Genesis1:1 Xoossay koyro salotanne sa7a medhis.
Genesis1:2 He wode sa7i giigonanne aybika bayna mela de7ees. Dhumi biitta ma77ida wolqaama haathata bolla de7ees. Xoossa Ayyaanay haathaafe bollara qaaxees.
Genesis1:3 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:4 Poo7oy lo77o gididaysa Xoossay be7is; poo7uwa dhumape shaakis.
Genesis1:5 Xoossay poo7uwa
Genesis1:6 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:7 Xoossay salo gufantho giigisidi
Genesis1:8 Xoossay he gufanthuwa
Genesis1:9 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:10 Xoossay he mela bessaa
Genesis1:11 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:12 Biittay mithi maata iya qommon qommon dolisis. Xoossay hessi lo77o gididaysa be7is.
Genesis1:13 Sa7i qammis wontis; hessi heedzantho gallas.
Genesis1:14 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:15 Biitta bolla poo7ana mela enti salo gufanthon hano” yaagis; hessadaka hanis.
Genesis1:16 Xoossay nam7u gita poo7ota medhis. Awi gallas
Genesis1:17 Xoossay enti ha sa7a bolla poo7ana mela salon wothis.
Genesis1:18 Hessi
Genesis1:19 Sa7i qammis wontis; hessi oyddantho gallas.
Genesis1:20 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:21 Yaatidi Xoossay abban de7iya gita do7ata
Genesis1:22 Xoossay enta
Genesis1:23 Sa7i qammis wontis; hessi ichashantho gallas.
Genesis1:24 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:25 Hessada oothidi enta ubbaa medhis. Xoossay hessi lo77o gididaysa be7is.
Genesis1:26 Hessafe simmin
Genesis1:27 Hessada Xoossay ase bana daanisidi medhis. I ase Xoosse daanisidi medhis; enta addenne maccas oothidi medhis.
Genesis1:28 Xoossay entana
Genesis1:29 Hessafe guye
Genesis1:30 Qassika ha sa7an de7iya mehenne do7a ubbaas
Genesis1:31 Xoossay ba medhida ubbabaaka xeelliya wode daro lo77o gididaysa be7is. Sa7i qammis; wontis; hessi usupuntho gallas.
Genesis2:1 Salotinne sa7i entan de7iyaba ubbabay haysada medhetidi poletis.
Genesis2:2 Xoossay ba oosuwa polidi
Genesis2:3 Xoossay laapuntha gallasan ba oothiya oosuwa ongidi shempida gisho he gallasaa anjis; gallasatape dummayis.
Genesis2:4 Salotinne sa7i hessada hani medhetis. Godaa Xoossay sa7anne salota medhida wode
Genesis2:5 sa7a bolla iri bukiboona gishonne oothiya asi bayna gisho mithinne maati dolibeenna; aaciyabayka baawa.
Genesis2:6 Gidoshin
Genesis2:7 Hessafe guye
Genesis2:8 Godaa Xoossay doloha baggara Edene gannate giigisis; yan ba medhida addiya wothis.
Genesis2:9 Godaa Xoossay xeellanaw lo77iya
Genesis2:10 Gannate ushshiya shaafa haathay Edenepe goggees. He shaafay Edenepe keydi oyddu shaafu keyidi shaaketees.
Genesis2:11 Koyro shaafa sunthay Fisoone. Fisooney worqey de7iya Hawila biitta bolla goggees.
Genesis2:12 He biitta worqey geeshsha worqa. Qassi al7o shittoynne shuchi yan de7ees.
Genesis2:13 Nam7antho shaafa sunthay Giyoone. Giyooney Tophe biitta yuushuwan goggees.
Genesis2:14 Heedzantho shaafa sunthay Xegroosa. Xegroosi Asoorepe doloha baggara goggees. Qassi oyddantho shaafay Efraxiisa.
Genesis2:15 Godaa Xoossay asi Edene Gannate oothana melanne naagana mela iya efidi yan wothis.
Genesis2:16 Godaa Xoossay ase
Genesis2:17 Shin lo77onne iita erisiya mitha ayfiyape moopa. Ayis giiko
Genesis2:18 Hessafe guye
Genesis2:19 Godaa Xoossay meheta
Genesis2:20 Hessadaka
Genesis2:21 Hessa gisho
Genesis2:22 Godaa Xoossay Addaamepe ekida meqetha macca oothidi medhis; yaatidi iyo iyako ehis.
Genesis2:23 Addaamey
Genesis2:24 Hessa gisho
Genesis2:25 Addaameynne Hewaanna nam7ayka xire kallo de7oosona; shin issoy issuwas yeellatokona.

Genesis3:2 Maccasiya shooshako
Genesis3:3 Shin Xoossay nuna
Genesis3:4 Shooshay maccasiw
Genesis3:5 Xoossay hessa giday
Genesis3:6 Maccasiya mitha ayfey maanaw mal7eysa
Genesis3:7 Enti mi simmidi
Genesis3:8 Sa7i omarsida wode gannate giddon Godaa Xoossay hemetishin iya girsa Addaameynne iya machiya si7idosona. Enti gannate mitha giddon Godaa Xoossafe qosetidosona.

Genesis3:19 Neeni ne medhetida biitta simmana gakanaw daaburan cawatada oothida ne kathi maana. Neeni biittafe medhetida gisho biitta simmana” yaagis.
Genesis3:20 Addaamey ba machiw de7oy de7iya asa ubbaas aayo gidiya gisho Hewaanno gidi sunthis.

Genesis3:22 Godaa Xoossay
Genesis3:23 Hessa gisho

Genesis4:1 Addaamey ba mache Hewaannira aqis. Iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. “Goday tana maaddin adde na7a demmas” gada Qaayela gada sunthasu.
Genesis4:2 Iya ishaa Aabela yelasu. Aabeli dorse heemmees qassi Qaayeli biitta oothees.
Genesis4:3 Undenna wodepe guye
Genesis4:4 Shin Aabeli ba dorsa wudiya giddon bayra yeletidaysa shukidi iya ashuwape modho bagga yarshis. Goday Aabelanne iya yarshuwa ekis.
Genesis4:5 Shin Qaayelanne iya yarshuwa ekibeenna. Hessa gisho
Genesis4:6 Goday Qaayelako
Genesis4:7 Neeni lo77o oothidaba gidiyako
Genesis4:8 Hessafe guye
Genesis4:9 Goday Qaayela
Genesis4:10 Goday Qaayela
Genesis4:11 Neeni baadetidaba gidiya gisho biitta zaarada oothanaw danda7aka. Ne ishaa wodhadasa iya suuthaaka biittan gussadasa.
Genesis4:12 Neeni oothinka biittay new ayfena; bete asada neeni sa7a bolla toylattada daaburana” yaagis.
Genesis4:13 Qaayeli Godaako
Genesis4:14 Neeni tana hachi biittafe yedethaasa; ne sinthafeka haassasa. Bete asada taani sa7a bolla daaburana; tana demmiya oonika wodhana” yaagis.
Genesis4:15 Goday iya
Genesis4:16 Qaayeli Godaa sinthafe keyidi
Genesis4:17 Qaayeli ba machera aqis; iya qanthatada Heenoke yelasu. He wode Qaayeli katama keexidi
Genesis4:18 Heenokey Gayda yelis. Gaydi Ma7eela yelis. Ma7eeli Matusa7eela yelis. Matusa7eeli Laameha yelis.
Genesis4:19 Laamehi Adonne Siilo geetetiya nam7u macho ekis.
Genesis4:20 Ada Yabaala yelasu. Yaabali mehe haariyanne dunkaanen de7iya asata aawa.
Genesis4:21 Iya ishaa sunthay Yubaala. Yubaali qassi diithi diixeysatanne suusul7e punniya asata ubbaa aawa.
Genesis4:22 Siila qassi Tubalqayna geetetiya na7aa yelasu. Tubalqayni naase biratapenne biratape dumma dumma miisheta qoxeysata aawa. Tubalqayna michiya Na7imo.
Genesis4:23 Issi gallas Laamehi ba macheta
Genesis4:24 Qaayela haluwa keyanaw laapun kushe koshshiko
Genesis4:25 Addaame machiya hara adde na7aa yelasu. Yaatada
Genesis4:26 Seeti adde na7a yelidi iya “Henoosa” gidi sunthis. Asay Godaa suntha xeegidi goyinno doomiday he wode.

Genesis5:2 I addenne maccas oothi medhidi enta anjis. Enta medhidi Ase (Addaame) gidi sunthis.
Genesis5:3 Addaamey 130 laythi de7idi
Genesis5:4 Addaamey Seeta yelidaape guye 800 laythi de7is. Hara adde naytanne macca nayta yelis.

Genesis6:1 Asay sa7a bolla darida wode entaw macca nayti yeletidosona.
Genesis6:2 “Xoossaa nayta” geetetiya medhetethati he macca nayti mala lo77o gideysa be7idi entafe bantaw dooridaysata machidosona.
Genesis6:3 Goday
Genesis6:4 He wodenne hessafe guye
Genesis6:5 Goday he wode sa7a bolla de7iya asa iitatethi daridaysanne enta wozanay ubba wode qopiyabay iita xalaala gididaysa
Genesis6:6 be7idi
Genesis6:7 Taani ase ayis medhadina gada qiirotas. Hessa gisho

Genesis6:9 Nohe taarkey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Nohey ba wode de7iya asa giddofe Xoossaa ufaysiyanne suure asi.
Genesis6:10 Nohey Seema
Genesis6:11 He wode biittay kumethi Xoossa sinthan tunis; biitta ubbay geellatethan kumis.

Genesis6:14 Hessa gisho
Genesis6:15 Markabiya haysada yaatada keexa; adussatethaa 300 wadha
Genesis6:16 Markabiyas kaara medha; kaarapenne godaape giddon issi wadha gidiya bessi dooya agga. Pengiya markabiyas miye baggara kessa; markabiya heedzu pooqe kessada keexa.
Genesis6:17 “Taani salope garsan shempora de7iya medhetetha ubbaa dhaysanaw dhayo haatha yeddada ha sa7aa bolla de7iyaba ubbaa dhaysana.

Genesis6:19 Enti neera de7on daana mela

Genesis9:15 taapenne hintefe giddon

Genesis12:1 Goday Abrameko
Genesis12:2 Ta nena wolqaama dere oothana
Genesis12:3 Taani nena anjeyisata anjana; nena baaddeyisata baaddana
Genesis12:4 Hessa gisho
Genesis12:5 Abramey ba machiw Soora
Genesis12:6 Abramey Seekeman de7iya More geetetiya gita mithaako gakanaw kanthidi bis. He wode Kanaane asati he biittan de7oosona.
Genesis12:7 Xoossay Abrames yan qoncidi
Genesis12:8 He bessaafe dendidi Beetelepe doloha baggara de7iya zumako bis. Yan Beetele wuloha baggan
Genesis12:9 Hessafe guye
Genesis12:10 He wode Kanaane biittan koshi keyis. Koshay minnida gisho guutha wode yan daanaw Abramey Gibxe biitta bis.
Genesis12:11 Gibxe gelanaw matiya wode Abramey ba mache Soorako
Genesis12:12 Gibxe asati nena be7idi
Genesis12:13 Hessa gisho
Genesis12:14 Abramey Gibxe biitta gakida mela Gibxe asati Soora mala lo77o maccasi gidoysa be7idosona.

Genesis13:1 Abramey ba machiw Sooranne baw de7iyaba ubba ekidi Gibxefe Negebe mela biitta bis. Looxeyka iyara wolla bis.
Genesis13:2 Abramey he wode mehen
Genesis13:3 Abramey Nagebepe dendidi bessafe besse aadhishe Beetele gakanaw bis. Beetelepenne Gayepe giddon I koyro dunkaaniya tokida bessaanne
Genesis13:4 Godaas kase yarsho yarshida bessa gakidi
Genesis13:5 Abramera wolla hemetiya Looxesika daro dorsati
Genesis13:6 He wode Abramesinne Looxes daro mehey de7iya gisho enti banta meheta heemmiya bessay xuummis.

Genesis13:16 Taani ne sheesha biitta baanada darsana. Oonika biitta baana taybanaw danda7onaysada ne sheeshayka taybetenna.
Genesis13:17 Taani ha biitta new immana gisho dendada biitta adussatethaninne dalgatethan simereta.”

Genesis17:1 Abrames laythi uddufun tammanne uddufuna gidiya wode
Genesis17:2 Ta giddoninne ne giddon de7iya caaquwa ta minthana; ne zeretha ta taybanaw danda7etonada oothana” yaagis.
Genesis17:3 Abramey ba som7uwara sa7an duge gufannin Xoossay iyako
Genesis17:4 “Heko ta new caaqiya caaqoy haysa; ne daro kawotethatas aawa gidana.
Genesis17:5 Ta nena daro kawotethatas aawa oothana gisho hizape ne sunthay Abrame gidi xeegetenna
Genesis17:6 Taani ne yeletetha darsana
Genesis17:7 Taani newunne neepe guyen ne sheeshas Xoosse gidana mela merina caaquwa ta giddoninne ne giddon
Genesis17:8 Neeni ha77i bete gidada de7iya Kanaane biitta ubba newunne neepe guyera yaa ne sheeshas merina laata gidana mela new immana; qassi taani enta Xoossa gidana” yaagis.
Genesis17:9 Qassika Xoossay Abrahaame
Genesis17:10 Ta gidduwaninne ne gidduwan

Genesis17:12 Hizape yaana yeletethan adde nayti ubbay yeletida hospuntho gallasan qaxareto. Ne son yeletidaysata gidin
Genesis17:13 Ne son yeletidaysata gidin woyko miishen shametidaysati qaxaretanaw bessees. Haysan hinte ashuwan de7iya ta caaqoy merina caaqo gidana.
Genesis17:14 Oonika qaxaretona de7iya adde asi ubbay ta caaquwa menthida gisho ba asaape duuxo” yaagis.
Genesis17:15 Xoossay Abrahaameko
Genesis17:16 Taani iyo anjana; taani iipe new adde na7a immana. Taani iyo anjana gisho iya kawotethatas aayo gidana; deriya kawoti iipe keyana” yaagis.

Genesis17:21 Shin ta caaquwa wonto laythi hanoode Saara new yeliya na7a Yisaaqara caaqana” yaagis.

Genesis19:1 Nam7u kiitanchoti omarsishin Soodome katamaa gakidosona. He wode Looxey he katamaa pengen uttis. Looxey enta be7idi mokanaw dendidi entako bis. Ba som7uwa sa7a gathidi entaw ziggis.

Genesis19:3 Shin I enta minthi woossida gisho bidi iya soo gelidosona. I entaw uythi uukidi aathin midosona.

Genesis19:35 He wode qamma banta aawa ushshu ushshidosona. Kaalo na7iya gelada iyara aqasu. Ha77ika iya iyara aqiya wodenne dendiya wode I eribeenna.

Genesis24:28 Na7iya woxa bada

Genesis24:30 Siidhe worqanne ba miche kushen de7iya sagaayota be7ida wode Irbiqa addey bana gidoysa odin si7ida wode
Genesis24:31 Iyako
Genesis24:32 Yaatin addey soo gelis. Laabi gimaleta caana billidi
Genesis24:33 Kathi iya sinthe aadhis. Shin
Genesis24:34 Hessa gisho
Genesis24:35 Goday ta godaa daro anjida gisho I duretis. Dorse
Genesis24:36 Ta godaa machiya Saara ba cimatetha laythan iyaw adde na7a yelasu. Yaatin I baw de7iyaba ubba iyaw immis.
Genesis24:37 Ta goday tana haysada caaqisis
Genesis24:38 Shin ta aawa asaako
Genesis24:39 Taani ta godaa
Genesis24:40 Ika
Genesis24:41 Neeni ta kochatako bin
Genesis24:42 “Taani hachi he pultuwako yaa wode yaagas; ‘Godaw
Genesis24:43 Heko

Genesis24:45 “Taani ta wozanan wooseysa zaarona de7ishin
Genesis24:46 “Yaagin iya ellesada ba hashiyape otuwa wothada
Genesis24:47 “Taani iyo

Genesis24:51 Irbiqo hanno be7a; ekada ba; Goday gidaysada ne godaa na7aas macho gido” yaagidosona.

Genesis25:8 Abrahaamey daro wode de7idi

Genesis27:1 Yisaaqi cimin iya ayfey xeelo ixida wode ba bayra na7a Eesawe xeegidi

Genesis27:4 Mal7o kathi ta doseysatho ootha kathada taw eha. Taani hayqanaape sinthe ma simmada nena anjana” yaagis.
Genesis27:5 Yisaaqi ba na7a Eesawes odiya wode Irbiqa si7awusu. Eesawey do7a shankatidi ehanaw bazzo bidaape guye
Genesis27:6 Irbiqa ba na7a Yayqooba
Genesis27:7 ‘Do7a shankata ehada taw mal7o kathi ta maanaw katha. Taani hayqanaape sinthe ma simmada Godaa sinthan nena anjana’ yaagishin taani si7as.
Genesis27:8 Ta na7aw
Genesis27:9 Wudiya giddo bada nam7u modho deesha marata taw ekada ya. Taani ne aawas mal7o kathi I doseysada oothada kathana.

Genesis28:5 Yaagidi Yisaaqi Yayqooba yeddis. Yayqoobi Masephexoome biitta Laabako bis. Laabi Yayqoobanne Eesawe aaye Irbiqa ishanne Araame addiya Batu7eela na7a.

Genesis28:15 Taani neera de7ayis. Neeni biya bessa ubban taani nena naagana. Taani nena ha biitta guye zaarada ehana. Taani new oothana gidaysa polana

Genesis31:28 Neeni hari attoshin

Genesis31:32 Shin ne soo eeqa misileta ekida asi oonaka neeni demmiko

Genesis31:35 Raheela ba aawa
Genesis31:36 Yayqoobi yilotidi Laabako
Genesis31:37 Ha7i neeni ta miishe ubba pilgada koyadasa. Ne soo eeqa misiletape ay demmadii? Enti nu nam7a giddon pirdana mela ne dabbota sinthaninne ta dabbota sinthan haysan wotha.
Genesis31:38 “Taani neera laatamu laythi kumethi de7as. Ne dorsatinne deeshati awucaybokona woyko ne wudiyape issuwaka qottada mabike.
Genesis31:39 Do7i mida gawuxaka ta new eha erike; taani taape ciggayis. Gallas woyko qamma kaysotetidaysata qanxisaasa.

Genesis32:5 Taw miizi

Genesis32:8 I
Genesis32:9 He wode Yayqoobi haysada yaagidi woossis
Genesis32:10 neeni ne aylliyas keehidabasinne ammanetetha ubbaas taani bessona asi. Taani Yordaanose shaafa pinniya wode taw issi xam7a xalaali de7ees; shin ha7i taani nam7u cuga godaa gidas.
Genesis32:11 Taani nena woossayis ta isha Eesawe kushepe tana ashsha. I yidi
Genesis32:12 Shin neeni tana
Genesis32:13 He gallas qamma I yan aqis. Baw de7iyaba ubbaafe ba isha Eesawes immanaba qoridi kessis.
Genesis32:14 I
Genesis32:15 
Genesis32:16 Hessata wuden wuden shaakidi ba aylletas immidi
Genesis32:17 Sinthan kaaletheysa
Genesis32:18 ne iyako
Genesis32:19 Qassi nam7anthuwa
Genesis32:20 ‘Ne aylliya Yayqoobi nuupe guyera yees’ goonna aggofite” yaagidi kiittis. I
Genesis32:21 Hessa gisho
Genesis32:22 He qamma Yayqoobi dendidi
Genesis32:23 I enta shaafa pinthi simmidi baw de7iyaba ubbaa pinthidi yeddis.
Genesis32:24 Shin Yayqoobi barka guye attis. He wode issi asi sa7i wontana gakanaw iyara baaxetishe aqis.
Genesis32:25 He uray iya xoonanaw danda7onaysa be7ida wode Yayqoobas bulxiya bochin
Genesis32:26 Yaatin uray iya
Genesis32:27 Uray
Genesis32:28 Uray
Genesis32:29 Yayqoobi uraa
Genesis32:30 Hessa gisho
Genesis32:31 I Phin7eelape dendiya wode iya bolla xalqey dolis. Iya bulxe kessay sakiya gisho dogees.
Genesis32:32 Yayqooba bulxey wodire ashuwa matan boshetida gisho
Genesis33:1 Yayqoobi dhoqu gidi xeelliya wode Eesawey ba oyddu xeetu asaara yeysa be7is. Hessa gisho
Genesis33:2 Aylletanne enta nayta sinthan
Genesis33:3 Shin I baw sinthe aadhidi ba ishaako matishe sa7a gaki gaki laapuntoho ziggis.
Genesis33:4 Shin Eesawey iyara gahetanaw woxi yidi iya qoodhiya qoomidi yeeris. Nam7ayka yeekidosona.
Genesis33:5 Eesawey dhoqu gidi xeellidi maccasatanne nayta be7idi
Genesis33:6 Aylleti banta naytara shiiqidi iyaw ziggidosona.
Genesis33:7 Kaallidi Liyaranne I naytara yidi ziggidosona. Wursethan Yoosefaranne Raheelira yidi ziggidosona.
Genesis33:8 Eesawey
Genesis33:9 Shin Eesawey
Genesis33:10 Yayqoobi
Genesis33:11 Taani new ehida ha imota eka. Xoossay taw keehi immida gisho kumis” yaagis. Yayqoobi woossidi aggonna ixida gisho
Genesis33:12 Eesawey
Genesis33:13 Shin Yayqoobi
Genesis33:14 Hessa gisho
Genesis33:15 Eesawey
Genesis33:16 Hessa gisho
Genesis33:17 Shin Yayqoobi Sukota bis. Yan baw keethe keexis
Genesis33:18 Yayqoobi Masephexoomepe simmidi Kanaane biittan de7iya Seekema katama saron gakis. I he katamas sintha baggara dunkaane tokidi uttis.
Genesis33:19 Ba dunkaaniya tokidi uttida gadiya Seekema aawa Hamoora naytape issi xeetu bira santimen shammis.
Genesis33:20 Yan yarsho bessi giigisidi
Genesis34:1 Liya Yayqoobas yelida na7iya Diina
Genesis34:2 He biitta haariya Hiwe addiya Hamoora na7a Seekemi iyo be7idi
Genesis34:3 Iya wozanay Yayqooba na7iw Diinas qadhetis. I iw mishetida gisho lo77o qaalara iyo odisis.
Genesis34:4 Seekemi ba aawa Hamoora
Genesis34:5 Yayqoobi ba na7iw
Genesis34:6 Hessafe guye
Genesis34:7 Yayqooba adde nayti bazzofe yidi hessa si7idosona. Enti Seekemi Yayqooba na7iw dafidi
Genesis34:8 Shin Hamoori entako
Genesis34:9 Nuura eketitenne geletite
Genesis34:10 Hinte nu giddon daanaw danda7eeta. Biittay daro dalga
Genesis34:11 He wode Seekemi Diina aawanne I ishata
Genesis34:12 Hinte mishira na7ees immanabaanne koyta hinte koyda mela tana oychite. Taani hinte tana oychidaba ubba immana. Shin taani machanaw na7iw taw immerketi” yaagis.
Genesis34:13 Banta michiw Diina Seekemi tunisida gisho
Genesis34:14 Entako
Genesis34:15 Hinte nuus issiba ero giiko nu hintew ero gaana. Hessika
Genesis34:16 nuuni nu macca nayta hintew immanaw Ero gaana. Hinte macca naytaka nuus ekana. Nuuni hinte giddon de7idi hintera issi ase gidana.
Genesis34:17 Shin hinte qaxaretanaw ero goonna ixiko
Genesis34:18 Yaatin ha enti gidabay Hamoorasinne iya na7a Seekemas lo77o daanis.
Genesis34:19 He panthay ba aawa keethan de7iya ubbaafe aadhidi bonchetida gisho koydaba oothanaw iyaw maati de7ees. Yayqooba na7iw daro dosida gisho
Genesis34:20 He wode Hamoorinne iya na7ay Seekemi banta katama dabaaba bidi
Genesis34:21 “Ha asati nuura siga de7oosona. Biittay daro dalga gidiya gisho enti ha biittan goyo zal7o. Enta macca naytaka nuuni ekana
Genesis34:22 Shin nuura enti issi asada de7anaw nuuni issiba ero gaanaw koshshees. Hessika
Genesis34:23 Nuuni hessada oothiko
Genesis34:24 Katamaa dabaaba shiiqida asati ubbay Hamoorasinne iya na7a Seekemas
Genesis34:25 Heedzantho gallas
Genesis34:26 Hamooranne iya na7a Seekema mashshan wodhidi
Genesis34:27 Yayqooba hara adde nayti ahata bolla gelidi banta michiw Diina tunisida katama ubbaa bonqidosona.
Genesis34:28 Enta dorsa wudiya
Genesis34:29 Enta keethan de7iya aquwa ubba
Genesis34:30 Yayqoobi Simoonanne Leewe
Genesis34:31 Shin enti
Genesis35:1 Hessafe guye Xoossay Yayqooba
Genesis35:2 Hessa gisho
Genesis35:3 Haysafe dendidi pude Beetele boos. Ta metuwa gallas taw si7ida
Genesis35:4 Enti bantaw de7iya allaga xoossata ubbaanne banta haythan aathida worqa ubba kessidi Yayqoobas immidosona. Yayqoobi hessata Seekeman de7iya wolaa garsan moogis.
Genesis35:5 Hessafe guye
Genesis35:6 Yayqoobinne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Kanaane biittan de7iya Beetele geetetiya Looza gakidosona.
Genesis35:7 Yan I yarsho bessi giigisis. I he bessa El-Beetele (Beetele Xoossa) gidi sunthis. I ba ishaape baqatidi biya wode Xoossay iyaw qonciday he bessaana.
Genesis35:8 Irbiqa dichiya Diboora yan hayqasu. Beetelepe garsara de7iya wolaa garsan iya moogetasu. Hessa gisho
Genesis35:9 Yayqoobi Masephexoomepe simmidaape guye
Genesis35:10 Xoossay
Genesis35:11 Qassi Xoossay Yayqooba
Genesis35:12 Taani Abrahaamesinne Yisaaqas immida biitta
Genesis35:13 Xoossay iyara odetida bessaafe pude keyis.
Genesis35:14 Yayqoobi Xoossay iyara odetida bessan qofisiya shucha mala essidi iya bolla woyniyanne zayte tigis.
Genesis35:15 Yayqoobi Xoossay iyara odetida bessa “Beetele” gidi sunthis.
Genesis35:16 Enti hessafe guye
Genesis35:17 Iqethay iyo waaysida wode iyo yelisiyara
Genesis35:18 Shin iya hayqos matada shempoy keyana hanishin
Genesis35:19 Hessafe guye
Genesis35:20 Yayqoobi I duufuwa bolla hawulte shucha essis. He hawultey hachu gakanawuka Raheeli duufuwa erisees.
Genesis35:21 Isra7eeley hessafe dendidi Edera gimbiyafe hefinthan ba dunkaaniya tokis.
Genesis35:22 Isra7eeley he biittan de7ishin
Genesis35:23 Liya nayti Yayqooba bayra na7a Robeela
Genesis35:24 Raheeli adde nayti Yoosefanne Biniyaame.
Genesis35:25 Raheeli aylle Baali adde nayti Daanenne Niftaaleme.
Genesis35:26 Liya aylle Zalafa adde nayti Gaadenne Aseera. Ha nayti Yayqoobas Masephexoomen yeletida adde nayta.
Genesis35:27 Yayqoobi Kebroona geetetiya Qiriyaat-Arba matan Mamiren de7iya ba aawa Yisaaqa soo bis. He bessay kase Abrahaameynne Yisaaqi de7ida bessaa.
Genesis35:28 Yisaaqi xeetanne hospun tammu laythi de7is.
Genesis35:29 I daro wodiya de7idi lo77o cimidi
Genesis36:1 Edoome geetetiya Eesawe yeletethay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa;

Genesis36:10 Eesawe adde nayta sunthay
Genesis36:11 Elfaaza nayti Temaana
Genesis36:12 Qassi Timnaa7a Eesawe na7a Elfaazas aylle. Iya Elfaazas Amaaleqa yelasu. Haysati Eesawe mache Adi na7aa nayta.

Genesis36:21 Disoona
Genesis36:22 Loxaana adde nayti Hooranne Hemaama; Loxaana michiya Timnaa7o.
Genesis36:23 Sobaala adde nayti Aliwa
Genesis36:24 Xiba7oona adde nayti Ayanne Ana; haysi Ani mela biittan ba aawa Xiba7oona hareta heemmishe bilbo haatha pultuwa demmidaysa.
Genesis36:25 Ana na7ay Disoona; na7iya qassi Oholbaamo.
Genesis36:26 Disoona adde nayti Hemdaana
Genesis36:27 Exera adde nayti Bilihaana
Genesis36:28 Disaana adde nayti Uxanne Arana.

Genesis36:30 Disoona

Genesis36:43 Magdelanne Irama. Haysati banta aysiya biittan
Genesis37:1 Yayqoobi iya aaway Yisaaqi de7ida Kanaane biittan de7is.
Genesis37:2 Yayqooba yeletetha taarikey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Yoosefi tammanne laapun laytha na7a gidida wode ba aawa machetape
Genesis37:3 Isra7eeley Yoosefa cimidi yelida gisho
Genesis37:4 Iya ishati enta aaway iya entafe aathidi doseysa be7ida wode iya ixidosona. Mal7o qaalaka iyako odetanaw danda7ibookona.
Genesis37:5 Issi wode Yoosefi amuho amuhidi
Genesis37:6 I entako
Genesis37:7 Nuuni gaden giste mirqishin ta mirqey dendidi luule eqis. Hinte mirqeti yuuyi aadhidi ta mirqiyas ziggidosona” yaagis.
Genesis37:8 Iya ishati
Genesis37:9 Qassika Yoosefi hara amuho amuhidi ba ishatas odis. “Heko
Genesis37:10 Ba ishatas odida amuhuwa ba aawas odida wode iya aaway
Genesis37:11 Iya ishati iya qanaatidosona
Genesis37:12 Issi gallas iya ishati Seekeman banta aawa meheta heemmanaw bidosona.
Genesis37:13 Isra7eeley Yoosefa
Genesis37:14 I iyako
Genesis37:15 Yan demba bessan enta koshshan yaa haa simeretishin

Genesis37:17 Uray
Genesis37:18 Shin I haahon de7ishin
Genesis37:19 Enti issoy issuwako
Genesis37:20 Haayite
Genesis37:21 Robeeli hessa si7ida wode
Genesis37:22 iya wodhanaape mela biittan de7iya ha ollan yeggite; iya bolla kushe wothofite” yaagis. Robeeli hessa giday
Genesis37:23 Yoosefi ba ishatako gakida wode I ma77ida alleeqetida ma7uwa iyape qaari ekidosona.
Genesis37:24 Iya efidi haathi bayna mela ollan yeggidosona.
Genesis37:25 Enti kathi mishin hassayoona Isma7eela asati Galadape Gibxe bishin

Genesis37:27 Haayite

Genesis37:30 I guye ba ishatako bidi

Genesis38:1 He wode Yihudi ba ishatape shaaketidi
Genesis38:2 Yan Yihudi Shuu7a geetetiya Kanaane ura na7iw machis.
Genesis38:3 Iya Yihudas qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. I he na7a Era gidi sunthis.
Genesis38:4 Qassika qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Iya he na7a Onaana gada sunthasu.
Genesis38:5 Zaaradaka hara adde na7a yelasu. Iya he na7aa Seela gada sunthasu. He na7ay yeletiya wode Yihudi Akziiba biittana.
Genesis38:6 Yihudi ba bayra na7a Eras Timaaro geetetiya macho immis.

Genesis38:8 Yihudi Onaanako

Genesis39:1 Isma7eela asati Yoosefa Gibxe biitta efidosona. Gibxe kawa moorinatape issuwas
Genesis39:2 Goday Yoosefara de7iya gisho
Genesis39:3 Goday iyara de7eysanne I oothiyaba ubbaa iyaw injeyidaysa Phoxfaari be7ida wode
Genesis39:4 Yoosefa dosis
Genesis39:5 He wodepe doomidi
Genesis39:6 I miya kathiw eriyaripe attishin
Genesis39:7 Guutha wodepe guye

Genesis39:11 Shin issi gallas I ba ooso oothanaw soo geliya wode
Genesis39:12 Iya Yoosefa afila oykada
Genesis39:13 Yoosefi ba afila I kushiyan yeggi aggidi
Genesis39:14 ba soo aylleta xeegada

Genesis40:1 Guutha wodepe guye
Genesis40:2 Kawoy he nam7u kaapota bolla daro yilotidi
Genesis40:3 Yoosefi qashetida
Genesis40:4 Naageyseta halaqay enta Yoosefas sheedhis
Genesis40:5 Gibxe kawa ushsha kaapoynne katha kaapoy
Genesis40:6 Yoosefi wonta entako geliya wode enti azzanidi uttidashin be7is.
Genesis40:7 I entana
Genesis40:8 Enti
Genesis40:9 Yaatin ushsha kaapoy ba amuhuwa Yoosefas odis; “Taani ta amuhon issi woyne ta sinthan be7as.
Genesis40:10 He woyniyas heedzu tasheti de7oosona. I hayxidi
Genesis40:11 Kawo wanci ta kushen de7ees. Taani woyne teera ekada iyan gum7ada
Genesis40:12 Yoosefi
Genesis40:13 Heedzu gallasata giddon Kawoy nena qashope billana. I nena kase shuumatethaako zaarana. Kase neeni ushsha kaapo gidada ootheysada neeni kawa wanca iya kushiyan wothana.
Genesis40:14 Shin new sa7i lo77ida wode tana dogopa; taw keeha. Tabaa kawas odada
Genesis40:15 Tana Ibraawe biittafe wolqan ehidosona. Hari attoshin
Genesis40:16 Kathaa kaapoy Yoosefi amuhuwa loythidi birshidaysa be7ida wode Yoosefako
Genesis40:17 bolla bagga gabatiyan Gibxe kawas dumma dumma katha qommofe uuketida uythay de7ees. Shin kafoti he ta huuphen de7iya gabatiyape moosona” yaagis.
Genesis40:18 Yoosefi
Genesis40:19 Heedzu gallasa giddon Kawoy nena qashope billana. Ne qoodhiya qanxisidi mithan kaqisana; ne ashuwaka kafoy maana” yaagis.
Genesis40:20 Heedzantho gallasan Gibxe Kawoy ba yeletida gallasan ba moorinnata ubbaas gibira giigisis. Ushsha kaapuwanne katha kaapuwa billi ehidi ba asa sinthan essis.
Genesis40:21 Ushsha kaapuwa iya shuumatethaako zaarin
Genesis40:22 Shin Kawoy kathaa kaapuwa kaqisis. Ubbayka Yoosefi enta amuhuwa birshidaysada hanis.
Genesis40:23 Shin ushsha kaapoy Yoosefa hassayonna dogi aggis.
Genesis41:1 Nam7u laythafe guye
Genesis41:2 Laapun ordenne modho miizati Nayle Shaafape keyidi
Genesis41:3 Entafe kaallidi
Genesis41:4 He gilqa miizati laapun ordenne modho miizata mittidosona. Hessafe guye
Genesis41:5 I zaari dhiskidi
Genesis41:6 Entafe kaallidi
Genesis41:7 He lee7ida mor7eti lo77onne muruuta mor7eta mittidosona. Hessafe guye
Genesis41:8 Sa7ay wontin dhiskofe I dendiya wode iya wozanay yarkis. Hessa gisho
Genesis41:9 Ushsha kaapoy he wode Gibxe kawako
Genesis41:10 Issi wode Kawoy ba aylleta hanqetidi
Genesis41:11 Yan de7ishe nu nam7ati amuho amuhida. He amuhotas dumma dumma birshethay de7ees.
Genesis41:12 He wode naageysata kaapuwa aylley
Genesis41:13 Yaanin
Genesis41:14 Yaatin
Genesis41:15 Kawoy Yoosefa
Genesis41:16 Yoosefi
Genesis41:17 Kawoy
Genesis41:18 laapun ordenne modho miizati Nayle Shaafape keyidi
Genesis41:19 Entafe kaallidi
Genesis41:20 He gilqanne laafida miizati koyro keyida laapun modho miizata mittidosona.
Genesis41:21 Shin enta mittidaape guye kaseysada gilqi uttida gisho
Genesis41:22 “Taani ta amuhuwan qassi laapun lo77onne muruuta mor7eti issi maqa bolla keydaysata be7as.
Genesis41:23 Entafe kaallidi
Genesis41:24 He lee7ida mor7eti laapun lo77o mor7eta midosona. Taani ha amuhuwa bitanchotas odas
Genesis41:25 Hessafe guye
Genesis41:26 He laapun lo77o miizati laapun laythata
Genesis41:27 He laapun gilqanne laafida miizati laapun laythata
Genesis41:28 “Taani kawas odidaysadaka
Genesis41:29 Laapun daro kalo laythati Gibxe biitta ubban yaana.
Genesis41:30 Shin hessafe guye
Genesis41:31 Koshay daro iita gidiya gisho he biitta kaaloy dogetidi attana.
Genesis41:32 Nam7u ogiyan kawas he amuhoy bentiday Xoossay ba qopidaba oothanaw qanxida gishosa. Hessa Xoossay mata woden oothana.
Genesis41:33 “Ha7i hiza
Genesis41:34 Laapun kalo laythan kaxiya kathaafe ichashu kushiyape issuwa shiishana asata shuuma.
Genesis41:35 Enti yaa kalo laythan kathaa shiishidi
Genesis41:36 Biittay koshan dhayona mela ha kathay Gibxe biittan laapun laythan dendana koshas minjetidi de7o” yaagis.
Genesis41:37 Yaatin he oday Gibxe kawasinne iya moorinnatas lo77o gididi bentis.
Genesis41:38 Hessa gisho
Genesis41:39 Hessafe guye Kawoy Yoosefa
Genesis41:40 Taani nena ta biittan shuumas. Ta asa ubbay new kiitetana. Taape hari neepe aadhiya oonika baawa.
Genesis41:41 Heko
Genesis41:42 Hessafe guye
Genesis41:43 Kawoy ba nam7antho para gaariya Yoosefa togisis. Boncho wotaadarey
Genesis41:44 Hessafe guye Kawoy Yoosefa
Genesis41:45 Kawoy Yoosefa
Genesis41:46 Yoosefi Gibxe kawas ooso oykiya wode
Genesis41:47 He laapun kalo laythan biittan daro kathi kaxis.
Genesis41:48 Yoosefi Gibxe biittan he laapun kalo laytha katha ubbaa shiishidi
Genesis41:49 Yoosefi abba shafiya mela daro katha shiishis. Katha darotethaafe dendoysan makanaw danda7etibona gisho
Genesis41:50 Kosha laythi yaanape sinthe
Genesis41:51 Yoosefi ba bayra na7aa sunthaa
Genesis41:52 Nam7antho na7aa sunthaaka
Genesis41:53 Gibxe biittan de7iya he laapun kalo laythati aadhidosona.
Genesis41:54 Yoosefi odidaysada laapun kosha laythati kaalli yidosona. Hara biitta ubban koshi keyis
Genesis41:55 Gibxe biittay ubbay koshatida wode
Genesis41:56 Koshay Gibxe biitta ubba gakida wode
Genesis41:57 Biitta ubban koshi suullida gisho
Genesis42:1 Yayqoobi Gibxen kathi de7eysa si7ida wode ba adde nayta
Genesis42:2 Gibxen kathi de7eysa taani si7as; yaa bidi
Genesis42:3 Yaatin
Genesis42:4 Shin Yayqoobi I qohetana gidi hirgida gisho Yoosefa isha Biniyaame iya ishatara yeddibeenna.
Genesis42:5 Kanaane biittan wolqaama koshi de7iya gisho
Genesis42:6 He wode Yoosefi he biitta aysiya gisho biittan de7iya asa ubbaas kathi bayzees. Hessa gisho
Genesis42:7 Yoosefi ba ishata be7ida melaka eri aggis. Shin I enta eronna asada hanidi; entako
Genesis42:8 Yoosefi ba ishata eris
Genesis42:9 Yoosefi entaba amuhida ba amuhuwa akeekidi entako
Genesis42:10 Enti
Genesis42:11 Nuuni ubbayka issi aawa nayta. Nuuni ne aylleti ammanetiya asi” yaagidosona.
Genesis42:12 Yoosefi entako
Genesis42:13 Shin enti
Genesis42:14 Yoosefi entako
Genesis42:15 Hinte paacetanaysi haysana; tuma Kawoy hayqo
Genesis42:16 Hinte odeysi tuma gideysa paacanaw
Genesis42:17 Entana heedzu gallas qasho keethan qachis.
Genesis42:18 Heedzantho gallasan Yoosefi entako
Genesis42:19 Hinte tumaka ammanetiya ase gidiko
Genesis42:20 Shin hinte wursetha ishaa taako ehiko
Genesis42:21 Enti issoy issuwako
Genesis42:22 Robeeli
Genesis42:23 Yoosefi entara turjumaanen odetiya gisho enti giyaba I ereysa enti akeekibokona;
Genesis42:24 I entafe haraso bidi yeekis. Shin zaari entako yidi
Genesis42:25 Yoosefi ba aylleta
Genesis42:26 Enti I gidaysada oothidaape guye
Genesis42:27 Enti qamma aqiya bessan entafe issoy ba hariyas kathaafe yegganaw ba ogoruwa billidi
Genesis42:28 I ba ishatako
Genesis42:29 Enti Kanaane biittan de7iya banta aawa Yayqoobako yidi
Genesis42:30 Enti iyako
Genesis42:31 Shin nuuni iyako
Genesis42:32 Nuuni tammanne nam7u ishanti issi aawa nayta. Issoy hayqis; wursetha kaaloy Kanaane biittan ha7i nu aawara de7ees’ yaagida.

Genesis43:9 Na7a ta waasetethan imma; iyabaa tana oycha. Taani iya new saro zaarada ehonna ixiko
Genesis43:10 Nu gam7onaba gidiyako
Genesis43:11 Enta aaway Isra7eeley

Genesis43:22 Ha7i nuuni katha shammanaw hara miishe oyki yida. Nu miishiya nu ogoruwan ooni yeggidaako eroko” yaagidosona.
Genesis43:23 I zaaridi
Genesis43:24 He uray he asata Yoosefa soo efidi
Genesis43:25 Enti Yoosefara kathi maanaysa si7ida gisho banta immanabata Yoosefas giigisidosona.

Genesis44:3 Sa7i wontin he asati banta hareta ekidi baanaw dendidosona.
Genesis44:4 Enti he katamaape keyidi haaki boonna de7ishin
Genesis44:5 Haysi ta goday uyeysanne xuuraba demmiya wanca gideysa ereketii? Ayis kaysotidetii? Haysi hinte oothidabay daro iitaba’ yaaga” yaagis.
Genesis44:6 Yaatin I enta geedo kaali gakidi
Genesis44:7 Shin enti
Genesis44:8 Nuuni hari attoshin

Genesis44:13 Hessan enti azzanidi

Genesis46:1 Isra7eeley baw de7iyaba ubbaa ekidi
Genesis46:2 Xoossay qamma Isra7eeles qoncidi
Genesis46:3 Xoossay iyako
Genesis46:4 Taani neera issife Gibxe baana; taani ne sheesha yaape kessada haa ehana. Ne hayqiya wode Yoosefi ne ayfiya oykana” yaagis.
Genesis46:5 Hessafe guye
Genesis46:6 Enti Kanaane biittan haarida haaruwanne mehe ubbaa eki bidosona. Yayqoobi ba soo asa ubbaa ekidi Gibxe bis.
Genesis46:7 I ba soo asa ubbaa; adde naytanne ba adde nayta nayta

Genesis46:10 Simoona adde nayti Yamu7eela
Genesis46:11 Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona
Genesis46:12 Yihuda adde nayti Era
Genesis46:13 Yisakoora adde nayti Tola
Genesis46:14 Zabloona adde nayti Sareda
Genesis46:15 Ha adde naytinne macca na7iya Diina
Genesis46:16 Gaade adde nayti Xafoona
Genesis46:17 Aseera adde nayti Yimina
Genesis46:18 Haysati Laabi ba na7e Liyas immida Zalafa Yayqoobas yelida nayta. Enti kumethi tammanne usupuna.
Genesis46:19 Yayqooba mache Raheeli adde nayti Yoosefanne Biniyaame.
Genesis46:20 Ona katama kahine Phoxfaara na7iya Asnaata Yoosefas Gibxen Minaasenne Efreema yelasu.
Genesis46:21 Biniyaame nayti Beella
Genesis46:22 Haysati Yayqoobas yeletida Raheeli adde nayta. Enti kumethi tammanne oydda.
Genesis46:23 Daane adde na7ay Hushima.
Genesis46:24 Niftaaleme adde nayti Yahixeela
Genesis46:25 Haysati laapunati Laabi ba na7e Raheelis immida Baali Yayqoobas yelida naytanne nayta nayta.

Genesis47:7 Hessafe guye
Genesis47:8 Kawoy Yayqooba
Genesis47:9 Yayqoobi kawako
Genesis47:10 Hessafe guye
Genesis47:11 Yoosefi kawoy kiitidaysada ba aawanne ba ishata Gibxe biittan Ramse katama matan de7iya ubbaafe aadhida arada biittan enta wothis.
Genesis47:12 Yoosefi ba aawas
Genesis47:13 Biitta ubban koshi suullida gisho biittan ubban kathi baawa; Gibxeynne Kanaane biittay qohetidosona.
Genesis47:14 Yoosefi Gibxe katha bayzidi
Genesis47:15 Gibxe miisheynne Kanaane miishey wurida wode Gibxe asa ubbay Yoosefako yidi “Nuus kathi imma. Nu miishey wurida gisho nuuni ne sinthan ayis koshan hayqanee?” yaagidosona.
Genesis47:16 Yoosefi entako
Genesis47:17 Hessa gisho
Genesis47:18 Enti kaalliya laythan iyako yidi “Nuuni nu godaape qosiyabay baawa; nu miishey ubbay wuris. Nu mehiyaka new immi diggida. Nu bollafenne nu gadiyape attishin
Genesis47:19 Nuuni ne be7ishin ayis koshan hayqanee? Nu gadeyka ayis dhayii? Nunaka nu gadiyaka shammada nuus kathi imma. Nuuni kawas aylletana
Genesis47:20 Yoosefi Gibxe biitta ubbaa kawas shammis. Koshi suullin
Genesis47:21 Yoosefi asa ubbaa Gibxes ha gaxape hini gaxa gakanaw kawas aylle oothis.
Genesis47:22 Shin kawoy kahinetas kathi immiya gisho Yoosefi enta gadiya shammibeenna. Hessa gisho

Genesis47:24 Shin kathaa shiishiya wode ayfidabape ichashu kushiyape issi kushiya kawas immite. Attida oyddu kushey hinte gadiyas zerethi
Genesis47:25 Enti
Genesis47:26 Hessa gisho

Genesis47:30 Shin taani hayqiya wode tana Gibxefe efada

Genesis49:8 “Yihuda

Genesis49:11 I ba hariya woyne bolla
Genesis49:12 Iya ayfey woyne ushshafe aadhidi dulkana; iya achay xaamatape aadhidi booxana.

Genesis49:14 “Yisakoori mino hare mela

Genesis49:33 Yayqoobi
Genesis50:1 Yoosefi ba aawa aha bolla kundidi
Genesis50:2 Hessafe guye
Genesis50:3 Shitto tishsha wogay oytamu gallas kumethi ekees. Gibxe asati iyaw laapun tammu gallas yeekidosona.
Genesis50:4 Yeeho gallasati aadhida wode
Genesis50:5 ‘Ta aaway tana issi caaqo caaqisis. Taani hayqanaw matas. Taani ta huuphen Kanaane biittan bookida gongolo duufuwan tana mooga’ yaagis. Hessa gisho
Genesis50:6 Yaatin Kawoy
Genesis50:7 Yaatin Yoosefi ba aawa mooganaw bis. Kawa moorinnati ubbay
Genesis50:8 Yoosefa soo asa ubbay
Genesis50:9 Para gaaretinne togati iyara bidosona. Iya kaallidi bida asay daro.
Genesis50:10 Enti Yordaanose Shaafa matan de7iya Axaade geetetiya wudumma gakidi
Genesis50:11 He biittan de7iya Kanaane asati Axaade wudumman he yeehuwa be7ida wode

Genesis50:15 Banta aaway hayqidaape guye

Exodus1:1 Banta soo asaa ubba ekidi
Exodus1:2 Entika Robeela
Exodus1:3 Yisakoora
Exodus1:4 Daane
Exodus1:5 Yayqooba sheeshati ubbay laapun tamma. Yoosefi kaseka Gibxen de7ees.
Exodus1:6 Wodepe guyen Yoosefi
Exodus1:7 Shin Isra7eele sheeshay yeletidi Gibxe biitta kumana gakanaw taybon daridosonanne minnidosona.
Exodus1:8 Hessafe guye
Exodus1:9 He kawoy ba asaa
Exodus1:10 Nuuni hiillatonna ixiko enti taybon kaseysafe haa darana. Qoponna oli dendiko enti nu morketara issifidi nuna olidi
Exodus1:11 Hessa gisho
Exodus1:12 Shin Gibxeti enta darsi un7ethinka enti haa daridi yeletidosonanne biitta gakidosona. Gibxeti Isra7eeleta ixida gisho yayyidosona.
Exodus1:13 Entana iita ooso oosisidosona.
Exodus1:14 Urqa yedhison
Exodus1:15 Gibxe kawoy qantha Ibraawe maccasata ulo pittiya Sipooronne Puuho geetetiya nam7u maccasatako haysada yaagis;
Exodus1:16 “Ibraawe maccasati yeliya wode yeletida na7ay adde gidiko wodhite
Exodus1:17 Shin ulo piteysati Xoosse babbidi
Exodus1:18 Hessafe guye
Exodus1:19 Ulo piteysati zaaridi
Exodus1:20 Hessa gisho
Exodus1:21 Qassi ulo piteysati Xoossas yayyida gisho Xoossay entaw enta soo asi immis.
Exodus1:22 Hessafe guye
Exodus2:1 He wode Leewe qommo gidida issi uray Leewe maccas issiw ekis.
Exodus2:2 He maccasiya adde na7a yelasu. Na7ay mala lo77o gideysa be7ada heedzu ageena qosasu.
Exodus2:3 Shin iya hessafe daro qosanaw danda7onnaysa erada
Exodus2:4 Iya michiya iya gakiyaba be7anaw haahon eqasu.
Exodus2:5 Gibxe kawa na7iya bolla meecetanaw Nayle Shaafa wodhasu. I macca aylleti haatha doonan yaa haa simeretoosona. Iya daacho mayca giddon demmada
Exodus2:6 Daacho dooyada he guutha na7aa be7asu. I yeekeysa be7ada qadhetada
Exodus2:7 He wode iya michiya kawa na7eko
Exodus2:8 Iya
Exodus2:9 Kawa na7iya maccasiw
Exodus2:10 Na7ay diccin
Exodus2:11 Musey diccidaape guye issi gallas ba asaa be7anaw bidi
Exodus2:12 I yaa haa xeellin
Exodus2:13 Wontetha gallas keyidi
Exodus2:14 He uray
Exodus2:15 Kawoy hessa si7ida wode
Exodus2:16 He wode Midiyaame kahine issuwas laapun macca nayti de7oosona. Enti banta aawa dorsata gongen haathe duuqi ushshanaw yidosona.
Exodus2:17 Henthanchoti yidi macca nayta goodidosona. Shin Musey enta maaddidi enta dorsata haathe ushshis.
Exodus2:18 Enti banta aawa Yetorako yida wode
Exodus2:19 Enti zaaridi
Exodus2:20 I ba macca nayta
Exodus2:21 Musey he addiyara yan de7anaw qofa qachis. Yotori ba na7iw Sipooro Muses macho oothidi immis.
Exodus2:22 Sipoora adde na7a yelin
Exodus2:23 Daro laythafe guye Gibxe kawoy hayqis. Shin Isra7eeleti banta aylletethan un7etidi waassidosona. Banta aylletethan enti waassida waasoy Xoossaako gakis.
Exodus2:24 Xoossay enta waasuwa si7idi
Exodus2:25 Xoossay Isra7eeleta aylletetha un7aa be7idi entana qopis.
Exodus3:1 Issi wode Musey Midiyaame biitta kahiniya
Exodus3:2 He bessan Godaa Kiitanchoy tushiyan eexiya tama lacuwa giddon iyaw bentis. Musey tushey taman oyketinka tamay tushiya moonnaysa be7idi
Exodus3:3 “Taani yaa bada
Exodus3:4 I be7anaw shiiqidaysa Goday be7idi
Exodus3:5 Xoossay iyako
Exodus3:6 Goday iyako
Exodus3:7 Goday qassika haysada yaagis; “Taani Gibxen de7iya ta asay ay mela waayako be7as. Enti bantana un7ethidi haareysatape ashshana mela taako waassiya waasuwa si7as. Enta waayaka erayis.
Exodus3:8 Hessa gisho
Exodus3:9 Ta deriya waasoy ha77i tana gakis. Gibxe asati enta qohida qohuwa taani be7as.
Exodus3:10 Hessa gisho
Exodus3:11 Shin Musey
Exodus3:12 Xoossay zaaridi
Exodus3:13 Musey Xoossaako
Exodus3:14 “Xoossay Museko
Exodus3:15 Xoossay zaaridi
Exodus3:16 “Bada Isra7eele cimata shiishada
Exodus3:17 Taani entana Gibxe waayiyape kessada maathinne eessi kumida
Exodus3:18 “Isra7eele cimati ne giyaba si7ana. Hessafe guye
Exodus3:19 Shin wolqan gidonna ixiko
Exodus3:20 Hessa gisho
Exodus3:21 “Qassi taani Gibxe asaa sinthan teemo hintew immana. Yaaniya gisho hinte keyiya wode mela kushe keyeketa.
Exodus3:22 Ibraawe maccas ubbay ba shooron de7iya Gibxe maccasaakonne ba son de7iya Gibxe maccasaako bidi
Exodus4:1 Musey
Exodus4:2 Goday Museko
Exodus4:3 Goday iyako
Exodus4:4 Hessafe guye
Exodus4:5 Goday
Exodus4:6 Kaallidi Goday Museko
Exodus4:7 Goday iyako
Exodus4:8 Goday
Exodus4:9 Shin enti ha nam7u malaatata ammanonna ixiko
Exodus4:10 Musey Godaako
Exodus4:11 Goday iyako
Exodus4:12 Ha77i neeni ba; neeni odetana mela ta nena maadana. Ne gaanaba ta new immana” yaagis.
Exodus4:13 Shin Musey
Exodus4:14 Hessafe guye
Exodus4:15 Neeni
Exodus4:16 I ne doona gididi asas ne gisho odana. Neeni Xoossa bessan gidada I gaanaba iyaw odana.
Exodus4:17 Ha xam7a eka bada iyara malaata oothada bessa” yaagis.
Exodus4:18 Hessafe guye
Exodus4:19 Musey Midiyaame biittan de7ishin Goday iyako
Exodus4:20 Musey ba machiwunne ba adde nayta hare togisidi guye Gibxe simmis. Musey Xoossaa xam7a ba kushen oykidi bis.
Exodus4:21 Goday Muse
Exodus4:22 He wode taani Goday giyaba kawas hayssada yaagada oda. ‘Isra7eeli ta bayra na7a.
Exodus4:23 I taw goyinnana mela iya yedda gada taani new odas. Shin neeni yeddonna ixadasa. Hessa gisho
Exodus4:24 Ogen shempo bessan Goday Musera gahetidi iya wodhanaw koyis.
Exodus4:25 Iya machiya Sipoora qara shuchu ekada
Exodus4:26 Hessa gisho
Exodus4:27 He wode Goday Aaronako
Exodus4:28 Musey Gibxe bidi gaanabaanne oothana malaatata ubba Goday iya kiitidaysa Aaronas odis.
Exodus4:29 Museranne Aaronara Gibxe bidi
Exodus4:30 Aaroni Goday Muses odida qaala ubbaa entaw odis. Qassi Musey malaatata he asaa sinthan oothis.
Exodus4:31 Entika ammanidosona. Goday entaw qopidaysanne enta waayiya be7idaysa si7ida wode gufannidi goyinnidosona.
Exodus5:1 Hessafe guye
Exodus5:2 Kawoy
Exodus5:3 Enti zaaridi
Exodus5:4 Shin Gibxe kawoy
Exodus5:5 Heko
Exodus5:6 Kawoy he gallas Gibxe kaapotanne Isra7eeleta oosiseyisata haysada yaagidi kiittis;
Exodus5:7 “Kaseysada xuube oothanaw asaas utulla immofite. Enti utulla bantaw koyidi shiisho.
Exodus5:8 Shin kaseysafe taybuwa guuthonna enti xuube medhidi shiishana mela kiittite; issinnoka pacisopite. Enti
Exodus5:9 Enti ooson gundana melanne wordo oda si7onnaw entaw wodey doonna mela ooso deexisite” yaagidi kiittis.
Exodus5:10 Gibxe kaapotinne Isra7eeleta oosiseysati keyidi
Exodus5:11 Hinte bidi awupeka koydi demmite. Shin hinte oothiya xuube taybuwape issoyka pacenna’ yaagis” yaagidosona.
Exodus5:12 Hessa gisho asay utulla koyanaw Gibxe biitta ubban laaletidosona.
Exodus5:13 Gibxe kaapoti entaw utulli imetin enti oothiya xuube taybuwa keena oothidi shiishana mela enta un7ethidosona.
Exodus5:14 Gibxe kaapoti bantafe garsara de7iya Isra7eele kaapota
Exodus5:15 Hessafe guye
Exodus5:16 Ne aylletas utulli imetenna
Exodus5:17 Shin kawoy
Exodus5:18 Ha77i guye bidi oothite. Hintew ayba utullika imetenna
Exodus5:19 Isra7eele kaapoti
Exodus5:20 Enti kawa matape keyidi
Exodus5:21 Enti Musekonne Aaronako
Exodus5:22 Musey Godaako simmidi
Exodus5:23 Taani ne sunthan kawas odanaw bida wodepe doomin I ha asaa bolla meto ha darsis. Qassi neka ne asaa ashshabaaka” yaagis.
Exodus6:1 Hessafe guye
Exodus6:2 Xoossay Muse
Exodus6:3 Taani Abrahaames
Exodus6:4 Qassi taani enti betetethan de7ida Kanaane biitta immana gada entara caaqas.
Exodus6:5 Qassika Gibxe asati aylleyiya Isra7eeleta waasuwa taani si7as; ta caaquwaka qopas.
Exodus6:6 “Hesaa gisho neeni Isra7eeletako
Exodus6:7 Taani hintena ta dere oothana; taani hinte Xoossaa gidana. Gibxe aylletethaafe taani hintena kessida wode
Exodus6:8 Taani Abrahaames
Exodus6:9 Musey hessa Isra7eeletas odis
Exodus6:10 Hessafe guye
Exodus6:11 “Bada Gibxe kawas
Exodus6:12 Shin Musey
Exodus6:13 Goday Musenne Aarona
Exodus6:14 Haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysati enta mayzata; Yayqooba bayra na7aa Robeela adde nayti
Exodus6:15 Simoona adde nayti
Exodus6:16 Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona
Exodus6:17 Gedisoona adde nayti Libinanne Same7a geetetoosona. Haysati banta soo asaas mayzata.
Exodus6:18 Qahaata adde nayti Amraama
Exodus6:19 Maraara adde nayti Mahilanne Muse. Banta yeletethaa maaran hayssafe qommon xaafetidaysati Leewe sheeshata.
Exodus6:20 Amraami ba aawa michiw Yokebeedo machis. Iya Aaronanne Muse iyaw yelasu. Amraami xeetanne hastamanne laapun laythi de7is.
Exodus6:21 Izarada nayti
Exodus6:22 Uzi7eela adde nayti
Exodus6:23 Aaroni Amnadaabe na7iw
Exodus6:24 Qore adde nayti
Exodus6:25 Aarona na7ay Alaazari Puti7eela naytape issinniw machis. Iya iyaw Pinihaasa yelasu. Haysati Leewe sheeshatanne enta mayzata.
Exodus6:26 Goday
Exodus6:27 Isra7eeleta Gibxefe kessi yeddana mela Gibxe kawas odiday enta.
Exodus6:28 Goday Gibxen Muses odida wode
Exodus6:29 “Taani Godaa; taani new odiyaba ubbaa Gibxe kawas oda” yaagis.
Exodus6:30 Shin Musey
Exodus7:1 Goday Museko
Exodus7:2 Taani nena kiitida kiita ubbaa Aaronas oda. I
Exodus7:3 Shin taani kawa wozanaa muumisana. Taani Gibxe biittan malaatatanne malaalsiyabata oothikoka
Exodus7:4 I hinte odiyaba si7enna. He wode taani Gibxeta pirdana; ta deriya Isra7eele Gibxefe kessana.
Exodus7:5 Hessi haniya wode taani godaa gididaysa Gibxeti erana” yaagis.
Exodus7:6 Museynne Aaroni Goday kiitidaysada oothidosona.
Exodus7:7 Enti kawas odiya wode
Exodus7:8 Goday Musenne Aarona
Exodus7:9 “Kawoy hintena
Exodus7:10 Museynne Aaroni kawako bidi Goday enta kiitidaysada oothidosona. Aaroni ba xam7aa kawa sinthaninne iya moorinnata sinthan yeggin xam7ay shooshu gidis.
Exodus7:11 Hessafe guye
Exodus7:12 Enti ubbay banta xam7aa sa7an yeggida wode xam7ati shooshi gididosona. Shin Aarona xam7ay enta xam7ata mittis
Exodus7:13 Gidoshin Goday gidaysa mela kawa wozanay muumis. I enti geysa si7onna ixis.
Exodus7:14 Goday Muse
Exodus7:15 Wonto wonta guura shooshi laametida xam7aa ekada
Exodus7:16 Iyako
Exodus7:17 Goday
Exodus7:18 Nayle Shaafan de7iya moloy hayqana; shaafayka xinqana. Gibxeti he shaafa haatha uyanaw danda7okona” yaagada oda.
Exodus7:19 Goday Museko
Exodus7:20 Museynne Aaroni Goday kiitidaysada oothidosona. Kawa sinthaninne iya moorinnata sinthan ba xam7aa denthidi
Exodus7:21 He Shaafa haathan de7iya moloti hayqidosona. Shaafa haathay iita xinqida gisho
Exodus7:22 Shin Gibxe bitanchoti banta bitan hessada oothidosona. Goday gidaysada kawa wozanay muumin
Exodus7:23 Kawoy he hanidaba aybinka taybonna yeggi aggidi ba gadho simmidi bis.
Exodus7:24 Gibxe asay Nayle Shaafa haatha uyanaw danda7iboona gisho
Exodus7:25 Goday haatha shoci simmin laapun gallas gidis.

Exodus8:5 Goday Museko

Exodus8:14 Gibxe asay hayqida shodheta shiishidi dooridosona; biitta ubbay xinqis.
Exodus8:15 Shin shodheti hayqidaysa kawoy be7ida wode iya wozanay zaari muumis. Goday gidaysa mela I Musenne Aarona si7onna ixis.
Exodus8:16 Hessafe guye
Exodus8:17 Enti kiitetidaysada oothidosona. Aaroni xam7ara biitta baana shocis. Gibxen de7iya baana ubbay boxe laametidi mehiyanne asaa ma7is.
Exodus8:18 Marotika banta bitan hessada oothanaw paacidosona

Exodus8:20 Goday Muse

Exodus9:1 Goday Museko
Exodus9:2 Neeni enta yeddonna ixiko
Exodus9:3 taani ne parata bolla
Exodus9:4 Shin taani Goday Isra7eele asaa mehiya giddoninne Gibxe asaa mehiya giddon dummatethi medhana. Isra7eele asaa mehiyape issoyka hayqenna.
Exodus9:5 Wonto taani hessa oothana gidi Goday wode qanxis’ yaaga” yaagis.
Exodus9:6 Wontetha gallas Goday gidaysada oothis. Gibxe asaa mehe ubbay hayqis
Exodus9:7 Kawoy hanidabaanne Isra7eeleta mehiyape hari attoshin issoyka hayqonaysa ase kiittidi
Exodus9:8 Hessafe guye
Exodus9:9 Hessi Gibxe biitta ubbaa bolla baana gididi laaletana. Gibxe biittan de7iya asaa bollanne mehey bolla kixa gado ehana” yaagis.
Exodus9:10 Enti coocepe guutha bido ekidi kawa sinthan eqidosona. Musey hessa bolla laallin
Exodus9:11 Gibxe asaa bolla wodhida kixay marota bollaka wodhida gisho Muse sinthan eqanaw danda7ibookona.
Exodus9:12 Shin Goday Muses gidaysa mela
Exodus9:13 Hessafe guye
Exodus9:14 Ha77i ne ixas giiko
Exodus9:15 Taani ta kushiya denthada nenanne ne asaa gadon shocidaba gidiyako ha77i gakanaw hinte biitta bolla de7eketashin.
Exodus9:16 Shin ta sunthay biitta ubban eretana mela taani ta wolqaa bessanaw nena de7on wothas.
Exodus9:17 Neeni ha77ika otortada ta asaa yeddonna ixadasa.
Exodus9:18 Taani wonto hannoode Gibxe biittay medhotosape hachi gakanaw buki eronna wolqaama shachi bukisana.
Exodus9:19 Ha77i neeni ne mehiyanne karen de7iyaba ubbaa elle soo gelsana mela kiitta. Soo gelonna asaa bollanne mehiya ubbaa bolla shachi bukidi
Exodus9:20 Kawa moorinatape issoti issoti Goday gidaysa si7idi yayyida gisho
Exodus9:21 Shin harati Goday gidaysa si7onna ixidi banta aylletanne banta mehiya karen aggaagidosona.
Exodus9:22 Hessafe guye
Exodus9:23 Musey ba xam7aa salo denthida wode
Exodus9:24 Goday gedera haara wolqaama wol7anthi yeddis. Hessa melabay Gibxe biittan asi doosape hani erenna.
Exodus9:25 He shachay Gibxen de7iya asaanne mehiya shocis. Gaden de7iyaba
Exodus9:26 Isra7eeleti de7iya Geesame biitta xalaalan shachi bukibeenna.
Exodus9:27 Kawoy Musenne Aarona xeegisidi
Exodus9:28 Deshoynne shachay nu bolla daridi un7ethida gisho nuus Godaa woossite. Taani hintena yeddana; hizape hinte haysan gam7eketa” yaagis.
Exodus9:29 Musey iyako
Exodus9:30 Shin nenne ne moorinnati ha77ika Godaa Xoossa yayyonnaysa taani erayis” yaagis.
Exodus9:31 Talbay ciishshe
Exodus9:32 Shin gisteynne murqay gakiboonna gisho shachan dhaybeenna.
Exodus9:33 Musey kawa matape keyidi
Exodus9:34 Shin kawoy he ubbay eqidaysa be7ida wode zaaridi nagara oothis. Iyaranne iya moorinnatara banta wozana gujidi minthidosona.
Exodus9:35 Goday Muse baggara odidaysa mela kawa wozanay muumin
Exodus10:1 Hessafe guye
Exodus10:2 Taani hessa oothiday ta malaatatan waatada Gibxeta seeridaako hinte hinte naytasinne hinte nayta naytas odana mela koyida gishosa. He wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana” yaagis.
Exodus10:3 Museynne Aaroni kawako bidi
Exodus10:4 Neeni enta yedo ixiko
Exodus10:5 Booley darotethaafe dendoysan biitta ubba kammana. Enti shacha gaduwape attida guuthabanne mitha haythi ubbaa maana.
Exodus10:6 Ne keethaa
Exodus10:7 Kawa moorinnati kawako
Exodus10:8 Kawoy Musenne Aarona guye xeegisidi
Exodus10:9 Musey
Exodus10:10 Kawoy
Exodus10:11 Hinte
Exodus10:12 Goday Museko
Exodus10:13 Musey ba xam7aa Gibxe biitta bolla denthida wode
Exodus10:14 Booley Gibxe biitta ubbaa gakidi ma7is. Hessa mela boole gadoy he biittan kaseka hanibeenna; sinthafeka hanenna.
Exodus10:15 Biitti dhumana gakanaw booley biitta ubbaa ma7is. He booley shachafe attidi gaden dicciyaba ubbaanne mitha ayfe ubbaa midosona. Gibxe biittan de7iya mitha haythinne cil7oba ubbaa midigis.
Exodus10:16 Kawoy Musenne Aarona ellesi xeegisidi
Exodus10:17 Hiza ta nagara taw issi toho atto giite. Ha dhaysiya gaduwa taape diggana mela Godaa hinte Xoossaa woossite” yaagis.
Exodus10:18 Musey kawa matape keyidi Godaa woossis.
Exodus10:19 Goday wuloha wolqaama carkuwa kiittidi booliya biittafe denthidi
Exodus10:20 Shin Goday kawa wozanaa muumisida gisho Isra7eeleta yeddonna ixis.
Exodus10:21 Goday Muse
Exodus10:22 Musey ba kushiya salo denthis. Gibxe biitta ubban heedzu gallas kumethi sakana dhumay dhumis.
Exodus10:23 He heedzu gallasatan Gibxeti issoy issuwa be7ibookona woyko oonika ba soope keybeenna. Shin Isra7eeleti de7iya Geesamen poo7oy de7ees.
Exodus10:24 Kawoy Muse xeegisidi
Exodus10:25 Shin Musey
Exodus10:26 Issoyka guye attona nu mehey nuura baanaw koshshees. Godaa
Exodus10:27 Shin Goday kawa wozanaa muumisida gisho

Exodus11:1 Goday Museko
Exodus11:2 Isra7eele asay
Exodus11:3 Goday Isra7eele asaas Gibxeta sinthan teemo immis. Gibxe kawa moorinnatinne asay Muse daro bonchetida asada xeellidosona.
Exodus11:4 Musey kawako
Exodus11:5 Gibxe biittan de7iya bayra adde na7i ubbay
Exodus11:6 Gibxe biitta ubban hessafe kaseka sinthafeka hanonna gita yeehoy yeekeettana.
Exodus11:7 Shin Isra7eele asaa bolla woyko enta mehiya bolla kanika boccenna.’ He wode taani Goday Gibxeta giddoninne Isra7eele giddon dummatethi medheysa neeni erana.
Exodus11:8 Ne moorinnati ubbay yidi ta sinthan gufannana. Ta asaa ekada ha biittafe keyana mela enti tana woossana. Hessafe guye
Exodus11:9 Goday muses kase
Exodus11:10 Museynne Aaroni malaalsiyaba ubbaa kawa sinthan oothidosona. Shin Goday kawa wozanaa muumisida gisho
Exodus12:1 Goday Gibxe biittan Musenne Aarona haysada yaagis;
Exodus12:2 “Ha ageenay hintew laythas koyro ageena gido.
Exodus12:3 Isra7eele asa ubbaas ha wogaa odite. Ha ageenay gelida tammantho gallasan
Exodus12:4 He keetha asaa tayboy he mehiya wursidi maanaw danda7onna ixiko
Exodus12:5 Hinte dooriya mehey dorse woyko deeshe gidanaw danda7ees
Exodus12:6 Ha ageenas tammanne oyddantho gallas gakanaw enta heemmite. He gallas omarsi laadiya wode Isra7eele asaa maabara ubbay enta shukanaw bessees.
Exodus12:7 Asay he suuthaafe ekidi enti miya keetha wula garsa
Exodus12:8 Ashuwa he gallas qamma taman caacidi cammiya boncoranne uythara miite.
Exodus12:9 Ashuwa qaye woyko kathidi moopite. Huuphiya
Exodus12:10 He ashuwape wontana gakanaw aykoka ashshofite. Wontana gakanaw attiko hessa xuuggite.
Exodus12:11 Oges giigiya ma7o ma7idi
Exodus12:12 “Taani he qamma Gibxera kanthada bayra yeletida ubbaa
Exodus12:13 He suuthay hinte de7iya keethaa erisiya malla gidana. Taani Gibxeta pirdiya wode he suuthaa be7ada hintena qohonna agga aadhana.
Exodus12:14 “Ha gallasay taani Goday hintew oothidaysa laythan laythan qofisiya Godaa bonchiya ba7aale gido” yaagis.
Exodus12:15 “Laapun gallas gakanaw irshoy gelonna uythi miite. Koyro gallas irsho hinte soope diggite. He laapun gallasatan irshoy de7iya uythi miya asi Isra7eele asaa giddofe duuxidi kureto.
Exodus12:16 Koyro gallasaninne laapuntha gallasan goyinnanaw shiiqite. He gallasatan aybi oosoka oothopite
Exodus12:17 “Taani Isra7eele deriya Gibxefe kessiday he gallas gidiya gisho ha uytha baaliya laythan laythan bonchite. Hessi hintew merina woga gido.
Exodus12:18 Koyro ageenan
Exodus12:19 Laapun gallas gakanaw irshoy hinte son bentofo. Irshoy gelidaba miya biitta aawu na7a gidin woyko asa gade asi gidin
Exodus12:20 Irshoy gelidaba aykoka moopite. Hinte de7iyason awunka irshoy geliboonna uythu miitepe attishin
Exodus12:21 Musey Isra7eele cimata ubbaa xeegisidi haysada yaagis; “Hinte issoy issoy soo bidi paasika ba7aale bonchanaw maraze woyko kole shukite.
Exodus12:22 Hisoophe mitha haythafe danki ekidi
Exodus12:23 Goday Gibxe bayrata wodhanaw he biittara kanthiya wode
Exodus12:24 “Hintenne hinte nayti ha kiita merinaw naagite.
Exodus12:25 Goday kase immana gidi qaala gelida biitta hinte geliya wode ha wogaa oothite.
Exodus12:26 Hinte nayti hintena
Exodus12:27 hinte entako
Exodus12:28 Isra7eeleti
Exodus12:29 Giddi bilahe Goday Gibxen bayra yeletida ubbaa
Exodus12:30 Kawoy
Exodus12:31 He qamma kawoy Musenne Aarona xeegisidi
Exodus12:32 Hinte gidaysa mela hinte dorsaanne mehiya wudiya ekidi biite. Qassi hinte Xoossay tana anjana mela woossite” yaagis.
Exodus12:33 Gibxe asay
Exodus12:34 Hessa gisho
Exodus12:35 Isra7eeleti Musey enta kiitidaysada Gibxeta
Exodus12:36 Goday
Exodus12:37 Isra7eeleti Ramse katamaape dendidi Sukota geetetiya bessi tohon bidosona. Asaa tayboy naytanne maccasaa gujonna usupun xeetu mukula.
Exodus12:38 Qassi entara hara daro walaka asay
Exodus12:39 Gibxefe enti dirgon keyida gisho kathi kathanaw wode dhayidosona. Enti keyishe eki keyida irshoy geliboonna munuqape ekidi uythi uukidosona.
Exodus12:40 Isra7eeleti Gibxe biittan de7ida laythay oyddu xeetanne hastama.
Exodus12:41 Oyddu xeetanne hastamu laythay wuriya he wursetha gallas Godaa asa ubbay Gibxe biittafe keyidosona.
Exodus12:42 Goday ba asaa naagidi
Exodus12:43 Goday Musenne Aarona
Exodus12:44 Hinte hinte miishen shammida aylley qaxaretidaape guye mo.
Exodus12:45 Shin hintera gam7iya imathinne une oothiya asi iyape moopo.
Exodus12:46 “He Paasika kathay kaxida keethan yan miite. He ashuwape aykoka kare kessofite. Meqethatape issuwaka menthofite.
Exodus12:47 Isra7eele maabara ubbay Paasika ba7aale bonchanaw koshshees.
Exodus12:48 “Asa gade asi gididi hinte giddon de7iya asi Godaa Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw koyko
Exodus12:49 Ha wogay biitta aawu naytasinne hara biitta asi gididi hinte giddon de7iya asaas issino” yaagis.
Exodus12:50 Isra7eele ubbay
Exodus12:51 He gallas Goday Isra7eeleta cugan cugan Gibxe biittafe kessis.
Exodus13:1 Goday Museko
Exodus13:2 “Bayra yeletida adde ubbaa taw dummaya. Isra7eele asaa giddon bayra yeletida ubbay
Exodus13:3 Hessafe guye
Exodus13:4 Abiiba ageenan
Exodus13:5 Goday Kanaaneta
Exodus13:6 Laapun gallas kumethi irshoy geliboonna uythi miite. Laapuntha gallasay Godaa bonchiya ba7aale gidana.
Exodus13:7 He laapun gallasatan irshoy geliboonna uythi miite. Irshoy woyko irshoy de7iyabay hinte giddoninne hinte zawan bentofo.
Exodus13:8 He gallas neeni
Exodus13:9 Ha ba7aaley hinte kushen woyko hinte som7on qashetida malla gididi hintena qofisiyaba gidana. Goday hintena ba gita wolqan Gibxefe kessida gisho
Exodus13:10 Hessa gisho

Exodus13:13 Bayra yeletiya hare mari ubbaa dorsa maran woza. Wozonna ixiko iya morgiya mentha. Ne adde nayta giddon bayra yeletida ubbaa woza.

Exodus14:5 Asay kessi ekidaysa Gibxe kawoy si7idi
Exodus14:6 Hessa gisho

Exodus14:8 Goday Gibxe biitta kawa wozana muumisida gisho yashshi bayna kessa bolla de7iya Isra7eele asaa yedethis.
Exodus14:9 Gibxe kawa parati

Exodus14:13 Shin Musey zaaridi

Exodus14:21 Musey Abba bolla ba kushiya miccis. Goday he qamma wolqaama doloha carko yeddidi mela biitti bentana gaso Abbaa shocis. Haathay shaaketis.
Exodus14:22 Haathay shaaketidi nam7u baggan godada eqin

Exodus14:28 Haathay guye simmidi

Exodus19:6 Hinte taw geeshsha dere gidana; hinte kawotethan kahine gididi tana haggaazana.’ Neeni Isra7eeletas odana qaalay haysa” yaagis.

Exodus19:12 Neeni ha zuma yuushuwan zawa wotha. Asay zuma bolla keyonna mela woyko zumaa xaphuwa bochonna mela entaw oda. Zumaa bochida oonika hayqana.
Exodus19:13 He uray shuchan cadetidi woyko dongen duketidi hayqo; iya kushen oonika bochofo. Mehey woyko asi hessada hayqo. Moyzey punetiya wode enti zumaa bolla keyanaw danda7oosona” yaagis.

Exodus23:1 “Wordo oda gasethofa; wordo markatada bala asi maaddofa.
Exodus23:2 Iitaba oothanaw daro asaa kaallofa. Pirda wobisanaw daro asaara issifada markatofa.
Exodus23:3 Manqoy pirdas shiiqiya wode iya manqotetha be7ada maaddofa.
Exodus23:4 “Ne morkiya booray woyko harey dhayin demmiko
Exodus23:5 Nena ixiya uraa harey caanara kundin be7ada
Exodus23:6 “Pirda dabaaban manqoy pirdas shiiqiya wode iya pirdaa wobbisopa.
Exodus23:7 Oonaka malten mootopa; xilluwa wodhopa. Hessa melaba oothidaysa taani pirdonna aggike.
Exodus23:8 Wodhaafe ekofa; wodhaafey suure xeelliya asa ayfe qooqisees
Exodus23:9 “Betanchuwa naaqofa. Hinte Gibxe biittan bete asi gididi de7ida gisho
Exodus23:10 “Neeni ne gadiya usupun laythi goyada ma.
Exodus23:11 Laapuntha laythan gadiya goyonna shaacha; iyan dolidi kaxiyaba shiishopa. Ne asaa giddon de7iya manqoti iyape mo; qassi entafe attidaysa do7ati mo. Ne woyne gadiyanne ne shamaho gadiya hessada ootha.
Exodus23:12 “Neeni usupun gallas ooso ootha. Ne booraynne ne harey shempana melanne ne son yeletida aylleynne bete asi shempana mela laapuntha gallasan ooso oothofa.
Exodus23:13 Taani hintew odidaba ubbaa minthidi oothite. Hara xoossata sunthaa xeegidi woossofite; enta sunthaa denthofite.
Exodus23:14 “Tana bonchanaw laythan heedzu ba7aale gallasati hintew de7o.
Exodus23:15 Hinte Gibxefe keyida Abiiba geetetiya ageenan
Exodus23:16 “Qassi hinte
Exodus23:17 Laythan laythan bonchetiya ha heedzu ba7aaletan adde ubbay tana
Exodus23:18 “Neeni taw mehe yarshiya wode irsho yeggidi uukida uythara taw yarshofa. Ba7aale bonchiya gallas yarshetida modhuwafe wontas aybika attofo.
Exodus23:19 Hinte gaden bayra kaxida katha ubbaafe lo77uwa Godaa
Exodus23:20 “Ne ogiyan nena naagana malanne taani new giigisida bessaa nena efana mela taani kiitancho ne sinthan kiittana.
Exodus23:21 I odiyaba si7ada iyaw kiiteta; iya bolla Makallofa. Ta iyaw maata immida gisho
Exodus23:22 Hinte iyaw kiitetikonne ta kiita ubbaa poliko
Exodus23:23 Ta kiitanchoy hinte sinthan bidi
Exodus23:24 Enta xoossatas ziggofite woyko goyinnofite
Exodus23:25 Godaa
Exodus23:26 Hinte biittan maccasay boshetenna; maynnena. Taani hinte laytha adussana.
Exodus23:27 “Taani ne morketa bolla ta yashsha yeddana. Hintera eqetiya kawotethata ubbaa daganthana. Hinte morketi ubbay hintew zoko zaaridi baqatana mela oothana.
Exodus23:28 Taani hinte morketa bolla kazhe yeddada Hiweta
Exodus23:29 Shin biittay mela attonaadanne bazzo do7i hintena waaysonaada issi laythan enta goodike.
Exodus23:30 Shin hinte taybon daridi
Exodus23:31 Taani hinte zawa Zo7o Abbaafe Filisxeeme Abbaa
Exodus23:32 Entara woyko enta xoossatara caaqo oothopite.
Exodus23:33 Enta hinte biittan wothofite. Hankoode enti hintena ta bolla nagara oosisana. Enta xoossata hinte goyinniko hintew xihe gidana” yaagis.
Exodus24:1 Goday Museko
Exodus24:2 Shin neeni nerka taako shiiqa; harati ta mati shiiqopo. Qassi asayka neera zuma bolla keyopo” yaagis.

Exodus24:4 Musey Goday odidaba ubbaa xaafis. Wontetha gallas guura dendidi
Exodus24:5 Isra7eele panthata I kiittin

Exodus24:8 Hessafe guye

Exodus24:17 Zumaa bolla qoncida Godaa bonchoy Isra7eeletas tama laco daanidi bentis.

Exodus25:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Exodus25:2 “Taw imota ehana mela Isra7eeletas oda. Iya wozani iya imma imma gidaba immiya imota asa ubbaafe taw eka.
Exodus25:3 Hinte entafe ekana imotay
Exodus25:4 kaalose qacina
Exodus25:5 haashetidi zo7o qalamen tiyetida dorsa ite
Exodus25:6 xompes maaddiya shamaho zayte
Exodus25:7 Kahine halaqay ma7iya efuude geetetiya ma7uwa bollanne iya tiran wosetiya margide geetetiya al7o shuchaanne hara alleeqo shuchata eho.
Exodus25:8 Taani enta giddon daana mela enti tana goyinniya bessi giigiso.”
Exodus25:9 Dunkaaniyanne iya giddon de7iya miisheta ubbaa ta nena bessiya maaran ootha.
Exodus25:10 “Soqala mithafe
Exodus25:11 Gaathaanne kariya walahi bayna worqan kamma; iya yuushuwaka worqan lanxa.
Exodus25:12 He Taabotiyas oyddu worqa sagaayota oothada; oyddu gedata bolla issi baggara nam7u sagaayota
Exodus25:13 Taabotiya tookiya kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessada worqan lanxa.
Exodus25:14 Taabotiya tookanaw iya miyen de7iya sagaayotan kaso mithata aatha.
Exodus25:15 Tookiya kaso mithati Taabotiya sagaayota giddon de7o; enti yaape keyopo.
Exodus25:16 Taabotiya giddon taani new immiya
Exodus25:17 “Walahi bayna worqafe adussatethay nam7u wadhanne takadho
Exodus25:18 Qefera de7iya nam7u kiruubeta worqafe qoxada ootha.
Exodus25:19 Issi kiruubiya issi bagga gaxan
Exodus25:20 Kiruubeti woliko simmi uttidi
Exodus25:21 Taani new immiya loche shucha bolla xaafetida tammu kiitata Taabotiya giddon wotha. Yaatada
Exodus25:22 Taabotiya guphiya bolla de7iya nam7u kiruubetape giddon gidada taani neera gahetana. Isra7eele asaas immiya kiita ubbaa taani yan new immana.”
Exodus25:23 “Soqala mithafe adussatethay nam7u wadha
Exodus25:24 Yaatada
Exodus25:25 Hessadaka
Exodus25:26 He xarpheezas oyddu worqa sagaayota oothada
Exodus25:27 Xarpheezaa tookanaw kaso mithata aathiya sagaayoti xarpheeza goossaa matan shiiqidi de7o.
Exodus25:28 He tookiya kasota soqala mithafe kessada
Exodus25:29 Hessadaka
Exodus25:30 Xarpheezay Taabotiyas sintha baggara utto. Ta sinthan uttiya geeshsha uythay ubba wode xarpheezaa bollafe dhayopo.”
Exodus25:31 “Xompe wothiya kocaa walahi bayna worqafe ootha. He kocay eqiya tohuwanne tooma worqafe qoxada ootha. Alleeqos oosetiya wallaxati
Exodus25:32 Nam7u baggara
Exodus25:33 Usupun tashetas xeeran xeeran heedzu heedzu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyabay de7o.
Exodus25:34 Xompiya wothiya kocaa giddon de7iya tooma xeeran oyddu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyabay de7o.
Exodus25:35 Tashetape garsan
Exodus25:36 Gambuthay

Exodus25:39 Xompe wothiya kocaynne iya miisheti ubbay hastamanne ichashu kilo giraame gidiya walahi bayna worqafe ooseto.
Exodus25:40 Taani nena zumaa bolla bessida leemisuwa kaallada
Exodus26:1 “Dunkaaniya gaatha baggaas al7o liinope oosetida
Exodus26:2 Gesheti ubbay issi like gido; adussatethay laatamanne oydda
Exodus26:3 Ichashu gesheta issife gathada sika; hanko attida ichashata hessada ootha.
Exodus26:4 Issife gahetidi siketida nam7u geshetas issuwa issuwa gaxan kaalose afilape oosetida sagaayota ootha.
Exodus26:5 Issife siketida koyro magarajuwa bolla koyro maaran kaalose afilape oosetida ishatamu sagaayota ootha; hessadaka nam7antho magarajuwa bolla wursetha gaxan ishatamu sagaayota ootha.
Exodus26:6 Geeshsha Dunkaaney issino gidana mela nam7un shaaketi siketida gesheta woli gathidi oysethanaw
Exodus26:7 “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollara kammana mela tammanne issi gesheta deesha ikisepe ootha.
Exodus26:8 Tammanne issi gesheti issi gina gido; issi issi magarajuwa adussatethay hastamu wadha
Exodus26:9 Ichashu gesheta issi baggara
Exodus26:10 Woli gathi sikida geshetape issi magarajuwas macara bolla ishatamu sagaayota ootha; qassi hanko magarajuwas macara bolla ishatamu sagaayota ootha.
Exodus26:11 Nam7un shaaketi siketida gesheti issi kama gidana mela ishatamu naase biratape oosetida oykiyabata ootha.
Exodus26:12 He dunkaaniya geshetape palahida baggaa ekada Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guye baggara kaqa.
Exodus26:13 Dunkaaniya geshetape adusatetha baggara palahida gompay issi issi wadha gidida gesheta Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas nam7u baggara kaqa.
Exodus26:14 “Dunkaaniyas bolla baggara daabulidi kammanaw zo7o qalamen tiyetida maraze itenne lo77o do7a ite ootha.
Exodus26:15 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta soqala mithafe ootha.
Exodus26:16 Issi issi tuuqiya adussatethay tammu wadha
Exodus26:17 Nam7u tuuqeti issife oyketana mela issi issi tuuqiyas oysethiyabay de7o. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta ubbaa hessada ootha.
Exodus26:18 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya wuloha baggara laatamu tuuqeta ootha.
Exodus26:19 Entana essanaw enta garsan bira biratape oosetida oytamu luhoy de7iya tohota ootha. Issi issi tuuqiyas nam7u nam7u toho kessa.
Exodus26:20 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pudeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta ootha.
Exodus26:21 Entana essanaw enta garsan bira biratape oosetida oytamu luhoy de7iya tohota ootha. Issi issi tuuqiyas nam7u nam7u toho kessa.
Exodus26:22 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guyera wuloha baggara usupun tuuqeta ootha.
Exodus26:23 Guye baggara de7iya maazanetas nam7u tuuqeta ootha.
Exodus26:24 He maazaniyan de7iya tuuqeti tohope huuphe gakanaw oyketo. Nam7u maazaneta medhiya nam7u tuuqeta hessatho oosetanaw bessees.
Exodus26:25 Hessadaka nam7u nam7u tohoy de7iya hospun tuuqeta oothada
Exodus26:26 “Tuuqeta sathidi oythiya soqala mithafe oosetida tammanne ichashu liyoota kessa. Entafe ichashata Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas issi bagga miyen de7iya tuuqetas
Exodus26:27 qassi ichashata hanko bagga miyen de7iya tuuqetas
Exodus26:28 Ha gaxa tuuqiyapenne ya gaxa tuuqiyape yaa liyooti giddo tuuqiyara oyketo.
Exodus26:29 Tuuqeta worqan lanxa; liyoota oykanaw maaddiya sagaayota worqafe ootha; qassi liyoota worqan lanxa.
Exodus26:30 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya zumaa bolla ta nena bessidaysada ootha.
Exodus26:31 “Al7o liinope issi magarajo oothada
Exodus26:32 Iya soqala mithafe oothada
Exodus26:33 He magarajuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas kaaran de7iya qaphetape garsan kaqa. Yaatada higgey xaafetida nam7u loche shuchata oykida Caaqo Taabotiya magarajuwas guye baggan wotha. He geshey
Exodus26:34 Nagara atotetha kaman Caaqo Taabotiya kamma.
Exodus26:35 Xarpheezaa
Exodus26:36 “Dunkaaniya penge magarajuwa
Exodus26:37 Magarajuwas ichashu tuussata soqala mithafe oothada worqan lanxa; kocatika worqafe oosetidaysata gido. Tuussatas naase biratape ichashu tohota giigisa.”
Exodus27:1 “Soqala mithafe yarsho bessi ootha. Adussatethaynne gompay oyddu wadhanne takadho
Exodus27:2 Oyddu maazaneta bolla kace daaniyaba kessa; kaceti yarsho bessaara issino gididi ooseto. Yaatada
Exodus27:3 Iyaw go7etiya miisheta; bido kessiya kereta
Exodus27:4 Yaatada
Exodus27:5 He zarzariya yarsho bessa goossaafe garsan yarsho bessaas bagga zawa gathada wotha.
Exodus27:6 Soqala mithafe yarsho bessa tookiya kaso mithata kessada
Exodus27:7 Yarsho bessaa tookiya wode maaddana mela he kaso mithata nam7u miyera de7iya sagaayotan aatha.
Exodus27:8 Taani nena zumaa bolla bessidaysada yarsho bessi xawulape oothada
Exodus27:9 “Geeshsha Dunkaaniya dabaaba gechanaw al7o liinope magarajo giigisa. Geshetas adussatethay dugeha baggara xeetu wadha gido.
Exodus27:10 Iyaw kate gidana mela naase biratape oosetida laatamu tuussatanne laatamu tohota ootha. Enta bolla bira biratape oosetida xam7atanne kaceta ootha.
Exodus27:11 Dabaabas pudeha baggaraka hessada ootha.
Exodus27:12 “Dabaabas wuloha bagga adussatethay ishatamu wadha gidida gesheti oosetidi
Exodus27:13 Geliya wulay de7iya
Exodus27:14 Dabaaba pengiyafe issi baggara adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha gidiya gesheti de7o; entaw heedzu tohoy de7iya heedzu tuussati de7o.
Exodus27:15 Hanko baggara de7iya geshetika hessada ooseto.
Exodus27:16 “Dabaaba geliya wulaas adussatethay laatamu wadha gidiya
Exodus27:17 Dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya tuussati ubbay bira biratape oosetida xam7atan oyketo; enta kaceti bira biratape
Exodus27:18 Dabaaba adussatethay xeetu wadha
Exodus27:19 “Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan go7etiya miishe ubbay
Exodus27:20 “Xompey qamma poo7ishe aqana mela gum7i xillisida shamaho zayte new ehana mela Isra7eele asaa kiita.
Exodus27:21 Aaroninne iya nayti
Exodus28:1 “Ne ishaa Aaronanne iya nayta Nadaaba
Exodus28:2 Iyaw bonchonne teema immana mela ne ishaa Aaronas boncho ma7ota giigisa.
Exodus28:3 Aaroni kahinetethan dummatidi taw haggaazanaada
Exodus28:4 Enti giigisana ma7otika haysata; tiran ma7etiya ma7o
Exodus28:5 Kushe hiillanchoti he ma7ota worqa cachafe
Exodus28:6 “Efuude geetetiya ma7uwa worqa cacha qacinape
Exodus28:7 Nam7u hashiyara wodhidi
Exodus28:8 Efuudey oosetidabaape hiillan oosetida dancoy efuudiyara wolla oosetidaba gididi issife oyketo.
Exodus28:9 Margide geetetiya nam7u shuchata ekada
Exodus28:10 Enta yeleta maarada issi shucha bolla usupun sunthata
Exodus28:11 Ha nam7u shuchata bolla tammanne nam7u Yayqooba nayta sunthaa woocadi xaafanaw hiillancho demma; he xaafetida shuchata efuudiya bolla oythanaw iya yuushuwa worqan lanxa.
Exodus28:12 Yaatada tammanne nam7u Isra7eele sheesha qofisiyaba gidana mela ha nam7u shuchata efuudiyara oythada hashiyara aadhiya qanguwa bolla wotha. Taani
Exodus28:13 He shuchata oykeysa worqafe ootha.
Exodus28:14 Qassi walahi bayna worqafe wodoroda dooqetida nam7u santhalaata hashiyara aadhiya qanguwara oyketana mela ootha.
Exodus28:15 “Godaa sheniya oychidi eranaw
Exodus28:16 Iyaw geesaynne gompay issi issi takadho gididi oyddu maazaney de7o.
Exodus28:17 Iyaw oyddu maaran al7o shuchata wotha. Koyro maaran sardiyoone
Exodus28:18 Nam7antho maaran baluure
Exodus28:19 Heedzantho maaran yaakinte
Exodus28:20 Oyddantho maaran birelle
Exodus28:21 Isra7eele naytas qofiso gidana mela ha tammanne nam7u al7o shuchata
Exodus28:22 “Tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas walahi bayna worqafe wodoroda dooqada santhalaata ootha.
Exodus28:23 Nam7u worqa migiddota oothada
Exodus28:24 He nam7u worqa santhalaatata migiddotara gathada oytha.
Exodus28:25 Hanko baggan de7iya nam7u santhalaata gaxa nam7u qangotara gasetha. Hessada oothada sintha baggara
Exodus28:26 Qassi nam7u worqa sagaayota oothada
Exodus28:27 Hessadaka
Exodus28:28 Tiran ma7etiya ma7uwan de7iya migiddota efuudiyan de7iya migiddotara gathada kaalose qacinan qacha. Hessada oothiko
Exodus28:29 “Aaroni Geeshsha bessa geliya wode Isra7eele mayzata sunthaa oykida
Exodus28:30 Qassi saama yeggiya nam7u geeshsha shuchata tiran ma7etiya ma7uwan yegga. Aaroni Geeshsha dunkaaniya geliya wode ba tiran enta tookidi gelo. Ta sheniya Isra7eele asaa erisanaw ta sinthe geliya wode ubban tira kiisiyape dhaysofo.
Exodus28:31 “Efuudiyape bollara ma7iya adussa ma7uwa kumethi kaalose afilape giigisa.
Exodus28:32 He adusse ma7uwas huuphe aathiya luho medha. He luhoy peedhetonna mela guye qalam7ada yuushsha aathada sika.
Exodus28:33 Adussa ma7uwas duge bagga macara yuushuwan kaalose
Exodus28:34 Worqa daalatinne oromaane teera misileti he adusse ma7uwas duge bagga macara yuushuwan aadho.
Exodus28:35 Aaroni kahinetethan oothiya wode ha adussa ma7uwa ma7o. Godaa sinthe
Exodus28:36 Walahi bayna worqafe issi alleeqo oothada
Exodus28:37 Yaatada huuphiya qaciya bolla kaalose qacinara qacha.
Exodus28:38 Aaroni iya ba som7uwan wotho. Hessan Isra7eele asay Godaas imota immishe balidabay de7iko
Exodus28:39 “Aarona shamziyanne qacciya al7o liinope dadda. Qassi dancuwaka al7o liinope daddada alleeqisa.
Exodus28:40 Aarona naytas bonchonne puula immana mela shamizeta
Exodus28:41 Neeni ha ma7ota ne ishaa Aaronanne iya nayta mayza. Enti kahinetethan taw haggaazana mela enta shamaho zayten tiyada taw dummaya.
Exodus28:42 Enta kalloy kametana mela garsan ma7iya ma7uwa xeessafe bidi wodire gakanaw kammiyaba al7o liinope sure giigisa.
Exodus28:43 Aaroninne iya nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya wode woyko Geeshsha Bessan kahinetethan haggaazanaw yarsho bessi shiiqiya wode ha ma7ota ma7o. Hessada haniko
Exodus29:1 “Aaroninne iya nayti kahinetethan taw haggaazana mela neeni enta dummayanaw haysada ootha; borey bayna wofaanonne nam7u maraze eka.
Exodus29:2 Geeshsha giste dhiille ekada
Exodus29:3 Wofaanuwanne nam7u marazeta yarshiya wode he uytha ubbaa gaytan wothada taw shiisha.
Exodus29:4 “Yaatada Aaronanne iya nayta Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge ehada haathan enti meecetana mela oda.
Exodus29:5 Hessafe guye
Exodus29:6 Qacciya qaccisa; iya bolla
Exodus29:7 Tishsha zaytiya ekada iya huuphiyan tigada tiya.
Exodus29:8 Iya nayta ehada shamziya mayza.
Exodus29:9 Enta xeessaa dancisa; enta huuphiyanka qoobe wotha. Aaronanne iya nayta yaatada kahinetethan shuuma. Hessika
Exodus29:10 “Wofaanuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthe ehada
Exodus29:11 Wofaanuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengiyan Godaa sinthan shuka.
Exodus29:12 Wofaanuwa suuthaafe guuthu ekada ne biradhiyan
Exodus29:13 Hessafe guye
Exodus29:14 Shin wofaanuwa ulo ashuwa
Exodus29:15 “Nam7u marazetape issuwa ekada
Exodus29:16 He maraziya shukada
Exodus29:17 Iya ashuwa qanxerethada
Exodus29:18 Hessafe guye
Exodus29:19 “Qassi kahinetetha wogas eketida hanko maraziya ekada Aaroninne iya nayti banta kushiya iya huuphen wothana mela oda.
Exodus29:20 Iya shukada
Exodus29:21 Yarsho bessan de7iya suuthaafenne tiyiya zaytiyape guuthu ekada
Exodus29:22 “He marazey kahineta shuuma wogaas eketiya gisho
Exodus29:23 Godaa sinthan wothida uythatape
Exodus29:24 Neeni ha katha ubbaa Aarona kushiyaninne iya nayta kushiyan wotha. Enti iya yuusho yarsho oothidi Godaas immiya yarsho oothidi Godaa sinthan shiisho.
Exodus29:25 Hessafe guye
Exodus29:26 Aaroni kahine gididi shuumetiya wode shukida maraziya angaasuwa ekada
Exodus29:27 “Kahiney shuumetiya wode
Exodus29:28 Isra7eeleti ubbay kahine shuumanaw woyko anjetanaw Godaas Angaasonne guye toho yarsho immiya wode ashoy taw dummatidaysa gido. Shin gishoy Aaronasinne iya naytas gako; he wogay laametofo.
Exodus29:29 “Aaroni hayqida wode iya nayti iya kahinetetha ma7uwa laatto. Enti kahinetethan shuumetidaape guye he ma7uwa ma7o.
Exodus29:30 Iya naytape iya bessan kahine gididi
Exodus29:31 “Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode shuketida maraziya ashuwa ekada
Exodus29:32 Aaroninne iya nayti maraziya ashuwa gaytan attida uythaara Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen mo.
Exodus29:33 Enti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode nagara atotethas yarshetida he ashuwa mona. Shin he kathay geeshshi gidida gisho
Exodus29:34 Ashuwapenne kathaafe mishin attidi aqiko
Exodus29:35 “Aaroninne iya nayti kahine gididi shuumetiya wode
Exodus29:36 Nagaraa atotethas issi issi gallasan issi wofaano shukada yarsha. Hessi yarsho bessa geeshshees. Yaatada yarsho bessa polo geeshshanaw shamaho zayte tiya.
Exodus29:37 Hessa laapun gallas gakanaw gallas gallas ootha. Yaatiko yarsho bessay polo geeshshi gidana. I polo geeshshi gidida gisho
Exodus29:38 “Laythan laythan yarsho bessan gallas gallas issi laythi gidida nam7u marazeta yarsha.
Exodus29:39 Marazetape issuwa wonta
Exodus29:40 Koyro maraziyara issi kilo giraame gidiya geeshsha lo77o giste dhiille
Exodus29:41 Hanko maraziya omarsi yarshashe wonta yarshoysa mela dhiille
Exodus29:42 “Laythan laythan he xuussa yarshoy Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen
Exodus29:43 Yan taani Isra7eeletara gahetana; ta bonchoy he bessa dummayana.
Exodus29:44 Taani Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne yarsho bessa dummayana; enti taw kahine gididi haggaazana mela Aaronanne iya nayta dummayana.
Exodus29:45 Yaatada
Exodus29:46 Enta giddon daanaw Gibxefe enta kessida Goday
Exodus30:1 “Ixaane cuyisiya bessaa soqala mithafe medha.
Exodus30:2 Iyaw oyddu maazaney de7o. Adussatethaynne gompay issi issi wadha
Exodus30:3 Iyaw bolla baggaa
Exodus30:4 Nam7u worqa sagaayota oothada
Exodus30:5 Kaso mithata soqala mithafe kessada
Exodus30:6 He ixaane yarsho xarpheezaa

Exodus30:10 Aaroni

Exodus30:12 “Neeni Isra7eele asaa taybiya wode
Exodus30:13 Taybon geliya asi oonika huuphen huuphen geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaane ginan bira ciggo. Issi issi asi hessa taw yarsho oothidi immo.
Exodus30:14 Taybon geliya asi oonika laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida ubbay Godaas hessa eho.

Exodus30:19 Aaroninne iya nayti banta kushiyanne banta tohuwa yan meeceto.
Exodus30:20 Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gelanaapenne yarsho yarshanaape sinthe hessa oothanaw bessees. Hessa enti oothiko hayqope attoosona.
Exodus30:21 Enti hayqonna mela
Exodus30:22 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;

Exodus30:24 usupun kilo giraame burgude eka. He ubbayka geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaaniya gina gido. Hessata bolla oyddu litiro zayte guja.
Exodus30:25 Hessata shittoda walakada
Exodus30:26 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne Caaqo Taabotiya tiya.

Exodus30:28 xuussa yarsho bessinne iyan bolla de7iya miisheta ubba
Exodus30:29 Enti polo geeshshi gidana mela enta dummaya. Enta bochiya oonika geeshshi gidana.
Exodus30:30 “Hessafe guye
Exodus30:31 Isra7eele asaas
Exodus30:32 He zaytiya coo asa bolla gussofa; qassi ay zayteka iya oothida ogiyan oothofa. Zaytey geeshshi gidida gisho
Exodus30:33 He shittuwa giigisiya asi

Exodus30:35 Shittoda walahetida ixaane oothada enta go7eta. Walahi baynanne geeshshi gidana mela iyan maxine yegga.
Exodus30:36 Iyape guuthara ekada liiqisa caddada
Exodus30:37 Hintew go7etanaw he ixaaniya ay ogenka giigisopite. Hessi taw dummatidaysa gideysa erite.

Exodus36:2 Musey Basili7eela
Exodus36:3 Enti
Exodus36:4 Yaatin
Exodus36:5 “Asay
Exodus36:6 Musey
Exodus36:7 Enti ehida imotay ooso ubbaa oothi polanaw gididi palahees.
Exodus36:8 Oosuwa ootheysatape hiillan aadheysati Geeshsha Dunkaaniya oothidosona. Enti iya al7o liinope
Exodus36:9 Magarajoti ubbay issi gina gididi
Exodus36:10 Ichashu gesheta issife gathidi sikidosona; qassi hanko attida ichashu geshetaka hessada oothidosona.
Exodus36:11 Issife gathidi sikida geshetape issi magarajuwas wursetha gaxan kaalose afilape oosetida sagaayota medhidosona. Qassi issife gathidi sikida hanko geshetape issuwa gaxanka hessada oothidosona.
Exodus36:12 Enti issife siketida koyro magarajuwa bolla koyro maaran kaalose afilape oosetida ishatamu sagaayota
Exodus36:13 Enti nam7u baggan de7iya gesheta gasethidi issino oothanaw worqafe ishatamu oykiya bessata medhidosona.
Exodus36:14 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollara kammanaw tammanne issi gesheta deesha ikisepe daddidosona.
Exodus36:15 Tammanne issi gesheta adussatethaa laatamanne usupun wadha
Exodus36:16 Ichashu gesheta issi baggara
Exodus36:17 Woli gathidi sikida geshetape wursetha magarajuwa macaran ishatamu sagaayota
Exodus36:18 Nam7u baggara de7iya gesheta gasethidi issi kama oothanaw naase biratape ishatamu oykiya bessata medhidosona.
Exodus36:19 Dunkaaniya kammanaw zo7o qalamen yeggi kessida dorsa ite
Exodus36:20 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta soqala mithafe kessidosona.
Exodus36:21 Issi issi tuuqiya adussatethay tammu wadha
Exodus36:22 Issi tuuqiya issuwara gasethanaw nam7u luhoti de7oosona. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tuuqeta ubbaa hessada oothidosona.
Exodus36:23 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas dugeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta medhidosona.
Exodus36:24 Issi issi tuuqetas nam7u toho medhidi
Exodus36:25 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas pudeha baggara laatamu tuuqeta medhidosona.
Exodus36:26 Issi issi tuuqetas nam7u toho medhidi
Exodus36:27 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas guye baggan
Exodus36:28 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya guye baggan de7iya maazanetas nam7u tuuqeta giigisidosona.
Exodus36:29 He nam7u maazane tuuqeti xaphope xeera gakanaw oyketi bidosona. Nam7u maazaniyan de7iya nam7u tuuqeti hessada hanidi oosetidosona.
Exodus36:30 Hessa gisho
Exodus36:31 Qassi enti soqala mithafe tammanne ichashu liyoota kessidosona. Ichashu liyooti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya issi bagga miyen
Exodus36:32 qassi ichashu liyoota hanko bagga miyen
Exodus36:33 Tuuqetas miye baggara giddon de7iya liyoy
Exodus36:34 Tuuqetanne liyoota worqan lanxidosona. Liyooti enta giddora kanthi aadhana mela worqa sagaayota tuuqetara oysethidosona.
Exodus36:35 Magarajuwa al7o liinope kaalosen

Exodus37:1 Basili7eeli Taabotiya soqala mithafe giigisis. Taabotiya adussatethay nam7u wadhanne bagga
Exodus37:2 Taabotiya giigisidi
Exodus37:3 Oyddu worqa sagaayota Taabotiyas oyddu gedata bolla

Exodus37:6 Walahi bayna worqafe
Exodus37:7 Qefey de7iya nam7u kiruubeta qoxetida worqafe oothidi
Exodus37:8 issi kiruubiya issi baggan
Exodus37:9 Kiruubeti banta qefiya miccidi
Exodus37:10 Adussatethay nam7u wadha

Exodus37:13 Taabotiya tookanaw maaddiya oyddu worqa sagaayota medhidi
