Exodus37:20 Xompe wothiya kocaa giddon de7iya tooma xeeran oyddu alleeqo gambuthatinne ciishshati de7iya lawuze mitha ciishshe daaniyaba medhis.
Exodus37:21 Waathan de7iya heedzu heedzu tashetape garsan issi issi gambuthi oosetis.
Exodus37:22 Gambuthati
Exodus37:23 Xompe wothiya kocaas laapun xompeta

Exodus37:25 Basili7eeli ixaane cuyisiya xarpheeza soqala mithafe giigisis. Iyaw oyddu maazaney de7ees. He xarpheezas adussatethaynne gompay issi wadha; qassi geesay nam7u wadha. Oyddu maazaniyan de7iya kaceti iyara issino gidi oyketidi oosetidosona.
Exodus37:26 Iyaw bolla bagga
Exodus37:27 Iyaw gaxa bolla tookanaw maaddiya nam7u worqa sagaayota medhidi

Exodus38:1 Soqala mithafe xuussa yarsho bessi oothis. He yarsho bessa adussatethaynne gompay
Exodus38:2 Oyddu maazanetara oyketidi oosetida kaceta medhis. Yaatidi
Exodus38:3 He yarsho bessan go7etiya miisheta
Exodus38:4 Naase biratape gite daaniya teqe yarsho bessaas giigisidi
Exodus38:5 Tookanaw maaddiya kasota aathanaw
Exodus38:6 Soqala mithafe yarsho bessa tookiya kaso mithata kessidi
Exodus38:7 Ha kasota nam7u miyen de7iya sagaayotan aathis. Yarsho bessaa xawulape giigisidi
Exodus38:8 Naase biratape meecha kerenne iya wothiya toho medhis. He naase biratay
Exodus38:9 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyas dabaaba baggaa gechanaw al7o liinope magarajo oothis. Dugeha bagga geshetas adussatethay xeetu wadha.
Exodus38:10 Geshetas kate gidana mela laatamu tuussatanne enti eqiya tohota naase biratape oothis. Enta xam7atanne kaceta bira biratape oothis.
Exodus38:11 Pudeha bagga dabaabayka hessada hanidi oosetis.
Exodus38:12 Wuloha bagga gesheta adussatethay ishatamu wadha. Entaw tammu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tammu tohoti de7oosona. Tuussatas bira biratape oosetida xam7atinne kaceti de7oosona.
Exodus38:13 Dabaaba geliya pengey de7iya
Exodus38:14 Issi baggara de7iya magarajuwa adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha. Iyaw heedzu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tohoti de7oosona.
Exodus38:15 Hanko baggara de7iya magarajuwa adussatethay tammanne ichashu wadha. Iyaw heedzu tuussatinne tuussati eqiya tohoti de7oosona.
Exodus38:16 Dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya gesheti ubbay al7o liinope oosetidosona.
Exodus38:17 Tuussati eqiya tohoti naase biratape oosetidosona. Xam7ati
Exodus38:18 Dabaaba pengiyan de7iya magarajuwa al7o liinope oothidi
Exodus38:19 Iya
Exodus38:20 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya dhishetinne iya yuushuwan de7iya gesheta dhisheti ubbay naase biratape oosetidosona.
Exodus38:21 Tammu kiitata oykida nam7u loche shuchati de7iya bessan
Exodus38:22 Yihuda sheeshape gidida Huura na7aa na7aa
Exodus38:23 Daane sheeshape gidida Ahisamaaka na7aa Eliyaabi
Exodus38:24 Geeshsha dunkaaniya oosuwas hanana mela Godaas imetida worqay geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen issi mukulu kilo giraame gidis.
Exodus38:25 Taybon de7iya asaape eketida biray geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen

Exodus39:3 Enti worqaa qoxidi
Exodus39:4 Enti nam7u hashiyara wodhidi
Exodus39:5 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Exodus39:6 Enti margide geetetiya shuchata giigisidi
Exodus39:7 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Exodus39:8 Enti
Exodus39:9 Iyaw oyddu maazaneti de7oosona; geesaynne gompay issi issi takadho gididi
Exodus39:10 Iya bolla oyddu maaran inqo geetetiya al7o shuchata wothidosona. Koyro maaran sardiyoone
Exodus39:11 nam7antho maaran baluure
Exodus39:12 heedzantho maaran yaakinte
Exodus39:13 oyddantho maaran birille
Exodus39:14 Tammanne nam7u shuchata bolla issi issi Isra7eele nayta sunthay woocetidi xaafetis.
Exodus39:15 Tiran ma7etiya ma7uwas walahi bayna worqafe wodoroda dooqada santhalaata ootha.

Exodus39:19 Qassi nam7u worqa sagaayota medhidi

Exodus39:21 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Exodus39:22 Efuudiyape bollara ma7etiya adussa ma7oy kumethi kaalose afilape giigisidosona.
Exodus39:23 He adussa ma7uwas huuphe aathiya luho medhidi
Exodus39:24 Adussa ma7uwas duge bagga macara yuushuwan kaalosen
Exodus39:25 Enti walahi bayna worqafe daalata medhidi
Exodus39:26 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Exodus39:27 Enti
Exodus39:28 huuphe qaceta
Exodus39:29 Qassi dancuwa kaalosen
Exodus39:30 Enti
Exodus39:31 Yaatidi
Exodus39:32 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya ooso ubbay kumethi poletis. Isra7eele asay
Exodus39:33 Hessafe guye
Exodus39:34 Bolla kamaas
Exodus39:35 Tammu kiitata oykida Taabotiya
Exodus39:36 xarpheezanne iya miisheta ubbaa
Exodus39:37 walahi bayna worqafe oosetida xompe wothiya kocaa
Exodus39:38 worqafe oosetida yarsho bessi
Exodus39:39 naase biratape oosetida yarsho bessi
Exodus39:40 dabaaba geliya penge magarajuwa

Exodus40:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Exodus40:2 “Koyro ageenan
Exodus40:3 Tammu kiitata oykida Caaqo Taabotiya iya giddon wothada
Exodus40:4 Xarpheezaa gaathi gelsada
Exodus40:5 Ixaane cuyisiya worqa xarpheezaa Caaqo Taabotiya sinthan wotha. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge magarajuwa kaqa.
Exodus40:6 Xuugetiya yarsho bessi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan wotha.
Exodus40:7 Meecha keriya Geeshsha Dunkaaniyapenne yarsho bessaafe giddon wothada
Exodus40:8 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape karera dabaaba yuushsha aatha giigisada
Exodus40:9 “Yaatada
Exodus40:10 Kaallada
Exodus40:11 Meecha keriyanne iya wothiya miisheta tiyada
Exodus40:12 “Aaronanne iya nayta Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge ehada haathan enta meecca.
Exodus40:13 Kahine ma7uwa Aarona mayzada
Exodus40:14 Iya adde naytaka ehada shamize mayza.
Exodus40:15 Enti taw kahinetethan oothana mela
Exodus40:16 Musey
Exodus40:17 Hessa gisho
Exodus40:18 Musey
Exodus40:19 Goday kiitidaysada
Exodus40:20 Yaatidi

Exodus40:25 Goday kiitidaysada
Exodus40:26 Musey
Exodus40:27 Goday kiitidaysada
Exodus40:28 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen magarajuwa kaqis.
Exodus40:29 Xuugetiya yarsho bessi
Exodus40:30 Meecha keriya Geeshsha Dunkaaniyapenne yarsho bessaafe giddon wothidi
Exodus40:31 Musey

Exodus40:33 Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne yarsho bessa yuushshi aathidi dabaaba giigisidi
Exodus40:34 Hessafe guye
Exodus40:35 Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya kammida gishonne Godaa bonchoy iyan kumida gisho
Exodus40:36 Isra7eeleti banta de7iya bessaa yeddidi
Exodus40:37 Shin shaaray dendonna ixiko
Exodus40:38 Godaa shaaray gallas gallas Geeshsha Dunkaaniya kammees
Leviticus1:1 Godaa Xoossay
Leviticus1:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; hintefe oonika Godaas yarsho yarshiya wode ba mehiyape
Leviticus1:3 He yarshoy mehepe xuussa yarshos gidiko borey bayna wofaano gido. Goday he yarshuwa ekana mela Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya pengen yarsho.
Leviticus1:4 Yarshuwa yarshiya uray xuussa yarshos ehida mehiya huuphen ba kushiya wotho. Hessi iya nagara atotethas Goday ekida yarsho gidana.
Leviticus1:5 I he wofaanuwa Godaa sinthan shuko; kahineti
Leviticus1:6 He mehiya galbaa qaaridi
Leviticus1:7 Kahiniya Aarona nayti yarsho bessan mithi wothidi tama eetho.
Leviticus1:8 Kahineti
Leviticus1:9 Shin he uray ulo ashuwanne gedata haathan meecco. Kahiney he ubbaa yarsho bessan xuuggo; hessi Godaas taman xuugetiya sawo tonku giya yarsho gidana.
Leviticus1:10 Xuugetiya yarshos I immiya imoy dorsaafe woyko deeshape gidiko
Leviticus1:11 He mehiya yarsho bessaafe pudeha baggara Godaa sinthan shuko. Kahineti
Leviticus1:12 He uray ashuwa qommon qommon kesso; kahiney he kessida ashuwa bolla huuphiyanne modhuwa gujidi
Leviticus1:13 Shin he uray ulo ashuwanne gedata haathan meecco; kahiney he ubbaa yarsho bessan xuuggo; hessi Godaas taman xuugetiya sawo tonku giya yarsho gidana.
Leviticus1:14 Godaas yarshetiya xuussa yarshoy kafo gidiko holle woyko kuraacho gido.
Leviticus1:15 Kahiney hessa ekidi qoodhiya kushera duutho; huuphiya yarsho bessa bolla de7iya taman xuuggo. Iya suuthay yarsho bessa miyera guko.
Leviticus1:16 Ulo ashuwanne qefiya kessidi
Leviticus1:17 I he kafuwa qefeta oykidi shaako
Leviticus2:1 Oonika katha yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode he yarshoy lo77o dhiille gido; iya bolla zaytenne ixaane gujo.
Leviticus2:2 Hessa kahine gidida Aarona naytako eho; kahineti he lo77o dhiilliyafe issi kuuca ekidi
Leviticus2:3 Katha yarshuwafe attidaysi Aaronasinne iya naytas gidana. Hessi Godaas taman xuugetida ubbaafe geeshsha yarsho gidana.
Leviticus2:4 Yarshetiya uythay coocen kompetida gidiko
Leviticus2:5 Yarshetiya uythay beshen uuketidaba gidiko
Leviticus2:6 Iya menthada iya bolla zayte tigada katha yarsho oothada yarsha.
Leviticus2:7 Ne yarshiya kathay oton kaxidaba gidiko zayten munuqetida lo77o dhiille gido.
Leviticus2:8 Hessada hanidi giigida kathaa yarshuwa Godaas ehada kahiniyas imma; kahiney hessa ekidi yarsho bessan yarsho.
Leviticus2:9 Kahiney he katha yarshuwa ekidi
Leviticus2:10 Katha yarshuwafe attidaysi Aaronasinne iya naytas gidana. Hessi Godaas taman xuugetida ubbaafe geeshsha yarsho gidana.
Leviticus2:11 Neeni irsho woyko eessi Godaas taman xuuggada yarshanaw bessonna gisho Godaas hinte ehiya katha yarshoy irshoy de7iyaba gidopo.
Leviticus2:12 Hayisata bayra yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshanaw danda7eeta
Leviticus2:13 Maxiney
Leviticus2:14 Neeni kathaafe bayra Godaas ehiya wode caacetidi shirketida tiya gidanaw bessees.
Leviticus2:15 Hessi katha yarsho gidiya gisho iya bolla zayte tiga; ixaane wotha.
Leviticus2:16 Kahiney he caacetidi shirketidanne zaytey tigetida katha yarshuwafe bagga ekidi ixaane ubbaara qofiso yarsho oothidi Godaas taman xuuggo.
Leviticus3:1 Issi asi issifetetha yarshos ba mehiyape borey bayna ussi woyko wofaano Godaa sinthe shiisho.
Leviticus3:2 Yarshanaw ehida mehiya huuphen ba kushiya wothidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen shuko. Kahineti
Leviticus3:3 Issifetetha yarshuwafe xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas shiisho; hessika ulo ashuwa kammida moodhiya
Leviticus3:4 nam7u kilahota
Leviticus3:5 Aarona nayti hessa xuussa yarshuwara issife yarsho bessa bolla de7iya mithaa bolla wothidi xuuggo. Hessi Godaas xuugetiya sawo tonku giya yarsho gidana.
Leviticus3:6 Issifetetha yarshos shiiqey macca woyko adde dorse gidiko borey baynaba gido.
Leviticus3:7 Issi asi dorsa urge yarshiyaba gidiko hessa Godaa sinthan shiisho.
Leviticus3:8 He dorsa urgiya huuphen ba kushiya wothidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen shuko. Aarona nayti suuthaa ekidi yarsho bessa oyddu maazaniya bolla wurxo.
Leviticus3:9 Issifetetha yarshuwafe Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho; hessika modhuwa
Leviticus3:10 nam7u kilahota
Leviticus3:11 Kahiney hessa Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan xuuggo.
Leviticus3:12 I yarshey deeshe gidiko I hessa Godaa sinthe shiisho.
Leviticus3:13 Iya huuphen ba kushiya wothidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan shuko. Aarona nayti suuthaa ekidi yarsho bessa yuushuwa wurxo.
Leviticus3:14 I he yarshuwafe ekidi Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho; hessika ulo ashuwa kammida moodhiya ubbaa
Leviticus3:15 nam7u kilahota
Leviticus3:16 Kahiney hessa Godaas sawo tonku giya yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan xuuggo. Modho ubbay Godaaba.
Leviticus3:17 Hinte modhonne suuthi moopite. Hessi hinttesnne yaana yeletethay de7iya bessa awunka naagiya woga gido.
Leviticus4:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus4:2 Neeni Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; oonika qoponna nagara oothiko woyko Godaa kiitatape issuwa menthiko
Leviticus4:3 Dooretida kahiney nagara oothidi asaa gomen gathiko
Leviticus4:4 He wofaanuwa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge ehidi
Leviticus4:5 Dooretida kahiney wofaanuwa suuthaafe guuthara ekidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gelsidi
Leviticus4:6 ba biradhiya suuthan yeddi ekidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya magarajuwa sinthan Godaa sinthan laapun toho wurxo.
Leviticus4:7 Kahiney guutha suuthi ekidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan Godaa sinthan sawiya ixaane cuyisiya bessan de7iya kaceta tiyo. Attida suuthaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya penge baggara de7iya xuussa yarsho bessa garsan gusso.
Leviticus4:8 Nagara yarshos shuketida wofaanuwa modhuwa ubbaa
Leviticus4:9 nam7u kilahota
Leviticus4:10 Issifetetha yarshos shuketida wofaanuwa modhuwa kessidaysada iyape modhuwa kesso. Kahiney xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan xuuggo.
Leviticus4:11 Shin wofaanuwa galbaa
Leviticus4:12 ashuwape attidaysa ubbaa gutaape kare kessidi bido yeggiya woga mela geeshsha bessi efidi yan taman xuuggo.
Leviticus4:13 Isra7eele maabara ubbay qoponna nagara oothikonne Godaa kiitatape issuwa menthiko hessi entafe qosetikoka entaw bala gididi taybetana.
Leviticus4:14 Enti oothida nagaraa akeekiya wode nagara yarshos haniya wofaano Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthe eho.
Leviticus4:15 Maabara cimati banta kushiya wofaanuwa huuphen wothidi Godaa sinthan shuko.
Leviticus4:16 Dooretida kahiney wofaanuwa suuthaafe guuthara ekidi Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gido gelo.
Leviticus4:17 I ba biradhiya suuthan yeddi ekidi magarajuwa sintha baggara Godaa sinthan laapun toho wurxo.
Leviticus4:18 Qassi guutha suuthi ekidi
Leviticus4:19 Modho ubbaa ekidi yarsho bessan xuuggo.
Leviticus4:20 Ha wofaanuwaka nagara yarshos shuketida wofaanuwa mela oothada shiisha. Hessada oothidi
Leviticus4:21 Kahiney wofaanuwa gutaape kare kessidi
Leviticus4:22 Asaa kaalethiya shuumatape issoy qoponna nagara oothikonne Godaa Xoossaa kiitaape issuwa menthiko he uray bala.
Leviticus4:23 I ba oothida nagaraa akeekidaape guye
Leviticus4:24 He koliya huuphen ba kushiya wothidi xuussa yarshoy yarshetiya bessan Godaa sinthan shuko; hessi nagara yarsho.
Leviticus4:25 Kahiney ba biradhiya suuthan yeddi ekidi
Leviticus4:26 Issifetetha yarshos shiiqida modhuwa ubbaa xuuggidaysada ha koliya modhuwa xuuggo. Hessada oothidi
Leviticus4:27 Maabaraape issi asi qoponna nagara oothikonne Godaa kiitaape issuwa menthiko he uray bala gidees.
Leviticus4:28 I ba oothida nagaraa akeekidaape guye borey bayna macca deeshi ba nagaraa gisho eho.
Leviticus4:29 Ba kushiya he deeshe huuphen wotho; yaatidi xuussa yarsho bessan nagara yarsho oothidi shuko.
Leviticus4:30 Hessafe guye
Leviticus4:31 Issifetetha yarshos shuketida mehiyape modhuwa kessidaysa mela he deeshe modhuwa qaari kessidi
Leviticus4:32 He uray ba nagaraa gisho yarshey dorse gidiko
Leviticus4:33 I ba kushiya he dorse huuphen wotho; yaatidi
Leviticus4:34 Hessafe guye
Leviticus4:35 Issifetetha yarshos shuketida mehiyape modhuwa kessidaysada he dorse modhuwa qori kessidi
Leviticus5:1 Issi asi ba be7idaba woyko ba eriyaba markatana mela oyshetidi markatonna ixiko he uray nagara oothida gisho seereto.
Leviticus5:2 Issi asi eronna de7ishe tunabaa
Leviticus5:3 Issi asi eronna de7ishe asa asatethafe goggidi tunisiyaba bochiko
Leviticus5:4 Issi asi iitaba gidin lo77oba oothanaw eeson caaqikonne ba caaqidaysa dogidi
Leviticus5:5 Issi asi ha odetida balatape issuwa oothidaba gidiko ba oothida nagaraa paaxo.
Leviticus5:6 I ba oothida nagaraa gisho Godaas ba mehiya giddofe macca dorse woyko macca deeshe nagaraa yarsho oothidi shiisho. Kahiney ekidi he uraa nagaraa qushethas yarshana.
Leviticus5:7 Issi asi ba oothida nagaraa gisho yarshanaw dorse woyko deeshe shammanaw iyaw gatey gakonna ixiko nam7u kuraachota woyko nam7u holleta
Leviticus5:8 I enta kahiniyas immo; kahiney nam7u holletape issuwa qoodhiya mirqidi duuthonnashin
Leviticus5:9 Yaatidi suuthaafe guuthara ekidi
Leviticus5:10 Hanko holliya qassi higgey kiiteysada xuussa yarsho oothidi xuuggo. Kahiney haysada oothidi
Leviticus5:11 Shin issi asi nam7u holle woyko nam7u kuraacho ehanaw gatey gakonna ixiko
Leviticus5:12 I hessa ehidi kahiniyas immo; kahiney he dhiilliyafe issi kuuca ekidi
Leviticus5:13 Issi asi ha nagaratape issuwa oothiko haysada oothidi iya nagara qushisees; he uraa nagaray atto geetetana. He yarshuwafe attidaysi katha yarshuwada kahiniyas gido.
Leviticus5:14 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus5:15 Oonika Godaa naaqikonne geeshsha miisheta tunisidi qoponna nagara oothiko ba naaquwas ba mehiya giddofe borey bayna issi maraze Godaas eho. Iya gatey geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaane ginan cigeto; hessi naaqo yarsho.
Leviticus5:16 I geeshsha miisheta bolla nagara oothida gisho koyro cigganaw bessiya gatiya bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujidi kahiniyas immo. Kahiney hessa maraziyara gathi yarshidi uraa naaquwa qushisees; iya nagaray atto geetetees.
Leviticus5:17 Issi asi qoponnashin
Leviticus5:18 I ba mehiyape borey baynanne gate kunthiya issi maraze naaqo yarshos kahiniyako eho. Kahiney he maraziya yarshidi uraa naaquwa qushisees; iya naaqoy atto geetetees.
Leviticus5:19 I tumape Godaa naaqida gisho hessi naaqo yarsho.
Leviticus6:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus6:2 Issi asi hara asi hadara wothidaba woyko tal7idaba lahiko woyko bonqiko woyko cimmiko
Leviticus6:3 woyko dhayidabaa demmidi ta be7abike gidi wordon caaqikonne asi oothiya haysa melabaape issuwa oothiko
Leviticus6:4 hessan nagarancho gididi bentiko
Leviticus6:5 woyko wordon caaqidi ekida kumetha shaluwa godaas zaaro. Qassi ba naaqo yarshuwa yarshiya gallas ba ekidaba bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujidi shaluwa godaas immo.
Leviticus6:6 Qassi ba naaquwa gisho Godaas yarsho yarshiya wode ba mehiya giddofe borey bayna issi maraze kahiniyako eho. He dorsay naaqo yarshos gate kuntheysa gido.
Leviticus6:7 Kahiney he dorsaa yarshidi he uraa naaquwa qushisees; he uraa naaqoy atto geetetana.
Leviticus6:8 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus6:9 Aaronanne iya adde nayta haysada yaagada kiitta; xuussa yarshuwas de7iya wogay haysa; xuussa yarshoy sa7i wontana gakanaw yarsho bessan de7o. Tamay yarsho bessan qamma kumethi eexishe aqo.
Leviticus6:10 Kahiney liinope dadetida qamise ma7idi
Leviticus6:11 Yaatidi ma7uwa qaari wothidi hara ma7o ma7idi he biduwa gutaape gaxa efidi wogaada geeshsha bessan qolo.
Leviticus6:12 Yarsho bessaa bolla de7iya tamay to7onna ubba wode eexishe de7o. Kahiney wonta wonta mithi iya bolla gujo. Xoossa yarshuwa mitha bolla maaran wothidi
Leviticus6:13 Tamay yarsho bessa bolla ubba wode eexishe de7o; to7anaw koshshenna.
Leviticus6:14 Katha yarshos imetida wogay haysa; kahine gidida Aarona nayti yarsho bessaafe sintha baggara Godaa sinthan yarsho.
Leviticus6:15 Kahiney issi kuuca lo77o dhiillenne zayte ekidi katha yarshuwa bolla de7iya ixaaniyara yarsho bessan Godaas sawo tonku giya qofiso yarsho oothidi xuuggo.
Leviticus6:16 Iyape attidaysa Aaroninne iya adde nayti uythi uukidi Dunkaaniya dabaaban de7iya geeshsha bessan mo.
Leviticus6:17 He uythay irshoy bayna uuketo. Taman xuussa yarshuwafe hessa taani entaw gisho oothada immas. Nagara yarshuwa melanne naaqo yarshuwa mela I ubbaafe geeshshi.
Leviticus6:18 Godaas taman xuussa yarshuwafe enta gakiya gisho gidiya gisho yaa yeletethan Aarona koche gidida addeti ubbay hessa mo. He yarshuwa
Leviticus6:19 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus6:20 Aaroninne iya adde nayti kahinetethan tiyetiya wode issi kilo giraame gidiya lo77o dhiille katha yarsho oothidi Godaas eho. Iyape baggaa wonta
Leviticus6:21 He dhiilley zaytera walaketidi loythi munuqetidi bashen uuketo; iya menthada yarsho bessan sawo tonku giya katha yarsho oothada Godaas yarsha.
Leviticus6:22 Qassi Aarona adde naytape iya kahinetetha laattanaw tiyetiya oonika he wogaa giigisees. Hessi Godaas ubba wode yarshetiya yarsho gidiya gisho kumethi xuugeto.
Leviticus6:23 Kahiney katha yarshuwa guye ashshona xuugganaw koshshees; I meetetanaw bessenna.
Leviticus6:24 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus6:25 Aaronasinne iya adde naytas haysada yaaga; “Nagara yarsho wogay haysa; nagaras shuketiya yarshoy xuussa yarshoy shuketiya bessan Godaa sinthan shuketto. He yarshoy ubbaafe geeshsha yarsho.
Leviticus6:26 He yarshuwa yarshiya kahiney Dunkaaniya dabaaban de7iya geeshsha bessan mo.
Leviticus6:27 He ashuwa bochiya oonika geeshshi gido; qassi shukishin suuthi ma7uwa bochiko he ma7oy geeshsha bessan meeceto.
Leviticus6:28 Ashoy kaxida otoy meqo; birata disten kaxidaba gidiko he miishiya qaacidi haathan meeccanaw koshshees.
Leviticus6:29 Kahine kochaafe adde gidida oonika he ashuwa mo; he yarshoy ubbaafe geeshshi.
Leviticus6:30 Shin Geeshsha bessan nagara atotethas suuthaa ekidi Dunkaaniya giddo gelidaba gidiko he mehiya ashoy meetetanaw koshshenna; I taman xuugetanaw bessees.”
Leviticus7:1 Ubbaafe geeshshi gidiya gisho naaqo yarsho wogay haysa;
Leviticus7:2 Xuussa yarsho mehey shuketiya bessan naaqo yarsho mehey shuketto; iya suuthay yarsho bessa oyddu baggan wurxeto.
Leviticus7:3 Iya modhuwa ubbaa
Leviticus7:4 nam7u kilahota
Leviticus7:5 Kahiney haysata taman xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarsho; hessi naaqo yarsho.
Leviticus7:6 Kahine yara gidida adde ubbay he yarsho ashuwa mo. He yarshoy ubbaafe geeshshi gidiya gisho geeshsha bessan meeteto.
Leviticus7:7 Naaqo yarshuwanne nagara yarshuwa wogay issinno. He mehiya ashoy nagara atotethas yarshida kahiniyas imetees.
Leviticus7:8 Oonika xuussa yarsho mehe ehin ekidi yarshiya kahiney he mehiya galba baw eko.
Leviticus7:9 Coocen kompetida woyko oton kaxida woyko bashen uuketida ubbay he yarshuwa yarshida kahiniyas imetees.
Leviticus7:10 Qassi zaytera munuqetida woyko munuqetonna katha yarsho ubbay Aarona adde nayta ubbaas issi gina shaaketidi imetees.
Leviticus7:11 Issi asi issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode iyaw de7iya wogay haysa;
Leviticus7:12 I yarshey galata yarsho gidiko he yarshuwara issife zaytera munuqida uythu
Leviticus7:13 He issifetetha yarshuwara issife irshora uuketida uythaa imota oothidi yarsho.
Leviticus7:14 He issi issi uythaafe issuwa denthidi Godaas yarsho oothidi eho. Hessi issifetetha yarshuwa suuthaa wurxida kahiniyas imeto.
Leviticus7:15 He mehiya ashoy he gallas meeteto; wontas aybika attofo.
Leviticus7:16 Shin iya yarshoy gaso yarsho woyko dosa yarsho gidiko he ashoy he yarshetida gallas meeteto; iyape attey de7iko wontetha gallas meeteto.
Leviticus7:17 He ashuwape palahidi heedzantho gallas gakanaw gam7iko hessi taman xuugeto.
Leviticus7:18 Issi asi shiishida issifetetha yarsho ashoy heedzantho gallasan meetetiko iya yarshoy eketenna; yarshoy yarshetidada taybetenna. He yarshoy tuna; iyape mida oonika ba nagaran oyshetees.
Leviticus7:19 Tunabaa bochida ashoy meetetofo; I taman xuugetanaw koshshees. Hara ashuwa wogan tuna gidonna asi oonika maana giiko mo.
Leviticus7:20 Shin issi asi tuna gidi uttidi
Leviticus7:21 Issi asi tunaba bochiko
Leviticus7:22 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus7:23 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; korma woyko maraze woyko kole modho ashuwa moopite.
Leviticus7:24 Hayqida mehe woyko do7i wodhida mehiya modhuwa harabas go7etitepe attishin
Leviticus7:25 Godaas taman xuussa yarshos shiiqiya mehiya modho ashuwa miya oonika ba asaa giddofe kuretto.
Leviticus7:26 Hinte de7iya bessan awun gidikoka
Leviticus7:27 Suuthi miya oonika ba asaa giddofe kuretto.
Leviticus7:28 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus7:29 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; Godaas issifetetha yarsho shiishiya oonika he issifetetha yarshuwafe shaakidi ba imota oothidi Godaas dummayidi yarsho.
Leviticus7:30 Hessa I Godaas taman xuussa yarsho oothidi
Leviticus7:31 Kahiney yarsho bessan modhuwa xuuggo; shin angaasoy Aaronasinne iya adde naytas imeto.
Leviticus7:32 Hinte issifetetha yarshuwafe ushacha gedaa imota oothidi kahiniyas immite.
Leviticus7:33 He ushacha geday issifetetha yarshuwa suuthaanne modhuwa yarshiya kahiniya gakiya gisho gido.
Leviticus7:34 Taani Isra7eele asaa issifetetha yarshuwafe yuusho angaasuwan shiiqida gedaa Isra7eele asaape ekada
Leviticus7:35 Aaroninne iya adde nayti kahine gididi shuumetida gallas Godaas shiiqida xuussa yarshuwafe
Leviticus7:36 Goday enta kahinetethas tiyida gallas
Leviticus7:37 Hiza xuussa yarshuwa
Leviticus7:38 Isra7eele asay Siina mela biittan banta yarshuwa Godaas yarshana mela Goday kiitida gallas
Leviticus8:1 Goday Muses haysada yaagidi odis;
Leviticus8:2 Aaronanne iya adde nayta
Leviticus8:3 Qassi Isra7eele asa ubbaa xeegada Dunkaaniya penge shiisha.
Leviticus8:4 Musey Goday kiitidaysada oothis; asa ubbay dunkaaniya penge shiiqis.
Leviticus8:5 Musey asaako
Leviticus8:6 Musey Aaronanne iya adde nayta ehidi haathan meeccis.
Leviticus8:7 Aarona ma7uwa mayzidi
Leviticus8:8 Efuudiya bolla tira kiise sikidi iyan Uriimenne Tumiime wothis.
Leviticus8:9 Aarona huuphen xaatha qace wothis. Goday Muse kiitidaysada xaatha qaciya sintha baggara Geeshsha worqa guche misiliya wothis.
Leviticus8:10 Hessafe guye Musey tiyo zaytiya ekidi
Leviticus8:11 He zaytiyape ekidi yarsho bessa bolla laapun toho wurxis; iya miisheta
Leviticus8:12 He tiyo zaytiyape guuthara ekidi Aarona huuphen tigidi iya dummayis.
Leviticus8:13 Goday Muse kiittidaysada Musey Aarona adde nayta sinthe aathidi ma7o mayzidi danco dancisis. Enta huuphen xaatha qace wothis.
Leviticus8:14 Musey nagara yarshos yarshetiya kormaa ehis; Aaroninne iya adde nayti he kormaa huuphen banta kushiya wothidosona.
Leviticus8:15 Musey he kormaa shukidi iya suuthan ba biradhiya yeddi ekidi
Leviticus8:16 Musey ulo ashuwa kammida modhuwa ubba
Leviticus8:17 Shin Goday Muse kiitidaysada korma galbaa
Leviticus8:18 Hessafe guye
Leviticus8:19 Musey he maraziya shukis; iya suuthaa yarsho bessa oyddu maazaneta bolla wurxis.
Leviticus8:20 Musey maraziya ashuwa qommon qommon qanxerethis; huuphiya
Leviticus8:21 Goday Muse kiitidaysada ulo ashuwanne gedata meeccidi
Leviticus8:22 Kahineti shuumetiya wode shiiqiya nam7antho dorsaa Musey ehis; Aaroninne iya adde nayti he dorsaa huuphen banta kushiya wothidosona.
Leviticus8:23 Musey he maraziya shukis; iya suuthaafe ekidi
Leviticus8:24 Qassi Musey Aarona adde nayta sinthe aathidi
Leviticus8:25 Modhdhuwa
Leviticus8:26 Godaa sinthan de7iya gaytape irshoy bayna uuketida issi uythaa
Leviticus8:27 I he katha ubbaa Aarona kusheninne iya adde nayta kushen wothin
Leviticus8:28 Musey he kathaa enta kushepe ekidi
Leviticus8:29 Qassi Musey angaasuwa ekidi
Leviticus8:30 Musey tiyo zaytiyapenne yarsho bessan de7iya suuthaafe ekidi
Leviticus8:31 Musey Aaronanne iya adde naytako haysada yaagis; ashuwa Dunkaaniya pengen kathite; Aaroninne iya adde nayti ta kiitidaysada gaytan de7iya geeshsha uythaara miite.
Leviticus8:32 He ashuwapenne uythaafe palahiday de7iko taman xuuggite.
Leviticus8:33 Kahineta shuumiya wogay laapun gallas ekiya gisho he wogay poletiya laapun gallasay wurana gakanaw Dunkaaniya pengefe kare keyopite.
Leviticus8:34 Goday kiittin hachi poletida wogay hinte nagaraa quchanaasa.
Leviticus8:35 Dunkaaniya pengen laapun gallas kumethi gallasinne qamma gam7ite; Godaa wogaa naagite; ixiko hinte hayqana. Tana Goday kiittiday haysa.
Leviticus8:36 Aaroninne iya adde nayti Goday Muse baggara kiittidaba ubbaa oothidosona.
Leviticus9:1 Hospuntha gallas Musey Aarona
Leviticus9:2 Aaronako haysada yaagis; borey bayna issi korma nagaraa yarshos
Leviticus9:3 Borey bayna issi kole nagara yarshos
Leviticus9:4 Qassi issifetetha yarshos issi korma
Leviticus9:5 Enti Musey kiittidaba ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthe ehidosona; maabara ubbay shiiqidi Godaa sinthan eqidosona.
Leviticus9:6 Musey entako
Leviticus9:7 Musey Aaronako haysada yaagis; “Yarsho bessaako shiiqada ne nagaraa gisho nagara yarshonne xuussa yarsho yarsha. Goday kiitidaysada asaa nagaraa atotethas yarsho yarsha.”
Leviticus9:8 Aaroni yarsho bessaako yidi
Leviticus9:9 Aarona nayti suuthaa ekidi iyaw ehidosona; I
Leviticus9:10 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Leviticus9:11 Shin attida ashuwanne galbaa gutaape kare kessidi xuuggis.
Leviticus9:12 Aaroni xuussa yarshos shiiqida mehiya shukis; iya nayti suuthaa ekidi iyaw ehidosona. I yarsho bessa oyddu maazaneta bolla wurxis.
Leviticus9:13 Enti ashuwa qommon qommon kessidi
Leviticus9:14 Ulo ashuwanne gedata haathan meeccidi
Leviticus9:15 Hessafe guye
Leviticus9:16 Wogay kiiteysada xuussa yarshos shiiqiya mehiya ehidi yarshis.
Leviticus9:17 Katha yarshuwa ehidi
Leviticus9:18 Aaroni kormanne maraziya asaas issifetetha yarsho oothidi shukis; iya adde nayti suuthaa iyaw ehidosona; I he suuthaa ekidi yarsho bessa oyddu maazaneta bolla wurxis.
Leviticus9:19 Kormanne maraziya ashuwape modhuwa
Leviticus9:20 enti angaaysuwa bolla wothin
Leviticus9:21 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Leviticus9:22 Hessafe guye
Leviticus9:23 Museynne Aaroni Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo gelidosona; enti yaape keyidi asaa anjidosona. He wode Godaa bonchoy asa ubbaas qoncis.

Leviticus10:1 Aarona adde nayti
Leviticus10:2 Hessa gaason Godaa matape tami yidi enta min
Leviticus10:3 Musey Aaronako
Leviticus10:4 Musey Aarona aawa ishaa Uzi7eela adde nayta Misa7eelanne Elzafaana xeegidi
Leviticus10:5 Enti yidi
Leviticus10:6 Musey Aaronanne iya adde nayta
Leviticus10:7 Godaa tiyo zaytey hinte bolla di7iya gisho Dunkaaniya pengefe kare keyopite; keyiko hinte hayqana” yaagis. Enti Musey gidaysada oothidosona.
Leviticus10:8 Goday Aaronako haysada yaagis;
Leviticus10:9 Hinte hayqonna mela Dunkaaniya gido geliya wode nenne ne nayti woyne ushshi woyko hara mathoyiya ushshi uyopite; hessi sinthafe yaana yeletethaas merinaw eqidi de7iya woga gidana.
Leviticus10:10 Hinte geeshshabanne geeshshi gidonaba qassi tunabaanne tuna gidonaba shaakidi erite.
Leviticus10:11 Goday Muse baggara odida woga ubbaa Isra7eele asaa tamaarsite.
Leviticus10:12 Musey Aaronanne attida iya adde nayta Alaazaranne Itamaara haysada yaagis; Godaas xuussa yarshuwafe attida katha yarshuwa ekidi irsho yeggonna uukite. I ubbaafe geeshshi gidiya gisho yarsho bessaa matan miite.
Leviticus10:13 Godaas xuussa yarshuwafe hessi nenanne ne adde nayta gakiya gisho gidiya gisho
Leviticus10:14 Shin yuusho yarshos shiiqida angaaysuwanne gedaa neeni
Leviticus10:15 Godaas yarshida gedaanne yuusho yarshos shiiqida angaasuwa modhuwara issife gathidi Godaa sinthan yuusho yarsho oothidi yarshanaw shiiqo. Goday kiitidaysada
Leviticus10:16 Musey nagara yarshos shiiqida deesha enti waatidaako eranaw koyidi oychis; I xuugetidaysa erida wode attida Aarona adde nayta
Leviticus10:17 “Nagaraa yarshos shiiqida ashuwa ayis geeshsha bessan mibeeketii? I ubbaafe geeshshi. Godaa sinthan asaa nagaraa diggidi asaas atotethi immana mela hessi hintew imetis.
Leviticus10:18 He mehiya suuthay geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo geliboonna gisho
Leviticus10:19 Aaroni Museko
Leviticus10:20 Musey hessa si7ida wode iya zaaruwan ufaytis.
Leviticus11:1 Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Leviticus11:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagidi odite; “Biitta bolla de7iya mehetapenne do7atape hinte maanaysati haysata;
Leviticus11:3 Shuquley phalqetidaysatanne waammotiya meheta miite.
Leviticus11:4 Shin waammotishe shuquley phalqetonaysatanne shuquley phalqethi gididi waammotonayisata moopite. Gimaley waammotees
Leviticus11:5 Gupalley waammotees
Leviticus11:6 Eshey waammotees
Leviticus11:7 Guduntho moopite; iyaw shuquley phalqethi
Leviticus11:8 Hinte hessata moopite; enta bawuta bochofite; enti hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:9 “Haatha giddon de7iya medhetetha ubbaafe hinte maanaysati haysata; Abbaa giddon woyko shaafa haatha giddon de7iya ubbaafe qefeynne poqoy de7iya ubbaa miite.
Leviticus11:10 Shin abba giddon woyko goggiya haathan de7iya qefeynne poqoy bayna medhetethati hintew tuna gidiya gisho moopite.
Leviticus11:11 Haysati hintew tuna; enta moopite; enta bawuta bochofite.
Leviticus11:12 Qefeynne poqoy bayna haatha giddon de7iya medhetethati ubbay hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:13 “Kafotape hintew tuna gididaysatinne hinte maanaw bessonnaysati haysata; arganthi
Leviticus11:14 xilo
Leviticus11:15 quuro ubbaa
Leviticus11:16 yancho
Leviticus11:17 guutha gutto
Leviticus11:18 haatha kutto
Leviticus11:19 silaago
Leviticus11:20 “Qefera de7iya oyddu tohon hemetiya laafa medhetethati ubbay hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:21 Gidoshin
Leviticus11:22 Hessatika
Leviticus11:23 Shin hara qefera de7iya oyddu tohoy de7iya medhetethati ubbay hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:24 “Haysati hintena tunisana; enta bawuta bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidana.
Leviticus11:25 Enta bawuta denthiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; shin omarsi gakanaw I tuna gido.
Leviticus11:26 Shuquley de7ishe phalqethi gidonnaysati woyko waammotonnaysati ubbay hintew tuna; enta bochiya oonika tunees.
Leviticus11:27 Oyddu tohotan hemetiya do7a ubbaafe gindera hemeteysati hintew tuna; enta bawuta bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tunees.
Leviticus11:28 Enta bawuta denthiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; shin omarsi gakanaw I tuna. Entika hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:29 “Sa7ara hemeteysatape haysati hintew tuna. Entika giro
Leviticus11:30 geegge
Leviticus11:31 Sa7ara hemetiya ubbaafe haysati hintew tuna; enta bawuta bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus11:32 Enta bawuta bochiya ay miisheyka tuna gidees; mitha miishey woyko ma7oy woyko galbi woyko ogoroy tuna gidees. Enta bawutay bochida miishe ubbay haathan muuketidi omarsi gakanaw gam7o; hessafe guye geeshshi gidana.
Leviticus11:33 Entafe issuwa bawutay oto giddon wodhidi bentiko
Leviticus11:34 Ay kathi gidin he otuwa giddon de7iya haathaafe xokiko
Leviticus11:35 He bawutape issoy wodhida miishe ubbay tuna; cooce woyko oto gidikoka menthite; enti hintew tuna.
Leviticus11:36 He bawutay bochida ubbay tuna gidikoka pultoynne haatha olli tunenna.
Leviticus11:37 Enta bawutape issoy zeretha katha bolla wodhiko
Leviticus11:38 Shin he zerethaa bolla haathi gukidi simmin
Leviticus11:39 “Meetetiya mehetape issoy bawutiko
Leviticus11:40 Oonika he mehiya bawutape miiko
Leviticus11:41 “Sa7ara gooshetiya medhetethi ubbay hintew tuna; iya moopite.
Leviticus11:42 Ulora gooshetiyaba gidin
Leviticus11:43 Ha sa7ara gooshetiya medhetethatan hintena tunisopite; enta gaason hinte asatethaa tunisopite.
Leviticus11:44 Taani Godaa
Leviticus11:45 Taani hintew Xoosse gidanaw hintena Gibxe biittafe kessida hinte Godaa. Hesaa gisho

Leviticus13:1 Goday Musekonne Aaronako haysada yaagis;
Leviticus13:2 “Issi asa asatethaa bolla kixi wodhiko woyko shattoy woyko iralley keyiko iya gogay hargen laametiko
Leviticus13:3 Kahiney iya goga bolla de7iya madunthaa be7o. He madunxida bessan de7iya ikisey booxikonne madunthay ollatiko
Leviticus13:4 Shin iya gogaa bolla de7iya madunthay boothi gididi
Leviticus13:5 Laapuntha gallas kahiney iya zaaridi be7o; I be7iya wode madunthay uraa gogaa bolla dalgonna kaseysda de7iko
Leviticus13:6 Qassika laapuntha gallas kahiney iya be7o; I be7iya wode madunthay dalgonna ixidi dhayi dhayi biiko
Leviticus13:7 Shin I geeyanaw bana kahiniya bessidaape guye
Leviticus13:8 Kahiney iya be7o; he goo7oy uraa gogaa bolla dalgi dalgi biiko
Leviticus13:9 “Oonika goga hargen oyketiko iya kahiniyako eho.
Leviticus13:10 Kahiney iya be7iya wode iya gogaa bolla bootha kixi de7iko
Leviticus13:11 hessi gogaa bolla gam7ida harge gidiya gisho
Leviticus13:12 Kahiney goga hargey addiya asatethaa bolla dalgiko
Leviticus13:13 He goga hargey iya asatethaa ubbaa ma7iko
Leviticus13:14 Shin he maduntha giddora ashoy bentiko I tuna.
Leviticus13:15 Kahiney he ashuwa be7idi he uray tuna gideysa eriso. He ashoy goga harge gidiya gisho I tuna.
Leviticus13:16 Shin he ashoy qassika laametidi booxiko
Leviticus13:17 Kahiney iya be7o; iya madunthay booxidaba gidiko
Leviticus13:18 “Issi asa bolla merkoy wodhidi paxidaba gidiko
Leviticus13:19 iya bessan bootha kixay wodhiko woyko zo77ida iralley keyiko he uray kahiniyako bo.
Leviticus13:20 Kahiney iya be7o; he madunthay ollatiko
Leviticus13:21 Shin kahiney be7iya wode ikisey booxonnaba gidiko
Leviticus13:22 Hessi iya gogaa bolla dalgi dalgi biiko
Leviticus13:23 Shin he iralley dalgi dalgi boonna issi bessan de7iko
Leviticus13:24 “Tami issi asi miiko he mida bessan bootha woyko zo7o iralley keyiko
Leviticus13:25 kahiney he bessa be7o. He bessan de7iya ikisey booxikonne he madunthay ollatiko
Leviticus13:26 Shin kahiney be7iya wode he madunthaa bolla de7iya ikisey booxonnaba gidiko
Leviticus13:27 Laapuntha gallas kahiney iya be7iya wode he bessay dalgi dalgi biiko
Leviticus13:28 Shin he madunthay gogaa bolla dalgonna aggidi issi bessan uttikonne dhayi dhayi biiko
Leviticus13:29 “Issi addey woyko maccasa huuphen woyko gaco bolla madunthi keyiko
Leviticus13:30 kahiney he madunthaa be7iya wode madunthay gogaa kanthidi ollatiko iya bolla de7iya ikisey lee7idi galal7o daaniko
Leviticus13:31 Qassi kahiney he hargiya be7iya wode gogaa kanthidi ollatiboonaba gidiko
Leviticus13:32 Laapuntha gallas kahiney he hargiya be7iya wode qaachiya hargey dalgonnaba gidiko
Leviticus13:33 he ura qaachiya bessan de7iya ikisiya gidonashin
Leviticus13:34 Laapuntha gallas kahiney he qaachiya bessaa be7iya wode uraa galbaa bolla dalgonna ixikonne gogaa kanthidi ollatonna ixiko
Leviticus13:35 Shin I geeydaape guye
Leviticus13:36 kahiney iya be7iya wode he qaachiya hargey dalgidaba gidiko
Leviticus13:37 Shin kahiney be7iya wode he qaachiya bessay dalgonnaba gidikonne kareetha ikisey iya bolla dolidaba gidiko
Leviticus13:38 “Issi adde woyko maccasa goga bolla bootha iralley keyiko
Leviticus13:39 kahiney be7iya wode enta gogaa bolla de7iya iralley bulla gidiko
Leviticus13:40 “Issi asas huuphe binaanay qoqofetiko
Leviticus13:41 Issi asi sinthara bo77atiko
Leviticus13:42 Shin iya bo77i woyko tiishshi midaysa bolla zo7o woyko bootha madunthi keyiko
Leviticus13:43 Iya kahiney be7iya wode iya bo77i woyko tiishshi midaysa bolla de7iya madunthay galba bolla keyiya goga harge mela zo7o gidiko
Leviticus13:44 he uray tuma goga hargen oyketida hargancho. I tuna gidiya gishonne iya hargey iya huuphen de7iya gisho I tuna gideysa kahiney eriso.
Leviticus13:45 “Goga hargey oykida asi peedhetida ma7o ma7o; ba huuphiya pixopo; ba doona kammo; ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Leviticus13:46 He hargey iya bolla de7ida wode ubban I tuna. I tuna gidiya gisho
Leviticus13:47 “Ay ma7o bolla buuqida bessi bentiko
Leviticus13:48 qacinape woyko shalope dadetida liino woyko suufe gidin
Leviticus13:49 he ma7uwa bolla bentida buuqay ciliilo woyko zo7o mala bessiko
Leviticus13:50 Kahiney he buuqa be7idi
Leviticus13:51 Laapuntha gallas kahiney he ma7uwa be7iya wode he ma7uwa bolla de7iya buuqay dalgi dalgi biiko
Leviticus13:52 He ma7oy qacina woyko shalo gidin
Leviticus13:53 “Shin kahiney be7iya wode he buuqa ma7uwa bolla dalgiboonaba gidiko
Leviticus13:54 he buuqay de7iya ma7uwa meeccana mela kahiney kiitto. Hessafe guye
Leviticus13:55 He ma7oy meecetidaape guye qassika kahiney be7iya wode he buuqay ba malaa laammonnabaa gidikonne dalgi dalgi boonna ixikoka I tuna. He buuqa bessay ma7uwas guye baggara woyko sintha baggara de7ikoka he ma7oy taman xuugetanaw koshshees.
Leviticus13:56 Shin he ma7uwa meecci simmin kahiney be7iya wode buuqay dhayi dhayi biiko
Leviticus13:57 Hessafe guye
Leviticus13:58 Shin meecetida ma7oy qacina woyko shalo gidin
Leviticus13:59 Issi ma7oy suufe woyko liino gidin
Leviticus14:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus14:2 Goga hargey oykida uray geeyiya gallas oothanaw koshshiya wogay haysa. He uraa kahiniyako ehanaw koshshees.
Leviticus14:3 Kahiney gutaape gaxaa keyidi iya hargiya be7o. I be7iya wode goga hargey uraa asatethafe dhayidabaa gidiko
Leviticus14:4 kahiney nam7u tuna gidonna kafota
Leviticus14:5 Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:6 Hanko kafuwa zo7o qacinaranne hisoophe boncora ekidi
Leviticus14:7 He suuthaa
Leviticus14:8 He hargiyafe geeyiya uray ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa bolla de7iya ikise ubbaa meedeto; ba asatethaa meeceto. Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:9 Laapuntha gallas ba huuphiya
Leviticus14:10 Hospuntha gallasan borey bayna nam7u urge dorsatanne issi laythi gidida issi macca dorse eho. Qassi katha yarshos zaytera munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o dhiillenne issi litiro zaytepe siko eho.
Leviticus14:11 Iya geeshshiya kahiney uraanne I ehida yarshotara issife Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen Godaa sinthan shiisho.
Leviticus14:12 Kahiney nam7u dorsa urgetape issuwa ekidi
Leviticus14:13 Yaatidi
Leviticus14:14 Kahiney naaqo yarshuwa suuthaafe guuthi ekidi
Leviticus14:15 Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:16 He haddirsa kushiya qaaqan de7iya zaytiya ba ushacha kushe biradhiya yeddi yeddi ekidi
Leviticus14:17 Yaatidi
Leviticus14:18 Qassi ba kushiya qaaqan attida zaytiya kahiney geeyiya uraa huuphen gusso; yaatidi Godaa sinthan he uraa nagaraa atto yaagiso.
Leviticus14:19 Hessafe guye kahiney geeyiya uraa nagara atotethas shiiqida yarshuwa yarshees; kallidi qassi xuussa yarshos shiiqida mehiya shukees.
Leviticus14:20 Kahiney xuussa yarshuwa katha yarshuwara issife yarsho bessan wothidi xuuggees; yaatidi uraa nagaraa atto yaagisees; he uray geeyees.
Leviticus14:21 Shin uray hessa ubbaa ehanaw danda7onna manqo gidiko
Leviticus14:22 Baw danda7etida mela nam7u holle woyko nam7u kuraacho issuwa nagaraa yarshos
Leviticus14:23 Hospuntha gallas ba tunatethaafe geeyiya uray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen Godaa sinthe ehidi kahiniyas immo.
Leviticus14:24 Kahiney naaqo yarshos yida dorsa urgiyanne zaytiya ekidi
Leviticus14:25 Naaqo yarshos yida dorsa urgiya shuko; He urgiya suuthaafe guuthara ekidi
Leviticus14:26 Kahiney zaytiyape guuthara ba haddirsa kushiya qaaqan tigo.
Leviticus14:27 Haddirsa kushiya qaaqan de7iya zaytiyape ushacha kushiya biradhiya yeddi ekidi
Leviticus14:28 Kahiney ba kushiya qaaqan de7iya zaytiyape guuthara ekidi
Leviticus14:29 Godaa sinthan uraa nagaraa atotethas kahiney ba kushen attida zaytiya geeyiya uraa huuphen tigo.
Leviticus14:30 Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:31 Issuwa nagara yarshos nam7anthuwa xuussa yarshos katha yarshuwara issife shiisho. Kahiney geeyiya uraa nagaraa Godaa sinthan iya nagaraa atto yaagiso.
Leviticus14:32 Ba asatethaa bolla de7iya goga hargiyafe geeyanaw manqotethi diggida uraas de7iya wogay haysa.
Leviticus14:33 Goday Musekonne Aaronako haysada yaagis;
Leviticus14:34 “Taani hintew immiya Kanaane biitta hinte geliya wode he biittan de7iya hinte keethafe issuwan taani buuqa yeddiya wode
Leviticus14:35 he uray kahiniyako bidi
Leviticus14:36 Kahiney soo gelidi buuqa qommuwa be7anaape kasetidi
Leviticus14:37 I gelidi be7iya wode buuqay godaa bolla ciliilo woyko zo7o malla bessikonne qassi godaa midi ollayidi giddo geliko
Leviticus14:38 kahiney kare keyidi
Leviticus14:39 Laapuntha gallasan kahiney he keethaa zaaridi xeelliya wode he buuqay keetha godaa bolla dalgiko
Leviticus14:40 buuqay de7iya shucha ubbaa godaape shoddidi
Leviticus14:41 Kaallidi godaa meeshida urqa soo baggara bookidi
Leviticus14:42 Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:43 “Shuchay shodetin
Leviticus14:44 kahiney hessa be7o. I be7iya wode buuqay he keethaa giddon dalgiko
Leviticus14:45 Hessa gisho
Leviticus14:46 He keethay gordan gam7iya wode iya gido geliya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna.
Leviticus14:47 He keethan aqiya woyko kathi miya uray ba ma7uwa meecco.
Leviticus14:48 “Shin kahiney yidi xeelliya wode keethay meeshetidi simmin
Leviticus14:49 Keethaa geeshshanaw nam7u kafota
Leviticus14:50 Kafotape issuwa pultofe duuqidi keren qolida haathan shuko.
Leviticus14:51 Hessafe guye
Leviticus14:52 Yaatidi
Leviticus14:53 Paxa de7iya kafuwa katamaape gaxa yeddo. Hessada oothidi
Leviticus14:54 “Dumma dumma goga hargeesinne goo7o hargees imetida wogay haysa.
Leviticus14:55 Ma7o bolla woyko keetha bolla keyiya buuqa harge gidin
Leviticus14:56 kixa gidin
Leviticus14:57 issibay tuna gideysanne tuna gidonnaysa erisiya wogay haysa.”
Leviticus15:1 Goday Musekonne Aaronako haysada yaagis;
Leviticus15:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagidi odite; “Issi asa asatethafe goggiyabay de7iko hessi tuna.
Leviticus15:3 Goggiyabay de7iya uraa tuna oothiya wogay haysa; he goggiyabay aggin
Leviticus15:4 “Iya asatethafe goggiyabay de7iya uray zin7iya hiixaynne uttiya oyde ubbay tuna.
Leviticus15:5 Iya hiixa bochiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaka meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:6 Goggiyabay de7iya uray uttidaba bolla uttiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaka meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:7 “Goggiyabay de7iya uraa asatethaa bochiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw I tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:8 “Goggiyabay de7iya asi tuna gidonna asa bolla cutiko
Leviticus15:9 “Goggiyabay de7iya uray uttiya toga koori tuna.
Leviticus15:10 Iyape garsara de7iyaba bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees; qassi hessa tookiya oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatetha meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw I tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:11 “Goggiyabay de7iya asi ba kushiya meecetonna bochiya asi oonika ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:12 “Goggiyabay de7iya uray bochiya oto ubbaa menthite; mithafe oosetida miishe ubbay haathan meeceto.
Leviticus15:13 “Goggiyabay de7iya asi he gogiyabape geeyida wodepe laapun gallas gam7o. Ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa pulto haathan meeceto; yaatidi I geeshshi gidees.
Leviticus15:14 Hospuntha gallasan nam7u holleta woyko nam7u kuraachota ekidi
Leviticus15:15 Kahiney holletape issuwa nagara yarshos
Leviticus15:16 “Issi addefe iya atunthay gukiko
Leviticus15:17 Atunthay bochida ma7o ubbay woyko galba ubbay haathan meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:18 Issi addey maccara aqin
Leviticus15:19 “Issi maccasi ba kushe meto be7iko
Leviticus15:20 “Ba kushe meto wode iya zin7iya hiixaynne iya uttiya oydey ubbay tuna.
Leviticus15:21 Iya zin7iya hiixa bochiya ubbay ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaka meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gido.
Leviticus15:22 Iya uttiyaba bochiya ubbay ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gido.
Leviticus15:23 Iya zin7iya hiixa gidin woyko iya uttiyaba bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna.
Leviticus15:24 “Issi maccasi kushe metora de7iya wode addey iira aqiko
Leviticus15:25 “Issi maccasi
Leviticus15:26 Suuthi iipe goggiya wode iya zin7iya hiixa ubbay
Leviticus15:27 He tunidabata bochiya oonika tuna gidiya gisho I ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; yaatidi omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees.
Leviticus15:28 “Iipe goggiya suuthay eqiko
Leviticus15:29 Hospuntha gallas iya nam7u holleta woyko nam7u kuraachota ehada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen kahiniyas immo.
Leviticus15:30 Kahiney holletape issuwa nagaraa yarshos
Leviticus15:31 “Isra7eele asay banta giddon de7iya Geeshsha Dunkaaniya tunisidi
Leviticus15:32 Iya asatethafe goggiyabay de7iya asas
Leviticus15:33 ba kushe meto gaason tuniya maccasas
Leviticus16:1 Aarona adde nayti nam7ay Godaa sinthe shiiqidi hayqidaape guye
Leviticus16:2 Taani Taabotiya nagara atotetha kamaa bolla shaaran gidada qonciya gisho magarajuwafe guyen de7iya Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa ba koyida wode gelidi hayqonna mela ne ishaa Aaronas oda.
Leviticus16:3 Aaroni nagaraa yarshos issi wofaano
Leviticus16:4 Aaroni liinope oosetida geeshsha adussa qamisenne garsara ma7etiya ma7o ma7o. Liinope oosetida danco danco; hessada ba huuphen liinope oosetida xaatha qace wotho. He ma7oti geeshshi gidiya gisho
Leviticus16:5 Isra7eele maabaray nagara yarshos nam7u koleta
Leviticus16:6 Aaroni ba nagarasinne ba soo asaa nagaraa atotethas issi wofaano yarsho.
Leviticus16:7 Hessafe guye
Leviticus16:8 He nam7u deeshata ekidi issuwa Godaasa
Leviticus16:9 Aaroni saaman Godaas gidida deesha ekidi nagara yarsho oothidi yarsho.
Leviticus16:10 Shin saaman Azaazelas gidida deesha asa nagaraa atotethas mela biitta yeddanaw paxa de7ishin Godaas shiisho.
Leviticus16:11 Aaroni ba nagarasinne ba soo asaa nagaraa atotethas issi wofaano nagaraa yarsho oothidi shiisho. Yaatidi ba nagaraa gisho he wofaanuwa shuko.
Leviticus16:12 Godaa sinthan de7iya yarsho bessaafe ixaane cuyisiya miishen bonqo kunthidi
Leviticus16:13 Godaa sinthan de7iya taman ixaane wotho. I hayqonna mela ixaaniya cuyay Taabotiya bolla de7iya nagara atotetha kamaa kammo.
Leviticus16:14 Wofaanuwa suuthaafe guuthara ekidi
Leviticus16:15 Hessafe guye
Leviticus16:16 Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa Isra7eele asaa tunatethafenne nagarape geeshshees. Enti tunabaa oothishin
Leviticus16:17 Aaroni Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelidi
Leviticus16:18 Hessafe guye
Leviticus16:19 He suuthan ba biradhiya yeddi ekidi laapun toho wurxo; hessada oothidi Isra7eele asaa tunatethaafe he yarsho bessa geeshsho.
Leviticus16:20 Aaroni Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessaa
Leviticus16:21 Aaroni ba nam7u kushiya paxa de7iya deesha huuphen wothidi
Leviticus16:22 Deeshay enta nagara ubbaa tookidi
Leviticus16:23 Hessafe guye
Leviticus16:24 Geeshsha bessan ba asatethaa meecetidi
Leviticus16:25 Nagara yarshuwa modhuwa yarsho bessan xuuggo.
Leviticus16:26 Bazzo yedetiya deesha efida uray ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; yaati simmidi guta gelo.
Leviticus16:27 Nagara atotethas Aaroni enta suuthaa Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessaa ehida wofaanuwanne deesha galbaa
Leviticus16:28 Hessa xuuggida uray ba ma7uwa meecco; ba asatethaa meeceto; hessafe guye
Leviticus16:29 Haysi hintew merinaa woga gido; laapuntha ageenay gelida tammantho gallas hintena kawushite; biitta aawu na7a gidin woyko hara biitta asi gidin
Leviticus16:30 Ayis giiko he gallasay hinte nagara atotethi demmiya gallas; hinte Godaa sinthan hinte nagara ubbaafe geeyana.
Leviticus16:31 Hessi hintew gita Sambaata shempo gallas gidana. He gallas hintena kawushite; hessi hintew merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus16:32 Qassi ba aawa bessan kahine gidana mela tiyetiyanne dummatiya kahiney geeshshi gidida liinope oosetida ma7uwa ma7idi
Leviticus16:33 I ubbaafe Geeshsha bessaa
Leviticus16:34 Isra7eele asa ubbaa nagaraa atotethas laythan laythan issi toho oothanaw haysi hintew merina woga gido. Goday kiitidaysada Musey oothis.
Leviticus17:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus17:2 “Aaronas iya adde naytasinne Isra7eele asa ubbaas haysada yaagada oda; Goday kiittidaysi haysa;
Leviticus17:3 Isra7eele asaape oonika boori woyko maraze woyko kole gutan woyko gutaape gaxan shukidi
Leviticus17:4 Godaas imota oothidi immanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge Godaa sinthe ehonna ixiko
Leviticus17:5 Hessa gisho
Leviticus17:6 Kahiney Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen de7iya yarsho bessa bolla he suuthaa wurxo. Modhdhuwa Godaas sawo tonku giya yarsho oothidi xuuggo.
Leviticus17:7 Isra7eele asay Godaa aggidi kaallida tuna ayyaanatas zaaridi banta yarshuwa yarshofo. Hessi entawunne yaana yeletethaa ubbaas merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus17:8 “Entako haysada yaaga; Isra7eele asaape gidin woyko enta giddon de7iya allaga biitta asape gidin
Leviticus17:9 Godaas yarshanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge ehonna ixiko
Leviticus17:10 “Isra7eele asaape woyko enta giddon de7iya allaga biitta asaape oonika suuthu miiko
Leviticus17:11 Ayis giiko asho ma7ida ubbaa de7oy iya suuthaa giddon de7ees; suuthi de7oy iya giddon de7iya gisho nagara atto giisees. Hinte nagara atotethas suuthu yarshana mela hintew immas.
Leviticus17:12 Taani Isra7eele asaako
Leviticus17:13 “Isra7eele asaape woyko enta giddon de7iya allaga biitta asaape oonika meetetiya do7a woyko kafo shankatidi wodhiko
Leviticus17:14 Ayis giiko asho ma7ida ubbaa de7oy iya suutha giddona. Asho ma7ida medhetethata ubbaa de7oy iya suutha giddon de7iya gisho
Leviticus17:15 “Isra7eele asaa gidin woyko enta giddon de7iya allaga biitta asaa gidin
Leviticus17:16 Ba ma7uwa meecconna ixiko
Leviticus18:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus18:2 “Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; taani Godaa
Leviticus18:3 Hinte kase de7ida Gibxe asay ootheysada oothopite; woyko ha77i taani hintena gelsiya Kanaane biitta asay ootheysada oothopite; enta wogaa kaallopite.
Leviticus18:4 Hinte ta kiitta oothite; ta wogaa naagite; taani Godaa
Leviticus18:5 Ta kiitaanne ta wogaa naagite
Leviticus18:6 “Hintefe oonika ba mata dabbora xaallofo. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus18:7 “Ne aayiw xaallada ne aawa kawushofa. Iya ne aayiw gidiya gisho iyo xaallofa.
Leviticus18:8 “Ne aawa machiw xaallada ne aawa kawushofa.
Leviticus18:9 “Ne michiw xaallofa; son yeletida woyko karen yeletida ne aawa na7iw woyko ne aaye na7iw xaallofa.
Leviticus18:10 “Ne na7aa na7iw woyko ne na7e na7iw xaallada ne nena kawushofa.
Leviticus18:11 “Ne micho gidiya gisho ne aawa mache na7iw xaallofa.
Leviticus18:12 “Ne aawa michiw xaallofa; iya ne aawas mata dabbo.
Leviticus18:13 “Ne aaye michiw xaallofa; iya ne aayes mata dabbo.
Leviticus18:14 “Ne aawa ishaa machiw xaallofa; iya ne aawa ishaa machiw.
Leviticus18:15 Ne na7aa machiw xaallofa; iya ne na7aa machiw.
Leviticus18:16 “Ne ishaa machiw xaallada ne ishaa kawushofa.
Leviticus18:17 “Aayiwunne I na7iw xaallofa; I na7e na7iw woyko I na7aa na7iw xaallofa. Enti iw mata dabbo gidiya gisho
Leviticus18:18 “Ne machiya paxa de7ishin
Leviticus18:19 “Kushe metora de7iya maccasi xaallofa.
Leviticus18:20 “Neeni tunonna mela ne shooruwa machiw xaallofa.
Leviticus18:21 “Ne Xoossaa sunthay cayetonna mela ne naytape issuwa taman xuuggada
Leviticus18:22 “Xoossa sinthan ixetidaba gidiya gisho maccasara gaheteysada addera gahetofa.
Leviticus18:23 “Neeni tunonna mela mehera gahetofa; maccasi mehera gahetanaw mehe sinthe aadhofo. Hessi wogan baynaba.
Leviticus18:24 “Taani hinte sinthafe yedethiya kawotethati he oosotan tunida gisho
Leviticus18:25 Hari attoshin
Leviticus18:26 Shin hinte ta higgiyanne ta kiita naagite. Hintena gidin woyko hinte giddon de7iya allaga biitta asaa gidin oonika hessa mela tuna ooso oothopite.
Leviticus18:27 “Hintefe kase ha biittan de7ida asay hessa mela tunabaa oothida gisho
Leviticus18:28 Hinte ha biitta tunisiko
Leviticus18:29 Hessata daaniya tuna oosotape issuwaka oothiya asi de7iko
Leviticus18:30 Hessa gisho
Leviticus19:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
Leviticus19:2 Isra7eele asa ubbaas haysada yaagada oda; “Taani
Leviticus19:3 “Hintefe issoy issoy ba aawanne ba aayiw boncho; ta Sambaata bonchite. Taani Godaa
Leviticus19:4 “Tana aggidi eeqata goyinnofite; woyko biratape oosetida xoossata hintew oothopite. Taani Godaa
Leviticus19:5 “Hinte issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode he yarshoy hinte gisho eketana mela besseysada yarshite.
Leviticus19:6 He yarshoy hinte yarshida gallas woyko wontetha gallas meeteto; heedzantho gallas gakanaw attiday de7iko taman xuugeto.
Leviticus19:7 Heedzantho gallas meetetiko
Leviticus19:8 Hessa miya oonika Godaas geeshshi gididaba tunisida gisho ba nagaran oyshetana. He uray ba asaa giddofe kuretto.
Leviticus19:9 “Hinte gaden kaxida kathaa hinte cakiya wode gadiya gaxaa gakanaw de7eysa cakofite; caki simmin de7iya poshiliya qoropite.
Leviticus19:10 Ne woyne ayfiya maxiya wode mithaa bolla qosetidi attidaysa woyko sa7an wodhida woyne ayfiya maxopa. Hessa manqotasinne bete asaas aggaaga. Taani Godaa
Leviticus19:11 “Kaysotopite. “Wordotopite. “Issoy issuwa cimmofite.
Leviticus19:12 “Ta sunthan wordo caaqofite; hinte Xoossaa sunthaa tunisopite. Taani hinte Godaa.
Leviticus19:13 “Ne shooruwa bolla gene oothofa; woyko iya bonqofa. “Une oothiya uraa damooziya diggada
Leviticus19:14 “Tulliya cayopa; woyko qooqiya sinthan dhube wothofa
Leviticus19:15 “Pirda geellayopite; manquwa iya manqotetha gisho maaddada pirdofa; duriya iya duretetha gisho yayyada aggofa. Shin ne shooruwas suure pirda.
Leviticus19:16 “Ne asaa giddon iita zigirsi ekada yuuyopa. “Ne shooruwa hayqos gathiyaba aykoka oothofa. Taani ne Godaa.
Leviticus19:17 “Ne ishaa ne wozanan ixofa. Ne shooruwa gaason ne nagara oothonna mela iya hanqa.
Leviticus19:18 “Halo keyopa; ne asaape issuwa bollaka shifopa. Shin ne shooruwa ne huupheda dosa. Taani ne Godaa.
Leviticus19:19 “Ta kiitata naaga. “Issi qommo mehe hara qommo mehera biraysisopa. “Issi shooqan nam7u qommo zerethi zeropa. “Nam7u qommofe oosetida ma7o ma7ofa.
Leviticus19:20 “Issi asi azinas oyshetada de7ishin
Leviticus19:21 Gidoshin
Leviticus19:22 Kahiney he naaqo yarsho maraziya ekidi
Leviticus19:23 “Hinte Kanaane biitta geliya wode ayfe immiya ay qommo mithi tokikoka
Leviticus19:24 Oyddantho laythan he mithaa ayfey Godaas galatas shiiqiya geeshsha yarsho gidana.
Leviticus19:25 Ichashantho laythan he mithaa ayfiya miite. Hinte hessada oothiko
Leviticus19:26 “Suuthi iya giddon de7iya asho moopite. Marotopite woyko bitopite.
Leviticus19:27 “Hinte huuphe binaana garsara yuushshi aathidi ciiropite; hinte buuchaa yuushshi aathidi meedopite.
Leviticus19:28 “Hayqida asa gisho hinte asatethaa gaaropite; woyko cacha beeta hinte asatethaa bolla medhofite. Taani ne Godaa.
Leviticus19:29 “Biittiya laymatethaninne tunatethan kumonna mela ne macca na7iw laymatethas aatha immada tunisopa.
Leviticus19:30 “Ta Sambaata bonchite; ta goyinnetiya bessaa bonchite. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus19:31 “Moytille odisiya asaako woyko marotako boopite; hinte tunonna mela enta koyopite. Taani Godaa
Leviticus19:32 “Dondza asinne cima asi be7iya wode uttida bessaafe denda eqada enta boncha; ne Xoossaas yayya. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus19:33 “Hinte biittan de7iya bete ase sugopite.
Leviticus19:34 Hinte biittan de7iya bete asi hinte gade asada xeellite; iya hinte huupheda dosite. Hinte kase Gibxe biittan bete asi gididi de7ideta. Taani Godaa
Leviticus19:35 “Hinte wadhiyaban
Leviticus19:36 Hinte mizaaney
Leviticus19:37 “Hinte ta higgiyanne ta kiitaa ubbaa naagitenne oothite. Taani Godaa.”
