Leviticus20:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; “Isra7eele asaape gidin
Leviticus20:3 Ba na7aa moloka geetetiya eeqas immidi ta Dunkaaniya tuniseynne ta geeshsha sunthaa kawushey ta sinthan ixetidaba gidana. Ta asaa giddofe shaakada taani iya dhaysana.
Leviticus20:4 Shin he uraa Isra7eele asay be7ishe qelli gidi aadhikonne wodhonna ixiko
Leviticus20:5 taani he addiyanne iya soo asaa morkana; iyanne Moloka kaallidaysata enta deriya giddofe shaakada dhaysana.
Leviticus20:6 “Oonika tana ammanetona ixidi moytille xeegikonne maro soo biiko
Leviticus20:7 “Taani
Leviticus20:8 Ta wogaa naagite; iya polite. Taani hintena geeshshiya
Leviticus20:9 “Oonika ba aawa woyko ba aayiw cayiko hayqo. I ba aawa woyko ba aayiw cayida gisho
Leviticus20:10 “Issi asi ba shooruwa machiw xaalliko
Leviticus20:11 Issi asi ba aawa machiw xaalliko
Leviticus20:12 Issi asi ba na7aa machiw xaalliko
Leviticus20:13 “Issi addey maccasara gaheteysada addera gahetiko
Leviticus20:14 Issi asi na7iwunne aayiw macho ekiko
Leviticus20:15 “Issi asi mehera gahetiko
Leviticus20:16 Issi maccasi mehera gahetiko he maccasiyanne he mehey nam7ay hayqo; enta suuthaa acoy enta bolla gido.
Leviticus20:17 “Issi asi ba aawa na7iw woyko ba aaye na7iw macho ekiko
Leviticus20:18 Issi asi kushe metora de7iya maccasara aqiko
Leviticus20:19 “Ne aaye michiw woyko ne aawa michiw xaallofa; hessa oothey ba mata dabbotetha kawushshees. Enti nam7ay banta nagaran oysheto.
Leviticus20:20 Issi asi ba aawa ishaa machiw xaalliko
Leviticus20:21 Issi asi ba ishaa machiw ekiko
Leviticus20:22 “Hinte daana mela ta hintena gelsiya biittay hintena cuttonna mela hinte ta higgiyanne ta kiitaa naagite.
Leviticus20:23 Taani hinte sinthafe dhaysiya asaa de7uwa wogaa kaallopite. Enti hessa ubbaa oothida gisho
Leviticus20:24 Hinte enta biitta laatana; maathinne eessi goggey biitta hintew immana. Taani hintena hara asaape dummayada kessida
Leviticus20:25 “Hessa gisho
Leviticus20:26 Taani Goday geeshshi gidiya gishonne hinte tabaa gidana mela hintena hara asaape dummayida gisho
Leviticus20:27 “Addey woyko macci moytillera haasayiko woyko marotiko
Leviticus21:1 Goday Museko
Leviticus21:2 ba mata dabbo
Leviticus21:3 woyko azina gelonna
Leviticus21:4 Ekoninne gelon dabbotida asa aha bochidi bana tunisopo.
Leviticus21:5 “Kahineti kayos banta huuphiyanne banta buuchaa meedopo; woyko banta asatethaa gaaropo.
Leviticus21:6 Enti Godaas xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho shiishiya kahineta gidiya gisho banta Xoossaas geeshshi gido; banta Xoossaa sunthaa tunisopo. Hessa gisho
Leviticus21:7 “Kahineti banta Xoossaas geeshshi gidiya gisho
Leviticus21:8 Kahineti hinte Xoossaas katha yarsho yarsheyisata gidiya gisho
Leviticus21:9 Kahiniya na7iya laymatada bana tunisiko
Leviticus21:10 “Kahine halaqay
Leviticus21:11 Ahi de7iya soo gelopo; hari attoshin ba aawa woyko ba aaye aha gidikoka
Leviticus21:12 Iya dummayanaw tiyida Xoossaa zaytey iya bolla de7iya gisho
Leviticus21:13 “I ekiya machiya geela7o gido.
Leviticus21:14 Azini hayqida maccasi woyko azini yeddida maccasi woyko layma maccasi macho ekofo. Shin ba asaa giddofe geela7o macca na7a dooridi macho eko.
Leviticus21:15 Hessi hanonna ixiko
Leviticus21:16 Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
Leviticus21:17 “Neeni Aaronas haysada yaagada oda; ne kochaafe asatethan borey de7iya oonika katha yarsho taw yarshanaw bessenna.
Leviticus21:18 Asatethan borey de7iya asi
Leviticus21:19 woyko tohoy woyko kushey silida asi
Leviticus21:20 woyko kuuna asi woyko daro qantha asi woyko ayfe mulca asi woyko puusoy oykida asi woyko iralley de7iya asi woyko shuufa asi taw katha yarsho yarshanaw bessenna.
Leviticus21:21 Kahiniya Aarona kochaafe asatethan borey de7iya asi oonika Godaas xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho shiishanaw yarsho bessa yaanaw bessenna.
Leviticus21:22 I geeshsha kathaanne Ubbaafe geeshshi gidida ba Xoossaa kathaa maanaw danda7ees.
Leviticus21:23 Shin iya asatethan borey de7iya asi gidiya gisho
Leviticus21:24 Musey hessa ubbaa Aaronas
Leviticus22:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus22:2 Ta geeshsha sunthaa enti tunisonna mela
Leviticus22:3 Entako haysada yaaga; “Yaana yeletetha ubban hinte kochaafe oonika tunidi de7ishe
Leviticus22:4 “Aarona kochaafe goga hargey de7iya
Leviticus22:5 Qassi sa7ara gooshetiya tunisiyabata
Leviticus22:6 woyko hessa melaba bochiya oonika
Leviticus22:7 Awi wulliya wode I geeshshi gidees. Hessafe guye
Leviticus22:8 Hayqidaba woyko do7i wodhida mehe asho moopo; hessi tunisiyaba. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus22:9 “Kahineti ta wogaa naago; enti iya naagonna ixidi banta balan hayqana. Enta geeshshiya Goday tana.
Leviticus22:10 “He geeshsha yarshuwa kahiniya soo asaape attishin
Leviticus22:11 Shin kahiney ba biran shammida aylley woyko iya son yeletida aylley he kathaa mo.
Leviticus22:12 Kahine gidonna asi gelida kahiniya na7iya he geeshsha yarshuwafe moopo.
Leviticus22:13 Shin I azinay hayqiko woyko iyo yeddiko qassi iw na7i bayna ixiko
Leviticus22:14 “Issi asi eronna de7ishe geeshsha yarshuwafe miiko
Leviticus22:15 Isra7eele asay Godaas yarshiya geeshsha yarshuwa kahineti tunisopo.
Leviticus22:16 Enti banta ehida geeshsha yarshuwa bantaw midi nagaran oyshetana mela oothofo. Enta geeshshiya Goday tana.”
Leviticus22:17 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus22:18 “Aaronas
Leviticus22:19 he yarshoy eketana mela borey bayna wofaano
Leviticus22:20 Borey de7iya ay meheyka eketonna gisho hessa shiishopite.
Leviticus22:21 “Issi asi ba qangetha gathanaw issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode woyko ba mehiyape dosan imota Godaas shiishiya wode hessi eketana mela he mehey borey baynaba gido.
Leviticus22:22 Hinte mehiyape qooqe woyko meqo woyko wobbe woyko giyiya madunthi woyko puusoy woyko shattoy de7iyaba Godaas yarshofite. Taman xuussa yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan Godaas shiishopite.
Leviticus22:23 Iya bolla laqoy medheti woyko bolla paci de7iya korma woyko dorse issi asi ba dosan immiya yarsho shiishanaw danda7ees; shin qangetha gasos gidiko hessi eketenna.
Leviticus22:24 Sanga woyko madunxidaba Godaas yarshofite. Hinte biittan hessa melaba oothopite.
Leviticus22:25 Hinte giddon de7iya allaga asatape ekida hessa mela mehiya hinte Xoossaas katha yarsho oothidi shiishopite. Enta bolla borey de7iya gisho hinte gisho eketokona.”
Leviticus22:26 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus22:27 “Boora na7i woyko marazey woyko koley yeletiya wode laapun gallas ba aayera gam7o. Hospuntha gallasape doomidi
Leviticus22:28 Miizi woyko dorse I maraara issi gallas shukofite.
Leviticus22:29 “Hinte galata yarsho Godaas shiishiya wode hinte yarshoy eketana mela yarshite.
Leviticus22:30 Yarshoy yarshetida gallas meetetidi wuranaw koshshees; iyape wontos ashshofite. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus22:31 “Ta kiitta naagitenne polite. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus22:32 Ta geeshsha sunthaa tunisopite. Ta geeshshi gideysi Isra7eele asaa giddon eretanaw bessees. Hintena geeshshiya Goday tana.
Leviticus22:33 Hinte Xoosse gidanaw hintena Gibxe biittafe kessiday tana. Taani Godaa.”
Leviticus23:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus23:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; Geeshsha shiiqo yaagidi awaajishe
Leviticus23:3 Hinte usupun gallas ooso ootheeta
Leviticus23:4 Enta woden woden geeshsha shiiqo oothidi hinte bonchanaw bessiya eretida Godaa ba7aaleti haysata;
Leviticus23:5 Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas sa7i omarsiya wode Godaa Paasikay doomees.
Leviticus23:6 He ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan Godaas Uytha Ba7aale gallasay doomees. Hessa gisho
Leviticus23:7 He gallasatape koyro gallas geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite.
Leviticus23:8 Laapun gallas ubbaa Godaas xuussa yarsho yarshite; laapuntha gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite.
Leviticus23:9 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus23:10 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; taani hintew immiya biitta gelidi hinte kathi cakiya wode
Leviticus23:11 Goday hintebaa ekana mela Sambaata kaalliya wontetha gallas kahiney he mirqiya Godaa sinthan dhoqu oothidi yuushsho.
Leviticus23:12 Hinte mirqiya yuushshida he gallas borey bayna issi laytha maraze xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas shiishite.
Leviticus23:13 He yarshuwara issife shamaho zaytera munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame lo77o dhiille katha yarsho oothidi shiishite. Hessi Godaas sawo tonku giya xussa yarsho gidana; iyara issife issi litiro gidiya woyne ushshi shiishite.
Leviticus23:14 Ha yarshuwa hinte
Leviticus23:15 Hinte yuusho yarsho mirqiya ehida Sambaata wontetha gallasaape doomidi
Leviticus23:16 Laapuntha Sambaata kaalliya wontetha gallasay gakanaw ishatamu gallas taybite; wacha kathaafe yarsho Godaas shiishite.
Leviticus23:17 Hinte de7iya bessaafe nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o dhiilliyan irsho yeggidi uukida nam7u uythi yuusho yarshos ekidi yiite. Hessi wacha kathaafe Godaas shiiqiya yarsho gidees.
Leviticus23:18 He uythaara issife borey bayna issi laythi gidida laapun dorsa urgeta
Leviticus23:19 Qassi issi kole nagara yarshos
Leviticus23:20 Kahiney bayra kathaa
Leviticus23:21 He gallas hintew geeshsha shiiqo gidana mela awaajite; ooso oothopite. Haysi hinte de7iya bessa ubban yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus23:22 Hinte biittan kaxida kathaa cakiya wode gadiya gaxaa gakanaw cakofite; cakishin attida poshiliya qoropite; hessa manqotasinne bete asaas aggaagite. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
Leviticus23:23 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus23:24 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; laapuntha ageenan koyro gallasaa shempo gallas oothidi bonchite; hassayiso moyze punnishe geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite.
Leviticus23:25 He gallas Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishitepe attishin
Leviticus23:26 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus23:27 Laapuntha ageenan tammantho gallasay nagara atotetha gallas; he gallas geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite. He gallas hintena kawushite; Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishite.
Leviticus23:28 He gallasay Godaa hinte Xoossaa sinthan hinte nagaray qushetana mela hinte nagaraa atotetha gallas gidiya gisho he gallasan ooso oothopite.
Leviticus23:29 He gallas banatetha kawushonna asi oonika ba asaa giddofe kuretto.
Leviticus23:30 He gallas ooso oothiya uraa oonaka taani iya asaa giddofe kurana.
Leviticus23:31 He gallas ooso oothopite. Haysi hinte de7iya bessa ubban yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus23:32 Hessi hintew dummatida shempo gallas; he gallas hintenatethaa kawushite. He ageenan uddufuntho gallas omarsafe doomidi
Leviticus23:33 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus23:34 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; laapuntha ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasaape doomidi
Leviticus23:35 He gallasatape koyro gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite; ooso oothopite.
Leviticus23:36 Laapun gallas ubban Godaas xuussa yarsho shiishite; hospuntho gallasan geeshsha shiiqo shiiqite. Godaas xuussa katha yarsho shiishite. He gallasay baaliya wursetha gallas gidiya gisho
Leviticus23:37 Xuussa yarsho
Leviticus23:38 Ha yarshoti Godaa Sambaatatape
Leviticus23:39 Hinte gaden kaxida kathaa shiishidaape guye
Leviticus23:40 Koyro gallas lo77o mitha ayfe
Leviticus23:41 He baaliya laythan laythan laapuntha ageenan laapun gallas Godaa bonchite. Hessi yaana yeletethaas merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus23:42 He laapun gallasaa shaqaran de7ite; Isra7eele asi gidida ubbay he shaqaran de7o.
Leviticus23:43 Taani hintena Gibxe biittafe kessida wode shaqaran daana mela oothidaysa yaana yeletethay erana. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
Leviticus23:44 Hessada oothidi
Leviticus24:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Leviticus24:2 Xompey to7onna eexishe daana mela iyaw koshshiya gum7idi xillisida shamaho zayte new ehana mela Isra7eele asaa kiitta.
Leviticus24:3 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon de7iya markatetha magarajuwafe kare baggara omarsafe wonta gakanaw Aaroni Godaa sinthan he xompiya ubba wode eetho. Yaana yeletetha ubbaas hessi merinaa woga gido.
Leviticus24:4 Xompe wothiya walahi bayna worqa kocaa bolla de7iya xompeti Godaa sinthan ubba wode eexana mela Aaroni naago.
Leviticus24:5 Tammanne nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o dhiille ekada tammanne nam7u uythi uuka.
Leviticus24:6 He uythata usupuna usupuna nam7u maaran Godaa sinthan de7iya walahi bayna worqa xarpheeza bolla wotha.
Leviticus24:7 Godaas xuugetanaw shiiqida katha yarsho gideysa erisanaw
Leviticus24:8 Ha uythaa Sambaatan Sambaatan ubba wode Aaroni Isra7eele asaa gisho merinaa caaqo oothidi Godaa sinthan wotho.
Leviticus24:9 Hessi Aaronanne iya adde nayta gakiya gisho; enti iya geeshsha bessan mo. Hessi Godaas xuussa yarshuwafe wogaada Aaronanne iya nayta gakiya gisho gidiya gisho Ubbaafe Geeshshi.
Leviticus24:10 Ba aayen Isra7eele
Leviticus24:11 Ba aayen Isra7eele gidida uray Godaa sunthaa cayis; yaatin iya asay Museko ehidosona. He uraa aayiya Daane koche gidida Debira na7a. I sunthay Salomito.
Leviticus24:12 He uraa waataneko Godaa sheney qoncana gakanaw iya naagisidosona.
Leviticus24:13 Goday Muse haysada yaagis;
Leviticus24:14 He cayida uraa gutaape gaxa kessa. I cayishin si7ida asa ubbay banta kushiya iya huuphiya bolla wotho; Isra7eele maabara ubbay iya shucha caddidi wodho.
Leviticus24:15 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; issi asi ba Xoossaa cayiko
Leviticus24:16 Godaa sunthaa cayiya asi hayqo; Isra7eele maabara ubbay iya shuchan caddo. Bete asi woyko gade asi Godaa sunthaa cayiko hayqo.
Leviticus24:17 Ase wodhida asi hayqo.
Leviticus24:18 Asa mehe wodhida asi oonika ba wodhida mehiya gisho paxa mehiya qanxo.
Leviticus24:19 Issi asi ba shooruwa qohiko
Leviticus24:20 Menthiko me77o; ayfe gisho ayfe; acha gisho ache. Asa bolla qoho gathida oonika I gathida qohuwada iya bolla gako.
Leviticus24:21 Mehe wodhida asi he mehiya gatiya qanxo; shin ase wodhida asi hayqo.
Leviticus24:22 Bete asaasinne Isra7eele asas higgey issino gido. Taani Godaa hinte Xoossaa.
Leviticus24:23 Musey hessa Isra7eele asaas odis; enti he cayida uraa gutaape gaxa kessidi
Leviticus25:1 Siina zuma bolla Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
Leviticus25:2 Neeni Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; taani hintew immiya biitta hinte geliya wode biittiya ba huuphen Godaa Sambaata boncho.
Leviticus25:3 Usupun laythi kumethi hinte gaden zerite; usupun laythi kumethi hinte woyne xeera xunqite; iya ayfiya maxite.
Leviticus25:4 Shin laapuntha laythay biittas shempo Sambaata; hessi Godaa Sambaata. He laapuntha laythan gaden zeropite; hinte woyne xeeraa xunqofite.
Leviticus25:5 Hinte biittan aasebo kaxidaba shiishopite; woyne xeera xunqofite; ayfiya maxopite. He laythay biittas kumethi shempo laythi gido.
Leviticus25:6 He Sambaata laythan biittay oosetonna de7ishin kaxiya kathaa neeni
Leviticus25:7 Hessadaka
Leviticus25:8 Laythatas giddon de7iya laapun Sambaatata tayba; laapun Sambaatatas laytha tayboy laapun toho laapuna; hessika oytamanne uddufun laythi.
Leviticus25:9 Laapuntha ageenan
Leviticus25:10 Ishatammantho laytha dummayidi
Leviticus25:11 He laythay hintew Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale. He laythan zeropite; aasebo kaxidaba cakofite; xeera xunqonna ayfida woyne ayfiya maxopite.
Leviticus25:12 Hessi Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale gidiya gisho I hintew geeshshi; goyonna coo denban kaxidaba miite.
Leviticus25:13 He Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode asi ubbay ba gade simmo.
Leviticus25:14 Hinte
Leviticus25:15 Hinte Ishatammantho Laytha Baaliyape guye de7iya laythata taybuwan hinte shooruwape shammite. Hinte shooroy gadey kathi immanaw de7iya laythata taybuwada bayzo.
Leviticus25:16 Laytha tayboy daro gidiko gatey darees; laythata tayboy guuxiko gatey guuxees. Gadiya lo77otethaada hinte shooroy hintew bayzees.
Leviticus25:17 Hinte issoy issuwa cimmofite; shin hinte
Leviticus25:18 Hinte ha biittan saro daana mela ta kiitta polite; ta higgiya naagite.
Leviticus25:19 Biittay ba ayfiya hintew immin hinte kallana gakanaw maana; he biittan hinte saro daana.
Leviticus25:20 Heko
Leviticus25:21 taani usupuntho laythan ta anjuwa hintew kiittana; biittay heedzu laythas gidiya kathi immana.
Leviticus25:22 Hospuntha laythan hinte
Leviticus25:23 Biittay tabaa gidiya gishonne hinte he biittan imathenne bete gididi de7iya gisho biitta simmonnaada oothidi bayzopite.
Leviticus25:24 Hinte oykida gadiya godati
Leviticus25:25 Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi ba gadiyape bayziko
Leviticus25:26 Iyaw he gadiya woziya dabboy dhayiko
Leviticus25:27 Ba bayzida wodepe doomidi de7iya laytha taybidi
Leviticus25:28 Shin iyaw he gadiya wozanaw gidiya miishey dhayiko
Leviticus25:29 Issi asi gimbetida katama giddon de7iya keethe bayziko
Leviticus25:30 Shin issi laytha giddon wozanaw danda7etonna ixiko
Leviticus25:31 Shin gimbetiboona heeran de7iya keethati gade mela wozetoosona. Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aale wode bayzidaysas simmoosona.
Leviticus25:32 Gidoshin
Leviticus25:33 Leewetape issi asi enta katamaa giddon de7iya keethaa bayzidi wozanaw xoonetiko
Leviticus25:34 Shin enta katamaa yuushuwan de7iya hentha biittay entaw merinaa aqo gidiya gisho bayzetenna.
Leviticus25:35 Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi bana aysanaw xoonetiko
Leviticus25:36 Iya neera wothanaw iyape yelo ekofa woyko wodhe moopa. Shin ne Xoossaa yayya.
Leviticus25:37 Ne bira iyaw yelora tal7ofa; ne kathaa iyaw wodhera bayzopa.
Leviticus25:38 Hintew Kanaane biitta immanawunne hinte Xoossaa gidanaw
Leviticus25:39 Issi Isra7eele asi manqidi
Leviticus25:40 I bete asada une oothidi Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw neera de7o.
Leviticus25:41 He wode I ba naytara issife ne soope keyidi ba soo asaako boo; ba aawa gade simmo.
Leviticus25:42 Isra7eele asay taani Gibxe biittafe kessida ta aylle gidiya gisho enti aylletethas bayzetofo.
Leviticus25:43 Neeni enta un7ethada haaropa; shin neeni
Leviticus25:44 New addenne macca aylley daana mela koyiko
Leviticus25:45 Hinte biittan de7iya bete asaa nayta shammanaw danda7eeta. Hinte biittan de7ishe yeletida enta soo asaape hintew shalo oothanaw danda7eeta.
Leviticus25:46 Hintefe guye
Leviticus25:47 Ne matan de7iya imathi woyko bete asi duretiko
Leviticus25:48 I bayzetidi simmin
Leviticus25:49 Iya aawa ishay
Leviticus25:50 I bana shammida uraara gididi
Leviticus25:51 Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw daro laythi attidaba gidiko
Leviticus25:52 Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw attida laythay guutha gidiko
Leviticus25:53 I laythan laythan une oothiya asada bana shammidaysara de7o; iya goday iya un7ethidi haaranaw bessenna.
Leviticus25:54 Shin I hessa mela hanon wozetonna ixiko
Leviticus25:55 Isra7eele asay
Leviticus26:1 Goyinnanaw eeqata oothopite; qassi hawulte woyko eeqa tuussu woyko shucha eeqa essofite. Taani Godaa
Leviticus26:2 Ta Sambaatata naagite; ta goyinno bessaa bonchite. Taani Godaa.
Leviticus26:3 Hinte ta higgiya kaallikonne ta kiita naagiko
Leviticus26:4 taani hintew ira woden woden immana; biittay kathaa darsidi dolisana; gaden de7iya mithay ayfana.
Leviticus26:5 Hinte kathaa shiishidi ongonna de7ishin woyne maxiya wodey gakana; woyniya maxidi wursonna kathaa zeriya wodey gakana. Hinte kallana gakanaw kathi maana; hinte
Leviticus26:6 Taani biittas sarotethi immana; oonika hintena yashisonna hinte zin7ana. Iita do7ata taani biittafe dhaysana; hinte biittan nam7antho oli dendenna.
Leviticus26:7 Hinte morketa hinte yedethana; enti hinte sinthan mashshan hayqana.
Leviticus26:8 Hintefe ichashay xeeta yedethana; qassi xeetay tammu mukula yedethana. Hinte morketi hinte sinthan mashshan hayqana.
Leviticus26:9 Taani hintena maarota ayfen be7ana; hintena ayfisana; hintena darsana; taani ta caaquwa hintera minthana.
Leviticus26:10 Hinte shaacha kathaa midi wursonna de7ishe
Leviticus26:11 Taani ta de7iya bessaa hinte giddon oothana; taani hintena ixike.
Leviticus26:12 Taani hinte giddon hemetana; hinte Xoossaa gidana; hinte ta ase gidana.
Leviticus26:13 Hinte Gibxetas aylle gidonna mela he biittafe hintena kessida Goday
Leviticus26:14 Shin hinte taana si7onna ixikonne
Leviticus26:15 ta wogaa kadhiko
Leviticus26:16 he wode taani hinte bolla haysa oothana; hinte akeekona de7ishin yashshi
Leviticus26:17 Ta hintena iita ayfen xeellana; hinte morketa sinthan hinte kundana; hintena ixeysati haarana; oonika yedethonna hinte baqatana.
Leviticus26:18 Hessa ubbaa oothinka hinte tana si7onna ixiko
Leviticus26:19 Ta hinte otoruwa menthana; saluwa birata; sa7aa naase birata oothana.
Leviticus26:20 Hinte biittay kathi
Leviticus26:21 Hinte taw ixas giikonne tana si7onna ixiko
Leviticus26:22 Taani hinte bolla bazzo do7ata yeddana; enti hinte nayta bonqana. Hinte meheta dhaysana; hinte taybuwa guuthana; hessa gaason hinte hemetiya ogey husatana.
Leviticus26:23 He seera ubban hinte taako simmonna ixiko
Leviticus26:24 he wode taka hintew ixas gaana. Hinte nagaraa gisho taani ta huuphen hintena laapun dako seerana.
Leviticus26:25 Ta caaquwa hinte menthida gisho
Leviticus26:26 Hinte kathaa taani dhaysiya wode tammu maccasati issi beshen uythu uukana; he uythaa mizaanen shaakidi ekana; hinte hessa maana shin kalleketa.
Leviticus26:27 Ha ubban hinte tana si7onna ixikonne hinte iitatethan gujidi biiko
Leviticus26:28 ta hinte bolla hanqon dendana. Hinte nagaraa gisho taani hintena laapun dako seerana.
Leviticus26:29 Hinte
Leviticus26:30 Taani
Leviticus26:31 Taani hinte katamata baysa oothana; hinte goyinno bessata dhaysana; hinte sawiya yarshuwa singike.
Leviticus26:32 Taani hinte biitta dhaysana; he biittan de7iya morketi hessan malaaletana.
Leviticus26:33 Taani hintena kawotethata giddon laallana; hinte bolla ta mashshaa shoddana. Hinte biittay baysatana; hinte katamati laaletana.
Leviticus26:34 Hinte morketa biittan de7iya wode
Leviticus26:35 Hinte he biittan de7iya wode Sambaatatan demmiboonna shempuwa ha77i baysa gidida wode demmana.
Leviticus26:36 Hinte di7etidi biya wode guye attida asata wozanan yashshi yeddana; carkoy qaathiya bonco girsay enta daganthana; enti mashshafe baqatiya mela baqatana; enta oonika yedethonna kundana.
Leviticus26:37 Oonika yedethonna olape baqatiyada baqatishe
Leviticus26:38 Kawotethata giddon hinte dhayana; hinte morketa biittan hinte mitetidi dhayana.
Leviticus26:39 Morketa biittan attidaysati banta nagaraa gishonne banta aawata nagaraa gisho gilqidi dhayana.
Leviticus26:40 Shin enti banta nagaraanne ta bolla makallidi si7onna ixida banta aawata nagaraa paaxiko
Leviticus26:41 ta enta ixanaadanne enta morketa biitta yedethannaada oothida banta nagaraa aggikonne enta kiitetonna wozanay simmiko
Leviticus26:42 Taani Yayqoobara
Leviticus26:43 Enta biittay baysa attana; he enti dhayin baysa gididi de7ida woden biittay Sambaata bonchishe ufaytana. Enti ta kiitaa kadhida gishonne ta wogaa leqida gisho banta nagaraa seera ekana.
Leviticus26:44 Gidoshin
Leviticus26:45 Taani enta Xoossaa gidanaw
Leviticus26:46 Goday Siina zuma bolla Muse baggara baapenne Isra7eele asaape giddon wothida wogati kiitatinne higgeti haysata.
Leviticus27:1 Goday Museko haysada yaagis.
Leviticus27:2 Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagada oda; issi asi Godaas ase immanaw qangiko
Leviticus27:3 Laatamu laythafe bidi usupun tammu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen usupun xeetu bira santime qanxo.
Leviticus27:4 Macca gidiko hastamu bira santime qanxo.
Leviticus27:5 Ichashu laythafe bidi laatamu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko laatamu bira santime qanxo; qassi maccas gidiko tammu bira santime qanxo.
Leviticus27:6 Issi ageenape bidi ichashu laythi gakanaw de7iya adde gidiko ichashu bira santime qanxo; qassi maccas gidiko heedzu bira santime qanxo.
Leviticus27:7 Laythi usupun tammanne iyape bolla gidida adde gidiko
Leviticus27:8 Qangida uray neeni gammatidaysa qanxanaw danda7onna manqo gidiko
Leviticus27:9 Issi asi Godaas yarsho oothidi immanaw qangiday mehe gidiko Godaas imetiya mehe ubbay geeshshi gidees.
Leviticus27:10 He mehiya gisho hara mehe immofo; woyko iya hara mehera laammofo. Lo77uwa iitaara woyko iitaa lo77uwara laammofo; shin I laammiko
Leviticus27:11 Issi asi Godaas yarsho oothidi immanaw gepida mehey geeshshi gidonna ixiko
Leviticus27:12 Lo77o gidin
Leviticus27:13 Shin he mehiya goday zaaridi wozanaw koyiko
Leviticus27:14 Issi asi ba keethaa geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko
Leviticus27:15 Ba keethaa geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayida uray zaaridi wozanaw koyiko
Leviticus27:16 Issi asi ba laata gadiyape shaakidi geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko
Leviticus27:17 I ba gadiya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aalepe doomidi geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayiko
Leviticus27:18 Shin I ba gadiya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley aadhin
Leviticus27:19 He gadiya geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayida uray zaaridi wozanaw koyiko
Leviticus27:20 Shin I gadiya zaaridi wozanaape sinthe hara asas bayziko
Leviticus27:21 Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakin gadey yedetiya wode he gadey nam7antho guye simmonna Godaas geeshshi gido; he gadey kahinetaba gidees.
Leviticus27:22 Issi asi hara asape shammida gadiya geeshshi oothidi Godaas dummayanaw koyiko
Leviticus27:23 kaalliya Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakanaw de7iya gatiya kahiney gammatiko
Leviticus27:24 Ishatammantho Laytha Ba7aaley gakiya wode he gadey koyro laatan ekidi bayzida uraas simmees.
Leviticus27:25 Enta gatey geeshsha dunkaaniyan eretida mizaanen gammatetees. (Issi saqiley laatamu Geera gidees).
Leviticus27:26 Shin oonika bayra yeletida mehe Godaas dummayidi shiishanaw danda7enna; I kaseka Godaaba. Miizi woyko dorse gidin Godaaba.
Leviticus27:27 He mehey geeshshi gidonna ixiko
Leviticus27:28 Issi asi Godaas dummayidi immidabay ayba gidikoka
Leviticus27:29 Asaa giddofe hayqana mela pirdetida asi oonika wozetofo; he uray hayqo.
Leviticus27:30 Gaden kaxida kathi woyko mitha ayfe gidin tammaafe issoy Godaaba. Hessi Godaas geeshshi.
Leviticus27:31 Issi asi ba asraata wozanaw koyiko
Leviticus27:32 Miiza asraata woyko dorsa asraata woyko deesha asraata gidin
Leviticus27:33 Tammantho mehey iita gidin
Leviticus27:34 Siina zuma bolla Goday Muse baggara Isra7eele asaa kiitida kiitay haysa.
Numbers1:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida nam7antho laythan
Numbers1:2 “Neeranne Aaronara Isra7eele asa ubbaa enta kochan kochan
Numbers1:3 Laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida
Numbers1:4 Kochape kochape issi issi asi ba soo asaas halaqa gididi hintena maaddo.
Numbers1:5 Hintena maaddana asaa sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Robeelape
Numbers1:6 Simoonape Sursadaya na7a Salumi7eela;
Numbers1:7 Yihudape Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona;
Numbers1:8 Yisakoorape Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela;
Numbers1:9 Zabloonape Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba;
Numbers1:10 Yoosefa naytape
Numbers1:11 Biniyaamepe Gadiyoona na7aa Abdaana;
Numbers1:12 Daanape Amsadaya na7aa Aki7ezera;
Numbers1:13 Aseerape Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela;
Numbers1:14 Gaadape Ragu7eela na7aa Elyaasafa;
Numbers1:15 Niftaalemepe Enaana na7a Akira;
Numbers1:16 Ha asay banta aawata keethaa asaape kaalethanaw dooretida Isra7eele yarata halaqata” yaagis.
Numbers1:17 Yaatin Museynne Aaroni he dooretida asata ekidi
Numbers1:18 nam7antho ageenan koyro gallasan kumetha maabara xeegidi shiishidosona. Asay banta kochan kochan
Numbers1:19 Goday iya Kiittidaysada Musey enta Siina mela biittan taybis.
Numbers1:20 Oletanaw danda7iya adde ubbay

Numbers1:46 Kumetha asaa tayboy 603
Numbers1:47 Shin Leewe kochati taybetibookona.
Numbers1:48 Gaasoyka kase Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Numbers1:49 “Leewe kochata taybopa; enta attida Isra7eele asaa taybon gelsofa.
Numbers1:50 Leeweta
Numbers1:51 Geeshsha Dunkaaney shodetiya wode Leeweti shoddo; Geeshsha Dunkaaney eqiya wode Leeweti esso; entafe hari oonika iyako shiiqiko hayqo.
Numbers1:52 Hanko Isra7eele asay banta heeraninne banta cugan cugan shaaketidi
Numbers1:53 Shin Godaa hanqoy Isra7eele maabara bolla wodhonna mela Leeweti Dunkaaniya yuushuwan banta dunkaaniya dunkaanidi naago” yaagis.
Numbers1:54 Isra7eele asay Goday Muse kiitida ubbaa oothidosona.
Numbers2:1 Goday Musenne Aarona haysada yaagis;
Numbers2:2 Isra7eele asay banta kochan kochan mallanne banta kocha kocha erisiya bandira kaallidi
Numbers2:3 Doloha baggara Yihuda kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Yihuda kochaa kaalethey Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona.
Numbers2:4 Iya cugaa tayboy 74
Numbers2:5 Yihuda gakidi dunkaananay Yisakoore kochaa. Yisakoora kochaa kaalethey Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela.
Numbers2:6 Iya cugaa tayboy 54
Numbers2:7 Iyape kaallidi Zabloona kochay dunkaanees. Zabloona kochaa kaalethey Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba.
Numbers2:8 Iya cugaa tayboy 57
Numbers2:9 Yihuda baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 186
Numbers2:10 Dugeha baggara Robeela kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Enta kaalethey Sadiyoora na7aa Elisuura.
Numbers2:11 Iya cugaa tayboy 46
Numbers2:12 Robeela gakidi dunkaaney Simoona kochaa. Simoona kochaa kaalethey Zurishadaya na7a Salumi7eela.
Numbers2:13 Iya cuga tayboy 59
Numbers2:14 Iyape kaallidi Gaade kochay dunkaanees. Enta kaalethey De7u7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.
Numbers2:15 Enta cugaa tayboy 45
Numbers2:16 Robeela
Numbers2:17 Hessafe guye
Numbers2:18 Wuloha baggara Efreema baggay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Entana kaalethey Amhuda na7aa Elishama7a.
Numbers2:19 Enta cugaa tayboy 40
Numbers2:20 Enta gakidi Minaase kochay dunkaanees. Entana kaalethey Padazuura na7aa Gamali7eela.
Numbers2:21 Enta olanchota tayboy 32
Numbers2:22 Iyape kaallidi dunkaaney Biniyaame kochaa. Biniyaame kochaa kaalethey Gidi7oona na7aa Abdaana.
Numbers2:23 Enta cugaa tayboy 35
Numbers2:24 Efreema baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 108
Numbers2:25 Pudeha baggara Daane kochay banta malla kaallidi dunkaanona. Entana kaalethey Amsadaya na7aa Aki7ezera.
Numbers2:26 Enta cugaa tayboy 62
Numbers2:27 Entana gakidi Aseera kochay dunkaanees. Aseera kochaa kaalethey Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela.
Numbers2:28 Enta cugaa tayboy 41
Numbers2:29 Iyape kaallidi Niftaaleme kochay dunkaanees. Niftaaleme kochaa kaalethey Enaana na7aa Akira.
Numbers2:30 Enta cugaa tayboy 53
Numbers2:31 Daane baggan dunkaanida olanchota tayboy 157
Numbers2:32 Banta kochan kochan shaaketidi taybetida Isra7eele olanchota tayboy 603
Numbers2:33 Shin Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Numbers2:34 Isra7eele asay
Numbers3:1 Goday Siina zuma bolla Musera odetiya wode de7iya Aaronanne Muse soo asay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa.
Numbers3:2 Aarona adde nayta sunthay
Numbers3:3 He Aarona adde nayti ubbay
Numbers3:4 Shin enta giddofe Naadabeynne Abyoodi Siina mela biittan Godaa sinthan geeshshi gidonna taman yarsho yarshidi hayqidosona. Entaw na7i baawa. Hessa gisho
Numbers3:5 Goday Museko
Numbers3:6 “Leewe kochata ehada kahiniya Aarona maaddana mela enta iya sinthe shiisha.
Numbers3:7 Enti Aaronanne Isra7eele maabara ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan dumma dumma ooso oothidi maaddo.
Numbers3:8 Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon de7iya miishe ubbaa aawatethan ayso. Isra7eele asaa gisho Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon ooso ubbaa enti oothonna.
Numbers3:9 Aaronanne iya adde nayta maadana mela Leeweta shuuma. Enti Isra7eele asaa giddofe shaaketidi Aarona maaddana mela imetidosona.
Numbers3:10 Aaronanne iya adde nayta kahine oothada shuuma. Entafe hara asi oonika Geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqiko hayqo” yaagis.
Numbers3:11 Qassi Goday Museko
Numbers3:12 “Taani Isra7eelen yeletiya bayra adde nayta gisho Leeweta ekas. Leeweti tabaa.
Numbers3:13 Ayis giiko
Numbers3:14 Qassika Goday Museko Siina mela biittan
Numbers3:15 “Leeweta enta kochan
Numbers3:16 Yaatin Goday kiitidaysada Musey enta taybis.
Numbers3:17 Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona
Numbers3:18 Gedisoona adde nayti Libinanne Same7a geetetoosona.
Numbers3:19 Qahaata adde nayti Amraama
Numbers3:20 Meraara adde nayti Mahilanne Musa geetetoosona. Leeweta mayzati haysata.
Numbers3:21 Nam7u Gedisoona kochati Libinanne Sim7a.
Numbers3:22 Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 7
Numbers3:23 Gedisoona kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape guyen wuloha baggan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers3:24 Gedisoona kochaa soo asaa halaqay La7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.
Numbers3:25 Gedisoona kochaas Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla de7iya aawatethay
Numbers3:26 Dunkaaniya yuushon de7iya dabaaba magarajuwa
Numbers3:27 Qahaata kochati Amraama
Numbers3:28 Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 8
Numbers3:29 Qahaata kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape dugeha baggara dunkaanidosona.
Numbers3:30 Qahaata kochaa kaalethey Uzi7eela na7aa Elzafaana.
Numbers3:31 Enti Taabotiya
Numbers3:32 Leeweta halaqay kahiniya Aarona na7aa Alaazara. I Geeshsha Bessan ootheysatas shuuma.
Numbers3:33 Meraara kochati Mahilanne Musa.
Numbers3:34 Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida adde nayta tayboy 6
Numbers3:35 Meraara kochaa kaalethey Abikaala na7aa Zur7eela. Meraara kochay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape pudeha baggara dunkaanidosona.
Numbers3:36 Meraara kochay Dunkaaniya tuuqeta
Numbers3:37 Gujidika
Numbers3:38 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya sinthan doloha baggara Musey
Numbers3:39 Goday
Numbers3:40 Goday Museko
Numbers3:41 Isra7eele bayra adde nayta bessan Leeweta
Numbers3:42 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eelen bayra yeletida ubbaa taybis.
Numbers3:43 Yeletin issi ageenanne iyape bolla gidida bayra adde nayta tayboy 22
Numbers3:44 Goday Museko
Numbers3:45 “Isra7eele bayra adde nayta bessan Leeweta taw dummaya. Qassi Isra7eele bayra meheta bessan Leeweta bayra mehiya taw dummaya; taani Godaa.
Numbers3:46 Isra7eele bayra adde nayta tayboy Leeweta bayra adde nayta taybuwape 273 aadhiya gisho he attidaysata taw woza.
Numbers3:47 Issuwas issuwas geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen ichashu bira santimen woza.
Numbers3:48 He wozo miishiya Aaronasinne iya adde naytas imma” yaagis.
Numbers3:49 Palahidaysata wozo miishiya Musey shiishis.
Numbers3:50 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya mizaaniya liken Isra7eele bayra adde nayta wozo miishiya 1
Numbers3:51 Goday kiitidaysada Musey wozo miishiya Aaronasinne iya adde naytas immis.
Numbers4:1 Goday Musenne Aarona haysada yaagis;
Numbers4:2 “Leewe kochatape Qahaata kochatanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
Numbers4:3 Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
Numbers4:4 Qahaata kochati Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothana oosoy Dunkaaniyan go7etiya geeshsha miisheta aawatethan naago.
Numbers4:5 “Asay gutaape baanaw dendiya wode Aaroninne iya adde nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo gelidi
Numbers4:6 He kamaa bolla liiqo galba kammo; iya bolla gujidi kaalose carqe kammo; tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
Numbers4:7 “Godaas shiiqiya uytha wothiya xarpheezaa bolla kaalose carqe kammo. Xarpheeza bolla saaneta
Numbers4:8 He ubbaa bolla zo7o carqe kammidi iya bolla qassi liiqo galba kammo; hessafe kaallidi tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
Numbers4:9 “Kaalose carqe ekidi xompe wothiya kocaa
Numbers4:10 Yaatidi iya miisheta ubbaa liiqo galban kammidi tookiya arsa bolla wothona.
Numbers4:11 “Kaallidi worqa yarsho saaxiniya kaalose carqen kammo; qassi iya bollara liiqo galba yeggo. Yaatidi tookiya kasota sagaayotan aatho.
Numbers4:12 Hessadaka
Numbers4:13 “Naase yarsho bessaafe biduwa pitidi iya bolla ocha teera daaniya carqe kammo.
Numbers4:14 Yarsho bessan go7etiya miisheta ubbaa; tama cooceta
Numbers4:15 Aaroninne iya adde nayti
Numbers4:16 “Kahiniya Aarona na7ay Alaazari xompe zaytiya
Numbers4:17 Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Numbers4:18 “Qahaata kochay Leewe kochaa giddofe hayqidi dhayana mela oothopite.
Numbers4:19 Ubbaafe Geeshsha miishiyako shiiqidi hayqonna mela Aaroninne iya adde nayti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddo gelidi
Numbers4:20 Qahaata kochay hayqonnaada geeshsha miisheta be7anaw guutha wodeska Dunkaaniya giddo gelopo” yaagis.
Numbers4:21 Goday Museko
Numbers4:22 “Leewe kochaafe Gedisoona kochaanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
Numbers4:23 Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
Numbers4:24 Gedisoona kochati oothana oosoy haysafe kaallidi de7eysa;
Numbers4:25 enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniya gaatha kamaa
Numbers4:26 Hessadaka Geeshsha Dunkaaniyanne yarsho bessa yuushuwan de7iya dabaaba magarajota
Numbers4:27 Tooho gidin
Numbers4:28 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon Gedisoona kochay oothana oosoy haysa. Enta oosuwa kahiniya Aarona na7ay Itamaari kaallidi oosiso.
Numbers4:29 “Leewe kochaafe Meraara kochaanne enta soo asaa asaa shaakada tayba.
Numbers4:30 Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata tayba.
Numbers4:31 “Enti Dunkaaniya tuuqeta
Numbers4:32 Dunkaaniya yuushon dabaaban eqiya tuussata
Numbers4:33 Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon Meraara kochay oothana oosoy haysa. Enti oothana ooso ubbaa kahiniya Aarona na7aa Itamaari aawatethan kaallidi oosiso” yaagis.
Numbers4:34 Musey
Numbers4:35 Laythi 30-50 gakida adde ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata taybidosona.
Numbers4:36 Enta tayboy 2
Numbers4:37 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Qahaata kochati haysata.
Numbers4:38 Gedisoona kochati banta soo asan asan shaaketidi taybetidosona.
Numbers4:39 Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbaa Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothanaw danda7eyisata
Numbers4:40 tayboy 2
Numbers4:41 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Gedisoona kochati haysata.
Numbers4:42 Meraara kochati banta soo asan asan shaaketidi taybetidosona.
Numbers4:43 Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbay
Numbers4:44 tayboy 3
Numbers4:45 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Geeshsha Dunkaaniya giddon oothana mela Museynne Aaroni taybida Meraara kochati haysata.
Numbers4:46 Musey
Numbers4:47 Laythi 30-50 gakida addeti ubbay
Numbers4:48 Leeweta tayboy 8
Numbers4:49 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Numbers5:1 Goday Museko
Numbers5:2 “Isra7eele asay baro hargen oyketida asi woyko asatethafe goggiyabay de7iya asi woyko aha bochidi tunida asi oonaka banta gutaape kessana mela kiita.
Numbers5:3 Ta enta giddon de7iya gutaa tunisonna mela ha geeshshi gidonna asati macca gidin adde enta giddofe kessada goodda” yaagis.
Numbers5:4 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eele asay enta ubbaa gutaape kessidi gooddidosona.
Numbers5:5 Goday Museko
Numbers5:6 “Neeni Isra7eele asaas haysa oda; adde gidin woyko macci gidin oonika Godaas ammanetona ixidi hara asi naaqiko he uray bala oothis.
Numbers5:7 I ba nagara paaxo; ba nagara acciya kumetha aca bolla xeetape laatamu kushe gujidi I naaqida uraas ciggo.
Numbers5:8 Shin he naaqetida uray hayqidaba gidiko
Numbers5:9 Qassi Isra7eele asay Godaas immiya geeshsha imo ubbay he kahiniyas gido.
Numbers5:10 Issi issi asi immiya geeshsha imotay he uraaba
Numbers5:11 Goday Museko
Numbers5:12 “Isra7eele asaas yaagada oda; issi addiya machiya kare hemetada iyaw ammanetona ixiko
Numbers5:13 hara addera aqiko
Numbers5:14 I azinay iyo tunasu gidi sidhiko
Numbers5:15 he addey ba machiw kahiniyako efo. I gisho yarshanaw issi kilo giraame banga dhiille efo. He addey ba machiw sidhida gisho
Numbers5:16 Kahiney he maccasiw Godaa sinthan esso.
Numbers5:17 Geeshsha haathi keren eko. Geeshsha Dunkaaniya wuygiyape biitta ekidi he haathan gujo.
Numbers5:18 He maccasiw Godaa sinthan esso; he maccase huuphiya billidi sidhida gisho yarshetiya qohuwa qoncisiya katha yarsho I kushen wotho; qassi kahiney ba kushen baadethi ehiya camo haatha keren oyko.
Numbers5:19 Hessafe guye
Numbers5:20 Shin neeni ne azina aggada hara addera aqada tunidaba gidiko
Numbers5:21 Goday ne yelo keetha gundisidi
Numbers5:22 Ha baadethi ehiya haathay ne uluwan gelidi ne uluwa gabbiso; ne yelo keethaa gundiso” yaagidi caaqiso. Maccasiya
Numbers5:23 “Haysafe guye
Numbers5:24 Qangethi ehiya haatha maccasiw ushshanaape sinthe
Numbers5:25 kahiney maccase kushepe yarsho dhiilliya ekidi
Numbers5:26 Kahiney yarsho kathaafe zolle ekidi bala qoncisiya yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan xuuggo. Hessafe guye
Numbers5:27 Iya ba azinaas ammanetona ixada tunidaba gidiko baadetha haathay I uluwan camo saho medho. I uloy gabbana; I yelo keethayka gundana; iya ba asaa giddon baadetidaaro gidana.
Numbers5:28 Iya tunaboonabanne xillo maccas gidiko
Numbers5:29 “Issi asi ba machiw laymatasu gidi sidhiko woyko qaanatiko yarsho bessi ehidi iyo esso. Kahiney he wogaa ubbaa I bolla polo.
Numbers5:30 
Numbers5:31 Azinay
Numbers6:1 Goday Museko
Numbers6:2 “Isra7eele asaa haysada gada kiita; adde gidin woyko macca bana Godaas dummayidi Naazirawe gidanaw qangiko
Numbers6:3 woyne woyko hara mathoyiya ushshi uyopo. Caalabanne mathoyaba uyopo; woyne teera
Numbers6:4 I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban
Numbers6:5 “I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban
Numbers6:6 I bana Godaas dummayida woden ubban ahako shiiqopo.
Numbers6:7 I bana dummayidaysa erisey iya huuphiya gidiya gisho
Numbers6:8 I bana Godaas dummayida wode ubban Godaas geeshshi.
Numbers6:9 “Asi iya matan qoponna hayqiko
Numbers6:10 Hospuntha gallasan nam7u holleta woyko nam7u kuraachota Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen de7iya kahiniyas eho.
Numbers6:11 Naazirawey aha bochidi tunida gisho nagarape iya geeshshanaw kahiney holletape issuwa nagara yarsho
Numbers6:12 I bana zaaridi Godaas dummayo. Yaatidi issi laytha maraze naaqo yarsho oothidi yarsho. I Godaas dummayida huuphey tunida gisho
Numbers6:13 “Issi naazirawey ba qangetha wodiya ongida wode polana wogay haysa; Geeshsha Dunkaaniya penge bidi;
Numbers6:14 borey bayna issi laytha dorsa urge xuussa yarshos
Numbers6:15 Qassi katha yarshonne ushsha yarsho entara issife yarshanaw eho. He katha yarshoy irshoy geliboonna lo77o dhiille shamaho zaytera uuketida orde uythinne shamaho zayten tiyetida lee7o gaytan eho.
Numbers6:16 “Kahiney he ubbaa nagara yarshonne xuussa yarsho oothidi Godaas yarsho.
Numbers6:17 Kahiney maraziya gaytan de7iya uythaara Godaas issifetetha yarsho oothidi yarsho; kaallidi katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa yarsho.
Numbers6:18 Naazirawey Godaas dummayida ba huuphiya Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen meedetidi
Numbers6:19 “Naazirawey ba huuphiya meedetidaape guye
Numbers6:20 Yaatidi kahiney he ubbaa yuusho yarsho oothidi

Numbers6:22 Goday Museko

Numbers6:24 “ ‘Goday hintena anjo
Numbers6:25 Goday ba som7uwa hintew poo7iso; I hintew qadheto;
Numbers6:26 Goday ba keeha ayfiyan xeello; I hintew sarotethi immo’ yaagidi anjite” yaaga.
Numbers6:27 “Enti Isra7eele asaa ta sunthan anjiya wode ta enta anjana” yaagis.

Numbers7:84 Yarsho bessay tiyetiya wode Godaas dummayanaw Isra7eele halaqati ehida imotay haysafe kaallidi de7eysa. Birape oosetida tammanne nam7u picca saanetanne ollatiya saaneta; worqafe oosetida tammanne nam7u ixaaney kumida shaateta ehidosona.
Numbers7:85 Issoy issoy 1
Numbers7:86 Ixaaney kumida tammanne nam7u worqa shaateta 1.4 kilo giraame geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen shiishidosona.
Numbers7:87 Xuussa yarshos shiiqida mehey katha yarshuwara wolla tammanne nam7u wofaanota
Numbers7:88 Issifetetha yarshos laatamanne oyddu boorati
Numbers7:89 Musey Godaara odetanaw Geeshsha Dunkaaniya geliya wode caaqo taabotiya kamaa bolla de7iya nam7u kiruubetape giddon gididi Goday odishin si7is.
Numbers8:1 Goday Museko
Numbers8:2 “Aaroni laapun xompeta kocaa bolla wothiya wode poo7oy sintha baggara de7iya heera poo7isana mela oothidi wotho gada oda” yaagis.
Numbers8:3 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Numbers8:4 Xompe wothiya kocay
Numbers8:5 Goday Museko
Numbers8:6 “Isra7eele asaa giddofe Leeweta shaakada wogaada enta geeshsha.
Numbers8:7 Neeni enta geeshshanaw haysada ootha; geeshshiya haatha ekada enta bolla wurxa; enti banta asatethaa ubbaa meedeto; banta ma7uwa meecco; yaanidi enti wogaada geeshshi gidana.
Numbers8:8 Kaallidi enti issi wofaanonne katha yarshos gidiya zaytera walahetida lo77o dhiille eko; qassi neeni nagara yarshos hara issi wofaano eka.
Numbers8:9 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asa ubbaa shiishada
Numbers8:10 Isra7eele asay enta huuphiya bolla banta kushiya wotho.
Numbers8:11 Leeweti Isra7eele asaa giddofe taw dummatidi oothana mela yuusho yarsho oothidi Aaroni ta sinthe shiisho.
Numbers8:12 Leeweti banta kushiya nam7u wofaanota huuphen wotho. Leeweta nagara atotethas issuwa nagara yarsho
Numbers8:13 “Leeweta shaakada taw dummaya; Aaronanne iya adde nayta enta bolla shuuma.
Numbers8:14 Hessada oothada Leeweta Isra7eele asape taw dummaya; enti tabaa gidana.
Numbers8:15 “Neeni enta geeshshidaapenne dummayidaape guye Leeweti Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan banta oosuwa oothanaw yo.
Numbers8:16 Isra7eele asaa giddofe kumethi enti taw imetidosona; Isra7eelen bayra yeletida adde nayta bessan Leeweta taw ekas.
Numbers8:17 Isra7eele asaa giddon bayra yeletida ase gidin mehe gidin ubbay tabaa. Taani Gibxe biittan bayra ubbaa wodhida wode enta taw dummayas.
Numbers8:18 Isra7eelen bayra yeletida adde nayta bessan taw Leeweta ekas.
Numbers8:19 Isra7eele asaa giddofe Leeweta Aaronasinne iya adde naytas immas. Isra7eele asay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyako shiiqidi qohetonna mela Leeweti Isra7eele asaa gisho Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanawunne nagara atotethi ehanaw dooretidosona” yaagis.
Numbers8:20 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Numbers8:21 Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona; banta ma7uwa meeccidosona. Aaroni enta Godaas dumma imo oothidi shiishis; entaw nagara atotethas yarshidi enta geeshshis.
Numbers8:22 Hessafe guye
Numbers8:23 Goday Museko
Numbers8:24 “Haysi Leeweti oothana wogaa; laythi laatamanne ichashanne iyape bolla gidida Leewe adde ubbay Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothanaw yo.
Numbers8:25 Shin laythi ishatamu gidiya wode banta oosuwape shempo; zaari oothofo.
Numbers8:26 Enti Geeshsha Dunkaaniyan oothiya banta ishata oothi maaddanaw danda7oosona. Shin enti bantaw ay oosoka oothofo. Hiza neeni Leeweta haysada oosisa” yaagis.
Numbers9:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyida nam7antho laythan koyro ageenan Siina mela biittan Goday Museko haysada yaagis;
Numbers9:2 “Isra7eele asay Paasika Ba7aale iya qamman boncho.
Numbers9:3 Ha ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasan iya qamman omarsi iya woga ubbaadanne iya kiita ubbaada boncho” yaagis.
Numbers9:4 Hessa gisho

Numbers9:7 “Nuuni aha bochida gisho tunida
Numbers9:8 Musey zaaridi
Numbers9:9 Goday Museko
Numbers9:10 “Isra7eele asaako haysada yaaga; hintefe woyko hinte kochaafe oonika aha bochidi tuniko woyko ogetidabaa gidiko
Numbers9:11 Nam7antho ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas omarsi Paasika Ba7aale boncho. Paasika dorsa uytharanne camo boncora mo.
Numbers9:12 Sa7ay wontana gakanaw dorsa ashuwape aybika attofo; qassi iya meqethafe issuwaka menthofo. Paasika Baaliya woga ubbaa ootho.
Numbers9:13 Shin geeshshinne ogetonna as Paasika bonchona ixiko
Numbers9:14 “Hinte giddon de7iya bete asi Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw koyko
Numbers9:15 Geeshsha Dunkaaney toketida gallas shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya ma7is. Omarsafe doomidi
Numbers9:16 Hessada gallas gallas shaaray ma77ees; qamma qamma he shaaray tamada poo7ees.
Numbers9:17 He shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bollafe dendiya wode ubban Isra7eele asay banta dunkaanida gutaape dendoosona. Qassi he shaaray wodhiya bessan Isra7eele asay dunkaanosona.
Numbers9:18 Isra7eele asay Godaa kiitan gutaape dendoosona; qassi Godaa kiitan dunkaanosona. Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla gam7iya wode ubban banta dunkaanida gutan gam7oosona.
Numbers9:19 Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla daro gallas gam7ikoka
Numbers9:20 Issi issi toho shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla guutha gallas gam7ees. Gidikoka enti Godaa kiitan dunkaanosona; qassi Godaa kiitan gutaape dendoosona.
Numbers9:21 Issi issi toho shaaray omarsafe wontana gakanaw xalaala gam7ees; shaaray dendiya wode enti dendoosona. Gallas gidin
Numbers9:22 Shaaray Geeshsha Dunkaaniya bolla nam7u gallas gidin woyko issi ageena woyko issi laythi gam7in Isra7eele asay banta dunkaanida gutan gam7osonape attishin

Numbers10:1 Goday Museko
Numbers10:2 asaa shiiqos xeeganawunne dunkaanida gutaape denthanaw maaddiya nam7u moyzeta birape qoxada medha.
Numbers10:3 Ha nam7u moyzeti punetiya wode asa ubbay Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen neeko shiiqo.
Numbers10:4 Shin issi moyze xalaali punetiko
Numbers10:5 Moyzey koyro punetiya wode Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape doloha baggan dunkaanida kochay dendo.
Numbers10:6 Moyzey nam7antho punetiya wode dugeha baggan dunkaanida kochay dendo. Moyzey hessatho punetiya wode gutaape dendanaw malla gido.
Numbers10:7 Asa shiishanaw moyze punna
Numbers10:8 Kahineti
Numbers10:9 “Hinte gadiya bolla ola denthida hinte morkiyara hinte oletanaw keyiya wode he moyzeta goochidi punnite. He wode Goday
Numbers10:10 Hinte ufaysa gallasatan hessika ageena xeeron
Numbers10:11 Asay Gibxefe keyin

Numbers10:13 Goday Muse kiitidaysada enti baanaw koyro dendidosona.
Numbers10:14 Koyro Yihuda kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay banta mala ekidi keyidosona. Entana kaalethey Amnadaabe na7aa Na7asoona.
Numbers10:15 Yisakoora kochaa kaalethey Zu7ara na7aa Natina7eela.
Numbers10:16 Zabloona kochaa kaalethey Heloona na7aa Eli7aaba.

Numbers10:18 Kaallidi Robeela kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay banta mala oykide keyidosona. Robeela kochaa kaalethey Shade7ura na7aa Elizuura.
Numbers10:19 Simoona kochaa kaalethey Zurishadaya na7aa Salumi7eela.
Numbers10:20 Gaade kochaa kaalethey Ragu7eela na7aa Eliyasaafa.

Numbers10:22 Kaallidi Efreema kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochati banta malla oykidi keyoosona. Efreema kochaa kaalethey Amhuda na7aa Elishama7a.
Numbers10:23 Minaase kochaa kaalethey Padazuura na7aa Gamali7eela.
Numbers10:24 Biniyaame kochaa kaalethey Gadiyoona na7aa Abdaana.
Numbers10:25 Wursethan Daane kochaa baggan dunkaanida kochay
Numbers10:26 Aseera kochaa kaalethey Okraana na7aa Pagi7eela.
Numbers10:27 Niftaaleme kochaa kaalethey Enaana na7aa Akira.

Numbers11:1 Isra7eele asay bantana gakida metuwan Godaa bolla zuuzumidosona. Enta zuuzuntha Goday si7ida wode iya hanqoy eexin
Numbers11:2 Yaatin Musey enta gisho Godaa woossana mela enti Museko yidi yeekidosona. Musey woossin tamay to7is.
Numbers11:3 Godaa tamay enta giddon eexida gisho
Numbers11:4 Isra7eeletara Gibxefe keyida dumma dumma derey hara kathi maanaw daro amotidosona. Enti
Numbers11:5 Nuuni Gibxen de7iya wode miishe qanxonna miya moluwa
Numbers11:6 Shin ha77i nu qoodhey gordetis; nu ayfeyka ha mannafe attishin
Numbers11:7 Mannay deebbo ayfe daanees; iya malay bootha adil7e ciishshe daanees.
Numbers11:8 Mannay qamma wodhees; asay yuuyidi iya maxidi woxan gaaccidi woyko udulan caddidi kathoosona. Yaatidi uukosona; iya mal7oy shamaho zaytera uuketida uytha mela.
Numbers11:9 Manni qamma enta gutan akara wodhees.
Numbers11:10 Asay banta dunkaaniya pengen pengen eqidi yeekishin Musey si7is. Enti Godaa hanquwa denthethida gisho
Numbers11:11 Musey Godaako
Numbers11:12 Ha asa ubbaa ta qanthatadinayee? Woyko enta ta yeladinaayee? Ne enta mayzatas
Numbers11:13 Ha asa ubbaas ta asho awupe ehanee? Enti taako yidi
Numbers11:14 Taani ha asa ubbaa tarka tookanaw danda7ike; taw hessi deexo tooho.
Numbers11:15 Hiza neeni tana haysada oothanaape taw qadheta; ha77i tana wodha; ha metuwape ta shempa aggana” yaagis.
Numbers11:16 Goday Museko
Numbers11:17 Taani wodhada neera yan odetana; ta new immida Ayyaanape shaakada enta bolla wothana. Neeni asaa toohuwa nerka tookonna mela enti nena maaddana.
Numbers11:18 “Neeni asaako haysada yaaga; ‘Wonto hinte asho maana gisho hintena geeshshite. Nu asho awupe demmanee? Nuus Gibxen sa7i lo77oshin’ yaagidi hinte yeekida yeehuwa Goday si7is. Ha77i Goday asho immana; hinteka maana.
Numbers11:19 Hinte maanay issi gallas woyko nam7u gallas woyko ichashu gallas woyko tammu gallas woyko laatamu gallas xalaala gidenna.
Numbers11:20 Shin ‘Hinte giddon de7iya Godaa hinte kadhida gishonne Gibxefe keyonna attidaako nuus lo77oshin gida gisho
Numbers11:21 Shin Musey Godaako
Numbers11:22 Miiza wudenne dorsa wude ubbaa shukin entaw gidanee? Abban de7iya molo ubbaa shiishiyako entaw gidanee?” yaagis.
Numbers11:23 Yaatin
Numbers11:24 Hessa gisho

Numbers11:30 Yaatidi

Numbers11:34 Asho amotidi hayqida asaa enti he bessan moogida gisho he bessay Kebroot-Hataaba geetetidi sunthetis.

Numbers13:1 Goday Museko
Numbers13:2 “Taani Isra7eeletas immana Kanaane biitta wochana mela tammanne nam7u Isra7eele kochaafe issi issi asi halaqa oothada kiitta” yaagis.
Numbers13:3 Yaatin Musey Goday kiitidaysada Paarana mela biittafe Isra7eele kochaafe tammanne nam7u halaqata kiittis.
Numbers13:4 Enta sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Robeela kochaafe Zakura na7aa Samu7a;
Numbers13:5 Simoona kochaafe Hoora na7aa Shaafaxa;
Numbers13:6 Yihuda kochaafe Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba;
Numbers13:7 Yisakoora kochaafe Yoosefa na7aa Yigi7aala;
Numbers13:8 Efreema kochaafe Nawe na7aa Awuse;
Numbers13:9 Biniyaame kochaafe Raafu na7aa Falxa;
Numbers13:10 Zabloona kochaafe Sooda na7aa Gadi7eela;
Numbers13:11 Yoosefa na7aa Minaase kochaafe Suusa na7aa Gaade;
Numbers13:12 Daane kochaafe Gamaala na7aa Ami7eela;
Numbers13:13 Aseera kochaafe Mika7eela na7aa Satura;
Numbers13:14 Niftaaleme kochaafe Waafisa na7aa Nahiba;
Numbers13:15 Gaade kochaafe Maka na7aa Ge7u7eela.
Numbers13:16 He biitta wochana mela Musey kiitida asata sunthay haysata. Musey Nawe na7aa Awuse sunthaa Iyyasu gidi sunthaa laammis.
Numbers13:17 Musey enta
Numbers13:18 Biittay ay mela biittako
Numbers13:19 Enti de7iya biittay lo77oko iiteko
Numbers13:20 biittay araddeko laddeko
Numbers13:21 Enti keyidi Siina mela biittafe doomidi
Numbers13:22 Negebe mela biitta kanthidi
Numbers13:23 Yaara kanthidi
Numbers13:24 Isra7eele asay he bessaafe woyne tashiya qanxida gisho he bessaa Eshkola Zangaara gidi xeegidosona.
Numbers13:25 Enti he biitta oytamu gallas wochidi guye simmidosona.
Numbers13:26 Paarana mela biittan Qaadesan de7iya Museko
Numbers13:27 Enti Museko
Numbers13:28 Shin he biittan de7iya asay wolqaama; enta katamatika gimbe dirsan diretidaysatanne gita. Nuuni ubbaafe aathidi Enaaqa kochata yan be7ida.
Numbers13:29 Amaaleqati Negebe mela biittan; Hitetinne
Numbers13:30 Yaatin Kaalebi asaa Muse sinthan si77i oothidi
Numbers13:31 Shin Kaalebara bida asati
Numbers13:32 Enti yuuyidi wochida biittaba Isra7eele asaas haysada yaagidi iita oda odidosona. “Nuuni wochida biittay yan de7iya asaaka miya biitta; yan de7iya asayka daro adusse.
Numbers13:33 Nuuni yan Enaaqa koche gidida Nifilime asata be7ida. Enta be7ida ayfen nuna xeelliya wode nuuni xaqo mela; entika nuna hessada be7oosona” yaagidosona.
Numbers14:1 He wode qamma maabara ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
Numbers14:2 Isra7eele asay Muse bollanne Aarona bolla zuuzumidosona. Kumetha maabaray
Numbers14:3 Nuuni mashshan wurana mela Goday ha biitta nuna ayis ehii? Nu machetinne nu nayti di7etana; hessa hananaape guye Gibxe simoy nuus keehennee?” yaagidosona.
Numbers14:4 Enti issoy issuwako
Numbers14:5 Yaatin
Numbers14:6 Biittaa wochanaw bida asaa giddofe Nawe na7aa Iyyasuynne Yoofona na7aa Kaalebi banta ma7uwa peedhidosona.
Numbers14:7 Isra7eele maabaraako
Numbers14:8 Goday nunan ufaytiyaba gidiko maathinne eessi goggiya biitta nuna gelsana; he biitta nuus immana.
Numbers14:9 Hessa gisho
Numbers14:10 Yaatin Isra7eele maabaray enta shuchan caddanaw dendis. He wode Godaa bonchoy Xoossaa Dunkaaniyan Isra7eele asa ubbaas qoncis.
Numbers14:11 Goday Museko
Numbers14:12 Taani enta gadon shocada dhaysana
Numbers14:13 Musey zaaridi Godaako
Numbers14:14 Enti he biittan de7iya asaas hessa odana. Abeeti Godaw
Numbers14:15 Yaatin
Numbers14:16 ‘Goday
Numbers14:17 “Hessa gisho
Numbers14:18 ‘Goday elle hanqetenna; maarotinne siiqoy kumidaysa nagaranne geellatethi atto geysa; shin balida uraa seeronna aggenna. Yelidaysata nagaraa gisho heedzanthonne oyddantho yeletethi gakanaw nayta seerana’ yaagadasa.
Numbers14:19 Ha asay Gibxefe keyoosope doomada hachi gakanaw enta maaridaysada ne merinaa siiquwan ha asaa nagaraa atto garki” yaagis.
Numbers14:20 Goday zaaridi
Numbers14:21 Shin ta de7o gideysadanne ta bonchoy sa7a ubbaa kumidaysada
Numbers14:22 ha asaape issi asika he biitta be7enna. Gibxe biittaninne mela biittan oothida malaatata ha asati be7idosona; shin enti tammu toho tana paacidi taw kiitetonna ixidosona.
Numbers14:23 Hessa gisho
Numbers14:24 Shin ta aylley Kaalebi entafe dummatiya gishonne tana polo wozanape kaallida gisho
Numbers14:25 Shin ha77i Amaaleqatinne Kanaaneti zangaaran de7iya gisho
Numbers14:26 Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Numbers14:27 “Ha iita asay ta bolla awude gakanaw zuuzumanee? Taani Isra7eele asaa zuuzuntha si7as.
Numbers14:28 Hessa gisho
Numbers14:29 Asay taybetiya wode laythi laatamanne iyape bolla gidida asi ubbay ta bolla zuuzumida gisho
Numbers14:30 Yoofona na7a Kaalebapenne Nawe na7a Iyyasupe attishin
Numbers14:31 Hinte
Numbers14:32 Shin hinte ahay ha mela biittan kundidi attana.
Numbers14:33 Hinte ammanetibona gisho
Numbers14:34 Hinte biitta wochida oytamu gallasaa taybon
Numbers14:35 Issife ta bolla dendida ha iita maabara bolla ta haysada oothana; enti ha mela biittan kundi attana; haysan enti hayqana; ta Goday haysa odayis” yaagis.
Numbers14:36 He biitta wochana mela Musey kiitida asati simmidi
Numbers14:37 Godaa sinthan boshan hayqidosona.
Numbers14:38 He biitta wochanaw bida asaape Yoofona na7ay Kaalebinne Nawe na7ay Iyyasu xalaali attidosona.
Numbers14:39 Musey hessa Isra7eele asaas odida wode asay daro yeekis.
Numbers14:40 Wontetha gallas wonta guura dendidi
Numbers14:41 Shin Musey entako
Numbers14:42 Goday hintera doonna gisho
Numbers14:43 Amaaleqa asaaranne Kanaane asaara hinte oletidi mashshan hayqana. Godaas hinte kiitetonna ixida gisho
Numbers14:44 Shin enti Godaa Caaqo Taaboteynne Musey gutaape dendonna de7ishin
Numbers14:45 Yaanin derey dariya biittan de7iya Amaaleqa asaynne Kanaane asay enta ollan xoonidi
Numbers15:1 Goday Museko
Numbers15:2 “Isra7eele asaa haysada yaaga; hinte daana mela ta hintew immiya biitta geliya wode
Numbers15:3 xuussa yarsho gidin woyko gaso yarsho gidin woyko dosan yarshiya yarsho gidin woyko ba7aale gallasa yarsho gidin
Numbers15:4 Yarshuwa yarshiya uray katha yarshuwas issi kilo giraame lo77o dhiille sayso litiro shamaho zayten munuqetidaysa eho.
Numbers15:5 Qassi xuussa yarshos woyko hara yarshos ehiya issi issi dorsaara sayso litiro woyne ushsha yarsho oothidi giigisite.
Numbers15:6 Maraze yarshiya wode nam7u kilo giraame lo77o dhiille issi litironne bagga shamaho zayten munuqetidaysa ehite.
Numbers15:7 Ushsha yarshuwas siko litiro woyne ushsha yarshuwas ehite. Hessi Godaas sawiya yarsho gidana.
Numbers15:8 Gaso woyko issifetetha yarshos wofaano xuussa yarsho oothada Godaas yarshiya wode
Numbers15:9 wofaanuwara issife heedzu kilo giraame lo77o dhiille
Numbers15:10 Ushsha yarshuwas bagga litiro woyne ushsha ehite. Hessi Godaas sawiya xuussa yarsho gidana.
Numbers15:11 “Issi issi wofaanoy woyko issi issi marazey woyko issi issi koley yarshetiya wode haysada hanidi ooseto.
Numbers15:12 Daro mehey yarshetiya wode yarshetiya katha yarshoyka hessada daro.
Numbers15:13 Isra7eele asi gidida oonika sawiya xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshiya wode ubban haysada oothanaw koshshees.
Numbers15:14 Yaana yeletethan hinte giddon de7iya bete woyko hara asi oonika sawiya xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshanaw koyiko hessada oothanaw koshshees.
Numbers15:15 Hintewunne hinte giddon de7iya bete asaas he wogay issino; hessi yaana yeletethaaska eqidi daana woga; Hinteka bete asatika Godaa sinthan issino.
Numbers15:16 Hintewunne hinte giddon de7iya bete asaas higgeynne wogay issino” yaagis.
Numbers15:17 Goday Museko
Numbers15:18 “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; taani hintena efiya biitta hinte gelidi
Numbers15:19 he biittan kaxiya kathi hinte miya wode he kathaafe xeera kessidi hinte Godaas yarshite.
Numbers15:20 Hessika
Numbers15:21 Yeletetha ubban hinte biittan kaxida kathaafe koyruwa uukidi Godaas yarsho yarshite.
Numbers15:22 “Goday
Numbers15:23 woyko Goday iya baggara immida kiita ubbaa
Numbers15:24 qassi hessa Isra7eele maabaray eronna oothidaba gidiko maabara ubbay Godaas issi wofaano sawiya xuussa yarsho oothidi
Numbers15:25 Kahiney kumetha Isra7eele maabaraas nagara atotetha yarsho shiishees. Enti eronna balida banta naaquwa gisho Godaas xuussa yarshonne nagara yarsho yarshida gisho enta nagaray atto geetetana.
Numbers15:26 Isra7eele maabaraynne enta giddon de7iya bete asay eronna he bala oothida gisho asa ubbaa nagaray atto geetetana.
Numbers15:27 “Issi asi eronna nagara oothiko issi laytha kole nagara yarsho oothidi yarsho.
Numbers15:28 Eronna de7ishe nagara oothida uraas kahiney Godaa sinthan nagara atotetha wogaa polo; iya nagaray atto geetetana.
Numbers15:29 Eronna nagara oothida uraas kahiney Godaa sinthan nagara atotetha wogaa polo; iya nagaray atto geetetana.
Numbers15:30 “Shin Isra7eele asi gidin woyko bete asi gidin erishe otoron nagara oothiya uray Godaa cayees. He uray deriya giddofe dhayo.
Numbers15:31 He uray Godaa kiitaa erishe kadhida gishonne iya kiitaa kawushida gisho iyaw dhayoy bessees. Iya balay iya bolla gido” yaagis.
Numbers15:32 Issi gallas Isra7eele asay mela biittan de7ishin
Numbers15:33 He uraa asay Museko
Numbers15:34 Enti iya bolla oothanaba eriboona gisho qashon gam7isidosona.
Numbers15:35 Hessafe guye
Numbers15:36 Yaatin Isra7eele maabara ubbay Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Numbers15:37 Goday Museko
Numbers15:38 “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; hintenne yaana yeletethay hinte afilaa gaxan macara kessidi he macara gaxan kaalose qacina sikite.
Numbers15:39 He macaraa hinte be7iya wode ubban ta kiitata
Numbers15:40 He macaraa be7idi hinte ta kiita ubbaa akeekidi polananne Xoossaas dummatidaysata gidana.
Numbers15:41 Taani Godaa
Numbers16:1 Leewe kochaafe Qahaata koche gidida Yisi7ara na7ay Qorey
Numbers16:2 Muse bolla dendidosona. Entara nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asati de7oosona; he asati asan eretidaysatanne maabara kaaletheyisata.
Numbers16:3 Enti Musenne Aarona sinthe shiiqidi
Numbers16:4 Musey hessa si7ida wode Godaa sinthan gufannis.
Numbers16:5 Qorekonne iya cugaako
Numbers16:6 Wonto wonta neeranne ne asaara haysa oothite; ixaane cuyisiya miishe ekidi
Numbers16:7 bonqo tama iyan wothidi
Numbers16:8 Qassika Musey Qoreko
Numbers16:9 Isra7eele Xoossay hintena ba maabara giddofe dummayidi
Numbers16:10 I hintenanne hinte ishata Leeweta ubbaa baako shiishis; shin ha77i hinte kahineta bessaa koyeeta.
Numbers16:11 Neeninne ne cuga ubbay Godaa bolla makallidi dendideta; hinte iya bolla zuuzumanaw I Aaroni oonee?” yaagis.
Numbers16:12 “Yaatidi
Numbers16:13 Neeni mela biittan nuna wodhanaw maathinne eessi goggiya biittafe nuna kessidaysi guuxis gada ha77i nu bolla halaqa gidanaw koyay?
Numbers16:14 Neeni nuna maathinne eessi goggiya biitta gelsabaaka; woyko neeni nuus laata oothada goshsha gadenne woyne gade immabaaka; neeni nuna cimmaasa; nuuni booko” yaagidosona.
Numbers16:15 Yaatin
Numbers16:16 Qassi Musey Qoreko
Numbers16:17 Issi issi asi ba ixaane cuyisiya miishiya eko; ixaaneka iyan wotho; ubbay issife nam7u xeetanne ishatamu ixaane cuyisiya miishe gidees; ixaane iyan wothidi Godaa sinthe shiisho. Neeninne Aaroni hinte ixaaniya hessada shiishite” yaagis.
Numbers16:18 Yaatin
Numbers16:19 Qorey ba asaara geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen Muse sinthaninne Aarona sinthan eqidosona. He wode Godaa bonchoy kumetha maabaraas qoncis.
Numbers16:20 Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Numbers16:21 “Taani issi toho ha asaa dhaysana gisho
Numbers16:22 Shin Museynne Aaroni sa7an gufannidi
Numbers16:23 Yaatin
Numbers16:24 “Asaas ‘Qore
Numbers16:25 Musey dendidi
Numbers16:26 I Maabaraako
Numbers16:27 Yaatin asay Qore
Numbers16:28 Musey asaako
Numbers16:29 Ha asati asi hayqeysada hayqiko woyko asa bolla gakiyaba xalaali enta bolla gakiko Goday tana Kiittibeenna.
Numbers16:30 Shin
Numbers16:31 I yaagidi ongida wode enti eqida biittay dooyetidi
Numbers16:32 entanne enta soo asaa
Numbers16:33 Yaatin enti bantaw de7iyaba ubbaara paxa de7ishe
Numbers16:34 Enta waasuwa gaason enta matan de7iya Isra7eele asa ubbay
Numbers16:35 Qassi tami Godaa matape yidi ixaane cuyisiya nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asaa mis.
Numbers16:36 Hessafe guye
Numbers16:37 “Kahiney
Numbers16:38 He miisheti banta de7uwa dhaysanaw nagara oothida asay ixaane cuyisiya miishe. He miisheti Godaas imetida gishonne geeshshi gidiya gisho lee7isa qoxada yarsho bessa lanxa. Hessi Isra7eele asaas naagiso malla gido” yaagis.
Numbers16:39 Yaatin kahiney Alaazari ixaane cuyisiya miisheta ekidi yarsho bessa lanxanaw lee7isidi qoxis.
Numbers16:40 Goday Muse baggara kiitidaysada
Numbers16:41 Wontetha gallas Isra7eele maabara ubbay
Numbers16:42 Enti Musenne Aarona bolla dendanaw shiiqidi
Numbers16:43 Hessafe guye
Numbers16:44 Yaatin Goday Museko
Numbers16:45 “Ha asaa giddofe kichite; ta enta issi tohon dhaysana” yaagis. Museynne Aaroni sa7an gufannidosona.

Numbers17:1 Goday Museko
Numbers17:2 “Isra7eele asay issi issi kochaa halaqatape issi issi xam7a ekidi tammanne nam7u xam7a new ehana mela entaw oda. He xam7aa bolla issi issi asaa sunthaa xaafa.
Numbers17:3 Issi issi kochaa halaqaas issi xam7a koshshiya gisho
Numbers17:4 He xam7ata geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon ta neera gahetiya Taabotiya sinthan wotha.
Numbers17:5 Ta dooriya uraa xam7ay aacana; hessada oothada hinte bolla Isra7eele asaa zuuzuntha ta teqana” yaagis.
Numbers17:6 Hessa Musey Isra7eele asaas odin
Numbers17:7 Musey he xam7ata ubbaa geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon Godaa sinthan wothis.
Numbers17:8 Wontetha gallas Musey geeshsha dunkaaniya giddo geliya wode Leewe koche gidida Aarona xam7ay aacidaysa
Numbers17:9 Musey xam7a ubbaa Godaa sinthafe ehidi Isra7eele asaa bessis. Enti hanidaba be7idaape guye issi issi halaqay banta xam7aa xam7aa ekidosona.
Numbers17:10 Goday Museko
Numbers17:11 Musey
Numbers17:12 Isra7eele asay Museko
Numbers17:13 Geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqiya ubbay hayqana gidiko
Numbers18:1 Goday Aaronako
Numbers18:2 Neeninne ne adde nayti geeshsha dunkaaniya sinthan oothiya wode hintena oothidi maadana mela Leewe koche gidida ne dabbota eha.
Numbers18:3 Enti hintefe garsan geeshsha dunkaaniya ooso ubbaa oothonna; shin entika hinteka hayqonna mela enti geeshsha dunkaaniya miishiyakonne yarsho bessaako shiiqopo.
Numbers18:4 Enti hintera issife gididi geeshsha Dunkaaniyan de7iya ooso ubbaa ootho. Shin Leewetape attishin
Numbers18:5 Zaaridi Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqoy wodhonna mela geeshsha dunkaaniyaninne yarsho bessan oosetiya oosuwa hinte xalaala oothite.
Numbers18:6 Leeweta
Numbers18:7 Shin yarsho bessaaninne magarajuwafe gaatha baggan de7iya oosuwa nenne ne adde nayta xalaali oothite. Kahinetetha oosuwa taani hintew imota oothada immas; hara asi oonika he bessaa shiiqiko hayqo” yaagis.
Numbers18:8 Goday Aaronako
Numbers18:9 Taw imetiya daro geeshsha imuwape taman xuugetonna baggay hintebaa gidana. Enti taw immiya geeshsha imo ubbay katha yarsho gidin nagara yarsho gidin naaqo yarsho gidin newunne ne adde naytas gidana.
Numbers18:10 Hinte hessa geeshsha bessan miite; adde ubbay hessa mo; hessi hintew geeshshi gidana.
Numbers18:11 “Qassi Isra7eele asay taw yarshiya yuusho yarsho ubbaa new
Numbers18:12 “Isra7eele asay taw bayra oothidi immiya koyro ayfiyape
Numbers18:13 Enti Godaas ehiya gaden koyro gakida ayfey hintesa; hinte soo asaa giddon wogaada tuna gidonna ubbay hessa mo.
Numbers18:14 “Isra7eele asaa giddofe Godaas dummatida ubbay hintesa.
Numbers18:15 Bayra yeletida asi woyko mehey Isra7eele asay Godaas immida ubbay hintesa. Shin bayra yeletida adde na7anne bayra yeletida geeshshi gidonna mehe hinte wozanaw bessees.
Numbers18:16 Issi ageena nayta wozanaw geeshsha dunkaanen eretida mizaanen ichashu bira santime wozo gate qanxite.
Numbers18:17 Shin enti geeshshi gidiya gisho mehe
Numbers18:18 Angaasoynne ushacha geday yuusho yarshon nebaa gididaysada enta ashoyka nebaa.
Numbers18:19 Isra7eele asay Godaas immiya geeshsha yarsho ubbaa new
Numbers18:20 Qassika Goday Aaronako
Numbers18:21 Goday
Numbers18:22 Hachife doomidi Isra7eele asay banta nagara gaason hayqonna mela geeshsha dunkaaniyako shiiqopo.
Numbers18:23 Geeshsha dunkaaniya giddon ootheysatinne iya giddon poletiya nagaraa tookey Leeweta. Hessi yeletetha ubbaas merinaa woga. Leewetas Isra7eele asaa giddon laati baawa.
Numbers18:24 Hessa gisho
Numbers18:25 Qassi Goday Museko
Numbers18:26 “Neeni Leewetako haysada yaaga; taani hintew laata oothada immida asraata hinte Isra7eele asaape ekiya wode hinte he asraatape asraata Godaas immite.
Numbers18:27 Hinte imoy wudummafe shiiqida kathada woyko gum7iya bessaafe ha77i keyida woyneda hintew taybetana.
Numbers18:28 Hessadaka Isra7eele asaape hinte ekiya asraata ubbaafe dumma imo Godaas immite; hinte asraatape Godaa gisho gidida imota kahiniya Aaronas immite.
Numbers18:29 Hinte ekiya imota ubbaafe lo77uwanne geeshsha Godaas gisho oothidi immanaw bessees.
Numbers18:30 Ubbaafe lo77o imuwa hinte immiya wode attidaysi hintew buketiya wudumma kathaadanne gum7etiya woyniyada taybetana.
Numbers18:31 Attidaysi geeshsha Dunkaaniyan hinte oothiya oosuwas damooze gidiya gisho hintenne hinte soo asay awunka maanaw danda7eeta.
Numbers18:32 Lo77o baggaa Godaas immidaape guye hinte miiko hessi hintew nagara gidenna. Lo77o baggaa kessonna de7ishe he imotape midi hinte Isra7eele asaa imota tunisonna mela naagetite; hessa hinte oothonna ixiko hinte hayqana” yaagada Leewetas oda.
Numbers19:1 Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Numbers19:2 “Goday higgiyan kiitetida wogay haysa; borsoy bayna
Numbers19:3 Kahiniya Alaazaras iyo immite; gutaape iyo gaxa kessidi kahiniya sinthan shuko.
Numbers19:4 Kahiney Alaazari I suuthaafe guuthara ekidi ba biradhiyan geeshsha dunkaaniyako simmidi laapun toho wurxo.
Numbers19:5 Kahiney be7ishin ussiya xuugeto; galbay
Numbers19:6 Kahiney ziga mithi
Numbers19:7 Hessafe guye
Numbers19:8 He ussiw xuuggidaysi ba ma7uwanne ba asatethaa meeceto; ika omarsi gakanaw wogaada tuna gidana.
Numbers19:9 “Hessafe guye
Numbers19:10 Qassi ussee biduwa shiishida urayka ba ma7uwa meecco; I omarsi gakanaw wogaada tuna gidana. Ha wogay Isra7eele asaasinne enta giddon de7iya hara dere asaas merinaa woga gidana.
Numbers19:11 “Aha bochiya oonika laapun gallas wogaada tuna gidana.
Numbers19:12 Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathan heedzantho gallasinne laapuntha gallas I bana geeshsho; hessafe guye
Numbers19:13 Hayqida asa aha bochiya oonika bana geeshshonna ixiko I Godaa dunkaaniya tunisees; he uray Isra7eele asaa giddofe kuretto. Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haathay iya bolla wurxetiboona gisho I tuna; I tuna gididi gam7ees.
Numbers19:14 “Issi asi dunkaaniya giddon hayqiko oothana wogay haysa; unkaaniya giddo geliya oonika
Numbers19:15 Hessadaka
Numbers19:16 Qassi denban hayqida asa aha woyko hargetidi hayqida asa aha woyko meqethi woyko duufo bochiya oonika laapun gallas gakanaw tuna gidana.
Numbers19:17 “Tunatethaafe geeshshanaw xuugetida ussee biduwape guuthara ekada oton yeggada pulto haathe iya bolla tiga.
Numbers19:18 Geeshsha asi hisoophe wurco ekidi haathan naaqi kessidi
Numbers19:19 Geeyida asi heedzantho gallasinne laapuntha gallas geeyiboonna uraa bolla wurxo. I laapuntha gallas he uraa tunatethaafe geeshsho; he geeyida addey
Numbers19:20 “Shin tuna uray bana geeshshonna ixiko
Numbers19:21 Haysi hintew merina woga gidana. Tunatethaafe geeshshiya haatha wurxiya uray ba ma7uwa meecco; qassi tunatethaafe geeshshiya haatha bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidana.
Numbers19:22 Tuna uray bochiya aybibayka tunees; qassi he miishiya bochiya oonika omarsi gakanaw tuna gidees” yaagis.
Numbers20:1 Koyro ageenan Isra7eele asa ubbay Siina mela biitta gakidi
Numbers20:2 He bessan asaas haathi dhayin
Numbers20:3 Enti
Numbers20:4 Nunne nu mehey ha mela biittan hayqana mela Godaa maabara ha bessa ayis ehidetii?
Numbers20:5 Gibxefe kessidi ha iita bessaa nuna ayis ehidetii? Haysan kathi woyko balasey woyko woyney woyko oromaaney baawa; hari attoshin uyetiya haathika haysan baawa” yaagidi Musera kacetidosona.
Numbers20:6 Yaatin Museynne Aaroni asaa matape geeshsha dunkaaniya penge bidi sa7an gufannidosona; Godaa bonchoyka entaw qoncis.
Numbers20:7 Goday Museko
Numbers20:8 “Ne xam7a eka; neeranne ne ishaa Aaronara maabara shiishite. Enta sinthan zaallay haathe kessana mela oda. Hinte zaallafe haathe kessidi
Numbers20:9 Goday kiitidaysada Musey Godaa sinthafe xam7aa ekis.
Numbers20:10 Museynne Aaroni maabara zaalla sinthan shiiqana mela oothidi
Numbers20:11 Musey ba xam7a denthidi zaalla nam7u toho shocis; haathi dhuuqidi keyin entinne enta meheti uyidosona.
Numbers20:12 Shin Goday Musekonne Aaronako
Numbers20:13 Isra7eele asay Godaara kacetida gishonne Goday ba geeshshatetha enta giddon qoncisida gisho he bessay Mariba haatha geetetis.
Numbers20:14 Edoome kawako Musey Qaadesape haysada yaagidi kiita yeddis. “Ne ishay Isra7eeley haysada yaagees; nuna gakida meto ubbaa ne si7adasa.
Numbers20:15 Nu mayzati duge Gibxe wodhidosona; yan nuuni daro laythi de7ida. Gibxeti nunanne nu aawata un7ethidosona.
Numbers20:16 Nuuni Godaako waassin
Numbers20:17 Hayyana
Numbers20:18 Shin Edoome asay
Numbers20:19 Yaatin Isra7eele asay
Numbers20:20 Edoome asay zaaridi
Numbers20:21 Edoome asay banta biittara Isra7eele asaa aathona ixin
Numbers20:22 Isra7eele asa ubbay Qaadesape dendidi Hoora zumako bidosona.
Numbers20:23 Edoome zawan de7iya Hoora zuman
Numbers20:24 “Aaroni ba mayzatan gahetiya wodey gakis. Hinte nam7ay Mariba haatha matan ta kiitaa bolla geellatida gisho Isra7eele asaas ta immiya biitta I gelenna.
Numbers20:25 Aaronanne iya na7aa Alaazara ekada Hoora zuma bolla keya.
Numbers20:26 Aarona kahinetetha ma7uwa qaarada
Numbers20:27 Goday kiitidaysada Musey oothis; Isra7eele asa ubbay be7ishin
Numbers20:28 Musey Aarona kahinetetha ma7uwa qaaridi iya na7aa Alaazara mayzis. Aaroni he zuma huuphen hayqis. Museynne Alaazari zumaape wodhidosona.
Numbers20:29 Aaroni hayqidaysa Isra7eele asay erida wode Isra7eele asay Aaronas hastamu gallas yeekidosona.

Numbers21:20 Baamotape dendidi

Numbers22:1 Isra7eele asay dendidi
Numbers22:2 Isra7eele asay Amooreta bolla oothidaysa ubbaa Sifoora na7ay Balaaqi si7is.
Numbers22:3 Isra7eele asay daro gidida gisho
Numbers22:4 Moo7abeti Midiyaame cimatako
Numbers22:5 Amawa biittan
Numbers22:6 Enti taape daro wolqaama gidiya gisho
Numbers22:7 Moo7abe cimatinne Midiyaame cimati baadetha miishiya ekidi Balaamako bidi Balaaqi gidaysa iyaw odidosona.
Numbers22:8 Balaami entako
Numbers22:9 Xoossay Balaama
Numbers22:10 Balaami Xoossaako
Numbers22:11 ‘Gibxefe keyida daro asay
Numbers22:12 Yaatin Xoossay Balaamako
Numbers22:13 Wontetha gallas wonta Balaami dendidi
Numbers22:14 Moo7abe halaqati Balaaqako guye simmidi
Numbers22:15 Zaaridi Balaaqi kaseysatape aadho bonchetidanne taybon daro halaqata iyako kiittis.
Numbers22:16 Enti Balaamako bidi
Numbers22:17 Ta new daro woyto immana; ne oychiyaba ubbaa ta new oothana. Hayyana yada ha asaa baaddarki’ yaagis” yaagidi odidosona.
Numbers22:18 Shin Balaami entako
Numbers22:19 Goday taw bessiya harabay de7iko ta erana mela hinteka hachi qamma haysan aqite” yaagis.
Numbers22:20 He qamma Xoossay Balaamako
Numbers22:21 Yaatin wontetha gallas Balaami ba hariw kooridi Moo7abe halaqatara bis.
Numbers22:22 Shin I biya gisho Xoossay hanqetis. He wode Balaami ba hariw toggidi
Numbers22:23 Godaa kiitanchoy mashsha shoddidi ogen eqidaysa hariya be7ada
Numbers22:24 Yaatin
Numbers22:25 Hariya Godaa kiitanchuwa be7ida wode gimbe dirsaako shiiqida
Numbers22:26 Hessafe guye
Numbers22:27 Hariya Godaa kiitanchuwa be7ada
Numbers22:28 Hessafe guye
Numbers22:29 Balaami zaaridi
Numbers22:30 Hariya Balaamako
Numbers22:31 He wode Goday Balaama ayfiya dooyin
Numbers22:32 Godaa kiitanchoy
Numbers22:33 Hariya tana be7ada ta sinthafe heedzu toho hara soo simmasu. Hariya hara soo simmaboonnaba gidiyako
Numbers22:34 Balaami zaaridi
Numbers22:35 Shin kiitanchoy Balaamako
Numbers22:36 Balaami yeysa Balaaqi si7ida wode Arnoona shaafa gaxan ba biitta zawan de7iya Moo7abeta kataman iya mokanaw bis.

Numbers23:1 Balaami Balaaqako
Numbers23:2 Balaami gidaysada Balaaqi oothis; enti nam7ay issi issi yarsho bessan issi kormanne issi maraze yarshidosona.
Numbers23:3 Yaatidi
Numbers23:4 Yan Xoossay Balaamara gahetin
Numbers23:5 Balaami gaanaba Goday iyaw odidi
Numbers23:6 Balaami simmiya wode Balaaqi Moo7abe halaqata ubbaara ba yarshuwa matan eqis.
Numbers23:7 Balaami haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Moo7abe kawoy
Numbers23:8 Xoossi baaddiboonaysa ta waatada baaddo? Goday
Numbers23:9 Ta dhoqa zaalla huuphen eqada enta xeellayis; zumaa bolla eqada enta be7ayis. Enti bantarka de7iya dere; enti hara kawotethatape dumma gideysa eroosona.
Numbers23:10 Yayqooba baana ooni taybi onganee? Isra7eele saysuwa ooni taybi kanthanee? Xillota hayquwa ta hayqarkina; ta wursethay entaysada hano” yaagis.

Numbers23:18 Balaami haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Sifoora na7aw
Numbers23:19 Wordotanaw Xoossay ase gidenna; ba qofaa laammanaw asa na7a gidenna. Odidi
Numbers23:20 Taani anjanaw kiita ekas; I anjis; ta laammanaw danda7ike.

Numbers23:22 Xoossay enta Gibxefe kessis; I mino menthada entaw oletees.

Numbers24:1 Balaami Isra7eele anjeysi Godaa ufaysidaysa I be7ida wode kase I ootheysada bita malla koybeenna
Numbers24:2 I dhoqu gidi xeelliya wode Isra7eele asay ba kochan kochan dunkaanidi uttidaysa be7iya wode Xoossaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wodhis.
Numbers24:3 I haysada yaagidi tinbite odis; “Bi7oora na7aa Balaama tinbitiya; iya ayfey dooyetin xeelliya addiya tinbitiya;
Numbers24:4 Xoossay giyaba si7eysa tinbitiya; I som7ora gufannin
Numbers24:5 Yayqooba
Numbers24:6 Enti micetida zangaarada
Numbers24:7 Enta xuggay haathan kumana; enta kochay gidiya haathi demmana. Enta kawoy kawa Agaagape aadhana; enta kawotethay bonchetana.
Numbers24:8 Xoossay enta Gibxefe kessis; I mino menthada entaw oletees. Enta morketa mentherethees; enta meqethaa gaaccees; ba dongiyan caddees.
Numbers24:9 Enti gaammoda zin7idosona; macca gaammoda zaqullidosona; enta boshechanaw danda7ey oonee? Enta anjiya ubbay anjetana; enta baaddiya ubbay baadetana” yaagis.
Numbers24:10 Yaatin
Numbers24:11 Ha77i ellesada ne soo ba; ta nena darobaa woytana gas
Numbers24:12 Balaami Balaaqako zaaridi
Numbers24:13 ‘Balaaqi hari attoshin ba kawotethan kumida biraanne worqaa taw immiyaba gidikoka Goday odidaysa menthada lo77o woyko iita ta shenen oothanaw danda7ike. Taani Goday giyaba xalaala odana’ gada new odabikinayee?” yaagis.
Numbers24:14 Balaami Balaaqako
Numbers24:15 I ba tinbitiya haysada yaagidi odis; “Iya ayfey tishshi oothidi xeelliya
Numbers24:16 Haysi Xoossay giyaba si7eysa tinbitiya
Numbers24:17 “Taani iya be7ayis
Numbers24:18 Edoomey xoonetana; iya morkey Sayrey oyketana; shin Isra7eeley minni minni baana.
Numbers24:19 Yayqoobape haareysi keyana; kataman paxa attidaysata dhaysana” yaagis.
Numbers24:20 Hessafe guye

Numbers24:25 Hessafe guye
Numbers25:1 Isra7eele asay Seexima geetetiya bessan dunkaanidi de7ishin
Numbers25:2 He maccasati banta xoossata yarshuwa maana mela xeegidosona. Enti he yarsho kathaa midi enta xoossata goyinnidosona.
Numbers25:3 Isra7eeleti Bi7eel-Fagoora geetetiya eeqa goyinnida gisho Goday enta bolla hanqetis.

Numbers25:5 Musey Isra7eele daynnatako
Numbers25:6 Museynne maabaray ubbay geeshsha dunkaaniya pengen yeekishin

Numbers25:15 Hayqida Midiyaame maccase sunthay Kozibo; I aaway Zuri Midiyaameta kochaa halaqa.
