Numbers28:2 “Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagada kiitta; xuugetiya sawiya katha yarsho woden woden taw yarshite.
Numbers28:3 Godaas taman xuugetidi yarshetiya yarshoy haysa; kumetha bollara de7iya issi laythi kumida nam7u marazeta wonta wonta xuussa yarsho oothidi yarshite.
Numbers28:4 Marazetape issuwa wonta issuwa qassi omarsi yarshite.
Numbers28:5 Qassi he maraziyara issi litiro shamaho zayten munuqetida issi kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille katha yarsho yarshite.
Numbers28:6 Haysi Godaa ufaysiya xuussa yarsho. Ika Siina zuma bolla yarshetida koyro xuussa yarsho.
Numbers28:7 Koyro maraziyara issi litiro caala woyne ushsha yarsho oothidi yarsho bessan Godaas gussite.
Numbers28:8 Omarsi nam7antho maraziya yarshiya wode koyroysa mela katha yarshuwanne ushsha yarshuwa gujidi yarshite. Ika Godaa ufaysiya sawo yarsho gidana.”
Numbers28:9 “Sambaata gallas borey bayna issi laythi kumida nam7u marazeta zayten munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille ekidi katha yarshonne ushsha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
Numbers28:10 Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bolla Sambaatan Sambaatan hinte yarshana xuussa yarshoynne ushsha yarshoy haysa.”
Numbers28:11 “Ageeni xeeriya koyro gallas nam7u wofaanota
Numbers28:12 Issi issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame gidiya lo77o giste dhiillera katha yarsho oothidi yarshite. Qassi shamaho zayten munuqetida nam7u kilo giraame gidiya lo77o giste dhiilliya maraziyara wolla yarsha.
Numbers28:13 Laapun marazetape issi issi maraze shamaho zayten munuqetida issi kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiillera xuugetiya sawiya katha yarsho oothada Godaas yarishsha.
Numbers28:14 Qassi ushsha yarshuwa issi issi wofaanuwas nam7u litiro woyne
Numbers28:15 Gallas gallas yarshetiya xuussa yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla issi kole nagara yarsho oothidi Godaas yarshite.”
Numbers28:16 “Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallasay Godaa Paasika bonchiya gallas gido.
Numbers28:17 Qassi he ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan Uytha ba7aaley bonchetees; he gallasaape doomidi laapun gallas gakanaw irshoy geliboonna uytha miite.
Numbers28:18 He gallasatape koyro gallasan goyinnanaw shiiqite; he gallasan ay oosoka oothopite.
Numbers28:19 Borey bayna nam7u wofaanota
Numbers28:20 Issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille
Numbers28:21 laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi dorsaara issi kilo giraame dhiille yarshite.
Numbers28:22 Qassi issi deeshi deriya nagaraas atotethi gidana mela nagara yarsho oothidi yarshite.
Numbers28:23 Hessa ubba wode gallas gallas yarshetiya yarshuwa bolla gujidi yarshite.
Numbers28:24 Ubba wode oosetiya xuussa yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla gujidi laapun gallasi Godaas sawiya katha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
Numbers28:25 Laapuntha gallasan goyinnoos shiiqite; he gallas ay oosoka oothopite.”
Numbers28:26 “Katha Shiisho Ba7aale saamintan koyro gallas goyinnoos shiiqiya wode hinte ooratha kathaafe yarsho yarshite; he wode ay oosoka oothopite.
Numbers28:27 Nam7u wofaanota
Numbers28:28 Issi issi wofaanuwara shamaho zayten munuqetida heedzu kilo giraame lo77o giste dhiille
Numbers28:29 laapun dorsa urgetape issi issi urgiyara issi kilo giraame giste dhiille ekidi yarshite.
Numbers28:30 Iya bolla gujidi issi kole nagara atothetha yarsho oothidi yarshite.
Numbers28:31 Gallas gallas yarshetiya yarshuwa bollanne ushsha yarshuwa bolla katha yarsho yarshite. Hinte yarshiya meheti borey baynaba gido.”

Numbers29:40 Musey
Numbers30:1 Musey Isra7eele zeretha halaqatako
Numbers30:2 Issi asi Godaas issiba oothanaw caaqiko woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangiko guye goonna polo.
Numbers30:3 “Ba aawa son de7iya geela7iya Godaas issiba oothanaw caaqiko woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangiko
Numbers30:4 I aaway iya caaqidaysa woyko iya qangetidaysa si7idi
Numbers30:5 Shin I aaway hessa si7idi iyo diggiko I caaqoynne I qangethay attanaw danda7ees. I aaway iyo diggida gisho Goday iw atto gaana.
Numbers30:6 “Gelonna macca na7iya caaqada de7ashe woyko issibaape bana naaganaw qangetada de7ashe azina geliko
Numbers30:7 I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggonna ixiko iya ba caaquwanne ba qangetha polanaw koshshees.
Numbers30:8 Shin I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggiko iya caaqida caaqoy woyko qangetida qangethay iyo gomenna. Hessa Goday iw atto gaana.
Numbers30:9 “Shin am7iya woyko sayo maccasi caaqida caaquwa woyko qangida qangetha polanaw bessees.
Numbers30:10 “Azinara de7iya maccasi caaqiko woyko issiba oothanaw qangiko
Numbers30:11 I azinay hessa si7idi iyo diggonna ixiko
Numbers30:12 I azinay hessa si7ida gallas iyo diggiko I caaqoy woyko iya oothanaw qangetida qangethay iyo gomenna. I azinay diggida gisho Goday iw atto gaana.
Numbers30:13 I azinay iya caaqida caaquwa woyko iya bana kawushanaw qangetida qangetha laallanaw woyko minthanaw danda7ees.
Numbers30:14 Shin I azinay he gallas woyko wontetha gallas aykoka goonna ixiko
Numbers30:15 Shin I hessa si7i gam7idi zaari diggiyaba gidiko hessas oyshetey iya” yaagis.
Numbers30:16 Hiza haysi azina giddoninne machi giddon

Numbers33:1 Museynne Aaroni kaalethin
Numbers33:2 Goday Kiittidaysa mela Musey enti siiratida bessata sunthaa ubbaa kaali kaali xaafis.
Numbers33:3 Isra7eele asay koyro ageenan
Numbers33:4 He wode Gibxe asay Godaa gadon hayqida banta bayra nayta moogosona. Hessada oothidi
Numbers33:5 Isra7eele asay Ramisepe dendidi Sukota geetetiya bessan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:6 Sukotape dendidi mela biitta gaxan de7iya Etaaman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:7 Etaamape dendidi Ba7ali-Xafoonape doloha baggan de7iya Pihahiroota simmidi Migdoola matan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:8 Pihahirootape dendidi
Numbers33:9 Maarape dendidi tammanne nam7u pultotinne laapun tammu zambati de7iya Eliman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:10 Elimape dendidi Zo7o Abbaa matan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:11 Zo7o Abbaa matape dendidi Siina mela biittan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:12 Siina mela biittafe dendidi Rafaqan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:13 Rafaqape dendidi Elusan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:14 Elusape dendidi haathi bayna bessan Rafidiman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:15 Rafidimape dendidi Siina mela biittan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:16 Siina mela biittafe dendidi Kibirooti Hati7awan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:17 Kibirooti Hati7awape dendidi Haxerootan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:18 Haxerootape dendidi Irtiman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:19 Irtimape dendidi Irmoon-Pareezan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:20 Irmoon-Pareezape dendidi Libinan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:21 Libinape dendidi Irisan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:22 Irisape dendidi Qahelatan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:23 Qahelatape dendidi Shefara zuman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:24 Shefara zumaape dendidi Haraadan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:25 Haradape dendidi Maqhelotan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:26 Maqhelotape dendidi Tahatan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:27 Tahatape dendidi Taaran dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:28 Taarape dendidi Mitiqan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:29 Mitiqape dendidi Hashimoonan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:30 Hashimoonape dendidi Moserootan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:31 Moserootape dendidi Ben-Ya7iqanan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:32 Ben-Ya7iqanape dendidi Hoor-Hagidigaadan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:33 Hoor-Hagidigadape dendidi Yoxibaatan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:34 Yoxibaatape dendidi Abroonan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:35 Abroonape dendidi Exiyoon-Gabiran dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:36 Exiyooni-Gabirape dendidi Siina mela biittan Qaadesan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:37 Qaadesape dendidi Edoome biitta zawan de7iya Hoora zuman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:38 Kahiney Aaroni Godaa kiitan Hoora zuma bolla keyidi
Numbers33:39 Aaroni Hoora zuma bolla hayqiya wode iyaw laythi xeetanne laatamanne heedza.
Numbers33:40 Negebe mela biittan Kanaanen de7iya Arada Kawoy Isra7eele asaa yuussaa si7is.
Numbers33:41 Isra7eele asay Hoora zumaape dendidi Xalmoonan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:42 Xalmoonape dendidi Punoonan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:43 Punoonape dendidi Obotan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:44 Obotape dendidi Moo7abe biitta zawan de7iya Abariiman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:45 Abariimape dendidi Diboon-Gaadan dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:46 Dibon-Gaadape dendidi Almoon-Dibilatayman dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:47 Almoon-Dibilataymape dendidi Nabo zuma sinthan Abariima zumata bolla dunkaanidosona.
Numbers33:48 Abariima zumatape dendidi Iyaarkofe hefinthan
Numbers33:49 Yordaanose shaafa matan de7iya Moo7abe denban
Numbers33:50 Iyaarkofe hefinthan
Numbers33:51 “Isra7eele asaas yaagada oda; Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi
Numbers33:52 he biittan de7iya asa ubbaa hinte sinthafe yedethite. Shuchafe masetidi oosetida misiletanne sheeshidi medhida eeqata dhaysite. Dhoqa goyinno bessata ubbaa laallite.
Numbers33:53 He biitta ta hintew immida gisho iya laattidi yan de7ite.
Numbers33:54 Hinte kochan kochan saama kessidi biitta shaaketite. Taybon dariya kochatas dalga laata immite; taybon guuxiya kochatas guutha laata immite. Saaman enta gakida biittay entaba gidana. Biittaa hinte mayzata kochan kochan shaakidi ekite.
Numbers33:55 Shin he biittan de7iya asaa hinte yedethonna ixiko
Numbers33:56 Hinte enta yedethonna ixiko
Numbers34:1 Goday Museko
Numbers34:2 “Isra7eele asaas haysada gada oda; hinte Kanaane geliya wode ta hintew laata oothada immana biitta zaway haysa.
Numbers34:3 Dugeha bagga zaway Siina mela biittafe dendidi Edoome zawa kanthees. Doloha baggara hinte zaway Maxine Abbaafe duge baggara doomidi
Numbers34:4 Aqirabima aadhiya bessaa shaakidi Siina biitta bazzuwa kanthidi dugeha baggara Qaades-Barne gakees. Yaape Hadar-Adaara kanthidi Aximoona gakees.
Numbers34:5 Aximoonape dendidi Gibxe shaafa guye simmidi Medetiraane Abbaa gakees.
Numbers34:6 “Wuloha bagga zaway Medetiraane Abbaa gaxa gidana.
Numbers34:7 “Pudeha bagga zaway Medetiraane Abbaa kaallidi Hoora zuma gakanaw bees.
Numbers34:8 Hoora zumaape Hamaata geliya bessaa gakanaw bees; he zawa wursethay Xadaada.
Numbers34:9 Yaape dendidi Zifiroona gakidi
Numbers34:10 “Doloha bagga zaway Haxar-Enaanape Safaama mallaa gakees.
Numbers34:11 Safaama mallafe dendidi Aynape doloha baggara Irbila duge wodhidi Kenereeta Abbaafe doloha baggara de7iya zumata gakees.
Numbers34:12 Hessafe hinte zaway duge Yordaanose shaafa wodhi zawaydi Maxine Abbaa gakees. Hinte biitta yuusho zawati haysata” yaagis.
Numbers34:13 Musey Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagidi Kiittis; “Uddufun bagga kochaas hinte saama yeggidi shaakana laata biittay haysa.
Numbers34:14 Robeela kochay
Numbers34:15 banta laata Iyaarkofe hefinthan

Numbers34:17 “Kahiniya Alaazaranne Nawe na7aa Iyyasuy he biitta asaas shaako.
Numbers34:18 Qassi biitta shaakanaw maadana mela issi issi kochaafe issi issi halaqa doorite.”
Numbers34:19 Enta sunthay haysafe kaallidi de7eysa. Yihuda kochaafe Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba;
Numbers34:20 Simoona kochaafe Amhuda na7aa Salam7eela;
Numbers34:21 Biniyaame kochaafe Kisiloona na7aa Eldaada;

Numbers34:23 Yoosefa na7aa Minaase kochaafe Sufeeda na7aa Hani7eela;
Numbers34:24 Yoosefa na7aa Efreema kochaafe Shifixaana na7aa; Qamu7eela;
Numbers34:25 Zabloona kochaafe Farnaaka na7aa Elsafaana;
Numbers34:26 Yisakoora kochaafe Hooza na7aa Palxi7eela;
Numbers34:27 Aseera kochaafe Salooma na7aa Ahuda;
Numbers34:28 Niftaaleme kochaafe Amhuda na7aa Padahi7eela;

Numbers35:1 Iyaarkofe hefinthan
Numbers35:2 “Isra7eeleti banta laatape Leeweti daana katamatanne enta yuushuwan hentha biitta immana mela entaw oda.
Numbers35:3 He katamati entaw duussa bessi gido; hentha biittati enta miizas
Numbers35:4 Hinte entaw immiya hentha biittay ubba baggara katamaa gimbe dirsaafe issi mukulu wadha gido.
Numbers35:5 Katamaa giddo oothidi doloha baggara nam7u mukulu wadha
Numbers35:6 “Leewetas hinte immida katamati
Numbers35:7 Oytamanne hospun katamata enta hentha biittara issife Leewetas immite.
Numbers35:8 Isra7eele asaa laatape enta laata mela daro kochaafe daro katama
Numbers35:9 Goday Museko
Numbers35:10 “Isra7eele asaako haysada yaaga; Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi
Numbers35:11 issi asi qoponna ase wodhidaba gidiko he uray baqatidi attana mela katamata hintew doorite.
Numbers35:12 Yan suuthu zaaranaw koya hayqida uraa dabbotape I attees. Shempo wodhida deriya sinthan pirdas shiiqonna hayqanaw bessenna.
Numbers35:13 Ha hinte immiya usupun katamati hinte baqatidi attiya katama gido.
Numbers35:14 Heedzu katamati Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan gido; qassi attida heedzati Kanaane biittan gido.
Numbers35:15 Ha usupun katamati eronna ase wodhida Isra7eele asay
Numbers35:16 “Issi asi hara asi birata miishen shocidi wodhiko he uray shempo wodhis; I hayqo.
Numbers35:17 Issi asi wodhanaw danda7iya shuchan hara asi caddidi wodhiko he uray shempo wodhis; I hayqo.
Numbers35:18 Issi asi wodhanaw danda7iya mitha miishen hara asi shocidi wodhiko he uray shempo wodhis; I hayqo.
Numbers35:19 Suuthu zaariya mata dabboy he shempo wodhidaysa demmiko wodho.
Numbers35:20 “Issi asi hara asi ba wozanan morkidi sugi yeggiko woyko hayqo gidi iya bolla issiba holin he uray hayqiko
Numbers35:21 woyko morkidi ba kushe cuucummidi dechin he uray hayqiko
Numbers35:22 “Shin morketethi baynan
Numbers35:23 woyko wodhanaw danda7iya shuchu I be7onna iya bolla holin
Numbers35:24 duulatay iya giddoninne iya suutha zaaranaw koya uraa giddon pirdiya wogay kaallidi de7iya wogaatho gido.
Numbers35:25 Eronna wodhidaysa suuthaa zaaranaw koyeysa kushepe he uraa duulatay ashshidi
Numbers35:26 “Shin eronna wodhidaysi baqatidi attiya katamaa zawape betiko
Numbers35:27 hayqida uraa dabboy iya demmidi wodhiko
Numbers35:28 He wode de7iya kahine halaqay hayqana gakanaw he eronna wodhida uray baqatidi attiya kataman utto. Shin he kahine halaqay hayqidaape guye eronna wodhida uray ba soo simmanaw danda7ees.
Numbers35:29 “Ha wogaynne higgey hinte de7iya biittan hintewunne hinte zerethaas eqidi de7iya woga gido.
Numbers35:30 “Ase wodhida oonika I shempo wodhidaysa nam7u woyko heedzu marki markatiko hayqo
Numbers35:31 Qassi shempo wodhida asape aca ekofite; I hayqanaw bessees.
Numbers35:32 Baqatidi attiya katama betida oodefeka kahine halaqay hayqanaape sinthe ba soo simmana mela aca iyape ekofite.
Numbers35:33 Suuthi biitta tunisiya gisho suuthu gussofite. Suuthu gussida uraa suuthaafe attishin
Numbers35:34 Taani

Numbers36:2 “Nu godaw

Deuteronomy1:24 Enti bidi

Deuteronomy1:27 Hinte dunkaaniya giddon issoy issuwara haysada yaagidi zuuzumideta. “Goday nuna ixida gisho
Deuteronomy1:28 Yaatin yaa ayis baanee? Nu ishati
Deuteronomy1:29 Yaatin taani

Deuteronomy1:33

Deuteronomy1:36 Ha biitta be7anay Yoofona na7aa Kaaleba xalaala. I yedhida biitta iyasinne iya kochaas immana; I ba kumetha wozanaape Godaa kaallis” yaagidi caaqis.

Deuteronomy2:1 Hessafe guye
Deuteronomy2:2 Hessafe guye
Deuteronomy2:3 “Ha derey dariya biitta adussa wode yuuyidaysi hintew gidana; pudeha bagga simmidi biite.
Deuteronomy2:4 Asaa neeni yaagada kiitta; ‘Sayren de7ey Eesawe nayta hinte ishata gidiya gisho enta biittara hinte kantheeta. Enti hintew yayyana
Deuteronomy2:5 Taani enta biittafe tohoy yedhiya bessa mela hintew immonna gisho entara oletofite. Taani derey dariya Sayre biitta laata oothada Eesawes koyrottada immas.
Deuteronomy2:6 Hinte miya kathaanne uyaa haatha entafe miishen shammite’ ” yaagada kiitta.
Deuteronomy2:7 Goday hinte Xoossay hinte oothidaba ubbaa anjis; hinte ha wolqaama mela biittan hemetiya wode hintena naagis. Oytamu laytha ubban Goday hinte Xoossay hintera de7is; hintew aybaaka pacisibeenna.

Deuteronomy2:9 Goday taako
Deuteronomy2:10 (He biittan kase minonne daro gidida
Deuteronomy2:11 Enti Anaaqetada Raafaymeta geetetoosona. Shin Moo7abe asay enta Emimeta gidi xeegosona.

Deuteronomy2:13 Goday nuuko
Deuteronomy2:14 Nuuni Qaades-Barnefe dendidi
Deuteronomy2:15 Dunkaanida gutaape enti kumethi dhayana gakanaw
Deuteronomy2:16 Olas gakida adde asa ubbay kumethi dhaydaapenne asaa giddofe hayqidi wuridaape guye
Deuteronomy2:17 Goday taako
Deuteronomy2:18 “Era ogiyara hachi hinte Moo7abe biitta kantheeta.
Deuteronomy2:19 Hinte Amoone asaa biitta gakiya wode enta bochofite woyko entara ooyetofite. Amoone asata biittafe aybibaaka taani hintew laata oothada immike. Taani he biitta Looxe kochaas laata oothada koyro immas” yaagis.
Deuteronomy2:20 [He biittay kase yan de7iya asay xeegetiya sunthaa Raafaymeta biitta geetetidi xeegetees. Qassi Amooneti enta Zamzumeta gidi xeegosona.
Deuteronomy2:21 Enti Anaaqetada adusse
Deuteronomy2:22 Goday Sayren de7iya Eesawe kochaas oothidaysada
Deuteronomy2:23 Gaaza gakanaw de7iya heeran de7iya Aweeti
Deuteronomy2:24 Qassika Goday nuuko
Deuteronomy2:25 Hachife doomin salope garsan de7iya asa ubbay hintew yayyana mela taani oothana. Enti hintebaa si7iya wode ubban yashshan kokorana” yaagis.

Deuteronomy2:30 Shin Haseboona kawoy Sihooney nuna aathona ixis. Goday hinte Xoossay ha77i oothidaysada iya hinte kushen aathidi immanaw koyida gisho iya wozanaa muumisisdi

Deuteronomy2:32 Sihooney ba olanchota ubbaa ekidi Yahaaxa geetetiya bessan nuura oletanaw keyis.

Deuteronomy11:24 Tohon hinte yedhida biitta ubbay hintebaa gidana. Hinte zaway dugeha mela biittafe bidi Libaanose gakanawunne Efraxiisa shaafape bidi Gita Abbaa gakanaw gidana.

Deuteronomy18:14 Neeni laattanaw biya biittan de7iya kawotethati murunneysatanne biteyisata; shin ne hessa oothonna mela Goday ne Xoossay nena diggis.

Deuteronomy22:4 Isra7eele asa harey woyko boori ogen kundin be7iko

Deuteronomy22:8 Ooratha keethi keexiya wode kaarape asi kundi hayqin ne oyshetonna mela keetha bolla kate giigisa.

Deuteronomy22:10 Boorinne hare issife waaxada goyopa.
Deuteronomy22:11 Suufepenne liinope oosetida ma7o ma7ofa.
Deuteronomy22:12 Ne ma7iya ma7oy oyddu baggara macari de7iyaba gido.

Deuteronomy23:1 Sangatida woyko qaaratetida addey Godaa shiiquwa gelopo.
Deuteronomy23:2 Laymatethan yeletida asi Godaa shiiquwa gelopo. Hari attoshin tammantho yeletethi gakanaw

Deuteronomy23:4 Neeni Gibxefe keyada bishin
Deuteronomy23:5 Goday
Deuteronomy23:6 Ne de7o laytha ubban enti saro daana melanne duretana mela amottofa.
Deuteronomy23:7 Edoometi new dabbo gidiya gisho enta kadhopa; ne enta biittan bete asi gidada de7ida gisho Gibxeta kadhopa.
Deuteronomy23:8 Enta heedzantho yeletethay Godaa shiiquwa gelanaw danda7oosona.
Deuteronomy23:9 Ne morketa olanaw keyada dunkaanida bessan nena tunatethafe naaga.
Deuteronomy23:10 Qamma amuhon atuntethay gukin
Deuteronomy23:11 Sa7i omarsiya wode ba asatethaa meecetidi
Deuteronomy23:12 Ne wora sheeshi uttiya bessi gutaape karen giigisa.
Deuteronomy23:13 Sheeshas uttiya olla bookiya miishe ola miishera gathada oyka; sheeshas utta simmada ollan biitta zaara.
Deuteronomy23:14 Goday
Deuteronomy23:15 Ba godaape baqatidi
Deuteronomy23:16 I ne katamatape issuwan

Deuteronomy23:18 Adde gidin woyko maccas gidin

Deuteronomy24:1 Issi asi macho eki simmidi
Deuteronomy24:2 iya soope keyada
Deuteronomy24:3 he nam7antho azinay iyo dosonna ixidi
Deuteronomy24:4 iya tunida gisho
Deuteronomy24:5 Ooratha macho ekida asi olas boopo; hara deexo ooso oothofo. Issi laythi aadhana gakanaw awuka boonna ba machiw ufayso.
Deuteronomy24:6 Issi asa woxa woyko mayde acos oykofa; hessi keetha asay miyaba dhayidi hayqo guussu.
Deuteronomy24:7 Issi Isra7eele gidida ba ishaa kaysoti efidi
Deuteronomy24:8 Goga hargefe nena minthada naaga; Leewe koche gidida kahineti nena tamaarsiya ubbaa pola; ta entaw immida kiita naaga.

Deuteronomy24:10 Issi asas issiba tal7ada
Deuteronomy24:11 Neeni karen eqidashin

Deuteronomy28:4 Ne ulo ayfey
Deuteronomy28:5 Ne keesheynne ne munaqa miishey anjetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:6 Ne kessaynne ne geloy anjetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:7 Ne bolla dendiya ne morketa
Deuteronomy28:8 Goday ne kushey oykiyabaanne ne shaaliya anjana; Goday
Deuteronomy28:9 Neeni Godaa
Deuteronomy28:10 Hessafe guye
Deuteronomy28:11 Goday new immanaw ne mayzatas caaqida he biittan
Deuteronomy28:12 Ne kushe ooso ubbaa anjanawunne
Deuteronomy28:13 Goday nena ubbaas kace kessanaape attishin
Deuteronomy28:14 Ta new hachi immida kiitaape haddirsi woyko ushachi gada
Deuteronomy28:15 Shin neeni Godaa
Deuteronomy28:16 Ne katamaninne ne goshshan baadetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:17 Ne keesheynne munaqa miishey baadetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:18 Ne ulo ayfey
Deuteronomy28:19 Ne kessaynne ne geloy baadetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:20 Neeni iita ooso oothada tana aggida gisho
Deuteronomy28:21 Neeni laattanaw biya biittafe dhayana gakanaw Goday
Deuteronomy28:22 Goday nena gilqatethan
Deuteronomy28:23 Neepe bollara de7iya saloy naase birata gidana; neepe garsara de7iya biittay birata gidana.
Deuteronomy28:24 Goday ne biittan bukiya ira bidonne baana kessana; neeni dhayana gakanaw salope baani bukana.
Deuteronomy28:25 Goday nena ne morketan xoonisana. Neeni enta olanaw issi ogera keyana; shin laapun ogera ne enta sinthafe baqatana. Biittan de7iya kawotethi ubbay ne bolla gakidaba be7idi
Deuteronomy28:26 Ne ahay salo kafotasinne bazzo do7atas kathi gidana; enta yedethiya oonika deenna.
Deuteronomy28:27 Goday nena paxoy bayna Gibxe gadon
Deuteronomy28:28 Goday nena gooshshatethan
Deuteronomy28:29 Seeta gallas neeni qooqey tattafeysada tattafana; ne oothiyaba ubbay new giigonna ixana. Ne de7o laytha ubban ne un7etananne bonqetada daana. Nena maaddiya asi demmaka.
Deuteronomy28:30 Ne macho oycha giigisana
Deuteronomy28:31 Ne booray ne sinthan shuketana
Deuteronomy28:32 Ne ayfey be7ishin ne adde naytinne macca nayti hara kawotethas imetana. Enti simmin be7ana gada xeellishin
Deuteronomy28:33 Ne biitta ayfiyanne ne cawa ubbaa ne eronna asi maana; ne de7o laytha ubban un7etidaysanne naaqetidaysa gidana.
Deuteronomy28:34 Ne be7iya iitati nena gooshshana.
Deuteronomy28:35 Goday paxoy bayna iita madunthan ne gulbatanne ne wodiriya hargisana; tohope huuphe gakanaw
Deuteronomy28:36 Goday nenanne ne kawa
Deuteronomy28:37 Goday nena laaliya hara kawotethata giddon neeni miichasinne kaassas attana.
Deuteronomy28:38 Neeni daro kathi ne goshshan zerana; shin booley midigin
Deuteronomy28:39 Woyne tokada iya harmana
Deuteronomy28:40 Ne biitta ubban shamahoy dolana
Deuteronomy28:41 Ne addenne macca yelana
Deuteronomy28:42 Ne mithaanne ne biitta ayfiya booley wursana.
Deuteronomy28:43 Ne giddon de7iya bete asay ne bolla dhoqu dhoqu gaana
Deuteronomy28:44 I new tal7anaape attishin
Deuteronomy28:45 Godaa
Deuteronomy28:46 Ha baadethati ne bollanne ne kochaa bolla merinaw malaatanne malaalsiyaba gidana.
Deuteronomy28:47 New sa7i injetida wode Godaa
Deuteronomy28:48 nena koshan
Deuteronomy28:49 Goday ne enta qaala eronna kawotethata
Deuteronomy28:50 Enti wozana minota; cima bonchonayisata; naytas qadhetonayisata.
Deuteronomy28:51 Ne dhayana gakanaw enti ne mehiyanne goshsha ayfiya maana. Neeni dhayana gakanaw ne kathaa
Deuteronomy28:52 Goday
Deuteronomy28:53 Ne morketi katamaa teqidi nena un7ethiya wode miyaba dhayada
Deuteronomy28:54 Ne giddon hari attoshin kase injen de7ida asika ba ishaas
Deuteronomy28:55 Morketi katamaa teqidi un7ethiya wode maanabay hari bayna gisho
Deuteronomy28:56 Ne giddon kase injen de7ida
Deuteronomy28:57 Morketi iya de7iya katamaa teqidi iyo un7ethida gishonne waaysida gisho

Deuteronomy32:1 Saloto
Deuteronomy32:2 Ta timirtey ira mela buko; ta qaalay akada wodho. Maata bolla wodhiya xaasada dola bolla wodhiya puuseda wodho.
Deuteronomy32:3 Taani Godaa sunthaa awaajana; gitatetha nu Xoossaas immite.
Deuteronomy32:4 I nu Zaalla; iya oosoy polo; iya ogey suure. Xoossay ammantheysa; wordoy baynaysa; I tumanchonne suure.
Deuteronomy32:5 Iya sinthan banta tunatethaa bessidosona; enti iya na7a gidokona; enti iitanne geella yeletethi.
Deuteronomy32:6 Hinteno
Deuteronomy32:7 Beni wodiya qopa; aadhida yeletethaa akeeka. Ne aawa oycha; I new odana; cimata oycha; enti new qoncisana.
Deuteronomy32:8 Ubbaafe Wolqaamay kawotethatas enta laata shaakida wode
Deuteronomy32:9 Godaa gakida gishoy Isra7eele; Yayqoobi iya gakida laata.
Deuteronomy32:10 I enta mela biittan
Deuteronomy32:11 Arganthi ba na7a paalo tamaarseysada
Deuteronomy32:12 Goday ba xalaala enta kaalethis; hara allaga xoossi iyara baawa.
Deuteronomy32:13 I biittas dhoqa bessaa enta kessis; goshsha ayfiya enta muzis. Zaalla qophope enta eessi kalsis; shucha biittafe bentiya zayte ushshis.
Deuteronomy32:14 Enta mehiyape qeesa maathi
Deuteronomy32:15 Shin Isra7eeley ordis; makallis; midi kallidi moollotis. Bana medhida Xoossaa aggis; ba Atotethaa Zaalla kawushis.
Deuteronomy32:16 Enti allaga xoossata goyinnidi
Deuteronomy32:17 Xoosse gidonaysatas
Deuteronomy32:18 Entaw de7o immiya Zaalla dogidosona; yelidi dichida Xoossa aggidosona.
Deuteronomy32:19 Adde naytinne macca nayti iya yiloyidosona; Goday hessa be7idi enta kadhis.
Deuteronomy32:20 I
Deuteronomy32:21 Xoosse gidonaysatan tana qanaatisidosona; banta eeqatan tana yiloyidosona. Taani enta kadhetida asan qanaatisana; eeya asan enta yiloyana.
Deuteronomy32:22 Ta hanqoy tamada eexana; Si7oole gakanaw xuuggana. Biittan de7iyaba ubbaa maana
Deuteronomy32:23 “Taani enta bolla meto doorana; ta dongiyan enta dukana.
Deuteronomy32:24 Ta enta bolla iita kosha yeddana; enti hargeninne gadon wurana. Enta bolla iita bazzo do7atanne dukidi wodhiya iita shooshata yeddana.
Deuteronomy32:25 Enta
Deuteronomy32:26 Ta enta dhaysanawunne enta hassayiya asi doonna mela oothanaw qopas.
Deuteronomy32:27 Shin enta morketi
Deuteronomy32:28 Isra7eele asay wozani bayna asi; enti akeekokona.
Deuteronomy32:29 Enti cincidi akeekidako haysa erana
Deuteronomy32:30 Goday enta Xoossay enta bayzonaako
Deuteronomy32:31 Nu Zaallay nu morketa zaalla mela gidonnaysa enti eroosona.
Deuteronomy32:32 Enta woyney Soodome woyniyape yees
Deuteronomy32:33 Enta woyney shoosha marze; wodhiya soggo.
Deuteronomy32:34 Goday
Deuteronomy32:35 Entaw dhayo gallasi matis; enta bolla gakanabay ellesees. He wode enta tohoy dhubetana; ta halo keyananne kushe zaarana.”
Deuteronomy32:36 Enta wolqay wuridaysanne enta maaddiya asi baynaysa be7ida wode
Deuteronomy32:37 Xoossay entako
Deuteronomy32:38 Enta modho yarshuwa midaysati
Deuteronomy32:39 “Tuma
Deuteronomy32:40 Ta kushiya denthada haysada yaagana; Taani merinaw de7o;
Deuteronomy32:41 Phooliya ta mashsha leefada
Deuteronomy32:42 Ta dongey enta suuthan mathotana; ta mashshay enta ashuwa maana. Tana ixiya ubbaa maarike; madunxidaysatinne di7etidaysati hayqana.”
Deuteronomy32:43 Kawotethato
Deuteronomy32:44 Museynne Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaa shiishidi

Deuteronomy32:48 He gallas Goday Muse haysada yaagis;

Deuteronomy33:2 Musey
Deuteronomy33:3 Godaw neeni ne asaa dosadasa; Geeshshati ubbay ne kushen de7oosona. Ne tohuwa garsan ubbay gulbatidi goyinnoosona; neepe kiita ekoosona.

Deuteronomy33:5 Isra7eele zerethati deriya halaqatara shiiqida wode
Deuteronomy33:6 “Robeela kochay taybon guutha gidikoka
Deuteronomy33:7 Musey Yihuda kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:8 Musey Leewe kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:9 Bantana yelidaysatape

Deuteronomy33:12 Biniyaame kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:13 Yoosefa kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:14 Awan kaxidi dooretida ayfeninne woden woden kaxiya ayfen anjeto.
Deuteronomy33:15 Benipe de7iya deretinne zumati lo77o ayfen anjeto.
Deuteronomy33:16 Enta biittay lo77obay kumida biitta gido; tushiya giddon eexiya taman qoncida Goday iya anjo. Ha anjoti ubbay Yoosefa kochaa gako; I ba ishata giddon halaqa gido.
Deuteronomy33:17 Yoosefi koyro yeletida kormada mino; iya kaceti mentha kaceda mino. Iya kaceti tammu mukulan taybetiya Efreema kochata; mukulun taybetiya Minaase kochata. He kacetan I kawotethata qaycana; biitta gaxaa gakanaw I enta sugana.”
Deuteronomy33:18 Zabloona kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:19 Enti asaa banta zumako xeegana; yan enti geeshshatetha yarsho yarshana. Banta aquwanne banta duretetha
Deuteronomy33:20 Gaade kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:21 Enti lo77o biitta bantaw dooridosona; halaqatas gida biitta enti ekidosona. Isra7eele halaqati shiiqida wode
Deuteronomy33:22 Daane kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:23 Niftaaleme kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:24 Aseera kochaaba
Deuteronomy33:25 Iya katamati birata pengen gordetidi naageto; ba laytha ubban I wolqaama gido.
Deuteronomy33:26 Isra7eele
Deuteronomy33:27 Merinaa Xoossay ne de7iya bessi; iya merinaa kusheti neepe garsara de7oosona. I ne morketa ne sinthafe kessidi
Deuteronomy33:28 Hessa gisho
Deuteronomy33:29 Isra7eele
Deuteronomy34:1 Musey Moo7abe dembaafe dendidi
Deuteronomy34:2 Niftaaleme biitta ubbaa
Deuteronomy34:3 dugeha baggara Zo7aarepe dendidi
Deuteronomy34:4 Goday Museko
Deuteronomy34:5 Godaa aylley
Deuteronomy34:6 Goday Beet-Pa7oora katamaape sintha baggan Moo7abe zangaaran iya moogis. Shin hachi gakanaw I moogetida duufuwa eriya asi baawa.
Deuteronomy34:7 Musey hayqiya wode iyaw laythi xeetanne laatama; shin iya ayfey ixibeenna; iya wolqay daaburibeenna.
Deuteronomy34:8 Isra7eele asay Moo7abe denban hastamu gallas Muses yeekidosona. Hessafe guye
Deuteronomy34:9 Musey
Deuteronomy34:10 Godaa som7on odisida
Deuteronomy34:11 Goday Muse Gibxe kawako
Deuteronomy34:12 Isra7eele ubbaa sinthan gita wolqan malaalsiyaba oothida
Joshua1:1 Godaa aylley Musey hayqidaape guye
Joshua1:2 “Ta aylley
Joshua1:3 Taani Muses odidaysada
Joshua1:4 Hinte zaway dugeha Negebe mela biittafe dendidi
Joshua1:5 Iyyasu
Joshua1:6 Aykoy baawa minna. Taani enta mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta neeni ha asaa laatisana.
Joshua1:7 Aykoy baawa minna. Ta aylley Musey new immida higgiya ubbaa minthada naaga. Neeni biya bessa ubban new injetana mela iyape ushachi woyko haddirsi goopa.
Joshua1:8 Ha higge maxaafay ne doonape shaaketofo. Iyan xaafetidaba ubbaa minthada naaganaw gallasinne qamma iya qopa. Hessa ne oothiko
Joshua1:9 Ne biya bessa ubban taani Goday ne Xoossay neera de7iya gisho
Joshua1:10 Hessafe guye
Joshua1:11 “Asay dunkaanidi de7iya guta bidi
Joshua1:12 Iyyasuy
Joshua1:13 “Goday
Joshua1:14 Hinte macheti
Joshua1:15 Goday hintena shempisidaysada
Joshua1:16 Enti zaaridi Iyyasuko
Joshua1:17 Nuuni Muses ubbaban kiitetidaysada
Joshua1:18 Neera eqeteynne ne kiita ixiya oonika de7iko
Joshua2:1 Nawe na7ay Iyyasuy
Joshua2:2 Iyaarko kawoy
Joshua2:3 Yaatin
Joshua2:4 Shin maccasiya he nam7u asata qottada
Joshua2:5 Omarsi katama pengiya gordana haniya wode
Joshua2:6 Shin iya asata dasa bolla kessada talba coyna giddon qosasu.
Joshua2:7 Yaatin
Joshua2:8 Wocheysati dhiskanaape kasetada
Joshua2:9 haysada yaagasu; “Goday ha biitta hintew immidaysa ta erayis. Gaasoyka
Joshua2:10 Gibxe biittafe hinte keyida wode
Joshua2:11 Nuuni hessa si7ida wode
Joshua2:12 Hessa gisho
Joshua2:13 Ta aawanne ta aayiw
Joshua2:14 He asati zaaridi
Joshua2:15 Ra7aabi keethay katama gimbe dirsara oyketidi keexetida gisho
Joshua2:16 Ra7aaba entako
Joshua2:17 Asati zaaridi
Joshua2:18 
Joshua2:19 Oonika ne soope kare keyidi hayqiko
Joshua2:20 Shin nu oothiyaba neeni asas qoncisiko neeni nuna caaqisida caaqoy nuus gome gidenna” yaagidosona.
Joshua2:21 Iya zaarada
Joshua2:22 Enti deriyako bidi
Joshua2:23 Hessafe guye
Joshua2:24 Enti Iyyasuko
Joshua3:1 Wontetha gallas
Joshua3:2 Heedzu gallasape guye
Joshua3:3 “Leewe koche gidida kahineti tookida
Joshua3:4 Hinte kase ha ogiyara bidi eronna gisho
Joshua3:5 Iyyasuy asaako
Joshua3:6 Qassi kahinetas
Joshua3:7 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua3:8 Neeni
Joshua3:9 Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaako
Joshua3:10 De7o Xoossay hinte giddon de7eysa hinte eranay
Joshua3:11 Biitta ubba Godaa caaqo taabotey hintefe sinthatidi
Joshua3:12 Hiza tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethatape issi issi asi doorite.
Joshua3:13 Biitta ubba Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineta tohoy Yordaanose haatha yedhiya wode haathay eqana. Qommofe duge goggiya Yordaanose haathay issi bolla shiiqidi dooretana” yaagis.
Joshua3:14 Asay Yordaanose shaafa pinnanaw dunkaanida gutaape dendiya wode
Joshua3:15 Kathi shiishiya wode Yordaanose shaafay medhaysada kixikoka
Joshua3:16 qommofe duge goggiya haathay eqis. Zartaana matan de7iya Adaama katama gakanaw shiiqidi dooretis. Duge Hayqo abbaako goggiya haathay eqis. Yaanin
Joshua3:17 Isra7eele asay mela biittara pinnidi wurana gakanaw Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafa giddon mela biittan eqidosona.
Joshua4:1 Asa ubbay Yordaanose pinnidaape guye Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua4:2 “Issi issi Isra7eele kochaafe issi issi asi ekada tammanne nam7u asata doora.
Joshua4:3 He asati Yordaanose shaafa giddon kahineti eqida bessaafe tammanne nam7u shuchata ekana melanne he shuchata hachi hinte dunkaanidi aqiya bessan wothana mela oda” yaagis.
Joshua4:4 Iyyasuy Isra7eele zerethatape dooretida tammanne nam7u asata xeegis.
Joshua4:5 Entako
Joshua4:6 Ha shuchati
Joshua4:7 hinte zaaridi
Joshua4:8 He asati Iyyasuy kiitidaysada oothidosona. Goday Iyyasus odidaysada
Joshua4:9 Iyyasuy
Joshua4:10 Musey Iyyasu kiitidaysa mela
Joshua4:11 Asa ubbay
Joshua4:12 Musey kiitidaysada
Joshua4:13 Darotethan oytamu mukulu gidiya olanchoti
Joshua4:14 He gallas
Joshua4:15 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua4:16 “Caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyana mela oda” yaagis.
Joshua4:17 Iyyasuy kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyana mela odis.
Joshua4:18 Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookida kahineti Yordaanose shaafape keyidosona. Enta tohoy mela biitta yedhida wode ellesidi
Joshua4:19 Asay koyro ageenan tammantho gallasan Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi
Joshua4:20 Iyyasuy Yordaanose shaafape eketida tammanne nam7u shuchata Galgalan essidi
Joshua4:21 Isra7eele asaako haysada yaagis; “Wonto hinte nayti
Joshua4:22 ‘Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafa mela biittara yedhidi pinnidaysa qofisiyaba’ yaagidi odeeta.
Joshua4:23 Nuuni pinnana gakanaw
Joshua4:24 Hessa gisho
Joshua5:1 Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan de7iya Amooreta kawotinne Medetiraane Abbaa lanqen de7iya Kanaaneta kawoti ubbay
Joshua5:2 He wode Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua5:3 Iyyasuy qara salo shucha ekidi
Joshua5:4 I hessa oothiday
Joshua5:5 Gibxefe keyida adde asa ubbay
Joshua5:6 Gibxefe keyiya wode laythi olas gakida adde asa ubbay Godaas kiitetonna ixida gisho
Joshua5:7 Hessa gisho
Joshua5:8 Asa ubbay
Joshua5:9 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua5:10 Isra7eele asay Iyaarko denban Galgala geetetiya bessan dunkaanidi
Joshua5:11 Paasikape guye
Joshua5:12 He gadiyan mokida kathaa enti mida wontetha gallas mannay wodheysa aggis. He wodepe doomidi Isra7eele asay manna demmibookona. Hessafe guye

Joshua5:14 Addey zaaridi

Joshua6:1 Isra7eele asaas yayyida gisho
Joshua6:2 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua6:3 Neeranne ne olanchotara salpidi
Joshua6:4 Laapun kahineti issoy issoy moyze oykidi
Joshua6:5 Kahineti moyze goochidi punuwa hinte si7iya wode
Joshua6:6 Nawe na7a Iyyasu kahineta xeegidi
Joshua6:7 Asaako qassi
Joshua6:8 Iyyasuy odidaysada
Joshua6:9 Olas dancidaysati moyze punniya kahineta sinthan hemetoosona. Kahineti qanxonna moyze punniya wode derey taabotiyape guyera kaallees.
Joshua6:10 Shin Iyyasuy
Joshua6:11 Hessa gisho
Joshua6:12 Wontetha gallas Iyyasuy guuridi dendis; kahinetika Godaa caaqo taabotiya tookidosona.
Joshua6:13 Laapun moyzeta oykida laapun kahineti banta moyziya qanxonna punnishe caaqo taabotiya sinthan boosona. Moyzey qanxonna punetiya wode olanchoti kahinetape sinthan qassi derey taabotiyape guyera kaallees.
Joshua6:14 Nam7antho gallas katamaa issi toho yuuyidi
Joshua6:15 Laapuntha gallas gontey wadhishin dendidi
Joshua6:16 Laapuntha yuushuwan

Joshua6:18 Shin hinte metonne qoho Isra7eele guta bolla ehona mela dhayanaw bessiyabape aybaka amotidi ekonnaada hinte huuphes naagetite.
Joshua6:19 Biraynne worqey
Joshua6:20 Hessa gisho
Joshua6:21 Banta mashsha denthidi
Joshua6:22 Iyyasuy biitta xomoosanaw kiitetida nam7u asatako
Joshua6:23 Enti bidi
Joshua6:24 Yaati simmidi katamaanne iya giddon de7iyaba ubbaa xuuggidosona. Shin biranne worqaa
Joshua6:25 Shin laymiya Raaba Iyaarko xomoosana mela kiitetida asata qosada ashshida gisho
Joshua6:26 He wode Iyyasuy

Joshua8:1 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua8:2 Neeni Iyaarko bollanne iya kawa bolla oothidaysada Gaye bollanne iya kawa bolla oothana. Shin hinte ha77i olidi di7iya shalonne mehe hintew ekite. Katamaape guye baggara qoponna mentha gelanaw giigeta.”
Joshua8:3 Hessa gisho
Joshua8:4 entana haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Bidi katamaape guye baggara qosetidi naagite. Katamaape haakidi boonnashin
Joshua8:5 Tanne taara de7iya asa ubbay
Joshua8:6 Enti kesseysada nu enta sinthafe baqatiya daanin
Joshua8:7 He wode hinte qosetida bessaafe keyidi katamaa oykite. Goday hinte Xoossay katamaa hinte kushen aathidi immana.
Joshua8:8 Katamaa oykidaape guye
Joshua8:9 Hessafe guye

Joshua8:11 Iyara de7iya olanchoti ubbay
Joshua8:12 Iyyasuy ichashu mukulu olanchota dooridi
Joshua8:13 Olanchotape baggaa katamaape pudeha baggara
Joshua8:14 Gaye katamaa kawoy hessa be7ida wode
Joshua8:15 Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asa ubbay xoonetidaba daanidi
Joshua8:16 Gaye kataman de7iya asa ubbay
Joshua8:17 Gayen woyko Beetelen de7iya asa ubbay
Joshua8:18 Hessafe guye
Joshua8:19 Iyyasuy ba toora denthida wode qosetida olanchoti banta bessaafe dendidi
Joshua8:20 Gaye katamaa asay guye simmidi xeelliya wode
Joshua8:21 Iyyasunne iyara de7iya asa ubbay
Joshua8:22 Katamaa gelidi oykida olanchotika katamaape enta bolla keyidosona. Yaatin
Joshua8:23 Shin Gaye katamaa kawa de7idi
Joshua8:24 Isra7eele asay Gaye katamaa asa entana yedethida bessan mashshan wodhidi ongidaape guye
Joshua8:25 He gallas Gaye kataman hayqida addeynne macci tammanne nam7u mukula.
Joshua8:26 Iyyasuy Gaye kataman de7iyaba ubbaa ongana gakanaw katamaa bolla denthida toora duge wothibeenna.
Joshua8:27 Shin Goday Iyyasu kiitidaysa mela Isra7eele asay he katamaa mehiyanne shaluwa bantaw di7idosona.
Joshua8:28 Iyyasuy Gaye katamaa xuuggis; he katamay hachi gakanaw laaletha doorenne asi baynna bessi gididi attis.

Joshua8:35 Musey kiitida higgiya Iyyasuy
Joshua9:1 Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan derey dariya biittaninne gadhan Medetrane abbaafe bidi Libaanose gakanaw de7iya Hiteta
Joshua9:2 Iyyasunne Isra7eeleta olanaw issife shiiqidi zoretidosona.
Joshua9:3 Gaba7oona asay Iyyasuy Iyaarko bollanne Gaye katamaa bolla oothidaba si7idi
Joshua9:4 Iyyasu cimmanaw koydosona. Enti shinqe qachidi
Joshua9:5 Kiitetida asati wurida caamma aathidosona; peedhetida afila ma7idosona; enti oykida shinqeyka melidabaanne meqertidaba.
Joshua9:6 Enti Isra7eele asay dunkaanida guta Galgala bidi
Joshua9:7 Yaatin
Joshua9:8 Enti Iyyasuko
Joshua9:9 Enti zaaridi
Joshua9:10 Qassi Yordaanose shaafape hefinthan wuloha baggan de7iya nam7u Amoore kawota
Joshua9:11 Nu biitta cimatinne nu biittan de7iya ubbay
Joshua9:12 “Nu oykida shinqiya be7ite. Nu soope ekidi keyiya wode ho77o
Joshua9:13 Ha woyniya ogorotan nu kunthiya wode oorathi
Joshua9:14 Shin Godaa sheniya oychonna de7ishe
Joshua9:15 Yaatin
Joshua9:16 Entara caaqida heedzantho gallasan he asati enta biittan de7eysanne entaw shooro gideysa Isra7eele asay si7idosona.
Joshua9:17 Isra7eele asay heedzu gallas hemetidi
Joshua9:18 Shin Isra7eele cimati entaw Godaa
Joshua9:19 Shin Isra7eele cimati
Joshua9:20 Nuuni entaw haysada oothana; nuuni entaw caaqida caaquwa menthin Godaa hanqoy nu bolla yoonnaada enta wodhoko.
Joshua9:21 Enti de7o giite. Gidoshin Isra7eele asa ubbaas mithinne haathe shiisheyisata gido” yaagidosona. Hessa gisho
Joshua9:22 Iyyasuy Gaba7oona asaa xeegidi
Joshua9:23 Hinte hessa oothida gisho
Joshua9:24 Enti zaaridi
Joshua9:25 Ha77i nu ne kushen de7oos. New lo77onne suure daanidi bentidaba ootha” gidi zaaridosona.
Joshua9:26 Iyyasuy Isra7eele asay enta wodhonna mela ashshis.
Joshua9:27 He gallas Iyyasuy
Joshua10:1 Iyyasuy Iyaarko katamaa oli dhaysidi
Joshua10:2 Gaba7ooni hanko kawo katamatada gita katama; he katamay Gaye katamaape aadhees; iyan de7iya addetika mino olancho gideysa eriya gisho
Joshua10:3 Hessa gisho
Joshua10:4 “Gaba7oona asay Iyyasuranne Isra7eele asaara saro de7anaw caaqida gisho
Joshua10:5 Ha ichashu Amoore kawoti banta olanchota issife gathidi
Joshua10:6 Gaba7oona asay Galgalan dunkaanida Iyyasuko
Joshua10:7 Hessa gisho
Joshua10:8 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua10:9 Iyyasuy Galgalape qamma kumethi hemetishe aqidi
Joshua10:10 Goday Isra7eele asa sinthan entaw wozana kaha dhaysis. Isra7eele asay enta Gaba7oonan wodhidosona. Isra7eeleti enta Beet-Horona efiya ogiya oythidi goodishe
Joshua10:11 Enti Beet-Horonape duge Azeeqa efiya ogiyara Isra7eele asaa sinthafe baqatishin
Joshua10:12 Goday Isra7eele asaas Amooreta
Joshua10:13 Isra7eele asay banta morketa xoonana gakanaw
Joshua10:14 Goday asa qaala si7ida he gallasa mela gallas haysafe kaseka haysafe sinthanka deenna. Tumaka Goday Isra7eele asaas oletis.
Joshua10:15 Hessafe guye
Joshua10:16 He ichashu Amoore kawoti baqatidi
Joshua10:17 Ichashu kawoti
Joshua10:18 Iyyasuy zaaridi
Joshua10:19 Shin hinte yan gam7ofite; enti banta katamaa gelidi attona mela hinte morketa gooddidi enta wodhite. Goday hinte Xoossay enta hinte kushen aathidi immis” yaagis.
Joshua10:20 Guutha asati baqatidi banta gimbetida katamaa gelidi attikoka
Joshua10:21 Hessafe guye
Joshua10:22 Hessafe guye
Joshua10:23 Gongoluwa doona dooyidi
Joshua10:24 Enti he kawota iyako ehida wode
Joshua10:25 Iyyasuy entako
Joshua10:26 Iyyasuy he ichashu kawota wodhidi
Joshua10:27 Awi wulliya wode Iyyasuy
Joshua10:28 He gallas Iyyasuy Maqeda katamaa oykis; katamaa kawaka wodhis; kataman de7iya asa ubbaa issi asika ashshona dhaysis. Iyaarko katamaa kawa bolla oothidaysada
Joshua10:29 Yaape simmidi
Joshua10:30 Goday he katamaanne katamaa kawa enta kushen aathidi immis. Iyyasuy kataman de7iya asaape issuwaka ashshona mashshan wodhis. Iyaarko katamaa kawa bolla oothidaysada Libina katamaa kawa bolla oothis.
Joshua10:31 Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti Libina katamaape Laakiso katama bidi
Joshua10:32 Goday Laakiso katama Isra7eele asa kushen aathidi immin
Joshua10:33 He wode
Joshua10:34 Hessafe simmidi
Joshua10:35 He gallas Egloona katamaa oykidi
Joshua10:36 Yaati simmidi
Joshua10:37 He katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya guutha katamata oykidi iyan de7iya asaanne kawa wodhidosona. Iyyasuy Egloonan oothidaysada he katamaa bollaka oothis.
Joshua10:38 Hessafe guye
Joshua10:39 He katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya guutha gutata oykidi
Joshua10:40 Iyyasuy he biittan de7iya katamata ubbaa oykis. Derey dariya biittan
Joshua10:41 Iyyasuy Qaades-Barnefe bidi Gaaza gakanaw qassi Goshena biittafe bidi Gaba7oona gakanaw de7iya ubbaa olidi xoonis.
Joshua10:42 Goday
Joshua10:43 Hessafe guye
Joshua11:1 Hazoora kawoy Yaabini
Joshua11:2 pudeha gezzen de7iya kawotas
Joshua11:3 Qassi dolohanne wuloha baggan de7iya Kanaanetas
Joshua11:4 Enti ubbay
Joshua11:5 He kawoti ubbay banta wolqaa issife gathidi
Joshua11:6 Goday Iyyasuko
Joshua11:7 Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti ubbay enti qoponna de7ishin Meroome haatha matan enta bolla keyidi olidosona.
Joshua11:8 Goday entana Isra7eeleta kushen aathidi immis. Isra7eeleti enta olidi
Joshua11:9 Iyyasuy
Joshua11:10 Yaatidi
Joshua11:11 Isra7eele asay Hazooran de7iya asaa ubbaa mashshan wodhida gisho shempora attida asi baawa. He katamay taman xuugetis.
Joshua11:12 Godaa aylley Musey kiitidaysada
Joshua11:13 Gidoshin
Joshua11:14 Isra7eele asay he katamatape bonqida
Joshua11:15 Goday ba aylliya Muse kiitidaysada
Joshua11:16 Iyyasuynne iya olanchoti derey dariya biitta
Joshua11:17 I Sayre kanthisiya Halaqa zumaape bidi
Joshua11:18 Iyyasuy daro wode he kawota ubbaara oletis.
Joshua11:19 Gaba7oonan de7iya Hiwetape attishin
Joshua11:20 Goday Muse kiitidaysada
Joshua11:21 He wode Iyyasuy bidi derey dariya Kebroonan
Joshua11:22 Anaaqe kochatape oonika Isra7eele biittan attibeenna
Joshua11:23 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Iyyasuy biitta ubbaa oykidi
Joshua12:1 Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Arnoona zangaarape bidi Armoona zumaa gakanaw
Joshua12:2 Haseboonan uttidi haariya Amooreta kawa Sihoona. I Galada biittas baggaa ekidi
Joshua12:3 Qassi doloha baggara Yordaanose zangaaran Kenereeta abbaafe bidi
Joshua12:4 Hessadaka
Joshua12:5 Oogey
Joshua12:6 Godaa aylley Musey kaalethin
Joshua12:7 Iyyasuynne Isra7eele asay Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggan de7iya kawota ubba xoonidosona. He biittay Libaanose zangaaran de7iya Ba7aal-Gaadepe bidi
Joshua12:8 He I immida biittay
Joshua12:9 Isra7eele asay xoonida kawoti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Iyaarko kawa
Joshua12:10 Yerusalaame kawa
Joshua12:11 Yarmuta kawa
Joshua12:12 Egloona kawa
Joshua12:13 Dabira kawa
Joshua12:14 Horma kawa
Joshua12:15 Libina kawa
Joshua12:16 Maqeda kawa
Joshua12:17 Tapuha kawa
Joshua12:18 Afeeqa kawa
Joshua12:19 Madoona kawa
Joshua12:20 Shimroon-Maroona kawa
Joshua12:21 Tanaka kawa
Joshua12:22 Qaadesa kawa
Joshua12:23 Gezzen de7iya Doora kawa
Joshua12:24 Tirsa kawa. Enti kumethi hastamanne issi kawota.
Joshua13:1 Iyyasuy daro cimida wode Goday iyako
Joshua13:2 Oyketiboonna biittati haysata; Filisxeemetanne Geeshureta biitta ubbaa.
Joshua13:3 Gibxefe doloha baggan de7iya Shihoora Shaafape bidi
Joshua13:4 Dugeha baggan de7iya Kanaaneta biittanne
Joshua13:5 Gebaalata biittaynne Ba7aal-Gaadepe doloha baggan de7iya Armoona zumaape bidi
Joshua13:6 Libaanosepe bidi Maseroona gakanaw gezze biittan de7iya Sidoonata ubbaa taani Isra7eeleta sinthafe goodda kessana. Taani nena kiitidaysada he biitta Isra7eele asaas laata oothada shaaka.
Joshua13:7 Neeni he biitta uddufun kochatasinne Minaase kochaafe baggaas shaaka” yaagis.
Joshua13:8 Robeela kochaas
Joshua13:9 Enta biittay Arnoona Zangaara matan de7iya Aro7eerape bidi
Joshua13:10 Qassi Haseboonan uttidi Amooneta zawa gakanaw haariya Amooreta kawa Sihoona katamata ubbaa gakees.
Joshua13:11 Hessadaka
Joshua13:12 Astarooteninne Edraa7an uttidi
Joshua13:13 Shin Isra7eele asay Geeshuretanne Ma7ikata gooddidi kessibookona. Enti hachi gakanaw Isra7eele asaa giddon de7oosona.
Joshua13:14 Musey Leewe kochaas laata biitta immibeenna. Goday
Joshua13:15 Musey Robeela kochaas enta kochan kochan laata immis.
Joshua13:16 Enta biittay Arnoona Zangaara matan de7iya Aro7eerape bidi
Joshua13:17 Haseboona
Joshua13:18 Yahaaxa
Joshua13:19 Qiratayma
Joshua13:20 Beet-Pa7oora
Joshua13:21 Qassi gezzen de7iya katamatanne Haseboonan uttidi haarida Amooreta kawa Sihoona biitta ubbaa gakees. Musey kawa Sihoonanne Midiyaameta halaqata Ewa
Joshua13:22 Isra7eele asay maruwa
Joshua13:23 Robeela kochaas wuloha bagga zaway Yordaanose shaafa. Robeela kochaas kochan kochan laata gididi imetida katamatinne gutati haysata.
Joshua13:24 Musey Gaade kochaas enta kochan kochan laata biitta shaakidi immis.
Joshua13:25 Enta biittay Ya7izeera
Joshua13:26 Hessadaka
Joshua13:27 Qassi Yordaanose zangaaran
Joshua13:28 Gaade kochaas kochan kochan laata biitta gididi imetida katamatinne gutati haysata.
Joshua13:29 Musey Minaase kochaafe baggaas enta kochan kochan laata biitta immis.
Joshua13:30 Enta biittay Mahinaymanne Baasane biitta ubbaa gaki oykees. Baasane kawa Ooge kawotetha ubbaanne Baasanen de7iya usupun tammu Ya7ira katamata oykees.
Joshua13:31 Qassi Galadape bagganne Baasanen Ooge kawotethaas waanna katamaa gidida Astarootenne Edraa7a geetetiya katamata gakees. He ubbay Minaase na7a Makira kochaas enta kochan kochan gakidaysa.
Joshua13:32 Musey Yordaanosepe hefinthan
Joshua13:33 Shin Musey Leewe kochaas laata biitta immibeenna. Goday
Joshua14:1 Kahiney Alaazari
Joshua14:2 Goday Muse kiitidaysada laata biittay uddufunanne bagga kochaas saaman shaaketis.
Joshua14:3 Musey kase nam7anne bagga kochaas Yordaanosepe doloha baggan de7iya biitta immis
Joshua14:4 Yoosefa nayti Minaaseynne Efreemey nam7u koche gididosona. Leewe kochaas duussa katamatanne mehe heemmiya biitta immisipe attishin
Joshua14:5 Goday Muse kiitidaysada Isra7eele asay biitta shaaketidi ekidosona.
Joshua14:6 Issi gallas Yihuda asay Iyyasuko Galgala yidosona. Entafe issoy
Joshua14:7 Godaa aylley Musey ha biitta wochana mela Qaades-Barnefe tana kiittiya wode taw laythi oytama. He wode taani ammanthiya oda Muses ehas.
Joshua14:8 Taara bida asati asaa wozanaa yashshan til7isidosona
Joshua14:9 He gallas Musey
Joshua14:10 Iyyasu
Joshua14:11 Taw he wode de7iya minotethay hachika de7ees. Oletanaw

Joshua16:1 Yoosefa kochata gakida laata biittay dugeha baggara Iyaarko matan de7iya Yordaanosen doomees. Iyaarko pultuwas wuloha bagga gaxape bidi

Joshua16:6 Yaape kanthidi Medetiraane abban zawatees. Qassi pudeha baggara de7iya zaway Mikmaatata. Yaape doloha baggara de7iya Taanat-Seeloko mirqetidi

Joshua17:1 Yoosefa bayra na7aa Minaase kochaas imetida laata biittay kaallidi de7eysa; Galada aaway Makiri Minaase bayra na7a. Makiri mino olancho gidida gisho
Joshua17:2 Yordaanose shaafape wuloha baggara de7iya biittay hanko attida Minaase kochaas
Joshua17:3 Hefeera na7aa Selophaada
Joshua17:4 Enti kahiniya Alaazarako
Joshua17:5 Minaase kochati Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan de7iya Galadanne Baasane bolla gujidi tammu biittata saaman ekidosona.
Joshua17:6 Hessa gisho
Joshua17:7 Minaase kochaa biitta zaway Aseerape bidi
Joshua17:8 Tapuha biittay Minaase kochaasa
Joshua17:9 Qassi he zaway yaape bidi
Joshua17:10 Shaafape dugeha baggan de7iya biittay Efreemasa; qassi pudeha baggan de7iya biittay Minaasesa. Minaase biitta zaway Medetiraane abba gakees. Iyaw pudeha baggara Aseeri
Joshua17:11 Yisakooranne Aseera biittata giddon
Joshua17:12 Shin Minaase kochati he katamatan de7iya asata kessidi katamata oykanaw danda7ibookona. Hessa gisho

Joshua18:1 Biitta oli xoonidi oykidaape guye

Joshua18:6 Ha laapun bessan shaaketana biitta qoncisi xaafidi ekidi yiite. Godaa

Joshua18:9 Asati bidi

Joshua18:12 Pudeha baggara enta zaway Yordaanosepe dendidi
Joshua18:13 He zaway dugeha baggara kase Looza geetetidi xeegetiya Beetele kanthidi
Joshua18:14 He zaway dugeha baggara Beet-Horona sinthan de7iya zumaape wuloha bagga xaaxetidi
Joshua18:15 Dugeha bagga zaway wuloha baggara Qiriyaat-Yi7aarimepe dendidi
Joshua18:16 Hessafe he zaway duge bidi Raafayme zangaarape pudeha baggan de7iya Henooma zangaarape sintha baggara duge wodhees. Yaape Yaabuseta katamaape dugeha baggan de7iya lanqiya oykidi
Joshua18:17 Yaape pudeha bagga mirqetidi Enshemeshe baggara Adumima zuma sinthan de7iya Geliloota gakees. Yaape qassi Robeela na7aa Bohaana shuchaako duge wodhees.

Joshua18:19 Hessafe Beet-Hogila pudeha lanqiya kanthi bidi

Joshua19:7 Qassi hara bessan Ayna
Joshua19:8 Simoona biittay dugeha baggan de7iya Ba7ilaat-Ba7eera woyko Rama katamatanne enta yuushuwan de7iya gutata ubbaa gakees. Simoona kochay banta kochan kochan laattida biittay haysa.

Joshua21:41 Isra7eele asay laattida biittafe Leewe kochaas imetida katamati hentha biittara issife oytamanne hospuna.
Joshua21:42 He katamata ubbaa yuushuwan hentha biittati de7oosona.

Joshua22:1 Hessafe guye
Joshua22:2 “Godaa aylley Musey hintena kiitida ubbaa polideta; qassi taw kiitetideta.
Joshua22:3 He ubban hachi gakanaw hinte ishata yeggibeeketa. Godaa
Joshua22:4 Goday hinte Xoossay hintew caaqida qaalada
Joshua22:5 Godaa aylley Musey hintena kiitida higgiya minthidi naagite. Godaa hinte Xoossaa siiqite. Iya ogiyape deshopite; iya kiita polite. Iyara shiphi gidi de7ite; hinte kumetha wozanapenne kumetha shempuwafe iyaw oothite” yaagis.
Joshua22:6 Iyyasuy enta anjidi yeddin enti banta soo simmidosona.
Joshua22:7 Iyyasuy
Joshua22:8 Hinte
Joshua22:9 Robeela
Joshua22:10 Robeela
Joshua22:11 Robeela
Joshua22:12 Isra7eele asay hessa si7idi
Joshua22:13 Hessafe sinthe Isra7eele asay
Joshua22:14 Issi issi kochay ba soo halaqatape issi issi ase dooridi
Joshua22:15 Enti Robeela
Joshua22:16 “Godaa asay
Joshua22:17 Pe7ooran nu oothida nagaray gidennee? Godaa asaa bolla boshi wodhis; hachi gakanaw nuuni he nagaraape geeyibooko.
Joshua22:18 Godaa bolla hachi hinte zoko zaarideta. Hachi hinte iya bolla zoko zaariko wonto I kumetha Isra7eele asaa hanqana.
Joshua22:19 Hinte de7iya biittay tunidaba gidiko
Joshua22:20 Zaara na7ay Akaani digetidaba ekidi
Joshua22:21 Yaatin Robeela
Joshua22:22 “Godaa xalaali Xoosse! Godaa xalaali Xoosse! Nuuni haysa ayis oothidaako I erees; hinteka erana mela nu koyoos. Nuuni Godaa bolla makallidabaanne kiitetonna ixidaba gidiko
Joshua22:23 Nu Godaas kiitetonna ixidi
Joshua22:24 Nu hessa qopidi keexibooko. Nuuni yarsho bessi keexiday
Joshua22:25 Goday nu giddoninne Robeelanne Gaade kochaa giddon Yordaanose shaafa zawa wothis. Hessa gisho
Joshua22:26 “Nu yarsho bessi keexiday hessasa. Xuussa woyko hara yarsho yarshanaasa gidenna.
Joshua22:27 Nuuni yarsho bessi keexiday
Joshua22:28 Enti wodepe nuuko woyko nu kochaako hessada giiko
Joshua22:29 Nu Godaa bolla makallanaysi nuupe haako. Godaa nu Xoossaa dunkaaniya sinthan de7iya yarsho bessaafe haraa xuussa
Joshua22:30 Kahiney Pinihaasinne iyara de7iya Isra7eele halaqati
Joshua22:31 Kahiniya Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi
Joshua22:32 Kahiniya Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasinne iyara de7iya halaqati Galadan de7iya Robeelanne Gaade kochaa matape Kanaanen de7iya Isra7eele asaako simmidi

Joshua24:5 “ ‘Guyepe Musanne Aarona kiittada Gibxe biitta gadon shocas; wursethan hintena kessas.
Joshua24:6 Hinte aawata Gibxefe kessida wode Zo7o Abbaako bidosona. Gibxeti parataninne para gaaretan hinte aawata guye zaaranaw yedethidosona.

Joshua24:8 Hessafe guye
Joshua24:9 Hessafe guye
Joshua24:10 Shin ta Balaama si7abike; I hintena anjana mela oothada
Joshua24:11 Hinte Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi

Joshua24:13 Hinte qeexi kessiboonna biittanne hinte keexiboonna katamata taani hintew immin de7eeta. Ha77i hinte tokiboonna woyne ayfiyanne shamaho ayfiya meeta’ ” yaagees.

Joshua24:15 Hinte Godaa goyinnanaw koyonna ixiko
Joshua24:16 Asay zaaridi

Judges1:5 Beezeqa kataman kawa Adooni-Beezeqa demmidi
Judges1:6 Adooni-Beezeqi baqatiya wode enti yedethi oykidi
Judges1:7 Adooni-Beezeqi
Judges1:8 Yihuda asay Yerusalaame oli oykidi asaa mashshan wodhidi
Judges1:9 Hessafe guye
Judges1:10 Kase Qiriyaat-Arba geetetiya Kebroona kataman de7iya Kanaaneta olidi Sesaya
Judges1:11 Yaape dendidi Yihuda asay Debira kataman de7iya asaa olanaw bidosona. Debira katamay kase Qiriyat-Sefera geetetees.
Judges1:12 Kaalebi
Judges1:13 Kaaleba kaalo isha Qanaza na7ay Gotoniyali he katamaa olidi oykin
Judges1:14 Aksa Gotoniyala geliya wode
Judges1:15 Iya
Judges1:16 Musey bolluwa Qenaati kochati Yihuda asaara Zamba Katama geetetiya Iyaarko katamaape dendidi Arada katamaape dugeha baggara

Judges1:18 Yihuda asay gujidi Gaaza
Judges1:19 Goday Yihuda asaara de7iya gisho
Judges1:20 Musey kiittidaysada
Judges1:21 Shin Biniyaame kochati Yerusalaamen de7iya Yaabuseta gooddidi kessibookona. He wodepe doomin Yaabuseti Biniyaame kochatara issife Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
Judges1:22 Qassi Yoosefa kochati Beetele katamaa olidosona; Xoossay entara de7ees.
Judges1:23 Yoosefa kochati kase Looza geetetiya Beetele katamaa wochiya asata kiittidosona.
Judges1:24 Enti katamaape keyiya issi addiya demmidi
Judges1:25 I enta bessin kataman de7iya asaa mashshan buthidosona; shin he addiyanne iya soo asa ubbaa ashshidosona.
Judges1:26 Guype he addey Hiteta biitta bidi
Judges1:27 Minaase kochati Beet-Saana

Judges1:29 Efreema kochatika Gezera kataman de7iya Kanaaneta gooddidi kessibookona; yaatin
Judges1:30 Zabloona kochati Qitiroonaninne Nahilaalan de7iya asata gooddidi kessibookona; yaatin
Judges1:31 Aseera kochati Akon
Judges1:32 Kanaaneti keyonna attida gisho Aseera kochati entara yan issife de7idosona.
Judges1:33 Niftaaleme kochati Beet-Sameesaninne Beet-Anaatan de7iya asata gooddi kessibookona; shin Kanaanetara yan issife de7idosona. Beet-Sameesanne Beet-Anata asata bantaw wolqan oosisidosona.

Judges2:1 Godaa kiitanchoy Galgalape Bookima bidi
Judges2:2 hinte ha biittan de7iya asatara caaqofite; enta yarsho bessa laallite’ yaagas. Shin hinte taw kiitetibeketa; ayis hessa hanidetii?
Judges2:3 Hessa gisho
Judges2:4 Godaa kiitanchoy Isra7eele asaas hessa odida wode asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
Judges2:5 Yaatidi he bessaa Bookima yaagidi sunthidi yan Godaas yarshidosona.
Judges2:6 Iyyasuy Isra7eele asaa yeddidaape guye
Judges2:7 Iyyasuy paxa de7iya laythaninne Goday Isra7eele asaas oothida gita ooso ubbaa be7ida cimati de7iya wode asay Godaas kiitetidosona.
Judges2:8 Godaa aylley
Judges2:9 Enti iya Ga7aasa zumaape pudeha baggan
Judges2:10 He yeletetha ubbay hayqidi banta mayzatan gahetidosona. Hessafe guye Godaa woyko Goday Isra7eele asaas oothidaba eronna hara yeletethi dendis.
Judges2:11 Hessafe guye
Judges2:12 Gibxe biittafe enta kessida Godaa
Judges2:13 Qassi Godaa aggidi
Judges2:14 Yaatin
Judges2:15 Enti oletanaw keyiya wode ubban
Judges2:16 Yaatin
Judges2:17 Gidoshin Isra7eele asay haareysatas kiitetibookona; Godaas ammanetona ixidi hara xoossata goyinnidosona. Enta aawati Godaas kiitetidi hemetida ogiya aggidi hara soo simmidosona.
Judges2:18 Goday entaw ayseysata denthida wode ubban I ayseysatara issife gididi he ayseysi paxa de7iya laytha ubban enta morketa kushepe ashshis. Enti un7aninne meton gididi Godaako waassiya wode ubban Goday entaw qadhetees.
Judges2:19 Shin ayseysi hayqidaape guye
Judges2:20 Goday Isra7eele asaa bolla yilo eexidi
Judges2:21 Iyyasuy hayqiya wode biitta bolla attida kawotethatape issuwaka taani enta sinthafe gooddada kessike.
Judges2:22 Isra7eele asay kase banta mayzatada ta ogiya kaalliyakonne kaallonnaako paacanaw taani ha attida kawotethata go7etana” yaagis.
Judges2:23 Hessa gisho
Judges3:1 Kanaanen ola meezetiboonna Isra7eele asaa paacanaw Goday Kanaanen ashshida asay haysata.

Judges3:3 Hessatika ichashu Filisxeeme halaqata

Judges3:21 Naa7odi ba haddirsa kushiya yeddidi

Judges8:28 Hessada hanidi

Judges8:31 Seekeman de7iya laggethiya iyaw adde na7aa yelin
Judges8:32 Iyo7aasa na7ay Gediyooni lo77o cimidi hayqis; ba aawa Iyo7aasa duufon moogetis. He duufoy Abezeera kochati de7iya Ofiran de7ees.

Judges9:2 “Seekeman de7iya asaa
Judges9:3 Iya aaye dabboti ha qaala ubbaa iya gisho Seekema asaas odin
Judges9:4 Enti Ba7aal-Biriita eeqa keethaafe laapun tammu bira santime ekidi iyaw immidosona. Abimelekey he biran iita asatanne bonqeyisata shammidi bana kaallanaada oothis.
Judges9:5 Ofran de7iya ba aawa soo bidi
Judges9:6 Hessafe guye
Judges9:7 Iyo7atami hessa si7ida wode Garzaana deriya bolla keyidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Judges9:8 Issi gallas mithati ubbay shiiqidi
Judges9:9 Shin shamahoy
Judges9:10 “Yaatin
Judges9:11 Shin balasey
Judges9:12 “Yaatin
Judges9:13 Shin woyney
Judges9:14 “Yaatin
Judges9:15 Xunduqey
Judges9:16 “Hinte Abimeleke kawothiday tumatethaninne suuretethanee? Gediyooni hintew oothidaba akeekidi iya soo asaas lo77o kushe zaaridetii?
Judges9:17 Ta aaway hintew oletidaysa akeekite; Midiyaame asaape hintena ashshana yaagidi
Judges9:18 Shin hinte hachi ta aawa soo asaa bolla dendidi
Judges9:19 Ha77i simmidi Gediyoonasinne iya soo asaas hinte oothida oosoy tumatethaninne suuretethan gidiko Abimelekera ufaytite; ika hintera ufayto.
Judges9:20 Shin hessi hanonna ixiko Abimelekepe tami keyidi Seekemanne Beet-Milo asaa mo. Qassi Seekema asaapenne Beet-Milo asaape tami keyidi Abimeleke mo” yaagis.
Judges9:21 Iyo7atami ba ishaa Abimelekes yayyida gisho baqatidi Beera bidi yan de7is.
Judges9:22 Abimelekey Isra7eele biittan heedzu laythi kawotis.
Judges9:23 Hessafe guye
Judges9:24 Xoossay hessa oothiday
Judges9:25 Seekema asay guutha asi dooridi deriya huuphiyan uttidi Abimeleke bolla morketethan dendana mela oothidosona. Enti ogera aadhiya asa ubbaa bonqidosona; Abimelekey hessa si7is.
Judges9:26 He wode Ebeeda na7ay Gaali ba ishatara Seekema yin
Judges9:27 Ubbay banta gade bidi woyne maxidosona; woyniya aggidi gita gibira giigisidosona. Banta eeqa keethaa gelidi yan mishenne uyishe Abimeleke cayidosona.
Judges9:28 Ebeeda na7ay Gaali
Judges9:29 Ha asaa kaalethey tana gidiyako Abimeleke digganashin. Abimeleke xeegada
Judges9:30 Ebeeda na7ay Gaali gidaysa katamaa haariya Zabuli si7ida wode daro yilotis.
Judges9:31 Qosan Abimelekeko ase kiittidi
Judges9:32 Hessa gisho
Judges9:33 Wontetha gallas awi doliya wode enti qoponna katamaa olite. Gaalinne iyara de7iya asay hintena olanaw keyiya wode hinte koyida mela enta bolla oothite” yaagis.
Judges9:34 Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay qamma dendidi Seekemape karera oyddu cugan shaaketidi zugidosona.
Judges9:35 Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya asay Ebeeda na7ay Gaali keyidi katamaa pengiyan eqidaysa be7idi qosetida bessaafe keyidosona.
Judges9:36 Gaali asaa be7ida wode Zabulako
Judges9:37 Gaali zaaridi
Judges9:38 Zabuli Gaalako
Judges9:39 Gaali Seekema asaa kaalethi keyidi Abimelekera oletis.
Judges9:40 Abimelekey yedethin Gaali baqatis; katamaa pengiya gakanaw daroti deshetidi kundidosona.
Judges9:41 Abimelekey Aruman de7in
Judges9:42 Wontetha gallas Seekema asay goshshas bidaysa Abimelekey si7is.
Judges9:43 I ba asaa ekidi heedzu cugan shaakidi
Judges9:44 Abimelekeynne iyara de7iya cugay sinthe woxi bidi
Judges9:45 Gallas kumethi Abimelekey asaara oletidi oykidaape guye kataman de7iya asa ubbaa wodhis; katamaa dhaysis; biitta bolla maxine laallis.
Judges9:46 Seekema Adussa Gimbiya giddon de7iya asa ubbay hessa si7ida wode Ba7aal-Barta eeqa keethan de7iya gongoluwan qosetidosona.
Judges9:47 Abimelekey enti yan shiiqidaysa
Judges9:48 si7idi inne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Salmoona deriya keyidosona. Abimelekey kalta ekidi mitha tashe qanxidi
Judges9:49 Asa ubbay mitha tashe qanxi ekidi
Judges9:50 Abimelekey Temeesa bidi katamaa teqidi oykis.
Judges9:51 He katamaa giddon issi mino adussa gimbey de7ees. Katamaa asay macci
Judges9:52 Abimelekey olishe adussa gimbiya gakidi taman xuugganaw pengiyako shiiqis.
Judges9:53 Shin issi maccasiya Abimeleke huuphen woxa mayde holada iya guuggiya phalqa yeggasu.
Judges9:54 Iya ola miishiya tookiya na7atetha ellesi xeegidi
Judges9:55 Isra7eele asa ubbay Abimelekey hayqidaysa be7idi ba soo soo bis.
Judges9:56 Abimelekey laapun tammu ba ishata wodhidi
Judges9:57 Xoossay Seekema asaa iitatetha ubbaa enta bolla zaaris. Hessada hanidi Gediyoona na7ay Iyo7atami baaddida baadethay enta gakis.

Judges10:3 Tolape kaallidi

Judges10:5 Ya7iri hayqidi Qamoonan moogetis.
Judges10:6 Qassika Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Enti Ba7aalenne Astaroota eeqata
Judges10:7 Goday Isra7eele asa bolla hanqetidi
Judges10:8 He laythi Filisxeemetinne Amooneti Isra7eele asaa un7ethidosona. Yordaanose shaafape doloha baggan

Judges11:1 Galada biittan de7iya Yoftaahey mino olancho. Iya aawa sunthay Galada; shin iya aayiya layma maccas.

Judges11:7 Shin Yoftaahey

Judges11:9 Yoftaahey
Judges11:10 Galada cimati

Judges11:13 Amoone kawoy Yoftaahey kiitida asaako
Judges11:14 Yoftaahey nam7antho Amoone kawako ase kiittis.

Judges11:21 Goday Isra7eele Xoossay Sihoonanne iya olanchota Isra7eele asaa kushen aathidi immin
Judges11:22 Arnoona shaafape bidi Yaaboqa shaafa gakanaw
Judges11:23 “Hessada oothidi Goday
Judges11:24 Neeni ne xoossay kamooshi new immeysa ekikii? Shin nuuni
Judges11:25 Gidoshin neeni Sifoora na7aa
Judges11:26 Isra7eele asay Haseboona
Judges11:27 Taani hintena aykoka qohabike; shin tana olanaw dendada naaqey nena. Pirdiya Goday hachi Isra7eelepenne Amoonepe giddon pirdo” yaagis.
Judges11:28 Shin Yoftaahey kiitida kiitaa Amooneta kawoy si7onna ixis.
Judges11:29 He wode Godaa Ayyaanay Yoftaahe bolla wodhin
Judges11:30 Yoftaahey Godaas qangetidi
Judges11:31 taani olaa xoonada soo simmiya wode tana mokanaw ta soope keyiya aybika neesa; taani iya xuuggiya yarsho oothada new shiishana” yaagis.
Judges11:32 Hessafe guye

Judges11:35 I iyo be7ida wode azzanidi ba ma7uwa daakidi
Judges11:36 Na7iya
Judges11:37 Shin iya ba aawako

Judges12:1 Efreema asay ola baanaw xeegetidi
Judges12:2 Yoftaahey entako
Judges12:3 Hinte tana ashshonaysa be7ida wode zawa pinnada ta shempuwas qadhetonna Amooneta olanaw bas; Goday enta ta kushen aathidi immis. Yaatin
Judges12:4 Yoftaahey Galada asa ubbaa shiishidi
Judges12:5 Efreema asay kessi ekonnaada Yordaanose shaafa pinuwa ubbaa Galadati oykidosona. Kessi ekanaw koyiya Efreema asi pinnanaw oychiya wode Galadati
Judges12:6 enti
Judges12:7 Yoftaahey Isra7eele asaa usupun laythi aysis. Galada addey Yoftaahey hayqidi Galadan de7iya issi kataman moogetis.
Judges12:8 Yoftaahepe kaallidi
Judges12:9 Ibxanas hastamu adde naytinne hastamu macca nayti de7oosona. I ba macca nayta ba koche gidonna adde naytas immis; ba adde naytas ba koche gidonna macca nayta giigisidi immis. Ibxani Isra7eele laapun laythi aysis.

Judges12:13 Eloonape kaallidi
Judges12:14 Abdoonas laapun tammu baqulota toggiya oytamu adde naytinne hastamu na7a na7i de7ees. Abdooni Isra7eele hospun laythi aysis.

Judges13:1 Isra7eele asay Godaa sinthan qassika iitabaa oothidosona. Yaatin

Judges13:4 Hessa gisho
Judges13:5 Ne qanthatada adde na7a yelana. Na7ay yeletida wodiyape doomidi Xoossas dummatida Naazirawe gidiya gisho iya huuphiya meedopa. I Isra7eele Filisxeemeta kushepe asho doomana” yaagis.
Judges13:6 Maccasiya bada
Judges13:7 Shin I taako

Judges13:9 Xoossay Maanuhe woosa si7is. Machiya gaden uttidashin Xoossa kiitanchoy nam7antho yis; shin he wode I azinay Maanuhey iira deenna.
Judges13:10 Machiya ellesada ba azinaako bada
Judges13:11 Maanuhey uttida bessaafe dendidi
Judges13:12 Maanuhey
Judges13:13 Godaa kiitanchoy
Judges13:14 Woyne mithafe bentiyaba aybaka moopo; woyne woyko mathoyiya ushshi uyopo; tuna gididaba moopo. Taani iw odida ubbaa ootho” yaagis.
Judges13:15 Maanuhey Godaa kiitanchuwako
Judges13:16 Godaa kiitanchoy
Judges13:17 Maanuhey Godaa kiitanchuwako
Judges13:18 Godaa kiitanchoy
Judges13:19 Maanuhey urge deeshinne katha yarshuwa ekidi shucha bolla Godaas yarshis. Maanuheynne iya machiya xeellishin
Judges13:20 Yarsho bessaafe tama lacoy pude laxidi keyishin
Judges13:21 Godaa kiitanchoy Maanuhesinne iya machees zaari bentonna aggin
Judges13:22 Maanuhey ba macheko
Judges13:23 Shin iya machiya
Judges13:24 Machiya adde na7a yelasu; iya sunthaa Samsoona gada xeegasu. Na7ay diccis; Godayka iya anjis.
Judges13:25 Na7ay Xor7afenne Eshta7oolape giddon de7iya Daane gutan de7ishin Godaa Ayyaanay iya denthetho doomis.
Judges14:1 Issi gallas Samsooni Timina wodhis; yan issi Filisxeeme geela7iw be7is.
Judges14:2 I Soo simmidi ba aawanne ba aayiw
Judges14:3 Shin iya aawanne aayiya
Judges14:4 Filisxeemeta olanaw Goday gaaso koyidi
Judges14:5 Samsooni ba aawaranne ba aayera Timina wodhis. Enti Timina woyne gade matara kanthidi aadhiya wode issi wodala gaammoy gudishe iya bolla keyis.
Judges14:6 He wode Godaa Ayyaanay Samsoona bolla wolqan wodhis; I deesha mari duuseretheysada ba kushen aykoka oykonna gaammuwa duuserethi yeggis. Ba oothidaysa ba aawasinne ba aayes odibeenna.
Judges14:7 Hessafe guye
Judges14:8 Guutha wodepe guye iyo ekanaw yaa simmidi bis. Ogiya bishe ba wodhida gaammo bawuta be7anaw ogepe gaxa keyidi biya wode gaammo bawuta giddon mathi eessi eessidaysa be7is.
Judges14:9 He eessaafe guuthara qanxi ekidi mishe ogiya bis. Ba aawanne ba aayiw gakidi
Judges14:10 Iya aaway geela7iw be7anaw I soo bin
Judges14:11 Filisxeeme asay iya be7ida wode iyara gam7ana mela hastamu na7atethata dooridi yeddidosona.
Judges14:12 Samsooni enta
Judges14:13 Shin hinte taw birshethaa odanaw danda7onna ixiko hinte taw hastamu liino afilanne hastamu kumetha ma7o immeeta” yaagidi oychis. Enti
Judges14:14 I
Judges14:15 Oyddantho gallas enti Samsoona machiw
Judges14:16 Yaatin
Judges14:17 Yaaganoy bonchetiya laapun gallasa ubban yeekada shempo diggasu. Laapuntha gallas qan7ishiya birshethaa iw odis; iya bada ba biitta asaas odasu.
Judges14:18 Yaatin
Judges14:19 Hessafe guye
Judges14:20 Samsoona machiya waanna laazanthi gidida iya laggiyas imetasu.

Judges15:6 Filisxeemeti
Judges15:7 Samsooni entako

Judges15:16 Samsooni

Judges15:20 Filisxeemeti biitta haariya wode Samsooni Isra7eele laatamu laythi aysis.
Judges16:1 Issi gallas Samsooni Filisxeeme katama gidida Gaaza katamaa bis; Yan issi layma maccas be7idi iira aqanaw I soo gelis.
Judges16:2 Gaaza katamaa asay Samsooni enta katamaa yidaysa si7idi keetha teqidi qamma kumethi naagishe katamaa pengiyan aqidosona. Sa7i wontiko wodhana gidi naagishe doona phuqona aqidosona.
Judges16:3 Shin Samsooni yan gidi bilahe gakanaw gam7is. Bilahe dendidi katamaa dirsa pengiya
Judges16:4 Guutha wodepe guye Samsooni Soreqa zangaaran de7iya issi Dalilo geetetiya maccasiw dosis.
Judges16:5 Filisxeeme halaqati iiko bidi
Judges16:6 Hessa gisho Dalila Samsoonako
Judges16:7 Samsooni
Judges16:8 Filisxeeme halaqati Dalilas laapun irxa dafota ehin iya Samsoona qachasu.
Judges16:9 Qol7an ase qotta wothada
Judges16:10 Dalila Samsoonako
Judges16:11 I zaaridi
Judges16:12 Dalila ooratha wodoro ekada Samsoona qachasu. Qol7an ase qotta wothada
Judges16:13 Dalila Samsoonako
Judges16:14 Hessafe guye
Judges16:15 Yaatin iya
Judges16:16 Gallas gallas oychada I hayqo amottana gakanaw iya waaysasu.
Judges16:17 Wursethan Samsooni
Judges16:18 Ba wozanan de7iyaba ubbaa I odidaysa Dalila be7ida wode
Judges16:19 Dalila Samsoona ba wodire bolla dhiskisada issi asi xeegin yidi
Judges16:20 Iya

Judges16:22 Enti iya huuphiya binaana meedidaape guye

Judges16:25 Enti daro ufaytida gisho
