Judges17:1 Derey dariya Efreema biittan Mika geetetiya issi addey de7ees.
Judges17:2 Issi gallas Miiki ba aayiw
Judges17:3 Na7ay tammanne issi kilo giraame bira santime aayes zaaris. Iya aayiya
Judges17:4 Na7ay miishiya ba aayes zaarin
Judges17:5 Mikas eeqa goyinniya keethi de7ees. I efuudenne soo giddo eeqa misileta giigisidi
Judges17:6 He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa; asi ubbay baw lo77o daanidaba oothees.
Judges17:7 He wode Yihuda biittan Beeteleme kataman Leewe koche gidida issi na7atethay de7ees.
Judges17:8 Ha addey baw de7iya bessi koyanaw Beeteleme katamaape dendidi derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Mika soo gakis.
Judges17:9 Miki
Judges17:10 Miiki iyako
Judges17:11 Na7atetha Leewey Mikara issife daanaw gelis; Mikas yelida na7ada hanis.
Judges17:12 Miiki iya ba kahine oothidi shuumin iya son de7is.
Judges17:13 Miiki
Judges18:1 He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa. He wodey gakanaw Daane kochati Isra7eele kochata giddon laattida biitti baawa. Enti bantaw de7iya biitta koyishe de7oosona.
Judges18:2 Hessa gisho
Judges18:3 Enti Mika son de7iya wode Leewe koche gidida na7atetha iya odan eridosona. Enti iyako shiiqidi
Judges18:4 I zaaridi
Judges18:5 Enti
Judges18:6 Kahiney
Judges18:7 Hessape guye
Judges18:8 Ichashu asati Xor7aninne Eshta7oolan de7iya banta ishatako simmidosona; enta ishati
Judges18:9 Enti zaaridi
Judges18:10 Hinte yaa bidi
Judges18:11 Yaatin
Judges18:12 Yihuda biittan Qiriyat-Yi7aarimape wuloha baggara uttidosona. Hessa gisho
Judges18:13 Yaape dendidi derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Mika soo yidosona.
Judges18:14 Laysha biitta wochanaw bida ichashu asati banta ishatako
Judges18:15 Enti ogiyape simmidi
Judges18:16 He wode usupun xeetu Daane olanchoti ola miishe oykidi penge bolla eqidosona.
Judges18:17 Enti he kahiniyara yan eqidashin
Judges18:18 He wode kahiney enta
Judges18:19 Enti iya
Judges18:20 Kahiney hessa si7idi ufaytidi efuudiya
Judges18:21 Yaape dendidi
Judges18:22 Enti Mika soope haakidi bidaape guye
Judges18:23 Enta gakidi waassin
Judges18:24 Miiki zaaridi
Judges18:25 Daane asati
Judges18:26 Daane asati banta ogiya bidosona. Mikika enti baape daro mino gideysa be7idi ba soo simmis.
Judges18:27 Daane asati Miiki medhida xoossatanne iya kahiniya ekidi
Judges18:28 Laysha katamay Sidoonape haakidi de7iya gishonne enti hara asara gahetidi eronna gisho enta ashshanaw oonika danda7ibeenna. Laysha katamay Beet-Rehooba geetetiya bessaa matan de7iya zangaaran de7ees. Daane asati katamaa zaari keexidi yan de7idosona.
Judges18:29 Katamaa sunthaa beni banta mayza Yayqooba na7aa Daane sunthan laammidi
Judges18:30 Daane asati bantaw eeqa misiliya yan wothidi
Judges18:31 Hessada hanidi
Judges19:1 Isra7eele biittan kawoy bayna wode derey dariya Efreema biittan
Judges19:2 Shin iyara ooyetada Yihuda biittan Beeteleme kataman de7iya ba aawa soo bada yan oyddu ageena uttasu.
Judges19:3 I azinay iyo cimatidi soo zaaranaw ba aylliyanne nam7u hareta ekidi bis. I yaa gakiya wode iya moka ekada ba aawa soo gelsasu; I aaway iya be7ida wode ufaytidi mokis.
Judges19:4 Na7ee aaway iya yeddonna ixin
Judges19:5 Oyddantho gallas wonta guura dendidi
Judges19:6 Nam7u asati uttidi issife midosonanne uyidosona. Hessafe guye na7e aaway iyako
Judges19:7 Leewey baanaw dendin
Judges19:8 Ichashantho gallas wonta guura baanaw dendin
Judges19:9 Leewey ba laggetheranne ba aylliyara baanaw keyin
Judges19:10 Shin I yan aqanaw koyiboona gisho ba laggethiw
Judges19:11 Enti Yaabuse matiya wode sa7i daro omarsin
Judges19:12 Shin iya goday
Judges19:13 Qassika ba aylliyako
Judges19:14 Hessa gisho banta ogiya oykidi bidosona. Biniyaame biittan Gib7a katamaa enti matiya wode awi wullis.
Judges19:15 Enti Gib7a katamaa gelidi aqanaw yaa bidosona. He katamaa asay duulata uttiya bessan uttidosona; shin enta ba soo efidi aysiya asi bentibeenna.
Judges19:16 Enti yan uttidashin
Judges19:17 He cima addey
Judges19:18 Leewey zaaridi
Judges19:19 Nu haretas utullinne kaley de7ees; taw
Judges19:20 Cima addey
Judges19:21 Enta ba soo efis; enta haretas miyaba yeggis. Imathati banta tohuwa meecetidi kaho midosona.
Judges19:22 Enti ufaytishin
Judges19:23 He keethaa goday
Judges19:24 Heko
Judges19:25 Shin asati I gidaysa si7onna ixidosona. Leewey ba laggethiw kare holis. Sa7i wontana gakanaw qamma kumethi taran taran iira wolqan gahetidi
Judges19:26 Wontanaw gontey zo77iya wode yada
Judges19:27 Wonta I goday dendidi
Judges19:28 I goday
Judges19:29 I ba soo gakida wode mashsha ekidi
Judges19:30 Hessa be7ida ubbay
Judges20:1 Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw Galadan de7iya Isra7eele asi ubbay issi asada Mixiphan Godaa sinthan issife shiiqidosona.
Judges20:2 He shiiqida Xoossaa asaara
Judges20:3 He wode Isra7eele asay Mixiphan shiiqidaysa Biniyaame asay si7idosona. Isra7eele asay
Judges20:4 Hayqida laggethe azinay
Judges20:5 Gib7a katamaa asati tana wodhanaw yidi
Judges20:6 Taani I aha ekada qanxerethas; enti ha iitabaanne yeellaba Isra7eelen oothida gisho Isra7eele asay de7iya biitta ubbaa issi issi qanxo yedas.
Judges20:7 Hiza
Judges20:8 Asa ubbay issife dendidi
Judges20:9 Nuuni Gib7a bolla haysa oothana; saama yeggidi
Judges20:10 Isra7eele zare ubbaafe ola biya asaas shinqe giigisana mela xeetape tamma
Judges20:11 Isra7eele asa ubbay katamaa olanaw issife shiiqidosona.
Judges20:12 Isra7eele kochati Biniyaame kocha ubbaas haysada yaagidi ase kiittidosona; “Hinte giddon hanida ha iitabay aybee?
Judges20:13 Nuuni enta wodhidi
Judges20:14 Enti Isra7eele asaara oletanaw banta katamatape keyidi issife Gib7an shiiqidosona.
Judges20:15 He gallas Biniyaame katamatape yida mashshan oletiya laatamanne usupun mukulu olanchota shiishidosona. Hessika Gib7an de7iya asaa giddofe dooretida laapun xeetu asaape hara.
Judges20:16 Ha olanchota giddofe laapun xeetu asati haddirsa kushen ootheyisata; enti yambarshan shuchu holidi
Judges20:17 Biniyaame asaa gujonna
Judges20:18 Isra7eele asay dendidi
Judges20:19 Wontetha gallas wonta guura Isra7eele asay dendidi Gib7a katamaa matan shiiqidosona.
Judges20:20 Hessafe guye Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaa olanaw bidi Gib7a katamaa matan salpidosona.
Judges20:21 He gallas Biniyaame asay Gib7ape keyidi
Judges20:22 Isra7eele asay issoy issuwa minthethin
Judges20:23 Isra7eele asay bidi sa7i qammana gakanaw Godaa sinthan yeekidosona. Enti
Judges20:24 Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaara oletanaw nam7antho shiiqidosona.
Judges20:25 Nam7antho gallasika Biniyaame asay Gib7a katamaape keyidi
Judges20:26 Hessafe guye
Judges20:27 He wode Xoossaa caaqo Taabotey Beetele kataman de7iya gisho Isra7eele asay Godaa oychidosona.
Judges20:28 He wode Aarona na7ay
Judges20:29 Isra7eele asay guutha olanchoti Gib7a katamaa yuushuwan zugidi naagana mela oothidosona.
Judges20:30 Heedzantho gallas Isra7eele olanchoti kaseysada Biniyaame olanchota olanaw bidi
Judges20:31 Biniyaame asay entara oletanaw katamaape keyidi
Judges20:32 Biniyaame asay
Judges20:33 Isra7eele asa ubbay banta bessaafe dendidi
Judges20:34 Isra7eele asaape dooretida tammu mukulu asay Gib7a bolla ola denthidosona; olay daro wolqaamis. He ubbay haniya wode Biniyaame asaas dhayoy matidaysa eribookona.
Judges20:35 Isra7eeleti Biniyaame asaa bolla xoono demmana mela Goday oothis. He gallas Isra7eele asay Biniyaame asaape mashshan oletiya laatamanne ichashu mukulunne issi xeetu olanchota wodhidosona.
Judges20:36 Hessafe guye
Judges20:37 Qosetidi naagiya olanchoti Gib7a katamaa ellesi woxi gelidi katamaa giddon demmida ubbaa wodhidosona.
Judges20:38 Qosetidi naagiya asatinne Isra7eele asay cuyaa shaarada denthana mela kase zoreti uttidosona.
Judges20:39 Ola denban de7iya Isra7eele asay baqateysa aggidi
Judges20:40 Shin malla cuyay katamaape pude kessi doomis. Biniyaame asay guye xeelliya wode katamay taman xuugetin
Judges20:41 Hessafe guye
Judges20:42 Hessa gisho
Judges20:43 Isra7eeleti Biniyaame asaa teqidi
Judges20:44 Yan Biniyaame asaape tammanne hospun mukulu mino olanchoti hayqidosona;
Judges20:45 Entafe attidaysati guye simmidi
Judges20:46 He gallas Biniyaame asaape mashshan oletiya laatamanne ichashu mukulu mino olanchoti hayqidosona.
Judges20:47 Shin usupun xeetu asati bazzuwa kanthidi
Judges20:48 Isra7eele asay attida Biniyaame asaako guye simmidi
Judges21:1 Isra7eele asay Mixiphan shiiqida wode
Judges21:2 Isra7eeleti Beetele katamaa bidi
Judges21:3 Enti
Judges21:4 Wontetha gallas guura dendidi
Judges21:5 Isra7eeleti
Judges21:6 Isra7eele asay banta ishatas
Judges21:7 Nuuni nu macca nayta entaw immonna mela Godan caaqida gisho hayqope attida Biniyaame kochati macho ekana mela nuuni ay oothinoo?” yaagidosona.
Judges21:8 Qassika enti
Judges21:9 Enti asa taybida wode Galadan de7iya Yaabesape issi asika bentibeenna.
Judges21:10 Hessa gisho
Judges21:11 Hessada oothidi; addenne addera aqida macca ubbaa wodhite” yaagidi kiittidosona.
Judges21:12 Yaabesa kataman de7iya asaa giddofe addera aqiboona oyddu xeetu geela7o macca nayta demmidosona. Enta Kanaane biittan
Judges21:13 Hessafe guye
Judges21:14 Biniyaame asati simmidi yidosona. Isra7eele asay Yaabesa katamaape wodhonna ehida geela7o nayta entaw immidosona. Shin geela7ota tayboy addeta taybuwara ginibeenna.
Judges21:15 Isra7eele kochata giddon de7iya issifetethay duuxana mela Goday oothida gisho asay Biniyaametas daro qadhetidosona.
Judges21:16 Maabara cimati
Judges21:17 Isra7eele asaa giddofe qushetidi dhayonna mela Biniyaame kochatape attidaysata laattiya na7i daanaw koshshees.
Judges21:18 Gidoshin
Judges21:19 Yaatin
Judges21:20 Hessa gisho
Judges21:21 naagite. Seelo katamaa macca nayti ba7aale gallas karaabo oykidi
Judges21:22 Enta aawati woyko enta ishati nuuko maggannanaw yaa wode nuuni entako
Judges21:23 Biniyaame asay Isra7eele cimati gidaysada oothidosona. Issoy issoy Seelon yexiya macca naytape baw macho dafidi ekis. Enti banta laata biitta simmidi
Judges21:24 He wode Isra7eele asay yaape laaletidi
Judges21:25 He wode Isra7eele biittan kawoy baawa; asi ubbay baw lo77o daanidaba oothees.
Ruth1:1 Isra7eele biitta daynnati aysiya wode he biittan koshi keyis. Issi addey ba macheranne ba nam7u adde naytara Yihuda biittan Beeteleme katamape dendidi Moo7abe biitta guutha wode yan daanaw betis.
Ruth1:2 He addiya sunthay Abemeleke
Ruth1:3 Enti yan de7ishin Nuhaami azinay Abemelekey hayqin
Ruth1:4 He nayti Moo7abe biitta macca naytape Orfanne Uruuto geeteteyisata machidi
Ruth1:5 Mahalooninne Kelewooni nam7ayka hayqidosona. Nuhaama I azinaynne nam7u nayti hayqin barka attasu.
Ruth1:6 Iya Moo7aben de7ishin
Ruth1:7 Iya ba de7iya bessaafe nam7u ba nayta machetara guye Yihuda efiya oge bolla keyidosona.
Ruth1:8 Nuhaama ba nayta machetako
Ruth1:9 Hinte gelana azinata son Goday hintew shempo immo” yaagada yeerada entana anjasu. Entika banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidi
Ruth1:10 “Nuka neera ne asako baana” yaagidosona.
Ruth1:11 Shin Nuhaama entako
Ruth1:12 Ta nayto simmite
Ruth1:13 hessati diccidi gakanaa gaso entana naaganeyee? Enta gisho gidi azina gelonna attanayee? Ta nayto
Ruth1:14 Hessan enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi darsi yeekidosona. Orfi ba azina aayiw yeerada guye simmasu. Shin Uruuta iipe shaaketike gada ganta kana shasho gidasu.
Ruth1:15 Nuhaama zaarada
Ruth1:16 Shin Uruuta zaarada
Ruth1:17 Ne hayqiya son ta hayqana
Ruth1:18 Uruuta iira baanaw qanxidaysa Nuhaama erada si77i gasu.
Ruth1:19 Yaape nam7u maccasati Beeteleme gakanaw bidosona. Bidi enti Beeteleme gakida wode he katama asa ubbay entaban malaaletidosona. Qassi maccasay
Ruth1:20 Iya zaarada ubba danda7iya Xoossay ta de7uwa daro camethida gisho
Ruth1:21 Taani kumethi keyada bas
Ruth1:22 Hessada hanada Nuhaama ba na7aa mache Moo7abe Uruutira simmasu. Enti Beeteleme gakiday bangi buroo caka doometiya wodena.
Ruth2:1 Nuhaamis I azina Abemeleke baggara dabbothiya
Ruth2:2 Issi gallas Moo7abe Uruuta Nuhaamo
Ruth2:3 Hessa gisho
Ruth2:4 Heko
Ruth2:5 Yaatin
Ruth2:6 Katha cakeyisata kaapoy zaaridi
Ruth2:7 Iya tana
Ruth2:8 Boo7ezi Uruuto
Ruth2:9 Asay kathi cakiya bessaa xeella xeellada macca aylletara gidada enta geedo kaallada qora. Adde aylleti nena bochonaada taani entaw odas. Qassi nena saamiko
Ruth2:10 Uruuta shoca ziggada
Ruth2:11 Boo7ezi zaaridi
Ruth2:12 Neeni oothidabaas Godi new kushe zaaro. Neeni iya qefiya garsan attana gada yida
Ruth2:13 Uruuta
Ruth2:14 Quma miya wode Boo7ezi
Ruth2:15 Iya budhe qoranaw dendiya wode
Ruth2:16 Ubbaka mirqiyaafe shoddidi iw yeggite iya eko; iyo kaccofite” yaagis.
Ruth2:17 Hessan Uruuta omarsi gakanaw qorasu. Iya qora pe7idaysa qoxin
Ruth2:18 Iya he katha ba77a ekada katama simmasu; iya ay mela qoridaako ehada ba azina aayiw bessasu. Qassi iya mishin attida kathi ehidaysa kessada iw immasu.
Ruth2:19 I azina aayiya
Ruth2:20 Nuhaama zaarada
Ruth2:21 Moo7abe Uruuta
Ruth2:22 Nuhaama ba na7a mache Uruutiko
Ruth2:23 Hessa gisho
Ruth3:1 Issi gallas Nuhaama ba na7a machiw
Ruth3:2 Neeni entara gam7ida macca aylleta goday
Ruth3:3 Neeni meecetada shitto tiyeta; ne lo77o ma7uwa ma7ada
Ruth3:4 I hiixa aadhiya wode I awun dhiskiyako be7ada
Ruth3:5 Uruuta
Ruth3:6 Hessa gisho
Ruth3:7 Boo7ezi midi uyidi ba bolla pashkisidaape guye
Ruth3:8 Giddi bilahe gidiyade I dagami dendidi shiretiya wode
Ruth3:9 Ika
Ruth3:10 Boo7ezi zaaridi
Ruth3:11 Ha7i ta naate babofa. Neeni oychidaba ubba new taani oothana. Ta kataman de7iya asa ubbay neeni lo77o maccasi gideysa erees.
Ruth3:12 Taani mata dabbo gideysi tuma; shin taape daro matey de7ees.
Ruth3:13 Hachi qamma haysan aqa. Wonto I nena wozanaw koyiko lo77o
Ruth3:14 Hessa gisho
Ruth3:15 Boo7ezi iyo
Ruth3:16 Uruuta ba azina aayeko simmada yin
Ruth3:17 Gujadaka
Ruth3:18 Yaagin Nuhaama
Ruth4:1 Boo7ezi pude katama pengiya matan de7iya dabaaban keyidi uttis. I yan uttidashin kase I odida mata dabboy he bessa yin
Ruth4:2 Boo7ezi he katama cimatape tammu asata dooridi
Ruth4:3 Boo7ezi ba mata dabbuwako “Moo7abe biittafe simmada yida Nuhaama
Ruth4:4 Hessa gisho
Ruth4:5 Boo7ezi
Ruth4:6 Ha mata dabboy
Ruth4:7 Beni wode Isra7eele biittan wozuwanne laata duuthanaw bayziya woyko laatisiya baggay ba caammaa tohuwape kessidi
Ruth4:8 Hessa gisho
Ruth4:9 Yaatin
Ruth4:10 Qassi hayqidaysa sunthay enta soo asaa suntha giddofe woyko katama asaa taybuwape dhayonnaada iya suntha iya laata gadiyan xeegisanaw kase Mahiloona machiw Uruutoka taani wozeysas hachi hinte ubbay marka” yaagis.
Ruth4:11 Katama pengiya dabaaban de7iya cimatinne asa ubbay
Ruth4:12 Ne keethay
Ruth4:13 Hessadaka oothidi
Ruth4:14 Maccasati Nuhaamo
Ruth4:15 Iyan new sa7i simmana
Ruth4:16 Nuhaama na7aa idimmasu; loytha dichasu.
Ruth4:17 I shooro maccasati
Ruth4:18 Faaresa yeletethay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa; Faaresi Hesroona yelis;
Ruth4:19 Hesrooni Raame yelis; Raamey Amnadaabe yelis;
Ruth4:20 Amnadaabey Na7asoona yelis; Na7asooni Salmoona yelis;
Ruth4:21 Salmooni Boo7eza yelis; Boo7ezi Yoobeda yelis;
Ruth4:22 Yoobedi Isseye yelis; Isseyey Dawita yelis.
1Samuel1:1 Derey dariya Efreema biittan
1Samuel1:2 Hilqaanas nam7u macheti de7oosona; issinne sunthay Haanno; hankoori sunthay Pinaano. Pinaanis nayti de7oosona
1Samuel1:3 Hilqaani laythan laythan Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa goyinnanawunne iyaw yarshanaw Seelo bees. Eeli nayti nam7ay
1Samuel1:4 Hilqaani yarsho yarshiya wode ubban ashuwape issi issi kushe ba mache Pinaanis
1Samuel1:5 Goday Haanno yelo diggikoka
1Samuel1:6 Goday Haanno yelo diggida gisho
1Samuel1:7 Hessi laythan laythan ubba wode haniyaba. Haanna Godaa keethi bida wode ubban I dawuthiya iya yeekana gakanawunne kathi ixana gakanaw yiloyawusu.
1Samuel1:8 I azinay Hilqaani
1Samuel1:9 Issi gallas enti Seelon midaapenne uyidaape guye
1Samuel1:10 Haanna daro azzanida gisho cametada yeekashe Godaa woossasu.
1Samuel1:11 Iya haysada yaagada qangetasu; “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw
1Samuel1:12 Haanna Godaa woosa adussida wode Eeli I doona be7ees.
1Samuel1:13 Haanna ba wozanan Xoossaa woossiya wode I mettershay qaaxees
1Samuel1:14 I
1Samuel1:15 Haanni zaarada
1Samuel1:16 Taani metoynne azzanoy darida gisho woossayis. Tana ne aylliw pathenna maccas oothada qopofa” yaagasu.
1Samuel1:17 Eeli zaaridi
1Samuel1:18 Haanna
1Samuel1:19 Wontetha gallas guura dendidi
1Samuel1:20 Iya qanthatada adde na7a yelasu. Haanna
1Samuel1:21 Hilqaani ba soo asa ubbaara laytha yarsho Godaas yarshanawunne qangetha gathanaw Seelo bis.
1Samuel1:22 Shin Haanna babuku. Iya ba azinaako
1Samuel1:23 Hilqaani
1Samuel1:24 Haanna na7ay dhanthi duuthidaape guye
1Samuel1:25 Enti wofaanuwa shukidaape guye na7aa Eeliko efidosona.
1Samuel1:26 Haanna
1Samuel1:27 Ha na7aa immana mela woossin
1Samuel1:28 Hessa gisho
1Samuel2:1 Haanna haysada yaagada woossasu; “Ta wozanay Godan ufaytees; ta kacey Godan dhoqu gis. Ta morketa bolla taani ceeqetayis; ne ashoy tana ufaysees.
1Samuel2:2 Godaa mela geeshshi baawa; ne meli oonika baawa. Nu Xoossaafe attishin
1Samuel2:3 Otoro haasaya aggite; otoro qaali hinte doonape keyopo. Godaa Xoossay ubbaa erees; asa ooso yiggidi xeellees.
1Samuel2:4 Olanchota dongey meqis; shin daaburanchoti wolqa demmidosona.
1Samuel2:5 Kallidaysati koshatidi unetidosona; shin koshatidaysati ha77i kallidosona. Maynthiya laapun nayta yelasu; shin daro nayta yelidaara barka attasu
1Samuel2:6 Goday wodhees
1Samuel2:7 Goday dureyees; Goday manqethees; kawushshees; dhoqu oothees.
1Samuel2:8 I manqota baanape denthees; metootanchota bidope denthees. Enta boncho asaara utisees; boncho araata laatisees. Biittaa baasoti Godaasa; enta bolla alamiya essis.
1Samuel2:9 “I geeshshata tohuwa naagees; shin iitata dhuman si77i oothana; asi ba wolqan xoonenna;
1Samuel2:10 Godaara eqeteysati liiqana; Goday salope enta bolla dadada dechana. Goday sa7an de7iya ubbaa pirdana; I ba kawas minotethi immana; I ba tiyidaysas xoono immana.”
1Samuel2:11 Hessafe guye
1Samuel2:12 Eeli adde nayti iita; enti Godaa bonchokona.
1Samuel2:13 He wode kahineti asaara de7iya gahetethan oothiya wogi de7ees. Hessika asay yarsho yarshiya wode kahiniya oosanchoy heedzu achara de7iya qaphe ekidi buroo ashoy kaxishin yees.
1Samuel2:14 Doysiya otuwan woyko distiyan woyko xaaruwan ba qaphiya yeddidi
1Samuel2:15 Qassi modhuwa yarsho bessan xuugganaape sinthe kahiniya oosanchoy yarsho yarshiya addiyako bidi
1Samuel2:16 Addey zaaridi
1Samuel2:17 Godaas immiya yarshuwa Eeli nayti kadhida gisho
1Samuel2:18 Shin Sameeli na7a de7ishe liinope oosetida efuude ma7o ma7idi Godaa sinthan oothees.
1Samuel2:19 Sameela aayiya laythan laythan guutha qolle giigisada
1Samuel2:20 Eeli Hilqaananne iya machiw
1Samuel2:21 Goday Haanna anjin
1Samuel2:22 Eeli daro cimis. Iya nayti Isra7eele asa ubbaa bolla oothida iitabaanne Geeshsha Dunkaaniya pengen Godaas oothiya maccasatara tunidaysa si7is.
1Samuel2:23 Hessa gisho entako
1Samuel2:24 Ta nayto
1Samuel2:25 Issi asi ase naaqiko
1Samuel2:26 Na7ay Sameeli Godaa sinthaninne asa sinthan diccisinne sabetis.
1Samuel2:27 Issi gallas nabey Eeliko yidi
1Samuel2:28 Ne aaway kahine gididi ta yarsho bessa keyana mela
1Samuel2:29 Taani ta de7iya bessan shiiqana mela kiitida ta yarshuwanne imuwa hinte ayis kadhidetii? Ta asa Isra7eele
1Samuel2:30 “Hessa gisho
1Samuel2:31 Ne kochan asi ceeggonna mela taani ne wolqaanne ne aawa soo asaa wolqaa dhaysiya wodey yaana.
1Samuel2:32 Neeni ta keethan meto be7ana; taani Isra7eele asaas immiya anjuwa neeni be7ada qanaatana; shin ne soo asan ceeggana asi oonika baawa.
1Samuel2:33 Taani ta yarsho bessaafe dhaysona asi de7iko
1Samuel2:34 Ne nayti nam7ay
1Samuel2:35 Ta wozanaadanne ta qofaada oothiya taw ammanetiya kahine denthana. Taani iyaw ammanetida soo asi immana; taani tiyida kawa sinthan enti ubba wode oothana.
1Samuel2:36 Ne kochaa giddofe attida ubbay guutha miishe woyko baso uythi woossanaw yidi
1Samuel3:1 Na7ay Sameeli Eelipe garsara Godaas oothees; Godaa qaalay he wode daro al7o; qoncethika baawa.
1Samuel3:2 Ayfey daaburin waayetidi xeelliya Eeli issi qamma ba bessan zin7is.
1Samuel3:3 He wode Xoossa xompey buroo to7ibeenna; Godaa Taabotey de7iya keethan Sameeli dhiskis.
1Samuel3:4 Goday Sameela xeegis; Sameeli
1Samuel3:5 I Eeliko woxi bidi
1Samuel3:6 Qassi Goday
1Samuel3:7 Godaa qaalay buroo iyaw qonciboonna gisho
1Samuel3:8 Goday Sameela heedzantho xeegin dendidi
1Samuel3:9 “Bada zin7a; I nena xeegiyaba gidiko
1Samuel3:10 Hessafe guye
1Samuel3:11 Goday Sameela
1Samuel3:12 He gallas taani Eeli soo asaa bolla oothana gada odida ubbaa koyrope wursethi gakanaw polana.
1Samuel3:13 Eeli eridi seeronna aggida iya nayta nagaraa gisho
1Samuel3:14 Hessa gisho
1Samuel3:15 Sameeli wontana gakanaw dhiskis; wontin dendidi
1Samuel3:16 Eeli
1Samuel3:17 Eeli
1Samuel3:18 Sameeli aykoka qosonna ubbaa Eelis odis. Eeli
1Samuel3:19 Sameeli diccishe bis; Goday iyara de7ees. Sameeli odidabaape issi qaalika sa7an wodhenna.
1Samuel3:20 Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw
1Samuel3:21 Goday Seelon qoncees; yan ba qaalan banatetha Sameelas qoncisees.
1Samuel4:1 Sameeli odida qaalay Isra7eele ubbaa gakis. Isra7eeleti Filisxeematara oletanaw keyidosona; Isra7eeleti Aben7ezeran dunkaanin
1Samuel4:2 Filisxeemeti cugan cugan gididi
1Samuel4:3 Olanchoti dunkaanida gutaa simmida wode Isra7eele cimati
1Samuel4:4 Hessa gisho
1Samuel4:5 Godaa Caaqo Taabotey asay dunkaanida gutaa gakida wode Isra7eele ubbay biitti qaaxana gakanaw banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
1Samuel4:6 Isra7eeleta waasuwa Filisxeemeti si7idi
1Samuel4:7 Yayyidi haysada yaagidosona; “Xoossay enta gutaa yis; nuna ayye! Haysa melabay haysafe kase hani erenna.
1Samuel4:8 Nuna ayye! ha wolqaama Xoossaa kushepe nuna ashshanay oonee? Ha Xoossay Gibxeta mela biittan dumma dumma gadon shocis.
1Samuel4:9 Hinteno Filisxeemeto
1Samuel4:10 Filisxeemeti oletidi
1Samuel4:11 Xoossaa Taabotey di7etis; Eeli nayti nam7ay
1Samuel4:12 He gallas Biniyaame koche gidida issi addey ola dembafe woxishe yidi Seelo gakis. Ba azzanuwa erisanaw I ba ma7uwa daakidi
1Samuel4:13 He addey gakiya wode Eeli ba wozanan Xoossa Taabotiyas hirgida gisho naagishe oge doonan de7iya ba oydiyan uttis. Addey katama gelidi
1Samuel4:14 Eeli he waasuwa si7idi
1Samuel4:15 Eeli uddufun tammanne hospun laythi gidida cima; iya ayfey daaburidi xeelo aggis.
1Samuel4:16 Addey Eeliko
1Samuel4:17 Addey
1Samuel4:18 Addey Xoossa Taabotiyabaa odida wode pengiya matan de7iya ba oydiyape Eeli guye kundis. I cimanne moollo gidiya gisho morgey meqin hayqis. Eeli Isra7eele biitta oytamu laythi haaris.
1Samuel4:19 Eeli na7aa Pinihaasa machiya yelanaw wodey wurida qanthe. Xoossaa Taabotey di7etetha
1Samuel4:20 I shempoy keyiya wode yeliseysati
1Samuel4:21 Iya ba na7aa Ikabooda gada sunthasu; Xoossaa Taabotey di7etida gishonne ba bolloynne ba azinay hayqida gisho
1Samuel4:22 Iya
1Samuel5:1 Filisxeemeti Xoossa Taabotiya di77idaape guye Aben7ezerape Ashdooda efidosona.
1Samuel5:2 Xoossa Taabotiya efidi
1Samuel5:3 Ashdooda asay wontetha gallas guura dendidi be7iya wode Godaa Taabotiya sinthan Daagoni gufannidaysa be7idosona. Daagone denthidi
1Samuel5:4 Qassi wontetha gallas guura dendidi be7iya wode Godaa Taabotiya sinthan Daagoni sa7an gufannidaysa be7idosona. He wode Daagone huupheynne iya nam7u kushey meqidi pengiya bolla de7ees; hanko asatethay dumma attis.
1Samuel5:5 Hachi gakanaw Daagone kahinetinne Ashdoodan de7iya Daagone keetha geliya asati ubbay Daagone pengiya yedhonna xambaali aadhey hessa gishosa.
1Samuel5:6 Ashdooda katamaa bollanne iya heeran de7iya asaa bolla Godaa kushey deexis; Goday kixa harge yeddidi enta seeris.
1Samuel5:7 Ashdooda katamaa asay hanidaba be7ida wode
1Samuel5:8 Hessa gisho
1Samuel5:9 Shin Taabotey Gaate gakidaape guye
1Samuel5:10 Hessa gisho
1Samuel5:11 Hessa gisho
1Samuel5:12 Hayqope attida asaa kixa hargey un7ethida gisho he katamaa asaa yeehoy salo gakis.
1Samuel6:1 Godaa Taabotey Filisxeeme biittan laapun ageena uttis.
1Samuel6:2 He wode Filisxeeme asay banta kahinetanne marota xeegidi
1Samuel6:3 Enti zaaridi
1Samuel6:4 Filisxeeme asay
1Samuel6:5 Hinte he kixatanne hinte biitta dhaysiya he ecereta misileta medhidi
1Samuel6:6 Gibxe asaynne enta kawoy zore ekonna ixidaysada hinte ayis zore ekeketii? Goday enta daro seerin Isra7eeleti banta ogiya baana mela yeddibookona?
1Samuel6:7 Ha77i issi ooratha gaare giigisite; qambara wothiboona nam7u dhanthiya miizata he gaariyan waaxite; shin marata entafe duuthidi son ashshite.
1Samuel6:8 Godaa Taabotiya gaariya bolla wothite; nagara yarshos giigisida worqa kixatanne worqa ecereta saaxinen yeggidi Godaa Taabotiya matan wothidi I baana mela yeddite.
1Samuel6:9 Shin I biya bessa be7ite; I ba zawa oykidi
1Samuel6:10 Enti geetetidaysada oothidosona; nam7u dhanthiya miizata ekidi
1Samuel6:11 Enti Godaa Taabotiya
1Samuel6:12 Hessafe guye
1Samuel6:13 Beet-Sameesa asay he wode zangaaran giste cakoosona; enti dhoqu gidi xeellidi
1Samuel6:14 Gaarey Beet-Sameesan de7iya Iyyasu geetetiya uraa gade gakidi
1Samuel6:15 Leeweti Godaa Taabotiyanne worqa miisheti de7iya saaxiniya gaariyape wodhisidi
1Samuel6:16 Ichashu Filisxeeme halaqati hanidaba ubbaa be7idi he gallas Eqroona simmidosona.
1Samuel6:17 Worqa kixati Filisxeeme halaqati nagara yarsho oothidi Godaas kiitida Ashdooda
1Samuel6:18 Worqa ecereta tayboy Filisxeeme halaqata ichashay de7iya gimbetida katamatanne heeran de7iya gutata taybuwa mela. Beet-Sameesan de7iya Iyyasu geetetiya uraa gaden Godaa Taabotiya wothida gita shuchay hachi gakanaw marka gididi de7ees.
1Samuel6:19 Shin enti Godaa Taabotiyas giddo baggaa be7ida gisho Goday Beet-Sameesa asaape laapun tammu asata wodhis. Goday entafe daro asaa wodhida gisho asay yeekidosona.
1Samuel6:20 Hessa gisho
1Samuel6:21 Qiriyat-Yi7aariman de7iya asaako kiita yeddidi
1Samuel7:1 Qiriyat-Yi7aarima asay yidi
1Samuel7:2 Taabotey Qiriyat-Yi7aariman daro wode gam7is; yan laatamu laythi uttis. Isra7eele asa ubbay azzanidi Godaa koydosona.
1Samuel7:3 Sameeli Isra7eele asaako
1Samuel7:4 Hessa gisho
1Samuel7:5 Hessafe guye
1Samuel7:6 Enti Mixipha shiiqidi haathe duuqidi
1Samuel7:7 Isra7eeleti Mixiphan shiiqidaysa Filisxeeme asay si7ida wode enta olanaw keyidosona. Isra7eeleti hessa si7idi
1Samuel7:8 Isra7eele asay Sameelako
1Samuel7:9 Sameeli issi dhammiya dorsa na7a ekidi
1Samuel7:10 Sameeli xuussa yarsho yarshiya wode Filisxeemeti Isra7eeleta olanaw shiiqidosona. Shin he gallas Filisxeemeta bolla Goday gita dada gunthidi daganthin
1Samuel7:11 Isra7eeleti Mixiphafe keyidi
1Samuel7:12 Hessafe guye
1Samuel7:13 Filisxeeme asay xoonetidosona; enti Isra7eele biitta bolla nam7antho dendibookona. Sameeli de7ida laytha ubban Godaa kushey Filisxeeme asaa bolla deexis.
1Samuel7:14 Filisxeeme asay Eqroonape Gaate gakanaw Isra7eelepe di77ida katamati Isra7eeles simmidosona. Isra7eele asay banta kase zawa Filisxeeme asaa kushepe wothi ekidosona. Isra7eele asaynne Amoore asay saro de7is.
1Samuel7:15 Sameeli ba de7o laytha ubban Isra7eele bolla pirdees.
1Samuel7:16 Sameeli laythan laythan Beetele
1Samuel7:17 Iya keethay Raman de7iya gisho yaa simmidi he bessanka Isra7eele bolla pirdees. I Raman Godaas yarsho bessi keexis.
1Samuel8:1 Sameeli cimida wode ba nayta Isra7eele bolla daynna oothidi shuumis.
1Samuel8:2 Iya bayra na7aa sunthay Iyyu7eela; kaalo na7a sunthay Abiya; enti Barsaaben pirdoosona.
1Samuel8:3 Shin iya nayti banta aawa ogiya kaallibookona. Enti bessonna go77a demmanaw guye simmidosona; wodhaafe ekidosona
1Samuel8:4 Hessa gisho
1Samuel8:5 “Heko neeni cimadasa; ne nayti ne ogiya kaallokona; hara kawotethati ootheysada nuna aysiya kawo ha77i nuus shuuma” yaagidosona.
1Samuel8:6 Enti
1Samuel8:7 Goday Sameela
1Samuel8:8 Enta taani Gibxefe kessida wodiyape doomidi hachi gakanaw tana aggidi
1Samuel8:9 Ha77i enti giyaba si7a; shin enta bolla kawotana kawa wogaa entaw minthada oda” yaagis.
1Samuel8:10 Kawo oychida deriyas Goday odida qaala ubbaa Sameeli yaagidi odis.
1Samuel8:11 “Hinte bolla kawotana kawoy oothanabay haysa; I hinte adde nayta ekidi
1Samuel8:12 Entafe attidaysata shaalaqatanne hamsalaqata
1Samuel8:13 Hinte macca naytaka efidi
1Samuel8:14 Hinte goshshaafe
1Samuel8:15 Kathaafenne woyniyape tammaafe issi kushiya ekidi ba shuumatasinne ba moorinnatas immana.
1Samuel8:16 Hinte adde aylletape
1Samuel8:17 Hinte dorsafenne deeshape tammaafe issi kushe ekana; hinte iya oosancho gidana.
1Samuel8:18 He gallasay gakida wode hinte doorida kawoy gathiya qohuwa gisho waassana; shin he gallas Goday hinte waasuwa si7enna” yaagis.
1Samuel8:19 Gidoshin
1Samuel8:20 Hara kawotethata mela nuna kaalethiya
1Samuel8:21 Sameeli asaa qaala ubbaa si7idi
1Samuel8:22 Goday Sameelako
1Samuel9:1 Biniyaame koche gidida issi Qiisa geetetiya addey de7ees; I eretida asi. I Abi7eela na7a; Abeeli Xaroora na7a; Xaroori Bakoraate na7a; Bakorati Biniyaame koche gidida Afeeqa na7a.
1Samuel9:2 Iyaw Saa7ola geetetiya issi mala lo77o gidida pantha na7i de7ees. Isra7eeleta giddon iya mela mala lo77oy baawa; I asi ubbay iya hashepe garsan attiya adussa asi.
1Samuel9:3 Issi gallas Saa7ola aawa Qiisa hareti dhayidosona; Qiisi ba na7aa Saa7olako
1Samuel9:4 Enti derey dariya Efreema biittaranne Shalisha biittara koyishe aadhidosona
1Samuel9:5 Enti Zuufa biitta gakida wode Saa7oli baara de7iya oosanchuwako
1Samuel9:6 Shin oosanchoy
1Samuel9:7 Saa7oli
1Samuel9:8 Oosanchoy zaaridi
1Samuel9:9 (Beni wode Isra7eele biittan issi asi Xoosse oychanaw bishe
1Samuel9:10 Saa7oli zaaridi
1Samuel9:11 Enti pude katamaa keyishin
1Samuel9:12 Enti
1Samuel9:13 Hinte katamaa geliya wode I maanaw dhoqa goyinno bessaa keyonna de7ishin hinte iya demmana. I yarshuwa anjanaw koshshiya gisho I gakonna de7ishin asay kathaa meenna. I anjidaape guye xeegetidaysati maana. Elle keyite; hinte iya ha77i demmana” yaagidosona.
1Samuel9:14 Enti katamaa geliya wode Sameeli goyinno bessaa keyanaw bishe entara gahetis.
1Samuel9:15 Saa7oli yaanape kase gallas Sameelas Goday haysada yaagidi qoncisis;
1Samuel9:16 “Wonto hannoode Biniyaame biittafe issi asi ta neeko yeddana; I ta asaa Isra7eele kaalethana mela tiya. I ta asaa Filisxeeme kushepe ashshana; ta asa waasoy taako gakida gisho ta enta be7as” yaagis.
1Samuel9:17 Sameeli Saa7ola be7ida wode Goday
1Samuel9:18 Saa7oli gimbe dirsa pengiya matan de7iya Sameelako shiiqidi
1Samuel9:19 Sameeli zaaridi
1Samuel9:20 Heedzu gallasape sinthe dhayida haretaba gidiko enti bentida gisho hirgofa. Isra7eele asa ubbaa amoy oonee? Nenanne ne aawa soo asaa gidennee?” yaagis.
1Samuel9:21 Saa7oli zaaridi
1Samuel9:22 Hessafe guye
1Samuel9:23 Sameeli kathi katheysako
1Samuel9:24 Kathi katheysi missa ashuwa ehidi
1Samuel9:25 Enti goyinno bessaafe duge katama wodhin
1Samuel9:26 Sa7i wontin
1Samuel9:27 Enti katama gaxa gakishin
1Samuel10:1 He wode Sameeli tigiyabara zayte ekidi
1Samuel10:2 Neeni hachi taape shaaketada biya wode Raheeli duufuwa matan Biniyaame zawan de7iya Xalxaha geetetiya bessan nam7u asatara gahetana. Enti nena
1Samuel10:3 Neeni he bessaafe dendada
1Samuel10:4 Enti nena sarothana; new nam7u uythu immana; ne enta kushepe he uythaa ekanaw koshshees.
1Samuel10:5 “Hessafe guye
1Samuel10:6 Godaa Ayyaanay ne bolla wolqan wodhana; neeni entara tinbite odana; neeni laametada hara asi gidana.
1Samuel10:7 Ha mallati poletiya wode Xoossay neera de7iya gisho ne oothanaw danda7iyaba ubbaa ootha.
1Samuel10:8 “Neeni taape sinthatada Galgala wodha. Taani xuussa yarshonne sarotetha yarsho yarshanaw neeko baana. Ta neeko bada ne oothanaba odana gakanaw laapun gallas gam7a” yaagis.
1Samuel10:9 Saa7oli Sameelape shaaketida wode Xoossay Saa7ola wozanaa laammis; Sameeli odida mallati ubbay he gallas hanidosona.
1Samuel10:10 Saa7olinne iya aylley Gib7a gakiya wode nabe cugay iyara gahetis. Xoossa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqara wodhin I enta giddon tinbite odetis.
1Samuel10:11 Saa7ola kase eriya ubbay I nabetara tinbite odeteysa be7ida wode
1Samuel10:12 He bessan de7iya issi uray
1Samuel10:13 Saa7oli tinbite odeysa wursidaape guye goyinno zumaa bolla keyis.
1Samuel10:14 Saa7ola aawa ishay Saa7olanne iya aylliya
1Samuel10:15 Saa7ola aawa ishay
1Samuel10:16 Saa7oli
1Samuel10:17 Hessafe guye
1Samuel10:18 Enta
1Samuel10:19 Shin hachi hintena hinte metuwapenne waayiyape ashshiya tana hinte Xoossaa ixideta. ‘Akay
1Samuel10:20 Sameeli Isra7eele zare shiishin
1Samuel10:21 Biniyaame kochaa shiishin
1Samuel10:22 Hessa gisho enti
1Samuel10:23 Enti woxi bidi
1Samuel10:24 Sameeli asaako
1Samuel10:25 Hessafe guye
1Samuel10:26 Saa7oli ba soo Gib7a bis; Xoossay enta wozanaa bochida mino asati Saa7olara bidosona.
1Samuel10:27 Shin issi issi pathonna asati
1Samuel11:1 Issi ageenape guye
1Samuel11:2 Na7oosi
1Samuel11:3 Yaabesa cimati Naa7osako
1Samuel11:4 Kiitetida asay Saa7oli de7iya bessaa Gib7a gakidi ha odaa asaas odidosona; asa ubbay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona.
1Samuel11:5 He wode Saa7oli ba boorata laaggidi goshshafe yishe
1Samuel11:6 Ha qaala Saa7oli si7ida wode Xoossa Ayyaanay iya bolla wolqan wodhis; Saa7oli shene eexis.
1Samuel11:7 Saa7oli waaxa boorata muxerethidi
1Samuel11:8 Saa7oli Beezeqan enta shiishidi taybida wode Isra7eele asay heedzu xeetu mukulu; Yihuda asay hastamu mukulu gidis.
