1Samuel12:1 Sameeli Isra7eele ubbaako
1Samuel12:2 Ha77i hintena kaalethanaw kawoy de7ees. Taani daro cimada puulumas; ta nayti hintera de7oosona. Taani ta na7atethafe doomada hachi gakanaw hintena kaalethas.
1Samuel12:3 Heko
1Samuel12:4 Enti zaaridi
1Samuel12:5 Sameeli
1Samuel12:6 Qassika Sameeli
1Samuel12:7 Ha77i hintewunne hinte mayzatas Goday oothida xillo ooso ubbaas taani hintenera Godaa sinthan mootetana mela haysan eqite.
1Samuel12:8 Yayqoobinne iya soo asay Gibxen de7ishin
1Samuel12:9 “Shin Isra7eele asay Godaa banta Xoossaa dogidosona. Goday enta Haxoora tora mocona Sisaara kushen
1Samuel12:10 Enti
1Samuel12:11 Goday Gediyoona
1Samuel12:12 “Amoone kawoy Na7oosi hinteko yidaysa be7ida wode Goday hinte Xoossay hinte kawo gidikoka
1Samuel12:13 Ha77i hinte dooridanne oychida kawoy haysish. Heko
1Samuel12:14 Hinte Godaas yayyiko
1Samuel12:15 Shin hinte Godaa qaalas kiitetonna ixikonne iya kiitaa bolla makalliko
1Samuel12:16 “Hiza minnidi eqite; Goday hinte ayfiya sinthan oothana gitaba be7ite.
1Samuel12:17 Ha77i giste caka wode gidennee? Goday dadanne ira yeddana mela taani Godaa woossana. Hinte kawo oychidi
1Samuel12:18 Sameeli Godaa woossis; Goday he gallas dadanne ira yeddis; hessa gisho
1Samuel12:19 Asay
1Samuel12:20 Sameeli asaako
1Samuel12:21 Pathonnaba gidiya gisho maaddonnanne ashshona eeqata kaallopite.
1Samuel12:22 Goday ba gita sunthaa gisho ba asaa aggenna; I hintena ba ase oothanaw ufaytees.
1Samuel12:23 Hinte gisho woosa aggada Godaa qohoy taape haako; taani hintena lo77onne suure ogiya tamaarsana.
1Samuel12:24 Godaa yayyite; hinte kumetha wozanan ammanetidi
1Samuel12:25 Shin hinte zaari zaari nagara oothiko
1Samuel13:1 Saa7oli kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hastama; I Isra7eele bolla nam7u laythi kawotidaape guye
1Samuel13:2 Isra7eeleta giddofe heedzu mukulu asi dooris. Entafe nam7u mukulu asay Mikmaasaninne derey dariya Beetele biittan Saa7olara de7ees. Issi mukulu asay qassi Biniyaamen de7iya Gib7an Yoonatanara de7ees; attida asaa Saa7oli enta soo soo yeddis.
1Samuel13:3 Yoonataani Gib7an de7iya Filisxeeme olanchota olis; Filisxeeme asay hessa si7idosona. Hessafe guye
1Samuel13:4 Saa7oli Filisxeeme asaa olidi xoonidaysa Isra7eele asay si7idosona; Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme asaa matan ixetidaysata gideysa eridosona. Isra7eele asay Saa7ola kaallanaw xeegetidi Galgalan shiiqidosona.
1Samuel13:5 Filisxeeme asay Isra7eele asaa olanaw heedzu mukulu para gaaretara
1Samuel13:6 Isra7eele asay sa7i entaw iita gideysanne olanchoti dagammidaysa be7ida wode gongolon
1Samuel13:7 Ibraawetape guuthati Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi
1Samuel13:8 Saa7oli Sameeli keerida laapun gallas gakanaw gam7is; shin Sameeli Galgala yibeenna; yaatin
1Samuel13:9 Hessa gisho
1Samuel13:10 Saa7oli xuussa yarshuwa yarshidi polidaape guye Sameeli yis. Yaatin
1Samuel13:11 Sameeli
1Samuel13:12 Hessa gisho
1Samuel13:13 Sameeli
1Samuel13:14 Shin ha77i ne kawotethay gam7enna; neeni Godaa kiita naagaboonna gisho
1Samuel13:15 Sameeli Galgalape dendidi
1Samuel13:16 Saa7oli
1Samuel13:17 Filisxeeme olanchoti heedzu cugan shaaketidi keyidosona. Entafe issi cugay Shu7aala biittan de7iya Ofirako simmidi bis;
1Samuel13:18 Nam7anthoy Beet-Horonako bis; heedzantho cugay mela biitta sinthan de7iya Saboyma zangaara duge xeelliya zawa ogiya oykidi bis.
1Samuel13:19 Filisxeeme asay
1Samuel13:20 Hessa gisho
1Samuel13:21 Marashanne konte poshisanaw hospun giraame deexiya bira qanxoosona; kaltanne xooxe poshisanaw oyddu giraame qanxoosona.
1Samuel13:22 Hessa gisho
1Samuel13:23 Filisxeeme cugay Mikmaasa pinthi baanaw keyis.
1Samuel14:1 Issi gallas Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookiya panthaako haysada yaagis; “Haaya; hefinthan de7iya Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaa ane boos” yaagis. Shin ba aawas hessa odibeenna.
1Samuel14:2 He wode Saa7oli Gib7a matan Migroonan
1Samuel14:3 Seelon Godaa kahine gidida Eeli na7ay
1Samuel14:4 Yoonataani Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaa pinnanaw biya ogiya bolla ushacha bagganinne haddirsa baggan
1Samuel14:5 Zaallatape issoy pudeha baggan Mikmaasa sinthan de7iya wode
1Samuel14:6 Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookiya panthaako
1Samuel14:7 Iya ola miishiya tookeysi
1Samuel14:8 Yoonataani
1Samuel14:9 Enti
1Samuel14:10 Shin enti
1Samuel14:11 Enti nam7ay keyidi Filisxeemetas bentida wode Filisxeemeti
1Samuel14:12 Filisxeeme olanchoti
1Samuel14:13 Yoonataani ba ola miishiya tookeysa kaalethidi
1Samuel14:14 He koyro olan Yoonataaninne iya ola miishiya tookeysi bagga boora soo gaden laatamu gidiya asi wodhidosona.
1Samuel14:15 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:16 Saa7oli Biniyaame biittan
1Samuel14:17 Yaatin
1Samuel14:18 Saa7oli kahiniya Akiya
1Samuel14:19 Saa7oli kahiniyara haasayishin
1Samuel14:20 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:21 Kase Filisxeeme asaara wolla olla bessa bida Ibraaweti enta aggidi
1Samuel14:22 Derey dariya Efreema biittan qosetida hara Isra7eeletika Filisxeemeti baqateysa si7idosona. Entika Isra7eeletara walaketidi yedetho oykidosona.
1Samuel14:23 Goday he gallas Isra7eele asaa ashshis. Beet-Aweenape hefinthi gakanaw olay kanthis.
1Samuel14:24 He gallas Isra7eele asay koshan labbanidosona. Saa7oli
1Samuel14:25 Olanchoti ubbay wora giddo geliya wode mitha bolla eessi de7ees.
1Samuel14:26 Enti wora giddon eessi xokeysa be7idosona; shin caaquwa yayyida gisho
1Samuel14:27 Shin Yoonataani iya aaway asara oda qachidaysa si7ibeenna. Hessa gisho
1Samuel14:28 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:29 Yoonataani
1Samuel14:30 Asay ba morketape di77ida kathaafe hachi midaba gidiyako lo77oshin; enti wodhana Filisxeemeta tayboyka ay mela daraneshin” yaagis.
1Samuel14:31 He gallas Isra7eele asay Mikmaasape Eloona gakanaw Filisxeemeta shoci simmidi daaburidosona.
1Samuel14:32 Enti di77ida dorsata
1Samuel14:33 Issi asi Saa7olako
1Samuel14:34 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:35 Saa7oli he bessan Godaas yarsho bessi gimbis; Godaas yarsho bessi gimbishin haysi iyaw koyro.
1Samuel14:36 Saa7oli
1Samuel14:37 Hessa gisho
1Samuel14:38 Saa7oli
1Samuel14:39 Isra7eele ashshiya de7o Goday eriya mela. Ta na7a Yoonataana gidikoka
1Samuel14:40 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:41 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:42 Qassi Saa7oli
1Samuel14:43 Saa7oli Yoonataana
1Samuel14:44 Saa7oli
1Samuel14:45 Shin asay Saa7olako
1Samuel14:46 Hessafe guye
1Samuel14:47 Saa7oli Isra7eele bolla kawotidaape guye
1Samuel14:48 I minnidi oletis; Amaaleqata xoonis; Isra7eele asaa bonqeyisata kushepe ashshis.
1Samuel14:49 Saa7ola adde nayti Yoonataana
1Samuel14:50 Iya machiya
1Samuel14:51 Saa7ola aawa Qiisinne Abeneera aawa Neeri Abi7eela nayta.
1Samuel14:52 Saa7oli de7ida laytha ubban Filisxeemetara morketethan oletida mela de7is. Mino asi woyko xaala asi demmida wode ubban I he uraa ba olanchotan gujees.
1Samuel15:1 Sameeli Saa7olako
1Samuel15:2 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Isra7eeleti Gibxefe keyidi yaa wode Amaaleqati ogen entara eqetida gisho taani Amaaleqata seerana.
1Samuel15:3 Ha77i bada Amaaleqata shoca; entaw de7iyaba ubbaa polo dhaysa. Enta ashshofa; Maccanne adde
1Samuel15:4 Saa7oli asaa xeegidi
1Samuel15:5 Saa7oli Amaaleqata katamaa bidi issi shaafan qosetidi uttis.
1Samuel15:6 Saa7oli
1Samuel15:7 Saa7oli Amaaleqata Hawilape doomidi
1Samuel15:8 Amaaleqata kawa Agaaga paxa di77is; iya asa ubbaa mashshan wodhidi wursis.
1Samuel15:9 Shin Saa7olinne iya olanchoti
1Samuel15:10 Goday Sameelako
1Samuel15:11 “Saa7oli tana kaalleysa aggidi
1Samuel15:12 Sameeli wonta guura dendidi
1Samuel15:13 Sameeli Saa7ola demmida wode Saa7oli Sameelako
1Samuel15:14 Shin Sameeli Saa7olako
1Samuel15:15 Saa7oli
1Samuel15:16 Sameeli
1Samuel15:17 Sameeli zaaridi
1Samuel15:18 Goday
1Samuel15:19 Yaatin
1Samuel15:20 Saa7oli
1Samuel15:21 Shin olanchoti di7uwape lo77iya dorsenne mehiya Godaas
1Samuel15:22 Sameeli
1Samuel15:23 Geellatethi marotho nagara mela; qassi otoroy iita eeqa goyinno mela. Neeni Godaa qaala ixida gisho Goday ne kawo gidonna mela ixis” yaagis.
1Samuel15:24 Saa7oli
1Samuel15:25 Ha77i ta nagaraa atto garki; taani Godaa goyinnana mela taara yedharki” yaagis.
1Samuel15:26 Sameeli
1Samuel15:27 Sameeli baanaw dendin
1Samuel15:28 Sameeli
1Samuel15:29 Isra7eele bonchoy
1Samuel15:30 Saa7oli
1Samuel15:31 Hessa gisho
1Samuel15:32 Sameeli
1Samuel15:33 Sameeli Agaagako
1Samuel15:34 Sameeli dendidi
1Samuel15:35 Sameeli hayqana gakanaw Saa7ola be7anaw simmidi bibeenna
1Samuel16:1 Goday Sameelako
1Samuel16:2 Sameeli
1Samuel16:3 Isseyeka yarshos xeega. Ne oothanaba ta nena bessaana; ta nena besseysa tiya” yaagis.
1Samuel16:4 Sameeli Goday odidaysa oothis; Beeteleme bidi katamaa cimatara gahetida wode enti kokorishe iyako yidi
1Samuel16:5 Sameeli
1Samuel16:6 Enti yaa gakiya wode Sameeli Isseye na7aa Eliyaaba be7idi
1Samuel16:7 Shin Goday Sameela
1Samuel16:8 Isseyey Abinadaabe xeegidi
1Samuel16:9 Isseyey Saama aathin
1Samuel16:10 Hessada oothidi
1Samuel16:11 Sameeli
1Samuel16:12 Isseyey kiittidi na7aa ehisis; he na7ay aarise; ayfey lo77onne mala lo77o na7a. Goday Sameela
1Samuel16:13 Sameeli kacen kumida zayte ekidi
1Samuel16:14 Godaa Ayyaanay Saa7olape shaaketin Godaape kiitetida iita ayyaanay Saa7ola waaysees.
1Samuel16:15 Saa7ola aylleti
1Samuel16:16 Nuuni diithi diixiya asi koyidi ehana mela nu goday ba aylleta kiitto. Xoossaafe kiitetida iita ayyaanay nena oykiya wode he uray diithi diixiko new lo77o gidana” yaagidosona.
1Samuel16:17 Saa7oli ba aylleta
1Samuel16:18 Aylletape issoy
1Samuel16:19 Saa7oli Isseyeko kiittidi
1Samuel16:20 Isseyey uythunne ogoro woyne ushshu haren caanidi
1Samuel16:21 Dawiti Saa7olako yidi ooso doomis. Saa7oli Dawita daro dosis; Dawiti Saa7olas ola miishe tookeysa gidis.
1Samuel16:22 Saa7oli
1Samuel16:23 Hessafe simmin
1Samuel17:1 Filisxeemeti banta olanchota Yihudan de7iya Sooko geetetiya bessan olas shiishidosona. Enti Sokopenne Azeeqape giddon de7iya Efees-Damima geetetiya bessan shiiqidi uttidosona.
1Samuel17:2 Saa7olinne Isra7eeleti Ela zangaaran shiiqidi
1Samuel17:3 Filisxeeme olanchoti issi bagga zuma bolla salpin
1Samuel17:4 Gaate kataman de7iya Gooliyada geetetiya issi toora qara addey Filisxeemeti dunkaanida gutaape keyis; iya geesay usupun wadhanne takadho.
1Samuel17:5 I ishatammanne laapun kilo giraame deexiya naase birata xurure ma7is; qassi naase birata barneexa ba huuphen wothis.
1Samuel17:6 Naase birata gambaale ba tohon aathis; ba hashiyan naase birata toora tookis.
1Samuel17:7 Iya toora toomay wandaraashe mela orde; iya toora ayfey laapun kilo giraame deexees; iya gondalliya tookiya issi addey iya sinthan hemetees.
1Samuel17:8 Gooliyadi eqidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
1Samuel17:9 He addey taara oletidi tana wodhiko
1Samuel17:10 Qassika he Filisxeeme addey
1Samuel17:11 Saa7olinne Isra7eeleti Filisxeeme addiya qaala si7idi dagammidosona
1Samuel17:12 Dawiti Yihuda biittan Beetelemen de7iya Efraata addiya Isseye na7a. Isseyes hospun adde nayti de7oosona; Saa7ola kawotetha laythan Isseyey daro laythi de7ida cima.
1Samuel17:13 Isseye heedzu bayra adde nayti Saa7ola kaallidi olaa bidosona. Enta sunthay:- bayray Eliyaaba; kaaloy Amnadaabe; heedzanthoy Saama.
1Samuel17:14 Dawiti nayta ubbaafe kaalo; bayra heedzu nayti Saa7ola kaallidosona.
1Samuel17:15 Shin Dawiti ba aawa dorsata heemmanaw Saa7ola matape Beeteleme simeretees.
1Samuel17:16 He Filisxeeme addey oytamu gallas wontanne omarsi yidi Isra7eeleta mandees.
1Samuel17:17 Issi gallas Isseyey ba na7aa Dawita haysada yaagis; “Ha caacetida tiyape laatamu kilo giraamenne ha tammu uythata ekada ne ishatas efada ne ishati dunkaanida gutaa elle gatha.
1Samuel17:18 Ha tammu nuka pila enta shaalaqas efa; ne ishati waani de7iyako be7ada
1Samuel17:19 Kawoy Saa7oli
1Samuel17:20 Dawiti guura dendidi dorsata hara asi henthidi
1Samuel17:21 Isra7eeletinne Filisxeemeti issoy issuwako simmidi salpidosona.
1Samuel17:22 Dawiti ba ehidaba shinqe naageysa kushen wothidi
1Samuel17:23 Dawiti ba ishatara haasayishin
1Samuel17:24 Isra7eele asa ubbay he addiya be7ida wode daro yayyidi baqatidosona.
1Samuel17:25 Isra7eele asay issoy issuwako
1Samuel17:26 Dawiti ba matan eqida asaa
1Samuel17:27 Enti
1Samuel17:28 Dawiti asaara odeteysa iya bayra ishay Eliyaabi si7idi
1Samuel17:29 Dawiti
1Samuel17:30 Dawiti ba ishaa aggidi
1Samuel17:31 Dawiti odidaysa si7ida asay Saa7olas odin
1Samuel17:32 Dawiti Saa7olako
1Samuel17:33 Saa7oli Dawitako
1Samuel17:34 Shin Dawiti
1Samuel17:35 iya kaalla bada iya doonape wotha ekayis. Taako simmiya wode qoodhiya cuullada wodhayis.
1Samuel17:36 Taani ne aylley gaammonne garmafeele wodhas; ha qaxaretiboona Filisxeeme addey de7o Xoossaa olanchota guuthida gisho I entafe issuwada hanana.
1Samuel17:37 Gaammofenne garmafeelepe tana ashshida Goday
1Samuel17:38 Saa7oli ba ma7uwa Dawita mayzis; Dawita huuphen naase birata barneexa wothis; naase birata xururiya Dawita mayzis.
1Samuel17:39 Dawiti ba ola ma7uwa bolla mashsha dancidi hemetidi be7is. Shin hessa mela ma7o ma7idi eronna gisho hemetanaw danda7ibeenna. Hessa gisho
1Samuel17:40 Dawiti ba hentha xam7a oykidi
1Samuel17:41 Gooliyadi ba gondalliya tookiya addiyara issife hemetishe Dawitako matis.
1Samuel17:42 I Dawita tishshi oothi xeellidi
1Samuel17:43 I Dawitako
1Samuel17:44 Kaallidi Dawitako
1Samuel17:45 Dawiti
1Samuel17:46 Hachi Goday nena ta kushen aathidi immana; taani nena shocana; ne qoodhiya muuca holana. Filisxeeme olanchota aha salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas hachi immana. He wode Isra7eelen Xoossi de7eysa sa7an de7iya asa ubbay erana.
1Samuel17:47 Goday ba asaa ashshanaw toora woyko mashshe koyonnaysa haysan shiiqida asa ubbay erana. Olay Godaaba gidiya gisho
1Samuel17:48 Filisxeeme addey dendidi
1Samuel17:49 Dawiti ba qarxiitan kushe yeddidi
1Samuel17:50 Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya yambarshaninne shuchan xoonis. Dawiti ba kushen mashshi bayna Filisxeeme addiya caddidi wodhis.
1Samuel17:51 Dawiti woxi bidi
1Samuel17:52 Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay dendidi gereerishe
1Samuel17:53 Isra7eele asay Filisxeemeta yedethi simmidi
1Samuel17:54 Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya huuphiya Yerusalaame ehis; shin Filisxeeme addiya ola miishiya ba dunkaaniya giddon wothis.
1Samuel17:55 Dawiti Filisxeeme addiyara oletanaw bishin
1Samuel17:56 Kawoy zaaridi
1Samuel17:57 Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya wodhidi simmida wode Abeneeri iya Saa7ola sinthe ehis. He wode Dawiti muucida Filisxeeme addiya huuphiya ba kushen oykidi utisis.
1Samuel17:58 Saa7oli
1Samuel18:1 Dawiti Saa7olara haasaya wursidaape guye
1Samuel18:2 He gallasape doomidi
1Samuel18:3 Yoonataani Dawita ba huupheda dosiya gisho iyara caaqis.
1Samuel18:4 Yoonataani ba ma7ida kaaba
1Samuel18:5 Saa7oli kiitida ubbaa Dawiti naagetidi oothiya gisho
1Samuel18:6 Dawiti Filisxeeme addiya Gooliyada wodhin
1Samuel18:7 Maccasati durishe
1Samuel18:8 Saa7ola ha yethay shaatin
1Samuel18:9 He wodepe doomidi Saa7oli Dawita qanaate ayfen xeellees.
1Samuel18:10 Wontetha gallas iita ayyaani Xoossafe kiitetidi Saa7ola oykin
1Samuel18:11 I
1Samuel18:12 Goday Saa7ola aggidi Dawitara de7iya gisho Saa7oli Dawita yayyis.
1Samuel18:13 Saa7oli Dawita ba sinthafe haassanaw koyidi mukulu olanchotas halaqa oothis. Yaatin
1Samuel18:14 Goday Dawitara de7iya gisho I oothiyabay ubbay iyaw injetees.
1Samuel18:15 Dawiti oothiyaba ubbay injeteysa Saa7oli be7idi iyaw daro yayyis.
1Samuel18:16 Shin Dawiti enta olan kaalethiya gisho Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asa ubbay iya dosoosona.
1Samuel18:17 Saa7oli Dawitako
1Samuel18:18 Shin Dawiti
1Samuel18:19 Shin Saa7ola na7iya Meraaba Dawitas imetiya wodey gakin
1Samuel18:20 Gidoshin
1Samuel18:21 I ba wozanan
1Samuel18:22 Saa7oli ba oosanchota xeegidi
1Samuel18:23 Saa7oli gidaysada enti Dawitas odidosona. Shin Dawiti
1Samuel18:24 Saa7ola moorinnati Dawiti gidaba Saa7olas odidosona.
1Samuel18:25 Saa7oli ba aylletako
1Samuel18:26 Saa7ola aylleti Saa7oli gidaba Dawitas odidosona; kawuwara bollotanaysi Dawita ufaysis. Wodey aadhanape sinthe
1Samuel18:27 Dawitinne iya asay dendi bidi Filisxeemetape nam7u xeetu asaa wodhidosona. Dawiti kawuwara bollotanaw he asata qaarati ehidi
1Samuel18:28 Saa7oli Goday Dawitara de7eysanne iya na7iya Milkoola Dawita doseysa eris.
1Samuel18:29 Saa7oli Dawitas kaseysafe aathidi yayyis. Saa7oli ba de7o laytha ubban Dawitas morke gidis.
1Samuel18:30 Filisxeeme olanchoti olas kessi aggibokona. Shin olas keyida wode ubban Saa7ola toora moconatape aathidi xoonoy haney Dawitasa; hessa gisho
1Samuel19:1 Dawita wodhana mela Saa7oli ba na7aa Yoonatanasinne ba oosanchotas odis. Shin Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataani Dawita daro dosees.
1Samuel19:2 Hessa gisho
1Samuel19:3 Taani ta aawara bada
1Samuel19:4 Yoonataani Dawita nashshidi
1Samuel19:5 I Filisxeeme addiya wodhida wode ba shempuwas qadhetibeenna. Goday Isra7eele ubbaas gita xoono immis; hessa be7ada neka ufaytadasa. Yaatin
1Samuel19:6 Saa7oli Yoonataani odidaba si7idi
1Samuel19:7 Yoonataani Dawita xeegidi enti odetidaba ubbaa iyaw odis. Yaatidi Dawita Saa7olako ehin Dawiti kaseysada Saa7olara de7is.
1Samuel19:8 Filisxeemetara zaaridi hara oli dendis; Dawiti keyidi Filisxeemetara oletidi
1Samuel19:9 Hessafe simmin
1Samuel19:10 Saa7oli Dawita godaara gathidi sikanaw toora xongis; Shin Dawiti iyape deesh gidi attin
1Samuel19:11 Dawita keethan naagidi wonta wodhana mela Saa7oli ase kiittis. Dawita machiya Melkoola
1Samuel19:12 Milkoola Dawita maskootera kessin
1Samuel19:13 Hessafe guye
1Samuel19:14 Dawita oykidi ehana mela Saa7oli ase kiittin Milkoola
1Samuel19:15 Dawita be7ana mela Saa7oli he asata guye kiittidi
1Samuel19:16 Shin asati soo geliya wode eeqa misiley arsan zin7idaysanne iya huupheson deesha ikisey de7eysa demmidosona.
1Samuel19:17 Saa7oli Melkoolo
1Samuel19:18 Dawiti kessi ekidi Raman de7iya Sameelako bidi Saa7oli bana oothida ubbaa iyaw odis. Dawitinne Sameeli Nayoota bidi yan uttidosona.
1Samuel19:19 Saa7oli Dawiti Raman de7iya Nayootan de7eysa si7is.
1Samuel19:20 Dawita oykidi ehana mela ase yaa kiittis. Shin nabe cugay Sameela kaalethuwan tinbite odishin be7ida wode Saa7oli yeddida asata bolla Xoossa Ayyaanay wodhin
1Samuel19:21 Saa7oli hessa si7ida wode hara asi yeddis; entika qassi tinbite odidosona. Saa7oli heedzantho ase yeddin entika tinbite odidosona.
1Samuel19:22 Wursethan
1Samuel19:23 Hessa gisho
1Samuel19:24 I ba ma7uwa qaaridi
1Samuel20:1 Dawiti Raman de7iya Nayootape baqatidi
1Samuel20:2 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:3 Shin Dawiti
1Samuel20:4 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:5 Dawiti zaaridi
1Samuel20:6 Ne aaway tana koyiko
1Samuel20:7 I
1Samuel20:8 Shin neeni taw ne aylliyas lo77oba ootha; Neeni taara ne aylliyara Godaa sinthan caaqadasa. Taani bala gidiko
1Samuel20:9 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:10 Dawiti “Ne aaway new iita zaaro zaariko
1Samuel20:11 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:12 Yoonataani Dawitako
1Samuel20:13 Shin ta aaway nena qohanaw koyaba gidiko
1Samuel20:14 Ta de7o laytha ubban ta hayqonna mela Godaa siiquwa tana bessa.
1Samuel20:15 Goday Dawita morketa ubbaa biittafe dhaysiya wodeka ne siiquwa ta soo asaas bessa” yaagis.
1Samuel20:16 Hessa gisho
1Samuel20:17 Yoonataani Dawita ba huupheda dosiya gisho
1Samuel20:18 Hessafe guye
1Samuel20:19 Wonti pee7in omarsi bada
1Samuel20:20 Taani issiba bolla xongiya asada hanada heedzu donge toorata he zaalla miye yeddana.
1Samuel20:21 Hessafe guye
1Samuel20:22 Shin taani na7aako
1Samuel20:23 Neera taara odetida odaas Goday nu giddon merinaw marka” yaagis.
1Samuel20:24 Hessa gisho
1Samuel20:25 Kawoy ba uttiya bessan godaa matan uttis; Yoonataani iyape sintha baggan
1Samuel20:26 Saa7oli he gallas aykoka gibeenna. Saa7oli ba wozanan
1Samuel20:27 Shin wontetha gallas
1Samuel20:28 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:29 I taako
1Samuel20:30 Saa7oli Yoonataana bolla shene eexi keyidi
1Samuel20:31 Isseye na7ay ha sa7a bolla de7ida peeshan ne woyko ne kawotethay eqenna. Ha77i kiittada elle ehisa; I hayqanaw bessees” yaagis.
1Samuel20:32 Yoonataani ba aawa
1Samuel20:33 Saa7oli Yoonataana wodhanaw toora iya bolla xongis. Hessa gisho
1Samuel20:34 Yoonataani shenetidi gibira bollafe dendis; ba aaway
1Samuel20:35 Yoonataani baara issi na7a ekidi wonta guura Dawitara gahetanaw gade bis.
1Samuel20:36 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:37 Na7ay Yoonataana donge tooray wodhida bessaa gakiya wode Yoonataani na7aa xeegidi
1Samuel20:38 Yoonataani na7aa
1Samuel20:39 Yoonatanapenne Dawitape attishin
1Samuel20:40 Yoonataani ba ola miishiya na7aas immidi
1Samuel20:41 Na7ay bidaape guye
1Samuel20:42 Yoonataani
1Samuel21:1 Dawiti kahiniya Abimelekeko Nooba bis. Abimelekey Dawitara gahetanaw kokorishe yidi
1Samuel21:2 Dawiti kahiniya Abimeleke
1Samuel21:3 Ha77i ne kushen aybi de7ii? Ichashu uythi woyko new de7iyaba taw imma” yaagis.
1Samuel21:4 Kahiney zaaridi
1Samuel21:5 Dawiti zaaridi
1Samuel21:6 Hessa gisho
1Samuel21:7 Saa7ola aylletape issoy
1Samuel21:8 Dawiti Abimelekeko
1Samuel21:9 Abimelekey
1Samuel21:10 He gallas Dawiti Saa7olape baqatidi
1Samuel21:11 Shin Ankusa moorinnati
1Samuel21:12 Dawiti enta haasaya ba wozanan si7idi
1Samuel21:13 Hessa gisho
1Samuel21:14 Ankusi ba oosanchotako
1Samuel21:15 Ha addey ta sinthan gooyanaada hinte ehiday
1Samuel22:1 Dawiti Gaatepe baqatidi
1Samuel22:2 Metootiday
1Samuel22:3 Dawiti yaape dendidi Moo7aben de7iya Mixipha bidi Moo7abe kawa
1Samuel22:4 Dawiti enta Moo7abe kawa matan wothis; Dawiti qosetida bessan de7iya wode ubban enti kawa matan de7idosona.
1Samuel22:5 Hessafe guye
1Samuel22:6 Dawitinne iya asay bentidaysa Saa7oli si7is. Saa7oli Gib7a matan de7iya dere bolla
1Samuel22:7 Saa7oli entako
1Samuel22:8 Hinte ubbay ta bolla maqetideta; ta na7ay Isseye na7aara caaqidaba taw oonika odibeenna. Hintefe issi asika taw qadhetenna; hachi hanidaysada ta na7ay ta aylliyan tana wodhisanaw denthethidaysa taw oonika odibeenna” yaagis.
1Samuel22:9 Saa7ola moorinnatara eqida Edoome addey Doyqi
1Samuel22:10 Dawiti ay oothaneko Abimelekey Godaa oychis; yaatidi Dawitas shinqenne Filisxeeme addiya Gooliyada mashshaa iyaw immis” yaagidi Saa7olas odis.
1Samuel22:11 Hessafe guye
1Samuel22:12 Saa7oli
1Samuel22:13 Saa7oli
1Samuel22:14 Abimelekey
1Samuel22:15 Taani iya gisho Xoossaa oychishin
1Samuel22:16 Kawoy
1Samuel22:17 Saa7oli ba matan eqidi naageysata
1Samuel22:18 Kawoy Doyqa
1Samuel22:19 Qassi Doyqi kahineta katamaa
1Samuel22:20 Shin Akxuuba na7aa Abimeleke naytape Abyataara geetetiya issi na7ay kessi ekidi
1Samuel22:21 I
1Samuel22:22 Dawiti Abyataara
1Samuel22:23 Hiza neeni taara de7a; yayyofa. Nena wodhanaw koyiya uray tana wodhanaw koyees; neeni ta matan saro daana” yaagis.
1Samuel23:1 Filisxeemeti Qa7ila olidi
1Samuel23:2 Dawiti
1Samuel23:3 Shin Dawita kaalleysati
1Samuel23:4 Dawiti zaaridi Godaa oychin Goday
1Samuel23:5 Dawitinne iya kaalleysati Qa7ila bidi
1Samuel23:6 Abimeleke na7ay Abyataari Dawitako Qa7ila baqatida wode efuude ma7uwa ekidi bis.
1Samuel23:7 Dawiti Qa7ila bidaysa Saa7oli si7idi
1Samuel23:8 Qa7ila bidi
1Samuel23:9 Saa7oli ba bolla iitaba oothanaw maqidaysa Dawiti eridi kahiniya Abyataarako
1Samuel23:10 Dawiti
1Samuel23:11 Qa7ila asay tana Saa7olas aathidi immanesha? Taani ne aylley si7idaysada Saa7oli tumaka haa yaaneshsha? Abeeti Godaw
1Samuel23:12 Dawiti
1Samuel23:13 Dawitinne usupun xeetu gidiya addeti Qa7ilape keyidi
1Samuel23:14 Dawiti bazzo miixataninne Ziifa mela biittan de7iya zumata bolla de7is. Saa7oli iya demmanaw ubba gallas koyees
1Samuel23:15 Dawiti Ziifa mela biittan de7iya Horesan de7ishin
1Samuel23:16 Saa7ola na7aa Yoonataani dendidi
1Samuel23:17 “Yayyofa; ta aawa Saa7oli nena kusheraka bochenna; neeni Isra7eele bolla kawotana; taanika neepe garsara haarana; ta aaway Saa7oli hessa loythidi erees” yaagis.
1Samuel23:18 Enti nam7ay Godaa sinthan issoy issuwara caaqidosona; Dawiti Horesan gam7in Yoonataani ba soo bis.
1Samuel23:19 Ziifa asay Saa7olako Gib7a bidi
1Samuel23:20 Kawaw
1Samuel23:21 Saa7oli
1Samuel23:22 Bidi ane gujidika geeshshite; Dawiti daro toho awu biyakoka ooni iya be7idaako
1Samuel23:23 Dawiti qosetiya bessata ubbaa be7idi
1Samuel23:24 Hessa gisho
1Samuel23:25 Saa7olinne iya asay Dawita koyanaw bidosona. Dawita hessa si7ida wode zaallako wodhidi
1Samuel23:26 Saa7oli zumaape issi bagga miyiyara bees; Dawitinne iya asay hanko bagga miyiyara boosona. Enti Saa7olape baqatanaw eesotoosona; Saa7olinne iya asati
1Samuel23:27 Shin
1Samuel23:28 Saa7oli Dawita koyeysa aggidi
1Samuel23:29 Dawiti he bessaafe keyidi
1Samuel24:1 Saa7oli Filisxeemeta olidi simmidaape guye
1Samuel24:2 Saa7oli Isra7eele giddofe dooretida heedzu mukulu asaa ekidi
1Samuel24:3 Saa7oli ogiya doonan dorsa girbiya matan de7iya gongoluwa giddo gelidi shee7anaw uttis. Dawitinne iya asay gongoluwas guye baggara shiiqidi uttidosona.
1Samuel24:4 Dawita asay
1Samuel24:5 Dawiti Saa7ola ma7uwa macaraa qanxida gisho iya wozanay qiirotis.
1Samuel24:6 Dawiti ba asaako
1Samuel24:7 Dawiti haysada gidi
1Samuel24:8 Saa7oli bidaape guye
1Samuel24:9 Dawiti Saa7olako
1Samuel24:10 Hachi ha gongoluwan Goday nena taw aathidi immidaysa neeni ne ayfen be7adasa. Taani nena wodhana mela guutha asati tana denthethidosona. Shin
1Samuel24:11 Ta aawaw
1Samuel24:12 Nebaanne tabaa Goday pirdo; Goday neeni tana qohidaysa haluwa kesso
1Samuel24:13 “Iita ootheysatape iiti keyees” giya beni leemisoy de7ees. Hessa gisho
1Samuel24:14 “Isra7eele kawoy oodde bolla dendii? Oona oykanaw kaallii? Hayqida kana woyko kastolle goodiyee?
1Samuel24:15 Goday nu bolla daannato; nebaanne tabaa I pirdo; ta gisho I mooteto; ne kushepe tana I asho” yaagis.
1Samuel24:16 Dawiti haasaya wursida wode Saa7oli Dawitako
1Samuel24:17 “Neeni taape aadhida xillo; taani new iitabaa oothin
1Samuel24:18 Goday tana hachi new aathidi immin neeni tana wodhaboonna gisho neeni taw lo77oba oothada bessadasa.
1Samuel24:19 Asi ba morke demmidi qohonna yeddiyee? Neeni taw hachi oothida keehatetha gisho
1Samuel24:20 Neeni Isra7eele kawo gidanaysanne Isra7eele kawotethay ne maata garsan eqanaysa ta erayis.
1Samuel24:21 Hiza ta kochaa dhaysona melanne ta sunthaa ta aawa soo asaa giddofe quchonna mela Godaa sunthan taw caaqa” yaagis.
1Samuel24:22 Dawiti Saa7olas caaqis. Hessafe guye
1Samuel25:1 Sameeli hayqin
1Samuel25:2 Ma7oona mela biittan
1Samuel25:3 He addiya sunthay Naabala
1Samuel25:4 Dawiti mela biittan de7ishe
1Samuel25:5 Dawiti tammu panthata haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Naabalako Qarmeloosa bidi
1Samuel25:6 ‘Ne barey aduqo! Saroy newunne ne soo asaas gido; new de7iya ubbaas saroy gido!
1Samuel25:7 Ne dorsa ikise meedeysa taani si7as; ne dorsaa heemmeysati nuura de7ida wode nuuni enta genibooko; enti Qarmeloosan de7ida wode ubban entabaape aybika pacibeenna.
1Samuel25:8 Hessa neeni ne aylleta oychiko enti new odana. Nuuni hachi gibira gallas neeko yida gisho
1Samuel25:9 Dawita asati Naabalako gakidi
1Samuel25:10 Naabali
1Samuel25:11 Ta kathaa
1Samuel25:12 Dawita asati simmi guye bidi Naabali gidaba ubbaa Dawitas odidosona.
1Samuel25:13 Dawiti
1Samuel25:14 Naabala aylletape issoy Naabala mache Abigiyako haysada yaagis; “Dawiti mela biittan de7ishe nu godaa saro gaanaw ase kiittis
1Samuel25:15 Gidoshin
1Samuel25:16 Nuuni nu dorsa wudiya enta matan heemmiya wode
1Samuel25:17 Nu godaa bollanne iya soo asaa bolla iitabay gakana haniya gisho
1Samuel25:18 Abigiya eeson nam7u xeetu uythu
1Samuel25:19 Ba aylletako
1Samuel25:20 Ba hariya toggada zumaa loobuwa duge wodhiya wode Dawitinne iya asay yishe iira gahetidosona.
1Samuel25:21 Dawiti
1Samuel25:22 Wonto wonta gakanaw
1Samuel25:23 Abigiya Dawita be7ida wode hariyape eesota wodhada
1Samuel25:24 Iya tohuwa bolla kundada
1Samuel25:25 Ha wozani bayna addey
1Samuel25:26 De7o Goday eriya mela
1Samuel25:27 Ha imotay taani ne aylliya new
1Samuel25:28 Ta godaw
1Samuel25:29 Ay asika nena wodhanaw koyiko
1Samuel25:30 Goday
1Samuel25:31 ta goday azzaniya gaasoy woyko qiiroyabay baawa. Gaasoy bayna suuthu gussidabay woyko halo keydabay bayna gisho ne wozanay dagammenna. Goday new lo77oba oothida wode tana ne aylliw dogopa” yaagasu.
1Samuel25:32 Dawiti Abigiyako
1Samuel25:33 Taani asa suuthu gussonnaadanne halo keyonnaada ne lo77o qofay tana teqida gisho neeni anjeta.
1Samuel25:34 Ta nena qohonnaada teqida de7o Goday
1Samuel25:35 Abigiya iyaw ehida imota I kushepe Dawiti ekidi
1Samuel25:36 Abigiya simmada Naabalako yaa wode
1Samuel25:37 Wonta Naabala mathoy simmidaape guye
1Samuel25:38 Tammu gallasape guye Goday Naabala shocin
1Samuel25:39 Naabali hayqidaysa Dawiti si7ida wode
1Samuel25:40 Dawita aylleti Qarmeloosan de7iya Abigiyako bidi
1Samuel25:41 Abigiya gufanna ziggada
1Samuel25:42 Abigiya ellesa dendada ba hariya toggasu
1Samuel25:43 Dawiti kase Izira7eele maccasiw Aknahoomo ekidi de7ees; enti nam7ay iya macheta.
1Samuel25:44 Saa7oli Dawita machiw
1Samuel26:1 Ziifa asay Saa7olako Gib7a bidi
1Samuel26:2 Saa7oli
1Samuel26:3 Saa7oli Yasmoona sinthan de7iya Hakila zumaa bolla de7iya ogiya matan dunkaanis; shin Dawiti he mela biittan uttis. Saa7oli iya kaallidi yidaysa Dawiti erida wode
1Samuel26:4 wochiya asi yeddidi
1Samuel26:5 Dawiti dendidi
1Samuel26:6 Dawiti Hite addiya Abimelekenne Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ishaa Abisaya
1Samuel26:7 Hessa gisho
1Samuel26:8 Abisayi
1Samuel26:9 Shin Dawiti Abisayako
1Samuel26:10 De7o Goday eriya mela
1Samuel26:11 Goday tiyida kawa bolla ta kushiya denthonaada tana Goday teqo. Ane iya huuphe son de7iya tooranne haatha oykiya miishiya ekidi boos” yaagis.
1Samuel26:12 Dawiti Saa7ola huuphe son de7iya tooranne haathe oykiya miishiya ekin
1Samuel26:13 Dawiti hefinthi pinnidi
1Samuel26:14 Dawiti Saa7ola olanchotanne Neera na7aa Abeneera xeegidi
1Samuel26:15 Dawiti
1Samuel26:16 Ne oothidabay lo77o gidenna. De7o Goday eriya mela
1Samuel26:17 Dawita qaala gideysa Saa7oli eridi
1Samuel26:18 Ta godaw
1Samuel26:19 Ta godaw
1Samuel26:20 Ha77i Godaa sinthafe haakidi
1Samuel26:21 Saa7oli
1Samuel26:22 Dawiti zaaridi
1Samuel26:23 Issi issi asas iya xillotethaa melanne iya ammanetetha mela Goday gate qanxees. Hachi Goday nena ta kushen aathidi immis; shin Goday tiyida kawa bolla taani ta kushiya wothanaw koyabike.
1Samuel26:24 Hachi ne shempuwa ta ashshidaysada Goday tana meto ubbaafe ashshidi boncho” yaagis.
1Samuel26:25 Saa7oli
1Samuel27:1 Dawiti ba wozanan
1Samuel27:2 Hessa gisho
1Samuel27:3 Dawitinne iya asay Ankusara Gaaten uttidosona. Asa ubbay ba soo asa asa ekidi bis; Dawitika ba macheta
1Samuel27:4 Dawiti Gaate baqatis geysa si7idi
1Samuel27:5 Dawiti kawa Ankusako
1Samuel27:6 He gallas Ankusi Xiqilaaga katamaa Dawitas immis; hachi gakanaw Xiqilaaga katamay Yihuda kawotaba gididi attis.
1Samuel27:7 Dawiti Filisxeeme biittan issi laythinne oyddu ageena de7is.
1Samuel27:8 Dawitinne iya asati pude keyidi
1Samuel27:9 Dawiti he biitta oliya wode ubban he biittan de7iya macca gidin
1Samuel27:10 Ankusi
1Samuel27:11 Entafe issi asi Gaate bidi
1Samuel27:12 Ankusi Dawitan ammanetidi
1Samuel28:1 He wode Filisxeeme asati Isra7eeleta olanaw banta olanchota shiishidosona. Ankusi Dawitako
1Samuel28:2 Dawiti
1Samuel28:3 Haysafe kase Sameeli hayqin
1Samuel28:4 Filisxeeme olanchoti shiiqidi
1Samuel28:5 Saa7oli Filisxeeme olanchota be7idi yayyis; iya wozanay daro dagammis.
1Samuel28:6 Hessa gisho
1Samuel28:7 Hessafe guye
1Samuel28:8 Yaagin Saa7oli bana erisonna mela hara ma7o ma7idi
1Samuel28:9 Yaagin maccasiya
1Samuel28:10 Yaagin Saa7oli maccasiw
1Samuel28:11 Maccasiya
1Samuel28:12 Maccasiya Sameela be7ada
1Samuel28:13 Kawoy
1Samuel28:14 Saa7oli maccasiw
1Samuel28:15 Sameeli Saa7olako
1Samuel28:16 Sameeli
1Samuel28:17 Goday ta baggara kaseti odidaba oothis; Goday kawotethaa neepe ekidi
1Samuel28:18 Neeni Godaas kiitetaboonna gishonne iya eexiya iya sheniya Amaaleqa bolla polaboona gisho Goday hachi haysa ne bolla ehis.
1Samuel28:19 Nenanne Isra7eele
1Samuel28:20 Saa7oli Sameela odaa si7idi yayyida gisho daaburidi
1Samuel28:21 He maccasiya Saa7olako yada
1Samuel28:22 Ha77i taani ne aylliya giyaba hayyana si7a; neeni mada gashtada ne ogiya baana mela taani new guutha kathi giigisas” yaagasu.
1Samuel28:23 Saa7oli
1Samuel28:24 He maccasiya ba son de7iya anqara maraa shukasu; dhiille eka munuqada
1Samuel28:25 Yaatada kathaa Saa7olasinne iya asatas aathin
1Samuel29:1 Filisxeemeti banta olanchota ubbaa Afeeqan shiishidosona. Isra7eeleti Izira7eelen de7iya pulto haatha matan dunkaanidosona.
1Samuel29:2 Filisxeeme halaqati banta olanchota xeetaninne mukulu cugan salpisidosona; Dawitinne iya asay Ankusara issife gididi guye baggara salpidosona.
1Samuel29:3 Filisxeeme halaqati enta be7idi
1Samuel29:4 Shin Filisxeeme halaqati Ankusa bolla hanqetidi
1Samuel29:5 Haysafe kase maccasay
1Samuel29:6 Hessa gisho
1Samuel29:7 Neeni guye simmada saro ba; Filisxeeme halaqata ufaysonnaba aykoka oothofa” yaagis.
1Samuel29:8 Dawiti
1Samuel29:9 Ankusi
1Samuel29:10 Nenne neera yida ne godaa aylletara wonto guura dendidi biite” yaagis.
1Samuel29:11 Hessa gisho
1Samuel30:1 Dawitinne iya asati heedzantho gallas Xiqilaaga gakidosona. Amaaleqati Negebanne Xiqilaaga olidi
1Samuel30:2 Xiqilaagan de7iya maccasaanne na7ape cima gakanaw de7iya ubbaa di77idosona; entafe issi asika wodhonna enta ubbaa di77idi efidosona.
1Samuel30:3 Dawitinne iya asati Xiqilaaga gakiya wode katamay taman xuugetidaysanne enta macheti
1Samuel30:4 Dawitinne iyara de7iya asay banta wolqay ixana gakanaw waassidi yeekidosona.
1Samuel30:5 Dawita macheti Izira7eele Aknahoomanne kase Naabala machiya Qarmeloosa Abigiya nam7ayka di7etidosona.
1Samuel30:6 Iya asay banta adde naytinne macca nayti di7etida gisho yilotidi Dawita shuchan caddanaw odetin
1Samuel30:7 Dawiti Abimeleke na7aa kahiniya Abyataarako
1Samuel30:8 Dawiti
1Samuel30:9 Dawitinne iyara de7iya usupun xeetu asati dendidi Boosora shaafa gakiya wode entafe guutha asati yan attidosona.
1Samuel30:10 Nam7u xeetu asay shaafa pinnanaw daro daaburidosona. Shin Dawitinne oyddu xeetu asay kaallidosona.
1Samuel30:11 Enti issi Gibxe asi denban demmidi
1Samuel30:12 Balase ongochonne nam7u woyne nuka iyaw immin midi gashtisis. I heedzu gallasinne heedzu qamma kathi moonna haathe uyonna gam7is.
1Samuel30:13 Dawiti
1Samuel30:14 Nuuni Yihuda zawa
1Samuel30:15 Dawiti
1Samuel30:16 Dawita kaalethidi entako gathis. Enti Filisxeemepenne Yihudape daro di7o di77ida gisho ufaytidi mishenne uyishe laaletidi uttidosona.
1Samuel30:17 He gallas omarsafe doomidi wontetha gallas omarsi gakanaw Dawiti enta shocis. Gimale toggidi baqatida oyddu xeetu panthatape attishin
1Samuel30:18 Amaaleqa asati efida ubbaa
1Samuel30:19 Asati di77idi efidabaape issibayka pacibeenna; na7i woyko cimi
1Samuel30:20 Dawiti dorse
1Samuel30:21 Dawiti daaburidi Boosora shaafa achan attida nam7u xeetu asaako yis. Enti Dawitanne iyara de7iya asaa mokanaw keyidosona. Dawiti ba asaara shiiqidi enta sarothis.
1Samuel30:22 Shin Dawitara bida asata giddofe pathonna iita asati
1Samuel30:23 Dawiti zaaridi
1Samuel30:24 Hinte giyaba oonika ekenna. Oletanaw bidaysatanne nubaa naagishe haysan gam7idaysata gishoy issino; ubbay gina shaaketana” yaagis.
1Samuel30:25 He gallasape doomidi hachi gakanaw Isra7eele biittan hessi higgenne woga gidis.
1Samuel30:26 Dawiti Xiqilaaga gakida wode ba lagge gidida Yihuda cimatako
1Samuel30:27 I hessa Beetelen
1Samuel30:28 Aro7eeran
1Samuel30:29 Rakaalan
1Samuel30:30 Hormana
1Samuel30:31 Kebroonan de7eysatas yeddis. Inne iya asati yuuyida bessa ubban de7iya asaas yeddis.
1Samuel31:1 Filisxeemeti Isra7eeletara oletidosona; Isra7eeleti Filisxeemeta sinthafe baqatidosona; daro Isra7eeleti Gilbo7a deriya bolla hayqidosona.
1Samuel31:2 Filisxeemeti Saa7olanne iya adde nayta yedethidi
1Samuel31:3 Olay teqidi Saa7ola un7ethis; dongen dukeysati iya caddidi daro madunxisidosona.
1Samuel31:4 Saa7oli ba ola miishiya tookeysako
1Samuel31:5 Iya ola miishiya tookeysi Saa7oli hayqidaysa be7idi
1Samuel31:6 Haysada hanidi
1Samuel31:7 Zangaaraninne Yordaanose shaafape hefintha baggara de7iya Isra7eele asay
1Samuel31:8 Wontetha gallas Filisxeemeti aha bollafe ola misheta qaaridi ekanaw yidi
1Samuel31:9 Enti Saa7ola qoodhiya qanxidi iya ola miishiya qaari ekidosona. Yaatidi banta eeqa keethaninne banta asaa giddon xoonuwa awaajana mela Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas kiita yeddidosona.
1Samuel31:10 Saa7ola ola miishiya Astaroote geetetiya enta macca xoosse keethan wothidosona. Saa7ola aha Beet-Saana katama gimbiya bolla mismaaren dhishidi kaqidosona.
1Samuel31:11 Filisxeemeti Saa7ola oothidaba Galadan de7iya Yaabesa asay si7ida wode
1Samuel31:12 mino asati qamma dendi bidi
1Samuel31:13 Hessafe guye
2Samuel1:1 Saa7oli hayqidaape guye
2Samuel1:2 Heedzantho gallas issi addey ba ma7uwa daakidi
2Samuel1:3 Dawiti
2Samuel1:4 Dawiti
2Samuel1:5 Dawiti iyaw odida panthaa
2Samuel1:6 Panthay
2Samuel1:7 He wode Saa7oli guye simmidi tana demmidi xeegis. Taani
2Samuel1:8 Saa7oli
2Samuel1:9 Hessafe guye
2Samuel1:10 I kundidaape guye hayqope attonnaysa erida gisho taani iya bolla keya eqada iya wodhas. Iya huuphen de7iya kallachanne iya qesen de7iya ambaariya ekada neeko ta godaako yas” yaagis.
2Samuel1:11 Dawitinne Dawita asay kayotidi
2Samuel1:12 Enti Saa7oli
2Samuel1:13 Dawiti hessa entaw ehida panthaa
2Samuel1:14 Dawiti
2Samuel1:15 Dawiti ba asatape issuwa xeegidi
2Samuel1:16 Dawiti Amaaleqa addiyako
2Samuel1:17 Dawiti Saa7olasinne iya na7aa Yoonatanas haysada yaagidi zeleelis.
2Samuel1:18 Yihuda asay
2Samuel1:19 “Neno Isra7eele
2Samuel1:20 Filisxeeme macca nayti hessa si7idi ufaytonna mela
2Samuel1:21 Hinteno Gilbo7a dereto
2Samuel1:22 Goyretidaysata suuthaafe
2Samuel1:23 Saa7olinne Yoonataani doseteyisata; hayqoninne paxan shaaketibookona. Enti arganthafe aadhidi eeso; gaammofe aadhidi mino.
2Samuel1:24 Hinteno Isra7eele maccasaw
2Samuel1:25 Wolqaamati olan waanidi kundidona? Yoonataani dhoqa bessan hayqis.
2Samuel1:26 Ta ishaa Yoonataana
2Samuel1:27 Wolqaamati waanidi kundidona? Ola miisheyka waanidi dhayidee?” yaagidi Dawiti zeleelis.
2Samuel2:1 Hessafe guye
2Samuel2:2 Dawiti ba nam7u macheta
2Samuel2:3 Dawiti baara de7iya asatanne enta soo asa ubbaa ehin
2Samuel2:4 Yihuda asati Kebroona katamaa yidi
2Samuel2:5 I ase kiittidi
2Samuel2:6 Goday siiquwanne tumatethaa hintew qonciso; taanika ha keehatetha gisho hintew lo77o kushe zaarana.
2Samuel2:7 Hiza minnite; xaalite; hinte goday Saa7oli hayqis. Yihuda asay tana tiyidi
2Samuel2:8 Saa7ola tora moconay Neera na7ay Abeneeri Saa7ola na7aa Iyabuste ekidi
2Samuel2:9 Iya Galadan
2Samuel2:10 Saa7ola na7ay
2Samuel2:11 Dawiti Kebroonan Yihuda bolla laapun laythinne bagga kawotis.
2Samuel2:12 Neera na7ay Abeneerinne Saa7ola na7ay Iyabuste asay Mahinaymape Gaba7oona bidosona.
2Samuel2:13 Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabinne Dawita asay Gaba7oona olla haatha matan entara gahetidosona. Issi cugay olla haathaafe hefinthan uttin
2Samuel2:14 Abeneeri Iyo7aabako
2Samuel2:15 Hessa gisho
2Samuel2:16 Issoy issoy ba morkiya huuphiya oykidi
2Samuel2:17 He gallas wolqaama ola oletidi
2Samuel2:18 Xaruya nayti heedzay Iyo7aabi
2Samuel2:19 Asaheeli Abeneera ushachi woyko haddirsi goonna yedethis.
2Samuel2:20 Abeneeri guye simmidi
2Samuel2:21 Abeneeri
2Samuel2:22 Qassika Abeneeri
2Samuel2:23 Shin Asaheeli iya yedetheysa aggonna ixis. Hessa gisho
2Samuel2:24 Shin Iyo7aabinne Abisi Abeneera gooddidosona; awi wulliya wode Gaba7oona mela biittako efiya ogiyan Gaadape sintha baggara de7iya Ama zumako gakidosona.
2Samuel2:25 Biniyaame asay Abeneerako shiiqidosona; issi cuga medhidi issi zumaa bolla eqidosona.
2Samuel2:26 Abeneeri Iyo7aaba xeegidi
2Samuel2:27 Iyo7aabi
2Samuel2:28 Iyo7aabi moyze punnin asa ubbay essis. Isra7eeleta zaari goodibookona woyko olibookona.
2Samuel2:29 Abeneerinne iya asay he qamma kumethi hemetidi Araba gadha gakidosona. Yordaanose shaafa pinnidi
2Samuel2:30 Iyo7aabi Abeneera gooddeysa aggidi
2Samuel2:31 Shin Dawita asay Abeneerara de7iya Biniyaame kochatape heedzu xeetanne usupun tammu asi wodhidosona.
2Samuel2:32 Asaheela aha ekidi
2Samuel3:1 Saa7ola soo asaynne Dawita asay daro wode oletidosona; Dawiti olan minni minni biya wode Saa7ola asay daaburi daaburi bis.
2Samuel3:2 Kebroonan Dawitas nayti yeletidosona; Izira7eele Aknahooma yelida bayra na7ay Amnoona;
2Samuel3:3 Qarmeloosa Abigiya kase Naabala machiya yelida Kil7aabi nam7antho na7a. Gashura kawa Talmaya na7iya Ma7ika yelida Abeseloomey heedzantho na7a.
2Samuel3:4 Oyddanthoy Haagita na7aa Adoona; ichashanthoy Abixaala na7aa Safaaxa.
2Samuel3:5 Usupunthoy Dawita mache Egili na7aa Yitra7aama; ha nayti ubbay Kebroonan yeletidosona.
2Samuel3:6 Saa7ola soo asaaranne Dawita soo asaara oletiya wode Abeneeri Saa7ola asaa bolla minni minni bis.
2Samuel3:7 Saa7olas Iyoheela na7a gidida Irxifo geetetiya issi laggethiya de7awusu; Iyabustey Abeneerako
2Samuel3:8 Abeneeri iya odan daro yilotidi
2Samuel3:9 Xoossay Dawitas oothana gidi caaqida qaala taani polonna ixiko
2Samuel3:10 Saa7ola kochaafe kawotethaa wosisidi
2Samuel3:11 Iyabustey Abeneeras yayyida gisho hara qaala pogibeenna.
2Samuel3:12 Abeneeri Dawitako
2Samuel3:13 Dawiti
2Samuel3:14 Hessafe guye
2Samuel3:15 Iyabustey ase kiittidi I azina Lawusha na7a Palxi7eelape kessi ekis.
2Samuel3:16 I azinay Biraqima katama gakanaw yeekishe I geedo kaallis. Abeneeri iyako
2Samuel3:17 Abeneeri Isra7eele cimatako bidi
2Samuel3:18 Ha77i polite! Goday
2Samuel3:19 Abeneeri Biniyaame kochatas hessa odis. Isra7eele asaynne Biniyaame asa ubbay oothanaw koyida ubbaa Dawitas odanaw Abeneeri Kebroona bis.
2Samuel3:20 Abeneeri baara laatamu asi ekidi
2Samuel3:21 Abeneeri Dawitako
2Samuel3:22 He wode Dawita asaynne Iyo7aabi olape darobaa di77idi simmidosona. Shin Dawiti iya saro ba gidi yeddida gisho
2Samuel3:23 Iyo7aabinne iyara de7iya olanchoti gakiya wode asay
2Samuel3:24 Hessa gisho
2Samuel3:25 Neera na7ay Abeneeri nena cimmanaw
2Samuel3:26 Iyo7aabi Dawita sinthafe keyidi
2Samuel3:27 Abeneeri Kebroona simmidi yida wode Iyo7aabi iyara dumma odetanaw koyida daanisidi dirsa pengiyako de7iya kifiliyanne iya efis. Ba ishaa Asaheela suutha zaaranaw Abeneera ulon caddin Abeneeri he bessan hayqis.
2Samuel3:28 Dawiti guyepe hessa si7ida wode
2Samuel3:29 Iya suuthay Iyo7aabanne iya aawa soo asa acho; madunthi de7iya asi woyko goga hargey de7iya asi woyko wobbe asi woyko mashshan hayqiya asi woyko koshatiya asi Iyo7aaba kochan dhayopo” yaagis.
2Samuel3:30 Gaba7oonan keyida olan banta ishaa Asaheela Abeneeri wodhida gisho
2Samuel3:31 Dawiti Iyo7aabanne iyara de7iya asaa
2Samuel3:32 Abeneeri Kebroonan moogetis; kawoy ba qaala dhoqu oothidi duufon yeekis; asa ubbay yeekidosona.
2Samuel3:33 Kawoy Abeneeras
2Samuel3:34 Ne kushey qashetibeenna; Ne tohoy santhalaatan oyketibeenna. Asi iita asa kushen hayqeysada hayqis” yaagidi zeleelis. Asa ubbay Abeneeras zaaridi yeekidosona.
2Samuel3:35 He gallas Dawiti kathi maana mela asay iya shoobbidosona. Shin Dawiti
2Samuel3:36 Kawoy oothidaba asa ubbay be7idi ufaytidosona; tumaka kawoy oothidaba ubbay asaa ufaysis.
2Samuel3:37 Hessa gisho
2Samuel3:38 Kawoy ba aylletako
2Samuel3:39 Taani Xoossay tiyida kawo gidikoka
2Samuel4:1 Saa7ola na7ay Iyabustey Abeneeri Kebroonan hayqidaysa si7ida wode iya wozanay til7is; Isra7eele asa ubbayka dagammis.
2Samuel4:2 Saa7ola na7aa Iyabustes ola kaalethiya nam7u halaqati de7oosona; issuwa sunthay Ba7ana; hankoy qassi Rakaaba. Enti Biniyaame koche gidida Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayta. Ba7aarotey Biniyaame baggada taybetees.
2Samuel4:3 Ba7aarotan de7ida koyro asati Gitayma biitta baqatidi
2Samuel4:4 Saa7ola na7aa Yoonatanas nam7u tohoy silida na7i de7ees; Saa7olanne Yoonataana hayquwa worey Izra7eelepe si7etiya wode I ichashu laytha na7a. He na7aa dichiyara iya ekada baqatishin na7ay kundin iya tohoy silis; he na7aa sunthay Mempiboste.
2Samuel4:5 Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayti Rekaabinne Ba7aani Iyabuste soo bidi seeta gallas gakidosona. Enti gakiya wode I shempanaw alga bolla zin7is.
2Samuel4:6 Enti giste koyiya asada hanidi soo gelidi
2Samuel4:7 Iyabustey qol7an arsan zin7idaysa demmidi
2Samuel4:8 Iyabuste huuphiya Kebroonan de7iya Dawitas ehidosona. Kawa
2Samuel4:9 Shin Ba7aarote addiya Irmoona nayta Rekaabanne iya ishaa Ba7ana Dawiti haysada yaagis; “Meto ubbaafe tana ashshida de7o Goday eriya mela.
2Samuel4:10 Taw mishiraacho odiya asada
2Samuel4:11 Ba son ba arsan zin7ida xillo addiya wodhida iita asatas iya haluwa keyeysi ay mela iitandesha! Iya suuthaa taani hinte kushepe achana; hintena taani biitta bollafe dhaysana!” yaagis.
2Samuel4:12 Rekaabanne Ba7ana wodhana mela Dawiti ba olanchota kiittin
2Samuel5:1 Isra7eele zare ubbay Dawitako Kebroona yidi
2Samuel5:2 Kase Saa7oli nuus kawo gididi de7iya wodeka Isra7eele asaa olas kaalethiday nena. Goday nena
2Samuel5:3 Isra7eele cimati ubbay kawa Dawitako Kebroona yidosona; I entara Kebroonan Godaa sinthan caaqis; Isra7eele bolla kawotana mela Dawita tiyidosona.
2Samuel5:4 Dawiti kawotiya wode iyaw hastamu laythi; I oytamu laythi kawotis.
2Samuel5:5 Kebroonan Yihuda bolla laapun laythinne usupun ageena kawotis; Yerusalaamen Isra7eele bollanne Yihuda bolla hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
2Samuel5:6 Yerusalaamen de7iya Yaabuse asaa olanaw Dawitinne iya asay bidosona. Yaabuse asay
2Samuel5:7 Gidoshin
2Samuel5:8 He gallas Dawiti
2Samuel5:9 Dawiti he miixaa oykidi
2Samuel5:10 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Xoossay iyara de7iya gisho Dawiti minni minni bis.
2Samuel5:11 Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitas kawo gadho keexana mela ziga mithi
2Samuel5:12 Goday Isra7eele bolla iya kawo oothidi minthidaysanne ba asaa Isra7eele gisho iya kawotethaa dhoqu oothidi bonchidaysa Dawiti eris.
2Samuel5:13 Dawiti Kebroonape Yerusalaame yidaape guye
2Samuel5:14 Yerusalaamen iyaw yeletida adde nayta sunthay Samu7a
2Samuel5:15 Yibhaara
2Samuel5:16 Elishama7a
2Samuel5:17 Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawo gididi tiyetidaysa Filisxeemeti si7ida wode enti ubbay Dawita koyanaw keyidosona; shin Dawiti hessa si7idi miixan bidi gelis.
2Samuel5:18 Filisxeemeti bidi
2Samuel5:19 Hessa gisho
2Samuel5:20 Dawiti Ba7al-Parasime geetetiya bessaa bidi
2Samuel5:21 Filisxeemeti banta eeqata he bessan yeggidi bin
2Samuel5:22 Filisxeemeti guye bidi
2Samuel5:23 Dawiti Godaa nam7antho oychin
2Samuel5:24 Wola mithaa xeeran salpe qaala neeni si7iya wode Filisxeeme olanchota shocanaw Goday neepe sinthe aadhidaysa erada ellesa” yaagis.
2Samuel5:25 Dawiti Goday kiittidaysada oothis; Geebape Gezera gakanaw Filisxeeme olanchota wodhis.
2Samuel6:1 Isra7eele giddofe dooretida hastamu mukulu asata Dawiti zaaridi shiishis.
2Samuel6:2 Dawitinne iya asa ubbay Yihuda Baala katamaape dendidi
2Samuel6:3 Enti Xoossa Taabotiya ooratha gaaren wothidi
2Samuel6:4 Dere huuphen de7iya Amnadaabe soope Xoossa Taabotiya ehiya wode Ahiyoy Taabotiyape sinthara hemetees.
2Samuel6:5 Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay diithan
2Samuel6:6 Naakoni katha bukiya wudumma gakiya wode boorati dhubetin
2Samuel6:7 Oozi Taabotiya bochida gisho Godaa hanqoy iya bolla eexis. Xoossay iya shocin he bessan Xoossaa Taabotiya matan hayqis.
2Samuel6:8 Godaa hanqoy Ooza shocida gisho Dawiti azzanis. He bessay hachi gakanaw Oozi shocetida bessaa geetetees.
2Samuel6:9 He gallas Dawiti Godaa yayyida gisho “Godaa Taabotey taako waanidi yaanee?” yaagis.
2Samuel6:10 Hessa gisho
2Samuel6:11 Godaa Taabotey Abidaara son heedzu ageena gam7is; Goday Abidaaranne iya soo asaa ubbaa anjis.
2Samuel6:12 Xoossa Taabotiya gisho Goday Abidaara soo asaanne iyaw de7iya ubbaa anjidaysa kawoy Dawiti si7is. Hessa gisho
2Samuel6:13 Dawiti Godaa Taabotiya tookida asati usupuna tango tangida wode enta essidi
2Samuel6:14 Dawiti liinope oosetida efuude ma7idi
2Samuel6:15 Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay ufaysan ililishenne moyze punnishe Godaa Taabotiya Dawita Katama ehidosona.
2Samuel6:16 Godaa Taabotey Dawita Katama geliya wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola maskootera xeellada
2Samuel6:17 Dawiti Godaa Taabotiya wothanaw tolida dunkaaniya giddon Taabotiya wothin
2Samuel6:18 Dawiti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidaape guye Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa sunthan asaa anjis.
2Samuel6:19 Isra7eele asa ubbaas
2Samuel6:20 Dawiti ba soo asaa anjanaw soo simmida wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola iya mokanaw keyada
2Samuel6:21 Dawiti
2Samuel6:22 Taani haysafe aathada buroo tana toochana; tanatethaa ziqi oothana. Shin neeni gida macca aylleta sinthan ta bonchetana” yaagis.
2Samuel6:23 Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola hayqana gakanaw na7a yelabuuku.
2Samuel7:1 Kawoy ba gadhon wopu gidi uttidaapenne Goday iya yuushuwan de7iya iya morketape shempisidaape guye
2Samuel7:2 nabiya Naatanako
2Samuel7:3 Naatani
2Samuel7:4 Shin he qamma Godaa qaalay Naatanako yidi
2Samuel7:5 “Bada ta aylliya Dawita haysada yaaga; ‘Taani daana keethaa keexanay nena gidaka.
2Samuel7:6 Taani Isra7eeleta Gibxe biittafe kessida wodepe doomada hachi gakanaw keethan de7abike; taani dunkaanen yaanne haanne yuuyashe de7as.
2Samuel7:7 Taani Isra7eele asaara yuuyida bessa ubban ta asa Isra7eele heemmana mela taani shuumida asaa
2Samuel7:8 “Hiza
2Samuel7:9 Neeni bida bessa ubban taani neera gidas; ne morketa ubbaa ne sinthafe dhaysas. Ha77i zaarada taani ha sa7an eretida gita asatada ne sunthaa gitayana.
2Samuel7:10 Taani ta asaa Isra7eeles besse immada
2Samuel7:11 Taani nena ne morketa ubbaafe shempisana. “ ‘Hessa bolla gujidi Goday ba huuphen taani new keethe keexana yaagidi odis.
2Samuel7:12 Ne barey wurin
2Samuel7:13 Ta sunthaas keethe keexanay iya; taani iya araata merinaw mintha essana.
2Samuel7:14 Taani iyaw aawa gidana; ika taw na7a gidana. I baliya wode taani iya asa xam7an
2Samuel7:15 Shin taani ne sinthafe diggida Saa7olape ta keehatethay eketidaysada iyape kumthi eketenna.
2Samuel7:16 Ne kochatinne ne kawotethay ta sinthan merinaw daana; ne araatay merinaw minnidi eqana’ ” yaaga.
2Samuel7:17 Naatani Goday iyaw qoncethan bessida qaala ubbaa Dawitas odis.
2Samuel7:18 Hessafe guye
2Samuel7:19 Abeeti ta Godaw
2Samuel7:20 “Haysafe aadhiyaba taani
2Samuel7:21 Neeni ne qaala gisho
2Samuel7:22 “Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw
2Samuel7:23 Ne ase oothanaw Gibxefe wozida ne asaa Isra7eele daaniya hara kawotethi sa7a bolla baawa. Neeni entaw oothida gitanne malaalsiya oosota gaason ne sunthay biittan eretis. Neeni ne asa sinthafe hara kawotethatanne enta xoossata goodda kessadasa.
2Samuel7:24 Ne asaa Isra7eele merinaw nebaa oothadasa; minthadasa. Abeeti Godaw
2Samuel7:25 “Abeeti ta Godaw
2Samuel7:26 Hessan ne sunthay merinaw gita gidana. Asay nena
2Samuel7:27 “Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw
2Samuel7:28 Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw
2Samuel7:29 Ne sinthan merinaw daana mela ne aylliya kochaa anja. Abeeti Ta Godaa Xoossaw ne gidaysada ne anjiko ne aylliya keethay merinaw anjetana” yaagidi woossis.
2Samuel8:1 Hessafe guye
2Samuel8:2 Dawiti qassi Moo7abeta xoonis. I enta biittan zin7isidi kushen wadhis; entafe nam7u kushiya wodhidi
2Samuel8:3 Rehooba na7ay
2Samuel8:4 Dawiti iya asaape issi mukulunne laapun xeetu para asatanne laatamu mukulu toho asata di77is. Dawiti gaareta goochanaw xeetu parata ashshidi hara parata ubbaas gaadiya gildayis.
2Samuel8:5 Damasqon de7iya Soore olanchoti Suubba kawa Adraazara maaddanaw yida wode Dawiti entafe laatamanne nam7u mukulu asaa wodhis.
2Samuel8:6 Dawiti Soore kawotethan
2Samuel8:7 Adraazara toora moconati oykiya worqa gondalliya Dawiti ekidi Yerusalaame ehis.
2Samuel8:8 Bexahanne Beroota geetetiya Adraazara katamatape kawoy Dawiti daro naase birata ekis.
2Samuel8:9 Adraazara olanchota ubbaa Dawiti xoonidaysa Hamaata kawoy To7i si7is.
2Samuel8:10 Dawiti Adraazara olidi xoonida wode Hadadizeri To7ara oletishe gam7ida gisho iya hashshu gaanawunne sarothanaw ba na7aa Yoraama Dawitako kiittis. Yoraami worqafe
2Samuel8:11 Kawoy Dawiti kase giirisiya kawotethata ubbaafe ekida worqanne bira oothidaysada ha imotataka Godaas dummayis.
2Samuel8:12 I xoonida kawotethati Edoome
2Samuel8:13 Maxine zangaaran tammanne hospun mukulu Edoome asata Dawiti wodhidi simmidaape guye iya sunthay keyis.
2Samuel8:14 Dawiti Edoome biittan olanchota miixa medhis; he biittay Dawitas haaretis. Dawiti bida bessa ubban Goday iyaw xoono immis.
2Samuel8:15 Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawotis; ba asa ubbaa xillotethaninne suure pirdan aysis.

2Samuel8:18 Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi kawa naageysata halaqa gidishin

2Samuel10:9 Iyo7aabi bana oli sintharanne guyera teqidaysa be7idi

2Samuel10:12 Hiza minna! Nu asaa gishonne nu Xoossaa katamata gisho

2Samuel10:15 Soore asati Isra7eele asay enta xoonidaysa erida wode banta olanchota ubbaa shiishidosona.

2Samuel10:18 Shin Soore asati Isra7eeleta sinthafe baqatidosona. Dawiti Soore olanchotape para gaare laagiya laapun xeetu asatanne oytamu mukulu toho olanchota wodhis. Enta toora mocona Sobaakika he bessan shocetidi hayqis.

2Samuel12:1 Goday nabiya Naatana Dawitako kiittin

2Samuel13:1 Issi wode haysada hanis. Dawita na7aa Abeseloomes Timaaro geetetiya issi mala lo77o micha de7awusu. Dawita na7ay Amnooni Timaaro dosis.
2Samuel13:2 Amnooni ba michiw Timaaro dosida gisho iyo qopishe daro gilqis. Iya geela7o gidida gisho iyo aykoka oothanaw danda7etonnaba iyaw daanis.
2Samuel13:3 Shin Amnoonas Dawita ishaa Saama na7aa Iyonadaaba geetetiya laggey de7ees; Iyyonadaabi daro eca asi.
2Samuel13:4 Iyyonadaabi
2Samuel13:5 Iyyonadaabi

2Samuel13:7 Dawiti

2Samuel13:11 Timaara kathaa iyako shiishiya wode iyo oykidi
2Samuel13:12 Iya

2Samuel13:16 Iya
2Samuel13:17 Amnooni ba aylliya xeegidi
2Samuel13:18 Aylley iyo kare kessidi wulaa gordis. Geela7o gidida kawo macca nayti ma7iya alleeqo ma7o ma7asu.

2Samuel13:20 I ishaa Abeseloomey iyo be7ida wode

2Samuel13:35 He wode Iyyonadaabi
2Samuel13:36 I odi wursiya wode kawa adde nayti gelidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi waassidosona. Qassi kawoynne iya moorinnati ubbay yibbata yeeho yeekidosona.

2Samuel14:26 I bana deexiya wode ba huuphiya qanxisees. Ba huuphiya qanxisiya wode ubban mizaanen mazzanees; iya binaanay kawo mizaane liken nam7u kilo giraamepe aadhees.

2Samuel14:32 Abeseloomey
2Samuel14:33 Iyo7aabi kawako bidi
2Samuel15:1 Hessafe guye
2Samuel15:2 Abeseloomey guura dendidi
2Samuel15:3 Abeseloomey
2Samuel15:4 Abeseloomey gujidi
2Samuel15:5 Oonika iyako yidi iyaw ziggiya wode Abeseloomey ba kushiya yeddidi he addiya oykidi yeerees.
2Samuel15:6 Pirdetanaw kawako yaa Isra7eele ubbaas Abeseloomey hessada hanidi Isra7eele asaa wozanaa ekis.
2Samuel15:7 Oyddu laythafe guye
2Samuel15:8 Taani ne aylley Soore biittan Geshura kataman de7ashe
2Samuel15:9 Kawoy
2Samuel15:10 Shin Abeseloomey Isra7eele zare ubbaas qosan kiita yeddidi
2Samuel15:11 Abeseloomey xeegin
2Samuel15:12 Abeseloomey yarsho yarshiya wode Dawita zoriya asaape issuwa Akxoofela Gilo katamaape xeegisis. Kawa bolla dendida maqoy goobis; Abeseloome kaalliya asaa tayboy guji guji bis.
2Samuel15:13 Issi kiitetida asi yidi Dawitako
2Samuel15:14 Dawiti baara Yerusalaamen de7iya ba moorinnatako
2Samuel15:15 Kawa moorinnati
2Samuel15:16 Kawoy keydi tohora bis; iya soo asaynne iya moorinnati ubbay iyara bis; shin ba gadhuwa naagana mela tammu laggethota son ashshis.
2Samuel15:17 Kawoy keyin asa ubbay iyara haahon de7iya issi keetha matan eqidosona.
2Samuel15:18 Iya asati ubbay iyape sinthara salpidi aadhidosona; enta kaallidi kawa naageysati salpidosona. Qassi enta kaallidi Gaate katamaape yida usupun xeetu asati
2Samuel15:19 Kawoy Gaate addiya Itayako
2Samuel15:20 Neeni zine yadasa; taani ta huuphen biya soo eronna de7ashe
2Samuel15:21 Shin Itayi
2Samuel15:22 Dawiti
2Samuel15:23 He asa ubbay biya wode he biitta asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona. Kawoy Qediroona zangaara pinnis; asa ubbay mela biittako simmidi bis.
2Samuel15:24 Kahiney Saadoqi he bessan de7ees; Xoossa caaqo Taabotiya tookiya Leewetinne kahiniya Abyataari yan de7oosona. Asa ubbay katamaape keyidi wurana gakanaw Xoossa Taabotiya sa7an shempisidosona.
2Samuel15:25 Hessafe guye
2Samuel15:26 Shin i
2Samuel15:27 Qassi kawoy kahiniya Saadoqako
2Samuel15:28 Hinte taw kiittana gakanaw taani mela biittan de7iya shaafa pinuwan de7ashshana” yaagis.
2Samuel15:29 Hessa gisho
2Samuel15:30 Shin Dawiti yeekishe Shamaho deriya bolla keyis. I azzanon ba huuphiya guuluntidi mela tohon hemetis; iyara de7iya asati guuluntidi yeekishe pude keyidosona.
2Samuel15:31 Akxoofeli Abeseloomera maqetidaysa Dawiti si7ida wode “Godaw
2Samuel15:32 Dawiti asay Xoossaa goyinniya zumaa huuphe gakida wode
2Samuel15:33 Dawiti
2Samuel15:34 Shin neeni katamaa guye simmada Abeseloomeko
2Samuel15:35 Kahineti Saadoqinne Abyataari neera yan de7oosona gidokona? Neeni kawo gadhon si7iyaba ubbaa entaw oda.
2Samuel15:36 Saadoqa na7aa Akmaasinne Abyataara na7aa Yoonataani yan entara de7oosona; neeni si7iyaba ubbaa enta bolla taw kiitta” yaagis.
2Samuel15:37 Abeseloomey Yerusalaame gelishin
2Samuel16:1 Dawiti deriya huuphiyara hefinthi aadhishin
2Samuel16:2 Kawoy
2Samuel16:3 Kawoy
2Samuel16:4 Kawoy
2Samuel16:5 Kawoy Dawiti Biraqima katama yaa wode Saa7ola dabbo gidida issi addey yaape keyis. Iya sunthay Geera na7aa Saami. I Dawita baaddishe keyis.
2Samuel16:6 Olanchotinne kawa naageysati ushacharanne haddirsara Dawita teqidi de7ishin
2Samuel16:7 Saami Dawita baaddishe
2Samuel16:8 Neeni Saa7ola bessan kawotadasa; neeni gussida Saa7ola soo asaa suutha ubbaa Goday ne bolla zaaris. Goday kawotethaa ne na7aa Abeseloomes immis; neeni suuthu gussida asi gidiya gisho
2Samuel16:9 Hessafe guye
2Samuel16:10 Kawoy
2Samuel16:11 Hessafe guye
2Samuel16:12 Ooni eri
2Samuel16:13 Hessafe guye
2Samuel16:14 Kawoynne iyara de7iya asati banta biya bessa daaburidi gakin kawoy yan shempis.
2Samuel16:15 Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asa ubbay Yerusalaame gelidosona; Akxoofeli entara de7ees.
2Samuel16:16 Dawita laggey Arkaya kochay Kuussi Abeseloomeko yidi
2Samuel16:17 Abeseloomey
2Samuel16:18 Kuussi
2Samuel16:19 Hiza taani ta godaa na7aas oothonna ooddes oothanee? Taani ne aawas oothidaysada ha77i newuka oothana” yaagis.
2Samuel16:20 Abeseloomey Akxoofelako
2Samuel16:21 Akxoofeli
2Samuel16:22 Kawo keethaa pooqiya bolla Abeseloomes dunkaane tokidosona; asa ubbay xeellishin Abeseloomey gelidi ba aawa laggethotara zin7is.
2Samuel16:23 He wode Akxoofeli zoriya zorey issi asi Godaa oychidi ekiya zore mela. Dawitinne Abeseloomey Akxoofela zoriya hessada oothidi ekidosona.
2Samuel17:1 Hessafe guye
2Samuel17:2 I daaburidi wolqa dhayidi de7ishin taani iya bolla wodhana. Taani iya daganthana; yan iyara de7iya asa ubbay baqatiya wode taani kawa xalaala shocana.
2Samuel17:3 Yaatada taani asa ubbaa neeko zaarana. Neeni issi asa xalaala wodhanaw koyaasa; hanko asay saro attana” yaagis.
2Samuel17:4 Akxoofela zorey Abeseloomenne Isra7eele cimata ubbaa ufaysis.
2Samuel17:5 Abeseloomey
2Samuel17:6 Kuussi iyako yida wode Abeseloomey
2Samuel17:7 Kuusi
2Samuel17:8 Ne aawaynne ne aawa asati mino olanchota gideysanne ba marata bonqetida maahe mela yashsheyisata gideysa neeni eraasa. Ne aaway ola meezetida asi; I qamma ba olanchotara aqena.
2Samuel17:9 I hannoode gongolo giddon woyko hara bessan qosetidi uttis. I hinte cugata koyrottidi qohiko
2Samuel17:10 Ne aaway toora qara gideysanne iyara de7iya asay mino gideysa Isra7eele asa ubbay eriya gisho
2Samuel17:11 “Shin taani nena zorey haysa; abba gaxan de7iya shafe mela darida
2Samuel17:12 Nuuni iya demmida bessa awunka shocana; aki sa7an wodhiyada nuuni iya bolla wodhana. Iya gidin woyko iyara de7iya asaa gidin issoyka paxa attenna.
2Samuel17:13 I katamaa gelikoka
2Samuel17:14 Abeseloomeynne Isra7eele asa ubbay
2Samuel17:15 Kuussi kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara
2Samuel17:16 Ha77i Dawitako eeson kiittidi
2Samuel17:17 Yoonataaninne Akimaasi qoncen katamaa gelishin enta asi be7onna mela Aynogeela geetetiya bessan uttidi naagoosona. Issi macca aylliya yada entaw odin
2Samuel17:18 Shin issi panthay enta be7idi Abeseloomes odis. Hessa gisho
2Samuel17:19 He addiya machiya oonika eronnaada ollaa doona kammada iya bolla kathi miccasu.
2Samuel17:20 Abeseloome aylleti addiya soo yidi machiw
2Samuel17:21 He asati bidaape guye
2Samuel17:22 Dawitinne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Yordaanose pinnidi bidosona. Sa7i wontiya wode ubbay pinnidi wuridosona.
2Samuel17:23 Akxoofeli ba zorey eketiboonaysa erida wode ba hariya kooridi ba de7iya katamaa bis. Akxoofeli ba soo giigisidi suletidi
2Samuel17:24 Abeseloomeynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay Yordaanose pinniya wode Dawiti Mahanayma katamaa gakis.
2Samuel17:25 Abeseloomey ba olanchota bolla Iyo7aaba bessan Amasaya shuumis. Amasayi Isra7eele addiya Yotora na7a. Yotori Na7oosa na7iw
2Samuel17:26 Isra7eeletinne Abeseloomey Galada biittan dunkaanidosona.
2Samuel17:27 Dawiti Mahanayma katamaa gakiya wode Amoone biittan Raabape yida Na7oosa na7ay Shoobi
2Samuel17:28 hiixiyabata
2Samuel17:29 eessi
2Samuel18:1 Dawiti baara de7iya asaa taybidi shaalaqatanne mato halaqata enta bolla shuumis.
2Samuel18:2 Dawiti asa heedzu cugan shaakis; issi cugaa Iyo7aabi
2Samuel18:3 Shin asay
2Samuel18:4 Kawoy
2Samuel18:5 Kawoy Iyo7aaba
2Samuel18:6 Dawita olanchoti Isra7eeletara oletanaw Efreema woran salpidosona.
2Samuel18:7 He bessan Dawita olanchoti Isra7eele olanchota xoonidosona. He gallas daro asi wuris
2Samuel18:8 Olay gaxare ubbaa gakis; he gallas wori wursida asay mashshi wursida asaape daro.
2Samuel18:9 Abeseloomey qoponna de7ishe Dawita asaara gahetis. Abeseloomey ba baquluwa toggidashin daashsha wola garsi baquloy gelin
2Samuel18:10 Asaape issoy hessa be7idi
2Samuel18:11 Iyo7aabi baw odida addiya
2Samuel18:12 Addey zaaridi
2Samuel18:13 Taani kawa kiitta ixada Abeseloome wodhidaba gidiyako
2Samuel18:14 Iyo7aabi
2Samuel18:15 Iyo7aaba ola miishiya tookiya tammu asati Abeseloome yuushuwa teqidi iya shocidi wodhidosona.
2Samuel18:16 Hessafe guye
2Samuel18:17 Enti Abeseloome efidi woran de7iya gita ollan yeggidi
2Samuel18:18 Abeseloomey paxa de7ishe
2Samuel18:19 Hessafe guye
2Samuel18:20 Iyo7aabi
2Samuel18:21 Iyo7aabi Tophe asi gidida issi addiya xeegidi
2Samuel18:22 Saadoqa na7ay Akimaasi nam7antho Iyo7aabako
2Samuel18:23 Akimaasi
2Samuel18:24 Dawiti soo pengiyafenne kare pengiyafe giddon uttidashin
2Samuel18:25 Naagiya uray kawa xeegidi odis. Kawoy
2Samuel18:26 Naageysi hara woxiya asi be7idi pengiya naagiya addiyako
2Samuel18:27 Naageysi
2Samuel18:28 Akimaasi kawa xeegidi
2Samuel18:29 Kawoy
2Samuel18:30 Kawoy
2Samuel18:31 Hessafe guye
2Samuel18:32 Kawoy Tophe addiyako
2Samuel18:33 Kawoy daro azzanis; pengiyafe qommo baggan de7iya keethaa gelidi yeekis. Kawoy
2Samuel19:1 Kawoy
2Samuel19:2 Kawoy ba na7aas yeekeysa si7ida gisho
2Samuel19:3 Olape baqatidi yeellan guye simmida olanchoda he gallas asay doona pogonna katama gelidosona.
2Samuel19:4 Kawoy guuluntidi
2Samuel19:5 Hessafe guye
2Samuel19:6 Nena ixeyisata neeni dosaasa; nena doseyisata neeni ixaasa. Ne olanchotinne enta halaqati new aykoka gidonnaysa neeni hachi qoncisadasa. Nuuni ubbay hayqin
2Samuel19:7 Ha77i denda! Kare keyada ne asaa minthetha. Ta Godaa sunthan caaqayis; neeni keyonna ixiko
2Samuel19:8 Hessa gisho
2Samuel19:9 Isra7eele kochati ubbay issoy issuwara haysada yaagidi palamidosona; “Kawoy Dawiti nuna nu morketa kushepe ashshis; nuna Filisxeemeta kushepe wosisis; shin I ha77i Abeseloome gaason biitta aggidi baqatis.
2Samuel19:10 Nu bolla kawotanaada nuuni tiyida Abeseloomey olan hayqis. Yaatin
2Samuel19:11 Kawoy Dawiti kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara kiittidi
2Samuel19:12 Hinte ta ishata; hinte ta ashonne ta suuthu. Yaatin
2Samuel19:13 Qassi Dawiti Amaasako
2Samuel19:14 I Yihuda asa ubbaa wozanaa issino oothidi shammis. Hessa gisho
2Samuel19:15 Kawoy simmidi
2Samuel19:16 Biraqima addey
2Samuel19:17 Iyara Biniyaame koche gidida mukulu asay
2Samuel19:18 Kawa soo asaa ehanawunne kawa ufaysiyabaa oothanaw pinniya bessaara pinnidosona. Geera na7ay Saami Yordaanose shaafa pinnida wode kawa sinthan gufannidi
2Samuel19:19 “Kawaw ta nagaraa taybopa. Ta goday
2Samuel19:20 Ne aylley taani nagara oothidaysa erayis; shin ta godaa
2Samuel19:21 Xaruya na7ay Abisi
2Samuel19:22 Dawiti Abisako
2Samuel19:23 Kawoy Saami
2Samuel19:24 Qassi Saa7ola na7ay Mempibostey kawa mokanaw duge wodhis. Kawoy bida gallasape doomidi I saron guye simmiya gallas gakanaw Mempibostey ba tohuwanne ba ma7uwa meeccibeenna; ba buuchaa meedibeenna.
2Samuel19:25 Mempibostey kawuwara gahetanaw Yerusalaamepe yida wode kawoy
2Samuel19:26 Mempibostey
2Samuel19:27 Ta godaa
2Samuel19:28 Ta aawa soo asa ubbay hayqanaw bessees
2Samuel19:29 Kawoy zaaridi
2Samuel19:30 Mempibostey
2Samuel19:31 Galada addey Barziley kawuwara issife Yordaanose pinnidi iya moyzanaw Roogalimape yis.
2Samuel19:32 Barziley laythi hospun tammu gidida cima asi. I daro dure gidiya gisho kawoy Mahanayma kataman de7iya wode kawas koshshiyaba immis.
2Samuel19:33 Kawoy iyako
2Samuel19:34 Shin Barziley
2Samuel19:35 Taani ha77i hospun tammu laytha asi; taani iitanne lo77o shaakada eranaw danda7iyana? Taani ne aylley ta miyabaanne uyaaba mal7uwa shaakada eranaw danda7iyana? Taani addenne macca yethi shaakada si7anaw danda7iyana? Yaatin
2Samuel19:36 Taani ne aylley nena Yordaanose pinthana. Shin kawoy taw kushe zaaranaw ayis koshshii?
2Samuel19:37 Taani ta aawanne ta aaye duufuwa matan ta kataman hayqana mela simmayis. Ne aylley Kimihaami haysish; ta godaa
2Samuel19:38 Kawoy
2Samuel19:39 Hessafe guye
2Samuel19:40 Kawoy Yordaanose pinnidi Galgala biya wode Kimihaami iyara issife bis. Yihuda olanchoti ubbaynne Isra7eele olanchotape baggati kawuwara bidosona.
2Samuel19:41 Isra7eele ubbay kawako bidi
2Samuel19:42 Yihuda asay
2Samuel19:43 Isra7eele asay
2Samuel20:1 Biniyaame koche gidida Bikira na7ay Saabe7a geetetiya meto medhiya addey yan de7ees. He addey moyze punnidi
2Samuel20:2 Isra7eele asa ubbay Dawita aggidi
2Samuel20:3 Dawiti Yerusalaamen de7iya ba gadho simmida wode
2Samuel20:4 Kawoy Amaasako
2Samuel20:5 Amaasi Yihuda asaa xeeganaw bis; shin kawoy gida gallasan simmanaw danda7ibeenna.
2Samuel20:6 Dawiti Abisako
2Samuel20:7 Iyo7aaba asay
2Samuel20:8 Enti bidi Gaba7oonan de7iya wogga zaalla gakiya wode Amaasi entara gahetanaw yis. Iyo7aabi ola ma7uwa ma7i uttis; ba xeessan mashsha dancis. I tangishin iya mashshay shoohuwape kessi ekidi wodhis.
2Samuel20:9 Iyo7aabi
2Samuel20:10 Shin Amaasi Iyo7aaba haddirsa kushiyan de7iya mashshaa be7iboona gisho
2Samuel20:11 Iyo7aaba asaape issoy Amaasa aha matan eqidi
2Samuel20:12 Amaasi suuthan iitidi ogiyas giddon kundidi zin7is. Olanchoti ubbay yidi
2Samuel20:13 Amaasa ogepe diggidaape guye
2Samuel20:14 Saabe7i Isra7eele kochata biittara kanthidi
2Samuel20:15 Iyo7aabara de7iya asay gakidi
2Samuel20:16 katamaape issi cinca maccasi enta xeegada
2Samuel20:17 I maccaseeko yin
2Samuel20:18 Maccasiya
2Samuel20:19 Isra7eele giddon saronne ammanthiya asi nuna. Isra7eele biittan aayo gidida katamiw neeni dhaysanaw qopaasa. Neeni Godaa laata biitta ayis dhaysanaw koyay?” yaagasu.
2Samuel20:20 Iyo7aabi
2Samuel20:21 Nu qofay hessa gidenna. Derey dariya Efreema biittan Bikira na7aa Sabe7a geetetiya addey kawa Dawita bolla dendis. He addiya taw immite; taani katamaa yeddada baana” yaagis. Maccasiya
2Samuel20:22 Hessafe guye
2Samuel20:23 Iyo7aabi Isra7eele olanchota ubbaa halaqa gidishin
2Samuel20:24 Adoniraami wolqa ooso ootheyisata halaqa gidishin
2Samuel20:25 Suusi waanna xaafe gidishin
2Samuel20:26 Qassi Ya7ira addey Irki Dawita kahinetape issuwa.
2Samuel21:1 Dawita kawotetha laythan biittay heedzu laythi kumethi koshatis. Hessa gisho
2Samuel21:2 Yaatin kawoy Gaba7oona asaa xeegidi odisis. Gaba7oona asati Isra7eele zare gidonashin
2Samuel21:3 Dawiti Gaba7oona asaa
2Samuel21:4 Enti zaaridi
2Samuel21:5 Enti
2Samuel21:6 Hessa gisho
2Samuel21:7 Saa7ola na7ay Yoonataaninne Dawiti Godaa sinthan caaqida caaquwa gisho
2Samuel21:8 Shin kawoy Dawiti Iyoheela na7iya Raxifa Saa7olas yelida nam7u adde nayta
2Samuel21:9 Gaba7oona asaas aathidi immin
2Samuel21:10 Iyoheela na7iya Raxifa kayo afila ekada zaalla bolla baw hiixada
2Samuel21:11 Saa7ola laggethiya
2Samuel21:12 Dawiti bidi
2Samuel21:13 Dawiti Saa7ola meqethaanne iya na7aa Yoonataana meqethaa he bessaafe ehis. Qassi kaqetida laapun asata meqethaaka shiishis.
2Samuel21:14 Saa7ola meqethaanne iya na7aa Yoonataana meqethaa Biniyaame biittan Xela kataman iya aawa Qiisa duufuwan moogidosona. Kawoy kiittidaba ubbaa enti polidosona. Hessafe guye
2Samuel21:15 Filisxeemeta giddoninne Isra7eele asaa giddon zaaridi oli dendin
2Samuel21:16 Rafaya yaraape Yishibibinooba geetetiya addey de7ees. Naase biratape oosetida
2Samuel21:17 Shin Xaruya na7ay Abisi Dawita ashshis; I Filisxeeme addiya wodhis. Hessafe guye
2Samuel21:18 Gooba geetetiya bessan Filisxeemetara hara oli dendis. He wode Kusata addey Sabaki
2Samuel21:19 Qassika he bessan Filisxeemetara hara oli dendin
2Samuel21:20 Qassika Gaaten hara oli dendis. He bessan issi adussa addey de7ees. He addiyas issi issi kushiyaninne issi issi tohuwan usupun
2Samuel21:21 He addey Isra7eele bushayida wode Dawita ishaa Saama na7ay Yoonataani iya wodhis.
2Samuel21:22 Ha oyddati Gaaten de7iya Raafa yarata. Enta Dawitinne iya asay wodhidosona.
2Samuel22:1 Goday Saa7ola kushepenne iya morketa ubbaa kushepe ashshida gallas Dawiti Godaas ha mazmuriya yexis.
2Samuel22:2 Goday ta zaalla; taw miixaa; I tana ashsheysa.
2Samuel22:3 Ta Xoossay taani baqatada attiya zaalla; I ta gondalliya; I ta atotetha wolqaa. I taani baqatada attiya bessi; ne tana makallanchota kushepe ashshaasa.
2Samuel22:4 Galati bessiya Godaa taani xeegana; taani ta morketape attana.
2Samuel22:5 Hayqo zuley tana teqis; dhayo di7oy tana daganthis.
2Samuel22:6 Si7oole wodoroy tana qachana hanees; hayqoy xiheda tana oykis.
2Samuel22:7 Tana metoy un7ethin Godaa xeegas; tana maaddana mela ta Xoossaako waassas. I ba keethan ta qaala si7is; ta waassida waasoy iya haythan wodhis.
2Samuel22:8 Xoossay hanqetida gisho
2Samuel22:9 Iya siidhiyape cuyay keyis; iya doonape tama lacoynne xuuggiya bonqoy keyis.
2Samuel22:10 Saluwa phalqidi duge wodhis; iya tohuwape garsara sakana dhumi de7ees.
2Samuel22:11 Kiruubetan uttidi paallis; carko qefiya bolla uttidi bis.
2Samuel22:12 Bana dhuman teqis; iya dunkaaney irara siketida shaara.
2Samuel22:13 Iya sinthan de7iya poo7uwape tama bonqoy keyees.
2Samuel22:14 Goday salope guummis; Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossay ba qaala sissis.
2Samuel22:15 Ba dongiya dukidi
2Samuel22:16 Goday seerida wodenne hanqetidi peenuqida wode
2Samuel22:17 Goday bollafe kushe yeddidi
2Samuel22:18 I tana ta wolqaama morketape
2Samuel22:19 Ta metuwa gallas enti ta bolla dendidosona; shin Goday tana zempiseysa.
2Samuel22:20 I tana dalga bessi kessis; tanan ufaytida gisho tana ashshis.
2Samuel22:21 Ta xillotethaada Goday taw qanxis; ta kushe geeshshatethaada taw zaaris.
2Samuel22:22 Ayis giiko taani Godaa ogiya kaallas; qassi ta Xoossaa aggada iita oothabike.
2Samuel22:23 Taani iya higgiya ubbaa naagas; iya wogaa polanaysa aggabike.
2Samuel22:24 Taani iya sinthan suure de7as; tana nagarape naagas.
2Samuel22:25 Goday taw ta xillotethaadanne ta geeshshatethaada zaaris.
2Samuel22:26 Neeni keehatas keeha; suuretas neeni suure.
2Samuel22:27 Geeshshatas neeni geeshshi; shin geellatas neeni morke.
2Samuel22:28 Bantana kawusheyisata ashshaasa; shin otoranchota kawushaasa.
2Samuel22:29 Abeeti Godaw
2Samuel22:30 Ne maaduwan ta morketa yedhada baana; ta Xoossan gimbe dirsa gupa aadhana.
2Samuel22:31 Xoossaa ogey suure; Godaa qaalay geeshshi; iyako baqatiya ubbaas I gondalle.
2Samuel22:32 Goday attishin
2Samuel22:33 Xoossay taw mino miixaa; I ta ogiya polo oothees.
2Samuel22:34 I ta tohuwa gen7e tohoda minthees; tana dhoqa bessan minthidi essees.
2Samuel22:35 I ta kushiya olas loohisees; ta qesey naase birata donge dukees.
2Samuel22:36 Tana ashshiya ne gondalliya taw immadasa; ne katisoy tana gitayees.
2Samuel22:37 Ta hemethaa dalgisaasa; ta gaadiya minthaasa.
2Samuel22:38 Ta morketa yedethada mentherethas; enti dhayonna de7ishin guye simmike.
2Samuel22:39 Enti zaaridi dendonna mela shocas; ta tohuwape garsan kundidosona.
2Samuel22:40 Olas taw wolqa dancisadasa; ta morketa taw gulbatisadasa.
2Samuel22:41 Ta morketa ta sinthafe baqatisadasa; tana ixeyisata dhaysas.
2Samuel22:42 Maade koyidi waassidosona; shin oonika enta ashshibeenna. Godaa enti xeegidosona; shin I entaw koybeenna.
2Samuel22:43 Taani enta baanada liiqisas; oge urqada enta yedhas.
2Samuel22:44 Makalla ta asaape tana ashshadasa; kawotethata bolla tana shuumadasa; ta eronna asay taw haaretis.
2Samuel22:45 Allaga derey tana aaddashees; ta woriya si7idi taw kiitetoosona.
2Samuel22:46 Enti wolqa dhayidosona; banta miixape kokorishe keyidi yoosona.
2Samuel22:47 Goday de7on de7ees! Ta zaallay anjeto. Tana ashshiya zaallay dhoqu dhoqu go.
2Samuel22:48 I ta haluwa keyiya Xoossaa; kawotethata taape garsan haarisees.
2Samuel22:49 Ta morketape tana ashshees; ta morketa bolla tana dhoqu dhoqu oothaasa; Oda medhiya asape tana ashshaasa.
2Samuel22:50 Abeeti Godaw taani kawotethata giddon nena galatana; ne sunthaa yexana.
2Samuel22:51 Xoossay ba kawas gita xoono immees; ba tiyida Dawitasinne iya kochaas
2Samuel23:1 Haysi Dawiti wursetha haasaya. Isseye na7aa Dawita wuresethay haysa; I Yayqooba Xoossan tiyetidaysa; Xoossay iya dhoqu dhoqu oothidaysa; Isra7eelen lo77o mazmure yexeysa.
2Samuel23:2 “Godaa Ayyaanay ta baggara odees; iya qaalay ta inxarsan de7ees.
2Samuel23:3 Isra7eele Xoossay taw odis; Isra7eele Zaallay haysada yaagis. ‘Xillotethan haariya kawoy
2Samuel23:4 I shaari bayna guura doliya xalqe poo7o mela. I iri bukidi aadhin
2Samuel23:5 Tuma ta keetha asay Xoossa sinthan suure; I taara merinaw caaqis; ha caaqoy giigidi
2Samuel23:6 Shin iita asati ubbay kushen shiishanaw hanonna agunthada wora holetana.
2Samuel23:7 Agunthu bochiya oonika wale woyko xam7a ba kushen oykanaw koshshees; hessi ba de7iya bessan eexana” yaagis.
2Samuel23:8 Mino Dawita asata sunthay haysafe kaallidi de7eyisata. Koyroy
2Samuel23:9 Heedzatape issoy
2Samuel23:10 Shin I ba bessan minni eqidi
2Samuel23:11 Iyape kaalley qassi Arooda yeleta gidida Aga na7aa Saama. Issi gallas Filisxeemeti misirey kumida shooqan
2Samuel23:12 Shin Saami shooqa giddon murti eqidi oletis. Filisxeemeta wodhis; he gallas Goday wolqaama xoono immis.
2Samuel23:13 Katha caka wode hastamu mino asatape heedzati Adulaama gongoluwa Dawitako bidosona. He wode Filisxeeme olanchoti Raafayme zangaaran dunkaanidosona.
2Samuel23:14 He wode Dawiti miixan de7ees; Filisxeeme olanchota cugay qassi Beetelemen olla kambe de7ees.
2Samuel23:15 Dawiti haathe uyanaw amotidi
2Samuel23:16 Ha heedzu mino asati Filisxeeme olanchota gutaa kanthidi
2Samuel23:17 “Abeeti Godaw
2Samuel23:18 Xaruya na7aa Iyo7aaba ishay Abisi hastamata halaqa; I heedzu xeetu asata ba tooran olidi wodhis; ika heedzatada eretis.
2Samuel23:19 I hastamatape aadhidi bonchetida asi; I heedzata mela eretida asi gidonna ixikoka hastamatas halaqa.
2Samuel23:20 Qabxi7eela yeleta gidida Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi mino ooso oothida gita asi. I nam7u eretida Moo7abe asata wodhis. Issi wode shachi wodhiya gallas ollan wodhidi gaammo wodhis.
2Samuel23:21 Qassi issi gita Gibxe addiya wodhis; Gibxe addey toora oykis; shin I xam7a oykidi iyako bidi
2Samuel23:22 Yoodahe na7ay Banayasi haysa oothis; iya sunthay heedzataysada eretis.
2Samuel23:23 I hastamata giddon daro bonchetida asi
2Samuel23:24 He hastamata giddon de7eysati
2Samuel23:25 Arooda yeleta gidida Saamanne Eliqa
2Samuel23:26 Falxa yara gidida Selesa
2Samuel23:27 Anatoote yeleta gidida Abi7ezera
2Samuel23:28 Ahoha yara gidida Xalmoona
2Samuel23:29 Naxoofa yeleta gidida Mahirayanne Ba7ana na7aa Heleba. Biniyaame biittan
2Samuel23:30 Phir7atoona yeleta gidida Banaya
2Samuel23:31 Araba yeleta gidida Abalboona
2Samuel23:32 Sha7alboona yeleta gidida Eliyaaba
2Samuel23:33 Arooda yeleta gidida Saamanne Shaara na7aa Ahi7aama
2Samuel23:34 Ma7ika yeleta gidida Ahasbaya na7aa Elfalaxa
2Samuel23:35 Qarmeloosa yeleta gidida Hexira
2Samuel23:36 Suubba yeleta gidida Naatana na7aa Yigi7aala
2Samuel23:37 Amoone yeleta gidida Seleqa
2Samuel23:38 Yatira yara gidiya Irayanne Gareeba
2Samuel23:39 Hite addiya Ooriyoona. Enti kumethi hastamanne laapuna.
2Samuel24:1 Godaa hanqoy qassika Isra7eele bolla eexis; Goday Dawita enta bolla denthethidi
2Samuel24:2 Hessa gisho
2Samuel24:3 Shin Iyo7aabi
2Samuel24:4 Shin kawa qaalay Iyo7aabanne tora moconata xoonin
2Samuel24:5 Enti Yordaanose pinnidi dugeha baggan de7iya
2Samuel24:6 Yaape enti Galadanne Hiteta biittan de7iya Qaadesa bidosona; yaape qassi Daane bidosona; yaara Sidoona gakidosona.
2Samuel24:7 Yaape dendidi
2Samuel24:8 Enti biitta ubbaa yuuyishe uddufun ageenanne laatamu gallas gam7idi
2Samuel24:9 Iyo7aabi asaa taybuwa kawa erisis; Isra7eelen mashshan oletanaw danda7iya hospun xeetu mukulu mino olanchoti
2Samuel24:10 Asaa taybidaape guye
2Samuel24:11 Wontetha gallas Dawiti hiixape dendiya wode Dawitas qoncethi be7iya
2Samuel24:12 “Bada
2Samuel24:13 Gaadi Dawitako bidi
2Samuel24:14 Dawiti Gaadeko
2Samuel24:15 Hessa gisho
2Samuel24:16 Yerusalaame dhaysanaw kiitanchoy ba kushiya miccida wode asaa bolla gakida gadoy Godaa azzanthida gisho
2Samuel24:17 Asaa shociya kiitanchuwa Dawiti be7ida wode Godaako
2Samuel24:18 He gallas Gaadi Dawitako yidi
2Samuel24:19 Dawiti
2Samuel24:20 Orni duge xeelliya wode

2Samuel24:22 Orni

1Kings1:1 Kawoy Dawiti daro cimidi wode sugis. Iya aylleti ma7o iya bolla doorinka iya ho77onna ixis.
1Kings1:2 Hessa gisho
1Kings1:3 Enti Isra7eele biitta ubban koyidi Abisa geetetiya issi mala lo77o geela7o Sunaama katamaape demmidi
1Kings1:4 He geela7iya daro mala lo77o. Iya kawa heemmasunne iyaw oothasu; shin kawoy iira aqi erenna.
1Kings1:5 Haagita na7ay Adooni
1Kings1:6 Iya aaway
1Kings1:7 Adoniyaasi Xaruya na7aa Iyo7abaranne kahiniya Abyataarara zoretin
1Kings1:8 Shin kahiniya Saadoqi
1Kings1:9 Issi gallas Adoniyaasi Enrogeela pultuwa matan Zoheleta Zaalla geetetiya bessan dorsata
1Kings1:10 Shin nabey Naatana
1Kings1:11 Hessafe guye
1Kings1:12 Ne ne shempuwanne ne na7aa Solomone shempuwa waatada ashshaneko ta nena zorayis.
1Kings1:13 Kawa Dawitako gelada
1Kings1:14 Neeni kawuwara haasayishin ta gelada
1Kings1:15 Barsaaba kawa haasayisanaw I de7iya keethaa gelasu; Sunaamape yida Abisa kawa heemmawusu.
1Kings1:16 Barsaaba kawa sinthan bonchon som7uwa sa7a gathada ziggasu. Kawoy
1Kings1:17 Iya
1Kings1:18 Heko
1Kings1:19 I daro meheta
1Kings1:20 Ta godaw kawaw
1Kings1:21 Hessi hanonna ixiko ta goday kawoy hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetiya wode tanne ta na7ay Solomoney daafaba oothida asada taybetana” yaagasu.
1Kings1:22 Barsaaba buroo kawuwara haasayishin
1Kings1:23 Nabey yidaysa asay kawas odidosona. Naatani kawa sinthe aadhidi
1Kings1:24 Naatani
1Kings1:25 Hachi I daro meheta
1Kings1:26 Shin tana ne aylliya
1Kings1:27 Haysi ta godaa kawuwape guye iya araatan ooni uttaneeko ba aylleta erisonna de7ishe ta goday kawoy oothidabayee?” yaagis.
1Kings1:28 Kawoy Dawiti
1Kings1:29 He wode kawoy
1Kings1:30 Godan
1Kings1:31 Barsaaba kawa sinthan ba som7uwa sa7a gathada ziggada
1Kings1:32 Hessafe guye Kawoy Dawiti
1Kings1:33 Kawoy “Ta aylleta hintera ekidi bidi
1Kings1:34 Yan kahiniya Saadoqinne nabiya Naatani iya tiyidi Isra7eele bolla kawoyo. Moyze punnishe
1Kings1:35 Hinte iya ajabidi iyara biite; I ta araatan uttidi
1Kings1:36 Yoodahe na7aa Banayi zaaridi
1Kings1:37 Goday ta godaara kawuwara gididaysada Solomonera gido; iya araata ta godaa Kawa Dawita araatape aathidi gitayo” yaagis.
1Kings1:38 Hessa gisho
1Kings1:39 Kahiney Saadoqi Geeshsha Dunkaaniyape zayte kacen tigi ekidi
1Kings1:40 Asa ubbay iya kaallidi bidosona; enti biitti qaaxana gakanaw suusul7e punnishenne durishe daro ufaytidosona.
1Kings1:41 Adoniyaasinne iyara de7iya imathati gibira midi wursishe hessa si7idosona. Iyo7aabi Moyze puno si7idi
1Kings1:42 I buroo odetishin
1Kings1:43 Yoonataani
1Kings1:44 Iya ajabana mela kawoy kahiniya Saadoqa
1Kings1:45 Kahiney Saadoqinne nabey Naatani
1Kings1:46 Solomoney araatan uttis.
1Kings1:47 Hessa bollaka
1Kings1:48 Gujidika
1Kings1:49 Adoniyaasa imathati ubbay hessa si7ida wode dagammidi
1Kings1:50 Adoniyaasi Solomone yayyidi
1Kings1:51 Asay Solomone
1Kings1:52 Solomoney zaaridi
1Kings1:53 Kawoy Solomoney

1Kings2:4 Goday
1Kings2:5 Gujidika
1Kings2:6 Ne iya ne cincatethaada ootha; I ceeggidi saro hayqanaada oothofa.
1Kings2:7 “Shin taani ne isha Abeseloomepe baqatiya wode enti taw miye gidida gisho
1Kings2:8 “Taani Mahanayma katama bida wode tana iita baadethi baaddida Biniyaame biittan Biraqima katamape yida Geera na7aa Saami neera de7eysa qopa. I taara gahetanaw Yordaanose Shaafa yida wode
1Kings2:9 Shin ha77i neeni iya xillo asada taybopa. Ne cinca asi gidiya gisho ay oothaneko eraasa. Ne he cima addiya suuthara mooga” yaagis.
1Kings2:10 Dawiti hayqidi
1Kings2:11 Dawiti Isra7eele bolla oytamu laythi kawotis; Kebroonan laapun laythi
