1Kings2:45 Shin Kawoy Solomoney anjetana; Dawita araatay Godaa sinthan merinaw saro daana” yaagis.
1Kings2:46 Kawoy
1Kings3:1 Solomoney Gibxe kawara bollotidi
1Kings3:2 Godaa sunthan Xoossa keethay buroo keexetiboonna gisho asay he wode dhoqa goyinno bessan yarshishe gam7is.
1Kings3:3 Solomoney Godaa dosiya ba aawa Dawita wogan hemetis. Shin dhoqa goyinno bessan yarshishenne ixaane cuyisishe gam7is.
1Kings3:4 Kawoy yarsho yarshanaw Gaba7oona bis; he bessay hara ubbaafe aadhidi koshshiya dhoqa goyinno bessi. Solomoney mukulu mehe ehidi
1Kings3:5 Goday Solomones Gaba7oonan qamma amuhon qoncidi
1Kings3:6 Solomoney
1Kings3:7 “Abeeti Godaw
1Kings3:8 Taani
1Kings3:9 Hessa gisho
1Kings3:10 Solomoney hessa oychida gisho
1Kings3:11 Xoossay iyako
1Kings3:12 Heko
1Kings3:13 Qassi ne oychonabaaka ta new immana; neeni de7ida laytha ubban hara kawoy demmonna duretethaanne bonchuwa ta new immana.
1Kings3:14 Ne aaway Dawiti hemetidaysada ta ogiyan ne hemetiko
1Kings3:15 Solomoney dhiskofe barkidi
1Kings3:16 Issi gallas nam7u layma maccasati kawa Solomoneko yidi
1Kings3:17 Entafe issinniya
1Kings3:18 Ta na7ay yeletida heedzantho gallas ha maccasiyaka issi na7a yelasu. He keethan nuupe
1Kings3:19 “Issi qamma iya bana na7aa bolla zin7ida gisho
1Kings3:20 Iya qamma dendada
1Kings3:21 Wonta taani ta na7aa dhanthanaw dendiya wode
1Kings3:22 Hanko maccasiya

1Kings4:1 Kawoy Solomoney Isra7eele biitta ubbaa bolla kawotis.
1Kings4:2 I shuumida asay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Saadoqa na7ay Azaariyasi kahine;
1Kings4:3 Shiisha nayti Elihorefinne Akiyi waanna xaafeta; Ahiluda na7ay Iyosaafexi taarike xaafe;
1Kings4:4 Yoodahe na7ay Banayi toora mocona; Saadoqinne Abyataari kahineta.
1Kings4:5 Naatana na7ay Azaariyasi deriya ayseysata halaqa; Naatana na7ay kahiney
1Kings4:6 Ahisaari kawo gadho halaqa; Abda na7ay Adonraami madda ootheyisata halaqa.
1Kings4:7 Qassi Solomones Isra7eele biittan tammanne nam7u dere aysiya halaqati de7oosona; enti kawasinne kawa son de7iya asa ubbaas miya katha eheyisata. Entafe issoy issoy laytha giddon issi issi ageena kathi ehees.
1Kings4:8 Enta sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetis. Benihuuri derey dariya Efreema biitta ayseysa.
1Kings4:9 Banxeqaari Maqaxa
1Kings4:10 Benihesedi Aruboota biitta ayseysa; Sooko biittaynne Hefeera biittay ubbay iyabaa.
1Kings4:11 Ben-Aminadaabi
1Kings4:12 Ahiluda na7ay Ba7ana
1Kings4:13 Bengibeeri Galadan Raamota katama
1Kings4:14 Ido na7ay Ahinadaabi Mahanayma biitta aysees.
1Kings4:15 Akmaasi Niftaaleme biitta aysees; I Solomone na7iw Basmaato ekis.
1Kings4:16 Kuusa na7ay Ba7aani Aseera biittanne Baalota katamaa aysees.
1Kings4:17 Paruha na7ay Iyosaafexi Yisakoora biitta aysees.
1Kings4:18 Ela na7ay Saami Biniyaame biitta aysees.
1Kings4:19 Ure na7ay Gabeeri
1Kings4:20 Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay abba gaxan de7iya shafeda daridosona; enti mishenne uyishe ufaytidi de7idosona.
1Kings4:21 Solomoney Efraxiisa Shaafape doomidi Filisxeeme biitta gakanaw
1Kings4:22 Solomones gallas gallas shiiqiya kathi; ishatamu kuntaale lo77o dhiille
1Kings4:23 dhiiketida tammu sangata
1Kings4:24 Solomoney Efraxiisa Shaafape doloha baggara de7iya kawotethata ubbaa Tifisa katamaape doomidi Gaaza katamaa gakanaw haaris; ba yuushuwan de7iya biitta ubbaara saro de7is.
1Kings4:25 Iya de7o laytha ubban Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay Daanepe Barsaabe gakanaw
1Kings4:26 Solomones ola para gaareta goochiya oytamu mukulu gaaxata paratinne tammanne nam7u mukulu para asati de7oosona.
1Kings4:27 He deriya ayseysati ageenan ageenan kawoy Solomoneynne iya gibira maanaw yida asa ubbay miyaba shiishosona. Enti iyape aybaka pacisokona.
1Kings4:28 Enti gaare paratinne hanko parati maanaw banganne peedhen enta gakida dalaa ehidi iya minja keethan wothidosona.
1Kings4:29 Xoossay Solomones cincatethi
1Kings4:30 Solomone cincatethay doloha baggara de7iya asaa cincatethaafenne Gibxeta cincatethaafe aadhees.
1Kings4:31 I asa ubbaafe aadhiya cinca; iya cincatethay
1Kings4:32 I heedzu mukulu leemisota odis; iya mazmureti issi mukulunne ichasha.
1Kings4:33 Solomoney Libaanose zigape doomidi
1Kings4:34 Iya cincatethaa si7ida sa7an de7iya kawoti ubbay kiittin
1Kings5:1 Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitara sigan gam7ida gisho
1Kings5:2 Solomoney zaaridi
1Kings5:3 “Goday iya morketa iya tohuwape garsan haarisana gakanaw
1Kings5:4 Shin ha77i Goday ta Xoossay taw shempo immis; taw ayba morkey woyko iitabaa oothey baawa.
1Kings5:5 Goday ta aawa Dawitas
1Kings5:6 Hessa gisho
1Kings5:7 Kiraami Solomone kiitaa si7idi daro ufaytis; “Ha gita kawotethaa haarana mela Dawitas ha cinca na7aa immida Goday galatetto” yaagis.
1Kings5:8 Hessafe guye Kiraami Solomoneko haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Ne kiitida kiitay tana gakis. Neeni koydaba taani oothana; ziganne xiidda ta new shiishana.
1Kings5:9 Ta asay duruma ciinetha Libaanosepe abbaako gaazana. Taani qashisada
1Kings5:10 Hessada oothidi Kiraami Solomoney koyida keena ziganne Xiidda immis.
1Kings5:11 Solomoney kawo keethan de7iya asay maana mela 20
1Kings5:12 Goday Solomones immana gidaysada
1Kings5:13 Kawoy Solomoney Isra7eele 30
1Kings5:14 Adonraama geetetiya addiya enta bolla halaqa oothidi shuumis. He oosanchota tammu tammu mukulan shaakidi
1Kings5:15 Solomones tooho tookiya 70
1Kings5:16 Enta bolla halaqa gididi oosisiya 3
1Kings5:17 Kawa Solomone kiitan
1Kings5:18 Solomone asaynne Kiraama asay kushe hiilla ereysati
1Kings6:1 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida 480 laythan
1Kings6:2 Solomoney keexida Xoossa keethay adussatethay usupun tammu wadha; gompay laatamu wadha; geesay hastamu wadha.
1Kings6:3 Xoossa keethi geliya bessan de7iya barandaa gompay Xoossaa keethaa gompaa mela laatamu wadha; keetha adussatethay Xoossa keetha geliya bessa gakanaw tammu wadha.
1Kings6:4 Xoossa keethaas soo baggara dalga
1Kings6:5 Xoossa keethaa matan
1Kings6:6 Koyro pooqiya gompay ichashu wadha; nam7antho pooqiya gompay usupun wadha; heedzantho pooqiya gompay laapun wadha. Issi issi pooqiya goday garsa baggara de7iya godaape lee7o. Geeshsha bessaa kanthidi gelonna mela xoossa keethaa godaas kare baggara teqe wothis.
1Kings6:7 Xoossa keethay shucha qoo7iya bessan masetida shucha xalaalan gimbetis; Xoossa keethay gimbetiya wode naariqa
1Kings6:8 Garsara de7iya pooqiya geliya pengey Xoossa keethaafe dugeha baggara de7ees; he bessaafe nam7antho pooqiyanne heedzantho pooqiya baanaw yedhidi keyiya dethati de7oosona.
1Kings6:9 Hessada oothidi
1Kings6:10 Xoossa keetha yuushuwan pooqeta keexidi ongis; enta issuwa issuwa geesay ichashu wadha gididi
1Kings6:11 Goday Solomoneko
1Kings6:12 “Ha neeni keexiya Xoossa keethan
1Kings6:13 Taani Isra7eele asaa giddon daana; taani ta asaa Isra7eele aggike” yaagis.
1Kings6:14 Solomoney Xoossa keetha keexidi ongis.
1Kings6:15 Xoossaa keetha gaatha bagga godaa
1Kings6:16 Xoossa keetha giddon Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa medhanaw guye baggara laatamu wadha gidiya besse shaakidi
1Kings6:17 He Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe sintha baggara de7iya wuygiya adussatethay oytamu wadha.
1Kings6:18 Xoossa keetha soo baggay gosenne ciishsha misiliya medhida masetida ziga mithan kametis; ubbay zigape oosetis; ay shuchika bentenna.
1Kings6:19 Solomoney Godaa caaqo taabotiya wothanaw Xoossa keetha giddon Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa giigisis.
1Kings6:20 Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessay laatamu wadha adusse
1Kings6:21 Solomoney Xoossa keetha gidduwa walahi bayna worqen lanxis; worqan lanxetida qol7a geliya pengiya bolla yaanne haanne gakiya worqa santhalaata tolidi alleeqisis.
1Kings6:22 Keetha giddo baggaa worqan lanxis; Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa sinthan de7iya yarsho bessa worqan lanxis.
1Kings6:23 Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessan wothanaw issoy issoy tammu wadha aduqiya shamahope oosetida nam7u kiruube misileta massidi giigisis.
1Kings6:24 Koyro kiruubiya qefey
1Kings6:25 Nam7antho kiruubey tammu wadha; nam7u kiruubeta hanotaynne medhoy issi mela.
1Kings6:26 Issi kiruubiya geesay tammu wadha; nam7antho kiruubiya geesay hessa mela.
1Kings6:27 Solomoney Xoossa keethan de7iya Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessan kiruubeta wothis. Enta qefey micetidi uttis; issi kiruubiya qefey issi bagga godaa bochiya wode
1Kings6:28 Solomoney kiruubeta worqan lanxis.
1Kings6:29 Qol7anne wuyge godaa ubbaa kiruubeta
1Kings6:30 Xoossa keetha giddo kifiliya wuygiya kare bagga kifiliya wuygiya worqan lanxis.
1Kings6:31 Ubbaafe Geeshsha bessa geliya pengiyan shamaho mithafe sanqa giigisis. Penge gobanetas ichashu baggara maazaney de7ees.
1Kings6:32 Shamaho mithafe oosetida nam7u sanqata bolla kiruubeta
1Kings6:33 Hessadaka
1Kings6:34 I he pengiya issi issi sanqay giddon dakotidi dooyetiya nam7u sanqata kessis.
1Kings6:35 Kiruubeta
1Kings6:36 Soo baggara de7iya dabaaba gimbis; he gimbiya bolla masetida heedzu shuchu
1Kings6:37 Xoossaa keethaa baasoy Solomoney kawotida oyddantho laythan
1Kings6:38 Solomoney kawotida tammanne issintho laythan
1Kings7:1 Solomoney ba gadhuwa tammanne heedzu laythan keexidi wursis.
1Kings7:2 “Libaanose Woraa Keethaa” geetetiya keethaa Solomoney keexis; he keetha adussatethay xeetu wadha; gompay ishatamu wadha; geesay hastamu wadha. Ziga tuuqeti oyddu maaran eqidosona; masetida ziga mithati enta bolla wodhidosona;
1Kings7:3 ziga mithati heedzu maaran
1Kings7:4 He keethaas maskooteti heedzu maaran de7oosona; enti issoy issuwa sinthan de7oosona.
1Kings7:5 Pengetinne maskooteti oyddu maazanera de7oosona; maskooteti heedzu maaran gididi
1Kings7:6 Solomoney
1Kings7:7 Solomoney pirda araatay de7iya “Pirda Keethi” keexis; he keethay wuygepe bidi kaara gakanaw zigan kametidi uttis.
1Kings7:8 Pirda Keethaafe guye baggara de7iya hara dabaaban baw daanaw kawo gadho hanko keethatada oothidi keexis. Ba mache
1Kings7:9 Ha keethati ubbay
1Kings7:10 Gimbey hiixetiday tammu wadha woyko hospun wadha gidiya lo77o masetida gita shuchana.
1Kings7:11 Bolla baggara liketidi masetida lo77o shuchinne ziga mithi de7ees.
1Kings7:12 Gita dabaaba yuushuwan de7iya gimbey Xoossa keethadanne barandada masetida heedzu shuchu
1Kings7:13 Kawoy Solomoney
1Kings7:14 Kiraama aayiya am7o; iya Niftaaleme koche. Iya aaway Xiroosa asi. Kiraami naase birata qoxiya hiilli de7iya ase; I naase birata qoxidi oothiyaban daro loohida asi; I Solomoneko yidi iya ooso ubbaa oothis.
1Kings7:15 Kiraami issuwa issuwa geesay tammanne hospun wadha aduqidi
1Kings7:16 Hessadaka
1Kings7:17 Tuussaa huuphen de7iya issi issi gumbota giteda oothida laapun santhalaata oothis.
1Kings7:18 Tuussata xeeran de7iya gumbota alleeqisanaw nam7u maaran oromaane misile alleeqisis.
1Kings7:19 Barandan eqida tuussata bolla de7iya gumboti ciishsha medhon alleeqetidosona; enta geesay oyddu wadha.
1Kings7:20 Nam7u tuuqeta huuphen de7iya gumbotan gerto gididi uttida bessaafe bolla baggara
1Kings7:21 Kiraami he nam7u tuussata Xoossaa keethaa barandaa matan essis. Ushacha baggara eqida tuussaa Yakina gidi sunthis; haddirsa baggara eqida tuussaa Boo7eza gidi sunthis.
1Kings7:22 Tuussata huuphen de7iya gumboti ciishshe daanidi medhetidosona. Hessada hanidi tuussata oosoy poletis.
1Kings7:23 Kiraami Abba Saaniya geetetiya issi daro gita saaniya naase birata sheeshidi medhis. He Abba Saaniya doonay ha gaxape ya gaxa gakanaw tammu wadha; geesay ichashu wadha; yuushoy hastamu wadha.
1Kings7:24 Abba Saaniya doonan kare baggara ziqi gidi
1Kings7:25 Abba Saaney naase biratape medhetida tammanne nam7u boorata misileta zokuwan uttis. Boora misiletape heedzati pudeha bagga
1Kings7:26 Abba Saaney oyddu biradhe orde; iya doonay wanca doona mela; ciishshe daanees. Abba Saaney oytamanne ichashu mukulu litiro gidiya haathe oykees.
1Kings7:27 Kiraami tammu gaareta naase biratape medhis. He gaareti issoy issoy oyddu wadha adusse; oyddu wadha dalganne heedzu wadha dhoqa.
1Kings7:28 He gaareti haysada oosetidosona; pude eqida oyddu birata bolla piddi gida loche naase biratati oyketidi uttidosona.
1Kings7:29 He birata bolla gaammo
1Kings7:30 Issi issi gaariyas naase biratape oothida oyddu gertotinne gertota gathidi waaxiya naase birata kasoti de7oosona. Hessadaka
1Kings7:31 Gaariya zempisiya miisheta huuphen gertoti uttida dooya bessi de7ees; he dooyay gaariya xeerape pude issi wadha dhoqu gidi
1Kings7:32 Gertota geesay issi wadhanne takadho; gertoti loche naase biratatas garsa baggara de7oosona. Gertoti oyketidi uttida kasoti gaariyara oyketidi uttidosona.
1Kings7:33 Gertoti ola para gaare gertota mela medhetidosona; gertota gathidi oykiya kasoti
1Kings7:34 He gaareta ubbaa maazanetas enta tohosoora tohosoora entara isso gididi oyketida naase biratape oosetida zempoti de7oosona.
1Kings7:35 Issi issi gaariya huuphe bagga yuushuwan takadho aduqiya kirkiroy de7ees; zempotinne loche naase biratati gaariyara oyketidi
1Kings7:36 Ha zempotapenne loche naase biratatape giddon de7iya dooya bessa ubbay kiruuben
1Kings7:37 Hiza tammu gaareti haysada oosetidosona; enta lanxida miishey issino gidiya gisho enta geesaynne enta medhoy issi mela.
1Kings7:38 Kiraami meecetiya tammu kereta naase biratape medhis; issi issi keriya gompay oyddu wadha dalga gididi
1Kings7:39 Kiraami ichashu gaareta Xoossa keethaafe pudeha baggara
1Kings7:40 Kiraami qapheta
1Kings7:41 I oothida oosoti
1Kings7:42 issi issi gumbuwa bolla nam7u maaran naase biratape oosetida issi issi xeetu oromaane misileta
1Kings7:43 Tammu gaareta
1Kings7:44 Abbaanne iya katisiya tammanne nam7u boora misileta
1Kings7:45 Kereta
1Kings7:46 Kawoy Solomoney Sukotapenne Xartaanape giddon
1Kings7:47 Naase biratape oosetida miishey daro gidida gisho
1Kings7:48 Solomoney Xoossa keethaa giddon de7iya miisheta ubbaa worqafe medhisis. Hessatika
1Kings7:49 Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaafe sinthan ushacha baggaranne haddirsa baggara eqida ichashu ichashu xompe wothiya kocata
1Kings7:50 xuu7ata
1Kings7:51 Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keetha oosuwa ubbaa polidaape guye
1Kings8:1 Hessafe guye
1Kings8:2 Etaanima geetetiya laapuntha ageenan
1Kings8:3 Isra7eele cimati ubbay shiiqin
1Kings8:4 Leewetinne kahineti
1Kings8:5 Kawoy Solomoneynne iyara de7iya Isra7eele asay Taabotiya sinthan shiiqidi
1Kings8:6 Hessafe guye
1Kings8:7 Micetidi uttida kiruubeta qefeti taabotiyanne taabotiya tookiya kasota kammidosona.
1Kings8:8 Kasoti daro adusse gidiya gisho enta xeeray Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessa sinthan qoncen bentoosona. Shin Geeshsha bessaafe karera bentanaw danda7enna. Enti hachi gakanaw he bessan de7oosona.
1Kings8:9 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyida wode Goday entara caaqida Koreeba zuman Musey wothida nam7u loche shuchata xalaalape attishin
1Kings8:10 Kahineti Xoossa keethafe keyida wode Xoossa keethay shaaran kumis.
1Kings8:11 He shaara gaason kahineti banta oosuwa oothanaw danda7ibookona; Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keetha kumis.
1Kings8:12 Hessafe guye
1Kings8:13 Taani new boncho keethi
1Kings8:14 Isra7eele maabaray kumethi yan eqidashin
1Kings8:15 “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay galatetto! Ta aawa Dawitas ba doonan odida ufaysa qaala ba kushen polis. I odida ufaysa qaalay
1Kings8:16 ‘Taani ta asaa
1Kings8:17 “Ta aaway Dawiti
1Kings8:18 Shin Goday
1Kings8:19 Gidoshin
1Kings8:20 “Goday gelida ba ufaysa qaala polis. Goday kase gelida ufaysa qaalada taani ta aawa Dawita bessan kawotas; Isra7eele kawotetha araatan uttas. Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sunthaas keethe keexas.
1Kings8:21 Goday nu aawata Gibxefe kessida wode entara caaqida caaqo taabotiya wothana bessi giigisas” yaagis.
1Kings8:22 Hessafe guye
1Kings8:23 haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw
1Kings8:24 Ne aylliyas
1Kings8:25 “Ha77ika Godaw
1Kings8:26 Abeeti Isra7eele Xoossaw
1Kings8:27 “Shin Xoossay tuma sa7an daaneyee? Heko
1Kings8:28 Gidoshin
1Kings8:29 ‘Ta sunthay he bessan daana’ gida ha keethaa ne ayfey qammanne gallas xeello. Taani ne aylley ha bessaako simmada woossiya woosa si7a.
1Kings8:30 Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley
1Kings8:31 “Issi asi ba laggiya qohidi
1Kings8:32 neeni salon si7ada ootha. Ne aylleta giddon pirda. Naaqida uraa bolla pirdada
1Kings8:33 “Ne asay Isra7eeley ne bolla nagara oothida gisho banta morketan xoonetidi
1Kings8:34 neeni salon si7a. Ne asaa Isra7eele nagaraa atto ga; yaatada neeni kase enta mayzatas immida biitta enta guye zaara.
1Kings8:35 “Ne asay ne bolla nagara oothida gisho saloy gordetin
1Kings8:36 Ne aylleta
1Kings8:37 “Biitta bolla koshi woyko gadoy yaa wode
1Kings8:38 ne asa Isra7eelepe oonika nena woossikonne neeko waassiko qassi ay asika ba wozanan un7etidi ha Xoossa keethaako simmidi ba kushiya micciko
1Kings8:39 ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Enta nagaraa atto ga; enta maadda. Neeni asa wozana ereysada asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada imma. Asa ubbaa wozana erey ne xalaala.
1Kings8:40 Yaaniko
1Kings8:41 “Ne asaa Isra7eelepe gidonashin
1Kings8:42 ne gita sunthaa si7idi
1Kings8:43 neeni de7iya bessan salon si7a. Ne asati
1Kings8:44 “Ne asati banta morketa olana mela ne kiitida bessaa bidi
1Kings8:45 enta woosanne waasuwa salon si7ada entaw xoono imma.
1Kings8:46 “Nagara oothonna asi bayna gisho enti ne bolla nagara oothin
1Kings8:47 enti he di7etida biittan de7ishe
1Kings8:48 entana di77idi efida morketa biittan de7ishe
1Kings8:49 enta woosanne enta waasuwa ne de7iya bessan salon si7ada entaw pirda.
1Kings8:50 Ne asay ne bolla oothida nagaraanne qohida qohuwa atto ga; enta di77idi efida asati entaw qadhetana mela ootha.
1Kings8:51 Enti
1Kings8:52 “Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley woossiya woosa ne ayfey xeello. Enti waassiya wode awudeka neeni enta alla.
1Kings8:53 Abeeti Godaw
1Kings8:54 Solomoney woosa polidaape guye
1Kings8:55 Isra7eele maabara ubbaa ba qaala dhoqu oothidi haysada yaagidi anjis;
1Kings8:56 “Ba gelida qaalada ba asa Isra7eele shempisida Goday galatetto; I ba aylliya Muse baggara immida lo77o ufaysa qaala ubbay poletis.
1Kings8:57 Goday nu Xoossay kase nu aawatara de7idaysada nuuraka de7o; I nuna kumethi aggenna; yeggenna.
1Kings8:58 Nuuni iya ogetan hemetana melanne I nu aawatas immida kiitaanne wogaa naagana mela nu wozanaa baako zaaro.
1Kings8:59 Gallas gallas nuus koshshiyaba immanaw Goday tana ba aylliyanne ba asaa Isra7eele maaddana mela
1Kings8:60 Hessan
1Kings8:61 Hachi hinte oothidaysada hinte iya wogaada iyaw kiitetanaw hinte wozanay Godaas
1Kings8:62 Hessafe guye kawoynne Isra7eele asa ubbay issife Godaa sinthan yarsho yarshidosona.
1Kings8:63 Solomoney Godaas issifetetha yarsho yarshanaw 22
1Kings8:64 Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keetha sinthan de7iya dabaaba giddo kifiliya he gallas dummayis. He bessan xuussa yarsho
1Kings8:65 He wode Solomoneynne Isra7eele asa ubbay laapun gallas Shaqara Ba7aale bonchidosona; Isra7eele zawan Hamaata Pinuwape bidi Gibxe shaafa gakanaw de7iya daro asay Godaa sinthan ba7aale bonchanaw shiiqis.
1Kings8:66 Wontetha gallas kawoy asaa moyzis; asay kawa anjidi
1Kings9:1 Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho keexidi wursida wode ba wozanan oothanaw amotida ubbaa polidaape guye
1Kings9:2 Gaba7oonan kase qoncidaysada Goday zaaridi iyaw qoncis.
1Kings9:3 Goday
1Kings9:4 Shin neeni ne aaway Dawiti hemetidaysada borey bayna suuretethan ta sinthan hemetiko
1Kings9:5 taani ne aawa Dawitas
1Kings9:6 “Shin ne woyko ne nayti tana kaalo aggidi guye simmiko
1Kings9:7 Isra7eele asaa taani kase entaw immida biittafe shoddana; taani ta sunthaas geeshshida ha keethaa aggana. Isra7eeleti asa ubbaa giddon kadhesinne miichas attana.
1Kings9:8 Ha malaalsiya Xoossa keethay laaletidi laaletha doore gidana. Matara aadhiya asa ubbay dagammidi
1Kings9:9 Asay zaaridi
1Kings9:10 Solomoney ha nam7u keethata
1Kings9:11 Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami xiidda
1Kings9:12 Shin Kiraami Xiroosape keyidi
1Kings9:13 Kiraami Solomoneko
1Kings9:14 Kiraami 4
1Kings9:15 Xoossa keethaa
1Kings9:16 Gibxe kawoy kase Gezera oykidi taman xuuggis. Kataman de7iya Kanaane asata wodhis; Solomoney ekida ba na7iw woyto oothidi immis.
1Kings9:17 Solomoney Gezeranne garsa Beet-Harona zaaridi keexis.
1Kings9:18 Ba7ilaata
1Kings9:19 buqura minjiya katamata ubbaa
1Kings9:20 Amooretape
1Kings9:21 Enti Isra7eele asay biittafe wursidi dhaysanaw danda7onna ixin he biittan attida asaa kochata. Solomoney enta aylle oothin
1Kings9:22 Shin Solomoney Isra7eele asaape oonaka aylle oothibeenna. Enti iyaw moorinnata
1Kings9:23 Enti Solomoney oosisiya keethaa keexeyisata halaqata; enti ichashu xeetanne ishatama.
1Kings9:24 Gibxe kawa na7iya Dawita katamaape Solomoney iw keexisida keetha yidaape guye
1Kings9:25 Solomoney Godaas gimbida yarsho bessan xuussanne issifetetha yarsho laythan heedzu toho yarshees. Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisees; hessan Xoossa keethay poletis.
1Kings9:26 Hessafe guye
1Kings9:27 Kawoy Kiraami Solomone asaara oothana mela markabe laagon loohida ba asata kiittis.
1Kings9:28 Enti Ofira biitta bidi 14
1Kings10:1 Saaba kawiya Goday Solomones qoncisida malaalsiya cincatetha woriya si7ada
1Kings10:2 Sawuwa
1Kings10:3 Solomoney iya oychidaba ubbaa zaaris; iw birshonnashin
1Kings10:4 Saaba kawiya Solomone cincatetha
1Kings10:5 iya gaytan shiiqiya kathaa
1Kings10:6 Iya
1Kings10:7 Shin taani yada
1Kings10:8 Ubba wode ne sinthan eqidi
1Kings10:9 Nenan ufaytidi
1Kings10:10 Saaba kawiya 4
1Kings10:11 (Kawa Kiraama markabeti
1Kings10:12 Kawoy Solomoney he sandalepe Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho tuuqeta
1Kings10:13 Kawoy Solomoney immanaw bessiya imotatape haraa
1Kings10:14 Solomoney laythan laythan ekiya worqay 23
1Kings10:15 Hessi zal7anchotape ekiya qaraxa
1Kings10:16 Solomoney nam7u xeetu gita gondalleta worqafe qoxidi oosisis. Issi issi gondalliyan usupun kilo giraame gidiya worqey gelis.
1Kings10:17 Qassi heedzu xeetu guutha gondalleta worqafe qoxidi oosisis. Issi issi guutha gondalliyan nam7u kilo giraame gidiya worqey gelis. Kawoy he gondalleta “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya ba kawo gadhon wothis.
1Kings10:18 Qassi kawoy issi gita araata dangarsa zaalepe oosisidi geeshsha worqan lanxisis.
1Kings10:19 Araatay de7iya bessa pude keyanaw yedhiya usupun dethati de7oosona. He araatas guye baggara huuphiya bolla gertoy de7ees. Araatas nam7u baggara qese zempisiya bessati de7oosona; he nam7u bessata miyen eqida issi issi gaammo misiley de7ees.
1Kings10:20 He araata bolla keyiya usupun dethatas ya baggaranne ha baggara issi issi gaammo misiley
1Kings10:21 Kawoy Solomoney ushshu uyaa miishe ubbay worqafe oosetis; “Libaanose Wora” geetetiya kawo gadhon de7iya miishe ubbay walahi bayna worqafe oosetis. Solomone wode biras go77i bayna gisho birape oosetidabay baawa.
1Kings10:22 Kawa Kiraama markabetara zal7iya gita markabeti abban de7oosona. He markabeti worqa
1Kings10:23 Kawoy Solomoney duretethaninne cincatethan sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe aadhees.
1Kings10:24 Sa7an de7iya asi ubbay iyako yaanawunne Xoossay iya wozanan wothida cincatethaa si7anaw koyees.
1Kings10:25 Laythan laythan yaa ubbay iyaw worqa
1Kings10:26 Solomoney para gaaretanne parata shiishis; iyaw 1
1Kings10:27 Kawoy Yerusalaamen biri shuchada
1Kings10:28 Solomone parati Gibxefenne Qaawe biittafe yoosona. Kawa zal7anchoti enta Qaawepe shammidi ehoosona.
1Kings10:29 Enti issi issi para gaare usupun xeetu bira santimen
1Kings11:1 Kawoy Solomone daro allaga biitta maccasata dosis. Hessati Gibxe kawa na7epe haraa Moo7abeta
1Kings11:2 Goday Isra7eele asaas
1Kings11:3 Solomones kawo na7a gidida laapun xeetu machetinne heedzu xeetu laggethoti (qubaateti) de7oosona. He macheti iya Xoossafe haassidosona.
1Kings11:4 Solomoney cimishe biya wode iya macheti iya wozanaa hara xoossatako zaaridosona. Iya aawa Dawiti kumetha wozanan Godaas haaretidaysada I ba Godaa Xoossaas haaretibeenna.
1Kings11:5 Solomoney Astarooto geetetiya Sidoonata xoosseesinne Moloka geetetiya ixetida Amooneta eeqa goyinnis.
1Kings11:6 Solomoney Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; iya aawa Dawiti kaallidaysada Godaa polo kaallibeenna.
1Kings11:7 Solomoney Kamoosha ixetida eeqasinne Moloka geetetiya Amooneta eeqas Yerusalaamepe wuloha baggan de7iya dere huuphen dhoqa goyinno bessata keexis.
1Kings11:8 Allaga biittafe ekida ba machetas hessada giigisin
1Kings11:9 Iyaw nam7u toho qoncida Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaafe Solomone wozanay haakida gisho
1Kings11:10 Hara xoossata kaallonnaada Goday Solomone kiittis
1Kings11:11 Hessa gisho
1Kings11:12 Gidoshin
1Kings11:13 Hessi hanikoka
1Kings11:14 Hessafe guye
1Kings11:15 Kase Dawiti Edoome asatara oletida wode hayqidaysata mooganaw bida toora moconay Iyo7aabi Edoomen de7iya addeta ubbaa wodhidi wursis.
1Kings11:16 Edoomen de7iya addeta ubbaa dhaysana gakanaw Iyo7aabinne Isra7eele asa ubbay yan usupun ageena uttidosona.
1Kings11:17 Shin he wode guutha na7a gidida Hadaadi
1Kings11:18 Enti Midiyaamepe dendidi Paarana bidosona; Paraanepe bantara ase ekidi Gibxe kawako bidosona. Kawoy Hadaadas issi keethinne gade immidi kathi iyaw yeddis.
1Kings11:19 Hadaadi kawa daro ufaysin
1Kings11:20 Iya Ganubaata geetetiya na7a iyaw yelasu. Xafinaasa iya kawo gadhon dichasu; Ganubaati yan kawa naytara issife de7is.
1Kings11:21 Hadaadi Gibxen de7ishe Dawitinne iya toora moconay Iyo7aabi hayqidaysa si7idi
1Kings11:22 Kawoy iya
1Kings11:23 Qassika Xoossay Eliyaada na7aa Razoona Solomone bolla morke oothidi denthis. Razooni Suubba kawa Adraazarape baqatis.
1Kings11:24 Dawiti Suubba olanchota dhaysida wode Razooni baw ase shiishidi paannota halaqa gidis. Paannoti Damasqo bidi
1Kings11:25 Hadaadi medhida metuwa bolla gujidi
1Kings11:26 Hessadaka Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Solomone bolla makallidi dendis. I Solomone aylletape issuwa. I Efreema biittan de7iya Xareedape yida asi; iya aaye sunthay Xiru7a; iya am7o.
1Kings11:27 Kawa bolla I makallidi dendida taarikey haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. He wode Solomoney Miilo gimbeesinne ba aawa Dawita katamaa gimbe dirsaa yuushuwan de7iya ollaa kunthees.
1Kings11:28 Iyorbaami mino asi; Solomoney ha na7atethay ba oosuwa waatidi loythi oothiyako be7idi
1Kings11:29 Issi gallas Iyorbaami Yerusalaamepe keyidi bishin
1Kings11:30 Akiyi ba ma77ida ooratha ma7uwa oykidi
1Kings11:31 Iyorbaamako
1Kings11:32 Shin ta aylliya Dawita gishonne Isra7eele zare ubbaa giddofe taani doorida Yerusalaame gisho issi koche iyaw aggana.
1Kings11:33 Taani hessa oothiya gaasoy
1Kings11:34 “ ‘Gidoshin
1Kings11:35 Taani kawotethaa iya na7aa kushepe ekada tammu kochata new immana.
1Kings11:36 Ta sunthay yan xeegetana mela taani doorida Yerusalaamen
1Kings11:37 Taani nena ekana; ne wozanay dosida ubbaa neeni haarana; neeni Isra7eele bolla kawotana.
1Kings11:38 Taani nena kiittiyaba neeni oothiko
1Kings11:39 Solomone nagaraa gisho taani Dawita kochaa seerana; shin merinaw seerike’ ” yaagis.
1Kings11:40 Solomoney Iyorbaama wodhanaw koyis; shin Iyorbaami Gibxe kawa Shishaaqako baqatidi
1Kings11:41 Solomone hanida harabay
1Kings11:42 Solomoney Isra7eele bolla Yerusalaamen oytamu laythi kawotis.
1Kings11:43 Hessafe guye
1Kings12:1 Isra7eele asa ubbay Orobi7aama kawoyanaw Seekema bida gisho ika yaa bis.
1Kings12:2 Kawa Solomonepe baqatidi
1Kings12:3 Isra7eele asay Iyorbaama kiittidi xeegisin
1Kings12:4 “Ne aaway nuna deexo qambara toossis; shin ha77i I nuna oosisiya wolqaama oosuwanne deexo qambara nuus kawusharki. Yaatiko
1Kings12:5 Robi7aami entako
1Kings12:6 Hessafe guye
1Kings12:7 Cimati zaaridi
1Kings12:8 Shin Robi7aami cimati zorida zoriya aggidi
1Kings12:9 I entako
1Kings12:10 Na7atethati zaaridi
1Kings12:11 Ta aaway hintew qambara deexethis; shin taani iyape aathada deexethana. Ta aaway hintena lisson garaafis; shin taani hintena korneda dukiya lisson garaafana’ yaagada zaara” yaagidosona.
1Kings12:12 Kawoy
1Kings12:13 Kawoy cimata zoriya aggidi entaw hanqon zaaris.
1Kings12:14 Na7atethati zorida zoriya kaallis. I entako
1Kings12:15 Goday Seelope yida Akiya baggara kase Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaamas odida qaalay poletana mela hessi Godaape hanida gisho kawoy asay giyaba si7onna ixis.
1Kings12:16 Isra7eele asa ubbay kawoy enti geysa si7onna ixidaysa be7idi haysada yaagidosona; “Dawitape nuna gakiya gishoy aybee? Isseye na7aape nuuni laattiyabay aybee? Isra7eele asaw
1Kings12:17 Shin Robi7aami Yihudan de7iya Isra7eele asaa bolla kawotis.
1Kings12:18 Kawoy Robi7aami madda ootheyisata halaqaa Adoniraama Isra7eele asaako kiittin
1Kings12:19 He wodepe doomidi hachi gakanaw tammu Isra7eele kochati Dawita kochaafe kawotida kawota bolla makallidosona.
1Kings12:20 Iyorbaami Gibxefe simmidaysa Isra7eele asa ubbay si7ida wode iya banta maabaraako xeegidi Isra7eele bolla kawothidosona. Dawita kochaafe kawotida kawotas ammanetiday Yihuda kochaa xalaala.
1Kings12:21 Solomone na7ay Robi7aami Yerusalaame gakida wode
1Kings12:22 Shin Xoossa qaalay Xoossa asi gidida Samayeko haysada yaagidi yis.
1Kings12:23 “Solomone na7aa
1Kings12:24 Goday hinteko
1Kings12:25 Hessafe guye Iyorbaami derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya Seekema miixa oothi gimbidi
1Kings12:26 Iyorbaami ba wozanan
1Kings12:27 Ha asay Xoossa keethan yarsho yarshanaw Yerusalaame biyaba gidiko
1Kings12:28 Kawoy zoretidaape guye worqafe nam7u mara misileta medhidi
1Kings12:29 Entafe issuwa Beetelen
1Kings12:30 Ha hanotay entaw nagara gidis; asay he mara misiliya goyinnanaw Daane gakanaw bidosona.
1Kings12:31 Iyorbaami dere huuphen dhoqa goyinno bessata giigisidi Leewe koche gidonna ixikoka oonaka kahine oothidi shuumis.
1Kings12:32 Yihudan boncheysada hospuntho ageenan tammanne ichashantho gallasan ba7aale bonchanaada Iyorbaami qamma qachidi yarsho yarshis. I haysada hanidi Beetele bidi
1Kings12:33 I ba huuphen doorida hospuntho ageenan
1Kings13:1 Heko
1Kings13:2 Goday kiittin he yarsho bessa bolla haysada yaagidi waassis; “Yarsho bessaw
1Kings13:3 He gallas Xoossa addey haysada yaagidi malaata immis; “Goday odida malaatay haysa; Heko
1Kings13:4 Kawoy Iyorbaami Xoossa addey Beetelen de7iya yarsho bessa bolla waassida waasuwa si7ida wode yarsho bessaafe ba kushiya mallidi
1Kings13:5 Xoossa addey Godaa qaalan immida malaatan yarsho bessay phalqetidi wodhin
1Kings13:6 Kawoy Iyorbaami Xoossa addiya
1Kings13:7 Kawoy nabiyako
1Kings13:8 Shin Xoossaa addey
1Kings13:9 Godaa qaalay
1Kings13:10 Hessa gisho
1Kings13:11 He wode Beetelen issi cima nabey de7ees. He gallas Xoossaa addey Beetelen oothidaba ubbaa he cima addiya nayti yidi iyaw odidosona. Qassi he addey kawas odida qaala enti banta aawas odidosona.
1Kings13:12 Aaway
1Kings13:13 I ba naytako “Taw elle hare koorite” yaagin
1Kings13:14 Xoossa addiya geedo kaallidi bis. Issi wolaa kuyan uttidaysa demmidi
1Kings13:15 Cima nabey
1Kings13:16 Xoossa addey zaaridi
1Kings13:17 Godaa qaalay taako ‘Neeni he bessan kathi moopa
1Kings13:18 Cima nabey
1Kings13:19 Hessa gisho
1Kings13:20 Enti gayta bolla uttidashin
1Kings13:21 Yihudape yida Xoossa addiyas ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
1Kings13:22 He bessan moopa woyko uyopa’ gida bessaa guye simmada yan kathi madasa; haathe uyadasa. Hiza ne ahay ne aawata duufon moogetenna” yaagis.
1Kings13:23 Xoossa addey midi uyidi simmin iya guye zaaridi ehida cima nabey ba hariya iyaw kooris.
1Kings13:24 I ogiya bishin gaammoy keyidi iya wodhin
1Kings13:25 Heko
1Kings13:26 Iya guye zaarida cima nabey hessa si7ida wode haysada yaagis; “Hessi Godaa qaalas kiitetonna ixida Xoossa addiya. Godaa qaalay iyaw koyrottidi odidaysada Goday gaammon iya gathis; yaatin
1Kings13:27 Hessafe guye
1Kings13:28 I keyidi biya wode ogiyan kundida aha
1Kings13:29 Cima nabey Xoossa addiya aha denthidi
1Kings13:30 Baw giigisidi wothida duufon aha moogis. Iyaw
1Kings13:31 Iya moogi simmidi ba naytako haysada yaagis; “Ta hayqiya wode Xoossa addey moogetida duufon tana moogite. Ta meqethaa iya meqethaa matan wothite.
1Kings13:32 Beetele kataman de7iya yarsho bessa bollanne Samaare kataman de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessata bolla Goday kiittin
1Kings13:33 Hessi haninka Iyorbaami ba iita ogiyape simmibeenna. Dhoqa goyinno bessatas Leewe koche gidonna oonaka kahine oothidi shuumis. Kahine gidanaw koyiya oonaka dhoqa goyinno bessan shuumees.
1Kings13:34 Iyorbaama keetha asaa dhaysanawunne biitta bollafe quchanaw gathida nagaray hessa.
1Kings14:1 He wode Iyorbaama na7ay Abiyi hargetis.
1Kings14:2 Iyorbaami ba machiw
1Kings14:3 Tammu uythu
1Kings14:4 Iyorbaama machiya I gidaysada oothada Akiya soo Seelo basu. Akiyi cimida gisho iya ayfey xeellanaw danda7enna.
1Kings14:5 Shin Goday Akiyako
1Kings14:6 Akiyi pengen toho girsi si7idi haysada yaagis; “Iyorbaama mache
1Kings14:7 Neeni Iyorbaamako bada
1Kings14:8 Dawita kochaafe kawotethaa ekada new immas; shin neeni ta aylliya Dawita mela gidaka. I ta kiitta naagis; ta sinthan suureba xalaala oothishe ba kumetha wozanan tana kaallis.
1Kings14:9 Neepe kase de7iya ubbay oothidaysafe aadhiya iitaba neeni oothadasa. Neeni new hara xoossatanne birape medhida eeqata medhadasa. Yaatada tana hanqethadasa; taw zoko zaaradasa.
1Kings14:10 Hessa gisho
1Kings14:11 Iyorbaama koche gididi kataman hayqiya oonaka kanati maana; gaxaren hayqeyisata salo kafoti maana. Taani Goday haysa odas!’ ” yaagis.
1Kings14:12 Iyorbaama macheko
1Kings14:13 Isra7eele ubbay na7aas yeekidi moogana. Iyorbaama keethan Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sinthan iyan lo77obay bentida gisho
1Kings14:14 Qassi Iyorbaama keethaa dhaysiya kawo Goday baw Isra7eele bolla denthana.
1Kings14:15 Goday Isra7eele shocana; haatha giddon mayrey qaaxeysada Goday he wode Isra7eele qaathana. Asheera geetetiya xoosse misile essidi
1Kings14:16 Iyorbaami oothida nagaraa gishonne Isra7eele asaa nagaraa oosisida gisho Goday Isra7eele aggana” yaagis.
1Kings14:17 Iyorbaama machiya bada Tirsa gakada
1Kings14:18 Ba aylliya nabiya Akiya baggara Goday odidaysada iya moogidosona; Isra7eele asa ubbay iyaw yeekidosona.
1Kings14:19 Iyorbaami oothida harabay
1Kings14:20 Iyorbaami laatamanne nam7u laythi kawotidi hayqis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Naadabi kawotis.
1Kings14:21 Solomone na7ay Robi7aami Yihudan kawotis; Robi7aami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi oytamanne issino. Goday ba sunthay xeegetana mela Isra7eele kochata biitta ubbaa giddofe doorida Yerusalaame kataman
1Kings14:22 Yihuda asay Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Banta oothida nagaran banta aawatape aadhidi Godaa hanqethidosona.
1Kings14:23 Qassi enti dhoqa goyinno bessata
1Kings14:24 Hari attoshin
1Kings14:25 Robi7aami kawotida ichashantho laythan Gibxe kawoy Shishaaqi Yerusalaame katamaa bola ola denthis.
1Kings14:26 Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadhon de7iya shaluwa
1Kings14:27 Yaatin
1Kings14:28 Kawoy Xoossa keethi biya wode naageysati gondalleta oykoosona; I simmidi biya wode enti zaaridi naageysata keethan wothoosona.
1Kings14:29 Robi7aami hanida harabaynne I oothida ubbay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
1Kings14:30 Robi7aaminne Iyorbaami ubba wode olan de7idosona.
1Kings14:31 Robi7aami hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; Dawita Kataman de7iya ba aawata duufon moogetis. Iya aaye sunthay Na7imo; iya Amoone biitta asi; Orobi7aama bessan iya na7ay Abiyi kawotis.
1Kings15:1 Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Abiyi Yihudan kawotis.
1Kings15:2 Abiyi Yerusalaamen heedzu laythi kawotis. Iya aayiya Abeseloome na7a; I sunthay Ma7iko.
1Kings15:3 Iyape kase
1Kings15:4 Gidoshin
1Kings15:5 Goday hessa oothiday
1Kings15:6 Abiyi de7ida laytha ubban Robi7aaminne Iyorbaami oletishe de7idosona.
1Kings15:7 Abiyi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis. Abiyinne Iyorbaami oletishe de7idosona.
1Kings15:8 Abiyi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis; I Dawita Kataman moogetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Asi kawotis.
1Kings15:9 Isra7eele kawoy Iyorbaami kawotida laatamantho laythan Asi Yihudan kawotis.
1Kings15:10 Asi Yerusalaamen oytamanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya wogga aaye sunthay Ma7iko; iya Abeseloome na7a.
1Kings15:11 Asi ba mayzay Dawiti oothidaysada
1Kings15:12 Goyinno woga oothidi addey addera laymatesata Asi biittafe dhaysis. Iyape kase de7iya kawoti medhida eeqa misileta ubbaa mentherethis.
1Kings15:13 Iya wogga aayiya Ma7ika Asheera geetetiya xoossees tuna eeqa misile medhida gisho
1Kings15:14 Asi dhoqa goyinno bessata ubbaa dhaysona aggikoka
1Kings15:15 Inne iya aaway Xoossas dummayidi wothida bira
1Kings15:16 Yihuda kawoy Asinne Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi
1Kings15:17 Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi Yihuda bolla dendidi
1Kings15:18 Hessa gaason kawoy Asi Xoossa keethaninne kawo gadhon de7iya worqanne bira ubbaa kessidi ba moorinnata kushen wothis. Heziyoona na7aa na7aa
1Kings15:19 “Kase ta aawaranne ne aawara caaqidaysada
1Kings15:20 Ben-Hadaadi kawoy Asi gidaysa ekidi
1Kings15:21 Kawoy Ba7oosi hessa si7idi
1Kings15:22 Hessafe guye kawoy Asi Yihudan de7iya asa ubbaa kiittin
1Kings15:23 Asi hanida harabay
1Kings15:24 Asi hayqidi
1Kings15:25 Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida nam7antho laythan Iyorbaama na7ay Naadabi Isra7eelen kawotis; I Isra7eele biittan nam7u laythi kawotis.
1Kings15:26 Naadabi kase ba aawa ogiyaninne Isra7eele asaa oosisida iya nagara ogiyan hemetidi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
1Kings15:27 Yisakoora koche gidida Akiya na7ay Ba7oosi Nadaaba bolla maqetis. He wode Naadabeynne iya olanchoti Filisxeemen de7iya Gibatoona katamaa yuushon de7oosona.
1Kings15:28 Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida heedzantho laythan Ba7oosi Nadaaba wodhidi iya bessan I baw kawotis.
1Kings15:29 Ba7oosi kawoto doomida mela Iyorbaama soo asa ubbaa wodhidi wursis. Goday Seelope yida ba aylliya
1Kings15:30 Hessi haniday
1Kings15:31 Naadabi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
1Kings15:32 Yihuda kawoy Asinne Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi banta kawotetha laytha ubban oletida mela de7idosona.
1Kings15:33 Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida heedzantho laythan Akiya na7ay Ba7oosi Isra7eele bolla kawotis; I Tirsa kataman uttidi laatamanne oyddu laythi kawotis.
1Kings15:34 Iyorbaami Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisidaysada ika he ogiyan hemetidi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
1Kings16:1 Hanaana na7aa gidida
1Kings16:2 “Taani nena baanape denthada ta asaa Isra7eele bolla halaqa oothas; shin neeni Iyorbaama ogiyan hemetadasa. Qassi ta asaa Isra7eele nagara oosisada enta nagaran tana hanqethadasa.
1Kings16:3 Heko
1Kings16:4 Ba7oosa koche gididi kataman hayqiya oonaka kani maana; qassi gaxaren hayqiya oonaka salo kafoti maana” yaagis.
1Kings16:5 Ba7oosi hanida harabay
1Kings16:6 Ba7oosi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetidi
1Kings16:7 Gujidika
1Kings16:8 Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne usupuntho laythan
1Kings16:9 Kawa toora moconatape issuwa gididi
1Kings16:10 Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne laapuntha laythan Zimiri
1Kings16:11 Zimira kawotida mela Ba7oosa soo asa ubbaa wodhis. Ba7oosi dabbo gidin lagge gidin issi addeka paxa ashshibeenna.
1Kings16:12 Nabiya Iyyu baggara Goday Ba7oosa bolla odida qaalada Zimiri Ba7oosa soo asa ubbaa wodhidi dhaysis.
1Kings16:13 Hessi haniday Ba7oosinne iya na7ay Eli banta eeqa goyinnidi oothida nagaraa gaasoninne Isra7eele asa oosisida nagaraa gaason
1Kings16:14 Eli hanida harabaynne I oothidabay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
1Kings16:15 Yihuda kawoy Asi kawotida laatamanne laapuntha laythan Zimiri Tirsan laapun gallasa xalaala kawotis. He wode Isra7eele olanchoti Gibatoona geetetiya Filisxeeme katamaa yuushuwa teqidosona.
1Kings16:16 Isra7eele asay Zimirii kawa bolla maqetidi iya wodhidaysa si7ida wode toora mocona Omira he gallas he bessan Isra7eele kawo oothidi kawothidosona.
1Kings16:17 Omirinne Isra7eele asay Gibatoonape keyidi Tirsa katamaa teqidosona.
1Kings16:18 Katamay oyketidaysa be7ida wode Zimiri kawo gadho giddon de7iya gimbiya gelidi kawo gadho taman oythis; ika hayqis.
1Kings16:19 Hessi haniday Iyorbaami oothida nagaranne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa kaallidi Zimiri Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothida gishosa.
1Kings16:20 Zimiri hanida harabaynne I maqida maqoy Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
1Kings16:21 He wode Isra7eele asay nam7u keyidi shaaketis. Asaape baggay Ginata na7aa Tibina kawothanaw koyin
1Kings16:22 Shin Omira maaddiya asay Ginata na7aa Tibina maaddiya asaape minnida gisho Tibini hayqin Omiri kawotis.
1Kings16:23 Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida hastamanne issintho laythan
1Kings16:24 Omiri Samaariya zuma Samira geetetiya addiyafe 6
1Kings16:25 Shin Omiri Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; I kase de7ida kawota ubbaafe aathidi nagara oothis.
1Kings16:26 Omiri Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami oothida nagaraanne Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraa kaallis; he pathonna eeqa gaason Godaa
1Kings16:27 Omiri hanida harabay
1Kings16:28 Omiri hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetidi
1Kings16:29 Yihuda Kawoy Asi kawotida hastamanne hospuntho laythan
1Kings16:30 Omira na7ay Akaabi baape sinthe kawotida kawota ubbaafe aadhiya iitabaa Godaa sinthan oothis.
1Kings16:31 Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami oothida nagaraa laafaba gidi qofo xalaala gidonashin
1Kings16:32 Samaaren I keexisida Ba7aale Eeqa Keethan yarsho bessi keexis.
1Kings16:33 Qassi Akaabi Asheera geetetiya xoosse misiliya essidi
1Kings16:34 Akaaba kawotethaa wode Beetelepe yida

1Kings18:29 Omarsi yarsho shiishiya wodey gakanaw enti tinbite odidosona; shin si7etiya girsi baawa; entana hayzidi zaaro immiya asi dhayis.

1Kings18:45 Guutha wodepe guye saloy kareetha shaaran dulkis; carkoy carkis; wolqaama iri bukis. Akaabi para gaariyan uttidi Izra7eela katamaa bis.

1Kings19:2 Elzabeela
1Kings19:3 Eeliyaasi ba shempuwas yayyidi
1Kings19:4 Issi gallasa oge mela biittan hemetis. I hemethaa aggidi issi sankara kuya garsan uttidi
1Kings19:5 Hessafe guye
1Kings19:6 I dendidi xeelliya wode
1Kings19:7 Godaa kiitanchoy nam7antho yidi
1Kings19:8 Eeliyaasi dendidi mis
1Kings19:9 I yaa gakidi
1Kings19:10 Eeliyaasi
1Kings19:11 Goday
1Kings19:12 Biitta qaaxuwape guye tami keyis; shin Goday tama giddon baawa. Tamape guye kalkashi si7etis.
1Kings19:13 Eeliyaasi he kalkashaa si7ida wode ba som7uwa afilan kammidi
1Kings19:14 Eeliyaasi
1Kings19:15 Goday iyako
1Kings19:16 Namisa na7aa
1Kings19:17 Azaheela mashshafe kessi ekiya ubbaa Iyyuy wodhana; Iyyu mashshafe kessi ekiya ubbaa Elsi wodhana.
1Kings19:18 Shin Ba7aale eeqa goyinnona woyko banta doonan Ba7aale eeqa yeeronna 7
1Kings19:19 Eeliyaasi he bessaafe dendidi bishe Safaaxa na7ay Elsi tammanne nam7u waaxa booran gade goyishin demmis; Elsi tammanne nam7antho waaxan goyees. Eeliyaasi iya matara aadhishe ba afila iya bolla yeggis.
1Kings19:20 Elsi boorata essidi
1Kings19:21 Hessa gisho
1Kings20:1 Soore kawoy Ben-Hadaadi ba olanchota ubbaa shiishis. Hastamanne nam7u kawotan
1Kings20:2 Isra7eele kawa Akaabako ase kiittidi haysada yaagis;
1Kings20:3 “Ne biraynne ne worqay tabaa; ne machetinne ne naytape lo77oti tabaa” yaagis.
1Kings20:4 Isra7eele kawoy zaaridi
1Kings20:5 Qassika
1Kings20:6 Shin wonto hannoode ne kawo gadhuwanne ne moorinnata keethaa pilgana mela ta oosanchota yeddana. Enti ne lo77oba gada wothidaba ubbaa efana” yaagidosona.
1Kings20:7 Isra7eele kawoy biitta cimata ubbaa shiishidi

1Kings20:18 Ben-Hadaadi
1Kings20:19 Awuraja haareysati kiittiya na7atetha olanchoti salpidi

1Kings20:21 Isra7eele kawoy olas keyidi
1Kings20:22 Hessafe guye

1Kings20:24 Neeni issiba ootha; hastamanne nam7u kawota kiittiya halaqatethafe denthada enta bessan hara halaqata shuuma.

1Kings20:32 Enti kayo ma7o ma7idi

1Kings20:35 Nabeta cugaape issi addey

1Kings20:40 Taani ne aylley oosoy darin

1Kings20:42 Nabey kawako

1Kings22:50 Iyosaafexi hayqidi ba mayzatan gahetis. Ba mayza Dawita Kataman moogetis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Iyoraami kawotis.

2Kings8:27 I entaw bollo gidida gisho
2Kings8:28 Akaziyaasi Araame kawa Azaheelara Galadan de7iya Raamota kataman oletanaw bidi
2Kings8:29 Iyoraami Araame kawa Azaheelara oletiya wode
2Kings9:1 Nabey Elsi nabeta cugaape issi asi xeegidi
2Kings9:2 Yaa gakada
2Kings9:3 Hessafe guye
2Kings9:4 Hessa gisho
2Kings9:5 I yaa gakida wode toora moconay issife zoretishin demmidi
2Kings9:6 Iyyuy dendidi soo gelin
2Kings9:7 Neeni ne godaa Akaaba kochaa dhaysana. Taani Elzabeela gussida nabeta
2Kings9:8 Akaaba kocha ubbay dhayana; taani Isra7eelen Akaaba kochaafe aylle gidin
2Kings9:9 Akaaba kochaa Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaama kochaadanne Akiya na7aa Ba7oosa kochaada oothana.
2Kings9:10 Elzabeelo
2Kings9:11 Iyyuy ba lagge gidida toora moconatako bida wode
2Kings9:12 Enti
2Kings9:13 He wode enti banta ma7uwa qaaridi
2Kings9:14 Iyosaafexa na7ay
2Kings9:15 Shin entafe kawoy Iyoraami Soore kawa Azaheelara oletida wode
2Kings9:16 Hessafe guye
2Kings9:17 Izra7eela gimbiya bolla eqidi wocheysa xeegidi
2Kings9:18 Paraaway Iyyura gahetanaw bidi
2Kings9:19 Hessa gisho
2Kings9:20 Wocheysi
2Kings9:21 Kawoy Iyoraami
2Kings9:22 Iyoraami Iyyu be7ida wode
2Kings9:23 Iyoraami ba para gaariya guye zaaridi baqatidi
2Kings9:24 Iyyuy
2Kings9:25 Iyyuy toora mocona Bidiqaarako
2Kings9:26 He wode Goday
2Kings9:27 Yihuda Kawoy Akaziyaasi hessa be7ida wode
2Kings9:28 Iya aylleti gaariyan iya ekidi
2Kings9:29 Akaaba na7ay Iyoraami kawotida tammanne issintho laythan Akaziyaasi Yihudan kawotis.
2Kings9:30 Hessafe guye
2Kings9:31 Iyyuy pengera gelishin
2Kings9:32 Iyyuy pude maskootiyako xeellidi
2Kings9:33 Iyyuy
2Kings9:34 Iyyuy kawa keethi gelidi
2Kings9:35 Shin enti iyo mooganaw bidi
2Kings9:36 Enti simmidi
2Kings9:37 Attidaysi Izra7eelan pito mela yegetana. Hessa gisho oonika
2Kings10:1 Akaabas Samaare kataman laapun tammu adde nayti de7oosona. Iyyuy Samaare katama halaqatas
2Kings10:2 “Hiza hinte godaa kochati
2Kings10:3 hinte godaa naytape lo77o gididaysa dooridi
2Kings10:4 Shin enti daro yayyidi
2Kings10:5 Hessa gisho
2Kings10:6 Iyyuy entaw nam7antho dabdaabe xaafishe
2Kings10:7 He kawa kochata dichiya asatako dabdaabey gakida wode
2Kings10:8 Kiitetida asay
2Kings10:9 Wontetha gallas wonta Iyyuy kare keyidi
2Kings10:10 Goday Akaaba kochata bolla odida qaalape issoyka sa7an wodhonnaysa hinte erite. Goday ba aylliya Eeliyaasa baggara odidaba polis” yaagis.
2Kings10:11 Hessa gisho
2Kings10:12 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:13 Yihuda kawa Akaziyaasa dabbotara gahetidi
2Kings10:14 Iyyuy ba asata
2Kings10:15 Iyyuy he bessaafe dendidi
2Kings10:16 “Taara yedha; taani Godaas waanada mishetiyako be7a” yaagis; iya ba gaariya bolla utisis.
2Kings10:17 Iyyuy Samaare yida wode
2Kings10:18 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:19 Ha77i Ba7aale nabeta
2Kings10:20 Iyyuy
2Kings10:21 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:22 Iyyuy
2Kings10:23 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:24 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:25 Iyyuy xuussa yarshuwa polidaape guye
2Kings10:26 Ba7aale eeqa keethaafe eeqa tuussata kessidi xuuggidosona.
2Kings10:27 Ba7aale eeqa shuchata tincherethidosona; Ba7aale eeqa keethaaka laallidosona. He bessaa sheesha keethi kessidosona; hachi gakanaw he bessay sheesha keethi gididi attis.
2Kings10:28 Hessada oothidi
2Kings10:29 Gidoshin
2Kings10:30 Goday Iyyuko
2Kings10:31 Iyyuy Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa higgiya ba kumetha wozanaape minthidi naagibeenna; qassi Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisida Iyorbaama nagaraape haakibeenna.
2Kings10:32 He wode Goday Isra7eele biittafe baggaa shaako doomis. Araame kawoy Azaheeli Isra7eele biittafe daro bessata xoonidi oykis.
2Kings10:33 Yordaanose Shaafape doloha baggara de7iya Galadanne Baasane biitta ubbaa oykis. He biittay Arnoona Shaafa matan de7iya Aro7eera katamaape doomidi
2Kings10:34 Iyyuy hanida harabay
2Kings10:35 Hessafe guye
2Kings10:36 Iyyuy Samaaren uttidi Isra7eele bolla laatamanne hospun laythi kawotis.
2Kings11:1 Akaziyaasa aayiya Gotola ba na7ay hayqidaysa be7ida wode
2Kings11:2 Shin kawa Iyoraama na7iya
2Kings11:3 Gotola biitta haariya wode ubban
2Kings11:4 Laapuntha laythan Yoodahey kawa naageysatanne kawo gadho naageysata halaqatas kiittidi
2Kings11:5 I enta
2Kings11:6 Issi cugay Suura pengiya naago; issi cugaa naageysatape guye baggara de7iya pengiya naago.
2Kings11:7 Sambaata galas naagope keyiya hanko nam7u cugay kumethi kawa bolla metoy gakonna mela Xoossa keetha naago.
2Kings11:8 Ola miishe oykidi
2Kings11:9 He halaqati
2Kings11:10 Kahiney Xoossa keethan de7iya
2Kings11:11 Naageysati issoy issoy ola miisheta banta kushen oykidi
2Kings11:12 Yoodahey kawa na7aa kare kessidi
2Kings11:13 Kawiya Gotola naageysata wocamaanne asaa wocamaa si7ida wode
2Kings11:14 Kawoy kase kawoti haneysada tuussa matan eqidysa be7asu. Halaqatinne moyze punneysati kawa matan de7oosona. He biitta asa ubbay ufaytidi
2Kings11:15 Kahiney Yoodahey tora moconatako
2Kings11:16 Enti iyo oykidi
2Kings11:17 Asay Godaa asi gidana mela
2Kings11:18 He wode Yihuda asa ubbay Ba7aale eeqa keethi bidi
2Kings11:19 Baara toora moconata
2Kings11:20 Yihuda asa ubbay ufaytidosona; Gotola kawo gadhon mashshan hayqidaape guye katamay wopu gis.
2Kings11:21 Iyo7aasi kawotiya wode laapun laytha na7a.
2Kings12:1 Iyyuy
2Kings12:2 Kahiney Yoodahey
2Kings12:3 Asay he bessan yarshonne ixaane cuyisethi aggiboonna gisho
2Kings12:4 Iyo7aasi kahineta xeegidi
2Kings12:5 Kahineti ubbay he miishiya ehiya asaape banta gishuwa gishuwa ekidi
2Kings12:6 Shin kawoy Iyo7aasi kawotida laatamanne heedzantho laythi gakanaw
2Kings12:7 Kawoy Iyo7aasi kahiniya Yoodahenne hara kahineta xeegidi
2Kings12:8 Kahineti
2Kings12:9 Yaatin
2Kings12:10 Enti saaxiniyan daro miishey dagaayetidaysa be7ida wode ubban
2Kings12:11 Taybetida miishiya salla7idaape guye
2Kings12:12 Miishiya shuchu masseysatasinne qoo7eysatas qanxanaw
2Kings12:13 Xoossa keetha yida miishiyape Xoossa keetha bira burcukota
2Kings12:14 He miishe ubbay Xoossa keetha oorathiya asaas qanxetis.
2Kings12:15 Xoossa keetha oosuwa xeellanaw sunthetida asati ammanetida asi gidida gisho
2Kings12:16 Naaqo yarshonne nagara yarshos qanxetiya miishey kahinetas gelesipe attishin
2Kings12:17 He wode Araame kawoy Azaheeli bidi
2Kings12:18 Shin Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aasi iyape kase kawotida Yihuda kawoti Iyosaafexi
2Kings12:19 Kawoy Iyo7aasi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings12:20 Hessafe guye
2Kings12:21 Iya wodhida oosanchoti Sim7ata na7aa Yozakaaranne Shomeera na7aa Yozabaata. Iyo7aasi Dawita Kataman ba mayzata duufon moogetis; iya bessan iya na7ay Amasiyaasi kawotis.
2Kings13:1 Akaziyaasa na7ay
2Kings13:2 I
2Kings13:3 Hessa gisho
2Kings13:4 Hessafe guye
2Kings13:5 Isra7eele asa ashshiya asi immin
2Kings13:6 Hessi haninka Isra7eele asaa balethida Iyorbaama soo asaa nagaraape simmibokona; enti he nagaraa ooso aggibokona. Qassi Asheera geetetiya xoosse eeqa misiley Samaaren eqidi de7ees.
2Kings13:7 Iyo7akaazas ishatamu para asata
2Kings13:8 Iyo7akaazi hanida harabay
2Kings13:9 Iyo7akaazi hayqidi
2Kings13:10 Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aasi kawotida hastamanne laapuntho laythan
2Kings13:11 Yo7aasi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis. Isra7eele asaa balethida Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaama nagaraape issuwaka ashshona oothis; I he nagara ooso aggibeenna.
2Kings13:12 Yo7aasi hanida harabay
2Kings13:13 Yo7aasi hayqidi

2Kings13:17 Elsi

2Kings13:19 Xoossa addey
2Kings13:20 Elsi hayqidi moogetis. Moo7abe paannoti Isra7eele biitta bolla laythan laythan dendoosona.
2Kings13:21 Issi gallas guutha Isra7eele asati issi uraa aha moogishe
2Kings13:22 Iyo7akaazi kawotida laytha ubban Soore Kawoy Azaheeli Isra7eele un7ethis.
2Kings13:23 Shin Goday Abrahaamera
2Kings13:24 Araame kawoy Azaheeli hayqin
2Kings13:25 Azaheeli iya aawa Iyo7akaazi olan oykida katamata
2Kings14:1 Iyo7akaaza na7ay
2Kings14:2 I kawotiya wode laythi iyaw laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen laatamanne uddufun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yoodanoo; iya Yerusalaame maccas.
2Kings14:3 Amasiyaasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis; shin iya mayzay Dawiti oothidaysada gidonashin
2Kings14:4 Asay dhoqa goyinno bessata dhaysibeenna; asay he bessan yarsho yarsheysanne ixaane cuyiseysa aggibokona.
2Kings14:5 Amasiyaasi kawotethaa minthidi oykidaape guye
2Kings14:6 Muse higge maxaafan xaafetidaysada
2Kings14:7 Amasiyaasi Maxine Zangaaran tammu mukulu Edoome asaa wodhidi
2Kings14:8 Hessafe guye
2Kings14:9 Shin Isra7eele kawoy Yo7aasi
2Kings14:10 Ee
2Kings14:11 Shin Amasiyaasi iya si7ibeenna. Isra7eele kawoy Yo7aasi olas keyin
2Kings14:12 Isra7eeley Yihuda xoonin
2Kings14:13 Isra7eele kawoy Yo7aasi Akaziyaasa na7aa na7aa
2Kings14:14 Xoossa keethaninne kawo gadhon shalo minjiya keethan de7iya worqaa
2Kings14:15 Yo7aasi hanida harabay
2Kings14:16 Yo7aasi hayqidi
2Kings14:17 Iyo7akaaza na7ay
2Kings14:18 Amasiyaasi hanida harabay Yihuda kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings14:19 Amasiyaasa wodhanaw asay Yerusalaamen maqetis; yaatin I Laakiso katama baqatis. Shin enti iya geedo Laakiso katama ase kiittin
2Kings14:20 Wodhidi iya aha paran caani ehidi
2Kings14:21 Hessafe guye
2Kings14:22 Iya aaway Amasiyaasi hayqidaape guye
2Kings14:23 Iyo7aasa na7ay
2Kings14:24 Nam7antho Iyorbaami Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; Isra7eele asaa nagara oosisida Nabaaxa na7aa Iyorbaami ogiyape haakibeenna.
2Kings14:25 Gaat-Hefera addiya Amaate na7aa nabiya
2Kings14:26 Isra7eelen asa ubbay aylle gidin
2Kings14:27 Goday Isra7eele asaa sunthaa salope garsan quchana gibeenna. Hessa gisho
2Kings14:28 Iyorbaami hanida harabay
2Kings14:29 Iyorbaami hayqidi
2Kings15:1 Isra7eele kawoy Iyorbaami kawotida laatamanne laapuntha laythan
2Kings15:2 I kawotida wode
2Kings15:3 Iya aaway Amasiyaasi oothidaysada
2Kings15:4 Gidoshin
2Kings15:5 Goday Azaariyasa guutha goga hargen oythis; hayqana gakanaw he hargey iya yeddiboonna gisho
2Kings15:6 Azaariyasi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:7 Azaariyasi hayqidi
2Kings15:8 Yihuda kawoy Azaariyasi kawotida hastamanne hospuntho laythan
2Kings15:9 Iya mayzati oothidaysada
2Kings15:10 Iyabeesa na7ay Saloomi Zakaryaasa bolla maqetidi
2Kings15:11 Zakaryaasi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:12 Hessada hanidi
2Kings15:13 Yihuda kawoy Ooziyani kawotida hastamanne uddufuntho laythan
2Kings15:14 Gaade na7ay Minaheemi Tirsa katamaape Samaare bis. Samaaren de7iya Yaabesa na7aa Saluma wodhidi iya bessan baw kawotis.
2Kings15:15 Salumi hanida harabaynne I maqetida maqoy Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:16 He wode Minaheemi Tirsafe dendidi
2Kings15:17 Yihuda kawoy Azaariyasi kawotida hastamanne uddufuntho laythan
2Kings15:18 I Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraape haakibeenna.
2Kings15:19 Hessafe guye
2Kings15:20 Minaheemi he miishiya Isra7eele asaa wolqan kessis; Asoore kawas immanaw dure asi ubbay issoy issoy ishatamu bira santime kessidosona. Hessada oothin
2Kings15:21 Minaheemi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:22 Minaheemi hayqidi
2Kings15:23 Yihuda kawoy Azaariyasi kawotida ishatamantho laythan
2Kings15:24 Paqsiyaasi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Isra7eele asa oosisida nagaraa ooso aggibeenna.
2Kings15:25 Iya toora moconatape issoy
2Kings15:26 Paqsiyaasi hanida harabaynne oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:27 Yihuda Kawoy Azaariyasi kawotida ishatammanne nam7antho laythan
2Kings15:28 Paaquhey Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; Nabaaxa na7ay Iyorbaami Isra7eele asaa oosisida nagaraape haakibeenna.
2Kings15:29 Isra7eele kawa Paaquhe wodiyan Asoore Kawoy Telgeltelfelisoori yidi
2Kings15:30 Azaariyasa na7ay Iyo7atami kawotida laatamantho laythan
2Kings15:31 Paaquhey hanida harabaynne oothidaba ubbay Isra7eele Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:32 Ramala na7ay
2Kings15:33 Iyo7atami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne usupun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yarusho; Yarusha Saadoqa na7iw.
2Kings15:34 Ba aaway Azaariyasi oothidaysada
2Kings15:35 Gidoshin
2Kings15:36 Iyo7atami hanida harabaynne oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings15:37 He wode Goday Araame kawa Ra7asoonanne Ramala na7aa
2Kings15:38 Iyo7atami hayqidi
2Kings16:1 Ramala na7ay Paaquhey kawotida tammanne laapuntho laythan
2Kings16:2 I kawotiya wode laythi iyaw laatama; Yerusalaamen tammanne usupun laythi kawotis. Iya mayzay Dawita suureba oothidaysada
2Kings16:3 I kase de7ida Isra7eele kawota ogiyan hemetis. Qassi Goday Isra7eele asa sinthafe gooddidi kessida asata wogaa
2Kings16:4 Akaazi dhoqa goyinno bessatan
2Kings16:5 Hessafe guye
2Kings16:6 He wode Araame kawoy Ra7asooni Elata katama zaari ekidi
2Kings16:7 Hessa gisho
2Kings16:8 Qassi Akaazi Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadhon shalo minjiya bessan de7iya biraanne worqaa ekidi
2Kings16:9 Akaaza oysha ekidi
2Kings16:10 Kawoy Akaazi Asoore kawa Telgeltelfelisoorara gahetanaw Damasqo bis. Damasqon de7iya yarsho bessa be7idi
2Kings16:11 Kawoy Akaazi Damasqofe simmidi yaanas
2Kings16:12 Kawoy Damasqofe simmida wode
2Kings16:13 xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho yarshis. Qassi ushsha yarshuwa gussis; issifetetha yarsho suuthaaka yarsho bessa bolla dharcis.
2Kings16:14 Naase biratape oosetidi
2Kings16:15 Kawoy Akaazi kahiniya Uraya haysada yaagidi kiittis; “Ha gita yarsho bessan wonta xuussa yarsho
2Kings16:16 Urayi kawoy Akaazi kiittidaysada oothis.
2Kings16:17 Kawoy Akaazi Xoossa keetha giddon go7etiya
2Kings16:18 Asoore kawa gisho
2Kings16:19 Kawoy Akaazi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings16:20 Akaazi hayqidi
2Kings17:1 Yihuda kawoy Akaazi kawotida tammanne nam7antho laythan
2Kings17:2 I
2Kings17:3 Asoore kawoy Salminasoori yidi
2Kings17:4 Shin guutha laythafe guye
2Kings17:5 Asoore kawoy Isra7eele biitta ubbaa bolla dendidi
2Kings17:6 Hosey kawotida uddufuntho laythan Asoore kawoy Samaare katama oykis; Isra7eele asaa ekidi
2Kings17:7 Haysi ubbay haniday
2Kings17:8 Goday enta sinthafe gooddidi kessida hara kawotethata wogaa kaallida gishosa. Hessa bolla qassi Isra7eele kawoti doomida iita wogaa kaallida gishosa.
2Kings17:9 Isra7eele asay Godaa banta Xoossaa bolla geeman iitabaa oothidosona; guutha moothafe bidi
2Kings17:10 Qassi enti eeqa shuchatanne Asheera geetetiya xoosse misileta zuma huuphe ubbaaninne daashsha mitha ubbaa garsan essidosona.
2Kings17:11 Goday beni enta sinthafe gooddidi kessida allaga asay oothidaysada
2Kings17:12 Goday enta
2Kings17:13 Goday Isra7eele asaanne Yihuda asaa ba nabeta baggaranne qoncethi be7iya ubbaa baggara
2Kings17:14 Shin enti si7onna ixidosona. Godaa banta Xoossaa ammanetibona banta aawatada morge minthidosona.
2Kings17:15 Enti iya wogaa
2Kings17:16 Godaa banta Xoossaa kiita ubbaa aggaagidosona. Mari daaniya
2Kings17:17 Enti banta adde naytanne macca nayta tama giddora aathidosona. Marotanne moytille xeegeyisata zore oychidosona. Hessa mela iitabaa oothanaw bantana bayzidi
2Kings17:18 Hessa gisho
2Kings17:19 Qassi Yihuda asayka
2Kings17:20 Hessa gaason
2Kings17:21 Goday Isra7eele asaa Dawita kochaa kawotethaafe beni shaakida wode
2Kings17:22 Isra7eele asay Iyorbaami oothida nagaraa ubbaa oothidosona; iyape simmibokona.
2Kings17:23 Goday nabeta
2Kings17:24 Asoore kawoy Babiloone biittan de7iya Kuuta
2Kings17:25 Enti koyro yan duussu doomida wode
2Kings17:26 Yaatin
2Kings17:27 Asoore kawoy
2Kings17:28 Hessa gisho
2Kings17:29 Gidoshin
2Kings17:30 Hessada oothidi
2Kings17:31 Awaawa asay Albazaranne Tartaqa geetetiya eeqa misileta medhidosona. Safarwayma asay qassi Adramelekinne Anameleka geetetiya banta xoossatas banta nayta taman xuuggidi yarshidosona.
2Kings17:32 Enti Godaa goyinnidosona; shin banta giddofe dumma dumma asaa dooridi
2Kings17:33 Enti Godaa goyinnidosona; gidikoka
2Kings17:34 Enti hachi gakanaw kase meezetidaysada oothosona. Enti tuma Godaa goyinnokona woyko Goday Isra7eele gidi sunthida Yayqooba zerethaas immida awaajuwanne wogaa
2Kings17:35 Goday Isra7eele asaara beni caaqida wode
2Kings17:36 Shin Gibxefe hintena ba gita wolqaaninne ba micetida kushen kessida Godaas oothite; iyaw gulbatite; iyaw yarsho yarshite.
2Kings17:37 Goday hintew xaafida awaajuwanne wogaa
2Kings17:38 Taani hintera caaqida caaquwa dogopite; hara xoossata goyinnofite.
2Kings17:39 Hessa aggidi
2Kings17:40 Shin enti iyaw ero goonna ixidi
2Kings17:41 He asati Godaa goyinnisheka
2Kings18:1 Ela na7ay Hosey Isra7eelen kawotida heedzantho laythan
2Kings18:2 I kawotiya wode laythi iyaw laatamanne ichasha; Yerusalaamen laatamanne uddufun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Abiya geetetees; iya Zakaryaasa na7iw.
2Kings18:3 Iya mayzay Dawiti oothidaysada
2Kings18:4 Asay dhoqa goyinno bessata diggis. Eeqa tuussata mentherethis. Asheera geetetiya xoosse misiliya qanxi yeggis. Qassi Musey naase biratape medhida
2Kings18:5 Hizqiyaasi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa ammanis; Yihuda kawota ubbaa giddon iya mela kawoy iyape kase gidin
2Kings18:6 I Godaara oyketis; Godaa kaalo aggibeenna; Goday Muse kiitida kiitata naagis.
2Kings18:7 Goday iyara gidis; I oothiyaba ubbay iyaw injetis. I Asoore kawa bolla makallidi
2Kings18:8 I
2Kings18:9 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi kawotida oyddantho laythan
2Kings18:10 Heedzantho laythi Samaare katama xoonis. Yaatin
2Kings18:11 Asoore kawoy Isra7eele asaa Asoore biitta efidi
2Kings18:12 Hessika enti Godaas banta Xoossaas kiitetonna ixidi
2Kings18:13 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi kawotida tammanne oyddantho laythan
2Kings18:14 Yaatin
2Kings18:15 Hizqiyaasi Xoossa keethan
2Kings18:16 He wode Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasi
2Kings18:17 Asoore kawoy
2Kings18:18 Enti kawa xeegin
2Kings18:19 Asooreta halaqay

2Kings18:21 Heko
2Kings18:22 Shin neeni
2Kings18:23 Ha77i haaya; ta godaa Asoore kawuwara mandeta. Neeni togganaw danda7iya
2Kings18:24 Neeni

2Kings18:30 Goday tuma nuna ashshana; ha katamayka Asoore kawa kushen gelenna’ yaagidi hinte Godan ammanetanna mela oothofo” yaagees.

2Kings19:17 Abeeti Godaw

2Kings19:22 Neeni cayidaynne toochiday oonee? Neeni ne qaala oodde bolla dhoqu oothadii? otoron dhoqu gada oona xeelladii? Hessa neeni oothiday ta bolla

2Kings21:1 Minaasey kawotiya wode iyaw laythi tammanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen ishatammanne ichashu laythi kawotis; iya aaye sunthay Hefseebo.

2Kings21:3 Iya aaway Hizqiyaasi laallida
2Kings21:4 Goday
2Kings21:5 Xoossa keethan de7iya nam7u dabaabatan salo xoolintota ubbaas yarsho bessata giigisis.
2Kings21:6 Ba na7aa tama giddora aathis. I ba huuphen bitanchonne murunniya asi gididi
2Kings21:7 Masetidi keyida Asheera xoosse misiliya ehidi

2Kings21:9 Shin asay si7onnan ixis; Goday Isra7eele asaa sinthafe dhaysida hara kawotethatape aadhidi iita oothana mela Minaasey enta balethis.
2Kings21:10 Goday ba aylle gidida nabeta baggara haysada yaagis;
2Kings21:11 “Yihuda kawoy Minaasey ha tuna oosuwa oothis; baape kase de7ida Amoore asa ubbaa nagaraape aadhiya iita nagara oothis. Yihuda asa ba medhida eeqa misiliya goyinnisidi
2Kings21:12 Goday
2Kings21:13 Samaare bolla yeggida wadha wodoruwa
2Kings21:14 Ta asaape attidaysata taani yegga aggana; taani enta enta morketa kushen aathada immana. Enta morketi ubbay enta oykananne bonqana.

2Kings22:1 Iyosyaasi kawotiya wode

2Kings22:17 Enti tana aggidi

2Kings23:1 Kawoy Iyosyaasi Yihuda cimatanne Yerusalaame cimata ubbaa shiishis.
2Kings23:2 Kawoy pude Xoossa keethi keyis; Yihuda asay
2Kings23:3 Kawoy tuussa matan eqidi
2Kings23:4 Kawoy kahine halaqa Kalqe
2Kings23:5 Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame yuushuwan de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessa ubban ixaane cuyisanaw Yihuda kawoti sunthida eeqata kahineta ubbaa oosope kessis. Ba7aales
2Kings23:6 Asheera xoosse misiliya Xoossa keethafe kessidi
2Kings23:7 Xoossa keetha giddon goyinno woga oothidi
2Kings23:8 Iyosyaasi kahineta ubbaa Yihuda katamatape ehidi
2Kings23:9 Dhoqa goyinno bessaa kahineti Yerusalaamen Godaa yarsho bessa pude yookona; shin enti hara kahinetara issife irshoy geliboonna daabbo moosona.
2Kings23:10 Kawoy Iyosyaasi Henooma zangaaran de7iya Toofeta yarsho bessa tunisis. Moloka xoossas issi asika ba adde na7aa woyka macca na7a tama giddora aathona mela diggis.
2Kings23:11 Yihuda kawoti Xoossa keethaa geliya pengiyan awas dummayidi wothida parata diggis. Awa parati Naatan-Meleka halaqaa kifiliya matan de7iya dabaaban de7oosona. Hessafe guye
2Kings23:12 Akaaza keethaa pooqiya bolla Yihuda kawoti giigisida yarsho bessatan Minaasey Xoossa keethan de7iya nam7u dabaabata giddon giigisida yarsho bessata Kawoy Iyosyaasi laallis. Enta he bessaafe diggidi tincherethidi
2Kings23:13 Kawoy Yerusalaame katamaape doloha baggara
2Kings23:14 Kawoy Iyosyaasi goyinno shucha tuussataka mentherethidi

2Kings23:16 Hessafe guye
2Kings23:17 Hessafe guye kawoy
2Kings23:18 Kawoy
2Kings23:19 Isra7eele kawoti Samaare katamatan oosisidi
2Kings23:20 I goyinno dhoqa bessan oothiya kahineta ubba yarsho bessa bolla wodhis; qassi he yarsho bessa bolla asaa meqethaa xuuggis. Hessa ubbaa oothidi
2Kings23:21 Kawoy asa ubbaa
2Kings23:22 Isra7eele haariya daynnata wodepe doomidi
2Kings23:23 Shin Kawoy Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Yerusalaame kataman Godaa bonchanaw Paasika Ba7aaley bonchetis.
2Kings23:24 Kahine halaqay Kalqiyaasi Xoossa keethan bentida maxaafan xaafetida higgiya qaala minthanaada
2Kings23:25 Muse higgiyada ba kumetha wozanan
2Kings23:26 Minaasey Godaa hanqethanaw oothida iita ooso ubbaa gisho
2Kings23:27 Goday
2Kings23:28 Iyosyaasi hanida harabaynne I oothidabay ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.
2Kings23:29 Iyosyaasa wode Gibxe Kawoy Naakoy
2Kings23:30 Aylleti iya aha para gaare bolla wothidi
2Kings23:31 Iyo7akaazi kawotiya wode
2Kings23:32 Iya mayzati oothidaysada
2Kings23:33 Iyo7akaazi Yerusalaamen kawotennaada Gibxe Kawoy Naakoy Hamaata biittan Irbilan iya qachidi heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame deexiya biranne hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame deexiya worqa Yihuda asaa giirisis.
2Kings23:34 Kawoy Naakoy Iyosiyaasa na7aa Eliyaqeeme iya aawa bessan kawothis; iya sunthaa Iyo7aqeema yaagidi laammis. Shin Iyo7akaaza Gibxe efin
2Kings23:35 Iyo7aqeemi
2Kings23:36 Iyo7aqeemi kawotiya wode laythi iyaw laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Zabido; iya Ruuma kataman de7iya Padaya na7a.
2Kings23:37 Iyo7aqeemi ba mayzati oothidaysada
2Kings24:1 Iyo7aqeema wode Babiloone Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Yihuda bolla dendis. Iyo7aqeemi iyaw heedzu laytha haaretidaape guye

2Kings24:4 I xillo asa suuthu gussidi
2Kings24:5 Iyo7aqeemi hanida harabaynne I oothidaba ubbay Yihuda Kawota Taarike Maxaafan xaafetis.

1Chronicles2:1 Isra7eele adde nayti haysata; Robeela
1Chronicles2:2 Daane
1Chronicles2:3 Kanaane maccase Sewape Yihudi yelida heedzu adde nayti Era
1Chronicles2:4 Yihudi ba na7aa mache Timaaripe Faaresanne Zaara yelis. Yihudas ichashu adde nayti de7oosona.
1Chronicles2:5 Faaresa adde nayti Hesiroomanne Hamuula.
1Chronicles2:6 Zaara adde nayti Zimira
1Chronicles2:7 Zaara koche gidida Karma na7ay Akaani Xoossas dummatida di7uwape kaysotidi Isra7eele asaa un7ethidaysa.
1Chronicles2:8 Etaana na7ay Azaara.
1Chronicles2:9 Hesrooni yelida nayti Yiram7eela
1Chronicles2:10 Araami Amnadaabe yelis. Amnadaabey Yihuda kochata halaqa Na7asoona yelis.
1Chronicles2:11 Na7asooni Salmoona yelis; Salmooni Boo7eza yelis;
1Chronicles2:12 Boo7ezi Iyyobeda yelis; Iyyobedi Isseye yelis.
1Chronicles2:13 Isseyey ba bayra na7aa Eliyaaba
1Chronicles2:14 oyddantho na7aa Natina7eela
1Chronicles2:15 usupuntho na7aa Asama
1Chronicles2:16 Isseye macca nayti Xaruyonne Abigiya. Xaruyi nayti heedzati Abisaya
1Chronicles2:17 Abigiya Amaasa yelasu; Amaasa aaway Isma7eela addiya Yetera.
1Chronicles2:18 Hesiroona na7aa Kaalebas Azuubonne Yir7ooto geetetiya nam7u macheti de7oosona. I Azuubipe Yesaara
1Chronicles2:19 Azuubi hayqin
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri Ure yelis; Urey Basli7eela yelis.
1Chronicles2:21 Hesiroonas laythi usupun tammu gidin
1Chronicles2:22 Sagubi Ya7ira yelis. Ya7iri Galada biittan de7iya laatamanne heedzu katamata haaris.
1Chronicles2:23 Shin Geshuranne Soore kawoti Ya7ira katamata Qanaatanne iya yuushuwan de7iya usupun tammu katamata olidi oykidosona; yan de7iya asa ubbay Galada aawa Makira koche.
1Chronicles2:24 Hesrooni Kaaleba Efraata geetetiya bessan hayqidaape guye
1Chronicles2:25 Hesiroona bayra na7aa Yirama7eela bayra na7ay Rama; kaaloti Buna
1Chronicles2:26 Yirahim7eelas Ataaro geetetiya hara macha de7awusu; Ataara Onaama aayiw.
1Chronicles2:27 Yirama7eela bayra na7aa Rama nayti Ma7asa
1Chronicles2:28 Onaama nayti Shamayanne Yada. Samaye nayti Naadabenne Abisura.
1Chronicles2:29 Abisura machiya Abikaala Ahbaananne Molida yelasu.
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaaba adde nayti Selidanne Afayma; Selidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
1Chronicles2:31 Afayma na7ay Yishi7a; Yishi7a na7ay Soosana; Soosana na7ay Ahilaya.
1Chronicles2:32 Shamaya ishaa Yada nayti Yeteranne Yoonataana; Yeteri na7a yelonna hayqis.
1Chronicles2:33 Yoonataana nayti Felitanne Zaaza. Haysati Yirama7eela kochata.
1Chronicles2:34 Soosanas macca na7ape attishin
1Chronicles2:35 Soosani ba na7iw ba aylliya Iyoheelas immin
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi Naatana yelis; Naatani Zabada yelis;
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi Eflaala yelis; Eflaali Obeeda yelis;
1Chronicles2:38 Obeedi Iyyu yelis; Iyyuy Azaara yelis;
1Chronicles2:39 Azaariyasi Kelesa yelis; Kelesi El7aasa yelis;
1Chronicles2:40 El7aasi Sisimaya yelis;
1Chronicles2:41 Sisimayi Salooma yelis; Saloomi Yiqaama yelis; Yiqaami Elisaama yelis.
1Chronicles2:42 Yirama7eela ishaa Kaaleba bayra na7ay Moosa. Moosa na7ay Ziifa; Ziifa na7ay Mereesa; Mereesa na7ay Kebroona.
1Chronicles2:43 Kebroona nayti Qoraha
1Chronicles2:44 Shamayey Yorqa7aama aawa Rahaama yelis. Reqeemi Shamaya yelis.
1Chronicles2:45 Shamaya na7ay Ma7oona. Maa7oni Beet-Xura yelis.
1Chronicles2:46 Kaaleba laggethiya Efa
1Chronicles2:47 Yahidaya nayti Regema
1Chronicles2:48 Kaaleba laggethiya Ma7ika Sheberanne Tirihaana yelasu.
1Chronicles2:49 Qassika Medmaana aawa Shafanne Makibeenanne Gib7a aawa Susana yelasu. Kaaleba macca na7e sunthay Akiso.
1Chronicles2:50 Kaaleba nayti harati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidosona. Kaalebi ba bayra na7aa Huura ba mache Efraatape yelis. Huura nayti Qiriyat-Yi7aarima aawa Sobaala
1Chronicles2:51 Beeteleme aawa Salmonanne Beet-Gadera aawa Hareefa.
1Chronicles2:52 Qiriyat-Yi7aarima aawa Sobaala yarati Haro7eetatanne Manuhoota yaratape baggata.
1Chronicles2:53 Qiriyat-Yi7aarima yarati Yatireta
1Chronicles2:54 Beeteleme aawa Salmoona yarati Naxoofata
1Chronicles2:55 Yaabexa kataman de7iya xaafeta yarati Tir7eta
1Chronicles3:1 Kebroona kataman Dawiti yelida nayti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata; Izira7eele maccase Aknahoomipe yelida bayra na7ay Amnoona. Qarmeloosa maccase Abigiyape yelida nam7antho na7ay Daanela.
1Chronicles3:2 Geshura kawa Talmaya na7iya Ma7ika yelida heedzantho na7ay Abeseloome. Agita yelida oyddantho na7ay Adoniyaasa.
1Chronicles3:3 Abixaala yelida ichashantho na7ay Safaaxa. Egila yelida usupuntho na7ay Yitirhaama.
1Chronicles3:4 Dawiti ha usupun nayta Kebroonan yelis. Dawiti Kebroonan laapun laythinne usupun ageena kawotis. Yerusalaamen hastamanne heedzu laythi kawotis.
1Chronicles3:5 Dawiti Yerusalaamen Ami7eela na7e Barsaabepe yelida oyddu nayti Saamusa
1Chronicles3:6 Qassi hara uddufun adde nayti Iyabhaara
1Chronicles3:7 Noga
1Chronicles3:8 Elsama
1Chronicles3:9 Ha adde nayta ubbaa bolla Dawitas laggethotape yeletida hara adde nayti de7oosona; Timaaro geetetiya micha entaw de7awusu.
1Chronicles3:10 Kawa Solomone yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Solomone na7ay Orobi7aama; Orobi7aama na7ay Abiya; Abiya na7ay Asa; Asa na7ay Iyosaafexa;
1Chronicles3:11 Iyosaafexa na7ay Iyoraama; Iyoraama na7ay Akaziyaasa; Akaziyaasa na7ay Iyo7aasa;
1Chronicles3:12 Iyo7aasa na7ay Amasiyaasa; Amasiyaasa na7ay Azaariyasa; Azaariyasa na7ay Iyo7atama;
1Chronicles3:13 Iyo7atama na7ay Akaaza; Akaaza na7ay Hizqiyaasa; Hizqiyaasa na7ay Minaase;
1Chronicles3:14 Minaase na7ay Amoxe; Amoxe na7ay Iyosyaasa.
1Chronicles3:15 Iyosyaasa na7ay bayray Yohaanana; nam7anthoy Iyo7aaqeme; heedzanthoy Sedeqiyaasa; oyddanthoy Salooma.
1Chronicles3:16 Iyo7aaqeme nayti Ikoniyaananne Sedeqiyaasa.
1Chronicles3:17 Di7etidi Babiloone bida Ikoniyaana adde nayti Salatiyaala
1Chronicles3:18 Malkiraama
1Chronicles3:19 Padaya adde nayti Zarubaabelanne Same7a. Zarubaabela adde nayti Masulaamanne Hanaana; enta michiya Salomito.
1Chronicles3:20 Hayisata bolla hara ichashu adde nayti Zarubaabelas de7oosona; entika Hashuba
1Chronicles3:21 Hanaana adde nayti Palaxanne Yeshaya. Yeshaya na7ay Rafaya; Rafaya na7ay Arnaana; Arnaana na7ay Abdiyu; Abdiyu na7ay Sakana;
1Chronicles3:22 Sakana na7ay Shamaya. Shamaya nayti ichashati Haxusa
1Chronicles3:23 Na7ara nayti heedzati Eliyo7ana
1Chronicles3:24 Eliyo7ana nayti laapunati Hodawa
1Chronicles4:1 Yihuda kochati Paaresa
1Chronicles4:2 Sobaala na7ay Rayi Yahaata yelis; Yahaati Ahumayanne Lahada yelis. Haysati Xor7ata yarata.
1Chronicles4:3 Exaama adde nayti Izira7eele
1Chronicles4:4 Panu7eeli Gadoora yelis. Exeri Husha yelis. Huuri ba aaye Efraatas bayra na7a; Huuri Beeteleme aawa. Haysati Huura yarata.
1Chronicles4:5 Tequhe aawa Ashihuuras Heelonne Na7ira geetetiya nam7u macheti de7oosona.
1Chronicles4:6 Na7ira Ahuzama
1Chronicles4:7 Heela adde nayti Dereta
1Chronicles4:8 Qooxe adde nayti Anuba
1Chronicles4:9 Yaabexi ba ishatape aadhidi bonchetida asi. Iya aayiya
1Chronicles4:10 Yaabexi Isra7eele Xoossaa xeegidi
1Chronicles4:11 Shuha ishay Kaluba Mahira yelis; Mahiri Eshtoona yelis.
1Chronicles4:12 Eshtooni Beet-Raafa
1Chronicles4:13 Qeneza adde nayti Gotoniyalanne Saraya; Gotoniyala adde nayti Hatatanne Ma7onotaya.
1Chronicles4:14 Ma7onotayi Ofira yelis. Sarayi Iyo7aaba yelis. Iyo7aabi Kushe Hiillata Zangaara geetetiya bessan de7iya asaa yelis.
1Chronicles4:15 Yoofone na7aa Kaaleba nayti Ira
1Chronicles4:16 Yihali7eela nayti Ziifa
1Chronicles4:17 Ezira adde nayti Yetera
1Chronicles4:18 Yihuda biittafe ekida machiya Gadoora aawa Yereda
1Chronicles4:19 Nahama miche
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoona nayti Amnoona
1Chronicles4:21 Yihuda na7aa Seela kochati Leeka aawa Era
1Chronicles4:22 Harati qassi Yoqima
1Chronicles4:23 Haysati Naxa7imaninne Gadeeran de7iya meqa miishe medhiya asata. Enti kawa ooso oothanaw iyara issife de7idosona.
1Chronicles4:24 Simoona nayti Nemu7eela
1Chronicles4:25 Saa7ula na7ay Saluma; Saluma na7ay Mibsaama; Mibsaama na7ay Masmaa7a;
1Chronicles4:26 Masmaa7a na7ay Hamu7eela; Hamu7eela na7ay Zakura; Zakura na7ay Same7a.
1Chronicles4:27 Same7i tammanne usupun adde naytanne usupun macca nayta yelis. Shin iya ishati daro na7a yelibookona. Yihuda kochaada Simoona kochay daribookona.
1Chronicles4:28 Simoona kochati Barsaabe katamaninne Molada
1Chronicles4:29 Baala
1Chronicles4:30 Batu7eela
1Chronicles4:31 Beet-Markaboota
1Chronicles4:32 Qassi enta gutati Exaama
1Chronicles4:33 Ba7aale gakanaw ha katamata yuushuwan de7iya gutati ubbay entan gujetoosona. Haysati enti de7iya bessatanne banta yeletaa maara mazgaben xaafidi oykidosona.
1Chronicles4:34 Simoona yarata halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enti Mashobaaba
1Chronicles4:35 Iyyu7eelanne Yoshiba na7aa Iyyu. Iyyu aawa aaway Asa7eela na7a Saraya.
1Chronicles4:36 Hara halaqati qassi Eliyo7ana
1Chronicles4:37 Ziiza. Ziizi Shifa na7a; Shifi Aloona na7a; Alooni Yadaya na7a; Yadayi Shimira na7a; Shimiri Shamaya na7a.
1Chronicles4:38 Simoona yarata halaqati haysata. Enta aawata kochay darishe bis.
1Chronicles4:39 Enti banta mehiyas heemmiya bessi koyishe Gadoora geliya bessaa matan de7iya zangaarape doloha baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw bidosona.
1Chronicles4:40 Yan araddanne lo77o heemmiya bessi demmidosona; he biittay wopatethinne saroy kumida dalga biitta. Beni wode he biittan de7idaysati Kaama kochaa.
1Chronicles4:41 Haysafe qommon sunthay xaafetida Simoona kochati Yihuda kawa Hizqiyaasa wode Gadoora biitta bidi yan de7iya Kaama kochaanne Ma7uuna asata olidi dhaysidosona. He biittan enta mehiyas heemmiya bessi de7iya gisho
1Chronicles4:42 Simoona kochaafe ichashu xeetu asay Sayre zuma bidosona. Enta halaqati Yishi7a nayta Palaxa
1Chronicles4:43 Baqatidi attida Amaaleqa asaa dhaysidi enti hachi gakanaw he biittan de7oosona.
1Chronicles5:1 Isra7eele bayra na7aa Robeela yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Robeeli bayra na7a; shin ba aawa hiixa tunisida gisho
1Chronicles5:2 Yihudi ba ishatape aadhidi mino; bayratethay Yoosefas imetidaba gidikoka
1Chronicles5:3 Isra7eele bayra na7aa Robeela adde nayti Henooha
1Chronicles5:4 Iyyu7eela na7ay Shamaya; Shamaya na7ay Googa; Googa na7ay Same7a;
1Chronicles5:5 Sama7a na7ay Mika; Mika na7ay Raya; Raya na7ay Bi7eela.
1Chronicles5:6 Bi7eela na7ay Asoore kawoy Telgeltelfelisoorii di77idi efida Bi7eera; Bi7eeri Robeela kochata halaqa.
1Chronicles5:7 Bi7eera dabboti
1Chronicles5:8 Bi7eeli Azaaza na7a; Azaazi Shama7a na7a; Shama7i Iyyu7eela koche. Iyyu7eela kochati Aro7eera kataman
1Chronicles5:9 Robeela kochatas mehey Galadan darida gisho
1Chronicles5:10 Saa7ola laythan Aggaara yaratara Robeela yarati oletidi xoonidosona. Galadape doloha baggara de7iya Aggaara yarata biittan uttidosona.
1Chronicles5:11 Gaade kochati Robeela kochatape pudeha baggan
1Chronicles5:12 Iyyu7eeli koyro yaratas halaqa; Safaami nam7antho yaratas halaqa. Yanaynne Safaami Baasanen uttida yaratas halaqa.
1Chronicles5:13 Enta dabboti
1Chronicles5:14 Haysati Abikaala nayti Buza kochata. Buzi Yedaya yelis; Yedayey Iyesaya yelis; Iyesayi Mika7eela yelis; Mika7eeli Galada yelis; Galadi Idaya yelis; Idayi Huura yelis; Huuri Abihaala yelis.
1Chronicles5:15 Enta soo asaa halaqay Guna na7aa na7aa Abdi7eela na7aa Aka.
1Chronicles5:16 Enti Galadaninne Baasanen
1Chronicles5:17 Hayisata yeletay Yihuda kawa Iyo7atama wode Isra7eele kawa Iyorbaama wode mazgaben xaafetis.
1Chronicles5:18 Robeela kochaafe
1Chronicles5:19 Enti Aggaara yaraara
1Chronicles5:20 Enti he asaara oletishe Xoossako waassida gisho
1Chronicles5:21 Banta morketape ishatamu mukulu gimaleta
1Chronicles5:22 Olay Xoossaba gidida gisho daroti hayqidosona. Di7etetha wodey gakanaw he biittan de7idosona.
1Chronicles5:23 Minaase kochaafe bagga yaray Baasanepe doomidi
1Chronicles5:24 Enta soo halaqati Efera
1Chronicles5:25 Shin banta mayzata Xoossaas ammanetibokona; Xoossay enta sinthafe dhaysida he biitta xoossata goyinnidosona.
1Chronicles5:26 Hessa gisho

1Chronicles6:2 Qahaata adde nayti Amraama
1Chronicles6:3 Amraama adde nayti Aarona
