1Chronicles6:5 Buuqi Oza yelis;
1Chronicles6:6 Ozi Zara yelis; Zarahi Marayoota yelis;
1Chronicles6:7 Marayooti Amaare yelis; Amaarey Akxooba yelis;
1Chronicles6:8 Akxoobi Saadoqa yelis; Saadoqi Akmaasa yelis;
1Chronicles6:9 Akimaasi Azaariyasa yelis; Azaariyasi Yohaana yelis;
1Chronicles6:10 Yohaani Azaariyasa yelis. Solomoney Yerusalaamen keexisida Xoossa keethan oothida kahiney Azaariyasa.
1Chronicles6:11 Azaariyasi Amaare yelis; Amaarey Akxooba yelis;
1Chronicles6:12 Akxoobi Saadoqa yelis; Saadoqi Saluma yelis;
1Chronicles6:13 Salumi Kalqe yelis; Kalqey Azaariyasa yelis;
1Chronicles6:14 Azaariyasi Saraya yelis; Sarayi Iyosadeqa yelis.
1Chronicles6:15 Goday Yihudanne Yerusalaame Nabukadanaxooran di7etana mela oothida wode Iyosadeqi di7etidi bis.
1Chronicles6:16 Leewe adde nayti Gedisoona
1Chronicles6:17 Gedisoona adde nayta sunthay Libinanne Same7a.
1Chronicles6:18 Qahaata adde nayti Amraama
1Chronicles6:19 Maraara adde nayti Mahilanne Muse. Banta soo asan asan xaafetida Leewe yaray haysa.
1Chronicles6:20 Gedisoona na7ay Libina; Libina na7ay Yahaata; Yahaata na7ay Zamata.
1Chronicles6:21 Zamata na7ay Yo7aaka; Yo7aaka na7ay Ado; Ado na7ay Zaara; Zaara na7ay Yatira.
1Chronicles6:22 Qahaata na7ay Amnadaabe; Amnadaabe na7ay Qore; Qore na7ay Aseera;
1Chronicles6:23 Aseera na7ay Helqaana; Helqaana na7ay Abisaafa; Abisaafa na7ay Aseera;
1Chronicles6:24 Aseera na7ay Tahata; Tahata na7ay Uri7eela; Uri7eela na7ay Ooziyana; Ooziyana na7ay Saa7ola.
1Chronicles6:25 Helqaana adde nayti Amaasanne Akmoota.
1Chronicles6:26 Akmoota na7ay Helqaana; Helqaana na7ay Xofaya; Xofaya na7ay Nahaata;
1Chronicles6:27 Nahaata na7ay Eliyaaba; Eliyaaba na7ay Yirohaama; Yirohaama na7ay Hilqaana.
1Chronicles6:28 Sameela bayra na7ay Iyyu7eela; kaaloy Abiya.
1Chronicles6:29 Maraara adde nayti Mahila; Mahila na7ay Libina; Libina na7ay Same7a; Same7a na7ay Ooza;
1Chronicles6:30 Ooza na7ay Sam77a; Sam77a na7ay Hagiya; Hagiya na7ay Asaya.
1Chronicles6:31 Dawiti Taabotiya Yerusalaame ehidaape guye
1Chronicles6:32 Solomoney Yerusalaamen Godaa Xoossaa keetha keexana gakanaw
1Chronicles6:33 Banta adde naytara yexidaysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Qahaata yaraape zammariya Hemaana; Hemaani Iyyu7eela na7a; Iyyu7eela Sameela na7a;
1Chronicles6:34 Sameeli Helqaana na7aa; Hilqaani Yirohaama na7a; Yirohaami Eli7eela na7a; Eli7eeli Toha na7a;
1Chronicles6:35 Tohi Xofaya na7a; Xofaya Helqaana na7a; Hilqaani Mahaata na7a; Mahaati Amasaya na7a;
1Chronicles6:36 Amasayi Helqaana na7a; Helqaani Iyyu7eela na7a; Iyyu7eela Azaariyasa na7a; Azaariyasi Sofoniyaasa na7a;
1Chronicles6:37 Sofoniyaasi Tahata na7a; Tahati Aseera na7a; Aseeri Abisaafa na7a; Abisaafi Qore na7a;
1Chronicles6:38 Qorey Yisara na7a; Yisari Qahaata na7a; Qahaati Leewe na7a; Leewey Isra7eele na7a.
1Chronicles6:39 Hemaana dabboy Asaafi iya ushacha baggara eqidi oothees. Asaafi Baraka na7a; Baraka Sim7a na7a;
1Chronicles6:40 Shim7i Mika7eela na7a; Mika7eeli Ba7asaya na7a; Ba7aasi Malkiya na7a;
1Chronicles6:41 Malkey Etaana na7a; Etaani Zaara na7a; Zaari Adaya na7a;
1Chronicles6:42 Adayi Etaana na7a; Etaani Zamata na7a; Zamati Same7a na7a;
1Chronicles6:43 Same7i Yahaata na7a; Yahaati Gedisoona na7a; Gedisooni Leewe na7a.
1Chronicles6:44 Entafe haddirsa baggara enta dabboti
1Chronicles6:45 Maluki Hashabaya na7a; Hashabaya Amasiyaasa na7a; Amasiyaasi Kalqe na7a;
1Chronicles6:46 Kilqey Ameesa na7a; Ameesi Baana na7a; Baani Samara na7a;
1Chronicles6:47 Samari Mahila na7a; Mahili Muse na7a; Musi Maraara na7a; Maraari Leewe na7a.
1Chronicles6:48 Enta dabo gidida Leeweti Xoossa Dunkaaniyan oothanaw sunthetidosona.
1Chronicles6:49 Shin Aaroninne iya kochati ixaane cuyisoosona; yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho yarshoosona. Xoossa aylley Musey kiitidaysada Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessan goyinniya goyinno ubbaasinne Xoossay Isra7eele nagaraa atto yaagisiya yarshuwa yarshanaw aawatethi entaw de7ees.
1Chronicles6:50 Aarona yeletay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Aarona na7ay Alaazara; Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasa; Pinihaasa na7ay Abisu;
1Chronicles6:51 Abisu na7ay Buuqa; Buuqa na7ay Oza; Oza na7ay Zaraha.
1Chronicles6:52 Zaraha na7ay Marayoota; Marayoota na7ay Amaare; Amaare na7ay Akxuuba;
1Chronicles6:53 Akxuuba na7ay Saadoqa; Saadoqa na7ay Akmaasa.
1Chronicles6:54 Aarona kochati daana mela entaw imetida bessati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysa. Koyro saamay Qahaata yaraas keyida gisho
1Chronicles6:55 Yihudan de7iya Kebroona katamaanne iya yuushuwan de7iya hentha bessata entaw immidosona.
1Chronicles6:56 Shin Kebroona goshsha gadetanne iya yuushuwan de7iya gutata Yoofone na7aa Kaalebas immidosona.
1Chronicles6:57 Aarona naytas baqatidi attiya katamata

1Chronicles6:59 Asana
1Chronicles6:60 Qassi Biniyaame biitta zawape Gib7a
1Chronicles6:61 Minaase yaraa baggaa biittafe tammu katamata attida Qahaata yaraas immidosona.

1Chronicles6:63 Robeela
1Chronicles6:64 Hessada oothidi
1Chronicles6:65 Yihudape

1Chronicles6:81 Haseboona
1Chronicles7:1 Yisakoora oyddu adde nayti Tola
1Chronicles7:2 Tola adde nayti Oza
1Chronicles7:3 Oza na7ay Yizraaha. Yizraaha nayti Mika7eela
1Chronicles7:4 Banta soo asaa yeletada Oza yaraape olanchoti 36
1Chronicles7:5 Yisakoora kochaafe olanchoti banta yeletaa mazgaben taybetidi
1Chronicles7:6 Biniyaame heedzu adde nayti Beella
1Chronicles7:7 Beella adde nayti Eseboona
1Chronicles7:8 Bekera adde nayti Zamira
1Chronicles7:9 Banta yeletaa mazgaben taybetida wolqaamanne mino asati 20
1Chronicles7:10 Yidi7eela na7ay Bilihaana. Bilihaana adde nayti Yi7uusa
1Chronicles7:11 haysati banta soo asaa halaqa; wolqaamanne mino asi. Banta yeletada taybetida olanchoti 17
1Chronicles7:12 Sufiminne Hufimi Ira nayta. Hushimi Ahere na7a.
1Chronicles7:13 Niftaaleme nayti Yahixi7eela
1Chronicles7:14 Minaase kochati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Minaase Soore laggethefe yelida adde nayti Asiri7eelanne Galada aawa Makira.
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri Hufimapenne Safimape issi issi macho ekis. Makira miche sunthay Ma7iko. Makira na7ay kaaloy Selophaada; Selophaadi macca na7a xalaala yelis.
1Chronicles7:16 Makira machiya Ma7ika Pareesanne Suroosa geetetiya nam7u adde nayta yelasu. Paaresa nayti Ulamanne Raqeema.
1Chronicles7:17 Ulama na7ay Badaana. Haysati Minaase na7aa na7a Makira na7aa Galada kochata.
1Chronicles7:18 Galada michiya Hamoleketa
1Chronicles7:19 Shamida adde nayti Ahiya
1Chronicles7:20 Efreema na7ay Shutula; Shutula na7ay Bareda; Bareda na7ay Tahata; Tahata na7ay Elada; Elada na7ay Tahata;
1Chronicles7:21 Tahata na7ay Zabada; Zabada na7ay Shutula. Efreemas Ederanne Elada geetetiya hara nam7u nayti de7oosona. Enti Geete asaa mehe kaysin asay enta wodhis.

1Chronicles7:23 Hessafe guye

1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaami ba macheta Hushimonne Ba7iira yeddidaape guye Moo7abe biittan adde nayta yelis.

1Chronicles8:10 Ye7uxa
1Chronicles8:11 I ba mache Hushimipe
1Chronicles8:12 Elfa7aala adde nayti Ebeera
1Chronicles8:13 Shaharaami Beri7anne Shem77a yelis. Enti Eloona kataman de7iya banta soo asaa halaqata. Enti Geete kataman de7iya asaa gooddidosona.
1Chronicles8:14 Beri7a adde nayti Shaharaama

1Chronicles8:16 Mika7eela

1Chronicles8:24 Hanaaniya
1Chronicles8:25 Yifdayanne Panu7eela.
1Chronicles8:26 Yirohaama adde nayti Shemshiraya
1Chronicles8:27 Yaaresha
1Chronicles8:28 Haysati banta yeletan Yerusalaamen uttida banta soo asaa halaqata.
1Chronicles8:29 Gaba7oona aaway Yi7eeli Gaba7oona kataman de7is; iya mache sunthay Ma7iko.
1Chronicles8:30 Iya na7aa bayray Abdoona; hara iya adde nayti Xuraya
1Chronicles8:31 Gedoora
1Chronicles8:32 Maqloota. Maqlooti Shim7a yelis. Haysati Yerusalaamen de7iya banta dabbota matan de7idosona.
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri Qiisa yelis; Qiisi Saa7ola yelis. Saa7oli Yoonataana
1Chronicles8:34 Yoonataana na7ay Marba7aala yelis; Marba7aali Mikiyaasa yelis.
1Chronicles8:35 Mikiyaasa adde nayti Pitoona
1Chronicles8:36 Akaazi Yaho7ada yelis. Yaho7aadi Alemeeta
1Chronicles8:37 Mooxi Bin7a yelis; Bin77i Raafa yelis; Raafi El7aasa yelis; El7aasi Axeela yelis.
1Chronicles8:38 Axeelas usupun adde nayti de7oosona. Enta sunthay Azirqaama
1Chronicles8:39 Axeela ishaa Esheqas heedzu nayti de7oosona. Iya na7ay bayray Ulama; kaaloy Yi7uusa; heedzanthoy Elfalaxa.
1Chronicles8:40 Ulama nayti wolqaamanne mino asi; enti dongen dukeyisata. Ulamas xeetanne ishatamu gidiya naytinne nayta nayti de7oosona. Haysati ubbay Biniyaame kochata.
1Chronicles9:1 Isra7eele asa ubbay ba yeletan yeletan
1Chronicles9:2 Koyro simmidi banta biittaninne banta katamatan uttiday guutha Isra7eele asata
1Chronicles9:3 Yihudape
1Chronicles9:4 Yihuda na7aa Paaresa yaraape Utayi Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa. Utayi Amhuda na7a; Amhudi Omira na7a; Omiri Imira na7a; Imiri Baana na7a.
1Chronicles9:5 Yihuda na7aa Seela yaraape Asayinne iya nayti Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa.
1Chronicles9:6 Yihuda na7aa Zaara yaraape Yi7u7eeli Yerusalaamen de7eysatas halaqa. Yihuda kochaa tayboy usupun xeetanne uddufun tamma.
1Chronicles9:7 Biniyaame yaraa halaqati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Masulaama na7aa Saalu
1Chronicles9:8 Yirohaama na7aa Yibinaya
1Chronicles9:9 Biniyaame kochaa tayboy uddufun xeetanne ishatammanne usupuna. Haysati ubbay banta soo asaa halaqata.
1Chronicles9:10 Yerusalaamen de7ida kahineti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enti Yodaha
1Chronicles9:11 Xoossa keethan aawatiya Azaariyasa. Azaariyasi Kalqe na7a; Kalqey Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Saadoqa na7a; Saadoqi Mariyoota na7a; Mariyooti Akxooba na7a.
1Chronicles9:12 Harati qassi Yirohaama na7aa Adayanne Adi7eela na7aa Ma7iseya. Yirohaami Paskora na7a; Paskori Malkiya na7a. Adi7eeli Yahizeera na7a; Yahizeeri Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Mashilmoota na7a; Mashilmooti Imera na7a.
1Chronicles9:13 Banta soo asaas halaqa gidida kahineta tayboy 1
1Chronicles9:14 Yerusalaamen de7iya Leeweti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Hashuba na7ay Shamayey Maraara yara. Hashubi Aziriqaama na7a; Aziriqaami Hasabaya na7a.
1Chronicles9:15 Harati qassi Baqbaqara
1Chronicles9:16 Harati qassi Naxoofata gutan uttiday Abdiyunne Baraka. Abdiyuy Shama7iya na7a; Shama7ey Galaala na7a; Galaali Yedutuuna na7a; Baraki Asa na7a; Asi Elqaana na7a.
1Chronicles9:17 Kawo pengiya naageysati
1Chronicles9:18 Enti wuloha baggara de7iya
1Chronicles9:19 Abisaafa na7aa na7ay Qore na7ay Salumi Qore yara. Qore yaray kase Godaa Dunkaaniya naagidaysada Saluminne Qore koche gidida iya dabboti Xoossa keetha pengiya naagoosona.
1Chronicles9:20 Alaazara na7ay Pinihaasi kase Qore yaraa halaqa; Goday iyara de7ees.
1Chronicles9:21 Masulaama na7ay Zakariyasi Dunkaaniya giddo geliya pengiya naagees.
1Chronicles9:22 Pengiya naaganaw dooretidaysati kumethi nam7u xeetanne tammanne nam7a; hessati banta gutan gutan taybetidi xaafetidosona. Enta yaras ha aawatetha immiday kawa Dawitanne nabiya Sameela.
1Chronicles9:23 Hessa gisho
1Chronicles9:24 Oyddu baggara dolohan
1Chronicles9:25 He gutan de7iya enta dabboti laapuntha gallasan gallasan laametidi
1Chronicles9:26 Pengiya naagiya oyddu Leeweti halaqa; enti Xoossa keethaa kifiletanne kifileta giddon de7iya miisheta aawatethan aysoosona.
1Chronicles9:27 Xoossa keethaa naageynne wonta guura kariya dooyey enta gidiya gisho yan aqoosona.
1Chronicles9:28 Leewetape guuthati goyinno wode go7etiya miisheta naagoosona; he miisheta kare kesseynne soo gelsey enta.
1Chronicles9:29 Entafe issoti issoti Xoossa keethan go7etiya hara miisheta
1Chronicles9:30 Shin kahineta naytape baggati sawuwa walakoosona.
1Chronicles9:31 Qore kochaafe Saluma bayra na7ay Mataatas yarsho uytha uukisiya aawatethi de7ees.
1Chronicles9:32 Qahaata yara gidiya enta dabbotape baggati Sambaatan Sambaatan xarpheeza bolla wothiya uythaa giigisiya aawatethi ekidosona.
1Chronicles9:33 Leewe kochaafe guutha halaqati Xoossa keethan yexeyisata. Qammanne gallas enti oothiya gisho hara ooso oothonna Xoossa keetha dirsa giddon de7iya keethatan de7oosona.
1Chronicles9:34 Haysati ubbay Leewe soo asaa halaqata; enti Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
1Chronicles9:35 Gaba7oona aaway Yi7eeli Gaba7oona kataman de7is; iya mache sunthay Ma7iko.
1Chronicles9:36 Iya na7ay bayray Abdoona; iya nayti harati Xuraya
1Chronicles9:37 Gadoora
1Chronicles9:38 Miklooti Sim7a yelis. Haysati Yerusalaamen de7iya banta dabbota matan de7idosona.
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri Qiisa yelis; Qiisi Saa7ola yelis. Saa7oli Yoonataana
1Chronicles9:40 Yoonataana na7ay Marba7aala yelis; Marba7aali Mikiyaasa yelis.
1Chronicles9:41 Mikiyaasa nayti Pitoona
1Chronicles9:42 Akaazi Ya7ira yelis. Ya7iri Alemeeta
1Chronicles9:43 Mooxi Bin7a yelis; Bin7i Rafaya yelis; Rafayi El7aasa yelis; El7aasi Axeela yelis.
1Chronicles9:44 Axeelas usupun adde nayti de7oosona. Enta sunthay Azirqaama
1Chronicles10:1 Filisxeemeti Isra7eele asaara oletidosona. Isra7eeleti Filisxeemeta sinthafe baqatidosona. He wode daro Isra7eele asay Gilbo7a deriya bolla hayqidosona.
1Chronicles10:2 Filisxeemeti Saa7olanne iya adde nayta gooddi efidi Saa7ola nayta Yoonataana
1Chronicles10:3 Olay Saa7ola teqidi un7ethis; dongen dukeysati Saa7ola demmidi madunxisidosona.
1Chronicles10:4 Saa7oli ba ola miishiya tookeysako
1Chronicles10:5 Iya ola miishiya tookeysi Saa7oli hayqidaysa be7idi
1Chronicles10:6 Hessada hanidi Saa7oli
1Chronicles10:7 Zangaaran de7iya Isra7eeleti ubbay banta olanchoti baqatidaysa
1Chronicles10:8 Wontetha gallas Filisxeemeti ahata bollafe ola miisheta qaari ekanaw yidi
1Chronicles10:9 Enti Saa7ola qoodhiya qanxidi iya ola miishiya qaari ekidosona. Yaatidi banta eeqata keethaninne banta asaa giddon xoonuwa awaajana mela Filisxeeme biitta ubbaas ase kiittidosona.
1Chronicles10:10 Enti Saa7ola ola miishiya banta xoossata keethatape issuwan wothidosona; iya huuphiya banta Xoossa Daagona eeqa keethan kaqidosona.
1Chronicles10:11 Filisxeemeti Saa7ola bolla oothidaba ubbaa Galadan de7iya Yaabesa katamaa asay si7ida wode
1Chronicles10:12 mino asati ubbay bidi
1Chronicles10:13 Saa7oli Godaas ammanetibona gisho hayqis. Godaa qaala I naagibeenna; Godaa zore oycheysa aggidi
1Chronicles10:14 moytille xeegiya asi zore oychis. Hessa gisho
1Chronicles11:1 Hessafe guye
1Chronicles11:2 Kase Saa7oli kawo gididi de7iya wodeka
1Chronicles11:3 Isra7eele cimati ubbay kawa Dawitako yida wode I entara Kebroonan Godaa sinthan caaqis. Goday Sameela baggara odida qaalada Dawiti Isra7eele bolla kawotanaada enti iya tiyidosona.
1Chronicles11:4 Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay Yerusalaame katamaa bidosona. He wode Yaabuse asay he bessan de7iya gisho he katamay Yaabuse geetetees.
1Chronicles11:5 Yaabuseti Dawitako
1Chronicles11:6 Dawiti ba olanchota
1Chronicles11:7 Dawiti he miixan de7ida gisho he katamay Dawita Katama geetetis.
1Chronicles11:8 Dawiti Miilope doomidi he katamaa zaaridi keexis; attida baggaa Iyo7aabi zaaridi keexis.
1Chronicles11:9 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday iyara de7iya gisho Dawiti minni minni bis.
1Chronicles11:10 Mino gidida Dawita asati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidosona. Goday Isra7eeles gida qaalada Dawiti kawotana mela ha asati Isra7eele asaara daro maaddidosona. Qassi iya kawotethaa minthidosona.
1Chronicles11:11 Mino gidida Dawita asati haysafe kaallidi de7eyisata. Entafe heedzati daro eretidaysata. Heedzatape koyroy Hakmoona addiya Yashobi7aama; I issi toho olan heedzu xeetu asaa ba tooran wodhis.
1Chronicles11:12 Iya kaalley
1Chronicles11:13 Filisxeeme asay oletanaw Pasdamima geetetiya bessaa shiiqida wode Alaazari Dawitara de7ees. Isra7eele olanchoti Filisxeeme asata sinthafe baqatiya wode Alaazari banga gaden de7ees.
1Chronicles11:14 Inne iya asati gadiya giddon Filisxeeme asaara oletin
1Chronicles11:15 Filisxeeme olanchoti Raafayme zangaaran dunkaanida wode hastamu halaqatape heedzati Dawiti de7iya Adulaama gongoluwan de7iya zaallako bidosona.
1Chronicles11:16 He wode Dawiti miixan de7ees; Filisxeeme olanchotape issi cugay Beeteleme olidi oykis.
1Chronicles11:17 Dawiti haathe uyanaw amotidi
1Chronicles11:18 Heedzu mino asati Filisxeemeti dunkaanida bessaa kanthi bidi Beeteleme pengiya matan de7iya pulto haathaafe duuqidi Dawitas ehidosona. Shin Dawiti uyonna ixidi haatha Godaa sinthan tigis.
1Chronicles11:19 “Ha haatha ushshi taape haako! Banta shempuwa bayzidi ehida ha asata suuthaa taani uyo? Enti banta shempuwa aathidi immidi ehidosona” yaagis. Hessa gisho
1Chronicles11:20 Iyo7aaba ishay Abisi hastamu olanchotas halaqa. I ba tooran heedzu xeetu asaa wodhidi
1Chronicles11:21 Abisi heedzatara taybetonna ixikoka
1Chronicles11:22 Qabxeela addey Yoodahe na7ay Banayi mino asi; I mino ooso oothis. I nam7u eretida Moo7abe asata wodhis. Qassi shachi wodhida issi gallas olla giddo gelidi gaammo wodhis.
1Chronicles11:23 Banayi ichashu wadha gidiya Gibxe addiya wodhis. Gibxe addiya kushen wandaraashe mela toori de7ees; shin Banayi xam7a oykidi addiyako bidi iya kushiyan de7iya toora dafi ekidi iya tooran iya wodhis.
1Chronicles11:24 Yoodahe na7ay Banayi haysa oothis. Iya sunthay he heedzataysada eretis.
1Chronicles11:25 I hastamata giddon daro bonchetis; shin I heedzata taybuwan deenna. Dawiti iya bana naageysata halaqa oothis.
1Chronicles11:26 Mino asati Iyo7aaba ishaa Asaheela

1Chronicles12:1 Dawiti Qiisa na7aa Saa7olape baqatidi Xiqilaagan uttida wode iyako yida asati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Enta kase Dawita olan maaddida mino asata giddon de7oosona.
1Chronicles12:2 Enti dongen dukeyisata; qassi ushacha kusheninne haddirsa kushen yambaranawnne donge dukanaw danda7oosona. Enti Biniyaame koche gidida Saa7ola kochata.
1Chronicles12:3 Enta halaqay Ahi7ezera; iyape kaallidi Iyo7aasa; enti Gib7a addiya Shama7a na7a. Harati qassi Azmaawe nayta gidida Yizi7eelanne Palaxa
1Chronicles12:4 hastamata giddon wolqaama gididi

1Chronicles12:13 tammanthoy Ermiyaasa; tammanne issanthoy Makibanaya.

1Chronicles12:21 Enti ubbay minonne wolqaama asi gidiya gisho Dawita zugidi oliya asaa olidi iya maaddidosona.

1Chronicles13:1 Dawiti shaalaqataranne mato halaqatara zoretis.
1Chronicles13:2 Isra7eele asa ubbaa
1Chronicles13:3 Saa7ola kawotethaa wode qeli geetetida nu Xoossaa Taabotiya ane zaaridi ehoos” yaagis.
1Chronicles13:4 Dawita oday lo77o gidida gisho asa ubbay ma7is.

1Chronicles13:7 Xoossa Taabotiya ooratha para gaaren wothidi
1Chronicles13:8 Dawitinne Isra7eele asa ubbay diithinne maasinqo kaa7ishe
1Chronicles13:9 Enti Kidoona wudumma gakiya wode boorati dhubetida gisho Oozi Taabotiya oykanaw ba kushiya yeddis.

1Chronicles13:14 Xoossa Taabotey Abdaara son iya soo asaara heedzu ageena gam7is. Goday iya soo asaanne iyaw de7iya ubbaa anjis.
1Chronicles14:1 Xiroosa kawoy Kiraami Dawitas gadho keexana mela kiitetiya asata
1Chronicles14:2 Goday Isra7eele bolla iya kawo oothidi minthidaysanne ba asaa Isra7eele gisho iya kawotethaa bonchidaysa Dawiti eris.
1Chronicles14:3 Hessafe guye
1Chronicles14:4 Dawiti Yerusalaamen yelida adde nayti Samuusa
1Chronicles14:5 Yibhaara
1Chronicles14:6 Noga
1Chronicles14:7 Elisaama
1Chronicles14:8 Dawiti Isra7eele ubbaa bolla kawo gididi tiyetidaysa Filisxeemeti si7ida wode ubbay Dawita olidi oykanaw keyidosona. Dawiti hessa si7idi entara oletanaw keyis.
1Chronicles14:9 Filisxeemeti Raafayme zangaara yidi oykidosona.
1Chronicles14:10 Dawiti
1Chronicles14:11 Dawitinne iya asay Ba7al-Parasime geetetiya bessaa bidi yan enta xoonidosona. Dawiti
1Chronicles14:12 Filisxeemeti banta eeqata he bessan yeggidi bin
1Chronicles14:13 Filisxeemeti zaari he zangaara yidi olidosona.
1Chronicles14:14 Dawiti Xoossaa zaaridi oychis. Xoossay
1Chronicles14:15 Wola huuphen salpe girsi neeni si7iya wode olanaw keya. Hessi Filisxeeme olanchota shocanaw Xoossay neepe sinthe aadhidaysas malla” yaagis.
1Chronicles14:16 Xoossay kiitidaysada Dawiti oothis. Gaba7oonape Gezera gakanaw Isra7eele asay Filisxeeme olanchota wodhidosona.
1Chronicles14:17 Dawita sunthay biitta ubbaa gakis. Kawotetha ubbay Dawitas yayyana mela Goday oothis.
1Chronicles15:1 Dawiti ba kataman baw keethe keexis; Xoossa Taabotiyas besse giigisidi
1Chronicles15:2 Dawiti
1Chronicles15:3 Dawiti Godaa Taabotiyas giigisida bessaa Taabotiya ehana mela Isra7eele asa ubbaa Yerusalaame shiishis.
1Chronicles15:4 Kaallidi Dawiti Aarona kochatanne Leeweta xeegidi shiishis.
1Chronicles15:5 Qahaata yaraape halaqay Uri7eelinne issi xeetanne laatamu iya dabboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:6 Maraara yaraape halaqay Asayinne nam7u xeetanne laatamu iya dabboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:7 Gedisoona yaraape halaqay Iyyu7eelinne xeetanne hastamu iya dabboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:8 Elzafaana yaraape halaqay Shama7inne nam7u xeetu iya dabboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:9 Kebroona yaraape halaqay Eli7eelinne hospun tammu iya dabboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:10 Uzi7eela yaraape halaqay Amnadaabeynne xeetanne tammanne nam7u iya daboti yidosona.
1Chronicles15:11 Dawiti kahineta Saadoqanne Abyataara
1Chronicles15:12 Entako
1Chronicles15:13 Hinte Leeweti koyro Xoossa Taabotiya tookiboonna gishonne nuuni iya woga mela waati efaneko Xoossaa oychiboona gisho
1Chronicles15:14 Godaa Isra7eele Xoossa Taabotiya ehanaw kahinetinne Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona.
1Chronicles15:15 Goday Muse baggara kase kiitidaysada Leeweti Xoossaa Taabotiya banta hashiyan kasora tookidosona.
1Chronicles15:16 Diithi
1Chronicles15:17 Leeweti Iyyu7eela na7aa Hemaana
1Chronicles15:18 Qassi nam7antho dethan Zakariyasa
1Chronicles15:19 Naase daala qaathana mela Hemaani Asaafinne Etaani shuumetidosona.
1Chronicles15:20 Qassi Zakariyasi
1Chronicles15:21 Matita
1Chronicles15:22 Leeweta halaqay Kanaaney mazmure eriya gisho enta kaalethanaw shuumetis.
1Chronicles15:23 Barakinne Elqaani Taabotiya dunkaaniya pengiya naaganaw dooretidosona.
1Chronicles15:24 Kahineti Sabaani
1Chronicles15:25 Dawiti

1Chronicles15:28 Hessada oothidi
1Chronicles15:29 Godaa caaqo Taabotey Dawita katamaa gelida wode Saa7ola na7iya Melkoola kawoy Dawiti ufaytidi durishininne kaa7ishin maskootera be7ada ba wozanan kadhasu.
1Chronicles16:1 Enti Xoossa Taabotiya ehidi Dawiti Taabotiya wothanaw essida dunkaaniya giddon wothidi
1Chronicles16:2 Dawiti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho yarshidi polidaape guye Godaa sunthan asaa anjis.
1Chronicles16:3 Isra7eele asa ubbaas maccasinne addes
1Chronicles16:4 Godaa Taabotiya sinthan oothana melanne Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa sabbana mela
1Chronicles16:5 Leeweta halaqay Asaafa; Asaafa kaallidi Zakariyasa. Zakariyasa kaallidi de7ey Yi7eela
1Chronicles16:6 Kahiney Banayinne Yahazi7eeli Xoossa caaqo Taabotiya sinthan ubba wode moyze punnanaw shuumetidosona.
1Chronicles16:7 He gallas Dawiti Asaafinne iya dabboti Godaa sabbana mela ha mazmuriya koyro kiittis.
1Chronicles16:8 Godaa galatite; iya sunthaa xeegite; Iya oosuwa kawotethata giddon odite.
1Chronicles16:9 Iya sabbite; galata mazmuriya iyaw yexite; Malaalisiya iya ooso ubbaa odite.
1Chronicles16:10 Iya geeshsha sunthan ceeqetite; Godaa koyeyisata wozanay ufayto.
1Chronicles16:11 Godaanne iya wolqaa be7ite; ubba wode iya sinthaa koyite.
1Chronicles16:12 Hinteno
1Chronicles16:13 
1Chronicles16:14 I Godaa nu Xoossaa; iya pirday biitta ubbaa bollana.
1Chronicles16:15 Iya caaquwa merinaw mukulu yeletethaa gakanaw
1Chronicles16:16 Abrahaamera caaqida caaquwa naagees; Yisaaqas gelida qaala minthees.
1Chronicles16:17 Yayqoobas wogaa
1Chronicles16:18 “Taani new Kanaane biitta immana; I ne kochaas laata gidana” yaagis.
1Chronicles16:19 Hessi hinte taybon guuthanne Kanaanen bete gididi de7iya wode hannis.
1Chronicles16:20 Issi deriyape hara dere pinnidosona; issi kawotethaafe hara kawotethi yuuyidosona.
1Chronicles16:21 Xoossay enta oonika naaqana mela immibeenna; enta gisho kawota seeris.
1Chronicles16:22 “Taani tiyidaysata bochofite; ta nabeta qohopite” yaagis.
1Chronicles16:23 Sa7an de7iya asa ubbay Godaas yexite; iya ashuwa gallas gallas odite.
1Chronicles16:24 Kawotethata giddon iya bonchuwa
1Chronicles16:25 Goday gita; aadho galatay iyaw bessees; xoossata ubbaafe aadhidi bonchetanaw bessees.
1Chronicles16:26 Hara kawotethata xoossati ubbay eeqata; shin Goday salota medhida Xoossaa.
1Chronicles16:27 Iya sinthan bonchoynne teemi de7ees; minotethinne ufaysi I de7iya bessan de7ees.
1Chronicles16:28 Hinteno
1Chronicles16:29 Iya sunthaas bessiya boncho immite; yarsho ekidi iya sinthe yiite; iya geeshshatetha teeman Godaa goyinnite.
1Chronicles16:30 Biittan de7iya asa ubbay iya sinthan kokorite; Sa7ay minni eqida gisho qaaxenna.
1Chronicles16:31 Saloti ufayto; sa7i hashshu go! Kawotethata giddon enti “Goday kawotis!” yaago.
1Chronicles16:32 Abbaynne iya giddon de7iya ubbay guummo; gadeynne iyan de7iya katha ubbay ufayto.
1Chronicles16:33 He wode woran de7iya mitha ubbay ufaysan Godaa sinthan yexana. I sa7aa bolla pirdanaw yees.
1Chronicles16:34 Goday keeha gidiya gishonne iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho
1Chronicles16:35 “Abeeti nuna ashshiya Xoossaw nuna ashsha; Nuuni ne geeshsha suntha galatana melanne ne bonchuwan nu bonchetana mela
1Chronicles16:36 Goday Isra7eele Xoossay
1Chronicles16:37 Godaa caaqo Taabotiya sinthan gallas gallas goyinnoos koshshiyaba ubba wode enti oothana mela Dawiti Asaafanne iya dabbota wothis.
1Chronicles16:38 Qassi Obeed-Edoomenne usupun tammanne hospun iya dabbota entara oothana mela wothis; Yedutuuna na7aa Obeed-Edoomenne Hosa pengiya naagana mela wothis.
1Chronicles16:39 Kahiney Saadoqinne iyara oothiya kahineti Gaba7oonan de7iya dhoqa bessan
1Chronicles16:40 Goday Isra7eeles immida higgiyan xaafetidaysada enti wontanne omarsi ubba wode xuussa yarsho yarshana mela oothis.
1Chronicles16:41 Iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho Godaa mazmuren galatana mela Hemaana
1Chronicles16:42 Hemaaninne Yedutuuni moyze punnoosona
1Chronicles16:43 Hessafe guye asa ubbay ba soo soo bis. Dawitika ba soo asaa anjanaw simmis.
1Chronicles17:1 Dawiti ba gadhon uttidaape guye nabiya Naatanako
1Chronicles17:2 Naatani Dawitako
1Chronicles17:3 Shin he qamma Godaa qaalay Naatanako haysada yaagishe yis;
1Chronicles17:4 “Bada ta aylliya Dawitako haysada yaaga; ‘taani daana keethe keexanay nena gidaka.
1Chronicles17:5 Taani Isra7eele Gibxefe kessida wodepe doomada hachi gakanaw keethan de7abike; taani dunkaanepe dunkaane
1Chronicles17:6 Taani Isra7eele asa ubbaara yuuyida bessa ubban
1Chronicles17:7 “Hessa gisho
1Chronicles17:8 Neeni bida besse ubban taani neera gidas; ne morketa ubbaa ne sinthafe diggas. Hiza taani ha sa7an eretida gita asaada ne sunthaa gitayana.
1Chronicles17:9 Taani ta asaa Isra7eeles besse immada
1Chronicles17:10 zaaridi iita asati enta naaqokona. Taani ne morketa ubbaa new haarsana. “ ‘Hessa bolla Goday ba huuphen new keethe keexanaysa odees.
1Chronicles17:11 Ne hayqada ne mayzatan gahetiya wode taani neepe guye ne naytape issuwa denthada iya kawotethaa minthana.
1Chronicles17:12 Taw keethe keexanay iya; taani iya araata merinaw mintha essana.
1Chronicles17:13 Taani iyaw aawa gidana; ika taw na7a gidana. Neepe sinthe kawotida Saa7olape ta maarotetha ekidaysada taani iyape ekike.
1Chronicles17:14 Taani iya ta asaa bollanne ta kawotethaa bolla merinaw shuumana; iya araatay merinaw minni eqana’ ” yaagis.
1Chronicles17:15 Naatani Xoossay iyaw qoncisida qaala ubbaa Dawitas odis.

1Chronicles17:22 Neeni ne asaa Isra7eele merinaw nebaa oothadasa. Abeeti Godaw

1Chronicles23:5 4

1Chronicles23:7 Gedisoona adde nayti La7idanenne Sam7a.

1Chronicles23:9 Same7a heedzu adde nayti Salomoota
1Chronicles23:10 Sama7a oyddu adde nayti Yahaata
1Chronicles23:11 Usi bayraa
1Chronicles23:12 Qahaata oyddu adde nayti Anbaraama
1Chronicles23:13 Anbaraama adde nayti Aaronanne Muse. Aaroninne iya kochay ubbaafe geeshshi gidana mela dummatidosona. Enti Godaa sinthan ixaane cuyisanaw
1Chronicles23:14 Xoossa ase gidida Muse nayta Leewe kochatara gathidi taybidosona.
1Chronicles23:15 Muse nayti Gedisoona Alaazara.
1Chronicles23:16 Gedisoona nayta giddofe halaqay Sabu7eela.
1Chronicles23:17 Alaazara na7ay Rahaaba. Alaazaras hara na7i baawa; shin Rahaabas nayti daro.
1Chronicles23:18 Yisihaara nayta halaqay Salomita.
1Chronicles23:19 Kebroona na7ay bayray Yiriya; kaaloy Amaare; heedzanthoy Yahazi7eela; oyddanthoy Yaqim7aama.
1Chronicles23:20 Uzi7eela bayra na7ay Mikiyaasa; kaaloy Yishiya.
1Chronicles23:21 Maraara nayti Mahilanne Musa. Mahila nayti Alaazaranne Qiisa.
1Chronicles23:22 Alaazari macca na7ape attishin
1Chronicles23:23 Musa heedzu nayti Mahila

1Chronicles24:1 Aarona kochati banta ooso maaran haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Aarona adde nayti Nadaaba
1Chronicles24:2 Shin Naadabeynne Abyooda na7a yelonna banta aawape sinthe hayqidosona. Hessa gisho
1Chronicles24:3 Dawiti Alaazara yaraape Saadoqa
1Chronicles24:4 Alaazara yarata halaqati Itamaara yarata halaqatape dari bentida gisho Alaazara yarati tammanne usupun cugan shaaketin Itamaara yarati hospun cugan shaaketidosona.
1Chronicles24:5 Alaazara yarata giddoninne Itamaara yarata giddon Xoossa keetha halaqatinne Xoossa oosuwas bessiya halaqati de7iya gisho oosoy entaw saaman shaaketees.
1Chronicles24:6 Alaazara yaratinne Itamaara yarati banta maaran maaran saama kessidosona. Leewe koche gidida Natina7eela na7ay xaafey Shamayey enta mazgabees. Kawoynne iya moorinnati
1Chronicles24:7 Koyro saamay Yo7aaribas keyis; nam7anthoy Yadayas keyis.
1Chronicles24:8 Heedzanthoy Harimas keyis. Oyddanthoy Sa7oorimas keyis.
1Chronicles24:9 Ichashanthoy Malkiyas keyis. Usupunthoy Miyaaminas keyis.
1Chronicles24:10 Laapunthoy Aqoosas keyis; Hospunthoy Abiyas keyis.
1Chronicles24:11 Uddufunthoy Iyyasus keyis. Tammanthoy Sakanas keyis.
1Chronicles24:12 Tammanne issinthoy Eliyaseebas keyis. Tammanne nam7anthoy Yaqinas keyis.

1Chronicles26:1 Xoossaa keetha pengiya naageysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Koyroy Qore kochaafe Asaafa adde naytape Qore na7a Masulaama.
1Chronicles26:2 Masulaami laapun adde nayta yelis; enti banta yeletaa maaran Zakariyasa
1Chronicles26:3 Elama
1Chronicles26:4 Xoossay Obeed-Edooma anjida gisho
1Chronicles26:5 Ami7eela
1Chronicles26:6 Obeed-Edooma na7ay Shamayey usupun adde nayta yelis; enti mino asi gidida gisho
1Chronicles26:7 Shamaya nayti Otina
1Chronicles26:8 Haysati ubbay Obeed-Edooma kochata; enti
1Chronicles26:9 Masulaamas mino naytinne mino dabboti de7oosona; enti kumethi tammanne hospuna.
1Chronicles26:10 Maraara yaraape Hosa geetetiya addiyas oyddu adde nayti de7oosona. Shimiri bayra na7a gidenna
1Chronicles26:11 Iya ishati Kalqe
1Chronicles26:12 Xoossa keetha pengiya naageysati banta soo asaa halaqata cugan cugan shaaketidosona. Hara Leewetada entaka Xoossa keetha oosoy shaahon gakis.
1Chronicles26:13 Issi issi pengiya naaganaw banta soo asan asan na7a cima goonna saama yeggidosona.
1Chronicles26:14 Doloha Pengiya naaganaw saamay Salamas keyis. Lo77o zore zoriya iya na7aa Zakariyasa pudeha Pengiya naaganaw saami keyis.
1Chronicles26:15 Obeed-Edoomas dugeha pengiya naaganaw saami keyis. Iya naytas buqura minjiya keethaa naaganaw saami keyis.
1Chronicles26:16 Wuloha pengiyanne qommo baggara de7iya Shalekota pengiya naaganaw saami Sufimasinne Hosas keyis. Naagoy maaran maaran gakees.
1Chronicles26:17 Gallas gallas doloha baggara usupun
1Chronicles26:18 Wuloha baggara dabaabako efiya ogiya oyddu
1Chronicles26:19 Hiza Qoresinne Maraara kochaas imetida penge naago oosoy haysa.
1Chronicles26:20 Akiya geetetiya Leewey Xoossa keethan de7iya buquranne Xoossas dummayi wothida imotata naaganaw shuumetis.
1Chronicles26:21 Gedisoona na7aa Laadanna yaraape Yi7eeli dumma dumma soo asaas aawates.
1Chronicles26:22 Yi7eela nayti Zetaamanne iya ishaa Iyyu7eela; enti Xoossa keethan de7iya buqura naaganaw shuumetidosona.
1Chronicles26:23 Amraama
1Chronicles26:24 Muse na7aa Gedisoona yara gidida Sabu7eeli Xoossa keethan de7iya buqura naageysata halaqata bolla shuumetis.
1Chronicles26:25 I Gedisoona ishaa Alaazara baggara Salomootas dabbo. Al77azari Rahaabiya yelis; Rahaabi Yeshaya yelis; Yeshayi Yoraama yelis; Yoraami Zikira yelis; Zikiri Salomita yelis.
1Chronicles26:26 Salomootinne iya dabboti kawoy Dawiti
1Chronicles26:27 Ha asati olan di7etidi yida miishetape baggaa Xoossa keethan dummayidi wothidosona.
1Chronicles26:28 Qoncethi be7iya Sameeli
1Chronicles26:29 Yisihaara yaratape Kanaaneynne iya nayti Xoossa keethafe karera de7iya ooson Isra7eele asaa aysanawunne daynnatanaw shuumetidosona.
1Chronicles26:30 Kebroona yaratape Hashabinne iya dabboti 1
1Chronicles26:31 Kebroona yarata mazgabiya maaran Yiriyi enta halaqa. Dawiti kawotida oytamantho laythan mazgaben koyin enta asaa giddofe mino asati Galada biittan Ya7izeera geetetiya bessan bentidosona.
1Chronicles26:32 Enta soo asaas halaqa gidida Yiriya dabboti minoti 2
1Chronicles27:1 Banta cugan cugan kawotethaa aysiya Isra7eele soo asaa halaqati
1Chronicles27:2 Koyro ageenan keya cugaa kaalethey Zabdi7eela na7aa Yashobi7aama; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:3 Yashobi7aami Paaresa koche; I koyro ageenas tora moconata.
1Chronicles27:4 Nam7antho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Ahoha addiya Dodaya; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:5 Heedzantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey kahiniya Yoodahe na7aa Banaya; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:6 Banayi hastamu eretida asata giddon mino asi; qassi hastamata halaqa. Iya bessan iya na7ay Amzabadi halaqa gidis.
1Chronicles27:7 Oyddantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Iyo7aaba ishaa Asaheela; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:8 Ichashantho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Yisihaara yaraape Shamhuuta; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:9 Usupuntho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Tequhe addiya Iska na7aa Ira; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:10 Laapuntha ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Efreema koche gidida Piloona addiya Selesa; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:11 Hospuntha ageenan keyiya cuga kaalethey Husha addiya Sibakaya; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:12 Uddufuntho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Biniyaame koche gidida Anatoote addiya Abi7ezera; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:13 Tammantho ageenan keyiya cuga kaalethey Naxoofa addiya Zaara yara gidida Mahira; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:14 Tammanne issintho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Efreema koche gidida Pir7atoona addiya Banaya; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:15 Tammanne nam7antho ageenan keyiya cugaa kaalethey Gotoniyala yaraape gidida Naxoofa Heldaya; iya cugan 24
1Chronicles27:16 Isra7eele kochata aysanaw shuumetidaysati haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Robeela kochaa aysey Zikira na7aa Alaazara. Simoona kochaa aysey Ma7ika na7aa Safaaxa.
1Chronicles27:17 Leewe kochaa aysey Qamu7eela na7aa Hasabaya. Aarona kochaa aysey Saadoqa.
1Chronicles27:18 Yihuda kochaa aysey Dawita ishaa Elihu. Yisakoora kochaa aysey Mika7eela na7aa Omira.
1Chronicles27:19 Zabloona kochaa aysey Abdiyu na7aa Yashimaya. Niftaaleme kochaa aysey Azri7eela na7aa Yarmoota.
1Chronicles27:20 Efreema kochaa aysey Azaaza na7aa Hose7a. Minaase kochaafe baggaa aysey Padaya na7aa Iyyu7eela.
1Chronicles27:21 Galadan de7iya Minaase kochaafe baggaa aysey Zakariyasa na7aa Ido. Biniyaame kochaa aysey Abeneera na7aa Ye7isi7eela.
1Chronicles27:22 Daane kochaa aysey Yirohaama na7aa Azari7eela. Haysati Isra7eele kochaa ayseysata.
1Chronicles27:23 Goday Isra7eele asaa salo xoolintoda darsana gida gisho Dawiti laatamu laythinne iyape garsara de7eyisata taybon gelsibeenna.
1Chronicles27:24 Xaruya na7ay Iyo7aabi asaa taybo doomidi wursonna aggis. Asaa taybida gisho Goday Isra7eele asaa bolla hanqetida gisho enta tayboy kawa Dawita taarike mazgaben xaafetibeenna.
1Chronicles27:25 Kawo buqura minjiya bessaa aawatethan aysiya asaa sunthay haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Adi7eela na7aa Azmooti kawo keetha buqura aawatethan aysees. Ooziyana na7ay Yoonataani gaxaren
1Chronicles27:26 Kaluba na7ay Iziri goshshanchota aawatethan aysees.
1Chronicles27:27 Rama addey Same7i woyne gadeta aawatethan aysees. Safaama addey Zabdi woyne ushsha minjiya keethaa aawatethan aysees.
1Chronicles27:28 Gadara addey Ba7al-Hanani zuma bolla de7iya zayte shamahuwanne boobba aawatethan aysees. Zayte wothiya keethaa aawatethan aysey Iyo7aasa.
1Chronicles27:29 Saarona denban heemetiya mehiya aawatethan aysey Saarona addiya Saxira. Zangaaran heemetiya mehiya aawatethan aysey Adilaya na7aa Shaafaxa.
1Chronicles27:30 Gimaleta aawatethan aysey Isma7eela addiya Ubisa. Hareta aawatethan aysey Meronoota addiya Yehidaya.
1Chronicles27:31 Dorsatanne deeshata aawatethan aysey Agara addey Yaziza. Haysati ubbay Dawita shaluwa bolla aawateyisata.
1Chronicles27:32 Dawita aawa ishay
1Chronicles27:33 Akxoofeli kawa zoreysa. Arka addey Kuussi kawa lagge.
1Chronicles27:34 Akxoofeli hayqin

2Chronicles3:1 Solomone aaway Dawiti xoossaa keethay keexetana bessaa More deriyan Yerusalaamen giigisis. He bessay Goday Dawitas qoncida Yaabuse addiya Orna wudumma.
2Chronicles3:2 Solomoney ba kawotida oyddantho laythan
2Chronicles3:3 Solomoney Xoossa keethaa keexanaw baasida baasuwa adussatethay usupun tammu wadha; gompay laatamu wadha.
2Chronicles3:4 Xoossa keetha geliya bessan de7iya barandaa gompay Xoossa keethaa gompaada laatamu wadha; adussatethay laatamu wadha.
2Chronicles3:5 Penge godaa xiidda xalaalan licidi kammis; geeshsha worqan tiyis; zamba misilenne santhalaata misilen alleeqisis.
2Chronicles3:6 Xoossa keethaa al7o shuchan alleeqisis; I alleeqisida worqay Parwayma biittafe yida worqaa.
2Chronicles3:7 Godata
2Chronicles3:8 Solomoney Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa keexis. He bessaa adussatethaa Xoossa keethaa gompaada laatamu wadha; gompaay laatamu wadha. He bessaa godaa laatamu mukulu kilo giraame muruuto worqan tiyis.
2Chronicles3:9 Enti go7etida misimaarey ichashu xeetanne laapun tammu giraame worqafe medhetis. Pooqen de7iya kifiletaka worqan tiyis.
2Chronicles3:10 Solomoney Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessan nam7u kiruube misileta giigisidi worqan tiyis.
2Chronicles3:11 He kiruubeta qefey micetidi
2Chronicles3:12 Nam7antho kiruubiya koyro qefey ichashu wadha gididi
2Chronicles3:13 Ha nam7u kiruubeta qefey micetidi
2Chronicles3:14 Solomoney kaalose ma7uwa
2Chronicles3:15 Solomoney Xoossa keethaa sinthan issuwa issuwa adussatethay hastamanne ichashu wadha gidida nam7u tuussata oosisidi
2Chronicles3:16 Qassi santhalaata giteda medhisidi
2Chronicles3:17 Tuussatape issuwa Xoossa keethaa sinthan ushacha baggara
2Chronicles4:1 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles4:2 Qassi naase birata seerisidi
2Chronicles4:3 Abba Saane doonan kare baggara yuuyi aadhidi
2Chronicles4:4 He Abba Saane naase biratape medhetida tammanne nam7u boorata misiletas zokuwan uttis. Booratape heedzati pudeha bagga

2Chronicles6:21 Taani ne aylleynne ne asay Isra7eeley ha ne keethako simmidi woossiya woosa si7a. Ne de7iya bessan salon si7ada nuus atto yaaga.
2Chronicles6:22 “Issi asi ba shooruwa qohidi akay gin
2Chronicles6:23 neeni salon si7ada ootha. Ne aylleta giddon pirda. Qohida uraa bolla pirdada
2Chronicles6:24 “Ne asay Isra7eeley ne bolla nagara oothidi
2Chronicles6:25 ne salon si7a. Ne asaa Isra7eele nagaraa atto yaaga; ne kase entawunne enta mayzatas immida biitta enta zaara.
2Chronicles6:26 “Ne asay ne bolla nagaraa oothin
2Chronicles6:27 ne salon si7a. Ne aylleta nagaraa
2Chronicles6:28 “Biittaa bolla koshi woyko boshi woyko leegey woyko booley woyko gondoy dhaysin woyko morkey enta katamata teqin woyko dhayoy woyko hargey yin
2Chronicles6:29 ne asaa Isra7eelepe oonika woyko ne asa ubbay nena woossiko
2Chronicles6:30 ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Enta nagaraa atto yaaga; entaw ootha. Neeni asa wozana ereysada asa ubbaas iya oosuwada oosuwada imma. Asa ubbaa wozanaa erey ne xalaala.
2Chronicles6:31 Hessika ne nu mayzatas immida biittan banta de7o laytha ubban new yayyana melanne ne ogiyan hemetana melasa.
2Chronicles6:32 “Isra7eele gidonna hara biitta asi ne gita sunthaa gishonne neeni ne asaas oothida malaalsiya oosota gisho haaho biittafe yidi
2Chronicles6:33 ne de7iya bessan salon si7a. Hara biitta asay oychiyaba ubbaa ootha. Ha alamiyan de7iya asa ubbay ne sunthaa eranaadanne ne ase gidida Isra7eeleda new yayyanaada ta keexida ha keethay ne goyinnetiya bessi gideysa enti eranaada hara biitta asay nena woossiyaba ubbaa ootha.
2Chronicles6:34 “Enti banta morketa olana mela ne kiittiya wode ne doorida ha katamaakonne ta ne sunthaa gisho keexida ha keethaako simmidi nena woossiko
2Chronicles6:35 enta woosaanne enta oysha salon si7a; enta oysha zaara.
2Chronicles6:36 “Nagara oothonna asi bayna gisho ne ase gidida Isra7eeley nagara oothidi nena qohiko neeni shenetada morketas aatha immin morketi enta di77idi haaho woyko mata biitta enta efin
2Chronicles6:37 enti he di7etida biittan de7ishe banta wozanan nagarape simmiko
2Chronicles6:38 bantana di7idi efida morketa biittan de7ishe enti banta kumetha wozanaaninne kumetha qofan neeko simmiko
2Chronicles6:39 enta woosaanne oysha ne de7iya bessan salon si7a; entaw pirda; enta nagaraa atto” yaaga.

2Chronicles7:1 Solomoney woosa polida wode salope tami wodhidi xuussa yarshuwanne hara yarshuwa mis. Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumis.
2Chronicles7:2 Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumida gisho kahineti Xoossa keethaa gelanaw danda7ibookona.
2Chronicles7:3 Isra7eele asa ubbay tami salope wodhishininne Godaa bonchoy Xoossa keethaa kumishin be7ida wode banta som7uwa sa7a gathidi goyinnidosona. “Goday keeha! iya siiqoy merinaasa” yaagidi Godaa galatidosona.
2Chronicles7:4 Kawoynne asa ubbay Godaa sinthan yarsho yarshidosona.
2Chronicles7:5 Kawoy Solomoney laatamanne nam7u mukulu kormatanne xeetanne laatamu mukulu dorsata yarshis. Hessada oothidi
2Chronicles7:6 Kahineti bantaw giigida bessan eqin
2Chronicles7:7 Solomoney xoossaa keethaa sinthan de7iya giddo dabaaba dummayis. He bessan xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarshuwafe modhuwa yarshis. I hessa oothiday
2Chronicles7:8 He wode Solomoneynne Isra7eele asa ubbay laapun gallas ba7aale bonchidosona. Isra7eele asay Hamaatape bidi Gibxe shaafa gakanaw de7iya daro asay he bessan shiiqidosona.
2Chronicles7:9 Asay yarsho bessa anjisiya ba7aale laapun gallas qassi Shaqara Ba7aale hara laapun gallas bonchidosona. Hospuntha gallas wursetha shiiqo shiiqidosona.
2Chronicles7:10 Solomoney laapuntha ageenan
2Chronicles7:11 Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne kawo gadho keexidi wursis. Solomoney Xoossa keethaninne ba gadhon oothanaw ba wozanan qopidaba ubbaa polis.
2Chronicles7:12 Goday Solomones qamma qoncidi
2Chronicles7:13 Iri bukonna mela ta saluwa gordiya wode woyko kathi maana mela boole kiittiya wode woyko ta asaa bolla gado yeddiya wode
2Chronicles7:14 ta sunthan xeegetida ta asay banta asatethaa kawushidi woossiko
2Chronicles7:15 Ha77i ha bessan woosetiya woosa ta ayfey xeellana; ta haythay si7ana.
2Chronicles7:16 Ha77i ta sunthay merinaw iyan daana mela ha keetha doorasinne geeshshas. Ta ayfeynne ta wozanay ubba wode ha keethan daana.
2Chronicles7:17 “Ne aaway Dawiti oothidaysada neeni ta sinthan hemetiko
2Chronicles7:18 taani ne aawa Dawitara
2Chronicles7:19 “Shin hinte tana aggidi ta hintew immida wogaanne higgiya aggiko
2Chronicles7:20 taani kase hintew immida biittafe hintena dhoqollana; ta sunthaas dummayida ha keethaaka aggaagana. Ta ha keethaa kawotetha ubbaa giddon miichasinne qelqisethas oothana.
2Chronicles7:21 Ha Xoossa keethay daro malaalsiyaba gidikoka
2Chronicles7:22 Asay zaaridi
2Chronicles8:1 Solomoney Xoossa keethaanne baw gadho keexida laatamantho laytha wursethan
2Chronicles8:2 Kawoy Kiraami immida katamata Solomoney zaari keexidi Isra7eele asaa he katamatan wothis.
2Chronicles8:3 Solomoney Hamaatanne Suubba geetetiya biitta bidi oykis.
2Chronicles8:4 Yaatidi mela biittan de7iya Tadmoora katamaanne shalo minjiya katamata Hamaata biittan keexis.
2Chronicles8:5 Hessadaka
2Chronicles8:6 Balata katamaa
2Chronicles8:7 Isra7eele gidonashin hara biitta asatape attida Hiteta
2Chronicles8:8 Isra7eele asay wursidi dhaysona aggida asaa wolqa ooso oothana mela Solomoney dooris; hachi gakanaw enti oothosona.
2Chronicles8:9 Shin Solomoney Isra7eele asaape oonaka aylle oothidi oosisibeenna. Enti iya olanchota
2Chronicles8:10 Enta giddofe nam7u xeetanne ishatamu asati kawa Solomone oosuwa aawatethan oosisosona.
2Chronicles8:11 Solomoney
2Chronicles8:12 Solomoney he wode Xoossa keethaa sinthan Godaas keexida yarsho bessan xuussa yarsho Godaas yarshis.
2Chronicles8:13 Muse higgey kiitteysada gallas gallas xuussa yarsho yarshees. Solomoney Sambaatan gallas
2Chronicles8:14 Iya aaway Dawiti kase kiittidaysada kahineta enta ooson ooson shaakidi shuumis; gallas gallas mazmuren sabbana melanne kahineta maaddana mela Leeweta shaakidi shuumis. Xoossa asi gidida Dawiti kiittidaysada penge naagiya asata issi issi pengiya naagana mela shuumis.
2Chronicles8:15 Hessadaka
2Chronicles8:16 Solomoney qopida ooso ubbay oosetidi wuris; Xoossa keethay baasetida wodiyape doomidi poletana gakanaw ooso ubbay lo77o oosetis.

2Chronicles9:1 Saaba kawiya Solomone woriya si7ada
2Chronicles9:2 Solomoney iya oychidaba ubbaas zaaro immis; I iw birshonna iyape geemmidi attidabay aybika baawa.
2Chronicles9:3 Saaba kawiya Solomone cincatetha
2Chronicles9:4 iya gaytan shiiqiya kathaa
2Chronicles9:5 Iya kawako
2Chronicles9:6 Shin ta yada ta ayfen be7ana gakanaw enti taw odidaba ammanabike. Ne cincatetha gitatethaas baggaaka taw odibookona; ta si7idaysafe ne daro gitataasa.
2Chronicles9:7 Ubba wode ne sinthan eqidi ne cincatethaa si7iya ne asatinne ne moorinnati ay mela anjetidona!
2Chronicles9:8 Nenan ufaytidi
2Chronicles9:9 Kawiya oyddu mukulu kilo giraame worqa
2Chronicles9:10 Qassi Ofirape worqa ehida Kiraamanne Solomone asati yaape sandale mithinne al7o shuchu ehidosona.
2Chronicles9:11 Kawoy sandale mithaa Xoossa keethasinne kawo gadhos dethe medhanaw
2Chronicles9:12 Kawoy Solomoney Saaba kawiya koyidabaanne oychidaba ubbaa iw immis. Iya
2Chronicles9:13 Solomoney laythan laythan ekiya worqay laatamanne heedzu mukulu kilo giraame.
2Chronicles9:14 Hessika zal7anchotape ekiya qaraxa
2Chronicles9:15 Kawoy Solomoney issi issi gondalley laapun kilo giraame gidiya nam7u xeetu wogga gondalleta worqafe oosisis.
2Chronicles9:16 Issoy issoy heedzu kilo giraame gidiya heedzu xeetu guutha gondalleta worqafe oosisis. Kawoy he gondalleta “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya kawo gadhon wothis.
2Chronicles9:17 Kawoy dangarsa zaalepe issi gita araata oosisidi walahi bayna worqan lanxis.
2Chronicles9:18 Araatay de7iya bessaa keyanaw yedhiya usupun dethati de7oosona. Araatara oyketidi uttida worqafe oosetida toho yedhiya bessi de7ees. Araatas nam7u baggara kushe shempisiya zempoti de7oosona; he zempota matara ya bagganinne ha baggan eqida issi issi gaammo misiley de7ees.
2Chronicles9:19 He araatay de7iya bessaa keyiya usupun dethata bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara eqida tammanne nam7u gaammo misileti de7oosona. Hessa mela araati hara kawotethan awunka oosetibeenna.
2Chronicles9:20 Kawoy Solomoney ushshu uyaa miishe ubbay worqafe oosetis; “Libaanose Woraa” geetetiya kawo gadhon de7iya miishe ubbay walahi bayna worqafe oosetis. Solomone wode biri darida gisho taybon gelenna.
2Chronicles9:21 Kawas Kiraama asati laagiya zal7e markabeta de7oosona. He markabeti worqanne bira
2Chronicles9:22 Kawoy Solomoney duretethaninne cincatethan sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe aadhees.
2Chronicles9:23 Sa7an de7iya kawoti ubbay Xoossay iya wozanan wothida cincatethaa si7anaw koyoosona.
2Chronicles9:24 Laythan laythan iyako yaa ubbay iyaw worqanne bira
2Chronicles9:25 Solomone paratasinne gaaretas oyddu mukulu zadaloti de7ees; tammanne nam7u mukulu para asati de7oosona. Solomoney hessata dumma dumma katamataninne Yerusalaamen wothis.
2Chronicles9:26 Solomoney Efraxiisa shaafape doomidi
2Chronicles9:27 Kawoy Yerusalaamen biri shuchada keeletanaada ziga mithi Yihuda zumata xaphon dicciya boobbada darana mela oothis.
2Chronicles9:28 Solomoney parata Gibxefenne hara biitta ubbaafe ehisees.
2Chronicles9:29 Koyrope wursethi gakanaw Solomone taarikey nabiya Naatana taarike maxaafan
2Chronicles9:30 Solomoney Isra7eele bolla Yerusalaamen oytamu laythi kawotis.

2Chronicles11:1 Robi7aami Yerusalaame katama gakida wode Isra7eele biitta asaara oletidi kawotethaa baw zaarana mela Yihudapenne Biniyaame kochaafe dooretida 180
2Chronicles11:2 Shin Godaa qaalay Xoossaa asi gidida Shamayako yis.
2Chronicles11:3 “Solomone na7aa
2Chronicles11:4 ‘Hinte isha gidida Isra7eeletara oletanaw boopite. Hessa taani oothida gisho hinte ubbay hinte soo soo simmite’ yaagees” yaaga. Enti Godaa qaala si7idi Iyorbaama olanaw beysa aggidi simmidosona.
2Chronicles11:5 Robi7aami Yerusalaamen uttidi haysafe kaallidi xaafetida Yihudanne Biniyaame katamatan miixata keexis.
2Chronicles11:6 He katamati Beeteleme
2Chronicles11:7 Beet-Xura
2Chronicles11:8 Geete
2Chronicles11:9 Adorayma
2Chronicles11:10 Xor7a
2Chronicles11:11 Robi7aami katamata minthidi entaw halaqata shuumis; kathi
2Chronicles11:12 He keexetida katamata ubban gondallenne toora wothis; yaatidi enta daro minthis. Hessada oothidi Yihudanne Biniyaame haaris.
2Chronicles11:13 Isra7eele ubban de7iya kahinetinne Leeweti ubbay banta de7iya bessaafe Orobi7aamako yidosona.
2Chronicles11:14 Leeweti banta hentha biittanne banta shaluwa aggidi Yihudanne Yerusalaame yidosona. Enti kahine gididi Godaas oothonna mela Iyorbaaminne iya nayti diggidosona.
2Chronicles11:15 Iyorbaami dhoqa goyinno bessaaninne I essida deeshenne mara misiletas oothiya hara kahineta shuumis.
2Chronicles11:16 Isra7eele Xoossaa banta wozanape goyinnanaw koydaysati Godaas banta aawata Xoossaas yarsho yarshanaw kumetha Isra7eelepe Leeweta kaallidi Yerusalaame yidosona.
2Chronicles11:17 Enta yuussay Yihuda kawotethaa minthis; enti heedzu laythi kumethi Solomone na7aa Orobi7aama maaddidosona. Enti kawa Dawita ogiyanne kawa Solomone ogiya kaallidi
2Chronicles11:18 Robi7aami Mahlaato geetetiya macho ekis. Mahilaati aaway Dawita na7aa Yarmoota; I aayiya Isseye na7aa Eliyaaba na7iw Abikaalo.
2Chronicles11:19 Mahilaata Orobi7aames Ye7usa
2Chronicles11:20 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles11:21 Robi7aami ba machetape ba laggethotape aathidi Abeseloome na7iw Ma7iko dosis. Iyaw tammanne hospun machetinne usupun tammu laggethoti de7oosona. I laatamanne hospun adde naytanne usupun tammu macca nayta yelis.

2Chronicles11:23 Robi7aami cincidi ba adde nayta Yihudan
2Chronicles12:1 Orobi7aama kawotethay minnidi eqida wode inne Isra7eele asa ubbay Godaa higgiya aggaagidosona.
2Chronicles12:2 Enti Godaas ammanetona ixida gisho Robi7aami kawotida ichashantho laythan Gibxe kawoy Shishaaqi Yerusalaame bolla dendis.
2Chronicles12:3 Iyaw issi mukulunne nam7u xeetu para gaareti
2Chronicles12:4 Kawoy Shishaaqi gimbetida Yihuda katamata oykidi Yerusalaame gakanaw yis.
2Chronicles12:5 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles12:6 Isra7eele halaqatinne kawoy Robi7aami
2Chronicles12:7 Enti bantana kawushidaysa Goday be7ida wode Shamayako haysada yaagis; “Enti bantana kawushida gisho ta enta dhaysike; ta enta ashshana. Ta hanqoy Shishaaqa baggara Yerusalaame bolla gukenna.
2Chronicles12:8 Gidoshin
2Chronicles12:9 Gibxe kawoy Shishaaqi Yerusalaame olidi
2Chronicles12:10 I efida worqa gondalleta gisho kawoy Robi7aami naase biratape hara gondalleta oosisidi kawo gadho penge naageysata halaqata kushen wothis.
2Chronicles12:11 Kawoy Xoossa keethi geliya wode ubban pengiya naageysati he gondalleta oykidi iya kaalloosona. Kawoy simmiko enti zaaridi naageysata keethan wothoosona.
2Chronicles12:12 Robi7aami bana kawushida gisho I dhayonna mela Godaa hanqoy iyape simmis. Yihuda biitta ubban qassi sa7i injetis.
2Chronicles12:13 Kawoy Robi7aami bana minthidi Yerusalaamen kawotis; Robi7aami kawotida wode iyaw laythi oytamanne issino. Goday ba sunthay yan xeegetana mela Isra7eele biitta ubban doorida
2Chronicles12:14 Robi7aami Godaa wozanape goyinnanaw koyiboona gisho iitabaa oothis.
2Chronicles12:15 Robi7aami ba kawotetha wodiyan oothidabay koyrope wursethi gakanawunne iya yeletaa maaray
2Chronicles12:16 Robi7aami hayqidi ba mayzata gakis; I Dawita kataman moogetis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Abiyi kawotis.
2Chronicles13:1 Kawoy Iyorbaami kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan Abiyi Yihudan kawotis.
2Chronicles13:2 Abiyi Yerusalaamen heedzu laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Mikayo; iya Gib7a addiya Uri7eela na7a. Abiyinne Iyorbaami oletishe de7idosona.
2Chronicles13:3 Abiyi dooretida oyddu xeetu mukulu mino olanchota ekidi olas keyis. Iyorbaami dooretida hospun xeetu mukulu mino olanchota ekidi Abiyara oletanaw keyis.
2Chronicles13:4 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles13:5 Goday Isra7eele Xoossay Dawitinne iya kochay Isra7eele bolla merinaw kawotana mela Dawitara Maxinen caaqidaysa ereketiyee?
2Chronicles13:6 Gidoshin
2Chronicles13:7 Robi7aami yooga
2Chronicles13:8 “Goday Dawita kochaas immida kawotethaara hinte eqetanaw qopeeta. Hinte hessa qopiday hinte daro gidiya gishonne xoossata gidana mela Iyorbaami worqafe medhida marati hintera de7iya gishosa.
2Chronicles13:9 Godaas oothiya Aarona koche gidida oothiya kahinetanne Leeweta hinte yedethideta. Hara biitta asay ootheysada hintew hara kahineta shuumideta. Bana dummayanaw issi wofaanonne laapun maraze ekidi yaa oonaka wordo xoossatas kahine oothidi shuumata.
2Chronicles13:10 “Gidoshin
2Chronicles13:11 Enti ubba gallas wontanne omarsi Godaas xuussa yarsho yarshoosonanne sawiya ixaane cuyisoosona. Godaa sinthan wothiya uythaa geeshsha xarpheeza bolla wothoosona. Omarsi omarsi xompe wothiya kocaa bolla tama oythoosona. Nuuni Godaa nu Xoossaa kiita naagoos; shin hinte iya aggideta.
2Chronicles13:12 Xoossay nuura de7ees; I nuna kaalethees. Ola moyze punniya iya kahineti nuura de7oosona; nuuni hintera olaa doomanaw moyze punnana. Isra7eele asaw
2Chronicles13:13 He wode Iyorbaami ba olanchotape issi cugaa entafe guyera zugidi naagana mela yeddis. Attida Isra7eele olanchoti Yihuda olanchota sinthan de7iya wode zugidi naagiya olanchoti entafe guyera de7oosona.
2Chronicles13:14 Yihuda olanchoti guye simmidi xeelliya wode enta olanaw yidaysati guyeranne sinthara de7eysa be7ida wode Godaako waassidosona; kahineti moyze punnidosona.
2Chronicles13:15 Yihuda olanchoti ola waaso waassida wode Goday Iyorbaamanne Isra7eele asaa ubbaa Abiya sinthaninne Yihuda sinthan xoonis.
2Chronicles13:16 Isra7eele olanchoti Yihuda olanchota sinthafe baqatin Xoossay enta Yihuda olanchota kushen aathidi immis.
2Chronicles13:17 Abiyinne iya olanchoti enta diifi oothidi wursidosona. He olan 500
2Chronicles13:18 Isra7eele asay he wode xoonetidosona; Yihuda asay Godan banta aawata Xoossan ammanetida gisho enta xoonidosona.
2Chronicles13:19 Abiyi Iyorbaama yedethidi iyape Beetele
2Chronicles13:20 Abiyi de7ida laythan Iyorbaami simmidi minnibeenna. Goday Iyorbaama shocin hayqis.
2Chronicles13:21 Gidoshin
2Chronicles13:22 Attida Abiyi taarikey
2Chronicles14:1 Abiyi hayqidi ba mayzata gakis; I Dawita kataman moogetis. Iya bessan iya na7ay Asi kawotis. I kawotida wode biittay tammu laythi wopu gidi de7is.
2Chronicles14:2 Asi Godaa ba Xoossaa sinthan lo77obaanne suureba oothis.
2Chronicles14:3 Asi allaga xoossatas yarshiya bessatanne dhoqa goyinno bessata dhaysis. Goyinnanaw shuchafe oosetida tuussata mentherethis. Asheera geetetiya Xoossa misileta qanxerethidi yeggis.
2Chronicles14:4 Yihuda asay Godaa banta aawata Xoossaa koyana mela
2Chronicles14:5 Dhoqa goyinno bessatanne ixaane cuyisiya bessata Yihuda katamatape dhaysida gisho iya kawotetha laythan biittay wopu gidi de7is.
2Chronicles14:6 Kawoy Asi Yihuda katamatas miixata keexis. Goday iya shempisida gisho biittay shempis; iya laythan iyara oonika oletibeenna.
2Chronicles14:7 Asi Yihuda asaako
2Chronicles14:8 Asas Yihuda kochaafe wogga gondalletanne toorata dancida heedzu xeetu mukulu olanchoti de7oosona. Biniyaame kochaafe guutha gondalleta dancidanne dongen dukeysati nam7u xeetanne hospun tammu mukulu olanchoti de7oosona. Hessati ubbay mino olanchota.
2Chronicles14:9 Zaraha geetetiya issi Tophe addey issi miloone olanchotanne heedzu xeetu para gaareta ekidi Yihuda olanaw yidi Marisa gakis.
2Chronicles14:10 Asi iyara oletanaw keyidi ba olanchota Marisa matan de7iya Xafaata zangaaran salpisis.
2Chronicles14:11 Asi Godaa ba Xoossaa haysada yaagidi woossis; “Abeeti Godaw
2Chronicles14:12 Goday Tophe olanchota Asa sinthaninne Yihuda olanchota sinthan shocin Tophe olanchoti baqatidosona.
2Chronicles14:13 Asinne iyara de7iya asay enta Geraara gakanaw yedethidosona. Tophe olanchotape daroy hayqida gisho enti simmidi minnanawunne oletanaw danda7ibookona. Hessada hanidi
2Chronicles14:14 He heeran de7iya asay Goday oothidaba be7idi daro dagammis. Asa olanchoti Geraara yuushuwan de7iya katamata ubbaa bonqidi dhaysidosona.
2Chronicles14:15 Qassi mehe moothata olidi
2Chronicles15:1 Odeeda na7aa Azaariyasa bolla Xoossaa Ayyaanay wodhis.
2Chronicles15:2 Kawa Asara gahetanaw Azaariyasi bidi
2Chronicles15:3 Isra7eele asay tuma Xoossi bayna
2Chronicles15:4 Shin bantana metoy gakida wode enti Godaako
2Chronicles15:5 He wode biittan de7iya asa ubbay dagaman de7iya gisho sarotethan keyidi geliya oonika baawa.
2Chronicles15:6 Xoossay enta dumma dumma meton yeggida gisho derey deriya
2Chronicles15:7 Gidoshin
2Chronicles15:8 Kawoy Asi ha qaalanne Odeeda na7ay nabey Azaariyasi odida qaala si7ida wode minnis. Asi Yihudanne Biniyaame biitta ubbaafenne I oykida derey dariya Efreema biittan de7iya ixetida eeqa misileta dhaysis. Xoossa keethaa sinthan de7iya Godaa yarsho bessa oorathis.
2Chronicles15:9 Iya Goday Xoossay iyara de7eysa be7ida gisho daro asay Isra7eelepe iyako yidosona. Yihuda asaanne Biniyaame asa ubbaa
2Chronicles15:10 Asi kawotida tammanne ichashantho laythan
2Chronicles15:11 He gallas enti di77idi ehidabaape laapun xeetu kormatanne laapun mukulu dorsata Godaas yarshidosona.
2Chronicles15:12 Godaa banta aawata Xoossaa banta kumetha wozanaaninne banta kumetha shempuwan koyanaw caaqidosona.
2Chronicles15:13 Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa koyonna asi
2Chronicles15:14 Hessa gita waason
2Chronicles15:15 Yihuda asa ubbay banta kumetha wozanan ha caaquwa caaqida gisho ufaytidosona. Godaa enti minthidi koyin I entaw bentis. Goday entaw ubba baggara wopa immis.
2Chronicles15:16 Qassi
2Chronicles15:17 Dhoqa goyinno bessata Isra7eele biittafe dhaysona ixikoka Asi ba de7ida laytha ubban Godaas ammanetida asi gididi de7is.
2Chronicles15:18 Inne iya aaway Godaas dummayida bira
2Chronicles15:19 Asi kawotida hastamanne ichashantho laythi gakanaw oli baawa.
2Chronicles16:1 Asi kawotida hastamanne usupuntho laythan Isra7eele kawoy Ba7oosi Yihuda bolla dendis. Yihuda kawa Asako oonika gelonna melanne keyonna mela teqanaw Raman miixa keexis.
2Chronicles16:2 Kawoy Asi Xoossa keethaninne ba kawo gadhon de7iya buqura minjiya keethaafe worqanne bira ekidi Damasqon de7iya Soore kawa Wolde-Adaras haysada yaagidi yeddis.
2Chronicles16:3 “Kase ta aawaranne ne aawara caaqidaysada taaranne neera caaqoos. Heko
2Chronicles16:4 Kawoy Wolde-Adari
2Chronicles16:5 Ba7oosi hessa si7idi Raman oothiya miixa aggaagis.
2Chronicles16:6 Kawoy Asi Yihuda asaa ubbaa shiishis; asay Ba7oosi kase yan go7etiya shuchaanne mithaa Ramape ekidi Gib7anne Mixipha katamatan miixa keexis.
2Chronicles16:7 He wode qoncethi be7iya Anaani Yihuda kawa Asako yidi
2Chronicles16:8 Tophenne Liibe asati daro para gaaretinne parati de7iya daro olanchota gidokonaayee? Shin neeni Godan ammanetida gisho Goday enta ne kushen aathidi immis.
2Chronicles16:9 Ba kumetha wozanan Godan ammanetiya asi minthethanaw Godaa ayfey sa7aa ubbaa xeellees. Neeni eeyatetha ooso oothida gisho hizape oli neepe shaaketenna” yaagis.
2Chronicles16:10 Asi qoncethi be7iya ura bolla daro hanqetida gisho iya santhalaatan qachidi qasho keethan yeggis. Asi he wode issi issi asata daro un7ethis.
2Chronicles16:11 Heko
2Chronicles16:12 Asi kawotida hastamanne uddufuntho laythan toho saketis; sahoy darikoka
2Chronicles16:13 Asi kawotida oytamanne issintho laythan hayqidi ba mayzata gakis.
2Chronicles16:14 Enti iya Dawita kataman zaalla woocidi kessida duufon moogidosona. Iya aha dumma dumma shitton tiyetida arsa bolla wothidosona. Enti iya bonchuwas daro mithi doori eethidi yeekidosona.
2Chronicles17:1 Asa na7ay Iyosaafexi ba aawa bessan kawotis; Iyosaafexi Isra7eele olanaw bana giigisis.
2Chronicles17:2 Miixi oosetida Yihuda katamatan olanchota wothis; Yihuda biittaninne iya aaway Asi olidi oykida Efreema biittan olanchota wothis.
2Chronicles17:3 Iyosaafexi
2Chronicles17:4 Iyosaafexi ba aawa ogen hemetidi Godaa kiita polis. Isra7eele kawoti oothida iita oosota oothibeenna.
2Chronicles17:5 Goday iya Yihuda kawotethan minthidi essis. Yihuda asa ubbay iyaw imota ehidosona; I daro duretisinne bonchetis.
2Chronicles17:6 Iyosaafexi Godaas kumetha wozanan oothiya asi. Dhoqa goyinno bessatanne Asheera geetetiya xoosse eeqa misileta Yihuda biittafe dhaysis.
2Chronicles17:7 Iyosaafexi kawotida heedzantho laythan Yihuda katamatan tamaarsana mela ba moorinnata Benihaala
2Chronicles17:8 Entara guutha Leeweta Shamaya
2Chronicles17:9 Enti Godaa higge maxaafa ekidi Yihuda biittan de7iya katamata ubbaa bidi yan asaa tamaarsidosona.
2Chronicles17:10 Yihuda yuushon de7iya kawotethata ubbaa Goday yashisin
2Chronicles17:11 Filisxeemepe guutha asati Iyosaafexas imotanne bira giira ehidosona; Arabati iyaw laapun mukulunne laapun xeetu dorsa urgetanne laapun mukulunne laapun xeetu koleta ehidosona.
2Chronicles17:12 Iyosaafexi minni minni bis. Yihudan miixatanne shalo minjiya katamata keexis.
2Chronicles17:13 Yihuda katamatan darobaa minjis. Yerusalaamen iyaw mino olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:14 Enti banta aawata soo asan asan haysafe kaallidi xaafetidosona. Yihuda kochaafe shaalaqay Adina; iyara heedzu xeetu mukulu mino olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:15 Adina kaallidi de7iya halaqay Yohaana; iyara nam7u xeetanne hospun tammu mukulu mino olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:16 Godaas ba shenen bana dummayida Zikira na7ay Amasayi iya kaallidi de7iya heedzantho halaqa; iyara nam7u xeetu mukulu mino olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:17 Biniyaame kochaafe halaqay mino olanchuwa Eliyaada; iyara dongenne gondalle oykiya nam7u xeetu mukulu olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:18 Eliyaada kaallidi de7iya halaqay Yozabaata; iyara ola baanaw dancida issi xeetanne hospun tammu mukulu olanchoti de7oosona.
2Chronicles17:19 Haysati kawas Yerusalaamen oothidaysata; haysati Yihudan gimbetida katamatan de7iya kawoy wothida olanchotape haraa.
2Chronicles18:1 Iyosaafexi daro duretethinne boncho demmidaape guye Akaabara bollotis.
2Chronicles18:2 Guutha laythafe guye Iyosaafexi Akaaba be7anaw Samaare bis. Akaabi iyawunne iyara de7iya asaas daro dorsinne booru shukis. Yaatidi Iyosaafexa Galadan de7iya Raamota olanaw baara baana mela maqis.

2Chronicles18:9 Isra7eele kawoynne Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi kawo ma7o ma7idi

2Chronicles18:31 Para gaareta kiitteysati Iyosaafexa be7ida wode

2Chronicles20:1 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles20:2 Guutha asati Iyosaafexako yidi
2Chronicles20:3 Iyosaafexi yayyida gisho Godaa oychanaw qofa qachis; Yihuda biitta ubban xooma awaajis.
2Chronicles20:4 Yihuda asa ubbay Godaape maado koyanaw shiiqidosona; enti Godaape maado koyanaw Yihuda katama ubbaafe yidosona.
2Chronicles20:5 Iyosaafexi
2Chronicles20:6 Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
2Chronicles20:7 Abeeti nu Xoossaw
2Chronicles20:8 Enti ha biittan de7idosona; yan ne sunthaas keethe keexidi
2Chronicles20:9 ‘Nu bolla iita metoy woyko oli woyko gadoy woyko koshi gakiko
2Chronicles20:10 “Heko
2Chronicles20:11 Nu oothidobas enti nuus zaaridaba be7a. Ne nuus immida laata biittafe enti nuna yedethanaw yidosona.
2Chronicles20:12 Abeeti nu Xoossaw
2Chronicles20:13 Yihuda asa ubbay banta naytaranne banta machetara shiiqidi Godaa sinthan eqidosona.
2Chronicles20:14 He wode Zakariyasa na7ay Yahazi7eeli shiiquwa giddon eqidashin Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla wodhis. Zakariyasi Banaya na7a; Banayi Yi7eela na7a; Yi7eeli Mataana na7a; Mataani Leewe kochenne Asaafa yara.
2Chronicles20:15 Godaa Ayyaanay Yahazi7eela bolla wodhin
2Chronicles20:16 Wonto enta bolla keyidi Xiixa geetetiya bessaa pude keyishin Yiru7eela mela biittan de7iya zangaara wursethan hinte enta demmana.
2Chronicles20:17 Ha olaa oletey hintena gideketa. Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaw
2Chronicles20:18 Iyosaafexi som7o sa7a gathidi goyinnis; Yihuda asa ubbay Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbay Godaa sinthan kundidi goyinnidosona.
2Chronicles20:19 Qahaatanne Qore kochaafe guutha Leeweti eqidi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
2Chronicles20:20 Enti wonta guura dendidi Tequhe mela biitta bidosona. Enti keyida wode Iyosaafexi dendi
2Chronicles20:21 Iyosaafexi asaara zoretidaape guye
2Chronicles20:22 Enti mazmure yethinne galata doomida wode Yihuda olanaw yida Amooneta bolla
2Chronicles20:23 Amoonetinne Moo7abeti Sayreta bolla dendidi
2Chronicles20:24 Yihuda asay mela biittan de7iya olanchota be7anaw yida wode banta morketi de7iya bessaa be7idosona. Enta ahay biittan zin7idaysa demmidosona; entafe issi asika kessi ekibeenna.
2Chronicles20:25 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles20:26 Enti oyddantho gallasan Baraka Zangaaran shiiqidi Godaa galatidosona. Hessa gisho he bessaa “Anjo Zangaara” yaagidi sunthidosona.
2Chronicles20:27 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles20:28 Enti Yerusalaame gakidi diithara
2Chronicles20:29 Isra7eele morketa Goday olidaysa biittan de7iya kawotethati ubbay si7ida wode yayyidosona.
2Chronicles20:30 Yaatidi Xoossay Iyosaafexas ubba baggara shempo immida gisho iya kawotethay sarotethi demmis.
2Chronicles20:31 Iyosaafexi Yihudan kawotiya wode iya laythi hastamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen laatamanne ichashu laythi kawotis. Iya aayiya Shiliha na7iw Azuubo.
2Chronicles20:32 Iyosaafexi ba aawa Asa ogiyan hemetis; I he ogiyape haddirsi ushachi gibeenna; Godaa sinthan suureba oothis.
2Chronicles20:33 Gidoshin
2Chronicles20:34 Iyosaafexi oothidabay koyrope wursethi gakanaw Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan
2Chronicles20:35 Issi wode Yihuda kawoy Iyosaafexi iitabaa oothida Isra7eele kawa Akaziyaasara issifetethi oothis.
2Chronicles20:36 Nam7ay zal7e markabe medhanaw zoretidosona; Exiyoon-Gabiran markabeta medhidosona.
2Chronicles20:37 Gidoshin Mareesa addey Dooda na7ay Alaazari
