2Chronicles21:2 Iyoraama ishati Azaariyasa
2Chronicles21:3 Enta aaway Iyosaafexi entaw daro bira
2Chronicles21:4 Iyoraami ba aawa kawotetha ekidi minnida wode ba ishata ubbaanne issi issi Isra7eele halaqata mashshan wodhis.
2Chronicles21:5 Iyoraami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hastamanne nam7a; Yerusalaamen hospun laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles21:6 Iyoraami Akaaba na7iw ekida gisho Akaaba soo asay hemetidaysada kase Isra7eele kawota ogiyan hemetis; Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
2Chronicles21:7 Gidoshin
2Chronicles21:8 Iyoraama kawotetha laythan
2Chronicles21:9 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles21:10 He wodepe doomidi hachi gakanaw Edoome asay Yihuda asaas haaretibookona. Iyoraami Godaa
2Chronicles21:11 Iyoraami Yihuda gezze biittan dhoqa goyinno bessata giigisis; Yerusalaamen asaa laymatana mela oothis; Yihuda asaaka balethis.
2Chronicles21:12 Nabey Eeliyaasi Iyoraamas dabdaabe haysada yaagidi xaafis; “Goday
2Chronicles21:13 Isra7eele kawota ogiyan hemetadasa. Akaaba soo asay oothidaysada Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya asay eeqa goyinnana mela oothadasa. Qassi neepe lo77iya
2Chronicles21:14 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles21:15 Nena maraace hargey oykin
2Chronicles21:16 Goday Filisxeemetanne Tophe matan de7iya Arabeta Iyoraama olana mela denthethis.
2Chronicles21:17 Enti Yihuda bolla dendidi kawo gadhon de7iya miishe ubbaa
2Chronicles21:18 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles21:19 Nam7u laytha giddon hargey iya bolla goobis; iya maraacey kare keyis; I iita saketidi hayqis. Iya moogiya wode asay kase mayzatas oothidaysada iya bonchoos mithi dooridi tama eethibookona.
2Chronicles21:20 Iyoraami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hastamanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen hospun laythi kawotis. I hayqiya wode oonika azzanibeenna. Iyoraami Dawita kataman moogetisipe attishin
2Chronicles22:1 Arabetara yida pangati
2Chronicles22:2 Akaziyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne nam7a. I Yerusalaamen issi laythi kawotis; iya aayiya Gotola
2Chronicles22:3 Akaziyaasi iitatethan baanada iya aayiya zorida gisho I Akaaba soo asaa ogiyan hemetis.
2Chronicles22:4 Iya aaway hayqidaape guye Akaaba soo asay iya zoriya gisho dhayana gakanaw Akaaba soo asaada ika Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
2Chronicles22:5 Akaziyaasi Akaaba soo asaa zoriya kaallidi
2Chronicles22:6 Iyoraami
2Chronicles22:7 Akaziyaasi Iyoraama oychanaw bida buussaa
2Chronicles22:8 Iyyuy Akaaba kochaa bolla pirdaa poliya wode Yihuda halaqatanne Akaziyaasa maaddiya iya dabbota nayta demmidi wodhis.
2Chronicles22:9 Iyyuy Akaziyaasa koyishin Samaaren qosetidi de7iya bessaafe Iyyu asati demmidi iyako ehidi wodhidosona. “Ba kumetha wozanan Godaa koyida Iyosaafexa na7a” yaagidi moogidosona. Hessa gisho
2Chronicles22:10 Akaziyaasa aayiya Gotola ba na7ay hayqidaysa si7ida wode dendada Yihuda kawa koche ubbaa dhaysasu.
2Chronicles22:11 Shin kawa Iyoraama na7iya Yosabeeta hayqanaw de7iya kawo nayta giddofe Akaziyaasa na7aa Iyo7aasa kaysada ekasu. Iyanne iya dichiyaro qol7an qosasu. Hessada oothada Gotola wodhonnaada kawa Iyoraama na7iya Akaziyaasa michiya kahiniya Yoodahe machiya Yosabeeta iya qosasu.
2Chronicles22:12 Gotola haariya wode ubban na7ay enta matan Xoossa keethan usupun laythi qosetidi de7is.
2Chronicles23:1 Laapuntha laythan Yoodahey minnidi mato halaqata Yirohaama na7aa Azaariyasa
2Chronicles23:2 Enti Yihuda ubbaa bidi yan de7iya Leewetanne Isra7eele yarata halaqata ubbaa ekidi Yerusalaame yidosona.
2Chronicles23:3 He shiiqida asa ubbay Xoossa keethan kawuwara caaqidosona. Yoodahey
2Chronicles23:4 Hinte oothanaw bessiyabay haysa; sambaata gallas Xoossa keethi geliya kahinetapenne Leewetape sikoy pengiya naagite.
2Chronicles23:5 Qassi sikoy kawo gadho naagite; sikoy qassi Baaso Pengiya naagite. Asa ubbay Xoossa keethaa dabaaban shiiqo.
2Chronicles23:6 Oothiya kahinetapenne Leewetape attishin
2Chronicles23:7 “Leeweti ola miishe banta kushen kushen oykidi kawa giddoyidi I keyiya wodenne geliya wode iyara gido. Xoossa keethi geliya oonika hayqo” yaagis.
2Chronicles23:8 Leewetinne Yihuda asa ubbay kahiney Yoodahey kiitida ubbaa oothidosona. Kahiney Yoodahey oosope keyanaw bessiya Leeweta kessidi yeddiboonna gisho
2Chronicles23:9 Kahiney Yoodahey Xoossa keethan de7iya
2Chronicles23:10 Kahiney Yoodahey asa ubbay ola miishe ba kushen kushen oykidi Xoossa keethaa dugehape pudeha gakanaw yarsho bessa mataninne Xoossa keethaa matan kawa yuushon eqanaada oothis.
2Chronicles23:11 Yoodahe kawa na7aa Iyo7aasa kare kessidi
2Chronicles23:12 Asay yexishenne kawa sabbishe ufayteysa Gotola si7ida wode asaako Xoossa keethi basu.
2Chronicles23:13 Kawoy pengen tuussa matan eqidaysa be7asu. Halaqatinne zaye punneysati kawa matan de7oosona; Yihuda asa ubbay ufaytishe zaye punnoosona; mazmure yexeysati sinthe aadhidi banta yetha miishen galatoosona. Gotola ba ma7uwa peedhada
2Chronicles23:14 Kahiney Yoodahey tora moconatako
2Chronicles23:15 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles23:16 Kahiney Yoodahey ba huuphen
2Chronicles23:17 He wode asa ubbay Ba7aale Eeqa Keethi bidi
2Chronicles23:18 Yoodahey kahinetanne Leeweta Xoossa keetha oosuwas halaqa oothidi shuumis. Enta oosoy Muse higgiyan xaafetidaysadanne kawoy Dawiti odidaysada yarsho yarshanaysa. Qassi kawoy Dawiti odidaysada mazmure yexishe bonchanaysa.
2Chronicles23:19 Higgiyan xaafetidaysada tuna asi gelonna mela Yoodahey Xoossa keetha pengen naageysata wothis.
2Chronicles23:20 Yoodahey tora moconata
2Chronicles23:21 Yihuda asa ubbay ufaytis. Gotola mashshan hayqidaape guye katamay wopu gis.
2Chronicles24:1 Iyo7aasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laapuna; I Yerusalaamen oytamu laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Saabo; iya Barsaabe maccas.
2Chronicles24:2 Kahiney Yoodahey de7ida laytha ubban Iyo7aasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis.
2Chronicles24:3 Yoodahey kawa Iyo7aasas nam7u macho immin enti iyaw adde naytanne macca nayta yelidosona.
2Chronicles24:4 Guutha wodepe guye Iyo7aasi Xoossa keethaa oorathanaw qopis.
2Chronicles24:5 Iyo7aasi kahinetanne Leeweta shiishidi
2Chronicles24:6 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles24:7 He wode iita maccase Gotola nayti Xoossa keethaa menthidosona. Enti Godaa keethan de7iya geeshsha miishe ubbaa ekidi Ba7aale goyinnanaw go7etidosona.
2Chronicles24:8 Kawoy Leeweta kiittin
2Chronicles24:9 Xoossaa aylley Musey mela biittan de7ishe
2Chronicles24:10 Halaqatinne asa ubbay ufaytidi saaxiney kumana gakanaw giira yeggidosona.
2Chronicles24:11 Saaxiney Leeweta baggara kawo moorinnatako gakin saaxiniya giddon daro miishey dagaayetidaysa be7ida wode ubban kawo xaafeynne kahine halaqay yidi saaxiniyape miishe kessidi saaxiniya bessan zaari wothoosona. Enti ubba wode hessa oothidi daro miishe dagaayidosona.
2Chronicles24:12 He miishiya kawoynne Yoodahey Xoossa keetha oosuwa oothana mela shuumetida asatas immoosona. Enti Xoossa keethaa oorathanaw shuchu masseyisata
2Chronicles24:13 Oosanchoti Xoossa keethaa minni oothidi kaseysada oorathidosona.
2Chronicles24:14 Xoossa keetha ooratho oosoy wurida wode palahida worqanne bira kawuwakonne Yoodaheko ehidosona. Enti he worqanne bira Xoossa keethaa gaatha oosuwas go7etiya miisheta
2Chronicles24:15 Yoodahey daro cimmidi hayqis; I hayqiya wode iyaw laythi xeetanne hastama.
2Chronicles24:16 Yoodahey Isra7eelen Xoossasinne Xoossa keethaas lo77oba oothida gisho Dawita kataman kawota duufon iya moogidosona.
2Chronicles24:17 Yoodahey hayqidaape guye Yihuda halaqati yidi kawa sinthan gufannidosona; kawoy enta oysha si7is.
2Chronicles24:18 Enti Godaa banta mayzata Xoossa keethaa aggidi
2Chronicles24:19 Enta zaarana mela Goday nabeta entako kiittis. Nabeti entaw markatidosona; shin enti si7onna ixidosona.
2Chronicles24:20 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles24:21 Enti iya bolla maqetidosona. Kawoy enta kiittin
2Chronicles24:22 Kawoy Iyo7aasi Zakariyasa aaway Yoodahey iyaw oothida keehatetha hassayonna aggidi iya na7aa Zakariyasa wodhisis. Zakariyasi hayqishe
2Chronicles24:23 Laytha laamen
2Chronicles24:24 Soore olanchoti taybon guutha; shin Yihuda asay Godaa banta aawata Xoossaa aggida gisho
2Chronicles24:25 Soore olanchoti iyape shaaketiya wode Iyo7aasi daro madunxidi de7ees. Kahiniya Yoodahe na7aa suuthaa gisho iya shuumati iya bolla maqetidi
2Chronicles24:26 Iyo7aasa bolla maqetidaysati Amoone maccase Simaati na7aa Zabadanne Moo7abe maccase Simariti na7aa Yozabaata.
2Chronicles24:27 Heko
2Chronicles25:1 Amasiyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen laatamanne uddufun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yo7aado; iya Yerusalaame maccas.
2Chronicles25:2 Amasiyaasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis; gidoshin
2Chronicles25:3 Amasiyaasi kawotethaa minthidaape guye ba aawa wodhida asata wodhis.
2Chronicles25:4 Gidoshin
2Chronicles25:5 Amasiyaasi Yihuda asaa shiishidi banta aawata keethan keethan shaalaqatanne mato halaqata shuumis. I laatamu laythinne iyape bolla gidida Yihuda kochatanne Biniyaame kochata ubbaa taybidi gondallenne toora oykidi olas giigida heedzu xeetu mukulu dooretida asata demmis.
2Chronicles25:6 Isra7eelepe issi xeetu mukulu mino asata heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame biran Amasiyaasi shammis.
2Chronicles25:7 Shin issi Xoossa asi iyako yidi
2Chronicles25:8 Enti tana minthana gada ne qopiko
2Chronicles25:9 Amasiyaasi Xoossa addiyako
2Chronicles25:10 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles25:11 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles25:12 Hara tammu mukulu olanchota paxa di77idi
2Chronicles25:13 Shin he wode Amasiyaasi baara olas boonna mela guye zaarida Isra7eele olanchoti Samaarepe Beet-Horona gakanaw de7iya Yihuda katamata olidosona. Enti Yihuda asaape heedzu mukulu wodhidi daro di7o ekidosona.
2Chronicles25:14 Amasiyaasi Edoometa wodhidi simmiya wode enta eeqata ekidi yis. Enta xoosse oothi essidi enta goyinnis; ixaane cuyisis.
2Chronicles25:15 Godaa hanqoy Amasiyaasa bolla eexin
2Chronicles25:16 Nabey buroo oda bolla de7ishin kawoy
2Chronicles25:17 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles25:18 Isra7eele kawoy Iyo7aasi Yihuda kawa Amasiyaasako haysada yaagis; “Libaanosen de7iya kinchotey Libaanosen de7iya zigaako kiita yeddidi
2Chronicles25:19 ‘Taani Edoome xoonas’ gada ne wozanan otoron kumadasa. Shin ha77i ne son wopu gada utta; ne bollanne Yihuda bolla metonne dhayo ehanaw ayis denthethay?” yaagidi zaaris.
2Chronicles25:20 Shin Amasiyaasi si7onna ixis. Enti Edoome xoossata goyinnida gisho Xoossay enta
2Chronicles25:21 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles25:22 Yihuda asay xoonetidosona; Yihuda asa ubbay baqatidi banta soo soo bidosona.
2Chronicles25:23 Kawoy Iyo7aasi Akaziyaasa na7aa na7aa
2Chronicles25:24 Xoossa keethan de7iya worqanne bira ubbaa
2Chronicles25:25 Iyo7akaaza na7ay
2Chronicles25:26 Amasiyaasi oothidaba ubbay koyrope wursethi gakanaw Yihuda kawotanne Isra7eele kawota taarike maxaafan xaafetidi de7ees gidennee?
2Chronicles25:27 Amasiyaasi Godaa kaalo aggidaape guye enti iya bolla Yerusalaamen maqetidosona. I Laakiso baqatis. Shin enti iya geedo ase kiittin enti iya yan wodhidosona.
2Chronicles25:28 Iya aha paran caani ehidi
2Chronicles26:1 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles26:2 Iya aaway Amasiyaasi hayqidaape guye I Eloota katamaa zaari keexis.
2Chronicles26:3 Ooziyani kawotiya wode iyaw laythi tammanne usupuna; I Yerusalaamen ishatammanne nam7u laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yikoolo; iya Yerusalaame maccas.
2Chronicles26:4 Iya aaway Amasiyaasi oothidaysada ika Godaa sinthan suureba oothis.
2Chronicles26:5 Xoossas yashshi tamaarsida Zakariyasa wode I Xoossas ammanetidi oothis. Godaa I koyida wode ubban Xoossay iya anjis.
2Chronicles26:6 Ooziyani Filisxeemetara oletanaw keyidi Gaate katamaanne iya heera
2Chronicles26:7 Xoossay Ooziyaanas Filisxeemeta
2Chronicles26:8 Amooneti Ooziyaanas giiridosona. Ooziyani daro minnida gisho iya sunthay Gibxe zawa gakanaw keyis.
2Chronicles26:9 Ooziyani Maazane Pengiya matan
2Chronicles26:10 Iyaw zuma xaphoninne denban daro mehey de7iya gisho he bessatan adussa gimbe shakota gimbidi daro haatha ollata bookis. I goshshe dosiya gisho dere bollanne aradda biittan iyaw daro goshshanchotinne woyney tokeysati de7oosona.
2Chronicles26:11 Ooziyaanas olaw giigida daro olanchoti de7oosona. Olanchota xaafey Yi7eelinne halaqay Ma7iseyi olanchota sunthaa mazgaben xaafidosona. Enta halaqay Hanaana.
2Chronicles26:12 Banta aawata soo asaa bolla halaqatiya mino asati nam7u mukulunne usupun xeeta.
2Chronicles26:13 Kawa morketara oletidi
2Chronicles26:14 Ooziyani olanchota ubbaas gondalle
2Chronicles26:15 Ooziyani Yerusalaamen de7iya hiillanchoti wochiya adussa gimbe shakotanne katamaa dirsa gimbe maazaneta bolla donge dukiya miishetanne gita gita shuchata pixiridi holiya miisheta oosisis. Xoossay iya maaddin I daro minnis; iya sunthay ubba bessan keyis.
2Chronicles26:16 Shin Ooziyani minnida wode otortis; otoroy iya kundethas gathis. Ooziyani Godaa ba Xoossa ammanetona ixidi ixaane cuyisiya bessan ixaane cuyisanaw Xoossa keethi gelis.
2Chronicles26:17 Kahiney Azaariyasinne mino gidida hospun tammu Godaa kahineti iya kaallidi gelidosona.
2Chronicles26:18 Kahineti iyako
2Chronicles26:19 Gidoshin
2Chronicles26:20 Kahine halaqay Azaariyasinne hara kahineti ubbay iya xeelliya wode iya som7on baro hargey bentidaysa be7idi
2Chronicles26:21 Kawoy Ooziyani hayqana gakanaw he hargiyara de7is; Xoossa keethi gelonna mela digetis. He hargiya gaason dumma keethan barka de7is. He wode iya na7ay Iyo7atami
2Chronicles26:22 Kawoy Ooziyani oothida haraba ubbaa koyrope wursethi gakanaw Amoxe na7ay
2Chronicles26:23 Ooziyani hayqidi ba mayzata gakis. Asay iya
2Chronicles27:1 Iyo7atami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne usupun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Yarusho; iya Saadoqa na7a.
2Chronicles27:2 Iya aaway Ooziyani oothidaysada Iyo7atami Godaa sinthan suureba oothis. Iya aaway Xoossa keethi gelidaysada I gelibeenna; gidoshin
2Chronicles27:3 Iyo7atami Xoossa keethi geliya Qommo Pengiya zaaridi oothis; Yerusalaame Ofeela deriya bolla daro ooso oothis.
2Chronicles27:4 Derey dariya Yihuda biittan katamata keexis; wori dariya zumaa bolla miixanne adussa gimbe shakota gimbis.
2Chronicles27:5 Iyo7atami Amoone kawuwara oletidi xoonis. Amooneti he laythi heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame bira
2Chronicles27:6 Iyo7atami Godaa ba Xoossaa sinthan suure hemetida gisho daro minnis.
2Chronicles27:7 Iyo7atama wode oosetida oosoti
2Chronicles27:8 Iyo7atami kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne usupun laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles27:9 Iyo7atami hayqidi ba mayzata gakis. Enti iya Dawita kataman moogidosona. Iya bessan iya na7ay Akaazi kawotis.
2Chronicles28:1 Akaazi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatama; I Yerusalaamen tammanne usupun laythi kawotis. Akaazi ba mayzay Dawiti suureba oothidaysada Godaa sinthan suureba oothibeenna;
2Chronicles28:2 I kase de7ida Isra7eele kawota ogiyan hemetis. Gujidi
2Chronicles28:3 Hinooma Zangaaran ixaane cuyisis; Goday Isra7eele asaa sinthafe gooddidi kessida asaa
2Chronicles28:4 Akaazi dhoqa goyinno bessatan
2Chronicles28:5 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles28:6 Yihuda asay Godaa
2Chronicles28:7 Efreema koche gidida mino olanchoy Zikiri
2Chronicles28:8 Isra7eele asay banta dabbotape nam7u xeetu mukulu maccasa
2Chronicles28:9 Godaa nabey Odeeda geetetiya addey Samaaren de7ees. Odeedi Samaare biya olanchotara gahetanaw keyidi
2Chronicles28:10 Hessi gidonna ixin Yihudanne Yerusalaame maccanne addiya hinte aylle oothanaw qopeeta. Yaatin
2Chronicles28:11 Ha77i ta hintew odeysa si7ite. Godaa hanqoy hinte bolla wodhida gisho hinte di77idi
2Chronicles28:12 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles28:13 Enti “He di7etida asata nuuko ehopite! Kase nuuni Godaa bolla oothida nagaraanne naaquwa bolla haraa gujeeta. Koyroka nu nagaray daro gidiya gisho Isra7eele bolla Godaa hanqoy wodhis” yaagidosona.
2Chronicles28:14 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles28:15 Sunthay haysafe qommon xaafetida asati dendi eqidi
2Chronicles28:16 He wode kawoy Akaazi Asoore kawoy bana maaddana mela kiita yeddis.
2Chronicles28:17 Edoome asati nam7antho Yihuda bolla dendidi
2Chronicles28:18 Filisxeemeti zuma xaphoninne Yihuda gadhan
2Chronicles28:19 Yihuda kawoy Akaazi Yihuda asaa nagara oosisida gishonne Godaas ammanetibona gisho Goday Yihuda kawushis.
2Chronicles28:20 Asoore kawoy Telgeltelfelisoori Akaazako yidi iya meto bessisipe attishin
2Chronicles28:21 Akaazi Xoossa keethafe
2Chronicles28:22 Kawoy Akaazi un7etida wode Godaas ammanetona ixidi meto bolla meto gujis.
2Chronicles28:23 Bana xoonida Damasqo xoossatas yarshishe
2Chronicles28:24 Akaazi Xoossa keetha miisheta ubbaa shiishidi tincherethis. Xoossa keethaa pengeta gordis. Yerusalaamen dumma dumma bessan baw yarsho bessi keexis.
2Chronicles28:25 Akaazi hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisanaw Yihudan de7iya katamata ubban dhoqa goyinno bessata medhis. Yaatidi Godaa
2Chronicles28:26 Heko
2Chronicles28:27 Akaazi hayqidi
2Chronicles29:1 Hizqiyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen laatamanne uddufun laythi kawotis. Iya aaye sunthay Abu; iya Zakariyasa na7a.
2Chronicles29:2 Iya mayzay Dawiti oothidaysada Hizqiyaasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis.
2Chronicles29:3 Hizqiyaasi ba kawotida koyro laythan
2Chronicles29:4 Kahinetanne Leeweta Xoossa keethaa doloha baggara de7iya dabaaban shiishis.
2Chronicles29:5 Entako
2Chronicles29:6 Nu aawati ammanetibokona; Godaa
2Chronicles29:7 Qassi
2Chronicles29:8 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles29:9 Hessa gaason
2Chronicles29:10 Godaa hanqoy nu bollafe kichana mela taani Godaara
2Chronicles29:11 Ta nayto
2Chronicles29:12 He bessan de7iya Leeweti haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysata. Qahaata yaraape Amasaya na7aa Mahaatanne Azaariyasa na7aa Iyyu7eela. Maraara yaraape Abda na7aa Qiisanne Yihali7eela na7aa Azaariyasa. Gedisoona yaraape Ziima na7aa Iyo7akinanne Yo7aaha na7aa Edena.
2Chronicles29:13 Elxafaana yaraape Shimiranne Uzi7eela. Asaafa yaraape Zakariyasanne Mataana.
2Chronicles29:14 Amaana yaraape Yi7eelanne Same7a. Edotaame yaraape Shamayanne Uzi7eela.
2Chronicles29:15 Enti banta dabbota shiishidi bantana geeshidaape guye kawoy enta kiittidaysada Godaa higgiyada Xoossa keethi geeshsho doomidosona.
2Chronicles29:16 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles29:17 Enti koyro ageenan
2Chronicles29:18 Leeweti kawa Hizqiyaasako gelidi
2Chronicles29:19 Kawoy Akaazi kawotidi de7iya wode Xoossas ammanetona ixidi efida miishe ubbaa nu zaaridi geeshshida. Heko
2Chronicles29:20 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi wontetha gallas wonta guura dendidi katamaa halaqata shiishidi
2Chronicles29:21 Enti kawotethaa gisho
2Chronicles29:22 Kahineti kormata shukidi suuthaa yarsho bessa bolla dharcidosona. Marazeta shukidi suuthaa yarsho bessa bolla dharcidosona. Dorsa urgeta shukidi suuthaa yarsho bessa bolla dharcidosona.
2Chronicles29:23 Nagara yarshos haniya koleta kawa sinthenne asaa sinthe ehidosona; enti ubbay banta kushiya deeshata bolla wothidosona.
2Chronicles29:24 Kawoy xuussa yarshonne nagara yarsho yarshana mela enta kiitida gisho kahineti deeshata shukidi Isra7eele asa ubbaa nagaray atto geetetana mela enta suuthaa yarsho bessan yarshidosona.
2Chronicles29:25 Goday kawas qoncethi be7iya Gaadenne nabiya Naatana baggara kawa Dawiti kiitida kiita Hizqiyaasi kaallidi
2Chronicles29:26 Leeweti Dawiti go7etiya yetha miisheta oykin
2Chronicles29:27 Enti xuussa yarsho yarshana mela Hizqiyaasi kiittis. Xuussa yarshoy yarshetiya wode zayeynne Isra7eele kawa Dawita yetha miishetan Godaas yethi doometees.
2Chronicles29:28 Xuussa yarshoy poletana gakanaw shiiqo ubbay Godaa goyinnees; yexeysati yexoosona; zaye punneysati punnoosona.
2Chronicles29:29 Kahineti yarshuwa polida wode kawoynne iyara de7iya asa ubbay gulbatidi goyinnidosona.
2Chronicles29:30 Kawoy Dawitinne qoncethi be7iya Asaafi xaafida galataa mazmure Godaas yexana mela kawoy Hizqiyaasinne halaqati Leeweta kiittidosona; Enti ubbay ufaysan galatishe gulbatidi goyinnidosona.
2Chronicles29:31 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles29:32 He shiiqida asay ehida xuussa yarsho tayboy laapun tammu kormata
2Chronicles29:33 Issifetetha yarshos usupun xeetu kormatanne heedzu mukulu dorsati shiiqidosona.
2Chronicles29:34 Gidoshin
2Chronicles29:35 Xuussa yarshora shiiqiya issifetetha yarshuwa
2Chronicles29:36 Hizqiyaasinne asa ubbay oosuwa ellesidi polana mela Xoossay enta maaddida gisho daro ufaytidosona.
2Chronicles30:1 Hizqiyaasi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keetha Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay yaana mela kiittis. Qassi
2Chronicles30:2 Kawoy
2Chronicles30:3 Gidiya kahineti bantana geeshshiboonna gishonne daro asay Yerusalaamen shiiqiboona gisho asay Paasika iya woden bonchanaw danda7ibookona.
2Chronicles30:4 He qofay kawanne shiiqida asaa ufaysis.
2Chronicles30:5 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles30:6 Kawoy kiitan
2Chronicles30:7 Hinte kase be7idaysada enta bores aathidi immana gakanaw banta Godaas
2Chronicles30:8 Hinte Godaas kiitetite; kase hinte aawatada si7ishe ixas goopite! Hintenatethaa Xoossas immite. Goday merinaw geeshshida Xoossa keethaa yiite. Godaa hanqoy hintefe simmana mela Godaa hinte Xoossaa goyinnite.
2Chronicles30:9 Hinte Godaako simmiko hinte ishatinne hinte nayti bantana di77idaysata sinthan maarota demmidi ha biitta simmana. Goday hinte Xoossay qadheteysanne maareysa gidiya gisho hinte iyako simmiko ba som7uwa hintefe qosenna” yaagis.
2Chronicles30:10 Kiitetidaysati Efreemanne Minaase biitta kanthidi Zabloona biitta gakanaw katamaape katamaa bidosona. Shin he katamatan de7iya asay enta kadhidi enta bolla miicidosona.
2Chronicles30:11 Gidoshin
2Chronicles30:12 Kawoynne kawa shuumati Godaa qaala maaran kiittidaysa polanaw issi wozanan gidana mela Xoossa kushey Yihuda bolla de7ees.
2Chronicles30:13 Nam7antho ageenan Uytha Ba7aale bonchanaw daro asi Yerusalaamen shiiqis.
2Chronicles30:14 Enti dendidi
2Chronicles30:15 Nam7antho ageenan
2Chronicles30:16 Xoossa asi gidida Muse wogaada Xoossa keetha giddon banta bessan bessan eqidosona; kahineti Leeweta kushepe ekida suuthaa dharcidosona.
2Chronicles30:17 Asaa giddofe daroti bantana geeshshiboonna gishonne dorsata shukonna mela digetida gisho Leeweti entaw Paasika dorsata shukidosona.
2Chronicles30:18 Efreemape
2Chronicles30:19 higgey kiitteysada haysati bantana geeshshonnaba gidikoka enti nena Godaa
2Chronicles30:20 Goday Hizqiyaasa woosa si7idi entaw atto gis.
2Chronicles30:21 Yerusalaamen shiiqida Isra7eele asay laapun gaalasi kumethi Uytha Baaliya gita ufaysan bonchidosona. Leewetinne kahineti yetha miishen yexishe gallas gallas Godaa galatoosona.
2Chronicles30:22 Hizqiyaasi Godaa goyinno wogaa kaaleson eretida Leeweta minthethis. Asa ubbay issifetetha yarsho yarshishe
2Chronicles30:23 Shiiqoy hara laapun gallas gujidi ba7aale bonchanaw zore qachidi laapun gallas ufaytidi bonchidosona.
2Chronicles30:24 Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasi yarsho yarshanaw issi mukulu kormata
2Chronicles30:25 Yihuda asay
2Chronicles30:26 Dawita na7aa
2Chronicles30:27 Kahinetinne Leeweti dendidi
2Chronicles31:1 Ba7aaley poletida wode he bessan de7iya Isra7eele ubbay Yihuda katamata bidi eeqa shuchata tincherethidosona; Asheera eeqa misileta qanxerethidosona. Yihudan
2Chronicles31:2 Hizqiyaasi kahinetanne Leeweta enta ooso maaran cugan cugan shaakidi essis. Enti xuussa yarshonne issifetetha yarsho Godaas yarshana melanne Xoossa keetha pengen Godaa galatananne sabbana mela oothis.
2Chronicles31:3 Godaa higgiyan xaafetidaysada wontanne omarsi xuussa yarshonne Sambaatan
2Chronicles31:4 Godaa higgiyan xaafetidaysada kahinetinne Leeweti banta kumetha wodiya Godaa oosos peeshshana mela entaw bessiyaba immana mela Yerusalaame asaa kawoy kiittis.
2Chronicles31:5 Isra7eele asay kawa kiitaa si7ida wode kathaafe
2Chronicles31:6 Yihuda katamatan de7iya Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay banta mehetape
2Chronicles31:7 Enti heedzantho ageenan eho doomidi laapuntha ageenan polidosona.
2Chronicles31:8 Hizqiyaasinne halaqati dooretidaysa yidi be7ida wode enti Godaanne Godaa asi gidida Isra7eele anjidosona.
2Chronicles31:9 Hizqiyaasi dooretida imotaba kahinetanne Leeweta oychis.
2Chronicles31:10 Saadoqa yara gidida kahine halaqay Azaariyasi
2Chronicles31:11 Hizqiyaasi Xoossa keethan minja kifileta giigisana mela kiittin asay giigisidosona.
2Chronicles31:12 Asraata
2Chronicles31:13 Kawoy Hizqiyaasinne kahine halaqay Azaariyasi shuumin Konaanepenne Same7ape garsara oothiya Leeweti
2Chronicles31:14 Doloha bagga pengiya naageysata halaqay Leewey
2Chronicles31:15 Kahineti de7iya katamatan gitape guuthu gakanaw de7iya banta ishatas ammanetidi
2Chronicles31:16 Banta cugan cugan banta oosuwa gallas gallas Xoossa keethan ootheysatas laythi
2Chronicles31:17 Banta aawata soo asan asan taybetida kahinetasinne laythi
2Chronicles31:18 Enti ammanetidi bantana geeshshida gisho enti banta yeletaa maaran taybetiya wode banta naytaranne machetara issife xaafetidosona.
2Chronicles31:19 Banta katamata yuushon de7iya hentha gadetan woyko hara katamatan de7iya kahine gidida Aarona sheeshas
2Chronicles31:20 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi Godaa ba Xoossaa sinthan lo77o
2Chronicles31:21 Hizqiyaasi Xoossa keethas oothida ooso ubban
2Chronicles32:1 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi ammanetethan Godaas oothidaape guye Asoore kawoy Sanakreemi Yihuda biitta bolla dendis; xoonidi baw ekanaw qopidi gimbetida katamata teqis.
2Chronicles32:2 Sanakreemi Yerusalaame olanaw yidaysa Hizqiyaasi be7ida wode
2Chronicles32:3 katamaape karera goggiya pulto haathata teqanaw ba shuumatanne toora moconata zore oychis; enti iya maaddidosona.
2Chronicles32:4 Daro asay shiiqidi
2Chronicles32:5 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles32:6 Ola halaqata asaa bolla shuumis; enta ubbaa katamaa pengiya matan de7iya dabaaban shiishidi
2Chronicles32:7 “Minnite; gencite; nuura de7eysi entara de7eysafe aadhiya gisho Asoore kawanne iya olanchota be7idi yayyofite
2Chronicles32:8 Iyara asa wolqi de7ees; shin nuura Goday nu Xoossay nuna maaddanawunne nuus oletanaw de7ees” yaagidi enta minthethis. Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasi odan asay minetis.
2Chronicles32:9 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles32:10 Asoore kawoy Sanakreemi
2Chronicles32:11 Hizqiyaasi
2Chronicles32:12 Dhoqa goyinno bessatanne yarsho bessata diggidi
2Chronicles32:13 “Tanne ta aawati hara kawotethata bolla oothidaba hinte ereketii? Enta xoossati banta biitta ta kushepe ashshanaw danda7idonaa?
2Chronicles32:14 Ta aawati dhaysida ha kawotethata xoossata ubbaa giddon ba asaa ta kushepe ashshanaw danda7iday oonee? Yaatin
2Chronicles32:15 Hiza Hizqiyaasi hintena balethofo woyko hessada cimmofo. Hinte Hizqiyaasa ammanopite. Iya asaa ta kushepe woyko ta aawata kushepe ashshanaw danda7ida hara biitta xoossati woyko kawotethata xoossati baawa. Yaatin
2Chronicles32:16 Sanakreema shuumati Godaa Xoossaa bollanne iya aylliya Hizqiyaasa bolla hara darobaa haasayidosona.
2Chronicles32:17 Sanakreemi Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa cayidi
2Chronicles32:18 Sanakreema shuumati katamaa oykanaw koyidi
2Chronicles32:19 Asa kushen oosetida
2Chronicles32:20 Kawoy Hizqiyaasinne Amoxe na7ay
2Chronicles32:21 Xoossay ba kiitanchuwa kiittidi Asoore olanchotanne toora moconata dhaysis. Hessa gisho
2Chronicles32:22 Hessada oothidi
2Chronicles32:23 Daro asay Godaas imota
2Chronicles32:24 He wode Hizqiyaasi hargidi
2Chronicles32:25 Shin Hizqiyaasi otortida gisho Goday iyaw keehida keehas bessiya zaaro immibeenna. Hessa gaason
2Chronicles32:26 Gidoshin
2Chronicles32:27 Hizqiyaasas daro duretethinne bonchoy de7ees. Hizqiyaasi ba bira
2Chronicles32:28 Kathaa
2Chronicles32:29 Xoossay iyaw daro aqo immida gisho baw katamata keexis; daro dorsenne mehe shiishis.
2Chronicles32:30 Qommo baggan de7iya Giyoone pulto haatha zeeridi
2Chronicles32:31 Shin Yihuda biittan hanida malaalsiya oosotaba oychanaw Babiloonepe kiitetida asati Hizqiyaasako yida wode Goday iya paacanawunne iya wozanan de7iyaba eranaw iya yeddi bessis.
2Chronicles32:32 Hizqiyaasi oothida harabaynne iya keehatethay Amoxe Na7aa
2Chronicles32:33 Hizqiyaasi hayqidi
2Chronicles33:1 Minaasey kawotiya wode iyaw laythi tammanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen ishatammanne ichashu laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles33:2 Goday Isra7eele asaa sinthafe gooddidi kessida asaa
2Chronicles33:3 Minaasey ba aaway Hizqiyaasi laallida
2Chronicles33:4 Goday
2Chronicles33:5 Xoossaa keethan de7iya nam7u dabaabatan salo xoolintoti goyinnetiya yarsho bessi giigisis.
2Chronicles33:6 Hinooma Zangaaran ba adde nayta taman xuuggidi yarshis. I bitanne murunno oothis; marothis; moytillenne tuna ayyaana zore oychis. Godaa sinthan daro iitabaa oothidi Xoossaa yiloyis.
2Chronicles33:7 Ba oothida eeqa misiliya efidi Xoossa keethan essis. He Xoossa keethay
2Chronicles33:8 Muse baggara ta Isra7eele asaa kiitida kiita
2Chronicles33:9 Shin Minaasey Yihuda asaanne Yerusalaame asaa balethidi
2Chronicles33:10 Goday Minaasesinne iya asaas odis; shin enti iya si7onna ixidosona.
2Chronicles33:11 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles33:12 Minaasey un7etida wode Godaa ba Xoossaa maado woossis; ba aawata Xoossaa sinthan banatetha daro kawushis.
2Chronicles33:13 Xoossay Minaase woosa si7is; Yerusalaame simmidi zaaridi kawotana mela oothis. Goday tuma Xoossi gideysa Minaasey hessan eris.
2Chronicles33:14 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles33:15 Allaga xoossatanne eeqa misileta Xoossa keethaafe diggis; Xoossa keethay de7iya zuma bollanne Yerusalaamen de7iya yarsho bessata laallidi he katamaape kare kessidi yeggis.
2Chronicles33:16 Minaasey Godaa yarsho bessi oorathidi issifetetha yarshonne galata yarsho yan yarshis. Yihuda asay Godaa Isra7eele Xoossaa goyinnana mela kiittis.
2Chronicles33:17 Asay dhoqa goyinno bessatan yarsho yarsheysa aggonna ixikoka
2Chronicles33:18 Minaase oothida harabay
2Chronicles33:19 Heko
2Chronicles33:20 Minaasey hayqidi ba mayzata gakis; iya kawo gadhon moogidosona. Iya bessan iya na7ay Amoxey kawotis.
2Chronicles33:21 Amoxey kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne nam7a; I Yerusalaamen nam7u laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles33:22 Iya aaway Minaasey oothidaysada ika Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis. Iya aaway Minaasey goyinnida eeqata goyinnis; entaw yarshis.
2Chronicles33:23 Shin iya aaway Minaasey banatetha kawushidaysada I banatetha Godaa sinthan kawushibeenna; Amoxey guji guji nagara oothis.
2Chronicles33:24 Amoxe shuumati iya bolla maqetidi
2Chronicles33:25 Yihuda asay kawa Amoxe bolla maqetida ubbaa wodhidi
2Chronicles34:1 Iyosyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hospuna; I Yerusalaamen hastamanne issi laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles34:2 Iyosyaasi Godaa sinthan suureba oothis; ushachi haddirsi goonna ba mayza Dawita ogen hemetis.
2Chronicles34:3 I kawotida hospuntho laythan buroo yooga de7ishe ba mayza Dawita Xoossaa koyis. I kawotida tammanne nam7antho laythan Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya dhoqa goyinno bessata
2Chronicles34:4 Iya kiitan
2Chronicles34:5 Iyosyaasi enta kahineta meqethaa he yarsho bessata bolla xuuggis; yaatidi
2Chronicles34:6 Minaase
2Chronicles34:7 Iyosyaasi yarsho bessata laallis; Asheera eeqa misiletanne hara eeqa misileta tincherethis; Isra7eelen de7iya ixaane cuyisiya bessata qanxerethis. Hessafe guye
2Chronicles34:8 Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan biittanne Xoossa keethaa geeshidaape guye
2Chronicles34:9 Enti kahine halaqaa Kalqiyaasako bidosona. Penge naagiya Leeweti Minaasepe
2Chronicles34:10 Enti Xoossa keethaa oorathiya halaqatas immin enti Xoossa keethaa oorathanaadanne zaaridi keexana mela oosanchotas immidosona.
2Chronicles34:11 Yihuda kawoti laallida Xoossa keethaa loythanaw mithinne masetida shuchu shammana mela anaaxetasinne gimbeysatas miishe immidosona.
2Chronicles34:12 Asay ammanetidi oosuwa polidosona. Enta bolla shuumetida oyddu Leeweti
2Chronicles34:13 wolqa ooso oothiya asata bollanne dumma dumma ooso ootheyisata bolla shuumetidosona. Qassi hara Leeweti xaafe
2Chronicles34:14 Enti Xoossa keethaa yida miishiya kessiya wode kahiney Kalqey Goday Muse baggara immida higge maxaafaa demmis.
2Chronicles34:15 Kalqey waanna xaafiya Saafanako
2Chronicles34:16 Safaani maxaafaa kawako efidi
2Chronicles34:17 Xoossa keethan de7iya miishiya ekidi
2Chronicles34:18 Waanna xaafey Safaani kawako
2Chronicles34:19 Kawoy higge qaala si7ida wode azzanidi ba ma7uwa pheedhis.
2Chronicles34:20 Kawoy
2Chronicles34:21 “Bidi ta gishonne Isra7eeleninne Yihudan attida asata gisho ha bentida maxaafan xaafetidaba Godaa oychite. Ha maxaafan xaafetida ubbaa oothanaw nu mayzati Godaa qaala naagiboonna gisho Goday nu bolla ba hanquwa gussis” yaagis.
2Chronicles34:22 Kalqeynne kawoy kiitida asati Xoossa keethan ma7o naagiya Hasira na7a
2Chronicles34:23 Hulda entako
2Chronicles34:24 Goday haysada yaagees; ‘Yihuda kawa sinthan nabbabetida maxaafan xaafetida iita baadetha ubbaa ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla ehana hanayis.
2Chronicles34:25 Enti tana aggidi hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidosona; enti banta kushen oothidaban tana hanqethidosona. Hessa gisho
2Chronicles34:26 Godaa oychanaw hintena kiitida Yihuda kawako
2Chronicles34:27 Ha bessaaninne ha bessan de7iya asaa bolla Xoossay odetidaba neeni si7ida wode ne wozanay boshetin
2Chronicles34:28 Heko
2Chronicles34:29 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles34:30 Kawoy Xoossa keethi keyis; Yihuda asay
2Chronicles34:31 Kawoy ba bessan eqidi
2Chronicles34:32 Yerusalaameninne Biniyaamen de7iya asa ubbay eqidi caaqana mela oothis; Yerusalaamen de7iya asay Xoossaa
2Chronicles34:33 Iyosyaasi Isra7eele zawan de7iya ixetidaba ubbaa diggis. Isra7eelen de7iya ubbay Godaa
2Chronicles35:1 Iyosyaasi Yerusalaamen Godaa Paasika Ba7aale bonchis. Koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas Paasika dorsaa shukidosona.
2Chronicles35:2 Iyosyaasi kahineta ooson shuumidi
2Chronicles35:3 Bantana Godaas dummayida
2Chronicles35:4 Isra7eele kawoy Dawitinne iya na7ay Solomoney xaafidaysada hinte cugan cuganinne hinte soo asan asan hintena giigisite.
2Chronicles35:5 Leeweti hinte dabbota
2Chronicles35:6 Goday Muse baggara odida qaala Isra7eele asay
2Chronicles35:7 Iyosyaasi he bessan de7iya asaas
2Chronicles35:8 Kawo shuumati banta shenen asaas
2Chronicles35:9 Leeweta halaqati Konaaneynne iya ishati
2Chronicles35:10 Paasika Baaliyas ubbabay giigis; kawa kiitan
2Chronicles35:11 Paasika dorsati shuketidosona; Leeweti galbaa qaaridosona; kahineti suuthaa yarsho bessa bolla dharcoosona.
2Chronicles35:12 Muse maxaafan xaafetidaysada asay Godaas yarshana mela xuussa yarshos giigida dorsata ashuwa Leeweti banta soo asan asan shaaketidi uttida Isra7eele yaratas immidosona; kormataka hessada oothidosona.
2Chronicles35:13 Leeweti wogay kiitteysada shuketida Paasika dorsaa ashuwa taman caacidosona; geeshsha yarshota xaaron
2Chronicles35:14 Hessafe guye
2Chronicles35:15 Dawiti
2Chronicles35:16 Godaas oothiya ooso ubbay
2Chronicles35:17 Yan shiiqida Isra7eele asay he gallas Paasika Baaliya bonchidosona; enti Uytha Ba7aale laapun gallas bonchidosona.
2Chronicles35:18 Nabiya Sameela wodiyape doomin
2Chronicles35:19 Paasika Ba7aaley Iyosyaasi kawotida tammanne hospuntho laythan bonchetis.
2Chronicles35:20 Iyosyaasi Xoossa keethaa giigisidaape guye Gibxe kawoy Naakoy Efraxiisa shaafa matan de7iya Karkamishan oletanaw bis. Iyosyaasi iya teqanaw keyis.
2Chronicles35:21 Shin Naakoy Iyosyaasako ase kiittidi
2Chronicles35:22 Gidoshin
2Chronicles35:23 Dongen dukeysati kawa Iyosyaasa caddin
2Chronicles35:24 Iyosyaasa para gaariyape wodhisidi
2Chronicles35:25 Nabey Ermiyaasi Iyosyaasas zelelsi kessidi xaafis. Zeleelidi yeekiya maccasaynne adde ubbay hachi gakanaw Iyosyaasas qopoosona. He zelelsay Isra7eele Yeeho zelelsa maxaafan xaafetis.
2Chronicles35:26 Iyosyaasi oothida harabay
2Chronicles35:27 koyrope wursethi gakanaw I oothida ubbay
2Chronicles36:1 He biitta asay Iyosyaasa na7aa Iyo7akaaza dooridi iya aawa bessan Yerusalaamen kawothidosona.
2Chronicles36:2 Iyo7akaazi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne heedza; I Yerusalaamen heedzu ageena kawotis.
2Chronicles36:3 Gibxe kawoy Iyo7akaaza kawotethaafe wothis; heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame biranne hastamanne oyddu kilo giraame worqa Yihuda asay giirana mela oothis.
2Chronicles36:4 Gibxe kawoy
2Chronicles36:5 Iyo7aqeemi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne ichasha; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis. Ba Godaa Xoossaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
2Chronicles36:6 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori iya olidi
2Chronicles36:7 Qassi Nabukadanaxoori Xoossa keetha miishiya ekidi Babiloone efidi
2Chronicles36:8 Iyo7aqeemi oothida harabay
2Chronicles36:9 Yo7akini kawotiya wode iyaw laythi hospuna; I Yerusalaamen heedzu ageenanne tammu gallas kawotis. I Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
2Chronicles36:10 Laytha laamen
2Chronicles36:11 Sedeqiyaasi kawotiya wode iyaw laythi laatamanne issino; I Yerusalaamen tammanne issi laythi kawotis.
2Chronicles36:12 Ba Godaa Xoossaa sinthan iitabaa oothis; qassi Godaa qaala odiya nabiya Ermiyaasa sinthan bana kawushibeenna.
2Chronicles36:13 Sedeqiyaasi
2Chronicles36:14 Qassi
2Chronicles36:15 Goday
2Chronicles36:16 Shin Godaa hanqoy enta bolla wodhana gakanawunne enti kessi ekiyaso dhayana gakanaw Xoossaa kiitanchota qelqisidosona; iya qaala kadhidosona; nabeta bolla miicidosona.
2Chronicles36:17 Hessa gisho
2Chronicles36:18 Babiloone kawoy Xoossa keethan de7iya miisheta ubbaa
2Chronicles36:19 Enti Xoossa keethaa taman xuuggidi
2Chronicles36:20 Mashshafe attidaysata kawoy di77idi Babiloone efis. Farse kawotethay dendana gakanaw enti iyawunne iya naytas aylle gididosona.
2Chronicles36:21 Goday nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara odida qaalay poletis. Wursethan biittay laapun tammu laythi asi bayna bessi gididi shempis. Biittay Sambaata shempo demmis.
2Chronicles36:22 Farse kawoy Qiroosi kawotida koyro laythan nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara Goday odidaysa polis. Farse kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotethan ubban haysada yaagidi awaajana melanne xaafidi wothana mela Goday iya ayyaana denthethis.
2Chronicles36:23 Farse kawoy Qiroosi
Ezra1:1 Farse kawoy Qiroosi kawotida koyro laythan
Ezra1:2 Farse kawoy Qiroosi haysada yaagees; “Goday
Ezra1:3 Xoossa asi gidida oonika yaa boo; iya Xoossay iyara gido! Hinte Yihudan de7iya Yerusalaame bidi
Ezra1:4 Dumma dumma biittan de7iya asa ubbay Ayhudetape attidaysati bira
Ezra1:5 Hessafe guye
Ezra1:6 Qassi enta shooron de7eysatika banta dosan immidaba bolla gujidi
Ezra1:7 Hessa bolla kawoy Qiroosi Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamepe efidi ba eeqa keethan wothida Godaa keethaa miisheta immis.
Ezra1:8 Farse kawoy Qiroosi miisheta wothiya keetha halaqaa Mitirdaaxu taybisidi
Ezra1:9 Simmida miisheta tayboy haysa; hastamu worqa shaate
Ezra1:10 hastamu worqaa kere
Ezra1:11 Worqa miishetanne bira miisheta tayboy kumethi ichashu mukulunne oyddu xeeta; Seesabisari Babiloonepe Yerusalaame simmiya wode di7ope simmida asaara ekidi yis.

Ezra2:54 Nasiya yaranne Haxifa yara.
Ezra2:55 Haysati di7ope simmida Solomone oosanchota yarata; Soxaya yara
Ezra2:56 Ya7ila yara
Ezra2:57 Safaaxa yara
Ezra2:58 Di7ope simmidi
Ezra2:59 Haysafe kaalleysati qassi Talmela
Ezra2:60 Dalaya
Ezra2:61 Kahinetape Abaya yaray
Ezra2:62 Haysati banta yeleta xaphuwa eranaw yeleta maxaafan koydosona
Ezra2:63 Uriimeninne Tumiimen shaakidi pirdiya kahiney dendana gakanaw
Ezra2:64 Di7ope Yihuda simmida asaa tayboy kumethi 42
Ezra2:65 Hessika 7
Ezra2:66 Di7ope simmida asaa parati 736; baquloti 245;
Ezra2:67 gimaleti 435; hareti 6
Ezra2:68 Enti Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keetha gakida wode issi issi soo asaa halaqati Xoossa keethay kase ba bessan keexetana mela banta dosan imota immidosona.
Ezra2:69 Issoy issoy baw danda7ida mela Xoossa keetha oosuwas imota immis; imotay 500 kilo giraame worqa
Ezra2:70 Hessafe guye
Ezra3:1 Laapuntha ageenan Isra7eele asay banta de7iya katamatape issi asi gididi Yerusalaame shiiqidosona.
Ezra3:2 Iyosadeqa na7aa Iyyasunne iyara oothiya kahineti
Ezra3:3 He biittan de7iya asaa ixuwape dendoysan yayyikoka
Ezra3:4 Kase xaafetidaysada Shaqara Ba7aale bonchidosona; xuussa yarsho issi issi gallas koshsheysada pacisonna yarshidosona.
Ezra3:5 Qassi ubba wode shiiqiya xuussa yarsho
Ezra3:6 Xoossa keetha baasoy buroo doometonaba gidikoka Laapuntha ageenan koyro gallas enti Godaas xuussa yarsho shiisho doomidosona.
Ezra3:7 Hessafe guye
Ezra3:8 Enti Yerusalaame simmida nam7antho laythan nam7antho ageenan
Ezra3:9 Leewe koche gidida Iyyasu
Ezra3:10 Anaaxeti Xoossa keethaa baasuwa yegethi oykiya wode
Ezra3:11 Enti Godaa galatishenne issoy issuwa kaali kaali mazmuren sabbishe
Ezra3:12 Shin kase Xoossaa keetha be7ida cima kahinetape
Ezra3:13 Oonika Ufaysa ililisaanne yeeho waasuwa shaakanaw danda7ibeenna; asay waassiya waasoy wolqaama gidiya gisho waasoy haahon si7etees.
Ezra4:1 Yihudasinne Biniyaames morke gidida asay
Ezra4:2 Zarubaabelakonne Isra7eele yara halaqatako yidi
Ezra4:3 Shin Zarubaabeli
Ezra4:4 Hessafe guye
Ezra4:5 Farse kawa Qiroosa laythafe bidi Daariyosa kawotetha gakanaw enti Yihuda asaa zoreta laallana mela ase shammidosona.
Ezra4:6 Arxekisisi kawotida wode Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa mootanaw payle dooyidosona.
Ezra4:7 Arxekisisa kawotetha laythan
Ezra4:8 Biitta aysiya Rehuuminne xaafey Simsayi Yerusalaameba haysada yaagidi
Ezra4:9 “Ha dabdaabey biitta aysiya Rehuumape
Ezra4:10 qassi gitanne bonchetida kawa Asnafaari di77idi Samaareninne Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan wothida asa ubbaafe xaafetis” yaagidosona.
Ezra4:11 Enta dabdaabey haysada yaagees; “Kawa Arxekisisas
Ezra4:12 “Kawaw
Ezra4:13 Hessa bolla qassi
Ezra4:14 Nuuni kawoy shuumin ootheyisata gidiya gishonne kawoy kawuyishin be7anaw koyonna gisho haysa ne erana mela gidi odoos.
Ezra4:15 Hessa gisho
Ezra4:16 Ha katamiya keexetiyanne I dirsa gimbey ooraxiyaba gidiko
Ezra4:17 Kawoy haysada giya zaaro entaw yeddis; “Biitta aysiya Rehuuma
Ezra4:18 Hinte taw yeddida dabdaabey birshetidi nabbabetin si7as.
Ezra4:19 Ta kiitan
Ezra4:20 Yerusalaamen wolqaama kawoti kawotidosona; Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya Biittafeka he kawoti giiranne qaraxa ekidosona.
Ezra4:21 Hessa gisho
Ezra4:22 Hinte ha oda qelli goonna mela naagetite; kawotas meto darsanaw koshshenna” yaagidi kiittis.
Ezra4:23 Kawa Arxekisisa dabdaabey Rehuumas
Ezra4:24 He wodepe doomidi Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keetha oosoy Daariyosi kawotida nam7antho laythi gakanaw eqis.
Ezra5:1 He wode nam7u nabeti Haggeynne Zakaryaasi Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya Ayhude asaas Isra7eele Xoossa sunthan tinbite odidosona.
Ezra5:2 Salatiyaala na7ay Zarubaabelinne Iyosadeqa na7ay Iyyasuy dendidi
Ezra5:3 He wode Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan de7iya biitta aysiya Tantani
Ezra5:4 Qassi
Ezra5:5 Shin Xoossa ayfey Yihuda cimata bolla de7iya gisho
Ezra5:6 Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta aysiya Tantanaya
Ezra5:7 Enti iyaw yeddida dabdaabey haysada yaagidi nabbabetees. Kawa Daariyosa
Ezra5:8 Nuuni Yihuda biittan de7iya gita Xoossaa keetha bidi be7idaysa kawoy ero. He Xoossa keethay gita shuchan keexetis; gimbe tuussati keyidosona; oosoyka gita akeekaninne eeson oosetishe de7ees.
Ezra5:9 “Nuuni
Ezra5:10 Qassi entana kaalethiya asata sunthay ooneko xaafidi nena erisanaw enta oychida.
Ezra5:11 Enti haysada yaagidi zaaridosona: “Nuuni salonne sa7a Xoossaa aylleta; nuuni daro laythafe kase gita Isra7eele kawoy keexidi polida keetha zaaridi keexoos.
Ezra5:12 Nu aawati salo Xoossaa hanqethida gisho
Ezra5:13 “Shin Babiloone kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotida koyro laythan
Ezra5:14 Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaafe eki efidi
Ezra5:15 Kawoy
Ezra5:16 Sesabisaari yidi
Ezra5:17 “Hiza ha oday kawa ufaysiyaba gidiko
Ezra6:1 Hessa gisho
Ezra6:2 Meedona awurajan Ahimata kataman issi xaatha maxaafi bentis; he maxaafan xaafetidabay haysada yaagees:
Ezra6:3 “Kawoy Qiroosi ba kawotida koyro laythan
Ezra6:4 Heedzu toho gita shuchan yuushsho
Ezra6:5 Nabukadanaxoori Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaafe ekidi
Ezra6:6 Hessafe guye
Ezra6:7 Ha Xoossaa keetha oosuwas dhube gidopite. Ayhudeta halaqatinne Ayhude cimati Xoossa keetha kase bessan zaaridi keexo.”
Ezra6:8 Hessa bolla qassi
Ezra6:9 Yerusalaamen de7iya kahineti salo Xoossas xuussa yarsho yarshanaw koshshiya wofaano gidin
Ezra6:10 Hessa hinte immey enti salo Xoossaa ufaysiya yarsho yarshanaasanne kawuwasinne iya naytas woossanaasa.
Ezra6:11 Ha awaajuwa laammiya oonika de7iko
Ezra6:12 Ha kiita laammanaw woyko Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossaa keethaa laallanaw kushe denthiya ay kawoy woyko asi gidin
Ezra6:13 Hessafe guye
Ezra6:14 Ayhude cimati banta oosuwa aggonna oothidosona; qassi nabey Haggeynne Ido na7ay Zakaryaasi odida qaalan minetidosona. Isra7eele Xoossay kiittidaysada Farse kawoti Qiroosi
Ezra6:15 Daariyosi kawotida usupuntho laythan Adaare geetetiya ageenan heedzantho gallasan
Ezra6:16 Isra7eele asay
Ezra6:17 He ba7aaley bonchetiya wode enti issi xeetu korma
Ezra6:18 Muse Maxaafan xaafetidaysada
Ezra6:19 Di7ope simmida asay koyro ageenan tammanne oyddantho gallas Paasika Ba7aale bonchidosona.
Ezra6:20 Kahinetinne Leeweti bantana geeshshidosona; enti ubbay wogada geeydosona. Leeweti di7ope simmida ubbaas
Ezra6:21 Di7ope simmida Isra7eele asaynne Ayhude gidonna asay oothiya tunatethaafe bantana shaakidi
Ezra6:22 Goday Asoore kawa qofa laammidi Isra7eele Godaa
Ezra7:1 Daro wodepe guye
Ezra7:2 Saluma na7a; Saadoqa na7a; Akxuuba na7a;
Ezra7:3 Amaare na7a; Azaara na7a; Marayoota na7a;
Ezra7:4 Zaraha na7a; Oza na7a; Buqa na7a;
Ezra7:5 Abisu na7a; Finihaasa na7a; Finihaasi Alaazara na7a; kahine halaqa Aarona na7a.
Ezra7:6 Haysi Iziri Babiloonepe bis. Goday
Ezra7:7 Kawoy Arxekisisi kawotida laapuntha laythan Isra7eele asaape guuthatara
Ezra7:8 Kawoy kawotida laapuntha laythan ichashantho ageenan Iziri Yerusalaame gakis.
Ezra7:9 Xoossaa lo77o kushey iya bolla de7iya gisho koyro ageenan koyro gallassi Babiloonepe keyidi
Ezra7:10 Iziri Godaa higgiya xanna7on
Ezra7:11 Goday Isra7eeles immida higgiyanne wogga
Ezra7:12 “Kawota Kawa Arxekisisape
Ezra7:13 “Ta kawotetha giddon de7iya Isra7eele asaape oonika
Ezra7:14 Taaninne taara zorettiya laapun asati issife gididi
Ezra7:15 Yerusalaamen de7iya Isra7eele Xoossaas
Ezra7:16 Hessa bolla qassi neeni Babiloone biitta kumethaafe demmida biraanne worqaa ubbaa
Ezra7:17 Ha miishiyan kormata
Ezra7:18 “Hessafe palahida biraanne worqaa neeninne neera de7iya Ayhude gidida ne ishati hinte Xoossa shenen
Ezra7:19 Qassi nuuni hinte Xoossa keethaas
Ezra7:20 Hessafe harabay Xoossaa keethas koshshiyabay aybika de7iko
Ezra7:21 “Taani kawoy Arxekisisi Efraxiisa Shaafape hefinthan biittan de7iya miishe keethan aawatethay de7iya ubbatas ha kiita immas. Kahinenne Salo Xoossaa higgiya loythi eriya Iziri hintena oychiyabay ayba gidikoka iyaw immite.
Ezra7:22 Heedzu mukulunne oyddu xeetu kilo giraame bira
Ezra7:23 Kawa bollanne kawa nayta kawotetha bolla hanqoy yoonna mela salo Xoossay ba keethas koyiyaba ubba immite.
Ezra7:24 Kahinetape
Ezra7:25 “La Izira
Ezra7:26 Ne Xoossaa higgiyanne kawa higgiya kiitetonna oonika de7iko
Ezra7:27 Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethaa haysada bonchetana mela kawa wozanan ha qofaa wothida Godaa
Ezra7:28 Kawa
Ezra8:1 Kawoy Arxekisisi kawotida wode taara issife Babiloone biittafe simmida soo asaa halaqati haysata;
Ezra8:2 Finihaasa yarape Gersoona
Ezra8:3 Paroosa yarape Zakaryaasanne enta yeleta maaran xaafetida hara issi xeetanne ishatamu addeta.
Ezra8:4 Pahati-Moo7abe yarape Zaraha na7aa Eliho7enayanne iyara de7iya nam7u xeetu addeta.
Ezra8:5 Zata yarape Yahazi7eela na7a Sakananne iyara de7iya heedzu xeetu addeta.
Ezra8:6 Adina yarape Yoonataana na7aa Ebeedanne ishatamu addeta.
Ezra8:7 Elama yarape Gotola na7a Yishayanne iyara de7iya laapun tammu addeta.
Ezra8:8 Safaaxa yarape Mika7eela na7a Zibaadanne iyara de7iya hospun tammu addeta.
Ezra8:9 Iyo7aaba yarape Yi7eela na7a Abdiyunne iyara de7iya nam7u xeetanne tammanne hospun addeta.
Ezra8:10 Baana yarape Yosifiya na7a Salomitanne iyara de7iya issi xeetanne usupun tammu addeta.
Ezra8:11 Bebaya yaraape Bebaya na7aa Zakariyasanne iyara de7iya laatamanne hospun addeta
Ezra8:12 Azgada yarape Haqaxaana na7a Yohaananne iyara de7iya issi xeetanne tammu addeta.
Ezra8:13 Adonqaama yarape wursethan simmidaysati
Ezra8:14 Bigiwaya yarape Utaya
Ezra8:15 Taani Ahawako goggiya shaafa matan enta shiishas. Nuuni he bessan dunkaanidi
Ezra8:16 Hessa gisho
Ezra8:17 Enta Kasfiya geetetiya bessan Leewetas halaqanne Xoossa keetha oosancho gidida Adosinne iya dabotas odanaba akeekisada nu Xoossa keethan oothiya ase ehana mela kiittas.
Ezra8:18 Nu Xoossa lo77o kushey nu bolla de7iya gisho
Ezra8:19 Hessadaka
Ezra8:20 Hessa bolla kase aawati Leeweta maaddana mela Dawitanne iyara oothiya halaqati shuumida Xoossa keetha oosanchotape nam7u xeetanne laatamu asata yeddidosona. Hessati ubbay banta sunthan xaafetidosona.
Ezra8:21 Nu Xoossaa sinthan nu huuphiya kawushidi
Ezra8:22 Kase nuuni kawas
Ezra8:23 Hessa gisho
Ezra8:24 Kahine halaqatape Sarebaya
Ezra8:25 Kawoy
Ezra8:26 Taani entaw immidabay haysa; laatamanne nam7u mukulu kilo giraame bira
Ezra8:27 hospun kilo giraamenne oyddu xeetu giraame worqafe oosetida laatamu saanetanne worqada al7onne muruuto gidida naase biratape oosetida nam7u saaneta.
Ezra8:28 Hessafe guye
Ezra8:29 Yerusalaamen de7iya Xoossa keethan miishe minjiya keethaa gakidi
Ezra8:30 Hessa gisho
Ezra8:31 Koyro ageenan tammanne nam7antho gallasan Yerusalaame baanaw Ahawa Shaafa matape dendida. Nu bolla de7iya nu Xoossaa lo77o kushey nu biya ogen de7iya morketapenne pangatape nuna ashshis.
Ezra8:32 Nuuni Yerusalaame gakidi
Ezra8:33 Oyddantho gallas bira
Ezra8:34 Ubbabay he wode taybeti liketidi xaafetis.
Ezra8:35 Hessafe guye
Ezra8:36 Kawoy kiitida kiittaka kawuwape garsara biitta ayseysatasinne Efraxiisa Shaafape hefintha biitta ayseysatas immidosona; enti Isra7eele asaanne Xoossa keethaa oosuwa maaddidosona.
Ezra9:1 Ha ubbay hanidaape guye
Ezra9:2 Bantawunne banta naytas Ayhude gidonna macca naytape macho ekidosona; hessa gaason geeshsha zeretha Ayhude gidonna asaara walakidosona. Ha balan koyro gididay kaaletheysatanne halaqata” yaagidosona.
Ezra9:3 Taani ha oda si7ida wode ta ma7uwanne ta qamisiya daakas; ta huuphiyanne ta buuchaa sikas; daro dagammada utta aggas.
Ezra9:4 Di7ope simmida asay oothida nagaraa gisho
Ezra9:5 Shin omarsa yarshoy shiiqiya wode
Ezra9:6 “Abeeti ta Xoossaw
Ezra9:7 Nuuni nu mayzata wodepe doomin
Ezra9:8 “Shin ha77i Goday nu Xoossay nuupe guutha asi ashshanawunne ba keethan nuus besse immanaw koyidi guutha wodes marotethi immis. Hessa gisho Xoossay nu ayfiya dooyis; nu aylletethan de7ishin guutha wodes shempo immis.
Ezra9:9 Nuuni aylle gidikoka
Ezra9:10 “Shin nu Xoossaw
Ezra9:11 Nu toochiday ne aylle gidida nabeta baggara ‘Hinte laattanaw geliya biittay
Ezra9:12 Hessa gisho
Ezra9:13 “Nu bolla gakida iitaba ubbay nu iita oosuwanne nu gita nagara gaasona. Gidoshin
Ezra9:14 Nuuni haysa mela tunabaa oothiya asaara ekoninne gelon walaketidi
Ezra9:15 Abeeti Godaw
Ezra10:1 Iziri Xoossa keetha sinthan kundidi yeekishe woossiya wodenne nagaraa paaxiya wode macci
Ezra10:2 Elama yara gidida Yi7eela na7ay Sakan haysada yaagis; “Nuuni nu yuushon de7iya allaga maccasata ekidi
Ezra10:3 Ta godaw
Ezra10:4 Izira ha oosoy ne kushen de7ees
Ezra10:5 Iziri dendi eqidi
Ezra10:6 Iziri Xoossa keetha sinthafe dendidi
Ezra10:7 Di7ope simmida asay Yerusalaame shiiqana mela
Ezra10:8 Ha heedzu gallasata giddon he bessan shiiqonna oonika de7iko
Ezra10:9 He geetetida heedzu gallasata giddon
Ezra10:10 Kahine Iziri dendiidi haysada yaagis; “Hinte ammanetonna ixideta; allaga maccasata macho ekidi
Ezra10:11 Hinte nagara Godaas
Ezra10:12 Shiiqida asay banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Ezra10:13 Shin haysan shiiqida asay daro; hessa bolla wolqaama iri bukees. Nuuni irape attiya bessi haysan baawa. Ha nagaran qohida asay daro gidida gisho
Ezra10:14 Ha shiiqida asaa sunthan nu halaqati Yerusalaamen gam7idi
Ezra10:15 Asaheela na7ay Yoonataaninne Tequwa na7ay Yahizi enta qofaa phalqidosona; Masulaaminne Leewe gidida Sabati entana maaddidosona” yaagidosona.
Ezra10:16 Di7ope simmida asay gidaysada oothidosona. Kahiney Iziri ubba kochatape halaqata dooridi
Ezra10:17 Koyro ageenan koyro gallasay gakanaw
Ezra10:18 Kahine kochata giddofe allaga maccasata ekidaysati haysata; Iyosadeqa na7a Iyyasu kochatapenne iya ishata giddofe Ma7iseya
Ezra10:19 Enti banta macheta yeddanaw qaala gelidosona; banta nagara gisho
Ezra10:20 Imera yarape Allaga macheta ekidaysati Hanaananne Zabada.
Ezra10:21 Harima yarape Ma7iseya
Ezra10:22 Paskora yarape Eliyo7anaya
Ezra10:23 Leewetape
Ezra10:24 Zammaaretape
Ezra10:25 Isra7eeletape
Ezra10:26 Elama yarape Mataana
Ezra10:27 Zata yarape Eliyo7ana
Ezra10:28 Babaya yarape Yohaana
Ezra10:29 Baana yarape Masulaama
Ezra10:30 Pahati-Moo7aba yarape Adina
Ezra10:31 Karima yarape Alaazara
Ezra10:32 Biniyaame
Ezra10:33 Hasuma yarape Mataana
Ezra10:34 Baana yarape Madaya
Ezra10:35 Banaya
Ezra10:36 Waaniya
Ezra10:37 Mataana Matinayanne Ya7isa.
Ezra10:38 Binuya yarape Sama7a
Ezra10:39 Selema
Ezra10:40 Makinadabaya
Ezra10:41 Azari7eela
Ezra10:42 Saluma
Ezra10:43 Nabo yarape Yi7eela
Ezra10:44 Ha ubbay Ayhude gidonna macheta ekidaysata; issoti issoti na7aka yelidosona.
Nehemiah1:1 Hakaliya na7aa Nahime qaalay haysa. Arxekisisi Farse biittan kawotin laatamantho laythan
Nehemiah1:2 Ta ishatape issoy
Nehemiah1:3 Enti zaaridi
Nehemiah1:4 Ta haysa ubbaa si7ida wode uttada yeekas. Daro gallas azzanoninne xooman salo Xoossaa haysada yaagada woossas.
Nehemiah1:5 “Abeeti Godaw
Nehemiah1:6 Taani ne aylley
Nehemiah1:7 Nuuni ne bolla daro iita nagara oothida; neeni ne aylliya Muse baggara nuus immida kiitaa
Nehemiah1:8 Ne aylliya Muses ne odida qaala hayyana qopa; neeni
Nehemiah1:9 Shin hinte taako simmidi
Nehemiah1:10 “Neeni ne gita wolqaaninne ne mino qesiyan woza ekida ne aylletanne ne asata.
Nehemiah1:11 Abeeti Godaw
Nehemiah2:1 Arxekisisi kawotida laatamantho laythan
Nehemiah2:2 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah2:3 “Kawoy merinaw kawoto! Ta mayzati moogetida katamay laaletidi dhayin
Nehemiah2:4 Kawoy zaaridi
Nehemiah2:5 kawako
Nehemiah2:6 He wode kawiya
Nehemiah2:7 Qassi
Nehemiah2:8 Hessadaka
Nehemiah2:9 Kawoy taara guutha toora moconatanne para toggeyisata yeddis. Taani entara issife Efraxiisa shaafape wuloha bagga biitta gakada kawoy yeddida dabdaabiya he biitta haareysatas immas.
Nehemiah2:10 Shin Horoona katama asi gidida Sanbalaaxinne Amoone biitta halaqa gidida Xoobbey
Nehemiah2:11 Taani Yerusalaame gakada heedzu gallas yan gam7as.
Nehemiah2:12 Yerusalaames taani oothana mela Xoossay ta wozanan wothida qofaa oodeska odabike. Hessafe guye
Nehemiah2:13 Taani bilahe dendada Zangaara Pengiyara kanthada
Nehemiah2:14 Hessafe simmada Pulto Pengiyakonne kawa teqe haathay de7iya bessaa bas. Gidoshin
Nehemiah2:15 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah2:16 Yan de7iya halaqatape oonika taani awu bidaako
Nehemiah2:17 Hessefe guye
Nehemiah2:18 Qassi Xoossaa lo77o kushey taara de7eysanne kawoy taw odidaba ubbaa entaw odas. Enti zaaridi
Nehemiah2:19 Shin Horoona katamaa asi gidida Sanbalaaxi
Nehemiah2:20 Taani zaarada
Nehemiah3:1 Kahine halaqay Eliyaseebinne hara kahineti Dorsa Pengiya zaari gimbidi Xoossas dummayidosona; sanqa aathidosona. Enti Xeeta geetetiya gimbe shakuwafe bidi Hanaani7eela geetetiya gimbe shakuwa gakanaw gimbidi Xoossas dummayidosona.
Nehemiah3:2 Enta lanqen de7iya bessaa Iyaarko asay gimbin
Nehemiah3:3 Hasinaa7a nayti Molo Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi
Nehemiah3:4 Enta kaallidi de7iya bessaa Haqooxa na7a gidida Uraya na7ay Maremooti gimbis. Iyape kaallidi de7iya bessaa Masezabeela na7a Baraka na7ay Masulaami gimbis. Iyape kaallidi de7iya bessaa Ba7ana na7ay Saadoqi gimbis.
Nehemiah3:5 Iya matan de7iya bessaa Taqoha katamaa asati gimbidosona. Shin he katamaa halaqati bantaw imetida oosuwa oothonna ixidosona.
Nehemiah3:6 Paseha na7ay Yodaaheynne Baasodiya na7ay Masulaami Gal7a Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi
Nehemiah3:7 Enta lanqen de7iya bessaa Gaba7oona katamaa asi gidida Malaaxinne Meronoota katamaa asi gidida Yadooni gimbidosona. Gaba7oonanne Mixipha katamaa asay entara issife gididi
Nehemiah3:8 Worqa sheeshiya Harihaya na7ay Uzi7eeli enta matan de7iya bessaa gimbis. Qassi iya matan de7iya bessaa shitto oothiya Hanaani gimbis. Enti nam7ay issife Yerusalaame Dalga Gimbiya geetetiya bessaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
Nehemiah3:9 Enta matan de7iya bessaa Huura na7ay
Nehemiah3:10 Haruma na7ay Yadayi ba keethaafe sintha baggara de7iya bessaa gimbis. Iya matan de7iya bessaa Asebaana na7ay Hatushi gimbis.
Nehemiah3:11 Harima na7ay Malkeynne Pahati-Moo7aba na7ay Hashubi iya matan de7iya bessaanne Itoone Shako gimbiya gimbidosona.
Nehemiah3:12 Enta matan de7iya bessaa Haloheesa na7ay
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuninne Zanoha kataman de7iya asay issife Zangaara Pengiya gimbidosona. Enti gobane essidi
Nehemiah3:14 Rakaaba na7ay
Nehemiah3:15 Kolihaaza na7ay
Nehemiah3:16 Beet-Xura woradaas baggaa haariya Azibuuqe na7ay Nahimey gimbis. I Dawita duufuwape sintha baggara de7iya bessaa gakanaw
Nehemiah3:17 Haysafe kaalleysa Baana na7aa Rehuuma aawatetha garsan de7iya Leeweti gimbidosona. Enta matan de7iya bessaa Qi7aala woradaas baggaa haariya Hashabi ba woradaa sunthan gimbis.
Nehemiah3:18 Iyape kaallidi Henadaada na7ay
Nehemiah3:19 Enta matan de7iya bessaa Iyyasu na7ay
Nehemiah3:20 Iyape kaalleysa Zabaya na7ay Baaroki
Nehemiah3:21 Iyape kaalleysa Haqooxa na7aa gidida Uraya na7ay Maremooti Eliyaseeba keetha pengiyafe doomidi
Nehemiah3:22 Iyape kaallidi de7eysa heeran de7iya kahineti gimbidosona.
Nehemiah3:23 Entafe kaallidi Biniyaameynne Hashubi banta keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbidosona. Entafe kaallidi Ananiya na7a gidida Ma7iseya na7ay Azaari ba keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis.
Nehemiah3:24 Iyape kaallidi Azaara keethaafe bidi
Nehemiah3:25 Uzaya na7ay Palali gimbiya maazaniyape doomidi
Nehemiah3:26 Ofeela deriya bolla de7iya Xoossa keethaa aylleti gimbidosona. Enti Haatha Pengiya matan doloha baggan de7iya bessaanne naago gimbiya gakanaw de7iya bessaa gimbidosona.
Nehemiah3:27 Entafe kaallidi Taqoha katamaa asay gimbiya sinthan de7iya bessaafe bidi
Nehemiah3:28 Para Pengiyafe qommo baggan
Nehemiah3:29 Entafe kaallidi Imera na7ay Saadoqi ba keethaa sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis. Iyape kaallidi Doloha Pengiya naagiya Sakana na7ay Shamayey gimbis.
Nehemiah3:30 Iyape kaallidi Salama na7ay Hananinne Zalafa usupuntho na7a gidida Hanunra gimbidosona. Entafe kaallidi Baraka na7ay Masulaami ba kifiliyape sinthan de7iya bessaa gimbis.
Nehemiah3:31 Iyape kaallidi Xomooso Pengiya sinthan de7iya Xoossa keetha oosanchotanne zal7anchota keethaa gakanaw de7iya bessaa worqa sheeshiya Malkey gimbis. Qassi I gimbe maazaniyas bolla baggara de7iya bessaaka gimbis.
Nehemiah3:32 Maazaniyas qommo bagga kifiliyapenne Dorsa Pengiyafe giddon de7iya bessaa worqa sheesheysatinne zal7anchoti gimbidosona.

Nehemiah8:1 Laapuntho ageenay geliya wode Isra7eele asay banta kataman kataman uttidosona. He ageenan enti ubbay issife Haatha Penge sinthan de7iya dabaaban shiiqidosona. Enti Goday Muse baggara Isra7eele asaas immida Higge Maxaafa ehana mela xaafiya Izira oychidosona.
Nehemiah8:2 Yaatin
Nehemiah8:3 Haatha Penge sinthan de7iya dabaaban eqidi
Nehemiah8:4 Xaafey Iziri
Nehemiah8:5 Iziri asa ubbaafe dhoqiya bessan eqiya wode ubbay iya loythidi xeellishin
Nehemiah8:6 Iziri Godaa
Nehemiah8:7 Enti banta eqida bessan de7ishin
Nehemiah8:8 Enti Xoossaa Higge Maxaafa nabbabidosona; qassi nabbabeteysi woygiyako asay erana mela birshethaa qoncisidosona.
Nehemiah8:9 Asay higge qaala si7ida wode yeekida gisho
Nehemiah8:10 Nahimey
Nehemiah8:11 Leeweti
Nehemiah8:12 Nabbebetida qaala birshethay entaw gelida gisho
Nehemiah8:13 He ageena nam7antho gallasan kochata halaqati
Nehemiah8:14 Enti tamaariya wode laapuntha ageenan Shaqara Ba7aale bonchiya wode Isra7eele asay shaqara garsan uttidi bonchana mela Xoossay Muse baggara kiitidaysa demmidosona.
Nehemiah8:15 Shaqara Ba7aale bonchanaw katamataninne Yerusalaamen haysada yaagidi awaajidosona; “Shaqara shaqaranaw dere bolla keyidi zayte shamaho
Nehemiah8:16 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah8:17 Di7etethafe simmida asa ubbay shaqara shaqaridi iya garsan uttidosona. Nawe na7aa Iyyasu wodepe haa simmin enti haysa mela ba7aale bonchi erokona. Hessa gisho
Nehemiah8:18 Ba7aaley doometidi wurana gakanaw gallas gallas Iziri Xoossaa Higge Maxaafape asaas nabbabees. Baaliya laapun gallas bonchidaape guye hospuntho gallasan higgey kiiteysada geeshsha duulatta oothidosona.
Nehemiah9:1 He ageenan laatamanne oyddantho gallasan Isra7eele asay issife shiiqidi
Nehemiah9:2 Bantana allaga dere asaape shaakidosona. Hessefe guye dendi eqidi entinne enta aawati oothida nagaraa ubbaa paaxidosona.
Nehemiah9:3 Enti yan eqidi de7ishin heedzu saate kumethi Godaa enta Xoossaa Higge Maxaafay entaw nabbabetis. Qassi hara heedzu saate banta nagaraa paaxishe Godaa banta Xoossaa goyinnidosona.
Nehemiah9:4 Leeweti
Nehemiah9:5 Leeweti
Nehemiah9:6 Xoossaw
Nehemiah9:7 Godaw
Nehemiah9:8 I new ammanthiya asi gideysa be7ada
Nehemiah9:9 Neeni nu mayzata Gibxe biittan gakida un7aa be7adasa; qassi Zo7o Abbaa matan de7ishe enti waassida waasuwa si7adasa.
Nehemiah9:10 Gibxe kawoy
Nehemiah9:11 Abbaa shaakada ne asaa mela biittara pinthadasa. Shin shuchi ciimmo haathan holin
Nehemiah9:12 Isra7eele asaa gallas shaara tuussan
Nehemiah9:13 Neeni salope wodhada ne asaa Siina zuma bolla odisadasa. Suure pirdaanne tuma gidida higgiya
Nehemiah9:14 Geeshsha ne Sambaata enti bonchana mela enta tamaarsadasa. Ne aylliya Muse baggara entaw kiita
Nehemiah9:15 Enti koshatida wode salope kathi immadasa; qassi enti saamotida wode zaallafe haathe pultisadasa. Neeni entaw immana gada caaqida biitta enti gelidi laattana mela kiittadasa.
Nehemiah9:16 Shin nu mayzati otortidosona; si7onna ixidi new kiitetibookona.
Nehemiah9:17 Kiitetonna ixidosona; neeni entaw oothida malaalsiyaba ubbaa hassaybookona. Enti si7onna asi gididosona; banta geellatethan aylletethas Gibxe biitta guye kaalethana mela halaqa bantaw dooridosona. Gidoshin
Nehemiah9:18 Enti mara malan eeqa medhidi
Nehemiah9:19 Ne daro maarotethan neeni enta mela biittan aggabaaka. Enti biya ogiya poo7isana mela gallas shaara tuussan
Nehemiah9:20 Enta tamaarsana mela ne lo77o Ayyaana entaw immadasa. Maanaw manna
Nehemiah9:21 Oytamu laythi kumethi mela biittan hemetiya wode entaw koshshiyabaape issibaaka pacisabaaka. Enta ma7oy wuribeenna; enta tohoy kixibeenna.
Nehemiah9:22 Ne enta kawotethatanne dereta hari attoshin haahon de7iya biittata xoonidi oykana mela oothadasa. Kawoy Sihooney haariya Haseboona biittanne kawoy Oogey haariya Baasane biitta entana laatisadasa.
Nehemiah9:23 Enta kochaa taybuwa salo xoolintoda darsadasa. Enta mayzatas immana gada caaqida biitta enta laatisadasa.
Nehemiah9:24 Enta nayti Kanaane biitta laattidosona. He biittan de7iya Kanaane asaa enta sinthan neeni kawushadasa. Enti Kanaane asaa bolla
Nehemiah9:25 Enti yuushoy gimbetida katamatanne aradda biitta xoonidi ekidosona. Lo77oba ubbay kumida keethata
Nehemiah9:26 Gidoshin
Nehemiah9:27 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah9:28 Shin enti shempo demmi simmidi zaaridi ne sinthan nagara oothidosona. Ne zaarada enta morketa kushen aathada immin
Nehemiah9:29 Ne higgiyako enti simmana mela entaw minthada odadasa
Nehemiah9:30 Gidikoka ne enta daro laythi danda7adasa; ne Ayyaanan nabeta baggara entaw odadasa
Nehemiah9:31 Shin neeni keehanne maariya Xoossi gidiya gisho
Nehemiah9:32 Hiza nu Xoossaw
Nehemiah9:33 Nuna gakidaba ubban neeni xillo. Nuuni nena naaqikoka ne ammanetetha aggabaaka.
Nehemiah9:34 Nu kawoti
Nehemiah9:35 Ne enta kawotethan entaw gita anjuwa immadasa; dalganne aradda biitta entaw immadasa. Shin enti nena goyinnibookona; banta iita oosuwape simmibokona.

Nehemiah11:1 Asaa kaaletheysati Yerusalaamen de7idosona. Hanko asay tammaafe issoy geeshsha kataman Yerusalaamen de7ana mela saama yeggidi dooridosona. Shin hara uddufun kushe asay banta kataman kataman de7idosona.
Nehemiah11:2 Ba shenen Yerusalaamen de7anaw dosida asa ubbaa asay anjidosona.
Nehemiah11:3 Hara katamatan de7iya Isra7eele asay
Nehemiah11:4 Yihuda kochaafe yida asay Paaresa yara gidida Atayanne Seela yara gidida Ma7iseya. Atayi Ooziyana na7a; Ooziyani Zakaryaasa na7a; Zakaryaasi Amaare na7a; Amaarey Safaaxa na7a; Safaaxi Malal7eela na7a.
Nehemiah11:5 Ma7iseyi Baaroka na7a; Baaroki Kolihooza na7a; Kolihoozi Ooza na7a; Oozi Adaya na7a; Adayi Yoyaariba na7a; Yoyaaribi Zakaryaasa na7a. Haysati Seela kochata.
Nehemiah11:6 Paaresa yarape wolqaama gidida 468 asati Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
Nehemiah11:7 Biniyaame kochaafe yida asay Saala
Nehemiah11:8 
Nehemiah11:9 Zikira na7ay Iyyu7eeli enta halaqa; qassi Hasanu7a na7ay Yihudi kataman nam7antho halaqa.
Nehemiah11:10 Kahinetape yida asay Yoyaariba na7aa Yadaya
Nehemiah11:11 Saraya; Sarayi Kilqiya na7a; Kilqey Masulaama na7a; Masulaami Saadoqa na7a; Saadoqi Marayoota na7a; Marayooti Xoossa keetha halaqa gidida Ahixuuba na7a.
Nehemiah11:12 Entara issife Xoossa keethan oothiya oosanchoti kumethi 822. Adayi Yirohaama na7a; Yirohaami Palala na7a
Nehemiah11:13 Adayara issife de7iya asaynne enta soo asaa halaqati kumethi 242. Amasasayi Azari7eela na7a; Azari7eeli Ahizaya na7a; Ahizayi Mashilmoota na7a; Mashilmooti Imera na7a.
Nehemiah11:14 Amasayara issife de7iya olanchoti kumthi 128. Hagidolima na7ay Zabdi7eeli kahineta ayseysa.
Nehemiah11:15 Leewetape yida asay Shamaya; Shamayey Hashuba na7a; Hashubi Aziriqaama na7a; Aziriqaami Hasabaya na7a; Hashabey Buna na7a.
Nehemiah11:16 Leeweti Sabatinne Yozabaata Xoossa keethafe karera oosetiya oosuwas halaqa.
Nehemiah11:17 Mataani Mika na7a; Miki Zabida na7a; Zabidi galata woosa kaalethiya Asaafa na7a; Asaafi iya nam7antho halaqa gidida Baqibuuqa na7a; Baqibuuqi Samusa na7a; Samusi Galaala na7a; Galaali Yedutuuna na7a.
Nehemiah11:18 Leewetape 284 asay geeshsha kataman Yerusalaamen de7idosona.
Nehemiah11:19 Pengiya naageysatape
Nehemiah11:20 Attida kahineti
Nehemiah11:21 Shin Xoossa keetha oosanchoti Yerusalaame kataman de7iya Ofeela deriya bolla de7idosona. Sihanne Gishipa geetetiya nam7u asati enta halaqata.
Nehemiah11:22 Yerusalaamen de7iya Leeweta halaqay Oza. Ozi Baana na7a; Baani Hasabaya na7a; Hashabey Mataana na7a; Mataani Mika na7a. Ozi Xoossa keetha zammaareta halaqa gidida Asaafa na7a.
Nehemiah11:23 Zammaareti gallas gallas yexana mazmuriya kawoy enta kiittees.
Nehemiah11:24 Yihuda na7aa Zaraha yaraape yeletida Masezabeela na7aa Pataha Isra7eele asaas doona gididi
Nehemiah11:25 Yihuda asaape guuthati goshsha gadetaninne gutatan
Nehemiah11:26 Qassi Iyyasun
Nehemiah11:27 Haxar-Shu7aalaninne iya gutatan
Nehemiah11:28 Xiqilaagan
Nehemiah11:29 Enirmoonan
Nehemiah11:30 Zanohan
Nehemiah11:31 Biniyaame kochati Gib7an
Nehemiah11:32 Anatootan
Nehemiah11:33 Haxooran
Nehemiah11:34 Hadidan
Nehemiah11:35 Loodan
Nehemiah11:36 Yihudan de7ida Leewetape baggati Biniyaame asaara daanada oosetidosona.
Nehemiah12:1 Salatiyaala na7aa Zarubaabelaranne kahine halaqaa Iyyasura di7ope simmida kahinetinne Leeweti haysata: Saraya
Nehemiah12:2 Amaare
Nehemiah12:3 Sakana
Nehemiah12:4 Ida
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamina
Nehemiah12:6 Shama7a
Nehemiah12:7 Saala
Nehemiah12:8 Entara issife simmida Leeweti Iyyasu
Nehemiah12:9 Entara issife zamariya Baqbuqeynne Unoy entafe sinthara haa simmi eqidi yexoosona.
Nehemiah12:10 Iyyasuy Yoyaaqima yelis; Yoyaaqimi Eliyaseeba yelis; Eliyaseebi Yoyada yelis;
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyadi Yoonataana yelis; Yoonataani Yadu7a yelis.
Nehemiah12:12 Yoyaaqimi kahine halaqa gididi de7iya laythi
Nehemiah12:13 Izira yaraa halaqay Masulaama. Amaare yara halaqay Yehohanana.
Nehemiah12:14 Maluka yaraa halaqay Yoonataana. Sabana yaraa halaqay Yoosefa.
Nehemiah12:15 Harima yaraa halaqay Adina. Marayoota yaraa halaqay Hilqaya.
Nehemiah12:16 Ido yaraa halaqay Zakaryaasa. Ginetoona yaraa halaqay Masulaama.
Nehemiah12:17 Abiya yaraa halaqay Zikira. Miniyaminanne Ma7ada yaraa halaqay Pilxaya.
Nehemiah12:18 Bilga yaraa halaqay Samu7a. Shamaya yaraa halaqay Yoonataana.
Nehemiah12:19 Yoyaariba yaraa halaqay Matanaya. Yadaya yaraa halaqay Oza.
Nehemiah12:20 Salaya yaraa halaqay Qalaya. Amoka yaraa halaqay Ebeera.
Nehemiah12:21 Kelqe yaraa halaqay Hasabaya. Yadaya yaraa halaqay Natina7eela.
Nehemiah12:22 Leeweta halaqati Eliyaseebi
Nehemiah12:23 Gidoshin
Nehemiah12:24 Leeweta halaqati Hasabaya
Nehemiah12:25 Xoossa keetha gimbe dirsaa pengiya matan keexetida dumma dumma miishe wothiya keethaa naageysati Mataana
Nehemiah12:26 Haysati Yoxedeqa na7aa na7aa gidada Iyyasu na7aa Yoyaaqimey
Nehemiah12:27 Yerusalaame gimbe dirsay gimbetidi wurida ba7aale bonchiya wode Leeweti banta de7iya bessaafe koyetidi
Nehemiah12:28 Ha baaliya bonchanaw zammaareti Yerusalaame heeran de7iya Naxoofata gutatape
Nehemiah12:29 Beet-Gelgalape
Nehemiah12:30 Kahinetinne Leeweti bantana wogada geeshidaape guye asaa
Nehemiah12:31 Taani Yihuda halaqata gimbe dirsaa bolla kessas. Nam7u gita mazmure koyreta galata mazmure yexana mela oothas. Issi koyrey gimbiya huuphesoora ushachi simmidi
Nehemiah12:32 Hoshayanne Yihuda halaqatape baggati entana kaallidosona.
Nehemiah12:33 Entara de7iya harati Azaara
Nehemiah12:34 Yihuda
Nehemiah12:35 moyze punniya guutha kahineti kaallidosona. Entana kaallidi yiday Zakaryaasa; Zakaryaasi Yoonataana na7a; Yoonataani Shama7a na7a; Shama7i Mataana na7a; Mataani Mikaya na7a; Mikayey Zakura na7a; Zakuri Asaafa na7a.
Nehemiah12:36 Zakaryaasa yara gidida Shama7ey
Nehemiah12:37 Pulto Pengiya gakidaape guye Dawita Katamaako simmidi
Nehemiah12:38 Nam7antho koyrey gimbiya huuphiya oykidi haddirsi simmidi bis. Taani asaape baggara gidada entafe guyera kaallas. Itoone Adussa Gimbiya aadhidi
Nehemiah12:39 Yaape simmidi
Nehemiah12:40 Galata mazmure yexiya nam7u koyreti Xoossa keethan banta besse besse oykidosona. Qassi taka taara de7iya halaqatara yaa gakas.
Nehemiah12:41 Hessadaka
Nehemiah12:42 Ma7iseyi
Nehemiah12:43 He gallas daro yarsho yarshidosona. Xoossay entaw gita ufaysi immida gisho daro ufaytidosona. Maccasay nayti ubbay ufaytidosona. Yerusalaamen asay ufaytiya ufaysa kooshinchay haahon si7etees.
Nehemiah12:44 He gallas asay immiya imotata
Nehemiah12:45 Enti Xoossay kiitidaysa oothidosona; geeshsho wogaa polidosona. Enta xalaala gidonashin zammaretinne naageysati Dawitinne iya na7aa Solomoney kiitida oosuwa polidosona.
Nehemiah12:46 Beni Dawita wodenne Asaafa wode zammaretinne Xoossas shiiqiya galata mazmureta kaalethiya halaqati de7oosona.
Nehemiah12:47 Zarubaabela laythaninne Nahime laythan Isra7eele asa ubbay zammaretasinne naageysatas bessiya kathaa gallas gallas immoosona. Leewetaska bessiya kathaa immoosona. Leeweti qassi Aarona yara gidida kahinetas bessiya kathaa immoosona.
Nehemiah13:1 He gallas asa ubbay si7ishin
Nehemiah13:2 Ayis giiko
Nehemiah13:3 He higgiya Isra7eele asay si7ida wode allaga asaa banta giddofe shaakidosona.
Nehemiah13:4 Hessafe kase Xoossa keetha miisheta wothiya keethaas halaqa gidida kahiney
Nehemiah13:5 Hessafe gaason Eliyaseebi
Nehemiah13:6 Ha ubbay haniya wode ta Yerusalaamen de7ike. Arxekisisey Babiloone biittan kawotida hastamanne nam7antho laythan taani simmada Babiloone biitta kawako bas. Gidoshin
Nehemiah13:7 Yerusalaame simmada yas. Xoossa keetha zabban Eliyaseebi Xoobbiyas daana kifile giigisidi wothida iitabaa si7as.
Nehemiah13:8 Daro yilotada
Nehemiah13:9 Kifilya wogaada geeshshana mela kiittas. Xoossa keetha miisheta
Nehemiah13:10 Qassi asay Leewetas bessiya kathaa immiboona gisho Leewetinne zammaareti banta Xoossa keetha oosuwa aggidi goshshas guye bidaysa be7as.
Nehemiah13:11 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah13:12 Yaatin Yihuda asay kathaafe
Nehemiah13:13 Taani kahiniya Salama
Nehemiah13:14 “Ta Xoossaw tana qopa; qassi ne keetha oosoy giigana mela taani oothida lo77o oosuwa dogopa” yaagas.
Nehemiah13:15 He wode taani Yihudan de7iya asay Sambaata gallas woyne gum7ishin be7as; harati kathi
Nehemiah13:16 Hessa bolla qassi Yerusalaamen de7iya Xiroosa asay molonne hara issi issi zal7e miisheta ehidi Sambaata gallas Yihuda asaasinne Yerusalaamen bayzoosona.
Nehemiah13:17 Taani Yihuda halaqata
Nehemiah13:18 Xoossay nu bollanne nu katamaa bolla haysa mela meto ehiday
Nehemiah13:19 Hessafe guye
Nehemiah13:20 Hessa gisho
Nehemiah13:21 Shin taani entako
Nehemiah13:22 Taani Leeweti banta huuphiya geeshshana mela
Nehemiah13:23 He wode taani Yihuda adde asape issoti issoti Ashdooda
Nehemiah13:24 Enta naytape baggay Ashdooda biitta woyko hara biitta doona haasayoosona; banta biitta
Nehemiah13:25 Taani entara ooyetas; enta baaddas; entafe issota issota dechada
Nehemiah13:26 Qassi entako
Nehemiah13:27 Yaatin
Nehemiah13:28 Kahine halaqaa Eliyaseeba naytape issoy Yoyada. Shin iya naytape issoy Beet-Horona katama asi gidida Sanbalaaxa na7iw macho ekis. Yaatin
Nehemiah13:29 “Ta Xoossaw
Nehemiah13:30 Enta allaga biitta tunatethaafe geeshidaape guye kahinetasinne Leewetas enta oosuwa oosuwa immas.

Esther1:1 Kawoy Arxekisisi Hinde biittafe Tophe biitta gakanaw de7iya
Esther1:2 Kawoy ba araatan uttidi aysiya waanna katamay Suusa geetetees.

Esther1:4 Kawoy issi xeetanne hospun tammu gallas kumethi ba kawotethaa duretethaanne ba yashshiya bonchuwa ubbaa enta bessis.

Esther1:8 Issi issi asi ba koyida mela uyees; hessa kawoy koyrottidi ba aylletas odis.

Esther9:1 Adaare geetetiya tammanne nam7antho ageenan tammanne heedzantho gallasay gakis. He gallas
Esther9:2 Kawa Arxekisisa kawotethan de7iya Ayhudeti ubbay bantana qohanaw koyiya ubbaa dhaysanaw banta kataman kataman issife shiiqidosona. Hara zare gidida asay entaw yayyida gisho
Esther9:3 Enti Mardikiyoosas yayyida gisho
Esther9:4 Mardikiyoosi kawo gadhon gita maati imetidanne wolqan guji guji biya asi gideysi he kawotethan de7iya biitta ubban eretis.
Esther9:5 He gallas Ayhudeti banta morketa ubbaa mashshan goyridi wursidosona; bantana ixiya ubbaa bolla koydaba oothidosona.

Esther9:9 Parmashita

Esther9:13 Astira zaarada

Esther9:16 He wode Suusa katamaape gaxara de7iya kawa biittatan de7iya Ayhudeti issife shiiqidi
Esther9:17 Haysi ubbay haniday Adaare geetetiya ageenan tammanne heedzantho gallasaana. Tammanne oyddantho gallasan enti shempidosona; gibira mishe
Esther9:18 Shin Suusa kataman de7iya Ayhudeti tammanne heedzanthonne tammanne oyddantho gallasan wodhishe pee7idi
Esther9:19 Hessa gisho
Esther9:20 Mardikiyoosi ha hanida taarike ubbaa xaafidi
