Esther10:1 Kawoy Arxekisisi ba kawotethan gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay giira qanxana mela wolqan kiittis.
Esther10:2 I oothida gitanne malaalsiya oosoti ubbay
Esther10:3 Maatan gidiko
Job1:1 Uxe biittan Iyyoba geetetiya issi asi de7ees; I borey bayna asi
Job1:2 Iyaw laapun adde naytinne heedzu macca nayti de7oosona.
Job1:3 Iyaw laapun mukulu dorsati
Job1:4 Iya adde nayti banta son son gibira giigisidi
Job1:5 Gibira gallasati poletiya wode Iyyobi ba nayta xeegisidi
Job1:6 Issi gallas kiitanchoti Godaa sinthan bentanaw yidosona; Xalaheyka qassi entara yis.
Job1:7 Goday Xalahiyako
Job1:8 Goday Xalahiyako
Job1:9 Xalahey zaaridi
Job1:10 Iyanne iya soo asaa
Job1:11 Shin neeni ne kushiya yeddada
Job1:12 Goday Xalahiyako
Job1:13 Issi gallas Iyyoba adde naytinne macca nayti banta bayra ishaa son moosonanne woyne ushshi uyoosona.
Job1:14 Issi kiitetida asi Iyyobako yidi
Job1:15 Saaba biitta asati akeekona yidi ola kessidi
Job1:16 I buroo odishin hara asi yidi
Job1:17 I buroo odishin hara asi yidi
Job1:18 I buroo odishin
Job1:19 wolqaama gotey akeekona mela biittafe dendidi
Job1:20 Hessafe guye
Job1:21 “Taani ta aaye ulope kallo yeletas; hayqasheka taani kallo baana; Goday immis; Goday zaaridi ekis; Godaa sunthay galatetto” yaagis.
Job1:22 Ha ubbanka Iyyobi nagaraa oothibeenna; Xoossaa bolla iitaba odetibeenna.
Job2:1 Hara gallas kiitanchoti Godaa sinthan bentanaw yidosona; Xalaheyka qassi entara issife iya sinthan bentanaw yis.
Job2:2 Goday Xalahiyako
Job2:3 Goday Xalahiyako
Job2:4 Xalahey zaaridi
Job2:5 Shin
Job2:6 Goday Xalahiyako
Job2:7 Hessafe guye
Job2:8 Iyyobi bido bolla uttidi kon7an bana goodis.
Job2:9 Iya machiya
Job2:10 Iyyobi zaaridi
Job2:11 Heedzu Iyyoba laggeti
Job2:12 Enti iya haahon eqidi xeelliya wode I Iyyoba gideysa eribookona. Guyepe iya gideysa erida wode banta qaala dhoqu oothidi yeekidosona; banta ma7uwa peedhidi
Job2:13 Enti iyara laapun gallasinne laapun qamma biittan uttidosona. Enti iya waayey keehi daro gideysa be7ida gisho oonika iya odisibeenna.
Job3:1 Hessafe guye
Job3:2 
Job3:3 “Taani qanthatida qammaynne yeletida gallasay baadetidaba gido!
Job3:4 He gallasay dhuman laameto! Salo Xoossay he gallasaa qopofo; iya bolla poo7oyka poo7opo.
Job3:5 Sakana dhuminne caagani iya goozo; iya shaarii kammo; iya poo7uwa dhumi qoso.
Job3:6 He gallasaa qamma sakana dhumi oyko. Laytha giddon de7iya gallasatan taybetofo; ageenata taybonka gelopo.
Job3:7 He qammay mayno; ufaysa ililsi iyan si7etofo.
Job3:8 Leewataane denthanaw danda7eysatinne gallasata baaddeysati he gallasaa baaddo.
Job3:9 He qamman bakali poo7opo; poo7o naagidi demmofo; wonta xalqey iyaw dolopo.
Job3:10 He gallasay taani ta aaye ulon qanthatonna melanne ha waayiya be7onna mela ashshiboona gisho baadetidaysa gido.
Job3:11 “Taani ta aaye ulon haatha gidida gidarkina! Ta aaye ulope yeleta wodhida mela hayqida gidarkina!
Job3:12 Ta aayiya tana ayis ba ki7on ekadesha? Ba dhanthaaka tana ayis dhanthadesha?
Job3:13 He wode taani hayqidaba gidiyako
Job3:14 Ha77i laaletida bessata bantaw keexida
Job3:15 enta keethan worqaynne biray kumida halaqatara issife duufon zin7anashin!
Job3:16 Woyko bosha gididi yeletida na7ada
Job3:17 Duufon iitati banta iita ooso aggoosona; yan daaburanchoti shempoosona.
Job3:18 He bessan qasho asati shempidi ufaytoosona; enta un7etheyisata waasuwa yan si7okona.
Job3:19 Gitinne guuthi yan de7ees; aylletika aylletethafe yan la77a keyoosona.
Job3:20 “Meton de7eysatas
Job3:21 Hayqo amotidi demmonaysatas
Job3:22 Duufo gakiya wode ufayteysatas
Job3:23 Ogey dhayida uraas
Job3:24 Ooley taw kathi gidis; ta waasoy goggiya haathi gidis.
Job3:25 Taani yayyidabay ta bolla gakis; taani dagammidabay taw hanis.
Job3:26 Taw metope attishin
Job4:1 Temaanape yida Elfaazi zaaridi
Job4:2 “Issi asi xaltaamidi neera odetiko neeni lancanee? Shin haasayonna agganay oonee?
Job4:3 Heko
Job4:4 Ne qaalay dhubetidaysata koolidi essis; daaburida gulbatata minthis.
Job4:5 Shin ha77i metoy nena gakin ufaysi qanxadasa; un7i nena teqin dagammadasa.
Job4:6 Ne Xoossaas yayyeysi nena ammanthidi wothibeennee? Ne suure hemethay new ufaysi gidibeennee?
Job4:7 “Ane qopa; geeshsha asi gididi dhayday oonee? Suure asi gididi shodetidi dhayday oonee?
Job4:8 Ta be7idaysada
Job4:9 Enti Xoossaafe keya shempon punetidi dhayana; iya hanquwa lacuwan meetetana.
Job4:10 Iitati gudiya gaammo mela xaaggoosona; shin enta achay meqeretis.
Job4:11 Shankatidi miyaba dhayida gaammoy hayqeysada
Job4:12 “Issi gallas issi xuuray taako yis; he xuura kalkashan ta si7as.
Job4:13 Wolqaama dhiskoy ase oykida wode un7ethiya qamma amuho giddon
Job4:14 yashshinne kokorsi tana oykis; ta meqethati kokoridosona.
Job4:15 Carkoy ta som7uwa baqidi aadhis; ta dagammin ta asatethaa ikisey eqis.
Job4:16 I ta sinthan eqis; shin I aybeko shaakada erabike. Hessafe guye
Job4:17 ‘Hayqiya asi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gidanaw danda7ii? Woyko asi bana medhidaysa sinthan geeshshi gidanaw danda7ii?
Job4:18 Xoossay ba aylletan ammanetonaba gidiko
Job4:19 Yaatin
Job4:20 Wonta bentidi omarsi hayqoosona; oonika hassayonna merinaw dhayoosona.
Job4:21 Dhishey shodetida dunkaane mela cincatethi bayna hayqoosona.’ ”
Job5:1 “Iyyoba
Job5:2 Eeya uraa lancey wodhees; akeeki bayna uraa qanaatey dhaysees.
Job5:3 Eeya uray minnidi de7ishin be7as; shin qoponna iya keethay baadetis.
Job5:4 Iya nayti saroy bayna daana; pirda dabaaban entaw eqiya asi bayna gisho enti qohetana.
Job5:5 I shiishida kathaa koshatida asay maana; hari attoshin aguntha giddon dolidaysaka aggokona. Saamotidaysati iya shaluwa ekanaw amottoosona.
Job5:6 Metoy sa7ape keyenna; waayey biittafe dolenna.
Job5:7 Tami pinxidi wodheysada
Job5:8 “Ta nena gidiyako ta Xoossako shiiqana; ta mootuwaka iya sinthan wothana.
Job5:9 I taybetonna malaatata
Job5:10 Ira biittan bukisees; goshsha gadiyas haathe yeddees.
Job5:11 Kawushata dhoqu dhoqu oothees; kayoteyisata minthethidi ufaysees.
Job5:12 Enta qofay poletonna mela
Job5:13 Cincata enta gene oosuwan oykees; genanchota maquwa aathidi yeggees.
Job5:14 Gallasay entaw dhuma gidana; seeta gallas dhuman hemetiya asada tattafana.
Job5:15 Manqota enta morketa mashshafe ashshees; enta wolqaamata kushiyape wothi ekees.
Job5:16 Hessa gisho
Job5:17 “Xoossay seeriya asi anjetidaysa; hessa gisho
Job5:18 I menthees
Job5:19 Usupun qommo qohotape I nena ashshana; laapunthoy nena bochenna.
Job5:20 Kosha laythi hayqope
Job5:21 I nena iita inxarsafe naagana; boshi gakiya wode yayyaka.
Job5:22 Bosha bollanne kosha bolla ne miicana; bazzo do7atas yayyaka.
Job5:23 Ne goshsha biittan shuchi deenna; bazzo do7atara ne saron daana.
Job5:24 Ne dunkaaney saro gideysa ne erana; ne daraa ne xomoosiya wode aybika pacenna.
Job5:25 Ne yeletay daranaysanne ne kochay maata mela gidanaysa ne erana.
Job5:26 Kathi wode naagidi caketeysada
Job5:27 “Iyyoba
Job6:1 Hessafe guye Iyyobi zaaridi
Job6:2 Ta waayeynne ta azzanoy ubbay mizaanen liketidi be7etiyako
Job6:3 Abba gaxan de7iya shafiyape aadhidi deexana; Hessa gisho
Job6:4 Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa dongeti tana caddidosona; ta asatethay enta yiishsha uyees; Xoossaa daganthoy ta bolla salpis.
Job6:5 Harey woyko boori maati de7ishin waassiyee?
Job6:6 Mal7onna kathi maxiney gelonna meetetiyee? Woyko phuuphulle haathi mal7iyee?
Job6:7 Hessa mela kathi tana suukeyenna; hessa mela kathi ta miiko tana sakees.
Job6:8 Ta woosa Xoossi si7iyako aybee? Ta amuwaka taw kunthiyako aybee?
Job6:9 Xoossaa shene gidin I tana mentherethiyako
Job6:10 Ta Geeshsha Xoossaa qaala kaddaboonna gisho
Job6:11 Ta paxa daanaw taw ayba wolqi de7ii? Taw ayba ufaysi de7ishin danda7iyana?
Job6:12 Ta wolqay shucha meleyee? Woyko ta ashoy naase birata meleyee?
Job6:13 Taani tana maaddanaw ayba wolqi taw de7ii? maado demmanaw xeelliya bessika baawa.
Job6:14 Meton de7iya asi Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossas yayyeysa aggikoka
Job6:15 Shin ta ishati hinte iri bukonna wode meliya shaafa mela tana cimmeeta.
Job6:16 Balgo ageenan ha shaafay shachan kumees.
Job6:17 Shin boney gakiya wode shachay til7ees; shaafayka melees.
Job6:18 Caana mehe laaggishe biya zal7anchoti
Job6:19 Teema biitta zal7anchoti haathe koyoosona; Saaba biitta oge asati ufaysi qanxokona.
Job6:20 Enti ammanetidi koyidi dhayida gisho yilotidosona
Job6:21 Hinteka taw he shaafata mela gidideta; tana gakida metuwa be7idi yayyideta.
Job6:22 Hanoshin ta hintena
Job6:23 “Tana ta morketa kushepe ashshite” woyko
Job6:24 “Ta si77i gaana; hinte tana tamaarsite; ta ay balidaako ane tana bessite.
Job6:25 Tuma odi cammikoka eketees! shin hinte oday aybiska maaddenna.
Job6:26 Hinte ta haasaya carko mela hada ootheeta; Yaatin
Job6:27 Aawi bayna na7a bolla saama yeggeeta; hinte laggiya bayzanaw washiseeta.
Job6:28 Ane shama ayfen tana xeellite; ta hinte sinthan wordotiyana?
Job6:29 Hayyana
Job6:30 Ta inxarsan wordoy de7ii? Ta doonay wordonne tumaa shaakanaw danda7ennee?”
Job7:1 Asa de7oy sa7a bolla wolqaama baaxe gidenneyee? Iya laythay une oothiya asa de7o mela gidenneyee?
Job7:2 Wulliya awa amotiya gaacha mela
Job7:3 hessada taw mela ageenati meto qammati imetidosona.
Job7:4 Taani zin7iya wode awude barkandinasha gayis; Shin qammay taw aduqees; sa7i wontana gakanaw hiixan shireta shireta wodhayis.
Job7:5 Ta asatethay guxuntis; ta madunthay giishshi goggees.
Job7:6 Ta laythay dorze mooqepe aadhidi ellesees; ufaysi baynashin ta laythay wurees.
Job7:7 Abeeti Xoossaw
Job7:8 Ha77i be7ey zaaridi be7enna; tana koyana shin zaari demmenna.
Job7:9 Shaari laaletidi dhayeysada
Job7:10 Ba soo simmidi yeenna; iya eriya asayka dogees.
Job7:11 “Hessa gisho
Job7:12 Hessa mela neeni tana ayis naagay? Ta new abba woyko abban de7iya iita do7a gadiyee?
Job7:13 ‘Ta hiixay tana minthethana; ta arsay tana zuuzunthafe shempisana!’ gada qopas;
Job7:14 Shin neeni tana amuhon yashisaasa; qoncethan tana daganthaasa.
Job7:15 Taani ha waayey kumida asatethaa tookada daanape
Job7:16 Taani ta de7uwa shaatettas; daanaw koyke; ta laythay issi shempo mela gidiya gisho tana aggarki.
Job7:17 Ne iya gitayada xeellanaw asi aybee? Ne iyaw qopanaw asi aybee?
Job7:18 Wonta wonta ne iya xomoosasa; woden woden ne iya paacasa.
Job7:19 Ne ta bolla ayfe wotheysa aggikii? Cuchu mittiya wode taw immikii?
Job7:20 Abeeti ase kaalleyso
Job7:21 Ta naaquwa ayis aggikii? Ta nagara ayis atto giikii? Ta duufo geliya wodey gakis; ne tana koyana
Job8:1 Shuha biittafe yida Beldadoosi zaaridi
Job8:2 “Neeni hessa awude gakanaw odetay? Ne doonape keya qaalay wolqaama gote mela.
Job8:3 Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay xillo pirdennee?
Job8:4 Ne nayti Xoossaa bolla nagaraa oothida gisho
Job8:5 Shin neeni Xoossaako simmiko
Job8:6 neeni geeshshinne suure gidiko
Job8:7 Ne doomethay guutha daanikoka
Job8:8 Kase yeletaa ane oycha; nu mayzati ay tamaaridaako pilgada demma.
Job8:9 Nuuni zine nayta aybaka eroko; nu ha sa7an de7iya laythay kuya mela.
Job8:10 Enti nena tamaarseynne new odey
Job8:11 Carey bayna bessan palki dolanaw danda7ii? haathi bayna bessan mayrey cil7anaw danda7ii?
Job8:12 Buroo diccidi qanxetonna de7ishe
Job8:13 Xoossaa dogiya asaa ubbaa wursethay hessa mela; Xoosse eronna asaa ufaysay dhayana.
Job8:14 I ammanetiyabay meqiyaba; I ceeqetiyabayka shango haada mela.
Job8:15 I ba shango haada bolla zempana
Job8:16 I awa wode haathe uyidi cil7iya atakilte mela; ba xaphuwa biitta ubban yeddida mitha mela.
Job8:17 Ba xaphuwa keelan yeddees; gita shucha bolla ba xaphuwa xaaxees.
Job8:18 Shin I ba bessaafe shodetiko
Job8:19 Iita asata ufaysay hessa mela; harati yidi enta bessaa oykana.
Job8:20 “Xoossay borey bayna asaa yeggi aggenna; iita ootheyisata maaddenna.
Job8:21 I zaaridi nena miichananne ililsana.
Job8:22 Nena ixeysati yeella ma7ana; iitata keethay dhayana” yaagis.
Job9:1 Iyyobi zaaridi
Job9:2 “Ee
Job9:3 Iyara ooni palamanaw danda7ii? I oychiya mukulu oyshatape issuwaka zaaranaw danda7enna.
Job9:4 Xoossay cincanne wolqaama; iyara eqetanaw danda7ey oonika baawa.
Job9:5 Qoponna de7ishin dereta enta bessaafe diggees; ba hanquwan aathidi yeggees.
Job9:6 I biitta iya bessaafe qaathees; biitta tuuqetaka yiggees.
Job9:7 Away keyonna mela oothees; xoolintoti poo7onna mela diggees.
Job9:8 I barka salota miccis; abba hobbiya bolla hemetees.
Job9:9 Xoossay Biire
Job9:10 I asi pilgid eranaw danda7onna gitabata
Job9:11 I ta matara aadhiya wode ta be7anaw danda7ike; I taako shiiqiya wode eranaw danda7ike.
Job9:12 I bonqiko digganaw danda7ey oonee? ‘Waatay?’ yaagidi iya oychanay oonee?
Job9:13 Xoossay ba hanquwa teqenna; Ra7aaba geetetiya do7a maaddeysati iya tohuwa garsan kundoosona.
Job9:14 Yaatin
Job9:15 Taani xillo gidikoka
Job9:16 Ta iya xeegin
Job9:17 Tana goten mentherethees; gaasoy bayna ta madunthaa darsees.
Job9:18 Tana shempo diggees; ta de7uwa camethees.
Job9:19 Wolqaba gidiko
Job9:20 Taani tana xillo giikoka ta doonay tana bala kessees; tanan borey baawa ta giikoka ta inxarsay tana geella kessees.
Job9:21 Taani borey bayna asi gidikoka tabaa qopike; taani ta de7uwa kadhayis.
Job9:22 Xoossay borey baynaysanne iita issife dhaysees; ta dummatethi baawa gey hessa gishosa.
Job9:23 Gadoy gelidi asaa qoponna wodhiya wode
Job9:24 Ha sa7ay iita asaa kushen wodhiya wode
Job9:25 Ta de7o laythati woxiya uraape aadhidi ellesoosona; enti lo77oba be7onna piradhidi dhayoosona.
Job9:26 Ta de7o laythay palka wogoloda woxees; arganthi miyaba oykanaw salope duge paalleysada paallees.
Job9:27 ‘Ta zuuzuntha dogana; som7o tukeysa aggada poo7isana giyako
Job9:28 Neeni tana geeshshi goonnaysa taani eriya gisho
Job9:29 Yaatin
Job9:30 Taani ta asatethaa hari attoshin saamunan meecetiyakoka
Job9:31 ta ma7oyka tana shaatettana gakanaw
Job9:32 Ta iyaw zaaro immanaw Xoossay ta mela ase gidenna; gidiyako nu nam7ay daynna sinthan eqana.
Job9:33 Shin nu nam7aa bolla ba kushe wothidi
Job9:34 Iya teemoy tana daganthonna mela
Job9:35 Yaaniko
Job10:1 Tana duussi shaattis! Hessa gisho
Job10:2 Taani Xoossaako haysada gaana; ta bala taw odape attishin
Job10:3 Neeni iitata qofaa ufaysan ekashe
Job10:4 Ne ayfey asa ayfe meleyee? neeni asi xeelleysada xeellayee?
Job10:5 Ne de7o laythay asa de7o laytha meleyee?
Job10:6 Yaatin
Job10:7 Taani bala gidonaysanne ne kushepe tana oonika ashshanaw danda7onnaysa ne eraasa.
Job10:8 Tana ne kushey giigisidi medhis; shin ha77i he kushey simmidi tana menthees.
Job10:9 Neeni tana biittafe medhidaysa hassaya Yaatin
Job10:10 Tana maathada ta aaye ulon tigidaynne meqa maathada Irkisiday nena gidikii?
Job10:11 Neeni tana ashonne goga mayzadasa; shayaninne meqethan waaxadasa.
Job10:12 Neeni taw de7onne merinaa siiqo immadasa; ne naagoy tana paxa wothis.
Job10:13 Shin neeni he wodepe doomada ne wozanan tana qohanaw qopada de7eysa ta erayis.
Job10:14 Ta naaquwa ne be7aasa; ta nagara oothiko seeronna aadhaka.
Job10:15 Taani balikoka tana ayye! Ta xillo gidikoka ceeqetanaw danda7ike. Ne tana yeella mayzadasa; waayen wothadasa.
Job10:16 Ta otoriko tana gaammoda shankatada oykaasa; tana qohanaw ne malaalsiya wolqaa zaara zaara bessaasa.
Job10:17 Neeni ta bolla ooratha markata ehaasa; ne hanquwa ta bolla darsaasa; tana olanaw ooratha olanchota giigisaasa.
Job10:18 Yaatin
Job10:19 Taani medhetonna attidaako
Job10:20 Ta guutha de7o laythay wurees gidenneyee? Ha guutha laythan ufaytana mela tana aggarki!
Job10:21 Ta simmonna bessaa boonna de7ishin
Job10:22 iya poo7oy dhuma gidida bessaanne hayqoy kawotida bessaa
Job11:1 Na7ima biittafe yida Soofari zaaridi
Job11:2 “Ha hada haasaya ubbaas zaaro immiya asi baawee? Woyko hessa odida uray tuma gidanaw danda7ii?
Job11:3 Ne hada oday ase si77i oothiya daanii? Ne qelqisiya wode nena seeriya asi baawee?
Job11:4 Neeni
Job11:5 Xoossay new odiyako
Job11:6 Cincatethas daro ogey de7iya gisho
Job11:7 “Ciimmo gidida Xoossaa xuuraa eranaw danda7ay? Woyko Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaba pilgada gakanaw danda7ay?
Job11:8 Enti salotape dhoqa; ne ay oothanaw danda7ay? Enti Si7oolepeka aadhida ciimmo; ne eranaw danda7aka.
Job11:9 Xoossaa cincatethay biittafe dalgees; abbafeka aadhidi ciimmotees.
Job11:10 I yidi nena qasho keethan yeggiyako
Job11:11 Xoossay pathonna asaa erees; iitabaa be7iya wode si77i gidi aggenna.
Job11:12 Eeya asi cinca gideysafe
Job11:13 Neeni ne wozanaa suure oothiko
Job11:14 nagaraa ne kushepe haassiko
Job11:15 He wode neeni dhoqu gada yeelli bayna ubbaba be7an; yashshi bayna minnada eqana.
Job11:16 Neeni ne metuwa ubbaa dogana; goggidi aadhida di7oda zaara hassayaka.
Job11:17 Ne de7oy seeta gallasa awape aadhidi poo7ana; ne de7uwa dhumay wonta xalqeda poo7ana.
Job11:18 New ufaysi de7iya gisho neeni hirgonna daana; Xoossay nena naagiya gisho wopu gada daana.
Job11:19 Neeni yashshi bayna dhiskana; daro asay nenan nashetanaw koyana.
Job11:20 Shin iitati meto be7ishe akeekokona; iyape baqatidi attanaw danda7okona; Enta ufaysay hayqo” yaagis.
Job12:1 Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris.
Job12:2 Ee
Job12:3 Shin taka hinteda akeeki de7iya asi; taani hintefe guuxike; Ha hinte odetidaba eronnay oonee?
Job12:4 Taani Xoossaa woossin I tana si7ida asi gidikoka
Job12:5 Metootidi be7iboona asi hara asa meton miicees; hinte kundanaw gandigariya asi sugeeta.
Job12:6 Bonqeyisata keethay saro de7ees; Xoossaa yiloyeysati hirgi bayna de7oosona; banta wolqaa bantaw xoosse oothosona.
Job12:7 Ane meheta oycha; enti nena tamaarsana; Woyko salo kafota oycha; enti new odana.
Job12:8 Woyko sa7a medhetethatas oda; enti nena tamaarsana; abba molotika new odana.
Job12:9 Godaa kushey hessa oothidaysa eronnay oonee?
Job12:10 De7oy de7iya medhetethi ubbaynne asa shempoy iya kushena.
Job12:11 Inxarsi kathi shaakidi ereysada
Job12:12 Cincatethi dondzida asaa matan deneyee? daro laythi de7ida asaa matan akeeki benteneyee?
Job12:13 Cincatethinne wolqi Xoossasa; zoreynne akeeki iya matan bentees.
Job12:14 Xoossay laallidaba zaari keexanay oonee? I qachida uraa birshanay oonee?
Job12:15 Xoossay ira teqiko biittay melees; ira bukisiko di7oy biitta dhaysees.
Job12:16 Minotethinne xoonoy Xoossasa; cimeteysinne cimmeysi nam7ayka iyape garsan de7ees.
Job12:17 Zoreysatape cincatethaa qaari ekees; halaqataka eeya kessees.
Job12:18 I kawota araatape wothidi aylle kessees.
Job12:19 Kahinetape bonchuwa qaari ekees; adussa wode xapho yeddida wolqaamata shiri yeggees.
Job12:20 Ammanetida zoreyisata si77i oothees; cimatapeka akeeka yegisees.
Job12:21 Bonchetidaysata kawushshees; minota danco bilisees.
Job12:22 Dhuman de7iya xuura qonce kessees; leelida dhumaa poo7o kessees.
Job12:23 Xoossay kawotethata gitayees; zaaridi dhaysees; Kawotethata dalgisees; zaaridi laallees.
Job12:24 Alamiya kawota akeeka diggees; ogey bayna mela biittan toylatana mela oothees.
Job12:25 Poo7oy bayna dhuman tattafoosona; mathotida asada gandigaroosona.
Job13:1 Ha ubbaa ta ayfey be7is; ta haythay si7idi akeekis.
Job13:2 Hinte ereysa taka erayis; taani hintefe guuxike.
Job13:3 Shin taani Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossara odetanaw koyayis; taani ta metuwaba iyara mootetanaw amottayis.
Job13:4 Shin hinte wordon kammeyisata; hinte ubbayka pathonna aakimeta.
Job13:5 Hinte si77i gidaba gidiyako
Job13:6 Ha77i ta mootuwa si7ite; ta doonape keya palama hayzite.
Job13:7 Hinte Xoossaa gisho wordo odeteetii? Iya gisho gidi cimon odeteetii?
Job13:8 Hinte iya maaddiyabay de7ii? Woyko iyaw xabaqa eqidi mootetetii?
Job13:9 I hintena pilgi xeelliyako hintefe lo77oba demmanee? Hinte ase cimmeysada iya cimmanaw danda7eetii?
Job13:10 Hinte geeman asa som7o be7idi maaddiko
Job13:11 Iya bonchoy hintena daganthennee? Iya teemay hintena yashshennee?
Job13:12 Hinte odida leemisoy bidintha mela pathonnaba; hinte mootoy biittafe medhetida gondalle mela.
Job13:13 Ane si77i giite; ta odetana; hizape hanidabay hano.
Job13:14 Taani tanatethaa ayis meton yeggiyana? Ta de7uwa ayis ta kushen oykiyana?
Job13:15 Xoossay tana wodhikoka taani iya danda7an naagana; taani ta metuwa iya sinthe shiishana.
Job13:16 Nagarancho asi iya sinthe shiiqanaw danda7onna gisho; ooni eri ta xaalatethay atotethas gaaso gidanaw danda7ees.
Job13:17 Ta haasaya akeekidi si7ite; ta oday hinte haythan gelo.
Job13:18 Ha77i taani ta metuwa eka shiiqas; I taw pirdanaysa erayis.
Job13:19 Tana mootana asi de7ii? De7iko taani si77i gada hayqana.
Job13:20 Xoossaw ne taw ha nam7ubata ootha; yaatiko ta ne sinthafe geemmike.
Job13:21 Ne seera kushiya taape dentha; tana dagantheysa agga.
Job13:22 Hessafe guye
Job13:23 Ta balaynne nagaray aapunee? Ane ta naaquwanne ta nagaraa tana bessa.
Job13:24 Neeni ayis ne som7uwa taape genthay? ne morkeda ayis tana taybay?
Job13:25 Carkoy efiya kaliya ayis un7ethay? melida punuwa ayis yedethay?
Job13:26 Neeni ta bolla xaafida mootoy camo; ta na7atetha balaka aggabaaka.
Job13:27 Neeni ta tohuwa duxadasa; ta tanguwa ubbaa wochaasa; ta tohoy yedhiyasuwa kaallasa.
Job13:28 Hessa gisho
Job14:1 “Maccasape yeletida asas laythi qanthi; ika qassi meton kumis.
Job14:2 Ciishshada bentidi ellesidi qoqofetees; kuyada gam7onna eeson aadhees.
Job14:3 Yaatin
Job14:4 Tunabaape geeshshaba kessanaw danda7ey oonee? Oonika baawa.
Job14:5 Asi daana laythas zawi de7ees; I daana ageena neeni tayba wothadasa; neeni wothida zawape aadhey oonika baawa.
Job14:6 Une oothiya asi ba oosuwa polidi shempeysada
Job14:7 Qanxetida mithas ufaysi de7ees; zaaridi aacees; ooratha tashe kessidi diccees.
Job14:8 Mithaa xaphoy biitta garsan cimikoka
Job14:9 haathe demmidi aacees; ooratha dolada tashe kessees.
Job14:10 Shin asi hayqees; hessi iyaw wursethi; iya shempoy keyape guye I awun de7ii?
Job14:11 Abbaa haathi meleysada
Job14:12 hessada asika hayqees; simmidi dendenna; saloti aadhana gakanaw asi baarkenna; ba dhiskuwafeka dendenna.
Job14:13 Neeni tana duufon genthidaako aybe! Ne hanqoy aadhana gakanaw qottidaako aybe! Ne taw qamida he gallas tana hassaydaako aybe!
Job14:14 Asi hayqiko simmidi de7on daanee? Ta shempiya wodey yaana gakanaw
Job14:15 He wode ne tana xeegana taka koyana; ne medhida tana be7anaw laamotiya wodey yaana.
Job14:16 He wode neeni tuma ta tanguwa wochana; shin ta nagaraa kaallaka.
Job14:17 Ta balay ogoron yiicetana; ta nagaraa neeni kammana.
Job14:18 Zumi woddeysada
Job14:19 haathi shucha xapho bookeysada
Job14:20 Neeni iya merinaw xoonasa; I simmenna; iya malaa laammada ne sinthafe diggaasa.
Job14:21 Iya nayti bonchetiko I erenna; enti kawuyiko I be7enna.
Job14:22 Shin iya asatethaa seelay iya xalaalas si7etees; I ba xalaalas yeekees” yaagis.
Job15:1 Temaana biittafe yida Elfaazi haysada yaagis;
Job15:2 “Cinca asi carkoda oyketonnaba odeetii? Woyko doloha bagga carkuwan ba uluwa coo kunthii?
Job15:3 Pathonna qaalan zuuzumii? Woyko gatey bayna odan mootetii?
Job15:4 Neeni Xoossas yayyeysa aggadasa; harati Xoossaa goyinnona mela dhubbadasa.
Job15:5 Ne iitatethay ne odan eretees; shin ne cinca oday nena genthees.
Job15:6 Ne doonay ne bolla pirdees tana gidike; ne inxarsay ne bolla markatees.
Job15:7 “Asape koyro yeletiday nenee? Neeni dereti medhetanaape kase yeletadii?
Job15:8 Neeni Xoossaa xuura duulatan de7ay? asa cincatethi ne xalaalas de7iyee?
Job15:9 Nuuni eronnabay neeni eriyabay aybee? Nuus geemmidi new qoncida ayba cincatethi de7ii?
Job15:10 Ne aawape bayratiya asati
Job15:11 “Xoossay new immida minthethoy gidenneyee? nuuni kahaamatethaba odida qaalay guutheyee?
Job15:12 Ne wozanay nena ayis wora efii? Ne ayfey ayis dereeqidi xeellii?
Job15:13 Yaatada neeni Xoossaa bolla hanqetadasa; iita qaala ne doonape kessadasa.
Job15:14 Asi Xoossa sinthan geeshshi gidanaw danda7ii? Woyko maccafe yeletida asi xillo gidanaw danda7ii?
Job15:15 Xoossay ba kiitanchotan ammanetena; hari attoshin saloti iya sinthan geeshshi gidokona.
Job15:16 Iitanne tuna gidida asi
Job15:17 “Ane si7a
Job15:18 Cincati banta aawatape ekidaysa
Job15:19 Biittay enta xalaalas imetis; hara biitta asi entara walaketibeenna.
Job15:20 Ase un7ethishe de7iya iita asi
Job15:21 Daganthiyabay iya haythan si7etees; I saro de7ayis gishin dhayseysati iya bolla keyana.
Job15:22 Dhumape kessi ekoy iyaw hanenna; iya qaaday mashshan dhayo.
Job15:23 Iya ahay anko quma gidana; baw dhuma gallas matatidaysa I erees.
Job15:24 Metoynne un7i iya bolla yaana; olanaw keyida kawo mela iya bolla goobana.
Job15:25 Hessika I ba kushiya Xoossaa bolla denthida gishosa; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa bolla xaalida gishosa.
Job15:26 I eqetanaw minonne dalga gondalle oykis; otoron Xoossaako hordofees.
Job15:27 “Iya kilahoy muumida gisho
Job15:28 I laaletida katamatan
Job15:29 I ba duretethan daro gam7enna; iya zaway aakenna.
Job15:30 Dhumape kessi ekenaw danda7enna; tashiya tami labida mithadanne carkoy ciishsha qoqofida mithada gidana.
Job15:31 Pathonnaban ammanetidi bana cimmofo; iyape aykoka demmonna attana.
Job15:32 Wodey gakonna iya ubbay melidi tasheyka aaconna mitha mela gidana.
Job15:33 I teeronna qawu7e de7ishe qoqofetiya woyne mela; ciishshan de7ishe qoqofetiya shamaho mela.
Job15:34 Xoossas yayyonna asaa kochay dhayana; wodhaafen keexetida keethay taman meetetana.
Job15:35 Enti iitatethi qanthatidi meto yeloosona; enta uluwan geney kumis” yaagis.
Job16:1 Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
Job16:2 “Taani hessa mela haasaya daro si7as; hinte minthethoy tana salethis.
Job16:3 Go77i bayna hinte odaas wursethi baawee? taara hintena hessada palanthiya gaasoy aybee?
Job16:4 Hinte ta bessan
Job16:5 Ta zoriyan ta hintena minthethanashin! Ta doonape keyiya oday hintena minthethanashin!
Job16:6 “Shin ta haasaykoka ta sahoy decenna; ta si77i gada danda7ikoka taape kichenna.
Job16:7 Abeeti Xoossaw
Job16:8 Shuuqida ta gogay taw marka gidis; ta gilqatethay tana nagarancho kessis.
Job16:9 Xoossay hanqetidi ta asatethaa qanxerethis; tana ixidi ba acha ta bolla garcis; ta morkey ba ayfiya ta bolla kessis.
Job16:10 Asay ta yuushon shiiqidi tana qelqisidosona; tana leqidi baqidosona.
Job16:11 Xoossay tana nagarachotas aathidi immis; iitata kushen tana yeggis.
Job16:12 Taani kase saro de7as; shin Xoossay tana tincherethis; ta mirgaciya oykidi tana mentherethis; cache loohisiya malla oothis.
Job16:13 Iya tooranchoti banta dongen tana teqidosona; qadhey bayna ta kilahuwa muxerethidosona; ta ciyaa sa7an gussidosona.
Job16:14 I tana zaari zaari madunxisis; olanchoda toollidi caddis.
Job16:15 Taani kayo ma7o ma7as; ta wolqay wurin baanan uttas.
Job16:16 Yeehon ta som7oy gabbis; ta ayfey zo77is.
Job16:17 Shin he ubban ta balidabay baawa; ta geeshsha wozanan woossayis.
Job16:18 Biittaw
Job16:19 Heko ta markay salona; ta xabaqay bollana.
Job16:20 Ta laggeti tana kadhidi xeelloosona; ta ayfey Xoossa sinthan afuthi tigees.
Job16:21 Ase asara sigethiya asi de7eysada
Job16:22 Ta laythay wurana hanees; guutha wodepe guye ta simmonna soo baana.
Job17:1 Ta shempoy keyees; ta laythay qaammis; taw duufoy giigis.
Job17:2 Ta bolla qelqiseysati ta yuushuwan de7oosona; enti tana yiloyida mela aysidosona.
Job17:3 Abeeti Xoossaw
Job17:4 Enti akeekona mela enta qofaa gordadasa; Hessa gisho
Job17:5 Miishe demmana gidi
Job17:6 Xoossay tana asas miichas aggis; asi cuttishe aadhiya asi gidas.
Job17:7 Ta daro kayotida gisho ta ayfey eeyis; ta asatethay laafidi eesho gidis.
Job17:8 Keeha asati tana be7idi dagammidosona; suureti Xoossaa ammanonayisata bolla yilotidosona.
Job17:9 Gidoshin xilloti banta ogiyape deshokona; suureti wolqa guji guji boosona.
Job17:10 Shin zaaridi ubbay taako haa yiite! ta hinte giddofe issi cinca asi demmike.
Job17:11 Ta de7o laythay wuris; ta halchoy hada gidis; ta wozanaa amoy coo attis.
Job17:12 Ta laggeti qamma gallas goosona; dhuma be7ishe ‘Poo7ana hanees’ yaagosona.
Job17:13 Ta ufaysan naagiya keethay duufo; ta hiixa dhuman hiixayis.
Job17:14 Duufoko
Job17:15 Yaatin
Job17:16 Ta ufaysay taara duufo bandee? Nu issife biittan duge gelanee?” yaagis.
Job18:1 Hessafe guye
Job18:2 “Iyyoba
Job18:3 Ne nuna ayis miizi oothay? Ayis nuna tulle kessay?
Job18:4 Ne hanqetada nena qohaasa; Ne hanquwan biittay kallo attanee? Woyko zaallay ba bessaafe qaaxennee?
Job18:5 Nagaranchota xompey to7ana; iya tama lacoy dhayana.
Job18:6 Enta keethan de7iya xompey dhayana; enta poo7oyka dhumana.
Job18:7 I tangiya tangoy qaammees; iya iita qofay iya zaaridi mees.
Job18:8 Iya hemethay iya xihen gelsees; iya tohoti gitetana.
Job18:9 Xihey iya ginde oykana; diizi iya qaaxo diggana.
Job18:10 Yurde wodoroy sa7an iyaw geemmi uttees; I hemetiya ogiyan gitey de7ees.
Job18:11 Dagami iya teqidi oykees; iya guyera kaallidi iya yedethees.
Job18:12 Iya wolqaa koshi wursis; dhayoy iya miyen naagees.
Job18:13 Hargey iya laafethees; hayqoy iya mokidi ekees.
Job18:14 Hirgi bayna de7iya ba keethaafe goodetees; enti iya hayqo geetetiya kawako efoosona.
Job18:15 Iya keethay taman oyketana; I de7iyasuwan diinney laaletana.
Job18:16 Garsara xaphoy melana; bollara haythi qoqofetana.
Job18:17 Iya qopiya asi biittafe dhayana; iya sunthay sa7an hassayetonna attana.
Job18:18 I poo7ope dhuman goodettana; alamiyape dhayana.
Job18:19 Iyaw na7i woyko kochi dhayana; I de7ida bessan issi asi paxa attenna.
Job18:20 Wuloha bagga asay
Job18:21 Iita asaa wursethay awudeka hessa mela; Xoossaa eronna asaa qaaday hessa mela” yaagis.
Job19:1 Iyyobi zaaridi haysada yaagis;
Job19:2 Hinte tana awude gakanaw madunxiseetii? Awude gakanaw hinte qaalan tana caddetii?
Job19:3 Hinte tana tammu toho cayideta; tana kawushishe yeellateketa.
Job19:4 Tuma ta balidaba gidiko
Job19:5 Hinte hintena dhoqu dhoqu oothidi
Job19:6 ha metuwa ta bolla ehiday Xoosse gideysanne ba gitiyan tana gelsiday iya gideysa erite.
Job19:7 Ta qohetas gada waassin
Job19:8 Ta kanthada boonnada Xoossay ta ogiya diris; ta hemetiya ogiya dhuman gordis.
Job19:9 Ta bonchuwa taape qaaris; ta kallachaa ta huuphepe ekis.
Job19:10 I tana mentherethi yeggis; ta ufaysa xaphora shodetida mitha mela oothis.
Job19:11 Iya hanqoy ta bolla eexi keyis; I tana morkeda taybees.
Job19:12 Tana olanaw ba tooranchota kiittees; enti tana olanaw miixa keexidi
Job19:13 Xoossay ta ishata taape haassis; tana ereysati taw allaga gididosona.
Job19:14 Ta dabboti taape haakidosona; ta laggeti tana dogidosona.
Job19:15 Ta son moketiya imathati tana dogidosona; ta macca aylleti tana oge asada xeellidosona.
Job19:16 Ta aylliya ta xeegin taw koyenna; ta woossin taw ero geenna.
Job19:17 Ta machiya ta doona peenuwa shaatetasu; ta ishati tana uufidosona.
Job19:18 Hari attoshin guutha nayti tana kadhoosona; tana be7idi leqoosona.
Job19:19 Ta mata laggeti ubbay tana uufosoona; ta doseysati taw zoko zaaridosona.
Job19:20 Ta meqethay ta gogaara oyketis; taani hayqa kichada attas.
Job19:21 Ta laggeto
Job19:22 Xoossay tana yedetheysada
Job19:23 “Ha77i gakanaw ta odetida qaalay mazgabetidaako
Job19:24 Merinaw daana mela maarisaninne irsaasen zaalla bolla woocetidi xaafetida gideerenne!
Job19:25 Tana Wozidaysi de7on de7eysanne wursethan biitta bolla I eqanaysa ta erayis.
Job19:26 Ta gogay meetetidi wurikoka
Job19:27 Hara asi gidonna taani ta huuphen
Job19:28 “Ha metuwas gaasoy iya
Job19:29 Mashshas yayyite! Xoossa hanqoy mashshara yaana; pirdi de7eysa erite” yaagis.
Job20:1 Na7ima biitta asi gidida Soofari haysada yaagidi zaaris;
Job20:2 “Ne oday tana lancisida gisho
Job20:3 Ne oday ta bonchuwa qaariya gisho
Job20:4 Asi biitta bolla de7ida wodepe doomidi
Job20:5 Iita asa ceeqoy qantha wodesa; Xoossaa eronna asaa ufaysay guutha wodesa.
Job20:6 Iita asa otoroy salo gakanaw dhoqu giikoka
Job20:7 I baana mela pitetidi dhayana; Iya kase eriya asay ‘I awun de7ii?’ yaagana.
Job20:8 Elmoda paallidi dhayana; simmidi bentenna; qamma amuhoda coo dhayana.
Job20:9 Iya kase be7ida ayfeti zaaridi iya be7okona; I ba de7iya bessaafe tim7i gidi dhayana.
Job20:10 Aaway bonqi ekida miishe
Job20:11 Iya meqethaa kumida na7atetha wolqay iyara issife biittan zin7ana.
Job20:12 “Iitatethi iya doonan mal7iko
Job20:13 wuronnaada ba doonan oykidi
Job20:14 iya uluwan camo gidana; wodhiya shoosha marze gidana.
Job20:15 Iita asi mitida shaluwa zaari cuttana; iya uluwan de7iya ubbaa Xoossay cooshshana.
Job20:16 Iita asi miyabay iyaw marze gididi
Job20:17 Eessinne maathi haathada goggishin
Job20:18 Ba daabura ayfiya moonna haras immana; zal7idi wodhisida wodhiyan ufaytenna.
Job20:19 Hessi haniday I manqota un7ethida gishonne hara asi keexida keethaa bonqida gishosa.
Job20:20 “Iya iita amoy shempo diggis; shiishida shaloy iya ashshanaw danda7enna.
Job20:21 Iya shaloy wuriya gisho
Job20:22 Iyaw aqoy kumidi de7ishin
Job20:23 Iya uloy kaalliya wode
Job20:24 Birata mashshafe I baqatana; shin naase birata dongey iya caddana.
Job20:25 He dongey iya zokora kanthi keyana; phooliya xeeray iya tiriya kanthi aadhana; dagami iya wozanaa waabaqisana.
Job20:26 I shiishida aqoy sakana dhuman dhayana; asi oythiboonna tami iya maana; iya keethan attida shalo ubbaa xuuggana.
Job20:27 Saloti iya nagaraa qoncisana; sa7ika iyaw morke gidana.
Job20:28 Xoossaa hanqo gallasan
Job20:29 Xoossay geellatas wothida qaaday
Job21:1 Yaatin Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
Job21:2 Ane ta oda akeekidi si7ite; hessi hinte tana minthethida mela gido.
Job21:3 Taani issi toho odetana mela taw wode immite; taani haasaya simmiko tana qelqisite.
Job21:4 Taani mootetey asara gidenna. Yaatin
Job21:5 Ane tana xeellidi malaaletite; hinte kushiya hinte doona bolla wothite.
Job21:6 Ta hessa qopiya wode tana daganthees; ta asatethay kokorees.
Job21:7 Iita asati ayis paxa de7oona? Enta laythay ayis aduqii? Enta wolqay ayis dari dari bidee?
Job21:8 Enta naytinne nayta nayti
Job21:9 Enta soy hirgi bayna saro de7ees; Xoossaa xam7ay enta gakenna.
Job21:10 Enta miizati biraysi ekidi koxokona; yelishe awucayokona.
Job21:11 Banta nayta dorsaa wudeda kessoosona; enta nayti duroosona.
Job21:12 Karaabo baqishe diithi diixishe
Job21:13 Enti banta de7o laytha injen de7idi
Job21:14 Gidoshin
Job21:15 “Nu iya goyinnanaw Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay oonee? Nu iya woossidi ay go7etanee?” yaagosona.
Job21:16 Enti duretetha banta minotethan demmida goosona; shin taani enta qofaa ekike.
Job21:17 “Hanoshin
Job21:18 Carkoy enta kaleda efida wodey
Job21:19 Hinte
Job21:20 Nagaranchoti banta seera bantaw eko; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa hanqoy enta bolla wodho.
Job21:21 Asi hayqidaape guye
Job21:22 “Dhoqa bessan de7eyisata pirdiya Xoossaa
Job21:23 Issi issi asi kumetha wolqaynne saroy de7ishin
Job21:24 Enta asatethay orde shin
Job21:25 Shin harati lo77oba be7onna
Job21:26 Nam7ayka hayqidi biittan moogetosona; enti guxuntoosona.
Job21:27 “Hinte tana qohanaw qopidi
Job21:28 Hinte
Job21:29 Oge asata oychibeeketii? Enta markatethaa ammanibeketii?
Job21:30 Enti
Job21:31 Iita asi iya iitatethaa gisho kaccanay oonee? Iya oosuwa gisho iya seeranay oonee?
Job21:32 I hayqin
Job21:33 Zangaara biittay iyaw injetees; daro asay iya sinthan boosona; tayboy bayna asay iya kaalloosona.
Job21:34 Yaatin
Job22:1 Hessafe guye
Job22:2 “Asi Xoosse go77anaw danda7ii? Hari attoshin cinca gidikoka
Job22:3 Neeni xillo gidiko hessi Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa ufaysiyee? Ne ogey borey baynaba gidiko hessan I ay wodhe demmii?
Job22:4 “I nena seereynne pirdey
Job22:5 Ne iitatethay daro gidenneyee? Ne nagaraas zawi baawa gidennee?
Job22:6 Gaasoy bayna ne ishata waase xeegisadasa; asaa ma7uwa qaara ekada enta kallo yeddadasa.
Job22:7 Saamotidaysata haathe ushshabaaka; koshatidaysata kathi muzabaaka.
Job22:8 Neeni wolqaama
Job22:9 Am7eta mela kushe yeddadasa; yi7otas wolqa dhaysadasa.
Job22:10 Ne yuushoy gitetiday
Job22:11 Ne be7onna mela dhumiday
Job22:12 “Xoossay dhoqa saluwan uttidi
Job22:13 Shin neeni
Job22:14 Salo gufantho bolla I simeretiya wode
Job22:15 Nagaranchoti hemetida beni ogiyara baanaw qofaa qachadii?
Job22:16 Entaw wodey gakonna de7ishin hayqidosona; enta de7o baasoy di7on meecetidi dhayis.
Job22:17 Enti Xoossaako
Job22:18 Gidikoka
Job22:19 “Iita asati seeretiya wode
Job22:20 ‘Nu morketi dhayidosona; enta duretethay tamas attis’ yaagosona.
Job22:21 “Iyyoba
Job22:22 Iya timirtiya si7a; iya qaala ne wozanan wotha.
Job22:23 Neeni Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaako simmiko; new sa7i simmana; iita ooso ubbaa ne soope digga;
Job22:24 Ne worqaa sa7an hola; ne Ofira worqaa shaafan yegga.
Job22:25 Yaatiko Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay
Job22:26 He wode ne Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossan ufaytana; yeellatonna Xoossako pude xeellana.
Job22:27 Neeni iya woossana
Job22:28 Ne qopidabay poletana; ne hemetiya ogey poo7o gidana.
Job22:29 Xoossay otoreyisata kawushshees; shin ashketa ashshees.
Job22:30 Ne kushey geeshshi gidiko
Job23:1 Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
Job23:2 Hachika ta cametada zuuzumayis; ta ooley mino gidikoka iya kushey ta bolla deexeysa aggibeenna.
Job23:3 Iya demmana bessaa ta erida gidarkina; I de7iya bessaa ta gakarkina!
Job23:4 Taani ta metuwa iya sinthan wothanashin! Ta doona mooton kunthanashin!
Job23:5 I taw zaaranay aybeko eranashin
Job23:6 I ba gita wolqan taara eqetanesha? Akay
Job23:7 Yan suure asi iyara mootetanaw danda7ees; ta daynnay tana merinaw shatinthana.
Job23:8 Shin taani doloha biiko I yan deenna; taani wuloha biiko iya yan demmike.
Job23:9 I pudehan oothiya wode taani iya be7ike; dugeha bagga simmiya wode taani iya demmike.
Job23:10 Shin I ta tanguwa ubbaa erees; I tana paaciya wode taani worqada geeyada keyana.
Job23:11 Ta tohoy iya tanguwa kaallidi bees; iya ogiyape haddirsi ushachi simmabike.
Job23:12 Iya doonape keyiya kiitaape taani shaaketabike; iya qaala ta wozanan wothas.
Job23:13 Xoossay laametenna; Iyara eqetanay baawa
Job23:14 I ta bolla qopidaysa polis; hessa mela hara daro halchoti iyaw de7oosona.
Job23:15 Hessa gisho
Job23:16 Xoossay ta wozanay doccana mela oothis; Ubbaa danda7iya Xoossay tana daganthis.
Job23:17 Sakana dhumay ta som7uwa goozikoka
Job24:1 Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay pirda wode ayis qanxennee? Iya ereysati he wodiya ayis coo naagonna?
Job24:2 Iita asati zawan de7iya shuchaa denthoosona; kaysi ehida dorsata yan heemmoosona.
Job24:3 Yi7o nayta hareta bonqoosona; am7e booraa acos oykidi ekoosona.
Job24:4 Manqota shaatetidi ogepe gooddosona; banta sinthafe qosetana mela oothosona.
Job24:5 Bazzon de7iya wora hare mela
Job24:6 Enti hara asa gaden kathi cakoosona; iita asaa woyne gaden budhe maxoosona.
Job24:7 Enti qamma kallo aqoosona; meegos bolla yeggiyabay entaw baawa.
Job24:8 Zuma bolla bukiya iran enti suuruxoosona; geliya bessi dhayidi shucha hom7on aqoosona.
Job24:9 Aawi bayna na7a aaye ki7ope dafi ekoosona; manquwa na7a acos oykoosona.
Job24:10 Manqoti ma7o dhayidi kallo hemetoosona; enti bantaw koshatishe hara asa mirqe tookosona.
Job24:11 Enti bantaw saamotishe
Job24:12 Kataman kataman hayqana haniya asay oolosona; deshetidi madunxida asay maado koyidi waassoosona; shin Xoossay enta metuwa xeellenna.
Job24:13 Poo7o ixiya asati
Job24:14 Sa7i qammiya wode shempo wodheysi dendidi
Job24:15 Laymatiya asi sa7i lem7anaysa naagees; oonika be7onna mela ba som7uwa kammees.
Job24:16 Kaysoti qamma keethe bookidi kaysotanaw geloosona; shin gallas qosetidi pee7osona.
Job24:17 Daganthiya dhumara enti dabbotiya gisho
Job24:18 “Shin iita asati haatha goponto mela; enta laata biittay baadetidaysa; oonika enta woyne gade beenna.
Job24:19 Shachi maayin
Job24:20 Yelida aayeti enta dogana; Guxuney enta ashuwa maana; iita asay hassayetokona; mithada meqana.
Job24:21 Enti na7i bayna mayntha maccasa naaqidosona; am7eta qadhetonna ixidosona.
Job24:22 Xoossay ba wolqan minota dhaysis; entaw sa7i injetida daanikoka
Job24:23 Xoossay enti saro daanada oothikoka
Job24:24 Iita asati guutha wodes dhoqu dhoqu goosona; shin ellesidi sharaafada shullidi dhayoosona; kathada caketoosona.
Job24:25 Hessi hanenna gidi kaddiya asi de7ii? taani odida qaala wordo gaana asi de7ii?” yaagis.
Job25:1 Hessafe guye
Job25:2 “Xoossay haareysanne yashsheysa; I dhoqa saluwa sarotethan haarees.
Job25:3 Iya olanchota taybanaw danda7iya asi de7ii? Xoossa poo7oy gakonna bessi de7ii?
Job25:4 Yaatin
Job25:5 Xoossaa sinthan ageenika kumetha poo7o gidenna; iya sinthan xoolintotika geeshshi gidokona.
Job25:6 Yaatin
Job26:1 Iyyobi haysada yaagidi zaaris;
Job26:2 “Neeni wolqi baynaysa ayba maaddadii? Daaburanchuwa waata ashshadii?
Job26:3 Cincatethi pacidaysas ay zore immadii? Ay mela eratethi qoncisadii?
Job26:4 Neeni ha qaala odetana mela nena maaddiday oonee? Ne odan mela nena denthethiday oodde ayyaanee?” yaagis.
Job26:5 Beldadoosi zaaridi
Job26:6 Xoossa sinthan Si7ooley qonce; aybika iya genthanaw danda7enna.
Job26:7 Xoossay pudeha salota coo miccis; sa7aa kaqoy bayna bessan kaqis.
Job26:8 I shaaratan haathe kunthees; haatha deexuwan shaarati daaketokona.
Job26:9 I ba shaara miccidi
Job26:10 Poo7o dhumape shaakanaw
Job26:11 I hanqetiya wode
Job26:12 Ba wolqan abba si77i oothees; ba cincatethan Ra7aaba geetetiya do7aa dhaysees.
Job26:13 I ba shempuwan salota geeshshees; iya kushey xongetiya shooshaa caddees.
Job26:14 Haysati Xoossay oothiya oosotape guuthata; nu iya kalkashaa xalaala si7oos; iya wolqaa deshuwa akeekanaw danda7ey oonee?” yaagis.
Job27:1 Iyyobi kaallidi haysada yaagis;
Job27:2 “Suure pirdaa tana diggidi
Job27:3 Ta shempoy de7ishin
Job27:4 ta doonay wordo odetenna; ta inxarsay cimo odetenna.
Job27:5 Hinte oday like gada ta ekike; hayqana gakanaw ta tana suure geysa aggike.
Job27:6 Ta xillotethaa mintha oykanaape attishin
Job27:7 “Ta morketi nagaranchoda
Job27:8 Xoossay enta shempuwa entafe ekiya wode
Job27:9 Enta bolla metoy gakiya wode
Job27:10 Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossan enti ufaytanee? Enti ubba wode Xoossaa xeeganee?
Job27:11 “Taani hintena Xoossaa wolqaaba tamaarsana; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa qofaa ta hintefe qottike.
Job27:12 Hinte ubbay hessa be7ideta; yaatin
Job27:13 Xoossay iita asatas giigisida qaaday
Job27:14 Enta nayti ay darikoka olan wurana; enta kochay miyaba dhayidi koshatana.
Job27:15 Hessafe attidaysati gadon wurana; enta am7eti entaw yeekokona.
Job27:16 Iita asati bira biittada shiishikoka
Job27:17 enta bira xillo asati shaaki ekana; enta ma7uwa geeshshati ma7ana.
Job27:18 Enti keexiya keethati shango haada melanne gaabba mela laaletana.
Job27:19 Iita asati dure gididi hiixan zin7oosona; shin enti dhiskofe barkiya wode aykoyka baawa.
Job27:20 Dagami di7o haathada qoponna enta bolla yaana; qamma gotey enta denthidi efana.
Job27:21 Doloha carkoy enti de7iyasuwape pitidi efana.
Job27:22 Enti kessi ekanaw baqatishin
Job27:23 Ba kushiya baqidi enta bolla qelqisana ba suyqethan enta sugi yeddana.
Job28:1 “Bira bookidi kessiya bessinne worqaa seerisiya bessi de7ees.
Job28:2 Birati biittafe keyees; naase birati shuchu seerisin keyees.
Job28:3 Asay xompe ekidi dhumaa poo7isees; biitta gaathi gakanaw gelees; sakana dhuman he shuchaa koyees.
Job28:4 Asay de7iya bessaafe haakidi
Job28:5 Kathi biittafe mokees; shin iya giddoy taman seeridi
Job28:6 He zaallafe sanpare geetetiya al7o shuchay keyees; iya biittafe worqay bentees.
Job28:7 He shuchaa bookiya bessa xiloy erenna; phircoyka be7ibeenna.
Job28:8 Iita do7ati he bessaa yedhi erokona; gaammoy yaara aadhibeenna.
Job28:9 Asi mino zaalla mentherethees; deriya bookidi xaphuwape aathidi yeggees.
Job28:10 Zaalla lukidi kanthiya oge kessees; he al7o shuchaa demmees.
Job28:11 Haathi he bessaara goggonna mela zeeres; geemmidabata poo7o kessees.
Job28:12 “Shin cincatethi awupe bentanaw danda7ii? Akeeki de7iya awee?
Job28:13 Asi iya gatiya erenna; I de7on de7iya medhetethati de7iya biittan bentenna.
Job28:14 Abbaa ciimmoy
Job28:15 Cincatethi worqan shametenna woyko biran bentenna.
Job28:16 Cincatethi Ofira worqan
Job28:17 Worqinne mastootey iyara liketenna; worqafe oosetida al7o miishen laametenna.
Job28:18 Cincatetha gatey zaagolepe
Job28:19 Toophaze geetetiya Tophe inqoy iyara liketenna; walahi bayna worqan I shametenna.
Job28:20 “Yaatin
Job28:21 De7on de7iya medhetetha ubbaafe geemmidi de7ees; salo kafoti iya demmokona.
Job28:22 Gadoynne hayqoy
Job28:23 “Cincatethako efiya ogiyanne I de7iya bessaa erey Xoossaa xalaala.
Job28:24 Xoossay sa7aa gaxa ubbaa xeellees; salope garsan de7iyaba ubbaa be7ees.
Job28:25 Xoossay carkos wolqaa immida wode
Job28:26 iri bukana woga immida wode
Job28:27 Xoossay cincatetha be7is; be7idi bonchis; paacidi essis.
Job28:28 He wode Xoossay asako
Job29:1 Iyyobi kaallidi haysada yaagis;
Job29:2 Ha77i ta de7iya duussay
Job29:3 He wode iya xompey ta bolla poo7ees; iya poo7uwan dhumaa kanthada bayis.
Job29:4 He wodey Xoossay ta keethaa anjin
Job29:5 He wode Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay taape shaaketibeenna; ta nayti ta yuushon de7oosona.
Job29:6 He wode taani ta kushiya maathan meeccayis; shucha biittan toketida shamahoy
Job29:7 Taani katamaa pirda keethaa bida wode
Job29:8 He wode na7atethati tana be7idi oge yeddoosona; cimati tana bonchanaw dendi eqidosona.
Job29:9 Halaqati oda aggaagidosona; banta kushiya banta doona bolla wothidosona.
Job29:10 He kataman de7iya gita asati si77i gidoosona; enta inxarsay enta kottonuwa baqidi oykis.
Job29:11 Tabaa si7ida ubbay nashshees; tana be7ida ubbay bonchees.
Job29:12 Hessi haniday
Job29:13 Hayqana haniya asati tana anjidosona; am7eti ta maaduwan ufaytidosona.
Job29:14 Xillotethaa ma7oda ma7as; suure pirdaa afilada ma7as; barneexada wothas.
Job29:15 Taani qooqetas ayfe
Job29:16 Manqotas aawa gidas; oge asas xabaqa gidas.
Job29:17 Taani iitata gacuwa menthas; enti bonqidaysa enta doonape yegisas.
Job29:18 Taani ta wozanan
Job29:19 Taani xaphuwa haathan yeddida
Job29:20 Ta bonchetida mela de7as; ta wolqay ubba wode oorathishin!
Job29:21 Ta haasaya wode si77i gidi si7ees; ta zoriya ufaysan ekoosona.
Job29:22 Ta entana alliya gisho
Job29:23 Goshshanchoy ira naageysada
Job29:24 Enti hirgan de7ishin ta som7uwa pashkisayis; ta miichay enta minthethees.
Job29:25 Taani enti daana ogiya doorada entaw halaqa gidas. Ba olanchota giddon de7iya kawoda ta enta giddon de7as; enti azzaniya wode minthethas.
Job30:1 Shin ha77i taape na7attiya asati tana qelqisoosona. Enti ta dorsa wudiya heemmiya kanatara pee7onna mela taani diggida aawata nayta.
Job30:2 Enta aawati wolqi ixidaysatanne gilqata gidiya gisho tana aykoka maaddibokona.
Job30:3 Metoynne koshi un7ethin
Job30:4 Cumadhenne bonco maxidosona; mal7onna sankara xapho midosona.
Job30:5 Asi waassishe kayso gooddeysada
Job30:6 Enti zangaaran
Job30:7 Enti woran do7ada waassishe yuuyidosona; aguntha giddon shiiqidi issife de7idosona.
Job30:8 Enti biittafe goodetidosona; sunthi bayna eeyata gididi de7idosona.
Job30:9 Ha77i enta nayti tana yethan caddoosona; taani enta giddon hayses attas.
Job30:10 Enti tana shaatetidi taape haakoosona; yeellatonna ta som7on cuttoosona.
Job30:11 Xoossay ta wolqaa laafethidi tana kawushida gisho
Job30:12 Seeri bayna diccida nayti ta bolla dendidosona; ta tohuwas xihe wothidosona; enti tana dhaysanaw teqidosona.
Job30:13 Enti ta ogiya gordidi tana dhaysanaw koyoosona; enti hessa oothonna mela teqiya oonika baawa.
Job30:14 Olanchoti katama dirsaa menthidi geleysada
Job30:15 Taani gita dagama dagammas; ta bonchoy carkoy efiyada bis; ta saro duussay shaarada dhayis.
Job30:16 Ta shempiya daro un7etasu; metoy tana cuucummidi oykis.
Job30:17 Qamma qamma sahoy ta meqetha coommees; seelay taw shempo immenna.
Job30:18 Xoossay ba gita wolqan ta ma7uwa shiishidi oykis; qoodhe oykiya ma7oda tana cuullis.
Job30:19 Xoossay tana urqan holis; taani baananne bidinthe gidas.
Job30:20 Abeeti Xoossaw
Job30:21 Neeni taw wozana mino gidadasa; ne gita wolqan tana yedethaasa.
Job30:22 Neeni tana carkora denthada gooddadasa; goten tana harqadasa.
Job30:23 Asa ubbaas wursethi gidida
Job30:24 Meqida asi
Job30:25 waayen de7eysatas ta yeekabikina? manqotas ta qadhetabikina?
Job30:26 Lo77oba demmana gada amotas shin iitabay gakis; Taw sa7i keehana gada naagas shin gallasi taw dhumis.
Job30:27 Ta wozanay hirga aggibeenna; taani wopa demmabike; un7a qammi ta bolla gakis.
Job30:28 Ta asatethay awa suulon gidonashin azzanon kareexis; taani deriya shiiquwan eqada maade koyayis.
Job30:29 Taani worakanatas isha
Job30:30 Ta gogay kareexidi poqeti poqeti wodhees; ta asatethay mishan xuugetees.
Job30:31 Ta ufaysi qoncisiya diithinne suusul7ey
Job31:1 “Geela7o xeellada amottonna mela
Job31:2 Bollan de7iya Xoossaa matape asas imetida qaaday aybee? Salon de7iya Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay asas immiya gishoy aybee?
Job31:3 Iitata bolla boshi
Job31:4 Xoossay ta ogiya ubbaa be7eneyee? ta tanguwa ubbaa taybeneyee?
Job31:5 “Taani wordon de7idaba gidiko
Job31:6 Xoossay tana like mizaanen mazzano; yaatidi ta xillo gideysa be7o.
Job31:7 Ta hemethay ogepe keydaba gidiko
Job31:8 ta dolay shodetidi dhayo; ta zeridaysa hari mo.
Job31:9 “Ta wozanay hara maccas amotidaba gidiko
Job31:10 ta machiya hara asas gaacco; iira hara addey aqo.
Job31:11 Hessi yeellayiya nagaras koshshiya gita pirda.
Job31:12 Ha nagaray tamada xuuggiyaba gidiya gisho
Job31:13 “Ta adde woyko ta macca aylleti abeeti gin
Job31:14 Xoossa sinthan ta pirdas shiiqiya wode waananee? I tana oychiya wode taani woyga zaaranee?
Job31:15 Tana medhida Xoossay enta I medhibeneyee? Nuna ubbaa nu aaye ulon medhiday issi iya gidenneyee?
Job31:16 “Taani manqoti woossidaba diggidaba gidiko
Job31:17 yi7o nayti mela aqiya wode be7ashe
Job31:18 Taani enta ta na7atethafe doomada enta aawada dichas; ta yeletoosope doomada am7eta maaddas.
Job31:19 Ma7oy dhayin meegoy wodhiya uraa
Job31:20 ta dorsata ikisepe oosetida ma7o mayzin
Job31:21 Taani mooton enta shatimmanaysa erada
Job31:22 ta qesey kuriyape me77o; ta kushey hashiyape kareti wodho.
Job31:23 Xoossaa hanquwa yayyida gisho hessa oothanaw danda7ike.
Job31:24 “Taani worqan ammanetidaba gidiko
Job31:25 Ta duretetha darotethan
Job31:26 Awa phoolethi be7ada
Job31:27 ta wozanay geeman enta nashshibeenna
Job31:28 Hessi pirda ehiya nagara gidiya gisho Xoossaa kaddas guussu.
Job31:29 “Ta morketa kundethan ufaytabike; enta gakida metuwan hashshu gabike.
Job31:30 ‘Ta morkey dhayo’ yaaga baaddada
Job31:31 Ta soo asay
Job31:32 Ta soy ubba wode dooya gidiya gisho
Job31:33 Harati ootheysada
Job31:34 Asa pokos yayyada
Job31:35 “Tana si7iya asi de7eerenneshin
Job31:36 Be7iyako woytoda qoodhen aathada ma7anashin
Job31:37 Taani maati de7iya asada xoossaako shiiqada
Job31:38 “Ta goshsha biittay ta bolla waassidaba gidiko
Job31:39 he biittan kaxidaba miishe qanxonna ekidaba gidiko
Job31:40 taw he biittan giste gisho agunthi
Job32:1 Iyyobi
Job32:2 Iyyobi Xoossaafe aathidi bana xillo oothida gisho
Job32:3 Enti iya coo bala gidi pirdidi
Job32:4 Elihuy entafe kaalotiya gisho enti ubbay haasaya wursana gakanaw naagis.
Job32:5 Ha heedzu asati Iyyobas bessiya zaaro immanaw danda7iboonaysa be7idi I daro yilotis.
Job32:6 Buza biittafe yida Barkela na7ay Elihuy haysada yaagidi haasaya doomis. “Taani hintefe na7atayis; hinte taape bayrateta; Hessa gisho
Job32:7 Taani
Job32:8 Shin asa giddon aqidi cincatethi immey
Job32:9 Ase cinca oothey cimatethi gidenna
Job32:10 Hessa gisho
Job32:11 Hinte haasaya wode
Job32:12 Hinte geysa ubbaa wursada si7as; shin hintefe oonika Iyyoba bala gidi ammanthibena; hintefe oonika iya palamas bessiya zaaro immibeenna.
Job32:13 Iyyoba odaas kalsiya zaaro immanaw danda7ey
Job32:14 Iyyobi palamiday taara gidonashin hintera; taani hinte odada iyaw zaaro immike.
Job32:15 Enti dagammidi
Job32:16 Yaatin enti odetiyaba dhayidi si77i gidi eqiko
Job32:17 Gidenna
Job32:18 Ta odanabay daroy de7iya gisho
Job32:19 Ta gaathay goozetida manaaceda
Job32:20 Ta odada kessanaw bessees; ta doona dooyada zaaro immanaw koshshees.
Job32:21 Ha odan taani oonaka maaddike
Job32:22 Ase coo sabbiyabay taw eretenna; ta hessa oothiyako tana medhidaysi pirdanashin.
Job33:1 Iyyoba
Job33:2 Taani ta doona dooyas; ta qaalati ta inxarsaa xeeran de7oosona.
Job33:3 Ta qaalati ta wozana suuretetha qoncisosona; ta ereysa ta inxarsay tumatethan odees.
Job33:4 Tana medhiday Xoossaa Ayyaana; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa shempoy taw de7o immis.
Job33:5 Ne danda7iko taw zaaro imma; nena giigisada taara palama.
Job33:6 Taani Xoossaa sinthan ne mela; taanika urqafe medhetas.
Job33:7 Neeni taw yayiya gaasoy baawa; taani nena naaqike.
Job33:8 “Ne haasaya ubbaa taani si7ashe gam7as; ne doonape keyida qaalata hayzas.
Job33:9 Taani geeshshinne borey bayna asi; taani xillonne nagara oothaboonna asi.
Job33:10 Shin Xoossay tana seeranaw gaaso koyees; I tana ba morkeda taybees.
Job33:11 Ta tohuwa duxis; ta tango ubbaa I wochees” yaagadasa.
Job33:12 “Iyyoba
Job33:13 ‘Xoossay asa odaas zaaro immenna’ gada
Job33:14 Asi akeekennafe attishin
Job33:15 Asi qamma hiixan zin7idi
Job33:16 He wode asay si7anaada haythe dooyees; ba seeran enta daganthees.
Job33:17 Yaatidi asi nagara oothonna mela teqees; otoro asape diggees.
Job33:18 Xoossi ase dhayope ashshees; hayqopeka naagees.
Job33:19 Asi hargetidi hiixan de7ishin
Job33:20 Hessada hanidi hargida uray kathi ixees; daro mal7o kathi iya shaatees.
Job33:21 Iya ashoy gilqidi wurees; iya asatethay melin meqethi taybetees.
Job33:22 Iya shempoy duufoko
Job33:23 “Asas suure ogiya bessiya mukulun taybetiya kiitanchotape issoy iya maaddanaw danda7ees.
Job33:24 Iyaw qadhetidi
Job33:25 Hessa gisho
Job33:26 He wode I Xoossaa woossana; Xoossay iya woosa si7ana; Xoossay iyaw iya xillotethaa zaariya gisho
Job33:27 He wode asa sinthan I haysada yaagidi yexana; ‘Taani nagaraa oothas; suureba geellayas; shin Xoossay ta hanuwa taw qanxibeenna.
Job33:28 Ta duufon gelonna mela tana ashshis; ha77i paxa de7ada poo77o be7ayis’ yaagana.
Job33:29 “Heko
Job33:30 I de7o poo7o be7ana mela
Job33:31 “Iyyoba
Job33:32 Ne odanaw koyaabay de7iko oda; taani ne xillo gideysa be7anaw koyayis.
Job33:33 Atto giiko si77i gada
Job34:1 Qassika Elihuy haysada yaagis;
Job34:2 “Hinteno
Job34:3 Inxarsi mal7o kathi shaaki ereysada
Job34:4 Ane nuuni suureba shaakidi
Job34:5 “Iyyobi
Job34:6 Taani tuma shin wordancho gidas; tanan bali baawa shin
Job34:7 Iyyobada Xoossa bolla
Job34:8 I iita ootheysatara laggetees; nagaranchotara hemetees.
Job34:9 I
Job34:10 “Hessa gisho
Job34:11 Xoossay asas iya oosuwada immees; iya ogiyada iyaw qanxees.
Job34:12 Xoossay tuma iita oothenna; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay suure pirdaa geellayenna.
Job34:13 Sa7a bolla iyaw maata immiday oonee? biitta ubbaa bolla iya shuumiday oonee?
Job34:14 Xoossay ba Ayyaananne ba de7o shempuwa zaaridi baako ekiyako
Job34:15 asho ma7ida ubbay issife dhayana; asi biitta simmanashin.
Job34:16 “New akeeki de7iko haysa si7a; ta haasaya hayza.
Job34:17 Suure pirdaa ixey haaranaw danda7ii? Neeni xillonne wolqaama Xoossaa pirday?
Job34:18 Xoossay kawotako
Job34:19 Enti ubbay iya kushe oosota gidiya gisho
Job34:20 Enti gidi bilahe akeekona hayqana; ubbay kokorishe dhayana; wolqaamati asa kushey bochonna kichana.
Job34:21 “Xoossay asa hemethaa xeellees; iya tango ubbaa wochees.
Job34:22 Iita ootheyisata
Job34:23 Asay iya sinthe pirdas shiiqana mela
Job34:24 Oyshi bayna wolqaamata mentherethees; enta bessan harata shuumees.
Job34:25 I enta oosuwa eriya gisho
Job34:26 Enta iitatethaa gisho
Job34:27 Hessa I oothey
Job34:28 Enti manqota un7ethidi Xoossako waassana mela oothidosona; Xoossay manqota waasuwa si7is.
Job34:29 Xoossay si77i giiko iya oone mootanay? I ba som7uwa qosiko iya be7anay oonee? I asaapenne kawotethaafe bolla.
Job34:30 Hessi haniday geellay deriya haaronna melanne enta sinthan xihe wothonna melasa.
Job34:31 “Asi Xoossako yaagiyako Lo77o; kase ta nagara oothidaba gidiko zaarada oothike.
Job34:32 Ta be7onnaysa tana tamaarsa; nagara oothidaba gidiko zaarada oothike.
Job34:33 Yaatin neeni paaxike gashe
Job34:34 Akeeka asay haysada yaagosona; cincati yaagosona;
Job34:35 ‘Iyyobi eri bayna odetees; Iya odan ayfey baawa.’
Job34:36 Iyyobi iita asada zaaro immida gisho
Job34:37 I ba nagaraa bolla geellatethi gujis; nu sinthan Xoossaa bolla qelqisis; Xoossa bolla daro odetis” yaagis.
Job35:1 Elihuy qassi haysada yaagis;
Job35:2 “Iyyoba
Job35:3 ‘Taani nagaraa oothonna aggada ay go7etiyana? ay wodhe demmanee?’ yaagada ne Xoossaa oychanaw danda7aasa.
Job35:4 Taani newunne ne laggetas zaaro immana.
Job35:5 Dhoqu gada salota xeella; neepe bollara de7iya shaara akeekada be7a.
Job35:6 Ne nagara oothiko Xoossaa aybin qohanee? Ne balay dariko hessi iyaw ay oothii?
Job35:7 Ne xillo gidiko iyaw ay immanee? Woyko ne kushepe I ay ekanee?
Job35:8 Ne nagaraa oothiko ne mela ase qohaasa; qassi xillikoka ase go77aasa.
Job35:9 “Un77i dariya wode asay waassees; wolqaamata kushepe kessi ekiya asi koyidi wobbatoosona.
Job35:10 Shin oonika
Job35:11 Do7atape aathidi tamaarseysi
Job35:12 Enti waassoosona; shin Xoossay enta otoruwa gaason
Job35:13 Coo waasuwa Xoossi tuma si7enna; Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossay hessa hayzenna.
Job35:14 Neeni ta Xoossaa be7anaw danda7ike yaagikoka
Job35:15 Xoossay ase pirdonnabaanne nagara aggidi aadhana gada qopay?
Job35:16 Hessa gisho
Job36:1 Elihuy gujidi haysada yaagis;
Job36:2 “Xoossaa doona gidada ta new odiyabay de7iya gisho
Job36:3 Taani ta eraa haaho soope ehana; tana Medhidaysi xillo gideysa qoncisana.
Job36:4 Taani wordo haasayike; kumetha eri de7iya asi neera de7eysa ammana.
Job36:5 “Xoossay tuma wolqaama; shin I oonaka kadhenna. I ba akeekan mino.
Job36:6 I iitati de7on daana mela oothenna; shin un7etidaysatas suure pirdees.
Job36:7 Xoossay ba ayfiya xillota bollafe denthenna; enta kawotara utisidi
Job36:8 Shin asay santhalaatan qashetiko
Job36:9 I enta oosuwanne otoron oothida nagaraa enta bolla qoncisees.
Job36:10 Seera si7anaada enta haytha dooyees; nagarape simmana mela enta kiittees.
Job36:11 Enti si7idi iyaw kiitetiko
Job36:12 Shin enti si7onna ixiko mashshan wurana; enti era dhayida gisho hayqana.
Job36:13 “Xoossaa ammanonna asati banta wozanan yilotida mela de7oosona; I enta pirdiya wode maade koyidi woossokona.
Job36:14 Enti oothiya tuna oosuwan dhayana; banta na7atethan hayqana.
Job36:15 Shin waayeteyisata enta waayiyape ashshees; enta metuwa baggara entaw odees.
Job36:16 “Xoossay nena meto wodorope
Job36:17 Shin ha77i iitata bolla gakiya pirday ne bolla gakin; xillo pirdan oyketadasa.
Job36:18 Oonika nena duretethi bessidi cimmonna mela
Job36:19 Ne duretethay woyko ne dafetethay nena metope ashshanee?
Job36:20 Asay banta bessaafe dhayiya qammay
Job36:21 Ha meto ubbay nena gakiday hessa gaasona; hessa gisho
Job36:22 “Xoossay ba wolqan dhoqu dhoqu gis; iya mela astamaarey oonee?
Job36:23 Xoossaa
Job36:24 Asay mazmuren sabbida iya oosuwa
Job36:25 Asa koche ubbay Xoossaa oosuwa be7is; asay haahon eqidi xeellidosona.
Job36:26 Xoossay gita! Iya gitatetha nu akeekanaw danda7oko; iya laytha darotethaas zawi baawa.
Job36:27 “Xoossay haathe abbafe pude salo efees; duge zaaridi ira oothidi bukisees.
Job36:28 He iray shaarape keyidi
Job36:29 Xoossi shaara waatidi micciyako
Job36:30 I ba yuushon wol7antha poo7uwa laallees; abba ciimmuwa waatidi kammiyako be7a.
Job36:31 Yaatidi Xoossay deriya aysees; kathaa darsidi immees.
Job36:32 I wol7anthi ba kushen oykees; ba mallida bessaa caddana mela kiittees.
Job36:33 Dadi dhuuqidi uushoy yaanaysa bessees; meheyka uushoy yaanaysa erees.
Job37:1 “Iya uushuwan ta wozanay dirgees; ba bessan qaaxees.
Job37:2 Iya doonape keyiya qaala si7ite; dadada guummiya iya girsaa hayzite.
Job37:3 I salo garsan ba wol7antha laallees; biitta gaxape gaxa gakanaw kiittees.
Job37:4 Hessafe guye
Job37:5 Xoossaa malaalsiya ogen ba guuntha sissees; nuuni akeekanaw danda7onna gitaba I oothees.
Job37:6 I shachako
Job37:7 I medhida asa ubbay iya oosuwa erana mela
Job37:8 He wode do7ati banta bessaa geloosona; banta gongoluwan qosetoosona.
Job37:9 Wolqaama gotey dugehape dendees; irxa carkoy pudehape yees.
Job37:10 Xoossaa de7o shempoy shachi medhees; dalga haathata shuchada minthees.
Job37:11 Shaari haathe tookana mela oothees; ba wol7antha shaara giddon laallees.
Job37:12 Shaarati iya kiitan biitta gaxaa yuuyosona; I kiittiya kiita ubbaa poloosona.
Job37:13 Xoossay ira bukisey biitta irxisanaasa
Job37:14 “Iyyoba
Job37:15 Xoossay shaarata waatidi kiittiyako
Job37:16 Shaarati salon waanidi uttiyako
Job37:17 Dugeha carkoy carkidi biitta mishisiya wode
Job37:18 Xoossay saluwa til7ida mastooteda micciya wode
Job37:19 Nuuni era paca gidiya gisho
Job37:20 Xoossara odetana gada taani oychanaw koshshii? tana dhaysana mela ta ayis iya denthethanee?
Job37:21 Carkoy salope shaara geeshshiya wode
Job37:22 Pudeha baggara worqaa daaniya poo7oy bentees; Xoossay yashshiya teeman qoncees.
Job37:23 Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaako shiiqanaw danda7oko; iya wolqay gita. I ba tuma pirdaaninne ba gita xillotethan ase qohenna.
Job37:24 Hessa gisho
Job38:1 Hessafe guye
Job38:2 Eri bayna odan ta zoriya dhumisey I hessi oonee?
Job38:3 Ane addeda danceta; ta nena oychana
Job38:4 Taani alamiya medhiya wode neeni awun de7ay? Ane ne akeekiyako taw oda.
Job38:5 Ne eriko
Job38:6 Ha sa7aa tuussata kundonna mela minthidi oykiday aybee? Ha sa7aa baasuwas koyro shuchaa wothiday oonee?
Job38:7 Wonta bakalati issife yexiya wode
Job38:8 Abba haathi biittafe dhuuqidi keyiya wode
Job38:9 Abbaa shaara mayzas; sakana dhuman gooziday tana.
Job38:10 Abbay kanthonna mela zawa medhiday
Job38:11 “Haysa gakanaw ya; shin haysafe aadhofa; ne wolqaama hobbey hessan eqo” yaagiday tana.
Job38:12 Iyyoba
Job38:13 Wonta poo7oy biitta ubban poo7ana mela
Job38:14 Wonta poo7oy zumatanne zangaarata
Job38:15 Iitata poo7oy eketana; enta makalla qesey meqana.
Job38:16 Ciimmo abba giddo gelada pultuwa be7adii? Woyko iya baasuwa gakada iya olla simeretadii?
Job38:17 New hayqo pengeti bentidona? Woyko sakana dhumaa pengeta be7adii?
Job38:18 Sa7ay ay mela giteeko ne eray? Hessa ubbaa ne eriya gidiko taw oda.
Job38:19 Poo7oko efiya ogey awunee? dhumi awun de7iyako eray?
Job38:20 Poo7onne dhuma enta bessaa bessaa efanaw danda7ay? Enti de7iya bessaa efiya ogiya eray?
Job38:21 Neeni sa7i medhetiya wode yeletida gishonne daro laythi de7ida gisho hessa eronna aggaka!
Job38:22 Shachi minjetiya keethaa geladii? woyko shachi dooretida bessaa be7adii?
Job38:23 Taani enta meto wodes
Job38:24 Wol7anthi keya bessaa efiya ogey awun de7ii? Woyko doloha carkoy awupe keyidi carkii?
Job38:25 Iri wodhiya bessaa giigisiday
Job38:26 Asi doonna mela biittan ira bukisey oonee?
Job38:27 Melida mela biittay iran laakidi
Job38:28 Iras aawi de7ii? Woyko aka yeliday oonee?
Job38:29 Shachas aayiya de7ay?
Job38:30 Haathay shuchada minthees; abba baasoy shachada uuketees.
Job38:31 Pilaadisa geetetiya xoolintota issife gathada qachanaw danda7ay? Ooriyoona geetetiya xoolintoti qashetida wodoruwa billanaw danda7ay?
Job38:32 Cugan cugan de7iya xoolintota enta woden woden kessanaw danda7ay? Biire geetetiya xoolintota enta naytara kaalethanaw danda7ay?
Job38:33 Saloti ay higgen aqiyako ne eray? He higgey sa7aa haarana mela oothanaw danda7ay?
Job38:34 Di7oy nena muukana mela ira bukisanaw
Job38:35 Wol7anthi kiittanaw danda7ay? Enti neeko yidi
Job38:36 Wozanas cincatethi
Job38:37 Ba cincatethan shaarata taybanaw danda7ey oonee? Baana munuqidi
Job38:38 
Job38:39 Shankatada macca gaammos miyaba eha eray? koshatida gaammo marata muza eray?
Job38:40 Enti gongolon qoseti naagoosona; bazzon zin7idi pee7osona.
Job38:41 Quuroti koshatidi daaburiya wode
Job39:1 “Woshi7ey awude yeliyako neeni eray? Baachoti bannakidi banta marata yeliya wode be7adii?
Job39:2 Enti ay mela ageena gam7iyako
Job39:3 Enti gulbati eqetidi
Job39:4 Enta marati bazzon diccidi minnoosona; banta aayeta aggidi boosona; nam7antho guye simmokona.
Job39:5 “Wora hareti yeda daanada oothiday oonee? Qashope enta birshidi yeddiday oonee?
Job39:6 Entaw bazzuwa de7iya bessi oothada immas; maxine biittan enti daanada oothas.
Job39:7 Katama waasuwape haakidi de7oosona; laaggeysta qodethi si7okona.
Job39:8 Enti dereta bolla bantana heemmoosona; yan miya purco maata qoroosona.
Job39:9 “Menthi new oothanaw ero gandee? Woyko ne zadalon qamma aqandee?
Job39:10 Goyana mela ne iya waaxanee? Woyko waaxada goyanaw danda7ay?
Job39:11 Neeni iya wolqaa minotethan ammanetanee? deexo ooso I oothana mela iyaw yegga agganee?
Job39:12 Neeni kathaa shaalen qolana mela
Job39:13 “Yanchoy ba qefiya ellesada qaathawusu; shin haatha kafoda piradhanaw danda7uku.
Job39:14 Yanchoy ba phuuphulliya biittan phuuphulawusu; shafen ho7ana mela aggaagawusu.
Job39:15 ‘Tohoy menthana
Job39:16 Nayti babaa gidonnaada oothada entaw daro iitawusu. I daabura ubbay mela atteysi iw aykoka daanenna.
Job39:17 Hessada oothada iyo cincatethi diggidaynne akeeka dhaysiday tana.
Job39:18 Shin dendada iya woxiya wode
Job39:19 “Iyyoba
Job39:20 Parati booleda gupanaadanne garmamidi daganthanaada oothiday nenee?
Job39:21 Parati banta wolqan ammanetidi dhiskoosona; oletanaw ola demba gaallaboosona.
Job39:22 Yashshi erokona; enta aybika daganthenna; enta bolla mashsha shoddikoka guye simmokona.
Job39:23 Enta toggiya olanchoti oykida ola miisheti
Job39:24 Shin parati biitta kaashishenne yashisishe gaallaboosona; Moyze girsi si7iya wode si77i gidi eqanaw danda7okona.
Job39:25 Moyzey punetiya wode ufaysan garmamoosona; ola peeno haahon ekoosona; toora mocona kiitaanne olanchota ceequwa si7oosona.
Job39:26 “Xiloy ba qefiya dugeha bagga miccidi
Job39:27 Arganthi pude keyidi
Job39:28 Arganthi aafo doonan ba keethaa keexidi de7ees; zaalla qophoti iyaw qol7a gididosona.
Job39:29 Yan uttidi baw miyaba wochees; iya ayfey haahon geeshshidi demmees.
Job39:30 Argantha nayti suuthi uyoosona; gawuxi de7iya bessan shiiqoosona” yaagis.
Job40:1 Goday Iyyobako zaaridi yaagis;
Job40:2 “Iyyoba
Job40:3 Hessafe guye
Job40:4 “Godaw
Job40:5 Taani issi toho odas; shin taw zaariyabay baawa; nam7antho odas haraa gujike” yaagis.
Job40:6 Hessafe guye
Job40:7 Addeda ne xeessaa dancada dendada
Job40:8 Ne tana bala asi kessana hanayee? New xillo gidanaw tana wordancho kessayee?
Job40:9 Xoossa wolqaa mela wolqi new de7ii? Xoossay guummeysada ne guummanaw danda7ay?
Job40:10 Hessa gidiko
Job40:11 Ne hanquwa gussa; ane otoranchota xeellada kawusha.
Job40:12 Ane loytha xeellada otortiya ubbaa yeellaya; iitata ubbaa enti de7iya bessaafe dhaysa.
Job40:13 Enta ubbaa biittan mooga; duufon yeggada enta bolla gorda.
Job40:14 He wode ne wolqay nena ashshanaw danda7eysa ta markatana.
Job40:15 Taani nena medhidaada medhida Bihemoota geetetiya do7a be7a; I boorada maata mees.
Job40:16 Iya xeessan de7iya wolqaynne iya uluwa kammida shayaa minotethay daro.
Job40:17 Iya goynay zigada bollan qaaxees; iya gedaa xaphoti minon dooqetidosona.
Job40:18 Iya meqethay naase birata mela; iya geday birata kure mela.
Job40:19 Xoossay medhida medheta ubbaa garsan I aadhees; taape attishin
Job40:20 Do7i gupiya derey
Job40:21 Mitha kuya garsan zin7ees; caren maqa giddon qosetees.
Job40:22 Mithati banta kuyan iya genthoosona; shaafa gaxan dicciya mithati iya kammoosona.
Job40:23 Shaafay kixidi goggey wode dagammenna; Yordaanose shaafay qoodhe gakanaw kumikoka I hirgenna.
Job40:24 Iya ayfiya toysidi
Job41:1 “Neeni Leewataane geetetiya abba do7aa manxaqon oykanaw
Job41:2 Iya siidhiya lukada dafo aathanaw danda7ay? Woyko iya gacuwa wospen lukanaw danda7ay?
Job41:3 I nena
Job41:4 Ne iya merinaw aylle oothada haarana mela
Job41:5 Asi kafo loohiseysada ne iya loohisanaw danda7ay? Woyko iya qachada ne macca naytara kaa7ana mela oothanee?
Job41:6 Molo zal7anchoti iya gatiya bolla palamona? Woyko iya qanxerethidi bayzoona?
Job41:7 Neeni iya galbaa tooran
Job41:8 Ane iya ne kushen bocha; ne iyara butetida butiya dogaka; nam7antho iyara butetanaw qopaka.
Job41:9 He do7aa oykanaw paacey mela waaye; hari attoshin iya be7ida ubbay yashshan kokorees.
Job41:10 I zin7ida bessaafe iya denthanaw oonika xaalenna; yaatin
Job41:11 Taani iyaw zaarana mela koyro taw tal7iday oonee? Salope garsan de7iyaba ubbay tabaa.
Job41:12 “Taani Leewataane tohotaba
Job41:13 Iya galbaa qaaranaw danda7ey oonee? Iya gacuwa pooqidi bixaala barsanay oonee?
Job41:14 Yashshiya achay de7iya iya gacuwa pooqanaw danda7ey oonee?
Job41:15 Iya zoko galbay issoy issuwa bolla dooretidi; shuchada minnida gondalle daanees.
Job41:16 Enti issoy issuwas daro matatida gisho
Job41:17 Issoy issuwara gahetidi de7iya gisho
Job41:18 I hadhishiya wode poo7oy pol7u gees; iya ayfeti wonta xalqeda caddees.
Job41:19 Iya doonape tama lacoy keyees; pinxiya tami bentees.
Job41:20 Iya siidhiyape cuyay
Job41:21 Iya siidhera keya shempoy kenchikelo bonqisees; tama lacoy iya doonape keyees.
Job41:22 Iya morgiyan wolqay de7iya gisho
Job41:23 Iya ashoy issife oyketidi de7iya gisho
Job41:24 Iya wozanay shuchada mino; gaacha woxa mela mino.
Job41:25 I dendiya wode minoti yayyoosona; dagammidi baqatoosona.
Job41:26 Iya gakiya mashshay aykoka oothenna; toori woyko dongey woyko mashshi iya qohenna.
Job41:27 I birata xinqa maatada
Job41:28 Dongey iya betisenna; yambarsha shuchi iyaw suulla mela.
Job41:29 Gumba xam7i iyaw xinqo mela; toora xongiya wode qelqisidi miicees.
Job41:30 Iya uluwa bolla de7iya galbay meqida kun7a mela qara; urqara I biya wode marasha mela biitta phalqees.
Job41:31 Abbaa pentida haatha mela tumbul tumbul oothees; xaaron pentiya zayte mela shiri shiri yeggees.
Job41:32 Iya biya ogey poo7ees; abba haatha goponto laammees.
Job41:33 I yashshi eronna gisho
Job41:34 I daro gita medhetethata ubbaa kadhees; do7a ubbaas I kawo” yaagis.
Job42:1 Hessafe guye
Job42:2 “Ne ubbaba oothanaw danda7eysanne ne qofaa teqanaw danda7ey baynaysa taani eras.
Job42:3 Ne
Job42:4 “Neeni taako
Job42:5 Taani kase nebaa haythan si7as; shin ha77i ta nena ayfen be7as.
Job42:6 Hessa gisho
Job42:7 Goday hessa Iyyobas odidaape guye
Job42:8 Hessa gisho
Job42:9 Hessafe guye
Job42:10 Iyyobi ba laggetas woossidaape guye
Job42:11 Hessafe guye
Job42:12 Goday Iyyoba wursetha laytha koyro laythaafe aathidi anjis. Iyyobas tammanne oyddu mukulu dorsati
Job42:13 Qassi iyaw laapun adde naytinne heedzu macca nayti yeletidosona.
Job42:14 Bayra macca na7iw Yimimo
Job42:15 Iyyoba macca naytada mala lo77o macca na7i awu biittan bentibeenna. Enta aawa entaw enta ishatara laata biitta immis.
Job42:16 Hessafe simmin
Job42:17 Iyyobi daro wode de7idi
Psalms1:1 Iitata zoriyan boonnay
Psalms1:2 Shin I Godaa higgiyan ufaytees; iya higgiya gallasinne qamma qopees.
Psalms1:3 I goggiya haatha xaphon toketidi
Psalms1:4 Shin iitati hessa mela gidokona; carkoy pitidi efiya suulla mela.
Psalms1:5 Iitati xillo pirda bessan eqokona; nagaranchoti xillota duulatan bentokona.
Psalms1:6 Goday xillota ogiya erees; shin iitata ogey dhayana.
Psalms2:1 Kawotethati ayis dendoona? asay ayis coo maqetoona?
Psalms2:2 Kawoti Godaa bollanne I tiyidaysa bolla dendidosona; deriya haareysati enta bolla shiiqidosona.
Psalms2:3 “Enta santhalaata duuthoos; enta qasho wodoruwa holoos” yaagidosona.
Psalms2:4 Salon uttidaysi enta bolla miicees; Goday enta qelqisees.
Psalms2:5 I ba hanquwan enta daganthees; ba yiluwan enta yashisees.
Psalms2:6 “Ta geeshsha zuma Xiyoone bolla ta kawa kawothas” yaagees goday.
Psalms2:7 Taani Godaa higgiya awaajana; Goday tana
Psalms2:8 Ne tana oycha; ta new kawotethata immana; sa7a ubbay nebaa gidana.
Psalms2:9 Neeni birata xam7an enta menthana; meqa miisheda enta tincherethana” yaagis.
Psalms2:10 Hiza
Psalms2:11 Godaa yashshan goyinnite; kokoridi kiitetite.
Psalms2:12 Goday hanqetin ogen hinte dhayonnaada iya tumatethan goyinnite. Iya hanqoy eeson eexi keyana; iyan qosetidi attida ubbay anjetidaysata.
Psalms3:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms3:2 Daroti
Psalms3:3 Shin abeeti Godaw
Psalms3:4 Ta qaala dhoqu oothada Godaako waassayis. I ba geeshsha zumaape taw zaarees.
Psalms3:5 Goday tana naagiya gisho
Psalms3:6 Ubba bessara ta bolla dendida
Psalms3:7 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms3:8 Xoonoy Godaasa; Godaw
Psalms4:1 Abeeti tana xillisiya Xoossaw
Psalms4:2 Hinteno asaw
Psalms4:3 Goday ammanetiya asata baw dummayidi wothidaysa erite; taani Godaa xeegiya wode I tana si7ees.
Psalms4:4 Hanqetite
Psalms4:5 Godaas like yarsho yarshite; iyan ammanetite.
Psalms4:6 “Nuna lo77oba bessanay oonee?” yaagidi daroti oychoosona; Abeeti Godaw
Psalms4:7 Daro gistefenne woyne ushshafe ne ta wozanan wothida gita ufaysay aadhees.
Psalms4:8 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms5:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms5:2 Ta kawaw
Psalms5:3 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms5:4 Neeni iitatethan ufaytonna Xoosse; iitabay neera deenna.
Psalms5:5 Otoranchoti ne sinthan eqokona; iitabaa oothiya ubbaa ne ixaasa.
Psalms5:6 Wordo odeteyisata ne dhaysaasa; Goday suuthu gusseysatanne cimmeyisata ixees.
Psalms5:7 Shin ta ne gita maarotethan ne keethaa gelana; ne geeshsha bessaako simmada nena bonchon goyinnana.
Psalms5:8 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms5:9 Enta mettershan tumi baawa; enta wozanan dhaysoy kumis. Enta doonay dooyetida duufo mela; enti banta inxarsan cimmoosona.
Psalms5:10 Enti ne bolla makallida gisho
Psalms5:11 Shin neeko baqatidi attida ubbay ufayto; enti merinaw ufaysan yexo. Ne sunthaa dosiya ubbay nenan ufaytana mela; neeni enta merinaw naaga.
Psalms5:12 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms6:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms6:2 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms6:3 Ta shempiya daro un7etasu; tana maaddanaw awude gakanaw gam7ay?
Psalms6:4 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms6:5 Hayqida asaa giddofe nena hassayey baawa; duufon gididi nena galatey oonee?
Psalms6:6 Taani oolen daaburas; qamma kumethi yeekashe ta hiixa irxisas; ta arsa afuthan wooqisas.
Psalms6:7 Ta morketa gaason ta ayfey mulcatis; taani afuxida gisho demmonna ixis.
Psalms6:8 Goday ta yeehuwa si7ida gisho
Psalms6:9 Goday ta waasuwa si7is; ta woosa ekis.
Psalms6:10 Ta morketi ubbay yeellatidosona; dagammidosona; qoponna guye simmidi kawuyidosona.
Psalms7:1 Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw
Psalms7:2 Neeni tana ashshonaba gidiyako
Psalms7:3 Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw
Psalms7:4 ta laggetas lo77o gisho iitaa zaaridaba gidiko
Psalms7:5 ta morkey tana yedethidi oyko; tana sa7an yeggidi yedho; tana baanan gondorsidi kawusho.
Psalms7:6 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms7:7 Asay ne yuushon shiiqo; neeni entafe bollara haara.
Psalms7:8 Goday kawotethata bolla pirdees; abeeti Godaw
Psalms7:9 Qofanne wozanaa shaakada eriya xillo Xoossaw
Psalms7:10 Wozana suureta ashshiya
Psalms7:11 Xoossay xillo pirdeysa; I ubba wode iitata bolla hanqetiya Xoossaa.
Psalms7:12 Iitati banta iitatethaafe simmonna ixiko
Psalms7:13 I ba wodhiya ola miisheta giigisees; laxiya ba donge toora pitees.
Psalms7:14 Iitati qoho qanthatidi
Psalms7:15 Hara asas olla bookida asi ba bookida ollan baw kundees.
Psalms7:16 Iya geney iya huuphen simmees. Iya geellatethay iya mees.
Psalms7:17 Iya xillotethaa gisho taani Godaa sabbana; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Godaa sunthaas taani galata mazmure yexana.
Psalms8:1 Abeeti Godaw nu Xoossaw
Psalms8:2 Neeni ne morketa gisho ne morkiyanne nena mandeysa si77i oothanaw
Psalms8:3 Neeni ne biradhen medhida ne salota
Psalms8:4 neeni asaba qopanaw asi aybee? Woyko neeni iya xomoosanaw I aybee?
Psalms8:5 Iya ne neepe guuthara guuthadasa; bonchonne gitatetha kallacha iya huuphen wothadasa.
Psalms8:6 Ne medhida medhetetha ubbaa
Psalms8:7 Dorsatanne meheta
Psalms8:8 salo kafota
Psalms8:9 Abeeti Godaw nu Xoossaw
Psalms9:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms9:2 Taani nenan ufaytana hashshu gaana. Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaw
Psalms9:3 Ta morketi guye simmiya wode
Psalms9:4 Ne araatan uttada taw xillo pirdaasa; ta mootuwa ne xillotethan oykadasa.
Psalms9:5 Neeni kawotethata seeradasa; iitata dhaysadasa. Neeni enta sunthaa merinaw quchadasa.
Psalms9:6 Morketi merinaw dhayidosona; enta katamata kumethi laalladasa; enti kumethi dogetidosona.
Psalms9:7 Shin Goday merinaw kawotidi de7ees; I ba araata pirdas giigisis.
Psalms9:8 Ha sa7aa xillotethan pirdana; dereta suuretethan aysana.
Psalms9:9 Goday un7etidaysatas attiya bessi; meto wode gelidi attiya qota.
Psalms9:10 Nena ereysati nenan ammanetosona; Godaw
Psalms9:11 Xiyoonen kawotida Godaa galatite; I oothida oosuwa asa ubbaas odite.
Psalms9:12 Halo keyiya Xoossay gukida xillo suuthaa dogenna; boretidaysata waasuwa qelli geenna.
Psalms9:13 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms9:14 Xiyoone asaa giddon taani eqada
Psalms9:15 Kawotethati banta bookida ollan bantaw kundidosona; enti wothida xihey enta tohuwa oykis.
Psalms9:16 Goday ba xillo pirdan eretis; iita asay banta iita oosuwan oyketidosona.
Psalms9:17 Iitati duufo baana; Xoossaa dogiya kawotethati ubbay entada hanana.
Psalms9:18 Manqoy ubba wode dogetidi attenna; metootanchuwa ufaysay merinaw dhayenna.
Psalms9:19 Abeeti Godaw denda; asi xoonopo! Kawotethati ne sinthan pirdeto.
Psalms9:20 Abeeti Godaw enta neeni yashisa; kawotethati ase gideysa ero.
Psalms10:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms10:2 Ba otoruwan iita asi manquwa yedethees; enti banta maquwan bantaw oyketidosona.
Psalms10:3 Iita asi ba iita amuwan ceeqetees; ba uuziyan Godaa cayeesinne kadhees.
Psalms10:4 Iitati banta otoruwan Xoossaa koyokona; banta qofan Xoossas besse immokona.
Psalms10:5 Iyaw ubba wode injetees; ne higgey iyaw gelenna; ba morketa I qelqisees.
Psalms10:6 Ba wozanan
Psalms10:7 Iya doonan baadethi
Psalms10:8 Gutatan zugidi uttees; suure asata wodhanaw qosetidi naagees; wolqi bayna daaburanchota wochees.
Psalms10:9 Ba qosetida bessan geemmidi
Psalms10:10 Wolqi bayna manquwa shocidi yeggees; iya tohuwa garsan I kundees.
Psalms10:11 I ba wozanan
Psalms10:12 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms10:13 Iita asati Xoosse ayis kadhoona? Banta wozanan
Psalms10:14 Shin Xoossaw
Psalms10:15 Gene asata wolqaa mentha; iita asata seera; zaaridi enta giddon iitatethi bentofo.
Psalms10:16 Goday merinaw kawotidi de7ees; hara kawotethati iya biittafe dhayana.
Psalms10:17 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms10:18 Yi7otanne un7etidaysata qohonna mela
Psalms11:1 Goday taani qosetada attiya bessi; yaatin ayis “Kafoda zumako baqata” yaagetii?
Psalms11:2 Nagaranchoti xillota dhuman caddanaw
Psalms11:3 Baasoy woddida wode
Psalms11:4 Goday ba geeshsha bessan de7ees; salon ba araatan uttidi asaa xeellees; Godaa ayfey asaa pilgees; wochees.

Psalms12:4 Enti

Psalms13:1 Abeeti Godaw awude gakanaw tana dogay? Awude gakanaw neeni taape geemmay?
Psalms13:2 Ta shempiya awude gakanaw un7etanee? Ta wozanay azzanon awude gakanaw daanee? Ta morkey ta bolla awude gakanaw goobanee?
Psalms13:3 Godaw ta Xoossaw
Psalms13:4 Ta morketi
Psalms13:5 Shin taani ne maarotethan ammanetayis; neeni tana ashshiya gisho ufaytayis.

Psalms14:1 Eeyati banta wozanan
Psalms14:2 Akeekeynne Xoosse koyey de7iyako be7anaw
Psalms14:3 Shin ubbay zoko zaaridosona; ubbay go77onnaba gididosona. Lo77oba oothiya oonika baawa; hari attoshin issi asika baawa.
Psalms14:4 Asi kathi meysada
Psalms14:5 Shin Xoossay xillo asaara de7iya gisho
