Psalms16:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms16:2 Taani Xoossaa
Psalms16:3 Sa7an de7iya geeshshati ay mela bonchetidonaa! Ta entara issife ufaytayis.
Psalms16:4 Hara xoossata kaalleysati banta bolla meto darsoosona. Shin taani hara xoossatas suuthi yarshike; taani enta sunthaa xeegike.
Psalms16:5 Ta Godaw ta laatay nena; taw koshshiya ubbaa taw immaasa; ta de7uwa saamay nena.
Psalms16:6 Tana gakida saamay ay mela lo77o! Ee ta laatay tuma lo77o!
Psalms16:7 Tana zorida Godaa galatayis; qamma ta wozanay tana tamaarsees.
Psalms16:8 Taani ubba wode Godaa ta sinthan be7ayis; I ta ushachan de7iya gisho dagammike.
Psalms16:9 Hessa gisho
Psalms16:10 Ta shempiw si7oolen aggaka; ne Geeshshaa wooqana mela oothaka.
Psalms16:11 Tana de7o ogiya bessaasa; ne sinthan kumetha ufaysi de7ees; ne ushachan merinaa injey de7ees.
Psalms17:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms17:2 Ne xillo pirday taw qonco; ne ayfey tumaa xeello.
Psalms17:3 Neeni qamma tana xomoosadasa; ta wozanaa paacadasa. Shin paacadaka ta bolla aykoka demmabaaka; ta inxarsayka baletibeenna.
Psalms17:4 Taani hara asatada iitabaa haasayike; taani ne qaala naagiya gisho
Psalms17:5 Ta tohoy dhubetonna mela
Psalms17:6 Abeeti Xoossaw ta woosa ne si7iya gisho
Psalms17:7 Banta morketape baqateyisata
Psalms17:8 Ne ayfe na77e mela tana naaga; ne qefiya garsan tana qosa.
Psalms17:9 Tana un7ethiya iitatape; teqidi oykida morketape ashsha.
Psalms17:10 Entaw qadhey baawa; otoron haasayoosona.
Psalms17:11 Tana gooddidi oykidosona; teqidosona; tana biittan holidi yegganaw xeelloosona.
Psalms17:12 Enti miyaba koyiya gaammo mela; qosetidi naagiya wodala gaammo mela.
Psalms17:13 Godaw
Psalms17:14 Godaw
Psalms17:15 Shin taani xillotethan ne som7uwa be7ana; ta barkiya wode ne malaa be7ada ufaytana.
Psalms18:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms18:2 Goday ta zaalla; ta miixa; tana ashsheysa; ta Xoossay ta iyako baqatiya ta zaalla. I taw gondalle; tana ashshiya wolqa; taani qosetada attiya besse.
Psalms18:3 Galata bessiya Godaa ta xeegayis; ta morketape taani attana.
Psalms18:4 Hayqo wodoroy tana cuullis; dhayo di7oy tana daganthis.
Psalms18:5 Duufo wodoroy ta bolla xaaxetis; hayqo xihey tana oykis.
Psalms18:6 Ta un7an Godaa xeegas; tana maaddana mela ta Xoossaako waassas. Ba keethan gididi ta girsaa si7is; ta waasoy iya haythan wodhis.
Psalms18:7 Xoossay hanqetida gisho
Psalms18:8 Iya siidhiyape hanqo cuyay keyis; iya doonape miya tama lacoy keyis; I xuuggiya bonqo cuttis.
Psalms18:9 Saluwa phalqidi wodhis; iya tohuwape garsan dhuma shaari de7ees.
Psalms18:10 Kiruubeta bolla uttidi paallis; carko qefen pude dendis.
Psalms18:11 Bana dhuman kammis; iya dunkaaney iran kumida shaara.
Psalms18:12 Iya sinthan de7iya gita poo7uwape shachinne tama lacoy keyidi dhuma shaara kanthidi bis.
Psalms18:13 Goday dadada salope guummis; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay ba girsaa sissis; wol7anthaninne tama lacon qoncis.
Psalms18:14 Ba dongiya dukidi ba morketa laallis; wol7antha poo7o kiittidi enta yedethis.
Psalms18:15 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms18:16 Goday bollafe kushiya yeddidi tana oykis; ciimmo haathaafe tana dafidi kessis.
Psalms18:17 Ta bolla daro wolqaamida ta morketapenne tana ixeysatape ashshis.
Psalms18:18 Ta metootida wode enti ta bolla dendidosona; shin Goday tana katisis.
Psalms18:19 I tana dalga bessi kessis; tanan ufaytida gisho tana ashshis.
Psalms18:20 Ta xillotethaada Goday taw qanxis; ta kushe geeshshatethaada I taw zaaris.
Psalms18:21 Taani Godaa ogiya kaallas; ta Xoossaa aggada kare keyabike.
Psalms18:22 Taani iya higgiya ubbaa naagas; iya kiitaa polo aggabike.
Psalms18:23 Taani iya sinthan suure de7as; tana nagarape naagas.
Psalms18:24 Goday ta xillotethaadanne ta kushe geeshshatethaada taw zaaris.
Psalms18:25 Ammaneteysatas ne ammanetaasa; suuretas ne suure.
Psalms18:26 Geeshshatas ne geeshshi; shin geellatas ne geella.
Psalms18:27 Ashketa ashshaasa; shin otoranchota kawushaasa.
Psalms18:28 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms18:29 Ne maaduwan ta morke toora bolla dendayis; ta Xoossan miixaa xeerara gupada aadhayis.
Psalms18:30 Xoossaa ogey polo; Godaa qaalay geeshshi; iyako baqatiya ubbaas I gondalle.
Psalms18:31 Godaape attishin
Psalms18:32 Taw wolqa immeynne ta ogiya saro oothey Xoossaa.
Psalms18:33 I ta tohuwa gen7e tohoda minthees; dhoqa bessan hirgi bayna essees.
Psalms18:34 Ta kushiya ola tamaarsees; naase birata dongiya dukana mela ta qessiya minthees.
Psalms18:35 Tana ashshiya ne gondalliya taw immadasa; ne ushacha kushey tana zempisees; ne lo77o oykethay tana gitayees.
Psalms18:36 Ta hemetiya bessaa dalgisadasa; ta tohuwa harchuchi ekibeenna.
Psalms18:37 Ta morketa yedethada oykas; enta dhaysona guye simmike.
Psalms18:38 Enti zaari dendonnaada shocas; enti ta tohuwa garsan kundidosona.
Psalms18:39 Olas tana dancisadasa; taara gaaddeteyisata taw gulbatisadasa.
Psalms18:40 Ta morketa ta sinthafe guye zaaradasa; tana ixeyisata dhaysas.
Psalms18:41 Maade koyidi waassidosona
Psalms18:42 Carkoy pitidi efiya baanada enta liiqisas; oge urqada enta yedhas.
Psalms18:43 Gene asape tana ashshadasa; tana kawotethata bolla shuumadasa; ta eronna asay taw haaretidosona.
Psalms18:44 Enti tabaa si7idi taw kiitetoosona; allaga derey ta sinthan ziggees.
Psalms18:45 Enti kaha dhayidosona; banta miixape kokorishe yoosona.
Psalms18:46 Goday de7ees! Xoossay
Psalms18:47 I taw halo kessiya Xoossaa; kawotethata ta garsan haariseysa.
Psalms18:48 Ta morketape tana ashsheysa; tana ixeyisata bolla dhoqu dhoqu oothaasa; iitatape tana ashshaasa.
Psalms18:49 Hessa gisho
Psalms18:50 I ba kawas xoono immees; ba tiyidaysas
Psalms19:1 Saloti Xoossaa bonchuwa haasayoosona; salo gufanthoy iya kushe oosuwa awaajees.
Psalms19:2 Issi gallasi hara gallassas hessa odees; issi qammi hara qammas eratethi qoncisees.
Psalms19:3 Odi woyko qaali baawa; enta girsay si7etenna.
Psalms19:4 Gidoshin enta oday sa7a ubban laaletis; enta qaalay biitta gaxaa gakis. Awi de7iya bessi Xoossay salon giigisis.
Psalms19:5 Ba soope keyiya mishirada
Psalms19:6 Issi bagga salo gaxape keyidi
Psalms19:7 Godaa higgey suure; shempo zaarees. Godaa kiitay ammanetidaysa; akeeki pacidaysata cinca oothees.
Psalms19:8 Godaa wogay like; wozana ufaysees. Godaa kiitay geeshshi; ayfe poo7isees.
Psalms19:9 Godaas yashshi geeshshi; merinaw eqidi de7ees. Godaa pirday kumethi tumanne xillo.
Psalms19:10 Worqafe aadhidi koyetees; walahi bayna worqafe aadhidi lo77o. Eessafe aadhidi lo77o ililo eessafe aadhidi mal7o.
Psalms19:11 Ne aylley naagetana mela zorees; ne higgiya naagoy daro go77ees.
Psalms19:12 Ba qohuwa demmey oonee? Abeeti Godaw

Psalms22:1 Ta Xoossaw
Psalms22:2 Ta Xoossaw
Psalms22:3 Gidoshin neeni geeshshi; Isra7eele galatay ne araata yuushon de7ees.
Psalms22:4 Nu aawati nenan ammanetidosona; nenan ammanetin
Psalms22:5 Neeko waassidi attidosona; nenan ammanetidi yeellatibookona.
Psalms22:6 Shin ta ase gidike; guxune; ta asan kadhetidaysanne boretidaysa.
Psalms22:7 Tana be7iya ubbay qelqisoosona; banta huuphiya qaathishe dereeqosona.
Psalms22:8 “I Godan ammanetis; ane iya asho; Goday iya dosiko
Psalms22:9 Gidoshin taani ta aaye ulope suure yeletanaada oothiday nena. Ta aaye dhantha dhammiya wodeka tana naagiday nena.
Psalms22:10 Ta yeletoosope doomada nenan diccas; ta aaye ulope doomin ne ta Xoossaa.
Psalms22:11 Metoy taako matiya gishonne tana maaddiya asi bayna gisho
Psalms22:12 Daro morketi qayciya boorada tana teqidosona; qayciya Baasane kormatada tana oykidosona.
Psalms22:13 Mentherethidi gudiya gaammoda banta doona ta bolla dooyosona.
Psalms22:14 Taani haathada goggas; ta meqethay ba kesuwape keyis; ta wozanay oysada ta gaathan til7is.
Psalms22:15 Ta qoodhey kun7ada melis; ta inxarsay kottonuwara oyketis; ne tana hayqida asada baanan yeggadasa.
Psalms22:16 Kanati tana teqidosona; iita asati ta yuushuwa oykidosona; ta kushetanne ta tohota caddoosona.
Psalms22:17 Ta meqethati taybetoosona; ta morketi tana dereeqosona.
Psalms22:18 Ta ma7uwa shaakidi ekoosona; ta adussa ma7uwa bolla saama yeggoosona.
Psalms22:19 Ta Godaw
Psalms22:20 Tana mashshafe kessa eka; ta al7o de7uwa kanatape ashsha.
Psalms22:21 Gaammota doonape tana ashsha; qayciya bazzo boorata kacepe tana naaga.
Psalms22:22 Taani ne sunthaa ta ishatas odana; enta shiiquwan nena galatana.
Psalms22:23 Hinteno
Psalms22:24 I un7etidaysa kadhenna; enta qohuwa be7ishe qelli geenna. Ba som7uwa entafe genthenna; enti iyako waassiya wode
Psalms22:25 Ta ne lo77o oosuwa gisho gita shiiqon galatana; ta qangetha new yayiya asaa sinthan gathana.
Psalms22:26 Manqoti midi kallana; Godaa koyeysati iya galatana; enti merinaw ufaysan daana.
Psalms22:27 Sa7a gaxa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay
Psalms22:28 Maati ubbay Godaasa; I kawotethata haarees.
Psalms22:29 Sa7an de7iya dure ubbay iya goyinnana; bantanan hayqope ashshanaw danda7onaysatinne biitta simmiya ubbay iyaw gulbatana.
Psalms22:30 Yaana yeletay iyaw kiitetana; sintha yeletas Godaaba odana.
Psalms22:31 Buroo yeletiboona asaska
Psalms23:1 Goday ta henthanchuwa; taw aybika pacenna.
Psalms23:2 Tana aaca qooron shempisees; wopu gida haathaako laaggees.
Psalms23:3 Ta de7uwa ooraxisees; ba sunthaa gisho gidi
Psalms23:4 Ne ta Goday taara de7iya gisho
Psalms23:5 Ta morketa sinthan taw gibira giigisaasa; tana mokashe
Psalms23:6 Ne keehatethaynne ne maarotethay ta de7o laytha ubban tana kaallana; taani Godaa keethan merinaw daana.
Psalms24:1 Sa7aynne sa7an de7iya ubbay Godaaba; alameynne iyan de7iya asa ubbay iyassa.
Psalms24:2 I sa7aa gita abba bolla hiixis; ciimmo haatha bolla minthidi essis.
Psalms24:3 Godaa zuma bolla keyanaw danda7ey oonee? Iya geeshsha bessan eqanay oonee?
Psalms24:4 Iya kusheynne iya wozanay geeshshi gididaysa; eeqa goyinnonnaysa
Psalms24:5 I Godaape anjo ekana; ashshiya Xoossaafe xillo pirdaa demmana.
Psalms24:6 Xoossaako xeelliya asinne Yayqooba Xoossaa som7uwa koyiya asi hessa mela ase.
Psalms24:7 Boncho kawoy gelana mela
Psalms24:8 He boncho kawoy oonee? Minonne wolqaama gidida Godaa; olan wolqaama gidida Godaa.
Psalms24:9 Boncho kawoy gelana mela
Psalms24:10 Ha boncho kawoy oonee? Ha boncho kawoy salo medhetethata Godaa!
Psalms25:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms25:2 Abeeti ta Xoossaw
Psalms25:3 Nenan ufaysi ootheysati yeellatokona; shin gaasoy bayna geneysati yeellatana.
Psalms25:4 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms25:5 Tana ashshiya Xoossay nena gidiya gisho
Psalms25:6 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms25:7 Ta na7atetha nagaraanne iitaba hassayopa; abeeti Godaw
Psalms25:8 Goday keehanne suure gidiya gisho; nagaranchota ba ogiya tamaarsees.
Psalms25:9 Ashketa suuretethan kaalethees; entana ba ogiya tamaarsees.
Psalms25:10 Godaa caaquwanne iya kiitaa naageysatas iya oge ubbay tumanne keeha.
Psalms25:11 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms25:12 Godaa yayiya asi oonee? I kaallanaw bessiya ogiya Goday iya tamaarsana.
Psalms25:13 I ubba wode duretethan daana; iya nayti biitta laattana.
Psalms25:14 Goday yayyeysatas ba xuuraa genthenna; I entaw ba caaquwa erisees.
Psalms25:15 Goday ta tohuwa xihepe naagiya gisho
Psalms25:16 Godaw
Psalms25:17 Taw hirgi daris; ta metuwape tana ne ashsha.
Psalms25:18 Ta metuwanne ta waayiya be7a; ta nagara ubbaa atto ga.
Psalms25:19 Ta morketi ay mela daridaako be7a; enti tana ay mela ixiyako xeella.
Psalms25:20 Ne tana naaga; ne tana ashsha; ta neeko baqatiya gisho tana yeellayopa.
Psalms25:21 Ta nenan ufaysi oothida gisho
Psalms25:22 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms26:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms26:2 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms26:3 Ne siiqoy ta sinthan de7iya gisho
Psalms26:4 Cimmiya asaara ta uttike; cubbota maabaran gelike.
Psalms26:5 Iitata duulata ta ixayis; makallachotara issife uttike.
Psalms26:6 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms26:7 Galata mazmure yexashe ne malaalsiya ooso ubba odana.
Psalms26:8 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms26:9 Tana nagaranchotara issife pittofa; asa suuthu gusseysatara ta shempuwa dhaysofa.
Psalms26:10 Enta kushen iita halchoy de7ees; enta ushacha kushen wodhaafey kumis.
Psalms26:11 Shin ta suuretethan hemetana; tana woza; taw qadheta.
Psalms26:12 Ta tohoy demba bessan eqis; gita shiiquwan Godaa galatana.
Psalms27:1 Goday taw poo7onne tana ashsheysa; yaatin
Psalms27:2 Iita asati
Psalms27:3 Morke toori tana teqiko ta wozanay yayyenna. Oli ta bolla dendiyakoka
Psalms27:4 Ta Godaa issiba oychas; hessika
Psalms27:5 Meto gallas tana ba de7iya bessan genthana; ba dunkaaniyan tana qosana; tana dhoqa zaalla bolla essana.
Psalms27:6 He wode taani tana teqida ta morketape aadhada
Psalms27:7 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms27:8 Neeni
Psalms27:9 Ne som7uwa taape genthofa; tana maaddeyso; ne shenetada tana ne aylliya guye zaaropa. Abeeti tana ashshiya Xoossaw
Psalms27:10 Ta aawaynne ta aayiya tana aggikoka Goday tana shiishidi ekana.
Psalms27:11 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms27:12 Tana mandiya wordo markati ta bolla wolqan dendida gisho
Psalms27:13 Taani de7on de7ashe
Psalms27:14 Godan ufaysi ootha; minna
Psalms28:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms28:2 Maade koyada ta waassiya wode; ubbaafe geeshsha dunkaaniyako
Psalms28:3 Iita oothiya iita asatara tana gathada oykofa; enti banta wozanan gene qopishe
Psalms28:4 Enta oosuwada enta seera; enta iitatethaada entaw qanxa. Enta kushe oosuwada enta pirda; entaw bessiya iitaa entaw zaara.
Psalms28:5 Enti Godaa oosuwanne iya kushe medhuwas
Psalms28:6 Ta woosa si7ida gisho Goday galatetto.
Psalms28:7 Goday taw wolqanne gondalle; ta wozanay iyan ammanetees; ta iyan maadetas. Ta wozanay iyan ufaytees; ta iya mazmuren sabbana.
Psalms28:8 Goday ba asaas wolqa; ba dooridi kawa ashshiya miixa.
Psalms28:9 Godaw
Psalms29:1 Hinteno salo medhetethato
Psalms29:2 Godaa boncho sunthaa galatite; iya geeshshatetha teema gisho Godaa goyinnite.
Psalms29:3 Godaa guunthay haathata bolla si7etees; boncho Xoossay dadada dechees; Goday gita haathata bolla guummees.
Psalms29:4 Godaa kooshinchay wolqaama; Godaa girsay teemara de7ees.
Psalms29:5 Godaa girsay zigaa menthees; Libaanosen de7iya zigaa menthees.
Psalms29:6 Libaanose dereta galo marada buraaqisees; Siriyoona deriya menthada gufisees.
Psalms29:7 Godaa girsay wol7amees.
Psalms29:8 Godaa girsay mela biittaa qaathees; Goday Qaadesa mela biittaa kokorsees.
Psalms29:9 Godaa girsay wolaa qaathees; mitha haythaa qoqofees. Iya keethan de7iya ubbay
Psalms29:10 Goday di7o haatha bolla ba araata wothidi uttis; Goday ba araatan uttidi merinaw kawotis.
Psalms29:11 Goday ba asaas wolqa immees. Goday ba asaa sarotethan anjees.
Psalms30:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms30:2 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms30:3 Abeeti Godaw

Psalms30:5 Iya hanqoy guutha wodesa
Psalms30:6 Ta naagetada de7eysa erida wode “Hiza ta qaaxike” yaagas.

Psalms30:8 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms30:9 “Ta duufo geliko nena ay go77ii? Biitta giddo gelida asi waatidi nena galatanaw danda7ii? Ne ammanetetha waatidi markatanee?
Psalms30:10 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms30:11 Ta yeehuwa yethan laammadasa; kayo ma7uwa taape qaarada
Psalms30:12 Hessa gisho
Psalms31:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms31:2 Ne haythaa taako zaara; ellesada tana ashsha. Neeni
Psalms31:3 Ee
Psalms31:4 Ne taw geemmiya besse gidiya gisho
Psalms31:5 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms31:6 Pathonna eeqata goyinneyisata ta ixayis; gidoshin taani Godan ammanetayis.
Psalms31:7 Ta metuwanne ta un7a ne be7ida gisho taani merinaw ne siiquwan ufaytana.
Psalms31:8 Ne tana morke kushen aathada immabaaka; ta tohota dalga bessan essadasa.
Psalms31:9 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms31:10 Ta de7oy azzanon
Psalms31:11 Ta morketa ubbaas qidhes attas; ta shoorotas yeella gidas. Ta laggetas daganthiyaba gidas; tana be7eysati taape haakidosona.
Psalms31:12 Ta hayqida asada dogetas; meqa miisheda wora yegetas.
Psalms31:13 Taani darota kalkashaa si7as; ubba bessara dagami de7ees. Enti ta bolla tobboosona; tana wodhanaw maqetoosona.
Psalms31:14 Shin Godaw
Psalms31:15 Ta de7o laythay ne kushiyana; tana yedethiya ta morketa kushepe tana ashsha.
Psalms31:16 Ne aylliya bolla ne som7uwa poo7isa; ne maarotethan tana ashsha.
Psalms31:17 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms31:18 Otoroninne boren xillota bolla minnidi haasaya gisho
Psalms31:19 Nena yayyeysatas ne minjida
Psalms31:20 Neeni enta ne sinthan
Psalms31:21 Morkey teqida katamaa giddon
Psalms31:22 Ta dagammada
Psalms31:23 Hinteno
Psalms31:24 Hinteno
Psalms32:1 Iya nagaray atto geetetidaynne iya nagaray kametida uray anjetidaysa.
Psalms32:2 Goday iya iitatethaa taybonna asi
Psalms32:3 Taani ta nagaraa paaxonna aggada
Psalms32:4 Gallasinne qamma ne kushey tana deexis; haathi dhayin bone awan melidibada
Psalms32:5 Taani ta nagaraa new paaxas; ta naaquwa neepe genthabike. “Ta nagaraa Godaas paaxana” yaagas; tana deexida nagaraa atto gadasa.
Psalms32:6 Hessa gisho
Psalms32:7 Ne taw qosetiya bessi; ne tana metope naagasa. Atotetha yethi yexiya asaa ta yuushuwan wothadasa.
Psalms32:8 Xoossay
Psalms32:9 Bixaalaninne puulon oyketonna; kiitetonna wozani bayna baquloda woyko parada hanopite.
Psalms32:10 Iitatas waayey darana; shin Godan ammaneteyisata siiqoy kammana.
Psalms32:11 Hinteno
Psalms33:1 Hinteno
Psalms33:2 Maasinqon Godaa galatite; tammu shayan waaxetida diithan yexite.
Psalms33:3 Ooratha yethi iyaw yexite; diithi loythidi diixishe ililite.
Psalms33:4 Godaa qaalay tuma; iya ooso ubbay ammaneteysa.
Psalms33:5 Goday xillotethinne tuma pirda dosees; iya maarotay sa7aa kumis.
Psalms33:6 Godaa qaalan saloti medhetidosona; iya doonape keyiya shempuwan salon de7iya medhetethati yeletidosona.
Psalms33:7 Abba haatha issi bessan eelisis; ciimmo haatha minja keethan wothis.
Psalms33:8 Sa7a ubbay Godaa yayyo; asa ubbay Godaa boncho.
Psalms33:9 Iya odan ubbay hanis; I kiittin minnidi eqis.
Psalms33:10 Goday kawotethata halchuwa hada oothees; enta qofaa laallees.
Psalms33:11 Godaa halchoy merinaw eqidi de7ees; iya wozanaa qofay yeletetha ubbaasa.
Psalms33:12 Xoossay entaw Godaa gidida kawotethay
Psalms33:13 Goday salon uttidi xeellees; asa koche ubbaa be7ees.
Psalms33:14 Goday ba araatan uttidi
Psalms33:15 Enta wozanaa medhiday iya; enti oothiyaba ubbaa I erees.
Psalms33:16 Kawoy ba wotaadare darotethan attenna; olanchoy ba wolqaa minotethan kessi ekenna.
Psalms33:17 Paran xoonana gidi naagoy hada; I ba minotethan ashshanaw danda7enna.
Psalms33:18 Godaa ayfeti iyaw yayyanne iya maarotan ufaysi oothiya asaa be7oosona.
Psalms33:19 Hessika enta hayqope ashshanaasanne kosha wode enta naaganaassa.
Psalms33:20 Nuuni Godaa ufaysan naagoos; nuna maaddeynne nu gondalley iya.
Psalms33:21 Iya geeshsha sunthan nuuni ammanetiya gisho
Psalms33:22 Godaw
Psalms34:1 Taani ubba wode Godaa galatana; iya galatay ta doonape pacenna.
Psalms34:2 Taani Godan ceeqetayis; aadati hessa si7idi ufayto.
Psalms34:3 Taara Godaa bonchite; iya sunthaa issife dhoqu dhoqu oothoos.
Psalms34:4 Taani Godaa koyin
Psalms34:5 Iyako xeelliya ubbay poo7osona; enta som7oy yeellatenna.
Psalms34:6 Ha manqoy waassis; Goday iya waasuwa si7is; iya meto ubbaafe iya ashshis.
Psalms34:7 Godaa kiitanchoy iyaw yayyeyisata naagees; enta yuushon gididi enta ashshees.
Psalms34:8 Goday keeha gideysa laacidi be7ite; iyako baqatiya asi anjetidaysa.
Psalms34:9 Hinteno
Psalms34:10 Gaammoti miyaba dhayidi koshatoosona; shin Godaa koyeysatas lo77obay pacenna.
Psalms34:11 Nayto
Psalms34:12 Lo77o de7o daanawunne keehaba be7anaw adussa laythi daanaw
Psalms34:13 Ne inxarsay iitabaa odetonaada
Psalms34:14 Iitape haaka; lo77oba ootha; sarotethi koya; kaalla.
Psalms34:15 Godaa ayfey xillota xeellees; iya haythay enta waasuwa si7ees.
Psalms34:16 Enta qofisiyaba biittafe dhaysanaw
Psalms34:17 Xilloti waassoosona; Goday enta waasuwa si7ees; I enta meto ubbaafe ashshees.
Psalms34:18 Wozani meqidaysatas Goday matana; I ufaysi qanxidaysata ashshees.
Psalms34:19 Xillo asas metoy daro; shin Goday iya he ubbaafe ashshees.
Psalms34:20 Goday iya meqethata naagiya gisho
Psalms34:21 Iitata enta iitatethay wodhana; xillota ixeysati pirdetana.
Psalms34:22 Goday ba aylleta wozees; iyako baqatiya oonika pirdetenna.
Psalms35:1 Godaw
Psalms35:2 Gondallenne toora oykada
Psalms35:3 Tana gooddeyisata bolla ne tooranne mashsha dentha; taako “Ta nena ashsheysa” yaaga.
Psalms35:4 Ta shempuwa wodhanaw koyeysati
Psalms35:5 Godaa kiitanchoy enta yedethiya wode
Psalms35:6 Godaa kiitanchoy enta gooddiya wode
Psalms35:7 Gaasoy bayna tana oykanaw xihe wothoosona; tana kundisanaw olla bookosona.
Psalms35:8 Eronna de7ishin enta bolla dhayoy yo; enti wothida xihey enta oyko; enti bookida ollan kundidi dhayo.
Psalms35:9 He wode taani Godan ufaytana; I ashshida gisho hashshu gaana.
Psalms35:10 Ta kumetha asatethay nena
Psalms35:11 Wordo markateysati ta bolla dendoosona; ta eronnaban tana mootosona.
Psalms35:12 Ta lo77o oothida gisho iita zaaridosona; tana bizza oothidosona.
Psalms35:13 Shin enti hargida wode taani kayo ma7o ma7as; ta asatethaa xooman daabursas; ta woosay zaaro demmonna attis.
Psalms35:14 Tana kawushada dabbos woyko ishas yeekeysada yeekas. Issi asi ba aayes kayoteysada ta huuphiya oykada yeekas.
Psalms35:15 Shin taani dhubetida wode ufaytidi shiiqidosona; gaasoy bayna tana wadhidi
Psalms35:16 Iita asati ootheysada enti tana qelqisidosona; yilotidi banta acha garcidosona.
Psalms35:17 Godaw
Psalms35:18 He wode gita shiiqon ta nena galatana; daro asay de7iya bessan nena bonchana.
Psalms35:19 Gaasoy bayna tana morkeysati ufaytofo; tana coo ixeysati ta bolla qam7otopo.
Psalms35:20 Enti saroba haasayokona; si77i gidi de7iya asaa bolla oda xaaxosona.
Psalms35:21 Enti banta doona ta bolla dooyidi
Psalms35:22 Godaw
Psalms35:23 Ta Xoossaw
Psalms35:24 Ta Godaw
Psalms35:25 Enti banta wozanan
Psalms35:26 Ta waayan ufayteysati
Psalms35:27 Ta xoonuwa doseysati ufayto; ililo; hashshu yaago. “Ubba wode ba aylliya sarotethan
Psalms35:28 Ta inxarsay ne xillotethaanne ne galataa
Psalms36:1 Iita asi ba wozanan iitabaa qopees; I ba wozanan Xoossas yayyenna.
Psalms36:2 I bana daro nashshiya gisho; ba nagaraa be7anaw woyko ixanaw danda7enna.
Psalms36:3 Iya doonan geneynne wordoy kumis; Cincatethinne lo77oba ooso aggis.
Psalms36:4 Ba hiixan zin7idi gene qopees; bana lo77o gidonna ogen kaalethees; iitabaa ixenna.
Psalms36:5 Godaw
Psalms36:6 Ne xillotethay dhoqa deretape aadhees; ne pirday abba ciimmuwafe ziqa; Godaw
Psalms36:7 Xoossaw
Psalms36:8 Enti ne gibiraape midi kalloosona; ne keehatetha shaafape uyidi aloosona.
Psalms36:9 De7o pultoy neepe keyees; ne poo7uwan nuuni poo7o be7oos.
Psalms36:10 Nena ereysatas ne siiqoy
Psalms36:11 Otoranchota tohoy tana yedhofo; nagaranchota kushey tana yedethofo.
Psalms36:12 Iita asata kundethaa be7ite; enti kundidosona; dendanaw danda7okona.
Psalms37:1 Iitaa ootheyisata gaason yilotopa; nagara ootheyisata qanaatopa.
Psalms37:2 Enti maatada eeson melana; boncoda shullidi qoqofetana.
Psalms37:3 Godan ammaneta; lo77oba ootha; biitta bolla utta; palahin de7a.
Psalms37:4 Godan ufayta; I ne wozanaa amuwa immana.
Psalms37:5 Ne ogiya hadara Godaas imma; iyan ammaneta; I new oothana.
Psalms37:6 I ne xillotethaa wonta xalqeda
Psalms37:7 Godaa sinthan si77i gada de7a; danda7an naaga; Iita asata halchoy poletin be7ada yilotopa.
Psalms37:8 Hanqo agga; yilo teqa; hessi meton yeggees.
Psalms37:9 Iita ootheysati dhoqolletidi dhayana; shin Godan ufaysi wotheysati biitta laattana.
Psalms37:10 Iita ootheysati guutha wodepe guye de7okona; ne enta koyada demmaka.
Psalms37:11 Shin aadati biitta laattana; sarotethan ufaytidi daana.
Psalms37:12 Iita asi lo77o asi dhaysanaw maqetees; ba acha enta bolla garcees.
Psalms37:13 Shin Goday iitata bolla miicees; entaw dhayo gallasi yeysa erees.
Psalms37:14 Iita asati manqotanne metootanchota wodhanaw
Psalms37:15 Shin enta mashshay enta wozanan gelana; enta dongey meqana.
Psalms37:16 Xillo asas de7iya guuthabay
Psalms37:17 Ayis giiko
Psalms37:18 Suure asata ogiya Goday erees; enta laatay merinaw entaba gidana.
Psalms37:19 Iita wode suure asati yeellatokona; kosha wode enti kallidi maana.
Psalms37:20 Shin iita asati hayqana; Godaa morketi ciishshada qoqofetana; cuyada ayfepe geemmana.
Psalms37:21 Iita asi tal7idi zaarenna; shin xillo asi keehatethan immees.
Psalms37:22 Godan anjetidaysati biitta laattana; shin I baaddidaysati dhayana.
Psalms37:23 Asa ogey Godaa ufaysiko
Psalms37:24 I dhubetikoka kundenna; Goday iya kushiya oykidi katisees.
Psalms37:25 Taani paamas; ha77i cimas; shin xillo asi yegetin
Psalms37:26 I ubba wode keehatethan immees; coo tal7ees; iya nayti haratas anjo gidana.
Psalms37:27 Iitape haaka; lo77o ootha; ne adussa laythi daana.
Psalms37:28 Goday xillo pirda dosees; ammaneteyisata I yeggenna. Enti merinaw naagetoosona; shin iitata kochay dhayana.
Psalms37:29 Xilloti biitta laattana; yan merinaw daana.
Psalms37:30 Xillo asa doonape cincatethi keyees; iya inxarsay xillo odetees.
Psalms37:31 Xoossa higgey iya wozanan de7ees; iya tohoy dhubetenna.
Psalms37:32 Iita asi xillo asi geeddees; iya wodhanaw koyees.
Psalms37:33 Shin Goday iya kushen aathidi immenna; pirdetanaw eqiya wode iya bolla pirdisenna.
Psalms37:34 Godan ufaysi ootha
Psalms37:35 Nagaranchoy Libaanose zigada
Psalms37:36 Shin ta simmada yan demmabike; koyinka bentibeenna.
Psalms37:37 Borey bayna asi be7a; suure asi akeeka; saro asas wursethay lo77o gidana.
Psalms37:38 Shin nagaranchoti dhayana; enta wursethay dhoommana.
Psalms37:39 Xillota atotethay Godaape yees; I meto wode enti naagetidi attiya besse.
Psalms37:40 Goday xillota maaddees; ashshees; enti iyako baqatida gisho
Psalms38:1 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms38:2 Ne donge tooray tana caddis; ne kushey tana deexis.
Psalms38:3 Ne hanqida gisho ta asatethay qohetis; ta nagaraa gaason ta meqethay liiqis.
Psalms38:4 Ta balay tana muukis; dendonna gita toohoda tana deexees.
Psalms38:5 Ta eeyatethan oothida nagara gisho
Psalms38:6 Ta sa7a xeellas; hokas; gallas kumethi azzanashe pee7as.
Psalms38:7 Ta ashoy xuuggees; ta asatethay paxa gidenna.
Psalms38:8 Ta daaburas; liiqas; ta wozanay dirgiya gisho oolas.
Psalms38:9 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms38:10 Ta wozanay dirgees; ta wolqay hitti gis; ta ayfiya poo7oy dhayis.
Psalms38:11 Ta madunthaa gaason ta shoorotinne ta laggeti haakidi eqidosona; ta dabboti taape haakidosona.
Psalms38:12 Tana wodhanaw koyeysati banta xihiya taw yeggoosona. Tana qohanaw koyeysati
Psalms38:13 Ta tulle asa mela si7ike; muume asa mela doona pogike.
Psalms38:14 Tuma haythi si7onna asi
Psalms38:15 Godaw
Psalms38:16 Taani
Psalms38:17 Ta kundana hanayis
Psalms38:18 Ta nagara paaxayis; ta naaquwa gaason azzanayis.
Psalms38:19 Ta morketi gitane wolqaama; tana coo ixeysati daro.
Psalms38:20 Taani lo77oba oothin iita zaareysati
Psalms38:21 Godaw
Psalms38:22 Tana ashshiya ta Godaw
Psalms39:1 Taani
Psalms39:2 Shin doona muumeda si77i gas; hari attoshin lo77oba odeteysa aggas; shin ta waayey haa daris.
Psalms39:3 Ta wozanay ta gaathan teellis; ta qofay tamada eexis; yaatin ta inxarsan haasaya doomas.
Psalms39:4 Godaw
Psalms39:5 Neeni ta laytha takadhada wothadasa; Ta laythay ne sinthan baynaba mela; tuma asi ubbay issi shempo mela.
Psalms39:6 Tuma asi aadhiya eesho mela; I coo daaburees; shalo shiishees; shin ooni go7etaneko erenna.
Psalms39:7 Godaw
Psalms39:8 Ta bala ubbaafe tana ashsha; eeyatan tana tooshisopa.
Psalms39:9 Hessa ubbaa oothiday nena gidiya gisho taani muumas; doonaka pogabike.
Psalms39:10 Ne xam7a ta bollafe dentha; mino ne kushiya gaason ta daaburas.
Psalms39:11 Ase iya nagaraa gisho seerasa; iya al7o de7uwa bilada wursaasa; tuma asi ubbay issi shempo mela.
Psalms39:12 Godaw
Psalms39:13 Ta shaaketanapenne baanape sinthe taani ufaytana mela tana agga.
Psalms40:1 Taani Godaa danda7an naagas; I taako simmidi ta waasuwa si7is.
Psalms40:2 Dhayo ollafe
Psalms40:3 Ta doonan ooratha yethi wothis; hessika nu Xoossay galatetto yaageysa; daroti be7idi yayyana; Godan ammanetana.
Psalms40:4 Godan ammanetiya
Psalms40:5 Godaw
Psalms40:6 Neeni yarshonne imo koyabaaka; shin nena si7ana mela ta haythaa dooyadasa; xuussa yarshonne nagara yarsho koyabaaka.
Psalms40:7 Hessa gisho taani
Psalms40:8 Ta Xoossaw
Psalms40:9 Gita shiiqon
Psalms40:10 Ta ne xillotethaa ta wozanan qosabike; ne ammanetethanne ne ashuwa odas. Ne siiquwanne ne tumatethaa
Psalms40:11 Godaw
Psalms40:12 Tayboy bayna iitabay tana teqis; ta balay tana goozis; ta xeellanaw danda7ike Ta nagaray ta huuphe binaanape daris; ta wozanay ta giddon til7is.
Psalms40:13 Godaw
Psalms40:14 Tana wodhanaw koyeysati yeellato
Psalms40:15 Taako
Psalms40:16 Shin nena koyiya ubbay
Psalms40:17 Taani manqonne metootancho; shin Goday tabaa qopo! Tana maaddey ashshey nena; ta Xoossaw
Psalms41:1 Manquwas qopiya asi anjetidaysa; meto gallas Goday iya ashshees.
Psalms41:2 Goday iya naagees
Psalms41:3 I saketidi hiithan de7ishin Goday maaddees; hargiyafe iya pathees.
Psalms41:4 Taani
Psalms41:5 Ta morketi iitabaa ta bolla haasayidi
Psalms41:6 Tana be7anaw yaa oonika wordo odees; ba wozanan tana zigiriyabaa shiishees; kare keyidi ta sunthaa iissees.
Psalms41:7 Tana ixiya ubbay issife tana zigiroosona; iitabay iya gakees gidi qopoosona.
Psalms41:8 “Iya iita hargey oykis; I hiza hiixape dendenna” yaagosona.
Psalms41:9 Hari attoshin ta ammanetiya laggey
Psalms41:10 Shin Godaw tana maara; ta entaw kushe zaarana mela
Psalms41:11 Ta morkey tana xoononna gisho
Psalms41:12 Ne tana ta suuretetha gisho katisaasa; ne sinthan tana merinaw wothaasa.
Psalms41:13 Goday
Psalms42:1 Gaari pulto haathi laamoteysada
Psalms42:2 “Ta shempiya Xoossaa
Psalms42:3 Asay
Psalms42:4 Taani enta ba7aale bonchanaw shiiqida
Psalms42:5 Ta shempe
Psalms42:6 Ta wozanay azzanis; hessa gisho taani Yordaanose biittan
Psalms42:7 Ne soossuwa guunthan ciimmoy ciimmuwa xeegees; ne beetaynne ne zuley ta bollara aadhis.
Psalms42:8 Goday ba siiquwa gallas taw kiittees; qamma galata yethay taara de7ees; ta de7o Xoossaa woossana.
Psalms42:9 Xoossaa
Psalms42:10 Ta morketi
Psalms42:11 Ta shempe ayis azzanay? ayis un7etay? Xoossan ufaysi wotha; tana ashshiya
Psalms43:1 Xoossaw taw pirda; nena eronna deretara ta gisho mooteta; Cimmiya iita asatape tana ashsha.
Psalms43:2 Xoossaw
Psalms43:3 Ne poo7uwanne ne tumaa taw kiitta; enti tana kaalethidi ne geeshsha deriya
Psalms43:4 He wode taani Xoossaa yarsho bessaako; tana ufaysiya Xoossaako baana. Xoossaw ta Godaw
Psalms43:5 Ta shempe ayis azzanay? ayis un7etay? Xoossan ufaysi wotha; tana ashshiya
Psalms44:1 Xoossaw
Psalms44:2 Kawotethata ne kushen goodda kessadasa; nu aawata enta biittan tokadasa. Hara kawotethata seeradasa; shin nu aawata aakisadasa.
Psalms44:3 Enti banta mashshan olidi he biitta laatibookona; enti banta minotethan xoonibookona. Shin neeni enta dosida gisho
Psalms44:4 Yayqooba kochaas xoono kiittiya
Psalms44:5 Nenan gididi nu morketa xoonana; ne sunthan nuna ixeyisata yedhana.
Psalms44:6 Taani ta tooran ammanetike; ta mashshay tana ashshena.
Psalms44:7 Shin ne nuna nu morketape ashshaasa; nuna ixeyisata neeni kawushaasa.
Psalms44:8 Nuuni ubba wode Xoossan ceeqetana; ne sunthaa merinaw galatana.
Psalms44:9 Shin ha77i nuna aggadasa; kawushadasa; nu olanchotara issife olas keyaka.
Psalms44:10 Nu morketa sinthafe nuna baqatisadasa; nu ixeysati nuna bonqidosona.
Psalms44:11 Nuna dorsada shuhas aatha immadasa; kawotethata giddon nuna laalladasa.
Psalms44:12 Neeni ne asaa laafa gaten bayzadasa; ay wodheka demmabaaka.
Psalms44:13 Nu shooroti nuna boranaada oothadasa; nu heeran de7eysati nuna qilqisanaadanne nu bolla miicanaada oothadasa.
Psalms44:14 Nuna kawotethata giddon hayses aggadasa; enti banta huuphiya nu bolla qaathana mela oothadasa.
Psalms44:15 Gallas kumethi taani tooshetas; ta som7uwa yeelli kammis.
Psalms44:16 Hessi haniday tana cayeysatanne boreyisata gaasoninne
Psalms44:17 Nuuni nena dogonna de7ishin
Psalms44:18 Nu wozanay nena aggibeenna; nu tohoy ne ogiyape kare keybeenna.
Psalms44:19 Shin neeni nuna mentherethada do7a ollan yeggadasa; sakana dhuman kammadasa.
Psalms44:20 Nu
Psalms44:21 Wozana xuuraa Xoossay eriya gisho
Psalms44:22 Gidoshin
Psalms44:23 Godaw
Psalms44:24 Ne som7uwa nuupe ayis genthay? Nu qohuwanne nu un7aa ayis dogay?
Psalms44:25 Nuuni baanan yegetida; nu asatethay biittara oyketis.
Psalms44:26 Godaw
Psalms45:1 Taani ta yethaa kawas sissana; ta wozanay lo77o qofa pultees; ta inxarsay lo77o xaafiya asa bi7ire mela.
Psalms45:2 Asa ubbaafe neeni mala lo7o; ne mettershay aadho keehatetha qaalan kumis; Xoossay nena merinaw anjis.
Psalms45:3 Wolqaama kawaw
Psalms45:4 Ne tumatethaa
Psalms45:5 Ne toorati qara; enti kawa morketa wozanaa caddo; kawotethati ne tohuwa garsan kundo.
Psalms45:6 Xoossaw
Psalms45:7 Neeni xillotethi dosada geellatethi ixaasa; Hessa gisho
Psalms45:8 Godare uuthan
Psalms45:9 Kawo keethan de7iya maccasata giddon; kawota macca nayti de7oosona. Kawiya Ofira worqan alleeqetada
Psalms45:10 Ta naatte
Psalms45:11 Kawoy ne malan ufaytis; ne godaa gidiya gisho iya boncha.
Psalms45:12 Xiroosa asay new woyto ekidi yaana; dureti nena aaddashana.
Psalms45:13 Kawa na7iya
Psalms45:14 Ba alleeqo ma7uwa ma7ada
Psalms45:15 Enti ufaytishe yidi
Psalms45:16 Kawaw
Psalms45:17 Ta ne sunthaa yeleta ubban
Psalms46:1 Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya
Psalms46:2 Hessa gisho
Psalms46:3 Abbay guummidi gopontikoka
Psalms46:4 Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossay de7iya
Psalms46:5 Xoossay iya giddon de7iya gisho
Psalms46:6 Derey dagammis; kawotethati qaaxoosona; Xoossay ba qaala sissis; biittay til7is.
Psalms46:7 Ubbaafe wolqaama Goday nuura de7ees; Yayqooba Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya besse.
Psalms46:8 Haa yiite; Godaa oosuwa xeellite; biitta waatidi dhaysidaako be7ite.
Psalms46:9 I biitta bolla de7iya olaa ubbaa teqees; dongenne toora menthees; gondalliya taman xuuggees.
Psalms46:10 Wopu giite; taani Xoosse gideysa erite; taani kawotethata giddon dhoqu dhoqu gaana; biitta bollaka dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Psalms46:11 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nuura de7ees; Yayqooba Xoossay nu qosetidi attiya besse.
Psalms47:1 Dere ubbay hinte kushiya baqite; qaala dhoqu oothidi Xoossaa galatite.
Psalms47:2 Ubbaafe dhoqa Goday waani yashshii? biitta ubban I gita kawo.
Psalms47:3 Dereta nuupe garsara
Psalms47:4 I nuus laata biitta dooris; I dosiya Yayqoobi he biittan ceeqetees.
Psalms47:5 Xoossay ufaysaninne ililsan pude dendis
Psalms47:6 Xoossaas zammarit; ee
Psalms47:7 Xoossay biitta ubbaa kawo gidiya gisho
Psalms47:8 Xoossay ba geeshsha araatan uttis
Psalms47:9 Kawotethata halaqati
Psalms48:1 Goday gita; nu Xoossaa kataman iya geeshsha zumaa bolla gita galati iyaw bessees.
Psalms48:2 Biitta ubbaa ufaysi gidida
Psalms48:3 Xoossay he gimbiya giddona; ika iyaw geshe gideysa erisis.
Psalms48:4 Kawoti banta tooranchotara shiiqidosona; Xiyoone olanaw yidosona.
Psalms48:5 Iya be7idi dagammidosona; guye simmidi baqatidosona.
Psalms48:6 Enti yan de7ishe yashshan kokoridosona; iqethi oykida maccasada inxaxidosona.
Psalms48:7 Doloha bagga wolqaama carkon meqiya Tarsesa markabeta mela gididosona.
Psalms48:8 Nu si7idaysada
Psalms48:9 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms48:10 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms48:11 Ne pirdaa gaason Xiyoone asay ufayto; Yihuda kumethay ufaysan ililo.
Psalms48:12 Xiyoone yuushuwan hemetite; I dirsa yuuyite; I shakota taybite.
Psalms48:13 Yaa yeletas odana mela iya gimbiya akeekite; miixata wochite.
Psalms48:14 Hinte
Psalms49:1 Asa ubbay haysa si7ite; biitta bolla de7eysato
Psalms49:2 Dhoqay ziqay
Psalms49:3 Ta wozanaa qofay akeeka immees; ta doonay cincatetha qaala odetees.
Psalms49:4 Ta haythaa leemisoko zaarana; diithi diixashe
Psalms49:5 Meto gallasay yaa wodenne cimmiya morketi; tana teqiya wode ta ayis babbayna?
Psalms49:6 Banta shaluwan ammaneteysatanne banta duretethan ceeqetiya ta morketa ayis babbayna?
Psalms49:7 Ay asika bana wozanaw
Psalms49:8 Asa shempo gatey daro al7o; Ay gate qanxinka gidenna.
Psalms49:9 I hayqonnaadanne duufo gelonnaada
Psalms49:10 Eeyatinne pathonna asati hayqeysada
Psalms49:11 Enti banta biitta bantaba giikoka
Psalms49:12 Asi ay gitatikoka ba gitatethaara kanthenna; I do7ada hayqees.
Psalms49:13 Bantarka banta huuphen ammaneteyisata qaadaynne enti gidaba tuma giya eeyata wursethay haysa.
Psalms49:14 Shukas giigetida dorsatada
Psalms49:15 Shin Xoossay ta shempuwa wozana; I tana hayqo wolqafe ashshana.
Psalms49:16 Asi duretiya wodenne iya bonchoy dariya wode yayyofa.
Psalms49:17 I hayqiya wode aykoka ekidi beenna; iya shaloy iyara issife duufo gelenna.
Psalms49:18 Asi paxa de7iya wode taw kumis giiko
Psalms49:19 simmidi poo7o be7onna
Psalms49:20 Eratethi bayna duretida asi do7ada coo dhayana.
Psalms50:1 Wolqaama Goday
Psalms50:2 Medhon polo yegelsi gidida Xiyoonepe Xoossay poo7ees.
Psalms50:3 Nu Xoossay yaana; si77i geenna; eexiya tamay iya sinthana; wolqaama gotey iya yuushuwana.
Psalms50:4 Xoossay ba asaa pirdiya wode
Psalms50:5 “Yarshon taara caaqida
Psalms50:6 Xoossay pirdiya gisho
Psalms50:7 “Ta asaw
Psalms50:8 Ne yarshuwa gishonne ne xuussa yarshuwa gisho
Psalms50:9 Ne daraape kormata
Psalms50:10 Woran de7iya do7ati ubbay tabaa; mukulu zumaa bolla de7iya mehetika taassa.
Psalms50:11 Taani dhoqa deriyan de7iya kafota ubbaa erayis; denban de7iya medhetethati tayisata.
Psalms50:12 Tana koshaykoka nena oychike; sa7inne sa7an kumidaba ubbay tabaa.
Psalms50:13 Taani kormata ashuwa maynayee? woyko deeshata suuthaa uyanayee?
Psalms50:14 Xoossas galata yarsho imma; Ubbaafe dhoqa Xoossaas ne qangetha gatha.
Psalms50:15 Meto gallas tana xeega; ta nena ashshana; neka tana bonchana” yaagees.
Psalms50:16 Shin Xoossay iita asaa haysada yaagees; “Ta higgiya ne nabbabanaw new ay maati de7ii? Woyko ta caaquwa ne doonan qoncisanaw new ay maati de7ii?
Psalms50:17 Neeni ta timirtiya ixadasa; ta qaala guye yeggadasa.
Psalms50:18 Kaysuwa be7ida wode neeni iyara dabbotadasa; laymateyisata maabaran geladasa.
Psalms50:19 Ne doona iitabaa odetanaw billa yeddadasa; Ne inxarsay wordo haasaya meezetis.
Psalms50:20 Uttada ne ishaa zigiradasa; ne aaye na7aa bolla iitaba odetadasa.
Psalms50:21 Ne haysa ubbaa oothiya wode
Psalms50:22 Hinteno
Psalms50:23 Taw galata yarshey tana bonchees; ba ogiya suurisida asas taani Xoossaa atotetha bessaana” yaagees.
Psalms51:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms51:2 Ta iitatethaafe tana meecca; ta nagaraape tana geeshsha.
Psalms51:3 Taani ta qohuwa erayis; ta nagaray ubba wode ta sinthana.
Psalms51:4 Taani nena
Psalms51:5 Heko ta yeletiya wode nagarancho; ta aaye ulon buroo attiya
Psalms51:6 Neeni asa wozanape tumatethi koyaasa; ta gaatha asatethaa cincatethi tamaarsa.
Psalms51:7 Hisoophe boncon tana wurxa; ta geeyana; tana meecca; ta shachafe aadhada booxana.
Psalms51:8 Ne tana ufaysinne lo77oba sissa; ne mentherethida ta meqethaa zaarada ufaysa.
Psalms51:9 Ne som7uwa ta nagaraape hara soo zaara; ta bala ubbaa qucha.
Psalms51:10 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms51:11 Tana ne sinthafe yeggofa; ne Geeshsha Ayyaana taape ekofa.
Psalms51:12 Ne atotetha ufaysaa taw zaara; ta new kiitetana mela tana zempisa.
Psalms51:13 Ta he wode higge mentheyisata ne ogiya tamaarsana; nagaranchotika neeko simmana.

Psalms52:2 Neno

Psalms52:5 Xoossay nena merinaw menthana; Xoossay nena mentherethananne ne keethaafe dafidi kessana; nena de7on de7eyisata giddofe shoddidi yeggana.

Psalms52:7 “Xoossaa baw geshe oothiboonna

Psalms52:9 Ne oothida gisho merinaw ta nena galatana; neeni lo77o gidiya gisho ne sunthan ufaysi oothana; geeshshata sinthan ta nena sabbana.
Psalms53:1 Eeyati banta wozanan
Psalms53:2 Xoossaa koyiya cinca asi de7iyako be7anaw

Psalms53:4 Asi kathi meysada ta asaa meysati
Psalms53:5 Enti dagammi eronna dagama dagammana; Xoossay ba asaa morketa meqethaa laallana; Xoossay enta kadhida gisho enti yeellatana.

Psalms55:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms55:2 Tana si7a; ta woosaas zaaro imma; ta qofay tana waaysin
Psalms55:3 Ta morketa girsa si7ada dagammas; iitata mandiya gaason kokoras. Enti ta bolla meto ehoosona; yilon dendidi tana morkoosona.
Psalms55:4 Ta wozanay dirgees; hayqo hirgay tana wodhees.
Psalms55:5 Tana yashshinne kokorsi oykis; iita dagami ta bolla wodhis.
Psalms55:6 Holleda taw qefey de7iyako
Psalms55:7 Taani haakada baanashin; bazzon aqanashin.
Psalms55:8 Taani gotepenne carkofe baqatada
Psalms55:9 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms55:10 Iitati gallasinne qamma katamaa gimbe dirsaa yuuyosona; waayeynne metoy katamaa giddon de7ees.
Psalms55:11 Dhayoy iya giddon de7ees; naaqoynne cimoy iya dabaabape shaaketenna.
Psalms55:12 Tana cayey ta morkiya gidenna; iya gidiyako ta danda7anashin. Ta bolla ceeqetey tana ixeysa gidenna; iya gidiyako ta iyape qosetanashin.
Psalms55:13 Shin hessa oothey nena
Psalms55:14 Nu issoy issuwara ulo oda odetida; Xoossa keethan dabaaban asaara issife simeretida.
Psalms55:15 Enta wozanan iitatethi de7iya gisho
Psalms55:16 Shin taani Xoossaa xeegana; Goday tana ashshana.
Psalms55:17 Wonta
Psalms55:18 Daroti tana morkikoka
Psalms55:19 Benipe ba araatan uttida Xoossay
Psalms55:20 Ta laggey ba dabbota qohis; entara caaqida caaquwa menthis.
Psalms55:21 Iya doonay oysape liiqo; shin ba wozanan ola denthees. Iya inxarsay zaytepe aadhida shugo; shin qanxanaw giigida qara mashsha mela.
Psalms55:22 Ne toohuwa Xoossa bolla yegga; I nena katisana. Xoossay xilloti
Psalms55:23 Shin Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms56:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms56:2 Ta morketi kumetha gallas tana yedhoosona; otoron tana oliya asay daro.
Psalms56:3 Tana yashshiya wode ta nenan ammanetayis.
Psalms56:4 Taani Xoossan ammanetayis; yayyike; iya qaala galatiya Xoossan ammanetayis; asi tana ay oothanee?
Psalms56:5 Kumetha gallasan ta morketi bala koyoosona; tana qohanaw ubba wode tobboosona.
Psalms56:6 Enti ta bolla maqetoosona; tana qohanaw geeddosona. Ta tango ubba kaalloosona; tana wodhanaw koyoosona.
Psalms56:7 Enti ay ogeraka kessi ekana mela oothofa; ne hanquwan he kawotethata kawusha.
Psalms56:8 Ta waayiya tayba; ne ta afuthaa makadasa; enti ne mazgabiyan de7okona?
Psalms56:9 Ta nena xeegiya wode
Psalms56:10 Ta iya qaala galatiya Xoossan
Psalms56:11 ta he Xoossan ammanetayis; yayyike. asi tana ay oothannee?
Psalms56:12 Abeeti Xoossaw ta new qangidabay de7ees; hessa galataa yarsho oothada ta new immana.

Psalms58:5 Biteysi ay cinca gidikoka

Psalms59:1 Abeeti ta Xoossaw
Psalms59:2 Iita ootheysatape tana ashsha; suuthu gussiya asatape tana ashsha.

Psalms59:4 Ta ay balaka oothonna tana qohanaw giigidosona; hessa be7a; tana maaddanaw denda.

Psalms59:6 Enti katamaa giddon yuuyishe pee7idi
Psalms59:7 Enta doonape keyeysa be7a; enta inxarsay mashsha mela; asi entana si7eysa qopokona.
Psalms59:8 Shin abeeti Godaw
Psalms59:9 Xoossaw
Psalms59:10 Ta Xoossay ba siiquwan taako yaana; ta Xoossay ta morketa xoonetethaa tana bessaana.
Psalms59:11 Ta asati dogonna mela ne enta wodhopa. Abeeti Godaw
Psalms59:12 Enta doonape keyiya nagaraa gisho enta inxarsaafe pultiya qaala gisho
Psalms59:13 ne hanquwan enta dhaysa; enta kumethi digga. Hessan Xoossay Yayqooba zeretha haareysanne sa7aa gaxaa gakanaw haareysi eretana.
Psalms59:14 Enti katamaa giddon yuuyishe pee7idi
Psalms59:15 Enti miyaba demmanaw toylatoosona; kallona attida laawiya kana gidoosona.
Psalms59:16 Shin taani ne wolqaa sabbana; wonta ne siiquwa yexana. Neeni taw ta waayiya gallas
Psalms59:17 Abeeti taw wolqa gidida Xoossaw
Psalms60:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms60:2 Ne biitta qaathadasanne za7isadasa; biittay kokoriya gisho
Psalms60:3 Neeni ne asaa meto bessadasa; nuna gandigarsiya woyne ushshadasa.
Psalms60:4 New yayyeysati banta morke dongefe attana mela malla immadasa.
Psalms60:5 Ne siiqeysati attana mela
Psalms60:6 Xoossay ba geeshsha bessan haysada yaagis; “Taani xoonada Seekema biitta shaakana; Sukota zangaara wadhana.
Psalms60:7 Galadi tabaa; Minaaseyka taassa; Efreemey ta huuphe ashshiya birata qoobe; Yihudi ta kawota xam7aa.
Psalms60:8 Moo7abey ta meecetiya kere; Edoomey tabaa gideysa erisanaw
Psalms60:9 Gimbetida katamaako tana oone efanay? Edoome gakanaw tana oone kaalethanay?
Psalms60:10 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms60:11 Asa maadoy pathonna gisho
Psalms60:12 Xoossaa wolqan nu morketa xoonana; I nu morketa yedhana.
Psalms61:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms61:2 Taani biitta gaxan de7ishin
Psalms61:3 Ne taw qotanne ta morketape naagetiya mino miixa.
Psalms61:4 Taani ne dunkaaniyan merinaw darkinaashin! Taani ne qefiya hapha garsan saro attarkinaashin!
Psalms61:5 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms61:6 Kawa laytha adussa; I yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw de7o.
Psalms61:7 I Xoossaa sinthan merinaw kawoto; ne siiquwaninne ne tuman iya naaga.
Psalms61:8 Hessa gisho ta qangetha gallas gallas gathana; ne sunthaa ubba wode sabbana.
Psalms62:1 Xoossaa xalaalan ta shempo demmas; ta atotethay iyape yees.
Psalms62:2 Iya xalaali ta zaallanne ta atotetha; I ta qosetiya attiya bessi gidiya gisho dagammike.
Psalms62:3 Woddana haniya godaanne qaaxiya dirsi daaniya uraa wodhanaw
Psalms62:4 Enti iya boncho bessaafe denthanaw koyoosona; enti wordon ufaytoosona. Banta doonan anjoosona; shin banta wozanan baaddoosona.
Psalms62:5 Ta shempete! Xoossaa xalaala si77i gada naaga; ta ufaysay iyape yees.
Psalms62:6 Iya xalaali ta zaallanne ta atotetha; taani qosetiya bessi gidiya gisho dagammike.
Psalms62:7 Ta atotethaynne ta bonchoy Xoossana; I ta mino zaallanne ta miixaa.
Psalms62:8 Asaw
Psalms62:9 Asi
Psalms62:10 Bonqen ammanetofite; kaysoti shiishidi duretethan otortofite. Hinte duretethay darikoka
Psalms62:11 Xoossay issi toho odis; taani nam7u oda si7as; wolqi xoossasa.
Psalms62:12 Merinaa siiqoy Xoossaba; Abeeti Godaw
Psalms63:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms63:2 Ta nena geeshsha bessan xeellas; ne wolqaanne ne bonchuwa taani be7as.
Psalms63:3 Ne siiqoy de7ope lo77iya gisho
Psalms63:4 Ta de7o laythan nena galatana; ne sunthan ta kushiya pude miccana.
Psalms63:5 Asi lo77o kathi midi kalleysada ta nenan kallana. Taani ta inxarsan ufaysa yethan nena galatana.
Psalms63:6 Taani ta hiixan nena hassayayis; qamma kumethan nebaa qopayis;
Psalms63:7 Ne tana maaddiya gisho
Psalms63:8 Ta shempiya neera oyketasu; ne ushacha kushey tana oykidi naagees.
Psalms63:9 Shin tana wodhanaw koyeysati
Psalms63:10 Enti mashshas aadhidi imetana; enti suudhumes kaho gidana.
Psalms63:11 Shin kawoy Xoossan ufaytana. Xoossaa sunthan caaqiya ubbay iya galatana; shin wordanchota doonay gordetana.
Psalms64:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms64:2 Nagaranchota maqofenne iitata duulataape tana gentha.
Psalms64:3 Enti banta inxarsaa mashsha mela leefidosona; iita qaalata donge toorada mallidi yeddoosona.
Psalms64:4 Enti qosetidi xillo asi banta dongiyan qohoosona; akeeki bayna dukoosona; yayyokona.
Psalms64:5 Enti banta iita maquwas issoy issuwa minthethoosona. Banta xihiya wothana bessa koyoosona; enti
Psalms64:6 Enti iitabaa maqetishe
Psalms64:7 Shin Xoossay enta ba dongiyan dukana; enti akeekona madunxana.
Psalms64:8 Enta maquwa I enta bolla zaarana; enta be7iya ubbay huuphe qaathana.
Psalms64:9 He wode asa ubbay Xoossas yayyana; iya oosuwa odananne zaari zaari qopana.
Psalms64:10 Xilloti Godan ufayto; iyako baqatidi atto; wozana suureti ubbay iya galato.
Psalms65:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms65:2 Neeni woosa si7iya gisho
Psalms65:3 Nu nagaray nuna muukida wode
Psalms65:4 Ne dooridaysatinne ne dabaaban daana mela neeko shiishida asi anjetidaysa. Nuuni ne son
Psalms65:5 Abeeti nu atotethaw
Psalms65:6 Neeni ne wolqan dereta minthadasa; ne wolqaa dancadasa.
Psalms65:7 Neeni abba girsaanne beeta guntha si77i oothaasa; yarkiya asaa waasuwa irxisaasa.
Psalms65:8 Ne oothida malaata gisho
Psalms65:9 Ne ira immada biitta naagasa; daro dureyasa; asaas kathay dolana mela Xoossa shaafay haathan kumidaysa; hessada oothada ne giigisadasa.
Psalms65:10 Goshshas haathe immaasa; biitta shugisada ollaa kunthaasa. Ne iran zaarada irxisaasa; kathay dolana diccana mela anjaasa.
Psalms65:11 Laytha kalo laythi oothaasa; ne aadhiya bessa ubbay kumidi palahana.
Psalms65:12 Hentha bessata maatan kunthaasa; zumata ufaysi mayzaasa.
Psalms65:13 Ne hentha bessata dorsata kunthaasa; zangaara biittan kathi kunthaasa; enti ufaysan ililishe yexoosona.
Psalms66:1 Biitta ubbay hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi
Psalms66:2 Xoossaa sunthaas bonchon yexite; boncho galataa iyaw immite.

Psalms66:4 Biitta ubbay nena goyinnees; nena sabbees; ne sunthaas galatan yexoosona” yaagite.
Psalms66:5 Haayite; Xoossay oothidaba be7ite; asaa giddon malaalsiya ooso oothis.

Psalms66:7 I ba wolqan merinaw haarees. Kawotethata ba ayfen xeellees; hessa gisho

Psalms66:11 Ne nuna xihen gelsadasa; nu zokon deexo toho wothadasa.

Psalms68:1 Xoossay dendo; iya morketi laaleto; Iya ixeysati iya sinthafe baqato.
Psalms68:2 Cuyay carkora dendidi dhaysiya mela
Psalms68:3 Shin xilloti hashshu go; Xoossaa sinthan ufayto; ufaysan ililo.
Psalms68:4 Xoossaas yexite; iya sunthaa sabbite; shaaran beysas oge kessite; iya sunthay Godaa; iya sinthan ufaytite.
Psalms68:5 Xoossay ba de7iya geeshsha bessan
Psalms68:6 Xoossay bizzatas soo asi immees; qasho keethan de7eyisata birshidi
Psalms68:7 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms68:8 Siina Xoossaa yuussaninne
Psalms68:9 Abeeti Xoossaw neeni ira darsada bukisadasa; laddida biitta zaarada oorathaasa.
Psalms68:10 Ne asay yan duussu oykis; abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms68:11 Goday kiittis; daro Maccasati he kiitaa markatidosona.
Psalms68:12 Kawotinne enta olanchoti baqatidi guye simmidosona; son attida maccasati di7o shaaketidosona.
Psalms68:13 Phooliya worqa qefera de7iya

Psalms68:15 Baasane zumaw
Psalms68:16 Daro xeerati de7iya zumato
Psalms68:17 Xoossaa ola para gaareti tammu mukulu toho tammu mukulan taybetees; Goday Siina zumaape ba geeshsha bessaa yis.
Psalms68:18 Di7etida darota ekidi
Psalms68:19 Gallas gallas nu toohuwa tookiya Goday galatetto; Xoossay nuna ashsheysa.
Psalms68:20 Nu Xoossay nuna ashshiya Xoossaa gidennee? Hayqope ashshiya Xoossay iya.
Psalms68:21 Xoossay tuma ba morketa huuphiya tinchana; nagara ogen hemetiya asa
Psalms68:22 “Taani hinte morketa Baasanepe zaarada ehana; ta enta ciimmo abbafe kessada guye ehana.
Psalms68:23 Hessika
Psalms68:24 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms68:25 Yexeysati sinthana; diixeysati guyena; qassi karaabo baqiya geela7oti giddona.
Psalms68:26 Hinte “Xoossa gita shiiqon galatite; hinteno
Psalms68:27 He salpiyan ubbaafe kaalo gidida Biniyaame kochay koyro taybetoosona. Kaallidi Yihuda halaqati banta cugan de7oosona; wursethan Zabloona halaqatinne Niftaaleme halaqati taybetoosona.

Psalms68:29 Hessa gisho

Psalms68:32 Hinteno

Psalms69:1 Haathi taw qoodhe gakida gisho
Psalms69:2 Eqiya bessi bayna ciimmon mitettas; ciimmo haatha giddo gelas; haatha zuley ta bollara aadhis.
Psalms69:3 Maado demmanaw waassashe daaburas; ta kottonoy melis. Ta Xoossaa xeellishin
Psalms69:4 Tana coo ixeysati ta huuphe binaanape daro; Wordon tana morkeysatinne dhaysanaw koyeysati daro; ta kaysotonnaba zaara gidoosona.
Psalms69:5 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms69:6 Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw
Psalms69:7 Ta ne gisho cashshe danda7as; ta som7oy yeella ma7iday ne gishosa.
Psalms69:8 Taani ta ishatas imathe
Psalms69:9 Taani ne keethas mishetiya mishay tana tamada xuuggees; nena cayiya cashshay ta bolla wodhis.
Psalms69:10 Taani xooman tana kawushida wode
Psalms69:11 Taani kayo ma7o ma7ida wode
Psalms69:12 Katama pengen utteysatas zigrisas attas; mathoteysati tabaa yethi kessidosona.
Psalms69:13 Shin Godaw
Psalms69:14 Silimon mitettonnaada tana ashsha; ta morketape tana ashsha
Psalms69:15 Di7o haathay tana muukofo; ciimmo haathay tana mittofo; ziqa ollay ba doona ta bolla gordofo.
Psalms69:16 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms69:17 Ne aylliyafe ne som7uwa genthofa; taani un7an de7iya gisho taw elle zaaro imma.
Psalms69:18 Taako shiiqa; tana woza; ta morketape tana la77a kessa.
Psalms69:19 Ta cashshaa
Psalms69:20 Cashshay tana hargancho oothis; taw qadhetiya asi koyas. Shin issi asika demmabike; tana minthethiya asi xeellas; shin bentibeenna.
Psalms69:21 Ta kathan ciiye walakidosona; ta saamuwas caala ushshi immidosona.
Psalms69:22 Enta gaytay entaw xihe gido; enta yarshoy entaw xihe gido.
Psalms69:23 Xeellonnaada enta ayfey goozeto; enta zokoy kuuno.
Psalms69:24 Ne hanquwa enta bolla tiga; suulliya ne sheney enta yedetho.
Psalms69:25 Enta kambey kaysi gido; enta dunkaaniyan de7iya asi dhayo.
Psalms69:26 Ne seeridaysata enti yedethidosona; ne madunxisidaysata enti yeessosona.
Psalms69:27 Enti nagaraa bolla nagara gujana mela aggaaga; ne maarotethaafe enta aybika gakofo.
Psalms69:28 Enti de7o maxaafape qusheto; xillo asaara mazgabetofo.
Psalms69:29 Ta waayeninne un7an de7ayis; abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms69:30 Taani Xoossaa sunthaa mazmuren galatana; galata imon iya gitayana.
Psalms69:31 Hessi boora yarshofe
Psalms69:32 Naaqetidaysati hessa be7ana; ufaytana; hinteno
Psalms69:33 Goday manqota si7ees; qasho keethan de7iya ba asaa kadhenna.
Psalms69:34 Saloy
Psalms69:35 Xoossay Xiyoone ashshana; Yihuda katamaa zaaridi keexana; asay yan daananne biittayka entaba gidana.

Psalms72:1 Xoossaw
Psalms72:2 I ne asaas xillotethan pirdana; qohetidaysatas suuren daynnatana.
Psalms72:3 Dereti duretethi
Psalms72:4 Kawoy qohetidaysata gisho mooteto; manqota ashsho; un7etheyisata mentho.
Psalms72:5 Xoossaw
Psalms72:6 Kawoy goshshan bukiya ira melanne biitta kalsiya puuse ira mela gido.
Psalms72:7 Iya laytha ubban xillo asati daayo; ageeni dhayana gakanaw sarotethi daro.
Psalms72:8 Abbaafe abba gakanaw
Psalms72:9 Bazzon de7iya asati iya goyinno; iya morketi baana laaco.
Psalms72:10 Tarsesanne yuushoy abban teqetida biittata
Psalms72:11 Kawoti ubbay iyaw gulbato; kawotethati ubbay iyaw kiiteto.
Psalms72:12 Iyako waassiya manqota
Psalms72:13 Manqotasinne daaburanchotas I qadhetees; manqota shempuwa hayqope ashshees.
Psalms72:14 Enta suuthay iya sinthan al7o gidiya gisho
Psalms72:15 Kawoy daro laythi gam7o; Arabe biitta worqay iyaw yo. Asay iya gisho ubba wode woosso; gallas ubban I anjeto.
Psalms72:16 Biittan kathi palaho; dereti kathan kametto. Libaanose deriya bolla kathi ayfiyada ayfo; denbi maatan kumiyada asay katamaa kumo.
Psalms72:17 Kawa sunthay merinaw de7o; awada ubba wode xeegetishe gam7o. Asa ubbay iya baggara anjetana; kawotethati iya “anjetidaysa” yaagana.

Psalms73:1 Tuma Xoossay Isra7eeles lo77o; wozana geeshshatas I keeha.
Psalms73:2 Shin ta tohoy dhubetanaw guuthu attis; ta tangoy hallixanaw matis.
Psalms73:3 Hessi haniday iita asatinne otoranchoti
Psalms73:4 Enta waayey gakonna gisho
Psalms73:5 Enti hara asada waayetokona; hara asada meton shocetokona.

Psalms73:7 Enta wozanay iitabaa pultees; enta qofay iita halchon kumis.

Psalms73:11 Enti

Psalms73:14 Gallasa kumethi taani meton shocetas; wonta wonta seeretas.

Psalms73:19 Enti ellesidi dhayidosona; dagaman issoy attonna wuridosona.

Psalms73:22 akeekona eeya asi gidas; ne sinthan mehe gidas.

Psalms73:27 Neepe haakeysati dhayana; nena kaddeyisata ubbaa ne wursana.

Psalms74:3 Laaletida ne keethaa yada xeella; morketi yan de7iyaba ubbaa dhaysidosona.
Psalms74:4 Ne morketi ne keethan
Psalms74:5 Enti mithi qanxanaw wora giddon eqidi
Psalms74:6 Enti kushe hiillan alleeqida oosota ubbaa
Psalms74:7 Ne keetha taman xuuggidi dhaysidosona; ne sunthay xeegetiya bessaa tunisidosona.

Psalms74:9 He wode malaati nuus imetenna; nabeyka deenna. Hessi awude gakanaw gam7aneko
Psalms74:10 Xoossaw

Psalms75:4 Taani otoranchota
Psalms75:5 ‘Hinte kaciya salo denthofite; qoodhe qaathidi haasayopite’ ” yaagana.
Psalms75:6 Bonchoy dolohape woyko wulohape woyko mela biittafe yeenna.
Psalms75:7 Shin suure pirdey Xoossaa; I issuwa bolla pirdees; hankuwa shatinthees.
Psalms75:8 Xoossaa kushen issi wanci de7ees; he wancay Xoossaa hanqo woyne ushshan kumidi uttis. I he ushshafe tigin
Psalms75:9 Shin taani Yayqooba Xoossaaba odana; iya merinaw sabbana.
Psalms75:10 I
Psalms76:1 Xoossay Yihudan eretis; iya sunthay Isra7eelen gita.
Psalms76:2 Iya dunkaaney Saalemana; I de7iya bessay Xiyoonena.
Psalms76:3 Yan xongetiya morke dongiya
Psalms76:4 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms76:5 Gooba tooranchoti bonqetidosona; enti wolqaama dhisko dhiskidosona; entafe issoyka ba kushiya denthibeenna.
Psalms76:6 Abeeti Yayqooba Xoossaw
Psalms76:7 Shin abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms76:8 Neeni pirdaa salope sissida wode
Psalms76:9 Neeni biittan qohetida asaa ashshanawunne entaw pirdanaw dendiya wode hessi hannis.
Psalms76:10 Ne ase hanqikoka new boncho gidees; Olape attida asati ne ba7aale bonchana.
Psalms76:11 Godaas hinte Xoossaas qangethi gathite; hinteno iya matan de7iya kawotethato
Psalms76:12 I halaqata ayyaana kawushshees; wolqaama kawotaka daganthees.
Psalms77:1 Taani Xoossaa maggannayis; tana si7a gada iyako waassayis.
Psalms77:2 Ta metuwa gallasan Godaa koyas; qamma kumethi shempoy bayna ta kushiya miccas; gidoshin
Psalms77:3 Taani Xoossaba qopiya wode oolayis; taani wotha denthida wode ta shempoy daaburees.
Psalms77:4 Qamma kumethi tana dhisko diggada aysadasa; ta un7etida gisho odetanaw danda7abike.
Psalms77:5 Taani aadhida gallasata qopas; kase laythata hassayas.
Psalms77:6 Taani qamma gita qofan aqas; ta wozanan wotha denthashe
Psalms77:7 “Xoossay nuna merinaw aggideyee? hizape guye I nuus keeheneyee?
Psalms77:8 Iya siiqoy attideyee? I odida qaala merinaw poleneyee?
Psalms77:9 Xoossay ba maarota dogideyee? Ba qadhiya hanqon laammideyee?” yaagada oychas.
Psalms77:10 Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaw
Psalms77:11 Godaa oosota taani qopana; I beni oothida malaalsiya oosota hassayana.
Psalms77:12 Ne oosota taani zaara zaarada qopana; ne wolqaama oosota taani wotha denthana.
Psalms77:13 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms77:14 Neeni malaalsiyaba oothiya Xoossaa; asaa giddon ne wolqaa qoncisaasa.
Psalms77:15 Ne asaa
Psalms77:16 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms77:17 Shaarati haathe duge tigidosona; daday salon guummis; ne wol7anthay yan han wol7amis.
Psalms77:18 Ne dadaa guunthay uushuwa giddon guummis; ne wol7anthay sa7aa poo7isis; biittay qaaxis; kokoris.
Psalms77:19 Neeni abba giddora hemetaasa; ciimmo abba giddora kanthaasa; shin ne tohoy yedhida bessay bentenna.
Psalms77:20 Muse kushennine Aarona kushen ne asaa dorsa wudeda kaalethadasa.
Psalms78:1 Ta asaw
Psalms78:2 Taani ta doona leemison dooyana; benipe geemmida xuura qoncisana.
Psalms78:3 Nuuni si7idaysanne eridaysa
Psalms78:4 Hessata nuuni enta naytape qosoko; Godaas bessiya galataa
Psalms78:5 I Yayqooba zerethaas kiitaa
Psalms78:6 Kaalliya yeletay hessa erana mela
Psalms78:7 He wode enti Xoossan ammanetena; I oothidaba balokona; iya kiitaa naagana.
Psalms78:8 Enti kase banta aawatada wozana muume yeleta
Psalms78:9 Efreema asay donge dancikoka
Psalms78:10 Enti Xoossaa caaquwa naagibookona; iya higgiyan hemetonna ixidosona.
Psalms78:11 Enti I oothida oosuwanne I bessida malaata dogidosona.
Psalms78:12 I enta aawata sinthan Gibxe biittan
Psalms78:13 Abbaa shaakidi giddora enta pinthis; haatha shaakidi yan han godada essis.
Psalms78:14 I enta gallas shaaran
Psalms78:15 I mela biittan zaalla phalqidi
Psalms78:16 Zaallafe haathe pultisidi
Psalms78:17 Shin enti iya bolla nagara gujidi oothidosona; Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa bolla mela biittan makallidosona.
Psalms78:18 Banta amotida kathaa oychidi
Psalms78:19 Enti Xoossaa bolla haysada yaagidi haasayidosona; “Mela biittan Xoossay nuus kathi giigisanaw danda7ii?
Psalms78:20 Zaalla shocin pultoy keyidi shaafa haathi goggis; shin I nuus kathi immanaw danda7ii? Woyko ba asaas asho immanaw danda7ii?” yaagidosona.
Psalms78:21 Goday hessa si7ida wode daro hanqetis; Yayqooba kochata bolla tami eexis; Isra7eele bolla iya hanqoy daris.
Psalms78:22 Hessika enti Xoossan ammanibookona; woyko iya ashuwan ammanetibokona.
Psalms78:23 Gidoshin
Psalms78:24 Enta muzanaw manna bukisis; salo kathaa entaw immis.
Psalms78:25 Kiitanchota kathi asay mis; Xoossay entaw miyaba darsidi immis.
Psalms78:26 Doloha carkoy carkana mela oothis; ba wolqan dugeha carkuwa denthis.
Psalms78:27 I asaas asho biitta kessis; paalliya kafota abba gaxa shafeda bukisis.
Psalms78:28 Enti de7iya bessan
Psalms78:29 Enti amotidaysa entaw immis; midi banta ganjiya gathidosona.
Psalms78:30 Shin enti banta amuwa aathona de7ishin
Psalms78:31 Xoossaa hanqoy enta bolla wodhis; enta giddofe wolqaama asata wodhis; Isra7eelepe na7atethata dhukis.
Psalms78:32 He ubbay haninka nagara ooso aggibokona; daro malaata oothinka ammanibookona.
Psalms78:33 Hessa gisho
Psalms78:34 Xoossay entafe baggaa wodhiya wode iya koydosona
Psalms78:35 Xoossay enta zaalla gideysa
Psalms78:36 Shin enti banta inxarsan wordotidosona; banta doonan cimmidosona.
Psalms78:37 Enta wozanay Xoossan minnidi eqenna; iya caaquwas ammanetokona.
Psalms78:38 Shin I enta maaris enta nagaraa atto gis; enta dhaysibeenna. Daro wode ba hanquwa teqis; ba gaduwa kumethi enta bolla yeddibeenna.
Psalms78:39 Enti hayqiya asho gideysanne keyidi simmonna shempo gideysa akeekis.
Psalms78:40 Enti mela biittan iya bolla aapun toho makallidona! Mela biittan iya aapun toho lancisidonaa!
Psalms78:41 Enti zaari zaaridi Xoossaa paacidosona; Isra7eele Geeshshaa yiloyidosona.
Psalms78:42 Entana morketa kushepe ashshida gallasaa
Psalms78:43 I Gibxen oothida malaata
Psalms78:44 Enta shaafa haathata suuthu laammis; hessa gisho
Psalms78:45 Enta waaysiya udunxetanne enta biitta dhaysiya shodheta kiittis.
Psalms78:46 Dolida kathaa duggos
Psalms78:47 Enta woyniya shachan
Psalms78:48 Enta meheta shachan wodhis; enta dorsata dadan wursis.
Psalms78:49 Dhaysiya kiitancho cugara
Psalms78:50 Ba hanquwas oge giigisis; enta dhayos aathidi immis; enta hayqope ashshibeenna.
Psalms78:51 Gibxe bayra nayta ubbaa shocis; Kaama dunkaanen koyro nayta wodhis;
Psalms78:52 Shin ba asaa dorsada kessis; wudeda mela biittan heemmis.
Psalms78:53 I enta saro kaalethida gisho babibookona; shin enta morketa abbay mittis.
Psalms78:54 I enta ba geeshsha biitta
Psalms78:55 I enta sinthafe kawotethata gooddis; enta biitta Isra7eele kochatas laata oothidi shaakis; ba asaas enta keethaa immis.
Psalms78:56 Gidoshin
Psalms78:57 Enti banta aawatada geellatanne minnidi eqonna asi gididosona; wobe toorada wora wodhidosona.
Psalms78:58 Dhoqa goyinno bessatan iya yiloyidosona; banta eeqatara iya qanaatisidosona.
Psalms78:59 Xoossay hessa si7ida wode shenetis; Isra7eele ubbaa kadhis.
Psalms78:60 Seelon I de7iya ba bessaa
Psalms78:61 Xoossa wolqaasinne bonchuwas malaata gidida Taabotiya morketa kushen aathidi immis.
Psalms78:62 I ba asaa bolla shenetis; enta mashshas aathidi immis.
Psalms78:63 Na7atethati ubbay taman meetetidosona; geela7oti azina gelonna attidosona.
Psalms78:64 Enta kahineti mashshan wuridosona; enta macheti yeekonna mela digetidosona.
Psalms78:65 Goday dhiskofe barkiya asada dendis; woyne ushsha mathoy aadhida asada hanis.
Psalms78:66 I ba morketa guye zaaridi shocis; enta merinaw yeellayis.
Psalms78:67 Yoosefa dunkaaniya kadhis; Efreema kochaa dooribeenna.
Psalms78:68 Shin Yihuda kochaanne I dosiya Xiyoone deriya dooris.
Psalms78:69 Ba keethaa saloda dhoqu oothidi keexis; sa7ada merinaw essis.
Psalms78:70 Ba aylliya Dawita dooridi
Psalms78:71 Dorse heemmiya bessafe denthidi
Psalms78:72 Dawiti enta suure wozanan heemmis; ba cincatethan kaalethis.
Psalms79:1 Xoossaw
Psalms79:2 Ne aylleta aha salo kafotas
Psalms79:3 Enta suuthaa Yerusalaame yuushon haathada gussidosona; enta aha moogiya asi dhayis.
Psalms79:4 Nu shoorotas nuuni miichas
Psalms79:5 Godaw
Psalms79:6 Nena eronna dereta bolla
Psalms79:7 Hessika enti Yayqooba mida gishonne enti de7iya bessaa dhaysida gishosa.

Psalms79:9 Abeeti nuna ashshiya Xoossaw
Psalms79:10 Dereti

Psalms79:12 Godaw
Psalms79:13 He wode nuuni ne asay
Psalms80:1 Yoosefa dorsa wudeda kaaletheyso
Psalms80:2 Efreema
Psalms80:3 Xoossaw nuna zaara; nu attanaada ne som7uwa nuus poo7isa.
Psalms80:4 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw
Psalms80:5 Neeni enta yeeho kathada muzadasa; afuthu haathada ushshadasa.
Psalms80:6 Nu shooroti nu biitta ekanaw banta giddon oyaana mela oothadasa; nu morketi nu bolla miicidosona.
Psalms80:7 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw nuna zaara; nu attanaada ne som7uwa nuus poo7isa.
Psalms80:8 Gibxefe woyne ehadasa; kawotethata yedethada
Psalms80:9 Neeni biitta qeexadasa; I xapho yeddidi
Psalms80:10 Dereti iya kuyan
Psalms80:11 Ba tasheta Medetiraane Abbaa gakanaw
Psalms80:12 Yaatin
Psalms80:13 Bazzo gudunthoy iya bolla gupis; wora do7ati iya midosona.
Psalms80:14 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaw nuuko simma; salora duge xeellada; ha woyniya naaga.
Psalms80:15 I ne ushacha kushey tokida xapho; neeni new dichida puute.
Psalms80:16 Ne morketi ne woyniya qanxidosona; taman xuuggidosona; enta ne hanquwan dhaysa.
Psalms80:17 Ne kushey ne ushachan de7iya asaa
Psalms80:18 Hiza nuuni guye simmoko; Nuna paxa wotha; ne sunthaa galatana.
Psalms80:19 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw
Psalms81:1 Nuus wolqa gidida Xoossaas ufaysan yexite; Yayqooba Xoossaas ililite.
Psalms81:2 Yethi doomite; karaabo baqite; diithaninne maasinqon yexite.
Psalms81:3 Ageeni xeeriya wode
Psalms81:4 Hessi Isra7eele biittan higge; Yayqooba Xoossay immida woga.
Psalms81:5 I Gibxe biitta shocida wode
Psalms81:6 “Hinte hashiya toohope
Psalms81:7 Hinte metuwan tana xeegideta; ta hintena ashshas; taani dechiya shaara giddofe hintena allas; Mariba pultuwa matan ta hintena paacas.”
Psalms81:8 “Ta asaw
Psalms81:9 Hinte giddon allaga xoossi de7opo; hara xoosse goyinnofite.
Psalms81:10 Gibxe biittafe hintena kessida
Psalms81:11 “Shin ta asay tana si7ibookona; Isra7eeley taw kiitetibeenna.
Psalms81:12 Hessa gisho
Psalms81:13 Ta asay tana si7idaako aybe; Isra7eeley ta ogiya kaallidaako aybi de7i;
Psalms81:14 Taani enta morketa eeson xoonanashin; enta ixeyisata bolla ta kushiya denthanashin.
Psalms81:15 Godaa ixeysati iya sinthan hokana; enta seeray merinaw gidana.
Psalms81:16 Taani hintena lo77o giste muzana; zaallafe keyiya eessan hintena kalsana.”
Psalms82:1 Xoossay salo shiiquwa giddon
Psalms82:2 “Hinte awude gakanaw wobbe pirdanee? awude gakanaw iitata bagga gidanee?”
Psalms82:3 Metootanchotasinne aawi baynaysatas mootetite; manqotanne qohetida asaa maata naagisite.
Psalms82:4 Daaburanchotanne metootanchota ashshite; iitata kushepe enta yegisite.
Psalms82:5 Hintew eratethinne akeeki baawa; enti dhuman simeretoosona; biitta baasoti qaaxidosona.
Psalms82:6 Taani
Psalms82:7 Gidoshin hinte asi hayqeysada hayqana; hara halaqati kundeysada kundana” yaagas.
Psalms82:8 Xoossaw
Psalms83:1 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms83:2 Ne morketi ne bolla dendeysa
Psalms83:3 Enti ne asaa bolla geeman duulatoosona; neeni dosiya asaa bolla maqetoosona.
Psalms83:4 “Haayite
Psalms83:5 Enti issi wozanan gididi maqetoosona; ne bolla dendanaw caaqidosona.
Psalms83:6 Enti
Psalms83:7 Gebaalanne Amoone asaa

Psalms83:9 Neeni
Psalms83:10 Enti Endooran dhayidosona; enta ahay denban wooqidi attis.

Psalms83:12 Enti

Psalms85:7 Abeeti Godaw

Psalms85:9 Iya bonchoy nu biittan daana mela

Psalms88:1 Godaw
Psalms88:2 Ta woosay ne sinthe gako; ne haythay ta waasuwa si7o.
Psalms88:3 Ta shempoy meto kallida gisho
Psalms88:4 Duufo geliya asaara taybetas; wolqi bayna asi gidas.
Psalms88:5 Taani ahata giddon yegetida asa mela; hayqidi duufon zin7ida asa mela. Hizape neeni hassayonna asinne neepe duuxida asa mela gidas.
Psalms88:6 Neeni tana ciimmon
Psalms88:7 Ne hanqoy tana deexees; ne hanquwa beetay tana muukis.
Psalms88:8 Neeni ta dabbota taape haassadasa; enti tana shaatettana mela oothadasa. Tana teqidosona; kessa ekanaw danda7ike.
Psalms88:9 Godaw
Psalms88:10 Hayqidaysatas ne malaalsiyaba oothayee? Enti dendidi nena galatonayee?
Psalms88:11 Merinaa ne siiqoy duufon
Psalms88:12 Ne malaalsiya oosoy dhuman
Psalms88:13 Godaw
Psalms88:14 Godaw
Psalms88:15 Na7atethafe doomada taani un7etas; hayqos matas; ne tana daganthin ufaysi qanxas.
Psalms88:16 Ne suulliya hanqoy ta bolla uushis; ne daganthoy tana dhaysis.
Psalms88:17 Enti gallas kumethi di7oda tana teqidosona; issife shiiqidi tana oykidosona.
Psalms88:18 Ta laggetanne taw mata asata taape haassadasa; taw dabboy dhuma xalaala.
Psalms89:1 Godaw
Psalms89:2 Ne siiqoy merinaw eqidaysanne tumatethaa neeni salon minthada essidaysa odana.
Psalms89:3 Neeni
Psalms89:4 ‘Taani ne kochaa merinaw kawothana; ne araata yeleta ubban minthana’ ” yaagadasa.
Psalms89:5 Godaw
Psalms89:6 Salon Godaara liketanaw danda7ey oonee? Salo medhetethata giddon Godaa meli oonee?
Psalms89:7 Geeshshata shiiquwan Xoossay yashisees; iya yuushuwan de7iya ubbaafe aadhidi daganthees.
Psalms89:8 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw Xoossaw
Psalms89:9 Neeni guummiya abba wolqaa kiittasa; dendiya zuliya si77i oothaasa.
Psalms89:10 Ra7aaba geetetiya do7a mentherethadasa; ne morketa ne wolqaama qesiyan laalladasa.
Psalms89:11 Saloynne sa7i nebaa; alamiyanne iyan de7iya ubbaa medhiday nena.
Psalms89:12 Pudehanne dugeha ne medhadasa; Taaborenne Armoona zumati
Psalms89:13 New wolqaama qesey de7ees; ne kushey mino; ne ushacha kushey dhoqu gis.
Psalms89:14 Xillotethinne suure pirdi ne araatas baaso; siiqoynne tumatethi ne sinthan boosona.
Psalms89:15 Godaw
Psalms89:16 Ne sunthan gallas kumethi ufaytoosona; enti ne xillotethaa dhoqu dhoqu oothosona.
Psalms89:17 Enti ceeqetiya wolqay nena; ne teeman nu kacey dhoqu dhoqu gis.
Psalms89:18 Nu gondalley nu Godaa kushena; nu kawoyka Isra7eele geeshshaa kushena.
Psalms89:19 Beni neeni
Psalms89:20 Ta aylliya Dawita demmas; ta geeshsha zaytiya tiyada iya kawothas.
Psalms89:21 Ta kushe iyara daana; ta qesey iya minthana.
Psalms89:22 Iya ay morkeyka giirisenna; ay iita asika iya haarenna.
Psalms89:23 Iya morketa ta iya sinthan tincherethana; iya ixeyisata shoca yeggana.
Psalms89:24 Ta tumatethaynne ta siiqoy iyara gidana; ta sunthan iya kacey dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Psalms89:25 Taani iya kawotethaa Medetiraane Abbaa
Psalms89:26 I tana
Psalms89:27 Taani iya bayra na7a oothana; sa7an de7iya kawota ubbaafe iya gitayana.
Psalms89:28 Taani ta siiquwa merinaw iyaw naagana; taani iyara caaqida caaquwa minthana.
Psalms89:29 Taani iya kochaa merinaw minthada essana; iya araata saloda gam7isana.”
Psalms89:30 “Shin iya kochati ta higgiya aggiko
Psalms89:31 ta awaajuwa shaariko
Psalms89:32 taani enta nagaraa gisho xam7an
Psalms89:33 Shin taani ta siiquwa iyape ekike; taani iyaw merinaw ammanetana.
Psalms89:34 Taani entara caaqida caaquwa menthike; ta doonape keyida qaala laammike.
Psalms89:35 Taani issi toho ta geeshshatethan caaqida gisho
Psalms89:36 Iya kochay merinaw daana; iya araatay ta sinthan awada gam7ana.
Psalms89:37 Salon ammanetiya marka gidida ageenada
Psalms89:38 Shin ha77i ne tiyida kawa bolla hanqetadasa; iya ixadasa; aggadasa.
Psalms89:39 Ne aylliyara caaqida caaquwa menthadasa; iya kallachaa baanan holada tunisadasa.
Psalms89:40 Iya katamaa gimbe dirsa laalladasa; iya miixaa dhaysadasa.
Psalms89:41 Ogera aadhiya ubbay iya bonqidosona; I ba shoorotas miichas attis.
Psalms89:42 Iya morketas xoono immadasa
Psalms89:43 Iya mashshaa xeeraa qalam7adasa; iya olan maaddabaaka.
Psalms89:44 Iya kawota xam7aa iya kushepe ekadasa; iya araata biittan holadasa.
Psalms89:45 Iya yalagatetha wodiya qaamisadasa; iya yeella mayzadasa.
Psalms89:46 Godaw
Psalms89:47 Ta laythay ay mela qantheko qopa; asa ubbaa coo mela medhadi!
Psalms89:48 Hayqope attanaw danda7iya asi de7ii? Duufo gelonna daanaw danda7ey oonee?

Psalms89:51 Godaw
Psalms89:52 Goday merinaw galatetto! Amin7i! Amin7i!
Psalms90:1 Godaw
Psalms90:2 Dereti medhetanaape kase
Psalms90:3 Neeni
Psalms90:4 Mukulu laythi zine aadhida gallasa mela; woyko issi qamma giddon issi saate mela.
Psalms90:5 Neeni asaa qoponna di7oda efaasa; enti amuho mela; wonta wonta doliya maata mela.
Psalms90:6 Maati wonta diccidi ciyees; omarsiya wode shullidi melees.
Psalms90:7 Nuuni ne yiluwan wurida; ne hanquwa suulon dagammida.
Psalms90:8 Nu iita oosuwa ne sinthan wothadasa; nu geemmida nagaraa ne som7uwa poo7uwan wothadasa.
Psalms90:9 Nu gallasa ubbay ne hanquwan aadhis; nu laytha oolen wursoos.
Psalms90:10 Nu de7o laythay laapun tamma; woyko dariko hospun tamma. Hessika metoynne waayey kumidaysa; nu laythay eeson wurees; nuka eeson aadhoos.
Psalms90:11 Ne hanquwa wolqaa erey oonee? ne hanquwa suuloy wolqaama.
Psalms90:12 Nu laytha maara ogen nu go7etana mela
Psalms90:13 Godaw

Psalms90:15 Ne nuna metoothida gallasata keena
Psalms90:16 Nuus ne aylletas ne oosoy qonco; ne bonchoy enta naytas bento.
