Psalms106:8 Gidoshin
Psalms106:9 I Zo7o abba kiittin
Psalms106:10 I enta ixeyisata kushepe ashshis; morketa kushepe enta wozis.
Psalms106:11 Enta morketa haathay mittis; entafe issoyka attibeenna.
Psalms106:12 He wode enti iya ufaysa qaala ammanidosona; iya mazmuren sabboosona.
Psalms106:13 Gidoshin
Psalms106:14 Mela biittan de7ishe daro amotidosona; mela biittan Xoossaa paacidosona.
Psalms106:15 Enti woossidaysa I immis; shin iita harge enta giddo kiittis.
Psalms106:16 Mela biittan dunkaanen de7ishe Musenne Godaas dummatida Aarona qanaatidosona.
Psalms106:17 Biittay dooyetidi Daatane mittis; Abeero iya keetha asaara moogis.
Psalms106:18 Enta maabara giddon tami eexis; lacoy he iita asata xuuggis.
Psalms106:19 Koreeba zuman worqafe mara misile medhidosona; he misiliya goyinnidosona.
Psalms106:20 Enti
Psalms106:21 Enti Gibxen gita ooso oothidanne entana ashshida Xoossaa dogidosona.
Psalms106:22 Kaama biittan oosetida malaalsiyabanne Zo7o Abban hanida malaata oothidaasaa.
Psalms106:23 Hessa gisho
Psalms106:24 Hessafe guye
Psalms106:25 Enti banta dunkaaniya giddon zuuzumidosona Godaa qaalas kiitetibookona.
Psalms106:26 Hessa gisho
Psalms106:27 Enta kochaa kawotethata giddon
Psalms106:28 Hessafe guye
Psalms106:29 Banta oosuwan Godaa hanqethidosona; hessa gaason enta giddon iita hargey wodhis.
Psalms106:30 Shin Pinihaasi dendidi
Psalms106:31 Hessika
Psalms106:32 Mariba pultuwa matan Godaa hanqethidosona; enta gaason Muse bolla metoy gakis.
Psalms106:33 Enti iya yiloyidosona; Muse doonape bessonna qaalay keyis.
Psalms106:34 Goday dhaysite gin
Psalms106:35 He palabaape
Psalms106:36 Xoossa asati enta eeqa goyinnidosona; hessi entaw xihe gidis.
Psalms106:37 Enti banta addenne macca nayta tuna ayyaanatas yarshidosona.
Psalms106:38 Enti xillo suuthu Kanaane eeqatas yarshidi
Psalms106:39 Hessada enti banta ooson tunidosona; banta hanotan banta layma kessidosona.
Psalms106:40 Hessa gisho
Psalms106:41 I enta allaga kushen aathidi immis; enta morketi enta haaridosona.
Psalms106:42 Enta morketi enta un7ethidosona banta shenen enta aysidosona.
Psalms106:43 I enta daro wode ashshis; shin enti banta makalla aggonna ixidosona; banta nagaraa gaason dhayidosona.
Psalms106:44 Gidoshin
Psalms106:45 I enta gisho
Psalms106:46 Enta di77ida ubbay
Psalms106:47 Nuuni ne geeshsha sunthaa galatana mela Abeeti Godaw
Psalms106:48 Isra7eele Goday
Psalms107:1 I keeha gidiya gishonne iya siiqoy merinaasa gidiya gisho; Godaa galatite
Psalms107:2 Goday ashshidaysati
Psalms107:3 Enti Dolohapenne wulohape
Psalms107:4 Entafe issoti issoti mela biittan yuuyidosona. Banta de7iya katamaa biya ogiya demmanaw danda7ibookona.
Psalms107:5 Enti koshatidosona; saamotidosona; enti un7etidosona.
Psalms107:6 Enti metootida wode
Psalms107:7 Enti daana katama gakanaw
Psalms107:8 Merina iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
Psalms107:9 I saamotidaysata alisees; koshatidaysata lo77oba kalsees.
Psalms107:10 Issoti issoti sakana dhuman uttidosona; birata santhalaatan waayidosona.
Psalms107:11 Hessi haniday enti Ubbaafe Dhoqa Xoossaa
Psalms107:12 I enta waaye ooson daaburisis; enta maaddiya asi dhayin kundidosona;
Psalms107:13 Enti metootida wode
Psalms107:14 I enta sakana dhumape kessis; enti qashetida santhalaata duuthis.
Psalms107:15 Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
Psalms107:16 I naase birata pengeta menthis; birata kasota qanxis.
Psalms107:17 Issoti issoti eeya gididosona; banta oothida nagara gaason banta iitatetha gaason metootidosona.
Psalms107:18 Enti kathi ixida gisho hayqos gakidosona.
Psalms107:19 Enti metootida wode
Psalms107:20 I ba qaala kiittidi enta pathis; duufope enta ashshis.
Psalms107:21 Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
Psalms107:22 Enti iyaw galata yarsho shiisho; ufaysa yethan iya oosuwa odo.
Psalms107:23 Issoti issoti markaben abba bollara bidosona; abba bolla banta oosuwa oothidosona.
Psalms107:24 Enti Godaa oosuwa be7idosona; ciimmo abban oothida malaalsiyaba xeellidosona.
Psalms107:25 I kiitida wode gotey dendis; abba zuley qaaxis.
Psalms107:26 Enti pude dendidosona; duge ciimmon wodhidosona; iita metoy gakin enta wozanay til7is.
Psalms107:27 Enti mathotida asada dhubetidi gandigaridosona; enta eray maayis.
Psalms107:28 Enti metootida wode
Psalms107:29 I gotiya si77i oothis; abba beeta sirphi oothis.
Psalms107:30 Si77i gida gisho ufaytidosona; enti koyida katamaa Goday gathis.
Psalms107:31 Iya siiquwa gishonne I entaw oothida malaalsiya oosuwa gisho enti Godaa galato.
Psalms107:32 Deriya shiiquwan iya gitatetha awaajo; cimata duulatan iya galato.
Psalms107:33 Goday shaafata melisis; pultoti goggonnaada teqis.
Psalms107:34 He bessan de7iya asaa iitatethaa gisho
Psalms107:35 I mela biittan haathe eelisis; mela biittan pultoy dhuuqanaada oothis.
Psalms107:36 Koshatida asaa he bessan wothis; bantaw daana katamaa yan keexidosona.
Psalms107:37 Enti banta goshshan zeridosona; woyne tokidosona; daro muruuto shiishidosona.
Psalms107:38 I enta anjin enti daridosona; enta mehiya taybuwa guuthibeenna.
Psalms107:39 Enti xoonetiya wodenne un7etiya wode
Psalms107:40 Goday enta halaqata kawushis; mela biittan toylatana mela oothis.
Psalms107:41 Shin manqota metope kessis; enta soo asaa dorsa wudeda darsis.
Psalms107:42 Suure asay hessa be7idi ufaytoosona; shin iita asay yeellatidi si77i goosona.
Psalms107:43 Cincati haysa ubbaa akeeko; Godaa siiquwa qopo.
Psalms108:1 Ta wozanay minnidi de7ees; abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms108:2 Ta shempe
Psalms108:3 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms108:4 Ne merinaa siiqoy salope dhoqa; ne ammanetethay shaarape dhoqa.
Psalms108:5 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms108:6 Ne doseysati attana mela
Psalms108:7 Xoossay ba geeshsha bessan haysada yaagis; “Ta xoonada Seekema shaakana; Sukota zangaara gishana.
Psalms108:8 Galadinne Minaasey tabaa; Efreemi ta huuphen wothiya uke; Yihudi ta kawota xam7aa.
Psalms108:9 Moo7abey ta meecetiya gabate; Edoomey tabaa gideysa erisanaw ta caammaa iya bolla wothana. Filisxeeme xoonada gereerana” yaagis.
Psalms108:10 Godaw
Psalms108:11 Abeeti Xoossaw
Psalms108:12 Asa maadoy pathenna gisho
Psalms108:13 Xoossaa wolqan nu morketa xoonana; nu morketa kawushanay iya.
Psalms109:1 Abeeti ta nena galatiya Xoossaw
Psalms109:2 Iita asatinne wordanchoti
Psalms109:3 Ixon ta yuushuwa teqidosona; gaasoy bayna tana olidosona.
Psalms109:4 Ta enta dosaysinne entaw woossayis; gidoshin
Psalms109:5 Ta lo77o oothin
Psalms109:6 Ta morkiya bolla iita daynna shuuma; mootanchoy iya ushachan eqo.
Psalms109:7 Iya pilgiya wode I bala gididi bento; iya woosay iyaw gome gido.
Psalms109:8 Iya laythay qaammo; iya shuumatetha hari eko.
Psalms109:9 Iya nayti yi7o gido; iya machiya am7o gido.
Psalms109:10 Iya nayti woosancho gididi toylato; banta de7iya humpa keethaafe goodeto.
Psalms109:11 Iya shalo ubbaa acoy oyko; I daaburidi kessidaba ubba allagi bonqo.
Psalms109:12 Oonika iyaw keehopo; iya naytas qadhetiya asi bentofo.
Psalms109:13 Iya nayti ubbay hayqidi wuro; kaalliya yeletethan iya sunthay dogeto.
Psalms109:14 Iya aawata nagaray Godaa sinthan qofeto; iya aaye nagaray qushetofo.
Psalms109:15 Goday enta nagara ubba wode qopo; enti sa7a bolla hassayetofo.
Psalms109:16 I keeha oothanaw polo qopibeenna; manqota
Psalms109:17 I baaddanaw dosida gisho
Psalms109:18 Baadethi iya afilada ma7is; iya baadethi haathada iya bolla laakisis; zayteda iya meqethaa giddo gelo.
Psalms109:19 Afilada iya kammo; dancoda ubba wode iya xeessan de7o.
Psalms109:20 Ha tana mooteysanne ta bolla iita odeteyisata Goday hessada oothidi seero.
Psalms109:21 Shin abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw
Psalms109:22 Taani manqonne metootancho asi; ta wozanay madunxis.
Psalms109:23 Ta omarsa kuyada dhayana hanayis; ta booleda qoqofetas.
Psalms109:24 Xooman ta gulbatay daaburis; ta asatethay laafin meqethi attis.
Psalms109:25 Tana mooteysatas qelqisethas attas; tana be7idi
Psalms109:26 Abeeti Godaw ta Xoossaw
Psalms109:27 Ne kushey haysa oothidaysanne
Psalms109:28 Enti tana baaddoosona
Psalms109:29 Tana mooteysati yeella ma7o; banta kawushaa afilada ma7o.
Psalms109:30 Taani ta inxarsan Godaa galatana; deriya shiiquwan iya sabbana.
Psalms109:31 I manqota gisho mootetees; hayqos pirdetidaysata ashshees.
Psalms110:1 Goday ta godaa
Psalms110:2 Godaw ne minotetha xam7a Xiyoonepe yedda; “Ne morketa haara” yaagana.
Psalms110:3 Ne haariya gallas ne derey dosidi new haaretana; ne geeshsha ma7uwa ma7ada
Psalms110:4 Goday
Psalms110:5 Goday ne ushachan de7ees; ba hanquwa gallas kawota tincherethana.
Psalms110:6 I kawotethata bolla pirdana; ola denbata aha xalaala oothana; biitta ubban de7iya kawota dhaysana.
Psalms110:7 Kawoy oge lanqen de7iya pultuwafe uyidi
Psalms111:1 Godaa galatite; Suureta shiiqon ta kumetha wozanan Godaa galatana.
Psalms111:2 Godaa oosoti ay mela gite! Entan ufaytiya ubbay enta qopees.
Psalms111:3 Iya oosoti bonchoninne teeman kumis; iya xillotethay merinaw de7ees.
Psalms111:4 Iya malaalsiya oosoy hassayetishe daanada oothis; I keehanne qadhetiya Godaa.
Psalms111:5 Baw yayyeysatas kathi immees; ba caaqo qaala merinaw baletenna.
Psalms111:6 Allagata biitta ba asaas aathidi immidi
Psalms111:7 Iya kushe oosoti tumanne suure; iya woga ubbay ammanetidaysa.
Psalms111:8 Enti merinaw eqidi de7oosona; tumatethaninne suuretethan imetidosona.
Psalms111:9 I ba asaa wozis; caaqo entara merinaw essis; iya sunthay geeshshinne yashsheysa.
Psalms111:10 Cincatethas koyroy Godaas yashshi; iya wogaa naageysatas lo77o akeeki de7ees. Goday merinaw galatetto!
Psalms112:1 Godaa galatite; Godaas yayeysinne iya kiita naageysi anjetidaysa.
Psalms112:2 Iya nayti biittan wolqaama gidana; suure asaa yeletay anjetana.
Psalms112:3 Shaloynne duretethi iya keethan de7ees; iya xillotethay merinaw daana.
Psalms112:4 Keeha
Psalms112:5 Keehatethan coo tal7iya uraas
Psalms112:6 Xillo asi awudeka kundenna; I merinaw hassayetana.
Psalms112:7 Iya wozanay hirgonna gishonne I Godan ammanetiya gisho
Psalms112:8 Iya wozanay mino gidiya gisho yayyenna; wursethan iya morketi xoonetin be7ana.
Psalms112:9 I manquwas darsidi immees; iya xillotethay merinaw de7ees; iya kacey bonchon dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Psalms112:10 Iita asi hessa be7idi yilotees; mettershe saxishe coo dhayees; iita asa amoy coo attana.
Psalms113:1 Godaa galatite; hinteno
Psalms113:2 Godaa sunthay
Psalms113:3 Away doliyasuwape wulliyasuwa gakanaw
Psalms113:4 Goday kawotetha ubbaa haarees; iya bonchoy saluwape dhoqa.
Psalms113:5 Godaa nu Xoossaa meli oonee? I bolla dhoqan ba araatan uttis.
Psalms113:6 I salotanne sa7aa be7anaw duge hokees.
Psalms113:7 I manquwa baanape dhoqu oothees; metootanchuwa bidope denthees.

Psalms113:9 Mayntha maccasiw nayta aayo oothidi

Psalms115:2 Ayis kawotethati
Psalms115:3 Nu Xoossay salon de7ees; ba dosidaba ubbaa oothees.

Psalms115:7 Entaw kushey de7ees

Psalms116:1 Goday ta waasuwanne ta woosa si7ida gisho
Psalms116:2 I ba haytha taako zaarida gisho

Psalms116:4 He wode
Psalms116:5 Goday keehanne xillo; nu Xoossay qadhetees.

Psalms116:9 Taani de7on de7eyisata giddon
Psalms116:10 Taani

Psalms117:1 Kawotethati ubbay Godaa galatite; asa ubbay iya sabbite.
Psalms117:2 Iya siiqoy nuus mino; iya ammanetethay merinaasa. Godaa galatite.
Psalms118:1 Goday keeha gidiya gisho galatite; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms118:2 Isra7eele asay
Psalms118:3 Aarona keetha asay
Psalms118:4 Godaas yayiya ubbay
Psalms118:5 Ta un7etida wode Godaako waassas; I ta waasuwa si7idi tana la77a kessis.
Psalms118:6 Goday taara de7iya gisho ta yayyike; asi tana ay oothanee?
Psalms118:7 Goday tana maaddanaw taara de7ees; ta morketa xoonetethaa ta be7ana.
Psalms118:8 Asan ammanetanape Godan geemmidi atteysi lo77o.
Psalms118:9 Gita asan ammanetanape Godan geemmidi atteysi lo77o.
Psalms118:10 Kawotethati ubbay tana teqidi oykidosona; shin Godaa sunthan ta enta xoonas.
Psalms118:11 Enti ta yuushuwa teqidosona; shin Godaa sunthan ta enta xoonas.
Psalms118:12 Enti ta yuushuwa mathada teqidosona; Shin buurey taman eexeysada eexidi dhayidosona; Godaa sunthan ta enta dhaysas.
Psalms118:13 Taani sugetada kundanaw gakas; shin Goday tana maaddis.
Psalms118:14 Goday ta minotethaanne yethaa; I tana ashsheysa gidis.
Psalms118:15 Xillota dunkaaniyan ola xoonidi
Psalms118:16 Godaa ushacha kushey xoono immis; Godaa ushacha kushey gitaba oothis.
Psalms118:17 Taani hayqike; de7on daana; Goday oothidaba awaajana.
Psalms118:18 Goday tana iita seera seeris; shin hayqos aathidi immibeenna.
Psalms118:19 Taani gido gelada Godaa galatana mela
Psalms118:20 Haysi Godaa penge; xilloti iyara geloosona.
Psalms118:21 Godaw
Psalms118:22 Gimbeysati kadhidi yeggida shuchay
Psalms118:23 Haysi Godaa ooso; nu ayfiyas malaalsiyaba.
Psalms118:24 Haysi gallasay Goday oothida gallas; ane nuuni iyan ufaytoosinne ililoos.
Psalms118:25 Godaw
Psalms118:26 Godaa sunthan yaa asi anjetidaysa gido; nuuni Xoossa keethaafe hintena anjoos.
Psalms118:27 Goday Xoossaa; I nu bolla poo7isis; yarsho bessan de7iya kaciyako keyite; irxa tashe oykidi ba7aale bonchite.
Psalms118:28 Neeni ta Xoossaa; ta nena galatana; neeni ta Xoossaa; ta nena sabbana.
Psalms118:29 Goday keeha gidiya gisho iya galatite; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms119:1 Banta ogiyan borey baynaysatinne Godaa wogaada hemeteysati anjetidaysata.
Psalms119:2 Iya kiitaa naageysatinne banta kumetha wozanan iya koyeysati anjetidaysata.
Psalms119:3 Enti bala oothidi erokona; Godaa ogiyan hemetoosona.
Psalms119:4 Ne kiita ammanetidi naagana mela
Psalms119:5 Ne wogaa naagada ta ogey minnana mela koyayis.
Psalms119:6 Ne kiita ubbaa akeekada
Psalms119:7 Ne xillo pirdaa ta tamaarida wode
Psalms119:8 Ta ne higgiya naagana; tana polo yeggofa.
Psalms119:9 Yalagay ba ogiya waatidi
Psalms119:10 Ta kumetha wozanan nena koyas; ne kiitaape kare keyonnaada tana naaga.
Psalms119:11 Taani ne bolla nagara oothonna mela ne qaala ta wozanan qosas.
Psalms119:12 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:13 Ne doonape keyiya pirda ubbaa taani ta inxarsan odana.
Psalms119:14 Duretethan ufayteysafe aathada
Psalms119:15 Ne wogata zaara zaarada qopayis ne ogiya loythada akeekayis.
Psalms119:16 Taani ne higgiyan ufaytayis; ne qaala dogike.
Psalms119:17 Taani de7on daana melanne ne qaala kiitetana mela taw ne aylliyas lo77oba ootha.
Psalms119:18 Ne higgiyan de7iya malaalsiya tumatethaa ta be7ana mela ta ayfiya dooya.
Psalms119:19 Taani ha sa7an imathe; ne kiita taape genthofa.
Psalms119:20 Ta shempiya ubba wode ne pirdaa laamotashe hayqasu.
Psalms119:21 Otoreyisata
Psalms119:22 Taani neeni odidaysa oothida gisho
Psalms119:23 Hari attoshin halaqati shiiqidi
Psalms119:24 Ne markatethay tana ufaysees; I tana zorees.
Psalms119:25 Taani hayqana hanayis; ne gida qaalada tana ashsha.
Psalms119:26 Taani ta ogiyaba new odin
Psalms119:27 Ne wogaa tana akeekisa; malaalsiya oosuwa taani zaara zaarada qopana.
Psalms119:28 Azzanoy darida gisho ta shempoy daaburis; neeni gida qaalada tana minthetha.
Psalms119:29 Wordo oge taape haassa; ne keehatethan ne higgiya tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:30 Taani tuma oge dooras; ne pirdaa hayzas.
Psalms119:31 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:32 Ta wozanaa la77a kessida gisho
Psalms119:33 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:34 Taani ne higgiya naagana malanne ta kumetha wozanaape iyaw kittaatan mela
Psalms119:35 Taani iyan ufaytiya gisho
Psalms119:36 Ta wozanaa amuwako gidonashin
Psalms119:37 Pathonnaba xeellonna mela
Psalms119:38 New yayyana mela
Psalms119:39 Tana yashshiya cashsha taape digga; ne pirday ay mela lo77o!
Psalms119:40 Taani ne wogaa naaganaw amottayis; neeni xillo gidiya gisho
Psalms119:41 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:42 Taani ne qaalan ammanetiya gisho
Psalms119:43 Taani ne pirda ufaysi oothida gisho
Psalms119:44 Taani merii merinaw ne higgiya kiitetana.
Psalms119:45 Taani ne woga poliya gisho
Psalms119:46 Taani kawota sinthan eqada
Psalms119:47 Taani ne kiitata dosayis
Psalms119:48 Taani dosiya ne kiita bonchayis; ne awaajuwa zaara zaarada qopana.
Psalms119:49 Neeni taw
Psalms119:50 Ne qaalay tana de7on wothees; I meto wode tana minthethees.
Psalms119:51 Otoranchoti tana likefe aathidi cayoosona; shin taani ne higgiyafe sher7i giike.
Psalms119:52 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:53 Iitati ne higgiya kiitetonaysa be7in
Psalms119:54 Taani de7iya allaga biittan ne awaajoy taw yethi gidis.
Psalms119:55 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:56 Ta Ne woga naagana; I taw ooso gidis.
Psalms119:57 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:58 Ta kumetha wozanan nena woossayis; ne gelida qaalada taw qadheta.
Psalms119:59 Taani ta ogiya akeeka xeellada
Psalms119:60 Taani ne kiita naaganaw
Psalms119:61 Iitati taw xihe yeggikoka
Psalms119:62 Ne xillo pirda gisho
Psalms119:63 Taani new yayyeyisata ubbaasinne ne wogaa naageysata dabbo.
Psalms119:64 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:65 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:66 Taani ne kiitatan ammanetiya gisho
Psalms119:67 Taani seeretanaape kase kare hemetas; shin ha77i ne qaalas kiitetayis.
Psalms119:68 Neeni keeha; neeni keehaba oothaasa; ne awaajuwa tana tamaarsa.
Psalms119:69 Otoranchoti ta sunthaa wordon iissoosona; shin ta ne wogaa ta kumetha wozanan naagana.
Psalms119:70 Enta wozanay kumthi doccis; shin taani ne higgiyan ufaytayis.
Psalms119:71 Ne higgiya tamaarana mela ne tana seeridaysi taw lo77o gidis.
Psalms119:72 Daro worqafenne birape
Psalms119:73 Tana ne kushey medhis; ne kushey giigisis; ne kiita tamaarana mela taw akeeka imma.
Psalms119:74 Taani ne qaalan ufaysi oothida gisho
Psalms119:75 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:76 Taw ne aylliyas gida qaalada
Psalms119:77 Ne higgey tana ufaysiya gisho
Psalms119:78 Otoranchoti tana wordon mootiya gisho yeellato; taani ne wogaa zaara zaarada qopayis.
Psalms119:79 New yayyeysatinne ne markatethaa ereysati taako yo.
Psalms119:80 Ta yeellatonna mela
Psalms119:81 Neeni tana ashshana mela
Psalms119:82 Neeni gida qaalay poletin be7anaw naagishin ta ayfey teljumis. “Ne tana awude minthethane” yaagas.
Psalms119:83 Cuyan kaqetida ogoroda gundas; gidoshin ne awaajuwa balabiike.
Psalms119:84 Taani ne aylley awude gakanaw naago? Tana yedetheyisata ne awude pirdanee?
Psalms119:85 Ne higgiya naagonna otoranchoti tana oykanaw olla bookosona.
Psalms119:86 Ne kiita ubbay ammantheyisata; gaasoy bayna asay tana yedethiya gisho tana maadda.
Psalms119:87 Enti tana wodhi diggidi aggidosona; shin ta ne wogaa aggabike.
Psalms119:88 Ne siiquwan ta de7uwa naaga; ta ne kiitaa naagana.
Psalms119:89 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:90 Yeletape yeletaa gakanaw ne ammanetaasa; ne ha sa7aa minthada essadasa; ika minnidi de7ees.
Psalms119:91 Ubbay ne aylle gidiya gisho
Psalms119:92 Ne higgey tana ufaysonnaba gidiyako
Psalms119:93 Taani ne wogaa kumethi dogike; neeni iyan tana de7on wothadasa.
Psalms119:94 Taani nebaa gidiya gisho tana ashsha; taani ne wogaa naaganaw koyayis.
Psalms119:95 Iitati tana dhaysanaw zugidi naagoosona; shin taani neena qopayis.
Psalms119:96 Polo geetetidaba ubbaas zawi de7eysa ta be7as; shin polo gidida higgiyas zawi baawa.
Psalms119:97 Taani ne higgiya waanada dosiyana! kumetha gallas taani iya qopayis.
Psalms119:98 Ne kiitay ubba wode taara de7iya gisho

Psalms119:102 Neeni tana tamaarsida gisho

Psalms119:106 Ne xillo pirdada daanaw
Psalms119:107 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:108 Abeeti Godaw
Psalms119:109 Ta shempoy ubba wode meton de7ees; shin taani ne higgiya dogike.
Psalms119:110 Iitati taw gite yeggidosona; shin taani ne wogaape kare keyabike.
Psalms119:111 Ne higgey taw merinaa shalo; I ta wozanaas ufaysi immees.
Psalms119:112 Ta hayqana gakanaw ne awaajuwada oothanaw qofa qachas.
Psalms119:113 Taani nam7u qofi de7iya asaa ixayis; shin ne higgiya dosayis.
Psalms119:114 Ne taw gondallenne qosetada attiya besse taani ne qaalan ufaysi oothayis.

Psalms119:117 Ta saro daana mela tana zempisa; ta ubba wode ne awaajuwa si7ana.

Psalms136:6 Haatha bolla biitta miccis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms136:7 Gita poo7ota medhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.

Psalms136:12 Ba mino kushiyan
Psalms136:13 Zo7o Abbaa shaakis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms136:14 Isra7eele asaa he abba giddora pinthis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.

Psalms136:16 I ba asaa mela biittara kaalethis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms136:17 Gita kawota shocis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.
Psalms136:18 Wolqaama kawota wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.

Psalms136:20 Baasane kawa Ooge wodhis; iya siiqoy merinaasa.

Psalms140:9 Ta morketan tana xoonisopa; enta doonape keyiya iitay enta bolla simmo.
Psalms140:10 Enta bolla xuuggiya tama bonqoy qoletto; enti tama ollan yegeto; keyanaw danda7onna olla holeto.
Psalms140:11 Yooyamati biitta bolla de7opo; buqeyisata iitabay yedethidi oyko.
Psalms140:12 Goday manqotas pirdeysanne metootanchotas mooteteysa erayis.
Psalms140:13 Xilloti tuma ne sunthaa galatana; suure asati ne sinthan daana.
Psalms141:1 Godaw
Psalms141:2 Ta woosay ixaaneda ne sinthe shiiqo; ta kushe micethay omarsa yarsho mela gido.
Psalms141:3 Godaw
Psalms141:4 Iita oothiya asatara iita oothonna mela
Psalms141:5 Xillo asi tana seero
Psalms141:6 Enta daynnati aafo holetiya wode
Psalms141:7 Enti
Psalms141:8 Ubbaa Haariya Godaw
Psalms141:9 Enti taw yeggida gitiyapenne iitaa ootheyisata xihiyape tana naaga.
Psalms141:10 Taani saro aadhin
Psalms142:1 Ta qaala dhoqu oothada Godaako waassayis; maarota demmanaw iya woossayis.
Psalms142:2 Ta oysha ubbaa iya bessayis; ta metuwa ubbaa iyaw odayis.
Psalms142:3 Taani heettida wode ne ta ogiya eraasa; ta ogiyan gite yeggidi wothidosona.
Psalms142:4 Taani ta yuushuwa xeelliya wode
Psalms142:5 Godaw
Psalms142:6 Taani daro metootiya gisho
Psalms142:7 Ta ne sunthaa galatana mela
Psalms143:1 Godaw
Psalms143:2 Ne sinthan xillo asi bayna gisho tana ne aylliya pirdas shiishopa.
Psalms143:3 Tana ta morkey yedethidi
Psalms143:4 Hessa gisho taani heettas; ta wozanayka til7is.
Psalms143:5 Taani beni wodeta hassayayis; ne oothida ooso ubbaa qopayis; ne kushe ooso ubbaa akeekayis.
Psalms143:6 Taani ta kushiya neeko miccas; mela biitti haathe koyeysada
Psalms143:7 Godaw
Psalms143:8 Taani nenan ammanetiya gisho
Psalms143:9 Godaw
Psalms143:10 Neeni ta Xoossaa gidiya gisho
Psalms143:11 Godaw
Psalms143:12 Ne siiquwan ta morketa wodha; ta ne aylle gidiya gisho tana un7etheyisata ubbaa dhaysa.
Psalms144:1 Goday
Psalms144:2 I ta siiqo Xoossaanne ta qosetta attiya besse; ta miixanne tana ashsheysa. Ta gondallenne taani baqatada attiya besse; I kawotethati taw haaretana mela oothis.
Psalms144:3 Godaw
Psalms144:4 Asi issi toho carkiya carko mela; iya gallasati aadhiya kuya mela.
Psalms144:5 Godaw
Psalms144:6 Wol7anthi yeddada ne morketa laalla; ne dongiya yiishshan dukada enta yedetha.
Psalms144:7 Bollara ne kushiya yeddada
Psalms144:8 Enti tuma haasayidi erokona; banta ushacha kushiya denthidi wordon caaqoosona.
Psalms144:9 Xoossaw taani new ooratha mazmure yexana; tammu shayan waaxetida diithan yexana.
Psalms144:10 Kawotas xoono immaasa; ne aylliya Dawita ashshaasa.
Psalms144:11 Tana iita mashshafe ashsha; allaga asata kushepe tana wosisa. Enta doonay wordon
Psalms144:12 Nu adde nayti banta na7atethan
Psalms144:13 Nu shaaleti dumma dumma katha qommon kumo; heemetiya bessan de7iya nu dorsati mukulaninne tammu mukulan yelo.
Psalms144:14 Nu miizati birayso; awucayona yeletidi daro; nu ogetan waasoy si7etofo.
Psalms144:15 Ha anjoti gakiya asati tuma anjetidaysata; Xoossay entaw Godaa gidida asati anjetidaysata.
Psalms145:1 Ta Xoossaw
Psalms145:2 Taani nena ubba gallas sabbana; ne sunthaa merinaw galatana.
Psalms145:3 Goday gita; aadho galati iyaw bessees; iya gitatethay asa qofape aadhees.
Psalms145:4 Issi yeletay hara yeletas ne oosuwa odana; ne malaalsiya oosota awaajana.
Psalms145:5 Enti ne bonchuwa
Psalms145:6 Malaalisiya gita ne oosuwaba odana; taani ne gitatetha awaajana.
Psalms145:7 Enti ne keehatetha darotethaa odana; ne xillotethabaa ufaysan yexana.
Psalms145:8 Goday keehanne qadheteysa; hanqetanaw ellesenna; siiqon kumidaysa.
Psalms145:9 Goday ubbaas keeha; I ba medhetetha ubbaas qadhetees.
Psalms145:10 Godaw
Psalms145:11 Enti ne kawotethaa bonchuwaba odana; ne wolqaaba odana.
Psalms145:12 Hessan enti ne wolqaama oosuwabaanne ne kawotethaa boncho teemaba erisana.
Psalms145:13 Ne kawotethay merina kawotethi; ne maatay yeleta ubbaa haarees. Goday ba gida qaala ubban ammanetees; ba ooso ubban keeha.
Psalms145:14 Goday kundanaw gedgadeyisata katisees; kundidaysata denthees.
Psalms145:15 Ubbaa ayfey nena xeellees; entaw koshshiya woden kathi immaasa.
Psalms145:16 Neeni ne kushiya miccada
Psalms145:17 Xoossay ba oge ubban xillo; ba ooso ubban keeha.
Psalms145:18 Goday bana xeegiya ubbaas
Psalms145:19 I baw yayyeyisata amuwa kunthees; enta waasuwa si7idi ashshees.
Psalms145:20 Goday bana doseyisata ubbaa naagees; shin iitata ubbaa dhaysana.
Psalms145:21 Taani ta doonan Godaa galatana; Medhetetha ubbay iya geeshsha sunthaa merinaw galato!
Psalms146:1 Godaa galatite! Ta shempe Godaa galata!
Psalms146:2 Ta de7o laytha ubban Godaa galatana; ta de7ida wode ubban ta Xoossaa sabbana.
Psalms146:3 Halaqatan ammanetofite; ashshanaw danda7onna asa na7an ceeqetofite.
Psalms146:4 Enta shempoy keyiya wode biittako simmoosona; enta halchoy ubbay he gallas aadhees.
Psalms146:5 Yayqooba Xoossay maaddiya asinne Godaa
Psalms146:6 Goday salonne sa7aa
Psalms146:7 Goday un7etidaysatas pirdees; koshatidaysatas kathi immees; Goday qashetidaysata birshees;
Psalms146:8 Goday qooqeta xeelisees. Goday kundidaysata denthees; Goday xillota dosees.
Psalms146:9 Goday bete asata naagees; Am7etanne yi7o nayta maaddees; shin iitata ogiya dhaysees.
Psalms146:10 Goday merinaw kawotana; Xiyoone
Psalms147:1 Godaa galatite! Nu Xoossaa saboy lo77o; iya saboy ufaysiyabaanne bessiyaba.
Psalms147:2 Goday Yerusalaame oorathana; Isra7eelepe di7etidaysata shiishana.
Psalms147:3 Wozani meqidaysata koolees; enta madunthaa pathees.
Psalms147:4 I xoolintota taybuwa erees; enta ubbaa enta sunthan sunthan xeegees.
Psalms147:5 Nu Goday gita; I wolqaama; iya akeekas zawi baawa.
Psalms147:6 Goday aadata zempisees; shin iitata sa7an yeggees.
Psalms147:7 Godaas galata yethi yexite; nu Xoossaas diithan yexite.
Psalms147:8 I saluwa shaara mayzees; biittas ira immees; zumata bolla maata dolisees.
Psalms147:9 Mehetas kathi
Psalms147:10 I parata wolqaninne tooranchota minotethan ufaytenna.
Psalms147:11 Shin Goday baw yayyeysataninne iya maarotan ammaneteysatan ufaytees.
Psalms147:12 Yerusalaame
Psalms147:13 I ne pengiya kobeta minthana; ne giddon de7iya ne asaa anjana.
Psalms147:14 I ne zawa sarotethan naagana; nena lo77o gisten kalsana.
Psalms147:15 I ba kiitaa biittas yeddees; iya qaalay eeson gakees.
Psalms147:16 I shachi bullukoda miccees; caagana bidoda laallees.
Psalms147:17 I shacha shuchada holees; iya meeguwan oonika eqanaw danda7enna.
Psalms147:18 I ba qaala kiittidi shacha maaysees. I carkuwa kiittin haathi goggees.
Psalms147:19 I ba qaala Yayqoobas
Psalms147:20 I hara kawotethatas hessa oothibeenna; enti iya higgiya erokona. Godaa galatite!
Psalms148:1 Godaa galatite! Salope Godaa galatite; bolla dhoqan iya galatite.
Psalms148:2 Iya kiitanchoti ubbay iya galatite; Salon de7iya iya olanchoti ubbay iya galatite.
Psalms148:3 Away
Psalms148:4 Dhoqa saloti iya galatite; Salope bollara de7iya haathati iya galatite.
Psalms148:5 Enti ubbay Godaa sunthaa galato; I kiittin enti medhetidosona.
Psalms148:6 I enta merinaw enta bessan bessan wothis; shaaretonna higge entaw immis.
Psalms148:7 Sa7ape Godaa galatite! abban de7iya gita medhetethato; abba ciimmoto ubbay iya galatite.

Psalms148:14 Iyaw mata gidida Isra7eele
Psalms149:1 Godaa galatite! Godaas ooratha yethi yexite! xillota shiiquwan iya sabbite!
Psalms149:2 Isra7eeley bantana medhidaysan ufayto; Xiyooney banta kawan hashshu go.
Psalms149:3 Durishe
Psalms149:4 Goday ba asan ufaytees; aadatas xoono immidi enta bonchees.
Psalms149:5 Ne asay banta xoonuwan ufayto; qamma kumethi ufaysan yexo.
Psalms149:6 Enta doonan Xoossaa galatay
Psalms149:7 Hessan enti kawotethata bolla halo keyana; asaa seerana.
Psalms149:8 Enta kawota santhalaatan
Psalms149:9 Enta bolla xaafetida pirdaa polana; Hessi Xoossaa asata ubbaas xoono. Godaa galatite!
Psalms150:1 Godaa galatite! Iya geeshsha keethan Xoossaa galatite; dhoqa salon iya galatite.
Psalms150:2 Iya wolqaama oosota gisho iya galatite; ubbaafe aadhiya iya gitatethaas iya galatite.
Psalms150:3 Moyze punnishe iya galatite; diithaninne maasinqon iya galatite.
Psalms150:4 Karaabo baqishenne durishe iya galatite; diithi diixishe
Psalms150:5 Daala qaathishe iya galatite; wolqaama daala girsan iya galatite.
Psalms150:6 Shempora de7iya ubbay Godaa galatite! Goday galatetto!
Proverbs1:1 Haysati Isra7eele kawa Dawita na7aa Solomone leemisota.
Proverbs1:2 Leemisoti asay cincatethi
Proverbs1:3 Enti cincatethi
Proverbs1:4 Eeyatas akeeka immees; na7atethatas eratethinne kahaamatethi immees.
Proverbs1:5 Cincati ha leemisota si7idi
Proverbs1:6 Hessan leemisotanne enta birshethaa
Proverbs1:7 Godaas yashshi cincatethas doomethi; shin eeyati cincatethinne seera kadhoosona.
Proverbs1:8 Ta na7aw
Proverbs1:9 Hessi ne huuphiyas boncho kallacha; ne qoodhiyas gozda gidana.
Proverbs1:10 Ta na7aw
Proverbs1:11 Enti
Proverbs1:12 Si7ooley mitteysada nuka enta paxa mittoos; nu enta ollan yegetiya asada oothana.
Proverbs1:13 Nuuni al7o miishe ubbaa demmana; nu keethaa bonqe miishen kunthana.
Proverbs1:14 Nuura laggeta; nu demmidaba issife shaaketana” yaagana.
Proverbs1:15 Ta na7aw
Proverbs1:16 Enti iitabaa oothanaw woxoosona; asa suuthi gussanaw yaa haa goosona.
Proverbs1:17 Kafoy xeellishin
Proverbs1:18 Shin enti banta suuthi gussanaw hokosona; banta shempuwa wodhanaw qosetoosona.
Proverbs1:19 Genen go77a demmiya asa wursethi hessa mela; enti shiishida shaloy enta shempuwa ekees.
Proverbs1:20 Cincatethi daggala bolla eqada xeegawusu; dabaaban ba qaala dhoqu oothada sissawusu.
Proverbs1:21 Cincatethi asi shiiqiya bessan eqada xeegawusu; katamaa geliya pengen eqada haysada yaagawusu.
Proverbs1:22 “Hinteno
Proverbs1:23 Ta seera hinte si7idaba gidiyako
Proverbs1:24 Shin ta xeegida wode hinte koyonna ixida gisho; taani kushe miccin oonika akeekibona gisho;
Proverbs1:25 Ta zoriya hinte kadhida gisho; ta seeraka ekiboonna gisho;
Proverbs1:26 Hintena metoy gakiya wode ta miicana; hinte dagaman kokoriya wode ta qelqisana.
Proverbs1:27 Gadoy uushoda hinte bolla yaa wode
Proverbs1:28 “He wode enti tana xeegana; shin ta koyke; enti tana minthidi koyana; shin demmokona.
Proverbs1:29 Enti eratethi ixida gisho; Godaa yashshi dooriboonna gisho
Proverbs1:30 Ta zoriya ekiboonna gisho; ta seera kadhida gisho;
Proverbs1:31 Enti banta oosuwa ayfiya maana; banta qofaa ayfiya kallana.
Proverbs1:32 Akeeki pacidaysata cincatethafe haakeysi wodhees; eeyata qelli guussi dhaysees.
Proverbs1:33 Shin ta odiyaba si7iya ubbay saro daana; meto hirgafeka shempana.”
Proverbs2:1 Ta na7aw
Proverbs2:2 ne haythaa cincatethako zaariko; ne wozanaa akeekako zaariko;
Proverbs2:3 Eratethi xeegiko; akeeka dhoqu oothada xeegiko;
Proverbs2:4 Bira woyko geemmida miishe koyeysada
Proverbs2:5 He wode neeni Godaas yashshi guussi aybeko erana; Xoossaa loythada erana.
Proverbs2:6 Goday cincatethi immees; iyape eratethinne akeeki bentees.
Proverbs2:7 I suuretas maaddiya zore minjees; borey baynaysatas gondalle gidees.
Proverbs2:8 Suure pirda ogiya naagees; iyaw ammaneteyisata ogiya minthees.
Proverbs2:9 He wode neeni xillotethi
Proverbs2:10 Cincatethi ne wozana giddo gelana; eratethi new ufaysi gidana.
Proverbs2:11 Shaakidi eroy nena naagana; akeeki nena kammana.
Proverbs2:12 Cincatethi nena iita asata ogiyape naagana; geella odape nena ashshana.
Proverbs2:13 Enti nagara dhuman daanaw
Proverbs2:14 Iita ooson ufaytoosona; geellatethan hashshu goosona.
Proverbs2:15 Enta oosoy mirqethi; enta de7oy geella.
Proverbs2:16 Cincatethi layma maccasape
Proverbs2:17 Iya ba na7atetha azina aggaagasu; Xoossa sinthan caaqida caaquwa dogasu.
Proverbs2:18 I soo ogey hayqoko gathees; iiko buussi moytilletako gathees.
Proverbs2:19 Iiko biya oonika guye simmenna; de7o oge demmenna.
Proverbs2:20 Hessa aggada
Proverbs2:21 Suure asatinne borey baynaysati
Proverbs2:22 Shin iitati biittafe shodetana; ammanetonaysati dhayana.
Proverbs3:1 Ta na7aw
Proverbs3:2 Enti ne laytha adussana; injenne sarotethi new gujana.
Proverbs3:3 Siiqoynne tumatethi neepe haakofo; enta ne qoodhen qacha; ne wozanan xaafa.
Proverbs3:4 Hessa oothiko ne Xoossanne asa sinthan sabetananne nashetana.
Proverbs3:5 Ne kumetha wozanan Godaa ammaneta; ne akeekan zempofa.
Proverbs3:6 Ne ooso ubban iya sinthaya; I nena suure oge kaalethana.
Proverbs3:7 Nena ne huuphen cinca oothofa; Godaa yayya; iitape haaka.
Proverbs3:8 Hessi ne asatethaas payyatethi ehana; ne meqethaaka xaalisana.
Proverbs3:9 Ne shaluwan Godaa boncha; koyro ayfida kathaafe bayraa immada iya boncha.
Proverbs3:10 Hessa ne oothiko
Proverbs3:11 Ta na7aw
Proverbs3:12 Aaway ba dosiya na7a seereysada
Proverbs3:13 Cincatethi demmeynne
Proverbs3:14 Cincatethi birape aadhidi go77ees; worqafe aadhidi maaddees.
Proverbs3:15 Cincatethi worqafe aadhidi al7o; ne demmanaw amotiya ubbay cincatethara ginenna.
Proverbs3:16 Cincatethi ushacha kushen adussa laythi
Proverbs3:17 I ogeti ufaysiya ogeta; I horogay saro horoga.
Proverbs3:18 Iya bana oykeysatas de7o mithi; iyo minthidi oykiya ubbay anjetidaysata.
Proverbs3:19 Goday ba cincatethan sa7aa medhis; ba akeekan salota minthis.
Proverbs3:20 Iya eratethan shaafati goggoosona; shaaratape iri bukees.
Proverbs3:21 Ta na7aw
Proverbs3:22 Enti new de7o gidana; injenne ufaysi immana.
Proverbs3:23 He wode ne hirgi bayna hemetana; ne tohoy dhubetenna.
Proverbs3:24 Neeni zin7iya wode yayyaka; qamma kumethi mal7o dhisko dhiskana.
Proverbs3:25 Akeekona gakiya gados yayyaka; iitati dhayiya dhayuwan dagammaka.
Proverbs3:26 Goday new zempo gidana; ne tohoy xihen oyketonnaada I naagana.
Proverbs3:27 New wolqi de7ishin
Proverbs3:28 Ha77i maaddanaw danda7ashe ne shooruwa
Proverbs3:29 Nena ammanetidi
Proverbs3:30 Nena qohonna de7ishin
Proverbs3:31 Gene oothiya asata qanaatopa; enta iita oosuwa kaallofa.
Proverbs3:32 Goday iita oothiya asata ixees; shin suureta dosees.
Proverbs3:33 Goday iita oothiya asaa keethaa baaddees; shin suureba oothiya asaa keethaa anjees.
Proverbs3:34 Otoron qelqiseyisata Goday qelqisees; shin bantana kawusheyisata sabbees.
Proverbs3:35 Cincati boncho demmana; shin eeyati kawuyana.
Proverbs4:1 Ta nayto
Proverbs4:2 Ta hintew lo77o timirte immiya gisho
Proverbs4:3 Taka ta aawas na7a; ta aayes iya dosiya issi na7a.
Proverbs4:4 Ta aaway tana haysada yaagidi tamaarsis; “Ta oday new gelo; ta kiita naaga; neeni hessa oothiko de7on daana.
Proverbs4:5 Cincatethinne akeeka demmanaw minna; ta new odiyaba dogopa; iyape kare keyopa.
Proverbs4:6 Cincatethas zoko zaaropa; iya nena ashshana; iyo dosa; iya nena naagana.
Proverbs4:7 Cincatethi aadhiya gisho iyo demma; new de7iyaba wursidi ekikoka akeeka demma.
Proverbs4:8 Ne iyo boncha; iya nena dhoqu dhoqu oothana; ne iyo oykiko
Proverbs4:9 Iya ne huuphiyas saba gidana; boncho kallacha immana” yaagis.
Proverbs4:10 Ta na7aw
Proverbs4:11 Taani nena cincatetha oge kaalethana; suure horoga bessaana.
Proverbs4:12 Ne hemetiya wode dhubiyabay deenna; woxiyakoka dhubetaka.
Proverbs4:13 Ta timirtiya loytha naaga; yeddofa; timirtey new de7o immiya gisho loytha naaga.
Proverbs4:14 Nagaranchota ogiyara boopa; iita asata ogiyan hemetofa.
Proverbs4:15 Iyape haaka; iyan hemetofa; guye simma; ne ogiyan ba.
Proverbs4:16 Enti iitaba oothonna de7ishin dhiskoy ekenna; enti ase dhubbonna de7ishin dhiskoy efenna.
Proverbs4:17 Enti nagara kathada moosona; geellatethi ushshada uyoosona.
Proverbs4:18 Xillota ogey seeta gallas gakanaw
Proverbs4:19 Shin geellata ogey sakana dhuma mela; enti aybin dhubetiyakoka erokona.
Proverbs4:20 Ta na7aw
Proverbs4:21 Ne ayfiya sinthafe haassofa; ne wozanan naaga.
Proverbs4:22 Enta demmiya ubbaas enti de7o; enti asatethas payyatethi immoosona.
Proverbs4:23 De7oy iyape pultiya gisho
Proverbs4:24 Ne doonape iita haasaya digga; wordo haasaya ne matape haassa.
Proverbs4:25 Sitti gada sinthe xeella; ne ayfey ne sinthan de7iyaba tishshi oothidi xeello.
Proverbs4:26 Ne tohuwa ogiya giigisa; suure oge xalaalan hemeta.
Proverbs4:27 Suure ogepe ushachi haddirsi goopa; ne tohoy iita oge boonnada naaga.
Proverbs5:1 Ta na7aw
Proverbs5:2 Hessi nena wozanaama oothana; ne oday ne eratethaa qoncisana.
Proverbs5:3 Layma maccasa inxarsafe ililo eessi xokees; I oday oysape aadhidi looxikees.
Proverbs5:4 Shin wursethan iya godare uthada cammawusu; nam7u baggara qanxiya mashshada qara.
Proverbs5:5 I tohoy hayqoko bees; I tangoy duufo gathees.
Proverbs5:6 Iya de7o oge qopuku; I ogey geella; shin geella gideysa iya eruku.
Proverbs5:7 Ta na7aw
Proverbs5:8 Layma maccasa heera boopite; I keetha pengiyako shiiqopite.
Proverbs5:9 Hessi hanonna ixiko hinte bonchuwa harati ekana; na7atethan wozana mino asa kushen hinte hayqana.
Proverbs5:10 Hinte aquwa allagati ekana; hinte daaburadi shiishidabay hara asas gidana.
Proverbs5:11 Wursethan hinte ashoynne hinte asatethay wurin hinte yeekana.
Proverbs5:12 Hinte yaagana; “Ta ayis timirte ixadina? Ta wozanay seera ayis kadhidee?
Proverbs5:13 Taani ta astamaareta si7abike; tana zoreyisata zoriya ekabike.
Proverbs5:14 Hesaa gisho
Proverbs5:15 Neeni ne pultuwafe haathe uya; ne mache xalaala siiqa.
Proverbs5:16 Ne pultuwa dabaaban
Proverbs5:17 Enta new buzo ootha; hara allaga uraara koxofa.
Proverbs5:18 Ne pultoy new anjeto; ne na7atetha machera ufayta.
Proverbs5:19 Lo77iya gaaredaninne ufaysiya gen7eda I dhanthay ubba wode nena alo; ubba wode I siiqoy nena di77o.
Proverbs5:20 Ta na7aw
Proverbs5:21 Asi oothiyaba ubbaa Goday be7ees; I hemetiya horoga ubbaa xeellees.
Proverbs5:22 Nagaranchuwa I oothida nagaray oykees; Iya nagaraa gitey iya qachees.
Proverbs5:23 I ba eeyatethan dhayis; bana naagiboonna gisho hayqis.
Proverbs6:1 Ta na7aw
Proverbs6:2 ne caaqida ne caaquwan xihen gelidaba gidiko
Proverbs6:3 hiza ne shooruwa kushen geladasa. Hessa gisho
Proverbs6:4 Hessa oothonna de7ashe zin7ofa; dhiskoyka nena ekofo.
Proverbs6:5 Shankafe gen7ey kessi ekiyada
Proverbs6:6 Neno azallaw
Proverbs6:7 Zimaddota kiittey baawa
Proverbs6:8 Shin bantaw maanaba bone minjoosona; kathi cakiya wode bantaw koshshiya kathaa shiishosona.
Proverbs6:9 Neno azallaw
Proverbs6:10 Neeni “guuthu zin7ana; guuthu dhiskana; kushe shiisha ekada guuthu shempana” yaagasa.
Proverbs6:11 He wode manqotethi pangada
Proverbs6:12 Laafanne iita asi yuuyidi oda mirqees;
Proverbs6:13 I ba ayfen qam7otees; ba tohon bessees; ba biradhen mallees.
Proverbs6:14 Iya ulon geellatethi de7ees; iitabaa qopees; ubba wode ooshshu medhees.
Proverbs6:15 Hessa gisho dhayoy akeekona iya bolla yaana; I hassayonna meqana; zaaridi paxenna.
Proverbs6:16 Goday ixiya usupun qommoti de7oosona; I shaatetiya qommoti laapuna;
Proverbs6:17 kadhidi xeelliya ayfe
Proverbs6:18 iitaba maqiya wozanaa
Proverbs6:19 Wordo bolla wordo gujiya wordo marka
Proverbs6:20 Ta na7aw
Proverbs6:21 Enta ubba wode ne wozanan oyka; ne qoodhiyan qacha.
Proverbs6:22 Ne hemetiya wode enti nena kaalethana; ne zin7iya wode
Proverbs6:23 Godaa kiitay xompe; iya timirtey poo7o; iya seeray de7oko efiya oge.
Proverbs6:24 Ha timirteti iita maccafenne hara cimmiya maccasa inxarsafe nena naagana.
Proverbs6:25 I mala lo77otethay nena qadhethofo; I qam7otoy nena di77ofo.
Proverbs6:26 Issi addey guutha miishen layma maccas demmanaw danda7ees; shin hara asa macho laggethoy shempo ekees.
Proverbs6:27 Tama idimmin iya ma7oy meetetonna attey de7ii?
Proverbs6:28 Tama bonqo yedhin
Proverbs6:29 Asa macho laggethiya uray hessa mela; iyo bochiya ubbay seerettonna attenna.
Proverbs6:30 Kaysoy koshatidi maanaw kaysiko
Proverbs6:31 Shin I oyketiyabaa gidiko
Proverbs6:32 Shin maccasara laymatiya asi wozani bayna asi; he uray ba shempuwa dhaysees.
Proverbs6:33 Deshethinne kawushi iya qaada; yeelli iyape qushetenna.
Proverbs6:34 Qanaatey azinas yilo denthethees; halo kessiya wode iw qadhetenna.
Proverbs6:35 I ay acaka ekenna; ay mela imotika iya hanquwa doshisenna.
Proverbs7:1 Ta na7aw
Proverbs7:2 De7on daanaw ta kiita ootha; ta timirtiya ne ayfe na77eda naaga.
Proverbs7:3 Ne kushen enta qacha; ne wozanan enta xaafa.
Proverbs7:4 Cincatethi ne michida
Proverbs7:5 Enti nena layma maccasapenne ba qaalan cimmiya hara maccasape naagana.
Proverbs7:6 Issi gallas ta maskootera kare xeellas.
Proverbs7:7 Eratethi pacida na7atethata be7as; enta giddofe issoy daro eeya.
Proverbs7:8 He na7atethay ogera bishe
Proverbs7:9 He wode sa7i laadees.
Proverbs7:10 Maccasiya iya demmasu; iya layma gideysa I ma7oy erisees; iya asa cimmanaw halchada keyasu.
Proverbs7:11 Iya xaltaamanne yeelli bayna maccas; son wopu gada uttuku.
Proverbs7:12 Iya issi toho ogen

Proverbs7:14 “Taani ta yarshuwa yarshada

Proverbs7:17 Taani ta hiixa
Proverbs7:18 Haaya; wontana gakanaw siiqo aloos; qoometidi ufaytoos.
Proverbs7:19 Ta azinay son deenna; haaho biitta bis.
Proverbs7:20 Miishe karxiita kunthidi bida gisho
Proverbs7:21 Ba mal7o odan iya balethasu; ba liiqo inxarsan iya cimmasu.

Proverbs8:1 Cincatethi xeegawusu; si7ite; akeeki ba qaala dhoqu oothida sissawusu.

Proverbs8:3 Dirsa penge matan
Proverbs8:4 Asaw
Proverbs8:5 Hinteno eratethi baynaysato eratethi tamaarite; hinteno eeyato
Proverbs8:6 Taani lo77oba odiya gisho si7ite; taani doonape suurebay keyees.
Proverbs8:7 Taani tuma odetayis; wordoy ta matan ixetidaba.
Proverbs8:8 Ta oday tuma; geella woyko mirqethi gidenna.
Proverbs8:9 Akeeki de7iya uraas ta oday like; eri de7iya uraas ta oday qonce.
Proverbs8:10 Birape aathidi ta zoriya doorite; geeshsha worqafe aathidi eratethi doorite.
Proverbs8:11 Cincatethi zo7o al7o shuchafe aadhees; ne amotiya ubbay iira liketenna.
Proverbs8:12 Taw
Proverbs8:13 Godaas yashshi iitatethi ixo; taani otoronne ceeqetethi ixayis; iita ogenne wordo oda dosike.
Proverbs8:14 Zoreynne lo77o eray tabaa; akeekinne wolqi taw de7ees.
Proverbs8:15 Kawoti ta baggara kawotoosona; haareysati suure higge ta baggara kessoosona.
Proverbs8:16 Halaqati ta maaddin deriya haaroosona; biitta aysiya gita asata ta maaddayis.
Proverbs8:17 Tana doseyisata ta dosayis; tana minthidi koyeysati demmana.
Proverbs8:18 Duretethinne bonchoy taara de7oosona; wuronna shaloynne injey ta matana.
Proverbs8:19 Hinte taape demmiya go77ay
Proverbs8:20 Ta xillotetha ogen hemetayis; suure pirda ogiyara kanthayis.
Proverbs8:21 Tana doseysatas ta shalo immana; enta keethaa duretethan kunthana.

Proverbs8:31 I medhida alamiyan ufaytayis; asa naytika tana ufaysoosona.

Proverbs8:36 Shin tana demmonna uray bana qohees; tana ixiya ubbay hayqo dosees.”

Proverbs10:1 Haysati Solomone leemisota. Cinca na7i ba aawa ufaysees; shin eeya na7i ba aayiw azzanthees.

Proverbs10:4 Azallatethi manqisees; shin minnidi oosoy dureyees.

Proverbs10:15 Dure asa miishey diretida katamada naagees; shin manqotethi manqota dhaysees.
Proverbs10:16 Xillo asa oosoy iya de7o; shin iita asa wursethay dhayo.
Proverbs10:17 Seerin simmiya asi de7o ogen hemetees; shin seerin ixiya asi balees.
Proverbs10:18 Ixo kammiya asi wordancho; zigirsi laaliya asi eeya.

Proverbs10:21 Xillo asa odi daro asaa go77ees; shin eeyati banta paca wozanan hayqoosona.
Proverbs10:22 Godaa anjoy dure kessees; he duretetha bolla meto gujenna.

Proverbs14:1 Cinca maccasi ba keethaa keexawusu; shin eeya maccasiya ba keethaa ba kushen laallawusu.
Proverbs14:2 Suure hemetiya asi Godaa yayyees; shin ba oge geellayiya asi Godaa kadhees.
Proverbs14:3 Eeya odi iya zokuwas xam7a ehees; shin cincata inxarsay enta naagees.
Proverbs14:4 Boori bayna ixiko shaaley kaysi gidees; shin goshsha boori de7iko
Proverbs14:5 Ammanetiya marki ubba wode tuma odees; shin wordo marki wordo xalaala odetees.
Proverbs14:6 Qelqisiya asi cincatethi koyees
Proverbs14:7 Eeya asape haaka; neeni iya odape eratethi demmaka.
Proverbs14:8 Cinca asi cinca gidiya ba oothiyaba erees; shin eeya asa eeyatethay iya balethees.
Proverbs14:9 Eeyati nagara oothishe
Proverbs14:10 Issi issi wozani ba azzanuwa erees; iya ufaysa oonika iyara koxenna.
Proverbs14:11 Iitata keethay laaletana; shin suureta keethay minnidi daana.
Proverbs14:12 Asas like daaniya ogey de7ees; shin iya wursethay hayqoko gathees.
Proverbs14:13 Miicha wodeka wozanan azzanoy de7ees; ufaysa wursethay azzano gidanaw danda7ees.
Proverbs14:14 Iita asi ba iita oosuwa gate ekana; lo77o asika ba lo77o oosuwa gate ekana.
Proverbs14:15 Eeya asi ubbaba ammanees; shin cinca asi akeekidi tangees.
Proverbs14:16 Cinca asi Godaa yayyees; iitape haakees; shin eeya asi eesotesinne iitape naagetenna.

Proverbs22:5 Iitata ogen agunthinne xihey de7ees; shin bana naagiya asi entafe haakees.
Proverbs22:6 Na7i waanidi daanaw bessiyako tamaarsa; I cimiya wodeka iyape haakenna.
Proverbs22:7 Durey manquwa haarees; tal7e ekiday tal7e immidaysas aylle gidees.
Proverbs22:8 Nagara zeriya uray waaye cakees; iya hanqo xam7ay meqana.
Proverbs22:9 Ba kathaa manqotas shaakiya gisho keeha asi anjetana.
Proverbs22:10 Qelqisiya asi diggiko
Proverbs22:11 Wozani geeshshi gidida asinne lo77o oda dosiya asi kawora dabbotees.
Proverbs22:12 Godaa ayfey eratethi naagees; shin wordanchota qaala shiri yeggees.
Proverbs22:13 Azalla asi
Proverbs22:14 Layma maccasa dooni wolqaama olla mela; Goday hanqetidaysati iyan kundoosona.
Proverbs22:15 Eeyatethi na7a wozanan de7ees; shin pircoy iyape haassees.
Proverbs22:16 Shalo shiishanaw manquwa naaqeynne dure asas imota immiya nam7ay manqana.
Proverbs22:17 Ne haytha zaarada cincata qaala si7a; ne wozanaa ta timirtiyako zaara.
Proverbs22:18 Enta ne wozanan wothikonne ne doonan enta haasayiko
Proverbs22:19 Ne ammanoy Godan gidana mela
Proverbs22:20 Taani new zorenne eratethi kumida hastamu leemisota xaafas.
Proverbs22:21 Nena kiittidaysas like zaaro zaarana mela
Proverbs22:22 Manqotas aybika bayna gisho
Proverbs22:23 Goday enta gisho mootetana; enta bonqidaysata I bonqana.
Proverbs22:24 Yilotiya uraara laggetopa; elle shenetiya uraara hemetofa.
Proverbs22:25 Neeni iya yiluwara meezetiko
Proverbs22:26 Asa aco ta qanxana gada waase gidopa.
Proverbs22:27 Ne qanxiyaba dhayiko
Proverbs22:28 Ne mayzati tokida beni zawa shoddofa.
Proverbs22:29 Ba oosuwan loohida asi be7adii? I coo asatas gidonashin kawotas oothees.

Proverbs30:28 Zareti kushen oyketoosona; shin kawo gadhon de7oosona.
Proverbs30:29 Banta maata bessishe hemetiya heedzu medhetethati de7oosona; oyddanthoy lo77o hemethi hemetees.
Proverbs30:30 Hessika
Proverbs30:31 Macca kuttota giddon hemetiya adde kutto
Proverbs30:32 Neeni eeyada otortidaba gidikoka
Proverbs30:33 Maathi bukey oysu kesseysada
Proverbs31:1 Haysafe kaallidi xaafetida leemisoy
Proverbs31:2 Ta na7aw
Proverbs31:3 maccasan ne wolqaa wursofa; kawota dhaysiya maccasatan ne minotethaa dhaysofa.
Proverbs31:4 “Limu7eela
Proverbs31:5 Enti uyaa wode higge baloosona; naaqetida asaa maata qelli goosona.
Proverbs31:6 Mathoyaa ushshu hayqana haniya uraasinne sa7i iitida uraas immite.
Proverbs31:7 Enti banta manqotethaanne banta waayiya doganaw uyo.
Proverbs31:8 Banta gisho odetanaw danda7onna asaa gisho ne odeeta; maaddiya asi baynayisata gisho ne eqa.
Proverbs31:9 Enta miyen eqada entaw suure pirda; manqotanne metootanchota maata naaga” yaagada tamaarsasu.
Proverbs31:10 “Wozanaama macho ooni demmanaw danda7ii? I gatey zo7o al7o shuchafe aadhees.
Proverbs31:11 I azinay iyo ammanetees; iyaw koshshiyabaape aybika pacenna.
Proverbs31:12 Iya ba de7o laytha ubban
Proverbs31:13 Suufenne liino koyada
Proverbs31:14 Iya zal7anchota markabe mela; ba kathaa haaho biittafe shiishawusu.
Proverbs31:15 Iya ba soo asaas kathi giigisanawunne ba macca aylletas ooso immanaw
Proverbs31:16 Lo77o gade koyada shammawusu; ba kushen oothada demmida miishen woyne tokawusu.
Proverbs31:17 Iya ba xeessa minthada dancawusu; ba qesiya oosos minthawusu.
Proverbs31:18 Iya wodhe demmanaw minnada zal7awusu; iya oothashe qamisiya gisho I xompey to7enna.
Proverbs31:19 Iya ba hindziritiya oykawusu; ba biradhen loythada suqawusu.
Proverbs31:20 Iya manqotasinne metootanchotas immawusu.
Proverbs31:21 I soo asa ubbay ho77iya ma7o ma7iya gisho
Proverbs31:22 Alga bolla hiixiya ma7o sikawusu; liinope oosetida ocha teera daaniya ma7o ma7awusu.
Proverbs31:23 Biitta cimati shiiqiya dubbushan I azinay bonchetida asi.
Proverbs31:24 Liinope ma7onne danco oothada
Proverbs31:25 Iya minonne boncho asi; yaana laytha ubban ufaytada de7awusu.
Proverbs31:26 Cincatethan ba doona dooyawusu; ammanthiya zorey I inxarsan de7ees.
Proverbs31:27 Iya ba soo asaa de7uwa injeyanaw ubba wode oothawusu; azallatethi I bolla bentidi erenna.
Proverbs31:28 I nayti dendidi
Proverbs31:29 Lo77oba oothiya daro maccasati de7oosona; shin ne enta ubbaafe aadhasa” yaagees.
Proverbs31:30 Mali cimmees; yegelssatethi dhayana. Shin Godaa yayiya maccasiya
Proverbs31:31 Iya oothidaba ubbaas iyo woytite; I ooso ubbay dabaaban iyo galatiso.

Ecclesiastes1:2 He cincay
Ecclesiastes1:3 Ba de7iya bessan ubban
Ecclesiastes1:4 Issi yeletethi aadhiya wode
Ecclesiastes1:5 Awi dolees wullees; nam7antho dolanaw yaa doliya bessaa ellesees.
Ecclesiastes1:6 Carkoy issi toho duge issi toho pude carkees; qassi yuuyi yuuyi aadhidi
Ecclesiastes1:7 Goggiya haathi ubbay abban gelees; shin abbay kumi erenna. He haathay simmidi gogganaw
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ubbabay salethiyaba; I ay mela salethiyako odi wursanaw danda7etenna. Ayfey xeellidi kalli erenna; haythi si7idi
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kase hanidabay wontoka simmidi I hanana; qassi ha77i hanishe de7eysi kase hanidaba. Hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes1:10 Oonika
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kase aadhida wodetan hanidabata zaaridi hassayabay baawa; guyepe hananabata entafe guye oonika hassayenna.
Ecclesiastes1:12 Taani cincay
Ecclesiastes1:13 Taani sa7an de7iyaba ubbaa shaakada eranawunne cincatethan pilgada xeellanaw qofa qachas. Yaatada asa ubbaas Xoossay immida de7oy daro daabursiyabaanne ufaysonnaba gideysa akeekas.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Salope garsan hanidaba ubbaa taani be7as; shin ubbayka hada; carko oykanaw yedetheysa mela.
Ecclesiastes1:15 Geelli suuranaw danda7enna; baynaba taybanaw danda7etenna.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Taani ta wozanan haysada yaagada qopas; “Taape kase Yerusalaame haarida ubbatape taani gitanne cinca gidas. Cincatethinne era guussi I aybeko paacada eras” yaagas.

Ecclesiastes2:2 Miichi eeyatethi gideysa
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ha7ika ta wozanay cincatethan tana kaalethishin
Ecclesiastes2:4 Issi gitaba oothas; ta daana keethata keexas; woyne tokas.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Dumma dumma atakiltiyanne ayfe ayfiya mithata tokas; asi shempiya bessaa giigisas. He bessan dumma dumma ayfe ayfiya mithata tokas.
Ecclesiastes2:6 He mithata ushshanaw
Ecclesiastes2:7 Addenne macca aylleta shammas; qassi ta son yeletida hara aylletika taw de7oosona. Taape kase Yerusalaamen de7ida asaape aadhiya mehe
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ta haariya dumma dumma biittatapenne kawotape bonchetida buqura ehisada
Ecclesiastes2:9 Taani kase Yerusalaamen de7ida oodefeka aadhada gita asi gidas. Ta cincatethayka taara wursethi gakanaw de7is.
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ta ayfey xeellidabaanne ta wozanay amotidaba ubbaa demmas; ta asatethay koyiya ufaysi ubbaa diggabike. Taani oothida ooso ubban ufaytas; ta daabura wodhey hessa.

Ecclesiastes2:12 Hessafe guye

Ecclesiastes3:1 Ubbabaas wodey de7ees; salope garsan oosetiyaba ubbaas wodeynne qammi de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:2 Yeletanaw wodey de7ees; hayqanaw wodey de7ees. Tokanaw wodey de7ees; Shoddanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:3 Wodhanaw wodey de7ees; pathanaw wodey de7ees. Laallanaw wodey de7ees; keexanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:4 Yeekanaw wodey de7ees; miiccanaw wodey de7ees. Kayotanaw wodey de7ees; yexanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:5 Shuchu laallanaw wodey de7ees; shuchu shiishanaw wodey de7ees. Qoometanaw wodey de7ees; duuxanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:6 Koyanaw wodey de7ees; koshshi agganaw wodey de7ees. Shiishi oykanaw wodey de7ees; laallanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:7 Peedhanaw wodey de7ees; sikanaw wodey de7ees. Si77i gaanaw wodey de7ees; odetanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:8 Dosanaw wodey de7ees; ixanaw wodey de7ees. Olas wodey de7ees; saro daanaw wodey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes3:9 Yaatin
Ecclesiastes3:10 Taani qassi
Ecclesiastes3:11 Xoossay ubbaba iya wodiyan wodiyan loythidi oothis. Xoossay asa wozanan merinatethi wothis; gidikoka
Ecclesiastes3:12 Asi ba de7ida laythan lo77iyaba ootheysafenne
Ecclesiastes3:13 Qassi
Ecclesiastes3:14 Xoossay oothidaba ubbay merinaw de7eysa taani eras; I oothidaba bolla gujanaw woyko iyape denthanaw oodesika danda7etenna. Xoossi hessa oothey
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ha77i hanishe de7iyabay woyko sinthafe hananaw de7iyaba ubbay kase hanidaba; Xoossay kase hanidabay zaari hananaada koyees.

Ecclesiastes4:2 Taani
Ecclesiastes4:3 Gidoshin
Ecclesiastes4:4 Asa daaburinne amotidaba demoy
Ecclesiastes4:5 Ba kushe idimmidi uttiya azallay koshan hayqees.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Daaburaninne carko kaalon demmiya dakobaape wopan demmiya issi kushey lo77o.
Ecclesiastes4:7 Salope garsan hada gididaba haraba be7as.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Hessika na7i woyko ishi bayna issi bizza addey de7ees. Shin iya daaburas zawi baawa; baw de7iyaban alenna. I bana
Ecclesiastes4:9 Banta oosuwan lo77o ayfe demmiya gisho issino gideysafe nam7a gideysi lo77o.
Ecclesiastes4:10 Nam7aafe issoy kundiko issoy denthees; shin barka de7iya uray kundiko iya denthey bayna gisho iya ayye!
Ecclesiastes4:11 Nam7ay issife zin7iko ho77ees; shin barka zin7iya uraa waanidi ho77anaw danda7ii?
Ecclesiastes4:12 Issi asi barka teqanaw danda7onna metuwa nam7u asati teqanaw danda7oosona. Heedzu ayfen dooqetida wodoroy elle duuxenna.
Ecclesiastes4:13 Zore ekonna eeyanne ceega kawuwape manqonne cinca gidida na7atetha kawoy lo77o.
Ecclesiastes4:14 He na7atethay qasho keethafe keyidi woyko manqotethafe dendidi kawo gidanaw danda7ees.
Ecclesiastes4:15 Salope garsan de7iyanne simeretiya asa ubbay kawa laattiya na7atetha kaalleysa be7as.
Ecclesiastes4:16 Issi kawoy haariya asaa tayboy daro gidanaw danda7ees. Shin kaalliya yeletethay iya kawotethan ufaytibeenna. Hessika hada; carko oykanaw kaalo mela.
Ecclesiastes5:1 Xoossa keethi geliya wode akeekada tanga. Enti banta iita oosuwa eronna gisho
Ecclesiastes5:2 Odetanaw eesotopa; Xoossa sinthan odetanaw ne wozanan dirgofa. Xoossay salona
Ecclesiastes5:3 Qofi dariya wode amuhoy darees; oda daroy eeyatethi qoncisees.
Ecclesiastes5:4 Xoossas gepidaba polanaw gam7ofa; eeyatan Xoossay ufaytenna. Hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes5:5 Issiba gepidi polonna agganaape koyro geponna agoy lo77o.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Nagaran nena gelsonna mela ne inxarsa yeda oothofa. Xoossa keethan ootheysako
Ecclesiastes5:7 Daro amuhoynne daro odi hada. Hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes5:8 Issi biittan manqoti naaqetishin
Ecclesiastes5:9 Biittafe bentiya wodhey ubbaasa; hari attoshin
Ecclesiastes5:10 Bira dosiya uraas biri gidi erenna; duretethi siiqiya uray miishe kalli erenna; he ubbay hada.
Ecclesiastes5:11 Duretethi dariya wode miya asi darees. Ba shaluwa coo ayfen xeellidi
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ooso oothiya asi guuthu min daro min
Ecclesiastes5:13 Salope garsan daro azzanthiyaba haraba taani be7as. Hessika iita wode bana asho gidi minjida shalo
Ecclesiastes5:14 woyko issi iitabay gakin dhayida duretethi. I na7a yelidaba gidikoka na7aa laatisiyaba dhayidi mela attees.
Ecclesiastes5:15 Asi ubbay kallo yeletidaysada mela kushe simmidi baana. Ay mela I daaburidi oothikoka ekidi biyabay baawa.
Ecclesiastes5:16 Asi kallo yeletidi kallo guye simmeysi daro azzanthiya iitabaa. Iya daabura ubbay carko oykiyabada hada gidiko iya ay maaddii?

Ecclesiastes6:1 Salope garsan asa bolla gakiya daro iitabaa taani be7as.
Ecclesiastes6:2 Xoossi asas shalo
Ecclesiastes6:3 Issi asi xeetu na7a yelidi
Ecclesiastes6:4 He boshay coo yeletidi oonika hassayonna dhumaa biya gisho iya sunthay dhuman kametidi attees.
Ecclesiastes6:5 I
Ecclesiastes6:6 Hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes6:7 Asi daaburidi oothiya ubbay baw miyaba demmanaasa; shin iya amoy ali erenna.
Ecclesiastes6:8 Yaatin
Ecclesiastes6:9 Amon xuugetanaape ayfen be7oy lo77o; hessika carko oykanaw kaalo mela hada.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Haniyaba ubbay koyrottidi eretidi de7ees. Issi issi asi waananaw de7iyako adussa wodepe kase eretidi uttis. Ay asika baape minneysara baaxetanaw danda7enna.
Ecclesiastes6:11 Odi dariya wode hadabay darees; yaatin hessi ase ay maaddii?
Ecclesiastes6:12 Hada gididi kuyada coo aadhiya ba guutha laytha asi waatidi aathanaw koshshiyako erey oonee? Asi hayqidi aggin salope garsan hananaw de7iyaba asas odanaw danda7ey oonee?
Ecclesiastes7:1 Al77o shittofe lo77o sunthi aadhees; yeletiya gallasape hayqo gallas lo77o.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Asa ubbaa wursethay hayqo gidida gisho
Ecclesiastes7:3 Azzanoy som7o kareethikoka
Ecclesiastes7:4 Cinca asa wozani yeeho son de7ees; shin eeya asa wozani ufaysa son de7ees.
Ecclesiastes7:5 Eeyata yethi si7anaape cincata seera sissi lo77o.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Eeya asa miichi agunthan tama yeddin dhuuqeysa mela; hessika hada.
Ecclesiastes7:7 Gene oosoy cinca asi eeya kessees; wodhaafe ekoy wozana iissees.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Doomethafe wursethi lo77o; otorope danda7i lo77o.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Eeyata hanqoy enta ki7on de7iya gisho
Ecclesiastes7:10 “Ha77i wodiyape kase wodey ayis lo77o gididee?” gada oychofa; hessa mela oyshoy cinca asi oychiya oysho gidenna.
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ha sa7an de7iya asi ubbay cinca gidanaw koshshees; cincatethi demoy laatape lo77o.
Ecclesiastes7:12 Miishey ase iitape kammidi ashsheysada cincatethika ashshees. Shin cincatethi miishepe aadhey asa de7o naaganaw danda7iya gishosa.
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ane Xoossi oothidaba akeeka! Xoossi geellayidaba ooni suurisanaw danda7ii?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Sa7i giigida wode ufayta; metoy gakiya wode akeeka. Ufaysi gidin meto gidin Xoossi yeddiya woden yees. Shin awusi koyrottidi yaaneko neeni eraka.
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ha hada gidida ta laythan darobaa be7as. Hessika
Ecclesiastes7:16 Hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes7:17 Neeni wodey gakonna hayqonnaada aadhida iita gidopa; aadhada eeya gidopa.
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ha ubban Xoosse yayya; asi meto ubbaa xoonon keyanaw danda7iya gisho neeni daro iita woyko daro xillo gidonashin giddo asi gida.
Ecclesiastes7:19 Cincatethi cincaas immiya wolqay issi katama haariya tammu asata wolqafe aadhees.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Xillobaa xalaala oothidi nagara oothonna de7iya asi ha sa7aa bolla baawa.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Asi haasaya qaala ubbaa si7ada polana goopa; neeni ubbaa si7ana giiko ne aylley nena baaddishin si7ana.
Ecclesiastes7:22 Qassi neeni ne huuphen harata baaddiyaba ne wozanay erees.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hessa ubbaa taani cincatethan pilgada be7as. Yaatada
Ecclesiastes7:24 Cincatethi ubba wode haahon de7iyabaanne ciimmoba; yaatin
Ecclesiastes7:25 Taani pilgada xeellanaw cincatethinne oda ubbaa wursethaa eranaw qopas. Nagari eeyatethi
Ecclesiastes7:26 Taani hayqope aadhidi cammiya haraba demmas. Hessika
Ecclesiastes7:27 Astamaarey haysada yaagis; “Taani pilgada demmidabay haysa.
Ecclesiastes7:28 Hessika
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taani pilgada demmida harabay
Ecclesiastes8:1 Cinca asi daaney oonee? Ubbabaas birshethaa erey oonee? Cincatethi pashkisidi
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kawos kiiteta; kase neeni kiitetana gada Xoossa sinthan caaqadasa.
Ecclesiastes8:3 Kawa sinthafe ellesada keyopa; kawoy ba koydaba oothanaw danda7iya gisho iita ooso oothanaw dendofa.
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ubbabaa oothanaw kawas maati de7iya gisho
Ecclesiastes8:5 Iya kiitaa poliya asi qohetenna; cinca asi like wodiyanne oothiya ogiya erees.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ase deexo metoy gakikoka ubbabaas wodeynne ogey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes8:7 Sinthafe hananaba eriya asi baawa; “Haysi hanana” gidi odanaw danda7ey oonee?
Ecclesiastes8:8 Shempoy shaaketidi biya gallas oykidi teqanaw danda7iya asi baawa; woyko hayqoy ba gallasan yoonnaada digganaw danda7iya asi baawa. Ola wode oonika oletike gaanaw danda7onnaysada iitatethi iita oothiya uraa yeddenna.
Ecclesiastes8:9 Salope garsan haniyaba ubbaa taani akeekada qopiya wode asi baw de7iya maata hara asi qohanaw go7eteysa be7as.
Ecclesiastes8:10 Iita asati bonchon moogetishin be7as. Enti iitatetha oothida katamaa asay shiiqidi enta sabbishin si7as; hessi ubbay hada.
Ecclesiastes8:11 Asi qopidi iitabaa oothiya gaasoy
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nagaranchoy xeetu toho iitabaa oothishin iya barey aduqikoka
Ecclesiastes8:13 Iitati Xoosse yayyonna gisho sarotethi entaw baawa; enti Xoosse yayyonna gisho enta barey kuyada qaammana.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ha sa7an oosetiya hara hadabay de7ees. Hessika
Ecclesiastes8:15 Asi miyabaape
Ecclesiastes8:16 Taani cincatethi aybeko eranawunne asi ha sa7a bolla daaburiya daabura akeekanaw halchas; wursethan asi dhisko dhayidi oothiya oosoy de7eysa be7as.
Ecclesiastes8:17 Taani Xoossi oothidaba ubbaa be7as. Salope garsan oosetida ooso asi pilgidi eranaw danda7onnaysa eras. Asi ay mela daaburidi pilgi xeellikoka
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ha ubbaa ta wozanan qopidaape guye cincatinne xilloti
Ecclesiastes9:2 Dummatethi bayna ubbaa gakiya qaaday issino; xillo gidin geella
Ecclesiastes9:3 Asa ubbaa qaaday issino gideysi
Ecclesiastes9:4 Hayqida gaammofe paxa de7iya kani lo77o; de7on de7eysatara de7iya uraas ufaysi de7ees.
Ecclesiastes9:5 De7on de7iya asati issi toho hayqanaw de7eysa eroosona; shin hayqidaysati issibaaka erokona. Enti dogetidaysata gidiya gisho aykoka maaddokona.
Ecclesiastes9:6 Enta siiqoy
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ba
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ubba wode ne ma7oy boothi gido; ne huuphen zayte tiya.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Salope garsan Xoossay new immida ha hada de7uwan
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ne kushey oothanaw demmidaba ubbaa ne kumetha wolqan ootha; neeni baana duufuwan oosoy woyko halchoy woyko eri woyko cincatethi baawa.
Ecclesiastes9:11 Taani salope garsan haraba be7as. Hessika
Ecclesiastes9:12 Gidoshin he wodey awude yaaneko eranaw danda7iya asi baawa. Kafoy xihen geleysada woyko moloy giten oyketeysada asi ubbay qoponna gakiya iita woden oyketees.
Ecclesiastes9:13 Salope garsan taani be7idaba harabay de7ees. Hessika cincatethi gita leemiso gideysa.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Guutha asi de7iya issi guutha katamiya de7awusu. He katamiw issi wolqaama kawoy olanaw dendis; iyo teqidi oykis.
Ecclesiastes9:15 He katamen manqo gidida issi cinca addey de7ees; I ba cincatethan he katamiw ashshis. Shin he manqo addiya zaaridi hassayday baawa.
Ecclesiastes9:16 Taani
Ecclesiastes9:17 Hessi hanikoka
Ecclesiastes9:18 Cincatethi ola miishepe aadhees; shin issi nagaranchoy daro lo77oba dhaysees.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Hayqida udunxeti sawiya shittuwa xinqisoosona; hessadaka
Ecclesiastes10:2 Cinca asa wozanay iya ushachi kaalethees; shin eeya asa wozani haddirsi kaalethees.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Eeya asi oge hemetiya wode iyaw akeeki baawa; I eeya gideysa asi ubbay erees.
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ne halaqay ne bolla hanqetiko ne bessaa yeddofa; si77i gidi danda7oy gita nagaraa atto giisees.
Ecclesiastes10:5 Salope garsan taani be7ida hara iitabay de7ees. Hessika deriya haareysati oothiya naaquwa.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Eeyati daro dhoqa shuumatetha oykidi de7iya wode dureti ziqa bessan uttidosona.
Ecclesiastes10:7 Taani aylleti haareysatada para toggidi bishin qassi haareysati aylletada tohon hemetishin be7as.
Ecclesiastes10:8 Olla bookiya asi he ollan kundees; gimbe dirsi laaliya uraa shooshi dukees.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Shuchu denthiya asi he shuchan
Ecclesiastes10:10 Dun7ida kalta leefonna qeriko daro wolqaa wursees; shin cincatethan oothiya oosuwas ayfey de7ees.
Ecclesiastes10:11 Shooshi duki aggin shooshu doqiya dhale wotheysi he uraa aykoka maaddenna.
Ecclesiastes10:12 Cinca asa odi iyaw boncho imisees; shin eeyay ba doonape keyida qaalan baw meton gelees.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Eeyay ba haasaya eeya qaalan doomidi
Ecclesiastes10:14 Eeya asi darobaa odetees. Gidoshin
Ecclesiastes10:15 Eeya asi ba ooson daaburees; I ba soo biya ogiya erenna.
Ecclesiastes10:16 Na7a gidida kawoynne wonta guura gibira miya halaqati de7iya biitte nena ayye!
Ecclesiastes10:17 Bonchetida kawoynne mathotanaw gidonashin wolqanne minotethi demmanaw maaran miyanne uyaa halaqati de7iya biittiya anjetidaaro.
Ecclesiastes10:18 Addey azalla gidiko iya kaaray woddees; iya kushey oothonnaba gidiko
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kathi muussaninne woyne ushshan ufaysi bentees; shin miishey ubbaba shammees.
Ecclesiastes10:20 Si7iya asi baawa gada ne wozanan kawo cayopa; woyko ne zin7iya kifiliyan dure uraa baaddofa. Ne gidaysa salo kafoy bidi entaw odanaw danda7ees.
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ne kathaa haatha bolla yegga; daro gallasape guye neeni zaarada demmana.
Ecclesiastes11:2 New de7iya shaluwa laapun woyko hospun bessan shaakada wotha. Sinthafe ha sa7aa bolla ay iitabay yaaneko neeni eraka.
Ecclesiastes11:3 Shaari ira tookiko biitta bolla iri bukees. Mithi pude kundin duge kundin ba kundida bessan de7ees.
Ecclesiastes11:4 Carko naagiya oonika kathi zerenna; shaari dendana gakanaw naagiya oonika ba kathaa cakenna.
Ecclesiastes11:5 Carkoy biya ogiyanne na7i ba aaye ulon waanidi medhetiyako ne eronnaysada ubbaba medhida Xoossay ba oosuwa waati oothiyako eranaw danda7aka.
Ecclesiastes11:6 Guura gidin omarsi ne zerethi zereysa aggofa; wontaysi woyko omarsaysi lo77aneko neeni eraka.
Ecclesiastes11:7 Poo7oy ufaysiyabaa; awa ayfe be7oy lo77oba.
Ecclesiastes11:8 Asi adussa laythi ha sa7an de7iko he laythan ufayto. Shin ha alamiyabay hada gideysanne yaana dhuma wodey merinaw daanaysa qopo.
Ecclesiastes11:9 Neno na7atethaw
Ecclesiastes11:10 Na7atethinne goobatethi hada gidiya gisho ne wozanaape azzano
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ne na7atetha laythan nena medhidaysa qopa. Un77a gallasati yoonna de7ishin
Ecclesiastes12:2 awinne poo7oy
Ecclesiastes12:3 He wodey keethe naageysati kokoriya wode
Ecclesiastes12:4 He wodey
Ecclesiastes12:5 He wodey
Ecclesiastes12:6 Bira santhalaatay duuxonna de7ishin
Ecclesiastes12:7 biittay biittako simmonna de7ishin
Ecclesiastes12:8 Astamaarey
Ecclesiastes12:9 Astamaarey cinca xalaala gidonashin eraka gidiya gisho deriya tamaarsis. I daro leemisota pilgidi issuwa issuwa iya maaran maaran dummayidi wothis.
Ecclesiastes12:10 Astamaarey like gidida qaala demmanaw koyis; hessa gisho
Ecclesiastes12:11 Cincata qaalay henthanchoy wude laagiya xeera oco xam7a mela. Issife shiiqida leemisoti gathi oythiya mismaare mela.
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ta na7aw
Ecclesiastes12:13 Heko ubbabay odetis; ubbabaas kuushshay haysa; Xoosse yayiya; iya kiitaa naaga; hessi asas waanna ooso.
Ecclesiastes12:14 Xoossay ooso ubbaa qassi geemmida ubbaa lo77o gidin iitaa pirdanaw de7ees.
