Isaiah1:1 Ooziyani
Isaiah1:2 Saloto si7ite; sa7aw hayza si7a; Goday haysada yaagees; “Ta nayta yelada dichas; shin enti taw makallidosona.
Isaiah1:3 Boori ba godaa erees; hareyka bana haaridaysa zadaluwa erees. Shin Isra7eeley erenna; ta asay akeekenna.
Isaiah1:4 Hinteno
Isaiah1:5 Makalla bolla makalla ayis gujeetii? Ayis zaari zaari shoceteetii? Hinte huuphey hargetis; hinte wozanay daaburis.
Isaiah1:6 Huuphe binaanape toho xugunthi gakanaw payyatethi baawa; madunthi
Isaiah1:7 “Hinte biittay oxis; hinte katamati taman xuugetidosona. Hinte be7ishin hinte goshsha allagati ekana; imatha asati hinte biitta quu7e kessana.
Isaiah1:8 Yerusalaamey woyne gaden de7iya shaqarada
Isaiah1:9 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday nuus guutha koche ashshonaako nuuni Soodomenne Gamoora katamaada hananashin” yaagis.
Isaiah1:10 Hinteno
Isaiah1:11 “Hinte yarsho daroy taw ay oothii? Hanno gakanaw hinte taw shiishida urge dorsaanne modho mehe xuussa yarshoy taw gidana. Taani kormata
Isaiah1:12 Hinte ta sinthan bentanaw yaa wode ta keethaa dabaaba hinte yedhana mela oone oychiday?
Isaiah1:13 Hada yarshuwa eheysa aggite! Hinte cuyisiya ixaaney tana shaattees. Ageena xeeron hinte bonchiya gallasa
Isaiah1:14 Ageena xeeron hinte bonchiya gallasaanne hinte ba7aale gallasata taani ixas; enti taw tooho gididosona; taani enta tookanaw danda7ike.
Isaiah1:15 Hinte kushe miccidi tana woossiya wode taani ta ayfiya hintefe genthana. Hinte kushey suuthan kumida gisho hinte darsi woossikoka taani si7ike.
Isaiah1:16 Meecetite; hintena geeshshite; hinte iita oosuwa ta sinthafe diggite; gene hanuwa aggite.
Isaiah1:17 Lo77oba ooso tamaarite; xillo pirdaa koyite. Un7etidaysata ashshite; yi7otas eqite; am7etas mootetite” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah1:18 “Haayite; ane woli ammanthoos. Hinte nagaray baara biittada zo7ikoka
Isaiah1:19 Hinte ero gidi taw kiitetiko biitta anjuwa maana.
Isaiah1:20 Shin hinte ixas gidi makalliko
Isaiah1:21 Ammanetida katamiya waanada layma gidadee? Kase suuretethinne xillotethi I giddon kumis
Isaiah1:22 Ne biray baltis; ne mal7o woyney haathan yeletis.
Isaiah1:23 Hinte halaqati makallanchotanne kayso lagge gididosona; enti ubbay wodhaafe doseysatanne kushe xeelleyisata. Yi7otas suure pirdokona; am7eta waasuwa si7okona.
Isaiah1:24 Hessa gisho
Isaiah1:25 Taani ta kushiya ne bolla zaarana; ne baltetha geeshshana; ne tunatetha ubbaa neepe diggana.
Isaiah1:26 Taani beniysada ne halaqata
Isaiah1:27 Xiyooney suure pirdan
Isaiah1:28 Shin makallanchotinne nagaranchoti issife meqana; Godaa aggeysati dhayana.
Isaiah1:29 Hinte ufaytida yarsho wolan yeellatana; hinte doorida kooran kawuyana.
Isaiah1:30 Hinte haythi qoqofetidi wurida woladanne haathi dhayida atakilte bessada gidana.
Isaiah1:31 Bana mino gey buuxa gidana; iya oosoyka pol7u gidi to7iya tama gidana; enti issife xuugetana; he tama toysana asi baawa.
Isaiah2:1 Amoxe na7ay Isayaasi Yihudabaanne Yerusalaameba be7idaysi haysa.
Isaiah2:2 Wursetha gallasatan Godaa keethay keexetida zumay
Isaiah2:3 Higgey Xiyoonepe
Isaiah2:4 I kawotethata giddon pirdana; daro asata palama shaakana. Enti banta mashshaa marasha
Isaiah2:5 Hinteno
Isaiah2:6 Godaw
Isaiah2:7 Enta biittan birinne worqey kumis; enta miishiyas zawi baawa. Enta biittan pari kumis; enta para gaariyas zawi baawa.
Isaiah2:8 Enta biittan eeqi kumidosona; enti banta kushe oosuwa goyinnoosona.
Isaiah2:9 Hessa gisho
Isaiah2:10 Godaa daganthuwafenne yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw zaallako biite; biitta giddon qosetite!
Isaiah2:11 Otoranchoti kawuyana; ceeqeteysati guuxana; he gallas Godaa xalaali dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Isaiah2:12 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Isaiah2:13 Adussa Libaanose zigatanne Baasane wola ubbaa dhaysana;
Isaiah2:14 Dhoqa deretanne zumata dembayana.
Isaiah2:15 Katamaa naagiya adussa shakotanne mino dirsa gimbeta ziqi oothana.
Isaiah2:16 Goday gitanne lo77o markabeta haathan mitisana.
Isaiah2:17 Asa otoroy ziqi gaana; iya ceeqetethay dhayana. He gallas Godaa xalaali dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Isaiah2:18 Eeqa ubbay polo dhayana.
Isaiah2:19 Goday biitta qaathanaw dendiya wode iya daganthuwafenne iya yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw asay shucha gongoloninne biitta ollan qosetana.
Isaiah2:20 He gallasay asay goyinnanaw medhida banta bira misiletanne banta worqa misileta girotasinne shirshiqotas yeggana.
Isaiah2:21 Goday biitta qaathanaw dendiya wode iya daganthuwafenne iya yashshiya bonchuwafe attanaw enti gongolo giddonne shucha za7o giddo baqatana.
Isaiah2:22 Hiza shempoy siidhen de7iya
Isaiah3:1 Heko
Isaiah3:2 Minotanne olanchota
Isaiah3:3 toora moconanne deriya ayseysa
Isaiah3:4 Taani yooga nayta enta halaqa oothana; guutha nayti enta haarana.
Isaiah3:5 Asay asa bolla
Isaiah3:6 Issi asi ba aawa keethan de7iya ba ishatape issuwa oykidi
Isaiah3:7 He gallas
Isaiah3:8 Yerusalaamey gandigarasu; Yihudi kundanaw matasu; enti banta odaaninne banta oosuwan Godaa bolla dendidi
Isaiah3:9 Enta som7oy enta bolla markatees; enti banta nagaraa Soodome asaa mela awaajosona; banta nagaraa qottokona. Enti banta bolla dhayo ehida gisho enta ayye!
Isaiah3:10 Enti banta oosuwa ayfiya maana gisho
Isaiah3:11 Enti banta kushe oosuwa gatiya ekana gishonne dhayoy enta bolla yida gisho iitata ayye!
Isaiah3:12 Na7atethati ta asaa un7ethoosona; maccasati enta haaroosona. Ta asaw
Isaiah3:13 Goday ba araatan uttis; asaa bolla pirdanaw giigetis.
Isaiah3:14 Goday deriya cimatanne kaaletheyisata pirdanaw shiishidi
Isaiah3:15 Hinte ta asaa ayis tincherethetii? Manqota som7uwa ayis kareethetii?” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Isaiah3:16 Goday
Isaiah3:17 Hessa gisho
Isaiah3:18 He gallas Goday Xiyoone maccasa alleeqota
Isaiah3:19 haytha worqa
Isaiah3:20 huuphe kama
Isaiah3:21 siidhe worqa
Isaiah3:22 koyse ma7uwa
Isaiah3:23 mastootiya
Isaiah3:24 Shitto gisho xinqo
Isaiah3:25 Ne asati mashshan
Isaiah3:26 Xiyoone pengeti yeekananne zeleelana; kayotada sa7an uttida maccasada hanana.
Isaiah4:1 He gallas laapun maccasati issi adde oykidi
Isaiah4:2 He wode Godaa tashey
Isaiah4:3 Xiyoonen attidaysati
Isaiah4:4 Goday Xiyoone maccasa qita meeccana; ba pirdaaninne ba ayyaana taman suutha guso Yerusalaamepe diggana.
Isaiah4:5 Goday Xiyoone zumaa bollanne yan shiiqiya ubbaa bolla gallas shaara cuyanne qamma tama laco medhana; iya boncho ubbaa bolla kama gidana.
Isaiah4:6 I
Isaiah5:1 Ta dosiya addiya woyne gadiyaba
Isaiah5:2 Biitta bookidi
Isaiah5:3 “Hinteno
Isaiah5:4 Taani ta woyne gadiyas oothidaysafe haraa ay oothanabay attidee? Lo77o ayfe ayfana gada naagas
Isaiah5:5 Ha77i taani ta woyne gadiya bolla oothanaba hintew odana. Taani iya dirsaa diggana; woyney dhayanaada oothana. Taani gimbiya laallana; woyne gadey yedhetana.
Isaiah5:6 Taani he gadiya quu7e oothana; woyney xintetenna
Isaiah5:7 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa woyne gadey Isra7eele asaa. I
Isaiah5:8 Bessi dhayin
Isaiah5:9 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada gidi caaqishin ta si7as. “He gita keethati kaysatana; he lo77o keethatan daanaw asi dhayana.
Isaiah5:10 Tammu waaxan tokida woyniyape
Isaiah5:11 Mathoya ushsha koyanaw wonta guura dendeysatanne woyne ushshay xuuggana gakanaw
Isaiah5:12 Enta imatuwan maasinqoy
Isaiah5:13 Hiza ta asay akeeka dhayida gisho
Isaiah5:14 Duufoy ba gompaa dalgisis; ba doona zawi bayna dooyis. Yerusalaamen de7iya gita asaa
Isaiah5:15 Asi tooshetana; asa koche ubbay kawuyana; otortiya ubbay guuxana.
Isaiah5:16 Shin Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Isaiah5:17 He wode dorsati he bessan heemetana; dorsa urgeti laaletida keetha bessatan maana.
Isaiah5:18 Cimo wodoron nagara
Isaiah5:19 “Ane Xoossay elleso! Nuuni be7ana mela ba oosuwa eesoyo! Nuuni erana mela Isra7eele Geeshshay qopida qofaa polo” yaageyisata ayye!
Isaiah5:20 Iitaa lo77o
Isaiah5:21 Bantana cincanne qara geyisata ayye!
Isaiah5:22 Woyne ushshan eretida asaanne mathoyiya ushshu walakanaw wozani mino gidida asaa ayye!
Isaiah5:23 Qohida uraa xillisanaw wodhaafe ekidi
Isaiah5:24 Enti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa higgiya ixida gishonne Isra7eele Geeshshaa qaala kadhida gisho tama lacoy kale oykeysadanne buurey taman meetetidi dhayeysada enta xaphoy wooqana. Enta ciishshay baanada laaletidi dhayana.
Isaiah5:25 Hessa gisho
Isaiah5:26 Goday haaho son de7iya kawotethatas malla dhoqan essis; sa7aa gaxan de7iya asaa suyqidi xeegis; enti dirgishe puttu goosona.
Isaiah5:27 Enta giddon daabureynne dhubetey baawa; entafe issoyka dhiskenna woyko zin7enna. Xeessan dancida saqey birshetena; enta caamma wodoroy duuxenna.
Isaiah5:28 Enta tooray qara; enta dongeyka waaxetidi de7ees. Enta parata tohoy qara shucha mela; enta para gaareta gertoy gote mela.
Isaiah5:29 Enti gaammo mela guummoosona; wodala gaammo mela gudoosona. Enti sarbuqishe miyaba oykidi
Isaiah5:30 He wode enti gita abba guunthada Isra7eele bolla guummana. Issi asi he biitta xeelliya wode dhuminne waayey be7ana; poo7oy shaaran mitettana.
Isaiah6:1 Kawoy Ooziyani hayqida laythi Goday dhoqa araataninne boncho bessan uttidaysa be7as; iya ma7oy Xoossa keethaa kumis.
Isaiah6:2 Surafeela geetetiya kiitanchoti iyape bollara de7oosona; issi issi kiitanchuwas usupun qefeti de7oosona; nam7u qefetan ba som7uwa kammees; nam7u qefetan ba tohuwa kammees; nam7u qefetan piradhees.
Isaiah6:3 Enti issoy issuwako
Isaiah6:4 Enta girsa waasuwa gaason Xoossa keethaa baasoy qaaxis; Xoossa keethay cuyan kumis.
Isaiah6:5 Yaatin
Isaiah6:6 He kiitanchotape issoy yarsho bessaafe bonqo tama qaphera ekidi piradhishe taako yis.
Isaiah6:7 Bonqo taman ta mettersha bochidi
Isaiah6:8 Hessafe guye Goday
Isaiah6:9 Goday taako
Isaiah6:10 Kaallidika
Isaiah6:11 Taani
Isaiah6:12 asaa haaho bessi yeddana gakanawunne biittay asi bayna mela biitta gidana gakanaasa.
Isaiah6:13 Tammu asaape issi asi biitta bolla attiko
Isaiah7:1 Ooziyana na7ay Iyo7atama na7ay Akaazi
Isaiah7:2 Araame biittay Efreema biittara issife olas caaqidaysa Yihuda kawoy si7ida wode
Isaiah7:3 Goday Isayaasako
Isaiah7:4 Iyaw haysada yaagada oda; ‘Naageta; wopu ga; yayyofa. Ha nam7u kawoti tamape attidi cuyaa duruma mela gidiya gisho
Isaiah7:5 Araame biittay
Isaiah7:6 Enti “Ane Yihuda olidi oykoos; iya mentherethidi nu giddon shaaki ekidi
Isaiah7:7 Gidoshin
Isaiah7:8 Damasqoy Araame huuphe; kawoy Razini Damasqo huuphe. Usupun tammanne ichashu laytha giddon Efreemi laaletidi kawotethi gidonna attana.
Isaiah7:9 Efreema huuphey Samaariya; Ramala na7ay
Isaiah7:10 Qassika Goday Akaazako
Isaiah7:11 “Bolla saluwape woyko garsa sa7aape Goday
Isaiah7:12 Shin Akaazi
Isaiah7:13 Yaatin
Isaiah7:14 Hessa gisho
Isaiah7:15 I
Isaiah7:16 Shin na7ay iita ixonne lo77uwa dooro eranaape sinthe
Isaiah7:17 Efreemi Yihudape shaaketoosape doomin haniboonna meto wode Goday ne bolla
Isaiah7:18 He gallas Goday
Isaiah7:19 Yaatin
Isaiah7:20 He gallas Goday Efraxiisa shaafa hefintha baggafe garxida shiggiriyan
Isaiah7:21 He gallas issi asas issi miizinne nam7u deesha xalaali attana.
Isaiah7:22 Gidoshin
Isaiah7:23 He gallas issi mukulu biran washetiya mukulu woyne tohoti de7iya bessa ubban kinchoteynne agunthi dolana.
Isaiah7:24 Biitta ubban kinchoteynne agunthi kumida gisho
Isaiah7:25 Kase konten oothida zumatan ha77i kinchoteynne agunthi kumida gisho yayyidi
Isaiah8:1 Goday taako
Isaiah8:2 Kahiniya Urayanne Baraka na7aa Zakariyasa ammanetiya marka oothada taani xeegana” yaagis.
Isaiah8:3 Hessafe guye
Isaiah8:4 Na7ay
Isaiah8:5 Qassika Goday taako haysada yaagis.
Isaiah8:6 “Ha asay loddara goggiya Salihoome haatha ixidi
Isaiah8:7 Hessa gisho
Isaiah8:8 Di77ishe Yihuda gelana; kixay qoodhe gakanaw kumidi yaara kanthana.” Abeeti Amanu7eela
Isaiah8:9 Hinteno kawotethato
Isaiah8:10 Xoossay nuura de7iya gisho
Isaiah8:11 “Goday ba mino kushiya ta bolla wothidi
Isaiah8:12 Ha asaa maqo ubbaa maqo goopite; enti yayyiyaba Yayyofite; dagammopite.
Isaiah8:13 Hinte geeshshi gaanaw bessey Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa; iyaw yayyanawunne dagammanaw bessees.
Isaiah8:14 I
Isaiah8:15 Entafe daroti dhubetana; kundidi me77ana; xihen oyketidi di7etana” yaagis.
Isaiah8:16 Ta odeysa naaga; ta tamaareta giddon higgiya attama.
Isaiah8:17 Taani ba som7uwa Yayqooba zerethafe genthiya Godaa naagana; iyan ammanetana.
Isaiah8:18 Tananne taw Goday immida nayta be7ite. Nuuni Xiyoone deriyan de7iya Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaape Isra7eele asaas mallanne malaata.
Isaiah8:19 “Suyqishenne kalkashishe odiya marotanne moytilleta oychite” yaagidi hintena zoriya asay de7oosona. De7on de7eysatas hayqidaysata oycheysafe asay banta Xoossaa oychanaw bessennee?
Isaiah8:20 Higgiyanne Godaa marka si7ite! He asati ha qaalada haasayonna ixiko entaw sa7i wontenna.
Isaiah8:21 Asay waayetishenne koshatishe biitta bolla toylatana. Enti koshatida wode yilotidi
Isaiah8:22 Sa7aa duge xeelliya wode waaye
Isaiah9:1 Gidoshin
Isaiah9:2 Dhuman hemetiya asay wolqaama poo7o be7is; qassi hayqo dhuman de7eysatas poo7oy poo7is.
Isaiah9:3 Neeni kawotethaa darsadasa; enta ufaysaa gujadasa. Asi kathi shiishiya wode ufayteysada woyko di7uwa shaakidi ekiya wode ufayteysada ne sinthan ufaytana.
Isaiah9:4 Neeni Midiyaame biitta xoonidaysada enta deexo qambara
Isaiah9:5 Olanchota caammaynne suuthan munuqetida ma7o ubbay taman xuugetana; tamas oysetho gidana.
Isaiah9:6 Nuus na7i yeletis! Adde na7i nuus imetis! Kawotetha maati iya hashiyan gidana; iya sunthay
Isaiah9:7 Iya kawotethaa dalgatethaasinne iya sarotethaas zawi baawa. Hachife doomidi
Isaiah9:8 Goday Yayqooba zeretha bolla pirda qaala kiittin
Isaiah9:9 Efreema asayinne Samaare katamaa asay haysa oothiday Godaa gideysa erishe
Isaiah9:10 “Xuubepe keexetida keethati laaletidosona; shin nu zaaridi masetida shuchan keexana; boobba mithati qanxetidosona; shin nu enta bessan zigata laammana” yaagidosona.
Isaiah9:11 Shin
Isaiah9:12 Dolohape Araameta
Isaiah9:13 Gidoshin
Isaiah9:14 Hessa gisho
Isaiah9:15 Cimatinne bonchetidaysati huuphe; wordo tamaarsiya nabeti goyna.
Isaiah9:16 Ha asaa kaaletheysati balethoosona; enta kaalleysatika baloosona.
Isaiah9:17 Hessa gisho
Isaiah9:18 Tami kinchotenne agunthi meysada iitatethi xuuggees; siketida wori xuugetin
Isaiah9:19 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa hanquwan biittay xuugetana; asika tama oysethiyaba gidana; oonika ba ishaa ashshanaw qopenna.
Isaiah9:20 Enti ushacha baggara bonqana
Isaiah9:21 Minaasey Efreema
Isaiah10:1 Iita higgenne un7ethiya awaajo kesseyisata ayye!
Isaiah10:2 Hessan enti manqota
Isaiah10:3 I
Isaiah10:4 Hinte di7etida asaara gooshetana; hayqida asaa giddon zin7ana. He ubban Godaa hanqoy simmibeenna; iya kushey dendida bessan de7ees.
Isaiah10:5 Goday haysada yaagees; “Ta yiluwas pirconne ta hanquwas xam7a gidida Asoore biitta ayye!
Isaiah10:6 Enta shaluwa di77anaadanne bonqanaada; oge urqada enta yedhanaada Xoosse eronna kawotethaa bolla taani Asoore kiittana; tana hanqethida asaa bolla iya yeddana.
Isaiah10:7 Shin Asoore kawoy haysa halchibeenna; iya wozanay haysa qopibeenna. I qopiday daro kawotethata dhaysanaasa.
Isaiah10:8 Hessa gisho
Isaiah10:9 Kalinoy Karkamisha katamaa mela gidenneyee? Hamaati Arfada katamaa mela gidenneyee? Samaarey Damasqo katamaa mela gidenneyee?
Isaiah10:10 Yerusalaameninne Samaaren de7iya eeqatape dariya eeqata goyinniya kawotethata seeranaw taani ta kushiya yeddas.
Isaiah10:11 Taani Samaare katamaa bollanne iya eeqa misileta bolla oothidaysada Yerusalaame katamaa bollanne iya eeqa misileta bolla oothikinaayee?” yaagis.
Isaiah10:12 Goday Xiyoone deriya bollanne Yerusalaame bolla ba oosuwa ubbaa polidaape guye
Isaiah10:13 Asoore kawoy haysada yaagees: “Ta kushe minotethan
Isaiah10:14 Asi kafo keethan kushe yeddeysada taani kawotethaa shaluwan ta kushiya yeddas. Qassi dogetida phuuphuleta shiisheysada taani biitta ubbaa shiishas. Ba qefiya qaathiday woyko doona phuqiday woyko waassiday issoyka baawa” yaagis.
Isaiah10:15 Kalti baara qanxiya addiya bolla dendanaw danda7ii? Woyko magaazey banan go7etiya addiya bolla otoranaw danda7ii? Kushey denthonna xam7i bana baw denthii? Guufey oykiya asi bayna baw hemetii?
Isaiah10:16 Hessa gisho
Isaiah10:17 Isra7eele Poo7oy tama gidana; enta Geeshshay laco gidana. Iya agunthanne iya kinchotiya issi gallas xuuggananne maana.
Isaiah10:18 Hargey ase gilqiseysada Goday ba wora mitha bonchuwanne ba aradda biitta bonchuwa dhaysana.
Isaiah10:19 Woran attiya mithay daro guuthi gidiya gisho
Isaiah10:20 He wode Isra7eelepenne Yihudape attida guuthati bantana shocidaysan gidonashin
Isaiah10:21 Attida Yihuda asay Wolqaama Xoossaako simmana.
Isaiah10:22 Neno Isra7eele
Isaiah10:23 Ee
Isaiah10:24 Hessa gisho
Isaiah10:25 Guutha wodepe guye
Isaiah10:26 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Oreeba shuchaa matan Midiyaameta shocidaysada enta lisson shocana. I Gibxen oothidaysada ba xam7a abba bolla denthana.
Isaiah10:27 He gallas
Isaiah10:28 Morkiya wotaadarati Gaye katamaa gelidosona; Migroonara kanthidosona; banta ola miishiya Mikmaasa wothidosona.
Isaiah10:29 Enti ogiyara kanthi aadhidi
Isaiah10:30 Galima asaw
Isaiah10:31 Madimana asay baqatidosona; Gebima asay banta shempuwas qosetidosona.
Isaiah10:32 Morkiya wotaadarati hachi Nooban de7oosona; enti Xiyoone zuma bolla eqidi
Isaiah10:33 Heko
Isaiah10:34 Goday siketida wora kallotana gakanaw qanxana; Libaanosey Wolqaamaa sinthan kundana.
Isaiah11:1 Isseye durumay aacana; iya xaphuwape ayfiya tashey keyana.
Isaiah11:2 Godaa Ayyaanay iya bolla shempana; cincatethaanne akeeka Ayyaanay
Isaiah11:3 Godaas yayyidi ufaytees; ba ayfey be7idaban coo pirdenna; woyko ba haythay si7idaban coo kuuyenna.
Isaiah11:4 Shin I
Isaiah11:5 Xillotethi iya xeessa danco gidana; ammanetethi iya miyaas saqe gidana.
Isaiah11:6 Suudhumey dorsa marara issife daana; maahey deesha marara issife zin7ana. Mari gaammo butalera issife hemetana; guutha na7i enta heemmana.
Isaiah11:7 Miizinne babanthi issife heemetana; enta marati issife zin7ana; gaammoy boorada kale maana.
Isaiah11:8 Dhammiya na7i shoosha ollan kaa7ana; dhanthi duuxida na7i wodhiya shoosha ollan ba kushiya yeddana.
Isaiah11:9 Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla oonika qohetenna woyko dhayenna. Abbi haathan kumeysada sa7i Godaa eron kumana.
Isaiah11:10 He wode Isseye xaphoy asaas malla gidana; kawotetha ubbay iya koyana; I de7iya bessay bonchetana.
Isaiah11:11 He gallas Goday attida ba asaa
Isaiah11:12 I kawotethatas malla dhoqu oothidi denthana; Isra7eelepe laaletidaysata issife gathana; Yihudape sa7aa oyddu baggan zeretidaysata shiishana.
Isaiah11:13 Hessafe guye
Isaiah11:14 Enti wuloha baggan de7iya Filisxeeme biitta bolla gupi wodhana; enti doloha baggan de7iya asaa bonqana. Enti Edoome bollanne Moo7abe bolla banta kushiya wothana; Amooneti entaw haaretana.
Isaiah11:15 Goday Gibxe matan de7iya Zo7o Abbaa melisana; ba melsiya carkuwara ba kushiya Efraxiisa shaafa bolla qaathana. Yaatidi asay mela bessaara pinnana mela laapun guutha shaafa kessidi shaakana.
Isaiah11:16 Isra7eele asay Gibxe biittafe keyiya wode ogey keydaysada
Isaiah12:1 He wode hinte haysada yaagidi yexana. “Godaw
Isaiah12:2 Xoossay ta atotetha; taani iyan ammanetayis
Isaiah12:3 Atotetha pultuwafe hinte haathe ufaysan duuqana.
Isaiah12:4 He gallas hinte yaagidi yexana: “Godaa galatite! Iya sunthaa xeegite. Iya oosota kawotethata ubbaas odite; I gita gideysa awaajite.
Isaiah12:5 Goday gita ooso oothida gisho
Isaiah12:6 Isra7eele Geeshshay hinte giddon gita gidiya gisho
Isaiah13:1 Amoxe na7ay
Isaiah13:2 Aykoy bayna deriya bolla malla essidi
Isaiah13:3 Taani hanqetidaysata seerana mela ta geeshshata kiittas; ta xoonoy ufaysiya ta wolqaamata xeegas.
Isaiah13:4 Daro asay wocameysada deriya huuphiyan de7iya wocamaa si7ite! Qassi kawotethati issife shiiqidi palamiya palama si7ite! Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday olanchota olas giigisis.
Isaiah13:5 Godaynne iya hanqo ola miishey biitta ubbaa dhaysanaw haaho biittafe
Isaiah13:6 Godaa gallasay matida gisho yeekite! He gallasay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Xoossaa matape dhaysanaw yaana.
Isaiah13:7 Hessa gisho
Isaiah13:8 Enti dagammana; iqethinne un7etethi enta oykana. Yelo keyida maccasada enti inxaxana. Enti dagammidi issoy issuwa xeellana; enta som7oy bido gidis.
Isaiah13:9 Heko biitta baysa kessanawunne iyan de7iya nagaranchota dhaysanaw yiloninne suullida hanqon Godaa gallasay yaana.
Isaiah13:10 Salo xoolintotinne xoolinto koceti banta poo7uwa diggana; doliya away dhumana; ageenayka ba poo7uwa immenna.
Isaiah13:11 Goday
Isaiah13:12 Attidaysati walahi bayna worqafe al7o gidana; asa na7i Ofira worqafe aadhidi boncho gidana.
Isaiah13:13 Hessa gisho
Isaiah13:14 Shankafe baqatiya gaarada woyko heemmiya asi bayna dorsa wudeda asi ubbay ba asaako simmana; ubbay ba biitta baqatana.
Isaiah13:15 Bentida oonika cadetana; oyketida oonika mashshan hayqana.
Isaiah13:16 Enta guutha nayti enta sinthan busetana; enta keethay bonqetana; enta macheta hara asi iissana.
Isaiah13:17 Bira koyonnanne worqan ufaytonna Meedona asaa taani enta bolla denthana.
Isaiah13:18 Enta dongey na7atethata wodhana; yooga naytaka maarokona; enta ayfey naytas qadhetenna.
Isaiah13:19 Kawotethatas boncho
Isaiah13:20 He biittan asi uttenna; woyko yeletaape yeletaa gakanaw yan asi deenna. Arabe asay yan banta dunkaaniya tolokona; dorse heemmeysatika yan banta wudiya heemmokona.
Isaiah13:21 Shin bazzo do7ati yan aqana; workanati enta keethaa kumana; guttoti yan daana; yanchoti yan keexana; bazzo deeshati yan gupana.
Isaiah13:22 Enta keethatan godarey waassana; enta kawo gadhon workanati boccana. Iya wodey matis; iya gallasayka gam7enna.
Isaiah14:1 Goday Yayqoobas qadhetana; Isra7eele zaaridi doorana; enta
Isaiah14:2 Kawotethati enta
Isaiah14:3 Goday hintena
Isaiah14:4 hinte Babiloone kawa bolla haysada yaagidi qelqisana. Un7etheysi waanidi aggidee? Iya hanquwa suulay waanidi attidee?
Isaiah14:5 Goday kawotethata xam7aanne haareyisata gumba menthis.
Isaiah14:6 Enti asaa zawi bayna hanquwan shocidosona; bantana xoonidaysata qanxonna un7ethishe de7idosona.
Isaiah14:7 Shin biitta ubbay shempidi de7is; ufaysan yexis.
Isaiah14:8 Hari attoshin
Isaiah14:9 Neeni yaa wode
Isaiah14:10 Enti ubbay haysada yaagana. “Heko neka nuuda wolqa dhayadasa; nu mela gidadasa.”
Isaiah14:11 Kase diithi diixin sabetiya ne bonchoy ha77i Si7oole gelis. Ollathi neeni zin7iya hiixa; guxuney neeni ma7iya afila gidana yaagana.
Isaiah14:12 Neno wonta na7aw
Isaiah14:13 Neeni ne wozanan
Isaiah14:14 Taani shaarati de7iya dhoqa bessaafe bolla aadhana; taani
Isaiah14:15 Shin neeni Si7oolen
Isaiah14:16 Nena be7idaysati
Isaiah14:17 sa7aa biitta bazzo kessidaysi
Isaiah14:18 Kawotethata kawoti ubbay ba duufon duufon bonchon zin7ana.
Isaiah14:19 Shin neeni ixetida tasheda ne duufuwape gaxa holettadasa. Ne ahay mashshan hayqida ahaninne ollan de7iya shuchatako duge wodhidaysata ahan kametis. Neeni tohon yedhetida aha mela gidadasa.
Isaiah14:20 Neeni ne biitta dhaysida gishonne ne asaa wodhida gisho entara moogetaka. Iitaa sunthay kochay merinaw xeegetofo.
Isaiah14:21 Enti dendidi biitta laattonna; sa7a ubbaa katama xalaala oothonna mela enta aawata nagaraa gisho
Isaiah14:22 Taani “Enta bolla dendana; enta sunthaa
Isaiah14:23 Taani Babiloone quxarey de7iya bessinne haathi eelliya bessi oothana; taani gado piton iya pittana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Isaiah14:24 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagidi caaqis: “Taani halchidaysada hanana; taani qopidaysada poletana.
Isaiah14:25 Taani Asoore asaa ta biittan mentherethana; ta deriya bolla iya yedhana. Iya qambaray enta bollafe
Isaiah14:26 Sa7a ubbaas qofetida qofay haysa; kawotethata ubbaa bolla micetida kusheyka haysa.
Isaiah14:27 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysa qopida gisho iya digganaw danda7ey oonee? Iya kushey micetis; hessa guye zaaranaw danda7ey oonee?
Isaiah14:28 Kawoy Akaazi hayqida laythi odetida qaalay haysa:
Isaiah14:29 Hinteno Filisxeeme asaw
Isaiah14:30 Manqofe manqoti ta qooruwan heemetana; metootanchoti wopu gidi zin7ana. Shin taani ne kochaa koshan wursana; neepe attida guuthata wodhana.
Isaiah14:31 Neno pengiyaw
Isaiah14:32 He kawotethay kiitida asatas woygidi zaaranee? Goday Xiyoone keexin
Isaiah15:1 Moo7abe biittaba Goday odida qaalay haysa: Moo7aben de7iya Era katamaynne Qiira katamay issi qamma laaletidi dhayidosona.
Isaiah15:2 Diboonan de7iya asay banta eeqa keethan yeekanaw dhoqa bessi keyidosona. Moo7abe asay Nebosinne Medebaas yeekees. Huuphe ubbay buluusetis; buuchi ubbay meedetis.
Isaiah15:3 Oge bolla kayo ma7o ma7oosona; pooqe bollanne dabaaba ubban yeekoosonanne afuthi dharcoosona.
Isaiah15:4 Haseboona asaynne Elaala asay waassoosona; enta waasoy Yahaaxa gakanaw si7etees. Hessa gisho
Isaiah15:5 Taani Moo7abes wozanape yeekas; iyan de7iya asay Zo7aarenne Egilaat-Shelisha katamaa baqatis. Enti Luhita ogiyan yeekishe boosona; baggati qassi Horonayma biya ogiyan
Isaiah15:6 Namirima haathati melidosona; maatay miccis; aacay shullis; cil7obay aybika baawa.
Isaiah15:7 Hessa gisho
Isaiah15:8 Moo7abe heera ubbay waaso xalaala gidis; enta waasoy Eglaamanne Bi7eer-Elime gakanaw si7etees.
Isaiah15:9 Dimoona haathati suuthi gididosona; shin
Isaiah16:1 Moo7abe asaw
Isaiah16:2 Moo7abe maccasay banta keethafe goodetida kafotada Arnoona shaafa pinniya bessan laaletana.
Isaiah16:3 Moo7abe asay Yihuda asaako
Isaiah16:4 Moo7abepe goodeteysati hinte giddon de7o; enta dhaysanaw koyeysatape qosetidi attiya besse gidite. Enta un7etheysati wuridosona; enta dhayoy attis; otoranchoti biittafe dhayidosona.
Isaiah16:5 Hessafe guye
Isaiah16:6 Yihuda asay
Isaiah16:7 Hessa gisho
Isaiah16:8 Haseboona goshshaynne Sebama woyne gadey dhayis. Kawotethata halaqati yedherethida tasheti mela biitta kanthidi Ya7izeera gakidosona; enta aacay daayidi
Isaiah16:9 Taani Ya7izeera katamaas yeekidaysada Sebama katamaa woynetas yeekayis. Haseboona katamaasine El7aala katamaas
Isaiah16:10 Goshsha gadiyape ufaysinne hashshu guussi eketis. Woyne gadiyan mazmurey yexetenna. Ufaysan woyne gum7iya bessan gum7iya asi baawa; taani gum7eyisata ililsaa dhaysas.
Isaiah16:11 Hessa gisho
Isaiah16:12 Moo7abey ba zumaa bolla keykoka
Isaiah16:13 Goday kasetidi Moo7abeba odida qaalay haysa.
Isaiah16:14 Shin ha77i Goday
Isaiah17:1 Damasqoba Goday haysada yaagees: “Heko
Isaiah17:2 Aroora katamati asi bayna baysa biitta gidana; yan mehey heemetana; enta yashshiyabay deenna.
Isaiah17:3 Efreemape Miixati
Isaiah17:4 “He wode Isra7eele bonchoy qaaretana; iya ordetethay gilqana.
Isaiah17:5 Isra7eeley
Isaiah17:6 Shamaho qoqofi simmin
Isaiah17:7 He gallas asay bantana medhidaysako
Isaiah17:8 Enti banta kushen giigisida yarsho bessaako xeellokona; Asheera eeqa misiliyas gidin
Isaiah17:9 He wode Isra7eele asaa gaason Hiwenne Amoore katamati laaletidaysada enta mino katamati laaletana; baysa gidana.
Isaiah17:10 Hinte hintena ashshiya Xoossaa dogideta; hinte qoseti attiya zaalla qopibeketa. Hessa gisho
Isaiah17:11 he gallas enti diccidi gakana mela oothikoka
Isaiah17:12 Heko
Isaiah17:13 Kawotethati daro haathada guummoosona; shin Goday enta seerana. Enti zumaa huuphen de7iya buure carkoy dentheysadanne gotey baana dentheysada enta denthidi haaho bessi laallana.
Isaiah17:14 Sa7i qammiya wode enti dagammana; sa7i wontanaape sinthe enti dhayana. Nuna wolqan ekeysatanne bonqeyisata qaaday haysa.
Isaiah18:1 Tophe shaafatape hefinthan giiriya qefeti de7iya biitta ayye!
Isaiah18:2 He biittay
Isaiah18:3 Hinteno

Isaiah19:1 Gibxe bolla Goday haysada yaagidi odis: “Heko
Isaiah19:2 Gibxe asaa issuwa issuwa bolla denthana. Ishay ishaa bolla
Isaiah19:3 Gibxe asay eesho dhayana; taani enta halchuwa hada oothana. Enti banta eeqata
Isaiah19:4 Taani wozana mino gidida Gibxe kawa kushen aathada immana; I enta haarana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Isaiah19:5 Nayle Shaafa guuxi guuxi baana; haathayka melana.
Isaiah19:6 Dhaway xinqana; Gibxe haathati guuxananne melana; mayreynne maqay shullana;
Isaiah19:7 Nayle Shaafa gaxan de7iya cil7obay melana; iya heeran zeretida katha ubbay melananne dhayana.
Isaiah19:8 Molo oykeysati kayotana; Nayle shaafan gitenne molo manxaqo yeggiya ubbay yeekananne doccana.
Isaiah19:9 Paadetida talbafe liino ma7o ootheysati
Isaiah19:10 Piiqeysatinne une oothiya ubbay kayotana.
Isaiah19:11 Xo7aane haareysati eeya; Gibxe kawa zoriya cincati pathonna zore zoroosona. Yaatin
Isaiah19:12 Yaatin
Isaiah19:13 Xo7aane haareysati eeyidosona; Mempisa haareysati cimetidosona. Gibxe zoriya gita asati iya balethidosona.
Isaiah19:14 Goday enta giddon eeyisiya ayyaana yeddis; enti mathotida asi ba cooshshan gondoreteysada Gibxey ba ooso ubban gondoretana mela oothidosona.
Isaiah19:15 Zamboy woyko boozi
Isaiah19:16 He gallas Gibxe asay maccasa mela gidana. Enti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta bolla qaathiya iya kushiya be7idi yashshan kokorana.
Isaiah19:17 Yihudi Gibxe yashisana; Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta bolla oothanaw qopida qofaa gisho Yihudaba si7iya ubbay yayyana.
Isaiah19:18 He gallas Gibxe biittan de7iya ichashu katamati Kanaane qaalan odeteysatanne Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas ammanetanaw caaqeyisata gidana. He katamatape issoy
Isaiah19:19 He wode Gibxe biittas gidduwan
Isaiah19:20 Hessi Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas Gibxe biittan mallanne marka gidana. Enti bantana un7etheyisata gisho Godaako waassiya wode entaw ashsheysa kiittidi enta ashshana.
Isaiah19:21 He wode Goday Gibxe biittan eretidaysa gidana; Gibxe asay he gallas Godaa erana. Yarshonne katha yarsho eki yidi iya goyinnana. Enti Godaas qangananne banta qangetha gathana.
Isaiah19:22 Goday Gibxe biitta shocana; iyo zaaridi pathana. Enti Godaako simmana; I enta woosa si7idi pathana.
Isaiah19:23 He gallas Gibxefe Asoore gakanaw dalga ogey keyana; Asoore asay Gibxe
Isaiah19:24 He gallas Isra7eeley Gibxeranne Asoorera heedzantho biitta gididi
Isaiah19:25 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta haysada yaagidi anjana: “Ta ase gidida Gibxey anjeto; ta kushe ooso gidida Assory anjeto; ta laata gidida Isra7eeley anjeto” yaagana.
Isaiah20:1 Asoore kawoy Sargooni kiitida toora moconati yidi

Isaiah21:3 Hessa gisho ta asatethay saketis; maccasi eqeteysada taani un7etas. Taani si7iyabay tana kokorsis; taani be7iyabay tana daganthis.

Isaiah22:1 “Qoncetha Zangaara” geetetiya bessaba Goday odida qaala. Hintena ubbaa aybi un7ethin pooqe keetha bolla keydetii?
Isaiah22:2 Neno waasoy
Isaiah22:3 Hinte halaqati ubbay issife baqatidosona; enti dongey bayna coo di7etidosona. Enti haakidi baqatikoka betida ubbay oyketidosona.
Isaiah22:4 Hessa gisho
Isaiah22:5 Goday
Isaiah22:6 Elaami ba para gaaretaranne para asatara ba dongiya oykidi yis; Qiira wotaadareti banta gondalleta giigisidosona.
Isaiah22:7 Hinte lo77o zangaarati para gaaretan kumidosona; para asati Yerusalaame pengiya sinthan eqidosona.
Isaiah22:8 I Yihuda miixata qaaris. He gallas Wora Keethan de7iya kawa olaa miisheta be7ideta.
Isaiah22:9 Dawita Katama giddon laaletha dooriya be7ideta; garsa baggan de7iya ollan haathe kunthideta.
Isaiah22:10 Yerusalaamen de7iya keethata taybideta; dirsaa zaaridi gimbanaw keethata laallideta.
Isaiah22:11 Kase gal7a zeeruwan de7iya haatha zaaridi

Isaiah22:17 Neno mino addiyaw
Isaiah22:18 Kooseda nena yuushshidi dalga biittan holana. Neno ne godaa keethaas yeella gidida addiyaw neeni yan hayqana; ne boncho para gaareti yan attana.
Isaiah22:19 Taani nena ne oosuwape kessana; ne shuumatethaafe shaarana.
Isaiah22:20 He gallas taani Kalqe na7aa
Isaiah22:21 Taani ne ma7uwa iya mayzana; ne dancuwa iya dancisana; ne shuumatetha iyaw immana. I
Isaiah22:22 Taani Dawita keethaa qulpiya iyaw immana; I dooyin oonika gordenna; I gordin oonika dooyenna.
Isaiah22:23 Taani iya ammanthiya bessan dhisheda tolana; I ba aawa keethas boncho araata gidana.
Isaiah22:24 Qandafe oto gakanaw de7iya soo miisheta
Isaiah22:25 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallas ammanthiya bessan dhishida toley kichana; qanxettananne kundana. Iya bolla kaqetida tooho ubbay duuxidi wodhana” yaagees. Goday haysa odis.
Isaiah23:1 Xiroosa katamaas odetida Godaa qaalay haysa. Xiroosa kataman keethi woyko shempiya soy bayna gisho hinteno Tarsesa markabiya laaggeysato yeekite! Qophiroosa biittafe ha worey hinteko yis.

Isaiah23:3 Hintew yaa kathay

Isaiah23:8 Kallacha wosisiya katamaa

Isaiah29:1 Dawiti de7ida Ar7eela katamaw nena ayye! Laytha bolla laythi guja; ne ba7aaleta zaara zaara boncha.
Isaiah29:2 Taani Ar7eela katamaa buroo un7ethana; I zeleelidi yeekana. He katamay suuthi kammida yarsho bessa mela gidana.
Isaiah29:3 Taani ne yuushuwa teqana; adussa gimbiyan nena dirana; ne bolla ola shako essana.
Isaiah29:4 Neeni gelida ollan gidada odetana; garsa baanape ne girsay yaana. Ne girsay moytille girsada biitta giddofe keyana; baana giddofe ne kalkashana.
Isaiah29:5 Shin ne morketi baana mela daro; wozana mino asata tayboy carkoy efiya puno mela.
Isaiah29:6 Qoponna de7ishin
Isaiah29:7 Ar7eela katamaa oliya daro kawotetha ubbay
Isaiah29:8 Koshatida asi amuhon kathi midi
Isaiah29:9 Malaaletite; dagammite; qilim7ite; qooqite. Mathotite
Isaiah29:10 Goday dhisko ayyaana hinte bolla gussis. Nabeto
Isaiah29:11 Ha ubba qoncethay new attametida maxaafa mela gidis. Issi asi
Isaiah29:12 Maxaafa nabbabi eronna asako

Isaiah29:14 Hessa gisho
Isaiah29:15 Banta halchuwa Godaape qosanaw ciimmoyeyisata
Isaiah29:16 Hinte ubbaba shiri yeggeeta. Oto medheysi urqa mela gidi qopeeta! Medhetidaysi medhidaysa
Isaiah29:17 Libaanose woray aradda gade gidanaw; qassi aradda gadey wora gidanaw guutha wodey attis gidennee?
Isaiah29:18 He gallas tulleti maxaafaa qaala si7ana; dhuman de7iya qooqeta ayfey xeellana.
Isaiah29:19 Ashketi Godan ufaytana; manqoti Isra7eele Geeshshan hashshu gaana.
Isaiah29:20 Ulo iitati wurana; qelqiseysati tim7i gaana; iitabaa oothanaw wochiya ubbay dhayana.
Isaiah29:21 Ase odan bala ootheysati
Isaiah29:22 Hessa gisho
