Isaiah29:24 Ayyaanan baleysati akeeka demmana; zuuzumeysati timirte ekana” yaagees.
Isaiah30:1 Goday
Isaiah30:2 Tana zore oychonna Gibxe wodhoosona. Paarona miixa bantaw teqe
Isaiah30:3 Shin Paarona miixay hintew yeella
Isaiah30:4 Enta halaqati Xaanesan de7ikoka
Isaiah30:5 yeellafe attishin
Isaiah30:6 Negeban de7iya do7ataba Goday odiday haysa: kiitetidaysati metoynne un7i de7iya biittara
Isaiah30:7 Gibxey aykoka maaddenna; hessa gisho
Isaiah30:8 Ha77i bada sinthara yaana wodiyas merinaa malla gidana mela enta sinthan shuchaa woocada xaafa; mazgabenka xaafa.
Isaiah30:9 Enti geellanne wordancho nayta; enti Goday odiyaba si7anaw koyonna nayta.
Isaiah30:10 Enti qoncethi be7eyisata
Isaiah30:11 Ogiyape kichite; horogape haakite; Isra7eele Geeshshara nuna som7on gathofite” yaagosona.
Isaiah30:12 Hessa gisho
Isaiah30:13 ha nagaray hintew za77idi woddiya
Isaiah30:14 Iya meqoy urqafe medhida oto mela dipi gidi meqana. He mequwa giddofe tama kaashiya woyko haathe duuqiya kun7i bentenna” yaagees.
Isaiah30:15 Isra7eele Geeshshay
Isaiah30:16 Hinte
Isaiah30:17 Issi tooranchuwa be7idi hintefe mukulu asay baqatana; ichashu tooranchoti hintena ubbaa yedethana. Zumaa huuphen eqida bandira mithada woyko zuma bolla de7iya mallada hinte hanana gakanaw hintena yedethena.
Isaiah30:18 Shin Goday hintew keehanaw naagees; Goday xillo pirdiya Xoossi gidiya gisho hintew qadhetanaw dendana. Iya ammanetidi naagiya ubbay anjetidaysata.
Isaiah30:19 Hinteno
Isaiah30:20 Goday hintew meto kathinne un7a haathi immikoka
Isaiah30:21 Hinte ushachi woyko haddirsi simmiya wode
Isaiah30:22 Biraninne worqan alleeqetida eeqa misileta hinte tunisana. Tuna curqada hinte enta
Isaiah30:23 He wode I
Isaiah30:24 Goshsha booratinne hareti gillan punetida geeshsha harquwa maana.
Isaiah30:25 Asi wuriya wode miixati laaletiya gallas deretanne zumata bollafe pulto haathi goggana.
Isaiah30:26 He gallas ageena poo7oy awa poo7oda hanana; awa poo7oy kaseysafe laapun kushe darana; laapun gallas poo7uwa mela gidana. He ubbay hananay Goday meqida ba asaa kooliya wodenne I dechin madunxida asaa pathiya wode.
Isaiah30:27 Heko
Isaiah30:28 Iya peenoy
Isaiah30:29 Geeshsha ba7aaley bonchetiya gallas yexeysada
Isaiah30:30 Goday ba yashshiya qaala sissana; ba suulliya hanquwan
Isaiah30:31 Goday ba girsan Asoore daganthana; iya xam7ay enta shocana.
Isaiah30:32 Goday enta ba seeriya xam7an enta shociya wode iya asay karaaboranne diithara yexana. Ba qesiya denthidi enta shocana.
Isaiah30:33 Benipe doomidi Asoore kawoy xuussa Toofeta geetetiya bessi giigis. He bessay ollanne dalga; qassi daro mithi dooretidi de7iya bessi. Godaa peenoy diinne shaafada goggidi
Isaiah31:1 Maado demmanaw Gibxe wodheysatanne paran ammaneteyisata ayye! Para gaareta darotethaaninne para asata minotethan ammaneteyisata ayye! Enti Isra7eele Geeshshaa xeellokona woyko Godaape maado koyokona.
Isaiah31:2 Shin Goday cinca gidiya gisho gado yeddana; I odidaysa aggenna. Iita asaa bollanne iitabaa oothiya asaa maaddeyisata bolla dendana.
Isaiah31:3 Gibxeti asepe attishin
Isaiah31:4 Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Gaammoy woyko wodala gaammoy mehe oykidi daariya wode henthanchoti xeegetidi shiiqikoka
Isaiah31:5 Kafoy aaleysada Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday Yerusalaame gechana
Isaiah31:6 “Hinteno Isra7eele asaw
Isaiah31:7 He gallas nagari kumida hinte kushiyan birapenne worqafe oothida eeqata wora holana.
Isaiah31:8 Asoorey asaba gidonna mashshan kundana; asaba gidonna mashshi enta maana. Enti mashsha sinthafe baqatana; enta na7atethati wolqan asas oothana.
Isaiah31:9 Dagama gaason enta mino miixay laaletana; enta toora moconati dagammidi yeggi dhayana” yaagees
Isaiah32:1 Heko
Isaiah32:2 Issi issi asi ba huuphen carkofe geemmiya bessi
Isaiah32:3 Xeelliya asata ayfey qilim7enna; si7iya asata haythay hayzidi si7ana.
Isaiah32:4 Eesotiya asaa wozanay erananne akeekana. Dedotiya asaa inxarsay biletana; geeshshidi odetana.
Isaiah32:5 Hizape guye eeyi asi erancho geetetenna; iita asi bonchetenna.
Isaiah32:6 Eeyay eeyatethi odetees; iya wozanay nagara qopees. Godaa bolla minoba odetees; iya bolla iitabaa maqetees: koshatidaysas kathi immenna; saamotidaysa haathe diggees.
Isaiah32:7 Gene asa qofay iita; manqoti suureba odetikoka enta dhaysanaw wordon iita qofa qopees.
Isaiah32:8 Lo77o asi lo77oba halchees; he lo77o halchuwan minnidi de7ees.
Isaiah32:9 Hinteno qofi bayna de7iya maccasaw
Isaiah32:10 Laythi kumonna hinte ammanetidi de7eysati kokorana; woyne iya wodiyan maxeketa; tokidabaape ayfe shiisheketa.
Isaiah32:11 Hinteno injetin de7iya maccasaw kokorite. Hinteno ammanetidi de7iya macca nayto yayyite. Hinte ma7uwa qaaridi kayo ma7o hinte xeessan dancite.
Isaiah32:12 Lo77o gaden ayfiya woyney dhayida gisho
Isaiah32:13 Agunthinne kinchotey ta asaa gadiyan dolis. Asay ufaytidi de7ida keethatasinne katamaas yeekite.
Isaiah32:14 Kawo keethaynne daro asay de7iya katamay baysatana; miixatinne gimbe shakoti merinaw laaletana; wora hareti ufaytiya bessinne dorsa wudey heemetiya bessi gidana.
Isaiah32:15 Hessi hananay
Isaiah32:16 Hessafe guye
Isaiah32:17 Xillotethi sarotethi ehana
Isaiah32:18 Ta asay saroy kumida keethan
Isaiah32:19 Shachi bukidi wora dhaysiyakoka
Isaiah32:20 shaafata gaxan hinte kathaa zeridi
Isaiah33:1 Nena dhaysona de7ishin haraa dhayseyso
Isaiah33:2 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah33:3 Ne girsaa deshuwan derey baqatees; neeni nuna maaddanaw dendiya wode kawotethati laaletoosona.
Isaiah33:4 Gondoy shiiqeysada hinte di7oy shiiqana; booley dirgeysada asay iya bolla dirgana.
Isaiah33:5 Goday bolla de7iya gisho
Isaiah33:6 I hinte wodiyas ammanthiya baaso gidana; hintew atotethi
Isaiah33:7 Heko
Isaiah33:8 Wogga ogeti kaysatidosona; ogiyara kanthiya asi baawa. Caaqoy laaletis; katamati kadhetidosona; boncho asati boretidosona.
Isaiah33:9 Biittay azzanis; daaburis; Libaanosey yeellatidi melis; Saarona zangaaray mela biitta gidis. Baasane deriyaninne Qarmeloosa deriyan de7iya mitha haythay qoqofetis.
Isaiah33:10 Goday haysada yaagees: “Ha77i taani dendana; ha77i taani bonchetana; ha77i taani dhoqu dhoqu gaana.
Isaiah33:11 Hinte utulla qanthatidi puno yelideta; hinte shempoy hintena tamada maana.
Isaiah33:12 Asay booqinte shuchada taman xuugetana; qassi agunthada taman eexana.
Isaiah33:13 Hinteno
Isaiah33:14 Xiyoonen de7iya nagaranchoti dagammidosona; Xoossaa eronnaysati kokoridosona. Enti
Isaiah33:15 Xillotethan hemetey
Isaiah33:16 he uray dhoqa bessan daana. I
Isaiah33:17 Hinte ayfey kawa
Isaiah33:18 Hinte
Isaiah33:19 Wozana mino asaa
Isaiah33:20 Nuuni nu ba7aale bonchiya Xiyoone katamaa be7ite! Wopu gidi de7iya
Isaiah33:21 He bessan Goday nuus wolqaa gidana. He bessay dalga safanne goggiya haatha mela gidana. Wogoloy iya bollara baanaw danda7enna; gita markabeti yaara kanthanaw danda7okona.
Isaiah33:22 Goday nuus pirdeysa; Goday nuus higge immeysa; Goday nu kawa; I nuna ashshana.
Isaiah33:23 Ne qasho wodoroy dol7ana; markabiya tuussay shuggana; iya sharayka toletibeenna. He wode daro di7o shaaketana; hari attoshin wobbetika di7o ekana.
Isaiah33:24 Xiyoonen de7iya oonika “Tana sakees” yaagenna; yan de7iya asaa nagaray atto geetetana.
Isaiah34:1 Hinteno
Isaiah34:2 Goday kawotethata ubbaa bolla hanqetis; enta tooranchota ubbaa bolla yilotis. I
Isaiah34:3 Enta ahay holetidi
Isaiah34:4 Salo xoolintoti ubbay seerana; saloti saleenada xaaxetana. Woyne haythinne balase ayfey qoqofeteysada xoolintoti ubbay qoqofetana.
Isaiah34:5 Ta mashshay salotan alana gakanaw uyis; Heko Edoome bolla
Isaiah34:6 Godaa mashshay suuthan muuketis. Yarshos shuketiya dorsatanne deeshata suuthan mashshi muuketeysadanne enta kilaho modhuwan kameteysada Godaa mashshay suuthan muuketis; modhuwan kametis. Goday Baasora kataman yarsho
Isaiah34:7 Menthati
Isaiah34:8 Goday halo keyana gallasinne Xiyoone olida morketa bolla kushe zaariya laythi giigisis.
Isaiah34:9 Edoome shaafati melidi made gidis; iya baanay diinne laametana; iya biittay eexiya made gidana.
Isaiah34:10 Qammanne gallas tamay to77enna; iya cuyay merinaw cuyana. Edoome biittay yeletethaafe yeletethaa gakanaw baysa gidana; oonika merinaw yaara kanthenna.
Isaiah34:11 Shin xiloynne quxarey iya laattana; guttoynne quuroy yan daana. Xoossay Edoome bolla laaletha wadha wodoronne baysatetha tumbe yeddana.
Isaiah34:12 He biitta aysiya kawoy deenna; halaqati yaape kichana.
Isaiah34:13 Kawo keethata agunthi
Isaiah34:14 Bazzo do7ati godaretara gahetana; tuna ayyaanati issoy issuwara xeegetana; qamma qoolleti wodhidi yan daana.
Isaiah34:15 Guttoti yan keethe keexidi
Isaiah34:16 Godaa maxaafan koyidi nabbabite. Godaa doonay odida gishonne iya ayyaanay shiishida gisho
Isaiah34:17 I
Isaiah35:1 Baysa biittaynne mela biittay ufaytana; aykoy bayna mela biittay ufaytananne ciiyana.
Isaiah35:2 Mela biittay ciishshe ma7ana; ufaysa mazmure yexana. Libaanose bonchuwa ma7ana; Qarmeloosanne Saarona gitatethay imetana; enti Godaa bonchuwanne nu Xoossaa gitatetha be7ana.
Isaiah35:3 Daaburida kushetanne argaacida gulbatata minthite.
Isaiah35:4 Yashsha wozani de7eysatako
Isaiah35:5 He wode
Isaiah35:6 Wobbeti gen7eda gupana; dedoti ufaysan yexana; mela biittan haathi goggana; mela bessan pultoy dhuuqana.
Isaiah35:7 Xuuggiya shafey eele haathi gidana; mela biittay haathe pultana; workanati allatiya bessan maatinne mayreynne maqi dolana.
Isaiah35:8 Yaara wogga ogey keyana; ika “Geeshshatetha Oge” geetetana. Tunati he ogiyara bookona; eeyati yan simeretokona; shin geeshshatas gidana.
Isaiah35:9 Gaammoy woyko yashshiya do7ati yaara kanthokona; yan bentokona; shin wozetidaysata xalaali hemetana.
Isaiah35:10 Goday wozidaysati simmana; yexish
Isaiah36:1 Hizqiyaasi kawotida tammanne oyddantho laythan
Isaiah36:2 Hessafe guye
Isaiah36:3 Kawo gadho aysiya Alqa na7ay Eliyaqeemi
Isaiah36:4 Asoore toora moconay entako
Isaiah36:5 Neeni coo qaalan
Isaiah36:6 Neeni ‘Gibxe kawoy tana maaddana’ gada qopidaba gidiko meqida mayre xam7a guufetiya asa mela. Xam7ay meqin pincoy kushiya caddesinne madunxisees. Gibxe kawoy banan ammanetiya asa ubbaas hessa mela.
Isaiah36:7 Shin neeni
Isaiah36:8 “Ane ha77i haaya! Ta godaa Asoore kawuwara geedareta. Togganaw danda7iya asi ne demmiko
Isaiah36:9 Neeni
Isaiah36:10 Hessa bollaka
Isaiah36:11 Hessafe guye Eliyaqeemi
Isaiah36:12 Shin halaqay zaaridi
Isaiah36:13 Asoore halaqay dendi eqidi
Isaiah36:14 Kawoy hinteko haysada yaagees; ‘Hizqiyaasi hintena cimmofo’ I hintena ta kushepe ashshanaw danda7enna.
Isaiah36:15 Hizqiyaasi hintena
Isaiah36:16 “Hinte Hizqiyaasi odiyaba si7opite. Asoore kawoy hintena
Isaiah36:17 Taani yada
Isaiah36:18 “Hizqiyaasi
Isaiah36:19 Hamaata xoossatinne Arfada xoossati awun de7oona? Safarwayma xoossati awu bidonaa? Enti Samaariya ta kushepe wothi ekidona?
Isaiah36:20 Ha biittata xoossatape ba biitta ta kushepe ashshidi ekiday de7ii? Yaatin hinte
Isaiah36:21 Shin kawoy entako
Isaiah36:22 Hessafe guye kawo gadho aysiya Kalqe na7ay Eliyaqeemi
Isaiah37:1 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi hessa si7ida wode ba ma7uwa peedhidi
Isaiah37:2 Kawo gadho aysiya Eliyaqeemi
Isaiah37:3 Enti Isayaasako bidi
Isaiah37:4 De7o Xoossaa cayanaada iya goday
Isaiah37:5 Kawoy Hizqiyaasi kiittidaysa Isayaasi si7ida wode
Isaiah37:6 entako
Isaiah37:7 Heko
Isaiah37:8 Asoore kawoy Laakiso katamaape dendidi bidaysa Asoore halaqay si7idi
Isaiah37:9 Kawoy Sanakreemi
Isaiah37:10 “Yihuda kawa Hizqiyaasa
Isaiah37:11 Asoore kawoti biittata ubbaa waati dhaysidaako neeni si7adasa. Yaatin
Isaiah37:12 Beni ta mayzati dhaysida Gozaana
Isaiah37:13 Hamaata kawoy
Isaiah37:14 Hizqiyaasi dabdaabiya kiitetida asaape ekidi nabbabis. Dabdaabiya Godaa keethi efidi Godaa sinthan miccis.
Isaiah37:15 Godaa haysada yaagidi woossis:
Isaiah37:16 “Abeeti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaw
Isaiah37:17 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah37:18 “Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah37:19 Enta xoossata taman xuuggidi dhaysidosona; Enta xoossati kaseka asa kushey massidi kessida mithinne shuchi gidiya gisho
Isaiah37:20 Hiza abeeti Godaw
Isaiah37:21 Hessafe guye
Isaiah37:22 “Goday Sanakreema haysada yaagis. Xiyoone geela7iya nena kadhasu; leqasu; Yerusalaame na7iya ba huuphiya qaathada nena borasu.
Isaiah37:23 Neeni cayidaynne toochiday oonee? Ne oodde bolla ne qaala dhoqu oothada odetadii? Ne otoron oona dhoqu gada xeelladii? Hessa ne oothiday Isra7eele Geeshshaa bollana gidennee?
Isaiah37:24 Neeni kiitida asaa baggara Godaa cayadasa. Haysada yaagadasa: ‘Ta daro para gaaretara dhoqa zumaa huuphiya
Isaiah37:25 Taani allaga biittatan haatha olla bookada haathe iyape uyas. Gibxe biittan goggiya haatha ubbaa taani ta tohuwan yedhada melisas’ ” yaagadasa.
Isaiah37:26 “Daro wodepe sinthe neeni gimbetida katamata laallada
Isaiah37:27 Hessa gisho
Isaiah37:28 “Shin neeni uttiya
Isaiah37:29 Ne ta bolla hanqetida gishonne
Isaiah37:30 Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako haysada yaagis. “Hessi poletanaysas mallay haysa; ha laythinne wonto laythi hinte aasebo kaxida kathi maana. Shin heedzantho laythan hinte
Isaiah37:31 Yihuda asaape attidaysati xapho yeddana; ayfe ayfana.
Isaiah37:32 Attida guuthati Yerusalaamepenne Xiyoone deriyape yaana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa qanaatey hessa oothana.
Isaiah37:33 “Hessa gisho
Isaiah37:34 Asoore kawoy ba yida ogiyara guye simmana; ha katamaa gelenna.” Taani Goday haysa odayis.
Isaiah37:35 “Taani ta bonchuwa gishonne ta aylliya Dawita gisho
Isaiah37:36 He qamma Godaa kiitanchoy keyidi
Isaiah37:37 Hessa gisho
Isaiah37:38 Issi gallas Sanakreema ba xoossaa Nisirooka keethan goyinnishin
Isaiah38:1 He wode kawoy Hizqiyaasi hargidi
Isaiah38:2 Hizqiyaasi godaako simmi zin7idi
Isaiah38:3 “Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah38:4 Hessafe guye
Isaiah38:5 Bada Hizqiyaasako
Isaiah38:6 Nenanne ha katamaa Asoore kawa kushepe ashshana; taani ha katamaas oletana” yaaga.
Isaiah38:7 “Goday ba gida qaala polanaw immida mallay haysa yaagis:
Isaiah38:8 Akaazi keyanaw giigisida dethan de7iya kuyay tammu tango guye simmidi baana mela taani oothana” yaagis. Kuyay tammu tango guye simmidi bis.
Isaiah38:9 Yihuda kawoy Hizqiyaasi hargiyafe paxidi xaafida mazmurey haysa:
Isaiah38:10 Taani
Isaiah38:11 “Taani de7on de7eyisata biittan Godaa be7ike; ha sa7an ase be7ike; ha alamiyan de7eysatara zaarada de7ike.
Isaiah38:12 Dorse heemmeyisata dunkaaniyada
Isaiah38:13 “Qamma kumetha danda7an naagas; gaammoda ta meqetha ubbaa menthadasa; wontafe omarsi gakanaw tana dhaysadasa.
Isaiah38:14 Taani kaarodanne cilashoda waassas; holleda zuuzumas. Ta ayfey salo xeellishe daaburis; Godaw
Isaiah38:15 Haysa ubbaa oothiday Godaa; taani ay gaanaw danda7iyana? Ta shempoy un7etida gisho
Isaiah38:16 Godaw
Isaiah38:17 Ta un7etethay taw lo77o gidis; neeni ta shempuwa dhayo ollafe ashshadasa; ta nagara ubbaa neeni guye yeggadasa.
Isaiah38:18 Duufoy nena galatenna; hayqoy nena sabbenna. Ollan wodhidaysati
Isaiah38:19 Taani hachi nena galateysada
Isaiah38:20 Goday tana ashshana; hessa gisho
Isaiah38:21 Isayaasi kase
Isaiah38:22 Hizqiyaasi kase
Isaiah39:1 He wode
Isaiah39:2 Hizqiyaasi kiitetidi yida asata mokis. Ba shaluwa minjiya keethan de7iya bira
Isaiah39:3 Nabey Isayaasi kawa Hizqiyaasako bidi
Isaiah39:4 Isayaasi zaaridi
Isaiah39:5 Yaatin
Isaiah39:6 ‘Neeni
Isaiah39:7 Qassi neepe yeletida ne ashonne ne suuthu gidida ne kochati di7etidi baana; Babiloonen kawo gadhon shuufa gididi oothana’ yaagees” yaagis.
Isaiah39:8 Hizqiyaasi zaaridi
Isaiah40:1 Hinte Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Ta deriya minthethite! Minthethite!
Isaiah40:2 I aylletethan de7ida wodey poletis; iya nagaray atto geetetis; ba nagaraa gisho
Isaiah40:3 Haysada giya girsay si7etees; “Mela biittan Godaa ogiya giigisite; nu Xoossaas Araba mela biittan horoga sitti oothite.
Isaiah40:4 Zangaara ubbay dhoqu gaana; dereynne zumay ziqi gaana; iita ogetinne gela kessati dembatana.
Isaiah40:5 He wode Godaa bonchoy qoncana; asho ma7ida ubbay hessa issife be7ana. Godaa doonay haysa odis” yaagees.
Isaiah40:6 Issi girsi
Isaiah40:7 Godaa iya bolla shempiya wode
Isaiah40:8 Maati melees; ciishshi qoqofetees; shin nu Xoossaa qaalay merinaw eqidi de7ees” yaagada waassa.
Isaiah40:9 Neno Xiyoones lo77oba odeyso; zuma bolla keya. Neno Yerusalaames lo77oba odeteyso; ne qaala dhoqu oothada waassa. Yayyofa; dhoqu ootha; Yihuda katamatas
Isaiah40:10 Heko
Isaiah40:11 I ba wudiya henthanchoda heemmana; Ba dorsa marata ba qesiyan shiishana; enta ba ki7on idimmana; dhantheyisata loddara kaalethana.
Isaiah40:12 Haathata ba kushe qaaqan
Isaiah40:13 Godaa Ayyaana eriday
Isaiah40:14 Iyaw qoncisana mela oona zore oychidee? Suure pirdaa iya tamaarsiday oonee? Iya cincatethi tamaarsiday
Isaiah40:15 Heko
Isaiah40:16 Libaanose mithay yarsho bessan eexanaw gidenna; iyan de7iya do7ati xuussa yarshos gidokona.
Isaiah40:17 Kawotethati ubbay iya sinthan baynaba mela; enti iya sinthan ubba aykoka gidokona; baynabapeka laafa.
Isaiah40:18 Yaatin
Isaiah40:19 Kushe hiillanchoy eeqa misile giigisees; worqa sheesheysi worqan lanxees; bira sheesheysi iya bolla bira santhalaata medhees.
Isaiah40:20 Miishey bayna manqoy
Isaiah40:21 Eribeeketii? Woyko si7ibeeketii? Haysi hintew koyrope odetibeennee? Woyko sa7i medhetoosape haysa hinte akeekibeketii?
Isaiah40:22 I biitta gertuwafe bolla baggan ba araatan uttees; biittan de7iya asati xaqo mela. Salota gesheda miccees; dunkaaneda de7iya bessi oothidi tolees.
Isaiah40:23 I
Isaiah40:24 Enti toketidi buroo gam7onnashin
Isaiah40:25 Yaatin
Isaiah40:26 Hinte ayfiya dhoqu oothidi salo xeellite; ha xoolintota medhiday oonee? I enta olanchoda kaalethees; enta taybuwa erees. I enta ubbaa enta sunthan sunthan xeegees; iya wolqa gitatethaafenne minotethafe dendoysan
Isaiah40:27 Neno Yayqoobaa
Isaiah40:28 Erabikii? Si7abikii? Goday merina Xoossa; biitta ubbaa medhiday iya. I daaburenna; woyko argaacena; oonika iya qofaa eranaw danda7ena.
Isaiah40:29 I daaburidaysatas wolqa immees; minotethi baynaysas minotethi gujees.
Isaiah40:30 Hari attoshin yalaga nayti daaburoosona; argaacosona; na7atethati daaburidi kundoosona.
Isaiah40:31 Shin Godaa ammanetidi naageysati
Isaiah41:1 Hinteno
Isaiah41:2 “Doloha baggafe issuwa denthidi biya bessa ubban xoono immey oonee? I kawotethata iya kushen aathidi immees; kawota iyaw haarisis. I enta ba mashshan bido kessees; ba dongiyan enta puno oothees.
Isaiah41:3 I enta yedethishe
Isaiah41:4 Haysa oothidaynne poliday yeletethaaka koyrope xeegiday oonee? Taani Goday
Isaiah41:5 Yuushoy abban teqetida biittati
Isaiah41:6 Issoy issuwa maaddees; ba ishaa
Isaiah41:7 Kushe hiillanchoy worqa sheesheysa minthethees; naariqan qoxidi lee7iseysi baachan birata seeriseysa
Isaiah41:8 “Shin neno Isra7eele
Isaiah41:9 taani nena biitta gaxape ehas; haahosoope xeegada
Isaiah41:10 Yayyofa
Isaiah41:11 Ne bolla hanqetiya ubbay yeellatidi kawuyana; neera eqeteysati baynaba gidana.
Isaiah41:12 Ne morketa neeni koyana; shin enta demmaka; nena oleysati baynaba gidana.
Isaiah41:13 Taani Goday
Isaiah41:14 Neno guxuniyaw
Isaiah41:15 Heko
Isaiah41:16 Neeni enta punnana; carkoy enta efana; shin neeni Godan ufaytana; Isra7eele Geeshshan bonchetana.”
Isaiah41:17 “Manqotinne metootanchoti haathe koyana
Isaiah41:18 Taani mela zumata bolla shaafa
Isaiah41:19 Taani mela biittan
Isaiah41:20 Isra7eele Geeshshay hessa medhidaysanne Godaa kushey hessa oothidaysa asay be7ana
Isaiah41:21 “Ane hinte mootuwa shiishite” yaagees Goday; “Ane hinte marka haa ehite” yaagees Yayqooba kawoy.
Isaiah41:22 Ane enti banta eeqata haa eho
Isaiah41:23 Hinte xoossata gideysa nuuni erana mela sinthafe yaanaw de7iyaba nuus odite. Nuuni dagammana melanne yayyana mela
Isaiah41:24 Shin hinte baynaba mela; hinte oosoyka hada; hintena dooriya asayka ixetidaysata.
Isaiah41:25 Taani pudeha baggafe issuwa denthin
Isaiah41:26 Nuuni erana melanne I like gaana mela kasetidi nuus haysa odiday oonee? Hintefe oonika kasetidi haysa qoncisiday
Isaiah41:27 Taani haysa kasetada Xiyoones odas; taani Yerusalaames mishiraacho odeysa immas.
Isaiah41:28 Shin taani xeelliya wode issoyka baawa; taani zore oychiya wode enta eeqata giddofe zaaro immiya issoyka baawa.
Isaiah41:29 Heko
Isaiah42:1 “Taani katisada oykida ta aylley
Isaiah42:2 I waassenna; ba qaala dhoqu oothenna ba qaala ogen sissenna.
Isaiah42:3 Dincetida mayriya I menthenna; lii7i lii7idi eexiya muqaada I toysenna; ammanetethan I suure pirda ehana.
Isaiah42:4 I biittan suure pirda essenna gakanaw argaacena woyko guye geenna. Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asay iya higgiya si7anaw naagees.
Isaiah42:5 Salota medhidaynne enta micciday
Isaiah42:6 Taani Goday nena xillotethan xeegas; ne kushiya oykada nena naagana. Taani nena asaas caaqo oothana; kawotethatas poo7o oothada immana.
Isaiah42:7 Neeni qooqe ayfeta dooyana; dhuma ollan
Isaiah42:8 Taani Godaa; hessi ta sunthaa; ta bonchuwa taani haras immike; ta galataa eeqatas immike.
Isaiah42:9 Heko taani kase odidaba ubbay poletidosona; ha77i taani oorathaba awaajayis; enti hananaape sinthe taani hintew odayis” yaagees.
Isaiah42:10 Godaas ooratha mazmure yexite; biitta gaxape gaxaa gakanaw iya galata yexite. Abba giddora beysatinne iyan de7eysati
Isaiah42:11 Mela biittan de7iya katamati
Isaiah42:12 Enti boncho Godaas immo; iya galata yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan odo.
Isaiah42:13 Goday mino asada keyana; ba qaala dhoqu oothidi ola awaajana. Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi gereerana; ba morketa xoonana.
Isaiah42:14 Daro wode si77i gada gam7as; si77i gada danda7as. Shin ha77i iqethi oykida maccasada ta waassana; tooka shempananne peenuqana.
Isaiah42:15 Deretanne zumata laallana; enta bolla dolidaba ubbaa melisana. Shaafata yuushoy abban teqetida biitta kessana; eele haathata melisana.
Isaiah42:16 Taani qooqeta enti eronna ogiyara kaalethana; enti eronna horogara efana. Enta sinthan dhumaa poo7o kessana; enta sinthan de7iya ogiya baasana. Ha ubbaa taani entaw oothana; taani enta oothonna aggike.
Isaiah42:17 “Shin eeqa misiletan ammaneteysati
Isaiah42:18 Hinte tulleti
Isaiah42:19 Ta aylliyafe hari qooqey oonee? Ta kiittidaysafe hari tulley oonee? Bana Godaas aathidi immida uraape Godaa aylliyafe hari qooqey oonee?
Isaiah42:20 Darobaa be7adasa
Isaiah42:21 Goday ba xillotetha gisho
Isaiah42:22 Shin ha asay bonqetis; de7iyaba eketis. Olla giddon xihen oyketis
Isaiah42:23 Hinte giddofe haysa si7ey oonee? sinthafe yaana wodiyaba qopey oonee?
Isaiah42:24 Yayqooba di7etethas
Isaiah42:25 Hessa gisho
Isaiah43:1 Shin neno Yayqoobaa nena medhiday
Isaiah43:2 Neeni haatha giddora pinniya wode taani neera gidana. Neeni shaafata giddora pinniya wode enti nena mittokona. Neeni tama giddora aadhiya wode xuugetaka; lacoyka nena meenna.
Isaiah43:3 Taani nena Ashshiysa
Isaiah43:4 Neeni ta sinthan al7onne boncho gidiya gisho
Isaiah43:5 Taani neera de7iya gisho yayyofa; taani ne nayta dolohape nena wulohape shiishana.
Isaiah43:6 Taani pudeha baggaa
Isaiah43:7 Enti ta sunthan xeegetidaysata
Isaiah43:8 Ayfey de7ishin qooqida asata
Isaiah43:9 Kawotethati ubbay issife shiiqo; asay duulata utto. Enta eeqata giddofe haysa odanaw
Isaiah43:10 Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinte ta markata; hinte tana erana melanne ammanana mela taani Xoosse gideysa akeekana mela taani doorida ta aylleti hintena. Taape kase hara xoossi medhetibeenna; taape guye hara xoossi deenna.
Isaiah43:11 Taani Godaa; taape attishin
Isaiah43:12 Ta kasetada odas
Isaiah43:13 Merinaape merinaw taani Xoosse; ta kushepe oonika ashshena; ta oothidaba laammanaw danda7ey baawa” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah43:14 Goday
Isaiah43:15 Taani Godaa
Isaiah43:16 Abba giddon oge
Isaiah43:17 Para gaaretanne parata
Isaiah43:18 Goday haysada yaagees: “Kasebata haasayopite; benibata qopofite.
Isaiah43:19 Heko
Isaiah43:20 Taani doorida
Isaiah43:21 Taani taw medhida dere gidiya gisho
Isaiah43:22 Shin neno Yayqoobaa
Isaiah43:23 Neeni taw xuussa yarshos dorse ehabaaka; hara yarshonka tana bonchabaaka. Taani nena katha yarsho eha gada waaysabike; ixaane taw cuyiso gada daabursabike.
Isaiah43:24 Neeni taw sawiya ixaane shammabaaka; ne modho yarshon tana ufaysabaka. Shin neeni ne nagaran tana waaysadasa; ne naaquwan tana daabursadasa.
Isaiah43:25 “Ta gisho gada ne nagaraa quchey tana; ne nagaraa zaarada qopike.
Isaiah43:26 Ane tana hassayisa; neeni xillo gideysa erisanaw issife shiiqidi mootetoos.
Isaiah43:27 Ne koyro aaway nagara oothis; ne astamaareti tana qohidosona.
Isaiah43:28 Hessa gisho
Isaiah44:1 Shin ta aylliya Yayqooba
Isaiah44:2 Nena medhida
Isaiah44:3 Taani saamotida biittan haatha gussana; mela biitta bolla shaafa gogisana. Ta Ayyaana ne nayta bolla
Isaiah44:4 Enti haatha doonan dolida maatada
Isaiah44:5 Issoy bana
Isaiah44:6 Goday
Isaiah44:7 Ta meli oonee? De7iko ane awaajo; ane ta sinthan eqidi odo. Benipe doomidi
Isaiah44:8 Yayyofite; dagammopite; taani haysa benipe doomada odabikina? Kasetada erisabikina? Hessas hinte taw marka. Taape attishin
Isaiah44:9 Eeqa misileta medhiya ubbay hada; iyan ufaytiyabati enta go7okona. Enta markati qooqeta entaw eri baawa; enti yeellatana.
Isaiah44:10 Bana go77onna eeqa Xoossa oothidi giigisiday oonee?
Isaiah44:11 Eeqa medhey asepe attishin
Isaiah44:12 Birata qoxeysi eeqa oothanaw ba birata taman seerisidi mala immanaw ba mino kushiyan naariqan qoxees. Hessa giigisishe koshatees; iya wolqay wurees; saamotesinne labbanees.
Isaiah44:13 Anaaxey wodoron likidi irsaasen iya bolla malla wothees; liiqisiya miishen liiqisees. Lo77o asa malan medhidi ba eeqa keethan wothees.
Isaiah44:14 I hessa oothanaw ziga qanxees; wola woyko xiidda wora giddofe dooridi diccana mela oothees. Woyko ziga tokidi iran diccana mela naagees.
Isaiah44:15 Iyape baggaa eethanaw go7etees; iyape baggaa ekidi
Isaiah44:16 Iyape baggaa eethidi kathi kathees; baggan asho caacidi kallidi mees. Qassi tama kayishe
Isaiah44:17 Qassi attida mithaa massidi
Isaiah44:18 Enti aykoka erokona; aykoka akeekokona; enti be7onna mela enta ayfey goozetis; akeekona mela enta wozanay gordetis.
Isaiah44:19 Eeqa oothiya asaa giddofe ba wozanan
Isaiah44:20 I bido mees; iya cimetida wozanay iya hara soo kaalethis. I ba shempuwa ashshanaw danda7enna; “Haysi ta ushacha kushen de7ey wordo gidenna” gaanaw danda7enna.
Isaiah44:21 Goday haysada yaagees: “Yayqoobaa
Isaiah44:22 Taani ne nagaraa pittada diggas
Isaiah44:23 “Hinteno saloto
Isaiah44:24 Ne aaye ulon nena medhidaysi
Isaiah44:25 Taani wordo nabeta tinbitiya hada oothas; marota kaayowa eeyatethi kessas. Taani cincata cincatethaa shira yeggas; enta eraa eeya oothas.
Isaiah44:26 Taani ta aylleta qaala minthana; ta nabeta tinbitiya polana. Taani Yerusalaame katamaa
Isaiah44:27 Taani goggiya haathata melisana gisho ciimmo haatha
Isaiah44:28 Qiroosako
Isaiah45:1 Goday tiyidaysas
Isaiah45:2 Taani ne sinthara baana; dereta dembayana; naase birata sanqata menthana; birata kobeta qanxana.
Isaiah45:3 Nena ne sunthan xeegey tana Godaa
Isaiah45:4 Ta aylliya Yayqooba gisho
Isaiah45:5 Taani Godaa; taape hara xoosse baawa; neeni tana eronna ixikoka taani new wolqa immana.
Isaiah45:6 Hessika awi doliyasope wulliyaso gakanaw taape hari baynaysa asay erana melasa; taani Godaa; taape hara xoossi baawa.
Isaiah45:7 Taani poo7onne dhuma medhas; Sarotethinne dhayo ehayis; ha ubba taani Goday oothayis.
Isaiah45:8 Hinteno saloto
Isaiah45:9 Bana Medhidaysara palamiya uraa ayye! I sa7an meqidi wodhida otope issuwa mela. Otoy bana medheysako
Isaiah45:10 Ba aawa
Isaiah45:11 Goday
Isaiah45:12 Taani sa7aa oothas; aseka iya bolla medhas. Salota taani ta kushen miccas; enta bolla xoolintota ubbaa wothas.
Isaiah45:13 Taani Qiroosa xillotethan denthas; iya ogiya ubbaa suure oothana. Miishe qanxonna woyko woyto immonna I ta katamaa keexana; ta asaa di7ope zaarana” yaagees ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Isaiah45:14 “Goday haysada yaagees: Gibxe duretethaynne Tophe zal7ey
Isaiah45:15 “Isra7eele Ashshiya Godaa Xoossaw
Isaiah45:16 Eeqa medheysati ubbay yeellatananne kawuyana; enti issife yeella ma7ana.
Isaiah45:17 Shin Goday Isra7eele merinaa atotethan ashshana; hinte merinaw yeellateketa kawuyeketa.
Isaiah45:18 Salota medhida Goday
Isaiah45:19 Taani geeman
Isaiah45:20 Hinteno kawotethata giddofe attidaysato
Isaiah45:21 Ane palamit; hinte mootuwas gaaso shiishite; issife zoretite. Daro wodepe kase haysa odiday oonee? Benipe haysa awaajiday oonee? Tana Godaa gidikinaayee? Taape attishin
Isaiah45:22 Hinteno biitta gaxape gaxa gakanaw de7eysato
Isaiah45:23 Taani tanan caaqas; guye simmonna qaali ta doonape xillotethan keyis. Gulbati ubbay taw gulbatana; inxarsi ubbay tanan caaqana.
Isaiah45:24 Enti tabaa haasayishe
Isaiah45:25 Shin Isra7eele zeretha ubbay
Isaiah46:1 Beella geetetiya Babiloone eeqay hokis; Nebo geetetiya eeqay gufannis. Enta misileti caana mehe bolla caanetidosona; daaburida mehetas deexo tooho gididosona.
Isaiah46:2 Deexuwape dendidaysan caana meheti
Isaiah46:3 Hinteno
Isaiah46:4 Hinte cimana gakanaw
Isaiah46:5 Tana oodera gaaddeyeetii? woyko oodera likiseetii? Enti woli daanees gaanaw tana oodera ginayetii?
Isaiah46:6 Asay worqanne bira banta qarxiitape qolidi
Isaiah46:7 Enti iya denthidi
Isaiah46:8 Hinteno nagaranchoto
Isaiah46:9 Beni wode hanidabata hassayite; taape attishin
Isaiah46:10 Ta qofay minnana; taani ta halchuwa ubbaa polana. Wursethan hananaba doomethan
Isaiah46:11 Doloha baggafe bonqiya kafo
Isaiah46:12 Hinteno wozani muumidaysato
Isaiah46:13 Taani ta xillotethaa matayana; ika haahona gidenna. Ta atotethay gam7enna; ta atotetha Xiyoones
Isaiah47:1 “Babiloone geela7ee
Isaiah47:2 Woxa teqada kathi gaacca; ne guulunthaa qaara; ne adussa ma7uwa kessa; ne wodiriya qaarada shaafa pinna.
Isaiah47:3 Ne kalloy qaaretana; ne pokoy bentana. Taani halo keyana; oodeska qadhetike” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah47:4 Nuna Woziya Isra7eele Geeshshaa sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa.
Isaiah47:5 “Babiloone naatte
Isaiah47:6 Taani ta asaa hanqetas; ta laata tunisas; taani enta ne kushen aathada immas. Neeni entaw qadhetabaaka; cimidaysata bolla ne deexo qambara wothadasa.
Isaiah47:7 Neeni
Isaiah47:8 “Neno wopu gada uttidaarenne naagetada de7idaare si7a. Ne wozanan
Isaiah47:9 Ha nam7ubati qoponna issi gallas ne bolla yaana. Ne bitay ay darikoka
Isaiah47:10 “Neeni ne iitatethan ammanetada
Isaiah47:11 Shin neeni waatada ne bitan haassaneeko eronna iitay ne bolla yaana. Neeni gate qanxanaw danda7onna dhayoy ne bolla wodhana; qassi neeni aykoka qoponna gadoy ne bolla yaana.
Isaiah47:12 “Ane neeni ne na7atethafe doomada oothashe de7ida ne bitaanne ne murunnuwa ha77ika ootha. Ooni eri ne qopidaysa mela hananeeko woyko neeni iyara daganthaneeko.
Isaiah47:13 Neeni ekida zorey ubbay daabursafe attishin
Isaiah47:14 Enti buure mela; tami enta maana. Enti tama lacuwape bantana ashshanaw danda7okona. Asi kayaa bonqoy woyko asi iya sinthan uttidi ho77iya tama gidenna.
Isaiah47:15 Neeni entara daaburidaysati
Isaiah48:1 “Hinteno
Isaiah48:2 Hinte
Isaiah48:3 Taani sinthafe hananabata daro wodepe kase odas. ta doonape enti keyin
Isaiah48:4 Neeni odin si7onnaysa
Isaiah48:5 Hessa gisho
Isaiah48:6 “Ta kase odidaysa ne si7adasa; I poletidaysa be7adasa
Isaiah48:7 Enti beni medhetidaba gidonashin ha77i medhetidosona. Neeni
Isaiah48:8 Neeni si7abaka; erabaaka; ne haythay benipeka dooyetibeenna. Neeni ay cimmiya aseeko taani erayis; neeni yeletoosape geella geetetada xeegeteysa erayis.
Isaiah48:9 Ta sunthaa gisho
Isaiah48:10 Taani nena paacas; birada gidonashin taani nena meto taman paacas.
Isaiah48:11 Taani ta gisho
Isaiah48:12 “Neno Yayqooba
Isaiah48:13 Ta kushey biitta baasuwa medhis; ta ushacha kushey salota miccis. Taani enta xeegiya wode enti issife eqoosona.
Isaiah48:14 “Hinte ubbay issife shiiqidi si7ite; eeqatape haysi hananaysa sinthatidi odiday oonee? Goday dooridaysi iya qofaa Babiloone bolla polana; iya qeseyka Babiloone biitta bolla gidana.
Isaiah48:15 Taani
Isaiah48:16 “Taako haa shiiqidi haysa si7ite; “Taani koyrope doomada geeman odabike; hessi hanida wodepe doomada taani yan de7ayis” yaagees. Ha77ika Ubbaa Haariya Godaynne iya Ayyaanay tana kiittidosona.
Isaiah48:17 Nena woziya Goday
Isaiah48:18 Neeni ta kiitaa si7idaba gidiyako
Isaiah48:19 Ne kochay abba shafeda
Isaiah48:20 Babiloone biittafe keyite; Babiloonepe baqatite! Qaala dhoqu oothidi
Isaiah48:21 I enta mela biittara kaalethida wode saamotibookona. Zaallafe haathi entaw pultis; I zaalla phalqin haathi dhuuqis.
Isaiah48:22 “Iitatas saroy baawa” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah49:1 Hinteno
Isaiah49:2 Ta inxarsaa qara mashshi oothis; ba kushiya kuyan tana genthis. I tana poshetida donge yiishshi oothidi ba shoohuwan tana qottis.
Isaiah49:3 I taako
Isaiah49:4 Shin taani
Isaiah49:5 Taani Godaa ayfe sinthan bonchetida gisho
Isaiah49:6 Goday taako haysada yaagees; Neeni Yayqooba kochaa denthanaw Isra7eelepe attida guuthata zaarada ehanaw neeni taw aylle gideysi daro guuthaba. Hessafe aathada
Isaiah49:7 Kadhetidaysasinne ixetidaysas qassi kawotethata haariya aylliyas
Isaiah49:8 Goday yaagees; “Taani doorida woden ne oysha zaarana; atotetha gallas taani nena maadana. Taani nena naagana; neeni biitta zaarada essana mela; asi doonna biitta neeni laatisana mela taani nena asaas caaqo oothada immas.
Isaiah49:9 Di7etidaysata
Isaiah49:10 Enti koshatokona woyko saamotokona; enta mela biitta mishay xuuggenna; away enta meenna. Entaw qadheteysi enta kaalethana; pulto haathaako enta laaggana.
Isaiah49:11 Taani ta dereta ubbaa oge kessana; ta wogga ogeta dhoqu oothana.
Isaiah49:12 Heko
Isaiah49:13 Hinteno saloto
Isaiah49:14 Shin Xiyooney
Isaiah49:15 Aayiya ba dhanthiya na7aa doganaw danda7ay? Ba ulope keyida na7as qadhetekee? Iya dogikoka
Isaiah49:16 Heko
Isaiah49:17 Nena zaaridi keexeysati ellesidi yaana; nena laallidaysati neepe haakana.
Isaiah49:18 Ane dhoqu gada ne yuushuwa xeella; ne nayti ubbay issife shiiqidi neeko yaana. Taani Goday
Isaiah49:19 Neeni laaletada baysa gidikoka
Isaiah49:20 Neeni kayotiya laythan new yeletida nayti ne haythan
Isaiah49:21 Neeni ne wozanan
Isaiah49:22 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Heko
Isaiah49:23 Kawoti nena dichiya aawata gidana; enta macca kawoti nena dhanthiya aayo gidana. Enti gufannidi new goyinnana; ne toho baana laaccana. Taani Godaa gideysa neeni hessan erana; tanan ammanetidi naageysati yeellatokona” yaagees.
Isaiah49:24 Olanchuwafe di7o yegisanaw
Isaiah49:25 Shin Goday yaagees: Olancho kushepe di7etida asi kessi ekanaw
Isaiah49:26 Nena un7etheysati banta ashuwa maana mela oothana; woyne uyidi mathoteysada enti banta suuthaa uyidi mathotana. He wode asa ubbay taani Godaa
Isaiah50:1 Goday yaagees; “Taani hinte aayiw yeddida pirima worqatey awun de7ii? taani ooddes hintena taani bayzadina? Heko
Isaiah50:2 Taani yida wode
Isaiah50:3 Taani salota dhuma mayzayis; enta kamay kayo ma7o daanees” yaagis.
Isaiah50:4 Daaburidaysa taani qaalan minthetho erana mela
Isaiah50:5 Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta haythaa dooyis; taani geella gidabike; guye simmabike.
Isaiah50:6 Taani ta zokuwa shoceysatas
Isaiah50:7 Ubbaa Haariya Goday tana maaddiya gisho
Isaiah50:8 Taw pirdeysi matan de7ees; yaatin
Isaiah50:9 Ubbaa Haariya Goday tana maaddees; yaatin
Isaiah50:10 Hinte giddofe Godaa yayyey
Isaiah50:11 Hinteno tama eethiya ubbato
Isaiah51:1 Hinteno xillotethi kaalleysato
Isaiah51:2 Hinte aawa Abrahaamenne hintena yelida Saaro xeellite. I barka de7ishin
Isaiah51:3 “Goday Xiyoonenne laaletida bessan de7iya asa ubbaa minthethana. I mela biitta Edene
Isaiah51:4 “Ta asaw; ta odiyaba si7ite; ta deriyaw
Isaiah51:5 Ta xillotethay ellesidi shiiqana; ta atotethay matis; ta qesey kawotethatas suure pirdaa ehana. Yuushoy abban teqetida biittati ubbay tanan ammanetidi naagana; taani enta ta wolqan ashshanaysa ufaysan naagana.
Isaiah51:6 Pude dhoqu gidi salota xeellite; duge sa7aaka xeellite. Saloti cuyada laaletidi dhayana; sa7i afilada wurana; iyan de7iya asa ubbay udunxeda hayqana. Shin ta atotethay merinaw daana; ta xillotethay wurenna.
Isaiah51:7 “Hinteno xillotethaa ereysato
Isaiah51:8 Bili ma7o
Isaiah51:9 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah51:10 Abbaanne gita ciimmo haatha melisiday nena gidikiyee? Ne wozidaysati pinnana mela ciimmo abba oge oothiday nena gidikiyee?
Isaiah51:11 Goday wozidaysati yexishe simmidi Xiyoone yaana; merinaa ufaysay kallacha mela enta bolla uttana. Enti ufaysinne hashshu giyaba demmana; azzanoynne yeehoy entafe haakana.
Isaiah51:12 Goday
Isaiah51:13 Salota miccidanne sa7a baasuwa essida Godaa
Isaiah51:14 Di7etidaysati eeson birshetana; qashetida ollan hayqokona; koshatokona.”
Isaiah51:15 “Taani Godaa
Isaiah51:16 Ta qaala ne doonan wothiday
Isaiah51:17 Neno
Isaiah51:18 Iya yelida naytape iyo kaalethiya issoyka baawa; iya dichida naytape I kushiya oykidi efida issoyka baawa.
Isaiah51:19 Ha nam7ubati ne qaada gididosona; hessati laaletethinne dhayo; koshinne mashshi ne bolla yaana; yaatin
Isaiah51:20 Ne nayti giten gelida gen7eda oge gaxan kundidi labbanidosona. Enti Godaa hanquwaninne ne Xoossaa seeran kumidosona.
Isaiah51:21 Hessa gisho
Isaiah51:22 “Ba asaas mootetiya ne Goday
Isaiah51:23 Taani hessa nena un7ethiya asaa kushen wothana; Enti neeko
Isaiah52:1 Neno Xiyoone
Isaiah52:2 Neno
Isaiah52:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinte kase gatey bayna bayzetideta; ha77i qassi miishe immonna coo wozetana.
Isaiah52:4 Goday haysada yaagees: Ta asay koyro bete asi gididi Gibxe bis; guyepe Asooreti ta asaa coo un7ethidosona.
Isaiah52:5 Xoossay haysada yaagidi odees: Ta asay gatey bayna coo di7etidi bin
Isaiah52:6 Hessa gisho
Isaiah52:7 Lo77o mishiraacho ehiya
Isaiah52:8 Ne katamaa naageysati banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Isaiah52:9 Hinteno Yerusalaamen laaletida bessato
Isaiah52:10 Goday ba geeshsha qesiya kawotethata ubbaa sinthan qoncisis. Biitta gaxaa gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay nu Xoossaa atotetha be7ana.
Isaiah52:11 Hinteno Godaa miishiya tookeysato
Isaiah52:12 Shin hinte keyishe eeson keyeketa; woyko goodetidi beeketa. Goday hintefe sinthe aadhidi kaalethana; Isra7eele Xoossay guyera gididi hintena naagana.
Isaiah52:13 “Heko
Isaiah52:14 Iya som7oy asa ubbaafe
Isaiah52:15 Shin ha77i daro kawotethati ubbay iyaban malaaletana; iya gaason
Isaiah53:1 Nuuni odidaba ooni ammanidee? Godaa qesey ooddes qoncidee?
Isaiah53:2 I iya sinthan mela biittan aacida duruma mela; xapho yeddida dola mela diccis. Nuuni iya loythi xeellonna mela mali woyko teemi baawa. Nuuni iyako shiiqonna mela cuchu mal7o gidenna.
Isaiah53:3 I asan kadhetis
Isaiah53:4 I tuma nu waayiya baw ekis; qassi nu daabura tookis. Shin nuuni
Isaiah53:5 Shin I nu nagaraa gisho
Isaiah53:6 Nuuni ubbay oge balida dorsada wora bida; nu ubbay nu ogiya ogiya bida. Shin Goday nu ubbaa naaquwa iya bolla wothis.
Isaiah53:7 I un7etis; qohetis; shin ba doona dooybeenna. Shukanaw efiya urge dorsada laagetis; ba ikisiya meediya uraa sinthan si77i giya dorsa mela aykoka pogibeenna.
Isaiah53:8 Enti iya un7ethoninne geella pirdan efidosona; I ta asaa nagaraa gisho shocetidi
Isaiah53:9 Iya doonan bali bayna
Isaiah53:10 Shin iya qohetethaynne iya un7etethay Godaa shene gidis. I bana nagara yarsho oothiya wode ba kochaa be7ana. Iya laythay aduqana; Godaa sheney iya kushen poletana.
Isaiah53:11 Ba shempuwa waayiyape guye
Isaiah53:12 Hessa gisho
Isaiah54:1 Naate
Isaiah54:2 Ne dunkaaniya bessaa dalgisa; dunkaaniya gesheta piddi oothada micca; xuumisopa; wodoruwa adussa; dhishiya mintha.
Isaiah54:3 Neeni ushachinne haddirsi dalgana; ne kochati kawotethata laattana; baysatida enta katamatan keexidi daana.
Isaiah54:4 “Yayyofa; neeni yeellataka; dagammofa; neeni kawuyaka. Ne yalagatetha yeella neeni dogana; ne am7etetha boriya hizape guye hassayaka.
Isaiah54:5 Ne azinay nena Medhidaysa; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. Isra7eele Geeshshay nena Wozidaysa; I biitta ubbaa Xoossaa geetetana.
Isaiah54:6 Azini aggin
Isaiah54:7 “Guutha wode taani nena aggas
Isaiah54:8 Suulliya hanqon taani ta som7uwa neepe guutha wodes genthas. Shin merinaa maarotethan taani new qadhetana” yaagees nena woziya Goday.
Isaiah54:9 “Haysi taw Nohe wodiya mela; he wode taani dhayo haathan zaarada sa7aa dhaysike gada caaqidaysada
Isaiah54:10 Dereti qaxanaw
Isaiah54:11 “Neno
Isaiah54:12 Ne shucha gimbiya qustiya zo7o inqo shuchan
Isaiah54:13 Ne nayti ubbay Godaape tamaarana; ne nayta sarotethay darana.
Isaiah54:14 Neeni xillotethan minnada eqana; geneynne un7ethoy neepe haakana. Nena yashisiyaba deenna; dagami neeko shiiqenna.
Isaiah54:15 Nena olanaw dendey de7iko
Isaiah54:16 “Heko
Isaiah54:17 Nena qohanaw oosetida ay miisheyka ne bolla oothenna; nena mootiya inxarsa ubbaas ne zaaro immana. Godaa aylleta laatay haysa; taape enti ekiya xillo haysa” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah55:1 Hinteno
Isaiah55:2 Kathi gidonnabaas hinte miishiya ayis kesseetii? Kalsonnaban hinte wolqaa ayis wurseetii? Ane tana si7ite
Isaiah55:3 “Hinte haytha taako zaaridi tana si7ite; de7on daanaw ta odeysa si7ite; taani Dawitas gelida ufaysa qaalan hintena anjana.
Isaiah55:4 Heko
Isaiah55:5 Goday
Isaiah55:6 “Goday bentiya wode iya koyite; matan de7iya wode iya xeegite.
Isaiah55:7 Iita asi ba ogiyape simmo; nagaranchoy ba qofaa aggo. Godaako simmo
Isaiah55:8 Ta qofay hinte qofaa mela
Isaiah55:9 Saloti sa7aape dhoqeysada
Isaiah55:10 Irinne shachi salope wodhidi
Isaiah55:11 Ta doonape keyiya qaalay hessa mala; I taani halchidaysa polonnanne ta kiittidaysa oothonna taako coo simmenna.
Isaiah55:12 “Hinte ufaysan keyana; saron moyzetana; deretinne zumati hinte sinthan ufaytidi yexana; bazzo mithati ubbay banta kushiya baqana.
Isaiah55:13 Aguntha gisho xiidda
Isaiah56:1 “Suure pirdaa naagite; xillo oothite; ta atotethay ellesidi yaana; ta xillotethay matan qoncana.
Isaiah56:2 Haysa oothiya uray
Isaiah56:3 Godaako shiiqida bete asi
Isaiah56:4 “Ta Sambaata bonchiya
Isaiah56:5 entaw taani ta keethaninne ta dirsa gimbiya giddon enti hassayetiyaba immana. Enti macca na7anne adde na7a yelidi
Isaiah56:6 Godaa haggaazanaw
Isaiah56:7 taani ta geeshsha zumaa bolla ehada ta woosa keethan enta ufaysana. Enti ta yarsho bessan shiishiya xuussa yarshoynne hara yarshoy eketana; ta keethay asa ubbay Xoossaa woossiya keethi geetetana” yaagees.
Isaiah56:8 “Shiqidaysata bolla gujada harataka taani shiishana” yaagees Isra7eelepe laaletidaysata shiishiya
Isaiah56:9 Hinteno bazzo do7ato
Isaiah56:10 Isra7eele asaa naageysati qooqe; entaw eri baawa; enti ubbay boccanaw danda7onna butale kanata; enti zin7idi elmotoosona; dhisko dosoosona.
Isaiah56:11 Enti midi kallonna yaramba kana mela; enti akeeki pacida henthancho. Enti ubbay banta oge bidosona; ubbay banta go77a xalaala koyoosona.
Isaiah56:12 Enti
Isaiah57:1 Xillo asi hayqees; shin hessa qopey baawa. Bantana Xoossas immida asay biittafe eketoosona
Isaiah57:2 I
Isaiah57:3 “Hinteno
Isaiah57:4 Hinte oona qelqiseetii? Hinte oona boreetiii? Hinte inxarsaa oodde bolla kesseetii? Hinte geellatanne wordancho nayta gideketii?
Isaiah57:5 Hinte wolaa garsaninne daashsha mitha garsan amon xuugeteeta. Hinte nayta zangaaraninne zaalla qophon shukidi yarsheeta.
Isaiah57:6 Zangaaran de7iya liiqo shuchati hinte xoossata; Hinte entaw ushsha yarsho tigideta. Kathaa yarshoka immideta yaatin
Isaiah57:7 Zumaa huuphen hiixa yeggideta; yan yarshanaw keydeta.
Isaiah57:8 Hinte pengiyafenne gobanetape soo baggara eeqa misileta essideta. Tana aggidi hinte arsa dalgisidi
Isaiah57:9 Zaytenne shitto ekidi Moloka geetetiya eeqako bideta; hinte kiitanchota haaho soo kiittideta; hari attoshin si7oole gakanaw wodhideta.
Isaiah57:10 Hinte hara xoossata koyishe daaburideta; shin
Isaiah57:11 “Hinte oona yayyidi
Isaiah57:12 Taani hinte xillotethaanne hinte oosota awaajana; shin hintena aykoka go77okona.
Isaiah57:13 Hinte maado demmanaw waassiya wode hinte shiishida eeqati hintena ashshena! Enta ubbaa carkoy efana; issi toho carkiya carkoy enta punnidi dhaysana. Shin tana baw baqatidi attiya besse oothiya uray biitta laattana; ta geeshsha zumaa ekana” yaagees.
Isaiah57:14 “Baasite
Isaiah57:15 Merinaw de7eysi
Isaiah57:16 Ta medhida asa ayyaanaynne shempoy
Isaiah57:17 Enta nagaraa gaason taani enta hanqetada seeras; ta som7uwa entafe genthas; shin enti ha77ika banta wozanaa qofan bidosona.
Isaiah57:18 Taani enta ogiya be7as; shin taani enta pathana
Isaiah57:19 Isra7eele biittan yeekeyisata
Isaiah57:20 Shin iitati urqanne silimo kessiya
Isaiah57:21 “Iitatas saroy baawa” yaagees ta Xoossay.
Isaiah58:1 Goday haysada yaagees: “Ne qaala dhoqu oothada waassa; guye goopa; ne qaala moyzeda dhoqu ootha. Ta asaas enta geellatetha
Isaiah58:2 Shin enti tana gallas gallas koyoosona; ta ogiya kaallanaw dosiya daanosona. Xillo oothidanne Xoossaa kiitaa aggiboonna asada enti tana suure pirda oychoosona; taako Xoossaako shiiqanaw dosiya daanosona.
Isaiah58:3 Enti Godaako
Isaiah58:4 Hinte ooshshaninne palaman xoomeeta; qadhey bayna iita deshethi dechanaw xoomeeta. Hessa mela xoomiya hinte woosay bolla saluwan si7etonna mela oothees.
Isaiah58:5 Taani doorida xoomay haysa mela xoomee? Issi asi banatetha kawushey haysa mela gallasa xalaalanee? Taani koyiya xoomay asi ba huuphiya kaxida gasheda hoksana melanne bido tiyetidi kayo ma7o ma7idi utetheyee? Hinte hessa xooma gidi xeegetiyee? He xooma gallasay Godaa sinthan eketiyee?
Isaiah58:6 “Taani dooriya xoomay haysa; suure pirda dhayo santhalaata billana melanne qambara menthidi un7etidaysata la77a kessana mela gidenneyee?
Isaiah58:7 Taani dooriya xoomay koshatidaysa muzana mela
Isaiah58:8 Yaatiko
Isaiah58:9 He wode hinte xeegana; Goday hintew koyana. Hinte maado koyidi waassana; I
Isaiah58:10 Koshatidaysa muziko
Isaiah58:11 Goday hintena ubba wode kaalethana; hintena mela biittan koshshiyaban kalsana; hinte xaphuwa xaalisana. Hinte haathe uyaa gannate melanne meli eronna haatha pulto mela gidana.
Isaiah58:12 Ne asay beni laaletida bessata zaaridi keexana; daro wodepe kase baasetida baasota keexidi dhoqu oothana. Hinte ‘Laaletida gimbeta gimbeysatanne asay de7iya bessaanne wogga ogey de7iya katamata esseyisata geetetana.’
Isaiah58:13 “Sambaata gallasaa boncho aggonna ixiko
Isaiah58:14 he wode hinte Godan ufaytana; taani hintena daro bonchetidaysata oothana; hinte aawa Yayqooba laata hinte maana mela oothana. Taani Goday haysa odas” yaagees.
Isaiah59:1 Heko
Isaiah59:2 Shin hinte nagaray hintefenne hinte Xoossaafe giddon shaahetethi medhis. I si7onna mela hinte nagaray iya som7uwa hintefe genthis.
Isaiah59:3 Hinte kushey suuthan
Isaiah59:4 Xillotethan mootey baawa; suuretethan pirdeyka baawa. Enti coo palaman ceeqetoosona; wordo odetoosona; cimo qanthatidi iitatethi yeloosona.
Isaiah59:5 Enti shoosha phuuphulle haphoosona; shango haada daddoosona. He phuuphulleta miya asi hayqees; phuuphulliyafe issoy meqiko
Isaiah59:6 Enti daddida shango haaday ma7os hanenna; iyara banta asatethaa kammanaw danda7okona. Enta oosoy iita; geella oosoy enta kushen kumis.
Isaiah59:7 Enta tohoti iitabaa oothanaw woxoosona; xillo suuthi gussanaw eesotoosona. Enta qofay iita; enti bida bessa ubban qohoynne boshi de7ees.
Isaiah59:8 Enti sarotetha oge erokona; enta ogiyan suure pirdi baawa. Enti banta ogiya geellayidosona; he ogiyara hemetiya oonika saro demmenna.
Isaiah59:9 Hessa gisho
Isaiah59:10 Nuuni qooqeda dirsaa gimbiya bolla tattafoos; seeta gallas
Isaiah59:11 Nuuni ubbay babanthada waassos; holleda kayotidi oolos. Nuuni suure pirda koyida
Isaiah59:12 Nu balay ne sinthan daris; nu nagaray nu bolla markatees. Nu naaqoy nuura de7ees; nu qohuwa nu eroos.
Isaiah59:13 Nuuni makallidi
Isaiah59:14 Suure pirdi guye sugetis; xillotethi nuupe haakis. Tumatethi dabaaban dhubetees; ammanetethi gelanaw besse dhayis.
Isaiah59:15 Tumatethi awunka bentenna; iitatethafe haakiya asi qohos aadhidi imetees; Goday suure pirdi baynaysa be7idi azzanis.
Isaiah59:16 Un7eteyisata maaddiya asinne entaw gaannatiya asi baynaysa Goday be7idi malaaletis. Hessa gisho
Isaiah59:17 I
Isaiah59:18 I entaw enta oosuwada oosuwada zaarana; hanquwa ba morketas
Isaiah59:19 Godaa peenoy wolqaama goteda di77ishe yaana gisho
Isaiah59:20 “Xiyoonesinne Yayqooba zeretha giddon banta nagarape simmeyisata Wozeysi yaana.
Isaiah59:21 Taw entara de7iya caaqoy haysa: hinte bolla de7iya ta Ayyaanaynne taani hinte doonan wothida ta qaalay
Isaiah60:1 Ne poo7oy yida gisho
Isaiah60:2 Heko
Isaiah60:3 Kawotethati ne poo7uwako
Isaiah60:4 Dhoqu gada ne yuushuwa xeella; ubbay issife neeko yaana. Ne adde nayti haahope yaana; ne macca nayti ba7etidi neeko yaana.
Isaiah60:5 He wode neeni be7ada ufaytana; ne wozanay ufaysan noocu gaana. Abbaa bolla de7iya shaloy neeko yaana; kawotethata duretethay nebaa gidana.
Isaiah60:6 Midiyaamepenne Efa biittafe yida
Isaiah60:7 Qedaarenne Nebayoota dorsa wude ubbay
Isaiah60:8 “Haysati shaarada woyko holleda banta keethako paalleysati oonee?
Isaiah60:9 Tuma yuushoy abban teqetida biittati
Isaiah60:10 “Allaga biittati ne dirsaa gimbana; enta kawoti new oothana. Nena taani ta hanquwan kase shocas
Isaiah60:11 Ne pengeti ubba wode dooya daana; kawotethata duretethaynne enta kawoti di7etidi neeko yaana mela gallasinne qamma gordetokona.
Isaiah60:12 New oothonna asi woyko kawotethi ubbay dhayana.
Isaiah60:13 Ta keethaa bessaa loythana mela Libaanose boncho gidida zigay
Isaiah60:14 Nena un7ethida asaa nayti yidi new hokana; nena kadhida ubbay ne sinthan goyinnana. Enti nena
Isaiah60:15 “Haysafe kase oonika ne giddora kanthonna mela yegetadasanne ixetadasa. Shin ha77i taani nena merinaw gita oothana; yeletethaa ubbay nenan ufaytana.
Isaiah60:16 Neeni kawotethata maatha uyana; kawota dhantha dhammana. Goday
Isaiah60:17 Naase birata gisho worqa
Isaiah60:18 Geellatethi ne biittan
Isaiah60:19 Gallas awa poo7o
Isaiah60:20 Awi nam7antho wullenna; ne ageenay poo7o aggenna. Goday new merinaa poo7o gidana; neeni yeekida gallasati new gidana.
Isaiah60:21 Ne asa ubbay xillo gidana; enti biitta merinaw laattana. Enti taani ta bonchuwa qoncisanaw tokida puutota; ta kushe oosota.
Isaiah60:22 Hinte giddon issi keethan de7iya guutha asata darsana; ubbaafe guuthaa gita kawotethi oothana. Taani Godaa; wodey gakiya wode
Isaiah61:1 Ubbaa Haariya Godaa Ayyaanay ta bolla de7ees; manqotas lo77oba odana mela Goday tana tiyis. Wozani meqidaysata koolana mela
Isaiah61:2 Dosetida Godaa laytha odana mela
Isaiah61:3 Xiyoonen kayoteysatas
Isaiah61:4 Enti beni laaletida bessata zaaridi keexana; beni kundida bessata zaaridi essana. Enti daro yeletethaafe kase laaletidi onida katamata zaaridi keexana.
Isaiah61:5 Allaga asati hinte dorsa wudiya heemmana; imathati hinte gadiya goyana enti hinte woyne gadiya naagana.
Isaiah61:6 Asay hintena
Isaiah61:7 Ta asay banta yeella gisho nam7u kushe ekana; banta kawusha gisho laatan ufaytana. Hessa gisho
Isaiah61:8 “Taani
Isaiah61:9 Enta kochati kawotethata giddon
Isaiah61:10 Taani Godan daro ufaytayis; ta shempiya ta Xoossan hashshu gawusu. Ekeysi ba huuphen kallacha wotheysada
Isaiah61:11 Biittafe mithi maati doleysada
Isaiah62:1 Xiyoone gisho

Isaiah62:3 Neeni Godaa kushen lo77ida kawotetha kallacha gidana.
Isaiah62:4 Neeni
Isaiah62:5 Panthi geela7o ekeysada
Isaiah62:6 Neno Yerusalaame
Isaiah62:7 Hinteno

Isaiah62:9 Shin banta kathaa cakidaysati midi Godaa galatana; woyne maxeysati ta keethaa dabaaban uyana.
Isaiah62:10 Aadhite! Pengera keyidi biite! Asaas oge giigisite! Wogga oge kessite. Shuchaa diggite; kawotethati ogiya demmana mela malla essite.

Isaiah62:12 Hinte
Isaiah63:1 Edoome biittan
Isaiah63:2 Woyne gum7iyason woyne yedhiya asa ma7oda ne ma7oy ayis zo77idee?
Isaiah63:3 “Taani woyne gum7iyason woyniya tarka yedhas; kawotethatape issi asika taara baawa. Taani enta ta hanquwan yedhas; ta yiluwan enta dirxerethas. Enta suuthay ta ma7uwa bolla dharcetin
Isaiah63:4 Taani ta asaa woziya gallasaynne enta morketa halo keyiya laythay gakis.
Isaiah63:5 Taani be7as
Isaiah63:6 Taani ta hanquwan kawotethata yedhas; ta yiluwan enta dirxerethas; enta suuthaa biittan gussas” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah63:7 Goday nuus oothida ooso ubbaa
Isaiah63:8 I
Isaiah63:9 Enta waaye ubbaa I waayetis; iya Sinthaa Kiitanchoy enta ashshis. I enta ba siiquwaninne ba maarotan wozis; kase aadhida wodeta ubban I enta tookis.
Isaiah63:10 Shin enti makallidosona; iya Geeshsha Ayyaana azzanthidosona. Hessa gisho
Isaiah63:11 Hessafe guye asay benibaanne ba aylliya Muse wode oothidaba qopidi
Isaiah63:12 Baw merinaa sunthu gidana mela enta sinthan haatha shaakidi
Isaiah63:13 Biitta bollara pari biyada enti dhubetonna ciimmo haatha giddora pinthidaysi awun de7ii?” yaagidosona.
Isaiah63:14 Zangaara wodhiya meheda
Isaiah63:15 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah63:16 Abrahaamey nuna eronna ixikoka
Isaiah63:17 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah63:18 Ne geeshsha asay ne keetha guutha wodes laattidosona; shin ha77i nu morketi iya yedhidosona.
Isaiah63:19 Nuuni benipe nebaa; shin enta neeni haarabaaka; ne sunthanka enti xeegetibookona.
Isaiah64:1 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah64:2 Tami eexidi haathe pentiseysada duge wodhada
Isaiah64:3 Kase nuuni naagiboonna malaatata neeni oothida wode wodhadasa; dereti ne sinthan kokoridosona.
Isaiah64:4 Benipe doomidi
Isaiah64:5 Ufaytidi xillotethi ootheysatanne ne ogiya qopeyisata neeni maaddadasa. Shin nuuni nagara ooso aggonna ixida wode neeni hanqetadasa; nuuni waanidi attanee?
Isaiah64:6 Nuuni ubbay tuna asi gidida; nu xillotetha ooso ubbay tuna curqa mela. Nu ubbay boncoda qoletida; nu nagaray nuna carkoda pitidi efis.
Isaiah64:7 Neeni ne sinthaa nuupe genthadasa; nu nagaray nuna dhaysana mela aggadasa. Ne sunthaa xeegey deenna; nena minthidi oykanaw koyey baawa.
Isaiah64:8 Gidoshin
Isaiah64:9 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah64:10 Ne geeshsha katamati mela biitta gididosona; Xiyoone katamay mela biitta
Isaiah64:11 Nu aawati iyan nena galatida geeshshinne lo77o gidida nu xoossa keethay taman xuugetis; nu lo77o bessa ubbay laaletis.
Isaiah64:12 Abeeti Godaw
Isaiah65:1 “Tana oychiboonaysatas qoncas; tana koyboonaysatas bentas. Ta sunthaa xeegiboonna kawotethas
Isaiah65:2 Banta qofaa kaallidi
Isaiah65:3 Ha asay
Isaiah65:4 Enti duufon utteyisata
Isaiah65:5 “Enti
Isaiah65:6 “Heko
Isaiah65:7 Taani enta nagaraanne enta aawata nagaraa acuwa issife entaw qanxana. Enti deriya bolla ixaane cuyisidosona; zumata bolla tana cayidosona. Enti kase oothida oosuwa acuwa taani entaw qanxana” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah65:8 Goday yaagees: “Iita woyne susa giddon lo77o woyne ayfey de7eysada
Isaiah65:9 Taani Yayqoobape koche
Isaiah65:10 Tana minthidi koyiya ta asaas
Isaiah65:11 “Shin hinteno
Isaiah65:12 Taani hinte wursethaa mashshas aathada immana; hinte ubbay goyretanaw hokana. Taani hintena xeegin koybeketa; odisin si7ibeeketa. Hinte ta sinthan iitabaa oothideta; taani dosonnaba doorideta.”
Isaiah65:13 Ubbaa Haariya Goday yaagees: “Ta aylleti maana
Isaiah65:14 Ta aylleti wozanape ufaytidi yexana
Isaiah65:15 Hinte
Isaiah65:16 Kase metoti dogetida gishonne ta ayfiya sinthafe geemmida gisho he biittan anjo koyiya ubbay tuma Xoossaa sunthan woossana. He biittan caaqo caaqiya ubbay tuma Xoossaa sunthan caaqana.
Isaiah65:17 “Heko
Isaiah65:18 Shin taani medhiyaban merinaw ufaytitenne hashshu giite. Taani Yerusalaame ufaysasinne I asaaka galatan kumidaysata oothada medhana.
Isaiah65:19 Taani Yerusalaamen ufaytana; ta asan hashshu gaana. Hizape guye yeehoynne un7a waasoy yan si7etenna.
Isaiah65:20 “Yerusalaamen hizape guye
Isaiah65:21 He wode asay keethe keexidi daana; woyne tokidi iya ayfiya maana.
Isaiah65:22 Enti keexin hari deenna; enti tokin hari meenna. Ta asaa laythay mitha laythada aduqana; taani dooridaysati adussa wode banta kushe oosuwan ufaytana.
Isaiah65:23 Enti coo daaburokona qaadi bayna na7a yelokona. Enti banta naytara Godan anjetida kochata gidana.
Isaiah65:24 Enti tana xeeganaape sinthe
Isaiah65:25 Suudhumeynne dorsa urgey issife heemetana; gaammoy boorada kale maana; baani shooshas kathi gidana. He wode ta geeshsha zumaa bolla enti qohetokonanne dhayokona” yaagees Godaa Xoossay.
Isaiah66:1 Goday yaagees; Saloy ta araata
Isaiah66:2 Haysa ubbaa ta kushey oothis; entika hanidosona. Shin taani bana ziqi oothiya uraa
Isaiah66:3 Korma yarshey ase wodhiya asa mela; urge dorsi yarshey kana yarshiya asa mela; katha yarsho yarshey
Isaiah66:4 Hessa gisho
Isaiah66:5 Hinteno
Isaiah66:6 Katamaape yaa waasuwa si7ite; xoossa keethafe keyiya girsaa si7ite. He girsay ba morketas enta oosuwada kushe zaariya Godaa girsaa.
Isaiah66:7 “Iqetonna na7a yeliya maccas de7ii? Bannakonna adde na7a yeliya maccas de7ii?
Isaiah66:8 Haysa melaba oone si7iday? Hessa melaba oone be7iday? Issi derey issi gallas yeletanaw danda7iyee? issi kawotethi qiphi zaaron medhetiyee? Xiyooney buroo iqethi oykonna
Isaiah66:9 Yelana wode gathiya taani enti yelanaada oothikinaayee? Yelanaada oothiya taani yeliya ulo gordaynaayee? Haysa giday tana
Isaiah66:10 Hinteno Yerusalaamo dosiya ubbaw
Isaiah66:11 Hinte
Isaiah66:12 Goday yaagees; “Taani iw sarotethaa shaafada darsana; iw kawotethata duretetha kixa shaafada ehana. Hinte hessa dhammana; I hashiyan tooketana; I ki7on uttidi baalotana.
Isaiah66:13 Aayiya ba na7a minthetheysada taani hintena minthethenna; hinte Yerusalaamen minettana.
Isaiah66:14 Hessa hinte be7iya wode hinte wozanay ufaytana; hinte meqethay maata mela aacana. Godaa kushey iya aylleta bolla de7eysin iya hanqoy iya morketa bolla de7eysi eretana.
Isaiah66:15 Heko
Isaiah66:16 Goday asho ma7ida ubbaa tamaninne mashshan pirdana; daroti Godaa mashshan hayqana.
Isaiah66:17 “Banta eeqa goyinnanaw atakilte gade baanaw
Isaiah66:18 “Taani enta oosuwanne enta qofaa eriya gisho
Isaiah66:19 Taani enta giddon malaata oothana; entafe attidaysata giddofe ta gitatetha si7iboonanne ta bonchuwa be7iboona kawotethatako
Isaiah66:20 Isra7eele asay katha yarshuwa geeshsha miishen wothidi xoossa keethi eheysada
Isaiah66:21 Entafe issota issota kahinenne Leewe oothana” yaagees Goday.
Isaiah66:22 “Taani medhida ooratha salotinne ooratha sa7i ta sinthan minnidi de7eysada
Isaiah66:23 Ageena xeerope bidi ageena xeero gakanaw
Isaiah66:24 Enti keyidi bishe
Jeremiah1:1 Biniyaame biittan
Jeremiah1:2 Amoone na7ay
Jeremiah1:3 Iyosyaasa na7ay
Jeremiah1:4 Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
Jeremiah1:5 “Neeni ne aaye ulon medhetanaape sinthe ta nena erayis. Ne yeletanaape sinthe ta nena dummayada wothas; kawotethatas nena nabe oothada shuumas” yaagis.
Jeremiah1:6 Taani
Jeremiah1:7 Shin Goday
Jeremiah1:8 Taani nena ashshanaw neera de7iya gisho entaw yayyofa. Haysa odey Godaa” yaagis.
Jeremiah1:9 Goday ba kushiya yeddidi
Jeremiah1:10 Shoddanawunne laallanaw
Jeremiah1:11 Godaa qaalay taako
Jeremiah1:12 Goday
Jeremiah1:13 Zaaridi Goday
Jeremiah1:14 Goday
Jeremiah1:15 Taani pudeha bagga kawotethatan de7iya asa ubbaa xeegana hanayis. Enta kawoti yidi
Jeremiah1:16 Yihuda asay tana aggidi
Jeremiah1:17 “Shin neeni giigeta! Dendada taani nena kiittiyaba ubbaa entaw oda. Entaw yayyofa; ne entaw yayyiko
Jeremiah1:18 Hachi ta nena ha biitta bolla
Jeremiah1:19 Enti neera oletana; shin ta ashshanaw neera de7iya gisho nena xoonokona. Haysa odey Godaa” yaagis.
Jeremiah2:1 Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
Jeremiah2:2 “Bada Yerusalaame asa haythan haysada yaagada awaaja. Ne na7atethan taw ay mela ammanetidako
Jeremiah2:3 He wode Isra7eeley Godaas geeshshi; iyaw bayra katha mela. Iyape mida ubbay bala gidoosona; enta bolla dhayoy yis. Hessa odey Godaa” yaagees.
Jeremiah2:4 Hinteno
Jeremiah2:5 Goday yaagees; kase hinte aawati taape ay bala demmidi taape haakidi bidonaa? Enti pathonna eeqata goyinnidi pathonnaba gididosona.
Jeremiah2:6 Enti
Jeremiah2:7 Hinte he biitta ayfiyape lo77uwa maana mela ta hintena aradda biitta ehas. Shin hinte yidi
Jeremiah2:8 Kahineti
Jeremiah2:9 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah2:10 Ane wuloha bagga bidi
Jeremiah2:11 Enti tuma xoossata gidonna ixikoka ba xoossata laammida derey oonee? Shin ta asay entaw boncho gidida tana pathonna eeqatara laammis.”
Jeremiah2:12 “Saloto
Jeremiah2:13 Ta asay nam7u nagara oothidosona; hessika
Jeremiah2:14 “Isra7eeley shametida aylleyee? woyko son yeletida aylleyee? Yaatin
Jeremiah2:15 Iya morketi gaammoda iya bolla gudoosona. Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi daarosona. Enti iya biitta kaysi kessidosona; iya katamati laaletidi asi bayna soo gididosona.
Jeremiah2:16 Hesaa bollaka Mempisanne Xafinaasa asati iya huuphiya meedidosona.
Jeremiah2:17 Neno Isra7eele
Jeremiah2:18 Nayle shaafape haathe uyanaw Gibxe buussi nena ay maaddanee? Efraxiisa shaafape haathe uyanaw Asoore buussi nena ay maaddanee?
Jeremiah2:19 Hiza ne iitatethay nena seerana; ne tana kaddidaysi ne bolla pirdana. Ne tana Godaa ne Xoossaa aggidaysi ay mela iitanne camo gidiyako akeeka be7a. Ne taw yayiya yashshay baawa” yaagees Goday
Jeremiah2:20 “Ta ne qambara daro wodepe kase menthas; ne qashuwa duuthas. Neeni
Jeremiah2:21 Ta nena dooretida zerethafe ekada
Jeremiah2:22 “Ne sangeenora meecetiyakoka
Jeremiah2:23 Neeni waanada
Jeremiah2:24 Neeni bazzo meezetida
Jeremiah2:25 Neno
Jeremiah2:26 “Kaysoy oyketida wode yeellateysada Isra7eele asay yeellatidosona; enti
Jeremiah2:27 Enti mithaako
Jeremiah2:28 Shin hinte
Jeremiah2:29 “Hinte taara ayis mootetetii? Hinte ubbay taw makallideta.
Jeremiah2:30 Ta hintena coo seeras; hinte hinte oosuwape simmiyaba gideketa. Koshatida gaammoda hinte mashshay hinte nabeta mis” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah2:31 Hinteno
Jeremiah2:32 Geela7iya ba alleequwa
Jeremiah2:33 Neeni ne laggethota geedo wothaa waanada meezetadii? Daro iita maccasati ne ogiya tamaarosona.
Jeremiah2:34 Menthidi gelishin oykida asaa suuthan gidonashin xillo manqota suuthan ne ma7oy iitis. Neeni hessa ubbaa oothadaka
Jeremiah2:35 Neeni
Jeremiah2:36 Neeni ne ogiya laammashe ayis woxay? Nena Asoorey yeellaydaysada Gibxey yeellayana.
Jeremiah2:37 Goday ne ammaneteyisata kawushida gishonne ne entafe maade demmonna gisho ne huuphiya oykada yaape keyana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah3:1 “Issi asi ba machiw yeddin
Jeremiah3:2 Dhoqu gada aykoy bayna dereta xeella. Laymatanaw ne zin7aboona bessi de7ii? Arabe asi mela biittan utteysada
Jeremiah3:3 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah3:4 Ha77i neeni
Jeremiah3:5 Ne ubba wode yilotay? Ne hanqoy merinaw aggennee?’ yaagasa. Shin ne oothanaw danda7iya iita ubbaa oothaasa” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah3:6 Kawa Iyosyaasa wode Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Ammanoy bayna Isra7eeley oothidaba ne be7adii? Iya dere bollanne daashsha mitha ubbaa garsi bada yan laymatasu.
Jeremiah3:7 Iya haysa ubbaa oothinka taako simmande gada qopas
Jeremiah3:8 Ammanoy bayna Isra7eele daro wode laymatida gisho pirima immada iyo yeddas. Hessi haninka Isra7eele michiya
Jeremiah3:9 Laymatethay iw laafaba gidiya gisho
Jeremiah3:10 He ubban I michiya
Jeremiah3:11 “Ammanetona Yihudape ammanoy bayna Isra7eeley xillo.
Jeremiah3:12 Bada pudeha baggan de7iya asaas haysada yaagada awaaja: ‘Ammanoy bayna Isra7eele
Jeremiah3:13 Gidoshin
Jeremiah3:14 “Hinteno
Jeremiah3:15 Ta wozanaada hintena heemmiya henthanchota hintew immana. Enti hintena eratethaninne akeekan heemmana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah3:16 “He gallasatan hinte he biittan dariya wode asay
Jeremiah3:17 He wode enti Yerusalaame
Jeremiah3:18 He wode Yihuda asaynne Isra7eele asay gahetidi pudeha bagga biittafe ta hinte aawata laatisida biitta issife yaana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah3:19 “Ta hintena na7atho ekada
Jeremiah3:20 Shin Isra7eele asaw
Jeremiah3:21 Enti banta ogiya geellayida gishonne banta Xoossaa aggida gisho manqo zumatape Isra7eele asaa waasoynne yeehoy si7etees.
Jeremiah3:22 “Hinteno
Jeremiah3:23 Dereta bollanne zumata bolla eeqa goyinnoy tuma cimo. Tuma Isra7eele atotethay Godaa
Jeremiah3:24 Nu na7atethafe doomin
Jeremiah3:25 Na7atethafe hachi gakanaw
Jeremiah4:1 Goday yaagees
Jeremiah4:2 tuman
Jeremiah4:3 Goday Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaako haysada yaagees: “Hinte othe biitta goyite; aguntha bolla zeropite.
Jeremiah4:4 Hinteno
Jeremiah4:5 Yihudan awaajite; Yerusalaamen moyze punnite! Hinte qaala dhoqu oothidi haysada gidi waassite! Issife shiiqidi gimbetida katamatako yedhite.
Jeremiah4:6 Asay Xiyoone baana mela mallite! Hinte shempuwa ashshanaw gam7onna baqatite! Gam7ofite! Ta pudeha baggafe gadonne dhayo biitta bolla ehana hanayis.
Jeremiah4:7 Gaammoy worape keyeysada kawotethata dhayseysi ba bessaafe dendidi hinte biitta dhaysanaw yis. Hinte katamati laaletidi baysa gidana.
Jeremiah4:8 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah4:9 “He wode kawanne halaqata wozanay til7ana; kahineti dagammana; nabeti hirgana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah4:10 Taani
Jeremiah4:11 He wode ha asaasinne Yerusalaames haysada yaagidi odetana: “Mela biittan de7iya aykoy bayna dhoqa deretape michiya carkoy ta asaa bolla carkana; hessi kathi geeshshanaasa gidenna.
Jeremiah4:12 Ta kiitan wolqaama carkoy carkana; ta enta pirdana” gees.
Jeremiah4:13 Heko
Jeremiah4:14 “Neno Yerusalaame
Jeremiah4:15 Daane katamaapenne Efreema zumaape yidaysati iitabaa awaajosona.
Jeremiah4:16 Yihuda katamata bolla ola awaajiya olanchoti haaho biittafe yuussaa bolla de7oosona gidi kawotethatas odite; Yerusalaameska awaajite.
Jeremiah4:17 I ta bolla makallida gisho
Jeremiah4:18 Yihuda asaw
Jeremiah4:19 Tana ayye! Ta haysa waata danda7ane! Ayye ta wozanaa! Ta wozanay kokorees; ta si77i gaanaw danda7ike. Taani moyze punonne ola girsi si7ida gisho si77i gaanaw danda7ike.
Jeremiah4:20 Dhayoy dhayo bolla yees; biittay kumethi dhayis. Ta dunkaaney kundis; ta shaqarayka laaletis.
Jeremiah4:21 Taani awude gakanaw ola malla be7anee? Awude gakanaw moyze puno si7anee?
Jeremiah4:22 “Ta asay eeya; enti tana erokona. Enti qofi bayna nayta mela; entaw akeeki baawa. Enti iitabaa oothanaw cinca; shin lo77oba oothidi erokona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah4:23 “Taani sa7aa be7iya wode
Jeremiah4:24 Ta dereta xeelliya wode enti qaaxoosona; taani zumata be7iya wode yaa haa woxoosona.
Jeremiah4:25 Ta xeelliya wode asi baawa; salo kafoti ubbay paallidi baqatidosona.
Jeremiah4:26 Ta xeelliya wode aradda biittay qaa7e gididaysa be7as. Godaa sinthaninne iya suulliya hanquwa sinthan he biitta katamati laaletidosona.
Jeremiah4:27 “Biittay dhayana; shin ta iya kumethi dhaysike.
Jeremiah4:28 Sa7ay yeekana; saloy dhumana. Taani odas; marsike. Taani qofa qachas; aggike” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah4:29 Para asatanne donge asata waasuwan
Jeremiah4:30 Neno
Jeremiah4:31 Taani iqethi oykida maccasi waassiya waasuwa mela si7as. I waasoy koyro na7a yeliya maccasa waaso mela. He waasoy
Jeremiah5:1 “Ane Yerusalaame ogiya bolla keyite; pudenne duge hemetite; iya yuushuwa xeellitenne akeekite; iya gutaranka koyite. Xillo pirdiyanne tuma koya issi asi hinte demmiko
Jeremiah5:2 Enti
Jeremiah5:3 Abeeti Godaw
Jeremiah5:4 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah5:5 Hiza
Jeremiah5:6 Enta makallaynne enta kundethay daro gidiya gisho
Jeremiah5:7 “Taani hinte nagaraa ayis atto go? Hinte nayti tana aggidi
Jeremiah5:8 Enti dhiiketida korma parada
Jeremiah5:9 Tuma ta ha oosota gisho
Jeremiah5:10 “I woyne gadiya giddo gelidi iissite
Jeremiah5:11 Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay kumethi kaddidosona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah5:12 Enti haysada gidi Godaa bolla wordo odetidosona: “I aykoka oothenna; qohiyabay aybika nu bolla yeenna. Morke mashshay woyko koshi nuna polo demmenna.
Jeremiah5:13 Nabeti carko mela; entan Xoossaa qaalay baawa. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah5:14 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah5:15 Goday Isra7eele asaako
Jeremiah5:16 Enta donge pal7e shoohoy dooya duufo mela; enta olanchoti wolqaama.
Jeremiah5:17 Enti hinte kathaanne hinte goshsha ayfiya maana; hinte adde naytanne macca nayta wodhana; hinte dorsaanne mehiya bonqana; hinte woyniyanne balase mithaa dhaysana. Hinte ammanetiya
Jeremiah5:18 “Gidoshin
Jeremiah5:19 Asay nena
Jeremiah5:20 “Haysa Yayqooba asaas oda; Yihuda biittan awaaja.
Jeremiah5:21 Hinteno
Jeremiah5:22 Hinte taw yayyanaw bessennee? Hinte ta sinthan kokoranaw koshshennee? yaagees Goday. Abbay aadhidi boonna mela shafe iyaw zawa oothiday tana? Zuley sugikoka iyape aadhanaw danda7enna; hobbey dendikoka kanthidi aadhenna.
Jeremiah5:23 Shin ha asaas muumenne makalla wozani de7ees. Enti hara soo simmidi wora bidosona.
Jeremiah5:24 Enti banta wozanan
Jeremiah5:25 Hinte balay hessa teqis; hinte nagaray hintena lo77obaape ashshis” yaagees.
Jeremiah5:26 “Ta asaa giddon iita asati de7oosona. Kafo oykanaw naagiya asada hokidi naagoosona. Enti gite yeggidi asaa oykoosona.
Jeremiah5:27 Kafo keethan kafoy kumidaada
Jeremiah5:28 Enti ordenne modho gididosona; enta iita oosuwas zawi baawa. Enti yi7o nayta gisho mootetokona; manqotas suure pirdibookona.
Jeremiah5:29 Yaatin
Jeremiah5:30 “Daro iitabaynne daganthiyabay biitta bolla hanis.
Jeremiah5:31 Nabeti wordo odoosona; kahineti enta zoriyan aysoosona. Ta asayka hessa melaba dosees. Shin wursethan hinte waananee?” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah6:1 Hinteno
Jeremiah6:2 Taani lo77iyanne ufaysiya Xiyoone katamata dhaysana.
Jeremiah6:3 Henthanchoti banta wudiya ekidi yaa yaana. Iya yuushuwan banta dunkaaniya tokana; issoy issoy ba wudiya heemmana.
Jeremiah6:4 “Yerusalaame olanaw giigetite! Dendite! Iya seeta gallas oloos. Shin ayye! Sa7i qammees; omarsa kuyay aduqi aduqi bees.
Jeremiah6:5 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah6:6 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Mithata qanxite. Yerusalaame gimbiya miyen biitta doorite. He kataman naaqoy kumida gisho I seeretanaw bessees.
Jeremiah6:7 Haatha olli haathe pulteysada ika ba iitatetha pultees. Makallinne dhayoy iya giddon si7etees; iya hargeynne madunthay ta sinthana.
Jeremiah6:8 Neno Yerusalaame
Jeremiah6:9 “Woyne poshiliyada
Jeremiah6:10 “Ta ooddes odo? Oona seero? Ooni si7anee? Enti si7onna mela enta haythay tullis. Godaa qaalay entaw miichas attis; enti iyan ufaytokona.
Jeremiah6:11 Godaa hanqoy tanan kumis. Ta ha sheniya teqanaw danda7ike. Oge bolla de7iya yooga nayta bollanne shiiqida na7atethata bolla ta hanquwa tiga. Machiya
Jeremiah6:12 Taani he biittan de7eyisata bolla ta kushiya yeddiya wode enta keethay
Jeremiah6:13 “Guuthafe gita gakanaw ubbay bana go77iyabaa koyees. Nabetinne kahineti ubbay cimmoosona.
Jeremiah6:14 Ta asaa maduntha pathonnaba oothidi guutha dhale wothoosona. Saroy baynashin
Jeremiah6:15 Enti ha shaatiya oosuwa oothidi yeellatidona? Akay
Jeremiah6:16 Goday haysada yaagees: “Ogiyan eqidi xeellite; beni ogey de7iya bessaa oychite. Lo77o ogey awun de7iyako oychidi iyan hemetite; hinte shempo demmana. Shin hinte
Jeremiah6:17 Taani naageysata hinte bolla shuumada
Jeremiah6:18 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah6:19 Sa7an de7iya asaw
Jeremiah6:20 Saaba biittafe ixaani woyko haaho biittafe yida sawoynne qimamey taw aysee? Hinte xuussa yarshoyka eketenna. Hinte yarshoy tana ufaysenna” yaagees.
Jeremiah6:21 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah6:22 Goday
Jeremiah6:23 Enti dongenne toora dancidosona; enti qadhey bayna wozana minotanne maarotethi eronnayisata. Enti paran gaallabiya wode abbada guummoosona. Hinteno
Jeremiah6:24 Nuuni he odaa si7in
Jeremiah6:25 Morkey mashsha oykida gishonne yan han dagami de7iya gisho soope keyopite; oge bollaka bentofite.
Jeremiah6:26 Dhayseysi qoponna nu bolla yaana gisho
Jeremiah6:27 Goday Ermiyaasako
Jeremiah6:28 Enti ubbay zigiranaw yuuyosona; odin si7onna makallanchota. Enti naase biratadanne biratada mino; enti ubbay nagara oothosona.
Jeremiah6:29 Birata bolla de7iya shi7a xuuggidi geeshshanaw gilpey punnees. Shin geeshshanaw waayida waayey coo gidis; ta asaa giddon de7iya iitati kichibookona.
Jeremiah6:30 Goday enta yeggidi aggida gisho
Jeremiah7:1 Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa:
Jeremiah7:2 “Xoossa keetha pengiyan eqada
Jeremiah7:3 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah7:4 ‘Haysi Xoossa keethi! Haysi Xoossa keethi! Haysi Xoossa keethi’ yaagidi cimo qaalan ammanetofite.
Jeremiah7:5 Hinte
Jeremiah7:6 bete asaa
Jeremiah7:7 ta hinte mayzatas merinaw immida biittan hintena wothana.
Jeremiah7:8 Shin hinte maaddonna cimo qaalan ammaneteta” yaagees.
Jeremiah7:9 “Hinte kaysoteeta
Jeremiah7:10 Yaatidi
Jeremiah7:11 Ta sunthan xeegetida ha Xoossa keethay hintew pangati qosetiya gongolo gidetiyee? Hinte oothiyaba ubbaa taani ta ayfen be7as” yaagees.
Jeremiah7:12 “Taani ta sunthay de7iya bessi oothada koyro doorida
Jeremiah7:13 Hinte ha ubbaa oothiya wode ta hintew zaara zaara odas; shin si7onna ixideta. Ta hintena xeegas; shin taw koybeketa.
Jeremiah7:14 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah7:15 Hinte dabbota
Jeremiah7:16 “Ermiyaasa
Jeremiah7:17 Enti Yihuda katamataninne Yerusalaame ogetan oothiyabay aybeko be7ikiyee?
Jeremiah7:18 Nayti mithi mixoosona; aawati tama eethoosona; maccasati
Jeremiah7:19 Enti haysa oothey tuma tana qohanaaseyee? Haysan qohetidi yeellatanay enta gidokonaayee?” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah7:20 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah7:21 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah7:22 Ta hinte mayzata Gibxe biittafe kessiya wode
Jeremiah7:23 Shin ta entako
Jeremiah7:24 Shin enti tana si7onna woyko taw besse immonna ixidosona. Enti banta iita wozanaa qofaa kaallidi bidosona; sinthe baanaysa aggidi guye bidosona.
Jeremiah7:25 Hinte mayzati Gibxefe keyida wodepe doomidi hachi gakanaw ta aylleta
Jeremiah7:26 Shin hinte tana si7onna woyko taw besse immonna ixideta. Hinte morgiya minthideta; hinte aawatape aadhidi iitabaa oothideta.
Jeremiah7:27 “Ha ubbaa ne entaw oda; shin enti ne giyaba si7okona. Ne enta xeegana; shin enti koyokona.
Jeremiah7:28 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah7:29 Hinte huuphiya meedidi wora holite. Goday bana yiloyida yeleta ixida gishonne yeggidi aggida gisho aybika bayna dhoqa zumaa bolla keyidi zeleelite” yaagis.
Jeremiah7:30 “Yihuda asay ta sinthan iitabaa oothidosona. Enti ta sunthan xeegetida Xoossa keethaa tunisanaw taani ixiya eeqata ehidi iya giddon wothidosona.
Jeremiah7:31 Enti banta adde naytanne macca nayta taman xuuggidi yarshanaw
Jeremiah7:32 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah7:33 He wode he asaa ahay salo kafotasinne sa7a do7atas kathi gidana; enta gooddana asika baawa.
Jeremiah7:34 Taani yethi
Jeremiah8:1 “He wode Yihuda kawota meqethay
Jeremiah8:2 Enti siiqida
Jeremiah8:3 Ta laallida bessatan de7iya
Jeremiah8:4 Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: “Issi asi kundiko
Jeremiah8:5 Yaatin
Jeremiah8:6 Ta minthada hayzas; shin enti tuma haasayokona. ‘Ta ay oothadina?’ gidi ba iita nagaraa paaxey issoyka baawa. Ubbay olas gaallabiya parada baw baw woxees.
Jeremiah8:7 Hari attoshin
Jeremiah8:8 “Yaatin waanidi
Jeremiah8:9 Cincati yeellatana; enti kawuyananne oyketana. Enti Godaa qaala ixin
Jeremiah8:10 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah8:11 Enti ta asaa madunthaa laafa gidi
Jeremiah8:12 Ha shaatiya oosuwa oothishe
Jeremiah8:13 Enta goshsha ayfiya ta entafe ekana. Enta woyne ayfey dhayana; balase mithaa ayfey bentenna. Iya boncoy shullana; ta entaw immidaba entafe ekana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah8:14 Asay zaaridi haysada yaagosona: “Nu si77i gidi ayis uttanee? Ane shiiqite; gimbetida katamata gelidi yan hayqana. Goday nu Xoossay nuna hayqos aathidi immis. Nu iya bolla nagara oothida gisho
Jeremiah8:15 Sarotethi ufaysan naagida; shin lo77obay yibeena. Nu paxo amotida; shin dagama gidis.
Jeremiah8:16 Morke para garmamoy Daane kataman si7etees; enta korma parata caagethan biitti qaaxees. Enti biittanne biittan de7iyaba ubbaa
Jeremiah8:17 Taani shooshata hinte giddo yeddana. Biti teqanaw danda7onna haso shooshata hinte giddo yeddana; enti hintena dukana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah8:18 Ta azzanuwas minthethoy baawa; ta wozanay til7is.
Jeremiah8:19 Ta asay haaho biittan waassiya waasuwa si7ite. Enti
Jeremiah8:20 Asay zaaridi
Jeremiah8:21 Ta asay madunxida gisho
Jeremiah8:22 Galadan tiyetiya dhaley baawee? Yan aakimey deennee? Yaatin
Jeremiah9:1 Hayqida ta asaas qammanne gallas yeekana mela ta huuphey haatha olla
Jeremiah9:2 Enti ubbay makallanne laymatiya asi gidiya gisho
Jeremiah9:3 “Enti banta inxarsan wordo odetanaw ubba wode giigidi de7oosona. Enta biittan tuma gidonashin wordoy kawotis. Enti issi nagarape hara nagaran pinnidosona; tana erokona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah9:4 “Ishi cimmeysa
Jeremiah9:5 Shooroy shooruwa cimmees; tuma odetey deenna. Wordo odetana mela banta inxarsaa tamaarsidosona; nagara oosona bantana daabursidosona.
Jeremiah9:6 Ne cimo giddon de7aasa; enti banta cimuwan tana eronna ixidosona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah9:7 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah9:8 Enta inxarsay wodhiya donge toora mela; enti cimon haasayoosona. Banta doonan issoy issuwara saro qaala haasayoosona; shin banta wozanan xihe wothoosona.
Jeremiah9:9 Yaatin
Jeremiah9:10 Taani dhoqa deretas yeekana; enta gisho waassana; bazzon de7iya hentha gadetas zeleelana. Enti dhayidosona; yaara issi asika aadhenna. Mehe waasoy si7etenna; salo kafotinne do7ati baqatidosona.
Jeremiah9:11 “Yerusalaame katamaa laaletida keelanne workanati gupiya bessi oothana. Yihuda katamata oonika doonna baysa kessana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah9:12 Haysa akeekanaw danda7iya cinca asi oonee? Hara asas odana mela Goday ooddes qoncisidee? Issi asika iya giddora aadhona mela biittay iitidi bazzoda oniday aybisee?
Jeremiah9:13 “Haysi haniday
Jeremiah9:14 Hessa aggidi
Jeremiah9:15 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah9:16 Enti woyko enta aawati eronna kawotethata giddon ta enta laallana. Enta dhaysana gakanaw mashshan yedethana” yaagees.
Jeremiah9:17 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Ane qopite. Yeeho yeekiya maccasata xeegite; zelelsi eriya asata ehite.
Jeremiah9:18 Enti ellesidi yidi
Jeremiah9:19 Xiyoonen zelelsa girsi si7etees; ‘Nu dhayida! Nu kawuyida! Nu keethay laaletida gisho
Jeremiah9:20 Hinteno
Jeremiah9:21 Hayqoy yooga nayta ogen
Jeremiah9:22 “Asa ahi buureda denban yegetana; cakeysati cakidi guye yeggida katha mela enta oonika shiishenna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah9:23 “Cinci ba cincatethan ceeqofo; wolqaami ba wolqan ceeqofo; durey ba duretethan ceeqofo.
Jeremiah9:24 Shin ceeqiya oonika tana eroninne akeekon ceeqo. Maarotethi
Jeremiah9:25 “Banta asho xalaala qaxaretida asaa ta seerana wodey yaana.
Jeremiah9:26 Hessatika Gibxe
Jeremiah10:1 Hinteno

Jeremiah10:3 Enta wogay hada; enti worape mithi qanxoosona; masseysi kaltan massees.
Jeremiah10:4 Enti biraninne worqan alleeqisosona; qaaxonnaada misimaaren dhishidi oythoosona.
Jeremiah10:5 Enta eeqati leehe giddon kafo daganthanaw essiya malla mela. Enti odetokona; enti hemetanaw danda7onna gisho asay enta tookosona. Entas kumthi yayyofite. Enti qohanawuka maaddanawuka danda7onna gisho entaw yayyofite” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah10:6 Abeeti Godaw
Jeremiah10:7 Abeeti kawotethata Kawaw
Jeremiah10:8 Enti eeyanne eri dhayidaysata; enti mithafe massida
Jeremiah10:9 He eeqati Tarsesa biraninne Afeeza worqan alleeqetidosona. Enti ubbay kushe hiillanchotan oosetida woynenne kaalose daaniya ma7uwan kametidosona.
Jeremiah10:10 Shin Goday tuma Xoossaa; I de7o Xoossaanne merinaa kawa. Iya hanquwan biittay qaaxees; kawotethati iya yiluwa danda7okona.
Jeremiah10:11 “Haysati salonne sa7a medhiboonna xoossati sa7apenne salope dhayana” yaagada neeni entaw oda.
Jeremiah10:12 Ba wolqan sa7aa medhiday
Jeremiah10:13 I
Jeremiah10:14 Asi ubbay era dhayidi eeyis; worqaa sheeshiya ubbay ba eeqan yeellatis. Enti medhida eeqati wordo; entaw shempoy baawa.
Jeremiah10:15 Enti pathonnabaanne hada; enti seeretiya wode dhayana.
Jeremiah10:16 Shin I ubbaa medhida gisho
Jeremiah10:17 Hinteno
Jeremiah10:18 “Taani
Jeremiah10:19 Ta madunxas! Ta madunthay paxenna. Shin taani
Jeremiah10:20 Ta dunkaaney laaletis; iya wodoro ubbay duuxeretis. Ta nayti ubbay taape shaaketidi bidosona; enti baawa. Ta dunkaaniya zaaridi tokanaw woyko ta magarajuwa kaqanaw issi asika attibeenna.

Jeremiah12:17 Shin kiitetonna ixida kawotethata taani polo shoddada dhaysana” yaagees Goday.

Jeremiah21:3 Ermiyaasi entaw zaaridi
Jeremiah21:4 ‘Neeni Babiloone kawuwaranne gimbiyafe karera ne katama teqida iya olanchotara oletiyanne ne kushen de7iya ola miishiya ta ne bolla zaarana; enta ubbaa ha katamaa giddo gelsana.

Jeremiah21:6 Ta ha kataman de7iya asaanne mehiya shocana; enti iita gadon wurana.

Jeremiah21:8 Goday Ermiyaasako

Jeremiah21:10 Taani ha katamaa bolla lo77oba gidonashin iitabaa oothanaw dendas. Ta iya Babiloone kawas aathada immana; I ha katamaa taman xuuggana” yaagees Goday.
