Jeremiah22:5 Shin hinte kiitetonna ixiko
Jeremiah22:6 Goday Yihuda kawo gadhuwaba haysada yaagees: “Neeni taw Galada biittanne Libaanose zuma mela gidikoka
Jeremiah22:7 Taani nena laaliya asaa ola miishe oythada kiittana; enti ne ziga tuuqeta qanxerethidi
Jeremiah22:8 “Dumma dumma kawotethatape asay he katamaa matara aadhishe
Jeremiah22:9 Enti zaaridi
Jeremiah22:10 Hayqida kawa Iyosiyasas yeekofite woyko kayotofite. Hessa aggidi
Jeremiah22:11 Ba aawa bessan Yihudan kawotidi de7ishe
Jeremiah22:12 I di7etidi bida biittan hayqana; simmidi ha biitta be7enna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah22:13 Ba keetha genen keexeysa
Jeremiah22:14 He uray
Jeremiah22:15 Ne daro zigan keexidaysi nena lo77o kawo kessees gada qopay? Ne aawa Iyosyaasas miyabaynne uyaabay dhayidee? I suure pirda pirdis; xillo oothis. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah22:16 I manqotasinne metootanchotas suure pirdiya gisho
Jeremiah22:17 Shin ne ayfeynne ne wozanay shempiday
Jeremiah22:18 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah22:19 Iya moogoyka hare moogo mela gidana. Iya ahay gooshetidi
Jeremiah22:20 Goday Yerusalaameba haysada yaagees: “Olas neera zupeteysati ubbay xoonetida gisho
Jeremiah22:21 Ne saro de7iya wode ta new odas; shin ne tana si7onna ixadasa. Ne na7atethafe doomin ne hanoy haysa; ne taw kiitetonna ixadasa.
Jeremiah22:22 Ne henthanchota ubbaa carkoy efana; olas neera zupeteysati di7etidi baana. He wode ne iitatetha ubbaa gisho yeellatananne kawuyana.
Jeremiah22:23 Hinteno
Jeremiah22:24 Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta de7oy ero! Neeni Iyo7aqeema na7ay
Jeremiah22:25 Nena wodhanaw koyeysatas
Jeremiah22:26 Ta nenanne ne aayiw hinte yeletonna hara biitta holana; hinte nam7ayka yan hayqana.
Jeremiah22:27 Hinte simmanaw laamotiya biitta polo simmeketa” yaagees.
Jeremiah22:28 Ha addey Yo7akini
Jeremiah22:29 Biitte
Jeremiah22:30 “Iya kochaafe issuwasika injetonna gishonne Dawita araatan uttiya woyko Yihudan kawotiya asi issoyka bayna gisho
Jeremiah23:1 “Ta hentha bessan de7iya dorsata dhaysiyanne laaliya henthanchota ayye!” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:2 Goday
Jeremiah23:3 Ta wudiyape attidaysata ta kase laallida biitta ubbaafe ta huuphen shiishana. Enta guye enta hentha bessaa zaarana; enti yan yeletidi darana.
Jeremiah23:4 Enta loythidi heemmiya henthanchota entaw shuumana. Enti zaaridi yayyokona; dagammokona; entafe issoyka dhayenna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:5 “Dawita kochaafe xillo aaca denthana wodey yaana. I kawotethaa cincatethan aysana; biitta bolla suurenne xillo oothana.
Jeremiah23:6 Iya kawotetha wodiyan Yihudi attana; Isra7eeley saro daana. Iya sunthay
Jeremiah23:7 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah23:8 ‘Isra7eela kochaa pudeha bagga biittafenne enta laallida biitta ubbaafe ehida Goday eriya mela’ yaagidi caaqana wodey yaana. Hessafe guye
Jeremiah23:9 Nabetaba ta qopiya wode ta wozanay daaburees; ta meqethati kokoroosona. Godaa gishonne iya geeshsha qaala gisho woyney xoonin mathotida asi gidas.
Jeremiah23:10 Biittay laymatethan kumis. Qangetha gisho
Jeremiah23:11 “Nabetinne kahineti tunidosona; hari attoshin ta keethan enti oothiya iitaa ta be7as” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:12 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah23:13 “Samaare nabeta giddon iitabaa be7as. Enti Ba7aale sunthan tinbite odoosona; ta asaa Isra7eele balethoosona.
Jeremiah23:14 Qassi Yerusalaame nabeta giddonka haythas deexiyaba be7as. Enti laymatoosona; wordotidi de7oosona. Oonika ba iita oosuwape simmonna mela enti iitaa ootheyisata minthethoosona. Enti ubbay taw Soodoma mela; Yerusalaame asay Gamoora mela” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:15 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah23:16 “Nabeti odiyaba si7opite; enti hanonna ufaysan kunthoosona. Goday odonnashin enti bantafe medhi kessidi qoncethi odoosona.
Jeremiah23:17 Tana kadheysatako
Jeremiah23:18 “Shin be7anaw woyko iya qaala si7anaw Goday zoriya bessan entafe oone eqiday? Iya qaala si7iday oonee?
Jeremiah23:19 Godaa gotey hanqon dendana; wolqaama hobbey iitata huuphiya shocana.
Jeremiah23:20 Ba wozanaa qofaa polonna de7ishe
Jeremiah23:21 Ta ha nabeta kiittabike; shin enti banta kiita ekidi woxoosona. Ta entaw odabike; shin enti tinbite odoosona.
Jeremiah23:22 Enti ta zoriya bessan eqidabaa gidiyako
Jeremiah23:23 “Ta mata xalaala Xoossee? Haaho Xoossi gidikina?
Jeremiah23:24 Ta be7onnaada
Jeremiah23:25 “Ta sunthan wordo tinbite odeysati giyaba si7as. Enti
Jeremiah23:26 Ha nabeti bantaw medhidi kessidi odiya wordo tinbitey enta wozanan awude gakanaw gam7anee?
Jeremiah23:27 Enta aawati Ba7aale eeqa goyinnidi ta sunthaa dogidaysada
Jeremiah23:28 Amuho amuhiya nabey ba amuhuwa odo; shin ta qaala si7iya nabey ta qaala ammanetidi odo. Dalinne gistey awun gahetii?
Jeremiah23:29 Ta qaalay tama mela gidennee? Zaalla mentherethiya naariqa mela gidennee?” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:30 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah23:31 Hessadaka
Jeremiah23:32 Wordo amuhishe tinbite odiya nabeta bolla ta dendana. Enti banta amuhuwan katidi tinbite odiya nabeta taani ixayis. Ta enta kiittonnashin woyko shuumonnashin wordo tinbite odoosona; ta asaa balethoosona. Enti ha asaa aykoka maaddokona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah23:33 “Goday taako
Jeremiah23:34 “Nabey woyko kahiney woyko asay
Jeremiah23:35 Hessa aggidi issoy issoy
Jeremiah23:36 Hizape oonika
Jeremiah23:37 Neeni nabetako
Jeremiah23:38 Shin hinte
Jeremiah23:39 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah23:40 Ta hinte bolla merinaa kawushanne dogetonna yeella ehana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah24:1 Kawoy Nabukadanaxoori
Jeremiah24:2 Issi keeshiyan koyro teerida daaniya lo77o balasey de7ees; hanko keeshiyan qassi maanaw giigonna iita balasey de7ees.
Jeremiah24:3 Goday taako
Jeremiah24:4 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah24:5 Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: “Yihuda biittafe di7on Babiloone biitta yeddida asata
Jeremiah24:6 Taani lo77o ayfen enta xeellana; qassi enta zaarada ha biitta ehana. Ta enta keexanape attishin
Jeremiah24:7 Taani Godaa gididaysa enti erana mela entaw wozana immana. Enti banta kumetha wozanape taako simmanaw de7iya gisho
Jeremiah24:8 Gidoshin
Jeremiah24:9 Taani enta gooddada yeddiya biitta ubban
Jeremiah24:10 Ta entawunne enta mayzatas immida biittafe enti polo dhayana gakanaw mashsha
Jeremiah25:1 Iyosyaasa na7ay
Jeremiah25:2 Nabey Ermiyaasi Yihuda ubbaasinne Yerusalaamen de7iya ubbaas haysada yaagis:
Jeremiah25:3 Amoxe na7ay
Jeremiah25:4 Goday ba aylleta
Jeremiah25:5 Enti
Jeremiah25:6 Hara xoossata goyinnanawunne entaw oothanaw kaallopite. Qassi hinte
Jeremiah25:7 “Hinte ta odidaysa si7onna ixidi
Jeremiah25:8 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah25:9 pudeha bagga asa ubbaanne ta aylliya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora xeegana. Enta ha biitta bolla
Jeremiah25:10 Enta giddofe ililsinne ufaysa qaala
Jeremiah25:11 Ha biittay kumethi laaletidanne baysa biitta gidana; kawotethati Babiloone kawas laapun tammu laythi haaretana.
Jeremiah25:12 “Laapun tammu laythay poletidaape guye
Jeremiah25:13 Ta ha biitta bolla odida ubbaa
Jeremiah25:14 Daro kawotethatinne gita kawoti Babiloone asaa haarana. Ta entaw
Jeremiah25:15 “Ta hanquwan kumida woyne wanca ta kushepe eka. Efada ta nena kiittiya kawotethata ubbaa ushsha.
Jeremiah25:16 Enti uyidi
Jeremiah25:17 Taani Godaa kushepe wanca ekada
Jeremiah25:18 Hachi hanidaysada enta ubbaa dhayonne dagama
Jeremiah25:19 Gibxe kawa
Jeremiah25:20 yan de7iya allaga asa ubbaa ushshas. Oxa kawota ubbaa ushshas. Filisxeemen de7iya Asqaloona
Jeremiah25:21 Edoome
Jeremiah25:22 Xiroosa kawota ubbaa
Jeremiah25:23 Dedaana
Jeremiah25:24 Arabe kawota ubbaanne mela biittan de7iya walaka asaa kawota ubbaa ushshas.
Jeremiah25:25 Zimira
Jeremiah25:26 Pudeha biitta kawota ubbaa
Jeremiah25:27 Goday taako
Jeremiah25:28 Shin enti ne kushepe wanca ekonnanne uyonna ixiko
Jeremiah25:29 Ta sunthan xeegetida katamaa bolla iitabaa oothanaw doomayis. Yaatin hinte seerettona attanaw danda7eetii? Ta sa7an de7iya ubbaa bolla mashsha xeegida gisho hinte seerettonna atteketa’ ” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Jeremiah25:30 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah25:31 Godaas kawotethatara mootoy de7iya gisho iya waasoy sa7a gaxaa gakidi si7etees. Goday asa ubbaara pirdetana; I iitata mashshas aathidi immana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah25:32 “Iitabay kawotethaafe kawotethaa laaletis; sa7aa gaxape gotey dendis” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Jeremiah25:33 He wode Goday wodhidaysata ahay
Jeremiah25:34 Hinteno
Jeremiah25:35 Henthanchoti baqatidi attiya bessi baawa; wudiya kaaletheysati kessi ekiya bessi baawa.
Jeremiah25:36 Goday enta hentha gadiya dhaysiya gisho
Jeremiah25:37 Godaa suulliya sheniya gaason saro biittay baysatana.
Jeremiah25:38 Gaammoy ba de7iya worape keyeysada Goday ba de7iya bessaafe keyana. Enta biittay un7etheyisata mashshaninne Godaa suulliya hanquwan baysa gidana.
Jeremiah26:1 Iyosyaasa na7ay Yihuda kawoy Iyo7aqeemi kawotida wode Godaa qaalay yis.
Jeremiah26:2 Goday
Jeremiah26:3 Enti si7idi
Jeremiah26:4 Entako haysada yaaga: “Hinte tana si7onna ixikonne ta hintew immida higgiya kiitetonna ixiko
Jeremiah26:5 hinte si7onna ixikoka ta zaara zaarada hinteko kiitida
Jeremiah26:6 ta ha xoossa keethaa Seeloda oothana. Ha katamaa sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaas baadethi oothana” yaagis.
Jeremiah26:7 Ermiyaasi Xoossa keethan ha qaala odishin
Jeremiah26:8 Ermiyaasi
Jeremiah26:9 Neeni
Jeremiah26:10 Yihuda halaqati hessa si7ida wode
Jeremiah26:11 Kahinetinne nabeti halaqatakonne asa ubbaako haysada yaagidosona: “Hinte
Jeremiah26:12 Ermiyaasi halaqatakonne asa ubbaako haysada yaagis: “Ha hinte si7ida qaala ubbay ha xoossa keethaa bollanne ha katamaa bolla hanana gada ta odana mela Goday tana kiittis.
Jeremiah26:13 Hiza hinte ogiyanne hinte oosuwa laammite; Godaa hinte Xoossaa qaalas kiitetite. Hessa hinte oothiko
Jeremiah26:14 Tana gidiko
Jeremiah26:15 Taani ha qaala ubbaa hintew odana mela Goday tuma tana kiitida gisho
Jeremiah26:16 Halaqatinne asa ubbay
Jeremiah26:17 Biitta cimatape issoti issoti dendi eqidi
Jeremiah26:18 “Hizqiyaasi Yihudan kawotida laythan Mooreseeta addey Mikiyaasi kase Yihuda asaas haysada yaagidi
Jeremiah26:19 Yaatin
Jeremiah26:20 Qiriyat-Yi7aarima geetetiya bessan
Jeremiah26:21 Kawoy Iyo7aqeemi
Jeremiah26:22 Gidoshin
Jeremiah26:23 Enti Ooriyoona Gibxefe kessidi
Jeremiah26:24 Shin Safaana na7ay
Jeremiah27:1 Iyosyaasa na7ay Sedeqiyaasi
Jeremiah27:2 “Dafo gonne wodorora de7iya qambara medhada ne gannan wotha.
Jeremiah27:3 Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasako Yerusalaame kiitetida asaa baggara
Jeremiah27:4 Enti banta godatas odana mela enta kiitta. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah27:5 ‘Ta gita wolqaaninne ta micetida kushen sa7aa
Jeremiah27:6 Ha77i ta biitta ubbaa ta aylliyas
Jeremiah27:7 Iya biittay haratas haaretiya wodey gakanaw kawotethati ubbay iyaw
Jeremiah27:8 “Shin ay biitti woyko ay kawotethi Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras kiitetonna ixikonne iya qambaran gelonna ixiko
Jeremiah27:9 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah27:10 Enti hintew wordo odoosona; hintena hinte biittafe shoddana; hintena gooddada kessana; hinteka dhayana.
Jeremiah27:11 Shin ay kawotethika Babiloone kawa qambaran gelidi
Jeremiah27:12 Taani
Jeremiah27:13 Goday Babiloone kawas haaretonna ixiya kawotethas odidaysada mashshan
Jeremiah27:14 Enti odey wordo gidiya gisho
Jeremiah27:15 Ta enta kiittabike; shin enti ta sunthan wordo tinbite odoosona. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah27:16 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah27:17 Enti giyaba si7onna aggidi
Jeremiah27:18 Enti tuma nabe gidikonne Godaa qaalay entan de7iko
Jeremiah27:19 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah27:20 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Iyo7aqeema na7aa
Jeremiah27:21 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah27:22 Enti Babiloone biitta gaazetana; ta enta gisho yaana wodey gakanaw
Jeremiah28:1 He laythi
Jeremiah28:2 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah28:3 Babiloone kawoy
Jeremiah28:4 Iyo7aqeema na7aa
Jeremiah28:5 Xoossa keethaa giddon eqida kahinetanne asa ubbaa sinthan nabey Ermiyaasi
Jeremiah28:6 “Amin7i! Goday ne gidaysada ootho. Xoossa keetha miishetanne di7etidi bida asa ubbaa Babiloonepe zaaridi
Jeremiah28:7 Gidoshin
Jeremiah28:8 Neepenne taape kase de7ida nabeti
Jeremiah28:9 Shin
Jeremiah28:10 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah28:11 Hanaani asa ubbaa sinthan
Jeremiah28:12 Nabey Hanaani
Jeremiah28:13 Bada Hanaanas oda; “Neeni mitha qambara menthadasa; shin neeni iya gisho birata qambara medhana.
Jeremiah28:14 Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras haaretana mela taani ha kawotethata ubbaa gannan birata qambara wothana; entika iyaw haaretana. Taani hari attoshin
Jeremiah28:15 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah28:16 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah28:17 He laythi laapuntha ageenan nabey Hanaani hayqis.
Jeremiah29:1 Nabiya Ermiyaasi di7etida asaa giddon de7iya attida cimatas
Jeremiah29:2 Haysi haniday
Jeremiah29:3 Ermiyaasi Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoorako kiitetida Safaana na7aa El7aasanne Kalqqe na7aa Gamaara bolla he dabdaabiya yeddis. Dabdaabey haysada yaagees:
Jeremiah29:4 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah29:5 Keethe keexidi yan de7ite. Kathi zeridi ayfiya miite.
Jeremiah29:6 Macho ekidi macca na7anne adde na7a yelite. Hinte adde naytas macho oychidi immite; hinte macca nayta azinas immite. Enti macca adde yelo; yan taybon darite; guuxofite.
Jeremiah29:7 Hinte di7etidi bida katamaas saroy daana mela koyite. He katamaas Godaa woossite. Iyaw saroy de7iko
Jeremiah29:8 Hinte giddon de7iya hinte nabetinne maroti odiyaban cimetofite; enti amuhiya amuhuwa si7opite.
Jeremiah29:9 Enti ta sunthan wordo tinbite odoosona; ta enta kiittabike” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah29:10 “Hinte Babiloonen gam7iya laapun tammu laythay poletiya wode ta hinte gisho yada
Jeremiah29:11 Taani hintew qopiya qofaa erayis. He qofay
Jeremiah29:12 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah29:13 Hinte tana koyana; hinte tana hinte kumetha wozanan koyida wode demmana.
Jeremiah29:14 Ta hintew bentana; ta hintena di7etethaafe zaarana. Taani hintena laallida kawotethatapenne dumma dumma bessaafe shiishana. Ta hintena di7on denthida hinte biitta guye zaarada ehana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah29:15 Hinte
Jeremiah29:16 Gidoshin
Jeremiah29:17 “Ta enta bolla mashshe
Jeremiah29:18 Taani enta mashshan
Jeremiah29:19 Ta aylleta nabeta baggara zaarada zaarada kiitida ta qaala enti si7onna ixidosona. Hinte di7etidi bidaysatika si7onna ixideta.
Jeremiah29:20 Hinteno
Jeremiah29:21 Ta sunthan wordo tinbite odiya
Jeremiah29:22 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah29:23 Enti Isra7eelen iita nagara oothidosona. Enti banta shoorota machetara laymatidosona; ta enta kiittonna wordo tinbite ta sunthan odidosona. Hessa erey tana; hessas taani marka” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah29:24 Nahelame addiya Shamayas haysada yaagada oda:
Jeremiah29:25 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Xoossa keethan halaqa gidana mela Goday nena Yoodahe bessan kahine oothidi shuumis. Bana nabe gidi tinbite odiya gooya oonaka iya tohuwa duthan
Jeremiah29:27 Yaatin bana nabe giya Anatoota addiya Ermiyaasa ayis hessada oothabikii?
Jeremiah29:28 Ermiyaasi
Jeremiah29:29 Kahiney Sofoniyaasi nabiya Ermiyaasas dabdaabiya nabbabis.
Jeremiah29:30 Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis;
Jeremiah29:31 “Ha kiitaa di7on de7iya asa ubbaas kiitta; Nahelama addiya Samayeba Goday haysada yaagees; Taani kiittonna Shamayey wordo tinbite odidi hinte wordon ammantana mela oothis.
Jeremiah29:32 Ta Nahelama addiya Shamayanne iya soo asaa seerana. I ta bolla makallaba odida gisho ha asaa giddon iyaw issi asika de7on attenna. Taani ta asaas oothana keehatetha I be7enna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah30:1 Godaape Ermiyaasako yida qaalay haysa.
Jeremiah30:2 “Ermiyaasa
Jeremiah30:3 Taani ta asaa Isra7eelenne Yihuda di7ope guye zaariya wodey matatis. Enta mayzatas immida biitta enta zaarana; enti iya laattana” yaagees Goday Isra7eele Xoossay.
Jeremiah30:4 Goday Isra7eelebanne Yihudaba odida qaalay haysa.
Jeremiah30:5 “Ta yashshanne dagama waaso si7as; dagama waasope attishin
Jeremiah30:6 Ane oychite; be7ite; addey na7a yelanaw danda7ii? Yaatin
Jeremiah30:7 He gallasay ay mela un7ethiya gallasee? Hessa mela gallas baawa. He gallasay Yayqooba zerethaas un7a wode gidana. Gidoshin enti he ubbaafe attana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah30:8 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallasan ta enta gannaafe qambara menthana; enti qashetida santhalaata duuthana. Hessafe guye
Jeremiah30:9 Shin enti Godaas
Jeremiah30:10 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah30:11 Ta hintena ashshanaw hintera de7ayis. Hintena laallida kawotethata ubbaa dhaysana; shin hintena dhaysike. Ta hintena xillo pirdan seerana; shin seeronna hintena coo yeddike” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah30:12 “Hinte meqoy kooletenna; hinte madunthay paxenna.
Jeremiah30:13 Hintew mootetey baawa; hinte madunthaas dhaley deenna; hintew paxoy baawa.
Jeremiah30:14 Hinte doseysati hintena dogidosona; enti hintebaa wuda gookona. Hinte balaynne hinte nagaray daro gidiya gisho
Jeremiah30:15 Paxoy bentonna hinte hargiyasinne hinte madunthaas ayis waassetii? Hinte balaynne hinte nagaray darida gisho ta haysa hinte bolla oothas.
Jeremiah30:16 “Shin hintena gaashidi mida ubbay meetetana; hinte morketi ubbay di7etana. Hintena bonqidaysati bonqetana; hintebaa ekidaysati eketana.
Jeremiah30:17 Enti
Jeremiah30:18 “Yayqooba kochata di7etida bessaafe guye zaarada
Jeremiah30:19 Yan de7iya asa ubbay galata mazmurenne ufaysa yethi yexana. Ta enta taybuwa darisanape attishin
Jeremiah30:20 Enta nayti beni duussaada daana; enta maabaray ta sinthan minnidi daana. Enta un7ethiya ubbaa ta seerana.
Jeremiah30:21 Enta kaalethanay enta giddofe keyana; enta haaranay enta giddofe dendana. Taani iya taw mata ehana; I taako shiiqana. Taani iya shiishonna de7ishin
Jeremiah30:22 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah30:23 Heko
Jeremiah30:24 Goday ba wozanaa qofaa wursidi polana gakanaw eexiya iya hanqoy guye simmenna. Hessa sinthafe yaana wodetan hinte akeekana.
Jeremiah31:1 “He wode taani Isra7eele zeretha ubbaas Xoosse gidana; entika ta ase gidana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:2 “Mashshafe attida asay mela biittan ta sinthan saba demmana. Taani Isra7eele asaas shempo immanaw yaana.
Jeremiah31:3 Taani entaw haaho bessafe qoncas; taani hintena merina siiquwan dosas; ta qadhiyan hintena taako shiishas.
Jeremiah31:4 Geela7o Isra7eele
Jeremiah31:5 Samaare zumaa bolla woyne tokana; tokidaysati iya ayfiyan ufaytana.
Jeremiah31:6 Efreema gezze biittan naageysati
Jeremiah31:7 “Yayqooba asaas ufaysan yexite; kawotethata ubbaafe aadhiya Isra7eeles ililite. ‘Isra7eele asaape attidaysata ashsha’ yaagidi galata mazmure yexite.
Jeremiah31:8 Taani enta pudeha bagga biittafe ehana; sa7aa gaxape ta enta shiishana. Qooqeti
Jeremiah31:9 Ta enta zaarada ehiya wode enti ufaysafe dendoysan yeekishenne woossishe yaana. Taani enta shaafa lanqiyara
Jeremiah31:10 “Hinteno
Jeremiah31:11 Goday Yayqooba kochata wozana; I enta
Jeremiah31:12 Enti yidi Xiyoone zuma bolla ufaysan yexana; enti
Jeremiah31:13 He wode geela7oti ufaysan durana; panthatinne cimati ufaytana. Ta enta yeehuwa ufaysan laammana; ta enta minthethana; enta azzanuwa gisho enta ufaysana.
Jeremiah31:14 Taani kahinetas daro kathi immana; ta asay ta keehatetha kaallana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:15 “Yeehoynne zelelsi Rama kataman si7etis; Raheela ba naytas yeekasu; enti bayna gisho yeeho minthetho ixasu” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:16 “Yeehuwa aggidi
Jeremiah31:17 Hinte nayti banta biitta simmanaw de7iya gisho
Jeremiah31:18 “Efreema kochata zuuzuntha ta si7as. Enti
Jeremiah31:19 Nu kase neepe haakidi bida; shin ha77i nu nagara paaxida. Ne nuna seerin
Jeremiah31:20 “Efreemi taw tuma al7onne ta dosiya na7a gidennee? Taani iya sunthaa denthiya wode ubban iya hassayayis. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah31:21 “Hinte ogiyan malaata wothite; malaata mithi essite; hinte bida ogiya akeekite. Geela7o Isra7eele
Jeremiah31:22 Hinteno
Jeremiah31:23 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah31:24 Yihudaninne Yihudan de7iya katamatan asay daana; goshshanchotinne henthanchoti banta wudiyara yan daana.
Jeremiah31:25 Taani daaburanchota gashtisana; qassi koshatidi gilqidaysata kalsana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:26 He wode barkada ta yuushuwa xeellas; ta dhiskoy taw mal7o dhisko gidis.
Jeremiah31:27 “Taani Isra7eeleninne Yihudan asenne mehe kunthiya wodey yaana.
Jeremiah31:28 Enta shoddanaw
Jeremiah31:29 “He wode asay
Jeremiah31:30 Shin issoy issoy ba nagaran hayqana; qaw7e woyne ayfe miya oodeska iya achay doccana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:31 “Taani Isra7eeleranne Yihudara ooratha caaqo caaqana wodey yaana.
Jeremiah31:32 He caaqoy ta enta Gibxefe kessanaw enta kushiya oykida wode enta mayzatara caaqida caaquwa mela gidenna. Ta entaw azina mela gida uttinka enti ta caaquwa menthidosona” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah31:33 “Shin taani he wodiyape guye Isra7eelera caaqana caaqoy haysa: taani ta higgiya enta guuggiyan wothana; enta wozanan xaafana. Taani enta Xoosse gidana; entika ta ase gidana.
Jeremiah31:34 Hizape guye
Jeremiah31:35 Gallas poo7ana mela awa wothiday
Jeremiah31:36 “Ha eqidi de7iya medhetetha higgey ta sinthafe shaaretiko
Jeremiah31:37 “Bolla salota wadhanaw woyko garsa sa7aa baasoy eretanaw danda7iko
Jeremiah31:38 “Hanaani7eela shako Gimbiyafe doomidi
Jeremiah31:39 He katamaa zaway wuloha baggafe bidi Gaareba zumanne Go7a yuushuwa gakanaw dalgana.
Jeremiah31:40 Aha moogiyanne bido yeggiya zangaaraynne Qediroona Zangaarape qommora doloha baggara bidi
Jeremiah32:1 Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammantho laythan
Jeremiah32:2 He wode Babiloone kawa olanchoti Yerusalaame teqidosona; nabey Ermiyaasi Yihuda kawo gadhon de7iya
Jeremiah32:3 Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi iya haysada yaagidi qachidi wothis: “Ne ayis haysada yaagada tinbite oday? ‘Goday ha katamaa Babiloone kawa kushen aathidi immana; I iya oykana’ yaagada ayis oday.
Jeremiah32:4 Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone aadhidi imetana; I Babiloone kawa kushen gelana. Iya sinthan eqidi
Jeremiah32:5 Nabukadanaxoori Sedeqiyaasa Babiloone efana; ta iyabaa be7ana gakanaw I yan daana. Neeni Babiloonetara oletanaw qopiko
Jeremiah32:6 Ermiyaasi
Jeremiah32:7 “Ne aawa isha Saluma na7ay
Jeremiah32:8 Goday gidaysada
Jeremiah32:9 “Anatoota kataman de7iya gadiya ta aawa ishaa na7aa Hanami7eelape shammas. Iya gatiya mizaanen likin
Jeremiah32:10 Shama pirimaa markati de7iya bessan paramas; gordas; maatame iya bolla wothas; miishiya mizaanen likada iyaw immas.
Jeremiah32:11 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah32:12 Ta aawa ishaa na7ay Hanami7eeli
Jeremiah32:13 Enta sinthan ta Baaroka haysada yaagada kiittas:
Jeremiah32:14 ‘Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah32:15 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah32:16 Taani Neera na7aa Baarokas shama pirimaa warqatiya immidaape guye
Jeremiah32:17 “Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw
Jeremiah32:18 Neeni ne siiquwa mukulu asaas bessaasa; shin aawata nagaraa enta nayta bolla zaarasa. Abeeti gitanne wolqaama Xoossaw
Jeremiah32:19 Ne halchoy gita; ne oothiya oosoy wolqaama. Asa oge ubbaa ne be7aasa; asa ubbaas iya ogiyadanne iya oosuwada zaarasa.
Jeremiah32:20 “Ne Gibxen malaatanne mallata oothadasa; hachi gakanaw ha mallata Isra7eele asaa giddoninne hara kawotethata ubbaa giddon ooso aggabaaka. Hessafe dendoysan ne sunthay ubba bessan eretis.
Jeremiah32:21 Neeni ne asaa Isra7eele Gibxefe malaataninne mallatan
Jeremiah32:22 Enta mayzatas ne immanaw caaqida biitta
Jeremiah32:23 Enti he biitta gelidi laattidosona. Shin enti new kiitetibookona; ne higgiya naagibookona; enti oothana mela ne kiitida ubbaa oothibookona. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah32:24 “Babiloone asay katamaa oykanaw gimbiya yuushuwan biitta dooridi teqidosona. Olape
Jeremiah32:25 Abeeti Ubbaa Haariya Godaw
Jeremiah32:26 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah32:27 “Taani Godaa
Jeremiah32:28 Taani ha katamaa Babiloone asaasinne Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immana; enti iya oykana.
Jeremiah32:29 Ha katama teqida Babiloone asay yidi
Jeremiah32:30 “Isra7eeleynne Yihudi banta na7atethafe doomidi
Jeremiah32:31 Ha katamay keexetida wodepe hachi gakanaw
Jeremiah32:32 Isra7eeleynne Yihudi
Jeremiah32:33 Enti banta som7uwa gidonashin
Jeremiah32:34 Enti ixetida banta eeqata ta sunthay xeegetida keethan essidi tunisidosona.
Jeremiah32:35 Enti banta adde naytanne macca nayta Moloka eeqas yarshanaw Hinooma Zangaaran Ba7aale eeqas yarsho dhoqa bessata giigisidosona. Enti hessa oothana mela ta kiittabike; Yihuda asay nagara oothana mela hessa enti oothana gada ta naagabike” yaagis.
Jeremiah32:36 “Neeni
Jeremiah32:37 Ta suulliya hanquwaninne gita sheniyan enta laallida biitta ubbaafe shiishada ha bessaa zaara ehada
Jeremiah32:38 Enti ta ase gidana; ta enta Xoosse gidana.
Jeremiah32:39 Enti taw merinaw yayyana mela
Jeremiah32:40 Taani entara merinaw caaqana; he caaquwan ta entaw lo77oba ooso aggike. Enti tana aggidi guye simmonna mela enti taw yayyana mela oothana.
Jeremiah32:41 Ta entaw lo77oba ootheysi tana ufaysees; ta kumetha wozanapenne ta kumetha shempuwafe tuma ha biittan enta tokana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah32:42 “Ta ha asaa bolla iita bosha ubbaa ehidaysada ta entaw immana gida lo77oba ubbaa immana.
Jeremiah32:43 Hinte
Jeremiah32:44 Ta enta zaarada ehiya gisho
Jeremiah33:1 Ermiyaasi buroo naageysata dabaaban qashetidi de7ishin
Jeremiah33:2 Sa7aa medhida Goday
Jeremiah33:3 “Tana xeega; ta new koyana; ne eronna gitabaanne wolqaamaba ta new qoncisana.”
Jeremiah33:4 Goday
Jeremiah33:5 Enta iitatetha gaason
Jeremiah33:6 Gidoshin
Jeremiah33:7 Taani Yihuda asaanne Isra7eele asaa di7ope zaarana; enti kase de7idaysada oothada enta gimbana.
Jeremiah33:8 Enti tana oothida nagara ubbaafe ta enta geeshshana; enti naaquwanne enta makalla ubbaa atto gaana.
Jeremiah33:9 Yerusalaame katamay taw ufaysi
Jeremiah33:10 “Hinte
Jeremiah33:11 Yethinne Yaagano girsi
Jeremiah33:12 “Ha asaynne mehey bayna baysa biittaninne iyan de7iya katamatan henthanchoti banta dorsa wudiya heemmiya gadey daana.
Jeremiah33:13 Gezze katamatan
Jeremiah33:14 “Taani Isra7eele asaasinne Yihuda asaas gelida qaala poliya wodey yaana.

Jeremiah33:16 He wode Yihuda asay attana; Yerusalaame asay wopu gidi de7ana. Ha katamay
Jeremiah33:17 Dawita kochaafe Isra7eele araatan uttiya asi dhayenna.

Jeremiah33:21 iya kochaafe araatan uttiya asi dhayonnaada
Jeremiah33:22 Taani ta aylliya Dawita kochaanne ta sinthan oothiya Leewe kocha taybanaw danda7etonna salo xoolintotadanne makanaw danda7etonna abba shafiyada darsana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah33:23 Godaa qaalay qassika Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
Jeremiah33:24 “Ha asay
Jeremiah33:25 Taani gallasaranne qammara caaqida caaquwanne salonne sa7a higgiya minthaboonnaba gidiko

Jeremiah34:1 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori

Jeremiah34:3 Neeni iya kushepe kessa ekaka; neeni oyketana; iyaw aadhada imetana. Neeni ne ayfen Babiloone kawa be7ana; ika neera odetana. Neeni Babiloone biitta baana’ yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah34:4 “Gidoshin
Jeremiah34:5 Ne saro hayqana. Neepe kase de7ida kawota bonchuwas

Jeremiah34:20 Ta enta

Jeremiah34:22 Taani Babiloone olanchota kiittin; enti ha katama simmana. Enti ha katamaa olana
Jeremiah35:1 Iyosyaasa na7aa Yihuda kawa Iyo7aqeema laythan
Jeremiah35:2 “Rakaaba yara gidida asaako bada

Jeremiah35:5 Hessafe guye

Jeremiah35:7 Keethe keexofite; goshshe goyopite; woyne tokofite. Dunkaane giddon de7ite; hinte adussa laythi ha biittan daana’ yaagis.
Jeremiah35:8 Nu mayzay Rakaaba na7ay Yoonadaabi nuna kiitida ubbaa kiitetida. Nuuni woyko nu macheti woyko nu adde nayti woyko nu macca nayti nu de7o laytha ubban woyne ushshu uyibooko.
Jeremiah35:9 Duussa keethi keexibooko; woyne gade woyko goshshi nuus baawa.
Jeremiah35:10 Nu dunkaanen de7ida; nu mayzay Yoonadaabi kiitida ubbaa kiitetida.

Jeremiah35:16 Rakaaba na7aa Yoonadaabe kochati enta mayzay enta kiitida kiita oothidosona; shin ha asay taw kiitetibeenna yaaga” yaagees Goday.

Jeremiah37:1 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Iyo7aqeema na7aa Ikoniyaana bessan Iyosyaasa na7aa Sedeqiyaasa Yihuda biittan kawothis.

Jeremiah37:3 Shin kawoy Sedeqiyaasi Selema na7aa Yokaalanne Ma7iseya na7aa kahiniya Sofoniyaasa

Jeremiah37:5 Gibxe kawa olanchoti

Jeremiah37:7 “Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees: tana oychana mela hintena taako kiitida Yihuda kawas haysada yaagite; ‘Hintena maaddanaw yida Gibxe kawa olanchoti banta biitta simmidi baana.

Jeremiah40:1 Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Ermiyaasa Raman birshidi simmin
Jeremiah40:2 Kawa naageysata halaqay Ermiyaasa dumma kessidi
Jeremiah40:3 I ehana gidaysada ha77i oothis; Godaa bolla hinte nagara oothida gishonne iyaw kiitetonna ixida gisho haysi ubbay hanis.
Jeremiah40:4 Heko
Jeremiah40:5 Ermiyaasi iya matape boonna de7ishin
Jeremiah40:6 Ermiyaasi Mixiphan de7iya Akqaama na7aa Godoliyako bis. I yan attida asaara issife de7is.
Jeremiah40:7 Yihuda toora moconatapene olanchotape guuthati Babiloone kawas kushe immibookona. Enti Babiloone kawoy
Jeremiah40:8 Naatana na7ay Isma7eeli
Jeremiah40:9 Safaana na7ay
Jeremiah40:10 Ta Mixiphan uttada
Jeremiah40:11 Moo7aben
Jeremiah40:12 Enti laaletidi de7iya banta biittafe Yihuda simmidi
Jeremiah40:13 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah40:14 “Amoone kawoy Ba7alisi nena wodhana mela Naatana na7aa Isma7eela yeddidaysa eray?” yaagidosona. Shin Akqaama na7ay Godoliya enti odaa ammanonna ixis.
Jeremiah40:15 Qaraya na7ay Yohaani Mixiphan de7iya Godoliyako yidi
Jeremiah40:16 Shin Akqaama na7ay Godoliya zaaridi
Jeremiah41:1 Laapuntha ageenan kawo koche gididi
Jeremiah41:2 Naatana na7ay Isma7eelinne iyara de7iya tammu asati banta mashshaa mashshaa kessidi
Jeremiah41:3 Isma7eeli qassi Mixiphan Godoliyara de7iya Ayhudetanne Babiloone olanchota ubbaa wodhis.
Jeremiah41:4 Godoliya hayqida wontetha gallas
Jeremiah41:5 Seekemape
Jeremiah41:6 Isma7eeli yeekishe Mixiphafe keyidi
Jeremiah41:7 Enti katamaa gelida wode Isma7eelinne iyara de7iya asati enta wodhidi haatha ollan yeggidosona.
Jeremiah41:8 Shin he hospun tammu asatape tammati Isma7eela haysada yaagidi woossidosona: “Nuna wodhopa! Nu goshshan nu qosida daro gistey
Jeremiah41:9 Isma7eeli asaa wodhidi yeggida ollay
Jeremiah41:10 Isma7eeli kawa macca naytanne Mixiphan attida asa ubbaa di77is. Hessati kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Akqaama na7aa Godoliya aawatetha garsan Mixiphan wothidaysata. I enta di77idi
Jeremiah41:11 Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne iyara de7iya toora moconati Isma7eeli oothida iitaba ubbaa si7idosona.
Jeremiah41:12 Banta asaa ekidi
Jeremiah41:13 Isma7eeli di77idi efiya asa ubbay Qaraya na7aa Yohaanananne iyara de7iya toora moconata be7ida wode daro ufaytidosona.
Jeremiah41:14 He di7etidaysati ubbay guye simmidi
Jeremiah41:15 Shin Isma7eelinne hara hospun asati Yohaananape kessi ekidi
Jeremiah41:16 Isma7eeli Akqaama na7aa Godoliya wodhidi
Jeremiah41:17 Enti yaape dendidi
Jeremiah41:18 Enti Gibxe biday Babiloone kawoy shuumida Akqaama na7aa Godoliya Isma7eeli wodhida gisho
Jeremiah42:1 Tora moconati ubbay
Jeremiah42:2 nabiya Ermiyaasako yidi
Jeremiah42:3 Nu biya ogiyanne nu oothanaba I nuna bessaana mela Godaa ne Xoossaa nu gisho woossa” yaagidosona.
Jeremiah42:4 Nabey Ermiyaasi zaaridi
Jeremiah42:5 Enti zaaridi
Jeremiah42:6 Nu dosiyaba gidin
Jeremiah42:7 Tammu gallasape guye
Jeremiah42:8 Qaraya na7aa Yohaana
Jeremiah42:9 Hinte woosa ta iyako shiishana mela hinte tana kiitida Goday Isra7eele Xoossay haysada yaagees.
Jeremiah42:10 “ ‘Ta kase hinte bolla ehida iitabay tana azzanthida gisho
Jeremiah42:11 Hinte ha77i yayiya Babiloone kawas aykoka yayyofite. Hintena iya kushepe ashshanaw ta hintera de7iya gisho yayyofite.
Jeremiah42:12 Ta hintew qadhetana; yaatada I hintew qadhetidi
Jeremiah42:13 “Gidoshin
Jeremiah42:14 qassi hinte
Jeremiah42:15 hinteno
Jeremiah42:16 hinte yayyida olay Gibxen hintena oykana; hinte hirgida koshay hintena kaallidi baana; hinte yan Gibxen hayqana.
Jeremiah42:17 Gibxe bidi daanaw qofa qachida asa ubbay olan woyko koshan woyko boshan hayqana. Ta enta bolla ehiya iitaape issoyka kessi ekenna woyko attenna’ yaagees.
Jeremiah42:18 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah42:19 “Yihudan attidaysato
Jeremiah42:20 Hinte taako
Jeremiah42:21 Ta I gidaba ubbaa hachi hintew odas. Shin Goday hinte Xoossay ta baggara hintew kiitida qaalas kiitetonna ixideta.
Jeremiah42:22 Hiza
Jeremiah43:1 Goday enta Xoossay kiitida qaala ubbaa Ermiyaasi entaw odidi wursidaape guye
Jeremiah43:2 Hoshaya na7ay Azaariyasi
Jeremiah43:3 Shin Babiloone asay nuna wodhanaada woyko di77idi banta biitta efanaada ne nuna enta kushen aathada immana mela nena nu bolla denthiday Neera na7aa Baaroka” yaagidosona.
Jeremiah43:4 Qaraya na7ay Yohaani
Jeremiah43:5 Qaraya na7ay Yohaaninne toora moconati ubbay banta laaletida kawotethata ubbaafe Yihudan daanaw simmida Yihuda asa bantara ekidi Gibxe bidosona.
Jeremiah43:6 Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani Safaana na7aa
Jeremiah43:7 Enti Godaa kiitaa ixidi
Jeremiah43:8 Xafinaasan Godaa qaalay Ermiyaasako haysada yaagidi yis.
Jeremiah43:9 “Gita shuchata ekada
Jeremiah43:10 Entako
Jeremiah43:11 I yidi Gibxe biitta olana. Hayqos besseysati hayqana; di7etanaw besseysati di7etana; mashshan hayqanaw besseysati mashshan hayqana.
Jeremiah43:12 Gibxen de7iya eeqa xoossata keethaa tama oythana; eeqata xuuggana woyko di77ana. Henthanchoy ba itiya ma7eysada
Jeremiah43:13 I
Jeremiah44:1 Gibxen Migdoola
Jeremiah44:2 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah44:3 Hessi haniday
Jeremiah44:4 ‘Ta ixiya haysa mela iitabaa oothopite’ yaagidi odana mela zaara zaara ta aylleta
Jeremiah44:5 Gidoshin
Jeremiah44:6 Hessa gaason ta suulliya hanqoynne yiloy Yihuda katamata bollanne Yerusalaame ogetan eexis. Enti hachi hinte be7eysada laaletidosona; baysa gididosona.
Jeremiah44:7 “Ha77ika Goday
Jeremiah44:8 Hinte daanaw yida Gibxe biittan hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisidi tana ayis hanqethetii? Sa7an de7iya kawotethata ubbaa giddon baadethasinne bores attidi
Jeremiah44:9 Kase hinte aawati
Jeremiah44:10 Hinte hachi gakanaw hintenatethaa kawushibeketa; tana bonchibeeketa. Ta hintewunne hinte mayzatas immida higgiyanne woga kaallibeketa.
Jeremiah44:11 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah44:12 Yihudan attida asaa giddofe
Jeremiah44:13 Ta Yerusalaame
Jeremiah44:14 Attida Yihuda asaape Gibxe bidi de7eysati Gibxeta kushiyape polo kessi ekokona. Enti simmidi daana gidi amotiya Yihuda biitta ay asika simmenna. Guutha asape attishin
Jeremiah44:15 Enta macheti hara xoossatas ixaane cuyisethi eriya addey ubbay
Jeremiah44:16 “Neeni Godaa sunthan nuus odiyaba ubbaa nu si7oko.
Jeremiah44:17 Nu oothana gidi qopidaba ubbaa oothana. Nuuni
Jeremiah44:18 Shin Salo Kawees ixaane cuyiseysanne ushsha yarsho gusseysa aggidaape guye
Jeremiah44:19 Maccasati gujidi
Jeremiah44:20 Haysada yaagidi zaarida asa ubbaas
Jeremiah44:21 “Hintenne hinte mayzati
Jeremiah44:22 Hinte oothiya iitanne shaatiya oosuwa Goday si77i gaanaw danda7iboona gisho
Jeremiah44:23 Ha dhayo ubbay hintena gakiday
Jeremiah44:24 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah44:25 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah44:26 “Gidoshin
Jeremiah44:27 Ta enta bolla lo77oba gidonashin
Jeremiah44:28 Olape attida guutha asati Gibxefe Yihuda simmana. He wode Gibxen de7iya Yihuda asay
Jeremiah44:29 Ta hintena ha bessan seeriya wode
Jeremiah44:30 Ta Yihuda kawa Sedeqiyaasa iyaw morke gididi
Jeremiah45:1 Iyosyaasa na7ay Iyo7aqeemi Yihudan kawotida oyddantho laythan
Jeremiah45:2 “Baaroka
Jeremiah45:3 Neeni
Jeremiah45:4 Baaroka
Jeremiah45:5 Yaatin
Jeremiah46:1 Kawotethatabaa Goday Ermiyaasas odida qaalay haysa.
Jeremiah46:2 Iyo7aasa na7ay Iyo7aqeemi Yihudan kawotida oyddantho laythan
Jeremiah46:3 Hinte tooranne gondalle giigisite; olas keyite.
Jeremiah46:4 Hinte parata bixaalidi toggite; hinte huuphiyan birata barneexa wothite. Hinte bessaa bessaa oykite; hinte toora leefite; hinte ola ma7uwa ma7ite.
Jeremiah46:5 “Shin haysi ta be7ey aybee? enti yayyidi guye simmidosona. Wolqaamati xoonetidosona; guye xeellonna baqatidosona; Enta yuusho ubban dagami de7ees” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah46:6 Eesoteysi kessi ekenna; minoyka attanaw danda7enna. Pudeha baggan Efraxiisa shaafa matan
Jeremiah46:7 Haysi Nayle shaafa kixada dendey
Jeremiah46:8 Gibxey Nayle shaafada dendees; di7o haathada gupees. Gibxey
Jeremiah46:9 Parato
Jeremiah46:10 He gallasay Godaa Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa gallas
Jeremiah46:11 Geela7ee
Jeremiah46:12 Kawotethati ne yeella si7idosona; ne yeehoy biitta ubbaa kumana. Ne olanchoti issoy issuwan dhubetidi
Jeremiah46:13 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori Gibxe olanaw yaanaysa
Jeremiah46:14 Haysa Gibxen oda; Migdoolan
Jeremiah46:15 Hinte mino olanchoti ayis kundidee? Goday enta sugida gisho gidennee?
Jeremiah46:16 Olanchoti dhubetidi kundidosona; issoy issuwa
Jeremiah46:17 Enti yan Gibxe kawako
Jeremiah46:18 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa” geetetiya kawoy haysada yaagees: “Taani
Jeremiah46:19 Hinteno
Jeremiah46:20 Gibxey lo77o ussa mela; shin pudeha bagga biittafe yaa boxiyan iya saxetana.
Jeremiah46:21 Miishey cigetin oothiya olanchoti modhida wofaano mela. Enta dhayo gallasay matida gisho
Jeremiah46:22 Morkey wolqan sugidi yaa wode
Jeremiah46:23 Asay sixida wora qeexidi dhayseysada
Jeremiah46:24 Gibxe macca na7iya kawuyana; pudeha bagga asaas aadhada imetana.”
Jeremiah46:25 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah46:26 Enta shempuwa koyiya Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora kusheninne iya olanchota kushen aathada immana. Hessafe guye
Jeremiah46:27 “Ta aylliyaw
Jeremiah46:28 Ta aylliyaw
Jeremiah47:1 Gibxe kawoy Gaaza olidi oykanaape kase

Jeremiah47:3 Parata girsaa
Jeremiah47:4 Filisxeeme asa dhaysanaw

Jeremiah47:6 Hinte
Jeremiah47:7 Shin Goday iya kiittin
Jeremiah48:1 Moo7abe Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah48:2 Hizape Moo7abe ceeqoy dhayana; Haseboona katamaa asay Moo7abe bolla
Jeremiah48:3 Horonayma asay
Jeremiah48:4 Moo7abey meqeretana; iya nayti yeekiya yeehuwa si7ite!
Jeremiah48:5 Enti yeekishe
Jeremiah48:6 Issoy issoy
Jeremiah48:7 Neeni ne wolqaaninne ne duretethan ceeqetida gisho
Jeremiah48:8 Goday odidaysada
Jeremiah48:9 Moo7abey paallidi attana mela qefe immite. I katamay dhayana laattiya asika demmenna.
Jeremiah48:10 Godaa oosuwa qeli gidi oothiya uray baadetidaysa gido. Suuthu gussonna mela ba mashsha teqiya uray baadetidaysa gido!
Jeremiah48:11 “Moo7abey yalagatethafe doomidi
Jeremiah48:12 Taani otuwa gupanthesata kiittiya wodey yaana. Enti iya gussana; otuwape xiizo dhaysana; otuwa mentherethana.
Jeremiah48:13 Isra7eele asay ba ammanetida
Jeremiah48:14 “Hinte
Jeremiah48:15 Heko
Jeremiah48:16 Moo7abe dhayoy matatis; iya laaletetha wodey ellesidi gakis.
Jeremiah48:17 Iya yuushuwan de7iya asay
Jeremiah48:18 “Hinteno
Jeremiah48:19 Aro7eera kataman de7eysato
Jeremiah48:20 Enti
Jeremiah48:21 “Gezzen de7iya Holona
Jeremiah48:22 Diboona
Jeremiah48:23 Qiratayma
Jeremiah48:24 Qiriyootanne
Jeremiah48:25 Moo7abe kacey qanxetis; iya qesey meqis.”
Jeremiah48:26 Godaa bolla otortida gisho
Jeremiah48:27 Kase ne Isra7eele bolla qelqisabikii? Iyabaa haasaya wode kadhada huuphe qaathiday Isra7eeley kaysotara oyketida gishoyee?
Jeremiah48:28 Hinteno
Jeremiah48:29 Moo7abey daro otortis; Moo7abey ay mela ba ganna gabbisidaako
Jeremiah48:30 Ta enta ceequwa erayis; shin aykoka maaddenna; enta otoroy aykoka oothenna.
Jeremiah48:31 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah48:32 Hinteno
Jeremiah48:33 Ufaysinne Lo77obay ayfiya Moo7abe biittafe eketis. Woyne gum7iya bessaafe woyney goggonnaada teqas. Oonika ililishe woyne gum7enna. Si7etiya girsi de7ikoka ufaysa girsi gidenna.
Jeremiah48:34 Enti Haseboonaninne Eliyaalan waassiya waasoy Yahaaxa gakanaw si7etees. Zo7aarape bidi Horonaymanne Eglaat-Shalisha gakanaw si7etees. Hari attoshin
Jeremiah48:35 Taani Moo7abepe dhoqa bessatan goyinnesatanne banta xoossatas ixaane cuyiseyisata dhaysana.
Jeremiah48:36 “Enti kase demmida duretethay ha77i dhayida gisho
Jeremiah48:37 Enti banta huuphiyanne banta buuchaa meedidosona; banta kushiya qanxidi madunxisidosona; banta xeessan kayo ma7o dancidosona.
Jeremiah48:38 Taani Moo7abe oonika koyonna otoda menthida gisho
Jeremiah48:39 Moo7abey aybi meqo meqide! Iya asay aybi waaso waassi! Moo7abe waani yeellatidi
Jeremiah48:40 Arganthi ba qefiya miccidi yeysada morkey Moo7abe bolla yaana.
Jeremiah48:41 Iya katamati oyketana; iya miixati eketana. He gallas Moo7abe mino olanchota wozanay iqethi oykida maccasa wozana mela un7etana.
Jeremiah48:42 Moo7abe ta bolla makallida gisho dhayana; hizape guye kawotethi gididi deenna.
Jeremiah48:43 Moo7abe asaw
Jeremiah48:44 Daganthiyabaape baqatiya oonika ollan kundana; ollafe keyiya oonika xihen oyketana. Taani Moo7abe seeriya wode hessa oothana.
Jeremiah48:45 “Baqatidi bidaysati wolqa dhayidi
Jeremiah48:46 Moo7abe asaw
Jeremiah48:47 Gidoshin
Jeremiah49:1 Amoonebaa Goday haysada yaagees; “Isra7eeles adde na7i baawee? Iya laattey baawee? Yaatin
Jeremiah49:2 Amoone biittan Raaba katamaa bolla ola waasoy si7etana mela ta oothana wodey yaana. He katamay laaletidi baysa gidana. Iya yuushuwan de7iya gutati taman xuugetana. Isra7eeley bana ba biittafe gooddidaysata gooddana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah49:3 “Haseboona asaw
Jeremiah49:4 Ammanoy bayna asaw
Jeremiah49:5 Ta ne yuushuwan de7eysati nena daganthana mela oothana” yaagees Goday
Jeremiah49:6 “Gidoshin
Jeremiah49:7 Edoomeba Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; “Temaana asaas de7iya cincatethay aw bidee? Zoreysatape zorey dhayidee? Enta cincatethay entafe eketidee?
Jeremiah49:8 Taani Eesawe kochaa seeriya wode iya bolla dhayo ehana gisho
Jeremiah49:9 Woyne maxeysati poshile ashshokona? Kaysoti qamma geliko
Jeremiah49:10 Shin ta Eesawa kochaa qaarada kallo ashshana; enti qosetanaw danda7onna mela
Jeremiah49:11 Hinte giddon de7iya yi7o nayta aggaagite; enta ta dichana. Hinte am7etika tanan ammaneto” yaagees.
Jeremiah49:12 Goday haysada yaagees; “Hiza seera ekanaw bessonna asas seeretethi attonnaba gidiko
Jeremiah49:13 Baasora katamay baysa gididi attana; iya be7ida asa ubbaas dagamas
Jeremiah49:14 Taani Godaape yida issi kiita si7as. Kawotethata giddo kiitetidaysi
Jeremiah49:15 “Hiza
Jeremiah49:16 Shucha qophoninne dere bolla de7eyso
Jeremiah49:17 “Edoomey ase daganthiya biitta gidana. Yaara aadhiya asa ubbay iya dhayuwa be7idi
Jeremiah49:18 Soodomeynne Gamoori banta yuushuwan de7iya katamatara dhayiya wode hanidaysada oonika yan deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah49:19 “Yordaanose shaafa lanqen de7iya woraape dorsati heemetiya lo77o qooroy de7iya bessaa
Jeremiah49:20 “Ta Edoome bollanne Temaana katamaa bolla oothanaw halchidabanne qopidaba si7ite. Enta nayta wolqan goochidi efana; hessa gaason enta soo asay dagammana.
Jeremiah49:21 Edoome kundethaa girsay biitta qaathana; Edoometa waasoy Zo7o Abbaa gakanaw si7etana.
Jeremiah49:22 Arganthi ba qefiya miccidi duge paallidi yeysada
Jeremiah49:23 Damasqoba Goday haysada yaagees; “Iita oda si7ida gisho
Jeremiah49:24 Damasqoy daaburis; enti dagaman kokoridi baqatidosona; maccas iqethi oykeysada metoynne un7i enta oykis.
Jeremiah49:25 Ufaysi kumida eretida katamay waanidi baysa gididee?
Jeremiah49:26 He wode he kataman de7iya yalaga addeti katamaa giddo ogetan hayqana; olanchoti ubbay wurana.
Jeremiah49:27 Taani Damasqo katama dirsa gimbiyan tama yeddana; he tamay Wolde-Adara miixa maana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Jeremiah49:28 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori olidi xoonida Qedaarenne Haxoora kawotethatabaa Goday haysada yaagees; “Dendidi
Jeremiah49:29 Enta dunkaanetanne enta wudeta ekite. Enta gesheta
Jeremiah49:30 Haxooran de7eysato
Jeremiah49:31 “Dendada; hirgi bayna saro de7iya kawotethata ola. Enta katama gimbiyas ibithi woyko kobey baawa; enti bantarka de7oosona.
Jeremiah49:32 “Enta gimaleti bonqetana; enta wudey di7etana. Banta huuphiya gaxaa meedeyisata carkon laallana; ta ubba bessara enta bolla dhayo ehana.
Jeremiah49:33 Haxoori merinaw workanati de7iya mela biitta gidana. Oonika yan deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah49:34 Yihuda kawoy Sedeqiyaasi koyro kawotida wode
Jeremiah49:35 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees; “Elaamas wolqa gidida donge dukiya asata ta wodhana.
Jeremiah49:36 Ubba bessara ta Elama bolla carko ehana; enta he carkuwan laallana. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah49:37 Enta morketa sinthaninne enta wodhanaw koyeyisata sinthan ta Elama daganthana. Ta gita hanquwan enta bolla dhayo ehana. Ta enta dhaysana gakanaw mashshan yedethana.
Jeremiah49:38 Taani Elama kawanne enta halaqata dhaysada ta araata yan wothana.
Jeremiah49:39 Gidoshin
Jeremiah50:1 Babiloonenne Babiloone asaaba nabiya Ermiyaasa baggara Goday odida qaalay haysa:
Jeremiah50:2 “Kawotethata giddon oditenne awaajite. Bandira dhoqu oothi oykidi
Jeremiah50:3 Pudeha baggafe issi kawotethi yidi
Jeremiah50:4 “He wodenne he gallas Isra7eeleynne Yihudi issife yeekishe yidi Godaa banta Xoossaa koyana.
Jeremiah50:5 Enti Xiyoone efiya ogiya oychana; banta som7uwa yaa zaarana. Enti
Jeremiah50:6 “Ta asay dhayida dorsa mela; enta henthanchoti enta balethidi
Jeremiah50:7 Demmida ubbay enta shankatis. Enta morketi
Jeremiah50:8 “Isra7eele asaw
Jeremiah50:9 Taani pudeha baggafe gita kawotethata cugaa denthada
Jeremiah50:10 Babilooney bonqetana; iya bonqiya ubbay kallana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah50:11 Babiloone asaw
Jeremiah50:12 Shin ha77i hinte gita katamay yeellatananne kawuyana. Kawotethata giddon Babilooney ubbaafe laafa gidana; haathi bayna mela biitta gidana.
Jeremiah50:13 Godaa hanquwa gaason
Jeremiah50:14 “Donge dukeysato
Jeremiah50:15 Ubba baggara Babiloone bolla ola waaso waassite; Babilooney kushe immis; iya gimbeti kundidosona; iya gimbe dirsay laaletis. Goday iya bolla halo keyishe de7iya gisho
Jeremiah50:16 Zerethi zereysanne caka wode baacara keyeysa Babiloonepe dhaysite. Dhayseysata mashshaa yayyida gisho
Jeremiah50:17 “Isra7eeley gaammoy yedethidi laallida dorsaa mela. Koyro Asoore kawoy iya ashuwa mis; wursethan Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori iya meqethaa dhoggis.”
Jeremiah50:18 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah50:19 Shin Isra7eele
Jeremiah50:20 He wode
Jeremiah50:21 “Miraatayma biittaninne Piqodan de7iya asaa bolla dendidi enta olite; wodhite; enta polo dhaysite. Ta hintena kiittiya ubbaa oothite” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah50:22 Biitta bolla ola waasoy si7etees; gita dhayoy gakis.
Jeremiah50:23 Biitta ubbaa liiqisiya naariqay waanidi meqide! Waanidi liiqide! Kawotethata ubbaa giddon Babilooney waanidi daganthiyaba gidide!
Jeremiah50:24 Neno
Jeremiah50:25 Taani ta ola miishiya wothiya keethaa dooyada
Jeremiah50:26 Yaara haara iya bolla dendite; kathay de7iya iya shaaliya dooyite; di7uwa kathada doorite; Aybibaaka ashshona wursidi dhaysite.
Jeremiah50:27 Booru shukeysada enta olanchota wodhite. Babiloone asay seeretiya wodey gakida gisho enta ayye!
Jeremiah50:28 “Di7etida asay Babiloonepe kessi ekidi
Jeremiah50:29 Babiloone olanaw donge dukiya ubbaa xeegite; issoyka kessi ekonnaada iya yuushuwa teqo. Godaa bolla
Jeremiah50:30 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah50:31 Goday
Jeremiah50:32 Otoranchoy dhubetidi kundana; iya denthiya asi deenna. Ta iya katamata taman oythana; he tamay yuushuwan de7iya ubba dhaysana” yaagees.
Jeremiah50:33 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Isra7eele asaynne Yihuda asay un7etidosona. Enta di77idi efidaysati enta minthidi oykidosona; enta yeddenaw koybookona.
Jeremiah50:34 Shin enta Wozeysi mino; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa. I
Jeremiah50:35 Babilooney
Jeremiah50:36 “Iya eeya wordo nabeti mashshan hayqonna. Dagammiya iya wolqaama olanchoti mashshan hayqana.
Jeremiah50:37 Iya parata bolla
Jeremiah50:38 Babiloonen eeqi kumida gishonne dagamman kokoriya eeqati de7iya gisho; iya haathay melo; iya bolla koshi yo.
Jeremiah50:39 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah50:40 Xoossay beni Soodomenne Gamoora enta yuushuwan de7iya katamatara dhaysidaysada Babiloonen oonika deenna; asi yan uttenna” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah50:41 “Heko
Jeremiah50:42 Enti banta dongiyanne toora oykidosona; enti wozana minonne yeddi maaronna asi. Enti banta para toggidi biya wode
Jeremiah50:43 “Babiloone kawoy hessa si7iya wode iya kushey daaburidi silis; iqethi oykida maccasada un7etis.
Jeremiah50:44 “Yordaanose shaafa lanqen de7iya woraape
Jeremiah50:45 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah50:46 Babiloone kundethaa girsay biitta qaathana; Babiloone waasoy kawotethata ubban si7etana” yaagees.
Jeremiah51:1 Babiloone asaanne Babiloone biitta dhaysiya carko kiittana.
Jeremiah51:2 Taani Babiloone bolla carkoda punniya allagata kiittana. Iya dhayuwa gallas enti ubba bessara iya un7ethana.
Jeremiah51:3 Iya olanchoti dongiya dukana gakanaw woyko banta ola miishiya dancana gakanaw naagopite. Iya yalaga addetas mishetopite; iya olanchota polo dhaysite.
Jeremiah51:4 Enti Babiloone biittan shuketana; I dabaaban cadetidi kundana.
Jeremiah51:5 Enti biitta nagaran kunthikoka
Jeremiah51:6 Babiloonepe baqatite; issoy issoy ba shempuwa ashsho. I oothida nagaraa gaason hinte wuropite. Ha wodey taani Goday halo keyiya wode.
Jeremiah51:7 Babilooney sa7an de7iya asa ubbay uyidi mathotiya
Jeremiah51:8 Babilooney qoponna kundidi meqis. Hessa gisho
Jeremiah51:9 Babiloonen de7iya allaga asay
Jeremiah51:10 Isra7eele asay
Jeremiah51:11 “Goday Babiloone dhaysanaw qofa qachida gisho
Jeremiah51:12 Babiloone bolla ola bandira denthite; minthidi naagite. Wocheyisata enta bessan bessan wothite; zugidi caddiya olanchota giigisite’ ” yaagidosona. Goday Babiloone asa bolla qopidabaanne ba gida ba oothana.
Jeremiah51:13 Babiloone
Jeremiah51:14 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah51:15 Goday ba wolqan sa7aa medhis; ba cincatethan biitta baasis; salota ba akeekan miccis.
Jeremiah51:16 I kiittiya wode
Jeremiah51:17 Asi ubbay eeyanne akeeki baynaysa; enta misileti wordonne shempoy baynayisata gidiya gisho
Jeremiah51:18 He misileti pathonaysatanne kedhetidaysata; enta bolla Xoossay pirdiya wode enti dhayana.
Jeremiah51:19 Shin Yayqooba Xoossay enta mela gidenna; ubbaba medhiday iya. I baw doorida kochay Isra7eele asaa; iya sunthay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa.
Jeremiah51:20 “Babiloone
Jeremiah51:21 Nena go7etada paratanne para toggeyisata; para gaaretanne enta laaggeyisata mentherethas.
Jeremiah51:22 Nena go7etada maccanne adde
Jeremiah51:23 Henthanchuwanne iya wudiya
Jeremiah51:24 “Babilooneynne Babiloone asay Xiyoone bolla oothida iita oosuwa gisho hinte xeellishin ta halo keyana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah51:25 “Neno
Jeremiah51:26 Neepe baason yeggiya woyko gimbees eketiya shuchi deenna; ne merinaw baysa gidana” yaagees Goday.
Jeremiah51:27 “Babiloone bolla ola bandira denthite; asa giddon moyze punnite. Iya olanaw asaa ubbaa giigisite; Araraate
Jeremiah51:28 Babiloone olanaw kawotethata ubbaa giigisite; Meedona kawota
Jeremiah51:29 “Babilooney oonika doonna baysa oothanaw Goday halchida halchuwa poliya gisho
Jeremiah51:30 Babiloone olanchoti ola aggidi
Jeremiah51:31 Ha gaxape hini gaxa gakanaw
Jeremiah51:32 Shaafara pinniya bessati oyketidaysa
Jeremiah51:33 “Babiloone biittay kathi bukiya wudumma gidana; guutha wodepe guye I caketiya wodey yaana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Jeremiah51:34 Babiloone kawoy Nabukadanaxoori nuna wursidi mis; nu katamaa kaysa oto kessis. Dawey mitteysada iya mittis; mal7oba midi kuntheysada I nu shaluwan ba ganjiya kunthis; attidaysa mucidi cuttis.
Jeremiah51:35 Xiyooney
Jeremiah51:36 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah51:37 Babilooney laaletha doorenne workanati gupiya bessi gidana. Iya be7iya ubbay dagammananne qelqisana; yan issi asika deenna.
Jeremiah51:38 Babiloone asa ubbay gaammoda gudoosona; gaammo marada daarosona.
Jeremiah51:39 Enta asatethay ho77iya wode
Jeremiah51:40 Shukanaw efiya urgeda
Jeremiah51:41 “Asa ubbay sabbiya Babilooney waanidi oyketide! Babilooney kawotethata giddon waanidi daganthiyaba gidide!
Jeremiah51:42 Babiloone morketi abba beetay dendeysada dendidi kataman eellidosona.
Jeremiah51:43 Iya katamati laaletidi
Jeremiah51:44 Beella geetetiya Babiloone eeqa ta seerana; I mittidaba iya uluwape kessana. Hizape guye
Jeremiah51:45 “Ta asaw
Jeremiah51:46 Biittan odetiya odaa si7iya wode ufaysi qanxofitenne yayyofite. Laythan laythan odi kaallidi kaallidi yaana. He wode kawoy kawa bolla dendiya makalla odi biittan si7etana.”
Jeremiah51:47 “Hessa gisho
Jeremiah51:48 Pudeha baggafe yaana dhayseysata kushen Babilooney geliya wode saloninne sa7an de7iya ubbabay ililana.
Jeremiah51:49 Babilooney
Jeremiah51:50 Ta asaw
Jeremiah51:51 Hinte
Jeremiah51:52 Shin “Taani Goday Babiloone eeqata seeriya wodey yaana. Madunxidaysati biitta ubban oolana.
Jeremiah51:53 Babilooney salo pude keyidi
Jeremiah51:54 “Babiloonen waasoy
Jeremiah51:55 Goday Babiloone dhaysana; iya wolqaama girsa si77i oothana. Abba beetada guummiya morketi olishe ceeqetana.
Jeremiah51:56 Dhayseysati Babiloone bolla yaana; iya olanchoti oyketana; enta dongey meqana. Taani Goday halo keyiya Xoosse gidiya gisho
Jeremiah51:57 Iya halaqata
Jeremiah51:58 “Gita Babiloone gimbey kundana; iya adussa pengeti taman xuugetana. Asay oothidaba ubbay hada; kawotethati daaburiyabay tamasa” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Jeremiah51:59 Maseya na7aa
Jeremiah51:60 Babiloone bolla gakanaw de7iya iitaba ubbaanne Babiloone xeelliya haraba ubbaa Ermiyaasi maxaafan xaafis.
Jeremiah51:61 Sarayako
Jeremiah51:62 Qassi haysada yaagada woossa: ‘Abeeti Godaw
Jeremiah51:63 Ha maxaafa nabbaba wursidaape guye
Jeremiah51:64 Taani Goday iya bolla ehiya dhayuwa gaason
Jeremiah52:1 Sedeqiyaasi kawotiya wode
Jeremiah52:2 Iyo7aqeemi oothidaysada Sedeqiyaasi Godaa sinthan iitabaa oothis.
Jeremiah52:3 Goday Yerusalaame bollanne Yihuda bolla hanqetida gisho enta ba sinthafe diggis. Sedeqiyaasi Babiloone kawa bolla makallis.
Jeremiah52:4 Sedeqiyaasi kawotida uddufuntho laythan
Jeremiah52:5 Sedeqiyaasi kawotida tammanne issintho laythi gakanaw
Jeremiah52:6 He laythi oyddantho ageenan
Jeremiah52:7 Katama gimbey issi baggara meqis. Babiloone asay katamaa yuushuwa naagikoka
Jeremiah52:8 Shin Babiloone olanchoti kawa Sedeqiyaasa yedethidi
Jeremiah52:9 Hessafe guye
Jeremiah52:10 Sedeqiyaasa adde nayta Sedeqiyaasi xeellishin
Jeremiah52:11 Sedeqiyaasa ayfeta woocidi
Jeremiah52:12 Nabukadanaxoori Babiloonen kawotida tammanne uddufuntho laythan
Jeremiah52:13 Xoossa keethaa
Jeremiah52:14 Babiloone olanchoti ubbay kawa naageysata halaqaa kiitan
Jeremiah52:15 Nabuzardaani guutha manqota
Jeremiah52:16 Shin Nabuzardaani manqotape guutha asaa woyne tokanaadanne gade goyanaada Yihudan aggis.
Jeremiah52:17 Babilooneti Xoossa keetha karen eqida naase birata tuuqeta
Jeremiah52:18 Kereta
Jeremiah52:19 Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani worqafenne birape oosetida disteta
Jeremiah52:20 Kawoy Solomoney Xoossa keethan oosetiyabas medhida nam7u tuussati
Jeremiah52:21 Nam7u tuussati issi mela gididi
Jeremiah52:22 Nam7u tuussata huuphiyan naasepe oosetida gumboti de7oosona. Issi gumbuwa geesay ichashu wadha gididi
Jeremiah52:23 Gumbotas miyen miyen de7iya oromaaneta misileti uddufun tammanne usupuna; yuushuwan de7iya gite misiletape bolla baggara de7iya oromaane misileti issi xeeta.
Jeremiah52:24 Kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani kahine halaqaa Saraya
Jeremiah52:25 Kataman de7iya asaape toora mocona
Jeremiah52:26 Nabuzardaani enta ubbaa ekidi
Jeremiah52:27 Hamaata biittan
Jeremiah52:28 Nabukadanaxoori kawotida laapuntho laythan
Jeremiah52:29 Tammanne hospuntho laythan hospun xeetanne hastamanne nam7u asay Yerusalaamepe di7etis.
Jeremiah52:30 Nabukadanaxoori kawotida laatamanne heedzantho laythan kawa naageysata halaqay Nabuzardaani laapun xeetanne oytamanne ichashu asaa di77is. Di7etida asa tayboy oyddu mukulunne usupun xeeta.
Jeremiah52:31 Yo7akini di7etida hastamanne laapuntha laythan
Jeremiah52:32 Yoor-Marodaaki Yo7akinara mal7o qaala odetidi
Jeremiah52:33 Hessa gisho
Jeremiah52:34 Yo7akini hayqana gakanaw
Lamentations1:1 Kase asi kumida katamiya ha77i waanada asi bayna bessi gidadee? Kase kawotethata giddon gita gididaara ha77i waanada am7o gidadee? Katamata giddon kawo gididaara ha77i waanada aylle gidadee?
Lamentations1:2 Qamma yibbata yeeho yeekashe aqawusu; afuthi I ayfe karera duge wodhees. Kase iyo doseysatape ha77i iyo minthethiya issoyka baawa. I laggeti iyo aathidi immidosona; iw morke gididosona.
Lamentations1:3 Yihudi naaqetada; aylletada di7etasu; ha77i kawotethata giddon de7awusu; shin shempo bessi demmabuku. Iya metootada de7ishin
Lamentations1:4 Laytha ba7aale bonchanaw yaa asi bayna gisho
Lamentations1:5 I morketi iw godaa gididosona; entaw injetin de7idosona. I
Lamentations1:6 Xiyooni bonchoy iipe qaaretis; I
Lamentations1:7 Yerusalaamey ba metuwanne ba un7a gallasan
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalaamey gita nagara oothida gisho tunasu; iyo bonchida ubbay I kalluwa be7ida gisho kadhees; iya oolashe guye simmasu.
Lamentations1:9 Tunatethi I afilaa bolla bentis; sinthafe ba bolla yaanaba qopabuuku. I kundethay daganthiyaba gidis; iyo minthethiya oonika baawa. Iya
Lamentations1:10 Morketi I boncho shaluwa bonqidosona; kase ne maabara giddo gelonna mela
Lamentations1:11 I asati koshatidi kathi demmanaw oolosona; enti de7on daanaw banta shaluwa kathan laammoosona. Yerusalaamey haysada yaagasu; Abeeti Godaw
Lamentations1:12 Hinteno
Lamentations1:13 Bollafe tama duge yeddis; he tamay ta meqethaa giddo gelis. Ta tohoy xihen oyketis; tana guye zaaris; tana gallas ubbaa labbanthidi yeggi aggis.
Lamentations1:14 Ta oothida nagara ubbaa shiishi qachidi
Lamentations1:15 Goday ta giddon de7iya wolqaama olanchota ubbaa diggis. Ta yalagata dhaysanaw wode qachis; woyne yedheysada
Lamentations1:16 Taani yeekashe ta afuthaa gussey hessasa; tana minthetheynne katisiya oonika baawa; morkey goobin
Lamentations1:17 Xiyooney ba kushiya miccasu; shin iyo minthethiya oonika baawa. I yuushuwan de7eysati iyo morkanaada Goday oothis. Yerusalaamey enta giddon tuna gidasu.
Lamentations1:18 Iya haysada yaagasu; “Goday xillo; iya kiitetonna ixiday tana. Hinteno
Lamentations1:19 Ta laggeta xeegas; shin enti tana cimmidosona; kahinetinne cimati banta shempuwa ashshanaw
Lamentations1:20 Abeeti Godaw
Lamentations1:21 Asay ta zelelsa si7idosona; shin tana minthethiya issi asika baawa. Ta morketi ta metuwa si7idosona; ne ta bolla oothidaban ufaytidosona. Enti taada hanana mela
Lamentations1:22 Enta iitatetha ubbay ne sinthe gako; ta nagaraa gisho tana seeridaysada entaka seera; ta zelelsay daris; ta wozanayka meqis.”
Lamentations2:1 Goday ba hanqo shaarape garsan
Lamentations2:2 Goday Yihudan keethata ubbaa qadhetonna dhaysis; ba hanquwan Yihuda biitta miixaa ubbaa laallis; he kawotethaanne halaqata sa7an duge yeggidi kawushis.
Lamentations2:3 Ba wolqaama hanquwan Isra7eele wolqaa mentherethis; morkey iya olanaw yaa wode Goday ba ushacha kushiya enta bollafe diggis. Ba yuushuwan de7iyaba ubbaa miya tamada
Lamentations2:4 Morkeda I ba dongiya enta bolla dafis; un7ethiya iya ushacha kushey giigis. Ayfees lo77iya asa ubbaa wodhis; Xiyoone bolla ba sheniya tamada qolis.
Lamentations2:5 Goday morkeda hanidi
Lamentations2:6 Ba keetha atakilte gaden de7iya shaqarada shoddidi holis; laytha ba7aaletinne Sambaatati dogetanaada oothis; ba gita hanquwan kawanne kahiniya kawushis.
Lamentations2:7 Goday ba yarsho bessa kadhis; ba keethaa aggaagis; kawo gadhota gimbiya morketa kushen yeggis. Laytha ba7aale bonchiya gallasa wocamada
Lamentations2:8 Goday Xiyooni na7e dirsa gimbiya
Lamentations2:9 Yerusalaame penge sanqati biittan moogetidosona; enta gorde mithata mentherethidi dhaysis. Kawoynne moorinnati di7etidi kawotethata giddo bidosona; higge tamaarsey baawa; nabetika hizape guye qoncethi be7okona.
Lamentations2:10 Xiyoone cimati si77i gidi biittan uttidosona; banta huuphen baana qolidi kayo ma7o ma7idosona; Yerusalaame geela7oti sa7an duge hokidosona.
Lamentations2:11 Ta asay dhayida gisho
Lamentations2:12 Enti banta aayetako
Lamentations2:13 Yerusalaame naatte
Lamentations2:14 Ne nabeti wordonne pathonna qoncethi be7idosona; ne di7etonna mela ne nagaraa qoncisidi odibookona; enti balethiya wordo qoncethi new be7idosona.
Lamentations2:15 Ne matara aadhiya ubbay ba kushiya baqees; “Biittan ubbaafe aadhada lo77iya katamiya hanno? Biitta ubbaas ufaysi geetetida katamiya hanno?” yaagidi nena qelqisishe banta huuphiya qaathidosona.
Lamentations2:16 Ne morketi ubbay banta doona ne bolla dooyidosona; ne bolla qelqisidosona. Banta achaa qarcishe haysada yaagosona; nu enta dhaysida
Lamentations2:17 Goday ba qopidaba oothis; kase odida ba qaala polis. Yerusalaames qadhetonna iyo laallis I morketi ufaytana mela
Lamentations2:18 Xiyoone
Lamentations2:19 Qamma dendada waassa; Godaa sinthan ne wozanaa haathada gussa. Koshatidi oge doonan kundida ne nayta shempuwas ne kushiya iyako pude denthada woossa!
Lamentations2:20 Abeeti Godaw
Lamentations2:21 Ciminne na7atethi oge bolla kundidosona; geela7otinne panthati mashshan wuridosona. Neeni ne hanquwa gallas enta wodhadasa; entaw qadhetonna enta buthadasa.
Lamentations2:22 Gibira gallas ase xeegeysada

Lamentations3:49 Ta ayfey aggonna afuxees.
Lamentations3:50 Goday salope duge be7ana gakanaw hessi hanees.

Lamentations3:63 Enti uttishenne eqishe tana boridi yexoosona.

Lamentations4:1 Worqey phooleysa waanidi aggidee? geeshsha worqay waanidi dammidee? Xoossa keethay gimbetida shuchay oge doonan laaletis.
Lamentations4:2 Kase al7o worqa mela bonchetida Xiyoone nayti ha77i biittafe medhetida oto gididosona.
Lamentations4:3 Hari attoshin worakani ba mari dhanthawusu; shin ta asay bazzon de7iya yanchoda
Lamentations4:4 Saamo gaason yooga nayta inxarsay kottonora oyketis; nayti kathi woossosona; shin entaw immiya oonika baawa.
Lamentations4:5 Kase mal7o katha xalaala meysati ha77i oge doonan koshan wuridosona. Kase liino ma7idi diccidaysati ha77i bido bolla zin7idosona.
Lamentations4:6 Ta asaa nagaray
Lamentations4:7 Yihuda halaqati shachafe aadhida geeshshi
Lamentations4:8 Shin ha77i enta som7oy shaalape aadhidi kareexis; asasi ogen enta be7idi erenna; enta gogay meqethaara oyketidi mithada melis.
Lamentations4:9 Miyaba dhayidi
Lamentations4:10 Ta asaa bolla yida dhayuwa gaason
Lamentations4:11 Godaa hanqo xuu7ay kumis; I ba suulliya sheniya tigis. Yerusalaame baasuwa tama oythis.
Lamentations4:12 Ha sa7a kawotape woyko kawotethatan de7iya asaape oonika morkey Yerusalaame pengiyara gelana gidi ammanibena.
Lamentations4:13 Shin haysi haniday iya nabetinne nagarasinne iya kahineti oothida naaquwasa
Lamentations4:14 Enti qooqe asada
Lamentations4:15 Hessa gisho
Lamentations4:16 Goday enta laallis; I entaba zaaridi qopenna; enta kahineti bonchetokona; enta cimati nashetookona.
Lamentations4:17 Nu ayfey maado demmanaw xeellishe coo daaburis; nuna ashshanaw danda7onna kawotethatape maado naagida.
Lamentations4:18 Asay nu gedaa kaalliya gisho
Lamentations4:19 Nuna yedetheysati piradhiya arganthafe aadhidi eesotoosona; enti nuna dere huuphera yedethidosona; bazzon hokidi nuna naagidosona.
Lamentations4:20 Goday tiyida kawoy
Lamentations4:21 Hinteno
Lamentations4:22 Hinteno
Lamentations5:1 Abeeti Godaw
Lamentations5:2 Nu laatay allagatas
Lamentations5:3 Nuuni aawi hayqida na7a gidida; nu aayetika am7o gididosona.
Lamentations5:4 Nuuni ushsha haatha shammidi ekoos; eethiya mithas gate qanxoos.
Lamentations5:5 Nuna yedetheysati nu gindiya garsana; nu daaburida shin shempanaw danda7ibooko.
Lamentations5:6 Nuuni kathi kallana gidi
Lamentations5:7 Nagara oothiday nu mayzata
Lamentations5:8 Nuna aylleti haaroosona; enta kushepe nuna ashshiya oonika baawa.
Lamentations5:9 Mashshan wodheysati bazzon de7iya gisho
Lamentations5:10 Iita kosha gaason
Lamentations5:11 Maccasata Xiyoonen geela7ota Yihuda katamatan wolqan oykidi tunisidosona.
Lamentations5:12 Halaqata efidi kaqidosona; cimati bonchetibookona.
Lamentations5:13 Yalaga addeti woxan gaaccidosona; adde nayti deexo mithi tookidi gandigaridosona.
Lamentations5:14 Cimati katama pengen pirdanaw utteysa aggidosona; yalaga addeti nayti yethi dogidosona.
Lamentations5:15 Nu wozanaape ufaysi kichis; nu dursay yeehon laametis.
Lamentations5:16 Nu huuphiyape kallachay kundis; nu nagara oothida gisho nuna ayye!

Lamentations5:18 Xiyoone Derey baysa gidida gisho

Lamentations5:20 Neeni nuna ayis ubba wode dogay? haysa mela adussa wode nuna ayis aggay?
Lamentations5:21 Abeeti Godaw
Lamentations5:22 Neeni nuna polo aggadiyee? Ne hanquwas zawi baaweyee?
Ezekiel1:1 Hastamantho laythan
Ezekiel1:2 Kawoy Yo7akini di7etida ichashantho laythan
Ezekiel1:3 Kaldaaweta biittan Koboora shaafa matan de7iya taako
Ezekiel1:4 Ta xeelliya wode gotey pudeha baggafe yishin be7as; wolqaama shaara giddofe wol7anthi bentees; iya yuushuwan de7iya saloy poo7is. Tama giddo baggay phooliya naase birata daanees.
Ezekiel1:5 Iya giddon oyddu de7on de7iya medhetethati de7oosona. Enta malay asa mala daanees.
Ezekiel1:6 Enta issuwas issuwas oyddu oyddu som7oynne oyddu oyddu qefey de7ees.
Ezekiel1:7 Enta geday sitti gis; enta tohoy mehe qincafile mela; he tohoti quchidi geeshshida naase biratada phoolees.
Ezekiel1:8 Enta qefiyape garsara oyddu baggara asa kushe daaniya kushey de7ees. He oyddu medhetethatas som7oynne qefey de7ees.
Ezekiel1:9 Enta qefey issoy issuwa bochees; enti ubbay yaa haa simmonna sitti gidi sinthe boosona.
Ezekiel1:10 Enta issuwas issuwas sintha baggara asa som7oy de7ees; ushacha baggara gaammo som7oy de7ees; haddirsa baggara boora som7oy de7ees; guye baggara argantha som7oy de7ees.
Ezekiel1:11 Enta qefey dhoqu gidi micetidi uttis; enta issuwa issuwa nam7u qefey nam7u baggara hanko medhetethata qefey bochees; nam7u qefey enta asatethaa kammees.
Ezekiel1:12 Enti ubbay sitti gidi sinthe boosona; yaa haa simmonna
Ezekiel1:13 Ha de7on de7iya medhetethata giddon issi eexiya tama bonqo daaneysi de7ees. He tamay sinthenne guye qaaxiya
Ezekiel1:14 Ha de7on de7iya medhetethati wol7anthada sinthenne guye eeson simeretoosona.
Ezekiel1:15 Heko
Ezekiel1:16 Ha gertoti al7o shuchada phoolosona; enti oydday medhoninne malan issoy issuwa daanosona. Issi gertoy hanko gertuwa giddora kanthidi aadhidaba daanees.
Ezekiel1:17 Enti biya wode oyddu baggafe awu simmidi baaneko yaa haa simmonna boosona.
Ezekiel1:18 Gitanne yashshiya oyddu gertoti de7oosona; he gertotas gaxi de7ees; he gaxaa yuushoy ayfen kumidi uttis.
Ezekiel1:19 Ha medhetethati biya wode
Ezekiel1:20 Ayyaanay biya awuka enti dendidi boosona. Hessi haney
Ezekiel1:21 De7o Ayyaanay gertota giddon de7iya gisho
Ezekiel1:22 De7on de7iya medhetethata huuphe soope bolla baggara mastooteda phoolidi ayfe caddiya salo gufantho daaniyabay micetidi de7ees.
Ezekiel1:23 He salo gufanthuwafe garsa baggara enta qefey sitti gidi
Ezekiel1:24 Medhetethati paalliya wode enta qefiya girsay haatha kixa guunthada
Ezekiel1:25 Enti banta qefiya shiishi ekidi
Ezekiel1:26 Salo gufanthuwafe bolla baggara sanpare geetetiya al7o shuchafe medhetida araata daaneysi de7ees; araata daaneysa bolla ase daaneysi uttis.
Ezekiel1:27 Taani iya be7iya wode iyaw xeesse daaneysafe bolla baggay taman de7iya naase biratada phoolees. Iyape garsa baggay tama daanees; iya yuushon phooliya poo7oy de7ees.
Ezekiel1:28 Iya yuushuwan de7iya phooliya poo7oy ira wode shaaran eqiya zuulla daanees. Haysi Godaa boncho qoncethaa daanees. Taani hessa be7ida wode biittan duge gufannada issi qaala girsi si7as.

Ezekiel2:10 I ta sinthan he xaatha maxaafa billis; he maxaafas nam7u baggara yeehoy

Ezekiel3:2 Hessa gisho

Ezekiel3:7 Isra7eele asay ta odiyaba si7anaw koyonna gisho
Ezekiel3:8 Shin taani nena entada wozana muumenne yeelli baynaysa oothana.
Ezekiel3:9 Taani nena yashshi baynanne zaallafe aadhida mino oothana. Enti makallancho gidikoka
Ezekiel3:10 Gujidi Xoossay

Ezekiel4:1 “Neno asa na7aw
Ezekiel4:2 Katamaa yuushuwa dira; iya biitta doora; miixa keetha; olanchoti uttiya bessi giigisa; gimbiya laaliya duruma iya yuushon giigisa.
Ezekiel4:3 Birata bashe ekada
Ezekiel4:4 “Isra7eele asaa seeretethas malla gidana mela neeni ne haddirsa miyen zin7a. Neeni ne haddirsa miyen zin7iya gallasata taybuwan Isra7eele asay waanidi seeretanaw de7iyako bessaana.
Ezekiel4:5 Isra7eele asay waanidi seeretanaw de7iyako bessanaw neeni zin7ana mela heedzu xeetanne uddufun tammu gallas new immas; issi gallasi issi laythara gina gidana.
Ezekiel4:6 “Neeni he gallasata polidaape guye
Ezekiel4:7 Ne som7uwa teqetida Yerusalaameko zaarada
Ezekiel4:8 He teqethay wurana gakanaw issi miyepe hara miye shiretonna mela ta nena wodoron qachana.
Ezekiel4:9 “Neeni gistenne banga
Ezekiel4:10 Gallas gallas ne miya katha mazanna; ika nam7u xeetanne hastamu giraame gido; hessa iya woden woden ma.
Ezekiel4:11 Gallas gallas ne uyaa haathayka likera gido; ika nam7u kubbaya gido; hessa iya woden woden uya.

Ezekiel5:5 Ubbaa Haariya Goday
Ezekiel5:6 Shin I ba iita oosuwan ba yuushuwan de7iya biittatapenne kawotethatape aadhidi ta higgiyanne ta wogaa bolla makallis. Tuma I ta higgiya menthis; ta wogaa kaallibeenna” yaagees.

Ezekiel5:12 Ne giddon de7iya asaape issi sikoy katamaa giddon boshaninne koshan hayqana; nam7antho sikoy mashshan wurana; heedzantho sikuwa carko bolla laallada
Ezekiel5:13 “Ta yiloy enta bolla poletana; ta wolqaama hanqoy irxana. Taani ta hanquwa enta bolla wursiya wode taani qanaaten odidaysa enti erana.
Ezekiel5:14 “Ne yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata giddoninne hinte matara aadhiya ubbaa sinthan ta hintena baysa oothana; hintena miichas aggana.
Ezekiel5:15 Ta hintena ta hanquwan
Ezekiel5:16 Dukiya donge toorada
Ezekiel5:17 Taani koshanne do7a hinte bolla yeddana; enti hinte nayta dhaysana; boshanne shempo wodho hinte bolla ehana” yaagees Goday.
Ezekiel6:1 Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis.
Ezekiel6:2 “Neno
Ezekiel6:3 Hinteno

Ezekiel6:5 Taani Isra7eele asaa aha enta eeqata sinthan zin7isana; hinte meqethata hinte yarsho xarpheezata yuushon laallana.
Ezekiel6:6 Hinte de7iya bessa ubbaan
Ezekiel6:7 Hayqida asay hinte giddon kundana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte hessan erana.
Ezekiel6:8 Taani hinte giddon mashshafe attida guuthata paxa ashshana; hinte biittataninne kawotethata giddon laaletana.
Ezekiel6:9 Mashshafe attida enti

Ezekiel7:1 Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis.
Ezekiel7:2 “Neno asa na7aw
Ezekiel7:3 Ha77i
Ezekiel7:4 Taani hintew qadhetike; hintena maarike. Hinte iita oosuwada hinte bolla pirdana; hinte giddon de7iya ixetida eeqa goyinnota qoncisana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte hessan erana’ ” yaagees.
Ezekiel7:5 Ubbaa Haariya Goday
Ezekiel7:6 Wursethi gakis; wursethi matis; I hinte bolla dendis; Heko
Ezekiel7:7 Biitta bolla de7eysato
Ezekiel7:8 Ha77i mata wode taani ta hanquwa hinte bolla gussana; ta yiluwa hinte bolla wursana. Taani hinte oosuwa gisho hinte bolla pirdana; ixetida eeqa goyinnida gisho hintena seerana.
Ezekiel7:9 Ta hintew qadhetike; hintena maarike. Hinte iita oosuwada hinte bolla pirdana; hinte giddon de7iya ixetida eeqa goyinnota qoncisana. He wode hintena seerey tana Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
Ezekiel7:10 “Heko
Ezekiel7:11 Geellatetha gaason iita oosoy daris. Entafe issoyka attenna; enta shaluwape woyko enta asaape woyko enta bonchuwafe attanabay baawa.
Ezekiel7:12 Wodey gakis; gallasay matis; ta hanqoy asa ubbaa bolla gidiya gisho shammeysi ufaytofo; bayzeysi azzanopo.
Ezekiel7:13 Nam7ay de7on de7iya wode ubban
Ezekiel7:14 Ta hanqoy asa ubbaa bolla qoncanaw de7iya gisho enti olas moyze punnidi giigetokona; oonika olas keyenna.
Ezekiel7:15 “Karen oli de7ees; son boshinne koshi de7ees. Katamaape karen de7ey olan hayqana; katamaa giddon de7ey boshaninne koshaninne wurana.
Ezekiel7:16 Kessi ekidi attidaysati
Ezekiel7:17 Kushe ubbay doccana; ubbay yashshan kokoridi sheeshi yeggana.
Ezekiel7:18 Enti kayo ma7o ma7ana; yashshan kokorana. Enta ubbaa som7oy yeella ma7ana; enta ubbaa huuphey meedettana.
Ezekiel7:19 Enti banta bira ogen holana; enta worqay tunaba gidana. Godaa wolqaama hanqo gallas enta biraynne enta worqay enta ashshanaw danda7enna. Entaw dhube gididi
Ezekiel7:20 “Enti banta al7o alleeqota otortidi
Ezekiel7:21 Taani enta alleequwa allaga biitta asaas di7o
Ezekiel7:22 He wode taani ta som7uwa hara soo zaarana; ta boncho keetha pangati gelidi tunisana.
Ezekiel7:23 “Suure pirda dhayon biittay suuthan kumida gishonne katamay geella ooson kumida gisho santhalaata giigisa.
Ezekiel7:24 Taani iita kawotethata ehada enta keethata bonqana mela oothana. Wolqaamata otoruwa dhaysana; enta geeshsha goyinno bessati tunana.
Ezekiel7:25 Enti dagammiya wode saro koyana; shin demmokona.
Ezekiel7:26 Issi gadoy hara gado kaalethana; issi worey hara wore kaallidi yaana. Enti nabetape qoncethi koyana; Kahinetas tamaarsiyabay dhayana; cimatas zoriyabay dhayana.
Ezekiel7:27 Kawoy yeekana; halaqay ufaysi qanxana; asay yashshan kokorana. Taani entaw enta oosuwada oothana; enti harata bolla pirdidaysada ta enta bolla pirdana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti hessan erana” yaagees.

Ezekiel10:1 Taani Kiruubeta huuphepe bolla baggara de7iya salo gufantho daaneysa be7as. Kirubeela bolla sanpare al7o shuchafe oosetida araata be7as.
Ezekiel10:2 Goday liino ma7ida addiyako
Ezekiel10:3 Addey soo geliya wode Kirubeeti Xoossa keethafe garsa baggara eqidosona; giddo dabaaban shaari kumis.
Ezekiel10:4 Godaa bonchoy Kirubeela bollafe dendidi
Ezekiel10:5 Kirubeela qefiya girsay Ubbaa Haariya Godaa girsada kare dabaaban si7etees.
Ezekiel10:6 Goday liino ma7ida addiya
Ezekiel10:7 Kirubeelape issoy banta giddon de7iya taman ba kushiya yeddidi
Ezekiel10:8 Kirubeela qefiyape garsa baggara asa kushe daaniyabay de7ees.
Ezekiel10:9 Ta xeelliya wode Kirubeela matan oyddu gertoy de7ees. Issi issi Kiruubiya matan issi issi gertoy de7eysa be7as; he gertoy al7o shuchada phoolees.
Ezekiel10:10 Enti oydday issoy issuwa daanosona; issi issi gertoy hara gerto giddora kanthi aadhidi medhetida daanees.
Ezekiel10:11 Kirubeeti biya wode oyddu bagga yaa haa simmonna boosona; issi gertoti bida ginde hanko gertoy yaa haa simmonna sitti gidi boosona.
Ezekiel10:12 Enta kumetha bolla
Ezekiel10:13 Ta si7ishin
Ezekiel10:14 Issi issi Kiruubiyas oyddu som7oy de7ees. Koyro som7oy kiruube som7o
Ezekiel10:15 Kiruubeti pude dendidosona. Enti taani Koboora shaafa matan be7ida de7on de7iya medhetathata.
Ezekiel10:16 Kiruubeti biya wode
Ezekiel10:17 De7on de7iya medhetethata ayyaanay gertota giddon de7iya gisho
Ezekiel10:18 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel10:19 Ta xeellishin
Ezekiel10:20 Enti Koboora shaafan Isra7eele Xoossaafe garsa baggara be7ida de7on de7iya medhetathata. Enti kiruubeta gideysa ta eras.
Ezekiel10:21 Enta ubbaas oyddu som7otinne
Ezekiel10:22 Enta som7oti Koboora shaafa matan ta be7ida som7ota daanosona. Enti ubbay sitti gidi sinthe boosona.

Ezekiel11:20 He wode enti ta higgiya kaallana; ta kiita naagana. Enti ta ase gidana; taani enta Xoossaa gidana.

Ezekiel13:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel13:2 “Neno asa na7aw
Ezekiel13:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Aybaka be7onna banta qofan dendidi tinbite odiya eeya nabeta ayye!’
Ezekiel13:4 Isra7eele asaw
Ezekiel13:5 Godaa gallasan olan minnidi eqana mela Isra7eele asaa dirsa gimbiya minthidi essibeeketa; pude laaletida bessaa keybeketa.
Ezekiel13:6 Enta qoncethaynne enta bitay wordo. Enti Goday kiittonnashin
Ezekiel13:7 Taani odonnashin
Ezekiel13:8 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel13:9 Wordo qoncethi be7iyanne muranchiya nabeta bolla taani ta kushiya denthana. Enti ta asaa zoretan gelokona; Isra7eele asaa mazgaben xaafetokona; enti Isra7eele biitta gelokona. He wode ta Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
Ezekiel13:10 “Saroy baynashin sa7i saro yaagidi ta asaa balethoosona. Asay shuchu keelidi doorin
Ezekiel13:11 Ha booqinte tiyeysatas; ha hinte tiyida gimbey kundana; wolqaama iri bukana. Taani gita shachi yeggana; wolqaama gotey dendana.
Ezekiel13:12 He gimbey kundiya wode asay hinte tiyida nooray anee? yaagidi oychonna aggane” yaagees.
Ezekiel13:13 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani gimbiya laallanaw; ta hanquwan wolqaama gote yeddana; ta yiluwan gita shacha kiittana
Ezekiel13:14 Hinte booqinte tiyida gimbiya ta mentherethana; baasoy bentana gakanaw laallana. I kundiya wode hinte iya giddon hayqana; he wode taani Godaa gideysa hinte erana.
Ezekiel13:15 Ta hanqoy gimbiya bollanne gimbiya booqinte tiyida asata bolla wodhana. Ta hinteko
Ezekiel13:16 Isra7eelen de7iya nabeti
Ezekiel13:17 “Neno asa na7aw
Ezekiel13:18 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Hara asa bolla wolqi daanada
Ezekiel13:19 Issi kophe banga woyko issi baso uythi demmanaw
Ezekiel13:20 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel13:21 Taani hinte shaashiya qaara ekada
Ezekiel13:22 Taani azzanthaboonna xillo asaa wozanaa hinte wordon azzanthideta; nagaranchoti banta iita oosuwape simmidi
Ezekiel13:23 Hizape hinte wordo qoncethi be7eketa; murunneketa. Taani ta asaa hinte kushepe kessa ekana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel14:1 Isra7eele cimatape issoti issoti taako yidi
Ezekiel14:2 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel14:3 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel14:4 Ne entaw Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda; “Isra7eele asaape oonika eeqa ba wozanan wothidi
Ezekiel14:5 He eeqati Isra7eele asaa taape haassidosona; shin ha77i ta entaw immiya zaaruwan enta wozanaa taako zaarana” yaagees.
Ezekiel14:6 “Hessa gisho
Ezekiel14:7 “Isra7eele asaa gidin woyko Isra7eele biittan de7iya allaga biitta asaa gidin
Ezekiel14:8 Taani he uraa morkana; ta iya asa malasinne miichas ashshana; taani iya ta asaa giddofe dhaysana; ta Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana.
Ezekiel14:9 Issi nabey cimetidi tinbite odiko
Ezekiel14:10 Enti banta nagara seera tookana; nabeynne nabiya oycheysi issi gina seeretana.
Ezekiel14:11 Hizape guye Isra7eele asay oge baletidi taape haakenna; banta nagaran bantana tunisokona. Enti ta ase gidana; taanika enta Xoossaa gidana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel14:12 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
Ezekiel14:13 “Asa na7aw

Ezekiel14:17 “Taani he biitta bolla toora yeddada
Ezekiel14:18 taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Ha heedzu asati he biittan de7iyakoka
Ezekiel14:19 “Taani he biitta bolla iita harge yeddada
Ezekiel14:20 taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Hari attoshin
