Ezekiel16:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel16:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel16:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday Yerusalaameko haysada yaagees. Ne mayzanne ne sheeshay Kanaane biittana; ne aaway Amoore; ne aayiya Hite asi.
Ezekiel16:4 Ne yellatiya gallas ne gul7ay qanxetibnna; woyko nena geeshshanaw haathan meecetabaaka; woyko maxinen gorpetada curqan xaaxetabaaka.
Ezekiel16:5 Ha geetetidaysatape hari attoshin issuwa oothanaw new mishetiday baawa. Ne yeletida gallas boretida gisho wora yegetadasape attishin
Ezekiel16:6 “Ta yaara aadhiya wode neeni ne suuthan iitada zohetishin be7ada
Ezekiel16:7 Ta nena aradda biittan de7iya kathada dichas. Neeni dicca aduqada
Ezekiel16:8 “Zaarada ta yaara aadhashe nena xeelliya wode
Ezekiel16:9 “Suuthan iitida ne asatethaa haathan meecca geeshshada
Ezekiel16:10 Taani nena alleeqo ma7o mayzas; lo77o galbafe oosetida caamma aasisas; liino shaashe nena qacisas; al7o kuta qulintisas.
Ezekiel16:11 Nena alleequwan alleeqisas; ne kushen sagaayo aathas; ne qoodhiya worqan mayzas.
Ezekiel16:12 Ne sidhene
Ezekiel16:13 Ne worqaninne biran alleeqetadasa; ne ma7o ubbay al7o liino
Ezekiel16:14 Ta new immida bonchuwa gaason
Ezekiel16:15 “Shin neeni ne puulan ammanetada
Ezekiel16:16 Ne ma7uwape baggaa ekada
Ezekiel16:17 Ta new immida worqafenne birape oosetida lo77o alleeqo
Ezekiel16:18 Ta immida alleeqo ma7uwa he misileta mayzadasa; ta zaytiyanne ta ixaaniya entaw shiishadasa.
Ezekiel16:19 Ta new immida lo77o dhiilliya
Ezekiel16:20 Ne laymatethay guuxibeenashin
Ezekiel16:21 Ne ta nayta shukada
Ezekiel16:22 Ne tunatethaaninne ne laymatethan ubban de7ashe
Ezekiel16:23 Ubbaa Haariya Goday
Ezekiel16:24 dabaaba ubban dhoqa eeqa goyinniya bessata new giigisadasa.
Ezekiel16:25 Oge doonan laymatiya bessata keexada
Ezekiel16:26 Neeni amon kumida
Ezekiel16:27 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel16:28 Ne alonna asi gidiya gisho
Ezekiel16:29 Zal7en aqiya Kaldaawetara laymatadasa
Ezekiel16:30 Ubbaa Haariya Goday
Ezekiel16:31 Neeni oge doonan laymatiya bessata new keexiya wodenne dabaaba ubban eeqas goyinniya bessata giigisadasa. Gidoshin
Ezekiel16:32 Neeni ba azinay de7ishin
Ezekiel16:33 Layma maccasas miishey qanxetees
Ezekiel16:34 Neeni laymatiya hara maccasatape dumma; neera laymatanaw nena kaalliya oonika baawa. Neeni gede imota immasape attishin
Ezekiel16:35 Neno
Ezekiel16:36 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Neeni ne laymatetha amuwan ne laggethotas ne asatethaa qaarida gisho
Ezekiel16:37 ne entan ufaytida ne laggethota ubbaa
Ezekiel16:38 Taani layma maccasata bollanne suuthu gussiya maccasata bolla pirdeysada ne bolla pirdana; ta hanquwaninne ta qaanatiyan ne bolla hayqo ehana.
Ezekiel16:39 Ta nena ne laggethotas aathada immana; enti ne laymatiya bessatanne eeqa goyinno bessata laallana. Enti ne ma7uwa qaaridi
Ezekiel16:40 Nena shuchan caddidi
Ezekiel16:41 Enti ne keethaa xuuggidi
Ezekiel16:42 Hessan ne bolla de7iya ta yiloy irxana; ta qanaatiya neepe haassana; hizape si77i gaana; zaarada hanqetike.
Ezekiel16:43 Neeni ne na7atetha laytha dogada
Ezekiel16:44 “Yerusalaame
Ezekiel16:45 Tuma neeni ba azinaanne ba nayta shaatetiya ne aaye mela; banta azinatanne banta nayta shaatetiya ne micheta mela; ne aayiya Hite asi; ne aaway Amoore asi.
Ezekiel16:46 Ne bayra michiya
Ezekiel16:47 Ne enta ogiya kaallada enta tuna oosota polo xalaala gidonashin
Ezekiel16:48 “Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday ta de7uwan caaqas. Neeninne ne gutan de7eysati oothidaysada ne michiya Soodomenne I macca nayti oothibookona.
Ezekiel16:49 Ne michiya Soodome oothida nagaray haysa: iyanne I macca nayti otorancho
Ezekiel16:50 Enti otorancho gididi
Ezekiel16:51 “Samaarey ne oothida nagaras baggaaka oothabuuku; ne iipe aadhada shaatiya tuna oothadasa. Ne oothida tuna oosota ubbaa gaason ne micheti xillo azzanana mela oothadasa.
Ezekiel16:52 Neeni ne micheta suure asi kessida gisho yeella ma7a. Ne nagaray entaysafe aadhidi iitin
Ezekiel16:53 “Gidoshin
Ezekiel16:54 Neban neeni daro yeellatana; ne kawushatethay daro gidiya gisho ne micheti hessan minettana.
Ezekiel16:55 Ne micheti
Ezekiel16:56 Ne otortiya wode ne miche Soodomi bolla qelqisabikii?
Ezekiel16:57 Hessi haniday ne nagaray qoncanaape kase gidennee? Ha77i neeni ne yuushuwan de7iya Edoomes michetisnne I shoorotas
Ezekiel16:58 Ne laymatetha gishonne ne tuna oosota gisho ne seeretana” yaagees Goday.
Ezekiel16:59 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Neeni ufaysa qaala menthada
Ezekiel16:60 Gidoshin
Ezekiel16:61 Ne bayranne ne kaalo micheta ta neeko ehiya wode neeni ne hemethaa hassayada yeellatana. Shin hessi ta neera caaqida caaquwa mela gidonna ixikoka
Ezekiel16:62 Taani ta caaquwa neera oorathana; he wode ta Godaa gideysa ne erana.

Ezekiel17:5 I Isra7eele biittafe aaca efidi

Ezekiel17:8 Shin

Ezekiel17:18 I caaqo kadhidi menthida gishonne ba kushiya immidi

Ezekiel18:16 oonaka un7ethonna ixiki
Ezekiel18:17 Iita oosope ba kushiya teqiko wodhe ekanaw yelora tal7onna ixiko
Ezekiel18:18 Shin iya aaway asa maata sugida gisho

Ezekiel19:5 Iya aayiya naagidaysi hanonna ixin
Ezekiel19:6 I wodala gaammo gididi
Ezekiel19:7 I enta miixaa mentherethis; katamata dhaysis; I gudiya wode biittan de7iya asa ubbay dagammees.
Ezekiel19:8 Iya yuushuwan de7iya kawotethati ubbay iya oykanaw xihe wothidosona; banta gitiya miccidosona; enta ollan I oyketis;
Ezekiel19:9 Enti iya sidhen wodoro aathidi hoothen yeggidi
Ezekiel19:10 Ne aayiya haatha doonan toketida woyne mela; daro haathi de7iya gisho woyney daashshaninne ayfen kumidi de7ees.
Ezekiel19:11 Iya tasheti mino gidiya gisho kawota xam7a gididosona. Woyney woran de7iya mithatape aadhidi diccis; ba tashiya darotethaaninne adussatethan ubbaafe bollara bentis.

Ezekiel22:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel22:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel22:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: ne daro asaa wodhida gishonne eeqa goyinnon nena tunisida gisho ne dhayo wodey gakis.
Ezekiel22:4 Ne gussida suuthan bala gidadasa; ne oothida eeqan tunadasa. Ne pirdaa gallasay matatis; ne dhayo wodey gakis. Hessa gisho
Ezekiel22:5 Neno
Ezekiel22:6 “Ne giddon de7iya Isra7eele halaqati ubbay suuthu gussanaw banta wolqaa ay mela go7etiyako be7a.
Ezekiel22:7 Ne giddon de7eysati banta aawanne banta aayiw bonchokona. Enti bete asaa cimmoosona; am7etanne aawu aayiya bayna nayta naaqoosona.
Ezekiel22:8 Enti ta geeshsha miisheta kadhoosona; ta Sambaata tunisoosona.
Ezekiel22:9 Ne giddon issoti issoti harata wodhisanaw wordon odoosona; harati eeqas yashetidaba moosona; harati laymatoosona.
Ezekiel22:10 Ne giddon issoti issoti ba aawa machera tunoosona; harati kushe metoy de7iya maccasara wolqan tunisoosona.
Ezekiel22:11 Ne giddon issoti issoti ba shooruwa machera tunoosona; aaway ba na7a machera tunees; ba aawa na7iw
Ezekiel22:12 Ne giddon issoti issoti miishe ekidi
Ezekiel22:13 “Asay bessonna miishe ekiya gishonne shempo wodhiya gisho
Ezekiel22:14 Ta nena seeriya wode ne goobatethay neera daanee? Woyko ne kushey mino gidanee? Taani Goday haysa odas; ta odidaysada oothana.
Ezekiel22:15 Ta nena kawotethata giddoninne biittata giddon laallana; ne tunatethaa neepe diggana.
Ezekiel22:16 Hara kawotethata sinthan ne kawuyana; taani Godaa gideysa ne erana” yaagis.
Ezekiel22:17 Goday taako haysada yaagis:
Ezekiel22:18 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel22:19 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel22:20 Bira
Ezekiel22:21 Ta hintena Yerusalaame shiishada
Ezekiel22:22 Biri coocen shee7eysada hinte Yerusalaamen til7ana. He wode taani Goday ta hanquwa hinte bolla gussidaysa hinte erana’ ” yaagees.
Ezekiel22:23 Zaaridi Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel22:24 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel22:25 Ne giddon enta halaqati wodhidaba gudishe mentherethiya gaammo mela; enti wodhoosona; miishe gidin
Ezekiel22:26 Kahineti ta higgiya menthidosona; ta geeshshabata bonchibookona. Geeshshinne geeshshi gidonna ba shaakokona; tunanne tunaa gidonna ba shaakidi tamaarsokona; ta Sambaata yeggi aggideta. Hessa gaason ta Isra7eele asaa giddon bonchetabike.
Ezekiel22:27 Halaqati banta wodhidaba duuserethiya suudhume mela; enti bantaw bessona duretethi demmanaw shempo wodhoosona.
Ezekiel22:28 Nabeti godaa booqinte tiyiya asada
Ezekiel22:29 Biittan de7iya asay bonqoosona; manqotanne metootanchota un7ethoosona; enti suure pirdaa diggidi bete asaa geellayosona.
Ezekiel22:30 “Taani biitta dhaysona mela dirsa gimbiya keexey
Ezekiel22:31 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel23:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
Ezekiel23:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel23:3 Enti Gibxen de7ishe
Ezekiel23:4 Entafe bayre sunthay Ohoolo; kaalo miche sunthay Ohooliba. Enta nam7a taani machin
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohoola taw macho gidada de7ashe laymatasu; iya ba olancho gidida Asoore laggethota kaallada bawusu.
Ezekiel23:6 Enti kaalose daaniya ma7o ma7ida olanchota
Ezekiel23:7 Iya bana layma oothada
Ezekiel23:8 Iya Gibxen doomida laymatetha ha77ika aggabuku; I na7atethafe doomidi
Ezekiel23:9 “Hessa gisho
Ezekiel23:10 Enti iyo qaaridi kalloydosona; I addenne macca nayta di7idi oykidosona; iyo mashshan wodhidosona. Iyo gakida pirda gaason
Ezekiel23:11 “I michiya Ohooliba hessa be7asu; iya ba amuwaninne ba laymatethan ba michefe aadhada tuna gidasu.
Ezekiel23:12 Iyaka Asoore haareysati
Ezekiel23:13 Iyaka bana tunisidaysa be7as; enti nam7ay issi ogen boosona.”
Ezekiel23:14 “Iya ba laymatetha yaa darsasu; iya godaa bolla woocetidi oosetidi zo7o qalamen tiyetada Kaldaaweta adde misile be7asu.
Ezekiel23:15 Enti banta xeessan zinnaare dancidosona; banta huuphiyan lo77o carqe xaaxidosona. Enti ubbay Kaldaawe biittafe yida Kaldaaweta halaqata daanosona.
Ezekiel23:16 Iya enta misileta be7ida wode daro siiqada
Ezekiel23:17 Babilooneti iiko yidi
Ezekiel23:18 Iya ba laymatetha qoncen oothida wodenne ba kalluwa qaara bessida wode
Ezekiel23:19 Shin iya Gibxen layma gidada de7iya
Ezekiel23:20 Enta atunthay hareysa mela
Ezekiel23:21 Neno
Ezekiel23:22 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel23:23 Babiloonetanne Kaldaaweta ubbaa
Ezekiel23:24 Enti ola para gaaretara
Ezekiel23:25 Taani ta hanquwa ne bolla yeddana; enti neera hanqo suulan gahetana. Enti ne siidhiyanne ne haythaa qanxana; attidaysati mashshan wurana. Enti ne adde naytanne ne macca nayta oykana; attidaysata taman xuuggana.
Ezekiel23:26 Enti ne ma7o ubbaa neepe qaaridi ekana; ne alleeqo ubbaa neepe kessidi ekana.
Ezekiel23:27 Hessada oothada
Ezekiel23:28 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani nena ne ixeyisata
Ezekiel23:29 Enti nena ixana; ne daaburada demmidaba ubba bonqidi
Ezekiel23:30 hessa ne bolla ehis. Neeni kawotethatara laymatadasa; enta eeqatara nena tunisadasa.
Ezekiel23:31 Ne michiya bida ogiya neka badasa. Hessa gisho
Ezekiel23:32 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Neeni ne miche xuu7ape uyana; he xuu7ay gitanne ciimmo. I tigin
Ezekiel23:33 Neeni mathota gandigarananne azzanana. Hessi ne miche Samaare xuu7ay new dagamanne dhayo ehana.
Ezekiel23:34 Ne iya xiizothada uyana; xuu7a menthana; kun7an ne dhantha gaarana.” Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odayis.
Ezekiel23:35 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Neeni tana dogida gisho
Ezekiel23:36 Goday taako haysada yaagis: “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel23:37 Enti nam7ay laymatidosona; shempo wodhidosona. Enti banta eeqa goyinnidosona. Hari attoshin
Ezekiel23:38 Hessafe aathidi hara iitabaa ta bolla oothidosona; enti ta keethaa tunisidosona; he wode ta Sambaataka shaaridosona.
Ezekiel23:39 Enti banta nayta eeqatas yarshida gallas
Ezekiel23:40 Enti haaho bessafe addeti yaana mela ase kiittin
Ezekiel23:41 Lo77o arjeeta bolla uttideta; xarpheeza bolla ta ixaaniyanne ta shamaho zaytiya wothideta.
Ezekiel23:42 Ufaytiya asaa koysethi hinte matan si7etees. Mathotida asay mela biitta yidosona. Hinte kushen sagaayo wothidosona; lo77o kallachata hinte huuphen goxidosona.
Ezekiel23:43 Taani ta wozanan
Ezekiel23:44 Addey maccasara laymateysada
Ezekiel23:45 Enti layma gidiya gishonne shempo wodhiya gisho
Ezekiel23:46 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Daro asa denthethada enta bolla eha. Enta daganthiyanne enta bonqiya asatas aatha imma.
Ezekiel23:47 Ha daganthiya asati yidi
Ezekiel23:48 Maccas ubbay naagetana mela taani biitta ubbaafe laymatethi dhaysana.
Ezekiel23:49 Hinte nam7u micheti hinte laymatetha gishonne eeqata hinte goyinnida nagaraa gisho hintena pirdana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel24:1 Nuuni di7etida uddufuntho laythan
Ezekiel24:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel24:3 Ha makallancho asaas Ubba Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada ha leemisuwa oda. Madabe diste tama bolla wothada haathe iyan tiga.
Ezekiel24:4 Gedaanne angaasuwa
Ezekiel24:5 Hessas ne ekana dorsay wudiyape dooretidaysa gido. Distiya garsan mithi wothada ashuwanne meqetha kaxana gakanaw doysa.”
Ezekiel24:6 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Suuthu gussiya katamaa ayye! Iya shi7idi geeyonna ixida naase birata diste mela gidasu. I giddon de7iya muxetida ashuwa saama yeggonna kushen gahetidaysa kessa kessa eka.
Ezekiel24:7 He katamay wodhida asaa suuthay hanno gakanaw in de7ees. Suuthi gussashe
Ezekiel24:8 Halo keyanaw
Ezekiel24:9 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel24:10 Daro mithi wotha; tama eetha. Ashuwa loythada doysa; cambaa mal7etha; meqetha xuugga.
Ezekiel24:11 Kaysa Madabe diste tama bolla wotha. Iya bolla de7iya buuqay seeridi kichana gakanawunne iya bolla de7iya shi7ay xuugetidi dhayana gakanaw suullidi michana mela tama bolla wotha.
Ezekiel24:12 He daaburay ubbay coo mela gidis; iya bolla de7iya daro shi7ay hari attoshin
Ezekiel24:13 Yerusalaame
Ezekiel24:14 Taani Goday haysa odas; hessi hanana. Taani guye simmike; new qadhetike; ta qofaa laammike. Ne ogiyadanne ne oosuwada taani nena pirdana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysa odayis” yaagis.
Ezekiel24:15 Qassika Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel24:16 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel24:17 Oola
Ezekiel24:18 Wonta taani asaas odas; omarsi ta machiya hayqasu. Wontetha gallas Goday tana kiittidaysada oothas.
Ezekiel24:19 Asay taako
Ezekiel24:20 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis yaagada entaw odas.
Ezekiel24:21 Ubbaa Haariya Goday Isra7eele asaa haysada yaagees; “Hinte ceeqetiya
Ezekiel24:22 He wode ta oothidaysada hinte oothana. Hinte doona kammeketa; shochu meeketa.
Ezekiel24:23 Hinte huuphiya xaaxite; hinte tohuwan caamma aathite. Kayoteketa woyko yeekeketa. Shin hinte hinte nagaraa gaason gilqananne issoy issuwara oolana.
Ezekiel24:24 He wode Hizqeeli hintew malaata gidana; I oothidaysada
Ezekiel24:25 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel24:26 He gallas new wore odanaw issi asi kessi ekidi yaana.
Ezekiel24:27 He gallas ne doonay dooyetana; ne iyara odetana; zaarada muume gidaka. Hessada hanada
Ezekiel25:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel25:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel25:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday odiya qaala si7ite. Hinte ta keetha tunisiya wode
Ezekiel25:4 Taani hintena doloha bagga biitta asaas laata oothada immana. Enti hinte giddon kambe keexidi daana. Hinte mithaa ayfiya enti maana; hinte maatha enti uyana.
Ezekiel25:5 Taani Raaba katamaa gimaleti heemetiya bessi kessana; Amooneta biitta dorsaa wudey pee7iya bessi oothana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he wode erana.
Ezekiel25:6 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Hinte Isra7eele dhayuwan kushe baqida gisho
Ezekiel25:7 taani hinte bolla ta kushiya denthas. Hintena kawotethatas di7o oothada immana. Ta hintena asaape shoddana; kawotethata giddofe dhaysana. Taani Godaa gideysa hinte he woden erana’ ” yaagees.
Ezekiel25:8 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Moo7abeynne Sayre
Ezekiel25:9 taani Moo7abe biitta teqana; iya zawa naagiya
Ezekiel25:10 Hizape guye Amooneta gujada
Ezekiel25:11 Taani Moo7abe pirdana; taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel25:12 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Edoomey Yihuda bolla halo keyida gishonne qohida gisho
Ezekiel25:13 taani kushiya Edoome bolla denthana. Yan de7iya asaanne mehiya kumethi dhaysada baysa kessana. Temaanape bidi
Ezekiel25:14 Taani Isra7eele baggara Edoome bolla halo keyana. Isra7eeleti enta bolla ta yiluwa mela oothana. Taani halo keydaysa Edoomey erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel25:15 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Filisxeemeti banta wozanaa iitatethan halo keyida gishonne aqida morken Yihuda kadhidi dhaysanaw koyida gisho
Ezekiel25:16 taani ta kushiya Filisxeemeta bolla denthana. Taani Keltaaweta qanxana; abba doonan attidaysata ubbaa dhaysana.
Ezekiel25:17 Ta enta bolla gita halo keyana; ta hanquwan enta seerana. Taani enta bolla halo keyiya wode
Ezekiel26:1 Nuuni di7etida tammanne issantho laythan
Ezekiel26:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel26:3 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel26:4 Enti ne dirsa gimbiya laallana; ne gimbe shakota menthana. Ta nena biitta ubbaa quchidi efin
Ezekiel26:5 Neeni abba giddon asay banta molo gitiya melisanaw micciya bessi gidana. Hara kawotethati Xiroosa bonqana.
Ezekiel26:6 Waanna biittan de7iya gutata mashshan wursana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana’ yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel26:7 “Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Xiroosa bolla ola denthana mela kawota kawo gidida Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora
Ezekiel26:8 Enti waanna biittan de7iya gutata mashshan wursana. Enti nena teqidi
Ezekiel26:9 Dirsa gimbeta dom7idi laaliya miishen ne dirsa gimbiya mentherethana; banta ola miishen ne adussa gimbeta laallana.
Ezekiel26:10 Iya parati daro gidiya gisho
Ezekiel26:11 Enta parati ogeta ubbaa yedhana. Ne asaa mashshan wursana; ne wolqaama tuussati sa7an kundana.
Ezekiel26:12 Ne shaloy di7etana; ne zal7iya miisheti bonqetana. Ne dirsa gimbetanne ne lo77o keethata ubbaa dhaysana; ne shuchata
Ezekiel26:13 Ne mal7o yetha ta teqana; ne diitha girsay zaari si7etenna.
Ezekiel26:14 Ta nena kallo de7iya zaalla oothana; neeni asay banta molo gitiya micciya bessi gidana. Taani Goday haysa odida gisho
Ezekiel26:15 “Ubbaa Haariya Goday Xiroosa katamaako haysada yaagees: ‘Ne morketi ne bolla dendiya wode yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asay
Ezekiel26:16 Abbaa doonan de7iya haareysati banta araatape wodhana. Banta boncho ma7uwanne alleeqetidi oosetida ma7uwa qaaridi yashshan kokorishe biittan uttana. Ne bolla gakida metuwa qopidi
Ezekiel26:17 Enti new haysada yaagidi zelelsi kessana: “Abbaa doonan de7iya yashshiya katamata; wolqaama asay de7iya katame
Ezekiel26:18 Neeni kundiya gallas yuushoy abban teqetida biittati kokoridosona. Haathan teqetida biittati ne dhayuwan dagammidosona” yaagis.
Ezekiel26:19 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Ha77i oonika doonna katamatada ta nena baysa kessana. Taani abba haatha ne bolla ehin
Ezekiel26:20 Neeni si7oole gelada beni hayqida asaara walaketana mela oothana. Neeni biittafe garsan
Ezekiel26:21 Taani ne wursethaa daganthiya wursethi oothana; new hessi wursethi gidana. Asi nena koyana; shin neeni zaarada bentaka” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel27:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel27:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel27:3 Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iyanne abba gaxan de7iya daro asaara zal7iya
Ezekiel27:4 Ne zaway abba gul7aana; nena keexeysati loythidi oothidi keexidosona.
Ezekiel27:5 Ne sanqa Sanira xiiddan oothidosona; ne markabiya tuussaa Libaanose zigan giigisidosona.
Ezekiel27:6 Haathaa pidhiya mithati Baasane wolaape oosetidosona. Ne markabiya hiixay Qophiroosa xiiddan
Ezekiel27:7 Ne sharay bandirada haahon bentana mela
Ezekiel27:8 Ne markabiya kolxiseysati Sidoonanne Arwada katamatape yidaysata; ne markabiya laaggeysati loohida ne asata.
Ezekiel27:9 Markabiya giigiseysati Gebaalape yida eranchotanne kaalethiya hiillanchota; abban biya markabe ubban de7iya oosanchoti wodha keya gidi ne giddon zal7oosona.
Ezekiel27:10 “Farsefe
Ezekiel27:11 Arwadanne Heleka olanchoti
Ezekiel27:12 Ne daro duretetha gaason Tarsesi neera zal7is; I bira
Ezekiel27:13 Yawaani
Ezekiel27:14 Beet-Torgaama asay toga parata
Ezekiel27:15 Didaana asay neera zal7idosona; yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan de7iya asay dangarsa zaalenne zophe mithi new ehoosona.
Ezekiel27:16 “Ne daro duretetha gaason
Ezekiel27:17 Yihudanne Isra7eele asay neera zal7idosona; enti Minite gade giste
Ezekiel27:18 Ne daro duretethinne shalloy de7iya gisho
Ezekiel27:19 Uzaalen de7iya Daanenne Yawaana asay ne dumma dumma miisheta shammidosona. Enti ne miishiyara laammanaw alleeqetida biratanne dumma dumma sawo ehidosona.
Ezekiel27:20 “Didaana asay koora gilaase ehidi zal7idosona.
Ezekiel27:21 Arabetinne Qedaare halaqati ubbay ne zal7e miishiyas dorsa urgeta
Ezekiel27:22 Saabanne Rama zal7anchoti al7o shuchu
Ezekiel27:23 Kaarane
Ezekiel27:24 Enti lo77o ma7ota
Ezekiel27:25 “Tarsesa markabeti ne miisheta caanidosona. Neeni darobay caanetin
Ezekiel27:26 Ne markabiya laaggeysati nena ekidi
Ezekiel27:27 Neeni meqeretida wode ne duretethaynne ne zal7e miishe ubbay
Ezekiel27:28 Enta waasoy abba gaxaa de7iya biitta daganthis.
Ezekiel27:29 “Markabiya bolla uttidi haatha pidheysati ubbay markabetape keyidi
Ezekiel27:30 Enti ubbay banta huuphen baana qolidi
Ezekiel27:31 New kayotidi
Ezekiel27:32 Enti haysada yaagidi new zeleelidosona: “Ha77i abba giddon si77i gida
Ezekiel27:33 “Ne zal7e miishey abba pinnidi yaa wode
Ezekiel27:34 Shin ha77i ciimmo abban meqeretadasa; ne zal7e miisheynne new oothiya asa ubbay
Ezekiel27:35 Yuushoy abban teqetida biittan de7iya asa ubbay ne bolla gakidaba be7idi dagammidosona. Enta kawoti daro yayyidosona; enta som7oy yashshan shullis.
Ezekiel27:36 Ne wursethay daganthiyaba gidis; neeni zaarada daaka. Hessa gisho
Ezekiel28:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel28:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel28:3 Ne Daanelape aadhada cincay? Ay xuurika neepe geemmennee?
Ezekiel28:4 Tuma ne cincatethaaninne ne akeekan dure gidadasa; ne buqura minja keethan biranne worqaa shiishadasa.
Ezekiel28:5 Ne zal7iya eran daro wodhe demmadasa; ne duretetha gaason ne wozanay otortis’ ” yaagees.
Ezekiel28:6 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel28:7 ta ne bolla qadhey bayna wozana mino morketa ehana; enti neeni cincatethaninne eratethan shiishida shalo ubbaa mashshan dhaysana; enti ne bonchuwa tunisana.
Ezekiel28:8 Enti nena si7oole yeddana
Ezekiel28:9 Enti nena wodhanaw yaa wode neeni
Ezekiel28:10 Neeni allagata kushen ammanonna asi hayqiya hayqo hayqana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel28:11 Qassi Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel28:12 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel28:13 Neeni Edenen
Ezekiel28:14 Nena naagiya kiruube oothada shuumas; nena tiyas. Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla ne de7adasa; tamada phooliya al7o shuchata giddon simeretadasa.
Ezekiel28:15 Ne medhetida gallasaape doomada
Ezekiel28:16 Ne daro zal7en mathotida gisho buqethan kumada
Ezekiel28:17 Neeni mala lo77o gidiya gisho daro otortadasa; ne boncho koyada cincatetha kawushadasa. Hessa gisho
Ezekiel28:18 Ne nagaraninne ne balethiya zal7iyan
Ezekiel28:19 Nena kase eriya kawotethati ubbay dagammidosona. Ne wursethay yashshiyabaa gidis; neeni zaarada bentaka’ ” yaagis.
Ezekiel28:20 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel28:21 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel28:22 Neno
Ezekiel28:23 Ta ne bolla iita harge yeddana; oge ubban suuthi gukanaada oothana. Ubba baggara yaa olaa gaason ne asay mashshan hayqana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana.
Ezekiel28:24 Hizape guye Isra7eele yuushon de7iya
Ezekiel28:25 “Isra7eele asaa laaletida biitta ubbaafe shiishada ehiya wodenne kawotethata ubbaa sinthan taani ta geeshshatetha bessiya wode
Ezekiel28:26 Yan enti saronne naagetidi daana; keethe keexana; woyne tokana. Enta kadhidi xeelliya enta shoorota ubbaa taani pirdiya wode Isra7eele asay saro daana. Taani Godaa enta Xoossaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel29:1 Nuuni di7etida tammantho laythan
Ezekiel29:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel29:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. ‘Neno
Ezekiel29:4 Ta ne siidhen dafo aathana; ne shaafan de7iya molota qefey ne galbara oyketana mela oothana; moloti ne gogaara oyketidi uttidashin
Ezekiel29:5 Ta nenanne ne shaafan de7iya molota ubbaa mela biitta holana; ne ahay denban yegetidi attana; ne aha shiishidi moogiya asi dhayana. Ta nena salo kafotasinne sa7aa do7atas kathi oothana.
Ezekiel29:6 Gibxen de7iya asa ubbay taani Godaa gideysa he wode erana. “Neeni Isra7eele asaas maqa xam7a gidadasa;
Ezekiel29:7 Enti nena oykida wode meqada enta shophen caddadasa; enti nenan zempida wode meqada enta zokuwa duuthadasa.
Ezekiel29:8 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel29:9 Gibxe laaletidi baysa biitta gidana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana. Neeni
Ezekiel29:10 taani ne bollanne ne shaafa bolla dendas. Pudeha baggara Migdoolape doomada
Ezekiel29:11 Ase gidin mehe gidin yaara kanthenna; oytamu laythi wurana gakanaw
Ezekiel29:12 Taani Gibxe biitta ubbaafe aadhida baysa biitta oothana; iya katamati oytamu laythi wurana gakanaw
Ezekiel29:13 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Oytamu laythafe guye
Ezekiel29:14 Taani nena zaarada gashtisana enta yeletida dugeha Gibxen de7iya Phatroosa biitta zaarana; yan enti laafa kawotethi gididi daana.
Ezekiel29:15 Gibxey hara kawotethata ubbaafe laafa kawotethi gidana. Zaaridi hara kawotethata bolla bana dhoqu dhoqu oothenna; I hara kawotethi haaronnaada taani iya guuthana.
Ezekiel29:16 Isra7eeley zaaridi maado demmanaw Gibxen ammanetena; Gibxen ammanetida ammanetethay ay mela qohoko Isra7eeley akeekana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel29:17 Nuuni di7etida laatamanne laapuntho laythan
Ezekiel29:18 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel29:19 ‘Taani Gibxe biitta Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxooras aathada immana; ika ba olanchotas damooze gidana mela di7oninne bonqen oykidaba ubbaa ekidi baana.
Ezekiel29:20 Inne iya olanchoti taw oothida gisho
Ezekiel29:21 “He gallas taani Isra7eele deriya minthana. Hizqeela
Ezekiel30:1 Qassika Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis:
Ezekiel30:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel30:3 He gallasay matis! Godaa gallasay gakis! He gallasay shaari kammida gallas kawotethata ubbaas meto gallas gidana.
Ezekiel30:4 Gibxe bolla oli yaana; Tophe bolla un7i yaana. Daroti Gibxe biittan hayqana; iya duretethay bonqetana; iya baasoy shodetana.
Ezekiel30:5 He olay Tophe
Ezekiel30:6 Gibxe maaddeysati kundana; iya otoruwa wolqay wurana. Migdoolape bidi Aswaana gakanaw
Ezekiel30:7 Gibxey biitta ubbaafe aadhida baysa biitta gidana; iya katamati hara laaletida katama ubbaafe aadhidi laaletidi attana.
Ezekiel30:8 Taani Gibxe taman oythiya wodenne iya maaddeysati ubbay hayqidi wuriya wode
Ezekiel30:9 “He wode taani saro de7iya Tophe asaa daganthanaw asata markaben kiittana. Gibxey pirdetiya gallas Tophe asaa bolla waayey yaana. He gallasay gakis” yaagees.
Ezekiel30:10 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Babiloone kawa Nabukadanaxoora kushen taani Gibxe duretetha dhaysana.
Ezekiel30:11 Kawotethata ubbaafe aadhidi
Ezekiel30:12 Nayle shaafa taani melisana; taani Gibxe iita asata kushen aathada immana; he biittanne yan de7iyaba ubbaa allagatan dhaysana. Taani Goday haysa odas” yaagees.
Ezekiel30:13 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Mempisa kataman de7iya eeqatanne misileta ubbaa ta dhaysana; Gibxe biittan zaaridi halaqay deenna; biitta ubbaa taani yashisana.
Ezekiel30:14 Taani Phatroosa geetetiya dugeha bagga Gibxe baysa kessana; pudeha baggara de7iya Xo7aane kataman tama yeddana; Tebisa katama pirdana.
Ezekiel30:15 Gibxe miixa gidida Pelusiyaman ta hanquwa gussana; Tebisa asa ubbaa wursana.
Ezekiel30:16 Taani Gibxen tama oythana; Pelusiyami daro waayetana; Tebisa dirsa gimbey laaletana; Mempisa katamaa duuxonna metoy gakana.
Ezekiel30:17 Onaninne Bubastu kataman de7iya na7atethati ubbay mashshan wurana; maccasay di7etidi baana.
Ezekiel30:18 Gibxe wolqaa ta mentherethiya wode Xafinaasan gallasi qammana; I otoruwa wolqay wurana; Gibxe shaari kammana; he katama yuushon de7iya gutati ubbaa di7etidi baana.
Ezekiel30:19 Taani Gibxe hessada oothada pirdana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel30:20 Nuuni di7etida tammanne issintho laythan
Ezekiel30:21 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel30:22 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel30:23 Taani Gibxeta kawotethata giddoninne hara biittatan laallana.
Ezekiel30:24 Taani Babiloone kawa nam7u qesiya minthada
Ezekiel30:25 Taani Gibxe kawa qesiya daabursada
Ezekiel30:26 Gibxeta taani kawotethata giddoninne biitta ubban laallana. Taani Godaa gideysa enti he wode erana” yaagees.
Ezekiel31:1 Nuuni di7etida tammanne issintho laythan
Ezekiel31:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel31:3 Ne lo77o daashsha kuyay de7iya Libaanose ziga mela; I diccis; iya xeeray shaara gakis.
Ezekiel31:4 Yan iya dichiya haathi de7ees; pulto ciimmoti iya dichidosona. Shaafati goggidi iya yuushuwa irxisidosona; pultoti mithay doliya bessa ubbaa ushshoosona.
Ezekiel31:5 He mithay woran de7iya mitha ubbaafe aduqis; iya daashshay daris; tashey aduqis; haathi darida gisho ordis.
Ezekiel31:6 Salo kafoti iya daashshan banta keethaa keexidosona; bazzo do7ati iya kuya garsan na7a yelidosona; gita kawotethati ubbay iya kuyan shempoosona.
Ezekiel31:7 Ba xaphuwa ciimmo haathan duge yeddida gisho he mithay ba daashsha tashiyara waanidi lo77i!
Ezekiel31:8 Hari attoshin Xoossa gannatiyan he zigaara giniya zigi baawa; iya mela daashshi de7iya xiiddika baawa. Hessa mela ocha mithi
Ezekiel31:9 Taani iya daro daashshan puulayas; Edene geetetiya Xoossa gannatiyan de7iya mithati ubbay iya qanaatoosona.
Ezekiel31:10 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel31:11 ta iya yegga aggas; wolqaama
Ezekiel31:12 Wozana mino allagati he mitha qanxidi yeggana; qanxida tasheti deretan
Ezekiel31:13 Salo kafoti yidi kundida mithaa bolla uttana; bazzo do7ati iya tasheta yedhana.
Ezekiel31:14 Haatha matan dicciya mithata giddon iya mela aduqidi
Ezekiel31:15 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He mithay duufo geliya gallas ciimmo pulto haathati iyaw kayotana mela oothana. He pulto haathay goggonna mela oothana; Libaanosey iya gisho azzanana mela oothana; wora mitha ubbay shullana.
Ezekiel31:16 Ta he mithaa duufon holiya wode
Ezekiel31:17 Kawotethata giddon iyara issifidaysatinne iya kuyan de7iya ubbay kase mashshan hayqidaysatara gahetanaw iyara issife duufo gelana.
Ezekiel31:18 Edene gannatiyan de7iya mithata giddon hessa mela gitinne lo77oy baawa. Shin ha77i Edene mithatada ika hayqidi duufon gelees; yan I mashshan hayqida ammanonaysatara gahetana. “He mithay Gibxe kawaanne iya asaa leemiso” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel32:1 Nuuni di7etida tammanne nam7antho laythan
Ezekiel32:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel32:3 Daro asay shiiqiya wode taani ta gitiyan nena oykana; asay nena goochidi
Ezekiel32:4 Taani nena biittan hola aggana; sa7a bolla miccana; salo kafota ne bolla utisana; bazzo do7ata ne ashuwa kalsana.
Ezekiel32:5 Ta ne ashuwa dereta bolla laallana; zangaarata ne ahan kunthana.
Ezekiel32:6 Shaafata kumidi dereta kammana
Ezekiel32:7 Ta nena dhaysiya wode saloy goozetana; xoolintoti dhumana; away shaaran kametana; ageenay ba poo7uwa diggana.
Ezekiel32:8 Neepe bollara de7iya salo poo7ota ubbaa dhaysada
Ezekiel32:9 Ne bolla gakida dhayuwa ne eronna kawotethata sissiya wode daro asa wozanay un7ethana.
Ezekiel32:10 Daro kawotethati nena be7idi dagammana. Taani ta mashsha enta sinthan shoddada seesiya wode

Ezekiel32:12 Hara kawotethatape aadhida
Ezekiel32:13 Daro haatha matan de7iya mehe ubbaa ta dhaysana; hizape guye

Ezekiel32:15 Taani Gibxe baysa kessiya wode iyan de7iya ubbaa quchada dhaysiya wodenne iyan de7iya asa ubbaa shociya wode taani Godaa gideysa enti erana.
Ezekiel32:16 Ha ubbay entaw zeleeletiya zelelsi gidana. Kawotethata maccasati Gibxesinne iya daro asaas zeleelana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

Ezekiel32:22 “Asoorey duufon de7ees. Olan hayqida Asoore olanchota duufoti iya yuushuwa teqidi uttidosona.
Ezekiel32:23 Enta duufoti ollas wursetha gaxan de7oosona. Iya olanchoti duufuwa yuushon keeletidosona; kase de7on de7iya asa heeran buqethi denthiya asay shuketidosona; mashshan wuridosona.
Ezekiel32:24 “Elaami duufon de7ees; iya olanchoti ubbay shuketidosona mashshan kundidosona. De7on de7iya asa matan buqethi denthidasati ubbay qaxaretona biitta garsi aadhidosona duufo gelidi zin7idosona.
Ezekiel32:25 Hayqidaysata giddon Elaamas bessi giigidi uttis. Elama olanchota duufoti iya yuushuwan de7oosona; enti ubbay mashshan hayqidosona. Enti ubbay qaxaretiboonaysatanne mashshan hayqidaysata Enti de7on de7eyisata giddon buqethi denthida gisho duufo geelidaystara issife zin7idosona.

Ezekiel32:27 Enti beni gooba olanchoti banta ola miishiya dancidi banta gondalliya tiran wothidi banta mashsha borkotidi mogeteysada bonchon mogetibookona. Ha olanchota de7on de7iya asa giddon buqethi denthida gisho enta nagaray enta meqetha bolla de7ees.
Ezekiel32:28 “Hinte Gibxe asati xoonetananne mashshan hayqida

Ezekiel32:30 “Pudeha bagga halaqatinne Sidoona asay duufon de7oosona. Enti kase banta wolqan asaa yashisidosona; shin ha77i enti banta yeellara yaa gelidosona. Mashshan hayqida qaxaretiboonna asaara issife duufo geloosona.

Ezekiel33:32 Ne entaw issi siiqo mazmure lo77o girsan yexiyanne diithi loythidi diixiya asa mela. Enti ne odeysa si7oosona; shin oothokona.

Ezekiel34:4 Daaburidaysata gashtisibeketa; hargidaysata pathibeeketa; meqidaysata koolibeeketa; betidaysata zaaribeeketa; dhaydaysata koybeketa. Hessa aggidi enta wolqan un7ethidi haarideta.
Ezekiel34:5 Dorsati ubbay heemmiya asi dhayin laaletidosona; bazzo do7atas kathi gididosona.
Ezekiel34:6 Ta dorsati laaletidosona; enti zumata bollanne dereta bolla toylatidosona. Biitta gaxa gakanaw laaletidosona; shin enta xomoosey woyko koyey baawa” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

Ezekiel34:14 Taani enta lo77o qooron heemmana; Isra7eele zumati enti heemetiya besse gidana. Enti lo77o qooroy de7iya Isra7eele zumata bolla hemetananne allatana.
Ezekiel34:15 Taani ta huuphen ta dorsata heemmananne shempisana.
Ezekiel34:16 Taani dhayidaysa koyana; betidaysa zaarana; meqidaysa koolana; hargidaysa pathana. Shin taani suure pirdiya henthancho gidiya gisho genen modhidaysanne minnidaysa dhaysana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.

Ezekiel34:24 Hizape guye ta Goday enta Xoossaa gidana; ta aylley Dawiti enta giddon halaqa gidana” yaagees Goday.

Ezekiel37:17 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel37:18 Ne biitta asay neeko
Ezekiel37:19 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda: taani Efreema kushen de7iya Yoosefa xam7anne iyara de7iya Isra7eele kochata ekanaw hanayis; enta nam7aa issi xam7a oothanaw
Ezekiel37:20 “He ne enta bolla xaafida nam7u xam7ata enta sinthan oykada
Ezekiel37:21 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. Taani Isra7eele asaa enti laaletida kawotethata giddofe kessana; ta enta shiishada
Ezekiel37:22 Isra7eele dereta bollanne enta biittan ta enta issi kawotethi oothana; enta ubbaa bolla issi kawo kawothana. Qassi enti zaaridi nam7u biitta gidokona; nam7u kawotethi gididi shaaketokona.
Ezekiel37:23 Hizape guye
Ezekiel37:24 “Ta aylley Dawiti enta kawo gidana; entaw ubbaas issi henthancho xalaali daana. Enti ta higgiya kaallana; ta wogaa minthidi naagana.
Ezekiel37:25 Taani ta aylliya Yayqoobas immidanne enta mayzati de7ida biittan enti daana. He biittan enti
Ezekiel37:26 Ta entara sarotetha caaqo caaqana; he caaqoy merinaa caaqo gidana. Taani enta minthada essana; enta taybuwa darsana; ta keethaa merinaw enta giddon wothana.
Ezekiel37:27 Taani yan entara daana; entaw Xoosse gidana; enti ta ase gidana.
Ezekiel37:28 Xoossa keethay enta giddon merinaw de7iya wode
Ezekiel38:1 Godaa qaalay haysada yaagishe taako yis.
Ezekiel38:2 “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel38:3 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees gada oda. Mosahanne Tobeela waanna halaqa gidida Googe ta ne bolla dendas.
Ezekiel38:4 Ta nena guye zaarana; ne sidhen dafo aathada
Ezekiel38:5 Farsefe
Ezekiel38:6 Gomerinne iya olanchoti ubbay
Ezekiel38:7 “Nenne neeko shiiqida asa ubbay dendite; hintena giigisite; ne entaw halaqa gida.
Ezekiel38:8 Daro wodepe guye
Ezekiel38:9 Neeni
Ezekiel38:10 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He wode qofi ne wozana giddo yin
Ezekiel38:11 Neeni
Ezekiel38:12 Taani enta di77ananne bonqana; kase baysa gidida biitta yidi uttida
Ezekiel38:13 Saaba asaynne Didaana asay Tarsesa zal7anchotinne na7atethi olanchoti ubbay
Ezekiel38:14 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel38:15 Neeni de7iya pudeha bagga biittafe yaana. Nenne neera de7iya daro kawotethati para toggidi
Ezekiel38:16 Biitta kammiya shaarada
Ezekiel38:17 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani ta aylle gidida Isra7eele nabeta baggara
Ezekiel38:18 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: ‘Googey Isra7eele bolla dendiya wode ta hanqoy suullana.
Ezekiel38:19 He wode Isra7eele biittan wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanana; taani ta sheniyaninne ta eexiya hanquwan awaajas.
Ezekiel38:20 Abbaa moloy
Ezekiel38:21 Ta zumatan ubban Googe bolla mashshi dendana mela oothana; olanchoti banta mashsha banta bolla zaaridi
Ezekiel38:22 Taani hargeninne hayqon iya seerana; wolqaama ira
Ezekiel38:23 Hessada oothada
Ezekiel39:1 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel39:2 Ta nena guye zaarana; haaho gidida pudeha bagga biittafe goocha kessada
Ezekiel39:3 Taani ne haddirsa kushiyape dongeta baqa yeggana
Ezekiel39:4 Neeni
Ezekiel39:5 Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday hessa odida gisho
Ezekiel39:6 Maagoge biittaninne yuushoy abban teqetida biittatan
Ezekiel39:7 Ta geeshsha sunthay ta asaa Isra7eele giddon eretanaada oothana. Hizape guye ta geeshsha sunthay cayetena. Kawotethati taani Godaa
Ezekiel39:8 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “He gallasay yaana; attenna” yaagada ta odida gallasay haysa.
Ezekiel39:9 “He wode Isra7eele katamatan de7iya asay keyidi
Ezekiel39:10 Enti mithi mixanaw woyko worape mithi qanxanaw koshshenna. Enti shiishida ola miisheta eeso mithi oothidi go7etana. Bantana bonqidaysata zaaridi bonqana; entaba ekidaysatape enti zaaridi ekana” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel39:11 He gallas Googe moogetiya bessi taani iyaw Isra7eele biittan immana. He bessay abbaafe doloha baggara de7iya Ooge asata Zangaara geetetiya zangaara giddon gidana. Googeynne iya olanchoti ubbay yan moogetiya gisho
Ezekiel39:12 “Isra7eele asay biitta geeshshanaw
Ezekiel39:13 He biittan de7iya asa ubbay aha moogon maadetana; hessan
Ezekiel39:14 Laapun ageenape guye attida ahi de7iko
Ezekiel39:15 Enti biittan yuuyishin
Ezekiel39:16 He katama sunthay Hamoona geetetana. Enti biitta zaaridi geeshshana. Iya heeran
Ezekiel39:17 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Asa na7aw
Ezekiel39:18 Hinte mino asata ashuwa maana; biitta halaqata suuthaa uyana. Enti hintew Baasane modho urge dorsada
Ezekiel39:19 Taani hintew giigisida yarsho ba7aalen hinte kallana gakanaw
Ezekiel39:20 Ta hintew giigisiya gibiraape parata
Ezekiel39:21 “Taani kawotethata giddon ta bonchuwa qoncisana. Kawotethati ubbay ta enta pirdida pirdanne ta enta bolla denthida ta kushiya be7ana.
Ezekiel39:22 He wodiyape doomidi
Ezekiel39:23 Isra7eele asay di7etidi biday banta nagara gaason
Ezekiel39:24 Enta tunatethaanne enta iitatetha mela entaw bessiya seera seeras; ta som7uwa entafe genthas” yaagis.
Ezekiel39:25 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees. “Ha77i taani Yayqooba kochata di7ope zaarada gashtisana; Isra7eele asaa ubbaas qadhetana. Ta geeshsha sunthas mishetada cayetonna mela oothana.
Ezekiel39:26 Enta yashshiyabay bayna
Ezekiel39:27 Taani enta kawotethata ubbaa giddofe zaarada ehana; morketa biittafe enta shiishana. Hessada oothada
Ezekiel39:28 Enti di7etidi baana mela oothiday tana gidiya gishonne enta shiishada
Ezekiel39:29 Taani ta Ayyaana Isra7eele asaa bolla gussana; zaarada ta som7uwa entafe genthike” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel40:1 Nuuni di7etida laatamanne ichashantho laythan
Ezekiel40:2 Xoossay tana qoncethan Isra7eele biitta efidi
Ezekiel40:3 I tana yaa efin taani naase biratada phooliya issi addiya be7as. He uray liinope oosetida wodoronne wadha xam7a oykidi
Ezekiel40:4 I taako
Ezekiel40:5 Taani Xoossa keetha yuuyi aadhida dirsa gimbiya be7as. He addiya kushen usupun wadha adusse gidida xam7i de7ees. Issi adussa wadhay issi wadho bolla oyddu biradheta guja gidees. Dirsa gimbiya likiya wode dalgatethay issi wadhanne takadho; gompaynne adussatethay usupun wadha.
Ezekiel40:6 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel40:7 Yaara aadhiya wode ushacharanne haddirsara penge naageysati eqiya heedzu heedzu kifileti de7oosona. Issi issi kifiley usupun wadha adussenne usupun wadha dalga. Enta giddon de7iya godati ichashu wadha orde. Pengiya naageysata kifiletape ya baggara
Ezekiel40:8 He uray geliya bessaa barandaa wadhin
Ezekiel40:9 Xoossa keethaako simmida pengey wursethan de7ees. He barandaa tuuqeta ordetethay nam7u wadha.
Ezekiel40:10 Doloha bagga pengiyan ushachaninne haddirsa baggan issi gina gidida heedzu naago keethi de7ees.
Ezekiel40:11 He uray dirsa pengiya wadhiya wode dalgatethay tammu wadha
Ezekiel40:12 Issi issi penge naageysata kifiliya sinthan adussatethay issi wadha
Ezekiel40:13 Hafinthan de7iya naageysata kifileti guye baggafe hefinthan de7iya naageysata kifileta guye bagga gakanaw de7iya bessay laatamanne ichashu wadha gidis.
Ezekiel40:14 He uray dabaaba sinthan de7iya wursetha kifiliya wadhin
Ezekiel40:15 Pengiya geliya bessaafe bidi
Ezekiel40:16 Kifileta ubbaas kare bagga simmida guutha maskooteti de7oosona; kifiletape giddon de7iya godatas maskooteti de7oosona. Yaanne haanne shaakiya godata bolla zamba misiley de7ees.
Ezekiel40:17 He uray tana kare dabaabako efis. Yan taani dabaaba yuushon de7iya shuchi hiixetida baasuwanne he baasuwa keexetida hastamu kifileta be7as.
Ezekiel40:18 Shuchay hiixetida baasoy dabaaba yuusho ubbaa gakis; kare dabaabay giddo dabaabape ziqees.
Ezekiel40:19 Giddo dabaaba gathiya
Ezekiel40:20 He uray tana qommo bagga efidi
Ezekiel40:21 Wulohape ushachaninne haddirsa baggara de7iya heedzu naageysata kifileti
Ezekiel40:22 Baranday
Ezekiel40:23 Doloha baggan
Ezekiel40:24 He uray tana garsa bagga dirsa pengiyako kaalethin
Ezekiel40:25 He dirsa pengiya matan de7iya kifileta ubbaas maskooteti de7oosona. Dirsaa pengiya adussatethay ishatamu wadha; dalgatethay laatamanne ichashu wadha.
Ezekiel40:26 Yaa gathiya laapun dethati de7oosona. Baranday dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees.
Ezekiel40:27 Giddo dabaabas hara pengey de7ees. He uray ha nam7u dirsa pengetape giddon de7iya bessaa wadhin
Ezekiel40:28 He uray tana garsa dirsa pengiya baggara giddo dabaabako efis. I dirsa pengiya wadhin
Ezekiel40:29 Naageyisata kifileti
Ezekiel40:30 He dirsa pengey yuushuwan barandati de7oosona; enta adussatethay laatamanne ichashu wadha; gompay ichashu wadha.
Ezekiel40:31 He barandati kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7oosona. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona.
Ezekiel40:32 He uray tana doloha bagga dirsa pengiyara giddo dabaabako efis. I he dirsa pengiya wadhin
Ezekiel40:33 Naageyisata kifileti
Ezekiel40:34 Baranday kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona.
Ezekiel40:35 He uray tana pudeha bagga dirsa pengiyako efis. I he dirsa pengiya wadhin
Ezekiel40:36 Naageyisata kifileti
Ezekiel40:37 Baranday kare bagga dabaaba sinthan de7ees. Pengiya bolla ya baggaranne ha baggara zamba misiley de7ees. Yaa gathiya hospun dethati de7oosona.
Ezekiel40:38 Kare dabaaba qommo baggara
Ezekiel40:39 He barandan ha baggara nam7u xarpheezati
Ezekiel40:40 Barandaafe kare baggara qommo dirsa pengiya matan nam7u xarpheezati ha baggara
Ezekiel40:41 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel40:42 Xuussa yarsho wothanaw giigisida
Ezekiel40:43 Oyddu biradhe aduqiya kaqota godaa bolla yuuyi aadhidi dhishetidi uttidosona. Yarshos shiishiya asho ubbay he xarpheezata bolla uttees.
Ezekiel40:44 He uray tana giddo dabaaba gelsis. Yan pengeti giddo dabaabako dooyetiya nam7u kifileti de7oosona. Entafe issi kifiley qommo dirsa pengiya matara garsa bagga simmis; nam7anthoy garsa dirsa pengiya matara qommo bagga simmis.
Ezekiel40:45 He uray
Ezekiel40:46 Qommo bagga simmida kifiley yarsho bessan oothiya kahinetaba. Kahineti ubbay Saadoqa yaraape yeletida Leeweta; Godaa sinthan eqidi oothanaw besseysati haysata xalaala” yaagis.
Ezekiel40:47 He uray dabaaba wadhin
Ezekiel40:48 I tana Xoossa keetha barandaako efis. Barandaa geliya bessan eqida gobaneta13 wadhin
Ezekiel40:49 Barandaa adussatethay laatamu wadha; gompay tammu wadha. Yaa gathiya tammu dethati de7oosona. Geliya bessan ushacharanne haddirsara eqida nam7u tuuqeti de7oosona.
Ezekiel41:1 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel41:2 Gompay tammu wadha gidis. Haddirsaranne ushachara de7iya godata gompay ichashu wadha. I Geeshsha Bessaa wadhin adussatethay oytamu wadha
Ezekiel41:3 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel41:4 I qol7a wadhin
Ezekiel41:5 He uray Xoossaa keethaa godaa wadhin
Ezekiel41:6 He kifileti issoy issuwa bolla keexetida heedzu pooqe gidin
Ezekiel41:7 Xoossa keethaa yuushon de7iya kifileta dalgatethay pooqey gujiya wode gujees. Xoossa keethaa yuushon de7iya keethaa oosoy garsafe pude dalgishe biya gisho keethay pude guzhetida wode ubban kifileta dalgatethay gujishe bees. Giddo pooqiyara kanthidi
Ezekiel41:8 Xoossa keethaa yuushon dhoqu gida baasoy de7eysa be7as. Iya yuushuwan de7iya kifileti he baasuwa bolla keexetidosona; he baasoy giddo dabaabape usupun wadha dhoqees.
Ezekiel41:9 He kifileta kare bagga godaa ordetethay ichashu wadha. Kaysa bessay Xoossa keethaafenne
Ezekiel41:10 kahineta kifiliyape giddon de7ees; iya ordetethay laatamu wadha.
Ezekiel41:11 Kaysa bessaafe ushachaninne haddirsa baggan de7iya kifileta gelsiya pengeti de7oosona. He pengeti issoy qommo baggara
Ezekiel41:12 Xoossa keethafe wuloha baggara de7iya kaysa bessaafe sintha baggara issi keethi de7ees. He keethaa adussatethay uddufun tammu wadha; gompay laapun tammu wadha. He keethaa godaa ordetethay ichashu wadha.
Ezekiel41:13 He uray Xoossa keetha kare baggaa wadhin
Ezekiel41:14 Doloha baggara de7iya Xoossaa keetha gompay nam7u kaysa bessata gujidi wadhin xeetu wadha gidis.
Ezekiel41:15 Nam7u baggara de7iya aadhiya bessata gujidi
Ezekiel41:16 wuygepe bidi
Ezekiel41:17 Xoossa keetha soo bagga kifileta goday
Ezekiel41:18 Kifileta yuushon
Ezekiel41:19 Issi baggara asa som7o daaniya som7oy zamba misiliya xeellees; hanko baggara gaammo som7o daaniya som7oy zamba misiliya xeellees.
Ezekiel41:20 Geeshsha bessi wuygepe bidi
Ezekiel41:21 Xoossa keetha penge xangeti ubbay oyddu maazaney de7iya ubbay issi like. Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geliya bessaa sinthan
Ezekiel41:22 mithafe oosetida yarsho bessi daaniya bessi bentees. Ika oyddu maazaney gididi
Ezekiel41:23 Geeshsha Bessaa gelsiya issi pengey de7ees; Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelsiya issi pengey de7ees.
Ezekiel41:24 Issi issi pengiyas giddon daakotidi dooyetiya nam7u sanqati de7oosona.
Ezekiel41:25 Godata bolla medhetidaysada Geeshsha Bessaa pengeta sanqata bolla kiruubetanne zambata misiley medhetidi uttis. Gaathi geliya kifiliya sinthan
Ezekiel41:26 He kifiliya geliya godata miyen maskooteti de7oosona. Godati zamba misilen alleeqetidosona. He kifiliya geliya ushachaninne haddirsan de7iya kifileta dethaa baggara kammiya kaari de7ees.
Ezekiel42:1 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel42:2 He keethaa wulay pudeha bagga simmis. Ha keethay xeetu wadha adussenne ishatamu wadha dalga.
Ezekiel42:3 Gido dabaabape laatamu wadha haakidi
Ezekiel42:4 He kifileta pengeti pude xeelloosona. Entafe sintha baggara tammu wadha dalganne xeetu wadha adusse gidida giddora aathiya ogey de7ees.
Ezekiel42:5 He keethas bolla heedzantho pooqey nam7antho pooqiyape xuummees; nam7anthoy koyruwape xuummees. Hessi haniday enti issoy issuwafe guye shiiqidi gimbetida gishosa.
Ezekiel42:6 He pooqiyas bolla bagga kifileti gido kifiletapenne garsa bagga kifiletape xuummiya gisho
Ezekiel42:7 He kifiletape sintha baggara ishatamu wadha aduqiya kare dabaaba baggara de7iya issi gimbey de7ees.
Ezekiel42:8 Kare dabaaba baggara de7iya kifileta adussatethay ishatamu wadha gidishin
Ezekiel42:9 Kare dabaabape gathi geliya wode doloha baggara garsa kifileta geliya pengey de7ees.
Ezekiel42:10 Dugeha baggara kare dabaaba kaallidi Xoossa keethaa dabaabara oyketidi keexetida kare dabaabako simmida kifiley de7ees.
Ezekiel42:11 He keethaa kifileta sinthan ogey de7ees. He keethay qommo baggan de7iya keethara issi gina; adussatethay
Ezekiel42:12 Dirsa gimbey wuriya doloha bagga gaxa doomidi gimbiyas dugeha baggara de7iya kifileta geliya pengey de7ees.
Ezekiel42:13 He uray taako
Ezekiel42:14 Kahineti issi toho Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelidaape guye
Ezekiel42:15 He uray Xoossaa keetha gaatha baggaa wadhidi wursidaape guye doloha bagga dirsa pengiyara tana kare kessidi
Ezekiel42:16 Wadha xam7a ekidi
Ezekiel42:17 Pudeha baggaa he xam7an wadhin
Ezekiel42:18 Dugeha baggaa wadhin
Ezekiel42:19 Wuloha baggaa wadhin
Ezekiel42:20 Hessada oothidi
Ezekiel43:1 He uray tana doloha bagga pengiyako ehis.
Ezekiel43:2 Taani Isra7eele Xoossaa bonchoy doloha baggafe yeysa be7as. Iya yuussaa girsay kixa haatha guntha mela; biittay iya bonchuwan poo7is.
Ezekiel43:3 Ta be7ida qoncethay kase Goday Yerusalaame katamaa dhaysanaw yida wode be7ida qoncethaa daanees. Koboora shaafa matan taani be7ida qoncethaa daanees. He wode ta som7uwa sa7a gathada gufannas.
Ezekiel43:4 Godaa bonchoy doloha pengiyara Xoossaa keethaa giddo gelis.
Ezekiel43:5 He wode Godaa Ayyaanay tana denthidi
Ezekiel43:6 Yan he uray ta matan eqidashin
Ezekiel43:7 I taako
Ezekiel43:8 Issi godaa xalaali tananne enta shaakin
Ezekiel43:9 Hiza eeqa goyinno aggo; banta kawota hawulte ta matape diggo. Yaatiko
Ezekiel43:10 Zaaridi Goday taako
Ezekiel43:11 Enti banta oothidaban yeellatiyaba gidiko
Ezekiel43:12 Xoossa keetha higgey haysa
Ezekiel43:13 Yarsho bessay kase Xoossa keethaa wadhidaysada
Ezekiel43:14 Baasuwape bidi
Ezekiel43:15 Yarshoy xuussa coocey de7iya wursetha dethay oyddu wadha dhoqa. I oyddu maazane gididi
Ezekiel43:16 Tamay eexiya coocey oyddu maazane gididi
Ezekiel43:17 Nam7antho dethay hessa mela oyddu maazane gididi
Ezekiel43:18 Ubbaa Haariya Goday taako
Ezekiel43:19 Ta sinthan eqidi oothiya Saadoqa yaraape yeletida Leewe koche gidida kahinetas nagara yarsho oothada issi wofaano imma” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel43:20 Neeni he suuthaafe ekada
Ezekiel43:21 Nagara yarshos imetida kormaa ekada
Ezekiel43:22 Wontetha gallas borey bayna issi kole ekada
Ezekiel43:23 Geeshsha simmada borey bayna issi wofaanonne issi maraze ekada
Ezekiel43:24 nam7aaka Godaa sinthe shiisha. Kahineti enta bolla maxine laallidi
Ezekiel43:25 “Laapun gallas kumethi
Ezekiel43:26 Kahineti laapun gallas kumethi yarsho bessa geeshshidi Godaas dummayo.
Ezekiel43:27 Ha gallasati wuriya wode
Ezekiel44:1 Hessafe guye
Ezekiel44:2 Goday taako
Ezekiel44:3 Gidoshin
Ezekiel44:4 He uray tana pudeha pengiyako efiya ogiyara efidi
Ezekiel44:5 Goday taako
Ezekiel44:6 Makallancho Isra7eele asaas
Ezekiel44:7 Hinte taw ta kathaa
Ezekiel44:8 Ta geeshsha miisheta bolla aawatona ixidi
Ezekiel44:9 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel44:10 “Tana aggidi
Ezekiel44:11 Enti ta keethan oosancho gido; ta keetha dirsa pengeta naago; Xoossa keethaa oosuwaka ootho. Enti xuussa yarshonne asay ehiya hara yarsho shuko; qassi asaas oothanaw asaako shiiqo.
Ezekiel44:12 Shin enti kase Isra7eele asaa eeqa goyinnisida gishonne asaa nagarako kaalethida gisho
Ezekiel44:13 Enti kahine gididi oothanaw taako shiiqopo; woyko taw dummatida geeshshabakonne Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaako shiiqopo. Enti banta oothida tuna oosuwa gisho
Ezekiel44:14 Hessa gisho enti Xoossa keethan aawatanadanne iya giddon oothanaw de7iya ooso ubbaa oothana mela ta enta shuumana.
Ezekiel44:15 “Shin Isra7eele asay tana aggidi
Ezekiel44:16 Xoossa keethaa enti gelo; taw oothanaw ta yarsho bessa enti shiiqo; aawatetha enti oyko.
Ezekiel44:17 Enti Xoossa keethaas giddo dabaaba geliya wode
Ezekiel44:18 Enti banta huuphen liino goxidi; banta xeessan liino qantha sure danco; cawaya ma7o ma7ofo.
Ezekiel44:19 Asay de7iya kare dabaaba enti keyanaape sinthe Xoossa keethan oothishe ma7ida ma7uwa qaaridi
Ezekiel44:20 “Kahineti banta huuphiya meedetofo woyko adussidi dichofo; banta huuphiya maaran qanxeto.
Ezekiel44:21 Ay kahineti giddo dabaaba geliya wode woyne ushshi uyopo.
Ezekiel44:22 Enti azini hayqida
Ezekiel44:23 “Kahineti Godaas dummatidabaanne dummatonnaba giddon de7iya dummatethaa ta asaa tamaarso; geeshshinne tuna giddon de7iya dummatethaa enta besso.
Ezekiel44:24 Ay mootoy dendikoka
Ezekiel44:25 “Kahiney hayqida ahako shiiqidi
Ezekiel44:26 Tunidaape guye
Ezekiel44:27 Geeshsha bessan haggaazanaw giddo dabaaba geliya wode ba nagaraa gisho yarsho shiisho” yaagees Ubbaa Haariya Goday.
Ezekiel44:28 Kahinetas laati baawa; ta entaw laata. Isra7eele biittan entaw ay laataka immopite; enta laatay tana.
Ezekiel44:29 Enti katha yarsho
Ezekiel44:30 Koyro gakiya dumma dumma kathaa xeera ayfeynne hinte Godaas immiya imota ubbay kahinetassa. Hinte keethay anjetana mela hinte dhiilliyafe koyro kushiya entaw immite.
Ezekiel44:31 Kahineti bawuta woyko do7i wodhida kafo asho woyko mehe asho moopo.
Ezekiel45:1 “Biittaa laattanaw hinte saaman shaakiya wode he biittafe issi saamaa Godaas dummayite. Hessika tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqiyanne tammu kilo mitire dalgiya besse gido. He bessay ubbay geeshsha besse gido.
Ezekiel45:2 He bessaafe oyddu maazane de7iya adussatethaynne dalgatethay issi gina gidiya ichashu xeetu wadha
Ezekiel45:3 He Godaas dummayida bessaafe adusatethay tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga
Ezekiel45:4 Hessi Xoossa keetha giddon Godaas haggaazanaw
Ezekiel45:5 Qassi attida tammanne nam7u kilo mitire bagga aduqiyanne ichashu kilo mitire bagga dalgiya bessay Xoossaa keethan oothiya Leewetas laata gido; enti bantaw duussa katamata yan keexo.
Ezekiel45:6 “Godaas dummayida bessaa matan tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqiyanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga dalgiya bessay katamaa keexanaw de7o; he bessay Isra7eele asa ubbaas gido.
Ezekiel45:7 Isra7eele halaqaas imetida gishoy nam7u baggara Godaas dummayida bessaaninne katamaa bessan zawatees. I wuloha baggara Medetiraane Abbaa gakees; doloha baggara Isra7eele biitta zawa gakees. Iya adussatethay Isra7eele kochaafe issuwa gishuwada wuloha bagga zawape bidi
Ezekiel45:8 He gishoy Isra7eele halaqaas laata gade gido. Hizape guye ta halaqati ta asaa un7ethofo; enti Isra7eele asa ubbay ba kochan kochan biitta ekanaada oothonna” yaagees.
Ezekiel45:9 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees; “Hinteno
Ezekiel45:10 Hintew issuwas issuwas like mizaaneynne maka miishey de7o.
Ezekiel45:11 Maka miishe ubbaas giddo gidiya gomare geetetiya maka miishe gido. Melaba makiya ifa geetetiya miisheynne gukiyaba makiya baate geetetiya miishey issi like gido. Hessa guussay
Ezekiel45:12 Guuthaba makiya wode hinte maka miishey saqile gido. Laatamu geeri issi saqile gido; usupun tammu saqiley issi minaane gido.
Ezekiel45:13 “Hinte imuwa immishe haysada immite. Hinte shiishiya gistefe usupun tammaafe issi kushe
Ezekiel45:14 Shamaho zaytiyape xeetape issi kushe immite. Hessa makiya wode ne makiya miishey baate gido. Tammu baatey issi gomare woyko issi Qoore gidees.
Ezekiel45:15 Isra7eele asay heemmiya nam7u xeetu mehepe de7iya issi wudiyape issi issi mehe immite. Hessi asaa nagara atotethas yarshetiya
Ezekiel45:16 Biittan de7iya asa ubbay hessa ubbaa Isra7eele halaqaas immo.
Ezekiel45:17 Halaqay oothiya oosoy

Ezekiel45:20 Oonika qoponna woyko eronna oothida nagara atotethas
Ezekiel45:21 “Koyro ageenan

Ezekiel45:25 “Laapuntho ageenan
Ezekiel46:1 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagees: “Giddo dabaaba gelsiya doloha bagga dirsa pengey usupun ooso gallasatan gordetidi gam7o; shin Sambaata gallasinne ageena xeero gallasan dooyeto.
Ezekiel46:2 Isra7eele halaqay dirsa pengiya baggara kare dabaabape gaathi gelidi
Ezekiel46:3 He biitta asay Sambaataninne ageena xeero wode he gido dabaaba pengiya sinthan Godaa goyinno.
Ezekiel46:4 Halaqay Sambaata gallas Godaas xuussa yarsho oothidi
Ezekiel46:5 Issi dorsa urgiyara tammane laapun kilo giraame katha yarsho immo. Urge dorsatar shiiqiya katha yarshoy halaqay baw shiishanaw koyeysa mela gido. Qassi issi issi tammane laapun kilo giraame kathara heedzu heedzu litiro zaytey immo.
Ezekiel46:6 Ageena xeero gallas borey bayna issi wofaano
Ezekiel46:7 Issi issi wofaanonne urge dorsi yarshiya wode katha yarshos issi issi tammanne laapun kilo giraame gistenne heedzu heedzu litiro zayte shiisho. Urge dorsatara shiiqiya katha yarshoy halaqay baw shiishanaw koydaysa mela gido.

Ezekiel47:9 Shaafay goggidi biya bessan dumma dumma medhetethati de7oosona. He shaafay yaara goggiya gishonne he haatha oorathidi xillisiya gisho daro moloti yan de7oosona. Hessa gisho haathay goggiya bessan de7iya medhetethati ubbay de7on daana.

Ezekiel48:8 “Yihuda zawara oyketidi
Ezekiel48:9 “He bessaafe neeni Godaas dummayada wothiya bessay tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adussenne tammu kilo mitire dalga gido.
Ezekiel48:10 He bessaafe baggay kahinetas dummatida besse gido; I pudeha baggara tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adusse; wuloha baggaranne doloha baggara ichashu kilo mitire dalga gido. Xoossa keethay iyaw giddo ginan de7ees.
Ezekiel48:11 Ha dummatida bessay Isra7eele asay ta ogiyape kare kare keyida wode entara kare keyida Leewetada giddona
Ezekiel48:12 Hessi Godaas dummatida biittafe entaw dumma gisho; I Ubbaafe geeshsha Bessi. Enta zaway Leewetas saaman imeto.
Ezekiel48:13 “Kahineta zawara oyketidi

Ezekiel48:15 “Attida nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga dalganne tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga adussa bessay katamaa asa ubbay keethaasinne mehe heemmiya besse gido; katamay he biitta giddo ginan de7o.
Ezekiel48:16 He katamay oyddu maazanera de7ees. Pudeha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; dugeha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; doloha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha; wuloha baggay oyddu mukulunne ichashu xeetu wadha.
Ezekiel48:17 Katamaas hentha gadey de7o; he gadey pudeha baggara
Ezekiel48:18 Xoossa keethay keexetidi simmin
Ezekiel48:19 He kataman de7iya Isra7eele zare gidida oonika he biitta goyanaw danda7ees.
Ezekiel48:20 Hinte dummaya bessaa oyddu maazaney tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga aduqo. He bessay katamay keexetida bessaanne geeshsha bessaa gujees.
Ezekiel48:21 “Geeshsha bessaafenne katamaa bessaafe attida biittay halaqaa gisho gido. Hessika tammanne nam7u kilo mitirenne bagga gidida geeshsha bessaafe bidi doloha bagga zawa gakees. Wuloha baggan de7iya tammanne nam7u kilo mitire gidida katamaa biittay wuloha baggaa zawa gakees. Hessada hanidi geeshsha bessaynne Xoossay keethay giddon gidana.
Ezekiel48:22 Hessa gisho
Ezekiel48:23 “Attida kochatas biittay haysada hanidi shaaketis. Dolohape wuloha gakanaw de7iya issi saamay Biniyaame kochaas imeto.

Daniel5:27 TEQEL: (mazzanetis) ‘Mizaanen mazzanetada
Daniel5:28 PAARES: (shaaketis) ‘Ne kawotethay shaaketidi Meedonasinne Farses imetis’ ” guussu.

Daniel5:31 Iya kawotethaa
Daniel6:1 Kawoy Daariyosi ba kawotetha ubbaa giddon baape garsara biitta haariya xeetanne laatamu asata shuumanaw qopis.
Daniel6:2 Kawas aybika paconna mela shuumata aawatethan xeellana mela heedzu asata halaqa oothidi dooris; dooretidaysatape issoy Daanela.
Daniel6:3 Daaneli ooso oothanaw baw de7iya dumma eran hara halaqatapenne shuumatape aadhidi bentis. Hessa gisho
Daniel6:4 Biitta shuumatinne halaqati Daanela mootanaw
Daniel6:5 Wursethan enti
Daniel6:6 Hessafe guye
Daniel6:7 Nuuni ne kawotetha ooso oothiya halaqati
Daniel6:8 Hiza kawaw
Daniel6:9 Hessa gisho
Daniel6:10 Daaneli awaajoy parametidi keydaysa erida wode ba soo bis; pooqe bolla de7iya kifiliya gelis. He kifiliya maskootey Yerusalaame bagga simmidi dooyetidi de7ishin
Daniel6:11 He asati issife bidi
Daniel6:12 Enti kawako bidi
Daniel6:13 Enti
Daniel6:14 Kawoy hessa si7ida wode daro azzanis; Daanela ashshanaw qopidi
Daniel6:15 He wode asati issife kawako bidi
Daniel6:16 Kawa kiitan
Daniel6:17 Enti shuchu ehidi
Daniel6:18 Kawoy ba gadho simmidi
Daniel6:19 Kawoy wonta guura dendidi
Daniel6:20 I azzanishe yaa gakidi
Daniel6:21 Daaneli zaaridi
Daniel6:22 Ta Xoossay ba kiitanchuwa kiittidi
Daniel6:23 Kawoy daro ufaytidi
Daniel6:24 Kawoy Daanela mootida asata ehana mela kiittis. Enti oyketidi
Daniel6:25 Kawoy Daariyosi asaas
Daniel6:26 “Ta kawotethan de7iya asa ubbay Daanela Xoossaa yayyana melanne kokorana mela taani awaajo kessas. “I merinaw de7iya de7o Xoossaa; iya kawotethay polo dhayenna; iya kawotethaas zawi baawa.

Daniel11:1 “Meedona asi gidida Daariyosi
Daniel11:2 “Hiza ta new tuma odayis. Hara heedzu kawoti Farse biittan kawotana; entafe guye kawotiya oyddantho kawoy
Daniel11:3 “Hessafe guye
Daniel11:4 I wolqan minnida wode iya kawotethay laaletidi
Daniel11:5 “Dugeha biitta kawoy mino gidana; shin iya shuumatape issoy iyape daro minnidi
Daniel11:6 Guutha laythafe guye
Daniel11:7 “Guutha wudepe guye
Daniel11:8 Qassi enta xoossata
Daniel11:9 Pudeha biitta kawoy dugeha biitta kawa bolla dendana; shin ba yida ogiyara guye simmana.
Daniel11:10 “Pudeha biitta kawa adde nayti olas giigidi
Daniel11:11 He wode dugeha biitta kawoy daro hanqetidi
Daniel11:12 Daro olanchota di77idaape guye
Daniel11:13 “Pudeha biitta kawoy kaseysafe aadhiya hara olanchota giigisana. Guutha laythi gam7idaape guye
Daniel11:14 He wode daro asay dugeha biitta kawa bolla dendana. Qoncethay poletana mela ne asaape issi issi makallanchoti dendana
Daniel11:15 Pudeha biitta kawoy dugeha biitta yidi
Daniel11:16 Iyara eqetanaw danda7ey bayna gisho pudeha biitta kawoy ba koydaba ubbaa oothana. I dooretida biittan minni eqidi
Daniel11:17 I ba kawotethan de7iya wolqa ubbaa ekidi yaanaw halchana; dugeha biitta kawuwara dabbotetha caaqo medhana. He kawotethaa dhaysanaw halchidi
Daniel11:18 Ba som7uwa yuushoy abban teqetida biittatako zaaridi
Daniel11:19 Pudeha biitta kawoy ba biitta
Daniel11:20 “Iya bessan kawotiya hara kawoy ba kawotetha bonchuwa naaganaw giira giirsiya ase kawotethaa giddo kiittana. Gidoshin
Daniel11:21 “Iya bessan issi kadhetida asi dendana; shin enti iyaw kawotetha boncho immokona. Asay sa7i saro gidi uttidashin
Daniel11:22 Daro olanchoti iya sinthafe pitetidi dhayana; caaqo halaqayka hayqana.
Daniel11:23 Iyara caaquwa caaqi simmidi
Daniel11:24 Asay sa7i saro gidi uttidashin
Daniel11:25 Ba wolqaa minthidi
Daniel11:26 Kawuwara issi gaytan meysati iya dhaysana; iya olanchoti pitetana; daroti olan hayqana.
Daniel11:27 Ha nam7u kawoti banta wozanan iita qofa oykidi
Daniel11:28 Pudeha biitta kawoy daro duretethara ba biitta simmana. Shin I ba wozanan geeshsha caaquwa ixana. Geeshsha caaquwa qohanaw iya bolla issiba oothidi
Daniel11:29 “Qametida wodey gakin
Daniel11:30 Kiximape yaa olaa markabeti iya daganthana. Guye simmidi
Daniel11:31 “Iya olanchoti Xoossa keethaanne iya yuushuwa tunisana; gallas gallas yarshetiya yarshuwa diggana. Yaatidi
Daniel11:32 I caaqo qaala mentheyisata
Daniel11:33 “Asaa giddon de7iya cincati daro asaa tamaarsana. Shin guutha woden he asati mashshan hayqana
Daniel11:34 He metuwa giddon de7ishe
Daniel11:35 Cincatape issoti issoti dhubetana. Qametida wodey buroo gakiboonna gisho
Daniel11:36 “Kawoy bana lo77idaba oothana; bana xoossata ubbaafe dhoqu oothidi gitayana; xoossata Xoossaa bolla kase si7etidi eronna iita qaala odetana. Hananaw de7iyabay hananaw bessiya gisho
Daniel11:37 I
Daniel11:38 I enta boncho aggidi miixata xoossaa bonchana; iya mayzati eronna xoosse
Daniel11:39 Imatha xoossan maadetidi
Daniel11:40 “Wursetha wodey gakin
Daniel11:41 I geeshsha biitta bolla dendana; daro biittati iya kushen kundana. Shin Edoomey
Daniel11:42 I daro biittata bolla dendiya wode
Daniel11:43 Gibxe worqaa
Daniel11:44 Shin doloha baggaafenne pudeha baggafe yaa oday
Daniel11:45 I ba kawota dunkaaniya abbaafenne lo77o geeshsha zumaape giddon tokana. Shin I

Hosea1:1 Ooziyani

Hosea1:4 Yaatin
Hosea1:5 He gallas taani Izra7eela zangaaran Isra7eele olanchota mentherethana.
Hosea1:6 Gomera nam7antho qanthatada
Hosea1:7 Shin taani Yihuda asaas qadhetana; taani enta dongen woyko mashshan woyko olan woyko paratan woyko para asatan gidonashin
Hosea1:8 Gomera Loruhaamo dhanthi duuthidaape guye qanthatada hara adde na7a yelasu.
Hosea1:9 Yaatin
Hosea1:10 “Gidoshin

Hosea2:1 “Hinte ishata

Hosea2:7 Iya ba laggethota geedo woxana
Hosea2:8 Kathaa

Hosea4:1 Ha biittan de7iya asa ubbaa
Hosea4:2 Ha biitta bolla de7ey baadethi
Hosea4:3 Hessa gaason biitta ubbay yeekana; biittan de7iya ubbay daaburana. Sa7a do7ati
Hosea4:4 Hinteno
Hosea4:5 Hinte gallasinne qamma dhubeteeta; nabetika hintera dhubetoosona. Hessa gisho
Hosea4:6 Ta asaas eratethi bayna gisho dhayidosona. Hinte eratethi ixida gisho
Hosea4:7 Kahineta tayboy dari dari biya wode tana guji guji naaqidosona; taani enta bonchuwa qaarada yeellayana.
Hosea4:8 Ta asaa nagaray entaw kathi gidida gisho enti ta asay balaba oothana mela koyoosona.
Hosea4:9 Kahineti deriyape dummatibokona. Taani enta hanota gisho
Hosea4:10 Enti Godaa aggida gisho maana
Hosea4:11 Laymatethi
Hosea4:12 Enti mithafe oosetida eeqa misile zore oychoosona; enta xam7ay enta oysha zaarees. Laymatetha ayyaanay enta balethis; enti banta Xoossaafe haakidi laymatidosona.
Hosea4:13 Dereta huuphen yarsho yarshoosona; lo77o kuyay de7iya wolaa garsan
Hosea4:14 Hinte macca nayti laymatiya wodenne hinte nayta macheti laammiya wode taani seerike. Ayis giiko
Hosea4:15 “Isra7eele asato

Hosea4:18 Enti daro woyne ushsha uyi simmidi
Hosea4:19 Enta carkoy efana; banta eeqas yarshida yarshota gaason enti yeellatana.”
Hosea5:1 “Hinteno kahineto
Hosea5:2 Geellati wodho aggibokona; hessa gisho
Hosea5:3 Taani Efreema erayis; Isra7eeley taape geemmibeenna. Efreema
Hosea5:4 “Isra7eele asay banta Xoossaako simmonna mela enta iita oosoy enta teqis. Laymatetha ayyaani enta wozanan de7iya gisho enti Godaa erokona.
Hosea5:5 Isra7eele asaa otoroy enta bolla markatees. Isra7eele asaynne Efreema asay banta nagara gaason dhubetoosona; Yihuda asayka entara dhubetees.
Hosea5:6 Enti Godaas yarshanaw banta dorsa wudiyanne mehe wudiya laagi ekidi iya koyanaw baana; shin I entafe shaaketida gisho iya demmokona.
Hosea5:7 Enti laymatethan nayta yelida gisho Godaas ammanetibokona. Hessa gisho

Hosea5:12 Hessa gisho
