Hosea6:1 Isra7eele asay
Hosea6:2 Nam7u gallasape guye I nuna pathana; heedzantho gallasan nu iya sinthan daana mela nuna denthana.
Hosea6:3 Ane Godaa eroos; iya eranaw minthidi kaalloos. Xalqey doleysada I qoncana; torche iri yeysada I nuuko yaana” yaagidosona.
Hosea6:4 Goday
Hosea6:5 Hessa gisho
Hosea6:6 Ta yarsho gidonashin maarota koyayis; xuussa yarsho gidonashin Xoossaa ero koyayis.
Hosea6:7 “Shin enti Addaameda
Hosea6:8 Galada katamay suuthi gukiya iita ooso oothiya asay kumida katama.
Hosea6:9 Pangati ase wodhanaw qosetidi naageysada kahineta cugay hessada naagoosona. Seekema katamaa efiya ogiyan naagidi ase wodhoosona; enti yeellaya worandzo ooso oothosona.
Hosea6:10 Taani Isra7eele asaa giddon daganthiyaba be7as. Efreema giddon laymatethi de7ees; Isra7eeley tunis.
Hosea6:11 “Yihuda
Hosea7:1 “Taani Isra7eele pathanaw koyiya wode Efreema nagaraynne Samaare asaa iita oosoy qoncis. Enti ubba wode cimmoosona; kaysoti menthidi geloosona; pangati keyidi bonqoosona.
Hosea7:2 Shin taani enta iita ooso ubbaa ereysa akeekokona. Enta iita oosoy enta naaqi oykis; he iita oosoy ubba wode ta sinthan de7ees.
Hosea7:3 “Enti kawa banta iitatethan
Hosea7:4 Enti ubbay laammoosona; munuqay dendana gakanaw daabbo uukeysi tama shiisho koshshonaysada enti teellida cooce mela.
Hosea7:5 Banta kawa boncho ba7aale gallasan halaqati woyne ushshan mathotidosona. Ika qelqiseysatas ba kushiya immis.
Hosea7:6 Enta wozanay tama cooce mela; enti shiiqidi iitabaa maqetidosona. Enta hanqoy qamma kumetha cuuyishe aqees; sa7i wontiya wode tama lacoda eexees.
Hosea7:7 Enti ubbay teellida cooce mela banta halaqata moosona. Enta kawoti ubbay kundidosona; entafe oonika tana xeegey baawa.
Hosea7:8 “Efreema asay hara kawotetha asaara walaketis; Efreema asay shiretiboonna uytha mela gidis.
Hosea7:9 Allagati iya wolqaa midosona
Hosea7:10 Isra7eele asaa otoroy enta bolla markatees. Hessi ubbay haninka enti Godaako
Hosea7:11 “Efreema asay holleda eeyanne coo cimeteyisata. Enti maado demmanaw issi toho Gibxe; issi toho Asoore simmoosona.
Hosea7:12 Enti biya wode taani enta bolla gite yeggana; taani enta kafo oykiyada oykana. Enta iita oosuwa gisho taani enta seerana.
Hosea7:13 “Enta ayye! Enti taape haakidosona. Entaw dhayo gido! Enti ta bolla makallidosona. Taani enta wozanaw koyas
Hosea7:14 Banta hiixan zin7idi zeleelosona
Hosea7:15 “Enta loohisidaynne minthiday tana
Hosea7:16 Enti hadabaako simmidosona. Enti ammanthona donge gididosona. Enta halaqati iitaba odetida gisho mashshan wurana; hessika entaw Gibxen miichas gidana.
Hosea8:1 “Moyze punna! Enti ta caaquwanne ta higgiya menthida gisho
Hosea8:2 Isra7eele asay
Hosea8:3 Shin Isra7eele asay lo77oba ixida gisho
Hosea8:4 Enti tana oychonna bantaw kawota kawothidosona; ta eronna de7ishin bantaw halaqata dooridosona. Dhayanaw machidi eeqa misileta banta birapenne worqafe medhidosona.
Hosea8:5 Samaare asaw
Hosea8:6 Ha mara eeqa misiley kushe hiillan medhetisipe attishin
Hosea8:7 “Enti carko zeridi gote buucosona. Eqon de7iya enta kathaas ayfey bentenna; dhiilleyka baawa; ayfey de7ikoka allagati maana.
Hosea8:8 Isra7eele asay ha77i allaga asaa giddon mitetidosona; enti pathonna asi gididosona.
Hosea8:9 Enti baddo harey barka toylateysa mela toylatishe Asoore bidosona. Efreema asay banta miishiyan laggetho shammidosona.
Hosea8:10 Bantana maaddana mela miishen shammikoka ta enta shiishana. Kare biitta kawotinne halaqati entana un7ethin enti coo dhayana.
Hosea8:11 “Efreema asay nagara yarsho yarshiya daro bessata keexis
Hosea8:12 Taani entaw ta higgiyan darobaa xaafas
Hosea8:13 Enti yarshanaw dosoosona; yarsho ashuwa moosona
Hosea8:14 Isra7eele asay bana Medhidaysa dogidi
Hosea9:1 Isra7eele asato
Hosea9:2 Hessa gisho
Hosea9:3 Enti Godaa biittan gam7okona. Efreemi Gibxe biitta simmana; Asoore biittan tuna kathi maana.
Hosea9:4 Enti Godaas woyne ushsha yarsho gussokona; enta yarshoy iya ufaysenna. He yarshoy entaw shocha mela gidana; hessa miya ubbay tunana. He kathay enta koshaa xalaala zaaranaasafe attishin
Hosea9:5 Godaa hinte bonchana mela I hintew immida ba7aale gallasatan hinte ay oothanee?
Hosea9:6 Enti dhayope kessi ekikoka Gibxey enta shiishana; Mempisa katamay enta moogana. Enti shiishida bira miishe ubbaa sharaafi mittana; enti de7iya bessan buloy dolana.
Hosea9:7 Seera gallasi yis; pirda wodey gakis. Isra7eele asay hessa ero! Hinte nagaraa gishonne morketetha gisho nabey eeya mela Xoossa asi geetetidaysi gooshsha mela taybetis.
Hosea9:8 Nabey Xoossara gididi
Hosea9:9 Gib7a kataman hanidaysada enti tunidosona. Xoossay enta naaquwa hassayana; nagaraa gisho enta seerana.
Hosea9:10 Goday
Hosea9:11 Efreema bonchoy kafoda paalli dhayana; hizape guye yeloy baawa; qanthatoy baawa; atethi baawa.
Hosea9:12 Enti na7a yelidi dichiyaba gidikoka ta enta wodha wursana. Taani entafe haakida wode entana ayye!
Hosea9:13 Efreemi lo77o bessan toketida zamba mitha mela hanin be7as
Hosea9:14 Abeeti Godaw
Hosea9:15 Goday
Hosea9:16 Efreemi deshetin
Hosea9:17 Enti iyaw kiitetonna ixida gisho ta Xoossay enta pixiri holana; enti kawotethata giddon toylatishe daana.
Hosea10:1 Isra7eele asay daro ayfe ayfiya daayida woyne mela; enta ayfey darida mela eeqa yarsho bessata darsi keexidosona. Enta biittay duretida keena goyinniya eeqa tuussata alleeqisidi medhidosona.
Hosea10:2 Enta wozanay caaketis; ha77i enti banta nagaraa tookana. Goday enta yarsho bessata laallana; enta eeqa tuussata dhaysana.
Hosea10:3 He wode asay
Hosea10:4 Enti hanonna ufaysa qaala geloosona; wordon caaqoosona; Hessa gisho
Hosea10:5 Samaare kataman de7iya asay Beet-Aweenan de7iya mara misiliyas yashshan kokoroosona. Iya bonchoy iyape qaaretida gisho iyaw yeekana; he eeqa misiliya kahineti waassana.
Hosea10:6 He eeqa misiley Asoore tooketidi
Hosea10:7 Samaare kawoy haatha goponto gididi dhayana.
Hosea10:8 Isra7eele asay Aweena kataman eeqas goyinnishe
Hosea10:9 Goday
Hosea10:10 Taani dosida wode he geellata seerana. Enti oothida daro nagaraa gisho taani enta seeriya wode kawotethati enta bolla dendana.
Hosea10:11 Efreemi kathi yedhanaw dosiya wadhi kessida wofaano mela. Shin taani iya lo77iya morgiyan qambara wothada waaxana. Yihuda asay worxafana; Yayqooba asay shirechana.
Hosea10:12 Goday yidi xillotethi hinte bolla bukisana gakanaw iya koyite. Hinte xillotethi zeriyaba gidiko merina siiqo cakana. Hessa gisho
Hosea10:13 Shin hinte
Hosea10:14 Hinte bolla wolqaama oli dendana; beni Kawoy Salmani Beet-Arbela katamaa olidi laallidaysadanne aayetanne nayta dhaysidaysada qassi hinte miixata dhaysana.
Hosea10:15 Beetele kataman de7eysato
Hosea11:1 “Isra7eeley na7a de7iya wode iya dosiday tana; ta na7aa Gibxefe xeegas.
Hosea11:2 Taani enta darsada xeegin
Hosea11:3 Efreema asaa kushiya oykada hemethi tamaarsiday tana
Hosea11:4 Taani enta qadheninne siiqo wodoron goochas; enta morgefe qambara denthada hokada enta muzas.
Hosea11:5 Enti taako simmonna ixidi Gibxe biitta simmana; Asoore biitta kawoy enta bolla kawotana.
Hosea11:6 Enta kataman mashshi dendana; enta katamata pengeta mentherethana; enta zoretay laaletana.
Hosea11:7 Ta asay taape haakanaw koyis. Enti Xoossaako waassikoka
Hosea11:8 Efreemi
Hosea11:9 Taani hinte giddon de7iya Geeshsha Xoossaafe attishin
Hosea11:10 Enti Godaa kaallana; ika gaammoda gudana. I gudiya wode iya nayti wuloha baggafe kokorishe yaana.
Hosea11:11 Gibxefe kafoda
Hosea11:12 Efreema asay wordon
Hosea12:1 Efreema asay wontafe omarsi gakanaw doloha carko oykees woyko yedethees. Enti wordonne geellatethi darsoosona; Asoore biittara caaqidosona; shamaho zayte Gibxe biitta yeddoosona.
Hosea12:2 Godaas Yihuda asaara mootoy de7ees; I Yayqooba nayta enta ogiyada seerana; enta oosuwada entaw zaarana.
Hosea12:3 Yayqoobi ba aaye ulon de7ishe ba ishaa gindiya oykis. Dicci gakidi Xoossara butetis;
Hosea12:4 kiitanchora baaxetidi xoonis. Bana keeha ayfen xeellana mela ba ishaa yeekidi woossis. Yayqoobi Xoossaa Beetelen demmin Xoossay yan iyara haasayis.
Hosea12:5 I Godaa
Hosea12:6 Hessa gisho
Hosea12:7 Zal7anchoy wordo mizaanen zal7ees; I asaa cimmanaw dosees.
Hosea12:8 Efreemi
Hosea12:9 Shin taani hintena Gibxe biittafe kessada ehida Godaa
Hosea12:10 Taani nabetas odas; daro qoncethi entaw immas; enta baggara daro leemisota odas” yaagis.
Hosea12:11 Galadi iita nagarancho; Galada asati pathonayisata. Enti Galgalan kormata yarshana. Enta yarsho bessay goshshan de7iya keela shuchada laaletana.
Hosea12:12 Yayqoobi Soore biitta baqatis; Isra7eeley macho ekanaw une oothis. Koyta immanaw yan dorse heemmis.
Hosea12:13 Goday Isra7eele asaa nabeta baggara Gibxe biittafe kessidi he nabeta baggara enta naagis.
Hosea12:14 Shin Efreemi Godaa daro hanqethis; I suuthi gussida gisho iya Goday achana; iya cashshaa iyaw zaarana.
Hosea13:1 Efreemi odetida wode si7ida ubbay yashshan kokoris; Isra7eele biittan enti bonchetida asi. Shin Ba7aale eeqa goyinnidosona; he nagara gaason hayqidosona.
Hosea13:2 Ha77ika nagara bolla nagara oothosona; banta bira sheeshidi bantaw eeqa medhidosona; hiillan oosetida misileta giigisidosona; ubbayka kushe hiillan medhetidosona. Asay entaba odishe
Hosea13:3 Hessa gisho
Hosea13:4 Goday “Taani hintena Gibxe biittafe kessada ehida Godaa
Hosea13:5 Bazzon
Hosea13:6 Taani hintena muzin
Hosea13:7 Hessa gisho
Hosea13:8 Mari eketida maahe mela taani hintera gahetada ta hintena puuzana. Taani hintena gaammoda mentherethana; bazzo do7ada hintena pooshshana.
Hosea13:9 “Isra7eele asato
Hosea13:10 Hinte tana
Hosea13:11 Taani ta hanquwan hintew kawo immas; ta yiluwan iya denthas.
Hosea13:12 Efreema balaynne nagaray xaafetidi uttis.
Hosea13:13 Iqethi oykida maccasi un7eteysa mela un7i iya bolla yaana. Shin I eri bayna na7a; yeletiya wodey gakin
Hosea13:14 Taani enta duufope ashshana; hayqo wolqaafe wozana. Hayqo
Hosea13:15 Efreemi ba ishata giddon minnikoka
Hosea13:16 Samaare asay banta Xoossaa bolla geellatida gisho
Hosea14:1 Isra7eele asaw
Hosea14:2 Godaako simmidi
Hosea14:3 Asoorey nuna ashshena; nu ola paratanka ammanetoko. Nuuni nu kushen medhida eeqa misileta ubbaa
Hosea14:4 Goday
Hosea14:5 Taani Isra7eele asaas aka gidana; enti ciishshada ciyidi
Hosea14:6 Enta dolay cil7ana; enti shamahoda lo77ana. Enta sawoy Libaanose zigada tonku gaana.
Hosea14:7 Asay simmidi ta kuya garsan shempana; enti dolada cil7ana; enti woyneda ciiyana; Libaanose woyne ushshada eretiyaba gidana.
Hosea14:8 Efreema asaw
Hosea14:9 Cincatethi de7iya oonika haysa akeeko; wozani de7iya oonika hessa ero. Godaa ogey suure; xilloti he ogiyara hemetoosona; shin nagaranchoti iyan dhubetoosona.
Joel1:1 Batu7eela na7aa Iyyu7eelako Goday kiitida qaalay haysa.
Joel1:2 Hinteno cimato
Joel1:3 Haysa hinte naytas odite; hinte nayti banta naytas odo; enta nayti kaalliya yeletas odo.
Joel1:4 Gondofe attida kathaa booley mis; boolepe attida kathaa guddoy mis; guddofe attida kathaa xaqoy mis.
Joel1:5 Mal7iya woyney hintefe attida gisho
Joel1:6 Tayboy bayna booley ta biitta oykis; Enta achay gaammo acha mela; enta gacoy macca gaammo gaco mela.
Joel1:7 Enti ta woyniya dhaysidosona; ta balasiya mitha dhoggidosona. Enti poqidi mida gisho
Joel1:8 Geela7iya
Joel1:9 Katha yarshoynne ushsha yarshoy Godaa keethan dhayida gisho
Joel1:10 Goshshay mela attis; biittay yeekees; kathay dhayis; woyneynne zaytey melis.
Joel1:11 Gaden de7iya gisteynne bangi dhayida gisho
Joel1:12 Woyney melis; balasey shullis; oromaaney
Joel1:13 Hinteno kahineto
Joel1:14 Xooma awaajite; geeshsha shiiqo xeegite. Cimatanne biittan de7iya asa ubbaa Godaa hinte Xoossaa keethan shiishite; yan Godaako waassite.
Joel1:15 Godaa gallasay matis; he gallasaa ayye! He gallasay Ubbaa Danda7iya Xoossaa hanqo gallas gididi yees.
Joel1:16 Nu sinthafe kathi
Joel1:17 Zeretida zerethay biitta giddon buuqis; kathay dhayida gisho eley kallotis; shaaley laaletis.
Joel1:18 Heemmiya bessi bayna gisho
Joel1:19 Abeeti Godaw
Joel1:20 Goggiya haathi melida gisho
Joel2:1 Xiyoonen moyze punnite; ta geeshsha zumaa bolla waassite. Biittan de7iya asi ubbay kokoro; Godaa gallasay yees; karen de7ees.
Joel2:2 He gallasay dhumanne caagana gallas; shaaranne sakana dhuma gallas! Zumaa bolla xalqey caareysada daronne wolqaama booley biitta ma7ana. Hessa melabay kase hanibeenna
Joel2:3 Entafe sinthara miya tami bees; entafe guyera lacoy xuuggees. Enta sinthay Gannate mela; shin enta guyey booddila bazzo mela; entafe aybika kessi ekenna.
Joel2:4 Enta medhoy para medho mela; enti ola parada adarsoosona.
Joel2:5 Pari goochiya gaareda giiroosona; deriya huuphera gupoosona. Buuriya miya tama lacoda xuuggoosona; ola baanaw keyida wolqaama olancho daanosona.
Joel2:6 Enta sinthan asi kokorees; yashshan asa som7oy kareexees.
Joel2:7 Enti olanchoda woxoosona; toora asada dirsaa bollara gupoosona. Enti ubbay maaran boosona; banta salpiyafe gaxa keyokona.
Joel2:8 Issoy issuwara sugetokona; ubbay qinxi gidi sinthe boosona. Enti bantara eqeteyisata menthidi boosona; enta teqiyabay baawa.
Joel2:9 Enti katamaa oykoosona; dirsa gimbiya bollara woxoosona. Enti keetha bolla keyoosona; kaysoda maskootera geloosona.
Joel2:10 Enta sinthan biitti qaaxees; saloti kokoroosona. Awinne ageeni dhumees; xoolintoti banta poo7uwa diggoosona.
Joel2:11 Goday ba olanchota sinthan guummees; iyaw kiitetiya olanchoti taybope bolla. Godaa gallasay gitanne daro yashshees; He gallasa danda7anay oonee?
Joel2:12 “Ha7ika xooman
Joel2:13 Hinte wozanaape attishin
Joel2:14 Goday hinte Xoossay
Joel2:15 Xiyoonen moyze punnite; xooma awaajite; geeshsha shiiquwa shiiqite!
Joel2:16 Asaa shiishidi
Joel2:17 Godaas oothiya kahineti Xoossaa keethaa barandaafenne yarsho bessaafe giddon eqidi yeeko. Enti haysada yaagidi woosso; “Abeeti Godaw
Joel2:18 Goday ba biittas de7iya mishan ba asaas qadhetis.
Joel2:19 Goday zaaridi ba asa haysada yaagana; “Heko
Joel2:20 “Pudeha baggara yida booliya
Joel2:21 Biittaw
Joel2:22 Hinteno sa7aa meheto
Joel2:23 Hinteno Xiyoone asato
Joel2:24 Kathaa bukiya wudumman kathi kumana; woyniyanne zaytiya gum7iya ollay kumidi palahana.
Joel2:25 Kase taani hinte giddo yeddida
Joel2:26 Hinte min kalsidi palahiya kathi daana; malaalsiyaba hintew oothida Godaa; hinte Xoossa sunthu galatana; ta asay zaaridi yeellatenna.
Joel2:27 He wode taani Isra7eele giddon de7eysa
Joel2:28 Hizape guye haysada hanana; taani asa ubbaa bolla ta Ayyaana gussana. Hinte adde naytinne macca nayti tinbite odana; hinte cimati amuho amuhana; hinte na7atethati qoncethi be7ana.
Joel2:29 He gallasatan ta adde aylleta bollanne ta macca aylleta bolla ta Ayyaana gussana.
Joel2:30 Taani saloninne sa7an malaalsiyaba oothana
Joel2:31 Gitanne yashshiya Godaa gallasay yaanape kase
Joel2:32 He wode haysada hanana; Godaa sunthaa xeegiya ubbay attana. Goday gidaysada Xiyoone zumaaninne Yerusalaamen attidaysati daana.
Joel3:1 “He gallasaninne he wodiyan taani Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa di7etethaafe zaarada anjana.
Joel3:2 Taani kawotethatan de7iya asaa shiishada
Joel3:3 Ta asaa bolla saama yeggidosona; laymatiya maccas demmanaw
Joel3:4 “Hinteno
Joel3:5 Ta bira
Joel3:6 Yihudanne Yerusalaame asaa enta biittafe haassi efidi
Joel3:7 Heko
Joel3:8 Taani hinte adde naytanne hinte macca nayta Yihuda asaas aatha immana. Enti haaho biittan de7iya Saaba asaas enta bayzana. Taani Goday haysa odas.
Joel3:9 “Haysada yaagidi kawotethata giddon awaajite; Olas giigite; mino asata denthethite
Joel3:10 Hinte marasha mashshe
Joel3:11 Hinteno
Joel3:12 “Kawotethati dendidi
Joel3:13 Enta iitatethay daro; caka wodey gakida kathada enta cakite. Woyne ayfey ollan kumin yedheysada
Joel3:14 Pirda zangaaran Goday pirdiya gallasay gakis; hessa gisho
Joel3:15 He gallas awinne ageeni dhumana; xoolintoti banta poo7uwa diggana.
Joel3:16 Goday Xiyoonen gididi dechana; Yerusalaamen ba qaala sissana; saloynne sa7i kokorana. Shin Goday ba asaas
Joel3:17 “He wode hinte
Joel3:18 He gallas dereti mal7anto woyne ushshan xokana; zumati maathi goggana. Yihuda biittan de7iya shaafa ubban haathi pultana. Godaa keethan pultoy dhuuqana; Seexima zangaara ushshana.
Joel3:19 “Gibxey baysa gidana; Edoomey booddila bazzo gidana. Enti Yihuda asaa bolla iitabaa oothidosona; xillo asaa suuthaa gussidosona.
Joel3:20 Shin Yihudinne Yerusalaamey merinaw
Joel3:21 Taani halo keyonna aggida enta suuthaa haluwa buroo keyana” yaagees Goday.

Amos1:2 I
Amos1:3 Goday
Amos1:4 Hessa gisho
Amos1:5 Taani Damasqo katamaa pengiya menthana; Aweena zangaaran de7iya asaa yedethananne kawota xam7aa oykidaysata Beet-Edenape dhaysana; Soore asay de7etidi
Amos1:6 Goday
Amos1:7 Hessa gisho
Amos1:8 Ashdoodan de7iya asaa taani yedethananne kawota xam7aa oykidaysata Asqaloonape dhaysana. Eqroona kataman de7iya asaa seerana; Filisxeeme asaape attidaysati hayqana. Taani Ubbaa Haariya Goday hessa odayis” yaagees.

Amos1:10 Hessa gisho
Amos1:11 Goday
Amos1:12 Hessa gisho
Amos1:13 Goday

Amos1:15 Enta kawoynne iyara oothiya halaqati ubbay de7etidi baana” yaagees.
Amos2:1 Goday
Amos2:2 Hessa gisho
Amos2:3 Taani Moo7abe haareysanne iya moorinnata ubbaa dhaysana” yaagees.
Amos2:4 Goday
Amos2:5 Hessa gisho
Amos2:6 Goday
Amos2:7 Manqota biitta baanan yeggidi
Amos2:8 Enti asape acos oykida ma7uwa yarshiya bessatan ubbaa matan hiixidi
Amos2:9 “Gidoshin
Amos2:10 Taani hintena Gibxe biittafe kessada
Amos2:11 Hinte adde nayta giddofe nabeta
Amos2:12 Shin hinte Naaziraweta caaqo menthisidi
Amos2:13 “Hessa gisho
Amos2:14 Gooba woxeysi kessi ekenna; minuwas wolqi ixana; olanchoy ba shempuwa ashshena.
Amos2:15 Dongen dukeysi eqanaw danda7enna; gooba woxiya olanchoy kessi ekenna; paraaway ba shempuwa ashshena.
Amos2:16 He gallas hari attoshin olanchota giddon daro xaala geeteteysati xire kallo baqatana” yaagees Goday.
Amos3:1 Gibxe biittafe hintena kessida
Amos3:2 Goday
Amos3:3 Nam7u asati wolla baana gidi qofa qachonna de7ishe issife hemetoona?
Amos3:4 Gaammoy wodhathe demmonna woran coo gudiyee? Woyko wodala gaammoy ayko yedethidi oykonna uti dendidi sarbuqiyee?
Amos3:5 Kafoy xihey bayna coo denban oyketiyee? Woyko xihey aykoy bochonna coo piriyee?
Amos3:6 Katama giddon ola moyzey punetiya wode asay yashshan kokoreneyee? Woyko Goday kiittonna de7ishin dhayoy issi katama bolla yiiyee?
Amos3:7 Tuma Ubbaa Haariya Goday ba xuuraa nabetas
Amos3:8 Gaammoy gudin yayyonnay oonee? Ubbaa Haariya Goday odin
Amos3:9 Ashdoodaninne Gibxen de7iya miixa ubbaas haysada yaagidi awaajite: “Samaariya dereta bolla shiiqidi
Amos3:10 “Ha asay lo77oba oothi erokona; iitatethaninne bonqidi ehida miishen banta keethaa kunthoosona” yaagees Goday.
Amos3:11 Hessa gisho
Amos3:12 “Henthanchoy gaammo doonape nam7u shuqule woyko duuxa haythi yegisi ekeysada
Amos3:13 “Haysa si7idi Yayqooba kochata bolla haysada yaagidi markatite.
Amos3:14 Taani Isra7eele asaa enta nagaraa gisho seeriya wode
Amos3:15 Enti balgonne bone de7iya keethata ubbaa taani dhaysana. Enti dangarsa zaalen alleeqisidi
Amos4:1 Hinteno
Amos4:2 Ubbaa Haariya Goday haysada yaagidi
Amos4:3 Hinte ubbay dirsa xoo7era gooshetidi
Amos4:4 “Hinteno
Amos4:5 Hinte oothanaw dosey hessa gidiya gisho
Amos4:6 “Hinte katama ubban taani kosha yeddada
Amos4:7 Kathi cakiya wodey gakanaw buroo heedzu ageeni de7ishin
Amos4:8 Hessa gisho
Amos4:9 “Taani hinte kathaa bolla harge yeddas; hinte atakiltiya
Amos4:10 “Taani Gibxe asaa bolla gado yeddidaysada
Amos4:11 “Soodomenne Gamoora katamata dhaysidaysada hintefe darota dhaysas; hinte tamape attida duncha mela; shin hessanka hinte taako simmibeketa” yaagees Goday.
Amos4:12 Hessa gisho
Amos4:13 Dereta giigisiday
Amos5:1 Isra7eele asaw
Amos5:2 “Geela7iya
Amos5:3 “Isra7eele katamaape mukulu olanchota olas yeddiko
Amos5:4 “Tana koyite; hinte de7on daana.
Amos5:5 Shin Galgali di7etana; Beeteley dhayana gisho
Amos5:6 Godaa koyite; hinte de7on daana. Hessa ixiko
Amos5:7 Hinteno
Amos5:8 Piliyadisa geetetiya laapun xoolintota oothiday
Amos5:9 I miixata laallanaw wolqaamata bolla gado ehees.
Amos5:10 Hintena pirdaa dabaaban seereysa ixeeta; tuma odeysa kadheeta.
Amos5:11 Hinte manqota yedhidi
Amos5:12 Hinte naaqoy ay mela daroko
Amos5:13 Hessa gisho
Amos5:14 Lo77o dosite; iita ixite; hinte de7on daana. Hessa oothiko
Amos5:15 Iitabaa ixite; lo77oba dosite. Pirdaa bessan suure pirda pirdite. Ooni eri Goday
Amos5:16 Hessa gisho
Amos5:17 Taani hintena seeranaw hinte giddora aadhiya gisho
Amos5:18 Hinteno
Amos5:19 He gallasay asi gaammofe baqatidi attiya wode maahey gakeysa mela qassi ba soo gelidi
Amos5:20 Godaa gallasay dhuma gidanaape attishin
Amos5:21 “Taani hinte bonchiya ba7aaleta ixaysinne shaatettayis; hinte geeshsha shiiqoti tana ufaysokona.
Amos5:22 Hinte taw xuussa yarshonne katha yarsho shiishiya wode taani ekike. Qassi hinte taw issifetetha yarshos ehiya dooretida modho meheta be7ike.
Amos5:23 Hinte mazmure cancetha ta matape haassite; hinte diixiya diithaa si7ike.
Amos5:24 Shin suure pirdi pulto haathada
Amos5:25 “Hinteno
Amos5:26 He wode hinte
Amos5:27 Hessa gisho
Amos6:1 Hinteno
Amos6:2 Ane Kaline katamaa bidi be7ite. Yaape gita Hamaata katamaanne Filisxeeme katamaa Geete wodhite. Enti hinte nam7u kawotethatape aadhona? Enta biittay hinte biittafe dalgii?
Amos6:3 Hinte
Amos6:4 zaalepe oosetida arsan zin7eysato
Amos6:5 Dawitada yetha miishe hintew giigisidi
Amos6:6 woyney ushsha kerera ganeysato

Amos6:8 Goday
Amos6:9 Issi keethan tammu asi attiko
Amos6:10 Hayqidaysata dabbotape issoy aha mooganaw soope kessi efishe
Amos6:11 Godaa kiitan
Amos6:12 Parati zaalla bolla gaallabanaw danda7oona? Woyko goshshanchoy boori waaxidi
Amos6:13 Hinte Lodobaara katama xoonida gisho ufayteta; hinte

Amos7:1 Ubbaa Haariya Goday tana qoncethi bessis. He qoncethan taani kawa gakiya kathay caketidaape guye

Amos7:3 Hessa gisho

Amos7:5 Taani

Amos7:8 Goday taako
Amos7:9 Yisaaqa kochati goyinniya dhoqa bessati laaletana; Isra7eele geeshsha bessati dhayana; Iyorbaama kawotethaa bolla taani mashshara dendana” yaagis.

Amos8:11 Ubbaa Haariya Goday

Amos9:8 Goday
Amos9:9 Taani kathi zarzaren harqeteysada Isra7eele asay kawotethata ubbaa giddon laaletana mela kiittana. Shin enta giddon ammanetidaysatape issoyka sa7an wodhidi dhayenna.
Amos9:10 ‘Nuna ayba iitika gakenna woyko demmenna’ giya ta asaa giddon de7iya nagaranchoti ubbay mashshan wurana” yaagees.

Obadiah1:1 Abdiyuy be7ida qoncethaa. Godaa Xoossay Edoomeba haysada yaagees: Edoomeba Goday
Obadiah1:2 “Heko
Obadiah1:3 Neno
Obadiah1:4 Ne arganthada pude haakada piradhikoka
Obadiah1:5 “Kaysoy woyko banqiya asi qamma yiiko
Obadiah1:6 Abeeti Eesawey waanidi bonqetandee? Qosan de7iya iya shaloy waanidi eketandee?
Obadiah1:7 Neera caaqidaysati ubbay nena ne biittafe gooddana; qassi ne ammanetida laggeti cimmidi nena xoonana. Ne kathaa midaysati ne ogen gite yeggana
Obadiah1:8 “He gallas taani Edoomepe cincatanne Eesawe zumaape akeeka dhaysana.
Obadiah1:9 Hinteno
Obadiah1:10 Ne ishaa Yayqooba bolla ne oothida iitabaa gisho
Obadiah1:11 Imathatinne allagati iya shaluwa bonqiya gallas neeni gaxa keyada eqa xeelladasa. Qassi iya pengera gelidi
Obadiah1:12 Neeni ne ishay metootiya gallas iya metuwan ufaytanaw bessennashin; Yihuda asaa bolla waayey gakiya gallas hashshu gaanaw bessennashin. Enta un7a gallasan otoron odetanaw bessennashin!
Obadiah1:13 Neeni enta metuwa gallas ta asay de7iya katamaa gelanaw
Obadiah1:14 Baqateyisata wodhanaw neeni daggala ogen naaganawunne attidaysata enta un7aa gallas morketas aathada immanaw bessennashin!
Obadiah1:15 Godaa pirda gallasay kawotethata ubbaa bolla matis. Neno Edoome
Obadiah1:16 Ta geeshsha zumaa bolla ne uyidaysa mela kawotetha ubbay qanxonna uyana; gujidika uyana; enti kase hani eronnabaa hanana.
Obadiah1:17 “Shin Xiyoone zuman kessi ekidaysati daana; Xiyooney geeshshi gidana; Yayqooba kochay banta biitta zaari laattana.
Obadiah1:18 Yayqooba kochay tama gidana; Yoosefa kochay laco gidana; Eesawe kochay buure gidana. Tami buure meysada
Obadiah1:19 Negebe mela biittan de7iya asay Eesawe zuma laattana; gadha biittan de7iya asay Filisxeeme biitta
Obadiah1:20 Di7etethafe simmida Isra7eele asay
Obadiah1:21 Ashsheysati Eesawe asaa haaranaw Xiyoone zuma bolla keyana; kawotethay Godaaba gidana.
Jonah1:1 Godaa qaalay Amaate na7aa
Jonah1:2 “He katama asa iitatethay ta sinthe gakida gisho
Jonah1:3 Shin Yoonasi Godaa sinthafe betidi Tarsesa biitta baanaw keyis. I
Jonah1:4 Shin Goday abba bolla wolqaama carkuwa denthis. Abban wolqaama hobbey wolqaamida gisho markabiya meqanaw gakasu.
Jonah1:5 Yaatin markabiya oosanchoti yayyidosona. Issoy issoy ba xoossaako ba xoossaako waassis. Qassi markabey kawuyana mela giddon de7iya caana denthidi abban yeggidosona. Shin Yoonasi markabiyas giddo gelidi wolqaama dhisko dhiskis.
Jonah1:6 Markabiya laaggeysi iyako shiiqidi
Jonah1:7 Markabiya oosanchoti issoy issuwako
Jonah1:8 Enti Yoonasako
Jonah1:9 Yoonasi zaaridi
Jonah1:10 I entaw koyrottidi odidaysada I Godaa sinthafe beteysa eridosona. Hessa gisho
Jonah1:11 Abbaa hobbey kaseysafe haa darida gisho asati Yoonasa
Jonah1:12 Ika
Jonah1:13 Shin markabiya oosanchoti markabiya gaxa kessanaw gita pidhidosona. Shin abba hobbey haa darida gisho gaxa kessanaw danda7ibookona.
Jonah1:14 Hessa gisho
Jonah1:15 Hessafe guye
Jonah1:16 Yaatin asati Godaas daro yayyidi yarsho yarshidosona; iyaw qangidosona.
Jonah1:17 Yoonasa mittana mela issi gita molo Goday giigisis. Yoonasi he moluwa ulon heedzu gallasinne heedzu qamma gam7is.

Jonah2:3 Neeni tana abba ciimmuwan duge yeggadasa. Haathi ta yuushuwa teqis; wolqaama zuley ta bollara aadhis.
Jonah2:4 ‘Taani ne sinthafe wora holetas
Jonah2:5 Haathi taw qoodhe gakis
Jonah2:6 Taani haatha garsan de7iya dereta baasuwa gakada mitettas

Jonah2:9 Shin taani galata mazmure new yarshana. Ta qangidabaaka new gathana. Ayis giiko

Jonah3:1 Godaa qaalay nam7antho Yoonasako haysada yaagidi yis.

Jonah3:3 Yoonasi Godaas kiitetidi Nanawe bis. Nanawey daro gita katama. Ha gaxape hini gaxa gakanaw heedzu qamma hemethees.
Jonah3:4 Yoonasi katama gelidi issi gallasa oge hemetidi
Jonah3:5 Nanawe asay Xoossaa ammanidosona. Xooma awaajidosona; guuthafe gita gakanaw asi ubbay kayo ma7o ma7idosona.
Jonah3:6 Nanawe kawoy he oda si7ida wode ba kawotetha araatape wodhidi
Jonah3:7 Nanawe deriyas haysada yaagidi awaajisis: “kawapenne iya moorinatape keyida kiittada hachife doomidi hinteranne hinte mehetara
Jonah3:8 Asinne mehe ubbay kayo ma7o ma77o. Issi issi asi minthidi Xoossaako waasso. Ba iita ogiyape simmo
Jonah3:9 Xoossay nuus qadhetidi
Jonah3:10 Enti banta iita ogiyape simmidaysa Xoossay be7ida wode entaw qadhetidi enta bolla ehana gida iitaba aggaagis.

Jonah4:7 Shin wontetha gallas wonta guura Xoossay guxune giigisis. He guxuniya gosey melana gakanaw masu.
Jonah4:8 Away keyiya wode Xoossay doloha baggafe misha carko yeddis. Yoonasi labbanana gakanaw away Yoonasa huuphiya xuuggis. Yaatin I

Micah1:1 Iyo7atami Akaazinne Hizqiyaasi kaalli kaallidi Yihudan kawotida wode Mooreseeta katama asi gidida Mikiyaasako yida Godaa qaalay haysa: I Samaarebanne Yerusalaameba qoncethi be7is.

Micah1:3 Heko

Micah5:2 Goday

Micah5:5 I entaw sarotethi gidana. Asoore biitta asati nu biitta oykiya wodenne nu miixata yedhidi geliya wode nuuni laapun naageysatanne hospun kaaletheyisata enta bolla denthana.
Micah5:6 Enti Namiruudey de7iya Asoore biitta olan xoonidi haarana. Asoore biitta asati nu biitta olidi oykiya wodenne nu zawa yedhiya wode I nuna enta kushepe ashshana.
Micah5:7 Attida Yayqooba zareti daro deriya giddon Goday kiitida xaasa melanne maata bolla wodhiya aka mela gidana. Enti ammanetidi naagey Godaape attishin
Micah5:8 Attida Yayqooba zareti kawotethata giddoninne daro asaa giddon
Micah5:9 Hinte kushey hintera eqeteyisata bolla dendana; hinte morketi ubbay dhayana.
Micah5:10 Goday
Micah5:11 Taani hinte biittan de7iya katamata dhaysana; hinte miixa ubbaa laallana.
Micah5:12 Hinte marota taani dhaysana; hizape guye murunneysati hinte giddon dookona.
Micah5:13 Taani hinte eeqa misiletanne hinte goyinnanaw essida shuchata hinte giddofe dhaysana; hizape guye hinte hinte kushen medhidaba goyinneketa.
Micah5:14 Taani Asheera eeqa xoossata hinte giddofe shoddana; hinte katamata dhaysana.
Micah5:15 Taw kiitetiboonna kawotethata bolla yiloninne hanqon halo keyana” yaagees.

Micah7:1 Tana ayye! Taani teera ayfey maxetidi wurin
Micah7:2 Xoossa asi biittan baawa; asa garsan suure asi dhayis. Asi ubbay asa suuthi gussanaw hokidi naagees; ubbay ba ishaa giten oykanaw kaallees.
Micah7:3 Enta nam7u kusheti iitaba oothanaw loohidosona. Halaqinne daynni wodhaafe oychoosona; wolqara de7iya asati banta koydaba wolqan polisoosona. Enti ubbay issife pirdaa mirqidi dhaysoosona.
Micah7:4 Enta garsan keeha geeteteysi aguntha mela; suure geeteteysi kinchote mela. Goday nabeta baggara odidaysada I ba asaa seerana gallasay gakis; enti yarkana wodey ha77i matis.
Micah7:5 Ne shooruwa ammanopa; ne laggiyan ammanetofa. Neera de7iya ne machefe ne doona naaga.
Micah7:6 He wode na7ay ba aawa kadhees; na7iya ba aaye bolla
Micah7:7 Shin taani ufaysan Godaa xeellana; tana ashshiya Xoossaa naagana; ta Xoossay tana si7ana.
Micah7:8 Ta morkiyaw
Micah7:9 Taani Godaa naaqas; I taw mootetidi
Micah7:10 He wode ta morkey hessa be7ana; taako
Micah7:11 Hinteno
Micah7:12 He gallas hinte asay hinteko simmana. Enti Asoorepe
Micah7:13 Shin biittay iya bolla de7iya asaa iitatetha gaason asi bayna baysa gidana.
Micah7:14 Neeni bazzon barka de7iya
Micah7:15 Goday
Micah7:16 Enta wolqay gita gidikoka
Micah7:17 Enti shooshadanne sa7ara gooshetiya medhetethatada biitta laaccana. Enti banta miixape kokorishe keyidi gita dagaman Godaako
Micah7:18 Nagara ubbaa atto yaagey
Micah7:19 Neeni zaarada ne asaas qadhetasa; nu naaquwa ne tohuwan yedhasa; nu nagara abba ciimmon holaasa.
Micah7:20 Neeni beni nu mayzatas caaqida caaquwada Abrahaamenne Yayqooba zare gidida ne asaas ne ammanetethanne ne merina siiquwa bessaana.
Nahum1:1 Elqosha kataman de7iya Nahoomi Nanaweba odida qaalaynne be7ida qoncethay haysa.
Nahum1:2 Goday qanaateysanne halo keyiya Xoossi; Goday halo keyeysanne hanqon kumidaysa. Goday baara eqeteyisata halo keyees; ba morketa seeranaw giigeti uttis.
Nahum1:3 Goday hanqetanaw ellesenna; iya wolqay gita; I qohidaysa seeronna aggenna. Godaas gotiyanne hobbiya giddora ogey de7ees; shaaray iya tohoy yedhin dendiya baana.
Nahum1:4 I abbanne shaafa hanqidi melisees; Baasanenne Qarmeloosi shulloosona. Libaanose ciishshay qoqofetees.
Nahum1:5 Iya sinthan dereti qaaxoosona; zumati til7oosona. I qonciya wode biitti qaaxana; sa7an de7iya ubbay kokorana.
Nahum1:6 Iya hanquwa sinthan eqanay oonee? Iya hanquwa suulaa danda7anay oonee? Iya hanquwa tamada bukiya wode zaallati za77idi phalqetoosona.
Nahum1:7 Goday lo77o; meto gallas qosetidi attiya besse; I banan ammaneteyisata erees.
Nahum1:8 Shin I ba morketa di7on muukidi dhaysana; baara eqeteyisata dhuman gelsana.
Nahum1:9 Hinte Godaa bolla maqetey aybisee? I hintena kumthi dhaysana; metoy zaari dendenna.
Nahum1:10 Hinte mathotidi gandigareysati
Nahum1:11 Nanawe
Nahum1:12 Goday
Nahum1:13 Taani ha77i Asooreta qambara hinte gannaafe menthana; hinte qashetida santhalaata duuserethana” yaagees.
Nahum1:14 Nanawe
Nahum1:15 Heko
Nahum2:1 Neno
Nahum2:2 Bonqeysati bonqidi
Nahum2:3 Olanchoti zo7o gondalle oykidosona; zo7o ma7o ma77idosona. Enti olas giigiya wode para gaareti qin7aarosona; enti banta toora luuxoosona.
Nahum2:4 Para gaareti ogiyan adarsoosona; enti yaanne haanne hemetishe katamaa ogiyan yuuyosona. Qassi enti lacoy loccu giya xompe daanosona; wol7anthada ellesoosona.
Nahum2:5 Nanawey ba halaqata xeegidi shiishana
Nahum2:6 Shaafa baggara de7iya katamaa dirsaa pengeti dooyetidosona; kawo gadhoy dagammis.
Nahum2:7 Kawiya di7etada basu; I macca aylleti azzanidi holleda guugumana; banta tiraa baqishe yeekana.
Nahum2:8 Teqetida haathi dooyi bessin goggeysada Nanawe asay katamaape baqatana. Asi enta ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Nahum2:9 He katamaa shaluwasinne
Nahum2:10 Nanawey baysa gidis; kasatidi
Nahum2:11 Gaammoti aqiya bessay
Nahum2:12 Gaammoy ba maratas gidiyaba oykis; baara de7iya macca gaammes mentherethidi immis. Ba gongoluwa wodhethan
Nahum2:13 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Nahum3:1 Daro asa suuthi gussida Nanawe katamaa ayye! Wordoy kumis; bonqi ekida shaluwas tayboy baawa.
Nahum3:2 Nanawe katamen lisso girsay
Nahum3:3 Para asati piirixoosona; mashshay locees; tooray phoolees. Daro asi hayqis! Ahi aha bolla dooretis; hayqidabaas tayboy baawa! Yaara kanthidi biya asi ahan dhubetees.
Nahum3:4 Hessi ubbay haniday maari bayna Nanawe laymatetha gaasuwana. I daro murunno oothasu; kawotethata ba laymatethan
Nahum3:5 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Nahum3:6 Taani nena pito yeggiya bessi kessana; nena kadhana; asi ubbay nena miiccanaada oothana.
Nahum3:7 Nena be7iya ubbay neepe haakidi
Nahum3:8 Neno
Nahum3:9 Topheynne Gibxey iw zawi bayna wolqa; Puuxinne Liibey iyo maaddeyisata.
Nahum3:10 Gidoshin
Nahum3:11 Neno
Nahum3:12 Ne miixati ubbay koyro teerida ayfey de7iya balase mithaa mela. Balase mithaa qaathiya wode teeray meysa doonan wodhees.
Nahum3:13 Heko
Nahum3:14 Ne morketi ne yuushuwa un7ethiya wode uyana haatha ha77i tika. Ne miixa mintha; urqa yedhada xuube medha; oto giigisa.
Nahum3:15 Nena yan tami maana; booley kathi meysada nena mashshi maana. Neeni booleda dara gondoda yeleta.
Nahum3:16 Neeni ne zal7anchota salo xoolintotape aathada darsadasa. Shin enti booleda ubbaa mi diggidi paallidi dhayana.
Nahum3:17 Ne toora moconatinne ne moorinnati meego wode dirsa bolla uttida boole mela. Enti awi keyiya wode paallidi dhayoosona; enti de7iya bessaa erey baawa.
Nahum3:18 Neno Asoore kawaw
Nahum3:19 Neeni zawi bayna iitatethaafe kessi ekida asi bayna gisho
Habakkuk1:1 Nabiya Inbaqoomes Goday qoncisida qaalay haysa.
Habakkuk1:2 Inbaqoomey
Habakkuk1:3 Neeni ha iitatetha ubbaa tana ayis bessay? Neeni bala be7ashe ayis si77i gay? Dhayoynne geellatethi ta sinthana; palaminne ooshshi biitta ubban daris.
Habakkuk1:4 Hessa gisho
Habakkuk1:5 Goday zaaridi
Habakkuk1:6 Taani qadhey baynaysatanne dirgiya Babiloone asaa denthana. Enti bantaba gidonna biitta olidi oykanaw biitta ubban yuuyosona.
Habakkuk1:7 Enti yashisoosonanne daganthoosona; bantana bonchisiya higge kessoosona.
Habakkuk1:8 Enta parati maahepe aadhidi ellesoosona; koshatida omarsa suudhumepe aadhidi wozana mino. Enta para asati haahope yoosona; enti arganthi issiba oykanaw wodhiyada paalloosona.
Habakkuk1:9 Enta olanchoti ubbay iita ooso oothanaw bazzo carkoda carkishe yoosona. Asa di77idi shafeda shiishosona.
Habakkuk1:10 Enti kawota bolla qelqisoosona; haareyisata enti toochoosona. Enti shucha dirsan diretida katamata ubbaa bolla miicoosona. He dirsata di77anaw enta yuushuwan biitta shiishosona.
Habakkuk1:11 Hessafe guye
Habakkuk1:12 Abeeti Godaw
Habakkuk1:13 Ne ayfeti daro geeshshi gidiya gisho
Habakkuk1:14 Neeni ase abba molodanne kaalethey bayna ulora gooshetiya medhetethata medhadasa.
Habakkuk1:15 Babiloone asay asa ubbaa qaphen qoridi kessana; enta banta gitiyan oykana; enta banta daachuwan buuridi shiishana; hessa oothidi enti ufaytananne hashshu gaana.
Habakkuk1:16 Hessa gisho
Habakkuk1:17 Yaatin
Habakkuk2:1 Taani wochiya gimbiya bolla eqada naagana. He bessan eqada Goday taw odiyabaanne ta mootuwas immiya zaaruwa si7anaw naagashshana.
Habakkuk2:2 Goday zaaridi
Habakkuk2:3 Qoncethay ba wodiya naagees; qoncethay poletiya wodey elle gakana; wordo gidenna. Gam7ikoka naaga; I tuma hanana; gam7enna.”
Habakkuk2:4 Heko
Habakkuk2:5 Duretethi ase cimmees; ceeqetiya uraas shempoy baawa. I duufoda yaramba gidiya gishonne hayqoda kalli eronna gisho
Habakkuk2:6 Di7etida asay simmidi enta borishenne qelqisishe haysada yaagana: “Babaa gidonna miishe shiishidi dooreysanne bonqidi duretidaysata ayye! Haysi haysada hanidi
Habakkuk2:7 Neeni entafe bonqida asati ne akeekona ne bolla dendidi nena kokorsana. Hessafe guye
Habakkuk2:8 Neeni daro asa shaluwa bonqida gisho
Habakkuk2:9 Metoy nena gakenna mela ne keethaa dhoqa bessan keexanaw geellatethan miishe shiishidayso nena ayye!
Habakkuk2:10 Daro asaa genada dhaysida gisho
Habakkuk2:11 Hari attoshin ne keetha gimbe shuchay ne bolla waassana; keethaa tuuqeti waasuwa kooshummana.
Habakkuk2:12 Katamaa iitatethan baasidi asa suuthan keexeysato hintena ayye!
Habakkuk2:13 Asay oothiyaba ubbay tama kaho gidana mela
Habakkuk2:14 Abbi haathan kumeysada sa7i Godaa bonchuwa eratethan kumana.
Habakkuk2:15 “Ba shooroy kallotin be7ana gidi
Habakkuk2:16 Neeni boncho aggada kawushe ma77ana. Ha77i mathoy ne tara; ne uyada kallota. Godaa ushacha kushiyan de7iya xuu7ay new imetana; ne bonchoy yeellan laametana.
Habakkuk2:17 Ne Libaanose dhaysidaysada neka dhayana. Ne do7ata wursadasa
Habakkuk2:18 “I baw eeqi ay maaddii? Iya asa kushen giigis gidennee? Wordofe attishin
Habakkuk2:19 Mithafe giigidaysa ‘Barka’ geyso
Habakkuk2:20 “Shin Goday ba geeshsha keethaana. Hessa gisho
Habakkuk3:1 Mazmuren shiqida nabiya Inbaqoome woosay haysa:
Habakkuk3:2 Abeeti Godaw
Habakkuk3:3 Xoossay Temaana biittafe yees; Geeshshay Paarana deriyape wodhees. Iya bonchoy saluwa kammis; iya galatay sa7aa kumis.
Habakkuk3:4 Iya poo7oy phooliya awa mela; iya wolqay qosetidi uttida iya kushiyape xolqiya poo7oy keyees.
Habakkuk3:5 Gadoy iya sinthan bees; tama lacoy iya tohuwape keyees.
Habakkuk3:6 I eqin biittay qaaxis; I xeellin kawotethati kokoridosona. Merinaa dereti woddidosona; I enta bolla hemetiya benipe de7iya zumati laaletidosona.
Habakkuk3:7 Taani Tophe asaa dunkaaney metootishin be7as; Midiyaame biitta asay kokorishin be7as.
Habakkuk3:8 Abeeti Godaw
Habakkuk3:9 Neeni ne dongiya waaxadasa; dukanaw giigisadasa; biitta phalqada haathe kessadasa.
Habakkuk3:10 Dereti nena be7idi yashshan kokoridosona; kixa haathay aadhis. Ciimmo haathati waassidosona; banta zuliya dhoqu dhoqu oothosona.
Habakkuk3:11 Ne dongiya dukan
Habakkuk3:12 Neeni hanquwan biitta ubba yuuyadasa; kawotethata ne hanquwan yedhadasa.
Habakkuk3:13 Ne asaanne ne tiyidaysa ashshanaw keyadasa; iitata halaqaa shocadasa; iya ma7uwa qaarada kallo ashshadasa.
Habakkuk3:14 Nuna laallanaw goteda yida nu morkiya
Habakkuk3:15 Neeni ne paratara abba bolla hemetadasa; daro haatha yedhadasa.
Habakkuk3:16 Taani hessa ubbaa si7in ta wozanay dagammis; ta mettershay kokoris. Ta meqethay dagammis; ta tohoy gundis. Nu morketa Goday seerana gakanaw
Habakkuk3:17 Balase mithay ayfonna ixikoka
Habakkuk3:18 taani Godan ufaytana; tana ashshiya Xoossan ufaysan kumana.
Habakkuk3:19 Ta wolqay Ubbaa Haariya Godaa; I ta tohuwa gaara tohoda minthees; I tana dhoqa bessan hemethees.
Zephaniah1:1 Amoone na7ay Iyosyaasi Yihudan kawotida wode Sofoniyaasako yida Godaa qaalay haysa. Sofoniyaasi Kuusha na7aa; Kuushi Gadalla na7a; Gadalli Amaare na7a; Amaarey Hizqiyaasa na7aa.
Zephaniah1:2 “Taani biitta bolla de7iyaba ubbaa dhaysana.
Zephaniah1:3 Asenne mehee
Zephaniah1:4 “Yihudaninne Yerusalaamen de7iya ubbaa seeranaw ta kushiya denthana. Ba7aale eeqa goyinneysatanne iya haggaaziya kahineta he bessaafe dhaysana.
Zephaniah1:5 Keetha bolla keyidi awas
Zephaniah1:6 Tana kaalo aggidi guye simmidaysata
Zephaniah1:7 Godaa gallasay matida gisho
Zephaniah1:8 “Godaa yarshuwa gallas halaqata
Zephaniah1:9 He gallas allaga biitta asatada
Zephaniah1:10 “He gallas Molo Pengiya baggara waasoy
Zephaniah1:11 Hinteno
Zephaniah1:12 He gallas taani xompe oythada Yerusalaame gidduwa koyana. Hirgi bayna wodhi uttidi banta wozanan
Zephaniah1:13 Enta shaloy bonqetana; enta keethay laaletana. Enti keethe keexana
Zephaniah1:14 “Godaa gita gallasay matis; ellesidi gakis. Godaa gallasay camo gallas; He gallas mino olanchotika waaso goochana.
Zephaniah1:15 He gallasay hanqo gallas
Zephaniah1:16 He gallasay diretida katamata bolla
Zephaniah1:17 Enti tana qohida gisho
Zephaniah1:18 Godaa hanqo gallas enta biraynne enta worqay enta ashshena. I sa7an de7iya ubbaa qoponna dhaysana; biitta ubbay iya hanquwa taman meetetana” yaagees Goday.
Zephaniah2:1 Hinteno
Zephaniah2:2 Carkoy punnidi efiya baanada hanonna de7ishin
Zephaniah2:3 Hinteno
Zephaniah2:4 Gaaza katamay ona gidana; Asqaloona katamay baysa gidana. Ashdooda katama asay seeta gallas goodettana; Eqroona katamay shodetana.
Zephaniah2:5 Hinteno
Zephaniah2:6 Abbaa gaxan de7iya hinte biittay mehe heemetiya bessi
Zephaniah2:7 Yihuda asape attidaysati abba gaxan de7iya bessaa laattana; enti yan heemmana. Sa7ay qammiya wode enti Asqaloona kataman de7iya keethatan aqana. Goday enta Xoossay entaba qopana; I enta zaaridi naannisana.
Zephaniah2:8 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Zephaniah2:9 Hessa gisho
Zephaniah2:10 Enti Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa asaa toochida gishonne cayida gisho
Zephaniah2:11 Enta biittan de7iya xoossata I dhaysiya wode Goday entana yashisana. Sa7an de7iya kawotethatan de7iya asa ubbay ba de7iya bessan iya goyinnana.
Zephaniah2:12 Hinteno
Zephaniah2:13 I ba kushiya pudeha bagga yeddidi Asoore biitta dhaysana. Qassi Nanawe katamaa mela bazzoda baysa bessi oothana.
Zephaniah2:14 Mehe wudeynne biittan de7iya do7ati ubbay yan hemetana; guttoynne quxarey laaletida gimbiya giddon daana. Enta qaalay maskooteranne pengiyara si7etana; ziga tuuqeti kallotana.
Zephaniah2:15 “Taape attishin
Zephaniah3:1 Makallanchuwas
Zephaniah3:2 I oonaka kiitetenna; seerin simmenna; Godan ammanetena; ba Xoossaako shiiqenna.
Zephaniah3:3 Iya halaqati gudiya gaammo mela; iya daynnati demmidaba wontos ashshona ubbaa midi ongiya omarsa suudhume mela.
Zephaniah3:4 Iya nabeti otoranchonne genancho; iya kahineti geeshshaa tuniseyisata; enti Godaa higgiya mirqoosona.
Zephaniah3:5 Shin iya giddon de7iya Goday xillo; I bala oothenna. Wonta wonta I xillo pirdees; gallas gallas hessa aggenna. Gidoshin
Zephaniah3:6 “Taani kawotethata dhaysas; enta gimbeta laallas. Enta katamata issi doonna baysa biitta oothas; enta ogeta asi kanthonna bazzo oothas.
Zephaniah3:7 Taani haysa ubbaa oothada
Zephaniah3:8 “Ane taani pirdiya gallasay gakanaw guuthu naagite. Taani deretanne kawotethata shiishanaw qofa qachas; ta hanquwa suulaa enta bolla gussana; biittay kumethi ta hanquwa taman xuugetana.
Zephaniah3:9 “He wode asa ubbay geeshsha oda odetana mela oothana. Enti ubbay Godaa sunthaa xeegana; issife iyaw goyinnana.
Zephaniah3:10 Laaletida asay
Zephaniah3:11 Otoreysatanne ceeqeteyisata ta hinte giddofe dhaysiya gisho
Zephaniah3:12 Taani hinte giddofe bantana kawusheysatanne aadata ashshana; enti Godaa sunthan ammanetana.
Zephaniah3:13 Isra7eele asaape attidaysati iitabaa oothokona; wordo odetokona; enta inxarsan cimoy bentenna. Hessa gisho
Zephaniah3:14 Xiyoone na7e
Zephaniah3:15 Goday hinte bolla pirdida pirdaa aggis; hinte morketa diggis. Goday
Zephaniah3:16 He gallas enti Yerusalaame haysada yaagana: “Xiyoone
Zephaniah3:17 Goday
Zephaniah3:18 Goday haysada yaagees: “Hizape guye ne bolla dhayoy gakonnaada oothana; ne yeella diggana.
Zephaniah3:19 He wode taani nena un7ethidaysata ubbaa seerana; wobbeta ashshana; laaletidaysata shiishana. Enti yeellatida bessan zaarada bonchana; enta yeella bonchoninne saban laammana.
Zephaniah3:20 He wode taani hintena shiishana; hintena issife zaarada shiishana. Taani hintena naannisiya wode

Zechariah5:3 I taako

Zechariah5:6 Taani

Zechariah6:1 Qassi taani dhoqu gada xeelliya wode oyddu para gaareti nam7u naase birata deretape giddora yeyisata be7as.
Zechariah6:2 Koyro gaariya zo7o parati goochosona; nam7antho gaariya kareetha parati goochosona.

Zechariah6:4 Taani kiitanchuwako
Zechariah6:5 Kiitanchoy zaaridi
Zechariah6:6 Kareetha parati goochiya gaarey pudeha bagga biitta bees; bootha parati goochiya gaarey wuloha bagga bees; wanco parati goochiya gaarey dugeha bagga bees” yaagis.
Zechariah6:7 He parati biitta wochanaw keyida wode gede haa pachiparoosona. Kiitanchoy entako
Zechariah6:8 Hessafe guye
Zechariah6:9 Godaa qaalay taako haysada yaagishe yis:
Zechariah6:10 “Babiloone di7etethaafe simmida Heldayi
Zechariah6:11 Entafe ekida birapenne worqafe kallacha medhada Iyosadeqa na7aa
Zechariah6:12 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees gada iyaw oda: heko
Zechariah6:13 Godaa keetha keexanay iya; I kawotetha ma7uwa ma77idi
Zechariah6:14 He kallachay Heldaya
Zechariah6:15 He wode haaho bessan de7iya asati Godaa keetha keexidi maaddanaw yaana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday tana hinteko kiittidaysa hinte hessan erana. Godaas
Zechariah7:1 Daariyosi kawotida oyddantho laythan
Zechariah7:2 Beetele katamaa asay Sarezeera
Zechariah7:3 Qassi Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa keethan oothiya kahinetanne nabeta
Zechariah7:4 Hessafe guye
Zechariah7:5 “Biittan de7iya asa ubbaasinne kahinetas haysada yaagada oda: ‘Hinte ha aadhida laapun tammu laythan ichashantho ageenaninne laapuntha ageenan xoomidaynne yeekiday tana bonchanaasee?
Zechariah7:6 Hinte miya wodenne uyaa wode hintew meetanne uyeeta.
Zechariah7:7 Yerusalaame katamaynne iya yuushuwan de7iya katamatan de7iya asay shemponinne injen de7ida wodenne Negebaninne gadhan asay wopu gidi de7ida wode Goday ba nabeta baggara odida qaalay haysa gidennee?’ yaaga” yaagis.
Zechariah7:8 Godaa qaalay Zakariyasako haysada yaagidi yis:
Zechariah7:9 “Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday kase immida kiitay
Zechariah7:10 Am7eta
Zechariah7:11 “Shin enti si7onna ixidosona; zoko zaaridi banta haythaa tuccidosona.
Zechariah7:12 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday ba Ayyaanan kase ba nabeta baggara kiitida higgiyanne qaala si7onna ixidi banta wozanaa zaallada minthidosona. Hessa gisho
Zechariah7:13 Taani xeegiya wode enti si7onna ixidaysada enti xeegiya wode taani si7ike” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Zechariah7:14 “Taani gote ehada enti eronna kawotethata giddon laallas. Biittay asi yaanne haanne simeretonna kaysa biitta gidis; ha lo77o biittay baysa gidis” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Zechariah8:1 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa qaalay qassika taako haysada yaagidi yis:
Zechariah8:2 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Zechariah8:3 Taani Xiyoone simmada Yerusalaamen daana. Qassi Yerusalaamey ammanthiya katama geetetada eretana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa zumay Geeshsha Zuma geetetidi xeegetana” yaagees.
Zechariah8:4 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday
Zechariah8:5 Yerusalaame katamaa ogeti kaa7iya addenne macca naytan kumana” yaagees.
Zechariah8:6 “Attida asaas hessi malaalsiyaba gidikoka
Zechariah8:7 Heko taani ta asaa dolohapenne wulohape shiishana.
Zechariah8:8 Enti Yerusalaamen daana mela oothana. Enti ta ase gidana; taani xillonne ammanthiya enta Xoossaa gidana” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Zechariah8:9 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinteno
Zechariah8:10 He wodiyape kase asaas damoozey
Zechariah8:11 Shin ha77i taani ha attida asaa bolla kase oothidaysada oothike” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Zechariah8:12 “Entii zerida ubbay dolana; woyney ba ayfiya immana; goshshay kathan kumana; saloti banta ira immana. Haysa ubba attida asaas laata oothada immana.
Zechariah8:13 Hinteno
Zechariah8:14 “Hinte mayzati tana yiloyida wode enta qadhey bayna seeranaw qofa qachas.
Zechariah8:15 Ha77i taani Yerusalaamesinne Yihudas lo77oba oothanaw qofa qachas. Hiza yayyofite!
Zechariah8:16 Hinte oothanaw koshshiyabay haysa: issoy issuwara tumaa odetite; pirda dabaaban tumaanne saruwa ehiya pirda pirdite.
Zechariah8:17 Issoy issuwa qohanaw iitabaa hinte wozanan maqetofite; wordon caaqofite. Hayisata ubbaa taani ixayis” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Zechariah8:18 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa qaalay qassika taako haysada yaagidi yis:
Zechariah8:19 “Oyddantho
Zechariah8:20 “Daro asaynne daro katamatan de7iya asay Yerusalaame yaana.
Zechariah8:21 Issi kataman de7iya asay hara kataman de7iya asaako bidi
Zechariah8:22 Qassi daro asaynne wolqaama kawotethati Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaa koyanawunne woossanaw Yerusalaame yaana.
Zechariah8:23 He gallasatan dumma dumma qaalan haasaya kawotethata ubbaafe tammu asati yidi
Zechariah9:1 Asaa ayfeynne Isra7eele asa ubbaa ayfey Godaa xeelliya gisho
Zechariah9:2 Qassi ha pirday Hadraaka zawa gidida Hamaata katamaanne qara gidida Xiroosanne Sidoona katamata bolla ha pirday gakana.
Zechariah9:3 Xiroosa katamay baw mino miixa gimbis. Qassi biraanne worqaa biittada dooris.
Zechariah9:4 Shin I shiishidaba ubbaa Goday ekana; iya shaluwa abban holana; katamay taman meetetana.
Zechariah9:5 Asqaloona katamay hessa be7idi yayyana; Gaaza katamay un7etana; Eqroona katamay ufaysi dhayana. Gaaza kawoy dhayana; Asqaloona katamay kaysa gidana.
Zechariah9:6 Ashdooda kataman walaha asay daana. Goday haysada yaagees: “Filisxeemeta otoruwa taani wursana.
Zechariah9:7 Taani enta doonape suuthi
Zechariah9:8 Hessafe guye
Zechariah9:9 Neno
Zechariah9:10 Taani para gaareta Isra7eelepe
Zechariah9:11 Taani neera suutha caaquwa gisho
Zechariah9:12 Hinteno
Zechariah9:13 Taani Yihuda dongeda
Zechariah9:14 He wode Goday enta bolla qoncana; iya donge tooray wol7antha wol7amana. Ubbaa Haariya Goday moyze punnana; dugeha bagga goteda dendana.
Zechariah9:15 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday enta gisho oletana. Enti banta morketa wursana; yambarshan oleyisata yedhana. Enti banta morketa suuthaa woyne ushsha uyana; suuthi keren kumiyada kumana; enti yarsho bessan gukiya suuthada gukana.
Zechariah9:16 He gallas henthanchoy ba dorsata ashsheysada Goday enta Xoossay enta ashshana. Kallacha bolla de7iya alleeqoda enti Godaa biittan phoolana.
Zechariah9:17 Enti waanidi lo77onne puulancho gidandesha! Na7atetha nayta kathay
Zechariah10:1 Balgoy gakiya wode Goday ira immana mela woossite. Goday ira tookida shaara kiittees; asaas ira immees; goshshan atakilte dolisis.
Zechariah10:2 Eeqati hadaba odoosona; maroti wordo qoncethi be7oosona; amuheysati wordo amuho odoosona; hada minthetho minthethoosona. Hessa gisho
Zechariah10:3 Goday haysada yaagees: “Ta hanqoy henthanchota bolla eexi keyis; he kaaletheyisata taani seerana. Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday ba wudiya Yihuda heemmees. I enta olas giigida wolqaama para mela oothana.
Zechariah10:4 Yihuda asaa giddofe quste shuchaa mela
Zechariah10:5 Banta morketa ogiya urqada yedhiya mino olanchota mela gidana. Goday entara de7iya gisho
Zechariah10:6 “Taani Yihuda asaa minthethana; Yoosefa asaa ashshana. Taani entaw qadhetiya gisho
Zechariah10:7 Isra7eele asay mino olancho mela gidana; woyne uyida asada enta wozanay ufaytana. Enta nayti hessa be7idi
Zechariah10:8 “Taani ta asaa suyqada xeegana; enta issife shiishana. Taani enta wozana; enti kaseysada darana.
Zechariah10:9 Taani enta kawotethata giddon laallikoka enti banta de7iya haaho biittan gididi tana hassayana. Qassi entinne enta nayti de7on daananne banta biitta simmana.
Zechariah10:10 “Taani enta Gibxe biittafe zaarana; Asoore biittafe enta shiishana. Entaw uttiya bessi dhayana gakanaw taani enta Galada biittaninne Libaanose biittan kunthana.
Zechariah10:11 Enti meto abba giddora aadhiya wode taani Goday abba seerana. Ciimmo gidida Nayle shaafay melana. Asoore biitta otoroy kawuyana; Gibxe kawotetha xam7ay meqana.

Zechariah11:1 Neno
Zechariah11:2 Neno xiiddaw
Zechariah11:3 Enta lo77o hentha bessay dhayida gisho
Zechariah11:4 Goday ta Xoossay taako haysada yaagis: “Shukettanaw de7iya dorsa wudiya heemma.
Zechariah11:5 Enta shammeysati shukoosona; shin seerettokona. Bayzeysati
Zechariah11:6 Goday haysada yaagees: “Taani hizape guye ha biittan de7iya asaas qadhetike. Taani issi issi ase iya shooruwasinne iya kawas aathada immana. Enti biitta dhaysana; taani issi asika enta kushiyape ashshike” yaagees.
Zechariah11:7 Hessa gisho
Zechariah11:8 Taani issi ageenan heedzu henthanchota dhaysas. Enta hanotethay taw danda7etenna; entika tana ixidosona.

Zechariah11:15 Qassika Goday tana
Zechariah11:16 Taani ha biittan issi henthancho denthana. I qohetida dorsata maaddenna; laaletida dorsata shiishenna; meqida dorsata koolenna; paxa de7eyisata heemmenna. Shin I hessa aggidi
Zechariah11:17 Dorsa wudiya yeggi dhayida he pathonna henthanchota ayye! Iya qesiyanne iya ushacha ayfiya bolla mashshi wodho. Iya ushacha kushey silo; iya ushacha ayfey qooqo” yaagis.
Zechariah12:1 Salota micciday
Zechariah12:2 “Heko
Zechariah12:3 He wode taani Yerusalaame katamaa asa ubbaas deexo shuchu oothana; iya denthiya ubbay baw deshetana. Sa7aa kawotethati ubbay iya olanaw issife shiiqana.
Zechariah12:4 He wode taani para ubbaa daganthana; para asata gooshshana.” Taani Goday haysa odayis. Yihuda asaa taani ta keeha ayfen xeellana; shin morketa parata ubbaa qooqisana.
Zechariah12:5 He wode Yihuda halaqati banta wozanan
Zechariah12:6 “He wode taani Yihuda kochata mitha dooriya giddon de7iya xiifanne mirqeeta giddon laxiya xompe oothana. Enti banta ushachan
Zechariah12:7 “Dawita kochata bonchoynne Yerusalaamen de7eyisata bonchoy Yihuda asaa bonchuwafe aadhona mela taani Goday kasetada Yihuda asaas xoono immana.
Zechariah12:8 He wode enta giddon daro laafa geetetiya asi Dawita mela mino gidana. Taani Goday Yerusalaamen de7eysatas gondalle gidana. Dawita kochati Xoossa mela
Zechariah12:9 He wode taani Yerusalaame olanaw dendiya kawotethata ubbaa dhaysanaw dendana.
Zechariah12:10 “He wode taani Dawita kochata bollanne Yerusalaamen de7iya asaa bolla qadhenne woosa ayyaana gussana. Hessa gisho
Zechariah12:11 He wode Yerusalaamen yeeketiya yeehoy Magido denban Hadaad-Rimoonas yeeketida yeehuwa mela wolqaama gidana.
Zechariah12:12 Biittan de7iya issi issi kochay baw baw yeekana; Dawita kochati banta machetara
Zechariah12:13 Leewe kochati banta machetara bantaw
Zechariah12:14 Attida kocha ubbay baw baw yeekana; enta macheti bantaw bantaw yeekana” yaagees.
Zechariah13:1 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “He wode Dawita kochatanne Yerusalaamen de7eyisata nagarapenne tunatethafe geeshshiya pultoy dhuuqana.
Zechariah13:2 He wode taani enti nam7antho qofetonna mela eeqata sunthaa biittafe dhaysana. Qassi nabetanne tuna ayyaanata biittafe dhaysana. Taani Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysa odayis.
Zechariah13:3 Qassi oonika
Zechariah13:4 He wode taani nabe giya oonika ba be7ida qoncethan yeellatana. Qassi ase cimmanaw ikisey de7iya ma7o ma77enna.
Zechariah13:5 Shin I
Zechariah13:6 Issi asi
Zechariah13:7 “Mashshaw denda
Zechariah13:8 “Biitta ubban de7iya heedzu kushe asaape nam7u kushey shocetidi hayqin

Zechariah14:1 Heko
Zechariah14:2 Kawotethata ubbaa Goday Yerusalaame bolla olas shiishana. Katamay oyketana; keethay bonqetana; macca asaa wolqan iissana. Katamaa asaape baggay di7etidi baana; shin attida asay katamaape keyenna.
Zechariah14:3 Hessafe guye
Zechariah14:4 He gallas iya tohoti Yerusalaamepe doloha baggara de7iya Shamaho zuma bolla eqana. Shamaho Derey dolohape wuloha gakanaw nam7u keyidi phalqetin
Zechariah14:5 He zangaaray bidi Axeela gakana; hinte he zangaarara baqati aadhidi attana. Beni Yihuda kawa Ooziyaane laythi biittay qaaxin
Zechariah14:6 He wode meegoy
Zechariah14:7 He wode qamminne gallasi baawa
Zechariah14:8 He wode de7o haathay Yerusalaamepe goggana; iyape baggay Maxine Abban gelana; qassi baggay Medetiraane Abban gelana. He haathay balgonne bone goggishe daana.
Zechariah14:9 Goday biitta ubbaa bolla kawotana; he wode issi Godaa xalaali daana; iya sunthaa xalaala xeegana.
Zechariah14:10 Gib7ape doomidi Yerusalaame dugeha baggara aadhidi Irmoona katamaa gakanaw de7iya biitta ubbay dembatana. Shin Yerusalaamey Biniyaame Pengiyafe bidi
Zechariah14:11 Yerusalaamey asi de7iya bessi gidana; hizape guye dhayenna; iyan de7iya asay hirgi bayna saro daana.
Zechariah14:12 Goday Yerusalaame olanaw dendida asa ubbaa bolla gado ehana. Enti eqon de7ishin
Zechariah14:13 He wode Goday enta wolqaama dagama daganthana. Asa ubbay issoy issuwa kushiya oykidi oletana.
Zechariah14:14 Yihuda asay Yerusalaame bagga gididi oletana. Yuushuwan de7iya kawotethata
Zechariah14:15 Ha gaduwa daaniya gadoy parata bolla
Zechariah14:16 Hessafe guye
Zechariah14:17 Sa7an de7iya asaape oonika Kawa
Zechariah14:18 Gibxe asay bidi goyinnona ixiko
Zechariah14:19 Shaqara Ba7aale bonchanaw boonna ixida Gibxeynne hara kawotethati ubbay seeretana seeray haysa.
Zechariah14:20 He wode parata qoodhen de7iya shaashshotiya bolla
Zechariah14:21 Yerusalaameninne Yihudan de7iya oto ubbay Ubbaafe Wolqaama Godaas geeshshi gidana. Yarsho yarshiya asa ubbay he otota ekidi
Malachi1:1 Goday Milkiyaasa baggara Isra7eele asaas odida tinbite qaalay haysa.
Malachi1:2 Goday ba asaako
Malachi1:3 Eesawe ixas. Taani derey dariya Eesawe biitta baysa oothas; iya laata workanati gupiya mela biitta oothas” yaagees.
Malachi1:4 Eesawe koche gidida Edoome asay
Malachi1:5 Hessa hinte
Malachi1:6 Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinteno
Malachi1:7 “Hinte ta yarsho bessan tuna kathi wotheta. Qassi
Malachi1:8 Hinte qooqe mehe yarshiya wode hessi qoho gidenneyee? Hinte hargancho woyko wobe mehe yarshiya wode hessi qoho gidenneyee? Hinte hessa mela mehe hinte halaqaas immiyako
Malachi1:9 “Ha77i Xoossay hintew qadhetana mela iya woossite. Wona hinte hessa mela imota iyaw immin
Malachi1:10 “Hinte ta yarsho bessan hada tama eethonna mela xoossa keetha pengiya gordiya issi asi bentida gidereneshin! Ta hintenan ufaytike; hinte immiya imotaka ekike” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Malachi1:11 “Awi doliyasope wulliyaso gakanaw ta sunthay kawotethata giddon wolqaama. Ubba bessan ta sunthaas ixaane cuyisananne geeshsha yarsho yarshana; ta sunthay kawotethata giddon wolqaama” yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday.
Malachi1:12 “Shin hinte
Malachi1:13 Qassi hinte
Malachi1:14 Taani gita kawo; ta sunthayka kawotethata giddon bonchetidaysa gidiya gisho
Malachi2:1 “Ha77ika kahineto
Malachi2:2 Hinte si7onna ixiko; ta sunthaa bonchanaw hinte wozanan ta qaala wothonna ixiko
Malachi2:3 “Taani hinte kochaa seerana; hinte yarsho mehe osha hinte som7on laallana; hinteka iyara issife holetana.
Malachi2:4 He wode ta Leewera caaqida caaqoy
Malachi2:5 “Ta iyara caaqida caaqoy de7onne sarotetha caaqo; I taw yayyana mela de7onne sarotetha iyaw immas; ika taw yayyis
Malachi2:6 Tuma timirtey iya doonan de7is; iya inxarsanka wordoy bentibeenna. I taara sarotethaninne suuretethan hemetis; qassi darota nagarape zaaris.
Malachi2:7 Kahiney
Malachi2:8 “Shin hinte ta ogiyape gaxa keydeta; hinte timirtiyan darota dhubideta; taani Leewera caaqida caaquwa menthideta.
Malachi2:9 Hessa gisho
Malachi2:10 Nu ubbaas issi aawi de7ees gidennee? Nuna issi Xoossay medhibeneyee? Yaatin
Malachi2:11 Yihudi cimmis; Isra7eeleninne Yerusalaamen tunabay oosetis; Yihudi allaga xoossa macca nayta ekidi
Malachi2:12 Hessa tamaarseynne kaalliya oonika
Malachi2:13 Qassi hinte oothiya harabay aybe giiko
Malachi2:14 Hinte
Malachi2:15 Goday hintewunne hinte machetas issi asatethinne issi ayyaani daana mela oothibeennee? Hessa ayis oothidee? Xoossa yayiya koche daana mela koyda gishosa. Hessa gisho
Malachi2:16 “Taani Goday
Malachi2:17 Hinte
Malachi3:1 “Heko
Malachi3:2 Shin I bira seerisidi geeshshiya tama melanne ma7uwa meeciya saamuna mela gidiya gisho
Malachi3:3 I bira sheeshiyanne geeshshiya asada uttana. I Leewe kochata biradanne worqada geeshshana. He wode enti Godaas xillotethan yarsho yarshana.
Malachi3:4 He wode Yihudanne Yerusalaame yarshoy beni wodetanne aadhida laythada Godaa ufaysiyaba gidana.
Malachi3:5 “Hessafe guye
Malachi3:6 “Taani Goday laametike; hessa gisho
Malachi3:7 Hinte mayzata wodepe doomidi
Malachi3:8 “Asi Xoosse kaysotii? Shin hinte tana kaysotideta.” Qassika hinte
Malachi3:9 Isra7eele asa ubbay tana kaysotida gisho
Malachi3:10 Ta keethan kathi daana mela asraata ubba shaalen yeggite. Yaatidi
Malachi3:11 “Kathi moonna mela taani hinte gisho
Malachi3:12 Hinte biittay daanaw injetiya biitta gidiya gisho
Malachi3:13 Goday haysada yaagees: “Hinte ta bolla mino qaala odetideta. Yaatidi qassi
Malachi3:14 “Hinte
Malachi3:15 Ha77ika nuuni otoreyisata anjetidaysata goos; iita ootheysati duretoosona; hari attoshin enti Xoossaa paacisheka kessi ekoosona’ yaageeta” yaagees Xoossay.
Malachi3:16 He wode Godaas yayyeysati issoy issuwara odetidosona; Godayka hayzidi si7is. Godaas yayyeysatinne iya sunthaa boncheysati dogetonna mela enta hassaysiya maxaafay iya sinthan xaafetis.
Malachi3:17 “Enti tabaa gidana; taani oothiya gallas enti taw buzo miishe gidana; aawi baw oothiya ba na7a maareysada taani enta maarana.
Malachi3:18 He wode hinte simmidi xilluwanne nagaranchuwa giddon

Malachi4:2 Shin “Hintew
Malachi4:3 Taani oothiya gallas
Malachi4:4 “Isra7eele asay kiitetana mela taani Koreeba zumaa bolla ta aylliya Muse baggara immida higgiyanne kiita akeekite.

Malachi4:6 Taani yada biitta baadethan dhaysonna mela aawata wozana naytako
Matthew1:1 Haysafe kaallidi xaafetidaysi Dawita na7a Abrahaame na7a gidida Yesuus Kiristoosa yeletethaa.
Matthew1:2 Abrahaamey Yisaaqa yelis; Yisaaqi Yayqooba yelis; Yayqoobi Yihudanne iya ishata yelis;
Matthew1:3 Yihudi Timaaripe Faaresanne Zaara yelis; Faaresi Asroome yelis; Asroomey Raame yelis;
Matthew1:4 Raamey Amnadaabe yelis; Amnadaabey Na7asoona yelis; Na7asooni Salmoona yelis;
Matthew1:5 Salmoona Raabipe Boo7eza yelis; Boo7ezi Uruutipe Iyobeeda yelis; Iyobeedi Isseye yelis;
Matthew1:6 Isseyey kawa Dawita yelis; Dawiti koyro Ooriyo machefe Solomone yelis;
Matthew1:7 Solomoney Orobi7aama yelis; Orobi7aamey Abiya yelis; Abiyi Asaafa yelis;
Matthew1:8 Asaafi Iyosaafexa yelis; Iyosaafexi Iyoraama yelis; Iyoraami Ooziyana yelis;
Matthew1:9 Ooziyani Iyo7ataame yelis; Iyo7atami Akaaza yelis; Akaazi Hizqiyaasa yelis;
Matthew1:10 Hizqiyaasi Minaase yelis; Minaasey Amoone yelis; Amooni Iyosiyaasa yelis;
Matthew1:11 Isra7eele asay di7etidi Babiloone biitta bida wode Iyosiyaasi Ikoniyaananne iya ishata yelis.
Matthew1:12 Babiloone biitta Isra7eele asay di7etidi bidaape guye Ikoniyaani Salatiyaala yelis. Salatiyaali Zarubaabela yelis;
Matthew1:13 Zarubaabeli Abdiyu yelis; Abdiyuy Eliyaqeeme yelis; Eliyaqeemi Azaara yelis;
Matthew1:14 Azaari Saadoqa yelis; Saadoqi Akime yelis; Akimey Elyuuda yelis;
Matthew1:15 Elyuudi Alaazara yelis; Alaazari Maatane yelis; Maataney Yayqooba yelis;
Matthew1:16 Yayqoobi Yoosefa yelis; Yoosefi Kiristoosa geetetiya Yesuusa yelida Mayraami azina.
Matthew1:17 Hiza
Matthew1:18 Yesuus Kiristoosa yeletethaa taarikey haysafe kaalleysa. Iya aayiya Mayraama Yoosefas oysheta de7ashe Yoosefara gahetonna Geeshsha Ayyaanape qanthatasu.
Matthew1:19 Yoosefi Xillo asi gidida gisho iyo asan kessanaw koybeenna. Yaaniya gisho qosan iyo agganaw qopis.
Matthew1:20 I he qofan de7ishin Xoossaa kiitanchoy amuhon qoncidi
Matthew1:21 Iya adde na7a yelana
Matthew1:22 Goday nabiya Isayaasa doonan
Matthew1:23 “Heko geela7iya qanthatana; adde na7a yelana; iya sunthay Amanu7eela” geetetana goysi poletana mela ha ubbay hanis. Amanu7eela geysas birshethay “Xoossay nuura de7ees” guussu.
Matthew1:24 Yoosefi dhiskofe barkidi Godaa kiitanchoy kiittidaysa mela Mayraamo ba soo efis.
Matthew1:25 Shin ba bayra na7a yelana gakanaw iyo bochibeenna; yeletida na7aka Yesuusa gidi xeegis.
Matthew2:1 Kawa Herodiisa woden Yesuusi Yihuda biittan Beeteleme kataman yeletidaape guye xoolinto taybiya asati dolohape Yerusalaame yidi
Matthew2:2 “Yeletida Ayhude kawoy awun de7ii? Nuuni doloha baggara keyida iya xoolintuwa be7idi iyaw goyinnanaw yida” yaagidi oychidosona.
Matthew2:3 Kawoy Herodiisi hessa si7ida wode dagammis. Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbayka dagammidosona.
Matthew2:4 Herodiisi kahine halaqatanne higge astamaareta baako xeegidi
Matthew2:5 Entika
Matthew2:6 “ ‘Yihudan de7iya Beeteleme
Matthew2:7 Hessafe guye
Matthew2:8 I entana Beeteleme yeddishe
Matthew2:9 Entika kawoy Herodiisi gidaysa si7idi bidosona. Enti doloha baggara be7ida xoolintoy entana kaalethishe na7ay de7iyasuwa gakanaw efis.
Matthew2:10 Enti he xoolintuwa be7ida wode gita ufaysi ufaytidosona.
Matthew2:11 Soo gelidi na7aa ba aaye Mayraamira de7eysa be7idosona. Iyaw gulbatidi goyinnidosona. Banta saaxiniya dooyidi worqa
Matthew2:12 Enti Herodiisako guye simmonna mela Xoossay amuhon entaw odin
Matthew2:13 Doloha baggafe yida asati bidaape guye
Matthew2:14 Hessa gisho
Matthew2:15 Nabiya doonan Xoossay
Matthew2:16 Hessafe guye
Matthew2:17 Nabiya Ermiyaasa doonan
Matthew2:18 
Matthew2:19 Herodiisi hayqidaape guye Gibxen Godaa kiitanchoy Yoosefas amuhon qoncidi
Matthew2:20 “Na7aa wodhanaw koyiya asati hayqida gisho
Matthew2:21 Yoosefi dendidi na7aanne na7aa aayiw ekidi Isra7eele biitta simmis.
Matthew2:22 Shin Arkeliyoosi Yihudan ba aawa Herodiisa bessan kawotidaysa si7ida wode yaa baanaw yayyis. Xoossay amuhon iyaw qoncisin Galila biitta bis.
Matthew2:23 Nabeta doonan
Matthew3:1 He wode Xammaqiya Yohaanisi
Matthew3:2 
Matthew3:3 Nabiya Isayaasi Yohaanisaba odidaysa mela
Matthew3:4 Yohaanisi gimale ikisepe oosetida afila ma77ees. Ba xeessan dafo dancees. I miya kathayka boolenne degera eessi.
Matthew3:5 Asay he wode Yerusalaame katamaape
Matthew3:6 Banta nagaraa paaxidi Yordaanose Shaafan Yohaanisa kushen xammaqetosona.
Matthew3:7 Yohaanisi
Matthew3:8 Hiza
Matthew3:9 Hinte
Matthew3:10 Beexey mitha xaphon giigidi uttis; lo77o ayfe ayfonna mitha ubbay qanxetidi taman yegetana.
Matthew3:11 “Hinte
Matthew3:12 Kathaa geeshshiya pithey iya kushen de7ees. Kathaa loythi geeshshees; gistiya ba shaaliyan qolana
Matthew3:13 He wode Yesuusi Yohaanisa kushen xammaqetanaw Galilape Yordaanose Shaafa bis.
Matthew3:14 Shin Yohaanisi iya digganaw koyidi
Matthew3:15 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew3:16 Yesuusi xammaqetida mela haathaafe keyis. Iiraka saloy dooyetin Xoossaa Ayyaanay holleda yishin qassi ba bolla wol7amidi wodhishin be7is.
Matthew3:17 He wode
Matthew4:1 Hessafe guye
Matthew4:2 Oytamu qammanne oytamu gallas xoomidaape guye koshatis.
Matthew4:3 Xalahey Yesuusako yidi “Neeni Xoossaa na7a gidiko
Matthew4:4 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew4:5 Kaallidika
Matthew4:6 “Neeni Xoossa na7a gidiko
Matthew4:7 Yesuusi iyako
Matthew4:8 Wursethan Xalahey Yesuusa issi wolqaama zuma huuphe kessidi alamiya kawotethata enta bonchuwara issife bessidi
Matthew4:9 “Ne taw kundada goyinniko ta new ha ubbaa immana” yaagis.
Matthew4:10 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew4:11 Hessafe guye
Matthew4:12 Yesuusi
Matthew4:13 Naazirete katamaa aggidi Zabloonaninne Niftaaleme heeran
Matthew4:14 Hessi haniday nabiya Isayaasa doonan
Matthew4:15 “Zabloona biittan
Matthew4:16 dhuman de7iya derey
Matthew4:17 He wodepe doomidi Yesuusi
Matthew4:18 Yesuusi Galila Abbaa matara aadhishe nam7u ishata
Matthew4:19 Yesuusi entana
Matthew4:20 Entika
Matthew4:21 Yesuusi yaape buroo gede sinthe aadhishe hara nam7u ishata
Matthew4:22 Entika
Matthew4:23 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethatan tamaarsishe
Matthew4:24 Hessafe dendoysan iya sunthay Soore biitta ubban keyis. Dumma dumma hargen oyketidaysatanne waayeteyisata
Matthew4:25 Asay Galilape
Matthew5:1 Daro derey shiiqidaysa Yesuusi be7ida wode zumaa bolla keyidi uttis. Iya tamaareti iyako shiiqin
Matthew5:2 haysada yaagidi tamaarsis:
Matthew5:3 “Banta ayyaanan manqoti anjetidaysata
Matthew5:4 Yeekeysati anjetidaysata
Matthew5:5 Banta wozanan ashketi anjetidaysata
Matthew5:6 Xillobaa oothanaw koshateysatinne saamoteysati anjetidaysata
Matthew5:7 Maareysati anjetidaysata
Matthew5:8 Wozana geeshshati anjetidaysata
Matthew5:9 Sigetheysati anjetidaysata
Matthew5:10 Xillobaa oothiya gisho gidi
Matthew5:11 “Asay hintena ta gisho gidi cayiya wode
Matthew5:12 Hinte woytoy salon gita gidiya gisho ufaytite
Matthew5:13 “Hinte biittas maxine; maxiney ba maxinetetha aggiko
Matthew5:14 “Hinte biittas poo7o; zuma bolla de7iya katamiya qosetanaw danda7uku.
Matthew5:15 Xompe oythidi son de7iya asa ubbaas poo7ana mela dhoqa son wotheesipe attishin
Matthew5:16 Hessa mela asay hinte lo77o oosuwa be7idi
Matthew5:17 “Taani Muse higgiyanne nabeta qaala shaaranaw yida hintew daanopo. Taani
Matthew5:18 Ta hintew tuma odayis; saloynne sa7i aadhana gakanaw higge ubbay poletanaape attishin
Matthew5:19 Hessa gisho
Matthew5:20 Ta hintew odayis; hinte xillotethay Farsaaweta xillotethaafenne higge astamaareta xillotethafe aadhona ixiko
Matthew5:21 “Hinte mayzatas
Matthew5:22 Shin ta hintew odayis; ba isha bolla hanqetiya ubbay pirdetana. Ba ishaa cayiya oonika daynna sinthe pirdas shiiqana. Ba ishaako
Matthew5:23 “Hessa gisho
Matthew5:24 ne yarshuwa he bessan aggada ba; koyrota bada ne ishaara giiga; yaata simmada
Matthew5:25 “Nena mooteysara pirda keethi bashe oge bolla iyara giiga. Hessi atto giiko I nena daynna sinthe efana. Daynnay nena qacheysas aathidi immana; I nena woynen yeggana.
Matthew5:26 Ta tuma odayis; ne bolla pirdetida acuwa issi santimey attonna cigga ongana gakanaw qasho keethafe keyaka.
Matthew5:27 “Haysafe kase
Matthew5:28 Shin ta hintew odayis
Matthew5:29 Ne ushacha ayfey new nagaras gaaso gidiko
Matthew5:30 Ne ushacha kushey new nagaras gaaso gidiko
Matthew5:31 “ ‘Ba machees anjo worqate immo’ geetetis.
Matthew5:32 Shin ta hintew odayis; ba machiya laymatonna de7ishin billiya oonika iya laymatana mela oothees. Hessadaka
Matthew5:33 “Hinte mayzatako
Matthew5:34 Shin ta hintew odayis; ubbaraka caaqofite. Xoossay uttiya araata gidiya gisho
Matthew5:35 Iya tohoy yedhiya soo gidiya gisho
Matthew5:36 Hinte binaanape issuwaka boothi woyko kareethi oothanaw danda7onna gisho
Matthew5:37 Hessa gisho
Matthew5:38 “ ‘Ayfe gisho ayfe; acha gisho ache’ geetetidaysa si7ideta.
Matthew5:39 Shin ta hintew odayis; hinte bolla iitabaa oothiya uraara eqetofite. Oonika ne ushacha shakala baqiko ne haddirsa shakala bessa.
Matthew5:40 Issi asi ne shamziya ekanaw nena mootiko
Matthew5:41 Issi asi nena wolqan babaa toossidi issi saate oge baara baana mela nena un7ethiko
Matthew5:42 Woossiya oodeska imma; neepe tal7anaw koyiya oonaka diggofa.
Matthew5:43 “ ‘Nena doseysa dosa; nena ixeysa ixa’ geetetoysa si7ideta.
Matthew5:44 Shin ta hintew odayis; hinte morketa dosite; hintena qoheysatas woossite.
Matthew5:45 Hessatho hinte oothiko
Matthew5:46 Hintena dosiya asaa xalaala hinte dosiko
Matthew5:47 Hinte
Matthew5:48 Hiza
Matthew6:1 “Asi be7o gidi hinte lo77o oosuwa asa sinthan oothonnaada naagetite. Hessatho hanonna ixiko salon de7iya hinte Aawape woyto demmeketa.
Matthew6:2 “Hinte manqotas immiya wode asa sinthan bonchetanaw gidi cubboti ogiya doonaninne ayhude woosa keethatan ootheysada asi be7o gidi oothopite. Ta hintew tuma odayis; enti banta kumetha woytuwa ekidosona.
Matthew6:3 Shin hinte manqotas immiya wode hinte ushacha kushey ootheysa hinte haddirsa kushey eropo;
Matthew6:4 hinte imoy geeman gido. Geeman ootheysa be7iya hinte aaway hintew woytuwa qoncen immana.
Matthew6:5 “Woosa woossishe cubbotatho hanopite. Enti
Matthew6:6 Shin neeni woossiya wode
Matthew6:7 Hinte woossiya wode ammanonna asatho coo qaala darsidi woossofite. Enti adussi woossin Xoossay si7ees gidi qopoosona.
Matthew6:8 Hessa gisho
Matthew6:9 “Hiza
Matthew6:10 Ne kawotethay yo
Matthew6:11 Gallasa kathaa hachi hachi nuus imma.
Matthew6:12 Nuuni nuna qohidaysata
Matthew6:13 Nuna iitape ashshafe attishin
Matthew6:14 “Hinte hintena qohidaysata atto giiko
Matthew6:15 Shin hinte hara asa nagara atto goonna ixiko hinte Aaway hinte nagara atto geenna.
Matthew6:16 “Hinte xoomiya wode cubbotatho kayotofite. Ayis giiko
Matthew6:17 “Shin neeni xoomiya wode ne som7uwa meecca
Matthew6:18 Hessada ne oothiko ne xoomiya xoomay asape geemmidaysa
Matthew6:19 “Bili miya bessan
Matthew6:20 Shin bili moonnason
Matthew6:21 Ne shaloy de7iyasuwan ne wozanay de7ana.
Matthew6:22 “Ayfey asatethas xompe. Hessa gisho
Matthew6:23 Ne ayfey hargancho gidiko ne kumetha asatethay dhuma gidees. Hiza
Matthew6:24 “Issi asi nam7u godaas haaretanaw danda7enna. Issuwa dosiko hankuwa ixees; woyko issuwa bonchiko hankuwa kadhees. Xoossasinne miishes haaretanaw danda7eketa.
Matthew6:25 “Hiza
Matthew6:26 Salo kafota xeellite; enti zerokona
Matthew6:27 Hinte giddofe daro un7etidi ba laytha bolla issi gallas gujanaw danda7ey de7ii?
Matthew6:28 “Qassi hinte ma7iyabaas ayis un7etetii? Ane ciishshata be7ite
Matthew6:29 Si7ite! Hari attoshin
Matthew6:30 Hinteno
Matthew6:31 Hessa gisho
Matthew6:32 He ubbaa Xoossaa ammanonna asay darsidi demmanaw un7etoosona. Hinte salo aaway he ubbay hintew koshsheysa erees.
Matthew6:33 Shin ubbaafe sinthe Xoossaa kawotethaanne iya xillotethaa koyite; he ubbay hintew guji imetana.
Matthew6:34 Hessa gisho
Matthew7:1 “Hinte bolla pirdetonna mela harata bolla pirdofite.
Matthew7:2 Ayis giiko
Matthew7:3 Ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa be7onna ne ishaa ayfen de7iya buuriya ayis be7ay?
Matthew7:4 Ne ayfen tuussi de7ishin ne ishaa ayfen de7iya buuriya kesso gaanaw waana danda7ay?
Matthew7:5 Neno cubbuwaw
Matthew7:6 “Guye simmidi hintena saxona mela geeshshaba kanatas yeggofite. Banta tohuwan yedhidi iissonna mela hinte al7o inquwa gudunthota sinthan yeggofite.
Matthew7:7 “Woossite hintew imetana
Matthew7:8 Woossiya oodeska imetana
Matthew7:9 “Hinte giddofe ba na7i uythi woossiko shuchi immey oonee?
Matthew7:10 Woyko molo woossiko shooshi immey de7ii?
Matthew7:11 Yaatin hinte iita gidishe hinte naytas lo77oba imo eriko
Matthew7:12 Harati hintew oothana mela hinte koyaba ubbaa hinteka haratas oothite. Ayis giiko
Matthew7:13 “Xuuntha wulara gelite; ayis giiko
Matthew7:14 Shin de7uwako efiya ogeynne wulay xuunthu; yaa geliya asayka guutha.
Matthew7:15 “Bolla baggara dorse daanidi banta gaathan suudhume gididi hinte giddo geliya wordancho nabetape naagetite.
Matthew7:16 Hinte enta
Matthew7:17 Hessa mela lo77o mithi ubbay lo77o ayfe ayfees; iita mithi iita ayfe ayfees.
Matthew7:18 Lo77o mithi iita ayfe ayfena
Matthew7:19 Lo77o ayfe ayfonna mithi ubbay qanxetidi taman xuugetana.
Matthew7:20 Hessa gisho
Matthew7:21 “Salon de7iya ta aawa sheniya oothiya uray salo kawotethi gelanaape attishin

Matthew7:23 He wode taani
Matthew7:24 “Hiza

Matthew7:27 Iray bukidi

Matthew8:4 Yesuusi iyako
Matthew8:5 Yesuusi Qifirnahooma katama gakida wode
Matthew8:6 “Godaw
Matthew8:7 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew8:8 Shin mato halaqay zaaridi
Matthew8:9 Ayis giiko
Matthew8:10 Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode malaaletidi
Matthew8:11 Ta hintew odayis; daroti dolohapenne wulohape yidi
Matthew8:12 Shin salo kawotethaa laattanaw bessishin attidaysati kare dhuman holetana. Yan entaw yeehonne acha garcethi gidana” yaagis.
Matthew8:13 Yesuusi mato halaqaako
Matthew8:14 Yesuusi Phexroosa soo geliya wode
Matthew8:15 Yesuusi I kushiya bochida wode qoxoynne mishay aggaagis. Paxa dendada iya mokasu.
Matthew8:16 He wode omarsi tuna ayyaanan oyketida daro asata
Matthew8:17 Hessanka nabiya Isayaasi
Matthew8:18 Yesuusi daro asay iya yuushuwan eqidaysa be7idi

Matthew8:21 Yesuusa kaalliya asatape issoy
Matthew8:22 Shin Yesuusi
Matthew8:23 Yesuusi baanaw wogoluwan gelida wode
Matthew8:24 Enti qoponna de7ishin
Matthew8:25 Iya tamaareti iyako shiiqidi iya barkethidi
Matthew8:26 Yesuusi entako
Matthew8:27 Iya tamaareti malaaletidi
Matthew8:28 Yesuusi abbaafe hefinthan de7iya Gergesoone biitta gakida wode tuna ayyaanay oykida nam7u asati duufope keyidi iyara gahetidosona. Enti daro iitanne yashshiya asata gidiya gisho asi he bessaara aadhanaw danda7enna.

Matthew9:2 Hanida guutha asati issi gunda ura algara tookidi Yesuusako ehidosona. Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi
Matthew9:3 He saatiyan
Matthew9:4 Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi
Matthew9:5 Hanoshin
Matthew9:6 Shin sa7a bolla nagara atto gaanaw Asa Na7aas maati de7eysa ta hintena erisana” yaagidi
Matthew9:7 Gunda uray dendidi ba soo bis.
Matthew9:8 Derey hessa be7idi malaaletidosona. Hessa mela maata asas immida Xoossaa galatidosona.
Matthew9:9 Yesuusi yaape dendidi bishe Maatosa geysa qaraxa qanxisiya bessan uttidashin be7idi
Matthew9:10 Yesuusi Maatosa son gayta bolla uttidashin
Matthew9:11 Issi issi Farsaaweti hessa be7idi
Matthew9:12 Yesuusi hessa si7idi
Matthew9:13 Shin hinte bidi
Matthew9:14 He wode Yohaanisa tamaareti Yesuusako shiiqidi
Matthew9:15 Yesuusi zaaridi entako
Matthew9:16 “Ooratha ma7ope peedhidi gal7a ma7o bolla sikey oonika baawa. Hessatho oothiko oorathay gal7a peedhees. Peedhethayka guji dalgees.
Matthew9:17 Ooratha woyne gal7a ogoron qoliya oonika baawa. Hessatho oothiko ooratha woyney gal7a ogoruwa dhusees woyneyka gukees; ogoroyka nam7antho maaddonnaba gidees. Shin ooratha woyney ooratha ogoron qoletanaw bessees. Hessatho oosetiko nam7ayka iitonna naagetoosona” yaagis.
Matthew9:18 Yesuusi hessa odo bolla de7ishin
Matthew9:19 Yesuusi dendidi iyara bis; iya tamaaretika kaallidosona.
Matthew9:20 I bishin tammanne nam7u laythi kumethi suuthi goggidi waaysiya issi maccasiya guyera shiiqada Yesuusa afilaa macaraa bochasu.
Matthew9:21 Iya ba wozanan
Matthew9:22 Yesuusi guye simmi iyo xeellidi
Matthew9:23 Yesuusi Ayhude halaqaa soo gakiya wode zaye punneysatanne yeekeyisata be7idi
Matthew9:24 “Ane kichite; guutha na7iya dhiskasupe attishin
Matthew9:25 Asaa kare kessidaape guye soo gelidi
Matthew9:26 He worey he biitta ubbaa gakis.
Matthew9:27 Yesuusi yaape dendidi gede sinthe biya wode nam7u qooqeti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Matthew9:28 Yesuusi soo gelida wode qooqeti iya kaallidi yidosona. Yesuusi entako
Matthew9:29 Hessafe guye
Matthew9:30 Enta ayfeyka dooyetis. Yesuusi entako
Matthew9:31 Shin asati bidi Yesuusaba he biitta ubban odidosona.
Matthew9:32 Enti yaape keyiya wode asay tuna ayyaanay oykidi muumisida issi asi Yesuusako ehidosona.
Matthew9:33 Tuna ayyaanay keydaape guye muume uray odetis. Dereyka malaaletidi
Matthew9:34 Shin Farsaaweti
Matthew9:35 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethatan tamaarsishe
