Matthew10:1 Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaareta baako xeegidi
Matthew10:2 Yesuusi kiitida tammanne nam7u hawaareta sunthay: koyroy Phexroosa geetetiya Simoonanne iya ishaa Indiriyasa
Matthew10:3 Filphoosanne Bartelemoosa
Matthew10:4 ba biittas mishetiya Simoonanne Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda.
Matthew10:5 He tammanne nam7ata Yesuusi kiittidi yeddishe
Matthew10:6 Shin Isra7eele keethaafe gidida hini dhayida dorsatako biite.
Matthew10:7 Yaa bidi
Matthew10:8 Harganchota pathite
Matthew10:9 Hinte kiisen worqa
Matthew10:10 Hinte ogiyas karxiito
Matthew10:11 “Hinte issi katamaa woyko gutaa geliya wode hintena mokidi ekanaw ufaytiya uraa koyidi iya son shempite; hinte baana gakanaw yan gam7ite.
Matthew10:12 Qassi oodde sooka gelishe sarothite.
Matthew10:13 He keethay hintena mokiko hinte sarothida saroy entana gako
Matthew10:14 Oonika hintena mokonnanne hinte odiyaba si7onna ixiko he keethaafe woyko he katamaape keyishe hinte tohuwan de7iya baana pitidi keyite.
Matthew10:15 Ta hintew tuma odayis; Xoossaa pirda gallasan he katamaape Soodomesinne Gamoora katamatas pirday kawuyana.
Matthew10:16 “Ta hintena dorsatada suudhumeta giddo yeddana. Hessa gisho
Matthew10:17 Asay hintena pirda daynnatas aathidi immana
Matthew10:18 Ta gisho gidi hintena deriya haareyisata sinthenne kawota sinthe efana. Enta sinthaninne Ayhude gidonna deriya sinthan eqidi hinte tabaa markatana.
Matthew10:19 Shin hintena pirdas aathidi immiya wode
Matthew10:20 Ayis giiko
Matthew10:21 “Ishay ba isha
Matthew10:22 Ta gisho gidi asa ubbay hintena ixana
Matthew10:23 Issi heerape hintena enti gooddiko hara katama baqatite. Taani hintew tuma odayis; Asa Na7ay yaana gakanaw
Matthew10:24 “Tamaarey ba astamaariyape
Matthew10:25 Tamaarey ba astamaariya
Matthew10:26 “Hiza
Matthew10:27 Taani hintew dhuman odiyaba hinte poo7on odite; ta hintew haythan kalkashidaba dabaaban awaajite.
Matthew10:28 Ashope attishin
Matthew10:29 Nam7u buubeti issi santimen bayzetokonayee? Hanope attishin
Matthew10:30 Hari attoshin
Matthew10:31 Hiza
Matthew10:32 “Asa sinthan taw markatiya ubbaas taanika salon de7iya ta aawa sinthan markatana.
Matthew10:33 Shin asa sinthan tana kaddeysa taanika salon de7iya ta aawa sinthan kaddana.
Matthew10:34 “Taani sa7an saro ehanaw yida hintew daanopo. Taani toorape attishin
Matthew10:35 Taani yiday
Matthew10:36 Asas morketi iya soo asata gidana.’
Matthew10:37 “Taape aathidi ba aawa woyko ba aayiw dosey
Matthew10:38 Ba masqaliya tookidi tana kaallonna oonika tabaa gidanaw bessenna.
Matthew10:39 Ba shempuwa ashshanaw koyey dhaysana
Matthew10:40 “Hintena mokey tana mokees
Matthew10:41 Nabiya nabe sunthan mokey
Matthew10:42 Ta hintew tuma odayis; ha ta tamaaretape guuxiya issuwas tana kaalliya gisho hari attoshin guutha irxa haathi immiko iya woytoy dhayenna” yaagis.
Matthew11:1 Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaareta kiitidaape guye yaape dendidi tamaarsanawunne sabbakanaw Galila katamata bis.
Matthew11:2 Yohaanisi qasho keethan de7ishe Kiristoosi oothiyabata si7idi
Matthew11:3 “Yaana geetetiday neneyee? Woyko nuuni haraa naagino?” yaagidi oychis.
Matthew11:4 Yesuusi entako zaaridi
Matthew11:5 Qooqeti xeelloosona
Matthew11:6 Tanan dhubetonay anjetidaysa” yaagis.
Matthew11:7 Yohaanisa tamaareti guye simmidi bin
Matthew11:8 Yaatin
Matthew11:9 Yaatin
Matthew11:10 “Ne ogiya ne sinthan giigisiya ta kiitanchuwa neepe sinthe kiittana” geetetidi xaafetiday iyassa.
Matthew11:11 Ta hintew tuma odayis; maccasape yeletidaysata giddofe Yohaanisape aadhey oonika baawa; salo kawotethan ubbaafe guuxey I
Matthew11:12 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa wodiyape doomidi hachi gakanaw salo kawotethay daro naaqetees
Matthew11:13 Nabeti ubbaynne Muse higgey Yohaanisa wode gakanaw salo kawotethaaba tinbite odidosona.
Matthew11:14 Hiza
Matthew11:15 Hiza
Matthew11:16 “Hiza
Matthew11:17 “ ‘Nu hintew suusul77e punnin; hinte yexeketa. Nu sabbidi zeleelin; hinte yeekeketa’ giya nayta daanosona.
Matthew11:18 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi moonnanne uyonna yin
Matthew11:19 Asa Na7ay mishenne uyishe yin
Matthew11:20 Hessafe guye
Matthew11:21 “Korazine katamaw nena ayye! Beetesayda katamaw nena ayye! Ayis giiko
Matthew11:22 Shin ta hintew odayis; pirda gallas hintefe aathidi Xiroosasinne Sidoonas pirday kawuyana.
Matthew11:23 Qassi
Matthew11:24 Shin ta new odayis; pirda gallas neepe aathidi Soodomes pirday kawuyana” yaagidi hanqetis.
Matthew11:25 He wode Yesuusi
Matthew11:26 Ee
Matthew11:27 “Ubbay taw ta Aawape imetis. Aawape hari Na7a erey baawa

Matthew12:1 Hessafe guye
Matthew12:2 Shin Farsaaweti hessa be7idi Yesuusako
Matthew12:3 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew12:4 Dawiti Xoossaa keethi gelidi kahineta xalaalape attishin
Matthew12:5 Woyko kahineti Sambaata wogaa shaaridi xoossa keethan Sambaata gallas ooso oothiko entaw bala gidonnaysa Muse higgiyan nabbabibeketii?
Matthew12:6 Shin si7ite! Xoossa Keethaafe aadhey haysan de7ees.
Matthew12:7 ‘Taani hinte yarshuwa gidonashin harata maarana mela koyayis’ giya qaalay woy guuseko hinte eridaako
Matthew12:8 Asa Na7ay Sambaata Godaa” yaagis.
Matthew12:9 Yesuusi yaape bidi ayhude woosa keethi gelis.
Matthew12:10 Yan kushey gundida issi uray de7ees. Yesuusa mootanaw gaaso koyiya asati
Matthew12:11 I entako
Matthew12:12 Yaatin asi dorsaafe waanidi daro aadhenee? Hessa gisho
Matthew12:13 Hessafe guye
Matthew12:14 Shin Farsaaweti yaape kare keyidi
Matthew12:15 Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi he bessaa aggidi hara soo bis. Daro asay iya kaallidi bidosona
Matthew12:16 Yesuusi
Matthew12:17 Hessika nabiya Isayaasi
Matthew12:18 “Heko ta doorida aylley
Matthew12:19 I palamenna woyko kaccenna; ba qaalaka denban coo sissenna.
Matthew12:20 Suure pirdan xoono demmana gakanaw
Matthew12:21 Ayhude gidonna derey ubbay iyan ufaysi wothana” yaagidi xaafidaysi poletana melasa.
Matthew12:22 Hessafe guye
Matthew12:23 Asa ubbay malaaletidi
Matthew12:24 Shin Farsaaweti hessa si7idi
Matthew12:25 Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi
Matthew12:26 Xalahey Xalahe kessiyaba gidiko ba giddon shaaketis guussu. Hessatho haniyaba gidiko iya kawotethay waanidi minnidi eqanaw danda7ii?
Matthew12:27 Taani tuna ayyaana kessey Bi7eel-Zebuula wolqan gidiko hintena kaalliya asati oodde wolqan kessannee? Hessa gisho
Matthew12:28 Shin taani tuna ayyaanata kessey Xoossaa Ayyaanan gidiko
Matthew12:29 “Woyko issi asi wolqaama asa soo gelidi iya shaluwa bonqanaw koyko koyrottidi he uraa qachonna ixiko waatidi danda7ii? Yaatiko iya shaluwa bonqanaw danda7ees.
Matthew12:30 “Taara gidonnay oonika taara eqetees; qassi taara issife shiishonna ubbay laallees.
Matthew12:31 Hessa gisho
Matthew12:32 Oonika Asa Na7a bolla iitabaa odetiko iyaw atto geetetana
Matthew12:33 “Lo77o mithay lo77o ayfe ayfees; qassi iita mithay iita ayfees. Hiza
Matthew12:34 Hinteno
Matthew12:35 Lo77o asi ba wozanan wothida lo77obaape
Matthew12:36 Shin si7ite
Matthew12:37 Ayis giiko
Matthew12:38 Hessafe guye
Matthew12:39 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew12:40 Yoonasi gita molo ulon heedzu gallasinne heedzu qamma gam7idaysa mela Asa Na7ay heedzu gallasinne heedzu qamma biitta garsan gam7ana.
Matthew12:41 Nanawe asay pirda gallas dendidi ha yeletethaa bolla pirdana; ayis giiko
Matthew12:42 Pirda gallas dugeha kawiya dendada ha yeletethaa bolla pirdana; ayis giiko
Matthew12:43 “Tuna ayyaanay asape keydaape guye baw shempiya bessi koyidi haathi bayna mela bessan daaburees
Matthew12:44 Yaanin
Matthew12:45 Hiza

Matthew13:1 He gallas Yesuusi soope keyidi abba gaxan uttis.
Matthew13:2 Daro derey iya yuushuwan shiiqin asaa abba gaxan aggaagidi wogolon gelidi uttis.
Matthew13:3 Asaas darobaa leemison yaagidi odis: “Issi goshshanchoy zerethi zeranaw keyis.
Matthew13:4 I zeriya wode issi issi zerethati oge gaxan wodhidosona; entaka kafoti yidi maxi midosona.
Matthew13:5 Issi issi zerethati garsan shaalloy de7iya biitta bolla wodhidosona. Daro biitti bayna gisho ellesidi dolis.
Matthew13:6 Shin away keyin shullis; xaphoy bayna gisho melis.
Matthew13:7 Issi issi zerethay aguntha giddon wodhis; agunthay diccidi he dolaa cuullis.
Matthew13:8 Harati qassi aradda biitta bolla wodhis; dolidi ayfe ayfis. Issoy xeeta
Matthew13:9 Si7iya haythi de7iya uray si7o” yaagis.
Matthew13:10 Yesuusa tamaareti iyako shiiqidi
Matthew13:11 I zaaridi
Matthew13:12 De7iya ubbaas guzhetana
Matthew13:13 Hessa gisho
Matthew13:14 “Isayaasi ba maxaafan odidaysi enta bolla poletis. I odishe
Matthew13:15 Ayis giiko
Matthew13:16 “Shin hinte ayfeti be7iya gishonne hinte haythati si7iya gisho hinte anjetidaysata.
Matthew13:17 Ta hintew tuma odayis; daro nabetinne xilloti hinte be7eysa be7anawunne hinte si7eysa si7anaw amotidosona
Matthew13:18 “Hiza
Matthew13:19 Oge gaxan wodhida zerethi leemisoy haysa: salo kawotethaa qaala si7idi akeekona uraa wozanape Xalahey yidi iya wozanan de7iya zeretha maxi diggees.
Matthew13:20 Shaalloy garsan de7iya biitta bolla zeretidaysi qaala si7idi ellesidi ufaysan ekeyisata.
Matthew13:21 Shin xapho yeddanaw danda7onna gisho daro gam7okona. Qaala gaason metoy woyko goodetethi yaa wode ellesi dhubetoosona.
Matthew13:22 Aguntha gaathan zeretidaysi qaala si7is
Matthew13:23 Shin aradda biittan zeretida zerethay akeekan qaala si7iya uraa. I ayfe ayfees; issoy xeeta
Matthew13:24 Yesuusi entaw hara leemiso odis
Matthew13:25 Shin asi ubbay dhiskin iya morkey yidi gistiya giddon leeshsho zeridi bis.
Matthew13:26 Gistey diccidi ayfiya wode leeshshoy iya giddon bentis.
Matthew13:27 “Gadiya godaa aylleti godaako bidi
Matthew13:28 “I entako
Matthew13:29 “Shin I
Matthew13:30 Bochofite; caka wodey gakanaw issife dicco. He wode cakiya asata leeshuwa sinthatidi maxidi taman xuugganaw mirqen mirqen qachite. Shin gistiya shiishidi ta shaaliyan qolite’ yaagana” yaagis.
Matthew13:31 Qassi hara leemiso yaagidi odis; “Salo kawotethay issi asi ba goshshan bakida guutha mithee ayfe daanees.
Matthew13:32 He mithee ayfey hara mitha ayfetape guutha
Matthew13:33 Kaallidika
Matthew13:34 Yesuusi deriyas he leemisuwa ubbaa odis. Leemisoy bayna issibaaka odibeenna.
Matthew13:35 Nabey ba maxaafan
Matthew13:36 Yesuusi deriya moyzidi soo gelis. Iya tamaareti iyako shiiqidi
Matthew13:37 I zaaridi
Matthew13:38 Goshshay ha alamiya. Lo77o zerethay salo kawotethaa nayta. Leeshshoy Xalahe nayta.
Matthew13:39 Leeshuwa zeriday morkiya Xalahe. Caka wodey
Matthew13:40 “Leeshshoy maxetidi taman xuugeteysa mela wodiya wursethan hessada hanana.
Matthew13:41 Asa Na7ay ba kiitanchota kiittana. Enti nagaras gaaso gideysatanne iita oothiya ubbaa maxidi iya kawotethaafe kessana.
Matthew13:42 Maxi shiishidi yeehoynne acha garcethi de7iya to7onna taman yeggana.
Matthew13:43 He wode xilloti banta Aawa kawotethan awada poo7ana. Si7iya haythi de7ey si7o!
Matthew13:44 “Xoossaa kawotethay goshshan moogetida miishe daanees. Issi asi he miishiya demmidi zaari moogis. Daro ufaytidi bidi baw de7iyaba ubbaa bayzidi he goshsha gadiya shammis.
Matthew13:45 “Hessadaka
Matthew13:46 Daro al7o inquwa demmidi bidi baw de7iyaba ubbaa bayzidi iya shammis.
Matthew13:47 “Qassi Xoossaa kawotethay abban yegetida dumma dumma qommo molo oykiya gitiya daanees.
Matthew13:48 Molo oykiya asati moloy gitiyan kumin abbaafe gaxa kessidosona. Yan uttidi lo77uwa qori qori daachon yeggidosona
Matthew13:49 Wodiya wursethan hessatho hanana. Kiitanchoti yidi nagaranchota xillotape shaakidi
Matthew13:50 yeehoynne acha garcethi de7iya to7onna taman yeggana.
Matthew13:51 “Ha ubbay hintew gelidee?” yaagidi enta oychis. Enti zaaridi
Matthew13:52 Yesuusi
Matthew13:53 Yesuusi ha leemisuwa odi wursidaape guye yaape dendidi bis.
Matthew13:54 Ba yeletida biitta bidi ayhude woosa keethan deriya tamaarsis. Enti malaaletidi
Matthew13:55 Haysi anaaxiya na7aa gidenneyee? Iya aaye sunthay Mayraamo gidennee? Iya ishati Yayqooba
Matthew13:56 Iya micheti nuura de7oosona gidokona? Yaatin
Matthew13:57 Hessa gisho
Matthew13:58 Enti ammanonna ixida gisho daro malaatata he bessan oothibeenna.
Matthew14:1 He wode Galila aysiya Herodiisi Yesuusaba si7is.
Matthew14:2 Ba aylletako
Matthew14:3 I hessa giday Herodiisi ba ishaa Filphoosa mache Herodiyadi gaason Yohaanisa qasho keethi gelsida gishosa.
Matthew14:4 Yohaanisi Herodiisa
Matthew14:5 Herodiisi Yohaanisa wodhanaw koyis
Matthew14:6 Herodiisi ba yeletida gallasa bonchiya wode
Matthew14:7 Yaatin
Matthew14:8 Na7iya ba aaye zoriya si7ada Herodiisako
Matthew14:9 Iya yaagin kawoy qiirotis
Matthew14:10 Kawoy ase kiittidi Yohaanisi qasho keethan de7ishin iya qoodhiya gora7isis.
Matthew14:11 Huuphiya keren wothi ehidi na7ees immidosona; na7iyaka ekada ba aayes efasu.
Matthew14:12 Yohaanisa tamaareti yidi iya aha efidi moogidosona. Iyape guye hanidaba ubbaa bidi Yesuusas odidosona.
Matthew14:13 Yesuusi hanidaba si7ida wode wogolon gelidi he bessaafe issi geemmiya soo barka bis. Asay hessa si7idi katamatape dendidi tohon iya kaallidosona.
Matthew14:14 Yesuusi wogoluwape wodhidi daro asaa be7idi entaw qadhetis. Enta giddon de7iya harganchota pathis.
Matthew14:15 Sa7ay omarsishe biya wode Yesuusa tamaareti iyako shiiqidi
Matthew14:16 Shin Yesuusi entako
Matthew14:17 Enti zaaridi
Matthew14:18 Ika
Matthew14:19 Kaallidika
Matthew14:20 Ubbay midi kallidosona. Yesuusa tamaareti mishin attidaysa tammanne nam7u gayta denthidosona.
Matthew14:21 Kathaa mida asay maccasaynne nayti attishin
Matthew14:22 Yesuusi ba tamaareti wogolon gelidi baape sinthatidi abbaafe he pinthi pinnana mela kiittidi baw deriya moyzanaw guye attis.
Matthew14:23 Deriya moyzi simmidi barka woossanaw issi zuma bolla keyis. Sa7ay qamminka I barka yan gam7is.
Matthew14:24 He wode wogoloy abba bolla bishin sintha baggara carkoy dendin hobbey wogoluwa un7ethis.
Matthew14:25 Wontimaatha bolla Yesuusi abba bolla hemetishe ba tamaaretako yis.
Matthew14:26 Iya tamaareti
Matthew14:27 Shin Yesuusi ellessidi
Matthew14:28 Phexroosi iyako
Matthew14:29 Yesuusi Phexroosako
Matthew14:30 Shin wolqaama carkuwa be7idi yayyis. Haathan mitetethi oykida wode
Matthew14:31 Yesuusi ellesidi ba kushiya yeddi iya oykidi
Matthew14:32 Yesuusaranne Phexroosara wogoluwan gelida wode carkoy si77i gis.
Matthew14:33 Wogoluwa giddon de7iya iya tamaareti
Matthew14:34 Enti abba pinnidi Gensareexe biitta gakidosona.
Matthew14:35 He biittan de7iya asay Yesuusa erida wode banta heeran de7iya guta ubba kiita yeddidosona. Asay harganchota ubbaa iyako ehidosona.
Matthew14:36 Harganchoti iya afila macaraa xalaala bochana mela woossidosona. Bochida ubbayka paxidosona.

Matthew16:25 Ba de7uwa ashshanaw koyiya ubbay dhaysees. Shin ba de7uwa ta gisho gidi aathidi immeysi ashshees.
Matthew16:26 Asi alame kumethi baw oothidi
Matthew16:27 Asa na7ay ba aawa bonchuwan ba kiitanchotara yaana. He wode issi issi uraas iya oosuwada immana.
Matthew16:28 Ta tuma odayis; haysan eqida asatape Asa Na7ay kawo gididi simmeysa be7ana gakanaw hayqonnaysati haysan de7oosona” yaagis.
Matthew17:1 Usupun gallasape guye Yesuusi
Matthew17:2 Yan enta sinthan Yesuusa malay kumethi laametis; iya som7oyka awada xolqis. Iya ma7oyka daro booxis.
Matthew17:3 Heko
Matthew17:4 Phexroosi Yesuusako
Matthew17:5 Phexroosi hessa buroo odishin bootha shaaray entana kammis. Shaara giddora
Matthew17:6 Yesuusa tamaareti hessa si7ida wode dagammidi banta som7uwara sa7an kundidosona.
Matthew17:7 Shin Yesuusi entako shiiqidi enta bochidi
Matthew17:8 Enti dhoqu gidi be7iya wode Yesuusape hara oonaka be7ibookona.
Matthew17:9 Enti zumaa bollafe wodhishin Yesuusi entako
Matthew17:10 Yesuusa tamaareti
Matthew17:11 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew17:12 Shin ta hintew tuma odayis; Eeliyaasi kasetidi yis. Entika iya bolla koydaba oothidosonape attishin
Matthew17:13 He wode Yesuusi giday Xammaqiya Yohaanisaba gideysa akeekidosona.
Matthew17:14 Enti deriyape asaako simmiya wode issi asi Yesuusa sinthan gulbatidi

Matthew17:23 Enti iya wodhana

Matthew17:25 Phexroosi zaaridi

Matthew17:27 Shin enti dhubetonna mela abba bada molo oykanaw manxaqo yegga. Koyro ne oykiya moluwa doona dooyada giiras gidiya miishe ne gishonne ta gisho efada giira” yaagis.
Matthew18:1 He wode Yesuusa tamaareti yidi
Matthew18:2 Yesuusi issi guutha na7a xeegidi enta giddon essidi haysada yaagis.
Matthew18:3 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte laametonnanne guutha naytada hanonna ixiko salo kawotethaa ubbaraka gelanaw danda7eketa.
Matthew18:4 Hiza
Matthew18:5 Haysa mela na7a ta sunthan mokiya oonika tana mokees.
Matthew18:6 “Shin tanan ammaniya ha guuthatape issuwa nagara oothana mela dhube gidiya oonika gita gaacha woxa ba qoodhen qachidi ciimmo abban mitetiko iyaw lo77o.
Matthew18:7 Alamen asay nagara oothana mela oothiyabati de7iya gisho alamiya ayye! Hessa melabati yoonna attenna
Matthew18:8 “Ne kushey woyko ne tohoy nena balethiko neepe qanxa yegga. Neeni nam7u kushera woyko nam7u tohora merinaa taman yegetanaape kushe woyko toho duuxa gidada merinaa de7o demmeysi new lo77o.
Matthew18:9 Qassi ne ayfey nena balethiko iyo wooca kessada wora hola. Neeni nam7u ayfera gaanname taman yegeteysafe issi ayfera merinaa de7uwa geleysi new lo77o.
Matthew18:10 “Ta hintew odayis; salon de7iya enta naagiya kiitanchoti ubba wode salon de7iya ta Aawa sinthan de7iya gisho
Matthew18:11 Asa Na7ay dhaydaysata ashshanaw yis” yaagis.
Matthew18:12 Qassi Yesuusi
Matthew18:13 Ta tuma odayis; I demmida wode uddufun tammanne uddufunatape aathidi dhayidi bentida issi dorsa gisho ufaytees.
Matthew18:14 Hessadaka
Matthew18:15 “Ne ishay nena qohiko nerka iyako bada iya qohuwa iyaw oda. I nena si7iko iya new isha ootha.
Matthew18:16 Shin I nena si7onna ixiko
Matthew18:17 I entana si7onna ixiko
Matthew18:18 “Ta hintew tuma odayis; sa7an hinte diggiyabati ubbay salon Xoossaa matan digetidaba gidana. Sa7an hinte hano giyabati ubbay salon Xoossa matan hanidaba gidana.
Matthew18:19 “Qassika ta hintew odayis; sa7an hintefe nam7ay banta woossiyabas issi wozanan gididi Xoossaa woossiyaba gidiko salon de7iya ta Aaway hintew oothana.
Matthew18:20 Tana kaalleysatape nam7a woyko heedza gididi shiiqiya bessan taani enta giddon bentana” yaagis.
Matthew18:21 He wode Phexroosi Yesuusako yidi
Matthew18:22 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew18:23 “Hessa gisho
Matthew18:24 He kawoy miishey pacidaakonne palahidaako be7iya wode daro gindiginda acoy de7iya issi uraa iyako ehidosona.
Matthew18:25 Shin he aylley acuwa qanxanaw xoonetin iyara
Matthew18:26 Yaatin aylley ba godaa tohuwa bolla gulbatidi
Matthew18:27 Kawoy iyaw qadhetidi
Matthew18:28 “Shin he aylley keyi bidi ba lagge oosanchotape issoy baape daro guutha miishe tal7idaysa
Matthew18:29 “He iya lagee aylley iya sinthan gulbatidi
Matthew18:30 “Shin ixidi eki efidi ba laggey acuwa qanxana gakanaw qasho keethi gelsis.
Matthew18:31 Hessa gisho
Matthew18:32 “Yaatin kawoy he aylliya xeegisidi
Matthew18:33 Yaatin
Matthew18:34 Hessa gisho
Matthew18:35 “Hessadaka
Matthew19:1 Yesuusi hessa odi ongidaape guye
Matthew19:2 Daro asay iya kaallidi bin enta giddofe harganchota pathis.
Matthew19:3 Farsaaweti iya paacanaw koyidi iyako yidi
Matthew19:4 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew19:5 ‘Hessa gisho
Matthew19:6 Hessa gisho
Matthew19:7 Farsaaweti
Matthew19:8 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew19:9 Ta hintew odayis; ba machiya laymatonna de7ishin yeddidi hara ekiya oonika laammees” yaagis.
Matthew19:10 Iya tamaareti iyako
Matthew19:11 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew19:12 Hiza
Matthew19:13 Yesuusi ba kushiya guutha nayta bolla wothidi entaw woossana mela issi issi asay nayta iyako ehidosona. Shin iya tamaareti asaa hanqetidosona.
Matthew19:14 Shin Yesuusi
Matthew19:15 Ba kushiya enta bolla wothidaape guye he bessaafe aggidi bis.
Matthew19:16 Issi gallas issi uray Yesuusako yidi
Matthew19:17 Yesuusi iyako
Matthew19:18 Uray zaaridi
Matthew19:19 ne aawanne ne aayiw boncha
Matthew19:20 He na7atethay
Matthew19:21 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew19:22 Shin he na7atetha uray daro dure gidiya gisho
Matthew19:23 Hessafe guye
Matthew19:24 Dure asi Xoossaa kawotethaa gelanaysafe gimaley narpe luhora aadheysi kawuyees” yaagis.
Matthew19:25 Yesuusa tamaareti hessa si7idi malaaletidi
Matthew19:26 Yesuusi enta caddi xeellidi
Matthew19:27 Phexroosi zaaridi
Matthew19:28 Yesuusi entako haysada yaagis: “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Asa Na7ay yaana alamiyan ba boncho araatan uttiya wode hinte tammanne nam7ati
Matthew19:29 Ta sunthaa gisho keethe woyko ishata woyko micheta woyko aawa woyko aayiw woyko nayta woyko gadee aggiday oonika xeetu kushe ekana. Qassi merinaa de7uwaka ekana.
Matthew19:30 Shin daroti ha77i dethan sinthe gididaysati guye gidana
Matthew20:1 “Xoossaa kawotethay ba woyne gaden une oothiya asi oosisanaw wonta guura keyida ura daanees.
Matthew20:2 I he une oothiya asa hachi hachi issi dinaare qanxanaw entara giigidi
Matthew20:3 “Qassi wontafe heedzu saate gidishin keyidi ooso dhayidi giya bolla eqida hara asata demmis.
Matthew20:4 I entako
Matthew20:5 Entika bidosona. Qassika I usupun saateninne uddufun saaten keyidi hessada oothis.
Matthew20:6 Tammanne issi saate gidishin I keyiya wode harati yan eqidaysata demmidi
Matthew20:7 “Enti zaaridi
Matthew20:8 “Sa7i omarsin
Matthew20:9 Tammanne issi saaten ooso oykidaysati yidi
Matthew20:10 Koyro ooso oykidaysati yidi
Matthew20:11 Banta miishiya eki simmidi godaa bolla zuuzumidosona.
Matthew20:12 ‘Haysati guyepe yidi issi saate xalaala oothidosona. Shin gallas kumethi awa suulan daaburidi pee7ida nuura enti waanidi issino gidoona’ yaagidosona.
Matthew20:13 “Woyniya goday oosanchotape issuwako
Matthew20:14 Ne miishiya ekada ne soo ba. Ta omarsi yidaysaska neysa mela immanaw koyayis.
Matthew20:15 Taani ta miishiyan koydaba oothanaw taw maati baawee? Woyko taani keeha gidida gisho neeni qanaatay?’ yaagis.
Matthew20:16 “Hessada ha77i dethan guye gididaysati sinthatana
Matthew20:17 Yesuusi Yerusalaame bishe
Matthew20:18 “Heko
Matthew20:19 Iya Ayhude gidonna deriyas aathidi immana. Enti iya kawushana
Matthew20:20 He wode Zabdiyoosa machiya ba nam7u adde naytara Yesuusako yada
Matthew20:21 Yesuusi iiko
Matthew20:22 Shin Yesuusi naytako zaaridi
Matthew20:23 Yesuusi
Matthew20:24 Attida tammu iya tamaareti hessa si7ida wode nam7u ishata bolla hanqetidosona.
Matthew20:25 Shin Yesuusi enta ubbaa xeegidi haysada yaagis. “Ayhude gidonna asaa haareysati banta asaa bolla godateysanne enta kaaletheysati wolqan haareysa hinte ereeta.
Matthew20:26 Shin hinte giddon hessada gidopo. Hintefe gitatanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gido.
Matthew20:27 Hinte giddon ubbaafe bolla gidanaw koyiya oonika hintew aylle gidanaw bessees.

Matthew21:1 Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara Yerusalaame matidi
Matthew21:2 “Hintefe sinthan de7iya guta biite. Yan issi harey qashon de7iyaro I maarara hinte demmana. Enta billidi haa eki yiite.
Matthew21:3 Oonika hintena oychiko
Matthew21:4 Hessika nabey
Matthew21:5 “Xiyoone katamaas
Matthew21:6 Iya tamaareti bidi Yesuusi enta kiitidaysada oothidosona.
Matthew21:7 Hariiwunne hare maraa ehidi bollara ma7ida banta ma7uwa enta zokon yeggidosona. Yesuusi ma7ota bolla uttis.
Matthew21:8 Daro asay banta ma7uwa ogiyan hiixidosona. Harati bonco tashidi oge bolla yeggidosona.
Matthew21:9 Yesuusape sinthara hemeteysatinne iyape guyera kaalliya daro asay
Matthew21:10 Yesuusi Yerusalaame katamaa gelida wode he kataman de7iya asa ubbay
Matthew21:11 Asay
Matthew21:12 Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi gelidi
Matthew21:13 Ika entako

Matthew21:15 Shin kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti Yesuusi oothida malaalsiyabata be7idaysasinne guutha nayti xoossa keethan
Matthew21:16 Enti Yesuusako
Matthew21:17 Entana yan aggidi Bitaane katamaa bidi aqis.
Matthew21:18 Yesuusi wonta guura katama simmidi yishe koshatis.
Matthew21:19 Oge gaxan issi balase mithi be7idi iiko bis. Shin haythafe attishin
Matthew21:20 Iya tamaareti hessa be7idi
Matthew21:21 Yesuusi zaaridi
Matthew21:22 Ammanidi hinte woossiyaba aybiba gidikoka hinte ekana” yaagis.
Matthew21:23 Yesuusi Xoossa Keetha gelidi tamaarsishin
Matthew21:24 Yesuusi entako
Matthew21:25 Yohaanisi xammaqana mela maatay awupe imetidee? Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis. Enti banta giddon zoretidi
Matthew21:26 Nuuni
Matthew21:27 Hessa gisho
Matthew21:28 “Yesuusi kaallidika haysada yaagis: nam7u adde nayti de7iya issi uray de7ees. He uray bayra na7aako bidi
Matthew21:29 Na7ay zaaridi
Matthew21:30 Aaway ba kaalo na7aako bidi
Matthew21:31 Ha nam7u naytape ba aawas kiitetidaysi awusee?” yaagis. Entika
Matthew21:32 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi suure ogiya tamaarsishe yin I geysa ammanibeketa. Shin qaraxa qanxiseysatinne laymateysati ammanidosona. Hinte hari attoshin
Matthew21:33 Qassika Yesuusi haysada yaagis; “Hara leemiso si7ite
Matthew21:34 Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin bana gakiya baggaa ekidi yaana mela ba aylleta entako yeddis.
Matthew21:35 Kothe aawati iya aylleta oykidi issuwa wadhidosona
Matthew21:36 Woyne atakiltiya goday kaseysatape dariya hara aylleta kiittis. Kothe aawati enta bollaka hankoyisata bolla oothidaysada oothidosona.
Matthew21:37 Wursethan I
Matthew21:38 “Shin kothe aawati na7aa be7idi banta giddon ‘Gadiya laattanaysi haysa
Matthew21:39 Na7a oykidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona.
Matthew21:40 “Hiza
Matthew21:41 Enti zaaridi
Matthew21:42 Yesuusi zaaridi entako
Matthew21:43 “Hessa gisho

Matthew24:31 I ba kiitanchota gita moyze punora kiittana. Enti sa7aa oyddu baggaa bidi

Matthew26:57 Yesuusa oykidaysati kahine halaqaa Qayyaafako iya efidosona. Yan higge astamaaretinne biitta cimati shiiqidi de7oosona.
Matthew26:58 Shin Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabbaa gakanaw haahon iya kaallis. Iya wursethay shaaketana gakanaw zabbaa gelidi naageysatara uttis.

Matthew27:1 Wonta guura kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati ubbay Yesuusa wodhisanaw maqetidosona.
Matthew27:2 Enti Yesuusa qachi efidi deriya haariya Philaxoosas aathidi immidosona.
Matthew27:3 He wode Yesuusa oythida Yihudi
Matthew27:4 “Taani xillo asi hayqos aatha immada nagara oothas” yaagis. Shin enti
Matthew27:5 Yihudi miishiya Xoossa Keethan yeggi aggidi enta matape bidi
Matthew27:6 Kahine halaqati miishiya ekidi
Matthew27:7 Hessafe guye
Matthew27:8 Hessa gisho
Matthew27:9 Nabiya Ermiyaasi
Matthew27:10 Goday tana kiitidaysada mana biitta shammanaw immidosona” gidaysi he wode poletis.
Matthew27:11 Yesuusi deriya haariya Philaxoosa sinthe shiiqin
Matthew27:12 Kahine halaqatinne biitta cimati iya mootiya wode entaw aybi zaaroka immibeenna.
Matthew27:13 He wode Philaxoosi Yesuusako
Matthew27:14 Yesuusi hari attoshin
Matthew27:15 Deriya haareysi laythan laythan Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasan
Matthew27:16 He wode issi Barbaana Yesuusa geetetiya daro eretida iita asi qasho keethan de7ees.
Matthew27:17 Hessa gisho
Matthew27:18 I hessa giday enti qanaatidi Yesuusa oythidaysa eriya gishosa.
Matthew27:19 Philaxoosi pirda keethan uttidashin
Matthew27:20 He wode kahine halaqati
Matthew27:21 Philaxoosi zaaridi
Matthew27:22 Philaxoosi
Matthew27:23 Philaxoosi asaako
Matthew27:24 Ooshshi denthethofe hara aybibaaka oothanaw danda7etonaysa Philaxoosi be7idi
Matthew27:25 Asa ubbay zaaridi
Matthew27:26 Yaatin
Matthew27:27 Hessafe guye
Matthew27:28 Iya afilaa qaari ekidi zo7o afila mayzidosona.
Matthew27:29 Qassi aguntha kallacha giigisidi
Matthew27:30 Iya bolla cuttidosona. He mayre xam7aa ekidi
Matthew27:31 Enti iya bolla qelqisidaape guye
Matthew27:32 Enti kare keyidi
Matthew27:33 Golgota geetetiya bessi gakidosona. “Golgota” guussay “Guugge bessi” guussu.
Matthew27:34 Hessan enti ciiye walaketida woyne ushsha uyo gidi iyaw immidosona. Shin I hessa ganxi ekidi
Matthew27:35 Enti masqaliya bolla iya kaqidaysafe guye
Matthew27:36 Hessafe guye
Matthew27:37 Qassi
Matthew27:38 Yesuusara he wode nam7u pangata issuwa iyape ushacha baggan
Matthew27:39 Ogiyara aadhiya asay Yesuusa boridi
Matthew27:40 “Xoossa Keethaa laallada heedzu gallasa giddon keexeyso
Matthew27:41 Hessadaka
Matthew27:42 “Harata ashshis
Matthew27:43 Xoossan I ammanetees
Matthew27:44 Qassi hari attoshin
Matthew27:45 Usupun saatepe bidi
Matthew27:46 Uddufun saate gidiya wode Yesuusi
Matthew27:47 Hessan eqida asaape issoti issoti hessa si7idi
Matthew27:48 Iira entafe issoy woxi bidi
Matthew27:49 Shin hankoti
Matthew27:50 Yesuusi nam7antho gita waaso waassidi
Matthew27:51 He saaten xoossa keethan kaqetida magaraajoy qommofe duge gakanaw nam7u keyidi
Matthew27:52 Duufoti dooyetin Xoossaa asatape daroti hayqope dendidosona.
Matthew27:53 Enti duufope keyidi
Matthew27:54 Mato halaqaynne iyara Yesuusa naagiya wotaadareti biittay qaaxidaysanne hessan hanidaba be7ida wode daro yayyidi “Tuma haysi Xoossaa Na7aa” yaagidosona.
Matthew27:55 Hessan daro maccasati
Matthew27:56 Enta giddon Magdela Mayraama
Matthew27:57 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yoosefa geetetiya issi dure aday
Matthew27:58 Yoosefi Philaxoosako bidi
Matthew27:59 Yesuusa aha ekidi
Matthew27:60 Baw moogetanaw shuchafe woocida ooratha gongolon iya aha wothis. Qassi he gongoluwa doonan gita shuchaa gondorsi wothidi
Matthew27:61 Magdela Mayraamanne hanko Mayraama he gongoluwako simmidi uttidosona.
Matthew27:62 Wontethe Sambaata gallas
Matthew27:63 “Godaw
Matthew27:64 Hessa gisho
Matthew27:65 Philaxoosi entako
Matthew27:66 Hessa gisho
Matthew28:1 Sambaati aadhin
Matthew28:2 Qoponna wolqaama biitta qaaxoy hanis. Godaa kiitanchoy salope wodhidi duufuwa doonan de7iya shuchaa gondorsidi iya bolla uttis.
Matthew28:3 Iya malay wol7anthi daanees. Iya ma7oyka shachada boothi.
Matthew28:4 Naageysati kiitanchuwa be7idi
Matthew28:5 Kiitanchoy maccasatako
Matthew28:6 I kase odidaysa mela hayqope dendis; haysan deenna. Haa yidi iya zin7isida bessaa be7ite.
Matthew28:7 Hinte ha77i ellesi bidi
Matthew28:8 Enti yayyishenne daro ufaytishe
Matthew28:9 Qoponna Yesuusi entara gahetidi entako
Matthew28:10 He wode Yesuusi entako
Matthew28:11 He maccasati bishin
Matthew28:12 Kahine halaqatinne cimati shiiqidi zoretidi
Matthew28:13 “ ‘Nuuni dhiskidashin iya tamaareti qamma yidi
Matthew28:14 Ha odaa deriya haareysi si7iko
Matthew28:15 Wotaaddareti miishiya ekidi
Matthew28:16 Tammanne issi iya tamaareti Yesuusi bantana biite gida Galila Zumaa bolla Keyidosona.
Matthew28:17 Yan enti iya be7ida wode iyaw goyinnidosona
Matthew28:18 Yesuusi entako shiiqidi
Matthew28:19 Hiza
Matthew28:20 Taani hintena kiittidaba ubbaa enti naagana mela enta tamaarsite. Taani wodiya wursethaa gakanaw ubba wode hintera de7ayis” yaagis.
Mark1:1 Haysi Xoossa Na7a Yesuus Kiristoosa wongelaa doomethi.
Mark1:2 Nabiya Isayaasi xaafida maxaafan Xoossay
Mark1:3 Issoy mela biittan ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Mark1:4 Xammaqiya Yohaanisi asaa xammaqishe
Mark1:5 Yihuda biittan de7iya asa ubbaynne Yerusalaame katamaa asa ubbay Yohaanisako yoosona. Banta nagara paaxin
Mark1:6 Yohaanisi gimale ikisepe dadetida afila ma77ees. Ba xeessan dafo dancees; qassi boolenne degera eessi mees.
Mark1:7 Yohaanisi qaala odishe
Mark1:8 Taani hintena haathan xammaqayis
Mark1:9 Yesuusi he wode Galila biittan de7iya Naazirete katamaape yin
Mark1:10 Yesuusi haathaafe keyiya wode saloy dooyetin
Mark1:11 Qassi salope
Mark1:12 Iira Geeshsha Ayyaanay Yesuusa mela biitta efis.
Mark1:13 Yesuusi mela biittan Xalahen paacetishe oytamu gallas gam7is. Do7atara de7is
Mark1:14 Yohaanisi qashetidaape guye
Mark1:15 Yan
Mark1:16 Yesuusi Galila Abbaa matara aadhishe
Mark1:17 Entako
Mark1:18 Enti ellesidi banta gitiya yeggi aggidi Yesuusa kaallidosona.
Mark1:19 Yesuusi guuthi sinthe bidi
Mark1:20 I enta be7ida mela xeegis. Enti banta aawa Zabdiyoosa
Mark1:21 Enti Qifirnahooma katamaa gelidosona. Sambaati gelida mela Yesuusi ellesidi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarso oykis.
Mark1:22 Maatara de7iya asada tamaarsesipe attishin
Mark1:23 He wode tuna ayyaanay oykida issi uray ayhude woosa keethi gelidi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Mark1:24 “Naazirete Yesuusa
Mark1:25 Yesuusi he tuna ayyaana
Mark1:26 Tuna ayyaanay uraa daferethidi
Mark1:27 Asa ubbay malaaletidi
Mark1:28 Yesuusa sunthay ellesidi Galila biittan de7iya heera ubban keyis.
Mark1:29 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethafe keyidi
Mark1:30 Simoona mache aayiya qoxo misha hargada zin7idaaro Yesuusi yaa gakiya wode iyaw odidosona.
Mark1:31 I iiko shiiqidi
Mark1:32 Hargida asa ubbaanne tuna ayyaanati oykida asa ubbaa omarsi away wullidaape guye
Mark1:33 Kataman de7iya asa ubbay he keetha kare shiiqidosona.
Mark1:34 Yesuusi dumma dumma hargen oyketida daro asaa pathidi
Mark1:35 Yesuusi wonta guura dendidi
Mark1:36 Simooninne iyara de7eysati iya koyishe bidosona.
Mark1:37 Enti iya demmidi
Mark1:38 Yesuusi qassi enta
Mark1:39 Ayhude woosa keethatan qaala odishenne tuna ayyaanata kessishe
Mark1:40 Baroy oykida issi uray Yesuusako yidi
Mark1:41 Yesuusi iyaw qadhetidi
Mark1:42 Ellesidi baroy uraa yeddin uray paxis.
Mark1:43 Yesuusi uraa minthi naagisidi kessi yeddis.
Mark1:44 Yesuusi iya
Mark1:45 Shin uray bidi
Mark2:1 Guutha gallasape guye
Mark2:2 Asaa keethay ekonna ixin
Mark2:3 Oyddu asati issi gunda uraa tookidi iyako ehidosona.
Mark2:4 Asay darida gisho
Mark2:5 Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi
Mark2:6 Higge astamaaretape he bessan uttida issoti issoti banta wozanan
Mark2:7 “La ha uray haysa mela iitabaa Xoossaa bolla ayis odeetii? Xoossaa xalaalape attishin
Mark2:8 Enti banta wozanan hessada qopidaysa Yesuusi ellesidi ba ayyaanan eridi
Mark2:9 Gunda uraa
Mark2:10 Shin taw
Mark2:11 “Nena gayis
Mark2:12 Uray ellesi dendi eqidi
Mark2:13 Yesuusi qassi Galila Abbaa doona simmi bidi
Mark2:14 Yaara aadhishe
Mark2:15 Yesuusi kathi maanaw Leewe son uttis. Iya kaalliya asay daro gidiya gisho
Mark2:16 Higge astamaare gidida issi issi Farsaaweti Yesuusi nagaranchotaranne qaraxa qanxiseysatara kathi mishin be7idi
Mark2:17 Yesuusi enti geysa si7idi
Mark2:18 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa tamaaretinne Farsaaweti xoomosona. Issi issi asati Yesuusako yidi
Mark2:19 Yesuusi entako
Mark2:20 Shin machiw ekeysi enta matape eketana wodey yaana
Mark2:21 “Gal7a ma7o bolla ooratha carqe wothidi sikiya asi baawa. Wothidi sikiko
Mark2:22 Qassi mal7anto woyne ceega ogoron qoliya asi baawa. Shin qoliko
Mark2:23 Yesuusi issi Sambaata gallas banga gade giddora aadhishin
Mark2:24 Farsaaweti Yesuusako
Mark2:25 Yesuusi entako

Mark2:27 Qassika Yesuusi entako

Mark3:1 Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethi simmi gelis. Yan kushey gundida issi uray de7ees.
Mark3:2 Issi issi asay Yesuusa mootanaw koyidi
Mark3:3 Yesuusi kushey gundida uraa
Mark3:4 Hessafe guye
Mark3:5 Yesuusi hanqetidi
Mark3:6 Ellesidi Farsaaweti ayhude woosa keethafe kare keyidi
Mark3:7 Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Galila Abbaako bis. Galilapenne Yihudape yida daro asay iya kaallidosona.
Mark3:8 Qassika Yerusalaamepe
Mark3:9 Asaa darotethaafe dendoysan iya un7ethonna mela iya tamaareti wogolo iyaw giigisana mela kiittis.
Mark3:10 Daro asaa I pathida gisho
Mark3:11 Tuna ayyaanay oykida asati iya be7ida wode iya sinthan kundidi
Mark3:12 He tuna ayyaanati iya oonatetha oodeska qoncisonna mela entaw minthidi odis.
Mark3:13 Yesuusi deriya bolla keyidi
Mark3:14 Enti baara daana melanne qaala tamaarsana mela tammanne nam7ata dooridi
Mark3:15 Tuna ayyaanataka kessana mela entaw maata immis.
Mark3:16 I doorida tammanne nam7ati haysata: Phexroosa yaagidi sunthida Simoona
Mark3:17 Bo7anerges (Dada Nayta) yaagidi sunthidaysata
Mark3:18 Indiriyasa
Mark3:19 Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda.
Mark3:20 Hessafe guye
Mark3:21 Asay iya
Mark3:22 Higge astamaaretape issoti issoti Yerusalaamepe yidi
Mark3:23 Yesuusi asaa baako xeegidi leemiso odis. “Xalahey Xalahe waati kessanaw danda7ii?
Mark3:24 Issi kawotethay ba giddon shaaketiko he kawotethay eqanaw danda7enna.
Mark3:25 Hessadaka
Mark3:26 Hiza
Mark3:27 “Shin koyrottidi wolqaama uraa qachonna de7ishe iya keetha gelidi
Mark3:28 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossay asa naytas nagara ubbaanne enti cayiya cashshe ubbaa atto gaana.
Mark3:29 Shin Geeshsha Ayyaana bolla iitabaa odetiya oodeska merinaa nagara gidanaape attishin
Mark3:30 Yesuusi hessa giday
Mark3:31 Iya aayanne iya ishati yidi karen eqidi
Mark3:32 Iya matan uttida daro asati
Mark3:33 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark3:34 Ba matan uttida asa yuushshi aathi xeellidi
Mark3:35 Xoossay sheniya oothiya ubbay ta isha
Mark4:1 Yesuusi zaaridi Galila Abbaa matan tamaarsees. Daro asay iya matan yuushuwan shiiqin
Mark4:2 I enta darobaa leemison tamaarsis. Tamaarsishe haysada yaagis:
Mark4:3 “Si7ite! Issi uray zerethi zeranaw keyis.
Mark4:4 I zerishin
Mark4:5 Issi issi zerethay garsan shaalloy de7iya biitta bolla wodhis. Daro biitti bayna gisho
Mark4:6 Shin awi keyida wode shullis. Loythidi xapho yeddiboonna gisho
Mark4:7 Issi issi zerethay aguntha giddon wodhis. Dolidaysa agunthay diccidi cuullida gisho ayfe ayfonna attis.
Mark4:8 Issi issi zerethay aradda biittan wodhidi dolis. Diccidi issoy hastama
Mark4:9 “Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis.
Mark4:10 Yesuusi odidaysa si7ida issi issi asatinne tammanne nam7u tamaareti Yesuusi barka de7ishin
Mark4:11 Yesuusi entako haysada yaagis: “Hintew Xoossaa kawotethaa xuuraa eroy imetis. Shin haratas kawotethaafe karen de7eysatas ubbabay leemison odetees.
Mark4:12 Gaasoyka
Mark4:13 Yesuusi entako
Mark4:14 Zereysi Xoossaa qaala zerees.
Mark4:15 Qaalay zeretiya wode oge gaxan wodhidaysati qaala si7idaysata. Shin Xalahey ellesidi
Mark4:16 Hessadaka
Mark4:17 Shin iyaw mino xaphoy bayna gisho ha77issafe attishin
Mark4:18 Aguntha giddon zeretidaysi qaala si7eyisata.
Mark4:19 Shin ha sa7a de7uwas hirgoy
Mark4:20 Shin aradda biittan zeretidaysati qaala si7idi ekeyisata. Enti issoy hastama
Mark4:21 Yesuusi gujidi
Mark4:22 Hiza
Mark4:23 Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis.
Mark4:24 Qassi entako
Mark4:25 Issibay de7iya uraas guji imetana
Mark4:26 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark4:27 He uray qamma dhiskees; wonta dendees. I ba huuphen waaniyako eronna de7ishin he zerethay doleesinne diccees.
Mark4:28 Biittay kathi barka immees. Koyro dolidi diccees
Mark4:29 Shin kathay gakiya wode uray ellesidi baacara geli aggees” yaagis.
Mark4:30 Yesuusi
Mark4:31 Xoossaa kawotethay ayfe guutha mithi daanees. He mithaa ayfiya zeriya wode sa7an de7iya mitha ayfe ubbaafe guuxees.
Mark4:32 Zerin dolidi atakilte ubbaafe gitatees; daro daashshi daayees. Kafoti iya tashiya bolla keexidi uttana gakanaw daayees” yaagis.
Mark4:33 Yesuusi haysa mela daro leemison asay akeekanaw danda7eysa mela qaala odis.
Mark4:34 Asaas leemisoy bayna odenna. Shin Yesuusi ba tamaareta xalaalara de7iya wode
Mark4:35 He gallas sa7i omarsin
Mark4:36 Iya tamaareti daro asa yeggi aggidi
Mark4:37 Wolqaama gotey dendidi
Mark4:38 He wode Yesuusi wogoluwan guye baggara borkotidi dhiskis. Iya tamaareti iya denthidi
Mark4:39 Yaatin
Mark4:40 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako
Mark4:41 Enti daro babidi banta giddon
Mark5:1 Yesuusinne iya tamaareti abba pinnidi
Mark5:2 Yesuusi wogoluwape wodhiya wode tuna ayyaanay oykida issi uray duufope keyidi iyara gahetis.
Mark5:3 He uray aqi pee7idi de7ey duufona. Iya oonika santhalaatan qachanaw danda7enna.
Mark5:4 I daro toho duthaninne santhalaatan qashetidi de7ees. Shin santhalaata duuserethees
Mark5:5 I qammanne gallas he duufuwaninne dere bolla waassees
Mark5:6 Yesuusa haahon be7ida wode woxi bidi iya sinthan gulbatis.
Mark5:7 He uray ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Mark5:8 I hessa giday Yesuusi iya
Mark5:9 Yesuusi iyako
Mark5:10 Tuna ayyaanati bantana he biittafe kessi yeddonna mela Yesuusa minthidi woossidosona.
Mark5:11 He deriya bolla daro guduntho wudey hemetees.
Mark5:12 Tuna ayyaanati Yesuusako
Mark5:13 Yesuusi entako
Mark5:14 Guduntho wudiya heemmeysati baqati bidi hanidaba katamaninne gaxariyan odidosona. Yaatin asay hanidaba be7anaw keyidosona.
Mark5:15 Asay Yesuusako yaa wode tuna ayyaanan oyketida uraa be7idosona. I ba wozanaako simmidi
Mark5:16 Hessa be7ida asati tuna ayyaanati oykida uraa bollanne gudunthota bolla hanidaba ubbaa asaas odidosona.
Mark5:17 Hessa gisho
Mark5:18 Yesuusi wogoluwan geliya wode kase tuna ayyaanay oykidi yeddida uray
Mark5:19 Shin Yesuusi ixidi iyako
Mark5:20 Uray bidi Tammu Katamaa geetetiya bessan yuuyidi
Mark5:21 Yesuusi simmidi
Mark5:22 Iyaroosa geetetiya ayhude woosa keetha halaqatape issoy
Mark5:23 kundidi
Mark5:24 Yesuusi Iyaroosara bis. I bishin daro asay iya kaallidi un7ethidosona.
Mark5:25 Tammanne nam7u laythi Ipe suuthi dhohiya issi maccasiya de7awusu.
Mark5:26 Daro aakimeti iyo aakimidosona
Mark5:27 He maccasiya Yesuusaba si7ada
Mark5:28 Iya
Mark5:29 Iipe goggiya suuthay iiraka eqi aggis. Iya ba waayiyape paxidaysa ba asatethan erasu.
Mark5:30 Yesuusi baape wolqi keydaysa ba huuphen eridi
Mark5:31 Iya tamaareti
Mark5:32 Yesuusi hessa ooni oothidaako be7anaw yuushshi aathi xeellis.
Mark5:33 Shin maccasiya baw hanidaba erada
Mark5:34 Yaanin
Mark5:35 Yesuusi buroo hessa odishin
Mark5:36 Shin Yesuusi enti geysa si7idi
Mark5:37 Yesuusi Phexroosape
Mark5:38 Enti ayhude woosa keetha halaqaa soo gakiya wode Yesuusi asay kaha dhayidi yeekeysanne zeleeleysa be7is.
Mark5:39 Gelidi asaako
Mark5:40 Asay iya bolla miicis. Shin asa ubbaa kare kessidi
Mark5:41 Yesuusi na7e kushiya oykidi
Mark5:42 Na7iya ellesa denda eqada hemetasu. Iya tammanne nam7u laytha na7a. Hessan asay daro malaaletidosona.
Mark5:43 Yesuusi hessa enti oodeska odonna mela enta minthi kiittis. Enti iw miyaba immana mela odis.
Mark6:1 Yesuusi yaape keyidi
Mark6:2 Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethan tamaarso oykis. I tamaarseysa si7ida daro asay malaaletidi
Mark6:3 Haysi anaaxiya gidennee? Mayraami na7a
Mark6:4 Yesuusi he asaako
Mark6:5 I he bessan ba kushiya guutha asaa bolla wothidi pathidaysafe attishin
Mark6:6 Asay ammanibona gisho daro malaaletis. Hessafe guye
Mark6:7 Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaareta baako xeegidi
Mark6:8 Enta
Mark6:9 Hinte tohuwan caamma aathite
Mark6:10 Qassika
Mark6:11 Hintena asi mokonasuwa woyko hinte odiyaba si7onnasuwa awun gidikoka
Mark6:12 Tammanne nam7u tamaareti bidi
Mark6:13 Enti asape daro tuna Ayyaanata kessidosona. Daro harganchota zayte tiyidi pathidosona.
Mark6:14 Yesuusa sunthay ubba bessan keyida gisho
Mark6:15 Baggati
Mark6:16 Shin Herodiisi hessa si7ida wode
Mark6:17 Herodiisi ba ishaa Filphoosa machiw Herodiyada ekida gisho I gaason Yohaanisa oythidi qashisis.
Mark6:18 Yohaanisi Herodiisa
Mark6:19 Herodiyada Yohaanisa ba ulon morkada iya wodhisanaw koyasu
Mark6:20 Yohaanisi xillonne geeshsha asi gididaysa Herodiisi erida gisho
Mark6:21 Herodiisi ba yeletida gallasa bonchanaw deriya haareysatas
Mark6:22 Herodiyada na7iya imathay moketiya bessaa gela durada
Mark6:23 Qassi iw caaqidi
Mark6:24 Na7iya kare keyada ba aayeko
Mark6:25 Na7iya ellesada kawako bada
Mark6:26 Yaanin
Mark6:27 Hessa gisho
Mark6:28 He qanxetida huuphiya saanen wothi ehidi na7ees immis. Na7iya qassi ba aayes immasu.
Mark6:29 Yohaanisa tamaareti hessa si7ida wode bidi iya aha eki efidi moogidosona.
Mark6:30 Tammanne nam7u hawaareti simmi yidi enti oothidabaanne tamaarsidaba ubbaa Yesuusas odidosona.
Mark6:31 Entako yaa asaynne biya asay darida gisho
Mark6:32 Hessa gisho
Mark6:33 Enti bishin daro asay enta be7idi eridosona. Yaatin
Mark6:34 Yesuusi wogoluwape wodhidi daro asa be7is. Asay heemmiya asi bayna dorsa mela gididaysa be7idi entaw qadhetidi enta darobaa tamaarsis.
Mark6:35 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yesuusa tamaareti iyako yidi
Mark6:36 Asay gutatanne katamata bidi bantaw miyaba shammana mela asa yedda” yaagidosona.
Mark6:37 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi entako
Mark6:38 Yesuusi entako
Mark6:39 Yesuusi ba tamaareta asa ubbaa cugan cugan shaakidi maatan utisana mela kiittis.
Mark6:40 Asay xeetu cuganinne ishatamu cugan shaaketi shaaketi uttidosona.
Mark6:41 Yesuusi ichashu uythaanne nam7u molota ekidi
Mark6:42 Asa ubbay midi kallidosona.
Mark6:43 Attida uytha tiifiyanne molota tiifiya
Mark6:44 Uythaa mida adde asaa tayboy ichashu mukulu.
Mark6:45 Ellesidi Yesuusi ba tamaareti wogoluwan gelidi
Mark6:46 Asaa moyzidaape guye
Mark6:47 Sa7ay qammiya wode wogoloy abba giddon de7ees
Mark6:48 Carkoy iya tamaaretako carkiya gisho
Mark6:49 Shin I abba bolla hemetishin
Mark6:50 Enti ubbay iya be7idi
Mark6:51 Yesuusi wogoluwan gelidi entara issife uttin carkoy wopu gis. Enti daro malaaletidosona.
Mark6:52 Enta wozanay zel7umida gisho
Mark6:53 Enti abba pinnidi
Mark6:54 Enti wogoluwape wodhiya wode asay ellesidi Yesuusa eridosona.
Mark6:55 Enti heeran de7iya biitta ubban woxeretidi harganchota halan tookidi
Mark6:56 Asay I bida soo ubban
Mark7:1 Yerusalaamepe yida guutha Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti Yesuusa matan shiiqidosona.
Mark7:2 Yesuusa tamaaretape issoti issoti geeyonna kushiyan
Mark7:3 Farsaawetinne Ayhude asa ubbay banta aawata wogaatho banta kushiya meecetonna mookonna.
Mark7:4 Hessadaka
Mark7:5 Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti Yesuusa
Mark7:6 Yesuusi entako
Mark7:7 Asi medhida wogaa Xoossaa higge daanisidi tamaarsiya gisho
Mark7:8 “Hinte Xoossaa kiitaa aggidi asa wogaa minthidi naageta” yaagis.
Mark7:9 Qassika Yesuusi
Mark7:10 Musey
Mark7:11 Shin issi asi ba aawa woyko ba aayiw maaddanaysa aggidi
Mark7:12 I ba aawa woyko ba aayiw maaddonna mela ootheeta.
Mark7:13 Hessadaka
Mark7:14 Yesuusi daro asaa qassika baako xeegidi
Mark7:15 Asa wozanape keyaabay ase tuniseesipe attishin
Mark7:16 Si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o” yaagis.
Mark7:17 Yesuusi daro asaa yeggi aggidi soo gelin iya tamaareti he leemisuwaba iya oychidosona.
Mark7:18 I entako
Mark7:19 Ayis giiko
Mark7:20 Kaallidika
Mark7:21 Asa wozana giddofe keyaabay iita qofa
Mark7:22 iita amo
Mark7:23 Ha iitabay ubbayka asa wozana giddofe keyidi ase tunisees” yaagis.
Mark7:24 Yesuusi yaape keyidi
Mark7:25 Shin I guutha na7iw tuna ayyaanay oykida issi maccasiya Yesuusaba si7ada ellesa iyako yada iya tohuwa bolla kundasu.
Mark7:26 Iya Ayhude maccasi giduku; iya yeletiday Sirofinqe biittana. Iya
Mark7:27 Shin Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark7:28 Maccasiya zaarada
Mark7:29 Yesuusi qassi iiko
Mark7:30 Maccasiya ba soo biya wode tuna ayyaanay iipe keyin hiixan zin7idaaro demmasu.
Mark7:31 Yesuusi Xiroosa katamaape keyidi
Mark7:32 Asay tullenne waayidi odetiya asi Yesuusako ehidi
Mark7:33 Yesuusi barka he uraa daro asape gaxa kessidi
Mark7:34 Salo pude xeellidi
Mark7:35 Uraa haythay ellesidi dooyetis
Mark7:36 Yesuusi asaako
Mark7:37 Hessa si7ida asa ubbay daro malaaletidi
Mark8:1 Guutha wodepe guye
Mark8:2 “Ha asay taara heedzu gallas gakanaw gam7idi
Mark8:3 Taani asaa koshara soo yeddiko asay bishe ogen daaburidi kundana
Mark8:4 Yesuusa tamaareti zaaridi
Mark8:5 Yesuusi entako
Mark8:6 Yesuusi asay sa7an uttana mela kiittis. Yaatidi
Mark8:7 Entaw qassi guutha laafa moloti de7oosona. Yesuusi he molota gisho Xoossaa galatidi
Mark8:8 Asa ubbay midi kallidosona. Iya tamaareti attida tiifiya laapun gayta kumethi denthidosona.
Mark8:9 Kathaa mida asaa tayboy oyddu mukulu gidana. Hessafe guye
Mark8:10 I qassi ba tamaaretara ellesi wogolon gelidi Dalmanuuta biitta bis.
Mark8:11 Farsaaweti yidi Yesuusa paacanaw koyidi
Mark8:12 Yesuusi tooki shempidi
Mark8:13 I enta yan yeggi aggidi zaari wogolon gelidi abbaafe hefinthi pinnis.
Mark8:14 Iya tamaareti kathi efanaysa dogidosona; entaw wogoluwa giddon issi uythaafe hari baawa.
Mark8:15 Yesuusi entako
Mark8:16 Enti banta giddon
Mark8:17 Yesuusi enti geysa eridi entako
Mark8:18 Hintew ayfey de7ishin be7eketii? Haythi de7ishin si7eketii? Hinte akeeketii?
Mark8:19 Taani ichashu uythaa ichashu mukulu asaas bathida wode aapun gayta kumethi tiife denthidetii?” yaagis. Entika
Mark8:20 “Hessadaka
Mark8:21 Yaatin

Mark8:24 Uray dhoqu gidi xeellidi
Mark8:25 Hessafe guye
Mark8:26 Yesuusi addiyako
Mark8:27 Yesuusi ba tamaaretara Qisaare Filphoosa matan de7iya gutaa bis. Enti bishin oge bolla Yesuusi
Mark8:28 Iya tamaareti
Mark8:29 Yesuusi entako
Mark8:30 Yesuusi
Mark8:31 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako

Mark8:34 Qassika Yesuusi daro asaanne ba tamaareta baako xeegidi

Mark13:1 Yesuusi Xoossa Keethafe keyishin
Mark13:2 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark13:3 Yesuusi Xoossa keethafe hini baggara Shamaho zuma bolla uttidashin
Mark13:4 “Haysi awude hananeeko nuus oda; ha ubbay poletana wodiya erisiya malaatay aybee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
Mark13:5 Yesuusi qassi entako haysada yaagidi odis. “Hintena oonika balethonna mela naagetite.
Mark13:6 Daro asati ta sunthan
Mark13:7 Matan de7iya olaanne haahon de7iya ola wore hinte si7iya wode hirgofite. Hessa melabay hananaw bessees
Mark13:8 Issi biitta asay hara biitta asaara oletana; qassi issi kawotethay hara kawotethatara oletana; biitta qaaxoy ubba bessan hanana; koshay daana
Mark13:9 “Shin hinte
Mark13:10 Wursethay gakanaape sinthe wongelay koyro dere ubbaas odetanaw bessees.
Mark13:11 Enti hintena pirda keethi ehiya wodenne aathidi immiya wode
Mark13:12 “Ishay ba ishaa
Mark13:13 Asa ubbay hintena ta suntha gisho ixana
Mark13:14 “Shin dhayo tunatethay eqanaw bessonna bessan eqidashin hinte be7ana.” (Akeekiso: Hessi woy guusseko nabbabeysi akeeko!) “Yihuda biittan he wode de7eysati deriyako baqato.
Mark13:15 Keetha huuphen de7iya urayka issiba ekanaw duge wodhidi
Mark13:16 Gaden de7eysi ba ma7uwa ekanaw guye simmofo.
Mark13:17 He wode qanthatida maccasatasinne dhanthiya maccasatas daro un7a gidana.
Mark13:18 Shin haysi ubbay haniya wodey balgo gidonna mela
Mark13:19 Ayis giiko
Mark13:20 Goday he gallasata taybuwa guuthonnaako
Mark13:21 “He wode oonika hintena
Mark13:22 Wordancho Kiristoosatinne wordo nabeti dendidi bantaw danda7etiko
Mark13:23 Shin hinte naagetite; taani hintew ubbaba kasetada odas.
Mark13:24 “Shin he wode he waayiyape guye
Mark13:25 Xoolintoti salope kundana; qassi salon de7iya wolqatika qaaxana.
Mark13:26 He wode Asa Na7ay
Mark13:27 He wode I kiitanchota sa7a oyddu bagga kiittana; sa7a gaxape salo gaxa gakanaw
Mark13:28 “Leemisuwa balase mithafe akeekite; balasiya aaciya wodenne I haythay cil7iya wode
Mark13:29 Hessadaka
Mark13:30 Taani hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbabay hanana gakanaw haysan de7iya asa ubbay hayqenna.
Mark13:31 Saloynne sa7i aadhana

Mark13:34 Ta yuussay
Mark13:35 “Hessa gisho
Mark13:36 Hinte akeekona I yidi hinte dhiskidi de7ishin demmonna mela minnite.
Mark13:37 Taani hintew odeysa asa ubbaas odayis; minnite” yaagis.
Mark14:1 Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasinne Uytha Ba7aale bonchiya gallasi gakanaw nam7u gallasi attis. Kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti asi eronna Yesuusa oykidi wodhiya oge koyoosona.
Mark14:2 “Asay ooshshi kessonna mela Paasika bonchiya gallasan hessa oothoko” yaagidosona.
Mark14:3 Yesuusi Bitaane kataman baro hargancho gidida Simoona son gibira bolla uttidashin
Mark14:4 He bessan de7iya asape issoy issoy hanqetidi
Mark14:5 Ha shittuwa heedzu xeetu dinaaren bayzidi
Mark14:6 Shin Yesuusi “Ha maccasiw aykoka goopite; iyo ayis waaysetii? Iya taw lo77oba oothasu.
Mark14:7 Manqoti ubba wode hintera de7oosona. Hinte koyida wode awudeka hinte enta maaddanaw danda7eeta
Mark14:8 Iya ba danda7idaysa oothasu; qassi tana moogoos giigisanaw kasetada shitto tiyasu.
Mark14:9 Taani hintew tuma odayis; sa7a ubban wongela odiya bessa awunka
Mark14:10 Tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issoy Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysi Yesuusa kahine halaqatas aathidi immanaw entako bis.
Mark14:11 Enti hessa si7ida wode ufaytidi
Mark14:12 Uytha miya gallas bonchiya koyro gallas
Mark14:13 Yesuusi ba tamaaretape nam7ata haysada yaagidi kiittis: “Katamaa biite; hinte bishin
Mark14:14 I bidi geliya keetha godaa
Mark14:15 Goday hintena pooqiya bolla de7iya giigidi uttida dalga kifile bessaana; hessan giigisite” yaagis.
Mark14:16 He nam7u tamaareti keyidi
Mark14:17 Sa7ay omarsiya wode Yesuusi tammanne nam7u tamaaretara yaa bis.
Mark14:18 Enti uttidi kathi mishin
Mark14:19 Iya tamaareti dagammidi
Mark14:20 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark14:21 Asa Na7ay
Mark14:22 Enti mishin
Mark14:23 Xuu7a ekidi
Mark14:24 Yesuusi
Mark14:25 Taani hintew tuma odayis; taani Xoossaa kawotethan ooratha woyne uyana gallasi gakanaw zaarada ha woyniyape uyike” yaagis.
Mark14:26 Mazmure yexidaape guye
Mark14:27 Yesuusi entako
Mark14:28 Shin taani hayqope dendidaape guye
Mark14:29 Phexroosi zaaridi
Mark14:30 Yesuusi Phexroosako
Mark14:31 Shin Phexroosi kaseysafe minthidi
Mark14:32 Geetasemaane geetetiya bessaa bidosona; Yesuusi ba tamaaretako
Mark14:33 Yesuusi Phexroosa
Mark14:34 Qassi entako
Mark14:35 Guuthi sinthe shiiqidi
Mark14:36 Qassi
Mark14:37 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako simmi yidi
Mark14:38 Paacen hinte gelonna mela barkidi naagitenne Xoossaa woossite. Hintew lo77o amoy de7ees
Mark14:39 Qassika bidi kaseysada Xoossa woossis.
Mark14:40 Ba tamaaretako guye simmidi yaa wode
Mark14:41 Heedzantho entako yidi
Mark14:42 Dendidi yedhite; be7ite
Mark14:43 Yesuusi hessa buroo odishin
Mark14:44 Yesuusa aathidi immanaysi he daro asaas
Mark14:45 Yihudi gaki wodhida mela Yesuusako shiiqidi
Mark14:46 He daro asay Yesuusa oykidosona.
Mark14:47 Shin matan eqidaysatape issoy ba mashsha shoddidi kahine halaqaa aylliya shocidi
Mark14:48 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark14:49 Taani xoossa keethan tamaarsashe
Mark14:50 Iya tamaareti ubbay iya yeggi aggidi baqatidosona.
Mark14:51 Laxana xalaala ma7ida issi na7atetha uray Yesuusa kaalleysa asay oykis.
Mark14:52 Shin he uray laxana yeggi aggidi
Mark14:53 Asay Yesuusa kahine halaqaa soo efidosona. Yan kahine halaqati
Mark14:54 Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabbaa gakanaw haahon iya kaalli bidi yan naageysatara uttidi tama kayees.
Mark14:55 Kahine halaqatinne shiiqida asa ubbay Yesuusa wodhanaw iya bolla marka koydosona
Mark14:56 Daro asati iya bolla wordo markatidosona
Mark14:57 Issi issi asati dendi eqidi Yesuusa bolla
Mark14:58 
Mark14:59 Gidoshin
Mark14:60 Kahine halaqay asa ubba sinthan dendi eqidi
Mark14:61 Shin Yesuusi si77i gis; aykoka zaaribeenna. Kahine halaqay
Mark14:62 Yesuusi zaaridi
Mark14:63 Kahine halaqay ba ma7uwa peedhidi
Mark14:64 Hinte iya cashsha si7ideta; hinte qofay aybee?” yaagis. Enti ubbay
Mark14:65 Entafe issoti issoti iya bolla cutethi oykidosona. Iya ayfiya goozidi baqishe
Mark14:66 Phexroosi kahine halaqaa zabban garsa baggara de7ishin
Mark14:67 Phexroosi tama kayeysa demmada
Mark14:68 Shin Phexroosi
Mark14:69 He gadhindiya Phexroosa be7ada
Mark14:70 Shin Phexroosi qassika kaddis. Guuthu gam7ishin
Mark14:71 Shin Phexroosi
Mark14:72 Ellesidi kuttoy nam7antho waassi aggis. Phexroosi
Mark15:1 Wonta guura ellesidi kahine halaqati
Mark15:2 Philaxoosi iyako
Mark15:3 Kahine halaqati Yesuusa daroban mootidosona.
Mark15:4 Shin Philaxoosi zaaridi Yesuusako
Mark15:5 Shin Yesuusi haraba zaaronna ixin
Mark15:6 Philaxoosas Paasika Ba7aale bonchiya gallasan asay koya issi asi qashope billiya meezey de7ees.
Mark15:7 He wode issi Barbaana geetetiya uray ooshshu kessidi shempo wodhida asaara issife qasho keethan de7ees.
Mark15:8 Shiiqida daro asay Philaxoosi kaseysada oothana mela iya oychidosona.
Mark15:9 Philaxoosi asa zaaridi
Mark15:10 Hessa I giday
Mark15:11 Shin kahine halaqati Yesuusa gisho Barbaana billanaada
Mark15:12 Philaxoosi zaaridi
Mark15:13 Asay Philaxoosa bolla waassidi
Mark15:14 Philaxoosi
Mark15:15 Philaxoosi asaa ufaysanaw koyidi
Mark15:16 Hessafe guye
Mark15:17 Qassi zo7o afila iya mayzidosona; aguntha kallacha giigisidi
Mark15:18 Hessafe guye
Mark15:19 Iya huuphiya xam7an shocidosona; qassi iya bolla cuttidosona; gulbatidi iyaw goyinnidosona.
Mark15:20 Iya toochidaape guye zo7o afila iyape qaari ekidi
Mark15:21 Enti bishe
Mark15:22 Yaatidi Golgota geetetiya bessaa Yesuusa efidosona. “Golgota” guussay “Huuphe guugge” guussu.
Mark15:23 Sakoy si7etonna mela karbera walaketida woyne uyo gidi iyaw immidosona; shin I uyonna ixis.
Mark15:24 Enti masqale bolla iya kaqidosona. Oona aybi gakaneeko gidi iya afila shaakidi saama yeggidosona.
Mark15:25 Enti masqale bolla iya kaqiya wode wontafe heedzu saate.
Mark15:26 Enti
Mark15:27 Yesuusara nam7u pangata issuwa iyape ushacha baggara hankuwa iyape haddirsa baggara masqale bolla kaqidosona.
Mark15:28 Geeshsha Maxaafay
Mark15:29 Ogera aadhiya asay Yesuusa kadhidi
Mark15:30 ane masqaliya bollafe wodha; ne huuphiya ashsha” yaagidosona.
Mark15:31 Hessadaka
Mark15:32 nuuni be7idi ammanana mela Kiristoosi
Mark15:33 Usupun saatepe doomidi
Mark15:34 Uddufun saaten Yesuusi
Mark15:35 Hessan eqida asape issoy issoy hessa si7idi
Mark15:36 He asape issoy woxidi
Mark15:37 Hessafe guye
Mark15:38 Xoossa keethan kaqetida magaraajoy qommofe duge gakanaw
Mark15:39 Masqaliyape sintha baggara yan eqida issi mato halaqay
Mark15:40 Hessa haahon eqidi be7iya guutha maccasati de7oosona. Enta giddon Magdela Mayraama
Mark15:41 He maccasati Yesuusi Galilan de7iya wode iya kaallidaysatanne iya mokidaysata qassi Yesuusara issife Yerusalaame bida hara daro maccasati yan de7oosona.
Mark15:42 Sa7i omarsida wode
Mark15:43 
Mark15:44 Philaxoosi
Mark15:45 Philaxoosi
Mark15:46 Yoosefi moogo afila shammis; Yesuusa aha masqaliyape wothidi
Mark15:47 Magdela Mayraamanne Yoosa aayiya Mayraama Yesuusa aha enti awun moogidako be7oosona.
Mark16:1 Sambaati aadhidaape guye
Mark16:2 Wogga wode wonta daro guura xalqey caarishin
Mark16:3 Enti banta giddon issoy issuwara
Mark16:4 Enti xeelliya wode he daro gita shuchay gondoretidi kichidaysa be7idosona.
Mark16:5 Yesuusi moogetida duufuwa giddo geliya wode issi pantha addey bootha ma7o ma7idi
Mark16:6 Shin I entako
Mark16:7 Ha77i bidi Yesuusa tamaaretasinne Phexroosas
Mark16:8 Maccasati yashshan kokorishe duufope keyidi baqatidosona. Qassi enti yayyida gisho
Mark16:9 Yesuusi hayqope dendidaape guye
Mark16:10 Iya bada kase iyara de7eysatas
Mark16:11 Shin Yesuusi paxa de7eysanne iw bentidaysa enti si7ida wode iya geysa ammanibookona.
Mark16:12 Hessafe guye
Mark16:13 Enti guye simmidi
Mark16:14 Guyepe tammanne issi iya tamaareti kathi mishin
Mark16:15 I entako
Mark16:16 Ammaneynne xammaqetey attana
Mark16:17 Ammaneysatas ha malaatati imetana. Enti ta sunthan tuna ayyaanata kessana
Mark16:18 Enti shooshu oykikoka woyko wodhiyaba uyikoka enta qohenna. Qassi enti banta kushiya harganchota bolla wothidi enta pathana” yaagis.
Mark16:19 Goday Yesuusi tamaaretara odetidaape guye
Mark16:20 Iya tamaareti bida bessa ubban qaala odidosona. Godayka entara issife oothees. Enti odiya qaalay tuma gididaysa Xoossay entaw immiya malaatatan erisis.
Luke1:1 Boncho Tewofloosa
Luke1:2 He taarikiya enti xaafiday koyrope doomidi ayfe markatinne qaala haggaazeysati nuus odidaysa.
Luke1:3 Taka ta baggara koyrope akeeka xeellidaape guye
Luke1:4 Hessika
Luke1:5 Yihuda kawa Herodiisa wode Abiya yaraape gidida Zakaryaasa geetetiya Ayhude kahiney de7ees. Iya machiyaka Aarona sheeshape. I sunthayka Elsabeexo.
Luke1:6 Nam7ayka Godaa wogaanne kiita ubbaa naagidi borey bayna Xoossaa sinthan xillotethan de7idosona.
Luke1:7 Hanope attishin
Luke1:8 Issi gallas Zakaryaasi ba gishuwa maaran Xoossaa sinthan kahinetethan haggaazees.
Luke1:9 Kahinetetha wogan Xoossa Keethi gelidi ixaane cuyisanaw iya saami gakis.
Luke1:10 Ixaaney cuyaa wode asay karen woossees.
Luke1:11 Godaa kiitanchoy yarsho yarshiya bessaafe ushacha baggara eqidi bentis.
Luke1:12 Zakaryaasi iya be7ida wode dagammidi daro yayyis.
Luke1:13 Shin kiitanchoy iyako
Luke1:14 I new injenne ufaysi gidana; daroti iya yeletethan ufaytana.
Luke1:15 Godaa sinthan I gita gidana; woyne ushshi gidin hara mathoyiya ushsha uyenna. Ba aaye ulon de7ishe Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumana.
Luke1:16 Isra7eele asatape darota banta Godaa
Luke1:17 Aawata wozana naytako zaarana
Luke1:18 Zakaryaasi kiitanchuwako
Luke1:19 Kiitanchoy zaaridi
Luke1:20 Heko
Luke1:21 He wode Zakaryaasi Xoossa Keethi gelidi gam7ida gisho
Luke1:22 I kare keyidi entana odisanaw danda7ibeenna. Malli besope attishin
Luke1:23 Zakaryaasi ba haggaazuwa polidi soo simmis.
Luke1:24 Hessafe guye
Luke1:25 Iya
Luke1:26 Elsabeexa qanthatin usupuntho ageenan
Luke1:27 Kawa Dawita sheeshape gidida Yoosefa geetetiya uraas oyshetida geela7eeko kiittis. He geela7iya Mayraamo geetetawusu.
Luke1:28 Kiitanchoy iiko bidi
Luke1:29 Mayraama iya odan daro dagammada
Luke1:30 Kiitanchoy zaaridi
Luke1:31 Heko neeni qanthatana adde na7a yelana
Luke1:32 I gita gidana
Luke1:33 I Yayqooba sheesha bolla merinaw kawotana; iya kawotethaas zawi baawa” yaagis.
Luke1:34 Mayraama kiitanchuwako
Luke1:35 Kiitanchoy zaaridi
Luke1:36 Heko
Luke1:37 Xoossaa xooniyabay baawa” yaagis.
Luke1:38 Mayraama
Luke1:39 Mayraama he saamintan dendada Yihuda biittan de7iya issi derey dariya katama basu.
Luke1:40 Zakaryaasa soo gelada Elsabeexo sarothasu.
Luke1:41 Elsabeexa Mayraami sarothuwa si7ida wode I uluwan de7iya na7ay ufaysan gupis. Elsabeexa Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumada
Luke1:42 ba qaala dhoqu oothada
Luke1:43 Hanoshin
Luke1:44 Heko ne sarothuwa ta si7ida wode ta uluwan de7iya na7ay ufaysan gupis.
Luke1:45 Goday polana gidi immida qaala ammanidara
Luke1:46 Mayraama haysada yaagasu: “Ta shempiya Godaa bonchawusu
Luke1:47 ta Ayyaanay dhaliya Xoossan ufaytees.
Luke1:48 I ba aylle kawushatethaa be7is. Hachife doomidi yeletethi ubbay tana anjetidaaro gaana.
Luke1:49 Ayis giiko
Luke1:50 Iya boncheyisata bolla
Luke1:51 Ba qesiyan minoba oothis
Luke1:52 Wolqaama kawota araatape kawushis; bantana kawushidaysata kaaboyis.
Luke1:53 Koshatidaysata lo77oban kalsis
Luke1:54 Ba maarota qopidi
Luke1:55 Hessika nu aawatas odida qaala
Luke1:56 Mayraama Elsabeexi matan heedzu ageena mela gam7ada ba soo simmasu.
Luke1:57 Elsabeexis yelo qammay gakin adde na7a yelasu.
Luke1:58 I shoorotinne I dabboti Goday gita maarota oothidaysa si7idi
Luke1:59 Hospuntha gallasan yooga na7aa qaxaranaw yidosona. Iya aawa sunthan Zakaryaasa gidi sunthanaw koydosona.
Luke1:60 Shin aayiya
Luke1:61 Entika
Luke1:62 Iya aaway oona gidi sunthaneko eranaw koyidi iya malla oychidosona.
Luke1:63 I xaafiyabaa oychi ekidi
Luke1:64 Iira Zakaryaasa inxarsay biletis
Luke1:65 Shooroti ubbay yashshan kumidosona. Ha hanidabay derey dariya Yihuda biittan odetis.
Luke1:66 Hessa si7ida ubbay
Luke1:67 Yohaanisa aaway Zakaryaasi Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi haysada yaagidi tinbite odis.
Luke1:68 “Isra7eele Goday galatetto
Luke1:69 Ba aylliya Dawita keethan atotetha kaciya denthis.
Luke1:70 Hessika beni wode geeshsha nabeta doonan odetidaysa mela
Luke1:71 Iya ashoy nu morketapenne nuura eqetiya ubbaa kushiyape.
Luke1:72 Hessa I oothiday nu aawatas ba maarota bessanaasinne
Luke1:73 Nu aawa Abrahaames caaqida caaquwa qopanaasinne
Luke1:74 nu morketa kushepe kessidi yashshi bayna iya haggaazana melasa.
Luke1:75 Nu laytha ubban geeshshatethaninne xillotethan ba sinthan nuna essanaasa.

Luke1:77 Enta nagaray qushetin

Luke2:1 He wode Roome biittan de7iya asa ubbay taybetana melanne sunthay xaafetana mela kawoy Awugisxoosi kiittis.
Luke2:2 Hessika Qerenoosi Soore biitta aysiya wode oosetida koyro taybuwa.
Luke2:3 Hessa gisho
Luke2:4 Yoosefika Dawita keethaafenne yaraape gidida gisho
Luke2:5 Bishe
Luke2:6 Enti yan de7ishin iw yelo wodey gakis.
Luke2:7 Ba bayra na7aa yelasu. Curqara xaaxada imathi aqiya keethan bessi dhayida gisho daran mehe muziya gongen zin7isasu.
Luke2:8 He gadiyan qamma dorsa wudiya naagishe karen aqiya henthanchoti de7oosona.
Luke2:9 Godaa kiitanchoy hassayonna yidi enta matan eqis. Godaa bonchoy enta yuushuwan poo7is; entika wolqaama yashshi yayyidosona.
Luke2:10 Shin kiitanchoy
Luke2:11 Hessika
Luke2:12 Zoqale na7i curqara xaaxetidi gongen zin7idaysa hinte demmana; hessika hintew malla gido” yaagis.
Luke2:13 Qoponna daro salo kiitanchoti kiitanchuwara issife qoncidi
Luke2:14 “Bonchoy Xoossaas dhoqa saluwan
Luke2:15 Kiitanchoti entafe shaaketidi saluwa keydaape guye henthanchoti
Luke2:16 Entika ellesidi bidosona. Mayraamo
Luke2:17 Be7i simmidi na7aba entaw odetoysa
Luke2:18 Hessa si7ida ubbay henthanchoti odidaysan malaaletidosona.
Luke2:19 Mayraama hanidaba ubbaa ba wozanan qopashe de7asu.
Luke2:20 Henthanchoti entaw odetidaysada hanin be7idosona. Hessa gisho
Luke2:21 Hospuntha qamman
Luke2:22 Muse woga mela enta geeshshatetha wodey poletidaape guye Yoosefaranne Mayraamira yooga na7aa banta Godaas immanaw Yerusalaame bidosona.
Luke2:23 Hessika
Luke2:24 Qassi Godaa wogan
Luke2:25 He wode geeshshinne ammanora mino gidida Simoona geetetiya asi Yerusalaamen de7ees. I Isra7eeleta atotetha naagishe de7ees. Geeshsha Ayyaanayka iya bolla de7ees.
Luke2:26 Qassi Kiristoosa be7onna hayqonnaysa Geeshsha Ayyaanay iyaw qoncisin eridi de7ees.
Luke2:27 I he gallas Ayyaanay kaalethin Xoossa Keethi bis. Na7aa aayeranne aawara wogaa polanaw yooga na7aa Yesuusa ekidi gelida wode
Luke2:28 Simooni moki ekidi na7aa idimmidi
Luke2:29 “Godaw ne taw gelida qaala mela
Luke2:30 Ta ayfey asaa ubbaa sinthan ne giigisida
Luke2:31 ne ashuwa be7is.
Luke2:32 Hessika kawotethata ubbaas
Luke2:33 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira iyaw odetidaban malaaletidosona.
Luke2:34 Simooni enta anjis. Aaye Mayraamiko
Luke2:35 Qassi eqeteysatas malla gidana. Ne shempuwaraka qassi mashshi aadhana” yaagis.
Luke2:36 Qassi Aseera yaraape gidida Faanu7ela na7iya Haanna geetetiya nabey de7awusu. Iya daro cimasu; iya ba koyro azinaara laapun laythi de7asu.
Luke2:37 I azinay hayqin hospun tammanne oyddu laythi gidana gakanaw qammanne gallas pacey bayna woosaninne xooman xoossa keethan haggaazasu.
Luke2:38 Iya he saatiyan bada Xoossaa galatasu; Yerusalaame wozetetha naagiya ubbaas yooga na7aba markatasu.
Luke2:39 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira Godaa higgiyan kiitetida woga ubbaa polidaape guye Galila biittan de7iya banta katama Naazirete simmidosona.
Luke2:40 Na7ay diccishenne minnishe bis. Cincatethan kumis; Xoossaa aadho keehatethay iya bolla de7ees.
Luke2:41 Yoosefaranne Mayraamira Paasika Ba7aale bonchanaw laythan laythan Yerusalaame boosona.
Luke2:42 Yesuusas tammanne nam7u laythi gidiya wode kase meezetidaysada ba7aale bonchanaw bidosona.
Luke2:43 Baaliya bonchidaape guye soo simmiya wode na7ay Yesuusi Yerusalaamen attis. Shin Yoosefaranne Mayraamira I Yerusalaamen attoysa eribookona.
Luke2:44 I soo simmiya asaara wolla de7iya daanin enti issi gallasa oge bidosona. I baynaysa eridaape guye banta dabbotanne laggeta matan koydosona.
Luke2:45 I yan dhayin koyishe guye Yerusalaame gakanaw bidosona.
Luke2:46 Heedzu gallasape guye xoossa keethan astamaareta giddon uttidi entaba si7ishenne enta oychishe de7ishin demmidosona.
Luke2:47 Iya si7iya ubbay iya akeekaninne zaaruwan malaaletidosona.
Luke2:48 Soo asay iya demmida wode malaaletidosona. Iya aayaka
Luke2:49 Yesuusi entako
Luke2:50 Shin I entako gidaba enti akeekibokona.

Luke4:1 Yesuusi Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi Yordaanose Shaafape simmida mela Ayyaanay iya mela biitta efis.
Luke4:2 Yan oytamu gallasinne qamma xalahen paacetis. He gallasatan aykoka moonna gam7ida gisho wursethan koshatis.
Luke4:3 Xalahey iyako
Luke4:4 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke4:5 Hessafe guye
Luke4:6 Xalahey
Luke4:7 Hessa gisho
Luke4:8 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke4:9 Wursethan Xalahey Yesuusa Yerusalaame efidi Xoossa Keethas huuphiya bolla essidi
Luke4:10 Ayis giiko
Luke4:11 Enti ne tohoy shuchan dhubetonna mela
Luke4:12 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke4:13 Xalahey Yesuusa paaciya wursidaape guye hara inje wode demmana gakanaw iyape shaaketis.
Luke4:14 Yesuusi Ayyaana wolqan kumidi Galila simmis. Iya sunthay heeran de7iya biitta ubban keyis.
Luke4:15 I ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarsis; asa ubbay iya galatidosona.
Luke4:16 Yaape I diccida katamaa Naazirete yis. Kase meezetidaysada Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethi gelis. Nabbabanawuka dendi eqis.
Luke4:17 Nabiya Isayaasa maxaafay iyaw imetin
Luke4:18 “Godaa Ayyaanay ta bolla de7ees
Luke4:19 Xoossay keehanaw qopida laytha odana mela tana kiittis” yaagis.
Luke4:20 Hessafe guye
Luke4:21 I
Luke4:22 Ubbay iyabaa darsidi odetoosona. Qassi iya doonape keyiya aadho keehatethan kumida qaalan malaaletishe
Luke4:23 I
Luke4:24 Qassi
Luke4:25 “Ta hintew tuma odayis; saloy heedzu laythinne bagga gordetin mino koshi biitta ubban de7iya Eeliyaasa wode daro am7eti Isra7eelen de7oosona.
Luke4:26 Eeliyaasi entafe issinnekoka kiitetibeenna. Shin Saraptan de7iya am7eeko kiitetis.
Luke4:27 Nabiya Elsa wode Isra7eelen daro baro harganchoti de7oosona. Shin Soore uraa Ni7imaanepe attishin
Luke4:28 Ayhude woosa keethan de7iya asa ubbay hessa si7ida wode daro yilotidosona.
Luke4:29 Banta uttida bessaafe dendidi dere bolla keexetida katamaape gaxa kessidi sugi yeddanaw aafo doona efidosona.
Luke4:30 Shin I enta giddora kanthidi aadhis.
Luke4:31 Yaape Galila biittan de7iya Qifirnahooma katamaa bis. Yan Sambaata gallas asaa tamaarsis.
Luke4:32 I tamaarsey maatara gidiya gisho ubbay iya timirtiyan malaaletidosona.
Luke4:33 Ayhude woosa keethan tuna ayyaanay oykida uray de7ees.
Luke4:34 I
Luke4:35 Yesuusi tuna ayyaanako
Luke4:36 Asa ubbay malaaletidosona. Woliko
Luke4:37 Iya sunthay heera ubban keyis.
Luke4:38 Hessafe guye
Luke4:39 I hiixako shiiqi hokidi I hargiya hanqis. Mishay aggin ellesa dendada enta mokasu.
Luke4:40 Away wullana hanishin dumma dumma hargiyan oyketida asaa iyako ehidosona. I issuwa issuwa bolla ba kushiya wothidi pathis.
Luke4:41 Tuna ayyaanati qassi
Luke4:42 Buroo wontiya wode Yesuusi issi geema bessi bis. Asay koyishe I de7iya bessaa yidosona. Entafe I shaaketidi boonna mela digganaw koydosona.
Luke4:43 Shin I
Luke4:44 Yihuda biittan de7iya ayhude woosa keethan sabbakis.
Luke5:1 Issi gallas Yesuusi Gensareexe Abbaa matan eqidashin daro asay iya yuushuwa un7ethidi
Luke5:2 Yan haatha gaxan de7iya nam7u wogolota be7is. Molo oykiya asati wogolotape wodhidi banta gitiya meeccosona.
Luke5:3 He wogolotape Simoonaysan gelidi biittafe guuthi giddo shiishana mela oychis. Yaatidi
Luke5:4 Ba timirtiya ongidaape guye Simoonako
Luke5:5 Simooni zaaridi
Luke5:6 Enti gitiya yeggida wode gitey daaketana gakanaw daro molo oykidosona.
Luke5:7 Hara wogolon de7iya banta laggeti yidi
Luke5:8 Simoon Phexroosi hessa be7ida wode
Luke5:9 I hessa giday
Luke5:10 Qassi Simoona lagge gidida Zabdiyoosa nayti Yayqoobaranne Yohaanisara malaaletidosona. Yesuusi Simoonako
Luke5:11 Enti wogolota gaxa shiishidaape guye ubbaa aggidi Yesuusa kaallidosona.
Luke5:12 Yesuusi katamatape issuwan de7ishin issi baro hargen oyketida asi he kataman de7ees. He uray Yesuusa be7idi iya sinthan gufannidi
Luke5:13 Yesuusi ba kushiya yeddi bochidi
Luke5:14 Yesuusi
Luke5:15 Gidoshin
Luke5:16 Shin Yesuusi daro wode geema bessi bidi woossees.
Luke5:17 Issi gallas Yesuusi tamaarsishin Galilapenne Yihuda heera ubbaafe qassi Yerusalaamepe yida Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti yan uttidosona. Asaa pathiya Godaa wolqayka iyara de7ees.
Luke5:18 He wode asay issi gunda asi halara tookidi ehidosona. Soo gelsidi iya sinthan wothanaw qopidosona.
Luke5:19 Shin asaa darotethaafe dendoysan soo gelsanaw xoonetidi keethaa bolla keyidi
Luke5:20 Yesuusi enta ammanuwa be7idi
Luke5:21 Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti
Luke5:22 Yesuusi enta qofaa erida gisho entako
Luke5:23 ‘Ne nagaray qushetis geysafenne dendada ba geysafe awusi kawuyii?’
Luke5:24 Shin ta hessa giday Asa Na7i sa7a bolla nagara ato gaanaw maati de7eysa hinte erana melasa.” Hessafe kaallidi
Luke5:25 I ellesi dendidi enta sinthan eqis; I tooketidi yida algaa tookidi Xoossaa galatishe ba soo bis.
Luke5:26 He wode ubbayka malaaletidosona. Xoossaa galatishe
Luke5:27 Hessafe guye
Luke5:28 I ubbaba aggidi
Luke5:29 He Leewey ba son gita gibira giigisis. Daro qaraxa qanxiseysatinne hara asati katha bolla uttidosona.
Luke5:30 Farsaawetinne higge astamaareti
Luke5:31 Yesuusi entako
Luke5:32 Taani nagaranchota maarotako zaaranaasafe attishin
Luke5:33 Enti Yesuusako
Luke5:34 Yesuusi entako
Luke5:35 Shin mushuray entafe shaaketana gallasay yaana
Luke5:36 Qassi yaagidi leemiso odis; “Ooratha ma7ope peedhidi gal7a ma7o bolla sikey oonika baawa. Hessatho oothiko ooratha ma7uwa peedhees
Luke5:37 Mal7anto woyne gal7a ogoron qoliya oonika baawa. Hessa oothiko
Luke5:38 Hessa gisho
Luke5:39 Hiza
Luke6:1 Issi Sambaata gallas Yesuusi giste gade giddora aadhees. Yesuusa tamaareti tiya banga duuthidi banta kushen shirkidi moosona.
Luke6:2 Shin Farsaaweta giddofe issoti issoti
Luke6:3 Yesuusi entako zaaridi
Luke6:4 Xoossa Keethi gelidi Ayhude kahineta xalaalas bessiya daabbuwa mis; baara de7eysataska immis” yaagis.
Luke6:5 Qassi Yesuusi
Luke6:6 Hara Sambaata gallas Yesuusi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi tamaarsees. He bessan ushacha kushey silida issi asi de7ees.
Luke6:7 Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti iya mootanaw gaaso koyidi Sambaata gallas pathiko be7ana gidi naagoosona.
Luke6:8 Shin Yesuusi enta qofaa eridi kushey silida uraako
Luke6:9 Yesuusi
Luke6:10 Qassi Yesuusi iya yuushuwan de7iya asaa yuushshi xeellidi uraako
Luke6:11 Shin higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti daro yilotidosona. Yesuusa bolla ay oothino gidi banta giddon maqetidosona.
Luke6:12 He wode gallasatape issuwan Yesuusi woossanaw zuma bolla keyis. Qamma kumethi woossishe aqis.
Luke6:13 Wontethe ba tamaareta xeegidi enta giddofe tammanne nam7ata dooridi
Luke6:14 Entika
Luke6:15 Maatosa
Luke6:16 Yayqooba na7aa Yihudanne Yesuusa aathidi immida Asqoroota Yihuda.
Luke6:17 Yesuusi entara issife zumaape wodhidi demba bessan eqis. Iya tamaaretape daroti he bessan de7oosona. Yihuda biitta ubbaafe Yerusalaamepe
Luke6:18 Enti yiday
Luke6:19 Wolqi iyape keyidi asa ubbaa pathiya gisho asay iya bochanaw koyoosona.
Luke6:20 Ba tamaareta xeellidi haysada yaagis: “Hinteno
Luke6:21 Hinte ha77i koshateysati anjetidaysata
Luke6:22 Asay hintena Asa Na7aa gisho
Luke6:23 “Heko
Luke6:24 “Shin dureto hintena ayye! hinte ha77i lo77o duussaa ekideta.
Luke6:25 Ha77i kallidaysato hintena ayye! hinte koshatana. Ha77i miiceysato hintenosho hinte kayotananne yeekana.
Luke6:26 Asi ubbay hinte lo77otetha xalaala odiya wode hintena ayye! Enta aawati beni wordancho nabeta bolla hessada oothidosona.
Luke6:27 “Shin tana si7iya hintew ta odayis; hinte morketa dosite; hintena ixeysatas lo77oba oothite.
Luke6:28 Hintena baaddeyisata anjite
Luke6:29 Issi bagga shakala baqeysas hanko bagga bessa. Ne laxana ekana geysas ne shamziya gujada imma.
Luke6:30 Nena woossiya ubbaas imma; neepe ekida oonaka zaaro gada oychofa.
Luke6:31 Asay hintew oothana mela hinte koyaba ubbaa hinteka asaas oothite.
Luke6:32 “Hinte
Luke6:33 Hintew lo77oba ootheyisata xalaalas lo77oba oothiko hintew ay galati de7ii? Nagaranchotika hessada oothosona.
Luke6:34 Tal7e zaarana asa xalaalas hinte tal7iko ay dumma galatetetii? Nagaranchotika guye zaarana asi be7idi tal7oosona.”
Luke6:35 “Shin hinte morketa dosite; entaw lo77oba oothite. Guye ekanaw qoponna tal7ite. Hessan hinte ekana woytoy gita gidana. Hinte Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa nayta gidana. I bana galatonaysatasinne iitatas keeha.
Luke6:36 Hinte aaway keeha gidoysada hinteka keeha gidite.
Luke6:37 “Asa bolla pirdofite; hinte bolla pirdetenna. Hinte boretonna mela oonaka boropite. Atto giite; Xoossay hintew atto gaana.
Luke6:38 Immite; hintew imetana. Hinte makidaban hintew zaari maketana
Luke6:39 Qassika Yesuusi yaagidi entaw leemiso odis; “Qooqey qooqe kaalethanaw danda7ii? Kaalethiko nam7ayka woli ekidi aafon wullokonayee?
Luke6:40 Tamaarey astamaarepe aadhenna. Shin loythi tamaarida uray ba astamaariyatho hanees.
Luke6:41 “Ne ishaa ayfen de7iya buuriya ayis be7ay? Ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa ayis be7ikii?
Luke6:42 Ne ayfen de7iya tuussu daaneysa be7onna ne ishaako
Luke6:43 “Lo77o mithi iita ayfe ayfena; hessadaka iita mithi lo77o ayfe ayfena.
Luke6:44 Ayfe ayfiya mithi ubbay ba ayfen eretees. Agunthafe balase ayfey maxetenna qassi laadepe woyne ayfey maxetenna.
Luke6:45 Lo77o asi ba wozanan kumida lo77obaape lo77oba kessees. Iita asi ba wozanan kumida iitabaape iitabaa kessees. Asi ba wozanan kumidi palahidabaape ba doonan odetees.
Luke6:46 “Ta geysa ootheketa
Luke6:47 Taako yeynne ta qaala si7idi poliya ubbay oona daaniyako ta hintena bessaana.
Luke6:48 I keethe keexanaw ziqi oothi
Luke6:49 Shin ta qaala si7idi oothonay ba keetha shafe bolla keexida ura daanees. Di7oy di77idi he keethaa sugida wode ellesidi kundis. He keethay wolqaama kundethi kundis” yaagis.
Luke7:1 Yesuusi hessa ubbaa asaa sinthan tamaarsidi ongidaape guye
Luke7:2 He bessan issi mato halaqay de7ees. I daro dosiya aylley hargetidi hayqos gakis.
Luke7:3 I Yesuusaba si7ida wode ba aylliya pathana mela iya woosso gidi issi issi Ayhude cimata Yesuusako kiittis.
Luke7:4 Kiitetidaysati
Luke7:5 Ayis giiko
Luke7:6 Yesuusika entara bis. Mato halaqaa sooko matiya wode ba laggeta iyako kiittidi
Luke7:7 Taka tana ne sinthe shiiqanaw bessiya asi gada qopike. Shin ne issi qaala oda; ta aylley paxana.
Luke7:8 Taw taape bollara halaqay de7ees
Luke7:9 Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode malaaletis. Guye simmidi baara yaa asaako
Luke7:10 Kiitetida asati soo simmiya wode aylley paxin demmidosona.
Luke7:11 Guutha wodepe guye Yesuusi Nayne katamaa bis. Iya tamaaretaranne hara daro asati iyara bidosona.
Luke7:12 I katamaa gelana haniya wode aha tookida daro asati katamaape keyoosona. Hayqida na7ay ba aayes issuwa
Luke7:13 Goday iyo be7ida wode qadhetidi
Luke7:14 Shiiqidi hala bochin tookida asati eqidosona. Yesuusi
Luke7:15 Hayqidaysi dendi uttidi oda oykis. Yesuusi na7aa ekidi aayes immis.
Luke7:16 Asa ubbay yashetidi
Luke7:17 Iya sunthay Yihudaninne he heeran de7iya biitta ubban si7etis.
Luke7:18 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa tamaareti hessa ubbaa Yohaanisas odidosona. I enta giddofe nam7ata xeegidi
Luke7:19 “Yaana geetetiday neneyee? Woyko haraa naagino?” yaagidi oychite gidi Godaako kiittis.

Luke7:23 Tanan dhubetonna oonika anjetidaysa.”

Luke7:25 Yaatin
Luke7:26 Yaatin
