Luke11:42 “Farsaaweto hintena ayye! Sawope
Luke11:43 “Farsaaweto hintena ayye! Ayhude woosa keethan boncho oyde
Luke11:44 “Mali dhayin
Luke11:45 Higge astamaarey zaaridi
Luke11:46 Yesuusi
Luke11:47 “Hinte aawati wodhida nabeta duufuwa hinte giigisiya gisho
Luke11:48 Hiza
Luke11:49 Hessa gisho
Luke11:50 Ha yeletethay alamey medhetoosape hanno gakanaw gukida nabeta ubbaa suuthas oyshetana.
Luke11:51 Aabelape doomidi yarsho bessaasinne xoossa keethafe gidduwan gukida Zakaryaasa suutha gisho ha yeletethay oyshetana.
Luke11:52 “Higge astamaareto
Luke11:53 Yesuusi yaape baanaw keyiya wode
Luke11:54 Iya doonape keyiya qaalan iya oykanaw koydi hessa oothidosona.
Luke12:1 He wode daro mukulun taybetiya asay woli bolla yedhetana gakanaw asi asa bolla shiiqidi de7ishin
Luke12:2 Qonconna qosetidi
Luke12:3 Hiza
Luke12:4 “Ta baggato
Luke12:5 Hanoshin
Luke12:6 Ichashu buubeti issi santimes bayzetokonayee? Hanoshin
Luke12:7 Hari attoshin
Luke12:8 “Ta odeysa si7ite; asa sinthan taw markatiya ubbaas Asa Na7i Xoossa kiitanchota sinthan markatana.
Luke12:9 Asa sinthan tana kaddeysas Xoossa kiitanchota sinthan ta iya kaddana.
Luke12:10 Asa Na7a bolla kadhe qaala haasaya ubbay maarota demmana
Luke12:11 “Asi hintena oykidi ayhude woosa keethan
Luke12:12 He wode hinte odanaba Geeshsha Ayyaani hintena tamaarsana” yaagis.
Luke12:13 Asaa giddofe issi asi Yesuusako yidi
Luke12:14 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke12:15 Gujidika
Luke12:16 Kaallidika leemison
Luke12:17 He uray
Luke12:18 Hizape yaatana; kase de7iya shaaleta laallada haraa dalga shaaleta keexana. Kathinne taw de7iyaba ubbaa iyan yeggana.
Luke12:19 Ba shempeko
Luke12:20 “Shin Xoossay
Luke12:21 “Hessa gisho
Luke12:22 Hessafe guye
Luke12:23 Shempoy kathafe
Luke12:24 Kafota be7ite zerokona
Luke12:25 Hanoshin
Luke12:26 Hiza
Luke12:27 Ane ciishshati waanidi dicciyako be7ite. Waayokonanne suqokona. Hari attoshin
Luke12:28 Hinteno
Luke12:29 Hessa gisho
Luke12:30 He ubbaas Xoossaa ammanonna asati un7etoosona. Shin hinte aaway Xoossay hessi ubbay hintew koshsheysa erees.
Luke12:31 Ubbaafe aathidi Xoossa kawotetha koyite; hessi ubbay hintew guji imetana.
Luke12:32 “Hinteno
Luke12:33 Hintew de7iyaba bayzidi manqotas immite. Kaysoy ekonnason
Luke12:34 Hinte wozanay hinte shaloy de7iya bessan gidana.
Luke12:35 “Qanthan dancidi giigetite; hinte xompey poo7o.
Luke12:36 Banta goday yaaganope simmana gakanaw barkidi naageysatada
Luke12:37 Banta goday simmiya wode dhiskonna de7ishe naageysati anjetidaysata. Tuma gayis; goday qanthan dancidi gayta yuushon utisidi mokees.
Luke12:38 Goday laade gidin
Luke12:39 Shin haysa erite; kaysoy awude yaaneko keetha aaway eriyako keethay boketiya wode si77i gidi be7enna.
Luke12:40 Hinteka giigidi naagite; Asa Na7i hinte qoponna wode yaana” yaagis.
Luke12:41 Phexroosika
Luke12:42 Goday zaaridi
Luke12:43 Goday simmiya wode hessa mela oothishe bentiya aylley
Luke12:44 Ta hintew tuma odayis; ba godaas de7iya shalo ubbaa bolla I
Luke12:45 Shin he aylley
Luke12:46 he aylliya goday
Luke12:47 “Godaa sheniyada giigonnaysinne iya goday ay dosiyako erishe oothonna aylley daro garaafetana.
Luke12:48 Shin ba godaa sheniya eronna attidi garaafetanaw besseysa oothiday guuthara garaafetana. Gaasoyka daro imetidaysafe daro koyetees
Luke12:49 “Taani yiday biitta bolla tama oythanaasa. Ha77i tamay oykiyako tana waanidi ufaysandesha!
Luke12:50 Hanoshin
Luke12:51 Sa7a bolla sarotethi ehanaw yida hintew daanii? Gidenna
Luke12:52 Ha77ife doomidi woli giddon shaaketida ichashu keethaa asati issife de7oosona. Nam7ati heedzata bolla
Luke12:53 Aaway na7aa bolla
Luke12:54 Qassika asaako
Luke12:55 Dugeha carkoy carkiya wode ‘Sa7i awana’ yaageeta
Luke12:56 Hinteno
Luke12:57 “Yaatin
Luke12:58 Ne morkiyara wolla daynna sinthan eqanaw bashe oge bolla giiganaw koya. Ne giigonna ixiko gooshechidi daynna sinthe nena efana. Daynnay nena qachiya asas aathidi immana. I nena woynen yeggana.
Luke12:59 Si7ite
Luke13:1 He wode Yesuusako asay yidi Philaxoosi wodhidi enta suuthara enta yarshuwa walakida Galila asaaba odida asati he bessan de7oosona.
Luke13:2 I haysada yaagidi zaaris; “Yaatin he Galila asati he iita hayqo hayqida gisho
Luke13:3 Gidenna! Gidoshin
Luke13:4 Woyko qassi Salihoome geetetiya bessan gimbey woddidi wodhida tammanne hospun asay Yerusalaamen de7iya asa ubbaafe aadhida nagarancho daanonna?
Luke13:5 Gidenna! Shin hinteka maarotan simmonna ixiko ubbay hessada dhayana.”
Luke13:6 Qassika Yesuusi haysada gidi leemiso odis: “Issi uraas woyne gaden toketida balase mithi de7awusu. I iipe ayfe demmanaw koydi aykoka demmibeenna.
Luke13:7 Woyne gadiya goday woyne oosanchuwako

Luke13:15 Goday
Luke13:16 Yaatin

Luke13:18 Hessafe guye
Luke13:19 Xoossa kawotethi issi asi ba goshshan tokida wola ayfe mela. I diccidi mithi gidis. Salo kafoti iya tashiya bolla shempidosona.”

Luke14:6 Enti issibaaka zaaranaw danda7ibookona.

Luke18:4 Daynnay guutha wodes I odaa si7onna ixis

Luke18:14 Ta hintew odeysa si7ite; Farsaawiyape haysi qaraxa qanxiseysi Xoossaa sinthan xillo gididi ba soo simmis. Ayis giiko
Luke18:15 Yesuusi yooga nayta bolla ba kushiya wothidi anjana mela asay iyako ehoosona. Yesuusa tamaareti hessa be7idi “Ayis Yesuusako eheetii?” yaagidi kaccidosona.
Luke18:16 Shin Yesuusi nayta baako xeegidi
Luke18:17 Taani hintew tuma odayis; Xoossa kawotetha yooga naytatho ekonnay oonika yaa gelenna” yaagis.

Luke19:48 Gidoshin
Luke20:1 Issi gallas Yesuusi xoossa keethan asaa tamaarsishininne Wongela markatishin
Luke20:2 “Neeni haysata aybi maatan oothiyako nuus oda. Ha maata new immiday oonee?” yaagidi oychidosona.
Luke20:3 I entako
Luke20:4 Xammaqiya Yohaanisa xinqatey Xoossafeye asapee?” yaagis.
Luke20:5 Enti woli giddon yaagidi zoretidosona: “Xoossafe giiko yaatin
Luke20:6 “Asape giiko
Luke20:7 Yaaniya gisho
Luke20:8 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke20:9 Hessafe guye
Luke20:10 Woyne ayfiya maxiya wodey gakin woyne ayfiyape iyaw yeddana mela goshshanchotako ba aylliya kiittis. Shin goshshanchoti he aylliya oykidi wadhidi mela kushe yeddidosona.
Luke20:11 Kaallidika hara aylliya kiittis. Qassi goshshanchoti iya wadhidi
Luke20:12 Ha77ika zaaridi heedzantho aylliya kiittis. Goshshanchoti iyaka madunxisidi woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi yeggidosona.
Luke20:13 “Woyne gadiya goday
Luke20:14 “Shin goshshanchoti uraa na7a be7ida wode
Luke20:15 Woyne gadiya giddofe gaxa kessidi wodhidosona. Yaatin
Luke20:16 Yidi he goshshanchota dhaysana
Luke20:17 “Yesuusi enta caddi xeellidi
Luke20:18 He shuchaa bolla kundiya ubbay qoxettana
Luke20:19 Higge astamaaretinne kahine halaqati ha leemisoy odetiday enta bolla gideysa eridi he wode iya oykanaw koydosona
Luke20:20 Hessa gisho
Luke20:21 Kiitetidi bida asati
Luke20:22 Hanoshin
Luke20:23 Shin I enta wozanaa iitatetha erida gisho
Luke20:24 “Ane tana issi santime bessite
Luke20:25 I zaaridi
Luke20:26 Hessa gisho
Luke20:27 Hayqope dendoy baawa giya Saduqaawetape issoti issoti Yesuusako yidi
Luke20:28 “Astamaariyaw
Luke20:29 Heko laapun ishati de7oosona. Koyroysi macho ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
Luke20:30 Nam7anthoy iyo ekidi na7a yelonna hayqis.
Luke20:31 Heedzanthoyka hessatho hanis. Laapunati ubbay hessada hanidi iyo ekidosona
Luke20:32 Wursethan maccasiya hayqasu.
Luke20:33 Hiza
Luke20:34 Yesuusi zaaridi
Luke20:35 Shin hayqope dendidi yaana alamiyan daanaw besseysati ekokonanne gelokona.
Luke20:36 Enti kiitancho mela gidiya gisho sinthafe hayqokona. Hayqope dendida gisho enti Xoossaa nayta.
Luke20:37 Musey Godaa
Luke20:38 Ubbay iyaw de7on de7eyisata gidiya gisho I de7on de7eyisata Godaape attishin
Luke20:39 Higge astamaaretape issoti issoti
Luke20:40 Hessafe guye
Luke20:41 Iyape kaallidi Yesuusi entako
Luke20:42 Ayis giiko
Luke20:43 
Luke20:44 “Hiza
Luke20:45 Derey ubbay si7ishin ba tamaaretako
Luke20:46 “Adussa ma7o ma7idi yuushshe doseysatape
Luke20:47 Enti am7eta keethaa kalloyoosona
Luke21:1 Dure asay xoossa keethan muxaata saaxiniyan yeggishin Yesuusi dhoqu gidi asaa be7is.
Luke21:2 Qassi issi manqo am7iya nam7u sikina yeggishin be7idi
Luke21:3 “Ta hintew tuma odayis; ha manqo am7iya ubbaafe aathada immasu.
Luke21:4 Ayis giiko
Luke21:5 Yesuusa tamaaretape issoti issoti Xoossa Keethay daro lo77iya shuchaninne asay Xoossaas immida imotan lo77idaysa odetoosona.
Luke21:6 Shin Yesuusi
Luke21:7 Entika
Luke21:8 Yesuusi yaagidi entaw zaaro immis: “Baletonna mela naagetite. Daroti
Luke21:9 Hinte olabaanne asaa geellatetha si7iya wode dagammofite. Hessi sinthatidi hananaysi attonnaba gidiya gisho wodiya wursethay ellesidi yeenna” yaagis.
Luke21:10 Kaallidika
Luke21:11 Gita biitta qaaxoy hanana
Luke21:12 Shin ha ubbay hananaape sinthe ta sunthaa gisho gidi asay hintena gooddananne oykana. Ayhude woosa keethaninne qasho keethan hintena yeggana. Kawota sinthenne deriya haareyisata sinthe hintena efana.
Luke21:13 Hessika tabaa hinte entaw markatanaw lo77o oge gidana.
Luke21:14 Hessa gisho
Luke21:15 Ayis giiko
Luke21:16 Hari attoshin
Luke21:17 Ta sunthaa gisho asa ubbaa sinthan hinte ixetidaysata gidana.
Luke21:18 Shin hari attoshin
Luke21:19 Polo danda7an hinte
Luke21:20 “Yerusalaame katamay wotaadaren diretidi uttidashin hinte be7iko iyaw dhayoy matatidaysa erite.
Luke21:21 He wode Yihudan de7iya ubbay deriyako baqato
Luke21:22 Ayis giiko
Luke21:23 Sa7a bolla gita metoy yaana
Luke21:24 Enti mashshan hayqana
Luke21:25 “Awan
Luke21:26 Saluwa wolqati buqettana gisho asay yashshaninne biitta bolla aybi hanandesha gidi naagon bantana baletana.
Luke21:27 He wode Asa Na7ay wolqaninne gita bonchuwan shaarara yishin enti be7ana.
Luke21:28 Hinte atotethay matatida gisho ha hanoti poletethi oykiya wode giigeti eqite
Luke21:29 Kaallidika
Luke21:30 Enti aaciya wode torchey matatidaysa hinte ereeta.
Luke21:31 Hessada ha hanoti poletishin hinte be7iko Xoossaa kawotethay matatidaysa erite.
Luke21:32 “Ta hintew tuma odayis; ha ubbay poletana gakanaw ha yeletethay aadhenna.
Luke21:33 Saloynne sa7i aadhana
Luke21:34 “Hiza
Luke21:35 He qammay biitta kumethan de7iya ubbaa bolla gakana.
Luke21:36 Hessa gisho
Luke21:37 Gallas gallas Yesuusi xoossa keethan tamaarsishe
Luke21:38 Asa ubbay iya si7anaw wonta guura iyako Xoossaa Keethi yoosona.
Luke22:1 He wode “Paasika” giya Uytha Ba7aaley matis.
Luke22:2 Kahine halaqatinne higge astamaareti ase yayiya gisho
Luke22:3 Xalahey tammanne nam7atape issuwa gidida Asqoroota Yihuda geeteteysa gido gelis.
Luke22:4 Yihudi kahine halaqatakonne Xoossa Keetha naageysata halaqatako bidi Yesuusa waati aathidi immaneko entara maqetis.
Luke22:5 Entika hessan ufaytidi miishe immanaw iyara zoretidosona.
Luke22:6 Ika zoretethan giigis. Aathi entaw immanaw asi bayna inje wode naagishe de7ees.
Luke22:7 Hessafe guye
Luke22:8 Yesuusi
Luke22:9 Enti
Luke22:10 I entako
Luke22:11 Astamaarey godaako
Luke22:12 I pooqiya bolla hiixetidi giigidi de7iya dalga kifile hintena bessaana
Luke22:13 Enti bidi Yesuusi gidaysada hanin demmidosona. Paasika ba7aale kahuwa yan giigisidosona.
Luke22:14 Saateyka gakida wode Yesuusi hawaaretara wolla kahuwa bolla uttis.
Luke22:15 I entako
Luke22:16 Hiza
Luke22:17 Ushshaa ekidi galati simmidi
Luke22:18 Si7ite! Xoossaa kawotethay yaana gakanaw hachife doomada ha woyne ushshafe zaarada uyike” yaagis.
Luke22:19 Uythaa ekidi
Luke22:20 Hessadaka
Luke22:21 Gidoshin
Luke22:22 Asa Na7ay iyaw geetetoysa mela hayqanaw de7ees
Luke22:23 Enti banta giddon
Luke22:24 Qassi enta giddon gita gidanay oone giya palami medhetis.
Luke22:25 Yesuusi entako
Luke22:26 Shin hinte giddon hessa mela gidopo. Hinte giddon bayratey kaaloda hano; kaaletheysi kaalleysada hano.
Luke22:27 Hanoshin
Luke22:28 “Hinteka ta metuwan taape shaaketonna taara minnidi eqidaysata.
Luke22:29 Hinte ta gaytape maana mela
Luke22:30 
Luke22:31 Kaallidika Yesuusi
Luke22:32 Shin taani ne ammanoy dhayonna mela new gaannatas. Neka simmida wode ne ishata mintha” yaagis.
Luke22:33 Simooni
Luke22:34 Yesuusi Phexroosako
Luke22:35 Kaallidika
Luke22:36 I entako
Luke22:37 Haa si7ite! ‘Geellatara taybetis’ geetetidi xaafetidaysi tanan poletanaw bessees. Ee
Luke22:38 Iya tamaareti
Luke22:39 Yesuusi kase meezetidaysada dendidi Shamaho zuma bolla keyis. Iya tamaareti iya kaallidosona.
Luke22:40 He bessaa gakida wode
Luke22:41 Entafe shuchi holin gakiya soo mela haakidi gulbatidi woossis.
Luke22:42 “Ta aawaw
Luke22:43 Kiitanchoy salope qoncidi minthis.
Luke22:44 Daro un7etidi minnidi woossees. Iya cawayka suuthi xokiyada sa7an xokees.
Luke22:45 Yesuusi woosa wursidi ba tamaaretako yis. Enti
Luke22:46 “Ayis dhisketii? Paacen gelonna mela dendidi woossite” yaagis.
Luke22:47 I buroo oda bolla de7ishin daro asati yidosona. Tammanne nam7atape issoy Yihuda geeteteysi entana kaalethees. I Yesuusa yeeranaw mati shiiqis.
Luke22:48 Shin Yesuusi
Luke22:49 Yesuusa tamaareti he hanuwa be7idi
Luke22:50 Enta giddofe issoy kahine halaqaa oosanchuwa shocidi ushacha haytha qanxidi yeggis.
Luke22:51 Shin Yesuusi
Luke22:52 Hessafe guye
Luke22:53 Ubba gallas xoossa keethan ta hintera de7iya wode ta bolla kushe wothibeeketa. Shin haysi dhuma kawotethay haarida wodenne hinte wode” yaagis.
Luke22:54 Hessafe guye
Luke22:55 Asati kahine halaqaa zabban tama eethidi wolla uttidashin Phexroosi entara issife uttis.
Luke22:56 Issi gadhindiya Phexroosi tama matan uttidaysa cadda xeellada
Luke22:57 Shin Phexroosi
Luke22:58 Guutha wodepe guye issi hara addey iya be7idi
Luke22:59 Issi saate mela gam7idaape guye issi hara addey tillisidi
Luke22:60 Shin Phexroosi
Luke22:61 Goday guye simmidi Phexroosa xeellis. Phexroosi
Luke22:62 Phexroosi kare keyidi daro kokoridi yeekis.
Luke22:63 Yesuusa naagiya asati iya leqisonne deshethi oykidosona.
Luke22:64 Iya ayfiya goozidi “Ane tinbite oda; nena dechiday oonee?” yaagidi oychoosona.
Luke22:65 Hara daro cashshe cayidi kawushoosona.
Luke22:66 Sa7i wontiya wode Ayhude biitta cimati
Luke22:67 Enti
Luke22:68 Ta oychiyako zaareketa.
Luke22:69 Shin Asa Na7ay haysafe gede baggan wolqaama Xoossaa ushacha baggan uttana” yaagis.
Luke22:70 He wode ubbay
Luke22:71 Enti
Luke23:1 He bessan shiiqida shangoti ubbay dendidi Yesuusa Philaxoosako efidosona.
Luke23:2 “Ha uray nu asaa balethishin
Luke23:3 Philaxoosi Yesuusa
Luke23:4 Philaxoosi kahine halaqatakonne asaako
Luke23:5 Shin enti
Luke23:6 Philaxoosi hessa si7ida wode Yesuusi Galila aseeko eranaw koyidi iya oychis.
Luke23:7 Yesuusi Herodiisa biittafe yida asi gideysa Philaxoosi erida wode Herodiisi he wode Yerusalaamen de7iya gisho iyako yeddis.
Luke23:8 Herodiisi Yesuusa be7anaw daro wodepe koyishe de7iya gisho
Luke23:9 Herodiisi Yesuusa daro oyshota oychis
Luke23:10 Kahineta halaqatinne higge astamaareti yan eqidi minthidi iya mootosona.
Luke23:11 Herodiisaranne iya wotaadaretara Yesuusa kadhidosonanne leqsidosona. Boncho afila mayzidi Philaxoosako zaaridi yeddidosona.
Luke23:12 Herodiisaranne Philaxoosara kase morkeshin he gallas wolla giigidosona.
Luke23:13 Philaxoosi kahine halaqata
Luke23:14 “ ‘Ha uray asaa geellatethas denthethees’ gidi taako ehideta. Taka hinte sinthan pilgada hinte shiishida mootuwas aybi balaka demmabike.
Luke23:15 Herodiisi
Luke23:16 Hessa gisho
Luke23:17 Hessa I giday Paasika Ba7aale wode issi asi entaw billanaysi iyaw attonnaba gidiya gishosa.
Luke23:18 Derey ubbay issi bolla
Luke23:19 Barbaani katamaa giddon asaa iitabas denthethidi ase wodhidi qashetida asi.
Luke23:20 Philaxoosi Yesuusa billanaw koyidi asaas zaari odis.
Luke23:21 Gidoshin
Luke23:22 Philaxoosi heedzantho
Luke23:23 Enti banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Luke23:24 Enta oysha gisho
Luke23:25 Ase iitabas denthethidaysanne ase wodhidi qashetidaysa billana mela woossida gisho he uraa entaw billis. Shin Yesuusa enti koydaba oothana mela entaw aathidi immis.
Luke23:26 Yesuusa oykidi efishin Simoona geetetiya Qereena biitta addey gaxarepe yishin
Luke23:27 Daro asaynne banta tiraa iccishe yeekiya maccasati iya guyera kaalloosona.
Luke23:28 Shin Yesuusi entako guye simmidi
Luke23:29 ‘Heko maynthati
Luke23:30 He wode dereta
Luke23:31 Hiza
Luke23:32 Iyara wodhanaw hara nam7u worandzota efidosona.
Luke23:33 Qeraaniyo geetetiya bessaa gathidi kaqidosona. Worandzotape issuwa ushacha baggara hankuwa haddirsa baggara kaqidosona.
Luke23:34 Yesuusi
Luke23:35 Asay eqidi xeelloosona
Luke23:36 Wotaaddareti iyako shiiqidi
Luke23:37 Yaatidi
Luke23:38 Iyaw huuphe baggara
Luke23:39 Kaqetida worandzotape issoy cashshe sa7ara goochishe
Luke23:40 Shin hanko worandzoy
Luke23:41 Nuuni nu oothida nagaraa gisho bessiya pirda ekoos
Luke23:42 Qassika
Luke23:43 Yesuusi
Luke23:44 He gallas usupun saatepe bidi uddufun saate gakanaw away poo7uwa diggida gisho
Luke23:45 
Luke23:46 Yesuusi
Luke23:47 Mato halaqay
Luke23:48 Ha haniyaba be7anaw he bessaa shiiqida asa ubbay hanidaba be7ida wode banta tiraa iccishe banta soo simmidosona.
Luke23:49 Gidoshin
Luke23:50 Ayhude shangotape issoy
Luke23:51 
Luke23:52 He uray Philaxoosako bidi
Luke23:53 Philaxoosi eka yaagin
Luke23:54 Sambaati gelana haniya gisho
Luke23:55 Galilape dendidi Yesuusa kaallidi yida maccasati Yoosefara bidi iya aha waati moogiyako duufuwa akeekidi be7idosona.
Luke23:56 Yaape simmidi shittonne qibaate giigisidosona. Higgey kiitteysa mela Sambaata gallas shempi pee7idosona.
Luke24:1 Saamintafe koyro gallas
Luke24:2 Enti yaa gakiya wode duufuwa doonan de7iya shuchay gonderetidi kichoysa demmidosona.
Luke24:3 Enti duufuwa gaathi gelidosona
Luke24:4 Enti yan eqidi aybi hanide gidi qopishin akeekona daro phooliya afila ma7ida nam7u asati enta matan eqidosona.
Luke24:5 Maccasati yashetidi banta huuphiya sa7an ziqi oothidi de7ishin
Luke24:6 I haysan deenna; hayqope dendis
Luke24:7 
Luke24:8 Maccasati he wode iya qaala qopidosona.
Luke24:9 Maccasati duufuwape simmidi hanidaba ubbaa tammanne issotasinne haratasika odidosona.
Luke24:10 Hessa hawaaretas odiday Magdela Mayraamo
Luke24:11 Shin entaw maccasati odidaysi elmo daanin ammanibookona.
Luke24:12 Shin Phexroosi dendi woxidi duufo bis. He bessaa gakidi
Luke24:13 He gallas kaalliya tamaaretape nam7ati Yerusalaamepe tammanne issi kilo mitire haakiya Emahoose guta boosona.
Luke24:14 Enti wolla hanidaba ubbaa odetoosona.
Luke24:15 Enti he hanotaba qopishenne odetishe biya wode Yesuusi ba huuphen shiiqidi entara bees.
Luke24:16 Hanoshin
Luke24:17 I
Luke24:18 Entafe issoy Qeliyoophe geeteteysi
Luke24:19 I zaaridi
Luke24:20 Iya kahine halaqatinne haareysati hayqo pirdas aathi immidi
Luke24:21 Nuuni Isra7eele asaa wozande gidi ufaytidi naagidashin haysi hanin hachi heedzantho qamma.
Luke24:22 Qassi nu giddofe issi issi maccasati nuna malaalsidosona. Enti hachi wonta guura duufuwa bidosona.
Luke24:23 Iya aha dhayida wode simmi yidi
Luke24:24 Nu giddofeka issoti issoti duufuwa bidi maccasati odidaysatho hanin be7idosona
Luke24:25 I entako
Luke24:26 Kiristoosi ha metuwa ekanawunne ba bonchuwan gelanaw bessennee?” yaagis.
Luke24:27 Musepenne nabeta ubbaafe dendidi Geeshsha Maxaafan iyabay xaafetidaysa ubbaa entaw qoncisis.
Luke24:28 Enti biya gutaako matatida wode Yesuusi aadhidi haaho soo biya daanin
Luke24:29 Enti
Luke24:30 Entara issife gayta bolla uttidi
Luke24:31 He wode enti erana mela enta ayfey dooyetis. Entika eridosona. Shin I entafe geemmis.
Luke24:32 Enti
Luke24:33 He wode dendidi guye Yerusalaame yidosona. Tammanne issotinne harati issi bolla shiiqidi de7ishin demmidosona.
Luke24:34 Enti
Luke24:35 He nam7u tamaareti Emmahuuse ogiya bolla de7ishin hanidaysanne uythaa menthida wode waati iya eridaako entaw odidosona.
Luke24:36 Nam7u tamaareti hessa oda bolla de7ishin
Luke24:37 Gidoshin
Luke24:38 I entako
Luke24:39 Ta kushiyanne ta tohuwa be7ite; taani tana. Qassi oykidi be7ite; tanan hinte be7eysada
Luke24:40 Yaagidi
Luke24:41 Enti ufaysafe dendoysan ammanonna malaaletethan de7ishin
Luke24:42 Enti issi caacetida molo iyaw immidosona.
Luke24:43 I ekidi enta sinthan mis.
Luke24:44 I
Luke24:45 He wode Geeshsha Maxaafata akeekana mela enta wozanaa dooyis.
Luke24:46 Hessadaka
Luke24:47 Yerusalaamepe dendidi asaa ubbaas nagaraape maarotethaynne atotethay iya sunthan markatana.
Luke24:48 Hinte hessas markata.
Luke24:49 Heko
Luke24:50 Hessafe guye
Luke24:51 Entana anjishe entafe shaaketidi pude salo eketis.
Luke24:52 Enti ziggi goyinnidi daro ufaysan Yerusalaame simmidosona.
Luke24:53 Xoossaa ubbaa wode galatishe xoossa keethan gam7idosona.
John1:1 Qaalay koyro de7ees. Qaalayka Xoossara de7ees; he Qaalay Xoossaa.
John1:2 Koyrope Qaalay Xoossara de7ees.
John1:3 Xoossay ubbaba Qaala baggara medhis. Medhetidabaape issoyka iya baggara medhetonabay baawa.
John1:4 Iyan de7oy de7ees; he de7oy asaas poo7o.
John1:5 Poo7oy dhuman poo7ees; dhumay poo7uwa xoonibeenna.
John1:6 Xoossay kiitida
John1:7 Asa ubbay poo7uwan ammanana mela I poo7os marka gididi yis.
John1:8 I poo7uwabaa markatanaw yisipe attishin
John1:9 Asa ubbaas poo7isiya tuma poo7oy alamiya yees.
John1:10 Qaalay alamen de7is. Xoossay Qaalan alamiya medhis
John1:11 I ba asaako yis
John1:12 Shin I bana ekidaysatasinne iya sunthan ammanidaysatas Xoossaa nayta gidana mela maata immis.
John1:13 Enti Xoossafe yeletidosonape attishin
John1:14 Qaalay ase gidis; aadho keehatethaanne tumaa kumidi nu giddon de7is. I aawas issi na7aa gididi ekida iya bonchuwa nuuni be7ida.
John1:15 Yohaanisi iyabaa markatis. Ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
John1:16 Nuuni ubbay iya aadho keehatetha kumethaafe anjo bolla anjo ekida.
John1:17 Xoossay higgiya Muse baggara immis
John1:18 Xoossaa be7ida asi oonika baawa; ba Aawa matan de7iya issi Na7aa xalaali baw Xoosse gididaysi iya qoncisis.
John1:19 Yerusalaamen de7iya Ayhude halaqati
John1:20 Yohaanisi
John1:21 Enti
John1:22 Yaatin
John1:23 Yohaanisi zaaridi
John1:24 Qassi Farsaaweti kiitida asati
John1:25 Yohaanisako
John1:26 Yohaanisi zaaridi
John1:27 I taape guyera yees. Taani hari attoshin iya caammaa wodoruwa billanaw bessike” yaagis.
John1:28 Hessi ubbay Yordaanose Shaafape hefinthan
John1:29 Yohaanisi wontetha gallas Yesuusi baako yishin be7idi
John1:30 Taani
John1:31 I ooneko taani erike. Shin Isra7eele asaas iya qoncisanaw haathan xammaqashe yas” yaagis.
John1:32 Yohaanisi haysada yaagidi markatis: “Geeshsha Ayyaanay salope holleda wodhishininne iyara de7ishin be7as.
John1:33 Hessi hananaape kase taani iya erike. Shin haathan xammaqanaw tana kiitida Xoossay
John1:34 Taani hessi hanishin be7ada
John1:35 Qassi wontetha gallas Yohaanisi ba tamaaretape nam7atara issife eqis.
John1:36 Yesuusi aadhishin
John1:37 Yohaanisa nam7u tamaareti Yohaanisi geysa si7idi Yesuusa kaallidosona.
John1:38 Yesuusi bana kaalleyisata guye simmi be7idi
John1:39 Yesuusi entako
John1:40 Yohaanisi gidaysa si7idi
John1:41 Indiriyasi koyro ba ishaa Simoonara gahetidi
John1:42 Indiriyasi Simoona Yesuusako ehis. Yesuusi Simoona be7idi
John1:43 Wontetha gallas Yesuusi Galila biitta baanaw qofa qachis. I Filphoosara gahetidi
John1:44 Filphoosi
John1:45 Filphoosi Natina7eelara gahetidi
John1:46 Natina7eeli zaaridi
John1:47 Natina7eeli baako yeysa Yesuusi be7idi
John1:48 Natina7eeli Yesuusako
John1:49 Natina7eeli zaaridi
John1:50 Yesuusi iyako
John1:51 Qassi Yesuusi
John2:1 Heedzantho gallas Galila biittan Qaana kataman yaaganoy yaaganetis. Yesuusa aayiya he yaaganuwan de7awusu.
John2:2 Yesuusika ba tamaaretara issife he yaaganuwa xeegetis.
John2:3 Woyne ushshay wurin
John2:4 Yesuusi zaaridi
John2:5 Yesuusa aayiya oosanchotako
John2:6 Ayhudeti banta geeshsho wogaas go7etiya usupun shucha baathati he bessan de7oosona. Issi issi baathay nam7u woyko heedzu xugga oykees.
John2:7 Yesuusi oosanchotako
John2:8 Yesuusi entako
John2:9 Yaaganuwa aawatethan poliseysi woyne ushshi laametida haatha ganxi ekidi awupe yidaako eribeenna
John2:10 “Oonika lo77o woyne ushsha asaa koyrottidi ushshees. Yaatidi asay uyi kallidaape guye
John2:11 Yesuusi ha koyro malaata Galila biittan Qaana kataman oothis; hessan ba gitatetha bessis. Iya tamaareti iya ammanidosona.
John2:12 Hessafe guye
John2:13 Ayhudeti bonchiya Paasika Ba7aale gallasay matatin Yesuusi Yerusalaame bis.
John2:14 Bidi xoossa keethan boorata
John2:15 I xurqafe dooqidi asaa ubbaa enta mehetara Xoossa Keethafe gooddidi kare kessis. Miishe laammeyisata xarpheezataka aathi yeggidi enta miishiya laallis.
John2:16 Holle bayzeyisata
John2:17 Iya tamaareti Geeshsha Maxaafan
John2:18 Hessafe guye
John2:19 Yesuusi
John2:20 Qassika Ayhudeti
John2:21 Shin Yesuusi odiya Xoossa Keethay ba asatethaba.
John2:22 Hessa gisho
John2:23 Yesuusi Paasika bonchiya bessan Yerusalaamen de7ishin
John2:24 Shin Yesuusi asaa ubbaa eriya gisho enta ammanibena.
John2:25 Asa wozanan de7iyaba I ba huuphen eriya gisho asaba oonika iyaw odana mela koshshibeenna.
John3:1 Farsaaweta yaraape gidida
John3:2 Niqodimoosi qamma Yesuusako yidi
John3:3 Yesuusi zaaridi
John3:4 Niqodimoosi
John3:5 Yesuusi zaaridi
John3:6 Asho na7atethi aawupenne aayipe yees; Xoossaa na7atethi Geeshsha Ayyaanape imetees.
John3:7 Taani
John3:8 Carkoy ba koyida bessi carkees. Neeni iya kooshincha si7asape attishin
John3:9 Yaatin Niqodimoosi
John3:10 Yesuusi zaaridi
John3:11 Taani new tuma odayis; nu eriyaba odoosinne be7idaba markatoos
John3:12 Taani hintew sa7aba odin hinte ammanonnaba gidiko saloba odin waatidi ammananee?
John3:13 Salope wodhida Asa Na7aape attishin
John3:14 Musey mela biittan Naase birata shooshi kaqidaysada tana ammanida ubbay merinaa de7uwa ekana mela Asa Na7ay dhoqu gaanaw bessees.
John3:15 
John3:16 Xoossaa Na7aa ammaniya ubbay merinaa de7uwa laattanaape attishin
John3:17 Xoossay ba Na7aa ha alamiya kiittiday alamiya pirdanaw gidonashin alamiya iya baggara ashshanaasa.
John3:18 Na7aa ammaniya oonika pirdetenna
John3:19 Pirdayka haysa: poo7oy alamiya yis
John3:20 Iitabaa oothiya oonika poo7o ixees. Ayis giiko
John3:21 Shin tuma oothiya oonika Xoossay kiitidaysada I oothidaysa poo7oy qoncisana mela poo7uwako yees.
John3:22 Hessafe guye
John3:23 Qassi Yohaanisi Saleema matan de7iya Henoona giya bessan gidiya haathi de7iya gisho asaa yan xammaqees. Asayka yaa bidi xammaqetosona.
John3:24 He wode Yohaanisi buroo qashetibeenna.
John3:25 Hessafe guye
John3:26 Enti Yohaanisako bidi
John3:27 Yohaanisi zaaridi
John3:28 ‘Taani Kiristoosa gidike
John3:29 Gelos giigidaara ekenaw giigidaysasa. Ekeysa laggey iya matan eqidi I geysa si7iya wode daro ufaytees. Hessa gisho
John3:30 I gitatanaw taani guuxanaw bessees” yaagis.
John3:31 Bollafe yeysi ubbaafe bolla. Sa7ape bentidaysi sa7aba. I sa7aba odees. Salope yeysi ubbaafe bolla.
John3:32 I ba be7idabaanne si7idaba markatees
John3:33 Iya markatethaa ekiya oonika Xoossay tuma gideysa qoncisees.
John3:34 Xoossay ba geeshsha Ayyaana iyaw kumethi immiya gisho Xoossay kiittidaysi Xoossaa qaala odees.
John3:35 Aaway ba Na7aa dosidi ubbaba iya kushen wothis.
John3:36 Na7aa ammaniya uraas merinaa de7oy de7ees. Shin Na7aa ammanonaysa bolla Xoossaa hanqoy de7eesipe attishin
John4:1 Yesuusi Yohaanisape daro kaalliya asaa baako shiisheysanne xammaqeysa Farsaaweti si7idosona.
John4:2 Gidikoka Yesuusa tamaareti xammaqidosonape attishin
John4:3 Yesuusi asay iyabaa geysa si7ida wode Yihudape dendidi Galila bis.
John4:4 I
John4:5 Hessa gisho
John4:6 He bessan Yayqooba haatha ollay de7ees. Yesuusi hemethan daaburidi he haatha olla matan uttis. He wode sa7i usupun saate heera.
John4:7 Issi Samaare katamaa maccas he ollaafe haathe tikanaw yasu. Yesuusi he maccaseeko
John4:8 He wode Yesuusa tamaareti kathi shammanaw katama bidosonashin.
John4:9 He maccasiya zaarada
John4:10 Yesuusi zaaridi
John4:11 Maccasiya zaarada
John4:12 Nuus ha haatha olla immida nu aawa Yayqoobape neeni aadhay? I
John4:13 Yesuusi
John4:14 Shin taani immana haatha uyaa oonika ubbaka saamotenna. Taani immiya haathay iya giddon merinaa de7o immiya goggiya pulto gidana” yaagis.
John4:15 Maccasiya zaarada
John4:16 Yesuusi iiko
John4:17 Maccasiya zaarada
John4:18 New kase ichashu azinati de7oosona. Ha77i neera de7iya addey ne azina gidenna. Neeni ha77i tuma odadasa” yaagis.
John4:19 Maccasiya zaarada
John4:20 Nu aawati ha zumaa bolla Xoossaa goyinnidosona. Shin hinte Ayhudeti asi Xoossas goyinnanaw bessiya bessay Yerusalaamena geeta” yaagasu.
John4:21 Yesuusi
John4:22 Hinte Samaareti eronnaysa goyinneta. Shin nuuni atotethay Ayhudepe yaa gisho nu ereysa goyinnoos.
John4:23 Shin Aawas tuman goyinneysati Ayyaananinne tumatethan goyinnana wodey matatis; ha77ika gakis. Hiza
John4:24 Xoossay Ayyaana; iyaw goyinneysati Ayyaananinne tumatethan goyinnanaw bessees” yaagis.
John4:25 Maccasiya zaarada
John4:26 Yesuusi
John4:27 Enti odetishin
John4:28 Hessafe guye
John4:29 “Taani oothidaba ubbaa taw odida addiya be7anaw yedhite. I Kiristoosa gidandesha?” yaagasu.
John4:30 Asay katamaape keyidi Yesuusako bidosona.
John4:31 Hessi hanishin
John4:32 Shin I
John4:33 Hessa gisho
John4:34 Yesuusi entako
John4:35 Hinte
John4:36 Zereysinne cakeysi issife ufaytana mela cakeysi damooziya ekees qassi kathaa merinaa de7os shiishees.
John4:37 Hiza
John4:38 Hinte daaburiboonaysa shiishana mela taani hintena kiittas. Harati oothi daaburidasuwan gelidi hinte enta daabura ayfiya ekideta” yaagis.
John4:39 Maccasiya
John4:40 Samaare asay Yesuusako yidi
John4:41 I odiya qaala gisho kaseysafe daro asay ammanidosona.
John4:42 Qassi enti maccaseeko
John4:43 Nam7u gallasape guye
John4:44 Yesuusi ba huuphen
John4:45 Yesuusi Galila gakida wode Galila asay iya mokidosona. Ayis giiko
John4:46 Yesuusi haatha woyne ushshi laammida bessaa
John4:47 Yesuusi Yihudape Galila yidaysa he shuumay si7idi iyako yis. Hayqanaw matida ba na7aa bidi pathana mela Yesuusa woossis.
John4:48 Yesuusi shuumako
John4:49 Shuumay zaaridi
John4:50 Yesuusi
John4:51 I ba soo bishin iya aylleti iyako yishe iyara ogen gahetidi
John4:52 I ba aylleta ba na7aas ay saaten lo77idaako oychis. Enti zaaridi
John4:53 Na7aa aaway Yesuusi baako
John4:54 Hessi Yesuusi Yihudape Galila yidi oothida nam7antho malaata.
John5:1 Hessafe guye
John5:2 Yerusalaamen Dorsa Pengiya matan Ibraawetho doonan Beetesayda giya teqetida haathi de7ees. He teqeti uttida haatha matan ichashu shempiya bessati de7oosona.
John5:3 [Hessan haathay qaaxanaysa naagiya] daro harganchoti
John5:4 [Ayis giiko
John5:5 He bessan hastamanne hospun laythi hargetida issi addey de7ees.
John5:6 Yesuusi yan zin7ida addiya be7idi
John5:7 Harganchoy zaaridi
John5:8 Yesuusi iyako
John5:9 Addey iiraka paxis; ba algaa tookidi bis. Hessi Sambaata gallasan hanis.
John5:10 Hessa gisho
John5:11 Shin addey
John5:12 Enti iyako
John5:13 Shin Yesuusi he bessan daro asaa giddora erisonna kanthidi bida gisho addey bana pathiday ooneko erenna.
John5:14 Yesuusi guyepe he addiya xoossa keethan demmidi
John5:15 Hessafe guye
John5:16 Yesuusi hessa Sambaata gallas oothida gisho
John5:17 Yesuusi zaaridi
John5:18 Yesuusi Sambaata bonchona gisho xalaalas gidonashin Xoossay ba Aawa gidi bana Xoossara giigisida gisho
John5:19 Yesuusi zaaridi
John5:20 Aaway ba Na7aa dosiya gisho I oothiya ooso ubbaa ba Na7aa bessees. Hinte malaaletana mela I haysafe aadhiya ooso ba Na7aa bessaana.
John5:21 Aaway hayqidaysata hayqope denthidi entaw de7o immeysada Na7ayka ba koyeysatas de7o immees.
John5:22 Aaway Na7aas pirda maata ubbaa immispe attishin
John5:23 Asa ubbay Aawa boncheysada Na7aaka bonchana. Na7aa bonchona oonika Na7aa kiitida Aawaka bonchenna.
John5:24 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta qaala si7eysasinne tana kiittidaysa ammaneysas merinaa de7oy de7ees. I hayqope de7on pinnida gisho pirdetenna.
John5:25 Taani hintew tuma odayis; hayqida asay Xoossaa Na7aa qaala si7iya wodey yaana; hessika ha77i. He qaala si7ey de7on daana.
John5:26 Aaway de7os pulto gididaysada Na7aaka de7os pulto oothis.
John5:27 Na7ay Asa Na7a gidiya gisho Aaway Na7aas pirda maata immis.
John5:28 “Duufon de7eysati iya qaala si7idi dendiya wodey yaana gisho haysan malaaletofite.
John5:29 Lo77o oothidaysati de7on daanaw qassi iita oothidaysati pirda ekanaw duufope dendana.
John5:30 “Taani ta maatan aybibaaka oothanaw danda7ike. Xoossay taw odidaysada pirdayis. Taani tana kiittidaysi koyaba oothaysipe attishin
John5:31 “Taani tabaa markatiko ta markatethay tuma gidenna.
John5:32 Tabaa markatiya hari de7ees; I tabaa markateysi tuma gideysa taani erayis.
John5:33 “Hinte Yohaanisako ase kiittin I tumaas markatis.
John5:34 Taani hessa hintew odey
John5:35 Yohaanisi muqaadada eexishe poo7is. Hinte guutha wode iya poo7uwan ufaytideta.
John5:36 “Shin taw Yohaanisape aadhiya marki de7ees. Taani oothana mela ta Aaway taw immida oosoti tabaa markatoosona; Aaway tana kiittidaysa qoncisosona.
John5:37 “Qassi tana kiitida Aawayka ba huuphen tabaa markatees. Hinte iya qaala ubbaraka si7ibeeketa woyko iya malaa be7ibeeketa.
John5:38 I kiittidaysa hinte ammanonna gisho iya qaalay hinte wozanan baawa.
John5:39 “Geeshsha Maxaafatape merinaa de7o demmanabaa hintew daanin enta pilgeeta; enti tabaa markatoosona.
John5:40 Shin hinte de7o demmanaw taako yaanaw koyeketa.
John5:41 “Asape taani boncho koyke.
John5:42 Shin taani hinte wozanan Xoossaa siiqoy baynaysa erayis.
John5:43 Taani ta Aawa maatan yas
John5:44 Hinte issoy issuwafe boncho koyeysati
John5:45 “Taani ta Aawa sinthan hintena mootiyaba hintew daanopo. Hintena mootanay hinte ufaysan naagiya Muse.
John5:46 Hinte Muse ammanidaba gidiyako I tabaa xaafida gisho tanaka ammananashin.
John5:47 Shin hinte I xaafidaysa ammanonna ixiko ta qaala waatidi ammananee?” yaagis.
John6:1 Hessafe guye
John6:2 I harganchota pason oothida malaata be7ida gisho
John6:3 Yesuusi zumaa bolla keyidi
John6:4 Ayhudeti bonchiya Paasika Ba7aale gallasay gakis.
John6:5 Yesuusi daro asay baako yeysa be7idi Filphoosako
John6:6 I hessa Filphoosa paacanaw gisipe attishin
John6:7 Filphoosi zaaridi Yesuusako
John6:8 Qassi Yesuusa tamaaretape issoy
John6:9 “Ichashu banga uythinne nam7u molo oykida issi na7ay haysan de7ees
John6:10 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako
John6:11 Yesuusi uythaa ekidi Xoossaa galati simmidi yan uttida asaas gishis. Moluwaka ekidi hessada oothidi immin
John6:12 Enti ubbay kallidaape guye
John6:13 Hessa gisho
John6:14 Asay Yesuusi oothida malaatata be7ida wode
John6:15 Yesuusi enti iya oykidi wolqan kawo oothanaw haneysa eridi
John6:16 Sa7ay omarsida wode Yesuusa tamaareti abbaako wodhidosona.
John6:17 Sa7ay qammida gishonne Yesuusi buroo entako yiboona gisho iya tamaareti wogolon gelidi abba pinnidi Qifirnahooma baanaw dendidosona.
John6:18 Wolqaama carkoy carkida gisho abbay qaaxees.
John6:19 Ichashu woyko usupun kilo mitire gideysa mela enti abba pidhidi bidaape guye
John6:20 Shin I
John6:21 Enti ufaytidi iya wogoluwan gelsidosona; iiraka wogoloy enti biya abba gaxa gakis.
John6:22 Wontetha gallas abbaafe hefinthan attida daro asay issi wogolo xalaali de7eysa be7idosona. Yesuusi ba tamaaretara wogoluwan gelidi
John6:23 Shin Xibradoosape hara wogoloti Yesuusi Xoossaa galatin
John6:24 Asay Yesuusi woyko iya tamaareti yan baynaysa be7idi
John6:25 Asay Yesuusa abbaafe hefinthan demmida wode
John6:26 Yesuusi zaaridi
John6:27 Samiya kathas oothopite
John6:28 Yaatin enti
John6:29 Yesuusi zaaridi
John6:30 Enti zaaridi
John6:31 Geeshsha Maxaafan
John6:32 Yesuusi
John6:33 Hiza
John6:34 Enti zaaridi
John6:35 Yesuusi
John6:36 Shin taani hintew odas; hinte tana be7ideta
John6:37 Ta Aaway taw immiya ubbay taako yaana; qassi taako yaa oonaka kare yeddike.
John6:38 Taani ta koyaba oothanaw gidonashin tana kiittidaysi koyaba oothanaw salope yas.
John6:39 Tana kiittidaysi koyey haysa: taani I taw immida ubbataka wursetha gallas hayqope denthana melape attishin
John6:40 Hiza
John6:41 Yesuusi
John6:42 Enti
John6:43 Yesuusi zaaridi
John6:44 Tana kiitida ta Aaway taako ehiya asape attishin
John6:45 Nabeti
John6:46 Xoossaa matape yidaysafe attishin
John6:47 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; tana ammaniya oodeska merinaa de7oy de7ees.
John6:48 Taani de7o immiya uythaa.
John6:49 Hinte aawati mela biittan manna midosona
John6:50 Salope yaa uythay haysa; he uythaa miya oonika hayqenna.
John6:51 Salope yida de7o uythay tana. Oonika ha uythaa miiko merinaw daana. Qassi ha alamey de7on daana mela taani hintew immana uythay ta ashuwa” yaagis.
John6:52 Ayhudeti
John6:53 Hessa gisho
John6:54 Ta ashuwa miya uraasinne ta suuthaa uyaa uraas merinaa de7oy de7ees. Taani wursetha gallas iya hayqope denthana.
John6:55 Ta ashoy tuma kathi; ta suuthayka tuma ushshu.
John6:56 Ta ashuwa miya uraynne ta suuthaa uyaa uray tanan de7ees; taka iyan de7ayis.
John6:57 De7o Aaway tana kiittin
John6:58 Salope wodhida uythay haysa: hinte aawati midi hayqida manna mela gidenna; ha uythaa miya uray merinaw daana” yaagis.
John6:59 Yesuusi Qifirnahooma kataman ayhude woosa keethan haysa tamaarsis.
John6:60 Yesuusa tamaaretape dariya baggay hessa si7ida wode
John6:61 Yesuusi ba tamaareti hessas zuuzumidaysa eridi
John6:62 Yaatin
John6:63 Geeshsha Ayyaanay de7o immees; asa wolqi aykoka maaddenna. Ta hintew odiya qaalay de7o immiya Geeshsha Ayyaanape yees.
John6:64 Shin hinte giddon ammanonaysati de7oosona” yaagis. Ammanonaysati oonanteko Yesuusi koyrope doomidi erees. Qassi bana aathidi immanay ooneko erees.
John6:65 Qassika Yesuusi
John6:66 Hessa gaason
John6:67 Yesuusi ba tammanne nam7u tamaaretako
John6:68 Simoon Phexroosi zaaridi
John6:69 Neeni Xoossaa Geeshshaa gideysa nuuni ammanoosinne eroos” yaagis.
John6:70 Yesuusi entako
John6:71 Yesuusi hessa giday Simoona Na7aa Asqoroota Yihudasa. Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaw de7iya tammanne nam7u tamaaretape issuwa.
John7:1 Hessafe guye
John7:2 Ayhudeti bonchiya Shaqara Ba7aaley bonchetanaw matis.
John7:3 Hessa gisho
John7:4 Baw eretanaw koya asi oonika ba oosuwa genthenna. Neeni haysata oothada nebaa alamiya erisa” yaagidosona.
John7:5 Iya ishati hessa giday iyan ammanibona gishosa.
John7:6 Yesuusi entako
John7:7 Alamey hintena ixanaw danda7enna
John7:8 Hinte baaliya biite; ta wodey gakiboonna gisho taani baaliya biike” yaagis.
John7:9 I hessa gidi Galilan attis.
John7:10 Iya ishati ba7aale bonchanaw bidaape guye Yesuusi oonaka erisonna qosan he bessaa bis.
John7:11 Ayhudeti ba7aale bonchiya bessan
John7:12 Asay kalkashidi iyabaa odetoosona. Baggay
John7:13 Shin Ayhude halaqatas yayyida gisho oonika iyabaa qoncen odetenna.
John7:14 Baaliya bonchidi giddo gathiya wode Yesuusi Xoossa Keethi bidi tamaarso oykis.
John7:15 Ayhudeti
John7:16 Yesuusi zaaridi
John7:17 Xoossaa sheniya oothanaw koyiya oonika ha timirtey Xoossaa matape yaakonne woyko taani taape odiyako erana.
John7:18 Babaa odiya oonika ba huuphe boncho koyees. Shin bana kiittidaysa bonchuwa koyiya oonika I tumancho; iyan wordoy baawa.
John7:19 Musey hintew higgiya immis
John7:20 Asay zaaridi
John7:21 Yesuusi
John7:22 Hinte
John7:23 Muse higgey kiitida gisho
John7:24 Tuma pirda pirditepe attishin
John7:25 Yerusalaame asaape issoti issoti
John7:26 Heko
John7:27 Kiristoosi yaa wode I awupe yaako oonika erenna
John7:28 Yesuusi xoossa keethan tamaarsishe ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
John7:29 Shin taani I kiittin iya matape yida gisho iya erayis” yaagis.
John7:30 Hessa gisho
John7:31 Shin daro asay Yesuusa ammanidi
John7:32 Farsaaweti daro asay Yesuusaba kalkasheysa si7idosona. Kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti iya oythidi qashisanaw Xoossa Keethi naageysata kiittidosona.
John7:33 Yesuusi
John7:34 Hinte tana koyana
John7:35 Ayhudeti issoy issuwara
John7:36 ‘Hinte tana koyana
John7:37 Baaliya bonchiya gallasatape wolqaamanne wursetha gallasan Yesuusi dendidi
John7:38 Tana ammaniya oonika Geeshsha Maxaafay gidaysada de7o immiya pulto haathay iyape goggana” yaagis.
John7:39 I hessa giday iya ammanidaysati ekanaw de7iya Geeshsha Ayyaanaba. Yesuusi buroo bonchetiboona gisho
John7:40 He asaape daroti I geysa si7idi
John7:41 Harati qassi
John7:42 Geeshsha Maxaafay
John7:43 Hessa gisho
John7:44 He asaape issoti issoti iya oykanaw koydosona
John7:45 Xoossa Keetha naageysati kahine halaqatakonne Farsaawetako guye simmi yin enti
John7:46 Xoossa Keetha naageysati entako
John7:47 Farsaaweti zaaridi
John7:48 Ayhude halaqatape woyko Farsaawetepe iya ammanida asi de7ii?
John7:49 Muse higgiya eronna ha asay baadetidaysata” yaagidosona.
John7:50 Farsaawetape issoy qamma Yesuusako bida Niqodimoosi entako
John7:51 “Issi asi giyaba si7onna woyko I ay oothidaako eronna de7ishe koyrottidi iya bolla pirdeysi nu higgiyan de7ii?” yaagis.
John7:52 Enti zaaridi
John7:53 Issoy issoy aggidi ba soo ba soo bis.
John8:1 Shin Yesuusi Shamaho zuma bolla keyis.
John8:2 Qassi wontetha gallas guura Xoossa Keethi simmis. Daro asay iyako yin uttidi enta tamaarsis.
John8:3 Higge astamaaretinne Farsaaweti laymatishin oykida issi maccasiw iyako ehidosona. Enti asa ubbaa sinthan iyo essidi
John8:4 “Astamaariyaw
John8:5 Muse higgey hanni mela maccas shuchan cadeta hayqana mela kiittees. Yaatin
John8:6 Enti hessa giday Yesuusa paacidi iya mootiyaba demmanaasa. Shin Yesuusi hokidi ba biradhen biitta bolla xaafis.
John8:7 Enti iya zaari zaari oychidi aggonna ixin
John8:8 Qassika hokidi biitta bolla xaafis.
John8:9 Enti hessa si7ida wode cimatape doomidi issoy issoy keyishe wuridosona. Yesuusa xalaali he bessan eqida maccaseera attis.
John8:10 I pude dhoqu gidi maccaseeko
John8:11 Maccasiya
John8:12 Qassika Yesuusi asaako
John8:13 Farsaaweti
John8:14 Yesuusi zaaridi
John8:15 Hinte asa qofan pirdeta; taani issi asa bollaka pirdike.
John8:16 Taani pirdiyaba gidikoka ta pirday tuma. Ayis giiko
John8:17 Nam7u asa markatethi tuma gideysi hinte higgiyan xaafetis.
John8:18 Taani tabaa ta huuphen markatayis; qassi tana kiitida ta Aawayka tabaa markatees” yaagis.
John8:19 Enti
John8:20 Yesuusi xoossa keethan muxaata miishiya yeggiya saaxiney de7iya bessan hessa tamaarsis. Iya qammay buroo gakiboonna gisho oonika iya oykibeenna.
John8:21 Qassika Yesuusi entako
John8:22 Ayhude halaqati
John8:23 Yesuusi zaaridi
John8:24 Hinte atotethi demmonna hinte nagaran hayqana gada taani hintew odiday hessasa. ‘Taani Tana Gideysa’ hinte ammanonna ixiko hinte atotethi demmonna hinte nagaran hayqana” yaagis.
John8:25 Enti
John8:26 Taani hintebaa odada pirdiyabay darobay de7ees. Shin tana kiittidaysi tumancho; qassi taani iyape si7idaysa xalaala alamiyas odayis” yaagis.
John8:27 Yesuusi ba Aawaba odeysa enti akeekibokona.
John8:28 Hessa gisho
John8:29 Tana kiittidaysi taara de7ees. Taani ubba wode iya ufaysiyabaa oothiya gisho I tana ta xalaala aggibeenna” yaagis.
John8:30 Yesuusi hessa odishin si7ida daro asay iya ammanidosona.
John8:31 Yesuusi bana ammanida asatako
John8:32 Hinte tumaa erana; tumayka hintena aylletethafe kessana” yaagis.
John8:33 Enti zaaridi
John8:34 Yesuusi zaaridi
John8:35 Aylley merinaw soo asaara deenna
John8:36 Na7ay hintena aylletethafe kessiko hinte aylletethafe tuma keyana.
John8:37 Hinte Abrahaame sheeshi gideysa taani erayis. Shin ta qaalay hinte wozanan bayna gisho
John8:38 Taani ta Aaway tana bessidaysa odayis
John8:39 Enti zaaridi
John8:40 Shin Xoossafe si7ida tumaa odida tana hinte wodhanaw koyeeta. Abrahaamey hessada oothibeenna.
John8:41 Hinte
John8:42 Yesuusi entako

John8:45 Taani tuma odayis
John8:46 Hintefe
John8:47 Xoossaa asi Xoossay giyaba si7ees. Hinte Xoossaa asi gidonna gisho Xoossay giyaba si7eketa” yaagis.

John8:50 Taani ta huuphe boncho koyke; taani bonchetana mela koyeysinne taw pirdeysi de7ees.
John8:51 Taani hintew tuma odayis; ta qaala naagiya oonika hayqenna” yaagis.
John8:52 Ayhudeti zaaridi

John9:3 Yesuusi
John9:4 Sa7i gallas de7ishin tana kiittidaysa oosuwa nu oothanaw bessees. Oonika oothanaw danda7onna qammay yees.
John9:5 Taani alamiyan de7ashe alamiyas poo7o” yaagis.
John9:6 Yesuusi hessa gidi sa7an cuttis. Ba cuchan guutha biitta laakothidi he urqan qooqe addiya ayfiya tiyis.

John9:9 Issi issi asay
John9:10 Enti iyako
John9:11 I zaaridi
John9:12 Enti iyako
John9:13 Enti kase qooqe

John9:20 Iya yelidaysati
John9:21 Shin ha77i I waanidi xeellidaako qassi iya ayfiya ooni pathidaako nuuni eroko. Iya oychite. I bana erida asi gidiya gisho babaa odanaw danda7ees” yaagidosona.
John9:22 Iya yelidaysati hessa giday Ayhudetas yayyida gishosa. Ayis giiko

John10:1 Yesuusi
John10:2 Shin pengera geleysi dorsata heemmeysa.
John10:3 Pengiya naageysi iyaw pengiya dooyees; dorsatika iya qaala si7oosona. I ba dorsata enta sunthan sunthan xeegees; enta kaalethidi kare kessees.
John10:4 I ba dorsata kare kessidaape guye enta sinthan hemetees. Enti iya qaala eriya gisho iya kaalloosona.
John10:5 Hara uraa qaala enti eronna gisho iyape baqatoosonape attishin
John10:6 Yesuusi entaw ha leemisuwa odis
John10:7 Zaaridi Yesuusi entako
John10:8 Taape sinthe yida ubbay kaysonne panga
John10:9 Pengey tana; ta baggara geliya oonika attana. I ta baggara gelananne keyana; lo77o heemetiya bessi demmana.
John10:10 Kaysoy kaysotanaw
John10:11 “Taani lo77o henthancho; lo77o henthanchoy ba dorsata gisho ba shempuwa aathidi immees.
John10:12 Une heemmiya asi dorsata godanne henthancho gidonna gisho suudhumey yaa wode be7idi dorsata aggidi bees. Hessa gisho
John10:13 Une heemmeysi miishes heemmiya gishonne dorsatabay iya qofisonna gisho dorsata aggidi baqatees.
John10:14 “Taani lo77o henthancho. Ta Aaway tana ereysada taanika ta Aawa erayis. Hessadaka
John10:15 
John10:16 Ha wudiyan bayna hara dorsati taw de7oosona. Taani entaka ehanaw bessees. Enti ta qaala si7ana; enti issi wude gidana; henthanchoyka issuwa.
John10:17 “Taani ta shempuwa aatha immada zaara ekiya gisho ta Aaway tana dosees.
John10:18 Ta dosada ta shempuwa aatha immaysipe attishin
John10:19 Hessa I gida gisho
John10:20 Entafe dariya baggay
John10:21 Harati qassi
John10:22 Yerusalaamen Xoossa Keetha anjisida gallasata bonchiya ba7aaley gakis; he wode sa7i balgo.
John10:23 Yesuusi xoossa keethan Solomone barandan simeretees.
John10:24 Ayhudeti Yesuusa yuushon shiiqi eqidi
John10:25 Yesuusi zaaridi entako
John10:26 Shin taani hintew odidaysada hinte ta dorse gidonna gisho ammaneketa.
John10:27 Ta dorsati ta qaala si7oosona. Taani enta erayis; entika tana kaalloosona.
John10:28 Taani entaw merinaa de7uwa immayis; enti ubbaraka dhayokona. Oonika ta kushepe enta bonqi ekanaw danda7enna.
John10:29 Enta taw immida ta Aaway ubbaafe aadhees Oonika ta Aawa kushepe enta bonqi ekanaw danda7enna.
John10:30 Tanne ta Aaway issino” yaagis.

John11:1 Bitaane gutan Alaazara geetetiya issi addey hargetis. Bitaaney Mayraamanne I michiya Marta de7iya guta.

John11:3 Hessa gisho
John11:4 Yesuusi hessa si7ida wode
John11:5 Yesuusi Marta

John11:14 Hessa gisho

John11:25 Yesuusi iiko
John11:26 Qassi de7on de7eynne tana ammaniya oonika hayqenna. Hessa neeni ammanay?” yaagis.

John11:29 Mayraama hessa si7ida wode ellesa denda eqada Yesuusako basu.
John11:30 He saaten Yesuusi Martara gahetida bessan de7ees; buroo gutaa gakibeenna.

John11:33 Yesuusi Mayraamanne iira de7iya

John11:42 Ne ubba wode tana si7eysa taani erayis. Shin haysan eqida asay neeni tana kiittidaysa ammanana mela taani enta gisho haysa gayis” yaagis.

John11:45 Hessa gisho
John11:46 Shin entafe issoti issoti Farsaawetako bidi Yesuusi oothidaysa entaw odidosona.
John11:47 Hessafe guye
John11:48 Nuuni iya si77i gidi aggiko asa ubbay iya ammanana. Qassi Roome biitta asati yidi nu xoossa keethaanne nu deriya dhaysana” yaagidosona.
John11:49 Entafe issoy Qayyaafa geysi
John11:50 Asa ubbay dhayeysafe asa ubbaa gisho issi asi hayqeysi lo77o gideysa ereketii?” yaagis.
John11:51 I hessa baape gibeenna. Shin he laythi kahine halaqa gidiya gisho
John11:52 Qassi Yesuusi Ayhude asaa xalaalas gidonashin laaletidi de7iya Xoossaa asa ubbaa issife shiishanawunne issi asi oothanaw hayqana.
John11:53 He gallasape doomidi enti iya wodhanaw maqetidosona.
John11:54 Hessa gisho
John11:55 Ayhudeti bonchiya Paasika gallasay matis. Qassi daro asay bantana geeshshanaw Paasika bonchiya gallasay gakanaape sinthe he biittafe Yerusalaame bidosona.

John11:57 Kahine halaqatinne Farsaaweti Yesuusa oykanaw
John12:1 Paasika bonchiya gallasape usupun gallas sinthatidi
John12:2 He bessan enti iyaw kaho giigisidosona. Alaazari Yesuusara issife gayta bolla uttidashin
John12:3 Mayraama nardoose geetetiya daro al7o geeshsha shitto ehada Yesuusa tohuwa tiyasu. Ba binaanan iya tohuwa quchasu; keetha ubbay shitto sawon tonku gis.
John12:4 Shin Yesuusa tamaaretape issoy
John12:5 “Ayis ha shittoy heedzu xeetu dinaaren bayzetidi
John12:6 I kayso gidida gisho hessa gisipe attishin
John12:7 Yesuusi
John12:8 Manqoti ubba wode hintera daana
John12:9 He wode daro asay Yesuusi Bitaanen de7eysa si7idi yaa bidosona. Enti Yesuusa xalaala gidonashin
John12:10 Hessa gisho
John12:11 Ayis giiko
John12:12 Wontetha gallas Paasika bonchiya bessaa yida daro asay Yesuusi Yerusalaame beysa si7idi
John12:13 Zamba haythi ekidi iya mokanaw keyidosona. Banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
John12:14 Geeshsha Maxaafan
John12:15 
John12:16 Yesuusa tamaareti hessa kase akeekibokona. Shin Yesuusi bonchetidaape guye enti hessa ubbaa akeekidosona. Hessi ubbay Geeshsha Maxaafay gidaysada hanis.
John12:17 Yesuusi Alaazara duufope xeegidi
John12:18 Daro asay iya mokanaw keyday
John12:19 Hessa gisho
John12:20 Paasika bonchiya gallas goyinnanaw Yerusalaame bidaysata giddon issi issi Girike asati de7oosona.
John12:21 Enti Galila biittan Beetesayda katamaape yida Filphoosako bidi
John12:22 Filphoosi bidi Indiriyasas odin nam7ay bidi
John12:23 Yesuusi entako
John12:24 Taani hintew tuma odayis; issi giste ayfey biittan wodhidi wooqonna ixiko barka attees. Shin he giste ayfey wooqiko daro ayfe ayfees.
John12:25 Ba shempuwa dosiya oonika dhaysees; ba shempuwa ha alamiyan ixiya oonika merinaa de7os ashshees.
John12:26 Taani de7iyasuwan taara daana mela taw oothanaw koyiya oonika tana kaallanaw bessees. Taw oothiya oonaka ta Aaway bonchana.
John12:27 “Ha77i ta shempoy daro un7etis; yaatin woygo? ‘Ta Aawaw
John12:28 Ta Aawaw
John12:29 He bessan eqida daro asay he qaala si7idi
John12:30 Yesuusi zaaridi entako
John12:31 Ha alamey pirdetiya wodey ha77i; ha alamiya haareysi ha77i kare holetana.
John12:32 Qassi taani sa7ape dhoqu oosetida wode asa ubbaa taako ehana” yaagis.
John12:33 I hessa giday ay mela hayqo hayqaneko entaw qoncisanaasa.
John12:34 Daro asay zaaridi
John12:35 Yesuusi
John12:36 Poo7o nayta gidana mela poo7oy de7ishin poo7uwa ammanite” yaagis. Yesuusi hessa odetidaape guye bidi entafe geemmis.
John12:37 I hessa mela malaatata enta sinthan oothinka ammanibookona.
John12:38 Nabiya Isayaasi
John12:39 Qassika Isayaasi
John12:40 
John12:41 Isayaasi hessa giday
John12:42 Gidikoka
John12:43 Hessa enti oothiday
John12:44 Yesuusi ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
John12:45 Tana be7iya oonika tana kiittidaysaka be7ees.
John12:46 Tana ammaniya ubbay dhuman doonna mela taani poo7o gidada alamiya yas.
John12:47 Ta qaala si7idi kiitetonna oonaka taani pirdike. Ayis giiko
John12:48 Tana ixeysanne ta qaala ekonna oonaka pirdeysi de7ees. Taani odida qaalay wursetha gallas he uraa pirdana.
John12:49 Ayis giiko
John12:50 Qassi iya kiitay merinaa de7o gideysa taani erayis. Hessa gisho
John13:1 Paasika bonchiya gallasay gakanaape sinthatidi ha alamiya aggidi Aawako biya wodey gakidaysa Yesuusi eris. Ha alamiyan de7iya ba asaa ubba wode dosis; wursethi gakanawuka enta dosis.
John13:2 Yesuusaranne iya tamaaretara issife kaho moosona. Hessafe kase Xalahey Simoona na7aa Asqoroota Yihudi Yesuusa aathidi immanaada iya wozanan iita qofa wothis.
John13:3 Yesuusi Aaway ubbaba iya kushen wothidaysa
John13:4 Yesuusi gayta bollafe dendidi bolla bagga ma7uwa qaari wothidi

John13:8 Yaatin
John13:9 Phexroosi Yesuusako

John13:16 Taani hintew tuma odayis; aylley ba godaape

John13:19 ‘Taani Tana Gideysa’ hinte ammanana mela hessi hananaape sinthatada hintew odayis.
John13:20 Taani hintew tuma odayis; taani kiitida oonaka mokiya uray tana mokees. Tana mokiya oonika tana kiittidaysa mokees” yaagis.

John13:29 Yihudi miishe oykiya gisho
John13:30 Yihudi uythaa baarida mela ellesidi kare keyis. He wode sa7i qamma.
John13:31 Yihudi kare keydaape guye
John13:32 Xoossay iya baggara bonchetiko I ba huuphen Asa Na7aa bonchana; qassi I hessa ellesidi oothana.
John13:33 Ta nayto
John13:34 Taani hintew immiya ooratha kiitay haysa; issoy issuwa dosite. Taani hintena dosidaysada hinte issoy issuwa dosanaw bessees.

John13:37 Phexroosi

John14:1 Yesuusi ba tamaaretako
John14:2 Ta Aawa keethan daro bessi de7ees. Taani hintew besse giigisanaw bayis. Hessa gidonnaako taani hintew odikeshin.
John14:3 Taani bada besse giigisidaape guye
John14:4 Hinte taani biya bessaa efiya ogiya ereeta” yaagis.
John14:5 Yaatin
John14:6 Yesuusi zaaridi
John14:7 Hinte tana eriyaba gidiyako
John14:8 Filphoosi Yesuusako
John14:9 Yesuusi zaaridi
John14:10 Taani Aawara issino gideysanne Aawayka taara issino gideysa neeni ammanikiyee? Taani hintew odiya qaala taani taape odike
John14:11 Taani Aawan de7eysanne Aawayka tanan de7eysa ammanite. Hessa ammanonna ixiko ta oothiyabatan tana ammanite.
John14:12 “Taani hintew tuma odayis; tana ammaniya uray taani oothiya oosuwape aadhiya ooso oothana. Taani Aawako biya gisho tana ammaniya oonika haysafe aadhiya ooso oothana.
John14:13 Aaway Na7aa baggara bonchetana mela ta sunthan hinte woossiya ubbaa ta hintew oothana.
John14:14 Ta sunthan aybibaaka hinte oychiko ta hintew oothana.
John14:15 “Hinte tana dosiko ta kiitaa naagana.
John14:16 Taani Aawa woossana; hintera merinaw daana mela minthetheysa hintew immana.
John14:17 He Ayyaanay Xoossaa tumaa qoncisees. Ha alamiya asay iya be7onna gishonne eronna gisho iya ekanaw danda7okona. Shin I hintera de7iya gishonne hinte giddon daana gisho hinte iya ereeta.
John14:18 “Taani hintena aayiya aawu bayna na7ada hinte xalaala aggike; simmada hinteko yaana.
John14:19 Guutha wodepe guye alamey tana zaari be7enna
John14:20 Taani ta Aawan
John14:21 “Ta kiitaa ekidi naagey tana dosees. Tana doseysa ta Aawayka dosees; taanika iya dosayis; taani iyaw qoncana” yaagis.
John14:22 Asqoroota Yihuda gidonna Yihudi Yesuusako
John14:23 Yesuusi zaaridi
John14:24 Tana dosonna oonika ta qaalas kiitetenna. Hinte si7iya qaalay tana kiitida Aawabape attishin
John14:25 “Taani hintera ha77i de7ashe hessa hintew odas.
John14:26 Shin Aaway ta sunthan kiittana minthethiya Geeshsha Ayyaanay
John14:27 “Sarotethaa hintew immana. Taani ta sarotethaa hintew immana. Ta immiya sarotethay alamey immiya sarotethaa mela gidenna. Hessa gisho
John14:28 ‘Taani baana
John14:29 Hessi haniya wode hinte ammanana mela hessi hanonna de7ishin sinthatada taani hintew odas.
John14:30 “Ha alamiya haareysi yaa gisho hizape guye hintera daro odetike. Tana I aykoka oothanaw danda7enna.
John14:31 Shin taani Aawa doseysa alamey erana mela ta Aaway tana kiittidaysa ubbaa oothayis. Dendite; haysafe boos.
John15:1 “Taani tuma woyne ubba. Goshshanchoy ta Aawa.
John15:2 I
John15:3 Taani hintew odida qaala gisho hinte geeshshi.
John15:4 Tanan de7ite; taanika hintenan de7ana. Woyne tashey ubbara doona ixiko he tashey barka ayfe ayfanaw danda7enna. Hessadaka
John15:5 “Taani woyne ubba; hinte tasheta. Tanan de7eysinne taani iyan de7eysi
John15:6 Tanan doonna uray tashiyada karen yegitidi melana. Hessa mela tasheti shiiqidi taman yegetana
John15:7 Hinte tanan de7iko
John15:8 Hinte daro ayfe ayfiya ta tamaare gidiko
John15:9 Aaway tana doseysada taanika hintena dosayis; ta siiquwan de7ite.
John15:10 Taani ta Aawa kiitaa naagada iya siiquwan de7idaysada hinteka ta kiitaa naagiko ta siiquwan daana.
John15:11 “Ta ufaysay hintenan gidana melanne hinte ufaysay polo gidana mela taani hintew hessa odas.
John15:12 Ta kiitay haysa; taani hintena dosidaysada hinteka issoy issuwa dosite.
John15:13 Ba shempuwa ba laggiyas aathidi immeysafe aadhiya gita siiqoy baawa.
John15:14 Taani hintena kiittidaba ubbaa oothiko hinte dosetidaysata.
John15:15 “Aylley ba goday oothiyaba eronna gisho taani hintena hizape guye aylleta giike. Shin ta Aawape si7ida ubbaa taani hintew odida gisho hintena dosetidaysata gas.
John15:16 Taani hintena doorasipe attishin
John15:17 Ta kiitay haysa: issoy issuwa dosite.
John15:18 “Alamey hintena ixiko koyrottidi tana ixidaysa akeekite.
John15:19 Hinte alamiyaba gidiyako alamey hintena dosana. Shin taani hintena alamepe doorida gishonne hinte alamiyaba gidonna gisho alamey hintena ixees.
John15:20 ‘Aylley ba godaape aadhenna’ gada taani hintew odidaysa akeekite. Enti tana gooddidaba gidiko hintenaka gooddana. Enti ta qaala naagidaba gidiko hinte qaalaka naagana.
John15:21 Shin enti tana kiittidaysa eronna gisho ha ubbaa ta gaason hinte bolla oothana.
John15:22 Taani yada entaw odonnaba gidiyako nagara gidenna. Shin ha77i enti oothida nagaraas gaasoyabay baawa.
John15:23 Tana ixeysi ta Aawaka ixees.
John15:24 Oonika oothiboonna ooso ta enta giddon oothaboonnaba gidiyako entaw nagara gidonna attana. Shin ha77i enti taani oothida oosuwa be7idi tanaka ta Aawaka ixidosona.
John15:25 Shin enta higgiyan
John15:26 “Aawape yaa tumaa qoncisiya Ayyaana ta hintew kiittana. I hintena minthethana
John15:27 Hinteka koyrope doomidi taara de7iya gisho tabaa markatana.
John16:1 “Taani hessa hinte ammanoy dhayonna mela hintew odas.
John16:2 Enti hintena ayhude woosa keethatape kessi yeddana. Hessadaka
John16:3 Enti hessa hinte bolla oothey tana woyko Aawa eronna gishosa.
John16:4 Shin enti hessa hinte bolla oothiya wodey gakiya wode taani hintew odidaysa hinte akeekana mela taani hintew haysa odas. “Sinthatada taani haysa hintew odonna gam7iday ta hintera de7iya gishosa.
John16:5 Shin ha77i taani tana kiittidaysako bayis; hintefe oonika
John16:6 Shin taani hessa odida gisho
John16:7 Shin taani hintew tuma odayis; taani biiko hintew lo77o. Ayis giiko
John16:8 Minthetheysi yidi
John16:9 Nagarabay
John16:10 Xillotethabay
John16:11 Pirdabay
John16:12 “Taani hintew odiyabay darobay de7ees
John16:13 Tuma Ayyaanay yaa wode hintena tumatethaa ubbaako kaalethana. I si7idaba odeesipe attishin
John16:14 I taw de7eysafe ekidi hintew odiya gisho I tana bonchana.
John16:15 Aawas de7iyaba ubbay tabaa; ‘Minthetheysi taw de7eysafe ekidi hintew odana’ taani giday hessasa.
John16:16 “Guutha wodepe guye tana be7eketa; qassi guutha wodepe guye hinte tana be7ana” yaagis.
John16:17 Iya tamaaretape issoti issoti banta giddon
John16:18 “Guutha wodepe guye geysi woy guussee? I ay odetiyako nuus eretenna” yaagidosona.
John16:19 Enti bana oychanaw koyeysa Yesuusi eridi
John16:20 Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte yeekananne afuxana
John16:21 Issi maccasiya na7a yelana haniya wode ba yelo wodey gakida gisho hirgawusu. Shin na7a yelidaape guye na7i ha alamiyan yeletida ufaysaa gisho ba un7aa dogawusu.
John16:22 Hessadaka
John16:23 “He gallas hinte tana aybibaaka woosseketa. Taani hintew tuma odayis; hinte ta sunthan woossiyaba ubbaa Aaway hintew immana.
John16:24 Ha77i gakanaw ta sunthan aybibaaka woossibeketa. Hinte ufaysay polo gidana mela Xoossaa woossite; hinte ekana.
John16:25 “Taani ha77i gakanaw hintew leemison odas
John16:26 He gallas hinte ta sunthan Aawa woossana; hinte gisho taani Aawa woossike.
John16:27 Ayis giiko
John16:28 Taani Aawa matape ha alamiya yas; qassi alamiya aggada Aawako baana” yaagis.
John16:29 Iya tamaareti zaaridi
John16:30 Neeni ubbaba ereysa nuuni ha77i eroos; qassi nena oonika oychana mela neeni koyaka. Hessi nuna neeni Xoossafe kiitetidaysa ammanthees” yaagidosona.
John16:31 Yaatin
John16:32 Heko
John16:33 Hinte taara de7ishe saroy hintew daana mela taani hessa odas. Alamen de7ishe hinte waayetana. Shin minnite; taani alamiya xoonas” yaagis.
John17:1 Yesuusi hessa odidaape guye pude salo xeellidi
John17:2 Neeni iyaw immida ubbaas I merinaa de7uwa immana mela asa ubbaa bolla iyaw maata immadasa.
John17:3 Merinaa de7oy
John17:4 Neeni ta oothana mela immida oosuwa polada nena sa7an bonchas.
John17:5 Ha77ika
John17:6 “Alamiya asaape neeni taw immidaysata nena erisas. Enti neyisata; neeni enta taw immadasa. Enti ne qaalaska kiitetidosona.
John17:7 Neeni taw immida ubbabay neepe yidaysa enti ha77i eroosona.
John17:8 Neeni taw immida qaala taani entaw immas; entika he qaala ekidosona. Taani ne matape yidaysi tuma gideysa eridi neeni tana kiittidaysaka ammanidosona.
John17:9 “Taani entaw woossayis. Enti neyisata gidiya gisho neeni taw immida asaas woossaysipe attishin
John17:10 Taw de7iya ubbabay nebaa; new de7iya ubbayka tabaa. Taani enta baggara bonchetas.
John17:11 Taani hizape guye alamiyan de7ike; enti alamen de7oosona. Taani ha77i neeko bayis. Geeshsha Aawaw
John17:12 Taani entara sa7an de7ashe
John17:13 “Ha77i taani neeko bayis. Ta ufaysay enta wozanan polo gidana mela haysa taani alamen de7ashe odayis.
John17:14 Taani entaw ne qaala immas. Taani alamiyape gidonaysada
John17:15 Neeni Xalahepe enta naagana melape attishin
John17:16 Taani alamepe gidonaysada entika alamepe gidokona.
John17:17 Neeni ne tumatethan enta nebaa ootha; ne qaalayka tuma.
John17:18 Neeni tana alamiya kiitidaysada taanika enta alamiya kiittas.
John17:19 Qassi enti tuma nebaa gidana mela enta gisho taani ta huuphiya new immayis.
John17:20 “Taani enta xalaalas gidonashin enti qaala odin
