Acts3:1 Issi gallas Phexroosinne Yohaanisi woossanaw uddufun saaten Xoossa Keethi bidosona.
Acts3:2 Yeletoosope doomidi wobbe gidida issi addey Xoossa Keethi geliya asaape miishe woossana mela ubba gallas lo77o geetetiya Xoossa Keetha pengen ehidi wothoosona.
Acts3:3 He wobbe addey Phexroosinne Yohaanisi Xoossa Keethi gelana hanishin be7idi enta miishe woossis.
Acts3:4 Entika iya caddi xeellidi
Acts3:5 Wobbe addey entafe ayko ekana daanin entako xeellis.
Acts3:6 Shin Phexroosi iyako
Acts3:7 Hessafe guye
Acts3:8 Addey gupidi dendi eqis. Gedenne haa hemethi doomis. Hemetishe
Acts3:9 I hemetishininne Xoossa galatishin asa ubbay iya be7idosona.
Acts3:10 Be7ida ubbay miishe woossanaw lo77o geetetiya xoossa keetha pengen uttidaysi
Acts3:11 Addey Phexroosapenne Yohaanisape duuxike gidi oykidi de7ishin
Acts3:12 Phexroosi asaa be7ida wode asaako
Acts3:13 Abrahaame
Acts3:14 Hinte geeshshanne xilluwa
Acts3:15 De7o immeysa hinte wodhideta
Acts3:16 Ha hinte be7eysinne eriya addey
Acts3:17 “Ha77ika ta ishato
Acts3:18 Shin Xoossay beni nabeta ubba doonan
Acts3:19 Hiza
Acts3:20 Godaa matape minthetho wodey hintew yaana. Xoossay Kiristoosa gidana mela sinthatidi doorida Yesuusa hintew yeddana.
Acts3:21 Xoossay ba geeshsha nabeta doonan beni odidaysa mela ubbabay ooraxiya wodey gakanaw Yesuusi salon gam7anaw bessees.
Acts3:22 Musey
Acts3:23 He nabey odeysa si7onna asi oonika asaa giddofe shaaketidi dhayo’ yaagis.
Acts3:24 “Qassi Sameelape doomidi de7iya nabeti ubbay ha wodiyaba odidosona.
Acts3:25 Hinte nabeta nayta; qassi Xoossay Abrahaames
Acts3:26 Xoossay hintena ubbaa hinte iita ogepe zaaridi anjana mela ba na7a denthidi hintew koyro yeddis” yaagis.
Acts4:1 Phexroosinne Yohaanisi asaas odishin kahine halaqati
Acts4:2 Enti Yesuusi hayqope dendoysanne iya gaason hayqope dendoy de7eysa asaa tamaarsida gisho yilotidosona.
Acts4:3 Hessa gisho
Acts4:4 Shin qaala si7idaysatape daroti ammanidosona. Ammanida adde asaa tayboy ichashu mukuluko bis.
Acts4:5 Wontetha gallas deriya haareysati
Acts4:6 He asa giddon kahine halaqay Haanni
Acts4:7 Hawaareta banta sinthan essidi
Acts4:8 He wode Phexroosi Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi
Acts4:9 hachi ha wobbe addiyas oosetida lo77o oosuwasinne I waanidi paxidaako hinte nuna oychiko
Acts4:10 masqaliya bolla hinte kaqin
Acts4:11 “ ‘Gimbeysati boridi ixida shuchay
Acts4:12 Hessa gisho
Acts4:13 Shiiqida asay Phexroosinne Yohaanisi minnida minotetha be7ida wode enti tamaariboonna coo asi gididaysa akeekidi
Acts4:14 Qassi paxida addey Phexroosaranne Yohaanisara eqidaysa asay be7idi giyaba dhayidosona.
Acts4:15 Shin Phexroosanne Yohaanisa kare keyana mela oothidi banta giddon
Acts4:16 “Ha asata nu ay oothino? Enta kushen oosetida gita malaatay Yerusalaamen de7iya ubbaas bentees. Nuuni hessa eroko gaanaw danda7oko.
Acts4:17 Shin ha oday asaa giddon laaletonna mela hizape guye
Acts4:18 Enta xeegidi
Acts4:19 Shin Phexroosinne Yohaanisi entako zaaridi
Acts4:20 Nuuni be7idabaanne si7idaba odonna agganaw danda7oko” yaagidosona.
Acts4:21 Biitta cimatinne deriya haareysati kasepe minthi naagisidi enta yeddi aggidosona. Asay hanidabaas Xoossaa galatiya gisho enta seeranaw danda7ibookona.
Acts4:22 He malaatan hargefe paxida addiyas laythi oytamape aadhis.
Acts4:23 Phexroosinne Yohaanisi birshetidi banta dabbotako bidi
Acts4:24 Enti hessa si7ida wode issi wozanan gididi Xoossaa haysada yaagidi woossidosona: “Ubbaa Haariya Godaw
Acts4:25 Neeni ne aylliya
Acts4:26 Sa7aa kawotinne deriya haareysati issife Godaa bollanne Kiristoosa bolla dendidosona’ yaagadasa.
Acts4:27 “Tumaka
Acts4:28 Qassi neeni ne wolqaaninne ne sheniyan oothana gada qopa uttidaba ubbaa polidosona.
Acts4:29 Ha77ika Godaw
Acts4:30 Ne geeshsha na7aa Yesuusa sunthan harganchota pathanaw
Acts4:31 Enti Xoossa woossidaape guye
Acts4:32 Ammaneysati ubbay qofaninne wozanan issino gididosona. Enti bantaw de7iyaba tabaa goonnashin issife shaaketoosona.
Acts4:33 Hawaareti
Acts4:34 Biitti woyko keethi de7eysati ubbay bayzi ekida miishiya ehiya gisho
Acts4:35 Miishe ehidi hawaaretas immoosona; he miishiya asaas koshshidaysada issuwas issuwas shaaki shaaki immees.
Acts4:36 Qophiroosa geetetiya bessan yeletida Yoosefa geetetiya Leewe sheeshape gidida issoy de7ees. Iya sunthaa hawaareti Barnabaasa (Minthetho na7a) gidoosona.
Acts4:37 Barnabaasi baw de7iya biitta bayzidi miishiya ehidi hawaaretas immis.
Acts5:1 Issi Hananiya geetetiya addey ba mache Saphirira gade bayzis.
Acts5:2 He bayzida miishiyape ba machiya erishin bagga ashshidi
Acts5:3 Shin Phexroosi Hananiyako
Acts5:4 Neeni bayzanaape kase gadey nebaa gidenneyee? Qassi neeni bayza simminka miishey nebaa gidenneyee? Yaatin
Acts5:5 Hanaani he qaala si7ida mela kundidi hayqis; hessa si7ida ubbay daro yayyis.
Acts5:6 Na7atetha asati soo gelidi iya aha xaaxidi efidi moogidosona.
Acts5:7 Heedzu saatepe guye Hananiya machiya hessa eronna de7ashe Phexroosi de7iyasuwa gelasu.
Acts5:8 Phexroosi iiko
Acts5:9 Phexroosi maccasiw
Acts5:10 Maccasiya iiraka Phexroosa tohuwa matan kundada hayqa aggasu; na7atethati geliya wode hayqidaaro demmidi kare kessidi
Acts5:11 Kumetha woosa keethaynne hessa si7ida hara asa ubbay daro yayyidosona.
Acts5:12 Hawaareti daro malaatatanne oorathabata asaa giddon oothosona. Ammaniya ubbay Solomone barandan issife shiiqoosona.
Acts5:13 Hara asape entara gahetanaw issi asika minnibeenna
Acts5:14 Ammaniya addetanne maccasata tayboy kaseysafe darishe bis.
Acts5:15 Hessa gisho
Acts5:16 Qassi daro asay Yerusalaame matan de7iya katamatape harganchotanne tuna ayyaani waaysiya asata ekidi yoosona; ubbayka paxidosona.
Acts5:17 Kahine halaqaynne iyara de7iya Saduqaaweti ubbay qanaaten kumidi hawaareta bolla dendidosona.
Acts5:18 Hawaareta oykidi deriya qasho keethan yeggidosona.
Acts5:19 Shin Godaa kiitanchoy qamma qasho keetha pengiya dooyidi hawaareta kare kessidi
Acts5:20 “Bidi
Acts5:21 Hawaareti hessa si7ida wode wonta guura Xoossa Keethi gelidi tamaarso doomidosona. Kahineta halaqaynne iyara de7eysati yidi
Acts5:22 Shin wotaadareti qasho keethi bidi hawaareta demmibookona. Guye simmi yidi deriyas
Acts5:23 “Nuuni biya wode qasho keetha pengey minthi gordetin
Acts5:24 Hessa gisho
Acts5:25 He wode issi addey entako yidi
Acts5:26 Xoossa Keethaa wotaadareta kiitteysi ba wotaadaretara bidi hawaareta ehis. Shin enti bantana asay shuchan caddana gidi yayyida gisho enta aaddashidi ehidosona.
Acts5:27 Enti hawaareta ehidi
Acts5:28 “Hintena nuuni he uraa sunthan tamaarsonna mela minthidi kiittibooko? Heko
Acts5:29 Phexroosaranne hanko hawaaretara entaw zaarishe
Acts5:30 Masqaliya bolla hinte kaqidi wodhida Yesuusa
Acts5:31 Isra7eeleti nagaraape simmana melanne enta nagaray atto geetetana mela Xoossay Yesuusa haareysanne ashsheysa oothidi bonchon baape ushacha baggan utisis.
Acts5:32 Hessas nuuni marka; qassi Xoossay bana ammaneysatas immida Geeshsha Ayyaanayka marka” yaagidosona.
Acts5:33 Shiiqida asay hessa si7ida wode daro yilotidi
Acts5:34 Shin asa ubban daro bonchetida Gamaaliyale geeteteysi
Acts5:35 Hessafe guye
Acts5:36 Ayis giiko
Acts5:37 Hessafe guye
Acts5:38 Ha77ika ta hintew odayis; ha asatape shaaketite; enta bochofite. Ayis giiko
Acts5:39 Shin ha qofaynne ha oosoy Xoossafe yidaba gidiko
Acts5:40 Hawaareta soo xeegidi lisson garaafisis. Hessafe guye
Acts5:41 Yesuusa suntha gisho
Acts5:42 Enti ubba gallas Xoossa keethaninne asaa son Yesuusi I Kiristoosa gideysa tamaarsonne sabbako aggibokona.
Acts6:1 He wode kaalleyisata tayboy dari daridi bishin
Acts6:2 Tammanne nam7u hawaareti woosa keetha asa ubbaa xeegidi
Acts6:3 Hiza
Acts6:4 Shin nuuni
Acts6:5 Hawaareti odida oday asa ubba ufaysis. Hessa gisho
Acts6:6 Enta hawaareta sinthan essin
Acts6:7 Xoossaa qaalay dalgi dalgi bis. Yerusalaamen de7iya ammaneyisata tayboy dari daridi bis; daro kahinetika ammanidosona.
Acts6:8 Isxifaanosey aadho keehatethaaninne wolqan kumidi asaa giddon oorathabatanne malaatata oothees.
Acts6:9 Aylletethafe keyida ayhude woosa keetha asay Qereenapenne Iskindirepe Kilqefenne Iisepe yida issi issi asati dendidi Isxifaanosera palamidosona.
Acts6:10 Shin Isxifaanosey Ayyaana wolqan odetiya cincatethaa enti eqetanaw danda7ibookona.
Acts6:11 He wode enti
Acts6:12 Hessada oothidi biitta cimatanne higge astamaareta iya bolla denthidosona. Isxifaanose oykidi shanguwa sinthe efidosona.
Acts6:13 Iya bolla paydida wordo markati
Acts6:14 I
Acts6:15 Shango shiiqon uttida asa ubbay Isxifaanose loythidi xeelliya wode iya som7oy kiitancho som7o daanees.
Acts7:1 Kahineta halaqay Isxifaanoseko
Acts7:2 Isxifaanosey
Acts7:3 ‘Ne biittafenne ne dabotape shaaketada taani nena bessiya biitta ba’ yaagis.
Acts7:4 He wode Abrahaamey Kaldaaweta biittafe keyidi Kaaranen daanaw bis. Iya aaway hayqidaape guye Xoossay iya ha biitta ha77i hinte de7iya bessaa ehis.
Acts7:5 I ha biittafe hari attoshin tohoy yedhiya bessika Abrahaames immibeenna. Shin na7i iyaw bayna wode Xoossay ha biitta iyawunne iya sheeshas laata oothidi immanaysa qaala gelis.
Acts7:6 Xoossay Abrahaameko
Acts7:7 Shin taani ne sheesha haariya kawotethata pirdana. Hessafe guye
Acts7:8 Xoossay Abrahaame sheeshay qaxaretana mela iyara caaqin
Acts7:9 “Yayqooba nayti Yoosefa qanaatidi Gibxe biittan aylletethas bayzidosona
Acts7:10 Iya
Acts7:11 “Gibxe biittaninne Kanaane biittan ubban koshi gelidi daro asaa un7ethis. He wode nu mayzati kathi demmanaw danda7ibookona.
Acts7:12 Yayqoobi Gibxe biittan kathi de7eysa si7idi nu aawata koyro yaa yeddis.
Acts7:13 Nam7antho buussan Yoosefi ba ishatas banatetha erisis. Gibxe kawoyka Yoosefa soo asa eris.
Acts7:14 Yoosefi ba aawa Yayqoobanne ba soo asa ubbaa
Acts7:15 Yayqoobi Gibxe biitta wodhis; inne iya nayti yan hayqidosona.
Acts7:16 Enta ahay he bessaafe Seekema biitta tooketidi bidi
Acts7:17 “Shin Xoossay Abrahaames immana gidaysa poliya wodey gakanaw matida wode Gibxe biittan de7iya nu asay dari dari bis.
Acts7:18 Hessafe guye
Acts7:19 He kawoy nu kochaa genidi guutha nayti hayqana mela enta kare kessi yeggana mela nu aawata un7ethis.
Acts7:20 “He wode Musey yeletis; I Xoossaa sinthan daro lo77o na7a. Ba aawa keethan heedzu ageena gakanaw diccis.
Acts7:21 Musey wora holetida wode Gibxe kawa na7iya demma ekada ba na7a oothada iya dichasu.
Acts7:22 Musey Gibxeta cincatetha ubbaa tamaaridi odaninne ooson mino asi gidis.
Acts7:23 “Muses laythi oytama kumida wode ba ishata
Acts7:24 Isra7eeletape issuwa Gibxe issoy qohishin be7idi he Isra7eele uraa maaddidi
Acts7:25 Musey ba ishata ba baggara Xoossay ashshanaw haneysa enti akeekana gidi qopis
Acts7:26 “Wontetha gallas nam7u Isra7eele asati issoy issuwara wadhetishin demmidi enta sigethanaw koyidi
Acts7:27 “Shin ba laggiya qoheysi Museko
Acts7:28 Neeni zine Gibxe uraa wodhidaysada tanaka wodhanaw koyay?’ yaagidi Muse sugi yeddis.
Acts7:29 Musey hessa si7ida wode Gibxefe betidi Midiyaame biittan bete asi gididi de7ishe nam7u adde nayta yelis.
Acts7:30 “Godaa kiitanchoy oytamu laythafe guye
Acts7:31 Musey ba be7idaysan malaaletidi
Acts7:32 ‘Taani ne aawata
Acts7:33 “Goday Museko
Acts7:34 Taani Gibxen de7iya ta asaa un7etetha be7as. Enta waasuwa si7ada enta ashshanaw wodhas. Ha77i haaya! Taani nena Gibxe kiittana’ yaagis.
Acts7:35 “Isra7eeleti Muse
Acts7:36 He Musey Isra7eeleta Gibxefe kessidi malaalsiyabatanne oorathabata Gibxe biittaninne Zo7o Abban oothidi enta oytamu laythi mela biittan kaalethis.
Acts7:37 “Isra7eele asaako
Acts7:38 Mela biittan shiiqida Isra7eele asaara de7idaysi
Acts7:39 “Shin nu mayzati Muses kiitetanaw dosibookona; iya ixidi guye Gibxe simmanaw amotidosona.
Acts7:40 Qassi Aaronako
Acts7:41 He wode mari daanisidi eeqa oothidosona. He eeqas yarsho yarshidi banta kushen oothida oosuwan ufaytidosona.
Acts7:42 Shin Xoossay entaw zoko zaaris. Enti saluwa xoolintotas goyinnana mela enta yeggi aggis. Nabeta maxaafan
Acts7:43 Hinte
Acts7:44 “Nu aawatas mela biittan marka dunkaaney de7ees. Iyaka Xoossay Muse kiittidaysadanne iya bessidaysada oothis.
Acts7:45 Qassi nu aawati he dunkaaniya banta aawatape ekidi Xoossay kase goodida Ayhude gidonna asaa biitta oykida wode Iyyasura yaa ekidi gelidosona. He dunkaaney Dawita wode gakanawuka he bessan de7is.
Acts7:46 Dawiti Xoossan sabetis. Qassi Yayqooba Goday de7ana keethaa keexanaw Xoossaa woossis.
Acts7:47 Shin iyaw keethaa keexiday Solomone.
Acts7:48 “Hanoshin
Acts7:49 “ ‘Saloy ta araata
Acts7:50 Ha ubbaa ta kushen oothabikina?’ yaagees Goday.
Acts7:51 “Hinte waanida si7onna asee? Hinte wozanay Xoossaa qaala ekanaw ayis ixidee? Hinte haythay ayis tullidee? Hinte
Acts7:52 Nabeta giddofe hinte aawati gooddonay oonee? Xoossaa Na7ay
Acts7:53 Hinte kiitanchuwa kushepe Xoossa higgiya ekideta
Acts7:54 Enti hessa si7ida wode banta wozanan Isxifaanose bolla daro yilotidi
Acts7:55 Shin Isxifaanosey Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi
Acts7:56 “Heko
Acts7:57 Qaala dhoqu oothidi waassishe
Acts7:58 Iya katamaape gaxa kessidi
Acts7:59 Isxifaanosey
Acts7:60 Gulbatidi
Acts8:1 Saa7oli Isxifaanose hayquwan ufaytis. He gallas Yerusalaamen de7iya woosa keethan gita goodi dendis. Hawaareti attishin
Acts8:2 Issi issi Xoossa asati Isxifaanose moogidosona; qassi iyaw daro yeekidosona.
Acts8:3 Shin Saa7oli woosa keetha dhaysanaw koyees. Soo soo yuuyi gelidi
Acts8:4 Laaletida ammaneysati bida bessa ubban qaala odidosona.
Acts8:5 Filphoosi Samaare katama bidi Kiristoosaba asaas odis.
Acts8:6 Daro asay Filphoosi odidaysa si7ida wodenne I oothiya malaatata be7ida wode iya akeekidi si7idosona.
Acts8:7 Tuna ayyaanati waassidi daro asaape keyidosona; qassi daro gundatinne wobbeti biletidosona.
Acts8:8 He kataman de7iya asay daro ufaytidosona.
Acts8:9 Shin Simoona geetetiya issi uray he kataman de7ees. I
Acts8:10 Guuthafe gita gakanaw de7iya asa ubbay
Acts8:11 Daro wodepe doomidi marotishe Samaare asa malaalsida gisho asay iyabaa si7oosona.
Acts8:12 Shin Filphoosi Xoossaa kawotethabanne Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthaba addetasinne maccatas odin
Acts8:13 Qassi Simoonika ba huuphen ammanidi xammaqetis. Filphoosara issife bida bessa ubban oosetiya gita malaatata be7idi malaaletis.
Acts8:14 Yerusalaamen de7iya hawaareti Samaare asay Xoossaa qaala ekidaysa si7ida wode Phexroosanne Yohaanisa entako yeddidosona.
Acts8:15 Phexroosinne Yohaanisi bidi
Acts8:16 Ayis giiko
Acts8:17 He wode Phexroosinne Yohaanisi banta kushe enta bolla wothin
Acts8:18 Hawaareti banta kushe enta bolla wothin
Acts8:19 “Taanika ta kushe wothiya ubbay Geeshsha Ayyaana ekana mela ha maata taw immerketi” yaagis.
Acts8:20 Shin Phexroosi iyako
Acts8:21 Ne wozanay Xoossaa sinthan suure gidonna gisho
Acts8:22 Hiza
Acts8:23 Gaasoyka
Acts8:24 Simooni zaaridi
Acts8:25 Phexroosinne Yohaanisi markatidaapenne Godaa qaala odidaape guye Yerusalaame simmidosona. Samaaren de7iya daro gutatan wongela odidosona.
Acts8:26 Godaa kiitanchoy Filphoosako
Acts8:27 Filphoosi dendidi bis. Hindeke geetetiya Tophe kawees I miishe ubba naagiya Tophe asi de7ees. Ika goyinnanaw Yerusalaame bis.
Acts8:28 Para gaaren uttidi
Acts8:29 Geeshsha Ayyaanay Filphoosako
Acts8:30 Yaatin Filphoosi woxi bidi gakiya wode moorinnay nabiya Isayaasa maxaafape nabbabishin si7idi
Acts8:31 Moorinnay
Acts8:32 Moorinnay nabbabiya maxaafa kifiley
Acts8:33 I kawuyis; iyaw xillo pirdi dhayis; iya de7oy ha sa7ape qanxetida gisho
Acts8:34 Moorinnay zaaridi Filphoosako
Acts8:35 Filphoosi
Acts8:36 Enti bishe haathi de7iyaso gakidosona. Moorinnay
Acts8:37 Filphoosi iyako
Acts8:38 Gaarey eqana mela moorinnay kiittin
Acts8:39 Enti haathaafe gaxa keyida wode Godaa ayyaanay Filphoosa qoponna ekis. Nam7antho moorinnay Filphoosa be7ibeenna
Acts8:40 Filphoosi Azaxoonan bana demmis. Qassi Qisaare yaana gakanaw katamatan yuuyidi wongela markatis.
Acts9:1 He wode Saa7oli Godaa kaalleyisata wodhanaw mandidi kahine halaqaako bis.
Acts9:2 Godaa ogiya kaalliya addenne macca demmiko
Acts9:3 I bidi
Acts9:4 I sa7an kundidashin
Acts9:5 Saa7oli
Acts9:6 Shin Saa7oli kokorishenne malaaletishe
Acts9:7 Saa7olara oge biya asati aykoka odetonna eqi attidosona. Qaala si7oosona
Acts9:8 Saa7oli kundida bessaafe dendidi xeelliya wode iya ayfey demmonna ixis. Hessa gisho
Acts9:9 Heedzu gallas gakanaw I xeellanaw danda7ibeenna; aykoka mibeenna; uybeenna.
Acts9:10 Damasqon issi Hananiya geetetiya Yesuusa tamaarey de7ees. Goday qoncethan
Acts9:11 Goday iyako
Acts9:12 Qassi Hananiya geetetiya addey gelidi
Acts9:13 Hanaani zaaridi
Acts9:14 Qassi Damasqon ne sunthaa xeegeyisata ubba qachanaw
Acts9:15 Shin Goday iyako
Acts9:16 Ayis giiko
Acts9:17 Hanaani bidi
Acts9:18 Ellesidi
Acts9:19 Kathi midi xaalidi
Acts9:20 Ellesidi Saa7oli
Acts9:21 Hessa si7ida ubbay malaaletidi
Acts9:22 Shin Saa7oli qaala odon minni minnidi bis. Yesuusi
Acts9:23 Daro gallasape guye
Acts9:24 Shin Ayhudeti bana wodhanaw qopidaysa Saa7oli si7is. Enti iya wodhanaw qammanne gallas katama pengen naagoosona.
Acts9:25 Shin iya tamaareti iya qamma efidi
Acts9:26 Saa7oli Yerusalaame gakida wode ammaneysatara gahetanaw koyis. Shin I Kiristoosa ammanidaysi entaw tuma daanonna ixin iyaw yayyidosona.
Acts9:27 Shin Barnabaasi Saa7ola hawaaretako efis. Ogen Goday waanidi qoncidaakonne odisidaako
Acts9:28 Saa7oli Yerusalaamen yuuyidi Godaa sunthan yayyonna qaala odishe
Acts9:29 Qassi Saa7oli Girike doonan haasaya Ayhudetara odetishe palamees. Shin enti iya wodhanaw koydosona.
Acts9:30 Ammaniya asati hessa si7idi
Acts9:31 Yihudan
Acts9:32 Phexroosi biitta ubba yuuyishe Liiden de7iya ammaniya asatako gakis.
Acts9:33 Yan hospun laythi kumethi gundidi arsan zin7idi de7iya Eniya geetetiya addiya demmis.
Acts9:34 Phexroosi
Acts9:35 Liideninne Saaronan de7iya asa ubbay Eniya be7idi
Acts9:36 Yoophe kataman issi Xaabito geetetiya ammaniyara de7awusu. I sunthay Aramike doonan
Acts9:37 He wode iya hargada hayqin
Acts9:38 Liidey Yoophes mata. Ammaneysati Phexroosi Liiden de7eysa si7idi
Acts9:39 Hessa gisho
Acts9:40 Phexroosi enta ubbaa kare kessidi
Acts9:41 Phexroosi iyo ba kushen maaddidi denthidi essis. Hessafe guye
Acts9:42 Ha oday
Acts9:43 Phexroosi Yoophen Simoona geetetiya galba haasheysa son daro gallas gam7is.
Acts10:1 Qisaaren
Acts10:2 Qorneliyoosi ba soo asaara Xoossaa minthi ammaniya asinne Xoossaa goyinniya asi. Ayhude manqotaka daro maaddees
Acts10:3 Issi gallas uddufun saate heeran Xoossaa kiitanchoy iyako yidi
Acts10:4 Qorneliyoosi dagammidi kiitanchuwa tishshi oothi xeellidi
Acts10:5 Ha77i Yoophe ase kiittada
Acts10:6 Phexroosi abba doonan galba haashiya Simoona son imathatethi siiratis” yaagis.
Acts10:7 Qorneliyoosi baw odida kiitanchoy bin
Acts10:8 entaw ubbaba odidi Yoophe kiittis.
Acts10:9 Wontetha gallas enti bidi
Acts10:10 I koshatidi kathi maanaw koyis
Acts10:11 Saloy dooyetin
Acts10:12 Iyan oyddu tohora de7iya meheti
Acts10:13 He wode
Acts10:14 Shin Phexroosi
Acts10:15 Qassi
Acts10:16 Hessika
Acts10:17 Phexroosi ba be7ida qoncethaa birshethay
Acts10:18 Banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Acts10:19 Phexroosi qoncethan be7idaba qofa bolla de7ishin
Acts10:20 Dendada wodha
Acts10:21 Phexroosi asatako wodhidi
Acts10:22 Enti zaaridi
Acts10:23 Phexroosi asata soo gelsidi mokis. Wontetha gallas
Acts10:24 Wontetha gallas
Acts10:25 Phexroosi soo gelana hanishin
Acts10:26 Shin Phexroosi
Acts10:27 Phexroosi Qorneliyoosara odetishe soo geliya wode daro asay shiiqidaysa demmis.
Acts10:28 I asaako
Acts10:29 Hessa gisho
Acts10:30 Qorneliyoosi
Acts10:31 I taako
Acts10:32 Hiza
Acts10:33 Hessa gisho
Acts10:34 Kaallidika
Acts10:35 Shin ase ubbaa oona gidikoka baw yayyeysanne xillo ooso ootheysan Xoossay ufayteysa taani tuma akeekas.
Acts10:36 Xoossay
Acts10:37 Yohaanisi xinqateba Galilan sabbakida wodiyape doomidi Yihuda biitta ubbaa gakanaw hanidaba hinte ereeta.
Acts10:38 Xoossay Naazirete Yesuusas Geeshsha Ayyaananne wolqaa immis. Xoossay iyara de7iya gisho lo77oba I oothishe Xalahe kushen haaretida ubbaa pathishe yuuyis.
Acts10:39 “Ayhude biittaninne Yerusalaamen I oothida ubbabaas nuuni markata. Enti masqaliya bolla kaqidi iya wodhidosona.
Acts10:40 Shin Xoossay heedzantho gallasan hayqope iya denthidi asaas qoncana mela oothis.
Acts10:41 He qoncethay Xoossay koyro doorida markatasafe attishin
Acts10:42 Xoossay Wongela asaas nuuni odana melanne paxa de7eyisata bollanne hayqidaysata bolla pirdanaw shuumetiday Yesuusa gideysa markatana mela nuna kiittis.
Acts10:43 Xoossay iya ammaniya ubbaa nagaray
Acts10:44 Phexroosi buroo he oda ongonnashin qaala si7iya ubbaa bolla Geeshsha Ayyaanay wodhis.
Acts10:45 Phexroosara Yoophefe yida ammaniya qaxaretida Ayhude ubbay
Acts10:46 Gaasoyka
Acts10:47 “Haysati qassi nu mela Geeshsha Ayyaana ekidaysati xammaqetonna mela haathe digganay oonee?” yaagis.
Acts10:48 Enti Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan xammaqetana mela enta kiittis. Hessafe guye
Acts11:1 Hawaaretinne Yihuda ubban de7iya ammaneysati
Acts11:2 Phexroosi Yerusalaame bida wode qaxaretida ammaneysati
Acts11:3 iyako
Acts11:4 Shin Phexroosi hanidaba koyrope doomidi maaran maaran odis:
Acts11:5 “Taani Yoophe kataman Xoossaa woossashe qoncethi be7as. Gita afila daaniyabay oyddu baggara oyketidi salope wodhishe taako yis.
Acts11:6 Taani tishshi ootha iya giddo xeelliya wode oyddu tohora de7iya meheta
Acts11:7 ‘Phexroosaa
Acts11:8 “Shin taani
Acts11:9 “ ‘Xoossay geeshshidaysa neeni tuna goopa’ giya qaalay nam7antho salope yis.
Acts11:10 “Hessi heedzu toho hanin
Acts11:11 He saatenka heedzu asati Qisaarepe taako kiitetidi taani de7iya keetha gaki aggidosona.
Acts11:12 Sidhonna entara bana mela Ayyaanay taw odis. Qassi ha usupun ishati Yoophefe taara Qisaare bidaysatara Qorneliyoosa soo gelida.
Acts11:13 Kiitanchoy iya son eqidi
Acts11:14 Nenanne ne soo asa ubbaa ashshiya qaala I new odana’ gidaysa Qorneliyoos nuus odis.
Acts11:15 “Taani haasaya doomiya wode Geeshsha Ayyaanay koyro nu bolla wodhidaysada enta bollaka wodhi aggis.
Acts11:16 He wode
Acts11:17 Xoossay nuus Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa ammanidaysatas immida imota Ayhude gidonaysataska immiko
Acts11:18 Enti hessa si7ida wode banta palama aggidi
Acts11:19 Isxifaanose hayqos gathida goodda gaason laaletida ammaneysati qaala Ayhudeta xalaalas odishe Sirofinqe
Acts11:20 Shin Qophiroosapenne Qereenape yida issi issi ammaniya asati Anxooke bidi
Acts11:21 Godaa wolqay entara de7ees; qassi daro asay ammanidi Godaako simmidosona.
Acts11:22 He odaa Yerusalaamen de7iya woosa keethay si7ida gisho Barnabaasa Anxooke kiittis.
Acts11:23 Barnabaasi Anxooke bida wode Xoossaa aadho keehatetha oosuwa be7idi ufaytis. Enti ubbay banta kumetha wozanan Godan minnidi daana mela enta zoris.
Acts11:24 Barnabaasi Geeshsha Ayyaanaynne ammanoy kumida lo77o asi gidiya gisho daro asay Godaa ammanidosona.
Acts11:25 Hessafe guye
Acts11:26 Yan Saa7ola demmida wode Anxooke ekidi yis. Barnabaasinne Saa7oli woosa keetha asaara laythi kumethi uttidi daro asaa tamaarsidosona. Ammaneysati Anxooken “Kiristaane” geetetidi koyro xeegetidosona.
Acts11:27 He wode issi issi nabeti Yerusalaamepe Anxooke wodhidosona.
Acts11:28 Enta giddofe Agaboosa geysi dendidi biitta ubban gita koshi keyanaysa Ayyaana wolqan tinbite odis. Hessi haniday Roome Kawa Qalawudiyoosa wodena.
Acts11:29 Ammaneysati huuphen huuphen banta wolqaa mela miishe kessidi Yihudan de7iya ammaneysatas maade yeddanaw qofa qachidosona.
Acts11:30 Enti hessada oothidi
Acts12:1 He wode Kawoy Herodiisi woosa keetha asaape baggaa goodda doomis.
Acts12:2 Yohaanisa ishaa Yayqooba mashshan wodhisis.
Acts12:3 Hessi Ayhudeta ufaysidaysa be7idi
Acts12:4 Phexroosa oykidi qachis. Paasika bonchiya gallasatape guye deriya sinthe aathanaw qopidi
Acts12:5 Hessa gisho
Acts12:6 Herodiisi Phexroosa asaa sinthe shiishanaape kase qamma Phexroosi nam7u baggara nam7u wotaadaretara santhalaatan qashetidi enta giddon dhiskis. Naageysati qasho keethaa pengetan eqidi naagoosona.
Acts12:7 Akeekona de7ishin Godaa kiitanchoy qoncis. Qasho keethan poo7oy poo7is. Kiitanchoy Phexroosa miya bochi barkisidi
Acts12:8 Kiitanchoy iyako
Acts12:9 Phexroosi qasho keethafe keyidi kiitanchuwa kaallis. Iyaw qoncethi be7iyaba daanisipe attishin
Acts12:10 Kiitanchoynne Phexroosi koyruwanne nam7antho wotaadariya aadhidi katamaa efiya birata pengiyako gakidosona. Pengey entaw barka dooyeti aggis. Enti keyidi issi ogiyara bishin kiitanchoy akeekona Phexroosape shaaketi aggis.
Acts12:11 Phexroosas wozani simmin
Acts12:12 I hessa akeekida wode daro asay issife shiiqidi Xoossaa woossiya bessaa
Acts12:13 Yan karen eqidi xeegis. Issi Rooda geetetiya oosanchiya pengiya dooyanaw yasu.
Acts12:14 Rooda Phexroosa qaala gididaysa erida wode ufaysan kumada kariya dooyenna guye woxa bada
Acts12:15 Asay iiko
Acts12:16 Shin Phexroosi karen eqidi xeegidi aggonna ixin asay kariya dooyidi iya be7idi malaaletidosona.
Acts12:17 Shin enti si77i gaana mela Phexroosi ba kushiyan mallidi Goday qasho keethafe iya waati kessidaako entaw qoncisi odidi
Acts12:18 Sa7ay wontiya wode
Acts12:19 Herodiisi Phexroosa koyisin
Acts12:20 Herodiisi Xiroosa asa bollanne Sidoona asaa bolla daro hanqetis. Enta biittay kathi Herodiisa biittafe demmiya gisho enti issife gididi iya Moorinna Bilasxoosa bantaw cima oothidi giiganaw Herodiisako bidosona.
Acts12:21 Herodiisi bareda gallasan ba kawotethaa afilaa ma7idi
Acts12:22 Asay
Acts12:23 Herodiisi Xoossaa bonchiboona gisho iiraka Godaa kiitanchoy iya dechin guxunen meetetidi hayqis.
Acts12:24 Shin Xoossaa qaalay diccishenne dalgishe bees.
Acts12:25 Barnabaasinne Saa7oli banta oosuwa polidi Marqoosa geetetiya Yohaanisa bantara ekidi Yerusalaamepe simmidosona.
Acts13:1 Anxooken de7iya woosa keethan nabetinne astamaareti de7oosona. Enti Barnabaasa
Acts13:2 Enti Godaa goyinnishininne xoomishin Geeshsha Ayyaanay
Acts13:3 Hessa gisho
Acts13:4 Hessa gisho
Acts13:5 Enti Silmana gakidi ayhude woosa keethatan Xoossaa qaala odidosona. Yohaanisi maaddishe entara de7ees.
Acts13:6 Enti yuushoy abban teqetida biitta
Acts13:7 He maroy deriya aysiya Sargiyoos Phawuloosa geetetiya akeekancho addiyara de7ees. Sargiyoos Phawuloosi Barnabaasanne Saa7ola baako xeegidi Xoossaa qaala si7anaw koyis.
Acts13:8 Shin Girike doonan maruwa sunthay “Elmaasa” geetetees. I deriya haareysi ammanonna mela digganaw koyidi Barnabaasaranne Phawuloosara eqetis.
Acts13:9 Shin Phawuloosa geetetiya Saa7oli Geeshsha Ayyaanan kumidi maruwa caddi xeellidi
Acts13:10 “La
Acts13:11 Heko
Acts13:12 Deriya ayseysi hessa be7ida wode Godaaba tamaarsiya timirtiyan malaaletidi ammanis.
Acts13:13 Phawuloosinne iyara de7eysati Phaafupe dendidi
Acts13:14 Shin enti Phargefe aadhidi Phisden de7iya Anxooke gakidosona. Sambaata gallas ayhude woosa keethi gelidi uttidosona.
Acts13:15 Muse higgeynne nabeta maxaafay nabbabetidaape guye ayhude woosa keetha halaqati
Acts13:16 Phawuloosi dendi eqidi ba kushe mallidi
Acts13:17 Ha Isra7eele asaa Xoossay nu mayzata dooris. Gibxe biittan imathatethan enti de7ishin
Acts13:18 Mela biittan oytamu laytha mela enta danda7is.
Acts13:19 Kanaane biittan Ayhude gidonna laapun kawotethata diggidi enta biitta ba asaa laatisis.
Acts13:20 “Hessafe guye
Acts13:21 Hessafe guye
Acts13:22 Xoossay Saa7ola shaaridaape guye enta bolla Dawita kawothis. Xoossay Dawitaba markatishe
Acts13:23 “Xoossay
Acts13:24 Yesuusi yaanape sinthe Isra7eele asa ubbay banta nagaraape simmidi xammaqetana mela Yohaanisi qaala odis.
Acts13:25 Qassi Yohaanisi ba oosuwa wursana hanishe asaako
Acts13:26 “Ta Ishato
Acts13:27 Ayis giiko
Acts13:28 Yesuusa wodhisanaw issi gaasoyka entaw dhayin Philaxoosi iya wodhana mela woossidosona.
Acts13:29 Enti Yesuusabay Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetidaba ubba polida wode masqaliyape iya wodhisidi moogidosona.
Acts13:30 Shin Xoossay hayqope Yesuusa denthis.
Acts13:31 Hessafe guye
Acts13:32 “Xoossay nu aawatas immana gida Wongela nuuni hintew odoos.
Acts13:33 Dawiti ba Mazmure Maxaafan nam7antho shempuwan
Acts13:34 I wooqonna mela Xoossay hayqope iya denthon erisanaw
Acts13:35 Hessa gisho
Acts13:36 “Dawiti ba wode Xoossaa qofaa polidaape guye hayqidi ba aawatara moogetidi wooqis.
Acts13:37 Shin Xoossay hayqope denthidaysi wooqibeenna.
Acts13:38 “Hessa gisho
Acts13:39 Shin Yesuusa ammaniya ubbay nagaraape xillees.
Acts13:40 Hessa gisho
Acts13:41 “ ‘Xoossay gidaba leqiseysato! Be7ite! Malaaletite! Dhayite! oonika odin
Acts13:42 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi Ayhude Woosa keethafe keyishin
Acts13:43 Shiiqoy laaletidaape guye
Acts13:44 Kaalliya Sambaatan kataman de7iya asaape daroti Xoossaa qaala si7anaw shiiqidosona.
Acts13:45 Shin Ayhudeti daro asaa be7ida wode Phawuloosa qanaatidi iya haasaya ixidi iya cayidosona.
Acts13:46 Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi yayyonna
Acts13:47 Gaasoyka Goday
Acts13:48 Ayhude gidonnaysati hessa si7ida wode ufaytidi Xoossaa qaala bonchidosona. Qassi merinaa de7uwas dooretida ubbay ammanidosona.
Acts13:49 Godaa qaalay he biitta ubbaa gakis.
Acts13:50 Shin Ayhudeti
Acts13:51 Shin Phawuloosaranne Barnabaasara ixeysatas malla gidana mela banta tohuwape baana pitidi Iqoniyoone katama bidosona.
Acts13:52 Qassi Anxooken de7iya ammaneysati Geeshsha Ayyaananinne ufaysan kumidosona.
Acts14:1 Kaseysadaka
Acts14:2 Shin ammanibona Ayhudeti
Acts14:3 Hawaareti yan daro wodiya gam7idosona. Enti yayyonna Godaaba odidosona. Goday malaatatanne oorathaba enti oothana mela entaw maata immidi
Acts14:4 Shin he katama asay shaaketidi
Acts14:5 Ayhude gidonaysatinne Ayhudeti banta halaqatara issife gididi hawaareta qohanawunne shuchan caddanaw koydosona.
Acts14:6 Hawaareti hessa eridi
Acts14:7 Yan Wongela odidosona.
Acts14:8 Yeletoosape doomidi nam7u tohoy wobbin hemeti eronna issi addey Lisxiran de7ees.
Acts14:9 He addey Phawuloosi odishin uttidi si7ees. Phawuloosi iya tishshi oothi xeelliya wode paxanaw iyaw ammanoy de7eysa be7idi
Acts14:10 ba qaala dhoqu oothidi
Acts14:11 Phawuloosi oothidaysa asay be7idi banta qaala dhoqu oothidi Liqa7oona doonan
Acts14:12 Barnabaasa
Acts14:13 Katamaape gaxan de7iya eeqa Diya keethaa kahineynne asay kormatanne alleeqo ciishshata hawaaretas yarshanaw koyidi katamaa penge ehidosona.
Acts14:14 Shin Barnabaasinne Phawuloosi hessa si7ida wode enti oothanaw qopidaysa ixidi
Acts14:15 banta qaala dhoqu oothidi
Acts14:16 I
Acts14:17 Shin ira saluwape bukisis
Acts14:18 Hawaareti hessa gidi
Acts14:19 Anxookepenne Iqoniyoonepe yida Ayhudeti
Acts14:20 Shin ammaneysati yidi
Acts14:21 Enti Darbe kataman Wongela odidi darota ammanthidaape guye Lisxira
Acts14:22 Yan ammaneyisata minthethishenne enti ammanon minnidi de7ana mela zorishe
Acts14:23 Qassi woosa keethatas huuphen huuphen cimata dooridosona. Xoomidaapenne woossidaape guye enti ammanida Godaas enta hadara immidosona.
Acts14:24 Phisde biitta kanthi aadhidi Phinfile bidosona.
Acts14:25 Phergen qaala odidaape guye Axaale bidosona.
Acts14:26 Banta oosuwa polidaape guye
Acts14:27 Anxooke gakida wode woosa keethaa asaa shiishidi Xoossay entara oothida oosuwa ubbaanne Ayhude gidonna asay ammanana mela entaw waati penge dooyidaako odidosona.
Acts14:28 Hessan ammaneysatara daro wode gam7idosona.
Acts15:1 Issi issi asati Yihudape Anxooke bidi
Acts15:2 Hessi Phawuloosanne Barnabaasa entara daro palamanadanne kaccanaada oothis. Hessa gisho
Acts15:3 Woosa keethay enta kiittin bidosona. Enti Sirofinqe Samaarera aadhishe Ayhude gidonnaysati Xoossako waanidi simmidaako odidosona. Hessi ammaneyisata ubbaa daro ufaysis.
Acts15:4 Enti Yerusalaame gakida wode woosa keethay
Acts15:5 Shin Farsaaweta baggafe ammanida issi issi asati dendi eqidi
Acts15:6 Hawaaretinne cimati hessa zorettanaw shiiqidosona.
Acts15:7 Daro zoretidaape guye
Acts15:8 Asa wozana eriya Xoossay Geeshsha Ayyaana nuus immidaysada entawuka immidi tumayis.
Acts15:9 Ammanon enta wozana geeshshida gisho nu giddoninne enta giddon dummatethi wothibeenna.
Acts15:10 Hessa gisho
Acts15:11 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethan enti attidaysada nuka attidaysa ammanoos” yaagis.
Acts15:12 Asay si77i gidi
Acts15:13 Enti haasaya ongidaape guye Yayqoobi
Acts15:14 Xoossay Ayhude gidonnayisata giddofe ba ase dooranaw koyidi entana koyro waatidi qopidaako Simooni odis.
Acts15:15 Nabeta qaalay haysara issino. Geeshsha Maxaafan
Acts15:16 “ ‘Haysafe guye
Acts15:17 Attida asa ubbay taako yaana
Acts15:18 Benipe doomada hessi eretana mela oothida Xoossay
Acts15:19 “Hessa gisho
Acts15:20 Shin enti eeqas yarshetidi tunidaba moonna mela
Acts15:21 Muse higgey benipe doomidi Sambaatan Sambaatan ayhude woosa keethatan nabbabetishe katama ubban sabbaketees” yaagis.
Acts15:22 Hessafe guye
Acts15:23 Haysada geetetidi xaafetida dabdaabe enta bolla yeddidosona: “Nuuni hawaaretinne cimati hinte ishati
Acts15:24 “Nuuni kiittonna asati nu giddofe bidi
Acts15:25 Nuuni dosiya Barnabaasanne Phawuloosa dooretida asatara issife hinteko kiittanaw issi wozanan nu qofaa qachida.
Acts15:26 Enti nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa gisho banta de7uwa aathidi immidosona.
Acts15:27 Hessa gisho
Acts15:28 “Ha koshsheysatape attishin
Acts15:29 Eeqas yarshetidi tunidaba moopite
Acts15:30 Hessa gisho
Acts15:31 Enti he minthethiya dabdaabiya nabbabida wode ufaytidosona.
Acts15:32 Qassi Yihudinne Sillaasey banta huuphen nabe gidiya gisho ammaneyisata loythi zoridi minthethidosona.
Acts15:33 Enti Anxooken guutha gallas uttidaape guye ishati lo77ora moyzin bantana kiitidaysatako simmidosona.
Acts15:34 [Shin Sillaasey yan attanaw koyis].
Acts15:35 Qassi Phawuloosinne Barnabaasi hara daro asatara issife Godaa qaala tamaarsishenne wongelaa odishe Anxooken gam7idosona.
Acts15:36 Guutha gallasape guye Phawuloosi Barnabaasako
Acts15:37 Barnabaasi Marqoosa geetetiya Yohaanisa bantara efanaw koyis.
Acts15:38 Shin Phawuloosi Marqoosa bantara efanaw koybeenna. Gaasoyka
Acts15:39 Enta giddon iita ooshshi keyin issoy issuwafe shaaketidosona. Barnabaasi Marqoosa ekidi markabera Qophiroosa bis.
Acts15:40 Shin Phawuloosi Sillaase dooris; ammaneysati Phawuloosa Xoossa aadho keehatethas hadara immidaape guye
Acts15:41 Yaatidi
Acts16:1 Phawuloosi Darbenne Lisxira bis. Yan Ximotiyoosa geetetiya ammaniya asi de7ees. Iya aayiya ammaniya Ayhude maccasi
Acts16:2 Lisxiraninne Iqoniyoonen de7iya ammaneysati Ximotiyoosaba loythidi markatidosona.
Acts16:3 Phawuloosi Ximotiyoosa baara efanaw koydi
Acts16:4 Enti katamatara bishe Yerusalaamen de7iya hawaaretinne cimati wothida higgiya ammaneysati naagana mela entaw odishe aadhidosona.
Acts16:5 Hessa gisho
Acts16:6 Iisen qaala odonna mela Geeshsha Ayyaanay enta diggida gisho
Acts16:7 Enti Miise zawa gakida wode Bitaane baanaw koydosona. Shin Yesuusa Ayyaanay enta diggis.
Acts16:8 Hessa gisho
Acts16:9 Phawuloosi qamma qoncethan issi Maqedoone asi baako
Acts16:10 Qoncethaa I be7idaape guye ellesidi nuuni Maqedoone baanaw koyda. Ayis giiko
Acts16:11 Xiro7aadape dendidi markaben gelidi Samotiraaqe bida
Acts16:12 Yaape dendidi Maqedoone biittan de7iya Filphisiyuusa katama bida. Filphisiyuusi Roome asay de7iya katama. Nuuni he kataman guutha gallas uttida.
Acts16:13 Sambaata gallas katamaape gaxan Shaafa doonan Ayhudeti Xoossaa woossiya bessi de7eysa eridi yaa bida. He bessan shiiqida maccasaas qaala odida.
Acts16:14 Nuna si7iya asape issi Liidiya geetetiya Tiyatroona katamaape yida
Acts16:15 Liidiya ba soo asaara issife xammaqetidaape guye nuuko
Acts16:16 Nuuni Xoossaa woossiya bessaa bishin iita ayyaanay I bolla de7idi marothiya issi geela7o gadhindoy nuura gahetasu. Iya kaayada daro miishe ba godatas ehawusu.
Acts16:17 Phawuloosanne nuna kaallada
Acts16:18 Ubba gallas hessada gawusu. Shin Phawuloosi yilotidi guye simmidi
Acts16:19 Shin I godati bantaw miishe demmiya ogey dhayidaysa be7idi
Acts16:20 Daynnata sinthe enta efidi
Acts16:21 Nuuni Roome biitta asi gidishe ekanawunne oothanaw woga gidonnaba tamaarsoosona” yaagidosona.
Acts16:22 Asay issi bagga gididi
Acts16:23 Enta daro wadhidaape guye
Acts16:24 Qasho keethaa naageysi he kiita ekidi
Acts16:25 Shin giddi bilahe gidiya wode Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera woossishenne mazmure yexishe Xoossaa galatoosona. Qasho keethan de7iya hara asatika enti giyaba si7oosona.
Acts16:26 Qoponna qasho keetha baasoy qaaxana gakanaw biitta qaaxoy hanis. He saatenka penge ubbay dooyetis; qashetida asa ubbaa santhalaatay birsheti wodhis.
Acts16:27 Qasho keethaa naageysi dhiskofe barkida wode qasho keethaa penge ubbay dooyetidaysa be7idi qasho asay kessi eki bidaba daanin bana wodhanaw mashshe ekis.
Acts16:28 Shin Phawuloosi qaala dhoqu oothidi “Nu ubbay haysan de7iya gisho neeni nena qohopa” yaagis.
Acts16:29 Qasho keethaa naageysi xompe woossi ekidi ellesidi gaathi woxis. Kokorishe Phawuloosa sinthaninne Sillaase sinthan gufannis.
Acts16:30 Enta kare kessidi
Acts16:31 Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera iyako
Acts16:32 Enti iyasinne iya son de7iya ubbaas Godaa qaala odidosona.
Acts16:33 Qamma he saatenka qasho keetha naageysi enta efidi enta madunthaa meeccis. Ellesidi ba soo asa ubbaara xammaqetis.
Acts16:34 Phawuloosanne Sillaase ba soo efidi entaw kathi aathis. I ba soo asa ubbaara Xoossa ammanida gisho ufaytis.
Acts16:35 Sa7i wontin daynnati
Acts16:36 Qasho keetha naageysi
Acts16:37 Shin Phawuloosi
Acts16:38 Wotaadare halaqati daynnatas hessa odin
Acts16:39 Hessa gisho
Acts16:40 Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera qasho keethafe keyidi Liidiya soo bidosona. Yan ammaneysatara gaketidi enta minthethidi keydi bidosona.
Acts17:1 Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera Amfipholisaranne Apholonara aadhidi Teselonqe bidosona. Yan ayhude woosa keethi de7ees.
Acts17:2 Phawuloosi kaseysada yaa gelis. Hessan heedzu saaminta Xoossaa qaalape asaas odis.
Acts17:3 Kiristoosi waaye ekanawunne hayqope dendanaw besseysa entaw qoncisidi odishe
Acts17:4 Entafe issoti issoti oday tuma gideysa ma7idi Phawuloosaranne Sillaasera issifidosona. Hessadaka
Acts17:5 Shin Ayhudeti qanaatidi issi issi oosoy bayna iita asata ogepe shiishidosona. Kataman buqethi kessidosona; Phawuloosanne Sillaase asaas aathidi immanaw koydi Yaasona keethaa teqidosona.
Acts17:6 Phawuloosinne Sillaasey entaw bentonna ixin
Acts17:7 Yaasoni enta ba son wothis. Haysati
Acts17:8 Shiiqida asaynne katama halaqati hessa si7idi hananaba dhaydosona.
Acts17:9 Halaqati Yaasonanne harata waasera billidosona.
Acts17:10 Ammaneysati Phawuloosanne Sillaase qammara Beeriya yeddidosona. Beeriya gakidi
Acts17:11 Beeriya asay Teselonqe asaape aadhida suureta. Enti qaala kumetha wozanape ekidosona; Phawuloosi gidaysi tuma gideysa shaaki eranaw gallas gallas Geeshsha Maxaafata pilgoosona.
Acts17:12 Hessa gisho
Acts17:13 Shin Teselonqen de7iya Ayhudeti Phawuloosi Xoossaa qaala Beeriyanka odidaysa si7ida wode Beeriya yidi asaa buqidosona.
Acts17:14 Hessafe guye
Acts17:15 Phawuloosa moyzida asati Ateena gathidosona. He asati Sillaaseynne Ximotiyoosi bantaw danda7etida mela ellesidi baako yaana mela Phawuloosi kiitida kiita ekidi Beeriya simmidosona.
Acts17:16 Phawuloosi Ateenan Sillaasenne Ximotiyoosa naagishe
Acts17:17 Hessa gisho
Acts17:18 Epiqoroosenne Istoyke geetetiya cugatape issi issi eranchoti Phawuloosara palamidosona. Entafe issoti issoti
Acts17:19 Phawuloosa oykidi Ariyospagoosa geetetiya shiiqo bessaa efidi
Acts17:20 Ayis giiko
Acts17:21 Ateena asa ubbaynne yan de7iya imatha asay oorathaba odetonanne si7onna pee7okona.
Acts17:22 Phawuloosi Ariyospagoosa sinthan eqidi
Acts17:23 Taani hinte katamaara yuuyashe hinte goyinniya bessata be7iya wode
Acts17:24 Sa7anne sa7an de7iya ubbaba medhida Xoossay
Acts17:25 I de7o
Acts17:26 Xoossay asa koche ubbaa issi addiyafe medhidi biitta ubban wothis. Yaatidi enti daana wodiyasinne bessaas zawa immis.
Acts17:27 I hessa oothiday asi iya koyana melanne pilgidi demmana melasa. Hanikoka I nuupe geemmibeenna.
Acts17:28 Hintefe issi issi yexeysati
Acts17:29 Hiza
Acts17:30 Hessa gisho
Acts17:31 Ayis giiko
Acts17:32 Entafe issi issi asati hayqope dendoba Phawuloosape si7idi
Acts17:33 Hessa gisho
Acts17:34 Shin issi issi addeti Phawuloosara gaketidi ammanidosona. Enta giddofe Ariyospagoosan shiiquwan de7iya Diyonasiyoosa geetetiya addey
Acts18:1 Hessafe guye
Acts18:2 Yan Phanxoosan yeletida issi Ayhude addiya Aqila demmis. Ayhude asa ubbay Roomepe keyana mela kawoy Qalawudiyoosi kiitida gisho guutha wodepe kase I ba mache Phirisqillara Xaalepe yis. Phawuloosi entara gahetanaw bis.
Acts18:3 Iya oosoy entaysada dunkaane siko gidiya gisho
Acts18:4 Phawuloosi Sambaata ubban Ayhudetanne Giriketa ammanthanaw ayhude woosa keethan palamees.
Acts18:5 Sillaaseynne Ximotiyoosi Maqedoonepe yida wode Phawuloosi ba kumetha wodiya immidi Ayhudetas Yesuusi I
Acts18:6 Shin enti Phawuloosa ixidi iya cayin Phawuloosi ba ma7uwape baana qoqofishe
Acts18:7 Yaape keyidi Xoossaa goyinniya Titos Yosxoosa geetetiya uraa soo bis. Yosxoosa keethay ayhude woosa keetha matan de7ees.
Acts18:8 Ayhude woosa keetha halaqay Qarisphoosi ba soo asa ubbaara Godaa ammanis. Qorontoosa asatapeka daroti Xoossaa qaala si7ida wode ammanidi xammaqetidosona.
Acts18:9 Goday issi qamma Phawuloosas qoncidi
Acts18:10 Taani neera de7ayis. Taw ha kataman daro asi de7iya gisho nena qohidi iitaban yeggana asi oonika baawa” yaagis.
Acts18:11 Hessa gisho
Acts18:12 Gaaliyoosi Akaya biitta aysiya wode Ayhudeti issife Phawuloosa bolla dendidi pirda keethi iya efidi
Acts18:13 “Ha addey higgiya ixidi
Acts18:14 Phawuloosi odetana hanishin
Acts18:15 Shin qaalas
Acts18:16 Yaatidi
Acts18:17 Hessafe guye
Acts18:18 Phawuloosi daro gallas Qorontoosan uttidaape guye ammaniya asaa sarothidi
Acts18:19 Enti Efesoona gakida wode Phawuloosi Phirisqillonne Aqila yan aggis. Shin baw ayhude woosa keethi gelidi Ayhudetara odetis.
Acts18:20 Enti bantara daro wode uttana mela Phawuloosa woossidosona shin I ixis.
Acts18:21 Entafe shaaketishe
Acts18:22 Qisaare gakida wode Yerusalaame bidi woosa keethaa asaa sarothidaape guye Anxooke bis.
Acts18:23 Yan guutha wode gam7idaape guye ammaniya asata ubbaa minthethishe Galatiyaranne Pirgera aadhis.
Acts18:24 Iskindiren yeletida issi Aphiloosa geetetiya Ayhude asi Efesoona bis. I oda eriya asinne Xoossaa qaala daro eriya asi.
Acts18:25 Godaa ogiyaka tamaaris
Acts18:26 I ayhude woosa keethan yayyonna tamaarsees. Phirisqillanne Aqili I odeysa si7ida wode bantara soo iya efidi Xoossaa ogiya kaseysafe geeshshidi iyaw odidosona.
Acts18:27 Aphiloosi Akaya baanaw koyin Efesoonan de7iya ammaniya asay iya qofaa ekidi Akayan de7iya ammaneysati iya mokana mela entaw dabdaabiya xaafidosona. I yaa gakida wode Xoossaa aadho keehatetha baggara Yesuus Kiristoosa ammanidaysata daro maaddis.
Acts18:28 Ayis giiko
Acts19:1 Aphiloosi Qorontoosan de7ishin
Acts19:2 Entako
Acts19:3 Phawuloosi entako
Acts19:4 Phawuloosi
Acts19:5 Enti hessa si7ida wode Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa tamaare gidanaw xammaqetidosona.
Acts19:6 Phawuloosi ba kushiya enta bolla wothida wode Geeshsha Ayyaanay enta bolla wodhin
Acts19:7 He bessan tammanne nam7a gidiya asati de7oosona.
Acts19:8 Phawuloosi ayhude woosa keethi gelidi
Acts19:9 Shin entafe issoti issoti dhube gididi daro asaa sinthan Godaa ogiya cayidi ammanonna ixidosona. Phawuloosi ammaneyisata entafe shaaki ekidi Xiranoosa geetetiya timirte keethan ubba gallas enta tamaarsis.
Acts19:10 Phawuloosi nam7u laythi gakanaw qaala odis. Hessa gisho
Acts19:11 Xoossay Phawuloosa kushen wolqaama malaatata oothis.
Acts19:12 Hessa gisho
Acts19:13 Tuna ayyaanata kessishe yuuyiya Ayhudetape issoti issoti
Acts19:14 Kahine halaqaa Asqewa geetetiya issi Ayhude addiyas hessa oothiya laapun nayti de7oosona.
Acts19:15 Shin tuna ayyaanay entako
Acts19:16 Tuna ayyaani oykida addey enta bolla gupi wodhidi
Acts19:17 Efesoonan de7iya Ayhudetinne Ayhude gidonnaysati ubbay hessa si7idi daro yayyidosona. Godaa Yesuusa sunthay daro bonchetis.
Acts19:18 Ammaneysatape daroti banta oothida iita oosuwa paaxishenne qoncen odishe yoosona.
Acts19:19 Marotape daroti banta maxaafata shiishidi asa ubbaa sinthan xuuggidosona. He maxaafata gatiya tayboy ishatamu mukulu bira santime gidis.
Acts19:20 Hessada hanidi Xoossa qaalay diccishenne dalgishe bis.
Acts19:21 Hessi hanidaape guye Phawuloosi
Acts19:22 Qassi bana maaddeysatape nam7ata Ximotiyoosanne Erasxoosa Maqedoone kiittidi
Acts19:23 He wode Godaa ogiya gisho Efesoonan wolqaama kachi keyis.
Acts19:24 Issi bira oothiya Dimexiroosa geetetiya uray Arxemisi eeqa keetha misiliya birape oothidi daro wodhe demmees.
Acts19:25 Hessa gisho
Acts19:26 Haysi Phawuloosi
Acts19:27 Meto gididay
Acts19:28 Asay hessa si7ida wode shenen xuugetidi
Acts19:29 He waasoy katama ubbaa gakis. Phawuloosara hemetiya Maqedoone asata
Acts19:30 Phawuloosi asay shiiqida bessa gelanaw koyis
Acts19:31 Iise biitta halaqatape Phawuloosa lagge gidida issoti issoti Phawuloosako kiittidi
Acts19:32 Shiiqida asaas hananabay dhayis; dariya bagga asay hari attoshin ayis shiiqidako eronna gisho
Acts19:33 Ayhudeti Iskindire geetetiya addiya aathidi bessin
Acts19:34 Shin Iskindirey Ayhude asi gididaysa asay erida wode nam7u saate gidanaysa mela ubbay issi qaalan
Acts19:35 Wursethan
Acts19:36 Haysa kashi giya asi bayna gisho
Acts19:37 Hinte
Acts19:38 Hessa gisho
Acts19:39 Shin hinte hara oda koyko
Acts19:40 Hessa gidonna ixiko hachi hanidabaas Roome kawotethay nuna oychana. Ha buqethaas gaasoy bayna gisho
Acts19:41 yaagidi shiiquwa laallis.
Acts20:1 Waasoy dochidaape guye
Acts20:2 He biittara aadhishe qaala odishe asaa daro minthethidaape guye Girike biitta bis.
Acts20:3 I yan heedzu ageena uttidi
Acts20:4 Phawuloosa moyzidaysati Beeriyape Pharhusa na7aa Sophaxiroosa
Acts20:5 Hessati sinthe bidi nuna Xiro7aadan naagoosona.
Acts20:6 Nuuni Uytha Baaliya bonchidaape guye
Acts20:7 Saamintafe koyro gallasan nuuni uythaa menthanaw shiiqidi de7ishin
Acts20:8 Nuuni shiiqidi uttida pooqiyan daro poo7oy de7ees.
Acts20:9 Ewuxikoosa geetetiya issi na7atethay maskoote bolla uttidi
Acts20:10 Shin Phawuloosi wodhidi
Acts20:11 Hessafe guye
Acts20:12 He paxida na7atetha soo efidi daro ufaytidosona.
Acts20:13 Shin Phawuloosi bana yaape mokana mela nuus odida gisho
Acts20:14 I nuura Asoosan gahetin markabiyan iya ekidi Mixiline bida.
Acts20:15 Wontetha gallas yaape dendidi markaben Kiyoosa sinthan de7iya bessaa gakida; qassi wontetha gallas Saamosa pinnidi kaalliya gallas Milixe gakida.
Acts20:16 Phawuloosi Iisen daro gam7onna Efesoona matara aadhanaw qopis. Baw danda7etiko Phanxeqosxe Baaliya gallas Yerusalaame gakanaw eesotees.
Acts20:17 Phawuloosi Milixepe Efesoona kiittidi woosa keethaa cimata xeegisis.
Acts20:18 Woosa keetha cimati iyako yin
Acts20:19 Ayhudeti duulatidi ta bolla meto gathikoka taani ashketethaninne daro afuthan Godaas oothas.
Acts20:20 Dabaabanka hinte keethan keethan hintena tamaarsishe hintena maaddiyabape issibaaka pacisabike.
Acts20:21 Taani Ayhudetasinne Ayhude gidonaysatas nagarape Xoossaako simmana melanne nu Godaa Yesuusa ammanana mela markatas.
Acts20:22 “Yan tana aybi gakaneeko erike
Acts20:23 Geeshsha Ayyaanay qashoynne waayey tana naageysa katama ubban taw markatis.
Acts20:24 Shin ta wothaa polanawunne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape ekida oosuwa
Acts20:25 “Taani ha77ika Xoossaa kawotethaa markatashe hinte ubbaa giddon yuuyas. Hizape guye
Acts20:26 Hessa gisho
Acts20:27 Ayis giiko
Acts20:28 “Ba na7aa suuthan wozida Xoossaa woosa keethaa naagite. Geeshsha Ayyaanay hintena halaqaa oothidi doorida wudiyasinne hinte huuphiyas naagetite.
Acts20:29 Taani bidaape guye
Acts20:30 Ammaneyisata banta geedo kaalethanaw wordo tamaarsiya asati hinte giddofe dendana.
Acts20:31 Hessa gisho
Acts20:32 “Ha77ika hintena minthanawunne geeshsha asaara laatisanaw danda7iya Xoossaasinne iya aadho keehatetha qaalas hintena hadara immayis.
Acts20:33 “Taani oodde bira woyko worqa woyko afila amottabike.
Acts20:34 Taani ta kushen oothada tananne taara de7eyisata koshshidaba maaddidaysa hinte
Acts20:35 Hinte haysada daaburidi oothishe daaburanchota maaddanaysanne Godaa Yesuusi
Acts20:36 Phawuloosi hessa odi ongidi enta ubbaara gulbatidi Xoossaa woossis.
Acts20:37 Enti ubbayka Phawuloosa idimmidi yeekidi yeeridosona.
Acts20:38 I Zaaridi
Acts21:1 Nuuni Efesoona cimatape shaaketida mela Qoosa bida. Wontetha gallas Rooda gakidi yaape Phaxara bida.
Acts21:2 Sirofinqe pinniya markabe demmidi iyan gelidi baanaw dendida.
Acts21:3 Nuuni Qophiroosa be7anaw danda7iya soo yidi
Acts21:4 Yan ammaniya asata demmidi entara laapun gallas uttida. Phawuloosi Yerusalaame boonna mela enti iyaw Ayyaanan odidosona.
Acts21:5 Nuuni entara uttiya wodey wurin keyidi bida. Enti ubbay banta maccasataranne banta naytara issife katamaape kare kessidi nuna moyzidosona. Nuuni abba doonan gulbatidi Xoossaa woossida.
Acts21:6 Hessafe guye
Acts21:7 Nuuni abba ogiya ongidi
Acts21:8 Wontetha gallas keyidi
Acts21:9 Filphoosas nabe gidida oyddu geela7o nayti de7oosona.
Acts21:10 Nuuni undenna gallas yan uttidi de7ishin tinbite odiya issi Agaboosa geetetiya addey Yihudape Qisaare yis.
Acts21:11 Nuuko yidi Phawuloosa saqiya ekidi ba kushiyanne ba tohuwa qachidi
Acts21:12 Nuuni hessa si7ida wode nunne yan de7iya asati Phawuloosi Yerusalaame boonna mela woossida.
Acts21:13 Shin Phawuloosi zaaridi
Acts21:14 Nu zoriya I ekonna ixin
Acts21:15 Yan guutha wode gam7idaape guye giigetidi Yerusalaame baanaw keyida.
Acts21:16 Qisaaren de7iya ammaniya asatape guuthati nuura bidosona. Enti nuuni shempana bessi Minaasona geetetiya Qophiroosa addiya soo efidosona. Minaasoni koyro ammanida asaape issuwa.
Acts21:17 Nuuni Yerusalaame gakida wode ammaniya asati nuna ufaysan mokidosona.
Acts21:18 Wontetha gallas Phawuloosinne nuuni Yayqoobara gahetanaw bida. Woosa keethaa cimati ubbatika yan de7oosona.
Acts21:19 Phawuloosi enta sarothidaape guye Ayhude gidonna asaa giddon ba baggara Xoossay oothidaba ubbaa entaw odis.
Acts21:20 Enti hessa si7ida wode Xoossaa galatidi Phawuloosako haysada yaagidosona: “Nu ishaw
Acts21:21 Neeni Ayhude gidonnayisata biittan de7iya Ayhude ubbay banta nayta qaxaronna mela
Acts21:22 Yaatin aybi lo77o? Neeni yidaysa daroti si7ana.
Acts21:23 “Hessa gisho
Acts21:24 Enta ekada entara geeya; qassi enti banta huuphiya meedettana mela entaw miishe imma. Enti kase nebaa si7idaysi tuma gidonaysanne neeni ne huuphenka higge naagiya asi gideysa ubbay erana.
Acts21:25 “Shin ammanida Ayhude gidonna asata gidiko
Acts21:26 Hessafe guye
Acts21:27 Laapun gallasay wurana hanishin
Acts21:28 “Isra7eele asaw
Acts21:29 Enti hessa giday kase Efesoona Xirofmoosa Phawuloosara kataman be7ida gisho ha77i Phawuloosi Xoossa keethi iya eki gelidaba entaw daanis.
Acts21:30 Katama ubbay buqetis; asa ubbay shiiqidi Phawuloosa oykidi Xoossa Keethafe kare goochidosona. Xoossa Keethaa pengeti ellesidi gordetidosona.
Acts21:31 Asay Phawuloosa wodhana hanishin
Acts21:32 Shaalaqay wotaadaretanne mato halaqata ekidi woxishe yis. Asay shaalaqaanne wotaadareta be7ida wode Phawuloosa wadheysa aggaagidosona.
Acts21:33 He wode shaalaqay shiiqidi
Acts21:34 Asaape baggay issiba gidi waassiya wode
Acts21:35 Phawuloosi yedhi keyiya dethaa gakiya wode asaa sugethaa gisho wotaadareti iya tookidosona.
Acts21:36 Daro asay
Acts21:37 Wotaaddareti Phawuloosa banta de7iyasuwa gelsana hanishin
Acts21:38 Neeni haysafe sinthe buqethi medhidi shempo wodhida oyddu mukulu asata ekidi bazzo gelida Gibxe uraa gidikii?” yaagis.
Acts21:39 Shin Phawuloosi
Acts21:40 Shaalaqay iyako
Acts22:1 “Ta ishato

Acts22:3 “Taani Kilqiyan de7iya Tersesee yeletada ha kataman diccas. Ta astamaareyka Gamaaliyale; taani nu aawata higgiya mintha tamaarida
Acts22:4 Taani ha ogiya kaalliya maccatanne addeta oykada qasho keethan yeggashenne enta wodhisana gakanaw waaye bessida asi.
Acts22:5 Hessadaka
Acts22:6 “Taani bada Damasqo matida wode seeta gallas qoponna salope gita poo7oy ta yuushuwan poo7is.

Acts22:9 Taara de7eysati poo7uwa be7idosonape attishin
Acts22:10 “Taani
Acts22:11 He wolqaama poo7uwa gaason ta ayfey qooqin

Acts22:13 Hanaani taako yidi
Acts22:14 “I taako
Acts22:15 Neeni be7idabaanne si7idaba asa ubbaa sinthan iyaw markatana.

Acts22:17 “Taani guye Yerusalaame simmada xoossa keethan woossishin
Acts22:18 Qoncethan Goday taako
Acts22:19 “Taani
Acts22:20 Enti ne marka Isxifaanose wodhiya wode taani he odan issifas. Qassi enta matan eqada iya wodheyisata ma7uwa naagayis’ yaagis.
Acts22:21 “Goday taako
Acts22:22 Phawuloosi he qaala odidi ongana gakanaw asay I geysa si7oosona. Hessafe guye
Acts22:23 Enti wocamishin

Acts22:25 Shin wotaadareti Phawuloosa dafon minthi qachidi garaafana haniya wode Phawuloosi ba matan eqida mato halaqaako
Acts22:26 Mato halaqay hessa si7ida wode shaalaqaako bidi

Acts22:28 Shaalaqay zaaridi

Acts23:2 Kahine halaqay Hanaani
Acts23:3 He wode Phawuloosi iyako
Acts23:4 Phawuloosa matan eqidaysati iyako
Acts23:5 Phawuloosi
Acts23:6 Shin Phawuloosi he bessan de7iya asaape baggati Saduqaaweta
Acts23:7 Phawuloosi hessa gida wode Farsaaweta giddoninne Saduqaaweta giddon ooshshi keyin shaaketidosona.
Acts23:8 Ayis giiko
Acts23:9 Gita kachi keyis; Farsaaweta bagga gidida higge astamaareti dendi eqidi
Acts23:10 Ooshshay darin asay Phawuloosa shaqerethonna mela gidi
Acts23:11 He qamma Goday Phawuloosa matan eqidi
Acts23:12 Wontetha gallas Ayhudeti
Acts23:13 Phawuloosa bolla hessa maqetida asati oytamape daroosona.
Acts23:14 Enti kahine halaqatakonne deriya cimatako bidi

Acts23:19 Shaalaqay na7aa kushiya oykidi
Acts23:20 Na7ay shaalaqaako
Acts23:21 Shin neeni enti giyaba si7opa. Ayis giiko
Acts23:22 Shaalaqay zaaridi
Acts23:23 Shaalaqay mato halaqatape nam7ata xeegidi
Acts23:24 Deriya aysiya Filkisako Phawuloosa saro gathanaw toga mehe giigisite” yaagidi enta kiittis.
Acts23:25 Shaalaqay Filkisas haysada giya dabdaabe xaafis:
Acts23:26 “Qalawudiyoosa Lusiyoosape deriya aysiya boncho Filkisas

Acts23:30 Enti ha uraa bolla maqetida zigirsay tana gakin

Acts23:34 Deriya ayseysi dabdaabiya nabbabidaape guye
Acts23:35 “Taani nebaa nena mooteysati yaa wode si7ana” yaagis. Wotaaddareti Phawuloosa Herodiisa gadhon naagana mela kiittis.
Acts24:1 Ichashu gallasape guye kahine halaqay
Acts24:2 Phawuloosi xeegetidi gelida wode
Acts24:3 Boncho Filkisa
Acts24:4 Taani nena gam7isonashin neeni ne keehatethan nubaa qanthan si7ana mela nena woossayis.
Acts24:5 Ha uray dhube gididi biitta ubban de7iya Ayhudeta giddon buqethi medhidi Naaziraweta bagga asaa kaaletheysa gidoysa erida.
Acts24:6 Hari attoshin
Acts24:7 Shin shaalaqa Lusiyoosi yidi
Acts24:8 Iya mooteysati neeko yaana mela kiittis. Neeni ne huuphen ha uraa pilgada nuuni iya mootiya mootuwa ubbaa eranaw danda7aasa” yaagis.
Acts24:9 Ayhudetika
Acts24:10 Deriya ayseysi Phawuloosa oda gidi mallis. Phawuloosi haysada gidi zaaris: “Neeni daro wodepe doomada
Acts24:11 Taani Yerusalaame goyinnanaw keyin tammanne nam7u gallasape aadhonaysa neeni ne huuphen eranaw danda7aasa.
Acts24:12 Ayhudeti tana Xoossaa Keethan gidin ayhude woosa keethan gidin kataman gidin ooderaka palamishin woyko asa shiishada maqishin issi asika demmibeenna.
Acts24:13 Ha77ika enti tana mootiyabas marka demmanaw danda7okona.
Acts24:14 “Shin taani haysa issiba ammanayis; taani higgen de7iyabaanne nabeti xaafida ubbaba ammanada
Acts24:15 Enti banta huuphen ammaneysa mela xillotinne nagaranchoti hayqope dendanaysa taka ammanayis.
Acts24:16 Hessa gisho
Acts24:17 “Taani Yerusalaamepe keyoosape daro laythafe guye ta biitta manqotas maade immanawunne yarsho yarshanaw Yerusalaame bas.
Acts24:18 Taani xoossa keethan hessa oothada geeshsha wogaa pola simmin tana demmidosona. He wode taara asi baawa
Acts24:19 Shin Iisepe yida issi issi Ayhudeti hessan de7oosona; enti ta bolla oda koyko yidi tana ne bolla mootanaw danda7oosona.
Acts24:20 Woyko taani shanguwa sinthe shiiqida wode oothida bali de7iko haysati ne sinthan de7eysati odonna.
Acts24:21 Taani enta giddon eqada
Acts24:22 Shin Filkisi Xoossaa ogiyaba geeshshi erida gisho
Acts24:23 Filkisi qassi Phawuloosa qachonna naagana melanne iya dabbotape oonika iya oychanaw yishin diggonna mela mato halaqaa kiittis.
Acts24:24 Guutha gallasape guye
Acts24:25 Phawuloosi xillotethabaa
Acts24:26 He wode Phawuloosape wodhaafe ekanaw qopidi
Acts24:27 Nam7u laythafe guye
Acts25:1 Fisxoosi kawotida heedzu gallasape guye Qisaarepe Yerusalaame bis.
Acts25:2 Yan kahine halaqatinne Ayhudeta kaaletheysati Phawuloosa mootidosona.
Acts25:3 Phawuloosa Yerusalaame ehishin ogen qosetidi iya wodhanaw entaw injetana mela bantana maaddo gidi Fisxoosa woossidosona.
Acts25:4 Fisxoosi entako
Acts25:5 I balidabay de7iko hinte giddon aawateysati taara Qisaare bidi iya mootona” yaagidi zaaris.
Acts25:6 Fisxoosi enta matan hospun woyko tammu gallasa mela gam7idaape guye Qisaare bis. Wontetha gallas pirda oyden uttidi Phawuloosa ehana mela kiittis.
Acts25:7 I yin Yerusalaamepe yida Ayhudeti iya yuushuwan eqidi enti lathanaw danda7onna daro deexo mooto iya bolla shiishidosona.
Acts25:8 Phawuloosi zaaridi
Acts25:9 Shin Fisxoosi Ayhudeta ufaysanaw koyidi Phawuloosako
Acts25:10 Shin Phawuloosi
Acts25:11 Hiza
Acts25:12 He wode Fisxoosi ba zoranchotara zoretidi
Acts25:13 Guutha gallasape guye Kawoy Agirphinne Barniqey Fisxoosa sarothanaw Qisaare bidosona.
Acts25:14 Yan enti daro gallas gam7in
Acts25:15 Taani Yerusalaame bida wode kahine halaqatinne Ayhude cimati iya bolla pirdana mela tana woossidi iyabaa taw odidosona.
Acts25:16 Taani
Acts25:17 “Hessa gisho
Acts25:18 Iya mooteysati iya matan eqidi
Acts25:19 Shin enti banta haymaanotebanne Phawuloosi
Acts25:20 Ha oday tana shaakanaw metida gisho
Acts25:21 Shin Phawuloosi ba oda Qeesarey iyabaa be7ana gakanaw qasho keethan gam7anaw oychis. Taani iya Qeesareko yeddana gakanaw I qashetana mela kiittas” yaagis.
Acts25:22 Hessa gisho
Acts25:23 Wontetha gallas Agirphinne Barniqey gita bonchon shaalaqataranne kataman de7iya gita asatara yidi pirda keethi gelidosona. Fisxoosi Phawuloosa xeegisidi ehis.
Acts25:24 Fisxoosi
Acts25:25 Shin iya hayqos gathiyaba aybibaaka taani demmabike. I ba huuphen
Acts25:26 Taani iyabaa ta godaa Qeesares xaafanaw gidiya gaasoy aybika baawa. Hessa gisho
Acts25:27 Ayis giiko
Acts26:1 Agirphi Phawuloosako
Acts26:2 “Kawaw
Acts26:3 Neeni Ayhude woganne palama loythada eriya gisho tana saletonna si7ana mela nena woossayis.
Acts26:4 “Taani na7atethafe doomada ta asaa giddoninne Yerusalaamen de7ida ta de7uwa Ayhude ubbay eroosona.
Acts26:5 Taani koyrope doomada
Acts26:6 Ha77ika taani Xoossay nu aawatas immana gida ufaysaa naagiya gisho mootetada haysan eqas.
Acts26:7 Qassi tammanne nam7u nu aawata sheeshay Xoossaa qammanne gallas minthidi goyinnishe Xoossay immana gidaysa ekanaw ufaysan naagoosona. Kawaw Agirpha
Acts26:8 Ayhudeto
Acts26:9 “Kase taani ta huuphenka Naazirete Yesuusa sunthaa teqanaw danda7etidaba ubbaa oothanaw bessees gada qopas.
Acts26:10 Taani Yerusalaamen oothiday haysa. Kahine halaqatape maata ekada Xoossaa asatape darota qashisas. Enta wodhiya wodeka enta hayquwa dosas.
Acts26:11 Daro wode ayhude woosa keethaa ubban enti seeretana melanne Yesuusa cayidi kaddana mela un7ethas. Taani wogi bayna enta hanqetada hari attoshin
Acts26:12 “Taani ha odas kahine halaqatape maatanne kiitaa ekada Damasqo bayis.
Acts26:13 Kawaw
Acts26:14 Nuuni ubbayka sa7an kundida wode Ibraawetho doonan
Acts26:15 “Taani
Acts26:16 shin denda eqa. Hachi neeni tana be7idaysaninne sinthafe ta new bessanaysa haratas markatana mela ta oosancho oothada nena shuumanaw new bentas.
Acts26:17 Isra7eele asatapenne taani nena entako kiittiya Ayhude gidonaysatape nena ashshana.
Acts26:18 Neeni enta ayfiya dooyana
Acts26:19 “Kawaw Agirpha
Acts26:20 Shin taani koyrottada Damasqon hessafe guye Yerusalaameninne Yihuda biitta ubban de7eysatinne Ayhude gidonnaysati banta nagaraape Xoossaako simmana melanne nagaraape simuwa bessiya ooso oothana mela qaala odas.
Acts26:21 Hessa gisho
Acts26:22 Hachi gakanaw Xoossaa maadey taape shaaketibeenna; yaaniya gisho
Acts26:23 Hessika
Acts26:24 Phawuloosi hessa yaagidi zaarishin
Acts26:25 Shin Phawuloosi
Acts26:26 Taani qoncen odiya odaa Kawoy erees. Ha oday geeman oosetiboonna gisho issoyka iyape geemmonaysa taani geeshshada erayis.
Acts26:27 “Kawaw Agirpha
Acts26:28 Kawoy Agirphi
Acts26:29 Phawuloosi
Acts26:30 Hessafe guye
Acts26:31 Yaape keyidi bishe issoy issuwara
Acts26:32 Agirphi Fisxoosako
Acts27:1 Nuuni markaben Xaale baanaw qachida wode Awugisxoosa wotaadareta geeteteysatape issi Yuuliyoosa geetetiya mato halaqaas Phawuloosanne hara guutha qasho asata aathidi iyaw immidosona.
Acts27:2 Iise gaxan de7iya biittata biya Adramixiyoone markaben gelidi dendida. Maqedoone asi gidida Teselonqe Arsxirokoosi nuura de7ees.
Acts27:3 Wontetha gallas nuuni Sidoona gakishin
Acts27:4 Yaape dendidi sinthara nu bolla carkiya gisho haathan teqetida biitta
Acts27:5 Kilqiyanne Phinfile matan de7iya abba pinnidi Liiqen de7iya Mura gakida.
Acts27:6 Yan mato halaqay Xaale biya Iskindire markabe demmidi
Acts27:7 Nuuni daro gallas loddara bidi
Acts27:8 Daro meton gaxa gaxa oykidi Laasa katamaa matan de7iya abba doonan “Markabey Wopu Gidi Shempiya bessi” geetetiya bessa gakida.
Acts27:9 Nuuni yan daro wode gam7idaape guye xoomi biletida gisho hizape markaben buussi metiya gisho Phawuloosi enta zoris.
Acts27:10 “Asaw
Acts27:11 Shin mato halaqay Phawuloosi gidaysafe aathidi markabiya laaggeysinne markabiya goday geysan ammanis.
Acts27:12 He abba doonan de7iya katamay balgo ageena aathanaw entaw injetonna gisho
Acts27:13 Kawusha dugeha carkoy loddara carkida wode banta qopidaysada hanidaba entaw daanin dendidi
Acts27:14 Shin daro gam7onna “Awuraqis” geetetiya wolqaama gotey haathan teqetida biittafe duge enta bolla dendis.
Acts27:15 He gotey markabiya sugidi efonna diggida gisho carkoy markabiya ba dosida soo efis.
Acts27:16 Nuuni yuushoy abban teqetida biitta
Acts27:17 Enti wogoluwa pude kessidaape guye wodoruwan markabiya bolla xaaxidi
Acts27:18 Gotey wolqaamishe bin wontetha gallas caanaape baggaa abban holo oykidosona.
Acts27:19 Heedzantho gallas markabiya miishiya ekidi banta kushen holidosona.
Acts27:20 Nuuni daro gallas awa ayfenne xoolinto be7onna gishonne wolqaama uushoy nu bolla uushida gisho sinthafe nuuni shempora attana gidi qopibooko.
Acts27:21 He wode enti daro gallas kathi moonna gam7ida gisho Phawuloosi enta giddon dendi eqidi
Acts27:22 Shin taani hintena yayyofite gada zorayis; ayis giiko
Acts27:23 Zine qamma ta iyabaa gididaysinne ta goyinniya Xoossay kiitida kiitanchoy ta matan eqidi
Acts27:24 ‘Phawuloosa
Acts27:25 Hessa gisho
Acts27:26 Shin carkoy nuna efidi issi yuushoy abban teqetida biitta gaxan holana” yaagis.
Acts27:27 Tammanne oyddantho qamman Adire Abban nuna carkoy gedenne haa sugishin
Acts27:28 Enti ciimmotetha eranaw koyidi wodoro xeeran deexiyaba qachidi abban yeggin
Acts27:29 Enti abba gaxan de7iya shuchan dom7etona mela yayyidi
Acts27:30 Markabiyan ootheysati markabiyape baqatanaw koyidi
Acts27:31 Phawuloosi mato halaqaakonne wotaadaretako
Acts27:32 Hessa gisho
Acts27:33 Sa7ay wontana hanishin ubbay kathi maana mela Phawuloosi asaako
Acts27:34 Hessa gisho
Acts27:35 Phawuloosi hessa gidi uythi ekidi ubbaa sinthan Xoossaa galatis; uythaa menthidi muussu doomis.
Acts27:36 Ubbay minetidi bantaw kathi ekidi midosona.
Acts27:37 Nuuni markabiyan de7eysati nam7u xeetanne laapun tammanne usupuna.
Acts27:38 Enti midi kallida wode caana gistiya abban yeggidi markabiya deexuwa kawushidosona.
Acts27:39 Sa7ay wontida wode markabiya oosanchoti aw biitta gakidaako eronnashin
Acts27:40 Yaatidi
Acts27:41 Shin markabey shafe dooren dom7etidi mitetis. Markabiyas sintha baggay xuggunidi shafiya caddi oykidi qaaxonna ixin
Acts27:42 Wotaaddareti qasho asaape issoyka haatha wadhidi kessi ekonna mela enta wodhanaw zoretidosona.
Acts27:43 Shin mato halaqay Phawuloosa ashshanaw koyidi wotaadareta zoreta ixis. Haathe wadho eriya ubbay markabiyape haathan gupi gupi wodhidi kasetidi gaxa keyana mela kiittis.
Acts27:44 Attidaysati sanqa bollanne
Acts28:1 Nuuni gaxa saro keyida wode gakida bessay yuushoy abban teqetida biitta
Acts28:2 Malta asay nuus daro keeha keehidosona. Iri bukiya gishonne meegiya gisho tama eethidi nuna ubbaa mokidosona.
Acts28:3 Phawuloosi daro afira shiishidi taman wothishin
Acts28:4 Malta asay shooshi Phawuloosa kushen xaaxetidaysa be7ida wode issoy issuwako
Acts28:5 Shin Phawuloosi ba kushiyape shooshaa wuxarkidi
Acts28:6 Enti
Acts28:7 He heeran yuushoy abban teqetida biitta halaqaa
Acts28:8 Pupliyoosa aaway qoxo
Acts28:9 Hessafe guye
Acts28:10 Enti nuna daro boncho bonchidosona; nuuni markaben baanaw dendida wode oges koshshiyaba nuus immidosona.
Acts28:11 Heedzu ageenape guye
Acts28:12 Sirakuuse katamaa gelidi yan heedzu gallas uttida.
Acts28:13 Yaape dendidi Regiyume katamaa gakida. Issi gallasape guye
Acts28:14 Yan nuuni issi issi ammaniya asata demmin
Acts28:15 Roomen de7iya ammaniya asati nubaa si7idi
Acts28:16 Nuuni Roome gelida wode Phawuloosi bana naagiya wotaadariyara barka de7o geetetis.
Acts28:17 Heedzu gallasape guye
Acts28:18 Enti ta mootuwa be7idi hayqos gathiyaba ta bolla aybibaaka demmiboonna gisho tana billanaw qopidosona.
Acts28:19 Shin Ayhudeti hessa ixida wode
Acts28:20 Taani hintena xeegisiday hintena be7anawunne hintew haysa odanaasa. Taani ha santhalaatan qashetiday Isra7eele asay naagiya ufaysaa gishosa” yaagis.
Acts28:21 Ayhude halaqati Phawuloosako
Acts28:22 Shin ha ne kaalliya ammanuwa dumma dumma bessan asay ixeysa nuuni eriya gisho ne qofaa si7anaw koyoos” yaagidosona.
Acts28:23 Enti banta yaana gallas Phawuloosas qaxaridi
Acts28:24 Issoti issoti Phawuloosi gidaysa ammanidosona
Acts28:25 Enti banta giddon oda ma7onna ixida wode Phawuloosi issiba gidaape guye bidosona. I haysada yaagis: “Geeshsha Ayyaanay nu aawatas nabiya Isayaasa doonan odidaysi tuma.
Acts28:26 “ ‘Neeni he asaako bada
Acts28:27 Ayis giiko
Acts28:28 “Hiza
Acts28:29 Phawuloosi hessa gidaape guye
Acts28:30 Phawuloosi kera keethan nam7u laythi kumethi de7is; yan de7ishe baako yaa ubbaa mokees.
Acts28:31 Yashshi baynanne oonika diggonashin Xoossa kawotethaaba sabbakis; Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosaba qoncisidi tamaarsees.
Romans1:1 Yesuus Kiristoosa aylle gidida
Romans1:2 Xoossay daro wodepe sinthe ba nabeta baggara immana yaagida Xoossaa Wongelay Geeshsha Maxaafatan xaafetis.
Romans1:3 He Wongelay ashon Dawita sheeshape yeletida
Romans1:4 Qassi I ba geeshsha Ayyaanan hayqope dendidi
Romans1:5 Iya baggara Ayhude gidonna asa ubbay
Romans1:6 Yesuus Kiristoosas gidana mela xeegetida asatape baggati hintena.
Romans1:7 Roomen de7iya
Romans1:8 Ubbaafe koyrottada
Romans1:9 Taani iya Na7aa wongelaba kumetha wozanan odiya Xoossay
Romans1:10 Wursethan
Romans1:11 Taani hintew Ayyaana imuwa shaakanawunne hintena be7anaw laamotayis.
Romans1:12 Hessika
Romans1:13 Ta ishato
Romans1:14 Tamaarida asaasinne tamaariboonna asaas qassi cincatasinne eeyatas taw acoy de7ees.
Romans1:15 Hessa gisho
Romans1:16 Iya ammaniya ubbaa
Romans1:17 Xilloy ammanon de7on daana geetetidi Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetis. Wongelan Xoossaa xillotethay qoncis; koyrope wursethi gakanaw
Romans1:18 Tumay eretonna mela banta iita ooson kammiya asaa bollanne nagara ubbaa bolla
Romans1:19 Xoossay entaw qoncanaw bessiyaba qoncisida gisho
Romans1:20 Alamey medhetoosape doomidi
Romans1:21 Enti Xoossaa erishe
Romans1:22 Enti bantana cincata goosona
Romans1:23 Enti hayqonna Xoossaa goyinnanaysa aggidi
Romans1:24 Hessa gisho
Romans1:25 Hessi haniday enti Xoossaa tumaa wordon laammida gishonne medhida Xoossaa aggidi
Romans1:26 Hessa gisho
Romans1:27 Hessadaka
Romans1:28 Enti Xoossaa erishe
Romans1:29 Entan geellatethi
Romans1:30 asa sunthi iisseyisata
Romans1:31 akeekonayisata
Romans1:32 Hayisata mela ootheysatas hayqoy bessees giya Xoossaa higgiya erishe
Romans2:1 Hessa gisho
Romans2:2 Hessa mela ooso ootheyisata bolla Xoossay xillo pirdaa pirdeysa nu eroos.
Romans2:3 Neno
Romans2:4 Woyko Xoossaa keehatetha
Romans2:5 Shin hintew shucha wozaninne si7onna haythi de7ees. Hessa gisho
Romans2:6 Xoossay issuwas issuwas iya oosuwa mela immana.
Romans2:7 Lo77o ooson minnidi
Romans2:8 Shin bantana siiqeyisata
Romans2:9 Iitabaa oothiya asa ubbaa
Romans2:10 Shin Xoossay lo77o ooso oothiya ubbaas
Romans2:11 Xoossay som7o be7idi ase shaakenna.
Romans2:12 Higgey bayna nagara oothida ubbay higgey bayna dhayana. Higgey de7ishin
Romans2:13 Xoossaa sinthan xilleysati higge naageysatape attishin
Romans2:14 Higgey bayna Ayhude gidonna asay medhon higgey kiitteysa oothosona. Entaw xaafetida higgey bayna ixikoka enti banta wozanan higgiya eroosona.
Romans2:15 Enta hanotay
Romans2:16 Ta tamaarsida Wongela mela Xoossay Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara asa wozanan geemmida qofaa pirdiya wode hessi eretana.
Romans2:17 Shin ne nena Ayhude gaasa; higgen zempaasa; Xoossan ceeqasa.
Romans2:18 Ne oothana mela Xoossay koyiyabay aybeko eraasa. Higgiya tamaarida gisho
Romans2:19 Neeni qooqeta kaaletheysa
Romans2:20 Neeni higgiyafe demmida eratethaninne tumatethan eeyata eriseysanne yoogata tamaarseysa gideysa eraasa.
Romans2:21 Yaatin
Romans2:22 Neeni
Romans2:23 Neeni Xoossaa higgiyan ceeqetasa
Romans2:24 Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans2:25 Ne higges kiitetiko
Romans2:26 Ayhude gidonna asi qaxaretonna de7ishe
Romans2:27 Hinte
Romans2:28 Hiza
Romans2:29 Shin tuma Ayhudetethi gaatha baggan Ayhude gideysa. Tuma qaxaretethi Xoossaa Ayyaanan oosetiya wozana qaxaretethafe attishin
Romans3:1 Yaatin
Romans3:2 Tumaka Ayhude gidoy daro ogera maaddees. Ubbaafe sinthe Xoossay ba qaala hadara Ayhudetas immis.
Romans3:3 Yaatin
Romans3:4 Diggenna! Asa ubbay wordancho gidikoka Xoossay tuma gido. Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans3:5 Yaatin
Romans3:6 Hessi ubbaraka hanenna. Hessada haniko
Romans3:7 Shin ta wordotethay Xoossa tumaa qoncisidi
Romans3:8 Issi issi asay
Romans3:9 Yaatin
Romans3:10 Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans3:11 Akeekiya asi baawa
Romans3:12 Asa ubbay Xoossaas zoko zaaridosona; ubbay issife pathonnaba gididosona. Lo77o oothiya oonika baawa; issi asika baawa.
Romans3:13 Enta doonape keyiya qaalay
Romans3:14 Enta doonan camo odaynne baadethi kumis.
Romans3:15 Enti suuthi gussanaw ellesoosona.
Romans3:16 Enta ogiyan dhayoynne qohoy de7ees.
Romans3:17 Enti sarotetha ogiya erokona.
Romans3:18 Banta de7uwan Xoossaas yayyokonna” geetetidi xaafetis.
Romans3:19 Ase ubbaa doona oythanawunne kumetha alamiya Xoossaa pirdaafe garsan shiishanaw
Romans3:20 Hessa gisho
Romans3:21 Shin ha77i Xoossay asi higgey baynashin xilliya oge qoncisis. He ogiya Muse higgeynne nabeti markatidosona.
Romans3:22 Ha xillotethaa
Romans3:23 Asa ubbay nagara oothidosona; Xoossay entaw immida bonchuwafe haakidi attidosona.
Romans3:24 Shin enti Xoossaa aadho keehatethan
Romans3:25 Xoossay Yesuus Kiristoosa yarsho oothidi immiday
Romans3:26 Ha77i wodiyan Yesuusa ammaniya ubbaa xillisidi
Romans3:27 Yaatin
Romans3:28 Xoossay ase xillisey ammanonape attishin
Romans3:29 Woyko Xoossay Ayhudeta xalaala Xoosseyee? Ayhude gidonaysatas Xoosse gidenneyee? Tuma
Romans3:30 Xoossay isso; Ayhudetanne Ayhude gidonnayisata ammanon xillisey iya.
Romans3:31 Yaatin
Romans4:1 Yaatin
Romans4:2 Abrahaamey ooson xillidaba gidiyako
Romans4:3 Geeshsha Maxaafay
Romans4:4 Oothiya uray ekiya damoozey
Romans4:5 Shin ooso oothonna oonika nagaranchuwa xillisiya Xoossaa ammaniko
Romans4:6 Geeshsha Maxaafan Dawiti
Romans4:7 “Enta balay atto geetetidaysatinne enta nagaray kametidaysati anjetidaysata.
Romans4:8 Goday iya nagaraa taybonna asi anjetidaysa” yaagees.
Romans4:9 Yaatin
Romans4:10 Yaatin
Romans4:11 Abrahaamey qaxaretanaape sinthe iya ammanoy iyaw xillotethi gididi taybetidaysa erisanaw
Romans4:12 I qaxaretidaysataska aawa. Abrahaamey entaw aawa gididay enti qaxaretida gisho
Romans4:13 Abrahaamesinne iya sheeshas
Romans4:14 Higges kiitetidaysati Xoossay immana gida ufaysa laateyisata gidiko
Romans4:15 Higge menthoy Xoossaa hanqo ehees
Romans4:16 Hessa gisho
Romans4:17 Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans4:18 Xoossay Abrahaames daro koche immanaysa caaqis. Ufaysi oothanaw aykoka danda7etonna wode Abrahaamey Xoossan ammanida gishonne ufaysi oothida gisho
Romans4:19 Abrahaames xeetu laythi kumana hanikoka
Romans4:20 Gidoshin
Romans4:21 Abrahaamey
Romans4:22 Hessa gisho
Romans4:23 Shin
Romans4:24 He qaalay nu Godaa Yesuusa hayqope denthida Xoossaa ammaniya nuuska nu ammanoy xillotethan taybetana mela xaafetis.
Romans4:25 Xoossay iya nu nagara gisho
Romans5:1 Hiza
Romans5:2 Nuuni iya baggara ha77i nu eqida aadho keehatetha giddo ammanon gelida. Hessa gisho
Romans5:3 Hessa xalaala gidonashin
Romans5:4 Qassi danda7ay genca
Romans5:5 Nuus immida Geeshsha Ayyaana baggara Xoossay ba siiquwa nu wozanan gussida gisho he ufaysay nuna yeellayenna.
Romans5:6 Nuuni buroo daaburanchota gididi de7ishin
Romans5:7 Xillo asa gisho hayqana asi demmanaysi daro meto
Romans5:8 Shin nuuni buroo nagarancho gididi de7ishin
Romans5:9 Hiza
Romans5:10 Nuuni Xoossara kase morke
Romans5:11 Hessa xalaala gidonashin
Romans5:12 Addaame baggara nagari ha alamiya gelis. He nagaraa baggara hayqoy yis. Asi ubbay nagara oothida gisho hayqoy asa zare ubbaa gakis.
Romans5:13 Higgey imetanaape sinthe alamen nagari de7ees
Romans5:14 Shin Addaamepe Muse gakanaw hayqoy asa ubbaa haaris. Hari attoshin
Romans5:15 Shin Xoossaa aadho keehatethay Addaame nagaraa mela gidenna. Issi asa nagara baggara daro asay hayqis. Shin Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa aadho keehatethay asa ubbaas daridi imetis.
Romans5:16 Addaame nagaraa giddoninne Xoossaa imota giddon daro dummatethi de7ees. Issi asa nagara gaason Xoossay iya bolla pirdis. Shin asay daro nagara oothinka Xoossaa aadho keehatethay xillotethaa ehis.
Romans5:17 Issi asa nagara gaason hayqoy asa ubbaa bolla kawotis. Shin Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa aadho keehatethaanne xillotetha imota ekiya ubbay
Romans5:18 Hiza
Romans5:19 Issi asi kiitetonna ixida gaason
Romans5:20 Asay nagara wolqaa erana mela higgey yis
Romans5:21 Nagari hayqo wolqan kawotidaysa mela Xoossa aadho keehatethay xillotethaa wolqan kawotidi
Romans6:1 Yaatin
Romans6:2 Akay
Romans6:3 Nu ubbay Kiristoos Yesuusara issifanaw xammaqetida wode iya hayquwan iyara issifanaw xammaqetidaysa ereketiyee?
Romans6:4 Nu xammaqetida wode Kiristoosara hayqidanne moogetida. Kiristoosi Xoossaa Aawa boncho wolqan hayqope dendidaysa mela nuka ooratha de7on daana.
Romans6:5 Nu iya hayquwan iyara issino gidiko
Romans6:6 Nu hizape nagaras aylle gidonna melanne nu nagarancho asatethaa wolqay dhayana mela nu cima asatethay Kiristoosara kaqetidaysa eroos.
Romans6:7 Issi asi Kiristoosan hayqidaba gidiko
Romans6:8 Nuuni Kiristoosara hayqiko
Romans6:9 Kiristoosi hayqope dendida gisho
Romans6:10 I hayqida wode nagaras issitoho wursethi gakanaw hayqis
Romans6:11 Hessadaka
Romans6:12 Hessa gisho
Romans6:13 Qassi hinte asatethaa nagara oothanaw geellatetha miishe oothidi immofite. Shin hinte hayqope dendidi
Romans6:14 Hinte Xoossaa aadho keehatetha garsan de7eetape attishin
Romans6:15 Yaatin
Romans6:16 Hinte issi asas kiitetanaw hintena aylle oothidi immiya wode he hinte kiiteteysas aylle gideysa ereeta. Hessadaka
Romans6:17 Kase hinte nagaras aylle
Romans6:18 Hinte nagara aylletetha qashope biletidi xillotetha aylle gidideta.
Romans6:19 Hinte hinte qofan daaburancho gidiya gisho
Romans6:20 Hinte nagaras aylletidi de7iya wode xillotethas haareteketa.
Romans6:21 Hintena ha77i yeellayiya beni hinte iita oosuwape ay maade demmidetii? He oosota wursethay hayqo.
Romans6:22 Shin hinte nagara aylletetha qashope biletidi
Romans6:23 Nagara gatey hayqo. Shin Xoossay
Romans7:1 Ta ishato
Romans7:2 Leemisos
Romans7:3 Hessa gisho
Romans7:4 Hessa gisho
Romans7:5 Nu asho amoy nuna haarin
Romans7:6 Shin ha77i nuuni nuna qachida higgiyas hayqida gisho nuuni higge qashope biletida. Hessa gisho
Romans7:7 Yaatin
Romans7:8 Shin ta ubbaba amottana mela nagari higge baggara tanan oge demmis. Higgey bayneko nagari hayqidaysa.
Romans7:9 Kase higgey bayna wode ta paxa
Romans7:10 Taani de7on daana mela Xoossay immida higgey taw hayqo ehis.
Romans7:11 Nagari higge baggara tana cimmiya ogiya demmidi
Romans7:12 Hessa gisho
Romans7:13 Yaatin
Romans7:14 Nuuni higgey ayyaanaba gideysa eroos. Shin taani nagaras bayzetida asho asi.
Romans7:15 Taani oothiyaba akeekike; taani dosiyaba oothanaysa aggada ta ixiyaba oothayis.
Romans7:16 Taani ixiyaba oothiya gidiko
Romans7:17 Hessa gidiko
Romans7:18 Tanan
Romans7:19 Taani ixiya iitabaa oothaysipe attishin
Romans7:20 Taani ixiyaba oothiya gidiko
Romans7:21 Hiza
Romans7:22 Taani ta wozanan Xoossaa higgiyan ufaytayis.
Romans7:23 Shin ta asatethaa giddon de7iya ta qofaa higgiyara oletiya dumma higge be7ayis. He higgey ta asatethaa giddon oothiya nagara higgiyas tana aylle oothidi immis.
Romans7:24 Taani waanida yibbata asee? Hayqos efiya ha asatethafe tana ashshanay oonee?
Romans7:25 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara tana ashshiya Xoossaas galatay gido. Hiza
Romans8:1 Hessa gisho
Romans8:2 Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara nuus de7o immiya Geeshsha Ayyaana higgey
Romans8:3 Nu nagara asatethaa gaason
Romans8:4 Xoossay hessa oothiday
Romans8:5 Banta asho amuwa kaallidi de7eysati bantana ufaysiyabaa qopoosona. Shin Geeshsha Ayyaana shenen de7eysati Geeshsha Ayyaana ufaysiyabaa qopoosona.
Romans8:6 Nu qofay asho amos haaretiko hayqo ehees
Romans8:7 Asho amos haaretiya asi Xoossaa higgiyas kiitetanaw koyonna gishonne kiitetanaw danda7onna gisho
Romans8:8 Banta asho amuwas haareteysati Xoossaa ufaysanaw danda7okona.
Romans8:9 Shin Xoossaa Ayyaanay hintenan de7ikonne hintena haariko
Romans8:10 Shin Kiristoosi hintenan de7iko
Romans8:11 Shin Yesuusa hayqope denthida Xoossaa Ayyaanay hintenan de7iko
Romans8:12 Hiza
Romans8:13 Hinte
Romans8:14 Xoossaa Ayyaanay kaalethiya ubbay Xoossaa nayta.
Romans8:15 Nuuni
Romans8:16 Xoossaa Ayyaanay nu ayyaanara gididi nuuni Xoossaa nayta gideysa markatees.
Romans8:17 Nuuni iya nayta gidiko Xoossaa anjuwa laattana; Kiristoosara wolla he anjuwa laattana. Qassi nuuni Kiristoosara metuwa ekiko iyara wolla iya bonchuwan shaaketana.
Romans8:18 Nuuni ha77i waayetiya waayiya
Romans8:19 Medhetetha ubbay Xoossaa nayta qoncethaa daro laamotidi naagoosona.
Romans8:20 Medhetetha ubbay hada gidis; hessika
Romans8:21 Medhetethay ba huuphen dhayo aylletethaafe wozetidi
Romans8:22 Medhetethay issife hanno gakanaw iqethi oykida maccasada ooleninne un7an de7eysa nu eroos.
Romans8:23 Qassi hessa medhetetha xalaala gidonashin
Romans8:24 Ha ufaysan nuuni attida. Shin nuuni ufaysi oothiyabay bentiya gidiko hessa ooni ufaysi oothii?
Romans8:25 Shin nu be7onnaba demmana gidi ufaysan naagiko hessa danda7an naagoos.
Romans8:26 Hessada Geeshsha Ayyaanay nu daaburan maaddees. Nuuni Xoossaa waati woossanaw bessiyako eroko
Romans8:27 Qassi asa wozana eriya Xoossay Geeshsha Ayyaana qofay aybeko erees. Geeshsha Ayyaanay Xoossaa sheniyada geeshshatas gaannatees.
Romans8:28 Xoossaa siiqeysatasinne iya sheniyada xeegetidaysatas Xoossay ubbaa lo77os ootheysa eroos.
Romans8:29 Xoossay koyrottidi eridaysati ba Na7aa daanana melanne na7ayka ammaneyisata giddon bayra gidana mela enta dummayidi wothis.
Romans8:30 Xoossay koyrottidi dummayidaysata xeegis; he xeegidaysata xillisis; he xillisidaysata qassi bonchis.
Romans8:31 Yaatin
Romans8:32 I hari attoshin
Romans8:33 Xoossay entana xillisida gisho I dooridaysata oone mootanay?

Romans8:35 Hiza
Romans8:36 Geeshsha Maxaafan

Romans9:1 Taani Kiristoosan tuma odayis
Romans9:2 Ta wozanan Isra7eeletas daro qadhetaysinne qamma gallas qopayis.
Romans9:3 Taani
Romans9:4 Enti Isra7eeleta
Romans9:5 Enti yeletethan mayzata koche; qassi Kiristoosi ashon enta koche gididi yis. Ubbaafe bolla gidida Xoossay merinaw galatetto. Amin7i!
Romans9:6 Gidoshin
Romans9:7 Qassi Abrahaame zare ubbay Abrahaame nayta gidokona. Xoossay Abrahaames
Romans9:8 Hessa guussay ashon yeletida nayti ubbay Xoossaa nayta gidokona. Shin tuma Isra7eele nayti Xoossay Abrahaames gelida qaalada yeletida nayta.
Romans9:9 Xoossay immana gidi gelida qaalay
Romans9:10 Hessa xalaala gidonashin

Romans9:30 Yaatin

Romans10:4 Asi ubbay ammanon xillana mela Kiristoosi higgiya polis.
Romans10:5 Asi higge naagidi ekiya xillotethabaa Musey xaafishe
Romans10:6 Shin ammanon ekiya xillotethabaa geetetiday haysa: “Ne wozanan
Romans10:7 Woyko
Romans10:8 Shin yaagidi xaafetis: ‘Xoossaa qaalay ne matana; ne doonaninne ne wozanan de7ees’ Nuuni hintew odiya ammano qaalay haysa.
Romans10:9 “Yesuusi Godaa” gada ne doonan markatikonne Xoossay iya hayqope denthidaysa ne wozanan ammaniko
Romans10:10 Asi ba wozanan ammanidi xillees; ba doonan markatidi attees.
