Romans11:1 Ane ta oychayis: yaatin
Romans11:2 Xoossay koyro doorida ba asata yeggenna. Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans11:3 Eeliyaasi
Romans11:4 Xoossay iyaw woygidi zaaridee? “Ba7aale geetetiya eeqas goyinniboona laapun mukulu asaa taw ashshas” yaagis.
Romans11:5 Hessadaka
Romans11:6 I enta dooriday ba aadho keehatethanaape attishin
Romans11:7 Yaatin
Romans11:8 Hessika
Romans11:9 Qassi Dawiti
Romans11:10 Enti xeellonnaada enta ayfey goozeto; ubba wode meton enti kuunidi de7o” yaagis.
Romans11:11 Yaatin
Romans11:12 Ayhudeta nagaray alamiyas daro anjo ehis; qassi enta kundethay Ayhude gidonna asaas daro anjo gidis. Yaatin
Romans11:13 Taani
Romans11:14 Ta hessa oothiday taw ashon koche gidida Isra7eeleta qiiroyada entafe guuthata ashshanaasa.
Romans11:15 Xoossay enta yeggida wode
Romans11:16 Koyro menthida baso uythay Xoossaas yarshetidi geeshshi gidiko
Romans11:17 Gaden tokida shamaho tashe gidida Ayhudeti karetin
Romans11:18 Hiza
Romans11:19 Neeni
Romans11:20 Hessi tuma. Enti ammanibona gisho karetidosona. Neeni ammanida gisho he bessan eqadasa. Neeni yayyanaw besseesipe attishin
Romans11:21 Xoossay medhon tashe gidida Ayhudetas qadhetonna ixiko hintewuka qadhetenna.
Romans11:22 Hiza
Romans11:23 Ayhudeti ammaniko
Romans11:24 Hintena bazzon de7iya shamaho gidida Ayhude gidonnayisata qanxidi
Romans11:25 Ta ishato
Romans11:26 Hessadaka
Romans11:27 Taani enta nagara atto giya wode entara caaqana caaqoy haysa” geetetidi xaafetis.
Romans11:28 Ayhudeti Wongela ekonna ixidi
Romans11:29 Xoossay ba imuwaninne ba xeessan qiirotenna.
Romans11:30 Hinte Ayhude gidonnaysati kase Xoossaas kiitetibeketa. Shin ha77i Ayhudeti kiitetonna ixin
Romans11:31 Hessadaka

Romans11:33 Xoossaa duretetha

Romans11:36 Ubbaa I medhis; ubbay iyan de7ees; ubbay iya bonchosa. Xoossaas merinaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
Romans12:1 Hiza
Romans12:2 Lo77o
Romans12:3 Xoossay hinte issuwas issuwas immida ammanuwa mela wozanaama asada qopite. Qopanaw besseysafe aathidi hintena dummayidi
Romans12:4 Nu issi asatethaa giddon dumma dumma kifileti de7oosona; he dumma dumma kifiletas dumma dumma oosoy de7ees.
Romans12:5 Hessada
Romans12:6 Nuus imetida aadho keehatethan dumma dumma imotati de7oosona. Nu imoy tinbit odo gidiko
Romans12:7 Nu imoy harata maade gidiko
Romans12:8 Nu imoy harata minthetho gidiko
Romans12:9 Hinte siiqoy qoodhepe qommon gidanaw bessenna. Iitaba ixite; lo77oba minthidi oykite.
Romans12:10 Issoy issuwara ishada siiqetite; issoy issuwa bonchite.
Romans12:11 Azallofite; hinte ayyaanan minnidi
Romans12:12 Xoossay immida ufaysan ufaytite; metuwa danda7ite; ubba wode Xoossaa woossite.
Romans12:13 Ammaniya geeshshata koshshiyaban maaddite; imathata mokite.
Romans12:14 Hintena goodeyisata anjite; anjitepe attishin
Romans12:15 Ufayteysatara ufaytite; yeekeysatara yeekite.
Romans12:16 Issoy issuwara issi qofan de7ite. Otoro qofaa aggidi
Romans12:17 Oonika hintew iitabaa oothiko
Romans12:18 Asa ubbaara saron daanaw hintew danda7etiya ubbaa oothite.
Romans12:19 Ta ishato
Romans12:20 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans12:21 Iitaa lo77on xoonape attishin
Romans13:1 Xoossaa shene gidonashin maati imetonna gishonne ha77i de7iya shuumatika Xoossaa shenen shuumetida gisho asi ubbay deriya ayseysatas kiitetanaw bessees.
Romans13:2 Hessa gisho
Romans13:3 Ayseysati iita ootheysatape attishin
Romans13:4 Enti new lo77oba oothanaw shuumetida Xoossaa aylle. Shin neeni iitabaa oothiko
Romans13:5 Hessa gisho
Romans13:6 Hinte giira giireyka hessasa. Deriya ayseysati he oosuwa oothey
Romans13:7 Issuwas issuwas besseysa immite. Giira giiranaw besseysas giirite; qaraxa qanxanaw besseysas qaraxa qanxite; yayyanaw besseysas yayyite; bonchoy besseysa bonchite.
Romans13:8 Issoy issuwara siiqetite. Siiqo acope attishin
Romans13:9 “Laammofa; wodhopa; kaysotopa; amottofa” giya kiitaynne hara kiita ubbay
Romans13:10 Ase siiqiya oonika iya bolla iitabaa oothenna. Hessa gisho
Romans13:11 Dhiskofe hinte barkiya wodey ha77i gideysa akeekidi hessa oothite. Nu attana wodey koyro nu ammanida wodiyape ha77i nuuko matis.
Romans13:12 Dhuma wodey aadhanaw hanees; wontay matis. Hiza
Romans13:13 Ane gallas poo7on de7iya asada maaran de7oos. Mathoninne laymatethara gahetiya dumma dumma tuna oosotan
Romans13:14 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa kanduwa ma7ite; hinte nagarancho asatethay ba amuwa polana mela iyaw qopofite.
Romans14:1 Ammanon daaburida oonaka shiishi ekitepe attishin
Romans14:2 Leemisos
Romans14:3 Ubbabaa miya asi moonna uraa kadhopo. Ubbabaa moonna asi miya uraa bolla pirdofo. Xoossay ubbaa miya uraa shiishi ekis.
Romans14:4 Hara asa aylle bolla pirdey neeni oonee? I daaburin woyko minnin ba Godaasa. Goday iya essanaw danda7iya gisho I minnidi eqana.
Romans14:5 Qassi “Issi gallasay hara gallasape aadhees” yaagidi qopiya asi de7ees. Haray qassi
Romans14:6 Issi gallasaa hara gallasatape aathidi bonchiya oonika Godaa bonchoos gidi oothees. Ubba kathi miya asi Godaa bonchoos gidi mees. I miya he kathaa gisho
Romans14:7 Nuupe oonika baw deenna; qassi nu giddofe oonika baw hayqenna.
Romans14:8 Nu de7on de7iko Godaas de7oos; qassi hayqikoka Godaas hayqoos. Hiza
Romans14:9 Kiristoosi hayqidi hayqope dendiday
Romans14:10 Yaatin
Romans14:11 Geeshsha Maxaafan Goday
Romans14:12 Hiza
Romans14:13 Hessa gisho
Romans14:14 Godaa Yesuusa ammaniya asada
Romans14:15 Ne miya katha gisho ne ishaa dhubiyaba gidiko
Romans14:16 Hiza
Romans14:17 Xoossaa kawotethay Geeshsha Ayyaanay immiya xillotethi
Romans14:18 Hessada Kiristoosas oothiya asi Xoossaa ufaysees; asanka anjetees.
Romans14:19 Hessa gisho
Romans14:20 Katha gisho gada Xoossaa oosuwa dhaysofa. Ubba kathi meetetees
Romans14:21 Ne ishay dhubetonna mela asho moonna woyko ushshu uyonna woyko ne ishaa dhubiya haraba oothonna agoy lo77o.
Romans14:22 Hiza
Romans14:23 Shin sidhishe miya uraas iya muussay ammanon gidonna gisho pirdetees. Ammanoy bayna oosetida ooso ubbay nagara.
Romans15:1 Nuuni ammanon minnidaysati daaburanchota toohuwa tookanaw bessees. Nuuni nuna ufaysanaw bessenna.
Romans15:2 Nuuni nu ishaa ammanon minthanaw iya maaddanawunne ufaysanaw bessees.
Romans15:3 Kiristoosi bana ufaysibeenna. Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans15:4 Geeshsha Maxaafay immiya gencaninne minthethuwan nu ufaysaa ekana mela Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetida ubbay nuna tamaarsanaw xaafetis.
Romans15:5 Gencanne minotethi immiya Goday hinte Kiristoos Yesuusa kaalliya wode issifetethi hintew immo.
Romans15:6 Hessika
Romans15:7 Kiristoosi hintena ekidaysada Xoossaa bonchoos issoy issuwa ekite.
Romans15:8 Xoossay beni aawatas immida ufaysay poletana melanne iya tumatethay eretana mela Kiristoosi Ayhudeta aylle gididi yidaysa ta hintew odayis.
Romans15:9 Kiristoosi Ayhudeta aylle gidida hara gaasoy qassi Ayhude gidonna asati Xoossaa iya maarotethaa gisho galatana melasa. Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans15:10 Qassi
Romans15:11 Qassi zaaridi
Romans15:12 Hessada Isayaasi
Romans15:13 Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan hinte diccana mela ufaysi immiya Xoossay
Romans15:14 Ta ishato
Romans15:15 Taani hintena issi issiba guja akeekisanaw koyada yayyonna ha dabdaabiya hintew xaafas.
Romans15:16 Taani Kiristoos Yesuusa aylle gidada
Romans15:17 Taani Kiristoos Yesuusan gidada Xoossaas oothiya oosuwan ceeqetayis.
Romans15:18 Ayhude gidonna asay Xoossaas kiitetanaada
Romans15:19 Xoossay hessa malaataninne Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan waati oothidaako ta hintew odana. Taani Yerusalaamepe doomada
Romans15:20 Taani hara asi baasida bessan keexanaw koyke. Kiristoosa sunthay xeegetiboona bessan Wongela odanaw amottayis.
Romans15:21 Geeshsha Maxaafan
Romans15:22 Hessa gaason
Romans15:23 Shin taani ha77i ha heeran ta oosuwa ongida gishonne daro laythafe doomada hintena be7anaw laamotida gisho
Romans15:24 taani Ispeene bashe hintena be7anaw qopas. Qassi guutha wode hintera ufaytidaape guye
Romans15:25 Shin ha77i taani Xoossaa asata maaddanaw Yerusalaame bayis.
Romans15:26 Maqedoonenne Akayan de7iya Xoossa asati
Romans15:27 Enti manqota maaddanaysi entaw attonnaba gidida gisho banta huuphen hessa oothanaw qofa qachidosona. Ayhudeti Ayhude gidonaysatara ayyaana anjuwa shaaketiko
Romans15:28 Hessa gisho
Romans15:29 Taani hinteko biya wode Kiristoosa anjuwan kumada baanaysa erayis.
Romans15:30 Ta ishato
Romans15:31 Xoossay tana Yihudan de7iya ammanonna asatape ashshanaadanne Yerusalaamen ta oothana oosoy Xoossaa asata matan eketana mela taw woossite.
Romans15:32 Qassi Xoossay giiko
Romans15:33 Sarotethaa Xoossay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.
Romans16:1 Kinkire kataman de7iya woosa keethan oothiya nu michiya Feebena lo77o maccas gideysa hinte erana mela koyayis.
Romans16:2 Hinte ammaniya asati Godaa sunthan mokanaw bessiya ammaniya asatape issuwada iyo mokite. Iya hintefe koyaba ubbaa iyo maaddite. Iya ba huuphen daro asaa maaddasu; qassi tana ta huuphenka daro maaddasu.
Romans16:3 Kiristoos Yesuusa oosuwa taara issife oothiya Phirisqillanne Aqila saro giite.
Romans16:4 Enti ta gisho banta shempuwa aathidi immidosona. Ta xalaala gidonashin
Romans16:5 Enta son shiiqiya ammaniya asaa saro giite. Iise biittan Kiristoosa koyro ammanida
Romans16:6 Hinte gisho ooson daro daaburida Mayraamo saro giite.
Romans16:7 Taara qasho keethan aathida ta Ayhude laggeta Andiraniqosanne Yuniyasa saro giite. Enti Yesuusa hawaareta giddon eretidaysata. Qassi enti Kiristoosa taape sinthe ammanidosona.
Romans16:8 Godan ammaniya ta siiqo laggiya
Romans16:9 Kiristoosa oosuwa nuura issife oothiya Urbaanosanne ta dosiya Istakuusa saro giite.
Romans16:10 Kiristoosan ammanthiya aylliya Aphelisas ta sarothuwa odite. Arsxobuloosa soo asaas ta sarothuwa odite.
Romans16:11 Ta Ayhude laggiya Herodiyoona saro giite. Narsisasinne iya soo asaape Kiristoosa ammanidaysata saro giite.
Romans16:12 Godaa oosuwan daaburiya Tirufaynanne Tirufoosa saro giite. Qassi Godaas daro daaburada oothiya
Romans16:13 Godaa oosuwan daro eretida Rufoosasinne tana ba na7ada be7iya iya aayes ta sarothuwa odite.
Romans16:14 Asqarixoonas
Romans16:15 Filologuusa
Romans16:16 Geeshsha yeeretethi yeeretishe
Romans16:17 Ta ishato
Romans16:18 Hessa mela asati bantaw oothosonape attishin
Romans16:19 Wongelas hinte kiitetidaysa asa ubbay si7idaysi tana ufaysees. Shin hinte lo77oba erana melanne iitabaape haakana mela ta koyayis.
Romans16:20 Sarotethaa Xoossay Xalahiya hinte tohuwape garsan gaaci yeggana. Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hintera gido.
Romans16:21 Taara oothiya Ximotiyoosi hintena saro yaagees. Hessadaka
Romans16:22 Taani
Romans16:23 Tana mokidaynne woosa keetha ubbay iya son shiiqiya Gaayoosi
Romans16:24 [Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.]
Romans16:25 Galatay Xoossaas gido. Taani
Romans16:26 Shin ha77i he tumay qoncis. Kawotetha ubbay ammanidi kiitetana mela merinaa Xoossaa kiitan nabeti he tumabaa xaafidosona.
Romans16:27 Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara cincatethi iya xalaalas de7iya

1Corinthians1:6 Taani Kiristoosaba markatidaysi tuma gideysa hessi qoncisees.

1Corinthians1:14 Taani Qarisphoosinne Gaayoosi attishin
1Corinthians1:15 Hessa gisho

1Corinthians1:17 Kiristoosi tana kiittiday wongela odana melasafe attishin
1Corinthians1:18 Kiristoosa masqala qaalay dhayeysatas eeyatethi
1Corinthians1:19 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians1:20 Yaatin
1Corinthians1:21 Ha sa7aa asay banta cincatethan Xoossa eronna mela ba cincatethan diggidi
1Corinthians1:22 Ayhudeti malaata be7anaw koyoosona; qassi Giriketi cincatethi koyoosona.
1Corinthians1:23 Shin nuuni masqale bolla kaqetida Kiristoosa sabbakoos. Hessi Ayhudetas dhube; qassi Giriketas eeyatethi gidis.
1Corinthians1:24 Shin Xoossay xeegidaysatas
1Corinthians1:25 Xoossa eeyatethi asa cincatethafe aadhees; qassi Xoossa daaburay asa minotethafe minnees.
1Corinthians1:26 Hiza
1Corinthians1:27 Shin Xoossay cincata yeellayanaw alamen de7iya eeyata dooris; qassi minota yeellayanaw alamen de7iya daaburanchota dooris.
1Corinthians1:28 Ha alamiyan gita geetetidaba dhaysanaw
1Corinthians1:29 Xoossa sinthan oonika ceeqetonna mela hessa oothis.

1Corinthians2:1 Ta ishato
1Corinthians2:2 Taani hintera de7iya wode masqaliya bolla kaqetida Yesuus Kiristoosape attishin
1Corinthians2:3 Ta hintera de7iya wode daaburan
1Corinthians2:4 Ta kiitaynne ta timirtey doona bilatethaninne cincatethan gidonashin
1Corinthians2:5 Hessika
1Corinthians2:6 Ayyaana de7on diccidaysatas nuuni cincatetha qaalan odoos. Shin he cincatethay
1Corinthians2:7 Shin nuuni odiya cincetethay
1Corinthians2:8 Ha sa7aa haareysatape oonika ha cincatetha eribookona. Enti eridaba gidiyako
1Corinthians2:9 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians2:10 Xoossay ba xuura ba Ayyaana baggara nuus qoncisis. Geeshsha Ayyaanay hari attoshin
1Corinthians2:11 Asan de7iya asa ayyaanape attishin
1Corinthians2:12 Xoossay nuus coo immidaba nu erana mela Xoossa Ayyaana ekidaape attishin
1Corinthians2:13 Nuuni ayyaanaba
1Corinthians2:14 Geeshsha Ayyaani bayna asi Xoossa Ayyaana imotata ekenna. Hessi iyaw eeyatethi; ubbay Geeshsha Ayyaanan pilgetiya gisho
1Corinthians2:15 Geeshsha Ayyaani de7iya asi ubbaba pilgees
1Corinthians2:16 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians3:1 Ta ishato
1Corinthians3:2 Hinte mino kathi maanaw danda7iboona gisho
1Corinthians3:3 Ha77ika hinte ammanonna asada de7eeta. Hinte giddon de7iya qanaateynne ooshshi hinte ammanonna asada de7eysa erisennee? Hinte ammanonna asada haneeta.
1Corinthians3:4 Hintefe issoy
1Corinthians3:5 Yaatin
1Corinthians3:6 Taani tokas; Aphiloosi haathe ushshis
1Corinthians3:7 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians3:8 Tokeynne haathe ushshey woli mela
1Corinthians3:9 Nuuni issife Xoossas oothiya iya oosanchota gidiya gisho
1Corinthians3:10 Xoossay taw immida aadho keehatetha mela hiillancho anaaxeda baaso yeggas. Hara asi iya bolla keexees. Shin iya bolla keexiya oonika waatidi keexiyako
1Corinthians3:11 Issi toho yegetida baasope hara baaso yegganaw oonika danda7enna. He baasoyka Yesuus Kiristoosa.
1Corinthians3:12 Shin ha baasuwa bolla oonika worqan woyko biran gidin
1Corinthians3:13 issi issi asi he baasuwa bolla aybin keexidako pirda gallas taman paacetidi qoncana.
1Corinthians3:14 Oonika he baasuwa bolla keexida keethay taman xuugetonna attiko
1Corinthians3:15 Shin oodde oosoyka taman xuugetiko
1Corinthians3:16 Hinte Xoossa keethi gideysanne Xoossa Ayyaani hintenan de7eysa ereketii?
1Corinthians3:17 Oonika Xoossaa keethi laalliko
1Corinthians3:18 Oonika bana cimmofo. Ha sa7aa cincatethan bana cinca oothidi ekiya oonika Xoossaa sinthan cinca gidanaw eeya gido.
1Corinthians3:19 Ha sa7a cincatethay Xoossa sinthan eeyatethi. Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians3:20 Qassi
1Corinthians3:21 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians3:22 Phawuloosi
1Corinthians3:23 Hinte Kiristoosassa; Kiristoosi Xoossasa.
1Corinthians4:1 Asay nuna Kiristoosa aylledanne Xoossa xuura qoncisanaw hadari imetida asada oothidi qopo.
1Corinthians4:2 Hadara ekida asati banta Godaas ammanetidaysata gidanaw bessees.
1Corinthians4:3 Shin hinte woyko hari tana pirdiko
1Corinthians4:4 Ta kahay geeshshi
1Corinthians4:5 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians4:6 Ta ishato
1Corinthians4:7 Ne haratape aybin aadhay? Neeni ekaboonabay aybi de7ii? Neeni ekidaba hara asape ekida gidiko
1Corinthians4:8 Ha77i hinte kallideta. Ha77i hinte duretideta. Nuuni bayna hinte xalaala kawotideta. Hinte tuma kawotidaba gidiyako
1Corinthians4:9 Taw
1Corinthians4:10 Nuuni Kiristoosa gisho eeya gidida
1Corinthians4:11 Ha77i gakanaw nu koshatoos
1Corinthians4:12 Nuuni nu kushen oothidi aqoos. Nuna asi baaddiya wode anjoos; nuna goodiya wode danda7oos.
1Corinthians4:13 Nu bolla iitabaa odetiya wode lo77o qaala zaaros. Nu ha77i gakanaw ha alamiya pitonne wora yegetiya buure gidida.
1Corinthians4:14 Taani hessa xaafiday
1Corinthians4:15 Kiristoosan hintena dichiya taybope bolla gidida kaaletheysati de7ikoka
1Corinthians4:16 Hiza
1Corinthians4:17 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians4:18 Taani hinteko yoonnaba daanin
1Corinthians4:19 Shin Goday giiko
1Corinthians4:20 Xoossaa kawotethay oda gidonashin
1Corinthians4:21 Taani hinteko xam7ara booye woyko siiqoranne ashke ayyaanara boo? Awusa dooretii?
1Corinthians5:1 Hinte giddon laymatethi de7eysi zigiretees. Hessa mela laymatethi hari attoshin
1Corinthians5:2 Hinte hessan qiirotanawunne yeellatanaw bessenne
1Corinthians5:3 Taani ashon hintera doona ixikoka ayyaanan ta hintera de7ayis. Taani hintera de7iya asada hanada hessa mela oosuwa oothida ura bolla pirdas.
1Corinthians5:4 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan hinte shiiqiya wode taani ayyaanan hintera daana. Hessan Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa wolqay hintera gidana.
1Corinthians5:5 He ura nagara ashoy dhaydi
1Corinthians5:6 Hinte ceeqoy lo77o gidenna. Guutha irshoy munuqa ubba dentheysa ereketiyee?
1Corinthians5:7 Hinte ha77i irshoy bayna munuqa gidana mela
1Corinthians5:8 Hessi gisho
1Corinthians5:9 Ta kase xaafida dabdaabiyan hinte laymatiya asara gahetonna mela hintew odas.
1Corinthians5:10 Hessa guussay ha alamiyan de7iya laymateysatara woyko uuzetara woyko kaysotara woyko eeqa goyinneysatara polo gahetofite guussu gidenna. Hessa gidiko
1Corinthians5:11 Shin ammanayis yaagishe laymateysatara woyko uuzetara woyko eeqa goyinneysatara woyko cayeysatara woyko mathoteysatara woyko kaysotara gahetofite gada hintew odayis. Hessa mela asara hari attoshin
1Corinthians5:12 Woosa keethafe karera de7eyisata bolla pirdanaw tana aybe gathey? Woosa keethan de7eyisata bolla hinte pirdeketiyee?
1Corinthians5:13 Shin karera de7eyisata bolla Xoossay pirdana. He iitaba oothiya ura hinte giddofe kessite.
1Corinthians6:1 Hinte giddofe issoy issuwara mootoy de7iko
1Corinthians6:2 Ammaniya asay alame bolla pirdanaysa hinte ereketii? Yaatin
1Corinthians6:3 Nuuni kiitanchota bolla pirdanaysa ereketii? Yaatin
1Corinthians6:4 Yaatin
1Corinthians6:5 Taani hintena yeellayanaw hessa gayis. Hinte giddon kacetida ishata sigethanaw danda7iya akeeka asi baawee?
1Corinthians6:6 Yaatin
1Corinthians6:7 Hiza
1Corinthians6:8 Shin hinte woli giddon ammaneysati
1Corinthians6:9 Geellati Xoossa kawotethi laattonaysa hinte ereketii? Hintena cimmofite; laymateysati woyko eeqa goyinneysati woyko laammeysati woyko addera addera gaheteysati
1Corinthians6:10 woyko kaysoti woyko uuzeti woyko mathoteysati woyko cayeysati woyko bonqeysati Xoossa kawotethi laattokona.
1Corinthians6:11 Hintefe issi issi asati kase hessa mela. Shin ha77i
1Corinthians6:12 Hinte
1Corinthians6:13 Hinte
1Corinthians6:14 Xoossay Godaa hayqope denthidaysada
1Corinthians6:15 Hinte asatethay Kiristoosa asatethafe issi bagga gideysa ereketii? Yaatin
1Corinthians6:16 Laymatiya addey
1Corinthians6:17 Shin Godaara issifiya asi iyara ayyaanan issino gidees.
1Corinthians6:18 Laymatethafe haakite. Issi asi oothiya hara nagari iya asatethafe karera oosetees
1Corinthians6:19 Hinte asatethay
1Corinthians6:20 Xoossay hintena gaten shammis. Hessa gisho
1Corinthians7:1 Hinte taw xaafida dabdaabiyas zaaroy haysa. Issi asi maccas bochonna aggiko lo77o.
1Corinthians7:2 Shin laymatethafe attanaw issi issi addey macho eko; qassi issi issi maccasas azini de7o.
1Corinthians7:3 Azinay ba machees
1Corinthians7:4 Machees ba asatethaa bolla maati baawa
1Corinthians7:5 Hinte woosan guutha wode gam7anaw zoretethan gidonna ixiko
1Corinthians7:6 Shin taani hintena zoranaw haysa gaysipe attishin
1Corinthians7:7 Asi ubbay taada macho ekonna de7iyako dosayis
1Corinthians7:8 Macho ekiboonaysatasinne azina geliboonnaysatas qassi am7etas taani odey
1Corinthians7:9 Shin amon xuugeteysafe ekeysinne geleysi lo77o gidiya gisho
1Corinthians7:10 Taani ekidaysatanne gelidaysata haysada gada zorayis; tana gidike Goday kiittees; machiya ba azinaape shaaketofo.
1Corinthians7:11 Shin shaaketiko hara azina gelonna barka de7o woyko ba azinara sigeto. Azini ba machiw billofo.
1Corinthians7:12 Shin haratas Godaa gidonashin
1Corinthians7:13 Qassi ammanonna azini de7iya ammaniya macha de7iko
1Corinthians7:14 Ammanonna azini ba ammaniya mache baggara xillees; qassi ammanonna machiya ba ammaniya azina baggara xillawusu. Hessi bayneko
1Corinthians7:15 Shin ammanonna azinay woyko machiya billanaw koyko billo. Ammaniya machiya woyko azinay hessa melaban qashetokona. Xoossi nuna sarotethan daana mela xeegis.
1Corinthians7:16 Neno
1Corinthians7:17 Issi issi asi Goday iyaw immida imotadanne Xoossay iya xeegidaysada de7o. Woosa keetha ubban taani tamaarsiya wogay haysa.
1Corinthians7:18 Oonika qaxaretidi xeegetidaba gidiko
1Corinthians7:19 Xoossa kiitaa polanaw besseesipe attishin
1Corinthians7:20 Issi issi asi Xoossay bana xeegiya wode de7eysada de7o.
1Corinthians7:21 Xoossay nena xeegiya wode neeni ayllee? Aykoy baawa hessas un7etofa. Shin neeni aylletethafe la77a keyanaw danda7iko la77a keya.
1Corinthians7:22 Aylle gididi de7ishe Godan xeegetida asi Godan aylletethafe la77a keyis. Hessadaka
1Corinthians7:23 Xoossay hintena gaten shammida gisho asa aylle gidopite.
1Corinthians7:24 Ta ishato
1Corinthians7:25 Geela7otaba Goday tana kiittidabay baawa. Shin Goday taw immida maarotetha mela taani hintena zorayis.
1Corinthians7:26 Hiza
1Corinthians7:27 Ne macho ekidaba gidiko
1Corinthians7:28 Shin ne macho ekiko nagari baawa. Hessada geela7iya azina geliko nagari baawa. Shin ekiya geliya asaas ha sa7an daro metoy de7iya gisho hinte hessafe attana mela taani koyayis.
1Corinthians7:29 Ta ishato
1Corinthians7:30 Yeekeysati yeekonaada
1Corinthians7:31 Ha sa7aa shalon maadeteysati maadetiboonada hano. Ha alamiya malay aadhana.
1Corinthians7:32 Hinte hirgi bayna daana mela ta dosayis. Macho ekiboonaysi Godaa ufaysanaw koya gisho
1Corinthians7:33 Shin macho ekidaysi ba machiw ufaysanaw koya gisho
1Corinthians7:34 Iya qofay nam7an shaaketees. Azina gelaboonna geela7iya ba asatethaninne ba shempuwan geeyada Godaa ufaysanaw koya gisho
1Corinthians7:35 Taani hessa hintew odey
1Corinthians7:36 Oonika ba oychida geela7es gelo wodey aadhis gidi iyo agganaw qopiko
1Corinthians7:37 Shin issi asi un7ethiyabay dhayin
1Corinthians7:38 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians7:39 Machiya ba azinay paxa de7iya wode ubban iyara qashetasu. Shin I azinay hayqiko
1Corinthians7:40 Ta qofan gidiko
1Corinthians8:1 Eeqas yarshetiya kathaba gidiko nu ubbay eroos. Eratethi otorsees
1Corinthians8:2 Oonika bana erayis gidi qopiko
1Corinthians8:3 Shin oonika Xoosse siiqiko
1Corinthians8:4 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians8:5 Xoosse gidonashin
1Corinthians8:6 ubbaba medhida
1Corinthians8:7 Shin ha erey ubba matan deenna. Issi issi asay eeqa goyinnora meezetida gisho
1Corinthians8:8 Shin kathi nuna Xoossara daboyenna. Nu moonna aggidi aykoka qohetoko; qassi midi dumma go7etoko.
1Corinthians8:9 Shin hinte koydaba maanaw maati hintew de7ikoka hessi ammanon minnonna asata dhubonna mela naagetite.
1Corinthians8:10 Neeni nena erancho gada eeqas yarshetida kathi maanaw eeqa keethan uttidashin
1Corinthians8:11 Hiza
1Corinthians8:12 Hessada oothidi
1Corinthians8:13 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians9:1 Taani yeda de7iya asi gidikina? Ta hawaare gidikina? Taani nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa be7abikina? Hinte Godan ta daabura ayfe gideketii?
1Corinthians9:2 Hinte Godaaba gidiya gisho
1Corinthians9:3 Tana hawaare gidenna geysatas taani immiya zaaroy haysa.
1Corinthians9:4 Nu hintefe maanawunne uyanaw tuma nuus maati baawee?
1Corinthians9:5 Hanko hawaaretada
1Corinthians9:6 Woyko oothidi aqanaw bessey taaranne Barnabaasa xalaalee?
1Corinthians9:7 Ba miishen wotaadaretathi oothey oonee? Woyko woyne tokidi
1Corinthians9:8 Taani hessa asa qofatho gaynayee? Muse higgey hessa geeneyee?
1Corinthians9:9 Muse Higgiyan
1Corinthians9:10 Xoossay hessa giday nuus qopidi gidennee? Ee
1Corinthians9:11 Nuuni hinte giddon ayyaana zerethi zerida gidiko
1Corinthians9:12 Harati hessa hintefe ekanaw entaw maati de7iko
1Corinthians9:13 Xoossa keethan oothiya asati banta katha xoossa keethafe ekeysa ereketii? Qassi yarsho bessan oothiya asati yarshuwafe ekeysa ereketii?
1Corinthians9:14 Hessadaka
1Corinthians9:15 Shin taani ha maata ubban aykoka go7etabike. Taani hessa xaafiday ta maata bonchisanaw koyada gidenna. Oonika ta ceequwa hada oothanaape hayqoy taw lo77o.
1Corinthians9:16 Taani wongela odey kiitetida gishosafe attishin
1Corinthians9:17 Taani wongela dosada odiko
1Corinthians9:18 Yaatin
1Corinthians9:19 Taani oodeska aylle gidike
1Corinthians9:20 Taani Ayhudeta maaddanaw entara enta gidas. Ta huuphen higgefe garsan de7ike
1Corinthians9:21 Xoossa higgiyafe kare keyonna
1Corinthians9:22 Taani daaburanchota maaddanaw daaburancho gidas. Taani issota issota maaddanaw ubbaara ubbaba hanas.
1Corinthians9:23 Taani wongela anjuwa shaaketanaw
1Corinthians9:24 Wothan gaaddetiya ubbay woxees
1Corinthians9:25 Gaaddetiya asa ubbay ubbaban bantana haarees. Enti hessa daaburey dhayiya woyto ekanaasa. Shin nuuni daaburey merina woyto ekanaasa.
1Corinthians9:26 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians9:27 Shin taani haratas wongela odidaape guye
1Corinthians10:1 Ta ishato
1Corinthians10:2 Enti Musera issifanaw shaaraninne abban xammaqetidosona.
1Corinthians10:3 Enti ubbay issi ayyaana kathi midosona.
1Corinthians10:4 Qassi ubbay issi ayyaana ushsha uyidosona. Enti bantana kaalliya ayyaana zaallafe pultida ushsha uyidosona; he zaallayka Kiristoosa.
1Corinthians10:5 Shin Xoossay entafe darotan ufaytiboonna gisho
1Corinthians10:6 Enti iitaba amotidaysada
1Corinthians10:7 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians10:8 Entafe issoti issoti laymatidaysada nu laymatanaw bessenna. Hessa gaason entafe issi gallas laatamanne heedzu mukulay hayqis.
1Corinthians10:9 Entafe issoti issoti Godaa paacidi shooshan duketidi hayqidaysada nu Godaa paacanaw bessenna.
1Corinthians10:10 Entafe issoti issoti zuuzumidi hayqo ehiya kiitanchuwan dhayidaysada hinteka zuuzumofite.
1Corinthians10:11 Ha enta bolla gakida ubbay nu naagetana mela nuus leemiso gidis. Qassi wode wursethaa bolla de7iya nuus timirte gidana mela ha ubbay xaafetis.
1Corinthians10:12 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians10:13 Ase ubbaa gakiya paacepe attishin
1Corinthians10:14 Hiza
1Corinthians10:15 Hinte wozanaama asi gidida gisho ta haysa odayis. Taani geysi tuma gideysa hinte hinte huuphen pirdite.
1Corinthians10:16 Nuuni Xoossaa galatidi shaaketiya anjo xuu7ay Kiristoosa suuthara issifetethi de7eysa gidenneyee? Qassi nuuni bathiya uythay Kiristoosa ashuwara issifetethi de7eysa gidenneyee?
1Corinthians10:17 Nuuni daro gidikoka uythay issino
1Corinthians10:18 Ane Isra7eele asay oothidaysa akeekite. Yarshetida yarshuwa meysati yarsho bessaara issifetethi baaweyee?
1Corinthians10:19 Taani ay gaanaw koyada gayna? Eeqas yarshetida kathay woyko eeqay pathiyaba guusseyee?
1Corinthians10:20 Gidenna
1Corinthians10:21 Hinte Godaa xuu7ape uyishe
1Corinthians10:22 Nuuni hessa oothidi Godaa yiloyno? Nuuni iyape aadhiya minoyee?
1Corinthians10:23 Hinte
1Corinthians10:24 Issi issi asi
1Corinthians10:25 Hinte kaha sidhen gelsiya oysha denthonna giyan bayzetiya ashuwa coo miite.
1Corinthians10:26 Ayis giiko
1Corinthians10:27 Issi ammanonna asi hintena imatanaw koydi xeegiko baanaw koyko biite. Hinte kahan medhetiya oyshan sidhonna hinte sinthe aathiyaba ubba miite.
1Corinthians10:28 Shin issi asi
1Corinthians10:29 Taani
1Corinthians10:30 Taani miya katha Xoossa galatada miiko balidada ayis boretiyana?
1Corinthians10:31 Hiza
1Corinthians10:32 Ayhudeta gidin Giriketa gidin woyko Xoossa woosa keethi gidin oodeska dhube gidopite.
1Corinthians10:33 Taani ubba wode darota ashshanaw enti maadetiya oge koyaysipe attishin tana maaddiya oge koyke.
1Corinthians11:1 Taani Kiristoosa leemisuwa kaalleysada
1Corinthians11:2 Hinte ubbaban tana qopiya gishonne taani tamaarsida timirtiya minthidi naagida gisho taani hintena galatayis.
1Corinthians11:3 Shin Kiristoosi adde ubbaas huuphe
1Corinthians11:4 Ba huuphiya guuluntidi Xoosse woossiya woyko tinbite odiya addey ubbay huuphe gidida Kiristoosa toochees.
1Corinthians11:5 Ba huuphiya qaconna Xoosse woossiya woyko tinbite odiya maccasiya huuphe gidida ba azina toochawusu. Ba huuphiya qaconna maccasiya ba huuphiya meedetida maccasa mela.
1Corinthians11:6 Maccasi ba huuphe kammonna ixiko
1Corinthians11:7 Addey Xoossa leemisonne Xoossa boncho gidiya gisho
1Corinthians11:8 Maccasi addefe medhetasupe attishin
1Corinthians11:9 Maccasi addes medhetisipe attishin
1Corinthians11:10 Haysa gishonne kiitanchota gisho maccasi baw maati de7eysa bessiya malla ba huuphen qacanaw bessees.
1Corinthians11:11 Shin Godaa qofan maccasi addey bayna deenna; addeyka maccasi bayna deenna.
1Corinthians11:12 Maccasi addefe medhetidaysada addeyka maccasape yeletis. Shin ubbayka Xoossafe medhetis.
1Corinthians11:13 Ane hinte pirdite; maccasi ba huuphe kammonna Xoossa woossanaw bessii?
1Corinthians11:14 Addey ba huuphiya dichiko iyaw borso gideysa hari attoshin medhetethi hintena tamaarsennee?
1Corinthians11:15 Shin maccasi ba huuphe dichiko iw boncho gidennee? Maccasas huuphey imetiday iya bana kammana melasa.
1Corinthians11:16 Shin haysa bolla palamanaw koya asi de7iko
1Corinthians11:17 Hinte issife shiiqey go77as gidonashin qohos gidiya gisho
1Corinthians11:18 Taani koyro si7iday
1Corinthians11:19 Hinte giddofe tumi de7eysati oonanteko eretana mela hinte giddon shaahoy daanaysi attenna.
1Corinthians11:20 Hinte issife shiiqiya wode hinte shiiqey Godaa kahuwa maanasa gidenna.
1Corinthians11:21 Hinte kathi miya wode issoy issuwa naagonna baysa baysa miya gisho
1Corinthians11:22 Tuma hinte maanawunne uyanaw hintew keethi baawee? Woyko Xoossa woosa keethi kadheetii? Aykoy bayna manqota yeellayetii? Ta hintena woygo? Haysas ta hintena nashoyee? Nashshike.
1Corinthians11:23 Taani hintew immida timirtiya Godaape ekas. Goday Yesuusi aadhidi imetiya qamma uythu ekidi
1Corinthians11:24 Xoossaa galatis. Uythaa bathidi “He7ite; miite. Haysi hintew imetiya ta ashuwa. Haysa mishe tana hassayite” yaagis.
1Corinthians11:25 Hessadaka
1Corinthians11:26 Hinte ha uytha miya wodenne ha xuu7a uyaa wode ubban Goday yaana gakanaw iya hayquwa odeeta.
1Corinthians11:27 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians11:28 Shin asi bana paaco. Yaatidi uytha mo; xuu7ape uyo.
1Corinthians11:29 Godaa ashuwaba shaakidi eronna
1Corinthians11:30 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians11:31 Shin nuuni nuna paacidi be7idaba gidiyako
1Corinthians11:32 Alamey pirdetiya wode nuuni alamiyara pirdetonna mela ha77i Goday nuna seerees.
1Corinthians11:33 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians11:34 Hinte shiiqoy pirdas gidonna mela koshatida oonika de7iko
1Corinthians12:1 Ta ishato
1Corinthians12:2 Hinte Xoossaa ammanonna wode dooni bayna eeqatan gooshetidi
1Corinthians12:3 Xoossaa Ayyaanay kaalethiya asi oonika
1Corinthians12:4 Dumma dumma Ayyaana imotati de7oosona
1Corinthians12:5 Nu Godaas oothiya dumma dumma oosoti de7oosona
1Corinthians12:6 Nu Godaas oothiya dumma dumma ogeti de7oosona
1Corinthians12:7 Shin issuwas issuwas imetida imotatan harata maaddana mela Geeshsha Ayyaanay qoncees.
1Corinthians12:8 Geeshsha Ayyaanay issuwas cincatethi kumida qaala immees; qassi issuwas eratethi kumida qaala immees.
1Corinthians12:9 He Geeshsha Ayyaanay issuwas ammano
1Corinthians12:10 Geeshsha Ayyaanay issuwas malaata oothiya wolqaa
1Corinthians12:11 Shin ha ubbaa oothey he issi Geeshsha Ayyaana. I koyiya mela issi issi asaas dumma dumma imota immees.
1Corinthians12:12 Issi asatethan daro billiteti de7oosona
1Corinthians12:13 Nuuni Ayhude gidin Girike gidin aylle gidin womaanno gidin
1Corinthians12:14 Nu asatethan dumma dumma billiteti de7oosonape attishin
1Corinthians12:15 Tohoy
1Corinthians12:16 Haythi
1Corinthians12:17 Asatetha ubbay ayfe xalaala gididaako
1Corinthians12:18 Shin Xoossay ba koydaysada
1Corinthians12:19 Ubbay issi billite gididaako asatethi waanidi daanee?
1Corinthians12:20 Shin billiteti daro gidikoka
1Corinthians12:21 Ayfey kusheko
1Corinthians12:22 Shin daabura daaniya asatethaa billiteti nuus aadhidi koshshosona.
1Corinthians12:23 Boncho koshshenna gidi nu qopiya nu billitetape baggata daro bonchoos. Qassi nu borsetiya nu asatethaa billiteta aathidi bonchidi naagoos.
1Corinthians12:24 Nu be7in borsonna asatethaa billitetas boncho koshshenna. Shin Xoossay nu asatethaa billiteta wolira gasethidi borsiya billitetas aadhiya boncho immis.
1Corinthians12:25 Asatetha billiteti issoy issuwara shaako medhonna wolis qopana mela oothidi medhis.
1Corinthians12:26 Asatetha billitetape issoy saketiko billiteti ubbay iyara saketoosona. Asatetha billitetape issoy bonchetiko billiteti ubbay iyara ufaytoosona.
1Corinthians12:27 Hinte ubbay Kiristoosa asatethi; qassi hinte issoy issoy iya billiteta.
1Corinthians12:28 Woosa keethan Xoossay
1Corinthians12:29 Ubbay hawaaree? Ubbay nabee? Ubbay astamaaree? Ubbay malaata oothii?
1Corinthians12:30 Ubbay pathiyee? Ubbay dumma dumma doonan odeetii? Ubbay dumma dumma doonan odetoysa birshii?
1Corinthians12:31 Shin ubbaafe aadhiya imota minthidi koyite. Qassi ubbaafe aadhiya ogiya ta hintena bessaana.
1Corinthians13:1 Taani asa qaalanne kiitancho qaala odetanaw danda7ikoka
1Corinthians13:2 Tinbite odiya imoti taw de7ikoka
1Corinthians13:3 Taw de7iyaba ubbaa manqotas immikoka
1Corinthians13:4 Siiqoy danda7ancho. Siiqoy keeha. Siiqoy qanaatenna. Siiqoy ceeqetenna. Siiqoy otorenna.
1Corinthians13:5 Siiqoy bessonnaba oothenna. Siiqoy uuzetenna. Siiqoy yilotenna. Siiqoy ba qoho paydenna.
1Corinthians13:6 Siiqoy tuman ufaytesipe attishin
1Corinthians13:7 Siiqoy ubbaa danda7ees; ubbaa ammanees; lo77obay hanana gidi
1Corinthians13:8 Siiqoy wursethi gakanaw dhayenna. Shin tinbitey attana; dumma dumma doonan odeteysi attana; eratethika aadhana.
1Corinthians13:9 Nu eratethaafe guuthi eroos; tinbitepe baggaa odoos.
1Corinthians13:10 Shin polo gididaysi yaa wode polo gidonnaysi attana.
1Corinthians13:11 Taani na7a de7iya wode na7ada haasayis; na7ada qopayis; na7ada akeekayis. Ta kahaamida wode na7atetha hanuwa aggas.
1Corinthians13:12 Ha77i poo7oy bayna son mastooten be7eysada be7oos
1Corinthians13:13 Hiza
1Corinthians14:1 Siiqo kaallite. Ayyaana imotata minthidi koyite; ubbaafe aathidi
1Corinthians14:2 Dumma dumma doonan odetiya asi Xoossaas odeesipe attishin
1Corinthians14:3 Shin tinbite odeysati ase dichanaw
1Corinthians14:4 Dumma dumma doonan odiya asi bana dichees. Shin tinbite odiya asi woosa keethaa dichees.
1Corinthians14:5 Hinte ubbay dumma dumma doonan odetiyako ta dosayis
1Corinthians14:6 Shin ta ishato
1Corinthians14:7 Dumma dumma yetha miishetas issi qommo girsi de7iko
1Corinthians14:8 Qassi moyze punoy geeyidi eretonna ixiko olas giigetey oonee?
1Corinthians14:9 Hessadaka
1Corinthians14:10 Ha alamiyan daro doonati de7oosona; he ubbaas birshethi de7ees.
1Corinthians14:11 Shin issi asi odetiya doona taani eronna ixiko I taw imathe gidees; taka iyaw imathe gidayis.
1Corinthians14:12 Hessadaka
1Corinthians14:13 Dumma dumma doonan odetiya asi ba odaa birshanaw birshetha imotay imetana mela Xoossaa woosso.
1Corinthians14:14 Taani dumma dumma doonan Xoossaa woossiko
1Corinthians14:15 Yaatin
1Corinthians14:16 Hessa gidonna ixiko neeni ne ayyaanan Xoossaa galatiya wode he bessan neeni geysa eronna asi ne galateysa woygidi
1Corinthians14:17 Neeni Xoossaa galateysi lo77o
1Corinthians14:18 Ta hinte ubbaafe aathada dumma dumma doonan odetiya gisho Xoossaa galatayis.
1Corinthians14:19 Shin taani woosa keethan harata tamaarsanaw dumma dumma doonan tammu mukulu qaala odetanaape ichashu qaala eretiya doonan odetanaw dosayis.
1Corinthians14:20 Ta ishato
1Corinthians14:21 Goday
1Corinthians14:22 Hiza
1Corinthians14:23 Woosa keethaa asay issife shiiqiya wode
1Corinthians14:24 Shin eronna woyko ammanonna asay woosa keethi yaa wode asay tinbite odishin
1Corinthians14:25 Enti iya wozanan geemmida qofaa qoncisana. Hessadaka
1Corinthians14:26 Ta ishato
1Corinthians14:27 Dumma dumma doonan odetiya asati de7iko
1Corinthians14:28 Shin birshiya asi dhayiko
1Corinthians14:29 Tinbite odeysati nam7a woyko heedza gididi odo. Qassi harati enti giyaba pirdona.
1Corinthians14:30 He shiiquwan de7iya hara asas issibay qonciko kase odeteysi si77i go.
1Corinthians14:31 Ubbay tamaarana melanne ubbay minnana mela maaran maaran tinbite odanaw danda7eeta.
1Corinthians14:32 Nabeta ayyaanay nabetas kiitetees.
1Corinthians14:33 Geeshshata woosa keetha ubbay meezetidaysada Xoossay sarotetha Xoossaafe attishin
1Corinthians14:34 Maccasi woosa keethan si77i go. Muse higgey geysada enti haaretofe attishin
1Corinthians14:35 Maccasi woosa keethan haasayoy borso gidiya gisho issiba eranaw koyko son banta azinata oychonna.
1Corinthians14:36 Xoossaa qaala koyro hinte ehidetii? Woyko Xoossaa qaalay hinte xalaalako yidee?
1Corinthians14:37 Oonika bana nabe woyko bana Xoossaa asi gidi qopiko
1Corinthians14:38 Shin oonika akeekona ixiko ika akeeketofo.
1Corinthians14:39 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians14:40 Shin ubbayka woganinne maaran gido.
1Corinthians15:1 Ta ishato
1Corinthians15:2 Ta tamaarsida wongela minthidi oykiko hinte iyan attana. Hessi hanonna ixiko hinte ammanoy hada gidana.
1Corinthians15:3 Taani ekida ubbaafe aadhiya kiitaa kasetada hintew immas. Hessika
1Corinthians15:4 Moogetis; Geeshsha Maxaafay geysada
1Corinthians15:5 Phexroosas qoncis. Hessafe guye
1Corinthians15:6 Hessafe guye
1Corinthians15:7 Hessafe guye
1Corinthians15:8 Qassi wursethan awucaya mela gidida taw qoncis.
1Corinthians15:9 Taani Yesuusa hawaareta ubbaafe laafa. Taani Xoossaa woosa keethaa gooddida gisho Yesuusa hawaare geetetada xeegetanaw bessonnaysa.
1Corinthians15:10 Shin Xoossaa aadho keehatethan ta ha77i gididaysa gidas; I taw immida aadho keehatethay mela attibeenna. Taani hanko hawaaretape aathada daaburas. Shin taara de7iya Xoossaa aadho keehatethay oothisipe attishin
1Corinthians15:11 Hiza
1Corinthians15:12 Kiristoosi hayqope dendidaysa nu sabbakiya wode hintefe issoti issoti yaatin
1Corinthians15:13 Hayqope dendoy baynaba gidiko Kiristoosi hayqope dendibeenna guussu.
1Corinthians15:14 Kiristoosi hayqope dendiboonaba gidiko nu timirtey qassi hinte ammanoyka hada.
1Corinthians15:15 Hayqope dendoy baynashin
1Corinthians15:16 Hayqida asay hayqope dendiboonaba gidiko hiza
1Corinthians15:17 Kiristoosi hayqope dendonaba gidiko
1Corinthians15:18 Hiza
1Corinthians15:19 Nuuni ha alamiya de7uwa xalaalas Kiristoosan ufaysi oothidaba gidiko
1Corinthians15:20 Shin Kiristoosi hayqidaysatas hayqope dendon bayra gididi tuma dendis.
1Corinthians15:21 Hayqoy issi asa baggara ha alamiya yidaysada hayqope dendoy issi asa baggara yis.
1Corinthians15:22 Addaame baggara asa ubbay hayqidaysada Kiristoosa baggara asa ubbay de7on daana.
1Corinthians15:23 Shin issoy issoy ba maaran maaran dendana. Kiristoosi ubbaafe kasetidi dendis; hessafe guye
1Corinthians15:24 Hessafe guye
1Corinthians15:25 Xoossay iya morketa ubbaa iya tohuwape garsan wothana gakanaw Kiristoosi haaranaw bessees.
1Corinthians15:26 Wursethan I dhaysanaw de7iya morkey hayqo.
1Corinthians15:27 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Corinthians15:28 Ubbabay Kiristoosa maatape garsan haaretidaape guye Kiristoosi qassi ba huuphen ubbaba baw haarisida Xoossaas haaretana. He wode Xoossay ba xalaala ubbaa haarana.
1Corinthians15:29 Hayqidaysati dendonaba gidiko enta gisho xammaqetiya asaas ayba wodhey de7ii? Hayqidaysati dendonaba gidiko yaatin
1Corinthians15:30 Yaatin
1Corinthians15:31 Ta ishato
1Corinthians15:32 Asa qofatho gidiko
1Corinthians15:33 Cimetofite! Iita laggetethi lo77o amale iissees.
1Corinthians15:34 Hinte akeekako simmite. Nagara oothopite. Hintefe issi issi asay Xoossaa erokona. Taani hintena yeellayanaw hessa gayis.
1Corinthians15:35 Issi asi
1Corinthians15:36 Neno eeyaw
1Corinthians15:37 Neeni zerey giste gidin woyko hara katha qommo ayfe xalaala zerasaape attishin
1Corinthians15:38 Shin Xoossay zerethaas ba dosida mela medhetethi immees. Dumma dumma zerethaas dumma dumma asatethi immees.
1Corinthians15:39 Medhetetha ubbaa ashoy isso gidenna. Shin asa ashoy issuwa; mehe ashoy dumma; kafota ashoy dumma; qassi molo ashoy dumma.
1Corinthians15:40 Salo asatethi de7ees; qassi sa7a asatethi de7ees. Shin salo asatethaa bonchoy dumma; qassi sa7a asatethaa bonchoy dumma.
1Corinthians15:41 Awa bonchoy dumma; ageena bonchoy dumma; xoolintota bonchoy dumma; issi xoolintoy hanko xoolintuwafe bonchon dummatees.
1Corinthians15:42 Hayqidaysati hayqope dendiya wode hessada hanana. Hayqiya asatethay zeretees; hayqonna asatethi gididi dendees.
1Corinthians15:43 Tooshen zeretidi
1Corinthians15:44 Medhetetha asatethay zeretidi
1Corinthians15:45 Hessadaka
1Corinthians15:46 Shin medheta asi koyro yin
1Corinthians15:47 Koyro Addaamey biittafe medhetida biitta asi; nam7antho Addaamey salope yida salo asi.
1Corinthians15:48 Biittafe medhetidaysati biittafe medhetidaysa daanosona. Saloysati salope yidaysa daanosona.
1Corinthians15:49 Nuuni biittafe medhetida addiya daaneysa mela salope yida addiya daanana.
1Corinthians15:50 Ta ishato
1Corinthians15:51 Ta hintew issi xuura odana. Nu ubbay hayqoko
1Corinthians15:52 Moyzey punetiya wode
1Corinthians15:53 Haysi wooqeysi wooqonnaysa
1Corinthians15:54 Haysi wooqeysi wooqonnaysa
1Corinthians15:55 Hessadaka
1Corinthians15:56 Hayqoy dukiya wolqay nagara; qassi nagara wolqay higge.
1Corinthians15:57 Shin nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara nuus xoono immiya Xoossaa galati gako.
1Corinthians15:58 Hessa gisho
1Corinthians16:1 Ammaniya asaas miishe shiishobaa Galatiya woosa keethatas taani kiittidaysada hinteka oothite.
1Corinthians16:2 Miishiya shiishoy ta hinteko biya wode gidonna mela issoy issoy saamintafe koyro gallas
1Corinthians16:3 Taani yaa bida wode miishiya Yerusalaame gathana mela hinte dooriya asaas dabdaabe immada enta Yerusalaame kiittana.
1Corinthians16:4 Entara ta buussay koshshiyaba gidiko enti taara baanaw danda7oosona.
1Corinthians16:5 Taani Maqedoonera aadhanaw qopida gisho
1Corinthians16:6 Ta biya bessa aw gidikoka
1Corinthians16:7 Taani ogera aadhashe hintena be7anaw koyke. Goday giiko
1Corinthians16:8 Shin taani Phanxeqosxe Ba7aaley gakanaw Efesoonan gam7ana.
1Corinthians16:9 Taw oosoy kumida dalga pengey dooyetis
1Corinthians16:10 I ta mela Godaa ooso oothiya asi gidiya gisho
1Corinthians16:11 Oonika iya kadhopo. I taako saro simmana mela iya maaddidi moyzite. Taani I hanko ammaneysatara simmanaysa naagayis.
1Corinthians16:12 Nu ishaa Aphiloosi hanko ammaneysatara hinteko baana mela ta iya mintha woossas. Ha77i hinteko baanaw koybeenna
1Corinthians16:13 Barkite; Ammanon eqite; xaalite; minnite.
1Corinthians16:14 Ooso ubbaa siiqon oothite.
1Corinthians16:15 Ta ishato
1Corinthians16:16 Hinteka enta mela asaasinne
1Corinthians16:17 Isxifaanosey
1Corinthians16:18 Enti hintena ufaysidaysada tanaka ufaysidosona. Hessa mela asata dogopite.
1Corinthians16:19 Iise woosa keetha asay hintena saro goosona. Aqilinne Phirisqilla banta son shiiqiya woosa keetha asaara issife hintena Godaa sunthan wozanape sarothoosona.
1Corinthians16:20 Ammaniya ishati ubbay hintena saro yaagosona. Geeshsha yeeretethi yeeretishe issoy issuwa sarothite.
1Corinthians16:21 Taani
1Corinthians16:22 Godaa dosonna asi de7iko
1Corinthians16:23 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hintera gido.
1Corinthians16:24 Ta siiqoy Kiristoos Yesuusan de7iya hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.
2Corinthians1:1 Xoossa shenen Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaare gidida Phawuloosinne
2Corinthians1:2 Xoossaa nu Aawapenne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape
2Corinthians1:3 Maarotetha Aawas
2Corinthians1:4 Xoossay nuus immida minthethuwan
2Corinthians1:5 Nuuni Kiristoosa daro waayiya shaaketidaysada qassi nuuni iya daro minthethuwan minnana.
2Corinthians1:6 Nuuni waayetiko hessi hintena minthethanaasanne hintena ashshanaasa. Qassi nuuni minetiko nuuni gencida waayiya mela hinteka gencidi
2Corinthians1:7 Hinte nu ekida metuwa mela ekidi
2Corinthians1:8 Nu ishato
2Corinthians1:9 Nuuni nu bolla hayqo pirdi pirdetida mela qopida. Shin nuuni nu huuphen gidonashin
2Corinthians1:10 Xoossay hessa mela iita hayqope nuna ashshis; ha77ika ashshana; sinthafeka I nuna ashshana gidi iyan ufaysi wothoos.
2Corinthians1:11 Woosan nuna maaddite. Daro woosa gaason Xoossaa maaduwa nu demmiya wode daro asay nu gisho Xoossaa galatoosona.
2Corinthians1:12 Nuuni nu geeshsha kahan ceeqetoos. Nuuni ha alamiyan de7ida de7uwan ubbaraka hintera nu de7ida de7uwan tumatethaninne suuretethan hintera de7ida. Hessika
2Corinthians1:13 Nu hintew xaafida dabdaabey hinte nabbabanawunne akeekanaw danda7iyabaape attishin
2Corinthians1:14 Ha77i hinte nuna hanida keena ereeta
2Corinthians1:15 Hessa taani loytha erida gisho
2Corinthians1:16 Taani Maqedoone bashenne yaape simmashe hintena be7ana. Taani yaape Yihuda biya wode hinte tana ta ogiyan maaddana gada qopas.
2Corinthians1:17 Taani hessa gashe ay oothanaw bessiyako eronna asi daaniyana? Woyko taani ta qofaa qachiya wode asa qofada
2Corinthians1:18 Shin Xoossay ammaneteysa gidiya gisho
2Corinthians1:19 Taani
2Corinthians1:20 Xoossay immana gida ubbay Kiristoosa baggara “Ee” gidees. Nuuni Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa bonchoos
2Corinthians1:21 Nunne hinte Kiristoosan minnidi eqana mela oothidaynne ba oosuwas dooriday Xoossaa.
2Corinthians1:22 Nuuni iyabaa gideysa erisanaw ba maatamiya nu bolla wothis; qassi ba Geeshsha Ayyaana oythi oothidi nu wozanan wothis.
2Corinthians1:23 Taani Qorontoosa boonna aggiday hinte azzanonna attana melasa; hessi wordo gidiko Xoossay ta shempuwa taape eko.
2Corinthians1:24 Hinte
2Corinthians2:1 Taani nam7antho hinteko biike gada qofa qachiday hintena azzanthonna agganaasa.
2Corinthians2:2 Taani hintena azzanthikoka ta azzanthida hintefe hari tana ufaysanaw de7ey oonee?
2Corinthians2:3 Taani hintew he dabdaabiya xaafiday
2Corinthians2:4 Taani daro waayeninne un7an qassi daro afuthan xaafiday
2Corinthians2:5 Ase azzanthida oonika de7iko ta iya naaquwa darsanaw koyikefe attishin
2Corinthians2:6 Hintefe dariya asay he uraa seerida seeray iyaw gidana.
2Corinthians2:7 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians2:8 Hinte iya siiqeysa zaari iyaw qoncisana mela ta hintena woossayis.
2Corinthians2:9 Ta he dabdaabiya hintew xaafiday
2Corinthians2:10 Hinte maariya uraa taka maarana. Taani maaranabay aybi de7ikoka
2Corinthians2:11 Taani hessa oothiday Xalahiya cimo oosuwa nu eriya gisho
2Corinthians2:12 Taani Kiristoosa Wongela sabbakanaw Xiro7aada bida wode
2Corinthians2:13 Shin taani ta ishaa Tito yan demmaboonna gisho ta wozanay shempibeenna. Hessa gisho
2Corinthians2:14 Shin Kiristoosa baggara ubba wode nuna xoonon kaalethiyanne shitto mela sawiya Kiristoosaba nu eriya timirtiya ubba bessi gathana mela oothiya Xoossaa galati gako.
2Corinthians2:15 Nuuni attiya asaa giddoninne dhayiya asaa giddon Kiristoosa baggara Xoossas imetida sawiya shitto mela.
2Corinthians2:16 Dhaya asaas hayqoko efiya hayqo peeno; qassi attiya asaas de7oko efiya de7o sawo; yaatin
2Corinthians2:17 Nuuni Xoossaa qaala wodhe demmanaw koyidi walakidi zal7iya daro asaa mela gidoko. Shin Xoossay kiitida suure asata mela Kiristoosan de7idi Xoossaa sinthan qaala odoos.
2Corinthians3:1 Nuuni zaaridi nuna sabbinoyee? Woyko hara asada
2Corinthians3:2 Asi ubbay hintena erana melanne nabbabana mela hinte nu wozanan xaafetidi de7iya nu dabdaabe.
2Corinthians3:3 Hinte qalamen gidonashin
2Corinthians3:4 Nu hessa giday
2Corinthians3:5 Nu hessa oothanaw danda7iday Xoossaa wolqaanape attishin
2Corinthians3:6 Nu ooratha caaquwa oosanchota gidana mela Xoossay nuna danda7isis. He ooratha caaqoy Geeshsha Ayyaanan bentidaysafe attishin
2Corinthians3:7 Shucha bolla xaafetida higgey imetiya wode Xoossaa bonchoy qoncis. Muse som7uwan de7iya bonchoy dhayishe biyaba gidikoka
2Corinthians3:8 yaatin
2Corinthians3:9 Asa bolla pirda ehiya higgey boncho gidiko yaatin
2Corinthians3:10 Kase boncho gididaysa ha77i aadhiya bonchoy de7eysara gathi be7iya wode bonchoy baynaba gidis.
2Corinthians3:11 Guutha wodes qoncidi guyepe dhaydaysi haysada bonchetiko
2Corinthians3:12 Nuus haysa mela ufaysay de7iya gisho
2Corinthians3:13 Nuuni
2Corinthians3:14 Shin enta wozanay doccis. Hachi gakanaw enti gal7a caaquwa nabbabiya wode enta wozanay he kaman kametidi de7ees. He kamay Kiristoosa xalaalan qaaretees.
2Corinthians3:15 Shin hachi gakanawuka enti Muse maxaafaa nabbabiya wode ubban he kamay enta wozanaa kammees.
2Corinthians3:16 Shin oonika Godaako simmiya wode awudeka he kamay qaaretees.
2Corinthians3:17 Goday Ayyaana; Godaa Ayyaanay de7iya bessan la77atethi de7ees.
2Corinthians3:18 Nuuni ubbay kametiboonna som7on Godaa bonchuwa be7ana. Nuuni Ayyaana gidida Godaa malaa daananaw bonchofe bonchon laametana.
2Corinthians4:1 Hiza
2Corinthians4:2 Nuuni yeellaya geema ooso ubbaa aggida; gene ooso oothoko; Xoossaa qaala wordora walakoko. Tumaa qoncen haasayishe
2Corinthians4:3 Nu odiya Wongelay geemmidaba gidikoka
2Corinthians4:4 Ha alamiya haariya xoossay ammanonna asaa wozanaa goozis. Enti Xoossaa mela gidida Kiristoosa boncho Wongela poo7uwa be7onna mela diggis.
2Corinthians4:5 Nuuni
2Corinthians4:6 “Dhuman poo7oy poo7o” gida Xoossay
2Corinthians4:7 Shin ubbaafe aadhiya wolqay nubaa gidonashin
2Corinthians4:8 Nu ubba baggaraka waayetida
2Corinthians4:9 Nu
2Corinthians4:10 Yesuusa de7oy nu asatethan qoncana mela iya hayquwa ubba wode nu asatethan tookidi yuuyoos.
2Corinthians4:11 Yesuusa de7oy hayqiya nu asatethan qoncana mela paxa de7iya nuuni iya gisho
2Corinthians4:12 Hiza
2Corinthians4:13 Geeshsha Maxaafan
2Corinthians4:14 Godaa Yesuusa hayqope denthida Xoossay
2Corinthians4:15 Hessi ubbay haniday hinte gishosa. Xoossaa aadho keehatethay daro asaa gakiya wode asay Xoossaa bonchuwas daro galataa immana.
2Corinthians4:16 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians4:17 Ha77is nuuni waayetiya ha kawusha waayey
2Corinthians4:18 Nuuni bentiyaba gidonashin
2Corinthians5:1 Ha77i nu de7iya dunkaane daaniya ha sa7a asatethay laaletikoka
2Corinthians5:2 Salo asatethaa ma7anaw amotishe ha77i ha sa7an de7ishe oolos.
2Corinthians5:3 Nuuni hessa ma7iya wode kallotoko.
2Corinthians5:4 Dunkaane daaniya ha sa7a asatethan nu de7ishe deexetidi oolos. Hayqiya nu asatethay de7on laametana mela salo asatethaa ma7anaw koyoosipe attishin
2Corinthians5:5 Nuna haysas giigisiday Xoossaa. Qassi sinthafe yaanabas oythi oothidi ba Ayyaana nuus immis.
2Corinthians5:6 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians5:7 Nuuni de7ey ammanonape attishin
2Corinthians5:8 Nu ha sa7a asatethafe shaaketidi
2Corinthians5:9 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians5:10 Nuuni issoy issoy ha sa7an de7ishe lo77o gidin woyko iita gidin
2Corinthians5:11 Hiza
2Corinthians5:12 Wozanan gidonashin
2Corinthians5:13 Nu gooshshi gidiko Xoossa bonchosa; wozanaama gidiko hintesa.
2Corinthians5:14 Issoy ubbaas hayqidaysanne ubbay qassi iyara hayqidaysa nu eriya gisho
2Corinthians5:15 De7on de7eysati hizape guye bantaw gidonashin
2Corinthians5:16 Hizape guye
2Corinthians5:17 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians5:18 Hessa ubbaa Xoossay oothis. I Kiristoosa baggara nuna baara sigethis. Qassi harata baara sigethana mela nuus sigetho ooso immis.
2Corinthians5:19 Xoossay Kiristoosa baggara asa ubbaa baara sigethees. Enta nagaraa taybibeenna; qassi asaa baara sigethiya qaala nuus immis.
2Corinthians5:20 Xoossay asaa nu baggara xeegiya gisho
2Corinthians5:21 Nuuni Xoossaa xillotethaa Kiristoosa baggara ekana mela
2Corinthians6:1 Nuuni Xoossara issife oothiya asi gideysada
2Corinthians6:2 Xoossay
2Corinthians6:3 Oonika nu oosuwa borana melanne nunan dhubetana mela koyoko.
2Corinthians6:4 Gidoshin
2Corinthians6:5 garaafetethan
2Corinthians6:6 geeshshatethan
2Corinthians6:7 tumaa odaninne Xoossaa wolqan nuuni iya oosanchota gideysa bessida. Qassi xillotethay nuus tooranne gondalle.
2Corinthians6:8 Nuuni bonchetidanne tooshetida; cayetidanne galatetida. Tumaa haasayoos
2Corinthians6:9 Nu asan eretida asi
2Corinthians6:10 Nuuni azzanikoka ubba wode ufaytoos. Nu manqo daanos
2Corinthians6:11 Qorontoosa asato
2Corinthians6:12 Hinte nuna hinte siiquwa bessonna diggidetape attishin
2Corinthians6:13 Aawu ba naytas odeysada ta hintew odayis; nu hintena nu uluwa bessidaysada
2Corinthians6:14 Ammanonna asaara bessonna ogen waaxettofite. Xillotethasinne nagaras aybi gahetethi de7ii? Poo7osinne dhumas aybi issifetethi de7ii?
2Corinthians6:15 Kiristoosanne Xalahe issife gathiyabay aybee? Qassi ammaneysinne ammanonaysi issife koxiyabay aybee?
2Corinthians6:16 Xoossaa Keethas eeqatara aybi issifetethi de7ii? Xoossay
2Corinthians6:17 Hessadaka
2Corinthians6:18 Ta hintew aawa gidana; hinte taw adde naytanne macca nayta gidana; yaagees Ubbaafe Wolqaama Goday” yaagis.
2Corinthians7:1 Hiza
2Corinthians7:2 Hinte uluwa nuna bessite. Nuuni oonaka naaqibooko; oonaka qohibooko; oonaka cimmibooko.
2Corinthians7:3 Taani hessa hinte bolla pirdanaw giike. Haysafe kase ta hintew odidaysada
2Corinthians7:4 Ta odiyaba hintefe qotike; ta hintenan ceeqetayis; nu waaye ubban minettayis; qassi gita ufaysi ufaytayis.
2Corinthians7:5 Nuuni Maqedoone bida wode
2Corinthians7:6 Shin azzanidaysata minthethiya Xoossay
2Corinthians7:7 Nuna minthethiday Tito yuussaa xalaala gidonashin
2Corinthians7:8 Ta dabdaabey hintena azzanthikoka ayis xaafadinasha gada qiirotike. Ta qiirotiday ta xaafida dabdaabey hintena guutha wodes azzanthida gishosa.
2Corinthians7:9 Ha77i taani ufaytiday
2Corinthians7:10 Xoossay koya azzanoy
2Corinthians7:11 Hinte azzanoy hintenan ayfisida ayfiya be7ite. He azzanoy hintena ay mela denthethidako
2Corinthians7:12 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians7:13 Nuuni ufaytiday hessa gishosa. Nu ufaysaafe aadhidi nuna daro ufaysiday
2Corinthians7:14 Taani hintena nashshada iyaw odin
2Corinthians7:15 Hinte iyaw yashshan kokoridi
2Corinthians7:16 Taani ubbaban hintenan ammanetiya gisho ufaytayis.
2Corinthians8:1 Nu ishato
2Corinthians8:2 Enti gita meton paacetidosona
2Corinthians8:3 Enti banta wolqaa melanne banta wolqafe aadheysa dosidi immidaysas ta marka.
2Corinthians8:4 Enti Xoossa ase maaddiya lo77o ooso nuura oothanaw koydi nuna daro woossidosona.
2Corinthians8:5 Enti nuuni qopidaysafe aathidi oothidosona. Xoossa sheniyada
2Corinthians8:6 Ha lo77o oosuwa doomida Titoy
2Corinthians8:7 Shin hinte ubbaban
2Corinthians8:8 Taani hessa kiittanaw giike. Shin harata gita amuwa hinte siiquwara gatha be7ada
2Corinthians8:9 Hinte
2Corinthians8:10 Taani ha odan hintena maaddiya zore zoranaw koyayis. Hinte zillaythi immanaw xalaala gidonashin
2Corinthians8:11 Hinte oothanaw doomida oosuwa ha77i polite. Hinte hintew de7eysa keena immiko
2Corinthians8:12 Issi asi immanaw amotiko
2Corinthians8:13 Taani hessa gey
2Corinthians8:14 Wode enta palahay hinte pacaa kunthana mela
2Corinthians8:15 Geeshsha Maxaafan
2Corinthians8:16 Nuuni hintew qopeysada Titoyka hintew qopana mela oothida Xoossay galatetto.
2Corinthians8:17 Titoy hinteko biday
2Corinthians8:18 Wongela markatethan woosa keetha ubban daro eretida isha
2Corinthians8:19 Hessa bolla nuuni ha keeha imota efiya wode nuura baana mela
2Corinthians8:20 Ha imetida keeha imuwa
2Corinthians8:21 Nuuni Godaa sinthan xalaala gidonashin
2Corinthians8:22 Qassi daro wode paacen minnidi aadhida nu ishaa
2Corinthians8:23 Titoba eranaw koyko
2Corinthians8:24 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians9:1 Ammaniya asaas kessiya miishiyaba ta hintew xaafanaw koshshenna.
2Corinthians9:2 Hinte maaddanaw keehi amotteysa ta erayis. Hinte Akaya asay
2Corinthians9:3 Ha oosuwan hintenan nu ceeqetiya ceeqoy hada gidonna mela koyro hintebaa ta odidaysada hinte giigetidi naagana mela ha ishata hinteko kiittas.
2Corinthians9:4 Maqedoone asay taara bidi
2Corinthians9:5 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians9:6 Haysa akeekite; guuthu zeriday guuthu cakana; daro zeriday daro cakana.
2Corinthians9:7 Xoossay ufaysan immiya uraa dosiya gisho
2Corinthians9:8 Ubba wode ubbaban koshshiyaba ubbaa demmidi lo77o ooso ubbaa oothanaw danda7ana mela Xoossay hintew ba anjuwa darsana.
2Corinthians9:9 Geeshsha Maxaafan
2Corinthians9:10 Zereysas zerethi
2Corinthians9:11 Daro asay hinte immiya imuwa nuupe ekidi
2Corinthians9:12 Ha hinte immiya imoy ammaniya asaa pacaa kuntho xalaala gidonashin
2Corinthians9:13 Ha hinte oosoy hinte ammanuwa erisidi Kiristoosa Wongela hinte ammanidinne iyaw kiitetidi hintew de7iyaba entaranne haratara shaaketida gisho ubbay Xoossaa bonchana.
2Corinthians9:14 Xoossay hintew immida aadho keehatetha gisho enti hintew Xoossaa woossishe hintena be7anaw laamotosona.
2Corinthians9:15 Zawi bayna Xoossaa imuwas Xoossay galatetto.
2Corinthians10:1 Taani hintera de7iya wode
2Corinthians10:2 Taani hinteko biya wode nu asho qofara simeretiya asi oothidi qopiya asaa bolla mino qaalan odetanaw qofa qachas. Hinte bolla hessada odetana mela hinte tana oothonnaada hintena woossayis.
2Corinthians10:3 Nuuni ha sa7an de7ikoka ha sa7aa asada oletoko.
2Corinthians10:4 Nu ola miishey ha sa7aba gidenna. Shin miixa laallanaw wolqara de7iya Xoossa toora. Tumaara eqetiya palamanne
2Corinthians10:5 Xoossa eratetha bolla otoron dendiya palamanne hada qofa ubba laalloos. Asa qofa ubbaa di77idi Kiristoosas kiitetana mela oothoos.
2Corinthians10:6 Hinte kiitetethay polo gidiya wode nuuni kiitetetha ixo ubbaa seeranaw giigetana.
2Corinthians10:7 Hinte ayfey be7ida mela pirdeta. Oonika bana Kiristoosaba gidi qopiyaba gidiko
2Corinthians10:8 Goday taw immida maatan ceeqetikoka hessan yeellatike. He maatay taw imetiday hintena dichanaasafe attishin
2Corinthians10:9 Taani ta dabdaabiyan hintena yashisanaw koyada xaafidaba daanopo.
2Corinthians10:10 Issi issi asay
2Corinthians10:11 He asati nu haahon de7ishe xaafiya dabdaabiyaninne matan hintera de7ishe oothiya oosuwa giddon dummatethi baynaysa akeeko.
2Corinthians10:12 Nuuni bantana nashshiya asatara nuna ginayanaw woyko gaaddeyanaw koyoko. Shin enti bantana bantara ginayidi woyko gaaddeyidi be7ishe eeya.
2Corinthians10:13 Shin nuuni Xoossay nuus immida dhassan ceeqetoosipe attishin
2Corinthians10:14 Nuuni besseysafe aathidi ceeqetoko
2Corinthians10:15 Nuuni Xoossay essida zawape pinnidi
2Corinthians10:16 Nuuni hara asi ba zawan oothida ooson gelidi ceeqetoko
2Corinthians10:17 Shin
2Corinthians10:18 Goday nashshiya uraape attishin
2Corinthians11:1 Ta guutha eeyatetha hinte ha77ika danda7ana gada qopayis; hayyana danda7ite.
2Corinthians11:2 Xoossay hintew qopidaysada
2Corinthians11:3 Shin shooshay ba geniyan Hewaanno balethidaysada ooni eri hinte wozanay iitidi Kiristoosas de7iya hinte suuretethaanne geeshshatetha aggandeti gada hirgayis.
2Corinthians11:4 Issi asi yidi
2Corinthians11:5 Shin taani Yesuusi kiitida “Gita hawaareta” geetetidi xeegeteysatape guuxayis gada qopike.
2Corinthians11:6 Taani oda eronna asi gidikoka
2Corinthians11:7 Taani miishe oychonna Xoossaa Wongela hintew coo odidaysinne hintena dhoqu oothada tana toochidaysi taw nagara gidii?
2Corinthians11:8 Taani hintew oothanaw hara woosa keethatape miishe bonqa ekas.
2Corinthians11:9 Ta hintera de7iya wode tana metinka hintefe issi asika waaysabike. Maqedoonepe yida ammaneysati tana koshshiyaba ubban maaddidosona. Hachi gakanaw ta hintew tooho gidabike sinthaska tooho gidike.
2Corinthians11:10 Kiristoosa tumatethay tanan de7ishin
2Corinthians11:11 Ta haysa ayis gayna? Hintena dosonna gishoyee? Taani hintena doseysa Xoossay erees.
2Corinthians11:12 “Nuka hinte mela oothoos” yaagidi ceeqiya hanko hawaareta ceequwa gaasuwa dhaysanaw ha77i ta ootheysa sinthaska oothana.
2Corinthians11:13 Haysa mela asati Kiristoosa hawaare daananaw bantana laammiya wordancho hawaaretanne cimmiya oosanchota.
2Corinthians11:14 Hessi malaalsiyaba gidenna; ayis giiko
2Corinthians11:15 Hessa gisho
2Corinthians11:16 Oonika tana eeya gidi qoponna mela zaaradaka odayis. Ta hintew eeya daanikoka ta guuthara ceeqetana mela tana eeya oothidi ekite.
2Corinthians11:17 Taani haysada ceeqetada odetey
2Corinthians11:18 Daro asay ha sa7aban ceeqetiya gisho
2Corinthians11:19 Hinte wozanaama gidiya gisho
2Corinthians11:20 Oonika hintena aylleyiko woyko hintena bonqiko woyko baw maadetanaw hinteko shiiqiko woyko hinte bolla otortiko woyko hintena baqiko hinte danda7eeta.
2Corinthians11:21 Nuuni hessa oothanaw daro daaburancho gideysa yeellatashe ta odayis. Shin oonika minnidi ceeqetiko
2Corinthians11:22 Enti Ibraawee? Taka Ibraawe. Enti Isra7eelee? Taka Isra7eele. Enti Abrahaame sheeshee? Taka Abrahaame sheeshi.
2Corinthians11:23 Enti Kiristoosa oosancho? Taani gooshsha asada odayis
2Corinthians11:24 Ayhudeti tana hastamanne uddufuna ichashu toho garaafidosona.
2Corinthians11:25 Heedzu toho xam7an shocetas; issi toho shuchan cadetas; markabey heedzu toho me77is; abba giddon issi qamma kumethi aqada pee7as.
2Corinthians11:26 Taani daro ogiya daaburan hemetas. Kixa haathafenne pangafe attas. Ayhudetinne Ayhude gidonna asay ta bolla meto gathidosona. Katamay
2Corinthians11:27 Taani ooson daaburasinne cawatas
2Corinthians11:28 Haraba ubbaa taybonna ubba wode tana qofisey woosa keethatabaa.
2Corinthians11:29 Issi asi daaburiya wode iyara ta daaburabikina? Issi asi nagaran dhubetiya wode ta awude qiirotonna aggadina?
2Corinthians11:30 Ta ceeqetanaw koshshiyaba gidiko taani daaburancho gideysa erisiyaban ceeqetana.
2Corinthians11:31 Merinaw bonchetida Xoossay
2Corinthians11:32 Damasqo kataman kawa Arisxoosape garsara haareysi tana oythanaw koyidi Damasqo katamaa pengiya naagisis.
2Corinthians11:33 Shin asay tana daachon yeggidi
2Corinthians12:1 Ceeqetethas go77i baynaysa erayis. Shin ceeqetanaw koshshiko
2Corinthians12:2 Tammanne oyddu laythafe kase
2Corinthians12:3 He uray heedzantho saluwa eketidaysa erayis. Shin I ashon woyko ashope karera eketidaako ta erike; Xoossay erees.
2Corinthians12:4 He uray gannate eketidi asi qoncisanawunne asi odanaw danda7onnaba si7is.
2Corinthians12:5 Taani he addiyaban ceeqetana
2Corinthians12:6 Taani tumaa odetiya gisho
2Corinthians12:7 Taw qoncida gita qoncethan ta otortonna mela tana waaysanaw ta ashuwan caddiya Xalahiya kiitanchoy taw imetis.
2Corinthians12:8 Ha waaysiyaba taape diggana mela taani Godaa heedzu toho woossas.
2Corinthians12:9 Shin Goday
2Corinthians12:10 Taani Kiristoosa gisho
2Corinthians12:11 Taani eeya asada ceeqetas. Hessada ta ceeqetana mela oothiday hintena. Ta
2Corinthians12:12 Ta hinte giddon de7ashe danda7an oothida malaatatinne mallati ta tuma hawaare gideysa bessoosona.
2Corinthians12:13 Ta hintew tooho gidonaysafe attishin
2Corinthians12:14 Taani hinteko baanaw giigetishin haysi taw heedzantho. Ta hintenape attishin
2Corinthians12:15 Ta hinte gisho
2Corinthians12:16 Gidikoka
2Corinthians12:17 Hari attoshin
2Corinthians12:18 Titoy hinteko baana mela taani woossas; qassi ammaniya ishaaka iyara yeddas. Yaatin
2Corinthians12:19 Nu ubba wode hinte sinthan nuna xillisanaw mootetiyaba hintew daanii? Nu Kiristoosan de7idi Xoossaa sinthan ha77i gakanaw odoos. Nu siiqo ishato
2Corinthians12:20 Ta hinteko biya wode ooni eri hinte ta koyeysada hanonna
2Corinthians12:21 Taani nam7antho hinteko biya wode Xoossay hinte sinthan tana kawushana gada yayyayis. Kase nagara oothidi he banta oothida tunatethaafe
2Corinthians13:1 Ta hinteko bishin haysi heedzantho. Ay mootoyka nam7u woyko heedzu markan minnees.
2Corinthians13:2 Taani nam7antho hintera gahetida wode hinte giddon kase nagara oothida uraanne harata ubbaa seeronna aggike gada oda wothas. Ha77i ta haakada de7ikoka simmada hinteko biya wode oodeska qadhetike.
2Corinthians13:3 Tanan de7idi odey Kiristoosa gideysa hinte eranaw koyeeta. I hintera haasaya wode wolqaamape attishin
2Corinthians13:4 Kiristoosi masqale bolla daaburan kaqetis
2Corinthians13:5 Ammanon minnidi de7iyako hintena hintew paacidi be7ite. Paacen hinte kundonna attiko
2Corinthians13:6 Nuuni paacen kundonaysa hinte ereeta gada ammanayis.
2Corinthians13:7 Hinte iitabaa oothonna mela nuuni Xoossaa woossoos. Nuuni mino gideysa asay be7ana mela gidonashin
2Corinthians13:8 Nuuni tumaas oothoosipe attishin
2Corinthians13:9 Nu daaburiya wode hinte qassi minniya wode nuna ufaysees. Hinte borey baynayisata gidana mela nu hintew Xoossaa woossoos.
2Corinthians13:10 Taani hintefe haakada de7ashe xaafiday hessa gishosa. Taani hinteko biya wode Goday taw immida maatan zempada hinte bolla godatanaw koyke. Goday taw maata immiday
2Corinthians13:11 Wursethan ta ishato
2Corinthians13:12 Geeshsha yeeretethi yeeretishe
2Corinthians13:13 Xoossaa asa ubbay hintena saro saro yaagosona.
2Corinthians13:14 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay
Galatians1:1 Asape woyko asa baggara gidonashin
Galatians1:2 taara de7iya ammaniya ishati ubbay
Galatians1:3 Xoossay nu Aawaynne nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosi hintew aadho keehatethaanne sarotethaa immo.
Galatians1:4 Ha iita wodiyape nuna ashshanaw
Galatians1:5 Xoossaas Merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
Galatians1:6 Kiristoosa aadho keehatethan hintena xeegida Xoossaa aggidi
Galatians1:7 Hintena balethanawunne Kiristoosa wongela wobbisanaw koyiya guutha asati de7oosonape attishin
Galatians1:8 Shin nuna gidin woyko salo kiitancho gidin nuuni hintew koyro odida Wongelape dummatiya hara Wongela hintew odiyaba gidiko
Galatians1:9 Haysafe sinthe nuuni gidaysada ha77ika zaarada gayis. Hinte ekida Wongelape dummatiya Wongela oonika hintew odiko he uray baadetidaba gido.
Galatians1:10 Yaatin
Galatians1:11 Ta ishato
Galatians1:12 Taw ha Wongela Yesuusi Kiristoosi qoncisisipe attishin
Galatians1:13 Ta kase Ayhude ammanon de7iya wode waana de7idaako
Galatians1:14 Ayhude ammano naagon
Galatians1:15 Shin ta buroo ta aaye ulon de7ishin Xoossay tana dooris; ba aadho keehatethan tana xeegis.
Galatians1:16 Ayhude gidonna asaas Wongela odana mela Xoossay ba Na7aa taw qoncisida wode ta ooderaka zorettabike.
Galatians1:17 Woyko taape sinthe hawaare gididaysatara gahetanaw Yerusalaame babike. Shin ta kasetada Arabe biitta bas; hessafe simmada Damasqo katamaa yas.
Galatians1:18 Heedzu laythafe guye
Galatians1:19 Shin Godaa ishaa Yayqoobape attishin
Galatians1:20 Ta hintew xaafiydaysi wordo gidonnaysa Xoossaa sinthan hintew qoncisayis.
Galatians1:21 Hessafe guye
Galatians1:22 Yihudan de7iya woosa keethaa asay tana be7idi eribookona.
Galatians1:23 Shin enti
Galatians1:24 Si7ida ubbay ta gaason Xoossaa galatidosona.
Galatians2:1 Tammanne oyddu laythafe guye
Galatians2:2 Xoossay taw qoncisida qoncethan yaa bada Ayhude gidonna asaa giddon ta sabbakiya Wongela entaw qoncisas. Kase ta woxida wothaynne ha77ika ta woxiya wothay hada gidonna mela gada kaaletheyisata dumma shiishada entaw odas.
Galatians2:3 Hari attoshin
Galatians2:4 Gidoshin
Galatians2:5 Shin tuma Wongelay hintenan minnidi daana mela nuuni hari attoshin
Galatians2:6 Shin halaqa daaniya asata oonatethay taw aykoka gidenna. Xoossay asa som7o be7idi pirdenna. Ha asati ta markatiya Wongela bolla gujidabay baawa.
Galatians2:7 Shin Phexroosi
Galatians2:8 Hiza
Galatians2:9 Qassi tuussu daanidi bentiya Yayqoobi
Galatians2:10 Enti nuna minthidi hadara giday
Galatians2:11 Phexroosi Anxooke katamaa yida wode I balida gisho taani iya som7on “Neeni baladasa” gas.
Galatians2:12 Yayqoobi kiitida guutha asay yaanape sinthe I Ayhude gidonna asaara mees
Galatians2:13 Qassi hanko ammanida Ayhudeti Phexroosa hanuwa kaallidosona. Hari attoshin
Galatians2:14 Shin enti Wongela tumatethan suure hemetonnaysa be7ada
Galatians2:15 Nuuni yeletan Ayhude
Galatians2:16 Shin asi Yesuus Kiristoosa ammanidi xilleesipe attishin
Galatians2:17 Nu Ayhudetika Kiristoosa baggara xillanaw koshshees. Hessa gidiko nuka hara asada nagarancho gideysa be7oos. Yaatin
Galatians2:18 Hiza
Galatians2:19 Taani Xoossaas daana mela higge baggara higges hayqas.
Galatians2:20 Taani Kiristoosara masqaliya bolla kaqetas. Taani hizape taw de7ike
Galatians2:21 Taani Xoossaa aadho keehatetha hada oothike. Xillotethi asas higge baggara bentiyaba gidiyako
Galatians3:1 Hinteno
Galatians3:2 Ta issiba eranaw koyayis; hinte Geeshsha Ayyaana ekiday higge naagidiye woyko hinte si7ida Wongela ammanidi ekidetii?
Galatians3:3 Hinte hessa mela eeyee? Hinte Xoossaa Ayyaanan doomidi
Galatians3:4 Hinte Wongela gaason daro waayetiday melee? He waaye ubbay coo gididee?
Galatians3:5 Xoossay hintew Geeshsha Ayyaana immeynne hinte giddon malaatata oothey
Galatians3:6 Ane Abrahaame be7ite
Galatians3:7 Hiza
Galatians3:8 Xoossay Ayhude gidonna asaa ammanon xillisanaysa Geeshsha Maxaafay be7idi
Galatians3:9 Hessa gisho
Galatians3:10 Higge naagidi xillana giya oonika baadetidaysa. Ayis giiko
Galatians3:11 “Xilloy ammanon daana” geetetidi xaafetida gisho
Galatians3:12 Higgey ammanon zempenna. Shin
Galatians3:13 “Mitha bolla kaqetidi hayqiya oonika baadetidaysa” geetetidi xaafetida gisho
Galatians3:14 Xoossay Abrahaames immida anjoy
Galatians3:15 Ta ishato
Galatians3:16 Xoossay he keeke qaala Abrahaamesinne iya zerethaas immis. Geeshsha Maxaafay
Galatians3:17 Taani gey haysa; oyddu xeetanne hastamu laythafe guye imetida higgey
Galatians3:18 Xoossay immiya laatay higgen eketiyaba gidiyako Xoossay immida ufaysaa baggara gideysi attees. Shin Xoossay ba aadho keehatethan laata Abrahaames ufaysa qaala baggara immis.
Galatians3:19 Yaatin
Galatians3:20 Giddo gididi sigethiya uray issi asa xalaalas gidenna
Galatians3:21 Yaatin
Galatians3:22 Shin Yesuus Kiristoosa ammanin bentiya ufaysa qaalay ammaneysatas imetana mela kumetha alamey nagaras haaretidi de7eysa Geeshsha Maxaafay odees.
Galatians3:23 Shin ammanoy yaanape kase higgey nuna qachi wothis. He ammanoy qoncana gakanaw higgey nu bolla gordi wothis.
Galatians3:24 Hessa gisho
Galatians3:25 Shin ha77i ammanoy yida gisho
Galatians3:26 Hinte ubbay Yesuus Kiristoosa ammanidi Xoossaa nayta gidideta.
Galatians3:27 Kiristoosara issino gidanaw xammaqetida ubbay Kiristoosa ma7oda ma7ideta.
Galatians3:28 Hinte ubbay Kiristoosan issino gidiya gisho
Galatians3:29 Hiza
Galatians4:1 Ta geysi haysa. Laattey na7aa gidi de7ishe
Galatians4:2 Shin iya aaway gida wodey gakanaw I hadara ekidaysata kusheninne naageysata kushen de7ees.
Galatians4:3 Hessadaka
Galatians4:4 Shin wodey gakida wode Xoossay higgefe garsan
Galatians4:5 I hessa oothiday
Galatians4:6 Nu Xoossaa nayta gidiya gisho
Galatians4:7 Hessa gisho
Galatians4:8 Hinte kase Xoossaa eronna wode xoosse gidonaysatas aylle gididi haaretideta.
Galatians4:9 Shin ha77i hinte Xoossaa erideta; ubbaraka Xoossan eretideta. Yaatin pathonnanne go77onna alame wogatako guye waanidi simmetii? Wodhi eqidi
Galatians4:10 Dumma gidida gallasata
Galatians4:11 Tana hintebay yashshees; ta hintew coo daaburadinasha?

Galatians4:14 Ta hargey hintew paace gidikoka
Galatians4:15 Yaatin
Galatians4:16 Yaatin

Galatians4:18 Lo77oba oothanaw amotiko lo77o
Galatians4:19 Ta siiqo nayto
Galatians4:20 Hintebay taw haddin ta un7etas; ha77i hinte giddon ta bentada shenetada odiyako ay mela dosaynashin.
Galatians4:21 Muse higgen haaretidi daanaw koyeysato
Galatians4:22 Geeshsha Maxaafay
Galatians4:23 Gadhinde na7ay asi na7a yeliya maaran yeletis
Galatians4:24 Ha maccasati nam7u caaqotas leemiso gididi eketoosona. Entafe issinniya
Galatians4:25 Aggaara Arabe biittan de7iya Siina zuman leemisetada ha77i de7iya Yerusalaame daanawusu. Ayis giiko
Galatians4:26 Shin salon de7iya Yerusalaamey aylletethan de7uku; iya nu ubbaas aayo.

Galatians4:28 Ta ishato

Galatians5:1 Nuuni la77atethan daana mela Kiristoosi nuna aylletethaafe kessis. Hiza
Galatians5:2 Ta
Galatians5:3 Qaxaretiya oonika higgey kiittiya ubbaa polanaw besseysa gujada ta odayis.
Galatians5:4 Higge naagidi xillanaw koyeysato
Galatians5:5 Shin nuuni Xoossaa Ayyaana baggara ammanon xillanaw ufaysan naagoos.
Galatians5:6 Hiza
Galatians5:7 Kase hinte lo77o woxeeta
Galatians5:8 Haysa mela iita cimoy hintena xeegida Xoossaafe yibeenna.
Galatians5:9 Hessika
Galatians5:10 Hintew hara qofi baynaysas ta Godan ammanetayis. Shin hintena buqiya oonika Xoossafe ba pirdaa ekana.
Galatians5:11 Ta ishato
Galatians5:12 Hintena buqeysati qaxaretetha xalaala gidonashin
Galatians5:13 Ta ishato
Galatians5:14 Higge ubbay
Galatians5:15 Shin hinte issoy issuwara saxetiyabaanne meetetiyabaa gidiko
Galatians5:16 Hiza
Galatians5:17 Asho amoy Ayyaana amuwara morke; qassi Ayyaana amoyka asho amuwara morke. Enti issoy issuwara ixetiya gisho hinte dosiyaba oothanaw danda7eketa.
Galatians5:18 Shin Ayyaanay hintena kaalethiyaba gidiko higgey hintena haarenna.

Galatians5:20 eeqa goyinno
Galatians5:21 gene

Galatians5:26 Ane issoy issuwa yiloyishenne qanaatishe coo ceeqeteysa aggoos.
Galatians6:1 Ta ishato
Galatians6:2 Issoy issuwa deexo toohuwa tookite. Yaatiko Kiristoosa higgiya poleeta.
Galatians6:3 Issi asi aykoyka baawashin
Galatians6:4 Shin issi issi asi ba oosuwa paaco. Hessafe guye
Galatians6:5 Issi issi asi ba toohuwa baw tookanaw bessees.
Galatians6:6 Xoossaa qaala tamaariya oonika lo77oba ubbaa ba astamaariyara shaaketees.
Galatians6:7 Hinte
Galatians6:8 Ba asho amuwa kunthanaw zeriya oonika
Galatians6:9 Ane lo77o ooso oothanaw azalleysa aggoos. Nuuni azallonna ixiko wodey gakiya wode nu zeridaysa cakana.
Galatians6:10 Nu inje wode demmiko
Galatians6:11 Taani ta kushen
Galatians6:12 Asa sinthan lo77o gididi bentanaw koyiya asati hinte qaxaretana mela koyoosona. Shin hessa enti oothey
Galatians6:13 Enti hinte qaxaretethan ceeqetanaw koyidi hintena qaxareto goosonape attishin
Galatians6:14 Shin alamey taw kaqetidaysafenne taanika alamiyas kaqetida
Galatians6:15 Hiza
Galatians6:16 Ha wogaa kaalliya ubbaasinne Xoossaa dere gidida Isra7eeles sarotethinne maarotethi gido.
