Galatians6:18 Ta ishato
Ephesians1:1 Xoossaa shenen Kiristoos Yesuusa hawaare gidida Phawuloosape
Ephesians1:2 Xoossaa nu Aawapenne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido.
Ephesians1:3 Salon de7iya ayyaana anjo ubban Kiristoosa baggara nuna anjida
Ephesians1:4 Nuuni iya sinthan geeshshatanne borey baynayisata gidana mela Xoossay alamey medhetanaape kase Kiristoosa baggara ba siiquwan nuna dooris.
Ephesians1:5 Xoossay ba sheniyan ba dosidaysada Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara nuna ba nayta oothanaw kasetidi qopi wothis.
Ephesians1:6 Xoossay ba siiqiya Na7aa baggara nuus coo immida aadho keehatethay bonchetana mela hessa oothis.
Ephesians1:7 Xoossaa aadho keehatetha duretethaada Kiristoosa suuthan wozetidi nagara atotetha demmida.
Ephesians1:8 Ba aadho keehatetha cincatethaninne eratethan kunthidi nuus immis.
Ephesians1:9 Xoossay ba dosidaysada Kiristoosa baggara iya sheniya xuuraa nu erana mela oothis.
Ephesians1:10 Wodey gakiya wode Xoossay polanaw qopida qofay
Ephesians1:11 Ubbabaa ba sheniyada oothiya Xoossay
Ephesians1:12 Hessa I oothiday
Ephesians1:13 Hinteka hinte atotetha Wongela
Ephesians1:14 Xoossaa bonchoy galatetana mela Xoossay ba asaa wozana gakanaw Geeshsha Ayyaana nuus oythu oothidi immis.
Ephesians1:15 Hessa gisho
Ephesians1:16 ta woosan hintena qopashe hinte gisho Xoossaa galateysa aggabike.
Ephesians1:17 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa Xoossay
Ephesians1:18 Xoossay hintena xeegida ufaysaynne geeshshati laattiya boncho laatay ay mela daroko hinte erana mela Xoossay hinte wozana ayfiya dooyana mela taani Xoossaa woossayis.
Ephesians1:19 Qassi iya ammaniya nunan oothiya iya wolqay ay mela aadhida giteeko hinte erana mela woossayis. He wolqay xoonetonanne daaburonna wolqaa. Ha nunan de7idi oothiya wolqaynne
Ephesians1:20 Kiristoosa hayqope denthidi
Ephesians1:21 Iya sunthay
Ephesians1:22 Xoossay ubba Kiristoosa tohope garsan haarisis; qassi woosa keethan
Ephesians1:23 Woosa keethi Kiristoosa kumethi oothiya iya asatethi. Medhetethay de7iya bessa ubban Kiristoosi ba huuphen ubbaba kuntheysa.
Ephesians2:1 Haysafe kase hinte
Ephesians2:2 He wode hinte ha alamiya iita ogiya kaallideta. Carkuwa bolla de7iya ayyaana wolqata halaqaasinne ha77ika Xoossaas kiitetonna asaa haariya ayyaanas kiitetideta.
Ephesians2:3 Nu ubbayka kase he asata giddon nu asho amuwanne nu wozanaa sheniya kaallidi de7ida. Nuka harata mela nu medhetethan Xoossaa hanquwa ekanaw de7eyisata.
Ephesians2:4 Shin Xoossaa gita maarotethaafenne nuus de7iya gita siiquwape dendidaysan
Ephesians2:5 hari attoshin nuuni nu qohuwan hayqidi de7ishin Kiristoosa baggara nuus de7o immis. Hinteka attiday Xoossaa aadho keehatethaana.
Ephesians2:6 Xoossay nuna Kiristoosara issife hayqope denthidi salon iyara issife wothis.
Ephesians2:7 I hessa oothiday
Ephesians2:8 Hinte aadho keehatethan ammanon attideta. Hessika
Ephesians2:9 Oonika ceeqetonna mela atotethay bentiday ooson gidenna.
Ephesians2:10 Nuuni Xoossaa medhetethi; I nuus kasetidi giigisi wothida lo77o oosota oothana mela Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara oorathi medhetida.
Ephesians2:11 Hessa gisho
Ephesians2:12 He wode hinte Kiristoosape shaaketi de7idaysa
Ephesians2:13 Shin hinte kase haakidi de7idaysati
Ephesians2:14 Kiristoosi nu sarotethaa; I Ayhudenne Ayhude gidonna asaa timidi
Ephesians2:15 I banan ha nam7u kochatape issi ooratha ase medhidi
Ephesians2:16 Kiristoosi masqaliya bolla hayqidi morketetha dhaysis; qassi nam7u kochata issi asatethi oothidi Xoossara sigethis.
Ephesians2:17 Kiristoosi yidi
Ephesians2:18 Nu ubbay iya baggara issi Ayyaanan Aawa sinthe shiiqanaw danda7oos.
Ephesians2:19 Hizape hinte allaga woyko imathe gideketa
Ephesians2:20 Hinte hawaaretinne nabeti baasida baasuwa bolla keexetideta. Godaa xaphuwa minthiya shuchay Kiristoos Yesuusa.
Ephesians2:21 Iyan keetha ubbay issife oyketidi Godan geeshsha Xoossa keethi gidanaw diccees.
Ephesians2:22 Hinte qassi Xoossay ba Ayyaanan de7iya keethi gidanaw Kiristoosan issife keexeteta.
Ephesians3:1 Hessa gisho
Ephesians3:2 Ta hintena maaddana mela Xoossay ba aadho keehatethan taw immida ha oosuwaba hinte loythi si7ideta.
Ephesians3:3 Ta hintew kase qanthan xaafidaysada Xoossay ba xuuraa qoncethan taw qoncisis.
Ephesians3:4 Ta xaafidaysa hinte nabbabiya wode Kiristoosa xuuraa ta ay mela eridaako hinte akeekanaw danda7eeta.
Ephesians3:5 Ha xuuray geeshsha hawaaretasinne nabetas ha77i Ayyaana baggara qoncidaysada beni wode asaas hessada qoncisibeenna.
Ephesians3:6 Xuuray haysa: Ayhude gidonna asay Wongela baggara Isra7eeletara issife Xoossaa anjuwa laattoosona. Isra7eeletara issi keetha asi gidoosona; Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara Xoossaa ufaysa qaala ekoosona.
Ephesians3:7 Xoossay ba oothiya wolqaa baggara taw immida aadho keehatethan ha Wongelas oosancho gidas.
Ephesians3:8 Taani geeshshata ubbaafe laafa gidikoka Ayhude gidonna asaas zawi bayna Kiristoosa duretetha Wongela odana mela ha aadho keehatethay taw imetis.
Ephesians3:9 Qassi kase wodiyan ubbaa medhida Xoossan qosetidi de7iya xuuras
Ephesians3:10 Xoossay hessa oothiday ha77i wodiyan woosa keetha baggara salon de7iya halaqatasinne haareysatas ba dumma dumma qoncethaa erisanaasa.
Ephesians3:11 Xoossay ba merinaa qofaa nu Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara polanaw hessa oothis.
Ephesians3:12 Nu ammanon yashshi bayna Xoossako shiiqana mela Kiristoosi nuus minotethinne la77atethi immis.
Ephesians3:13 Taani hinte gisho waaye ekiya gisho
Ephesians3:14 Taani aawa sinthan gulbatada woossey hessa gishosa.
Ephesians3:15 Saloninne sa7an de7iya issi issi soo asay iyan sunthetees.
Ephesians3:16 Xoossay ba boncho duretethaafe hinte garsa asatethaa minthiya wolqaa ba Ayyaana baggara immana mela hintew woossayis.
Ephesians3:17 Qassi ammanon Kiristoosi hinte wozanan daana melanne hinte siiqon xapho yeddidi minnidi daana mela woossayis.
Ephesians3:18 Hessadaka
Ephesians3:19 Eratethaafe aadhiya Kiristoosa siiquwa hinte erana mela qassi de7o immiya Xoossaa wolqan hinte kumana mela ta woossayis.
Ephesians3:20 Hiza
Ephesians3:21 woosa keethaninne Kiristoos Yesuusan wode ubban merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
Ephesians4:1 Hiza
Ephesians4:2 Hinte ubba wode aadatanne hayo gidite; issoy issuwa danda7itenne siiqon de7ite.
Ephesians4:3 Sarotethan qashetidi Ayyaanay immiya issifetetha naaganaw minnite.
Ephesians4:4 Xoossay hintena xeegida wode issi ufaysas xeegidaysada issi asatethinne issi Ayyaani de7ees.
Ephesians4:5 Issi Goday
Ephesians4:6 Ubbaafe bolla gidida
Ephesians4:7 Shin Kiristoosi immanaw koydaysada nu issoy issoy dumma dumma imota ekida.
Ephesians4:8 Hessa gisho
Ephesians4:9 Yaatin
Ephesians4:10 Ha duge wodhidaysi
Ephesians4:11 I issota issota hawaareta
Ephesians4:12 I hessa oothiday Kiristoosa asatethi gidida woosa keethi dichanawunne ammaniya asaa Xoossaa oosos giigisanaasa.
Ephesians4:13 Hessadaka
Ephesians4:14 Hizape guye
Ephesians4:15 Shin nuuni tumaa siiqon odishe
Ephesians4:16 Kumetha asatethay Kiristoosa bolla zempees qassi dumma dumma asatethaa billiteti issoy issuwara oyketidi uttis. Issi issi asatethaa kifiley ba oosuwa oothiya wode kumetha asatethay siiqon diccees.
Ephesians4:17 Hessa gisho
Ephesians4:18 Enta qofay dhumis; banta wozanaa muumisidosona. Enti eratetha dhayoninne ixas gidi Xoossay immiya de7uwape haakidosona.
Ephesians4:19 Enti yeella giyaba erokona; enti laymatethas bantana aathidi immidosona; qassi tunabaa ubbaa guye goonna oothosona.
Ephesians4:20 Shin hinte Kiristoosa eriday hessa mela ogen gidenna.
Ephesians4:21 Iyabaa tuma si7ideta. Qassi Yesuusan de7iya tumaa mela iyape tamaarideta.
Ephesians4:22 Hinte kase de7ida de7o ogiya aggite. Qassi ba cimmiya amon dhayiya hinte ceega asatethaa diggite.
Ephesians4:23 Hinte wozanaa qofan ooraxite.
Ephesians4:24 Tuma xillotethaninne geeshshatethan Xoossaa leemison medhetida ooratha asatethaa ma7ite.
Ephesians4:25 Hiza
Ephesians4:26 Hanqetite
Ephesians4:27 Xalahes besse immofite.
Ephesians4:28 Kaysotiya uray hizape guye kaysotopo. Shin manqota maaddiyabay iyaw daana mela ba kushen lo77oba ootho.
Ephesians4:29 Hinte doonape iita qaali keyopo. Shin si7eyisata go77ana melanne harata minthethiya koshshiya lo77o qaali hinte doonape keyo.
Ephesians4:30 Xoossay hintena woziya gallasas hintena attamidi wothida Xoossaa Ayyaana azzanthofite.
Ephesians4:31 Cametethi
Ephesians4:32 Aathidi issoy issuwas keehanne qadheteyisata gidite. Xoossay Kiristoosa baggara hintew atto gidaysada hinteka wolis atto giite.
Ephesians5:1 Hiza
Ephesians5:2 Kiristoosi nuna dosidi bana nu gisho Xoossaas sawiya imonne yarsho oothidi immidaysada hinteka siiqon de7ite.
Ephesians5:3 Shin laymatethi
Ephesians5:4 Xoossaa galatitepe attishin
Ephesians5:5 Haysa erite; oonika laymatey woyko tunabaa oothey woyko uuzetey Kiristoosa kawotethaanne Xoossaa kawotethaa laattanaw danda7enna. Uuzetethi eeqa goyinno mela.
Ephesians5:6 Hayisata gaason Xoossaa hanqoy kiitetonna asaa bolla yaana gisho oonika hintena pathonna odan cimmofo.
Ephesians5:7 Hessa mela asaara issifetethi oothopite.
Ephesians5:8 Kase hinte dhuman de7ideta
Ephesians5:9 Poo7oy lo77otethi
Ephesians5:10 Godaa ufaysiyabaa oothanaw koyite.
Ephesians5:11 Go77i bayna dhuma ooso qoncisitepe attishin
Ephesians5:12 Enti geeman oothiya oosuwa hari attoshin odanawuka yeellayees.
Ephesians5:13 Shin ubbabay poo7on keyiya wode qoncen bentees.
Ephesians5:14 Poo7oy ubbaba qoncen bessees. Hessa gisho

Ephesians5:16 Laythay iita gidiya gisho injetiya wode ubbaa go7etite.

Ephesians5:18 Geeshsha Ayyaanan gallas gallas kumitepe attishin
Ephesians5:19 Mazmuren
Ephesians5:20 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan ubba wode Xoossaa Aawa ubbabaas galatite.
Ephesians5:21 Kiristoosa bonchuwas gidi issoy issuwas haaretite.
Ephesians5:22 Macheto
Ephesians5:23 Kiristoosi woosa keethaas huuphe gideysada azinika ba machees huuphe. Qassi Kiristoos ba asatethi gidida woosa keethaa ashsheysa.
Ephesians5:24 Shin woosa keethay Kiristoosas haareteysada macheti banta azinatas ubbaban haaretanaw bessees.
Ephesians5:25 Azinatoo
Ephesians5:26 I woosa keethaa ba qaala baggara haathan meeccidi geeshshis.
Ephesians5:27 Kiristoosi woosa keethaa qiti woyko som7o tuussi woyko hessa melabay bayna I kumetha bonchuwara geeshshinne boretonaaro oothidi baako shiishanaw koyidi hessa oothis.

Ephesians6:1 Nayto
Ephesians6:2 “Ne aayiwunne ne aawa boncha.” Hessi ufaysa qaali de7iya koyro kiitaa.
Ephesians6:3 “Ne hessa poliyaba gidiko ubbay new injetana; ne laythay sa7a bolla aduqana.”
Ephesians6:4 Aawato
Ephesians6:5 Aylleto
Ephesians6:6 Enta sinthan saba demmanaw enti be7iya wode xalaala oothopite. Shin Kiristoosa aylletada Xoossaa sheniya wozanape polite.
Ephesians6:7 Asas gidonashin
Ephesians6:8 Aylle gidin woyko godaa gidin issoy issoy ba oothida lo77o oosuwas Godaape woyto ekanaysa ereeta.
Ephesians6:9 Godato
Ephesians6:10 Wursethan
Ephesians6:11 Xalahe cimuwa eqetanaw danda7ana mela Xoossay hintew immida ola miishiya ubbaa ma7ite.
Ephesians6:12 Nu olay asara gidonashin
Ephesians6:13 Hessa gisho
Ephesians6:14 Tumaa xeessan dancoda dancidi
Ephesians6:15 
Ephesians6:16 He ubbaafe aathidi
Ephesians6:17 Xoossaa atotetha birata barneexada hinte huuphen wothite; qassi Geeshsha Ayyaana mashsha ika
Ephesians6:18 Woossa aggofite; haratasika gaannatite; ubba wode Ayyaanan woossite. Hessan
Ephesians6:19 Taani Wongela xuuraa yashshi bayna qoncisada odana mela Xoossay taw qaala immana mela woossite.
Ephesians6:20 Taani hessa oothanaw kiitetas ha77ika qashon de7ey he Wongela gishosa. Yaaniya gisho
Ephesians6:21 Taani waana de7iyakonne ay oothiyako hinte erana mela nu siiqo ishay
Ephesians6:22 Nuuni ubbay waanidi de7iyako hintew odana melanne hintena minthethana mela taani iya hinteko kiittas.

Philippians1:1 Kiristoos Yesuusara issifida gisho
Philippians1:2 Nu Aawa Xoossaafenne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido.
Philippians1:3 Taani hintena qopiya wode ubban
Philippians1:4 Taani hinte ubbaas Xoossaa woossiya wode ufaysan woossayis.
Philippians1:5 Hinte koyro gallasape ha77i gakanaw
Philippians1:6 Hinte giddon lo77o ooso doomida Xoossay
Philippians1:7 Hinte ubba wode ta wozanan de7eeta. Taani ubba wodeka hessada qopanaw bessees. Ha77i taani qashon de7ashenne qashetanaape sinthe Wongela naagoninne Wongela mintha eson Xoossay taw qaadida qaada hinteka taara shaaketideta.
Philippians1:8 Taani hintena ubbaa Kiristoos Yesuusa siiquwan ay mela laamotiyako Xoossay taw marka.
Philippians1:9 Hinte siiqoy tuma eratetharanne akeekara issife guji guji diccana mela Xoossaa woossayis.
Philippians1:10 Hessan hinte lo77oba shaakidi
Philippians1:11 Hinte de7oy Xoossaa bonchuwasinne galatas Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara bentiya xillotethaa ayfiyan kumidi ayfana.
Philippians1:12 Ta ishato
Philippians1:13 Taani Kiristoosa gisho qashetidaysa
Philippians1:14 Ta qashuwa gaason nu ishatape daroti Godan keehi ammanetidosona. Hessa gisho
Philippians1:15 Gidoshin
Philippians1:16 Suure wozanape odeysati
Philippians1:17 Shin tana qanaateysati ta qashuwa bolla hara meto ehanaba entaw daanin bantana dosidi Kiristoosaba odoosonape attishin
Philippians1:18 Hessi aykoka metenna. Tuma ogen gidin woyko wordo ogen gidin he ubban Kiristoosi sabbaketees. Tana hessi ufaysees. Qassi harabay tana ufaysiyabay
Philippians1:19 taani hinte woosaninne Yesuus Kiristoosa Ayyaana maaduwan attanaysa eriya gisho tana ufaysees.
Philippians1:20 Ta gita amoynne ufaysan naagiya naagoy ta yeellatonna attanaysa. Shin ubba wode ootheysada
Philippians1:21 Ta de7ikoka Kiristoosa xalaalas de7ayis; qassi ta hayqikoka taw aadhida wodhe.
Philippians1:22 Shin ta paxa de7iko ayfey de7iya ooso oothana. Shin paxa de7eysafenne hayqope awusa dooraneko taw eretenna.
Philippians1:23 Taani ha nam7atape awusa dooraneko un7etas. Ha de7uwape shaaketada Kiristoosara issife daanaw amottayis; Kiristoosara issife de7eysi ubbaafe aadhida lo77o.
Philippians1:24 Shin taani hinte gisho paxa de7eysi hintew daro koshshiyaba.
Philippians1:25 Hessa taani geeshshada erayis; taani
Philippians1:26 Hessa gisho
Philippians1:27 Ubbaafe aathidi
Philippians1:28 Hinte morketas yayyofite. Enti hintera eqetiyaba gidiko hessi hintew atotethas
Philippians1:29 Kiristoosas oothiya qaaday hintew imetiday
Philippians1:30 Hessa gisho
Philippians2:1 Kiristoosan hinte de7iya de7oy hintena minthees; qassi iya siiqoyka hintena minthethees. Geeshsha Ayyaanara hintew issifetethi de7ees; hinte haratas keehetanne qadheteta.
Philippians2:2 Hiza
Philippians2:3 Hintena doson woyko ceeqetiya hada amon issibaaka oothopite. Shin hinte issoy issuwafe gitatayis yaagidi qoponna hintena kawushite.
Philippians2:4 Hinte issoy issoy
Philippians2:5 Kiristoos Yesuusan de7iya qofay hintenan daanaw bessees.
Philippians2:6 Iyaw ubba wode Xoossa hanoti de7ees. Gidoshin
Philippians2:7 Gidoshin
Philippians2:8 I bana kawushis; hayqana gakanaw
Philippians2:9 Hessa gisho
Philippians2:10 Saloninne sa7an
Philippians2:11 Asa ubbay banta inxarsan
Philippians2:12 Ta ishato
Philippians2:13 Xoossay
Philippians2:14 Ay ooso oothisheka zuuzumonna woyko palamonna oothite.
Philippians2:15 Geellanne nagarancho asaa giddon boretonayisata
Philippians2:16 de7o immiya kiitaa entaw odite. He wode ta daabursaynne ta oosoy mela attiboona gisho
Philippians2:17 Hinte Xoossaas immiya ammano imota bolla ta suuthay ushsha yarshoda gukikoka tana ufaysees. Hinteka taara ufaytana.
Philippians2:18 Hessada hinteka ufaytidi tanaka ufaysanaw bessees.
Philippians2:19 Taani hinte de7uwabaa si7ada ufaytanaw Ximotiyoosa hinteko ellesada yeddana mela Godaa Yesuusi tana maaddanaysa ammanetayis.
Philippians2:20 Hinte de7uwas wozanape qopiya iya mela asi hari oonika baawa.
Philippians2:21 Harati bantana go77iyabaa koyoosonape attishin
Philippians2:22 I taara issife gididi na7i ba aawas ootheysada Wongela ooso oothidaysanne ammanetiya asi gideysa hinte ereeta.
Philippians2:23 Hessa gisho
Philippians2:24 Taani
Philippians2:25 Hessadaka
Philippians2:26 I hintena ubbaa be7anaw daro laamotees. Qassi I hargetidaysa hinte si7ida gisho
Philippians2:27 I tuma hargetidi
Philippians2:28 Hiza
Philippians2:29 Godaas haggaaziya asada iya kumetha ufaysan mokite. Qassi iya mela asa ubbaa bonchite.
Philippians2:30 Hinte ta matan gididi oothanaw danda7onna maaddiya maaddidi Kiristoosa oosuwa gisho
Philippians3:1 Wursethan
Philippians3:2 Iitabaa oothiya kanatape
Philippians3:3 Nuuni Xoossaa Geeshsha Ayyaanan goyinniya gishonne nu de7uwan Kiristoos Yesuusan ceeqetiya gisho
Philippians3:4 Ta kare asatethan ceeqetanaw koshshiko ta daroban ceeqetanaw danda7ayis. Ay asika ba kare asatethan ceeqetiyabay baw de7ees gidi qopiko
Philippians3:5 Taani yeletida saamintara qaxaretas. Taani yeletan Isra7eele; taani Biniyaame koche; taani walaki bayna Ayhude ase. Ayhude higge naagon gidiko taani Farsaawe.
Philippians3:6 Ayhude ammanuwas mishetethan gidiko taani woosa keethaa yedethas. Issi asi higge naagidi xilliyaba gidiko
Philippians3:7 Shin kase tana maaddees gada qopidaba ubbaa
Philippians3:8 Hessa xalaala gidonashin
Philippians3:9 Taani higges kiitetada demmiya ta huuphe xillotethi taw baawa. Kiristoosa ammanin bentiya xillotethay
Philippians3:10 Taani Kiristoosanne iya dendo wolqaa eranaw koyayis. Taani iya metuwa iyara shaaketanawunne iya hayquwan iya daananaw amottayis.
Philippians3:11 Hessadaka
Philippians3:12 Taani ha77i gaxa gakas woyko tanan bali baawa giike. Shin Kiristoos Yesuusi tana oykida gisho taani ta sinthan de7iya woytuwa oykanaw woxaysinne butetayis.
Philippians3:13 Ta ishato
Philippians3:14 Hessa gisho
Philippians3:15 Hiza
Philippians3:16 Gidikoka
Philippians3:17 Ta ishato
Philippians3:18 Taani hessa hintew kase daro toho odas
Philippians3:19 Enta wursethay dhayo; enta uloy entaw xoosse. Yeellatanaw bessiyaban enti ceeqetoosona; qassi ha sa7aba xalaala qopoosona.
Philippians3:20 Nu biittay saluwana. Salope yidi nuna ashshiya Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa naagoos.
Philippians3:21 Kiristoosi ubbaba ba maatape garsan oothanaw danda7iya ba wolqan nu daaburancho asatethaa laammidi ba boncho asatethaa daanisana.
Philippians4:1 Ta ishato
Philippians4:2 Ewoodanne Sinxika
Philippians4:3 Taara oothiya ammantheyso
Philippians4:4 Godaara hinte de7iya de7uwan ubba wode ufaytite. Taani hessa gujadaka odayis; ufaytite.
Philippians4:5 Asi ubbay hinte ashketetha ero; Goday matan yaana.
Philippians4:6 Hinte Xoossaa woossiya wode ubban iya galatishe
Philippians4:7 Asa eratetha ubbaafe aadhiya Xoossaa sarotethay
Philippians4:8 Wursethan
Philippians4:9 Hinte taape tamaaridaba
Philippians4:10 Daro wodepe guye
Philippians4:11 Taani hessa tana metida gisho giike; taw de7iyabay gidana guussu tamaaras.
Philippians4:12 Taani metootetidi de7iya duussi erayis; qassi duretidi de7iya duussika erayis. Awun gidin qassi ay wodeka taani kalonne kosha
Philippians4:13 Kiristoosi taw immiya wolqan ubbaba oothanaw danda7ayis.
Philippians4:14 Gidikoka
Philippians4:15 Filphisiyuusa asato
Philippians4:16 Teselonqen metoy gakida wodeka tana zaari zaaridi maaddideta.
Philippians4:17 Taani
Philippians4:18 Taani
Philippians4:19 Ta Xoossay ba boncho duretethaafe
Philippians4:20 Nu Aawa Xoossaas merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
Philippians4:21 Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara Xoossaba gidida ubbaa saro giite. Taara de7iya ishati hintena saro goosona.
Philippians4:22 Xoossaba gidida asa ubbay
Philippians4:23 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hintera gido.
Colossians1:1 Xoossaa shenen Kiristoosi Yesuusa hawaare gidida Phawuloosinne nu ishaa Ximotiyoosi
Colossians1:2 Qolaasiyasa kataman de7iya Kiristoosan geeshshatasinne ammanetida asaas xaafida kiitaa. Xoossaa nu Aawape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido.
Colossians1:3 Nuuni hintew woossiya wode Xoossaa nu Godaa
Colossians1:4 Nuuni Kiristoos Yesuusan de7iya hinte ammanuwanne geeshshata ubbaas de7iya hinte siiquwa si7ida.
Colossians1:5 Hessa hinte oothiday hinte ufaysay salon hintew naagetida gishosa. Hinte tuma kiitta gidida Wongela koyro ammanida wode he ufaysaa si7ideta.
Colossians1:6 Hinte he Wongela si7ida wodenne Xoossaa aadho keehatetha tumaa shaaki erida wodepe doomidi hinte giddon hanidaysada biitta ubban diccishenne ayfishe de7ees.
Colossians1:7 Hinte hessa nuura issife Kiristoosas oothiya ammanetida
Colossians1:8 I hessa bolla gujidi Ayyaanay hintew immida siiquwaba nuus odis.
Colossians1:9 Hessa gisho
Colossians1:10 Hessadaka
Colossians1:11 Xoossaa boncho wolqay hinte ubbaba gencanaadanne danda7anaada ba minotethaa immidi hintena ufayso.
Colossians1:12 Qassi geeshshata poo7o kawotethaa laattana mela hintena oothida Aawa galatite.
Colossians1:13 I nuna dhuma wolqaafe ashshidi ba dosiya na7aa kawotethaako ehis.
Colossians1:14 Iyan wozetidi iya suuthan nagara atotethi demmida.
Colossians1:15 Kiristoosi bentonna Xoossaas tuma leemiso. I medhetetha ubbaafe bayra.
Colossians1:16 Ubbabay iya baggara medhetis. Bentiyabatinne bentonnabati
Colossians1:17 I ubbabaape kase de7ees. Ubbabay iyan ba bessan bessan oyketidi de7ees.
Colossians1:18 I ba asatethi gidida woosa keethas huuphe. I ubbaafe bolla gidanaw hayqope dendon sinthenne bayra.
Colossians1:19 Xoossay ba kumetha Xoossatethaara iyan daanaw koyis.
Colossians1:20 Qassi masqaliya bolla gussida ba na7aa suuthan sarotethi medhidi saloninne sa7an de7iya ubbaa iya baggara baara sigethis.
Colossians1:21 Haysafe kase hinte qofaa iitatethay hintena Xoossaafe shaakisinne iyara morke oothis; hinte oosoyka iita.
Colossians1:22 Shin ha77i Kiristoosi ashon hayqida hayquwa baggara Xoossay hintena baara sigethidi
Colossians1:23 Hinte
Colossians1:24 Taani hinte gisho ha77i ekiya waayan ufaytayis. Kiristoosi iya asatethi gidida woosa keethaas ekida waayiya taani ta ashuwan polayis.
Colossians1:25 Xoossaa qaala hintew polada odana mela taw imetida maatan woosa keethaas oosancho gidas.
Colossians1:26 Ha qaalay kase aadhida wodiyan yeletethaa ubbaafe geemmidi de7is. Shin ha77i Xoossay ha xuuraa ammaniya ubbaas qoncisis.
Colossians1:27 Xoossay Ayhude gidonna asaa giddon ha xuuraa boncho duretetha qoncisis. Ika boncho ufaysi gidida hinte giddon de7iya Kiristoosa.
Colossians1:28 Hessa gisho
Colossians1:29 Xoossay ba gita wolqan tanan oothiya gisho
Colossians2:1 Ta hintewunne Loodoqe kataman de7iya asaas
Colossians2:2 Ta baaxetiya gaasoyka enti banta wozanan minnidi
Colossians2:3 Iyan Xoossay minjida eraynne cincatetha ubbay de7ees.
Colossians2:4 Ta hessa oonika hintena cimo qaalan balethonna mela koyada gayis.
Colossians2:5 Ta hintefe haakada de7ikoka ayyaanan hintera de7ayis. Hinte duussaa maaranne Kiristoosa hinte minnidi ammaneysa be7ada ufaytayis.
Colossians2:6 Hinte Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusa ekidaysada iyan de7ite.
Colossians2:7 Iyan xapho yeddite; iyan keexetite. Hinte tamaaridaysada ammanon minnite; Xoossaas kumidi palahida galataa immite.
Colossians2:8 Kiristoosape gidonashin
Colossians2:9 Xoossaa Xoossatethay Kiristoosa asatethan kumethi de7ees.
Colossians2:10 Hinteka maatasinne wolqa ubbaas huuphe gidiya Kiristoosan kumideta.
Colossians2:11 Hinte Kiristoosa ammanidi qaxaretideta. Hessika asa kushen gidonashin
Colossians2:12 Hinte xammaqetida wode Kiristoosara issife moogetidi
Colossians2:13 Hinte
Colossians2:14 I nuna mootiyanne nuura eqetiya
Colossians2:15 Kiristoosi wolqatanne maatata masqaliyan xoonidi
Colossians2:16 Hessa gisho
Colossians2:17 Haysati sinthafe yaanaw de7iyabatas eesho
Colossians2:18 Qoodhepe qommo ashketethaninne kiitancho goyinnon ceeqetiya oonika hintena hinte woytuwape ashshofo. Hessa mela asi ba be7ida qoncethan nashetishe ba asho qofan coo otortees.
Colossians2:19 Hessa mela asaas huuphe gidida Kiristoosara gahetethi baawa. I asatethaa ubbaa shayaninne keson keson gathi oythidi muzidi dichees. Xoossay hessa mela ogen asatethaa ubbaas dichi immees.
Colossians2:20 Hinte Kiristoosara hayqidi ha alamiya haariya ayyaanata wolqaafe la77a keydeta. Yaatin
Colossians2:21 He wogati
Colossians2:22 Ha ubbay asa woganne timirte gidiya gisho ooso bolla pee7idaape guye dhayana.
Colossians2:23 Ha kiitati bonchonne cincatethi daanidi bentanaw danda7oosona. Ha wogati Xoosse daro dosisiyaba
Colossians3:1 Hiza
Colossians3:2 Salon de7eyisata bolla hinte qofaa wothitepe attishin
Colossians3:3 Hinte hayqon shaaketida mela ha alamiyape shaaketideta. Hinte de7oy Kiristoosara issife Xoossan geemmis.
Colossians3:4 Hintew de7o gidida Kiristoosi qonciya wode he wode hinteka iyara bonchon qoncana.
Colossians3:5 Hessa gisho
Colossians3:6 Hayisata gaason Xoossaa hanqoy kiitetonna asaa bolla yaana.
Colossians3:7 Hinteka kase he iita ogiyan biya asaa giddon de7ishe haysata oothideta.
Colossians3:8 Ha77i hinte hessata oothopite. Qassi hanqo
Colossians3:9 Ceega asatethaa iya oosuwara hintefe qaarida gisho
Colossians3:10 Xoossaa medho daaniya
Colossians3:11 Ha ooratha medhetethan
Colossians3:12 Hessa gisho
Colossians3:13 Issoy issuwa danda7ite. Oonika ba laggiyan qohetidabay de7iko iyaw atto go. Goday hintew atto gidaysada hinteka wolis atto giite.
Colossians3:14 He ubbaa bolla ubbaba issife shiishidi qachiya siiqo ma7ite.
Colossians3:15 Xoossay hintena issi asi oothidi xeegiday
Colossians3:16 Kiristoosa qaalay hinte wozanan kumidi de7o. Cincatetha ubban issoy issuwa tamaarsitenne zorite. Mazmuren
Colossians3:17 Xoossaa Aawa Yesuusa baggara galatishe hinte odetiyaba woyko oothiyaba ubbaa Godaa Yesuusa sunthan oothite.
Colossians3:18 Macheto
Colossians3:19 Azinatoo
Colossians3:20 Nayto
Colossians3:21 Aawato
Colossians3:22 Aylleto
Colossians3:23 Hinte oothiya ooso ubbaa asas gidonashin
Colossians3:24 Godaape laata woyto oothidi hinte ekeysa erite; hinte Godaa Kiristoosa haggaazeeta.
Colossians3:25 Xoossay asa som7o be7idi pirdonna gisho
Colossians4:1 Godato
Colossians4:2 Xoossaa barkidi galatishe qanxonna woossite.
Colossians4:3 Xoossay ba qaalas penge dooyana melanne taani hessa gaason qashon de7iya Kiristoosa xuuraa awaajana mela nuuska woossite.
Colossians4:4 Qassi taka besseysada qaala qoncisada odana mela taw Xoossaa woossite.
Colossians4:5 Injetiya wode ubbaa go7etishe ammanonna asaa matan cincatethan de7ite.
Colossians4:6 Hinte asa ubbaas koshshiya zaaro imo erana mela hinte oday ubba wode aadho keehatethan kumidaysanne maxineda mal7iyabaa gidanaw bessees.
Colossians4:7 Nu siiqo ishay Tikiqoosi
Colossians4:8 Taani iya hinteko kiittiday
Colossians4:9 Anasmoosi
Colossians4:10 Taara qashetida Arisxirokoosinne Barnabaasa ishaa na7ay Marqoosi
Colossians4:11 Yesuusa geetetiya Yasxoosi hintena saro saro yaagees. Xoossaa kawotethaa gisho taara oothiya asata giddofe Ayhude gididaysati ha heedzata; enti tana daro minthethidosona.
Colossians4:12 Hinte baggay
Colossians4:13 I hinte gishonne Loodoqeninne Hirapolisa kataman de7iya asaa gisho daro daaburidaysa ta markatayis.
Colossians4:14 Nu siiqo ishay dottorey Luqaasinne Deemasi
Colossians4:15 Loodoqen de7iya nu ishatas
Colossians4:16 Ha dabdaabiya hinte nabbabidaape guye
Colossians4:17 Qassi Arkiphaasa
Colossians4:18 Taani
1Thessalonians1:1 Phawuloosi Sillaaseynne Ximotiyoosi Teselonqe woosa keethan de7iya
1Thessalonians1:2 Nuuni Xoossaa woossiya wode ubban hintena qopishe hinte gisho ubba wode Xoossaa galatoos.
1Thessalonians1:3 Xoossaa nu Aawa sinthan ammanon hinte oothida oosuwa
1Thessalonians1:4 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians1:5 Ayis giiko
1Thessalonians1:6 Hinte daro meto ekikoka Geeshsha Ayyaanay immiya ufaysan kiitaa ekideta; nunanne Godaa daanideta.
1Thessalonians1:7 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians1:8 Godaa qaalay hintefe keyidi
1Thessalonians1:9 Nuuni hinteko bida wode hinte nuna mokida mokuwanne hinte
1Thessalonians1:10 Qassi Xoossaa Na7ay
1Thessalonians2:1 Ta ishato
1Thessalonians2:2 Shin nuuni hinteko Teselonqe yaanape sinthe Filphisiyuusa kataman waayetidaysanne cayetidaysa hinte ereeta. Daro ixoy de7ikoka hintew iya Wongela odana mela Xoossay nuus minotethi immis.
1Thessalonians2:3 Nuuni hintena zoriday balethon woyko cimon woyko genen gidenna.
1Thessalonians2:4 Shin Xoossay nunan ammanetidi ba Wongela odana mela nuus hadara immida gisho odoos. Nu hessa oothey nu wozanaa be7iya Xoossaa ufaysanaasafe attishin
1Thessalonians2:5 Nu miishe yaaridi wordo hintena sabbishe hinteko yoonnaysa loythidi ereeta; Xoossay nuus marka.
1Thessalonians2:6 Nuuni hintefe gidin woyko hara asa oodefeka boncho koyibooko.
1Thessalonians2:7 Nuuni Kiristoosa hawaare gideysada nuus koshshiyaba immite gidi ekanaw danda7oos
1Thessalonians2:8 Nu hintena dosida gisho Xoossaa Wongela hintew shaako xalaala gidonashin
1Thessalonians2:9 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians2:10 Nu de7oy hinte ammaneyisata mataninne Xoossaa sinthan geeshshi
1Thessalonians2:11 Nuuni hintew huuphen huuphen yelidaysati banta naytas haneysada hanidaysa ereeta.
1Thessalonians2:12 Nu hintena zorida
1Thessalonians2:13 Hintew nuuni Xoossaa qaala odida wode asa qaalada gidonashin
1Thessalonians2:14 Ta ishato
1Thessalonians2:15 He Ayhudeti Godaa Yesuusanne nabeta wodhidosona; qassi nuna goodidosona. Enti Xoossaa ufaysonaysatanne ase ubbaa ixeyisata.
1Thessalonians2:16 Enti hari attoshin
1Thessalonians2:17 Shin nu ishato
1Thessalonians2:18 Nu simmi hinteko baanaw koyida. Taani ta huuphen hinteko baanaw koyas
1Thessalonians2:19 Hiza
1Thessalonians2:20 Tuma hinte nu bonchonne nu ufaysi.
1Thessalonians3:1 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians3:2 Hintena zoranaadanne ammanon hintena minthethanaada nuura issife Xoossas ootheysanne Kiristoosa Wongela odiya nu ishaa Ximotiyoosa hinteko kiitida.
1Thessalonians3:3 Hintena gakida goodan hintefe oonika guye simmofo. He gooday nuus Xoossa shene gideysa hinte
1Thessalonians3:4 Nu hintera de7iya wode goodi gakanaysa hintew koyrottidi odida. Hinte ereysa mela hessada hanis.
1Thessalonians3:5 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians3:6 Ha77i Ximotiyoosi hinte matape yidi
1Thessalonians3:7 Ta ishato
1Thessalonians3:8 Hinte Godan minnidi de7iko nuka de7on de7oos.
1Thessalonians3:9 Hiza
1Thessalonians3:10 Nuuni hintena be7anawunne hinte ammanuwan pacidaba kunthanaw qammanne gallas nu kumetha wozanan Xoossaa woossoos.
1Thessalonians3:11 Xoossay nu aaway ba huupheninne nu Goday Yesuus Kiristoosi nu hinteko baana ogiya giigiso.
1Thessalonians3:12 Nu hintena daro doseysada Goday hinte issoy issuwa siiqiya siiqonne ase ubbaa siiqiya siiqo hintew darsonne gujo.
1Thessalonians3:13 Nu Goday Yesuus Kiristoosi ba geeshshatara yaa wode Xoossaa
1Thessalonians4:1 Wursethan
1Thessalonians4:2 Nuuni Godaa Yesuusa maatan hintena kiitida kiitay awuseko ereeta.
1Thessalonians4:3 Xoossay
1Thessalonians4:4 Hinte issoy issoy
1Thessalonians4:5 Xoossaa eronnanne ammanonna asada laymatetha amon xuugetofite.
1Thessalonians4:6 Nu kase hintew odidaysadanne minthi zoridaysada Goday hessa melaba oothiya ubbaa pirdiya gisho
1Thessalonians4:7 Xoossay nuna geeshshatethan daana mela xeegisipe attishin
1Thessalonians4:8 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians4:9 Hinte issoy issuwa waati siiqaneko Xoossay hintena tamaarsida gisho
1Thessalonians4:10 Qassi Maqedoone biittan de7iya ammaniya ishata ubbaa tuma hinte doseeta. Shin nu ishato
1Thessalonians4:11 Nuuni kase hintew odidaysada wopu gida de7uwa de7ite. Hinte
1Thessalonians4:12 Hessada haniko
1Thessalonians4:13 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians4:14 Nuuni

1Thessalonians4:16 Goday wolqaama kiitara
1Thessalonians4:17 Hessafe guye
1Thessalonians4:18 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians5:1 Ta ishato
1Thessalonians5:2 Godaa Gallasay kaysoy qamma yeysada yaanaysa hinte loythi ereeta.
1Thessalonians5:3 Asay
1Thessalonians5:4 Shin nu ishato
1Thessalonians5:5 Hinte ubbay poo7o asinne gallasan de7iya asi; nuuni qamma asi woyko dhuma asi gidoko.
1Thessalonians5:6 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians5:7 Dhiskeysati qamma dhiskoosona; mathoteysati qamma mathotosona.
1Thessalonians5:8 Shin nuuni gallasa asi gidiya gisho giigidi daanaw bessees. Ammanonne siiqo xurureda tiran ma7idi
1Thessalonians5:9 Xoossay nuna nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara kumetha atotethi ekana mela doorisipe attishin
1Thessalonians5:10 Nuuni paxa de7in woyko hayqin
1Thessalonians5:11 Hessa gisho
1Thessalonians5:12 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians5:13 Enti oothiya oosuwa gisho
1Thessalonians5:14 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians5:15 Oonika iita gisho iita zaaronna mela naagetite. Hinte wolisinne asa ubbaas lo77oba oothanaw minnite.
1Thessalonians5:16 Ubba wode ufaytite.
1Thessalonians5:17 Ubba wode Xoossaa woossite.
1Thessalonians5:18 Ubbaban galatite. Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara Xoossay hintefe koyey hessa.
1Thessalonians5:19 Geeshsha Ayyaana oosuwa toysopite.
1Thessalonians5:20 Tinbite qaala kadhopite.
1Thessalonians5:21 Ubbabaa paacite; lo77oba ekite.
1Thessalonians5:22 Iita ooso ubbaafe haakite.
1Thessalonians5:23 Saro immiya Xoossay ba huuphen hintena polo geeshsho. Nu Goday Yesuus Kiristoosi yaana gallasaas
1Thessalonians5:24 Hintena xeegeysi ammanetidaysa gidiya gisho
1Thessalonians5:25 Nu ishato
1Thessalonians5:26 Ammaniya asa ubbaa geeshsha yeeretethan sarothite.
1Thessalonians5:27 Hinte ha kiitaa ammaniya asa ubbaas nabbabanaada Godaa sunthan hintena woossayis.
1Thessalonians5:28 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hintera issife gido. Amin7i.
2Thessalonians1:1 Phawuloosi
2Thessalonians1:2 Xoossaa nu Aawapenne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido.
2Thessalonians1:3 Nu ishato
2Thessalonians1:4 Hintena gakida goodaninne waaye ubban gencaninne ammanon minnidi eqida gisho
2Thessalonians1:5 Hinte iya gisho gidi meto ekiya Xoossaa kawotethaas besseyisata gididi taybetana mela Xoossaa xillo pirdaas haysi malla.
2Thessalonians1:6 Xoossay tuma pirdaa pirdana. Xoossay hintena waayseysata bolla waaye ehana.
2Thessalonians1:7 Goday Yesuusi ba wolqaama kiitanchotara
2Thessalonians1:8 Qassi Xoossay bana eronnaysatanne nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa Wongelas kiitetonayisata pirdana.
2Thessalonians1:9 Enti Godaa sinthafenne iya bonchuwa wolqaafe shaaketidi merinaa dhayuwan pirdetana.
2Thessalonians1:10 He gallas
2Thessalonians1:11 Nuuni hintew ubba wode Xoossaa woossey hessasa. Nu Xoossay hintena xeegida de7uwas besseyisata gididi taybetana mela nuuni woossoos. Hinte lo77oba oothanaw amotiya amuwanne hinte ammano oosuwa I ba wolqan polo.
2Thessalonians1:12 Hessan nu Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethan
2Thessalonians2:1 Nu ishato
2Thessalonians2:2 Tinbiten woyko hara asape si7ida qaalan woyko nuupe ekida kiittada oothidi
2Thessalonians2:3 Hintena oonika ay ogenka balethofo. Kasetidi geellatethay qonconnanne dhayoy bessiya geella uray yoonna de7ishin
2Thessalonians2:4 Asi goyinniyabanne xoossayaba ubbaa I ixananne bana dhoqu oothana. Hari attoshin
2Thessalonians2:5 Taani hintera de7ashe hintew odidaysa akeekeketii?
2Thessalonians2:6 I ba gallasan yaanape attishin
2Thessalonians2:7 Asaas qonciboonna geellatetha xuura wolqay ha77ika oothees
2Thessalonians2:8 Hessafe guye
2Thessalonians2:9 Geella uray
2Thessalonians2:10 Hessadaka
2Thessalonians2:11 Hessa gisho
2Thessalonians2:12 Hessika
2Thessalonians2:13 Goday dosiya nu ishato
2Thessalonians2:14 Xoossay
2Thessalonians2:15 Hiza
2Thessalonians2:16 Xoossay nu aaway nuna dosees. I nuus keeha; I merinaa minthethonne lo77o ufaysaa nuus immis. Hinte ubba wode lo77oba oothanawunne odetanaw minthethana melanne maaddana mela nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosanne Xoossaa nu aawa woossoos.
2Thessalonians2:17 
2Thessalonians3:1 Wursethan nu ishato
2Thessalonians3:2 Hessadaka
2Thessalonians3:3 Shin Goday ammanetidaysa; I hintena minthethananne Xalahepe naagana.
2Thessalonians3:4 Nuuni hintena kiitteysa ha77ika sinthafeka hinte oothanaysas Godan nuuni ammanetoos.
2Thessalonians3:5 Goday hinte wozanaa Xoossa siiquwakonne Kiristoosa danda7aako kaaletho.
2Thessalonians3:6 Nu ishato
2Thessalonians3:7 Nuuda hanidi daanaw besseysa hinte
2Thessalonians3:8 Nuuni oodefeka kathi mela mibooko. Nuus danda7etida mela qammanne gallas oothi daaburidi de7idape attishin
2Thessalonians3:9 Nuuni hessa oothiday
2Thessalonians3:10 Nu hintera de7iya wodeka
2Thessalonians3:11 Nuuni hessa giday
2Thessalonians3:12 Nuuni hessa mela asati maara de7o daanadanne bantana koshshiyaba oothidi demmanaada Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan enta kiittoosinne zoroos.
2Thessalonians3:13 Shin nu ishato
2Thessalonians3:14 Ha77i nuuni ha dabdaabiyan kiitida kiittas kiitetonna asi oonika de7iko he uraa erite. I yeellatana mela iyape shaaketite.
2Thessalonians3:15 Shin iya ishada seeritepe attishin
2Thessalonians3:16 Saro immiya Goday
2Thessalonians3:17 Taani Phawuloosi
2Thessalonians3:18 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido.
1Timothy1:1 Nuna ashshiya Xoossaaninne nu ufaysan naagiya Yesuus Kiristoosan kiitetida
1Timothy1:2 ammanon taw tuma na7a gidida Ximotiyoosas. Xoossaa nu Aawa
1Timothy1:3 Taani Maqedoone bashe nena hadaridaysada
1Timothy1:4 Enti go77i bayna hayse odanne banta kocha taybuwa agganaada oda. Hessa melabay palama kaaletheesipe attishin
1Timothy1:5 Ha kiitaa huuphe qofay geeshsha wozanape
1Timothy1:6 Issi issi asati haysa aggidi
1Timothy1:7 Enti Xoossaa higgiya astamaare gidanaw koyoosona. Shin enti ay odiyako woyko tuma oothidi odeysi I aybeko erokona.
1Timothy1:8 Asi besseysada higgiyan go7etiko higgey lo77o gideysa eroos.
1Timothy1:9 Issiba akeekanaw koshshees. Higgey lo77o asaas medhetibeenna. Shin higgey
1Timothy1:10 laammeyisata
1Timothy1:11 He timirtey bonchonne anjetida Xoossay taani awaajana mela taw hadara immida Wongela giddon de7ees.
1Timothy1:12 Taani oothiya oosuwan taw wolqaa immida nu Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusa galatayis. Tana ba oosuwas shuumidi he oosuwas besseysa gidi taybida gisho iya galatayis.
1Timothy1:13 Taani haysafe kase iya cayeysa
1Timothy1:14 Nu Goday ba aadho keehatetha ta bolla gussidi
1Timothy1:15 “Kiristoos Yesuusi nagaranchota ashshanaw ha alamiya yis” giya qaalay ammantheysanne asa ubbay ekanaw besseysa. Ubbaafe aadhida nagaranchoy tana.
1Timothy1:16 Shin merinaa de7uwa ekanaw iya ammaniya asaas taani leemiso gidana mela Yesuus Kiristoosi daro danda7is. Taw ubbaafe aadhida nagaranchuwas Xoossay ba maarota darsis.
1Timothy1:17 Ayfen bentonnaysas
1Timothy1:18 Ximotiyoosa
1Timothy1:19 Ammanoynne lo77o kahi new de7o. Issoti issoti kaha dhayidi markabey hobben dhayeysada banta ammanuwa dhaysidosona.
1Timothy1:20 Hessa hanidaysata giddon Hemeneyoosinne Iskindirey de7oosona. Enti tamaaridi Xoossaa cayeysa aggana mela taani Xalahes entana aatha immas.
1Timothy2:1 Ubbaafe sinthatada
1Timothy2:2 Nuuni tuma ayyaana de7oninne geeshshatethan Xoossaa goyinnishe sarotethaninne wopu gida de7on daana mela kawotasinne shuumata ubbaas woossite.
1Timothy2:3 Hessa mela woosay nuna ashshiya Xoossaa sinthan lo77onne ufaysiyabaa.
1Timothy2:4 Xoossay asi ubbay attanaadanne tumaa eranaada koyees.
1Timothy2:5 Issi Xoossi de7ees. Xoossafenne asape giddon gididi sigethiya issoy de7ees; ika ase gidida Kiristoos Yesuusa.
1Timothy2:6 I asa ubbaa wozanaw bana aathidi immis. Xoossay ba wodiyan asa ubbaa wozanaw koyeysa bessiya markay haysa.
1Timothy2:7 Xoossay tana Wongelas astamaarenne hawaare oothidi dooriday hessasa. Taani tuma odayis; wordotike; ammanoninne tuman Ayhude gidonna asaas markatana mela Xoossay tana shuumis.
1Timothy2:8 Hessa gisho
1Timothy2:9 Hessada maccasay bantana haaridaysa qoncisiya
1Timothy2:10 Shin Xoossaas goyinnayis giya maccasay bantaw besseysada lo77oba oothonna.
1Timothy2:11 Maccasi kiitetethan si77i gidi tamaaro.
1Timothy2:12 Taani maccasay tamaarsana mela woyko adde bolla aawatana mela gidonashin
1Timothy2:13 Addaamey koyro medhetis; guyepe Hewaanna medhetasu.
1Timothy2:14 Qassi cimetada Xoossaa higgiya menthiday maccasipe attishin
1Timothy2:15 Shin maccasi ammanon
1Timothy3:1 Oonika
1Timothy3:2 Woosa keethaa kaalethiya asi boretonaysa
1Timothy3:3 mathotonaysa
1Timothy3:4 iya nayti iyaw kiiteteysanne boncheysa
1Timothy3:5 Issi asi ba keethaa aysanaw danda7onna ixiko
1Timothy3:6 Otoron sugetidi
1Timothy3:7 Boreninne Xalahe xihen gelonna mela he uray ammanonna asa matan nasheteysa gidanaw bessees.
1Timothy3:8 Hessada qassi woosa keethaa daaqoneti bonchetidaysata
1Timothy3:9 ammanuwa xuuraa geeshsha kahan naageysata gidanaw bessees.
1Timothy3:10 Enti koyrottidi paacetanaw koshshees; enta bolla borey bayna ixiko
1Timothy3:11 Hessadaka
1Timothy3:12 Woosa keethaa daaqoneti issi machi xalaali de7eysa gido. Ba naytanne ba keethaa loythi ayseysa gidanaw bessees.
1Timothy3:13 Woosa keethaa daaqone gididi
1Timothy3:14 Taani ha kiitaa new xaafashe
1Timothy3:15 Shin taani boonna gam7iko
1Timothy3:16 Nu ammanuwa xuuray sidhey bayna gita. Kiristoosi asho ma7idi qoncis; Iya tumatethaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay markatis. Kiitanchotas bentis; I kawotetha ubbaas sabbaketis. Alamen de7iya asan ammanetis; bonchon salo eketis.
1Timothy4:1 Yaana wodiyan balethiya ayyaanatanne tuna ayyaanata timirte kaallidi
1Timothy4:2 Hessa mela timirtey enta kahay doccin
1Timothy4:3 Hessa mela asati ekonne gelo qassi issi issi kathata moonna mela diggoosona. Shin ammaneysatinne tumaa ereysati Xoossaa galati woossidi maana mela Xoossay kathi medhis.
1Timothy4:4 Xoossay medhida ubbabay lo77o. Xoossaa galatidi miiko wora wodhiyabay aybika baawa.
1Timothy4:5 Ubbabay Xoossaa qaalaninne woosan geeshshi gidees.
1Timothy4:6 Hessa gisho
1Timothy4:7 Shin go77i bayna tuma gidonna odapenne cima maccasa haysepe baqata. Tuma ayyaana de7on daanaw nena loohisa.
1Timothy4:8 Asi ba asatethaa minthanaw oothiya oosoy guuthas maaddees. Shin tuma ayyaana de7on bana loohisoy ha77iska merinawuka de7o immiya ufaysi de7iya gisho
1Timothy4:9 Ha qaalay asa ubbay ekanaw bessiya tuma oda.
1Timothy4:10 Nuuni asa ubbaa
1Timothy4:11 Haysa kiittanne tamaarsa.
1Timothy4:12 Neeni yalaga gidiya gisho
1Timothy4:13 Taani yaana gakanaw asaas Geeshsha maxaafaa nabbabon
1Timothy4:14 Tinbitey odetin
1Timothy4:15 Ne dichay asa ubbaas qoncana mela hessa mintha qopa; haysa ubba wode ootha.
1Timothy4:16 Ne huuphiyasinne ne timirtiyas naageta. Neeni hessa ubba wode oothiko nenanne nena si7eyisata ashshaasa.
1Timothy5:1 Cima addeta ne aawada bonchafe attishin
1Timothy5:2 Cima maccasata ne aayida
1Timothy5:3 Azini hayqida tuma am7eta boncha.
1Timothy5:4 Shin am7ees nayti woyko nayta nayti de7iko
1Timothy5:5 Barka de7iya tuma am7iya Xoossafe maade demmanaw ufaysan naagasu. Gallasinne qamma Xoossay bana maaddana mela woossawusunne oychawusu.
1Timothy5:6 Shin ha alamiyan lo77o duussaa xalaala koyiya am7iya paxa de7ashe hayqidaaro.
1Timothy5:7 Oonika enta boronna mela ha kiitaa entaw imma.
1Timothy5:8 Shin ba dabbotas
1Timothy5:9 Laythi usupun tammu kumiboona am7e sunthaa mazgaben xaafopa. Qassi hessa bolla iya ba azinaas ammanetidaro gidanaw koshshees.
1Timothy5:10 Nayta dishon
1Timothy5:11 Shin yalaga am7eta sunthaa mazgaben xaafopa. Entana azina gelo gelo giya asho amoy oykiya wode Kiristoosa aggana.
1Timothy5:12 Enti koyro gelida qaala menthida gisho pirdetana.
1Timothy5:13 Hessa bolla enti ooso dhayidi keethafe keethe yuuyana. Yuushsha xalaala gidonashin
1Timothy5:14 Hessa gisho
1Timothy5:15 Haysafe kase guutha am7eti Xalahe kaallanaw guye simmidosona.
1Timothy5:16 Issi ammaniya maccasees soo asaa giddon am7eti de7iko
1Timothy5:17 Woosa keethi loythi heemmiya cimati
1Timothy5:18 Geeshsha Maxaafay
1Timothy5:19 Nam7u woyko heedzu marki bayna
1Timothy5:20 Harati yayyana mela nagara oothiya oonaka asa ubbaa sinthan hanqeta.
1Timothy5:21 Neeni asa som7o be7onna
1Timothy5:22 Oodde bollaka ne kushiya wothada shuumanaw ellesopa. Harata nagaran gelopa; nena geeshshatethan naaga.
1Timothy5:23 Neeni ubba wode hargetiya gishonne ne ulo hargiya gisho haatha xalaala uyopa; guutha woyne uya.
1Timothy5:24 Issi issi asata nagaray qonce; enta nagaray enta pirdanaw entafe sinthe aadhees
1Timothy5:25 Hessada
1Timothy6:1 Xoossaa sunthaynne nu timirtey cayetonna mela aylletethan de7eysati bantana haariya godata boncho.
1Timothy6:2 Ammaniya godati de7iya aylleti
1Timothy6:3 Oonika dumma timirte tamaarsiyaba gidiko
1Timothy6:4 He uray otoron sugeteesipe attishin
1Timothy6:5 giigonna palama kaalethees. Qassi entaw iita wozani de7ees; tumaa balidosona; enti Xoossaa ammanoy duretethas oge gidi qopoosona.
1Timothy6:6 Shin taw de7iyabay gidana giya asas tuma ayyaana de7oy gita wodhe.
1Timothy6:7 Nuuni ha alamiya aykoka ehibooko; qassi iyape aykoka ekidi booko.
1Timothy6:8 Nuus kathinne ma7oy de7iko hessi gidana.
1Timothy6:9 Shin duretethi koyeysati paaceninne xihen geloosona. Qassi entana duge dafiyanne dhaysiya eeyatethinne qohiya amon kundoosona.
1Timothy6:10 Miishe siiqoy iitatetha ubbaas pulto. Issoti issoti miishe amotishe ammanope baletidi daro meton bantana yeggidosona.
1Timothy6:11 Shin neno
1Timothy6:12 Ammano baaxiya loytha baaxeta. Daro asaa sinthan ne markatida ne ammanuwaba
1Timothy6:13 Ubbaas de7o immiya Xoossaa sinthaninne
1Timothy6:14 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosi qoncana gakanaw ha kiitaa balinne borey bayna naaga.
1Timothy6:15 Ba xalaala ubbaa haariya boncho Xoossay
1Timothy6:16 Issi iya xalaali hayqenna. Oonika shiiqanaw danda7onna poo7on de7ees. Oonika iya be7ibeenna; qassi be7anawuka danda7enna. Bonchoynne merinaa wolqay iyaw gido. Amin7i.
1Timothy6:17 Ha alamiya dureti coo dhayiya shalon otortonna melanne ceeqonna mela oda. Nuus koshshiyaba palahisidi immiya nuna anjiya
1Timothy6:18 Enti lo77o ooso oothanaada lo77o ooson duretanaada
1Timothy6:19 Hessi entaw sinthas mino baaso gidiya gisho
1Timothy6:20 Ximotiyoosa
1Timothy6:21 Issoti issoti nuus eratethi de7ees yaagishe ammanuwa aggidosona. Xoossaa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido.
2Timothy1:1 Xoossaa shenen
2Timothy1:2 ta dosiya na7aa Ximotiyoosas kiitetida kiita. Xoossaa Aawapenne nu Godaa Kiristoos Yesuusape aadho keehatethay
2Timothy1:3 Taani
2Timothy1:4 Taani ne afuthaa qopayis; nena be7ada ufaytanaw daro laamotayis.
2Timothy1:5 Qassi new de7iya tuma ammanuwa erayis. He ammanoy beni ne wogga aaye Loydininne ne aaye Ewuniqin de7iya ammanuwa mela.
2Timothy1:6 Hessa gisho
2Timothy1:7 Ayis giiko
2Timothy1:8 Hiza
2Timothy1:9 Xoossay ba sheneninne ba aadho keehatethan nuna ashshidi
2Timothy1:10 Ha77i ha aadho keehatethay nuna ashshiya Kiristoos Yesuusa yuussan qoncis. I hayqo wolqaa dhaysidi
2Timothy1:11 Taani Wongela sabaake
2Timothy1:12 Taani hessa gisho ha metuwa ekayis; shin ta ammaney ooneko eriya gisho yeellatike. Taw imetida hadara he gallasay gakanaw I naaganaw danda7eysa erayis.
2Timothy1:13 Taani nena tamaarsida tuma qaala leemiso ootha oykada Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara nubaa gidida ammanuwaninne siiquwan de7a.
2Timothy1:14 Nu giddon de7iya Geeshsha Ayyaana wolqan new imetida lo77o hadara naaga.
2Timothy1:15 Iise biittan de7iya ubbay taape haakidaysa eraasa; enta giddon Figeluusinne Hermogeneesi de7oosona.
2Timothy1:16 Anesfoori tana daro wode minthethida gisho Goday iya soo asaas qadheto. Taani qasho keethan de7iya wode I tanan yeellatibeenna.
2Timothy1:17 Hessa bolla I Roome katamaa yida wode tana minthi koyidi demmis.
2Timothy1:18 Wursetha gallasan Goday iyaw qadhetana mela taani Godaa woossayis. Efesoona kataman I tana ay mela maaddidaako ne loytha eraasa.
2Timothy2:1 Hiza
2Timothy2:2 Daro markata sinthan taani nena tamaarsida timirtiya
2Timothy2:3 Yesuus Kiristoosas ammanthiya wotaadare gidada taara meto eka.
2Timothy2:4 Ola wotaadarey ba tora mocona ufaysanaw giigeteesipe attishin
2Timothy2:5 Hessadaka
2Timothy2:6 Goshshan daaburiya goshshanchoy ba daabura ayfiyape miya koyro asi gidanaw bessees.
2Timothy2:7 Ne akeekana mela Goday nena maaddana gisho
2Timothy2:8 Taani markatiya Wongela mela hayqope dendida
2Timothy2:9 Taani wongela odiya gisho
2Timothy2:10 Hessa gisho
2Timothy2:11 Haysada giya tuma qaali de7ees; “Nuuni iyara hayqidaba gidiko
2Timothy2:12 Nuuni genciko
2Timothy2:13 Nuuni ammanetona ixiko
2Timothy2:14 Neeni enta haysa akeekisa; enti qaalata gaason palamonna mela
2Timothy2:15 Neeni tuma qaala suuretethan tamaarseysanne yeellayonna oosancho gidada
2Timothy2:16 Shin ha alamiyas injetiya go77onna odape baqata. Hessa mela oday ase Xoossaafe haassees.
2Timothy2:17 Hessa mela oday asatethi midigiya paxonna woyzazire maduntha mela. Hessa mela odaa odeteyisata giddofe Hemeneyoosinne Filixoosi de7oosona.
2Timothy2:18 Ha asati tuma ogiya aggidi
2Timothy2:19 Gidoshin
2Timothy2:20 Issi gita keethan worqafe woyko birape oosetida miisheta xalaala gidonashin
2Timothy2:21 Hessa gisho
2Timothy2:22 Na7atetha iita amuwape baqata. Geeshsha wozanan Godaa xeegiya asatara issife
2Timothy2:23 Shin ooshshi medheysa erada eeyatethinne hada gidida palamape haaka.
2Timothy2:24 Godaa oosanchoy asa ubbaas keeha
2Timothy2:25 I baara eqeteyisata ashketethan seereysa gidanaw bessees. Enti banta nagaraape simmidi tumaa eranaada Xoossay oothaneko ooni eri.
2Timothy2:26 Enti banta wozanaako simmidi ba sheniya oothana mela enta oykida Xalahe xihiyape kessi ekana.
2Timothy3:1 Wursetha gallasan un7ethiya wodey yaanaysa era.
2Timothy3:2 Asay bantana doseyisata
2Timothy3:3 siiqoy baynayisata
2Timothy3:4 morkees aathidi immeyisata
2Timothy3:5 Enti ammaniya daanosonape attishin
2Timothy3:6 Entafe issoti issoti asa keethaa gelidi nagaran oyketidaysatanne dumma dumma amon sugetiya daaburancho maccasata bolla godatosoona.
2Timothy3:7 He maccasati ubba wode tamaarosonashin
2Timothy3:8 Yaanesinne Yambareesi Musera eqetidaysada ha asati guuggey oothonaysatanne ammanon kundida asata gidiya gisho tumaara eqetoosona.
2Timothy3:9 Shin Yaanesanne Yambareesa eeyatethay qoncidaysada enta eeyatethayka asa ubbaa sinthan qoncana gisho entaw hanenna.
2Timothy3:10 Shin neeni ta timirtiya
2Timothy3:11 ta goodetethanne ta metuwa eraasa. Anxooke
2Timothy3:12 Kiristoos Yesuusan Xoossaa ufaysiya de7o daanaw koyiya ubbay goodettana.
2Timothy3:13 Iita asatinne baletheysati bantaw baletishenne harata balethishe kasepe iiti iiti baana.
2Timothy3:14 Shin ne tamaarida tumaaninne ne ammanida ammanuwan eqa. Ne oodefe tamaaridaako eraasa.
2Timothy3:15 Neeni ne na7atethafe doomada Kiristoosa Yesuusa ammanada
2Timothy3:16 Geeshsha Maxaafaa ubbay Xoossaafe imetida qaala. He maxaafay tumaa tamaarsanaw
2Timothy3:17 Xoossaa asi polonne lo77o ooso ubbaa oothanaw giigidaysa gidana mela maaddees.
2Timothy4:1 Taani nena Xoossaa sinthaninne
2Timothy4:2 Qaala oda; wodey injetin injetonna ixin minnada oda. Daro danda7aninne tamaarson asaa zora seeranne denthetha.
2Timothy4:3 Asay tuma timirtiya si7onna ixiya wodey yaana. Enti banta amuwa kaallidi
2Timothy4:4 Enti tuma timirtiya aggidi
2Timothy4:5 Shin neeni ubbaban nena haara. Meto danda7a. Wongela markatetha oosuwa ootha. New imetida Xoossaa ooso ubbaa pola.
2Timothy4:6 Taani yarshetiya wodey gakis; ha alamiya aggada biya wodey matis.
2Timothy4:7 Taani lo77o ola oletas; ta gaaddiya woxada wursas; ammanuwa naagas.
2Timothy4:8 Sinthafe xillotetha kallachay tana naagees. Hessa xillo pirdaa pirdiya Goday he gallas taw immana. Hessa ta xalaalas gidonashin
2Timothy4:9 Ellesa yada tana be7a.
2Timothy4:10 Deemasi ha77i alamiya dosidi
2Timothy4:11 Luqaasa xalaali taara de7ees. Marqoosi Xoossa ooson tana maaddanaw danda7iya gisho
2Timothy4:12 Taani Tikiqoosa Efesoona katama kiittas.
2Timothy4:13 Neeni yashe
2Timothy4:14 Birata qoxiya Iskindirey tana daro qohis; Goday iya oosuwada iyaw zaarana.
2Timothy4:15 I nu timirtiya daro ixiya gisho iyape nena naaga.
2Timothy4:16 Koyro ta mootetiya wode ubbay aggidi bidosonape attishin
2Timothy4:17 Shin taani kumetha kiitaa Ayhude gidonna asa ubbaas markatin
2Timothy4:18 Goday tana iita ubbaafe ashshidi ba salo kawotetha saron efana. Iyaw merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
2Timothy4:19 Phirisqillas
2Timothy4:20 Erasxoosi Qorontoosa kataman attis. Xirofmoosi hargetida gisho
2Timothy4:21 Balgoy gelanaape sinthe ellesada ya. Ewubulusi
2Timothy4:22 Goday Yesuus Kiristoosi ne ayyaanara gido. Xoossaa maarotethay hinte ubbaara gido.
Titus1:1 Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaareynne Xoossa aylley
Titus1:2 He ammanoynne eratethay merinaa de7uwa ufaysaa bolla zempis. Hessa daro wodepe sinthe wordotonna Xoossay nuus immana gidi qaala gelis.
Titus1:3 Nuna ashshiya Xoossay ba woden ha kiitaa odana mela taw hadara immis.
Titus1:4 Nu kothe ammanuwan ta tuma na7aa gidida Tito
Titus1:5 Taani nena Qarxeesan aggada yiday
Titus1:6 Cimi boretonaysa
Titus1:7 Woosa keetha cimi Xoossaa oosuwa hadara ekida gisho
Titus1:8 Shin imathe mokeysa
Titus1:9 Harata suure timirtiyan minthethanawunne he timirtiya ixeyisata zaaranaw ba tamaarida tuma qaalan minnidi eqanaw bessees.
Titus1:10 Kiitetonaysati
Titus1:11 Enti bessonna ogen miishe demmanaw koyidi
Titus1:12 Enta nabetape issoy
Titus1:13 Ha markatethay tuma markatethi. Hessa gisho
Titus1:14 Tumaa ixiya asaa timirtiyanne Ayhudeta pathonna tossiya si7onna mela enta seera.
Titus1:15 Bantaw geeshshi gididaysatas ubbay geeshshi
Titus1:16 Enti nu Xoossaa eroos goosona
Titus2:1 Shin neeni suure timirtiya phalqonna timirte tamaarsanaw bessees.
Titus2:2 Cima addeti bantana haareyisata
Titus2:3 Hessadaka
Titus2:4 Enti hessada haniko yalaga maccasay banta azinatanne banta nayta siiqana mela tamaarsanaw danda7oosona.
Titus2:5 Xoossaa qaalay boretonna mela bantana haareyisata
Titus2:6 Hessadaka
Titus2:7 Neeni ne huuphen lo77o ooso ubban entaw leemiso gida. Neeni ne timirtiyan eqidaysanne ammanetidaysa gida.
Titus2:8 Nu morketi nuna zigiranaw gaasoyabay entaw dhayin enti yeellatana mela neeni boretonna lo77o oda odeeta.
Titus2:9 Aylleti ubbaban banta godatas kiitetana mela enta ufaysana melanne entara palamonna mela zora.
Titus2:10 Enti banta godatape kaysotopo. Hessika
Titus2:11 Ase ashshiya Xoossa aadho keehatethay asa ubbaas qoncis.
Titus2:12 He aadho keehatethay
Titus2:13 Nuuni anjetida ufaysaa gidida gita Xoossaanne nuna ashshiya Yesuus Kiristoosa boncho qoncethaa naagoos.
Titus2:14 Iita ooso ubbaafe nuna wozanawunne lo77oba oothanaw amotiya ba geeshsha asi kessanaw nu gisho bana aathidi immis.
Titus2:15 Neeni haysa tamaarsa; kumetha maatan zora
Titus3:1 Asay deriya haareysatas
Titus3:2 Qassi enti oodde bollaka iita odetonna mela
Titus3:3 Nuuni kase eeyata
Titus3:4 Shin ashshiya Xoossaa keehatethaynne siiqoy qoncida wode
Titus3:5 nu oothida xillo oosuwa gisho gidonashin
Titus3:6 He Ayyaana
Titus3:7 Ba aadho keehatetha baggara nuna xillisidi merinaa de7uwa laata ufaysaa oykana mela hessa oothis.
Titus3:8 Ha qaalay ammanetida qaala. Xoossaa ammaneysati lo77o ooso oothanaw giigidaysata gidana mela ne ha qaala minthada odana mela ta koyayis. Haysati ase ubbaas lo77onne go77eyisata.
Titus3:9 Shin eeyatetha palamape
Titus3:10 Shaahetethi medhiya uraa koyro zora; nam7antho hanqeta
Titus3:11 Hessa mela asi geellanne nagarancho; I ba bolla pirdeysa era.
Titus3:12 Taani balgo yan shaacanaw qopida gisho
Titus3:13 Higge eriya Zeemasinne Aphiloosi oge biya wode entaw koshshiyabay paconna mela enta maadda.
Titus3:14 Nu asayka pathonna asi gididi attonna mela bantaw koshshiyaba demmana mela lo77o ooso oothanaw minnidi tamaaro.
Titus3:15 Taara de7iya ubbay nena saro goosona; ammanon nuna siiqiya asaa saro ga. Xoossaa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.
Philemon1:1 Taani Phawuloosi
Philemon1:2 ne son shiiqiya woosa keethatas
Philemon1:3 Xoossaa nu Aawapenne nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosape aadho keehatethaynne sarotethay hintew gido.
Philemon1:4 Neeni geeshshata doseysanne Godaa Yesuusa ammaneysa taani si7iya gisho
Philemon1:5 
Philemon1:6 Neeni ne ammanuwa haratas shaakeysi nuus Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara yaa lo77oba ubbaa erisana mela taani Xoossaa woossayis.
Philemon1:7 Geeshshata wozanay ne oosuwan minnida gisho
Philemon1:8 Hessa gisho
Philemon1:9 Taani
Philemon1:10 Taani qashon de7ashe iyaw zoriya aawa gidada ta na7aa Anasmoosa gisho nena woossayis.
Philemon1:11 I kase nena maaddenna
Philemon1:12 Taani wozanape dosiya Anasmoosa neeko yeddayis. Taani Wongela gisho qashetidashin
Philemon1:13 
Philemon1:14 Shin ne sheneda oothanaw koyasipe attishin
Philemon1:15 Anasmoosi guutha wode neepe shaaketidaysi
Philemon1:16 Hiza
Philemon1:17 Hiza
Philemon1:18 I nena qohidabay woyko I acotidabay de7iko taape eka.
Philemon1:19 He acuwa ta qanxana gada taani Phawuloosi
Philemon1:20 Ta ishaw
Philemon1:21 Taani gidaysafe daro neeni oothanaysa erada qassi ne taw kiitetanaysa ammanada haysa xaafayis.
Philemon1:22 Xoossay hinte woosa si7idi tana hinteko guye zaarana gada qopiya gisho
Philemon1:23 Kiristoos Yesuusa gisho taara qashon de7iya Ephafiri nena saro saro gees.
Philemon1:24 Qassi taara issife oothiya Marqoosi
Philemon1:25 Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay hinte ayyaanara gido.
Hebrews1:1 Kase Xoossay
Hebrews1:2 Shin ha wursetha wodiyan ubbaa iya laatisida qassi alame iya baggara medhida ba Na7aa baggara nuus odis.
Hebrews1:3 Na7ay Xoossaa bonchuwa phoolethaanne kumetha Xoossa Xoossatetha ekidi
Hebrews1:4 Iyaw imetida sunthay kiitanchota sunthafe bolla gideysada I entafe bolla.
Hebrews1:5 Hiza
Hebrews1:6 Qassi Xoossay ba bayra Na7aa ha alamiya kiittishe
Hebrews1:7 Xoossay kiitanchotaba odishe
Hebrews1:8 Shin ba Na7aba odishe
Hebrews1:9 Neeni xillotethi dosadasa; iita ixadasa. Xoossay
Hebrews1:10 Xoossay Zaaridi
Hebrews1:11 Hessati ubbay dhayana; shin neeni daana. Enti ubbay afilada wurana.
Hebrews1:12 Neeni enta saleenada xaaxana; qassi enti afilada laametana. Shin neeni ubba wode nena; ne laythayka wurenna” yaagees.
Hebrews1:13 Shin Xoossay kiitanchotape oodeko
Hebrews1:14 Kiitanchoti ubbay atotethi demmanaw de7iya asata maaddanaw Xoossay kiitida ayyaanata gidokonaayee?
Hebrews2:1 Hessa gisho
Hebrews2:2 Hiza
Hebrews2:3 yaatin
Hebrews2:4 Qassi Xoossay malaatatan
Hebrews2:5 Xoossay ha nuuni odiya sinthafe yaana alamiya
Hebrews2:6 Geeshsha Maxaafay issi bessan haysada yaagees: “Neeni asas qopanaw asi aybee? Woyko neeni iya naaganaw I aybee?
Hebrews2:7 Ne iya kiitanchotape guutha wodes guuthadasa; Iya huuphen bonchonne saba kallacha wothadasa.
Hebrews2:8 Qassi ubbaba iya tohuwape garsan wothadasa” yaagees. Xoossay ubbaba iyaw haarisiya wode iyaw haaretiboonabay aybika baawa. Shin ha77i ubbabay iyaw haaretishin nuuni be7ibooko.
Hebrews2:9 Shin nuuni kiitanchotape guuthara guuxida Yesuusa be7oos. Xoossaa aadho keehatetha gaason Yesuusi asa ubbaas hayqis. I waaye hayqo hayqida gisho
Hebrews2:10 Ubbabay iyawunne iya gaason medhetida Xoossay
Hebrews2:11 Yesuusinne he I geeshshida asa ubbay issi aawa nayta. Yesuusi enta
Hebrews2:12 Yesuusi
Hebrews2:13 Qassi I

Hebrews2:16 Tuma Yesuusi yiday Abrahaame koche maaddanaasafe attishin
Hebrews2:17 Asaa nagaray atto geetetana mela Xoossaa sinthan maariyanne ammanetida kahine halaqa gidis. Hessa gisho
Hebrews2:18 I ba huuphen paacen waayetida gisho paaceteyisata maaddanaw danda7ees.

Hebrews6:6 guyepe kaddidaysata nagaraape nam7antho zaaranaw danda7etenna. Ayis giiko
Hebrews6:7 Ubba wode I bolla bukiya ira uyada
Hebrews6:8 Shin agunthinne kinchote doliya biittiya aybibaaka maadduku; iw baadethay matatis; wursethan xuugetana.

Hebrews7:1 Malkexaadeqey
Hebrews7:2 Abrahaamey ba di77idaba ubbaafe iyaw asraata kessidi immis. Malkexaadeqa sunthay koyro “Xillotethaa kawa”
Hebrews7:3 Malkexaadeqas aayiya woyko aawu woyko kocha paydoy baawa. Iya yeletethaas doomethi woyko iya de7uwas wursethi baawa
Hebrews7:4 Malkexaadeqi ay mela giteeko be7ite. Nu aawata mayzay
Hebrews7:5 Kahine gidiya Leewe kochay Isra7eele asape
Hebrews7:6 Malkexaadeqi Leewe koche gidonna ixikoka Abrahaamepe asraata ekis; ufaysa qaali de7iya Abrahaame anjis.
Hebrews7:7 Guuthay gitan anjeteysi palanthenna.
Hebrews7:8 Issi baggara
Hebrews7:9 Hiza
Hebrews7:10 Ayis giiko
Hebrews7:11 Isra7eele asaas higgey Leewe kahinetetha baggara imetis. Ha Leewe kahinetethay polo gididaba gidiyako Aaronaysa mela gidonashin
Hebrews7:12 Hiza
Hebrews7:13 Ha nu iyabaa odiya uray hara koche; iya sheeshape oonika yarsho bessan kahinetethan oothibeenna.
Hebrews7:14 Nu Goday Yihuda sheeshape yidaysi eretidaysa. Gidoshin
Hebrews7:15 Malkexaadeqa mela hara kahiney yidaba gidiyako ha nu odiyabay aadhidi qoncana.
Hebrews7:16 I kahine gididay dhayonna de7o wolqanaape attishin
Hebrews7:17 Geeshsha Maxaafay
Hebrews7:18 Koyro higgey daaburanchonne maaddonnaba gidiya gisho shaaretis.
Hebrews7:19 Muse higgey aybinka polo oothanaw danda7ibeenna. Shin nuuni iya baggara Xoossaako shiiqiya ubbaafe aadhiya ufaysa qaalay nuus imetis.
Hebrews7:20 Kiristoosi kahine gidiya wode Xoossay caaqis
Hebrews7:21 Shin Yesuusi caaqon kahine gidis. Xoossay yaagidi caaqis; “Goday caaqis; I ba qofaa laammenna; ‘Neeni merinaa kahine’ ” yaagis.
Hebrews7:22 Ha caaquwa gaason Yesuusi nuus ubbaafe aadhiya qaala caaquwas waase gidis.
Hebrews7:23 Kahinetethan oothonna mela hayqoy enta diggida gisho koyro kahineta tayboy daro.
Hebrews7:24 Shin Yesuusi merinaw de7iya gisho iya kahinetetha hari laattenna.
Hebrews7:25 Hessa gisho
Hebrews7:26 Hiza
Hebrews7:27 I hanko kahine halaqata mela koyro ba nagara gisho
Hebrews7:28 Muse higgey daaburancho asaa kahine halaqa oothidi shuumees. Shin higgiyafe guye yida caaqo qaalay merinaw polo gidida Xoossaa Na7aa shuumis.
Hebrews8:1 Nuuni haasaya gitabay hessa. Saluwan Ubbaafe Bolla Xoossaa araatape ushacha baggan uttida haysa mela kahine halaqay nuus de7ees.
Hebrews8:2 I asan gidonashin
Hebrews8:3 Kahine halaqa ubbay imonne yarsho yarshanaw shuumetees. Hessa gisho
Hebrews8:4 Higgey kiiteysada yarshiya kahineti de7iya gisho
Hebrews8:5 Enti kahinetethan oothiya dunkaaney salon de7eysas leemisonne kuya. Musey dunkaaniya essiya wode Xoossay iyako
Hebrews8:6 Shin Yesuusi giddo gididi sigethiya caaqoy
Hebrews8:7 Koyro caaquwan bali baynaba gidiyako nam7antho caaqo koshshenna.
Hebrews8:8 Shin Goday enta boridi
Hebrews8:9 He caaqoy ta enta aawata Gibxe biittafe kushiya oykada
Hebrews8:10 Shin hizape guye Isra7eele asaara ta caaqana caaqoy haysa yaagees Goday. Taani ta higgiya enta guuggiyan wothana; enta wozanan xaafana. Taani enta Xoossaa gidana; entika ta ase gidana.
Hebrews8:11 Entafe oonika ba shooruwa woyko ba ishaa
Hebrews8:12 Taani enta naaquwa atto gaana; enta nagaraa zaara qopike” yaagees.
Hebrews8:13 Xoossay ha caaquwa “Oorathi” gidi xeegishe koyroysa gal7isis. Hiza
Hebrews9:1 Koyro caaquwas Xoossaa goyinniya wogaynne sa7a Xoossa Keethay de7ees.
Hebrews9:2 Dunkaaney eqis. Iyan xompe wothiya kocay
Hebrews9:3 Nam7antho magarajuwafe guye baggara de7iya bessay Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geetetees.
Hebrews9:4 Iya giddon ixaane cuyisiya worqa saaxineynne worqan meeshetida caaqo Taabotey de7ees. He caaqo Taabotiyan mannay de7iya worqa xaaroy
Hebrews9:5 He Taabotiyape bolla baggara atotetha kamaa banta qefiyan genthiya boncho kiruubeti de7oosona. Shin ha77i he ubbaa qoncisidi odanaw danda7oko.
Hebrews9:6 Ha ubbay haysada giigidaape guye
Hebrews9:7 Shin kahine halaqaa xalaali dunkaaniyas nam7antho kifiliya laythafe issi toho gelees. I yaa gelishe ba nagaraa gishonne asay eronna oothida nagaraa gisho suutha yarsho ekonna gelenna.
Hebrews9:8 Koyro dunkaaney eqidi de7ishin
Hebrews9:9 Hessi ha wodiyas leemiso; Xoossas imetiya imoynne yarshoy goyinniya uraa kaha geeshshanaw danda7onaysa haysi bessees.
Hebrews9:10 Hessati muussaba
Hebrews9:11 Shin Kiristoosi ha77i nu demmida lo77obatas kahine halaqa gididi yis. I gelida dunkaaney gitanne polo gididaysa. He dunkaaney asa kushen oosetibeenna qassi ha alamiyaba gidenna.
Hebrews9:12 Kiristoosi Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa geliya wode deesha suuthinne mari suuthi ekidi gelibeenna. Shin merinaa atotetha immanaw ba suuthaa ekidi zaarethonna ogen issi toho gelis.
Hebrews9:13 Deesha suuthaynne korma suuthay
Hebrews9:14 merinaa Geeshsha Ayyaana baggara borey bayna yarsho oothidi

Hebrews9:19 Musey higge kiita ubbaa asaas odidaape guye mara suuthinne deesha suuthi haathara walakidi

Hebrews9:24 Kiristoosi tuma Xoossa keethaas leemiso gidida
Hebrews9:25 Kahine halaqay laythan laythan ba suuthi gidonnaysa ekidi
