Hebrews9:28 Hessadaka
Hebrews10:1 Muse higgey yaanaw de7iya lo77obatas kuyape attishin
Hebrews10:2 Higgey enta polo oothanaw danda7idaba gidiyako enti yarsho yarsheysa agganashin. Qassi goyinnanaw shiiqiya asay banta nagaraape geeyana; enta kahayka entana bala gidi mootenna.
Hebrews10:3 Shin he yarshoti laythan laythan nagara qofisoosona.
Hebrews10:4 Ayis giiko
Hebrews10:5 Hessa gisho
Hebrews10:6 Neeni xuussa yarshoninne nagara yarshon ufaytabaaka.
Hebrews10:7 He wode
Hebrews10:8 Yarshoy yarshetana mela higgey kiittiyaba gidikoka
Hebrews10:9 Kaallidika I
Hebrews10:10 Yesuus Kiristoosi Xoossaa sheniya oothidi
Hebrews10:11 Kahine ubbay
Hebrews10:12 Shin Kiristoosi ubba wodes gidiya issi nagara yarshuwa yarshidi
Hebrews10:13 He wodiyape doomidi iya morketi iya tohoy yedhiyabaa oothana gakanaw naagees.
Hebrews10:14 I zaarethonna ogen issi toho bana yarshida yarshuwan geeshshata merinaw polo oothis.
Hebrews10:15 Qassi Geeshsha Ayyaanay nuus haysa markatees. Koyro haysada yaagis:
Hebrews10:16 “He gallasatape guye
Hebrews10:17 Kaallidika
Hebrews10:18 Hiza
Hebrews10:19 Hiza
Hebrews10:20 Nu gelanay Kiristoosi ba magarajuwa
Hebrews10:21 Nuus Xoossa Keetha bolla shuumetida gita kahine halaqay de7ees.
Hebrews10:22 Nuuni iita kahape geeyanaw nu wozanaa wurxetidi
Hebrews10:23 Nuus ufaysa qaala immida Xoossay ammanetidaysa gidiya gisho nu markatiya ufaysaa ushachi haddirsi goonna minthidi oykoos.
Hebrews10:24 Issoy issuwa siiqosinne lo77o oosos waati denthethaneko ane qopoos.
Hebrews10:25 Issoti issoti meeze oothidi shiiqeysa aggidaysada nuuni issife shiiqeysa aggoko. Shin Godaa gallasay matatidaysa hinte be7iya gisho hessa kaseysafe aathidi oothite.
Hebrews10:26 Nuuni tuma eratethaa ekidaape guye erishe nagara oothiko
Hebrews10:27 Shin hiza attiday yashshiya pirdaanne Xoossaa morketa xuugganaw giigida wolqaama tama.
Hebrews10:28 Muse higgiya kiitetonna ixida oonika nam7u woyko heedzu asi iya bolla markatiko qadhey baynashin hayqees.
Hebrews10:29 Yaatin
Hebrews10:30 Hiza
Hebrews10:31 De7o Xoossaa kushen kundethi daro yashshees.
Hebrews10:32 Hintew Xoossaa poo7oy poo7idaape guye hinte daro waayen
Hebrews10:33 Issi issi toho hinte asa sinthan cayetideta; goodetideta; issi issi toho hessa mela waayey gakida asaara issife waayideta.
Hebrews10:34 Qashon de7iya asaaska qadhetideta. Hintew lo77onne dhayonna shaloy salon de7eysa hinte erida gisho hinte shaloy bonqetiya wode ufaysan danda7ideta.
Hebrews10:35 Hessa gisho
Hebrews10:36 Xoossaa sheniya polidi
Hebrews10:37 Hiza
Hebrews10:38 Shin ta xilloy
Hebrews10:39 Nuuni ammanidi attiya asaa baggafe attishin
Hebrews11:1 Ammano guussay
Hebrews11:2 Beni aawati ammanon Xoossaafe markatethi ekidosona.
Hebrews11:3 Alamey Xoossaa qaalan medhetidaysa nu ammanon eroos. Qassi bentiyabay bentonnabape medhetis.
Hebrews11:4 Aabeli Qaayelape aadhiya yarsho Xoossaas yarshiday ammanonna. Xoossay Aabela imuwa ufaytidi ekida wode I xillo gididaysa markatis. Aabeli hari attoshin
Hebrews11:5 Heenokey hayqonna salo biday ammanonna. Xoossay iya ekida gisho oonika iya be7anaw danda7ibeenna. Heenokey salo eketanaape sinthe I Xoossaa ufaysida asi gideysi odetis.
Hebrews11:6 Ammanoy bayna oonika Xoossaa ufaysanaw danda7enna. Xoossaako yaa oonika Xoossay de7eysanne bana koyeysatas woyto immeysa ammananaw koshshees.
Hebrews11:7 Nohey buroo bentonnabas Xoossi iyaw odida wode Xoossas yayidi
Hebrews11:8 Abrahaamey laata oothidi ekana biitta baana mela Xoossay iya xeegida wode hari attoshin
Hebrews11:9 Abrahaamey Xoossay iyaw immana gida biittan bete asada de7iday ammanonna. Xoossay he immana gidaysa iyara issife laattanaw de7iya Yisaaqaranne Yayqoobara wolla dunkaanen de7is.
Hebrews11:10 I
Hebrews11:11 Saara ba huuphen cimidabaa gidikoka ufaysi immida Xoossay ammanetidaysa gideysa erida gisho qanthatanaw wolqa demmiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:12 Hessa gisho
Hebrews11:13 He asa ubbay bantaw geetetida ufaysaa qaala ekonna ammanon hayqidosona. Shin haahora hessa be7idi
Hebrews11:14 Hessada giya asay banta biitta naageysa qoncen bessees.
Hebrews11:15 Enti he aggidi keyida biitta guye qopidaba gidiyako guye simmanaw danda7oosona.
Hebrews11:16 Shin ha77i aadhidi lo77iya salo biitta laamotosona. Hessa gisho
Hebrews11:17 Abrahaamey paacetida wode Yisaaqa yarshiday ammanonna. He ufaysa qaala ekida Abrahaamey ba issi na7aa yarshanaw giigis.
Hebrews11:18 Xoossay Abrahaameko
Hebrews11:19 Xoossay hayqope denthanaw danda7eysa Abrahaamey ammanida gisho
Hebrews11:20 Yisaaqi wodepe hananaba eridi Yayqoobanne Eesawe anjiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:21 Yayqoobi hayqana hanishe
Hebrews11:22 Yoosefi hayqanaw matida wode Isra7eele asay Gibxefe keyanaysa odidaynne ba meqethaa oothanaba enta kiittiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:23 Musey yeletidaape guye iya aayanne iya aaway mala lo77o na7a gididaysa be7idi heedzu ageena qottiday ammanonna; enti kawa awaajuwa babibookona.
Hebrews11:24 Musey diccidaape guye Gibxe kawa na7e na7a geetetanaysa ixiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:25 Musey nagaran guutha wodes ufaytanaape
Hebrews11:26 I wodepe demmana woytuwa tishshi oothidi xeellida gisho
Hebrews11:27 Musey Kawa hanquwa yayyonna
Hebrews11:28 Hayqo ehiya kiitanchoy Isra7eele asaa bayra nayta wodhonna mela Musey Paasikanne suutha wurxetha wogaa oothiday ammanonna.
Hebrews11:29 Isra7eele asay mela biittara hemetiyada hemetidi
Hebrews11:30 Isra7eele asay Iyaarko katamaa shucha dirsaa laapun gallas yuuyidi
Hebrews11:31 Laymiya Ra7aaba biitta wocheyisata mokida gisho
Hebrews11:32 Hiza
Hebrews11:33 Enti ammanon kawotethata xoonidosona; xillotethan aysidosona; Xoossay immana gida ufaysaa ekidosona; gaammota doona gordidosona;
Hebrews11:34 tama wolqaa toysidosona; morketa mashshafe attidosona; banta daaburan minnidosona; olan wolqaama gididosona; allaga toora goodidosona.
Hebrews11:35 Maccasati banta hayqidaysata hayqope paxin ekidosona. Qassi harati aadhiya hayqope dendo ekanaw koyidi qashope biletanaysa ixidosona.
Hebrews11:36 Harati asan boretidi lisson garaafetidosona; harati santhalaatan qashetidi qasho keethan yegetidosona.
Hebrews11:37 Enti shuchan cadetidosona; magaazen nam7a keyidi phalqetidosona; paacetidosona; mashshan hayqidosona; entaw ubbabay dhayin metootidosona. Dorsa itenne deesha ite ma7idi yuuyidosona.
Hebrews11:38 Entaw ha alamey giigonna ixin mela biittan
Hebrews11:39 Xoossay enta ammanuwaba markatikoka
Hebrews11:40 Xoossay nuus lo77oba qopi wothida gisho enti nuuni bayna polo gidokona.
Hebrews12:1 Hiza
Hebrews12:2 Nu ammanuwas oge dooydaysanne nu wursetha poluwako nuna gathiya Yesuusa bolla nu ayfiya wothoos. Yesuusi wodepe de7iya ufaysaa gisho masqaliya waayiya danda7idi
Hebrews12:3 Hiza
Hebrews12:4 Nagarara de7iya baaxiyan buroo suuthu gussana gakanaw eqetibeketa.
Hebrews12:5 Xoossay ba qaalan
Hebrews12:6 Goday ba dosiya uraa seerees; qassi ba na7ada ekiya ubba garaafes” yaagees.
Hebrews12:7 Xoossay hintena ba naytada seeriya wode gencite; Aaway seeronna na7i oonee?
Hebrews12:8 Xoossay ba nayta ubbaa seerees; hinte seerettonna ixiko tuma iya nayta gidonashin balako nayta.
Hebrews12:9 Qassi nuna yelida nu aawati nuna seerosona; nuka entana bonchoos. Yaatin
Hebrews12:10 Hiza
Hebrews12:11 Nuuni seeretiya wode yiloyeesipe attishin
Hebrews12:12 Hiza
Hebrews12:13 Wobbey paxana melape attishin
Hebrews12:14 Asa ubbaara saro daanawunne geeshshatethan daanaw minnite; geeshshatethi bayna oonika Godaa be7anaw danda7enna.
Hebrews12:15 Hintefe oodeska Xoossaa aadho keehatethay paconnaada
Hebrews12:16 Hinte giddon laymatiya asi woyko issi toho miya kathas ba bayratetha toochidi bayzida Eesawe mela asi doonna mela naagetite.
Hebrews12:17 Guyepe Eesawey he anjuwa ekanaw koyida wode digetidaysa ereeta. I he anjuwa afuthan minnidi koykoka
Hebrews12:18 Hinte kushen boshetiya Siina deriyako
Hebrews12:19 moyze punuko woyko qaalay si7etiya bessaako yibeeketa. He qaala si7ida asay hara guzha qaala si7onna mela woossidosona.
Hebrews12:20 Ayis giiko
Hebrews12:21 He haniyabay daro daganthiyaba gidida gisho Museyka
Hebrews12:22 Shin hinte Xiyoone zumako
Hebrews12:23 Enta sunthay salon xaafetida woosa keethaa bayra naytako
Hebrews12:24 Ooratha caaquwas giddo gididi sigethiya Yesuusako
Hebrews12:25 Hintew odiya ura qaala ixas goonna mela naagetite. Kaseysati sa7an gididi odida kiita si7onna ixidi
Hebrews12:26 He wode iya qaalay sa7a qaathis. Shin ha77i taani
Hebrews12:27 “Issi toho zaarada” giya qaalay qaaxonnabay minnidi daanaysa
Hebrews12:28 Nuuni qaaxanaw danda7onna kawotethaa ekiya gisho Xoossaa galatoos; Xoossaa ufaysiya ogen bonchoninne yashshatethan iya goyinnoos.
Hebrews12:29 Hiza
Hebrews13:1 Ammaniya asada issoy issuwara polo siiqetite.
Hebrews13:2 Imathe mokeysa dogopite. Issi issi asati hessada oothishe eronna kiitanchota mokidosona.
Hebrews13:3 Qashon de7eyisata hinteka entara issife qashon de7iyada oothidi entana qopite. Waaye ekiya asaara issife hinteka waaye ekiyada oothidi entana qopite.
Hebrews13:4 Ekoynne geloy asa ubbaa matan bonchetidaba gido. Qassi Xoossay laymateysatanne laammeyisata pirdanaw de7iya gisho azinaynne machiya issoy issuwas ammanetanaw bessees.
Hebrews13:5 Miishe siiqope hintena naagite; hintew de7iyaban alite. Xoossay
Hebrews13:6 Hessa gisho
Hebrews13:7 Xoossaa qaala koyro hintew odida hintena kaaletheyisata qopite. Enti waanidi de7idaako enta duussaa be7idi enta ammanuwa kaallite.
Hebrews13:8 Yesuus Kiristoosi zineka hachika merinawuka laametenna.
Hebrews13:9 Dumma dumma ooratha timirten haraso bidi dhayopite; boopite. Nu wozanay Xoossaa aadho keehatethan minnanaw besseesipe attishin
Hebrews13:10 Shin dunkaaniya giddon oothiya kahineti he yarsho kathaafe maanaw entaw maati bayna yarsho bessay nuus de7ees.
Hebrews13:11 Kahine halaqay nagara yarshos mehe suuthi ekidi yarshanaw Ubbaafe Geeshsha Bessaa gelees. Shin he mehiya ashuwa dirsaafe karen xuuggees.
Hebrews13:12 Hessadaka
Hebrews13:13 Hiza
Hebrews13:14 Hiza
Hebrews13:15 Hiza
Hebrews13:16 Lo77oba oosonne hintew de7iyabaape metootida asaas imo dogopite. Hiza
Hebrews13:17 Hintena kaaletheysatas kiitetite; enti giyaba oothite. Enti banta oothiyabas Xoossaa sinthan oyshetanaw de7iya gisho
Hebrews13:18 Nuus Xoossaa woossite. Nu kahay geeshshi; nu ubba wode lo77oba oothanaw koyoos.
Hebrews13:19 Taani hinteko ellesada yaana mela hinte taw minthidi Xoossaa woossana mela ta hintena hadara gayis.
Hebrews13:20 Sarotethaa Xoossay
Hebrews13:21 iya sheniya oothana mela lo77oba ubban I hintena danciso. Iya ufaysiyabaa Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara nunan Xoossay ootho. Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaas merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoy gido. Amin7i.
Hebrews13:22 Ta ishato
Hebrews13:23 Nu ishay
Hebrews13:24 Hintena kaaletheysatanne ammaniya ubbaa saro giite. Xaalepe yida ammaniya asay hintena saro yaagosona.
Hebrews13:25 Xoossaa aadho keehatethay hinte ubbaara gido. Amin7i.
James1:1 Xoossaanne Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa aylley
James1:2 Ta ishato
James1:3 Hinte ammanuwa paacetethay danda7a hintew immeysa ereeta.
James1:4 Hinte wursethi gakanaw danda7iko aybi pacey bayna polonne kumethi gideta.
James1:5 Hintefe oodeska cincatethi dhayiko Xoossaa woosso. Iyaw imetana. Xoossay oonaka boronna ubbaas keehatethan immiya Xoosse.
James1:6 Shin I woossiya wode sidhonna ammanon Xoossaa woosso. Sidhiya oonika carkoy sugin qaaxiya abba zule mela.
James1:7 Nam7u qofi de7eynne ba ogiyan eqonna oonika Godaape aykoka demmana gidi qopofo.
James1:8 
James1:9 Ammaniya manqo asati
James1:10 Qassi ammaniya dure asati Xoossay entana ziqi oothiya wode ufayto. Dure asati ciishshada dhayana.
James1:11 Away ba mishaara keyidi maata melisin
James1:12 Metuwa xoonidi aadhidaape guye
James1:13 Oonika paacetiya wode
James1:14 Shin issi issi asi ba iita amuwan gooshetiya wodenne cimetiya wode paacetees.
James1:15 Hessafe guye
James1:16 Ta siiqo ishato
James1:17 Lo77o imoynne kumetha anjo ubbay salopenne saluwa poo7uwa medhida Xoossaa aawape yees. Xoossay kuyada ubba wode laametenna.
James1:18 Nuuni
James1:19 Ta siiqo ishato
James1:20 Asa hanqoy Xoossay koyiya xillotethaa ehenna.
James1:21 Hessa gisho
James1:22 Shin Xoossaa qaala ooson peeshshitepe attishin
James1:23 Qaala si7idi oothonna asi
James1:24 I ba som7uwa be7idi bees
James1:25 Shin oonika aylletethafe kessiya polo higgiya akeekan be7idi
James1:26 Ba inxarsaa naagonna ammanayis giya uray bana cimees; iya ammanoy hada.
James1:27 Xoossaa Aawa sinthan borey bayna geeshsha ammanoy haysa: aayiya aawu bayna naytanne am7eta maadonne alamiya tunaape bana naago.
James2:1 Ta ishato
James2:2 Leemisos
James2:3 Lo77o ma7o ma7ida addiya hinte aathidi bonchidi
James2:4 Yaatin
James2:5 Ta siiqo ishato
James2:6 Shin hinte manqota toocheta. Hintena un7etheysati dureta gidokonaayee? Hintena daynna sinthe goocheysati enta gidokonaayee?
James2:7 Hinte xeegetida lo77o Godaa sunthaa cayeysati enta gidokonaayee?
James2:8 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafan
James2:9 Shin hinte asa som7o xeellidi bonchiko
James2:10 Oonika higge ubbaafe issuwa menthidi
James2:11 “Laammofa” gida Goday
James2:12 Aylletethafe kessiya higgiya sinthan pirda ekanaw de7iya asada odetitenne oothite.
James2:13 Ase maaronna oonaka Xoossay maaronna pirdana. Shin maarotethay pirdaa xoonees.
James2:14 Ta ishato
James2:15 Leemisos issi ishay woyko issi michiya kallotikonne entaw miyabay dhayiko
James2:16 hintefe issi asi entako
James2:17 Hessa gisho
James2:18 Shin issi asi
James2:19 Neeni
James2:20 Neno eeyaw! Ammanoy oosope shaaketidi maaddonnaysa eranaw koyay?
James2:21 Nu aawa Abrahaamey
James2:22 Iya ammanoynne iya oosoy issife oothidaysa be7ikii? Iya ammanoy iya oosuwan poletis.
James2:23 Geeshsha Maxaafay
James2:24 Asi ammano xalaalan gidonashin
James2:25 Hessadaka
James2:26 Shempoy shaaketida asatethay hayqo gideysada
James3:1 Ta ishato
James3:2 Nu ubbay daroban baletoos. Ba odan baletonna oonika banatetha naaganaw danda7iya polo asi.
James3:3 Parati nuus kiitetana mela bixaala barsidi nuuni koyiya bessi ubbaa efoos.
James3:4 Markabey hessa mela gita gidishe wolqaama carkuwan sugetikoka
James3:5 Hessada inxarsi asatethaa giddon guutha gidikoka daro gitaban ceeqetees. Guutha tami daro gita wora xuuggees.
James3:6 Inxarsi tama mela. Inxarsi nu asatethaa giddon iitan kumida alame; asatethaa ubbaa tunisees. Gaannamepe keyiya tamada nu de7uwa wotha ubbaa xuuggees.
James3:7 Do7atanne kafota
James3:8 Shin oonika inxarsi haaranaw danda7ibeenna. Inxarsi wodhiya marzey kumida haaretonna iita medhetethi.
James3:9 Nu inxarsan
James3:10 Issi doonape galatinne baadethi keyees. Ta ishato
James3:11 Pultoy issi ollafe mal7iya haathinne cammiya haathi pultanaw danda7ii?
James3:12 Ta ishato
James3:13 Hinte giddon cincinne akeekanchoy oonee? Ba lo77o de7uwa
James3:14 Shin hinte wozanan cammiya qinaateynne bana dosoy de7iko ceeqetofite; tumaa bolla wordotopite.
James3:15 Hessa mela cincatethay salope yidaba gidonashin
James3:16 Qinaateynne bana dosoy de7iya son ooshshinne iita ooso ubbay de7oosona.
James3:17 Shin bollafe yaa cincatethay ubbaafe sinthe geeshshi. Qassi sarotethi
James3:18 Sarotethaa doseysati sarotethi zeridi xillotethi buucosona.
James4:1 Ooshshinne oli hinte giddo awupe yii? Enti yey hinte asatethaa haaranaw oletiya hinte asho amuwape gidenneyee?
James4:2 Hinte amotteeta
James4:3 Hinte woosseta
James4:4 Hinteno
James4:5 Geeshsha Maxaafay
James4:6 Shin Geeshsha Maxaafay
James4:7 Hessa gisho
James4:8 Xoossaako shiiqite; I hinteko shiiqana. Hinteno
James4:9 Kayotite
James4:10 Godaa sinthan hintenatethaa kawushite; hintena dhoqu dhoqu oothana.
James4:11 Ta ishato
James4:12 Higge immeynne pirdey Xoossaa xalaala. Ashshanawunne dhaysanaw danda7ey iya. Yaatin
James4:13 Hinte
James4:14 Wonto aybi hananeeko hinte ereketa. Hinte de7oy waananeko erey oonee? Hinte guutha wode bentidi dhayiya aka mela.
James4:15 Hessa aggidi
James4:16 Shin hinte ha77i otortetanne ceeqeteta. Hessa mela ceeqo ubbay iita.
James4:17 Hessa gisho
James5:1 Hinteno
James5:2 Hinte shaloy buuqis; hinte afilayka bilan meetetis.
James5:3 Hinte worqaynne hinte biray shi7is. He shi7ay hinte bolla marka gidana. I hinte asatethaa tamada maana. Hinte ha wurida qammatan hintew shalo dagayeeta.
James5:4 Hinte gaden oothi pee7ida asaa une miishiya qanxibeketa. Hessi hinte bolla waassees. He asata waasoy wolqaama Godaa haythan si7etis.
James5:5 Ha sa7an hinte ulo xalaalas qopidi
James5:6 Hintera eqetanaw danda7onna xillo asa bolla pirdideta iya wodhideta.
James5:7 Ta ishato
James5:8 He goshshanchuwada hinteka gencite. Godaa yuussay matatida gisho ufaysan naagite.
James5:9 Ta ishato
James5:10 Ta ishato
James5:11 Danda7an gencidaysata nuuni anjetidaysata goos. Iyyobi waanidi gencidaako hinte si7ideta. Goday wursethan iya waati maaddidaako be7ideta. I maarotinne qadhey kumida Godaa gidiya gisho hessa oothis.
James5:12 Shin ubbaafe sinthe
James5:13 Hinte giddon meto ekiya oonika de7iko Xoossaa woosso. Ufaytiya oonika de7iko galatan yexo.
James5:14 Hintefe hargetiya oonika de7iko woosa keetha cimata xeego. Enti Godaa sunthan shamaho zayte tiyidi iyaw Xoossaa woosso.
James5:15 Ammanon woossida woosay harganchuwa pathana. Goday iya
James5:16 Hessa gisho
James5:17 Eeliyaasi nu mela ase. Iri sa7an bukonna mela minthidi Xoossaa woossin heedzu laythinne usupun ageena sa7an iri bukibeenna.
James5:18 Zaaridi I Xoossaa woossin salope iri bukis; sa7ika kathi dolisees.
James5:19 Ta ishato
James5:20 nagaranchuwa iya bala ogiyape zaariya oonika
1Peter1:1 Taani
1Peter1:2 Yesuus Kiristoosas hinte kiitetana melanne iya suuthan geeyana mela
1Peter1:3 Yesuus Kiristoosa hayqope denthidi ba gita maarotethan nam7antho yeletethaanne dhayonna ufaysaa immida nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa Aaway
1Peter1:4 Qassi Xoossay hintew dhayonna
1Peter1:5 He laatay wode wursethan qoncanaw de7iya atotethas Xoossaa wolqan ammanon hintew naagetidi de7ees.
1Peter1:6 Ha77i guutha wodes hinte dumma dumma paacen un7etikoka hessan ufaytite.
1Peter1:7 He paacey hintena gakiday
1Peter1:8 Hinte Yesuusa be7ibeeketa
1Peter1:9 Hinte ammanon naagiya hinte shempuwa atotetha ekana.
1Peter1:10 Aadho keehatetha baggara hintew giigida ha atotethaaba nabeti eranaw gita koshshaninne naagon koydosona.
1Peter1:11 Entan de7iya Kiristoosa Ayyaanay iya waayabanne hessafe guye
1Peter1:12 Nabeti odida tinbitey bantaw gidonashin
1Peter1:13 Hessa gisho
1Peter1:14 Xoossaa naytada iyaw kiitetite; hinte kase eronna oothida iita amuwa kaallopite.
1Peter1:15 Shin hintena xeegida Xoossay geeshshi gididaysada hinteka hinte duussa ubban geeshshi gidite.
1Peter1:16 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Peter1:17 Asa som7o be7onna iya oosuwada pirdiya Xoossaa
1Peter1:18 Hinte
1Peter1:19 Borey woyko borsoy bayna dorsa suuthada al7o gidida Kiristoosa suuthan wozetideta.
1Peter1:20 Xoossay alamey medhetanaape kase Kiristoosa dooris
1Peter1:21 Hinte ammanoynne hinte ufaysay Xoossan gidana mela iya hayqope denthidi
1Peter1:22 Hinte tumatethaas kiitetidi hintenatethaa geeshshideta. Hinte issoy issuwa wozanape siiqeta
1Peter1:23 Hinte nam7antho yeletiday dhayiya zerethafe gidonashin
1Peter1:24 Xoossaa qaalay
1Peter1:25 Shin Godaa qaalay merinaw de7ees” yaagees. Hintew odetida Wongela qaalay haysa.
1Peter2:1 Hiza
1Peter2:2 Goday keeha gideysa hinte eridi meezetidaysada ha77i yeletida guutha naytada hinte atotethan diccishe baanaw Xoossaa geeshsha qaala maatha ubba wode amotite.
1Peter2:3 
1Peter2:4 Asan boretidi Xoossan dooretida al7o gidida de7o shuchaa
1Peter2:5 Hinte Ayyaana keethi keexetiya de7o shuchata. Hinte Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara Xoossaa ufaysiya ayyaana yarsho yarshiya geeshsha kahineta.
1Peter2:6 Geeshsha Maxaafan
1Peter2:7 Ha shuchay hintew ammaneysatas al7o
1Peter2:8 Qassika
1Peter2:9 Shin Xoossay dhumape malaalsiya ba poo7uwako hintena xeegiday
1Peter2:10 Hinte kase Xoossaa dere gideketa
1Peter2:11 Ta ishato
1Peter2:12 Ammanonna asay hintena iita oothiya asada zigirya wode Xoossay nuna be7anaw yaa gallas
1Peter2:13 Godaa gisho gidi maatara de7iya asatas haaretite; ubbaafe bolla gidiya gisho kawuwasika haaretite.
1Peter2:14 Enti iita ootheyisata seeranawunne lo77o ootheyisata sabbanaw kawuwape kiitetida gisho deriya ayseysatas haaretite.
1Peter2:15 Hinte
1Peter2:16 Xoossaa aylle gididi la77atethan de7itepe attishin
1Peter2:17 Asa ubbaa bonchite; ammaniya asaa siiqite; Xoossaa yayyite; kawo bonchite.
1Peter2:18 Aylleto lo77o godatasinne keeha godata xalaalas gidonashin
1Peter2:19 Asi Xoossaa gisho gidi bessonna waaye waayetiko Xoossay iya anjana.
1Peter2:20 Shin hinte nagara oothin hintena dechiya wode hinte danda7iko hintew ay galati de7ii? Shin lo77oba oothidi waaye danda7iko Xoossay hintena hessas anjana.
1Peter2:21 Xoossay hintena xeegiday hessa gishosa; Kiristoosi hintew waayetis; hinte iya kaallana mela
1Peter2:22 I nagara oothibeenna; iya doonan wordoy bentibeenna.
1Peter2:23 Enti iya cayiya wode
1Peter2:24 Nuuni nagaras hayqidi xillotethas daana mela Kiristoosi ba ashuwan nu nagaraa masqaliya bolla tookis; hinte iya madunthan paxideta.
1Peter2:25 Kase hinte oge balidi dhayida dorsata mela
1Peter3:1 Hessadaka
1Peter3:2 
1Peter3:3 Hinte
1Peter3:4 Shin hinte wozanaa giddon de7iya yegelsatethay Xoossaa sinthan hintew daro al7o gididi dhayonna
1Peter3:5 Xoossay immana gidaysa ammanida geeshsha maccasati beni wode banta azinatas haaretidi
1Peter3:6 Hessada Saara Abrahaame
1Peter3:7 Azinatoo
1Peter3:8 Wursethan
1Peter3:9 Iita gisho iita woyko cashsha gisho cayidi zaaropite; hessa aggidi
1Peter3:10 Ayis giiko
1Peter3:11 Iitabaa ootheysa aggidi lo77oba ootho; sarotethaaka keehi koyonne kaallo.
1Peter3:12 Godaa ayfey xillotako xeellees; qassi I ubba wode enta woosa hayzees. Shin Goday iitabaa ootheyisata ba hanqo som7uwan xeellees” yaagees.
1Peter3:13 Hinte lo77oba oothanaw amotiko hintena qohanay oonee?
1Peter3:14 Hari attoshin
1Peter3:15 Kiristoosa hinte wozanan bonchitenne godayite. Xoossay hintew immida ufaysas gaaso oychiya oodeska zaaro immanaw ubba wode giigidi uttite
1Peter3:16 Qassi Kiristoosan hinte de7iya lo77o de7uwa iitabaa oothidabaada
1Peter3:17 Xoossay gidaba gidiko iitabaa oothida gisho waaye ekeysafe lo77oba oothida gisho waaye ekeysi lo77o.
1Peter3:18 Kiristoosi nuna Xoossaako shiishanaw baw xillo gididi de7ishe
1Peter3:19 Qassi he ayyaanan I bidi qashon de7iya shempotas qaala odis.
1Peter3:20 Nohey markabiya keexiya wode he shempoti Xoossaas kiitetonna ixidosona
1Peter3:21 He dhayo haathay ha77i hintena ashshiya xinqate leemiso gidis. Ha xinqatey bolla qita meecco gidonashin
1Peter3:22 I salo bidi Xoossaa ushachan uttidi
1Peter4:1 Hessa gisho
1Peter4:2 He uray ba attida laythan Xoossaa shene oothanaw koyeesipe attishin
1Peter4:3 Kase hinte ammanonna asay de7idaysada de7ideta. Hinte iita amon
1Peter4:4 Ammanonna asaara hinte shori bayna oosuwa oothonna gisho malaaletidi hintena cayoosona.
1Peter4:5 Shin enti paxata bollanne hayqida asaa bolla pirdanaw de7iya Xoossaas zaaro immana.
1Peter4:6 Hayqida asaas Wongelay sabbaketiday haysa gishosa. Enti asatho banta ashuwan pirdetana qassi banta ayyaanan Xoossaatho de7on daana.
1Peter4:7 Hiza
1Peter4:8 Siiqoy daro nagara kammiya gisho
1Peter4:9 Zuuzumonna issoy issuwa imathatethan mokite.
1Peter4:10 Hinte Xoossaafe dumma dumma aadho keehatetha imota ekidaysada hinte issoy issoy he imuwa bessiyada oykidi issoy issuwa haggaazite.
1Peter4:11 Yesuus Kiristoosa baggara ubbaban Xoossay galatetana mela oonika odiyaba gidiko Xoossaafe qaala ekidaada odo. Qassi oonika maaddiyaba gidiko Xoossay iyaw immiya wolqaada maaddo. Bonchoynne wolqi merinaape merina gakanaw iyaw gido. Amin7i.
1Peter4:12 Ta ishato
1Peter4:13 Shin iya bonchoy qonciya wode hinte ufaysay gita gidana mela Kiristoosa waayiya hinte ekeysan ufaytite.
1Peter4:14 Kiristoosa sunthaa gisho asi hintena cayiya wode
1Peter4:15 Hintefe waaye ekiya oonika shempo wodhidaada woyko kaysotidaada woyko iita oothidaada woyko gelsonnaban gelidaada hanidi waayetofo.
1Peter4:16 Gidoshin
1Peter4:17 Pirdi Xoossaa asaa bolla doomiya wodey gakis. Hiza
1Peter4:18 Xilloy un7an attiyaba gidiko
1Peter4:19 Hessa gisho
1Peter5:1 Hiza
1Peter5:2 Hinte aawatethafe garsan de7iya Xoossaa wudiya heemmite. Xoossay koyeysada dosanaape attishin
1Peter5:3 Hinte aawatethafe garsan de7iya wudiyas leemiso giditepe attishin
1Peter5:4 Heemmeyisata halaqay qonciya wode qolettonna boncho kallacha hinte ekana.
1Peter5:5 Hessadaka
1Peter5:6 Xoossay ba wode hintena bonchana mela wolqaama Xoossaa kushiyape garsan hintena kawushite.
1Peter5:7 I hintew qopiya gisho hintena hirgisiya ubbaa iya bolla yeggite.
1Peter5:8 Hinte morkey Xalahey
1Peter5:9 Alamen de7iya hinte ishati hessada waaye ekeysa eridi
1Peter5:10 Ba merinaa bonchuwas Kiristoos Yesuusa baggara hintena xeegida aadho keehatetha ubbaa Xoossay
1Peter5:11 Merinaape merinaa gakanaw Xoossay kawoto. Amin7i.
1Peter5:12 Ammanetida ishaa gada ta ekiya Sillaase baggara ha dabdaabiya hintew qanthan xaafas. Ta hessa hintew xaafiday
1Peter5:13 Hintera issife dooretida Babiloonen de7iya woosa keetha asaynne ta na7aa Marqoosi hintena
1Peter5:14 Siiqo yeeretetha yeeretishe
2Peter1:1 Yesuus Kiristoosa hawaareynne iya aylley
2Peter1:2 Xoossaanne nu Godaa Yesuusa eron aadho keehatethaynne saroy hintew kumo.
2Peter1:3 Ba bonchoninne lo77otethan nuna xeegida iya eron de7osinne Xoossaa daanidi daanaw koshshiyaba ubbaa Xoossay ba wolqan nuus immis.
2Peter1:4 Hinte iita amo gaason medhetiya ha alamiyan de7iya dhayope kessi ekanaadanne Xoossaa xoossatethan shaaketanaada
2Peter1:5 Hessa gisho
2Peter1:6 eratetha bolla bana haaro
2Peter1:7 Xoossaa daano bolla ishatetha keehatethi
2Peter1:8 Haysati hintew daridi de7iyaba gidiko
2Peter1:9 Shin hessati bayna oonika matan de7iyaba xalaala be7iya qooqe. I ba kase nagaraape geeyidaysa dogis.
2Peter1:10 Hessa gisho
2Peter1:11 Hessan nu Godaanne nuna ashshiya Yesuus Kiristoosa merinaa kawotethaa geliya kumetha maatay hintew imetana.
2Peter1:12 Hessa gisho
2Peter1:13 Taani shempora de7ida wode ubban hintena hassayisanaysi koshshiyaba gada qopayis.
2Peter1:14 Nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosi taw qoncisadaysada taani ha hayqiya asatethaa gam7onna qaara yeggada baanaysa erayis.
2Peter1:15 Taani hintefe shaaketikoka hinte haysata ubba wode akeekana mela taw danda7etiyaba ubbaa oothana.
2Peter1:16 Nuuni Godaa Kiristoosa wolqaanne iya yuussaba hintew odey
2Peter1:17 Daro wolqaama bonchuwafe
2Peter1:18 Nuuni geeshsha zumaa bolla iyara de7iya wode he qaalay salope yishin si7ida.
2Peter1:19 Nuus hessafe aadhiya ammanetida tinbite qaali de7ees. Sa7i wontana gakanawunne bakali hinte wozanan dolana gakanaw
2Peter1:20 Ubbaafe kasetidi haysa erite. Geeshsha Maxaafan xaafetida tinbite qaala oonika ba dosidaada birshanaw danda7enna.
2Peter1:21 Tinbite ubbaa
2Peter2:1 Shin wordo nabeti kase asaa giddon de7eysa mela ha77ika wordo astamaareti hinte giddon dendana. Enti bantana wozida
2Peter2:2 Daro asay yeellayiya enta iita ogiya kaallana; enta gaason tuma ogey cayetana.
2Peter2:3 Wordo astamaareti miishe yaaridi bantaw medhi kessida haysen hintena bonqana. Benipe doomidi enta pirday giigidi uttis; enta dhayoyka entana naagidi uttis.
2Peter2:4 Nagara oothida kiitanchotas Xoossay qadhetonna
2Peter2:5 Hessadaka
2Peter2:6 Geellatas leemiso gidana mela Xoossay Soodomenne Gamoora katamata bido oothidi xuuggidi dhaysis.
2Peter2:7 Higges kiitetonna laymatiya asata giddon waayetishe de7ida xillo Looxe Xoossay ashshis.
2Peter2:8 He xillo addey enta giddon de7ishe
2Peter2:9 Hessa gidiko
2Peter2:10 Ubbaafe aathidi tuna amon asho qofa kaalleysatanne maata aawata kadheyisata
2Peter2:11 Shin kiitanchoti wordo astamaaretape wolqaninne minotethan daro aadhosonashin Godaa sinthan salo medhetethata cayokona.
2Peter2:12 Shin he asati banta eronnaban gelidi cayoosona. Enti oyketanawunne hayqanaw yeletida
2Peter2:13 Enti gathida metuwada zaari metootana. Seeta gallas yexishe gupeysa ufaysiyabaa gidi qopoosona. Enti kawushatanne tunata gidi de7ishe hintera shaaketiya siiqo imatuwan ufaytoosona.
2Peter2:14 Laymatiya maccasi xeellidi aggonna ayfey entaw de7ees; qassi nagara ootheysa aggokona. Ammanon minniboonna asaa cimmoosona. Entaw ubba wode amotiya wozani de7ees; enti baadetidaysata.
2Peter2:15 Enti suure oge aggidi
2Peter2:16 I ba nagara gaason hanqetis; dooni bayna harey asada haasayidi nabiya gooshshatethaa teqis.
2Peter2:17 He asati melida pultota melanne carkoy tookidi efiya shaara mela; enta naagey sakana dhumaa.
2Peter2:18 Enti hadanne otoro oda odetishe balan de7iya asaa giddofe kessi ekidi buroo minniboonna asata laymatetha asho amon cimmidi balethoosona.
2Peter2:19 Enti bantaw dhayo aylletethan de7ishe haratako
2Peter2:20 Enti ashshiya nu Godaa Yesuus Kiristoosa eridi ha alamiya tunatethaafe kessi ekidaape guye
2Peter2:21 Enti xillotetha ogiya eri simmidi aggeysafe koyrottidi geeshsha kiitta eronnaako entaw lo77oshin.
2Peter2:22 “Kani ba cooshshaako guye simmees” qassi
2Peter3:1 Ta siiqo ishato
2Peter3:2 Qassi geeshsha nabeti beni odida qaalanne nuna ashshiya Goday
2Peter3:3 Ubbaafe kasetidi
2Peter3:4 Enti
2Peter3:5 Daro wodepe kase saloy Xoossaa qaalan medhetidaysa; qassi sa7i haathafenne haathan medhetidaysa erishe kaddoosona.
2Peter3:6 He wode de7iya sa7ay haathan mitetidi dhayis.
2Peter3:7 Shin ha77i de7iya saloynne sa7i
2Peter3:8 Shin ta siiqo ishato
2Peter3:9 Issoti issoti gam7is gidi qopeysada
2Peter3:10 Shin Godaa gallasay kaysoda yaana. He gallasan saloti wolqaama guunthan dhayana; salo medhetethati taman xuugetana; sa7inne iya bolla de7iya ubbay dhayana.
2Peter3:11 Hiza
2Peter3:12 Hinte sinthara yaa Xoossaa gallasaa naagishe hintew danda7etiyaba ubbaa oothidi he gallasaa eesoyite. He gallas salotinne iyan de7iyabay taman xuugetana; wolqaama suulan til7ana.
2Peter3:13 Shin nuuni xillotethi haariya ooratha salonne ooratha sa7a Xoossaa ufaysa qaalada naagoos.
2Peter3:14 Hessa gisho
2Peter3:15 Asi ubbay attana mela koyidi Goday danda7eysa dogopite. Qassi nu siiqo ishay
2Peter3:16 I ba dabdaabeta ubban hessataba xaafis. Iya dabdaabeta giddon akeekanaw waaysiya qofati de7oosona. Tamaariboonnanne minniboonna asati hara Xoossaa qaala mirqeysada ha kiitataka dhayanaw machidi mirqoosona.
2Peter3:17 Hessa gisho
2Peter3:18 Shin hinte nuna ashshiya nu Godaa
1John1:1 Nuuni koyrope doomidi de7iya
1John1:2 He de7oy qoncin
1John1:3 Nuura hintew issifetethi daana mela nuuni be7idaysanne si7idaysa hintew odoos. Hintew nuura issifetethi de7iya gisho
1John1:4 Nu ufaysay polo gidana mela hessa hintew xaafoos.
1John1:5 Nuuni de7o gidida iyape si7idi
1John1:6 Nuus iyara issifetethi de7ees yaagishe dhuman de7iko
1John1:7 Shin poo7on I de7eysada
1John1:8 Nuuni
1John1:9 Shin Xoossaas nu nagara paaxiko
1John1:10 Nuuni nagara oothibooko giiko Xoossaa wordancho kessoos; iya qaalayka nunan deenna.
1John2:1 Ta nayto
1John2:2 Nu nagaray Kiristoosa baggara atto geetetees. I nu nagaraa xalaalas gidonashin
1John2:3 Nuuni Xoossaa kiitaa naagiko
1John2:4 Oonika
1John2:5 Shin iya qaalas nu kiitetiyaba gidiko he uray Xoossaa siiqiya siiqoy polo gidees. Nuuni Xoossan de7eysas hessi baw tuma marka.
1John2:6 Taani
1John2:7 Ta siiqo ishato
1John2:8 Gidikoka
1John2:9 “Poo7on de7ayis” gishe ba ishaa ixiya oonika
1John2:10 Ba ishaa dosiya oonika poo7on de7ees. He uran hara asi dhubiyabay baawa.
1John2:11 Shin ba ishaa ixiya oonika dhuman de7ees; dhuman hemetees. Dhumay iya ayfiya qooqisida gisho aw biyako erenna.
1John2:12 Ta nayto
1John2:13 Aawato
1John2:14 Guutha nayto
1John2:15 Alame woyko alamen de7iyaba dosopite. Alamiya dosiya oonika Xoossaa dosenna.
1John2:16 Alamen de7iya ubbabay
1John2:17 Alameynne alamen asi amotiya ubbay aadhana
1John2:18 Ta nayto
1John2:19 He morketi nu bagga gidonna gisho nu giddofe keyidosona. Enti nu bagga gidiyako nu giddon de7ana
1John2:20 Shin Kiristoosi hinte bolla Geeshsha Ayyaana gussis; qassi hinte ubbay tumaa ereeta.
1John2:21 Tumaa hinte eriya gishonne tuman ayba wordoy baynaysa hinte eriya gisho
1John2:22 Yesuusi
1John2:23 Na7aa kaddiya oodeska Aaway baawa; qassi Na7aas markatiya oodeska Aaway de7ees.
1John2:24 Hessa gisho
1John2:25 Na7ay nuus merinaa de7uwa immana gidi qaala gelis.
1John2:26 Hintena balethiya asaa gisho taani haysa hintew xaafas.
1John2:27 Shin Kiristoosi hinte bolla ba Geeshsha Ayyaana gussis. Geeshsha Ayyaanay hintenan de7iya gisho oonika hintena tamaarso koshshenna. Iya Geeshsha Ayyaanay hintena tumaa tamaarsesipe attishin
1John2:28 Hiza
1John2:29 Kiristoosi xillo gideysa hinte eriko xillo oothiya ubbay Xoossaa na7a gideysa erite.
1John3:1 Nuuni Xoossaa nayta geetetidi xeegetana mela Xoossay nuna ay mela dosidaako be7ite. Nuuni tumaka Xoossaa nayta. Ha alamey Xoossaa eronna gisho nunaka erenna.
1John3:2 Ta siiqo ishato
1John3:3 Kiristoosa be7ana gidi ufaysan naagiya oonika
1John3:4 Nagari higge mentho gidiya gisho nagara oothiya ubbay Xoossaa higge menthees.
1John3:5 Kiristoosi asaa nagara dhaysanaw qoncidaysa hinte ereeta; iyan nagari baawa.
1John3:6 Kiristoosan de7iya oonika nagaran deenna. Qassi nagaran de7iya oonika iya be7ibeenna woyko eribeenna.
1John3:7 Ta nayto
1John3:8 Xalahey koyrope nagara oothida gisho nagara ubba wode oothiya oonika Xalahe dabbo. Hessa gisho
1John3:9 Xoossaa na7a gidiya oonika Xoossaa Ayyaanay iyan de7iya gisho
1John3:10 Xoossaa nayta giddoninne Xalahe nayta giddon de7iya dummatethay hessan eretees; xillo oothonna asi woyko ba ishaa dosonna asi Xoossaa Na7a gidenna.
1John3:11 Koyrope hinte si7ida kiitay
1John3:12 Nuuni Qaayela mela gidanaw bessenna. Qaayela Xalahe dabbo gididi ba ishaa wodhis. I ba ishaa ayis wodhidee? Iya oosoy iita gidida gishonne iya ishaa oosoy lo77o gidida gisho wodhis.
1John3:13 Ta ishato
1John3:14 Nuuni nu ishata siiqiya gisho
1John3:15 Ba ishaa ixiya oonika shempo wodhees. Qassi shempo wodhiya oodeska merinaa de7oy baynaysa hinte ereeta.
1John3:16 Kiristoosi ba shempuwa nu gisho aathidi immidaysan siiqoy aybeko nuuni erida. Nuka nu ishata gisho nu shempuwa aathidi immanaw bessees.
1John3:17 Shin dure gidida oonika metootanchuwa be7ishe
1John3:18 Ta nayto
1John3:19 Nuuni issoy issuwa siiqiko
1John3:20 Nu wozanay nu bolla pirdiyaba gidiko
1John3:21 Ta siiqo ishato
1John3:22 Nuuni iya kiitaa naagiya gishonne iya ufaysiyabaa oothiya gisho woossiyaba ubbaa iyape ekoos.
1John3:23 Kiristoosi nuna kiittidaysada Xoossaa Na7aa Yesuus Kiristoosa sunthan ammananadanne issoy issuwa siiqanaada Xoossay nuna kiittis.
1John3:24 Xoossaa kiitaa naagiya oonika Xoossan de7ees; Xoossayka iyan de7ees. Xoossay nuus immida Geeshsha Ayyaana baggara I nunan de7eysa eroos.
1John4:1 Ta siiqo ishato
1John4:2 Xoossaa Ayyaana gideysa hinte haysan erana; “Yesuus Kiristoosi ase gididi yidaysa markatayis” giya ayyaana ubbay Xoossafe yees.
1John4:3 Kiristoosi ase gididi yidaysa ammanayis goonna ayyaana ubbay Xoossaafe gidenna. Hessi Kiristoosa ixiya ayyaana. Hinte he ayyaanay yaanaysa kase si7ideta; I hari attoshin ha77ika alamen de7ees.
1John4:4 Ta nayto
1John4:5 Enti ha alamiya ase gidiya gisho
1John4:6 Nuuni Xoossaafe yeletida; Xoossaa eriya oonika nuna si7ees. Xoossaa eronna oonika nuna si7enna. Nuuni tuma ayyaananne wordo ayyaana hessan shaakos.
1John4:7 Ta siiqo ishato
1John4:8 Xoossay siiqo gidiya gisho siiqonna oonika Xoossaa erenna.
1John4:9 Nuuni Kiristoosa baggara de7uwa demmana mela Xoossay ba issi Na7aa ha alamiya kiittis. Xoossay nuna ba siiquwa hessan bessis.
1John4:10 Tuma siiqo guussay haysa: nuuni Xoossaa siiqida gisho gidonashin
1John4:11 Ta siiqo ishato
1John4:12 Xoossaa be7iday oonika baawa. Nuuni issoy issuwa siiqiko Xoossay nunan de7ees; iya siiqoyka nunan polo gidees.
1John4:13 Xoossay ba Geeshsha Ayyaana nuus immida gisho
1John4:14 Aaway ba Na7aa
1John4:15 Yesuusi Xoossaa Na7aa gideysa markatiya oodenka Xoossay de7ees; ika Xoossan de7ees.
1John4:16 Xoossay nuna siiqeysa nuuni eroosinne ammanoos. Xoossay siiqo. Siiqon de7iya oonika Xoossan de7ees; Xoossayka iyan de7ees.
1John4:17 Nu de7oy ha alamiyan Kiristoosi de7idaysa mela gidiya gisho
1John4:18 Siiqon yashshi baawa
1John4:19 Xoossay koyro nuna siiqida gisho nu siiqoos.
1John4:20 Oonika
1John4:21 Kiristoosi nuus immida kiitay haysa; “Xoossaa siiqiya oonika ba ishaa siiqanaw bessees” yaageysa.
1John5:1 Yesuusa
1John5:2 Nuuni Xoossaa siiqiya gishonne iya kiitaa naagiya gisho Xoossaa nayta siiqeysa eroos.
1John5:3 Nuuni Xoossaa siiqiko
1John5:4 Ayis giiko
1John5:5 Alamiya xoonanaw danda7ey oonee? Yesuusi Xoossaa Na7aa gideysa ammaniya asa xalaali xoonana.
1John5:6 Yesuus Kiristoosi haatha xinqatiyaranne ba hayquwan gusida suuthara yis. I
1John5:7 Heedzu markati de7oosona.
1John5:8 Hessati
1John5:9 Nu asay markateysa ammanoos. Shin Xoossaa markatethay asaysafe daro aadhees. Xoossay ba Na7aas markatida markatethay haysa.
1John5:10 Xoossaa Na7aa ammaniya uraa wozanan ha markatethay de7ees. Xoossaa ammanonna oonika Xoossay ba Na7aas markatida markatethaa ammanibona gisho
1John5:11 Hiza
1John5:12 Xoossaa Na7ay de7iya oodeska de7oy de7ees. Xoossaa Na7ay bayna oodeska de7oy baawa.
1John5:13 Xoossaa Na7an ammaniya hintew merinaa de7oy de7eysa hinte erana mela haysa hintew xaafas.
1John5:14 Xoossaa sheniyada aybibaaka iya woossiko
1John5:15 Nuuni woossiya ubbaa I si7eysa eriko
1John5:16 Oonika ba ishay hayqo bessonna nagara oothishin be7iko
1John5:17 Iita ooso ubbay nagara
1John5:18 Xoossaa Na7ay iya naagiya gisho
1John5:19 Nuuni Xoossasa gideysanne ha kumetha alamey Xalahen haareteysa eroos.
1John5:20 Nuuni tuma Xoossaa eranaada Xoossaa Na7ay yidaysanne nuus akeeka immidaysa eroos. Nuuni iya na7a
1John5:21 Ta nayto
2John1:1 Ta cimay dooretida godatesinne I naytas kiitida kiita. Ta xalaala gidonashin
2John1:2 Ha tumay nunan de7iya gishonne merinaw nuura daana gisho taani hintena tuma dosayis.
2John1:3 Xoossaa nu Aawanne iya Na7aa Yesuus Kiristoosa aadho keehatethay
2John1:4 Aaway nuna kiittidaysada
2John1:5 Godate
2John1:6 Tuma siiqoy nuuni Xoossaa kiitaa naagidi daanaysa. Qassi koyrope hinte si7idaysada iya kiitay
2John1:7 Yesuus Kiristoosi ase gididi yidaysa ammanonna
2John1:8 Hinte oothida kumetha woytuwa ekanaw minnite. Hinte oothidaysi dhayonna mela naagetite.
2John1:9 Kiristoosa timirtiyan doonnaysasinne iyape haakiya uraas Xoossay baawa. Kiristoosa timirtiyan de7iya uraas Aawaynne Na7ay de7oosona.
2John1:10 Oonika hinteko yishe ha timirtiya ehonna ixiko
2John1:11 Iya saro giya oonika iya iita oosuwan iyara shaaketees.
2John1:12 Taani hintew xaafanaw koyida darobay de7ees
2John1:13 Xoossay doorida ne miche nayti nena saro yaagosona.
3John1:1 Taani cimay
3John1:2 Ta siiquwaw
3John1:3 Guutha ammaniya asati yidi
3John1:4 Ta nayti tumatethan de7eysa si7eysafe aadhidi
3John1:5 Ta siiquwaw
3John1:6 Enti ne siiquwaba woosa keethan markatoosona. Ha77ika enti biya ogiyan Xoossay doseysada oothada enta maaddiko lo77o oothaasa.
3John1:7 Enti Kiristoosa sunthaa gisho keyishe
3John1:8 Nuuni tuma oosuwa entara issife oothanaw haysa mela asata maaddanaw bessees.
3John1:9 Taani woosa keethatas dabdaabe xaafas
3John1:10 Hessa gisho
3John1:11 Ta siiquwaw
3John1:12 Dimexroosi lo77o asi gideysa asa ubbay markatees. Tumay ba huuphen iyabaa markatees; nuka iyabaa markatoos; nu markatethay tuma gideysa hinte ereeta.
3John1:13 Taani new xaafanaw koyida darobay de7ees
3John1:14 Shin taani matara neera gahetanaw qopayis; he wode nuuni odetana.
3John1:15 Saroy new gido. Ne dabboti nena saro yaagosona. Nu dabbota ubbaa enta sunthaa sunthaa xeegada tana “Saro gis” yaaga.

Jude1:7 Hessada
Jude1:8 Hessadaka
Jude1:9 Shin kiitanchota halaqay Mika7eeli Muse ahaas Xalahera palamida wode
Jude1:10 Shin ha asati bantaw eronnabaa ubbaa cayoosona; qassi enti wozani bayna meheda medhon eriya eray
Jude1:11 Entana ayye! Enti Qaayela ogiyan bidosona. Miishe koyidi Balaama balan kundidosona. Qore geetetiya addey Xoossaa bolla dendidaysada enti Xoossaa bolla dendidi dhayidosona.
Jude1:12 Ha asati
Jude1:13 Enti hanqetida abba zuliya mela banta pokuwa goponteyisata. Enti merinaw sakana dhumay naagiya toylatiya xoolintota.
Jude1:14 Addaamepe doomidi
Jude1:15 Asa ubbaa pirdana; geellata ubbaa enti oothida iita ooso ubbaa gishonne makallatethan enti Xoossaa bolla odetida iita odaa ubbaa gisho pirdana” yaagis.
Jude1:16 He asati ubba wode zuuzumeysatanne oda koyeyisata. Qassi banta iita amuwa kaalloosona; bantanan ceeqosonanne bantana go77iyabaa demmanaw harata sabboosona.

Jude1:18 Enti

Jude1:20 Shin ta ishato

Jude1:22 Sidhey de7iya asaas qadhetite.
Jude1:23 Issi issi asata tamape kessi ekite. Qassi iita amon tunida enta ma7uwa ixishe haratas yashshan qadhetite.

Revelation1:1 Eeson hananaw de7iyaba ba aylleta bessaana mela Xoossay iyaw immida Yesuus Kiristoosa qoncethay haysa. Yesuusi ba kiitanchuwa kiittidi
Revelation1:2 Yohaanisi Xoossaa kiitaa
Revelation1:3 Ha ubbay hananaw wodey matida gisho
Revelation1:4 Ha dabdaabey
Revelation1:5 
Revelation1:6 Nuuni Xoossaa iya Aawas oothana mela nuna kawotethaa kahine oothis. Iyaw merinaape merinaa gakanaw bonchoynne wolqay gido. Amin7i.

Revelation1:8 “Kaseka
Revelation1:9 Taani
Revelation1:10 Godaa gallasan ta Geeshsha Ayyaanan haaretada de7ayis; taape guyera moyze puno mela gita girsi si7as.
Revelation1:11 He girsay tana
Revelation1:12 Taani taw odiya girsaa be7anaw guye simmada xompe wothiya laapun worqa kocata be7as.
Revelation1:13 He kocata giddon asa na7a daaneysa be7as. I adussa afila ba tohuwa gathi ma7is
Revelation1:14 Iya huupheynne iya binaanay bootha dorsa ikise mela woyko shacha mela boothi; iya ayfey tama laco daanees.
Revelation1:15 Iya tohoy taman seeridi zo77ida naase birata daanees; iya girsayka gita shaafa kooshincha mela.
Revelation1:16 I ba ushacha kushen laapun xoolintota oykis. Iya doonape nam7u baggara qaratida mashshay keyees. Iya som7oy seeta gallasa awa ayfe daanees.
Revelation1:17 Taani iya be7ida wode hayqida asada hanada iya tohuwa matan kundas. I ba ushacha kushiya ta bolla wothidi
Revelation1:18 Taani de7on de7ayis; taani hayqas
Revelation1:19 Hiza

Revelation2:1 “Efesoona woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Ba ushacha kushen laapun xoolintota oykidaysinne laapun worqa kocata giddora hemeteysi haysada yaagees:
Revelation2:2 Taani ne oosuwa
Revelation2:3 Neeni gencadasa; ta sunthaa gisho meto danda7adasa; xoonetabaaka.
Revelation2:4 Gidoshin
Revelation2:5 Hiza
Revelation2:6 Ha77i ta nena nashshiya issibay de7ees; ta ixiya Niqolaweeta oosuwa neka ixadasa.
Revelation2:7 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7anaw haythi de7iya oonika si7o. Xooniya oonika Xoossaa gannatiyan de7iya de7o mithee ayfepe maana mela maata immana.”
Revelation2:8 Samirneesa woosa keethaa kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. “Koyroynne wursethay
Revelation2:9 Taani ne waayanne ne manqotetha erayis; gidoshin neeni dure. Ayhude gidonashin bantana Ayhude geysati cayiya cashshaa ta erayis
Revelation2:10 Neeni ekanaw de7iya waayiya babofa. Xalahey hintefe issota issota paacanaw qasho keethan yeggana; tammu gallas gakanaw hinte waayetana. Hayqana gakanaw ammanetidaysa gida; ta new de7o kallacha immana.”
Revelation2:11 “Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7anaw haythi de7iya oonika si7o. Xooniya oonika nam7antho hayquwan qohetenna.”
Revelation2:12 “Phargamoona woosa keethaa kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Nam7u baggara qaratida mashshay de7eysi haysada yaagees:
Revelation2:13 Taani ne de7iya bessaa erayis; neeni Xalahe araatay de7iya bessan de7aasa; ta sunthaa mintha naagadasa. Hari attoshin
Revelation2:14 Gidoshin
Revelation2:15 Hessadaka
Revelation2:16 Hessa gisho

Revelation2:19 Taani ne oosuwa
Revelation2:20 Gidoshin

Revelation3:1 “Sardeesa woosa keetha kiitanchuwas haysada yaagada xaafa. Laapun Xoossaa ayyaanatanne laapun xoolintota oykidaysi haysada yaagees: Taani ne oosuwa erayis; asi nena paxa de7ees giikoka
Revelation3:2 Barka; attida guuthabanne hayqanaw matidaba mintha. Ne oosoy Xoossaa sinthan polo gidonnaysa demmas.
Revelation3:3 Hiza
Revelation3:4 Shin banta ma7uwa qitayonna guutha asati Sardeesan de7oosona. Entaw bessiyaba gidiya gisho bootha ma7o ma7idi enti taara hemetana.
Revelation3:5 Xooniya oonika entaysada bootha ma7o ma7ana. Taani iya sunthaa de7o maxaafape quchike. Taani ta Aawa sinthaninne iya kiitanchota sinthan I tabaa gideysa markatana.
Revelation3:6 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o.

Revelation3:8 Taani ne oosuwa eras; Heko ta ne sinthan oonika gordanaw danda7onna dooya penge wothas. Ne wolqay guutha gidikoka
Revelation3:9 Ayhude gidonashin
Revelation3:10 Neeni
Revelation3:11 Taani ellesada yaana; oonika ne kallachaa ekonna mela new de7iyaba minthada oyka.
Revelation3:12 Xoonidaysa ta xoossa keethan tuussu oothana; I yan merinaw daana. Taani ta Xoossaa sunthaanne ta Xoossaa katamaa sunthaa iya bolla xaafana; iyaka ta Xoossaa matape wodhiya ooratha Yerusalaame. Qassi taani ta ooratha sunthaaka I bolla xaafana.
Revelation3:13 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7iya oonika si7o.

Revelation3:22 Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa keethatas giyaba si7iya haythi de7ey oonika si7o” yaagis.

Revelation9:2 Xoolintoy ollaa dooyida wode dalga coocepe keyiya cuyaa mela cuyay he ollaafe keyis. He ollaafe keyida cuyan awinne saloy dhumidosona.
Revelation9:3 He cuyape booley keyidi sa7an wodhis. Sa7an de7iya kornetas de7iya wolqaa mela wolqay booletas imetis.
Revelation9:4 Xoossaa maatamey som7on bayna asaa xalaalape attishin

Revelation9:7 Booley olas giigidi uttida para daanees. Booliya huuphen worqa kallachi de7ees; enta som7oyka asa som7o daanees.
Revelation9:8 Iya binaanay maccasa binaana mela adusse. Enta achayka gaammo achi daanees.
Revelation9:9 Entaw tira bolla wothiya birata xururey de7ees; enta qefiya girsay oletanaw gaallabiya paranne para gaariya girsaa mela.
Revelation9:10 Entaw korne goyna daaniya goyninne dukiya yiishshi de7ees. He goynan ichashu ageena asaa qohana mela maati imetis.
Revelation9:11 Entana haariya kawoy de7ees; he kawoy olla kiitanchuwa. Iya sunthay Ibraawetho doonan Abdoona; qassi Girike doonan Apholiyoona geetetees. Iya sunthaa birshethay “Dhayseysa” guussu.

Revelation12:2 He maccasiya qanthe; shin iyo iqethi oykin un7etada waassasu.
Revelation12:3 Qassi hara malaati salon bentis. Laapun huuphetinne tammu kaceti de7iya gita zo7o dawey bentis. I ba huupheta bolla laapun kallacha wothis.
Revelation12:4 He dawey ba goynan xoolintotape sikuwa salope dafidi sa7an yeggis. He dawey na7ay yeleti wodhida mela mittanaw koyidi
Revelation12:5 He maccasiya kawotethaa ubbaa birata xam7an haaranaw de7iya adde na7a yelasu. Na7ay Xoossaakonne iya araatako pude eketis.

Revelation12:14 Maccasiw shooshay qohonna mela heedzu laythinne bagga mashenne uyashe iya naagetiya bessi mela biitta piradhada baana mela nam7u wolqaama argantha qefey iw imetis.

Revelation21:12 He katamaa dirsay wolqaamanne adusse. Iyaw tammanne nam7u pengetinne he pengeta naagiya tammanne nam7u kiitanchoti de7oosona. Pengeta bolla tammanne nam7u Isra7eele zerethata sunthay xaafetis.
Revelation21:13 Doloha baggara heedzu pengeti

Revelation21:17 Kiitanchoy qassi dirsaa wadhin
Revelation21:18 Katamaa dirsay yasphide geetetiya shuchan diretis. Katamay mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqan oosetis.
Revelation21:19 Katamaa dirsaa baasoy ubba qommo bonchetida shuchan alleeqetis. Koyro hiixetida shuchay yasphide
Revelation21:20 ichashanthoy sardonkisa
Revelation21:21 Tammanne nam7u pengetas tammanne nam7u al7o shuchi de7ees. Issi issi pengey issi al7o shuchan oosetis. Katamaa wogga ogey mastooteda phooliya walahi bayna worqafe oosetis.

Revelation22:2 He shaafay katama ogiya giddora duge goggees. Shaafape hefintha baggaranne hafintha baggara ageenan issi toho; laythan tammanne nam7u toho ayfiya de7o mithi de7ees. He mitha boncoy kawotethata ubbaa hargefe pathees.
Revelation22:3 He kataman aybi baadethika deenna. Xoossaa kawotetha araataynne Dorsaa kawotetha araatay he kataman daana. Xoossaa aylleti Xoossaas oothana.
